Genesis1:1 A tîra Pathianin lei leh vân a siam khân 
Genesis1:2 khawvêl chuan mu leh mal a la nei lo va, tuithûkpui chung pawh a thim mup a, Pathian Thlarau chuan tui chung chu a vil reng a." 
Genesis1:3 Pathian chuan, “Êng lo awm rawh se,” a ti a, êng a lo awm ta mai a." 
Genesis1:4 Pathianin êng a hmuh chuan ṭha a ti hle a, êng leh thim chu a ṭhen hrang a." 
Genesis1:5 Pathianin êng chu ‘chhûn’ a vuah a, thim chu ‘zân’ a vuah a. Tlai a lo ni a, zîng a lo ni leh a: a ni khatna chu." 
Genesis1:6 Pathian chuan, “Tui leh tui ṭhen tûrin boruak zau tak vân kumkulh awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis1:7 Pathian chuan vân kumkulh chu a siam a, kumkulh chunga tui awm leh a hnuaia tui chu a ṭhen ta a; chutiang chu a ni ta mai a." 
Genesis1:8 Pathianin kumkulh chu ‘vân’ a vuah a, tlai a lo ni a, zîng a lo ni leh a: a ni hnihna chu." 
Genesis1:9 Pathian chuan, “Vân hnuaia tui chu hmun khatah tling khâwm sela, khawmual lo lang rawh se,” a ti a. Chutiang chu a ni ta mai a." 
Genesis1:10 Pathianin khawmual chu ‘lei’ a vuah a, tui tling khâwm chu ‘tuifinriat’ a vuah a. Pathianin a han en a, ṭha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:11 Pathian chuan, “Leiah thlai, a fang neia rah chi tinrêng te, thei, a mu neia rah chi hrang hrang ṭo ṭeuh rawh se,” a ti a. Chutiang chu a ni ta mai a." 
Genesis1:12 Lei aṭang chuan thlai tinrêng, fang neia rah chi tinrêng te, thei, mu neia rah hrang hrang te a lo ṭo ta a." 
Genesis1:13 Pathianin a han en chian chuan ṭha a ti hle a. Tlai a lo ni a, zîng a lo ni leh a: a ni thumna chu." 
Genesis1:14 Pathian chuan, “Chhûn leh zân awmtîr tûrin vân kumkulhah êntute awm teh se, chûng chu hun bi, ni te leh kum chhiar nân te ni sela," 
Genesis1:15 lei tiêng tûrin êntute chu vân kumkulhah chuan awm rawh se,” a ti a. Chutiang chu a ni ta mai a." 
Genesis1:16 Pathian chuan êntu lian pui pahnih leh arsite a siam a; êntu lian zâwk chu chhûna êng tûrin a ti a, a tê zâwk chu zâna êng tûrin." 
Genesis1:17 Lei ên tûr chuan Pathianin vân kumkulhah chuan êntute chu a dah a," 
Genesis1:18 thim leh êng ṭhena, chhûna êng tûr leh zâna êng tûrin. Pathian chuan a han en a, ṭha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:19 Tlai a lo ni a, zîng a lo ni leh a: a ni lina chu." 
Genesis1:20 Pathian chuan, “Tuiah nungcha awm noh noh sela, vân kumkulh hnuaia lei chungah sava thlâwk sup sup bawk rawh se,” a ti a. Chutiang chu a ni ta mai a." 
Genesis1:21 Pathian chuan tuifinriata sa hlauhawm pui pui te, a ruala lêng dûl dûl tinrêng te leh sava thla nei chi hrang hrangte chu a siam a. Pathianin a han en a, ṭha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:22 Pathian chuan mal a sâwm a, “Inthlah pung zêl ula, pung duah duah rawh u, tuifinriatah khat ula; leia savate pawh pung chiam rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis1:23 Tlai a lo ni a, zîng a lo ni leh a: a ni ngana chu." 
Genesis1:24 “Leian thil nung tinrêng, ran te, ramsa te, leia vâk chi te lo awm noh noh rawh se,” a ti a. Chutiang chu a ni ta mai a." 
Genesis1:25 Pathian chuan ramsa te, ran te leh leia vâk chi te, thil nung tinrêng te chu a siam a. Pathianin a han en chuan ṭha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:26 Tin, Pathian chuan, “Keimahni ang, kan anpuiin mihring siam ila, tuifinriata sangha te, chunglêng sava te, ran te, ramsa te leh leia vâk chi zawng zawng chungah te thu nei teh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis1:27 Pathian chuan amah angin mihring, mipa leh hmeichhia a siam a, Pathian anpui ngeiin a siam a ni." 
Genesis1:28 Pathian chuan anni chu mal a sâwm a, an hnênah, “Fanau neiin lo pung deuh deuh rawh u; lei hi luah khat ula, nei vek rawh u; tuifinriata sangha te, chunglêng sava te leh leia thil nung awm zawng zawng chungah thu nei bawk rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis1:29 Pathian chuan heti hian a ti bawk: “Ngai teh u, in ei atân leia thlai, a fanga rah te; thei, a mu neia rah te ka pe a che u;" 
Genesis1:30 leia ran zawng zawng te, chunglêng sava te leh nungcha lei chunga vâk chi te ei atân hnimhring ka pe bawk a ni,” tiin. Chutiang chu a ni ta mai a." 
Genesis1:31 Pathian chuan a thilsiam zawng zawng chu a hmuhin ṭha a ti êm êm a. Tlai a lo ni a, zîng a lo ni leh a: a ni rukna chu." 
Genesis2:1 Lei leh vân leh thil engkim siam chu zawh a ni ta a. 
Genesis2:2 A ni sarihna ni-ah Pathianin a thilsiam hna chu a zawh fel tâk avângin a ni sarih ni chuan a châwl ta a. 
Genesis2:3 A thilsiam hna zawng zawng a tih zawha a chawlhsan tâk avângin Pathian chuan a ni sarih ni chu mal a sâwm a, a serh ta a." 
Genesis2:4 Chu chu lei leh vân siam dân chanchin chu a ni. 
Genesis2:5 Lalpa Pathianin lei leh vân a siam lai khân thlai rêng rêng leiah a la ṭo lo va, hnim pawh a la chawr hek lo; Pathianin ruah a sûrtîr rih lo va, lo neitu tûr mihring pawh an la awm lo." 
Genesis2:6 Lei aṭangin tuihu a lo chhuak a, chu chuan lei chu a tihnâwng ṭhîn a ni." 
Genesis2:7 Lalpa Pathian chuan lei vaivutin mihring a siam a, a hnârah chuan nunna thaw a thaw lût a, mihring chu mi nung a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis2:8 Lalpa Pathian chuan khawchhak ram, Eden-ah huan a siam a; tah chuan a mihring siam chu a dah a." 
Genesis2:9 Lalpa Pathian chuan thing mawi tak tak leh rah tui tak huanah chuan a ṭotîr a, huan lai takah chuan nunna thing leh a chhia a ṭha thleina thing a ṭotîr bawk a." 
Genesis2:10 Huan tihnâwng tûr chuan lui pakhat a luang tlang a, huan pâwnah chuan pêng liin a pêng darh a." 
Genesis2:11 Pêng khat hming chu Pison a ni a, rangkachak tamna Havila ramah a luang a." 
Genesis2:12 Chu rama rangkachak chu a ṭha bîk a, lungmantam Bidela leh Soham pawh a awm." 
Genesis2:13 Lui pakhat hming chu Gihon a ni a, Kus ramah a luang tlang a." 
Genesis2:14 Lui pathumna chu Hidekal a ni a, Asuria chhak lamah a luang a. A palina chu Eufretis lui hi a ni." 
Genesis2:15 Lalpa Pathian chuan mihring chu a hruai a, huan enkawla vêng tûrin huanah chuan a dah a." 
Genesis2:16 Lalpa Pathian chuan mihring chu a hrilh a, “Huana thing rah hi i duh duh i ei thei ang." 
Genesis2:17 A chhia a ṭha thleina thei erawh hi chu ei tûr a ni lo, i ei phawt chuan i ei niin i thi ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis2:18 Lalpa Pathian chuan, “Mihring, amah maia a awm hi a ṭha lo ve, ṭanpuitu tûr, a kawppui âwm tak ka siamsak teh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis2:19 Lalpa Pathian chuan leiin ramsa tinrêng leh chunglêng sava tinrêng a han siam a. Mihring chuan engtin nge a lo koh dâwn hriat nân a hnênah a rawn hruai zêl a; mihringin a lo koh dân ang zêl chu thil nung tinrêng chuan hmingah an pu ta a. 
Genesis2:20 Mihring chuan ran te, chunglêng sava te leh ramsa tinrêng te chu hming a neihtîr a; mahse, mihring chuan amah ṭanpuitu tûr, kawppui âwm a hmu lo." 
Genesis2:21 Lalpa Pathian chuan mihring chu tui takin a muttîr a, a muthilh hlân chuan a nâkruh pakhat a lâksak a, tisain a tiping leh a." 
Genesis2:22 Mipa nâkruh a lâk aṭang chuan Lalpa Pathian chuan hmeichhia a siam a, mipa hnênah chuan a rawn hruai ve a." 
Genesis2:23 Ani chuan, “Hei zet zawng, ka ruh ang ruh nei, ka tisa ang tisa pu zu nia le! Mipa aṭanga lâk chhuah a nih avângin ‘hmeichhia’ tih tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis2:24 Hei vâng hian mipain a nu leh a pa a thlah a, a nupui a vuan a, tisa pumkhat an lo ni ta a ni." 
Genesis2:25 Mipa leh hmeichhia chu saruakin an awm a; mahse, an zak lêm lo." 
Genesis3:1 Lalpa Pathian siam ramsa zîngah rûl hi a fing vervêk ber a, hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “Huana thei rah rêng rêng hi Pathianin in ei a khap che u elo maw?” a ti a." 
Genesis3:2 Hmeichhia chuan rûl hnênah, “Huana thei rahte hi kan ei thei asin." 
Genesis3:3 Huan laia awm thing rah hi erawh chu Pathian chuan, ‘Ei suh u, tawh pawh tawk suh u, in thi mai ang,’ min ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:4 Rûl chuan hmeichhe hnênah, “Thi teh suh e!" 
Genesis3:5 In ei veleh in mit a lo vâr ang a, Pathian angin a chhia a ṭha in thlei ve tawh dâwn tih Pathian chuan a hria atin alâwm,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:6 Hmeichhia chuan thei tuihnai, tui âwm tak, fin theihna tûra thei îtawm tak a ni tih a hmuh chuan a lo va, a ei ta a; a ṭhen chu a pasal a pe ve a, ani pawh chuan a ei ta a." 
Genesis3:7 An pahnih chuan an mit a lo vâr a, saruak an nih an hrechhuak ta a; tichuan, theipui hnah an chilh khâwm a, fên tûr an insiam a." 
Genesis3:8 Tlai ni nêm chuan huana Lalpa lo lêng thâwm chu an hria a, mipa leh a nupui chuan thing zîngah Pathian chu an bihrûksan ta a." 
Genesis3:9 Lalpa Pathian chuan mihring chu a ko va, a hnênah, “Khawiah nge i awm tâk?” a ti a." 
Genesis3:10 “Huana i thâwm ka hria a, saruak ka nih avângin ka hlau che a, ka biru a ni,” tiin a chhâng a." 
Genesis3:11 “Saruak i nih tu nge hrilh che? Ei loh tûr ka tih thei kha i lo ei a ni maw?” a ti a. 
Genesis3:12 Mipa chuan, “Mi awmpui tûra i tih hmeichhia khân thei rah chu mi pe a, ka ei ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:13 Lalpa Pathian chuan hmeichhe hnênah, “Engtiziaa hetiang thil hi ti nge i nih?” a ti a. Hmeichhia chuan, “Rûlin min tihder a, ka ei ta mai a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:14 Lalpa Pathian chuan rûl hnênah, “He thil hi i tih tâk avângin ran zawng zawng leh ramsa tinrêng dawn aia nasa zâwk ânchhia i dawng dâwn a ni; leiah i tleng ang a, i dam chhûng zawng chu vaivut i ei ṭhîn ang." 
Genesis3:15 “Nang leh hmeichhia hi ka inhmêlmâktîr ang che u a, i thlahte leh a thlahte pawh an inhmêlmâk zêl ang. I luruh a vaw keh ang a, nangin a keartui i chuk ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:16 Hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “I nau vei na ka tizual ang a, na ti takin fa i hring dâwn a ni; mahse, i thlâkhlelh chu i pasal a ni ang a, ani chuan i chungah thu a nei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:17 Adama hnênah chuan, ‘I nupui thu i zâwm a, ei loh tûr ka tih thei kha i ei a, i tân lei hi ânchhia ka lawh ta. I dam chhûng zawng hah takin ei tûr i thawk chhuak ang." 
Genesis3:18 Hnimhlîngnei te, hlohar te a ṭo vang a, chuta thlai chu i ei ang." 
Genesis3:19 I lo pian chhuahna leia i kîr leh hma chu thlansaphûlkaiin ei i zawng ang. Vaivut i ni a, vaivutah bawk i kîr leh tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:20 Mipa chuan a nupui chu mi zawng zawng nu a nih avângin a hmingah Evi a sa a. 
Genesis3:21 Lalpa Pathian chuan mipa leh a nupui tân savun puan a siam a, a sintîr a." 
Genesis3:22 Lalpa Pathian chuan, “Mihring chuan keimahni angin a chhia a ṭha a thlei ve ta si a, nunna thing rah chu lovin a ei ang a, a nung reng thei mai ang a!” a ti a." 
Genesis3:23 Tichuan, Lalpa, Pathian chuan a pian chhuahna ram chu lova nei tûrin Eden huan aṭang chuan a hnawt chhuak ta a." 
Genesis3:24 Mihring a hnawh chhuah hnu chuan Eden huan chhak lamah cherub-te leh khandaih vir tawn, huan vêng tûr chuan a dah a." 
Genesis4:1 Adama chuan a nupui Evi chu a pâwl a, nau a pai a; Kaina a hring a, “ Lalpa zârah fapa ka nei ta,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:2 A nau Abela chu a hring leh a. Abela chuan berâm a vulh a, Kaina chuan lo a nei a." 
Genesis4:3 Eng emawti hnuah chuan Kaina chuan a lova thlai thar chu Lalpa hnêna thilhlan atân a rawn la a. 
Genesis4:4 Abela pawh chuan a berâmno piang hmasa zînga mi a rawn la a, a sa ṭha lai ber chu a hlan a. Lalpa chuan Abela leh a thilhlan chu a lo lâwm a." 
Genesis4:5 Kaina chungah leh a thilhlanah chuan a lâwm lo. Kaina chu a thin a ur a, a hmêl a dur ta khup a." 
Genesis4:6 Lalpa chuan Kaina hnênah, “Engati nge i thin a ura, i hmêl a dur tâk le?" 
Genesis4:7 Thil ṭha ti la, i hmêl pawh a hlim ang chu. Thil ṭha i tih loh avângin sual chuan kawngkaah nghâkhlel takin a châng reng che a ni; mahse, i hneh tûr a ni asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:8 Kaina chuan a nau Abela hnênah, “I feh ang hmiang,” a ti a. Lo an thlen chuan Kaina chuan a nau Abela chu a bei a, a that ta mai a." 
Genesis4:9 Lalpa chuan Kaina hnênah, “I nau Abela kha khawiah nge a awm tâk?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ka hre nâng, ka nau vêngtu ka ni em ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis4:10 Ani chuan, “Engtizia nge hetiang thil hi i tih le? I nau thisen aw chuan lei aṭangin min au asin." 
Genesis4:11 Chuvângin, nangma thah ngei i nau thisen lo dawngtu lei chungah hian i hmuingîl dâwn tawh lo a ni." 
Genesis4:12 Lo i neih pawhin a rah seng tûr i nei lo vang; leiah hian chanhai takin i vâkvai tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:13 Kaina chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Min hrem na êm a, tuar zawh rual em ni?" 
Genesis4:14 Vawiinah he ram ata hi min hnawt chhuak a, i hmuh loh tûrin ka awm dâwn ta a ni si a; leiah hian chanhai takin ka vâkvai dâwn ta a ni. Chuvângin, min hmu apiangin min that mai ang asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:15 Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “That lo ve, Kaina that chu a lêt sariha phuba lâk a ni ang,” a ti a. A hmu apiangin an thah mai loh nân Kaina chu chhinchhiahna a siamsak a." 
Genesis4:16 Lalpa hma ata Kaina chu a chhuak a, khawchhak lam Nod ramah chuan a awm ta a." 
Genesis4:17 Kaina chuan a nupui a pâwl a, nau a nei a. Enoka a hring a. Khua a siam a, a fapa hming chawiin ‘Enok’ a vuah a." 
Genesis4:18 Enoka chuan Irada fapa a nei a; Irada chuan fapa Mehujaela a nei a, Mehujaela chuan fapa Methusaela a nei a, Methusaela chuan fapa Lameka a nei a." 
Genesis4:19 Lameka chuan nupui pahnih a nei a, pakhat hming chu Adaii a ni a, pakhat hming chu Zillaii a ni." 
Genesis4:20 Adaii chuan Jabala a hring a, ani chu berâm vulha puan ina chêngho thlahtu a ni." 
Genesis4:21 Chu mi nau chu Jubala a ni a, ṭingṭang leh phênglâwng tum mite thlahtu a ni." 
Genesis4:22 Zillaii pawh chuan Tubal-kaina a hring a, ani chu dâr leh thîr hmanraw tinrêng chhertu a ni. Tubal-kaina chuan farnu Naamaii a nei." 
Genesis4:23 Lameka chuan a nupuite hnênah: “Adai, Zillai, ka thu hi ngaithla ula, Lameka nupuite u, ka sawi hi bengkhawn rawh u: Min tipemtu chu ka that a, min vawtu tlangvâl chu ka that bawk a ni." 
Genesis4:24 Kaina phuba laa mi pasarih an thih chuan, Lameka phuba lâk nân mi sawmsarih leh pasarih an that ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:25 Adama chuan a nupui chu a pâwl leh a, fapa a hring a, a hmingah Setha a sa a. “Kainan Abela min thahsak tâk avângin a aiah Pathianin fapa min pe leh ta a nih hi,” a ti a ni." 
Genesis4:26 Setha pawh chuan fapa a nei a, a hmingah Enosa a sa a. Chutih lai chuan a ni, miten Lalpa hming an lam ṭan tâk ni." 
Genesis5:1 Hetiang hi Adama thlahte chanchin chu a ni. Pathianin mihring a siam khân Pathian anpui ngeiin a siam a ni. 
Genesis5:2 Mipa leh hmeichhia a siam a, mal a sâwm a, a siam ni chuan an hmingah ‘mihring’ a vuah a." 
Genesis5:3 A anpui, amah ang taka fapa a hrin khân Adama chu kum za leh sawmthuma upa a ni a, a fapa hmingah chuan Setha a sa a." 
Genesis5:4 Setha a neih hnu chuan Adama chu kum zariat a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis5:5 Adama chu kum zakua leh sawmthum chhûng a dam a, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:6 A fapa Enosa a pian khân Setha chu kum za leh pangaa upa a ni a. 
Genesis5:7 Enosa a pian hnuah Setha chu kum zariat leh pasarih a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis5:8 Setha chu kum zakua leh sâwm leh pahnih chhûng a dam a, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:9 A fapa Kenana a pian khân Enosa chu kum sawmkuaa upa a ni a. 
Genesis5:10 Kenana a pian hnuin Enosa chu kum zariat leh sâwm leh panga a dam a; fanu fapa dangte a nei a," 
Genesis5:11 Enosa chu kum zakua leh panga chhûng a dam a, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:12 A fapa Mahalalela a pian khân Kenana chu kum sawmsariha upa a ni a. 
Genesis5:13 Mahalalela a pian hnuin Kenana chu kum zariat leh sawmli a dam a; fanu fapa dangte a nei a. 
Genesis5:14 Kenana chu kum zakua leh sâwm chhûng a dam a, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:15 A fapa Jareda a pian khân Mahalalela chu kum sawmruk leh pangaa upa a ni a. 
Genesis5:16 Jareda a pian hnuin Mahalalela chu kum zariat leh sawmthum a dam a; fanu fapa dangte a nei a. 
Genesis5:17 Mahalalela chu kum zariat leh sawmkua leh panga chhûng a dam a, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:18 A fapa Enoka a pian khân Jareda chu kum za leh sawmruk leh pahniha upa a ni a. 
Genesis5:19 Enoka a pian hnuin kum zariat a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis5:20 Jareda chu kum zakua leh sawmruk leh pahnih chhûng a dam a, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:21 A fapa Methusela a pian khân Enoka chu kum sawmruk leh pangaa upa a ni a. 
Genesis5:22 Methusela a pian hnuin Enoka chu kum zathum chhûng Pathian nên an lêng dûn ṭhîn; fanu fapa dangte a nei a. 
Genesis5:23 Enoka chu kum zathum leh sawmruk leh panga chhûng a dam a. 
Genesis5:24 Enoka chu Pathian nên an lêng dûn ṭhîn, Pathianin a lâk tâk avângin a awm ta lo a ni." 
Genesis5:25 A fapa Lameka a pian khân Methusela chu kum za leh sawmriat leh pasariha upa a ni a. 
Genesis5:26 Lameka a pian hnuin kum zasarih leh sawmriat leh pahnih a dam a; fanu fapa dangte a nei a. 
Genesis5:27 Methusela chu kum zakua leh sawmruk leh pakaw chhûng a dam a, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:28 Fapa a neihin Lameka chu kum za leh sawmriat leh pahniha upa a ni. 
Genesis5:29 “He mi hian leia kut hna rim taka kan thawh, Lalpa ânchhia aṭang hian min tihahdam tawh ang,” tiin a fapa hmingah chuan Nova a sa a." 
Genesis5:30 Nova a pian hnuin Lameka chu kum zanga leh sawmkua leh panga a dam a; fanu fapa dangte a nei a. 
Genesis5:31 Lameka chu kum zasarih leh sawmsarih leh pasarih chhûng a dam a, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:32 Kum zanga vêla upa a nih khân Nova chuan fapa Sema te, Hama te, Jafeta te a nei a." 
Genesis6:1 Leiah mihring an lo tam a, fanute pawh an ngah ta hle a." 
Genesis6:2 Pathian fate chuan mihring nulate hmêlṭhatzia an hmuh chuan an duh duh nupuiah an nei ta a. 
Genesis6:3 Lalpa chuan, “Mihring hi an dam kumkhua ka remti lo, an tisa mi êm mai; kum za leh sawmhnih erawh chu dam thleng rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis6:4 Chutih hun lai chuan, a hnu deuhvah pawh leiah hian Nefil-ho an awm a. Chûng chu Pathian faten mihring fate nupuia an neiha an thlah tâkte an ni. Chûng mite chu hmânlai mi hrâtkhawkhêng, mi hmingthang tak tak an ni." 
Genesis6:5 Lalpa chuan leia mihring sual nasatzia chu a hmu a, eng lai pawhin thil sual hlîr an ngaihtuah a ni." 
Genesis6:6 Leiah mihring a siam ta chu pawi a ti a, a rilru a na hle a." 
Genesis6:7 Lalpa chuan, “Mihring te, ramsa te, a tlenga tleng mi te, chunglêng sava ka siam te hi ka nuai bo mai teh ang, ka siam ta kha pawi ka ti êm mai,” a ti a." 
Genesis6:8 Nova erawh chu Lalpa chuan a ngaina hle a. 
Genesis6:9 Hei hi Nova thlahte chanchin chhuina a ni. Nova chu mi ṭha a ni a, a dam rualpuite zîngah sawisêl kai lo awm chhun a ni. Nova chu Pathian nên an lêng dûn ṭhîn." 
Genesis6:10 Nova chuan fapa pathum, Sema te, Hama te, Jafeta te a nei a." 
Genesis6:11 Pathian ngaihin lei chu a chhe let dêr a, inpâwngnêknain a khat a ni." 
Genesis6:12 Khawvêl chhiat tâkzia chu Pathian chuan a hmu a. Ngai teh, leia mi tin a sual zâwng hlîrin an khawsa a ni." 
Genesis6:13 Pathianin Nova hnênah, “Mihringte hi tihboral ka tum ta. Lei hi anmahni avângin inpâwngnêknain a khat ta si a, lei pawh hi ka tichhe vek dâwn a ni." 
Genesis6:14 Tichuan, thing ṭha chi hmangin lawng tuk rawh; lawngah chuan pindante siam la, a chhûng lam leh a pâwn lamah alkatra hnawih chhuak vek ang che." 
Genesis6:15 Lawng chu tawng zathuma sei, tawng sawmngaa zau, tawng sawmthuma sângin tuk ang che." 
Genesis6:16 Lawngah chuan tukverhte siam la, bang leh a chung inkâr chu inchi sâwm leh pariat a ni tûr a ni; lawng kawngka chu a sîrah hawng ang che, chhâwng thum neiin i siam tûr a ni." 
Genesis6:17 “Ngai teh, kei hian lei chîm pil tûr tui ka lêttîr dâwn a ni. Vân hnuaia nunna nei rêng rêng chu ka nuai bo vek dâwn; leia engkim a chhe nghâl ang." 
Genesis6:18 Nang nên erawh chuan thu ka thlung ang a, lawngah i lût ang a, i nupui leh i fate pawh, an nupuite nên lawngah chuan in lût tûr a ni." 
Genesis6:19 Thil nung tinrêng, tisa pu rêng rêng chu an him theih nân, pahnih zêl, a nu leh a pa hruai lût ve ang che." 
Genesis6:20 Sava chi tin nên ran leh a tlenga tleng chi hrang hrang nên an him theih nân pahnih zêl an lût ve tûr a ni. 
Genesis6:21 In tla tâwk tûr ei tûr la khâwm la, nangni leh anni ei atân chhêk khâwm ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis6:22 Nova chuan Pathian thupêk ang chuan a ti ta vek a. 
Genesis7:1 Lalpa chuan Nova hnênah, “Nang leh i chhûngte nên lawngah lût vek rawh u; tûnlai mite zîngah nang chauh hi mi dik tak ka hmuh chhun i ni." 
Genesis7:2 Leia chi thlaha nung zêl tûrin sa thiang zînga mi tuak sarih zêl, a nu leh a pa; sa thiang lo zînga mi tuak khat zêl, a nu leh a pa;" 
Genesis7:3 chunglêng sava zînga mi tuak sarih, a nu leh a pa, hruai lût bawk ang che." 
Genesis7:4 Tûn aṭanga ni sarih ralah ni sawmli chhûng chhûn leh zân ruah ka sûrtîr dâwn a ni. Thil nung ka siam tinrêngte chu lei ata ka timang vek dâwn,” a ti a." 
Genesis7:5 Nova chuan Pathian thupêk ang chuan a ti a," 
Genesis7:6 Lei chunga tui a lo lêt khân Nova chu kum zaruka upa a ni. 
Genesis7:7 Tui a lêt dâwn avângin Nova leh a nupui chu, an fate leh an nupuite nên lawngah chuan an lût a." 
Genesis7:8 Sa thiang leh thiang lo, chunglêng savate leh leia tleng ṭhîn chi tinrêngte chu," 
Genesis7:9 Pathianin Nova hnêna thu a pêk angin pahnih zêl, a nu leh a pa, Nova lawng chhûngah chuan an lût ta a." 
Genesis7:10 Ni sarih a ral hnu chuan lei chungah tui a lo lêt ta a. 
Genesis7:11 Nova kum zaruk a nih kum, thla hnihna, ni sâwm leh pasarih ni tak chuan tuithûkpui tuite chu a lo sah a, vân tukverhte chu a inhawng a." 
Genesis7:12 Ni sawmli leh zan sawmli chhûng ruahpuivânâwn a sûr ta chiam a. 
Genesis7:13 Chumi ni chuan Nova leh a fa pathum, Sema te, Hama te, Jafeta te, Nova nupuite leh a mo pathumte chu lawngah an lût a," 
Genesis7:14 chumi ni ngei chuan ramsa tinrêng, ran tinrêng, thil nung tinrêng - leia tleng te, sava chi tinrêng, thlâwk thei tinrêng te chu lawngah an lût ve a." 
Genesis7:15 Nunna thaw nei, tisa pu zawng zawng chu an lût kim a ni." 
Genesis7:16 Nova hnêna Pathianin thu a pêk angin nupa kawp zêlin an lût a. Lalpa chuan lawng chu a khârsak ta a. 
Genesis7:17 Leiah ni sawmli chhûng zawng tui a lo lêt ta a; tuiin a chîm ang zêlin lawng chu a lâng zêl a. 
Genesis7:18 Lei chungah tui chu a lo pung a, a chîm sâng tial tial a, lawng pawh chu a lâng zêl a." 
Genesis7:19 Lei chungah tui chu a tam tulh tulh a, a lei chîm chin pawh a sâng tial tial a, tlâng sâng berte pawh a chîm pil ta a." 
Genesis7:20 Tlâng sâng ber chhîp pawh chu tawng sâwm leh panga laia thûkin a pil a ni. 
Genesis7:21 Tisa pu, leia che thei awm zawng zawng, sava te, ran te, ramsa te, a ruala tla chi te, mihring te a chîm hlum zo ta a." 
Genesis7:22 Thaw thei tawh phawt, khawmuala chêng zawng zawng chu an thi zo ta a." 
Genesis7:23 Khawvêla awm zawng zawng, mihring te, ran te, leia tleng chi te, chunglêng sava te an boral ta vek a. Nova leh lawng chhûnga awmte chauh chu zuah an ni." 
Genesis7:24 Tui chuan lei chu ni za leh sawmnga chhûng a chîm ta pûng a. 
Genesis8:1 Pathian chuan Nova te, a awmpui ramsa te leh ran tinrêng chu a hre reng a. Pathian chuan lei chungah thli a tlehtîr a, tui chu a kâm ṭan ta a." 
Genesis8:2 Tuithûkpui sah leh vân tukverh inhawng chu a inkhâr a, vân aṭanga ruahpuivânâwn sûr chu a hân ta a." 
Genesis8:3 Zawi zawiin tui chu a kâm hret hret a, ni za leh sawmnga a ral hnu," 
Genesis8:4 a thla sarihna, ni sâwm leh pasarih ni chuan lawng chu Ararat tlângah a innghat ta a." 
Genesis8:5 A thla sâwmna thleng chuan tui chu a kâm zêl a, a thla sâwmna ni khat ni chuan tlâng chhîpte chu a lang thei ta a." 
Genesis8:6 Ni sawmli a ral hnu chuan lawng tukverh a siam chu Nova chuan a hawng a. 
Genesis8:7 Choak a chhuah a, leia tui a kâm fel nghâkin a thlâwk a thlâwk a." 
Genesis8:8 Tui a kâm zo tawh emaw hriat nân ṭhuro a chhuah leh a; 
Genesis8:9 ṭhuro chuan fûkna tûr leichâr a hmu lo va, lawngah chuan a lo kîr leh a, tui chuan lei chu a la chîm vek a ni. Tichuan, a kut a zen chhuak a, a man a, lawng chhûngah chuan a la lût a." 
Genesis8:10 Ni sarih dang a nghah hnuah lawng aṭang chuan ṭhuro a chhuah leh a. 
Genesis8:11 Tlai lamah chuan ṭhuro chu a lo kîr a, oliv hnah bal thar a rawn pu a. Nova chuan leia tui chu a kâm zo ta tih a hria a." 
Genesis8:12 Ni sarih dang a nghah leh hnu chuan ṭhuro chu a chhuah leh a, a lo kîr ta lo va." 
Genesis8:13 Nova kum zaruk leh pakhat kum, thla hmasa ber ni khat ni chuan lei ata tui chu a kang zo ta a. Nova chuan lawng chhîn chu a hawng a, lei chu a châr ta tih a hmu a." 
Genesis8:14 A thla hnihna, ni sawmhnih leh pasarih ni chuan lei chu a ro ta vek a." 
Genesis8:15 Pathian chuan Nova hnênah," 
Genesis8:16 “I nupuite, i fate leh an nupuite nên lawng ata hi chhuak rawh u." 
Genesis8:17 Savate leh rante pawh hi hruai chhuak ula, an inthlah ang a, leiah an awm darh dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis8:18 Tichuan, Nova chu a fa te, a nupui te leh a mo te nên an lo chhuak a." 
Genesis8:19 Rannung zawng zawng, leia tleng chi te, chunglêng sava te, leia tla ṭhînte chu a chi chiin an lo chhuak ve a." 
Genesis8:20 Nova chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a, sa thiang leh sava thiang zînga mi a thlang ṭheuh va, maichâmah chuan hâlralah a hlân a." 
Genesis8:21 Lalpa chuan hâl ral rim chu tui a ti hle a; “Mihring avângin khawvêl pum pui hi ka sawisa leh tawh lo vang; mihring thinlung hi a naupan lai aṭangin suala khat a ni si a; thil nung dang pawh tûn ang chuan ka tihlum tawh lo vang. 
Genesis8:22 Lei hi a awm chhûng chu buh tuh hun te, a seng hun te, khaw vâwt leh khaw lum te, nipui leh thlasik te, chhûn leh zân te a tâwp lo vang,” a ti rilru a." 
Genesis9:1 Pathian chuan Nova leh a fate chu mal a sâwm a, “In chi ṭha sela, pung duah duah ula, lei hi luah khat ang che u." 
Genesis9:2 Leia ramsa zawng zawng leh tuipuia sangha zawng zawngin an ṭih ang che u a, an zah êm êm ang che u, in kutah ka dah a ni." 
Genesis9:3 In ei atân thlai hring tinrêng ka pe a che u, thil nung tinrêng, nunna nei zawng zawngte pawh in ei thei ang." 
Genesis9:4 Sa erawh chu a nunna thisen chawpin in ei tûr a ni lo. 
Genesis9:5 Tin, in nunna thisen chhuahtu chungah, ramsa an ni emaw, mihring an ni emaw, kut ka thlâk ang." 
Genesis9:6 Mihring nunna thisen chhuahtu chu, Mi dangin a thisen an chhuahsak ve ang. Mihring hi Pathian anga siam a ni si a;" 
Genesis9:7 tichuan, in chi ṭha sela, Pung deuh deuh ula, Leilung dâp chhuak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis9:8 Pathian chuan Nova leh a fate hnênah heti hian a ti bawk: 
Genesis9:9 “Ngai teh u, nangni leh in thlah zêlte tân thu ka thlung ta." 
Genesis9:10 Chu chu in hnêna awm, thil nung zawng zawng, sava te, ran te, ramsa te, lawng aṭanga lo chhuak, leia thil nung tinrêngte tân chuan a ni." 
Genesis9:11 Ka thuthlung, ka vawn reng tûr chu hei hi a ni: Thil nung tinrêng tihlum tûrin tui ka tilêt ngai tawh lo vang a, lei tichhe tûrin a lêt ngai tawh lo vang." 
Genesis9:12 “Tin, ka kumkhaw thuthlung, nangni leh thil nung zawng zawng nêna kan inkâra ka thuthlung chhinchhiahna chu hei hi a ni:" 
Genesis9:13 Chhûmah chhimbâl ka zâmtîr hi, khawvêl nêna kan inkâra thuthlung chhinchhiahna chu a ni." 
Genesis9:14 Lei chunga chhûm ka zîntîr hunah chhimbâl chu a lo lang ang a; 
Genesis9:15 nangni leh thil nung tinrêng nêna kan inkâra thuthlung ka thlun chu ka hre reng ṭhîn ang a, tui lo lêtin mi nung zawng zawng a tihlum tawh dâwn lo nia." 
Genesis9:16 Chhûm zînga chhimbâl a lo lanin ka hmu ang a, nangni leh leia thil nung tinrêng nêna ka thuthlung chu ka hre reng ṭhîn ang." 
Genesis9:17 Chu chu nang leh leia thil nung tinrêng nên kan inkâra ka thuthlung chhinchhiahna a ni zêl ang,” tiin." 
Genesis9:18 Lawng aṭanga lo chhuak, Nova fate chu Sema te, Hama te, Jafeta te an ni; Hama chu Kanan mite thlahtu a ni." 
Genesis9:19 Hêng mi pathum hi Nova fate chu an ni, an thlahte chuan lei pum pui hi an dâp ta a." 
Genesis9:20 Nova chu lo nei mi a ni a, grep huan a siam a." 
Genesis9:21 Uain chu a in a, a rui a, a puan in chhûnga a mu chu a mu sual a." 
Genesis9:22 Kanan mite thlahtu Hama chuan a pa mu sual chu a va hmu a, a unaute chu a rawn hrilh a." 
Genesis9:23 Sema leh Jafeta chuan puan an la a, an kokia inzâwnin hnungtawlhin an kal a, an pa mu sual chu an va khuh a, an pa mu sual hmu lo tûrin lehlam an hawi tlat a ni." 
Genesis9:24 Nova rui chu a lo harh a, a fapa naupang ber Hama thil tih dân chu a han hriat chuan:" 
Genesis9:25 Kanana chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se, A unaute zîngah chhiahhlawh tê ber ang ni rawh se." 
Genesis9:26 Sema Pathian chu fakin awm sela, Kanana chu mi dang chhiahhlawh ni rawh se." 
Genesis9:27 Pathianin Jafeta tân hmun zuah sela, Sema puan inahte pawh chêng sela, Kanana erawh chu an chhiahhlawh ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis9:28 Nova chu tuilêt hnuah kum zathum leh sawmnga a dam a. 
Genesis9:29 Nova chu kum zakua leh sawmnga chhûng a dam a ni, a thi ta a." 
Genesis10:1 Hei hi Nova thlah chhâwng zêlte chanchin a ni. Nova fa Sema te, Hama te, Jafeta te chuan tuilêt hnuah fa an nei hlawm a." 
Genesis10:2 Jafeta fate chu Gomera te, Magoga te, Madaia te, Javana te, Tubala te, Meseka te, Tirasa te an ni." 
Genesis10:3 Gomera fate chu Askenaza te, Rifata te, Togarma te an ni." 
Genesis10:4 Javana fate chu Elisa te, Tarsisa te, Kitima te, Dodanima te an ni." 
Genesis10:5 Anni chu tuipui kam leh thliarkâra awm hnamte thlahtu an ni. Khîngte khi Jafeta thlahte chu an ni, a chi chiin hmun hrang hrangah an awm a, mahni ṭawng bîk an hmang ṭheuh a ni." 
Genesis10:6 Hama thlahte chu Kusa te, Mizraima te, Puta te, Kanana te an ni." 
Genesis10:7 Kusa thlahte chu Seba te, Havila te, Sabta te, Raama te, Sabteka te an ni. Raama fate chu Seba leh Dedana an ni." 
Genesis10:8 Kusa chuan fapa Nimroda a nei a. Chu mi chu khawvêla râltu mi ropui tak a ni. 
Genesis10:9 Lalpa mit tlung, ramvâk mi a ni a. ‘Nimroda angin Lalpa mit tlung, ramvachal ni ve ang che,’ an inti ṭhîn a ni." 
Genesis10:10 A tîrah chuan Babulon-ah te, Erek-ah te, Akad-ah te a lal a, chûng zawng zawng chu Sinar rama awm vek an ni." 
Genesis10:11 Chu ram aṭang chuan Asuria ramah a kal a, Ninevi khua te, Rehobot-ir te, Kala khua te a din a." 
Genesis10:12 Ninevi leh Kala khaw inkârah an khawpui ber Resen pawh a siam a. 
Genesis10:13 Mizraima thlahte chu hêng mite hi an ni: Lud mi te, Anam mi te, Lebab mi te, Nafta mi te," 
Genesis10:14 Pathros mi te, Kaslu mi te. Hêng mite hi Filistia leh Kaftor mite thlahtu an ni." 
Genesis10:15 Kanana chuan fapa Sidona a nei hmasa a, Hetha pawh a nei leh a." 
Genesis10:16 Jebus mi te, Amor mi te, Girgas mi te," 
Genesis10:17 Hiv mi te, Arka mi te, Sin mi te," 
Genesis10:18 Arvad mi te, Zemar mi te leh Hamath mi te thlahtu a ni bawk. Nakin hnuah chuan Kanana thlahte chu an inzâr darh a," 
Genesis10:19 Sidon aṭanga Gaza bul Gerar thlengin an ram an zauh a; Sodom te, Gomora te, Adma te, Lasa bula Zeboim khaw thlengin an nei zêl a." 
Genesis10:20 Khîng khi Hama thlahte chu an ni, a hnam hnamin, mahni ram ramah an awm a, mahni ṭawng ṭheuh an hmang a ni." 
Genesis10:21 Eber mite thlahtu Jafeta u Sema pawhin fate a nei ṭeuh va. 
Genesis10:22 Sema fate chu: Elama te, Asura te, Arpaksada te, Luda te, Arama te an ni." 
Genesis10:23 Arama fate chu: Uza te, Hula te, Gethera te, Masa te an ni." 
Genesis10:24 Arpaksada chuan fapa Sela a nei a, Sela chuan fapa Ebera a nei a." 
Genesis10:25 Ebera chuan fapa pahnih a nei a, pakhat hming chu Pelega a ni, a hun laiin khawvêl mi an inṭhen ta a. A nau hming chu Joktana a ni." 
Genesis10:26 Joktana thlahte chu; Almodada te, Selefa te, Hazarmaveta te, Jera te," 
Genesis10:27 Hadorama te, Uzala te, Dikla te," 
Genesis10:28 Obala te, Abimaela te, Seba te," 
Genesis10:29 Ofira te, Havila te, Jobaba te an ni. Khîng zawng khi Joktana thlahte chu an ni." 
Genesis10:29 Ofira te, Havila te, Jobaba te an ni. Khîng zawng khi Joktana thlahte chu an ni." 
Genesis10:30 An ram luah chu Mesa aṭanga Sefar thleng zak a ni a, khawchhak lam tlângram zawng zawng khi a huam a ni." 
Genesis10:31 Khîng khi Sema thlahte chu an ni, mahni chi chi, mahni ram ramah a hnam hnamin an awm a, mahni ṭawng ṭheuh an hmang." 
Genesis10:32 Nova thlah hlâwm hrang hrangte chu an thlahtute leh an awmna ram ang zêlin khitiang khi a ni. Hnam dangte pawh tuilêt hnua an laka lo pianga darh ta an ni. 
Genesis11:1 Khawvêl pum puiah ṭawng khat an hmang a, an awphawi pawh a inang vek a." 
Genesis11:2 Khawchhak lam aṭangin mi an lo pêm a, Sinar phai" 
Genesis11:3 “Hawh u, leirawhchan siam ila, chang takin i rawh ang u,” an ti a. Lung aiah leirawhchan chu an hmang a, hlum banin an châr a." 
Genesis11:4 “Hawh u, khawpui i din ang, in sâng tak, vân tawng sa ila, hmingṭha i chher ang u; chutilo chu, khawvêlah kan awm darh zo dah ang e,” an ti a." 
Genesis11:5 Lei miten khawpui an siam leh in sâng an sa chu en tûrin Lalpa chu a lo chhuk a. 
Genesis11:6 “Ṭawng khat hmang, hnam pumkhat thiltih duh dân heti hi a nih si chuan an tum ang ang tih theih loh an nei lo mai ang a!" 
Genesis11:7 An thu sawi inhre tawn lo tûrin hawh u, an ṭawng i zu tihhransak ang u,” a ti a." 
Genesis11:8 Lalpa chuan chuta ṭang chuan khawvêl pum puiah a hnawt darh a, khua chu an sa thei ta lo va." 
Genesis11:9 Chuvâng chuan, chu hmun chu ‘Babel’ tih a ni ta a; khawvêl pum pui mite ṭawng chu inhre tawn thei lovin Lalpa chuan a tihrang ta a; chuta ṭang chuan ram tinah a hnawt darh ta a." 
Genesis11:10 Hei hi Sema thlah chhâwng zêlte chanchin chu a ni: Tuilêt zawh kum hnih hnua a fapa Arpaksada a pian khân Sema chu kum za a ni tawh a. 
Genesis11:11 Arpaksada pian hnuin Sema chu kum zanga chhûng a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis11:12 Kum sawmthum leh panga a nihin Arpaksada chuan fapa Sela a nei a," 
Genesis11:13 Sela a pian hnu chuan Arpaksada chu kum zali leh pathum chhûng a la dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis11:14 Kum sawmthum a nihin Sela chuan fapa Ebera a nei a," 
Genesis11:15 Ebera pian hnu chuan Sela chu kum zali leh pathum chhûng a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis11:16 Kum sawmthum leh pali a nihin Ebera chuan fapa Pelega a nei a. 
Genesis11:17 Pelega pian hnu chuan Ebera chu kum zali leh sawmthum chhûng a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis11:18 Kum sawmthum a nihin Pelega chuan fapa Reua a nei a. 
Genesis11:19 Reua pian hnu chuan Pelega chu kum zahnih leh pakaw chhûng a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis11:20 Kum sawmthum leh pahnih a nihin Reua chuan fapa Seruga a nei a," 
Genesis11:21 Seruga a pian hnu chuan Reua chu kum zahnih leh pasarih a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis11:22 Kum sawmthum a nihin Seruga chuan fapa Nahora a nei a," 
Genesis11:23 Nahora pian hnu chuan Seruga chu kum zahnih chhûng a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis11:24 Kum sawmhnih leh pakua a nihin Nahora chuan fapa Tera a nei a. 
Genesis11:25 Tera pian hnu chuan Nahora chu kum za leh sâwm pakaw chhûng a dam a, fanu fapa dangte a nei a." 
Genesis11:26 Abrama te, Nahora te, Harana te an pian chuan Tera chu kum sawmsarih a tling tawh a." 
Genesis11:27 Tera thlah zêlte chanchin chu hetiang hi a ni: Tera chuan fapa Abrama te, Nahora te, Harana te a nei a, Harana chuan fapa Lota a nei a." 
Genesis11:28 Harana chu Kaldai ram Ur khuaah, a pianna ramah chuan, a pa Tera a la dam laiin a thi a." 
Genesis11:29 Abrama leh Nahora chuan nupui an nei a: Abrama nupui hming chu Saraii a ni a, Nahora nupui hming chu Milkaii a ni. Milkaii leh Iskaii chu Harana fanu an ni." 
Genesis11:30 Saraii chu a ching a, fa a nei lo." 
Genesis11:31 Tera chuan a fapa Abrama te, a tupa Lota, Harana fapa te, a monu Saraii, a fapa Abrama nupuite chu a hruai a, Kaldai ram Ur khua chu an chhuahsan a. Kanan rama kal tûrin an chhuak a; mahse, Haran khua an thlen chuan awmhmun an khuar ta a." 
Genesis11:32 Tera chu kum zahnih leh panga chhûng a dam a, Haran-ah chuan Tera chu a thi ta a." 
Genesis12:1 Lalpa chuan Abrama hnênah “In ram hi i laichînte leh i pa inte nên chhuahsan la, ka kawhhmuh tûr che ramah chuan kal rawh." 
Genesis12:2 Hnam ropui takah ka siam ang che: mal ka sâwm ang che a, i hming ka tithang ang a, malsâwmna i ni ang." 
Genesis12:3 Malsâwmsaktu che chu mal ka sâwm ang a, ânchhe lawhtu che chu ânchhia ka lawh ang; khawvêla hnam tinrêng i zârah an nihlawh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis12:4 Lalpa thu ang chuan Abrama chu a thawk chhuak a, Lota pawh a rual chuan a kal ve a. Haran a chhuahsan khân Abrama chu kum sawmsarih leh pangaa upa a ni." 
Genesis12:5 Abrama chuan a nupui Saraii leh a nau fapa Lota chu a hruai a, Haran khuaa an awm chhûnga an sum deh chhuah zawng zawng kengin, ṭhuihruai an neih belh tâk zawng zawng nên Kanan ram an pan a, an va thleng ta a." 
Genesis12:6 Chu ramah chuan Abrama chu a kal zêl a, Sekem hmun More sasaw thing awmna chu a thleng a. Chutih lai chuan Kanan mite chu chu ramah chuan an la awm a ni." 
Genesis12:7 Abrama hnênah Lalpa chu a inlâr a, “He ram hi a ni i thlahte ka pêk tûr ram chu,” a rawn ti a. Chutah chuan a hnêna lo lang Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a." 
Genesis12:8 Chuta ṭangin Bethel chhak lam tlângah a insawn a; tah chuan bûk a khuar a, khawthlang lamah Bethel a awm a, khawchhak lamah Ai khua. Chutah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam leh a, Lalpa hming chu a lam ta a." 
Genesis12:9 Negeb ram panin zawi zawiin a insawn zêl a. 
Genesis12:10 Chu ramah chuan ṭâm a tla a, ṭâm chu a nat êm avângin Abrama chuan ṭâm tlân tûrin Aigupta ram a pan a." 
Genesis12:11 Aigupta ram a thlen dâwn chuan a nupui Saraii hnênah, “Ngawi teh, i hmêlṭhatzia ka hria e." 
Genesis12:12 Aigupta miten an hmuh che chuan, ‘A nupui a ni,’ an ti ang a, min that mai ang a, nang an zuah si ang che; ‘A farnu ka ni,’ ti mai teh." 
Genesis12:13 Tichuan, nangmah avângin min ti ṭha ang a, min zuah dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis12:14 Abraman Aigupta ram a zu thleng a. Aigupta mite chuan a nupui chu hmêlṭha an ti êm êm a. 
Genesis12:15 Farawa khâwnbâwlte chuan an han hmu ve a, Farawa hriata an fak tâk êm avâng chuan Farawa inah chuan an la lût ta a." 
Genesis12:16 Amah avâng chuan Abrama chu an ti ṭha hle a; berâm te, ran te, sabengtung te, chhiahhlawh nula leh tlangvâl te, sabengtungpui te, sanghâwngsei te an pe a." 
Genesis12:17 Lalpa chuan Abrama nupui Saraii vâng chuan Farawa leh a chhûngte chu hri na tak a veitîr a. 
Genesis12:18 Farawa chuan Abrama chu a ko va, “Ka chunga i thiltih dân hi engtizia nge? I nupui a nih engtizia nge min hrilh loh?" 
Genesis12:19 ‘Ka farnu a ni,’ i ti a, nupuiah ka la lût mai a ni lâwm ni? I nupui hi hruai la, hawpui daih rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis12:20 Farawa chuan mi a tîr a, Abrama chu a nupui leh a neih zawng zawng nên an hnawt chhuak ta a." 
Genesis13:1 Aigupta ram aṭang chuan Abrama chu Negeb-ah, a nupui leh a neih zawng zawng nên, an chho va, Lota pawh a tel zêl a." 
Genesis13:2 Abrama chuan tangkarua leh rangkachak te leh ran rualte a ngah êm êm a. 
Genesis13:3 Negeb aṭang chuan a bûk khuarna hmun Bethel leh Ai inkâr panin Bethel lamah a inchhawp chho va. 
Genesis13:4 A hmaa maichâm a siamna hmun kha a thleng a; tah chuan, Lalpa hming a lam a." 
Genesis13:5 Abrama kalpui Lota pawh chuan berâm te, bâwng te a ngah hle a, chhûng hung tak an ni ve tawh a." 
Genesis13:6 Ran vulh an ngah êm a, awm dûn tûr chuan ramin a daih ta lo va; an awm ho hlei thei ta lo va ni." 
Genesis13:7 Abrama ran pute leh Lota ran pute inkârah innghirnghona a chhuak ta a. Chutih laiin chu ramah chuan Kanan mi leh Periz mite pawh an la awm si a. 
Genesis13:8 Abrama chuan Lota hnênah, “Nang leh kei, kan inkârah innghirnghona awm lul suh se, pafa kan nih hi." 
Genesis13:9 Ram lah hei a awm duai a, awm hran zai rêl mai teh; vei lam hi i duh zâwk leh ding lamah ka kal ang a, ding lam i duh zâwk leh vei lam ka pan mai ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis13:10 Lota chuan a han thlîr vêl a, Jordan lui ruam chu Zoar thlengin Lalpa huan ang mai, Aigupta ram anga ram ṭha, tui ṭhatna ram a ni tih a hmu a, Sodom leh Gomora pawh Lalpa chuan a la tichhe si lo va." 
Genesis13:11 Lota chuan Jordan lui ruam chu awmna atân a thlang a, khawchhak lam chu a pan a, an awm hrang ta a." 
Genesis13:12 Abrama chu Kanan ramah chuan a awm ta zêl a, Lota chuan phai ram khawpui zîngah, Sodom khaw bulah awmhmun a khuar ta a." 
Genesis13:13 Sodom mite chu Lalpa ngaiha mi sual buru tak an ni. 
Genesis13:14 Lota a awm hran tâk hnu chuan Lalpa chuan Abrama hnênah, “Han hawi kual la, chhim leh hmâr lam te, chhak leh thlang lam te thlîr vêl teh." 
Genesis13:15 I hmuh phâk ram zawng zawng hi i thlahte pawhin an neih kumkhua atân ka pe ang che. 
Genesis13:16 Leia vaivut anga tamin i thlahte ka tipung ang a, vaivut chhiar sên loh ang hian chhiar sên an ni lo vang." 
Genesis13:17 Tho la, ram dung leh vâng hi fang chhuak teh, ka pêk tawh che hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis13:18 Abrama chuan a puan in a sawn a, Mamre sasaw bul, Hebron kiangah awmhmun a khuar ta a. Chutah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a." 
Genesis14:1 Sinar lal Amrafela te, Elasar lal Arioka te, Elam lal Kedorlaomera te, Goim lal Tidala te pali chuan," 
Genesis14:2 Sodom lal Bera te, Gomora lal Birsa te, Adma lal Sinaba te, Zeboim lal Semebera te leh Zoar an tih tâk Bela lalte an rawn rûn a." 
Genesis14:3 Hêng lal pangate hi Sidim ruam, Tuipui Thi ruamah an lo ṭang tlâng a." 
Genesis14:4 Kum sâwm leh pahnih chhûng chu Kedorlaomera hnuaiah an awm a, a kum sâwm leh pathum kum chuan an hel a." 
Genesis14:5 Kum sâwm leh pali kum chuan Kedorlaomera leh a thurualpui lalte chu an lo thawk a, Asterot-Karnaim rama Refa-hote, Ham rama Zuzim-ho te, Seva-kiriathaim rama Enim-ho te leh" 
Genesis14:6 thlalêr depa awm El-paran lui, Seir tlângrama awm Hor-ho te thleng chuan an rawn hneh a." 
Genesis14:7 An hawn pah chuan Kades an tih tâk En-mispat lamah an kual a, Amalek-ho ram zawng zawng leh Zazon-tamar rama Amor-ho te an tudawl bawk a." 
Genesis14:8 Chûng avâng chuan Sodom lal te, Gomora lal te, Adma lal te, Zeboim lal te, Zoar an tih tâk Bela lalte chu an lo thawk a, Sidim ruamah ṭan an lo khawh tlâng a." 
Genesis14:9 Tichuan, Elam lal Kedorlaomera te, Goim lal Tidala te, Sinar lal Amrafela te, Elasar lal Arioka te pali chu hêng lal pangate hian an lo bei a." 
Genesis14:10 Sidim ruamah chuan alkatra khur a awm thluah a, Sodom leh Gomora lal tlânchhia chu chûngah chuan an biru a; mi dang pawh an tlânchhia a, tlângramah an biru a." 
Genesis14:11 Sodom leh Gomora mite thil neih zawng zawng, an buh te nên an mansak a, an ṭinsan ta a." 
Genesis14:12 Abrama nau fapa Lota, Sodom khuaa awm pawh kha, a neih zawng zawng nên an man bawk a." 
Genesis14:13 Indonaa tlânchhia pakhat chuan chûng thu chu Hebrai-pa Abrama chu a rawn hrilh a. Chutih lai chuan Eskola leh Anera laichîn Amor mi Mamre-a sasaw kûng bulah Abrama chu a awm a. 
Genesis14:14 Abrama chuan a nau fapa Lota chu salah an man tih a hriat chuan a ina piang râlkai tawh mi zathum leh sâwm leh pariat a hruai a, Dan thlengin a ûmzui a." 
Genesis14:15 Zâna hmêlma bei tûra ruat, ama hote chuan an hneh a, Damaska hmâr lam Hoba khaw thlengin an ûm a." 
Genesis14:16 An sum lâk zawng zawng chu an chhuhsak a, a nau fa Lota leh a neih zawng zawng chu hmeichhia leh mi dangte nên a hruai haw leh ta a." 
Genesis14:17 Kedorlaomera leh a thurualpui lalte hneha a lo haw chu Sodom lal chuan Save ruamah a lo hmuak a, chu hmun chu ‘lal ruam’ an ti bawk." 
Genesis14:18 Salem lal Melkisedeka pawhin chhang leh uain kengin a rawn hmuak bawk a, ani chu Pathian Chungnungbera puithiam a ni." 
Genesis14:19 Mal a lo sâwmsak a, “Pathian Chungnungbera, lei leh vân neitu chuan Abrama hi malsâwm rawh se." 
Genesis14:20 A hmêlmate ngamtîrtu Pathian Chungnungbera chu Fakin awm rawh se,” a ti a. Abrama chuan a râllâk engkim aṭang chuan ani chu sâwma pakhat a pe a." 
Genesis14:21 Sodom lal chuan Abrama hnênah, “Thil dang chu nei la, ka mite kha erawh chu mi pe kîr rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis14:22 Abrama chuan Sodom lal chu a chhâng a, “ Lalpa Pathian Chungnungbera, lei leh vân neitu hnênah" 
Genesis14:23 ‘La zai khat tê pawh, pheikhawk hrui khat tê pawh, i ta rêng rêng pakhat mah ka la lo vang,’ tiin thu ka lo tiam tawh a ni; chutilo chu, ‘Abrama chu ka tihhausak alâwm,’ I ti dah ang e." 
Genesis14:24 Ka miten an eiral tawh chu ei ral ni sela, a dang chu eng mah ka la lo vang; ka thurualpui Anera mite, Eskola mite leh Mamre-a mite erawh chuan an chanvo tûr chu la rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:1 Chûng thil hnuah chuan Abrama chu zêlin a awm a, Lalpa chuan a rawn bia a. “Abram, thlaphâng suh, I tân phaw ka nih hi, I dawn tûr hi a ropui a ni,” a rawn ti a." 
Genesis15:2 Abrama chuan, “Aw Lalpa Pathian, fa ka nei lo hlen mai dâwn a, ka rokhâwmtu tûr lah Damaska mi Eliezara daih a ni ang a, eng nge mi dawntîr ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis15:3 Abrama chuan a sawi zêl a, “Ngai teh, fa min pe si lo va, ka ina piang ka chhiahhlawhin ka ro a luah ngei dâwn mai,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:4 Lalpa chuan a rawn chhâng a, “Chu mi chu i roluahtu tûr a ni lo, nangma fa ngeiin i ro a luah ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:5 Pâwnah a hruai chhuak a, “Vân lam khi thlîr teh, arsite khi i chhiar sêng em?” a ti a. “Khiti zât khi i thlahte an la ni dâwn” a ti a." 
Genesis15:6 Lalpa chu a ring a, chu chu a diknaah a lo pawmsak ta a." 
Genesis15:7 A hnênah chuan heti hian a ti ta a: “He ram hi neihtîr tûr chein Kaldai ram Ur khua aṭanga ko chhuaktu che Lalpa kha ka ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:8 Ani chuan, “Aw Lalpa Pathian, ka ta tûr a nih engtin nge ka hriat ang?” tiin a chhâng a." 
Genesis15:9 “Bâwngpa kum thum mi te, kêlpui kum thum mi te, berâmpa kum thum mi te, ṭhuro leh pârva no nên mi han lâk teh,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:10 Chûng chu a rawn lâksak a, a laiah a phel a, a phel chu inepin a tlarin a dah a; savate erawh chu a phel lo." 
Genesis15:11 Sa ruangahte chuan mu an lo ṭum ṭhîn a, Abrama chuan a lo hnawt zêl a." 
Genesis15:12 Ni a tlâk dâwn suar suar chuan a muhîl ta sulh a, hlauhawm thim takin a rawn bawh ta a." 
Genesis15:13 Abrama hnênah chuan, “I thlahte chu an hriat ngai loh ramah mikhual an ni dâwn; bawihah an tâng ang a, kum zali chhûng chu an tiduhdah ang tih hre rawh." 
Genesis15:14 Rawng an bâwlsak hnamte chu ka hrem ang a, chumi hnuah chu ram chu muk ṭânin an chhuahsan ang." 
Genesis15:15 Nang erawh chu, thlamuang takin i pi leh pute hnênah i châwl ve ang a, tarkûna damin an phûm ang che." 
Genesis15:16 Mi dang erawh chu chhuan li a ral hunah hetah hian an lo kîr leh ang, Amor mite suahsualna vâwrtâwp a thlen hunah chuan,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:17 Ni a tlâka, khua a thim tâk hle hnuin thuk, khu lût lût leh meichher alh hluah hluah chu sa ruang kârah chuan a vei a vei a." 
Genesis15:18 Chumi zân chuan Lalpan Abrama hnênah thu a thlung ta a, “He ram hi i thlahte hnênah ka pe ta. Aigupta ram lui aṭanga Eufretis luipui inkâr ram," 
Genesis15:19 Ken mi te, Kenis mi te, Kadmon mi te," 
Genesis15:20 Hit mi te, Periz mi te, Refaim te," 
Genesis15:21 Amor mi te, Kanan mi te, Girgas leh Jebus mi te ram hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis16:1 Abrama chu a nupui Saraii chuan fa a hrinsak lo va. Saraii chuan Aigupta mi, Hagari, bawih nula a nei a." 
Genesis16:2 Abrama hnênah Saraii chuan, “Ngai teh, Lalpa chuan fa neih min phalsak si lo va, ka bawihnu hi mutpui mai teh; ka fa ve tûr min hrinsak dâwn nia,” a ti a. Abrama chuan Saraii thu chu a zâwm a." 
Genesis16:3 Tichuan, Abrama chu kum sâwm Kanan rama a awm hnu chuan a nupui Saraii chuan a bawihnu Hagari, Aigupta mi chu, hmei atân a pasal chu a neihtîr ta a." 
Genesis16:4 A lo mutpui a, nau a pai ta a. Nau a pai tih a inhriat hnu chuan a pi chu a ngainêp ta a." 
Genesis16:5 Tichuan, Saraii chuan Abrama hnênah, “Heti taka min thamlo ta hi i thiam loh a ni. Ka bawihnu hi keimah ngeiin hmeiah ka neihtîr che a nih kha; nau a pai tih a inhriat aṭangin min ngainêp ta hle si a; chuvângin, Lalpa chuan nang nêna kan inkâr thu hi tifel teh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis16:6 Mahse, Abrama chuan Saraii chu a chhâng a, “I bawihnu chu i kuta awm alâwm, ṭha i tih ang angin ti rawh,” a ti a. Saraii chuan a tiduhdah ta a, a tlân bo phah ta hial a." 
Genesis16:7 Lalpa Vântirhkohvin Hagari chu thlalêrah Sur kawnga tuikhur kiangah a lo hmu a. 
Genesis16:8 A hnênah, “Saraii bawihnu Hagar, khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i niha, khawiah nge i kal dâwn?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ka pi Saraii ka tlân bosan a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis16:9 Lalpa Vântirhkoh chuan, “I pi hnênah kîr leh rawh, a hau che pawhin tuar hrâm hrâm rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis16:10 Lalpa Vântirhkoh chuan a sawi zêl a, “I thlahte ka tihpunsak ṭeuh dâwn che asin, tu man an chhiar sêng lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis16:11 Lalpa Vântirhkoh vêk chuan a sawi leh a, “Ngai teh, nau i pai hi; fapa i hring ang a, Lalpa chuan i manganzia a hre si a, a hmingah Ismaela sa ang che." 
Genesis16:12 Ani chu ram sabengtung ang a ni ang a, mi tu pawh a bei zêl ang a, anni pawhin an lo bei ang. A unaute tu mah a ngeih lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis16:13 A hnêna thusawitu Lalpa hmingah chuan, “El-roi’ a vuah a. “Min hmutu chu ka hmu ve ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis16:14 Chuvâng chuan, chu tuikhur chu ‘Beer-lahai-roi’ tih a ni ta a, Kades leh Bered inkâra awm a ni." 
Genesis16:15 Hagari chuan Abrama chu fapa a hrinsak a, Abrama chuan Hagari fa hmingah chuan, ‘Ismaela’ a sa a." 
Genesis16:16 Abrama chu Hagarin Ismaela a hrinsak khân kum sawmriat leh paruka upa a ni. 
Genesis17:1 Abrama chu kum sawmkua leh pakua a nihin a hnênah Lalpa chu a rawn inlâr a, “El-Sadaia ka nih hi, ka duhzâwng angin nung la, sawisêlbovin awm rawh." 
Genesis17:2 Nang nêna kan inkârah thu ka thlung ang a, nasa takin ka tipung ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis17:3 Abrama chu hmai lei siin a kûn a, a Pathian chuan a be zêl a." 
Genesis17:4 “Hei hi i tâna ka thuthlung chu a ni: Hnam tam tak thlahtu i ni ang a," 
Genesis17:5 i hming hi Abrama ni tawh lovin Abrahama a ni tawh zâwk ang; hnam tam tak paah ka siam tâk che hi. 
Genesis17:6 I chi ka tiṭha ang a, hnam tam tak thlahtu i ni ang a, lalte pawh i hring ang." 
Genesis17:7 Kan inkâra ka thuthlung chu i thlah lo awm zêlte thlengin ka tinghet tlat ang; i tân leh i thlah zêlte tân kumkhaw Pathian ka ni ang. 
Genesis17:8 “I thlah lo la awm tûrte rochun atân kumkhuaa an neih tûrin i mikhualna Kanan ram pum pui hi ka pe a che, an Pathian ka ni zêl bawk ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis17:9 Pathian chuan Abrahama hnênah thu a sawi zêl a, “Nang pawhin ka thuthlung hi i vawng reng tûr a ni, i thlah lo awm tûrte pawhin an zâwm zêl tûr a ni." 
Genesis17:10 Nang leh i thlahte nêna ka thuthlung, in zawm zêl tûr chu hei hi a ni: in zînga mipa tawh phawt chu an serh tan tûr a ni." 
Genesis17:11 In serh vun hmâwr in tan tûr a ni; chu chu kan inkâra thuthlung chhinchhiahna a ni ang. 
Genesis17:12 Kumkhuain in zînga mipa naupang chu ni riat a tlinah a serh in tan tûr a ni; in chhûng zînga piang, bawihte leh in chipui ni lo tangkaa in leite pawh an serh in tan tûr a ni." 
Genesis17:13 In ina piang bawih pawh in lei bawih pawh, an serh in tan ngei tûr a ni. In taksaah ka thuthlung chhinchhiahna chu kumkhuain a awm tûr a ni." 
Genesis17:14 Mipa tawh phawt, serh tan loh, a vun hmâwr tan loh chu a laichînte zîng ata tuithlâr tûr a ni, ka thuthlung a bawhchhiat avângin,” a ti a." 
Genesis17:15 Pathian chuan Abrahama hnênah heti hian a ti bawk: “I nupui Saraii pawh hi Saraii ti tawh suh, a hmingah Sari a ni tawh zâwk ang." 
Genesis17:16 Mal ka sâwm ang a, mal ka sâwm hnuah fapa a hrinsak ang che. Hnam tam tak nu a ni ang a, mi tam tak chunga lal tûrte pawh a thlah aṭangin an lo piang ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis17:17 Abrahama chu lei siin a kûn a, a nuih a za a, “Kum za mi hian fa ka nei ang a, kum sawmkaw mi Sari hian nau a pai ang maw?” a ti rilru a." 
Genesis17:18 Abrahama chuan Pathian hnênah, “Ṭha i tih chuan Ismaela hi dam zêl teh phawt se,” a ti a." 
Genesis17:19 Pathian erawh chuan a chhâng a, “I nupui Sari hian fa a hrinsak dâwn che alâwm, a hmingah Isaka i sa dâwn nia; ka thuthlung hi kumkhua atân amah leh a thlah zêlte tân ka vawng tlat dâwn a ni." 
Genesis17:20 Ismaela thu i sawi pawh ka hria e; ngai teh, ani pawh mal ka sâwm a, a chi ka tiṭha ang a, nasa takin ka tipung ang. Lal sâwm leh pahnih a hring ang a, hnam lian takah ka din dâwn a ni." 
Genesis17:21 Ka thuthlung erawh hi chu nakkum hetih huna Sarin a hrin tûr Isaka tân ka vawng ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis17:22 A sawi zawh chuan Pathian chuan Abrahama chu a chhohsan ta a. 
Genesis17:23 Tin, Abrahama chuan a fapa Ismaela leh a bawih, a ina piang leh a lei pawh, a ina awm mipa zawng zawng chu a hruai a, chumi ni chuan Pathianin a hrilh ang chuan an serh vun hmâwr chu a tansak ta a." 
Genesis17:24 A serh vun a tan chuan Abrahama chu kum sawmkua leh pakaw mi a ni. 
Genesis17:25 Ismaela pawh serh a tansak ni chuan kum sâwm leh kum thum mi a ni. 
Genesis17:26 Chumi ni ngei chuan Abrahama te, a fapa Ismaela te," 
Genesis17:27 a ṭhuihruai zawng zawng, a ina piang bawihte leh hnam dang, bawiha a leite chu an serh a tansak ta a." 
Genesis18:1 Mamre-a sasaw bula a puan in kawngkaah, chhûn ni sat lai takin Abrahama chu a ṭhu a, a hnênah Lalpa chu a rawn inlâr a." 
Genesis18:2 A han en chuan a bul maiah mi pathum an lo ding reng a; a han hmuh veleh chuan anni chu lâwm tûrin puan in kawngka ata chu a tlân chhuak a. Kûnin chibai a bûk a," 
Genesis18:3 “Ka pu, min khawngaih la, i chhiahhlawh hi min kal pêl lo hrâm teh." 
Genesis18:4 Tui tlêm han la ila, in kete sil ula, thing hlimah hian châwl rih teh u." 
Genesis18:5 In chhiahhlawh in rawn tlawh ta sa sa, chhâng tlêm ka han lâk ang che u a, in intiharh dâwn nia; chumi zawhah chuan in kal zêl a ni ang chu,” a ti a. “Chuti chu, i sawi ang chuan ti ta che,” an ti a." 
Genesis18:6 Abrahama chu puan inah a tlân lût a, Sari chu a ko va, “Chhangphut ṭha chi ṭîn khat la chhuak la, hmet la, chhangpêr siam thuai teh” a ti a." 
Genesis18:7 Abrahama chu bâwng rual awmnaah a tlân a, bâwngno chum thau tak a man a, chhiahhlawh a talhtîr a, a kang hmin ta thuai a." 
Genesis18:8 Bâwngsa kan chu bâwnghnute leh a dak nên a rawn la a, an hmaah a hlui a; an ei a, ani pawh chu an bulah, thing hlimah chuan a ding reng a." 
Genesis18:9 Anni chuan a hnênah, “Khawnge i nupui Sari a awm?” an ti a. “Puan in chhûngah hian,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:10 Pakhat chuan, “Thla kua a ral hunah ka lo kal leh ang a, i nupui Sari hian fapa a hring ang,” a ti a. A hnung maiah, puan in luhna phênah Sari chuan a lo ngaithla reng a." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahama leh Sari chu tar tawh tak, upa tak an ni; Sari pawh hmeichhe dân pangngaiin a awm tawh lo." 
Genesis18:12 Sari chu a nuih a za a, “Kei tarzûr tawh hian ka pasal ka la thlahlel ang maw, ani pawh a upa hle tawh si?” a ti rilru a." 
Genesis18:13 Lalpa chuan Abrahama hnênah, “Engtizia nge Sari nuih a zata, ‘Ka tar tawh vei nên fa ka la nei tak tak ang maw?’ a tih?" 
Genesis18:14 Lalpa tân tih theih loh a awm em ni? Thla kaw ral hnuah ka lo kal leh ang a, Sari hian fapa a lo hring tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:15 Sari chuan a hlau va, a pha chung a, “Ka nuih a za lo ve,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “I nuih a zat kha le!” a ti a." 
Genesis18:16 Chûng mite chu chuta ta chu an tho va, Sodom khaw lam chu an zu thlîr a. Thlah tûrin Abrahama pawh an rualin a kal ve a." 
Genesis18:17 Lalpa chuan, “Ka thiltih tum hi Abrahama lakah ka zêp ang em aw?" 
Genesis18:18 Abrahama hi hnam lian, hnam ropui tak a la ni ngei dâwn a, khawvêl hnam zawng zawngin mal insâwmsak nân tak ani hi an lam dâwn a." 
Genesis18:19 A fate leh a thlah zêlte Lalpa duhzâwnga awma, thil ṭha leh thil dik zirtîr tûrin ani hi ka thlan chhuah a ni si a. Lalpa chuan Abrahama hnêna a thutiam chu a tihlawhtling ngei dâwn si a,” a ti a ni." 
Genesis18:20 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Sodom leh Gomora khaw sual thu leh an thiltih râpthlâk thu ka beng a lo thleng hi a dik tak tak em tih en tûrin" 
Genesis18:21 ka chhuk dâwn a ni, ka zu hre chiang teh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:22 Mite chu Sodom khuaa kal tûrin an chhuk ta a. Abrahama erawh chu Lalpa bulah a ding khawtlai a. 
Genesis18:23 Abrahama chuan a hnaih a, “Mi sualte zînga awm mi ṭhate pawh chu i tiboral tel dâwn em ni?" 
Genesis18:24 Khuaah chuan mi ṭha, mi pawi khawih lo sawmnga awm sela, chûng mi ṭha sawmngate avângin khawpui chu zuah lovin i tichhia ang maw?" 
Genesis18:25 Mi ṭhate leh ṭha lote tuar inang rengin mi ṭhate chu mi sualte nên i tiboral êm lo vang chu! Lei chung zawng zawnga thuneitu, nang meuh chuan dik lo takin thil i ti âwm si lo va,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:26 “Sodom khuaah mi ṭha sawmnga ka hmuh chuan anmahni avângin khua chu ka zuah ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:27 Abrahama chuan a sawi leh a, “Kei vaivut leh meivâp mai hian Lalpa chu ka be pawp ta sa sa si che a," 
Genesis18:28 mi ṭha pangain sawmnga tling lo ta sela? Pangaa an tlin loh avângin khaw pum chu i tichhia ang maw?” a ti a. “Mi sawmli leh panga ka hmuh chuan ka tichhe lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:29 A la zâwt ta zêl a, “Mi sawmli chauh awm sela?” a ti a. “Mi sawmli avâng pawhin ka tichhe lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:30 “Ka sawi zêl pawhin Lalpa chuan ninawm ti teh suh se, mi sawmthum chauh lo awm sela?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Mi sawmthum chauh pawh hmu ila ka tichhe lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:31 “ Lalpa chu ka zâwt ta law law che a, sawmhnih chauh awm sela?” a ti a." 
Genesis18:32 Ani chuan, “Mi sawmhnih avâng pawh chuan ka tichhe lo vang,” a ti a, a chhâng a. “ Lalpa chuan lung lovah neih teh suh se, hei bâk hi chu ka zâwt tawh lo vang che, mi sâwm chauh awm ta sela?” a ti a. “Chûng mi sâwmte avâng pawh chuan ka tichhe lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:33 Abrahama nên an inbiak zawh chuan Lalpa chu a kal ta a. Abrahama pawh a in lamah a kîr leh ta a. 
Genesis19:1 Vântirhkoh pahnih chuan tlaiah Sodom khua chu an zu thleng a, Lota chu Sodom khaw kulh kawngkhâr bulah a lo ṭhu a. Anni chu a hmuh chuan be tûrin a tho va, hmai lei si-a kûnin chibai a bûk a." 
Genesis19:2 “Pute u, in chhiahhlawh ina zân riak tûrin lo kal hrâm teh u. In kête in sil ang a, zîng takah in kal leh mai dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:3 “Ni lo ve, khawlaiah kan riak ang,” an ti a. A sâwm tlut tlut avângin an zui a, a inah chuan an lût ta a. Ei tûr a buatsaih a, chhangpêr a hem hmin a, an ei ta a." 
Genesis19:4 An mut hmain khuaa mi, Sodom khaw paho, a pui a pangin vêng tina mipa zawng zawng chuan a in chu an rawn hual a." 
Genesis19:5 Lota chu an au va, a hnênah, “Zânina i mikhualte kha khawiah nge an awm? Han hruai chhuak rawh, kan lo pâwl teh ang,” an ti a." 
Genesis19:6 Lota chu kawngkhârah chuan a va chhuak a, a khâr leh a," 
Genesis19:7 “Ṭhiante u, hetiang thil sual hi tih tum lul lo teh hrâm u." 
Genesis19:8 Mipa la khawih loh fanu pahnih ka nei a, ka rawn hruai chhuahsak ang che u, in duh duhin in lo ti dâwn nia. Ka mikhual, ka in rawn pante hi zawng, eng mah tih lul suh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:9 “Kiang rawh, nang mikhual mai mai, kan chunga thu neih i tum vei em ni? Anni aiin kan sawisa na zâwk mai tûr che nia,” an ti a. Lota chu an rawn chîm ta huk a, kawngkhâr chu chhut chhiat an tum a." 
Genesis19:10 Vântirhkohte chuan an ban a, Lota chu an man a, inah an hnûk lût a, kawng chu an khâr leh ta a." 
Genesis19:11 Kawngka bula awm a lian a tê chu an mit an chhun delsak a, kawngkhâr chu an hmu thei ta lo va." 
Genesis19:12 Mite chuan Lota hnênah, “He khuaah hian mi dang, fapa te, fanu te, laichîn hnai i neih apiangte khua aṭang hian hruai chhuak rawh." 
Genesis19:13 He khua hi kan tichhe dâwn, an chanchin Lalpa benga thleng chu a râpthlâk êm a, tichhe tûrin min tîr a ni,” an ti a." 
Genesis19:14 Tichuan, Lota chu a chhuak a, a fanu neitu tûr, a mâkpa hualte chu a va hrilh a, “Tho ula, kan khua hi tlânsan rawh u. Lalpa chuan a tichhe dâwn,” a ti a. A mâkpa hualte chuan fiamthu a thawhah an lo ngai a." 
Genesis19:15 Khawfîng a chahin vântirhkohte chuan Lota chu an tur sek a, “Hmanhmawh rawh, i nupui leh i fanu pahnih, heta awmte hi hruai chhuak teh, he khaw hremna hi in tuar ve dah ang e,” an ti a." 
Genesis19:16 Ani erawh chu muangchângin a che a. Tichuan, mite chuan a nupui leh a fanute kut chu a kut nên an chelh a, anni chu Lalpa chuan a lainat êm si a; chuvângin, khua ata chu an kai chhuak ta a." 
Genesis19:17 An hruai chhuah hnu chuan, “Kal thuai thuai rawh u, hnung lam pawh hawi suh u, phaiah hian khawiah mah châwl hek suh u, tlângahte sâwn tlân rawh u, in tuar ve hlauh dah ang e,” Lota hnênah chuan an ti a." 
Genesis19:18 Lota chuan, “Ni lo ve, ka pu," 
Genesis19:19 min chhanhima min khawngaih ta sa sa, i chhiahhlawh hi dawh hrâm teh; tlângram pana ka tlân chuan he thil ṭha lo hian min nang hman ang a, ka thi mai ang." 
Genesis19:20 Ka hmaa khaw te tak tê saw tlân nân a hnai ber a, tah sâwn ka tlân ang e, ngaihmawh tham pawh a nih loh saw. Kan thih loh nân tah sâwn kan tlân mai ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:21 “I thu chu ka zâwm mai a ni ang chu, i khaw sawi chu ka tichhe lo nâng e." 
Genesis19:22 Hmanhmawh la, tah chuan tlân rawh; i thlen hma chu eng mah ka tih theih loh hi,” a ti a. Chuvâng chuan, he khua hian Zoar tih hming a pu ta a ni." 
Genesis19:23 Lotan Zoar khua a thlenin chu ramah chuan ni a chhuak ta a. 
Genesis19:24 Tichuan, vân aṭangin, Lalpa mei, kât kâng chu Lalpa chuan Sodom leh Gomora khuaah chuan a sûrtîr ta a." 
Genesis19:25 Chûng khuate chu a tichhe vek a, phaizâwla khuate leh a chhûnga chêngte chu leia thil ṭote lamin a tichhe ta vek a." 
Genesis19:26 Lota nupui erawh chuan a thlîr kîr vei a, chi khâwn dingah a chang ta a." 
Genesis19:27 Abrahama chu zîng takah a tho va, Lalpa bula a dinna hmunah khân a kal a." 
Genesis19:28 Sodom leh Gomora khua te leh a phairam pum chu a zu thlîr vêl a, meipui khu anga khu luih luih chauh chu a hmu thei a ni." 
Genesis19:29 Pathianin phairam khuate a tihchhiat khân Abrahama chu a hre reng a. Lota chênna khua a tihchhiat pawh khân Lota chu a chhan chhuahsak a ni. 
Genesis19:30 Zoar khuaa awm reng a hlauh avângin Lota chu a fanu pahnih nên tlângramah an chho va, an awm ta a. A fanu pahnih nên chuan pûkah an awm a ni." 
Genesis19:31 A upa zâwk chuan a nau hnênah, “Kan pa hi a tar tawh hle a, khawvêl pum pui tih dân anga min nei tûr mipa an awm tawh si lo." 
Genesis19:32 Ti rawh, kan pa hi uainin hrai ila, a bulah i mu ang; Tichuan, kan pa chi a mang dâwn lo nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:33 Chumi zân chuan an pa chu uainin an hrai rui a. A upa zâwk chu a pa bulah chuan a va mu a, ani chuan a lo mut lai emaw, a thawh leh lai emaw a hre lo." 
Genesis19:34 A tûkah chuan a upa zâwk chuan a nau hnênah, “Ngai teh, nizân khân kan pa bulah ka mu a, zâninah pawh uainin i hrai leh ang; a bulah va mu ve ang che; tichuan, kan pa chi a mang dâwn lo nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:35 An pa chu uainin an hrai a, a naupang zâwk chu a tho va, an pa bulah chuan a va mu a, a lo mut lai emaw, a thawh leh lai emaw a hre lo." 
Genesis19:36 Lota fanu pahnih chuan an pa fa chu an pai ve ve ta a. 
Genesis19:37 A upa zâwk chuan fapa a nei a, a hmingah ‘Moaba’ a sa a; chu mi chu tûnlaia Moab-ho thlahtu hi a ni." 
Genesis19:38 A naupang zâwk pawh chuan fapa a nei a, a hmingah ‘Ben-amona’ a sa a, tûnlaia Amon mite thlahtu hi a ni." 
Genesis20:1 Abrahama chu Negeb lamah a kal zêl a, Kades leh Sur inkârah awmhmun a khuar a, Gerar khuaa an awm laiin," 
Genesis20:2 Abrahama chuan a nupui Sari chu “Ka farnu a ni,” a ti a; tichuan, Abimeleka, Gerar lal chuan, mi a tîr a, Sari chu a inah a hruaitîr a." 
Genesis20:3 Zan khat chu mumangah Abimeleka hnênah Pathian chu a lo kal a, “He hmeichhia hi mi nupui a ni a, i lâksak vei a, i thi ngei ang,” a rawn ti a." 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleka chuan a kut hmâwr pawh a la dehsak lo va; “ Lalpa, pawi khawih lo pawh hi i tihlum tho dâwn em ni?" 
Genesis20:5 Amah ngeiin, ‘Ka farnu a ni,’ ka hnênah a ti a, a hmeichhia lahin ‘Ka nuṭa a ni,’ a ti bawk si a, rilru thianghlim leh dik tak pua ti ka ni asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:6 Pathianin a mangah chuan a chhâng a, “Rilru thianghlim tak pua ti i nih ka hria e, ka laka thil sual i tih loh nân ka vêng tlat che atin alâwm a kut hmâwr i khawih pawh ka phal loh ni." 
Genesis20:7 He mi nupui hi tûnah pe kîr leh rawh, zâwlnei a nih hi. I nun theih nân a dilsak ang che, i pêk kîr leh loh chuan i thi ang, i mi zawng zawngte pawh an thi vek ang tih hre rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:8 A tûk zîngah Abimeleka chuan a ṭhuihruaite a ko khâwm a, a thil hmuh chu a hrilh vek a, an hlau ta êm êm a." 
Genesis20:9 Abimeleka chuan Abrahama chu a ko va, a hnênah, “Kan chungah eng nge i tih tâk le? I pawi eng nge kan sawia, ka chungah leh ka ram chungah hetiang thiam lohna nasa tak hi i rawn thlen? Thil âwm lo tak i ti a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:10 Abimeleka vêk chuan Abrahama hnênah, “Eng vângin nge kan chungah hetiang thil hi i rawn tih?” a ti leh a." 
Genesis20:11 Abrahama chuan, “He khuaah hian Pathian ṭih mi tu mah an awm ka ring lo va, ka nupui avâng hian min lo that mai ang tih ka hlau atin a ni." 
Genesis20:12 Ka farnu pawh a ni tak tak asin; nu hrang laka ka pa fanu a ni a, nupuiah ka nei ta a ni." 
Genesis20:13 Pathianin kan pa in leh lo aṭanga min vahvaihtîr tâk hnuah hi chuan, ‘Ka chunga i khawngaihna i lantîr dân tûr chu hmun tinah, ka nuṭa a ni, ti zêl rawh,’ ka ti rêng a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:14 Abimeleka chuan berâm te, bâwngpa te, bawihpa te, bawihnu te a thlang chhuak a, Abrahama chu a pe a, a nupui Sari pawh a pe kîr a." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleka chuan, “Hei, ka ram hi a awm duai alâwm, i duh duhnaah awm rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:16 Sari hnênah pawh chuan, “Ngai teh, i nuṭa chu tangka sâng ka pêk tâk hi, in zaa tâna zângna dawmna ni rawh se, i fihlîm ta e,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:17 Abrahama chuan Pathian hnênah a ngensak a, Pathianin Abimeleka chu, a nupui te leh a chhiahhlawh te nên a tidam leh a, nau an nei thei ta a." 
Genesis20:18 Abrahama nupui Sari vâng chuan Abimeleka te chhûngkua chu Pathianin a tiching a ni. 
Genesis21:1 Lalpa chuan Sari chu a zu kan a. Lalpa chuan a tiam tawh ang khân Sari chu a tihsak ta a. 
Genesis21:2 Sari chuan nau a pai ta a, Pathianin a sawi hun takah khân Abrahama chu, pa upa tak a nih hnuin, fapa a hrinsak ta a." 
Genesis21:3 Abrahaman Sarin fapa a hrinsak hmingah chuan Isaka a sa a. 
Genesis21:4 Pathianin thu a pêk angin a ni riat ni chuan Abrahama chuan a fapa Isaka serh chu a tansak ta a. 
Genesis21:5 A fapa Isaka a pian chuan Abrahama chu kum zaa upa a ni. 
Genesis21:6 Sari chuan: “Pathianin min nuihtîr tâk hi, A hria apiangin min nuihpui ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:7 “Abrahama hnênah, ‘Sarin nau hnute a pe ang,’ tu nge tih nachâng hria ang? Mahse, a tar hnuin fapa ka hrinsak hi,” a ti bawk a." 
Genesis21:8 Nau chu a ṭhang lian a, hnute hnêk bântîr a lo hun ta a. Chumi ni chuan Abrahaman ruai ropui tak a ṭheh a." 
Genesis21:9 Aigupta mi Hagarin Abrahama fapa a hrinsak khân a fapa Isaka chu a chhaih lai Sari chuan a hmuhin," 
Genesis21:10 Abrahama hnênah, “He bawihnu hi, a fapa nên hnawt chhuak rawh. He bawih fa hian ka fapa Isaka hi ro a luahpui tûr a ni lo,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:11 Chu chuan Abrahama rilru a tihrehawm hle a, a fapa a ni ve bawk si." 
Genesis21:12 Mahse, Pathian chuan Abrahama hnênah, “Naupang chungchâng leh i bawihnu chungchâng hi lunglovah la suh. Sari sawi ang chu zâwm rawh, Isaka-ah hian a ni i thlahte chhui a nih dâwn." 
Genesis21:13 Bawihnu fapa pawh nangma thlah ngei a nih avângin hnam ropui takah ka din tho dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:14 A tûk zîngah Abrahama chuan Hagari pêk tûr chhang leh savun tuithâwl tuia khat a la a, a phurhtîr a, a fapa nên chuan a tîr bo ta a, Beer-seba thlalêrah chuan kalna chin tûr hre lovin a vâk a vâk a." 
Genesis21:15 Savun tuithâwla tui chu an in zawh chuan naupang chu hnimbuk hnuaiah a dah a, hla fe, thal kah phâk tâwkah a kal a, a ṭhu a," 
Genesis21:16 “Naupang thi lai ka hmu ngam lo,” a ti a ni. Hla takah chuan a ṭhu a, a ṭap a." 
Genesis21:17 Naupang au râwl chu Pathianin a lo hria a, Pathian Vântirhkoh chuan vân aṭangin Hagari chu a au va, ‘Hagar, eng i ti nge ni? Thlaphâng suh, a awmna hmuna naupang râwl chu Pathianin a hria asin," 
Genesis21:18 ti rawh, naupang chu kaitho la, thlêm rawh, hnam ropui takah ka din dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:19 Pathian chuan a mit a tihvârsak a, tuichhunchhuah a hmu ta a. A va pan a, tuithâwl chu a thâl khat a, naupang chu a intîr a." 
Genesis21:20 Naupang chu a lo ṭhang lian a, Pathianin a awmpui zêl a, thal kah a thiam êm êm a." 
Genesis21:21 Paran thlalêrah awmhmun a khuar a, Aigupta ram aṭangin a nu chuan nupui a neihsak a." 
Genesis21:22 Chutih hun vêl chuan Abimeleka chu a sipai hotu Fikola nên Abrahama hnênah an lo kal a, “I thiltih apiangah Pathianin a awmpui che hi." 
Genesis21:23 Chuvângin, ka tu leh fate chungah emaw, ka chungah emaw thil ṭha lo ti lo tûrin Pathian hming chhâlin chhia chham rawh. I chunga ka ṭhat ang bawkin ka chungah leh i chênna ram chungah hian ṭhat chhuah tiam rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:24 Abrahama chuan, “Tiam e a,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:25 Abimeleka chhiahhlawhte chuan Abrahama tuichhunchhuah an chhuhsak a; chumi chungchângah chuan Abimeleka chu a khak a. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleka chuan, “Chu, tu tih nge ka hre ve hlei nêm; min va hrilh lo ve, tûnah chauh a ni ka hriat,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:27 Abrahama chuan berâm leh bâwngpa a la a, Abimeleka chu a pe a, an pahnih chuan thu an thlung ta a." 
Genesis21:28 Abrahama chuan, berâm rual zînga mi berâmla pasarih pawh a dah hrang a." 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleka chuan, “Engtizia nge berâmla pasarih hi i dah hran le?” a ti a." 
Genesis21:30 “He tuichhunchhuah hi ka laih ngei a ni tih hriat nân hêng berâmla pasarih hi nei ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:31 Chuvâng chuan, chu hmun chuan Beer-seba hming a pu ta a ni, an pahnihin thu an intiam tâk avângin." 
Genesis21:32 Thu an thlun zawh chuan Abimeleka chu a sipai hotu Fikola nên, an chhuak a, Filistia ramah an haw ta a." 
Genesis21:33 Abrahama chuan Beer-seba-ah chuan Esel thing a phun a, Lalpa chatuan Pathian hming chu a lam a." 
Genesis21:34 Abrahama chu Filistia ramah kum tam fe a awm ta a. 
Genesis22:1 Chûng thil hnuah chuan Pathianin Abrahama chu a fiah a, “Abraham,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Eng nge ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis22:2 “I fapa mal, i duh êm êm Isaka hi hruai la, Moria ramah kalpui teh; ka hrilh tûr che tlângah hâlral thilhlan atân hlân rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis22:3 Tin, Abrahama chu zîng takah a tho va; sabengtung a siam a, a naute zînga tlangvâl pahnih leh a fapa Isaka chu a ko va; hâlral thilhlana hman tûr thing a ek a; a tho va, Pathian hrilh hmun lam pan chuan an chhuak ta a." 
Genesis22:4 Ni thum ni chuan Abrahama chuan a han thlîr a, hla fe aṭang chuan chu hmun chu a hmu ta a." 
Genesis22:5 Abrahama chuan a naute hnênah, “Hetah hian sabengtung hi lo awmpui ula, sawtah sâwn naupang nên hian kan kal ang a, Pathian chibai kan va bûk ang a, kan lo kîr leh mai ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis22:6 Abrahama chuan hâlral thilhlan thing chu a la a, a fapa Isaka chu a puttîr a, ani chuan mei leh chem chu a keng a, an kal dûn ta a." 
Genesis22:7 Isaka chuan a pa Abrahama chu a bia a, “Ka pa,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Eng nge ni, ka fapa?” a ti a. “En teh, mei leh thing chu kan keng a, hâl ral tûr berâmno chu khaw nge?” a ti a." 
Genesis22:8 Abrahama chuan a chhâng a, “Ka fapa, Pathianin hâl ral tûr berâmno chu a hmu mai dâwn alâwm,” a ti a. Tichuan, an kal dûn ta zêl a." 
Genesis22:9 Pathianin hmun a hrilh chu an thleng a; chutah chuan Abrahaman maichâm a siam a, thing chu a chhep a, a fapa Isaka chu a phuar a, maichâm thing chungah chuan a mut a." 
Genesis22:10 Abrahama chuan a ban a, chem chu a la a, a fa chu tihhlum a tum ta a." 
Genesis22:11 Vân aṭangin Lalpa tirhkohvin a rawn au va, “Abraham, Abraham,” a rawn ti a. Ani chuan, “Eng nge ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis22:12 “Naupang chungah i kut thlâk suh, eng mah tih hek suh. Pathian i ṭihzia ka hre ta, i fapa neih chhun meuh pawh ka tân i ui loh hi,” a rawn ti a." 
Genesis22:13 Abrahama chu a han hawi vêl a, a hnung lamah chuan berâmpa a hmu a, thingbukah a ki a lo tâng a. Abrahama chuan berâm chu a man a, a fapa aiah hâlral thilhlan atân a hlân ta hlauh a." 
Genesis22:14 Abrahama chuan chu hmun hmingah chuan, “ Lalpa Jireh” a sa a, tûn thlengin “ Lalpa tlângah chuan hmuh a ni,” tih a ni ta a." 
Genesis22:15 Lalpa tirhkoh chuan Abrahama chu vân aṭangin a rawn be nawn leh a. 
Genesis22:16 “I fapa neih chhun chu ka tân ui lovin he thil hi i ti a. 
Genesis22:17 Mal ka sâwm ang che a, i thlahte chu chunga arsi zât leh hnuaia ṭiauvaivut zâtin ka tipung ang tih mahni inchhâlin thu ka tiam e. I thlahte chuan an hmêlmate kulh kawngkaah thu an nei ang." 
Genesis22:18 Khawvêla hnam tinrêngin i thlahte chhâlin mal an insâwmsak ang, ka thu i awih avângin chûng chu tihsak che ka tiam a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis22:19 Abrahama chu a naute hnênah chuan a kîr a, Beer-seba-ah an haw ta a. Abrahama chu Beer-seba-ah chuan a awm ta rih a." 
Genesis22:20 Chûng thil hnuah chuan, “Milkaii chuan i nau Nahora chu fate a hrinsak ṭeuh asin,” tiin Abrahama chu an rawn hrilh a." 
Genesis22:21 A fa tîr chu Uza a ni a, a naute chu Buza leh Kemuela, Arama pa chu an ni." 
Genesis22:22 Kheseda te, Hazoa te, Pildasa te, Jidlafa te, Bethuela te a hring bawk a." 
Genesis22:23 Bethuela chu Rebeki pa a ni. Hêng mi pasarihte hi Milkaii chuan Abrahama nau Nahora chu a hrinsak a ni. 
Genesis22:24 Tin, a hmei Reumi pawhin Teba te, Gahama te, Tahasa te, Maaka te a hrinsak bawk a." 
Genesis23:1 Sari chu kum za leh sawmhnih leh pasariha upa a ni. Sari dam chhûng kum zât chu chuti chu a ni. 
Genesis23:2 Kiriat-Arba khuaah, tûna Hebron khua an tih tâk, Kanan ramah chuan a thi a. Abrahama chu a sûn tûr leh ṭah tûrin a lo kal a." 
Genesis23:3 A nupui ruang bul aṭang chuan a tho va, Hit mite chu a bia a," 
Genesis23:4 “In zînga lo pêm mikhual mai ka la ni a, in ramah inphûmna tûr hmun min pe ve rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis23:5 Hit mite chuan Abrahama chu an chhâng a," 
Genesis23:6 “Ka pu, kan thu hi ngaithla teh, kan zîngah Pathian mi thlan i ni a, i duhna lai ber, kan thlân hmunah hian inphûm mai rawh u, tu man in inphûmna thlân hmun atân ram kan ui lo vang,” an ti a." 
Genesis23:7 Abrahama chu a tho va, chu ram hotute leh Hit mite hmaah chuan a kûn a, an hnênah," 
Genesis23:8 “Kan inphûmna tûr hmun min duhsak takzet a nih chuan Zohara fapa, Efrona ram, Makpela biala pûk awmna, a ram kila ram awm hi," 
Genesis23:9 a man tâwk a chhiar zâtin thlân hmuna ka neih atân min leitîr teh se, khawngaih takin min sawipui rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis23:10 Efrona chu Hit mite zîngah chuan a ṭhu ve reng a. Hit mite hriatah, Hit mi Efrona chuan, khaw kulh kawngkaa hotu ṭhute hmaah ngei chuan Abrahama hnênah," 
Genesis23:11 “Hralh lo ve, ka pu, ka thu hi ngaithla teh, pûk leh a awmna ram chu ka pe a che, ka laichînte hriat ngeiah ka pêk che hi, inphûm nân hmang mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis23:12 Chûng mite hmaah chuan Abrahama chu a kûn a," 
Genesis23:13 an hriatah chuan Efrona hnênah, “Ngai teh, rem i tih chuan ram man chu ka pe zâwk ang che. La hrâm la; tichuan, inphûm nân ka nei dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis23:14 Efrona chuan Abrahama chu a chhâng a," 
Genesis23:15 “Ka pu, ka thu hi ngaithla hrâm teh. He ram hi tangka sekel zali bûk man lek a ni a, chu chu nang leh kei, kan inkârah sawi tham a ni hlei nêm, inphûmna thlân atân chuan nei rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis23:16 Abrahama chuan Hit mite hriata Efrona sawi zât tangkarua chu a bûk chhuahsak ta a; an tangka hman lai, sekel bûk zali chu a pe ta a." 
Genesis23:17 Makpela-a Efrona ram, Mamre dep pûk awmna chu, a ri chhûnga thing awm zawng zawng nên," 
Genesis23:18 Abrahama chuan a nei ta a; Hit mite leh khaw kulh kawngkaa ṭhute hmaah chuan tihngheh a ni ta a. 
Genesis23:19 Makpela rama pûkah chuan Abrahama chuan a nupui Sari chu a phûm ta a. Chu hmun chu Hebron an tih tâk Mamre dep, Kanan rama awm a ni." 
Genesis23:20 Chu ram chu Hit mite kut aṭangin thlân hmun atân Abrahama chuan a nei hlen ta a. 
Genesis24:1 Abrahama chu a kum a lo tam a, a upa ta hle a, Lalpa chuan kawng tinrêngah Abrahama chu mal a sâwm a." 
Genesis24:2 Abrahama chuan a chhiahhlawh min ber, an chhûngkaw enkawltu hnênah, “Ka malpui kârah i kut dah la, Lalpa, vân Pathian leh lei Pathian chhâlin chhia ka chhamtîr dâwn che a ni." 
Genesis24:3 Ka chênna ram, Kanan nula zînga mi, ka fapa Isaka tân nupui i neihsak tûr a ni lo." 
Genesis24:4 Ka pianna ramah i kal ang a, ka laichînte zîngah, ka fapa Isaka nupui i va zawng zâwk tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:5 Chhiahhlawh chuan, “Hmeichhia chuan he ramah hian min rawn zui duh lo sela, i fapa hi i lo kalna ramah chuan ka hruai kîr leh tûr em ni ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis24:6 Abrahama chuan, “Chu ramah chuan ka fapa hi i hruai kîr hauh tûr a ni lo." 
Genesis24:7 Lalpa vân Pathian chuan ka pa in leh lo, ka pianna ram aṭangin min hruai chhuak a, ‘He ram hi i thlahte hnênah ka pe ang,’ tiin a tiam tlat a ni. Ani chuan i hmaah Vântirhkoh a tîr ang a, ka fapa nupui tûr i rawn hâwn thei mai ang." 
Genesis24:8 Hmeichhia chuan a zui duh tlat loh che erawh chuan ka hnêna i chhechham lakah i fihlîm ang; eng pawh ni se, ka fapa hi chutah chuan i hruai kîr tûr a ni lo,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:9 Tichuan, chhiahhlawh chuan a pu Abrahama malpui inkârah chuan a kut a dah a, chu thil thu-ah chuan a hmaah chhia a chham ta a." 
Genesis24:10 Chhiahhlawh chuan a pu sanghâwngsei sâwm a hruai a, thilpêk tûr chi tinrêng a keng a, Nahora awmna khua Aram-Naharaim lam chu a pan ta a." 
Genesis24:11 Hmeichhe tuichawi hun, tlai ni nêmah, chu khaw dai kianga tuichhunchhuah bulah chuan a sanghâwngsei chu a bawhtîr a." 
Genesis24:12 Heti hian a ti a: “Aw Lalpa, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, ka pu Abrahama chungah ngilneih chhuah la, ka kawng hi tihmuingîl ang che." 
Genesis24:13 Hei tuikhur bulah hian ka lo ding ang a, khuaa nulate chuan tui an rawn chawi ang a;" 
Genesis24:14 ‘Khawngaih takin i tuibêl chu han la thla la, ka lo in teh ang,’ ka ti dâwn a ni. ‘In rawh, i sanghâwngseite pawh tui ka han chawisak ang e,’ tia mi chhângtu chu i chhiahhlawh Isaka nupui tûra i nula ruat chu ni rawh se, chu chu ka pu chungah i ngilneihna i lantîr a ni tih chhinchhiahnaah ka ngai ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:15 A sawi zawh hma chuan Abrahama nau Nahora fapa Bethuela fanu, Rebeki chu tuibêl kengin a lo kal a." 
Genesis24:16 Chu nula chu Milkaii fanu a ni a, nula hmêlṭha tak, nula thianghlim, mipa la khawih loh a ni. Tuikhurah chuan a chhuk a, a bêl chu a thâl khat a, a lo chhuak a." 
Genesis24:17 Chhiahhlawh chu a lam pan chuan a va tlân a, “I bela tui kha mi lo intîr teh,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:18 “Ka pu, in rawh,” a ti a, a tuibêl put chu a la thla a, a intîr ta a." 
Genesis24:19 Duh tâwka a intîr hnu chuan, “I sanghâwngseite pawh an duh tâwka an in tûr tui ka han chawisak ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:20 A tuibêl chu ran tuikuangah chuan a chhûng thuai a, tuichhunchhuahah chuan a chhuk a, sanghâwngsei zawng zawng duh tâwka in tur a chawisak ta a." 
Genesis24:21 Chutih chhûng chuan a kal chhan Lalpa chuan a tihlawhtling a ni nge ni lo ngaihtuah chungin a ding a, a en ta reng a." 
Genesis24:22 Sanghâwngseite chuan duh tâwk tui an in hnu chuan, sekel chanvea rit rangkachak hnâr vuah a la chhuak a, a hnârah a vuahsak a; rangkachak ngûn pahnih, sekel sâwma rit a buntîr bawk a." 
Genesis24:23 “Tu fanu nge i nih, min hrilh teh, zân kan riahna tûr i pa inah a awm thei ang em?” a ti a." 
Genesis24:24 “Bethuela fanu ka nih hi, ani chu Milkaiin Nahora a hrinsak kha a ni." 
Genesis24:25 Buhpâwl leh ran chaw pawh kan ngah asin, riahna tûr pawh kan nei e,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:26 Chu mi chu a kûn a, Lalpa hmaah a bawkkhup a." 
Genesis24:27 “Ka pu chunga a ngilneihna danglam ngai lo Abrahama Pathian Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se, ka pu chhûngte inah, kei pawh min hruai lût ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:28 Chûng thil chu a nute hrilh tûrin nula chu a tlân a," 
Genesis24:29 Rebeki chuan nuṭa Labana a nei a; ani chu tuichhunchhuah rawn pan tûr chuan a tlân a. 
Genesis24:30 A farnu hnâr vuah leh ngûn a hmuha, ‘chutiang khatiang chuan min bia,’ tih a sawi a hriat khân chu mi lam pan chuan a tlân a ni. A va thlen chuan tuikhura sanghâwngsei bulah a lo la ding reng a." 
Genesis24:31 Labana chuan, “Nang, Lalpa duhsak, lo kal teh, thlenna tûr leh sanghâwngsei awmna tûr ka buatsaih vek tawh asin, pâwnah engati nge i la din reng le?” a ti a." 
Genesis24:32 Ani chu Labana chuan inah a zui lût a, sanghâwngsei phurte chu Labana chuan a hlân thlâksak a, buhpâwl leh ran chaw te chu sanghâwngseite pawh a pe a. A kalpuite nêna an ke silna tûr tui a rawn la bawk a." 
Genesis24:33 A hmaa chaw an han hlui dâwn lai chuan Abrahama chhiahhlawh chuan, “Ka sawi tûr ka sawi zawh hma chu eng mah ka ei lo vang,” a ti a. “Sawi ta che,” an ti a." 
Genesis24:34 Ani chuan, “Abrahama chhiahhlawh ka ni a, ka pu chu nasa takin Lalpa chuan mal a sâwm a." 
Genesis24:35 A neinung ta hle a ni. Berâm te, ran te, bawihpa te, bawihnu te, sanghâwngsei leh sabengtung te a pe ṭeuh va, tangkarua leh rangkachak nên." 
Genesis24:36 Ka pu nupui Sari chuan upa tak a nih hnuin fapa a hrinsak a, ani chu a neih zawng zawng a pe ta a." 
Genesis24:37 Ka pu chuan chhia min chhamtîr a; ‘Ka awmna ram Kanan mite nula zînga mi hi ka fapa tân nupui neihsak suh. 
Genesis24:38 Ka laichîn te, ka chhûngte hnênah i kal zâwk ang a, ka fapa tân nupui i zawng tûr a ni,’ min ti a." 
Genesis24:39 Ka pu hnênah chuan, ‘Hmeichhiain min zui duh lo ta sela engtin nge ni ang?’ ka ti a." 
Genesis24:40 Ani chuan, ‘ Lalpa duhzâwngin ka awm ṭhîn a, ani ngei chuan a tirhkoh i rualin a kaltîr ang a; i tih tûr chu a tihhlawhtlinsak ang che. Ka chhûngte, ka laichînte zînga mi ngei ka fapa tân nupui i zawng tûr a ni. Ka laichînte hnên i thlen hunah chauh i chhechham aṭangin i thiang ang."
