Genesis24:41 Ka laichînte hnêna i kala, nupui tûr an lo pêk duh loh che chuan i fihlîm ang,’ tiin min ti a, chhia ka chham ta a ni." 
Genesis24:42 “Vawiina tuikhur ka lo thlen khân heti hian ka ti a, ‘Aw Lalpa, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, ka thiltih tûrah min tihhlawhtlin takzet dâwn chuan heti hi ni teh se," 
Genesis24:43 tuikhur bula ka awm lai hian khuaa nula, tuichawi tûrin an lo kal ang a; ‘I bêla tui kha ka lo in teh ang,’ ka ti dâwn a ni." 
Genesis24:44 ‘In rawh, i sanghâwngsei in tûr pawh ka han chawisak ang e,’ titu chu ka pu fapa nupui atân Lalpa mi ruat chu ni rawh se,’ ka ti a." 
Genesis24:45 Rilrua ka sawi zawh hma chuan Rebeki a lo kal a, tuibêl a rawn pu a. Tuikhura tui chu a thâl zawh chuan, ‘Khawngaih takin i tui chu mi intîr teh,’ ka ti a." 
Genesis24:46 A tuibêl chu a chawi thla a, ‘In rawh, i sanghâwngseite in tûr pawh ka han chawi ang e,’ a ti a. Ka in a, ka sanghâwngseite pawh chuan duh tâwk an in ta a." 
Genesis24:47 A hnênah chuan, ‘Tu fanu nge i nih?’ ka ti a. Ani chuan, ‘Bethuela fanu ka ni, ani chu Nahora fapa a ni, a nu chu Milkaii a ni,’ a ti a. Hnâr vuah ka vuahsak a, ngûn ka buntîr bawk a." 
Genesis24:48 Lalpa hmaah chuan ka kûn a, ka pu Abrahama Pathian Lalpa chu ka fak a; ka pu fapa nupui atân a laichîn fanu hnêna min hruai vang vang hi ka fak a ni." 
Genesis24:49 Ka pu chu in khawngaih dâwn chuan min hrilh ula, in khawngaih thei lo a nih pawhin min hrilh bawk ula, ka hawi lam lam ka hawi dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:50 Labana leh Bethuela chuan an chhâng a, “He thil hi Lalpa tih a nih hi; keini remtih leh tih loh tûr pawh zu ni lo va!" 
Genesis24:51 Rebeki chu i kuta awm a ni a, hruai la, Lalpa thu angin i pu fapa nupuiah nei ang che,” an ti a." 
Genesis24:52 Abrahama chhiahhlawh chuan an thutlûkna a hriat chuan lei siin Lalpa hmaah a kûn a. 
Genesis24:53 Tangkarua leh rangkachaka siam thil, thawmhnaw te a rawn phawrh chhuak a, Rebeki chu a pe a, a nuṭa leh a nu chu thil hlu tak tak a pe bawk a." 
Genesis24:54 A kalpuite nên chuan an eiin an in ta a. Zânah chuan an mu a, a tûk zînga an thawh veleh, “Ka pu hnênah min kîrtîr rawh u le,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:55 Rebeki nuṭa leh a nu chuan, “Kan nau hi ni sâwm emaw tal la awm rih sela, chutah in kal dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
Genesis24:56 Ani chuan, “Min chelh khawtlai suh u, Lalpa chuan ka kawng min tihtluansak ta si a, ka pu hnêna kîr min phal teh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:57 “Nula chu ko ila, a ngaih dân amah ngei pawh zâwt ila,” an ti a." 
Genesis24:58 Rebeki chu an ko va, “He mi hi i zui duh mai em?” an ti a. Ani chuan, “Duh e,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:59 Tichuan, an farnu Rebeki chu a awmtu nên Abrahama chhiahhlawh leh a kalpuite nên chuan an kaltîr ta a." 
Genesis24:60 Rebeki chu mal an sâwmsak a: “Kan farnu, a sînga sîng têl nu ni la, I thlahte chuan an hmêlmate kulh kawngkhârah Thu nei rawh se,” an ti a." 
Genesis24:61 Tichuan, Rebeki leh a chhiahhlawh nulate chu sanghâwngseiah chuan an chuang a, mi chu an zui ta a. Abrahama chhiahhlawh chuan Rebeki chu a hruai a, an kal ta a." 
Genesis24:62 An thang hlân chuan Isaka chu Beer-lahai-roi aṭangin a lo kîr a, Negeb lamah awmhmun a khuar a." 
Genesis24:63 Isaka chu tlaiah daiah a lêng chhuak a, sanghâwngsei lo kalte chu a hmu a." 
Genesis24:64 Rebekin Isaka a han hmuh chuan sanghâwngsei aṭangin a chhuk a. 
Genesis24:65 Abrahama chhiahhlawh hnênah chuan, “Saw, phûla min hmuak tûr lo kal saw tu nge ni?” a ti a. Chhiahhlawh chuan, “Saw saw ka pu chu alâwm,” a ti a. Tichuan, a hmai khuhna chu a phawrh a, a inkhuh ta a." 
Genesis24:66 Chhiahhlawh chuan a thil tawh zawng zawng chu Isaka a hrilh a. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka chuan Rebeki chu a nu Sari puan inah a hruai lût a, an innei a, a nupui a ni ta a. Isaka chuan a duh êm êm a, a nu thi a ngaih pawh chu a nêp thei ta a." 
Genesis25:1 Abrahama chuan nupui a nei leh a, a hming chu Keturi a ni." 
Genesis25:2 Fapa Zimrana te, Joksana te, Medana te, Midiana te, Isbaka te, Suaha te a hrinsak a." 
Genesis25:3 Joksana chuan fapa - Seba te, Dedana te a nei a. Dedana thlahte chu Asur-ho te, Letus-ho te, Leum-ho te an ni." 
Genesis25:4 Midiana fate chu Efa te, Efera te, Hanoka te, Abida te, Elda te an ni; hêngho hi Keturi thlahte chu an ni." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahama chuan Isaka chu a neih zawng zawng a rochuntîr a. 
Genesis25:6 A hmei fate erawh chu a dam lai ngeiin thilpêk a pe ṭeuh va, Isaka chîm buai lo tûrin khawchhak ram lamah a kaltîr a." 
Genesis25:7 Abrahama dam chhûng chu kum za leh sawmsarih leh panga a ni. Tarkûn khûp bihin a dam a, a hnuk a chat a," 
Genesis25:8 a thi ta a ni; a laichînte hnênah hruai a ni ve ta a. 
Genesis25:9 A fapa Isaka leh Ismaela chuan Makpela pûk, Hit mi Zohara fapa Efrona ram, Mamre depah chuan an phûm a." 
Genesis25:10 Chu ram chu Hit mite hnên aṭanga Abrahama ram lei kha a ni. Chutah chuan Abrahama leh a nupui Sari chu an phûm a ni. 
Genesis25:11 Abrahama thih hnu chuan Pathianin a fapa Isaka chu mal a sâwm a, Beer-lahai-roi bulah Isaka chuan awmhmun a khuar a." 
Genesis25:12 Hêng hi Abrahama fapa, Ismaela, Sari bawihnu, Aigupta mi Hagarin Abrahama a hrinsak thlahte chu an ni." 
Genesis25:13 Ismaela fate chu an indawt dân ang zêlin hêngte hi an ni: A fa tîr chu Nebaiota a ni a; Kedara te, Adbeela te, Mibsama te," 
Genesis25:14 Misma te, Duma te, Masa te," 
Genesis25:15 Hadada te, Tema te, Jetura te, Nafisa te, Kedema te an ni." 
Genesis25:16 Khîng khi Ismaela fate hming leh an chênna ram leh awmna bîk hming an put tâk chu a ni. Khîng hnam sâwm leh pahnih thlahtute khi an ni. 
Genesis25:17 Ismaela chu kum za leh sawmthum leh pasarih a dam a; a hnuk a chat a, a thi ta a; a chipuite hnêna hruai a ni ta a." 
Genesis25:18 Havila aṭangin Asur pan zâwngin Aigupta thlen hma lawk, Sur thlengin a fate chu an inzâr a, an unau dangte tu mah an ngeih lo." 
Genesis25:19 Hei hi Abrahama fapa Isaka chanchin chu a ni: Abrahaman fapa Isaka a nei a. 
Genesis25:20 Kum sawmli-a upa a nihin Isaka chuan Padanaram-a awm, Suria mi, Bethuela fanu Rebeki, Suria mi Labana farnu chu nupuiah a nei ta a." 
Genesis25:21 A chin avângin Isaka chuan a nupui tân Lalpa a dîlsak a. Lalpa chuan a aw chu a lo ngaithla a, Rebeki chuan nau a pai ta a." 
Genesis25:22 A pum chhûngah chuan nautête chu an insual nasa hle a, “Hetiang hi a nih chuan ka dam zo dâwn em ni?” a ti a. Lalpa râwn tûrin a kal a." 
Genesis25:23 Lalpa chuan a chhâng a, “I chhûlah hnam hnih an awm a, I kawchhûngah chi hnih inngeih lo an awm; Pakhat chuan pakhat chu a khûm ang a, A u zâwk chuan a nau rawng a bâwl ang,” a lo ti a." 
Genesis25:24 A hrin a lo hun chuan phîr a pai a lo ni a. 
Genesis25:25 A lo piang hmasa zâwk chu sahmul puan anga hmul sen thur a lo ni a, a hmingah ‘Esauva’ an sa a." 
Genesis25:26 Pakhat chu a lo chhuak ve a, Esauva keartui chu a vuan chial a, a hmingah ‘Jakoba’ an sa a. An lo pian chuan Isaka chu kum sawmruk mi a ni." 
Genesis25:27 Naupangte chu an lo ṭhang lian a, Esauva chu sa kâp thei, ramvachal tak a ni a; Jakoba erawh chu pa ti chet chawt, in lam ngaihsak mi tak a ni." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka chuan Esauva chu sa a kah theih êm avângin a duh hle a, Rebeki erawh chuan Jakoba chu a ngaina zâwk a." 
Genesis25:29 Vawi khat chu Jakoba chuan englo a chhûm a, ram aṭangin Esauva chu chau zetin a lo haw a." 
Genesis25:30 Jakoba hnênah chuan, “I thil sen chhum kha khawngaih takin mi lo eitîr teh, ka ṭâmchhâwl a ni e,” a ti a. Hemi avâng hian a hmingah Edoma an vuah bawk a ni." 
Genesis25:31 Jakoba chuan, “Fa tîr nihnain lei rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis25:32 Esauva chuan, “Rilṭâmin ka thi mai dâwn alâwm, fa tîr nihna chu eng nge ka sâwtpui ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis25:33 Jakoba chuan, “Chhia chham rawh,” a ti a, chhia a chham ta a, a fa tîr nihna chu Jakoba hnênah chuan a hralh ta mai a." 
Genesis25:34 Jakoba chuan chhang leh a dailuah chhum chu a pe a, a ei a, a in a, a tho va, a kal ta a. Chutiangin, Esauva chuan a fa tîr nihna chu a ngainêp a ni." 
Genesis26:1 Abrahama dam laia ṭâm tla ni lo, chu ramah chuan ṭâm a lo tla leh a. Gerar khuaah, Filistia lal Abimeleka hnênah Isaka chu a kal ta a." 
Genesis26:2 Lalpa chu a hnênah a rawn inlâr a, “Aigupta ramah chuan chhuk suh, ka kawhhmuh tûr che ramah awm la," 
Genesis26:3 chu ramah chuan châm reng ang che. Ka awmpui ang che a, mal ka sâwm ang che. Hêng ram zawng zawng hi nang leh i thlahte ka pe dâwn a ni." 
Genesis26:4 I thlahte chu vâna arsi zât khian ka tipung ang a, hêng ram zawng zawng hi i thlahte chu ka pe ang." 
Genesis26:5 Abrahaman ka aw a ngaih pawimawha, ka thu a zâwma, ka thupêkte, ka dânte leh ka zirtîrnate a pawm avâng khân,” a ti a." 
Genesis26:6 Gerar khuaah chuan Isaka chu a awm ta reng a. 
Genesis26:7 Chuta mite chuan Rebeki chu a nupui a nih leh nih loh an hre duh a. “Ka farnu a nih hi,” a ti a. “Ka nupui ka tih chuan Rebeki vâng hian min that mai ang, a hmêl a ṭha hle si a,” a ti a ni." 
Genesis26:8 Chumi khuaa rei tak a awm hnu chuan Filistia lal Abimeleka chu tukverhah a han dâk a, Isakan a nupui Rebeki a chhaih lai chu a phâwk a." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleka chuan Isaka chu a ko va, a hnênah, “I nupui a lo ni reng a ni maw? Engtiziaa ‘ka farnu a ni,’ ti nge i nih le?” a ti a. Isaka chuan, “Amah avângin min thah mai ka hlau atin a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleka chuan, “I nupui ni si mutpui tumte kan lo awm mai thei asin; tlêmah tlêmah thil sual min tihtîr ṭhelh alâwm le,” a ti a." 
Genesis26:11 Mi zawng zawng hnênah Abimeleka chuan, “Tu pawh, he mi hi emaw, a nupui hi emaw khawih tawh phawt chu tihhlum an ni ang,” a ti bawk a." 
Genesis26:12 Chu ramah chuan Isaka chuan thlai a chîng a. Chumi kum chuan a lêt za a thar a, Lalpa chuan mal a sâwm a ni." 
Genesis26:13 A neinung tial tial a, mi hausa tak a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis26:14 Berâm rual te, bâwng rual te, ṭhuihruai te a ngah ta êm êm a. Filistia-ho chuan an îtsîk ta a." 
Genesis26:15 Tichuan, a pa Abrahama dam laia, a pa chhiahhlawhte tuichhunchhuah laih zawng zawng chu Filistia-ho chuan an hnawhsak a, lei an chhûng khat ta vek a." 
Genesis26:16 Abimeleka chuan Isaka hnênah, “Kan aiin i chak ta hle si a, heta ta hi insawn rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis26:17 Isaka chu chuta ṭang chuan a insawn a, Gerar ruamah awmhmun a khuar ta a." 
Genesis26:18 A pa Abrahama dam laia an tuichhunchhuah laih, Abrahama thih hnua Filistia-hovin an hnawhte chu a lai leh a, a pain hming a vuah te kha hmingah a puttîr leh zêl a." 
Genesis26:19 Isaka chhiahhlawhten an awmna ruama tuichhunchhuah an laihah chuan tui a lo awm ṭha hle a. 
Genesis26:20 Gerar berâm vêngtute chuan Isaka berâm vêngtute hnênah, “He tui hi kan ta a ni,” tiin an rawn chuh a. Tichuan, chu tuichhunchhuah hmingah chuan ‘Esek’ a vuah a, an rawn chuh buai avânga vuah a ni." 
Genesis26:21 Tuichhunchhuah dang an lai leh a, an rawn chuh leh a, a hmingah Sitna a vuah a." 
Genesis26:22 Chuta ṭang chuan a insawn a, tuichhunchhuah dang a lai leh a, chu zawng an rawn chuh ta lo va, a hmingah Rehobot a vuah a, “Tûnah zawng Lalpa chuan kan inzârzauna tûr hmun min pe ta,” a tihna a ni." 
Genesis26:23 Chuta ṭang chuan Beer-seba-ah a chho va. 
Genesis26:24 Chumi zân chuan a hnênah Lalpa a rawn inlâr a: “Kei hi i pa Abrahama Pathian ka ni, Thlaphâng suh, ka awmpui che alâwm. Mal ka sâwm ang che a, Ka chhiahhlawh Abrahama avângin i thlahte ka tipung ang,” a rawn ti a." 
Genesis26:25 Chutah chuan maichâm a siam a, Lalpa hming a lam a. Tah chuan bûk a khuar a, Isaka chhiahhlawhte chuan tuichhunchhuah an lai leh a." 
Genesis26:26 Chutih lai chuan Gerar aṭangin Abimeleka chu a ṭhian Ahuzatha leh a sipai hotu Fikola nên an lo kal a. 
Genesis26:27 Isaka chuan, “Min ngaithei lo va, in zîng ata min hnawt chhuak a, eng nge in duha in lo kal tâk le?” a lo ti a." 
Genesis26:28 “ Lalpa chuan a awmpui che tih kan hre ta a, sa-ui tan ho ila kan ti a ni, kan inkârah inremna thu i thlung teh ang," 
Genesis26:29 kan tibuai ngai lo che a, kan khawngaih hle ṭhîn che a, i insawn dâwn pawh khân ṭha takin kan kaltîr che a, nang pawhin kan pawi khawih bîk suh ang che,” an ti a." 
Genesis26:30 Ruai a ṭhehsak a, an ei a, an in a." 
Genesis26:31 A tûk zîngah chuan chhia an chham dûn ta a. Isaka chuan a thlah a, ṭha takin an inṭhen ta a." 
Genesis26:32 Chumi ni chuan Isaka chhiahhlawhte chu an lo kal a, an tuichhunchhuah laihah tui ‘kan hmu ta e,’ an rawn ti a." 
Genesis26:33 A hmingah Seba a vuah a, tûn thlengin chu khua chu Beer-seba an la ti a ni." 
Genesis26:34 Hit mi, Beeria fanu Judithi leh Hit mi Elena fanu Basemathi chu kum sawmli-a upa a nihin Esauva chuan nupuiah a nei a." 
Genesis26:35 Chûng mite chu Isaka leh Rebeki thin tina rengtute an ni. 
Genesis27:1 Isaka chu a upa ta hle a, a mit a thim a, khua a hmu thei ta lo hial a. A fapa upa zâwk Esauva chu a ko va, “Ka fapa,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Eng nge ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis27:2 “Ka upa ta êm a, engtikah nge ka thih ang sawi theih a nih loh hi." 
Genesis27:3 I thal leh thalngul, i hriamhrei chu la la, va ramkal la, sakhi min va kahsak teh." 
Genesis27:4 Ka duhzâwng tak, hmui tui deuhvin siam la, mi han lâk ang che. Ka lo ei ang a, ka thih hma ngeiin ka malsâwmna i dawng dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:5 Isakan Esauva a bia chu Rebeki chuan a lo ngaithla reng a. 
Genesis27:6 Ramvâka a pa tân sakhi kâp tûra Esauva a chhuah veleh Rebeki chuan a fapa Jakoba hnênah, “I pain i u Esauva hnênah," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Sa kâp la, hmui tui takin min han siam teh, ka lo ei ang e; ka thih hma ngeiin Lalpa remtih zâwng angin mal ka lo sâwmsak ang che,’ a tih ka hre ru a ni." 
Genesis27:8 Chutichuan, ka hrilh ang che hian ti vat teh." 
Genesis27:9 Ran rual zîngah va kal la, kel no ṭha thlan chhuah pahnih han la ang che, i pa duhzâwng takin hmui tui deuhvin ka lo siam ang e." 
Genesis27:10 I pe ang a, a ei ang a, a thih hma ngeiin mal a sâwmsak dâwn che nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:11 Jakoba chuan a nu Rebeki hnênah, “Ka u Esauva chu mi hmulphurh chhe tak a ni a, kei lah hmul nei lo, sa mâm tak ka ni si a." 
Genesis27:12 Ka pa chuan min han dap hlauh se amah ka tiduhdah emaw a ti ang a, mal sâwmsak ahnêkin ânchhia min lawh ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:13 A nu chuan, “Ka fapa, ânchhia i dawn leh ka chungah tla rawh se, ka sawi ang chuan ti phawt mai rawh. Kal la, va la thuai tawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:14 Tichuan, a chhuak a, a va man a, a nu hnênah chuan a rawn la a, a nu chuan a pa duhzâwng takin a lo siam a." 
Genesis27:15 Rebeki chuan ina a kawl, a fa u zâwk thawmhnaw ṭha chu, a la a, a fa naupang zâwk Jakoba chu a hâktîr a." 
Genesis27:16 A bân leh a nghâwng sam awm lo laite chu, berâmno vun chuan a tuamsak a." 
Genesis27:17 Sa leh a chhang siam chu Jakoba hnênah chuan a pe a. 
Genesis27:18 A pa hnênah chuan a va kal a, “Ka pa,” a ti a. “Eng nge ni? Ka fapa tu zâwk nge i nih?” a lo ti a." 
Genesis27:19 Jakoba chuan a pa chu a chhâng a, “Esauva, i fa tîr kha ka ni. Min tirh angin ka ti a, lo tho la, ṭhu kâng teh, ka sakhi sa hi ei rawh le; tichuan, i malsâwmsakna ka dawng dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:20 Isaka chuan a fapa hnênah, “Ka fapa, engtizia nge i va hlawhtling hma teh thut ve?” a ti a. “ Lalpa i Pathian chuan min tihmuingîl a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:21 Isaka chuan Jakoba hnênah, “Ka fapa Esauva i ni nameuh emaw; ka lo dap teh ang che, lo kal hnai teh,” a ti hrâm a." 
Genesis27:22 Jakoba chuan a va hnaih a, a lo dap vêl a. “A aw chu Jakoba aw a ni a, a kutte erawh chu Esauva kut zawng a nih si hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:23 A bân chu a u Esauva bân angin a lo hmul si a, a hre hrang thei lo a ni. Mal a sâwmsak dâwn ṭêpah pawh chuan," 
Genesis27:24 “Ka fapa Esauva i ni ngei maw?” a ti a. “Ni e,” tiin a chhâng a." 
Genesis27:25 “Han la teh, ka fapa sakhi kah sa chu ka lo ei teh ang; tichuan, mal ka sâwmsak dâwn che nia,” a ti a. A hmaah chuan a hlui a, a ei a, uain a rawn lâk chu a in a." 
Genesis27:26 A pa Isaka chuan, “Ka fapa, lo kal hnai la, mi han fâwp teh,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:27 A va hnaih a, a fâwp a, a kawr rim chu a han hria a, mal a sâwmsak ta nge nge a: A! Ka fapa rim chu Lalpa malsâwm ram rim ang veng veng a ni," 
Genesis27:28 Vân daifîm chu Pathianin pe che sela, Lei hausaknate chu pe che rawh se. Buh leh uain nei thûr thûr bawk ang che," 
Genesis27:29 Hnam dangte chuan i rawng bâwl se, Hnam tinrêngten chibai bûk che rawh se. I unaute chungah lal la, I nu fate chu i hmaah kûn rawh se. Ânchhe lawhtu che chu ânchhia lawh a ni ang a, Mal sâwmsaktu che chu duhsak an ni ve ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:30 Isakan Jakoba mal a sâwmsak zo va, Jakoba chuan a pa a chhuahsan chiah tih chuan Esauva ramvâk chu a lo haw a." 
Genesis27:31 Ani pawh chuan hmui tui takin a siam a, a pa chu a rawn pe a, a pa hnênah chuan, “Ka pa chuan a fapa sakhi sa hi ei teh se; tichuan, mal a sâwmsak dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:32 A pa Isaka chuan, “Tu nge i nih?” a ti a. “I fa tîr Esauva,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:33 Isaka chu a khûr ta hlawk hlawk a, “Sa kâpa mi rawn petu kha tu nge ni ta ang le? I lo haw hma chiah khân ka lo ei zo hman a, mal ka sâwmsak tâk kha! Malsâwmna chu a chang hlen tho dâwn,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:34 A pa thu a han hriat chuan Esauva chu lungngai takin a ṭap ta zawih zawih a, “Ka pa, kei hi, mal min sâwmsak ve ta hrâm che,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:35 “I nau a lo kal a, min bum a ni, i dawn tûr malsâwmna chu a kalpui ta,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:36 “A hming Jakoba a ni rêng a, vawi hnih tlawng min bum tâk hi. Ka fa tîr nihna min neihsak a, malsâwmna ka dawn tûr pawh min dawn khalh ta a nih hi. Malsâwmna tlêm tal i la nei lâwm ni?” tiin a ngên a." 
Genesis27:37 Isaka chuan Esauva chu a chhâng a, “I chunga lal tûrin ka lo ti diam tawh, a laichîn zawng zawngte a bawih atân ka pe a, buh leh uain nei ṭeuh tûrin ka lo ti tawh bawk a. Chuvângin, ka fapa, eng nge maw tihsak tûr che ka la neih ang le?” a ti a." 
Genesis27:38 Esauva chuan, “Malsâwmna pakhat mai em ni i neih? Ka pa, kei hi, mal min sâwmsak ve hrâm teh,” a ti a. Esauva chu a ṭap chiam a." 
Genesis27:39 Isaka chuan a hnênah heti hian a ti leh a: I chênna chu ram ṭha aṭanga hla tak a ni ang a, Vân daifîmte chu i dawng lo vang." 
Genesis27:40 I khandaih hmangin i nung ang a. I nau rawng i bâwl ang. Tharum i thawh hunah chuan A nghâwngkawl i bah chu i thing thla ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:41 A pain mal a sâwmsak tâk avângin Jakoba chungah Esauva chu a lungnilo hle a. Esauva chuan, “Ka pa kan sûn ni chuan ka nau Jakoba chu ka that ve ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:42 Chutiang chuan a fapa upa zâwk Esauva chu a ṭawng tih Rebeki an hrilh a, a fa naupang zâwk Jakoba chu a ko va, “Ngai teh, i u Esauva hian thah che tumin a inhnêm a ni." 
Genesis27:43 Chuvângin, ka thu hi ngaithla teh. Haran khuaah ka nuṭa Labana hnênah tlânchhe daih la," 
Genesis27:44 a hnênah chuan eng chen emaw va awm ang che. I u thinrim a daiha," 
Genesis27:45 i thiltih avânga i chunga a thin na chu a dam hma chu va awm ang che, chutih hunah chuan mi ka rawn tîr ang a, a rawn hruai kîr dâwn che nia. Tichuan, in pahnihin ni khatah ka sûn dâwn lo che u nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:46 Rebeki chuan Isaka hnênah, “Hêng Hit hmeichheho vâng hian dam pawh manhla ka ti ta lo; Jakoba hian hêng lai mi, Hit nula a neih ve lek phei chuan ka tân nun thlâkhlelh tlâk em ni ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis28:1 Tichuan, Jakoba chu Isakan a ko va, chibai a lo bûk a, hetiang hian a hrilh a: ‘Kanan nula nupuiah i nei tûr a ni lo." 
Genesis28:2 Tho la, Padan-aram-ah, i nu pa Bethuela inah kal la, i nu nuṭa Labana fanute zînga mi nupui va nei ang che." 
Genesis28:3 El-Sadaia chuan malsâwm che sela, i chi tiṭhain tipung che sela, tihtham tak hnam thlahtu ni ang che." 
Genesis28:4 Abrahama ang khân nang leh i thlahte chu malsâwm sela, Pathianin Abrahama a pêk, i mikhualna ram hi nei ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis28:5 Isaka chuan Jakoba chu a kaltîr a, Padan-aram-a Suria mi Bethuela fapa, Jakoba leh Esauva nu nuṭa, Labana hnênah chuan a kal ta a." 
Genesis28:6 Jakoba chu Padan-aram lama nupui zawng tûra Isakan a tirh khân mal a sâwmsak a, mal a sâwmsak pah khân, “Kanan nula nupuiah i nei tûr a ni lo,” tiin a hrilh a," 
Genesis28:7 a nu leh pa thu awihin Jakoba chu Padan-aram lamah chuan a kal ta a. 
Genesis28:8 Chuvâng chuan, Kanan hmeichhiate chu Isaka chuan a ning hle ṭhîn a lo ni tih Esauva chuan a hre ta a." 
Genesis28:9 Chuvângin, Esauva chu Abrahama fapa Ismaela hnênah a kal a, a nupui neih sa bâkah Abrahama fapa Ismaela fanu Mahalathi, Nabaiotha farnu chu nupuiah a neih belh ta a." 
Genesis28:10 Jakoba chu Beer-seba ata chu Haran khuaa kal tûrin a chhuak ta a. 
Genesis28:11 Ni a tlâk chuan hmun pakhat chu a va thleng a, riah zai a rêl ta a. Lung pakhat hi a la a, a lukham a, a mu ta a." 
Genesis28:12 Mumang a nei a, lei aṭanga vân thleng kailâwn lo awm zur chu a hmu a. Pathian Vântirhkoh rual an lo chhovin an lo chhuk zut zut a." 
Genesis28:13 Lalpa chuan a lo dinchilh reng a, “Kei Lalpa hi, i pa Abrahama Pathian, Isaka Pathian ka ni. I mutna lei hi nang leh i thlahte ka pe dâwn a ni." 
Genesis28:14 I thlahte chu leia vaivut zât an ni ang a, chhak leh thlang, chhim leh hmârah an inzâr darh ang, leia hnam tinrêngin nang leh i thlahte chu induhsakna ṭawngkam takah an hmang ang che." 
Genesis28:15 Ngai rawh, ka awmpui a che, i kalna apiangah ka vêng ang che a, he ramah hian ka hruai kîr leh ang che, ka thutiam ka tihhlawhtlin hma chu ka thlahthlam lo vang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis28:16 Jakoba chu a lo ṭhangharh a, “Hetah hian Lalpa a lo awm a nih hi, ka lo hre si lo va,” a ti a." 
Genesis28:17 Hlauvin a khûr a, “He hmun hi hmun ṭihbaiawm tak a nih hi, Pathian in a lo ni reng mai, vân lama chhohna kawngka chu,” a ti bawk a." 
Genesis28:18 Zîngah chuan Jakoba chuan lung a lukham chu a la a, a phun a, a chhîpah hriak a leih a." 
Genesis28:19 Chu hmun hmingah chuan Bethel a vuah a, tûn hma chuan chu hmuna khaw awm hming chu Luz a ni." 
Genesis28:20 Jakoba chuan thu a tiam a, “Pathianin min awmpui a, ka khualzinna lama min vên zêla, ei tûr leh sin tûr min pêk zêla," 
Genesis28:21 ka pa ina him taka ka lo kîr leh chuan Lalpa hi ka Pathian a ni ang a. 
Genesis28:22 He ka lungphun pawh hi Pathian in a ni ang, i thil min pêk zawng zawng aṭangin sâwma pakhat ka pe ngei ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:1 Jakoba chu a kal ta zêl a, khawchhak mite ram chu a thleng ta a." 
Genesis29:2 Chutah chuan tuichhunchhuah a va hmu a, a bulah chuan berâm rual pâwl thum an lo bawk chu a va hmu a. Chu tuichhunchhuah tui chu an intîr ṭhîn a ni." 
Genesis29:3 Tuichhunchhuah chhinna lung chu a lian hle a, berâm rual an rawn khalh thlen kim hunah chauh a chhîn chu an lum sawn thei a, tui an intîr ṭhîn a ni; an in zawhah an chhîn ṭha leh ṭhîn." 
Genesis29:4 Jakoba chuan berâm vêngtute hnênah, “Ṭhiante u, khawii khua nge in nih?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Haran khua kan ni,” an ti a." 
Genesis29:5 “Nahora fapa Labana kha in hria em?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Hria e,” an ti a." 
Genesis29:6 Ani chuan, “An dam lai em ni?” a ti a. “Dam e, a fanu Rakili pawh, saw, a berâm rual nên a lo kal saw,” an ti a." 
Genesis29:7 “Ni a la sâng hle si a, engati nge berâmte chu tui in intîr loh, an la tla leh hman alâwm,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:8 “Berâm rual zawng zawng an lo thlen kim vek hunah tui kan intîr thei chauh ṭhîn a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:9 An inbiak lai chuan Rakili pawh chu, a pa berâm rual nên a lo thleng a, berâm a vêng ve rêng ṭhîn a ni." 
Genesis29:10 A nu nuṭa Labana fanu Rakili chu, a nu nuṭa Labana berâmte nên a hmuh chuan tuichhunchhuah chu a hnaih a, a chhinna lung chu a lum sawn a, a nu nuṭa Labana berâm rual chu tui a intîr ta a." 
Genesis29:11 Jakoba chuan Rakili chu a fâwp a, aw chhuahin a ṭap ta a." 
Genesis29:12 “I pa tupa, Rebeki fapa ka nih hi,” Rakili hnênah chuan Jakoba chuan a ti a. Ani chu a pa hrilh tûr chuan a tlân hâwng ta a." 
Genesis29:13 Labanan a farnu fapa Jakoba chanchin a hriat chuan lâwm tûrin a tlân chhuak a, a pawm a, a fâwp a, a inah a hruai lût ta a. Chanchin engkim Labana chu a hrilh a." 
Genesis29:14 Labana chuan a hnênah, “Ka thisen zawmpui ngei i ni alâwm,” a ti a. Jakoba chu Labana inah thla khat a awm ta a." 
Genesis29:15 Labana chuan a hnênah, “Ka tupa i nih avângin a thlâwna ka chhawr reng thu che a awm lo, eng nge hlawh i duh, min hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:16 Labana chuan fanu pahnih a nei a, a upa zâwk hming chu Leaii a ni a, a naupang zâwk hming chu Rakili a ni." 
Genesis29:17 Leaii chu a meng mawi hle a; Rakili phei chu tituai ṭha deuh, hmêlṭha tak a ni." 
Genesis29:18 Jakoba chuan Rakili chu a ngaizâwng a. “Kum sarih min chhawr la, i fanu naupang zâwk Rakili hi ka hlawh ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:19 Labana chuan, “Mi dang daih neihtîr ai chuan nang neihtîr che chu a ṭha zâwk ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:20 Jakoba chuan Rakili hlawh tûrin kum sarih a thawk a, a ngaihzâwn êm avângin ni rei lo tê lek niin a hria." 
Genesis29:21 Jakoba chuan Labana hnênah, “Ka hun ka tlâk ta bawk a, ka nupui tûr chu min neihtîr tawh rawh le,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:22 Labana chuan khuaa mite chu a sâwm a, ruai a ṭheh a." 
Genesis29:23 Zân thimah chuan a fanu Leaii chu a kai a, Jakoba hnênah chuan a hruai a, a lo mutpui a." 
Genesis29:24 Labana chuan a bawih nula Zilpaii chu Leaii a chhawmtîr a. 
Genesis29:25 Zîng a lo nih chuan Leaii a lo ni reng mai si a. Jakoba chuan Labana hnênah, “Min tih dân hi engtizia nge? Rakili hlawhah min chhawr a ni lâwm ni? Engati nge min bum?” a ti a." 
Genesis29:26 Ani chuan, “Fanu upa zâwk aiin a naupang zâwk kaltîr hmasak hi hêng lai ram dân a ni hlei nêm." 
Genesis29:27 Mo lawm hapta chhûng hmang tlingtla zet la, a nau zâwk pawh i nei mai dâwn nia; kum sarih dang ka chhawr leh ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:28 Jakoba chuan a nupui hmasa zâwk lawmna hapta khat chu a tlingtla a, Labana chuan Rakili pawh chu nupuiah a neihtîr ta a." 
Genesis29:29 Labana chuan a chhiahhlawh nula Bilhaii chu a fanu Rakili a chhawmtîr a. 
Genesis29:30 Jakoba chuan a lo nei ta a, Leaii ai chuan a duh zâwk a. Labana chuan Jakoba chu kum sarih dang a chhawr zui ta a." 
Genesis29:31 Lalpa chuan Leaii chu a chuang hle tih a hriat chuan a chhûl a hawnsak a, Rakili erawh chuan nau a nei thei lo." 
Genesis29:32 Leaii chuan nau a nei a, fapa a hring a, a hmingah Reubena a sa a. “Tûnah chuan ka manganna a hmu” tihna a ni. “Ka pasal pawhin min duh deuh tawh ang,” a ti bawk a." 
Genesis29:33 Nau a nei leh a, fapa a hring a, “ Lalpa chuan hmangaih ka hlawh lo tih a hria a, hei pawh hi min pe a nih hi,” a ti a, a hmingah Simeona a sa a." 
Genesis29:34 Nau a pai leh a, fapa a hring a, “Tûnah zawng ka pasal fapa pathum ka hrinsak ta a, min lungrualpui tawh ang,” a ti a, a hmingah Levia a sa a." 
Genesis29:35 Nau a pai leh a, fapa a hring leh a, “Tûn ṭum chu Lalpa ka chawimawi dâwn e,” a ti a, a hmingah Juda a sa ta a ni. Nau a pai nawn leh ta lo va." 
Genesis30:1 Rakilin Jakoba chu fa rêng a hrinsak loh avâng chuan a laizâwnnu Leaii chu a îtsîk hle a. 
Genesis30:2 Jakoba hnênah Rakili chuan, “Fa min pe ve rawh; chutilo chu, ka thi mai ang,” a ti a. Jakoba chu Rakili chungah chuan a thinur a, “Fa nei thei lova siamtu che Pathian em ka nih?” a ti a." 
Genesis30:3 Rakili chuan, “Hei, ka chhiahhlawhnu Bilhaii hi mutpui teh, mal chunga ka chawi ve tûr fa min hrinsak dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:4 Hmei atân a chhiahhlawh Bilhaii chu Jakoba a neihtîr ta a. 
Genesis30:5 Bilhaii chuan nau a pai a, Jakoba chu fapa a hrinsak a." 
Genesis30:6 Rakili chuan, “Pathianin ro min rêlsak a, ka dîl angin fapa min pêk tâk hi,” a ti a, a hmingah Dana a sa a." 
Genesis30:7 Rakili chhiahhlawh Bilhaii chuan nau a pai leh a, Jakoba chu fa a hrinsak a." 
Genesis30:8 Rakili chuan, “Ka laizâwnnu nên namên lovin inchuh kan nei a, ka chan a ṭhat tâk hi,” a ti a, a hmingah Naftalia a sa a." 
Genesis30:9 Leaii chuan nau a pai thei ta lo tih a inhriat chuan a chhiahhlawh Zilpaii chu hmeiah Jakoba chu a neihtîr a. 
Genesis30:10 Leaii chhiahhlawh Zilpaii chuan Jakoba chu fapa a hrinsak a," 
Genesis30:11 Leaii chuan, “A va nihlawhthlâk êm!” a ti a, a hmingah Gada a sa a." 
Genesis30:12 Leaii chhiahhlawh Zilpaii chuan Jakoba chu fa dang a hrinsak leh a. 
Genesis30:13 Leaii chuan “Nihlawh min va ti dâwn e,” a ti a, a hmingah Asera a sa a." 
Genesis30:14 Ni khat chu huit seng laiin Reubena chu lovah a kal a, zâwlaidi a hmu a, a nu Leaii a hawnsak a. Rakili chuan Leaii hnênah, “I fapa zâwlaidi chu a ṭhen min pe ve hrâm teh,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:15 Leaii chuan, “Ka pasal min chhuh mah tihin ka fapa zâwlaidi leh zêl pawh min lâksak i tum em ni?” a ti a. Rakili chuan, “I fapa zâwlaidi min pe la, zâninah i bulah a mu dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:16 Tichuan, tlaia Jakoba feh haw chu Leaii chuan a lo hmuak a, “Zânin chuan ka hnênah i awm tûr a ni, ka fapa zâwlaidiin ka thleng tawh che a ni,” a ti a. Chumi zân chuan a bulah a awm ta a." 
Genesis30:17 Pathian chuan Leaii dilna chu a ngaithla a, nau a pai a, Jakoba chu a pangana tûr fapa a hrinsak ta a." 
Genesis30:18 Leaii chuan, “Pathianin ka pasal hmeia ka chhiahhlawh ka neihtîr man min pe ta a nih hi,” a ti a, a hmingah Isakara a sa a." 
Genesis30:19 Leaii chuan nau a pai leh a, Jakoba chu a parukna atân fapa a hrinsak leh a;" 
Genesis30:20 “Pathianin thil hlu tak min pe a nih hi. Tûn ṭum hi chuan ka pasal fapa paruk ka hrinsak tâk avângin thilpêk hlu tak min pe ngei ang,” a ti a, a hmingah Zebuluna a sa a." 
Genesis30:21 A tâwp berah chuan fanu a hring a, a hmingah Dinaii a sa a." 
Genesis30:22 Pathianin Rakili chu a hre reng a, Pathianin a khawngaih a, a chhûl a hawnsak a." 
Genesis30:23 Nau a pai a, fapa a hring a. “Pathianin ka hmingchhia min chhilhsak ta,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:24 A hmingah Josefa a sa a. “ Lalpa chuan fapa min pêk belh ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:25 Rakilin Josefa a hrin hnu chuan Jakoban Labana hnênah, “Kan ram, kan in leh lo lamah min hawtîr tawh rawh le." 
Genesis30:26 Ka thawh hlawh, ka nupui leh ka fate hi min pe la, ka kal chhuak dâwn nia, ka thawhsak nasatzia che i hria alâwm,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:27 Labana chuan, “Ngawi hrâm teh rih. Nangmah avângin Lalpa chuan min tihmuingîl a ni tih hriatna ka nei a ni." 
Genesis30:28 Chuvângin, hlawh i duh zât zât min dîl rawh, ka pe mai ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:29 “Ka tha i hlâwkpuizia i hria a, ka enkawl chhûngin i ran lo pun tâkziate pawh i hria." 
Genesis30:30 Ka lo kal hmaa tlêm tê kha tûnah chuan a tam tâk êm hi; ka thawhna lam apiangah Lalpa chuan mal a sâwm zui zêl che a ni. Ka puala eng emaw ka tih chu a hun ta hle a ni e,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:31 “Eng nge ka pêk ang che?” a ti a. Jakoba chuan, “A hrana hlawh min pêk a ngai lo, hetiang hi i remtih theih chuan i rante hi ka thlah ang a, ka enkawl leh ang." 
Genesis30:32 Vawiin hian i ran rual va en chhuak ila, berâm zînga a dum te, kêl zînga a vâr pheuh pheuh leh a ṭiala vâr ṭhik ṭhek te la chhuak la, ka hlawh atân dah hran ni rawh se." 
Genesis30:33 Ka hlawh i rawn enfiah leh hunah ka rinawm leh awm loh chu rang takin i hre mai thei ang. Ka ran zîngah berâm dum ni lo, kêl pawh a vâr pheuh pheuh leh a ṭial ṭhik ṭhek ni lo i hmuh chuan ka rûkah ngai zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:34 Labana chuan, “Ni e maw le, i sawi ang chu ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:35 Nimahsela, chumi ni chuan kêlpa ṭial leh vâr pheuh pheuh, kêlpui vâr phoh phoh leh ṭial ṭhik ṭhek, a vâr kahte leh berâm dumte chu a la hrang a, a fate a enkawltîr a." 
Genesis30:36 Jakoba awmna aṭanga ni thum kalah a awmtîr a; Jakoba chuan Labana ran la awmte chu a khalh a, a enkawl zui ta a." 
Genesis30:37 Jakoba chuan chawngtlai ṭang te, theite ṭang te, sehawr ṭang te a la a, a pil a khawk ṭial thluah thluah hlawm a." 
Genesis30:38 Chûng thingṭang ṭial chu ran tui inna kuang bulah, an hmuh theih tûrin a dah a, tui in tûra an lo kal chu an inbawh ṭhîn a ni." 
Genesis30:39 Kêl chuan tiang ṭial en chunga an rai chuan ṭial phoh phoh te, ṭial ṭhik ṭhek te, a vâr kah te an hring a." 
Genesis30:40 Jakoba chuan berâm leh kêl chu a dah hrang a, tiang ṭial chu Labana kêl dumte hmuh tûrin a dah a. Chutiang chuan ama ta tûr chu a tipung a, Labana ta nên chuan a dah hrang zêl a." 
Genesis30:41 Ran hrisêl deuh chu an inbawh dâwnin tiang ṭial chu an hmuh tûrin tui kuang bulah chuan a dah zêl a. 
Genesis30:42 Ran sawngnawi deuhte hmaah chuan tiang ṭial chu a dah ve duh lo. Tichuan, a sawngnawi deuhte chu Labana chuan a nei ta zêl a, Jakoba chuan a pianṭha deuhte chu a nei ta zêl a." 
Genesis30:43 Ani chu a neinung ta hle a, ran a ngah ta êm êm a, chhiahhlawh, mipa leh hmeichhia pawh a ngah a, sanghâwngsei te leh sabengtung te pawh a nei a." 
Genesis31:1 Labana faten, “Jakoban kan pa thil neih zawng zawng a lâksak zêl a, kan pa ta tûrin a intihausa a ni,” an tih thâwm chu Jakoba chuan a lo hria a." 
Genesis31:2 Labanan a en dân pawh ni dang a ang ta lo tih a hmu bawk a. 
Genesis31:3 Lalpa chuan Jakoba hnênah, “I pianna, i pate ramah kîr leh tawh rawh, ka awmpui zêl ang che,” a ti bawk a." 
Genesis31:4 Jakoba chuan Rakili leh Leaii chu ran tlatna phûla lo kal tûrin a chah a; 
Genesis31:5 an hnênah, “In pa mi en dân hi tûn hma a ang ta lo tih ka hmu thei a ni; mahse, ka pa Pathian chuan min awmpui zêl a." 
Genesis31:6 In pa tân theihtâwp chhuahin ka thawk ṭhîn tih in hria e. 
Genesis31:7 Nimahsela, in pa hian a duh duhin min chawkzân a, ka hlawh tûr lah a nawm a mâkin a tidanglam a. Ka chhiat dêr erawh chu Pathianin a phal lo a ni." 
Genesis31:8 ‘A ṭial ṭhik ṭhek i hlawh dâwn nia,’ a tih leh ran rualte chuan a ṭial thik thek hlîr no an nei a; ‘a vâr phoh phoh i hlawh dâwn nia,’ tia a thu a thlâk leh pawhin ran rual chuan a vâr phoh phoh hlîr an nei a." 
Genesis31:9 Chutiangin Pathianin in pa ran chi ṭha chu a chhuhsak a, min pe zêl a ni." 
Genesis31:10 “Vawi khat ran rual hur laiin mumang ka nei a, a bawhtu kêlpa zawng zawng chu a ṭial ṭhik ṭhek te, a vâr phoh phoh te, a vâr kah zeuh zeuh te vek an lo ni a." 
Genesis31:11 Ka mumangah chuan Pathian Vântirhkohvin min lo bia a, ‘Jakob,’ a ti a. Kei chuan, ‘Eng nge ni?’ ka ti a." 
Genesis31:12 ‘Dâk la, en chiang teh, ran rual bawhtu, a pa zawng zawng saw, a ṭial ṭhik ṭhek te, a vâr phoh phoh te leh a vâr kah zeuh zeuhte an nih vek saw. Labanan i chunga thil a tih dân ka hmuh ve reng avângin sawtiang sâwn thil a awm a ni." 
Genesis31:13 Bethel-ah i lungphun hriak i hnawih a, thu i tiam a, khata i hnêna inlâr Pathian kha ka nih hi. Tho la, he ram hi chhuahsan la, i pianna ramah kîr leh tawh rawh,’ min ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:14 Rakili leh Leaii chuan an chhâng a, “Kan pa ro kan chan ve tûr eng mah a awm tawh lo;" 
Genesis31:15 mikhual ang lekah min ngai tawh a ni lâwm ni? Min hralh a, kan man te lah a ei zo vek tawh bawk si." 
Genesis31:16 Kan pa sum, Pathianin a chhuhsak zawng zawng hi kan chan tûr rêng a ni asin, Pathianin a hrilh che ang chuan ti zêl mai rawh,” an ti a." 
Genesis31:17 Tichuan, a fate leh a nupui te chu sanghâwngsei chungah a chuantîr a." 
Genesis31:18 A ran rualte chu a khalh a, a thil neih zawng zawng, Padan-aram-a a awm chhûnga a thil neih thar zawng zawng chu a keng a, Kanan ram, Isaka awmna ram chu pan tûr chuan a chhuak ta a." 
Genesis31:19 Chutih lai chu Labana, berâm hmul mêt tûra a thang bo hlân a ni a, Rakili chuan a pa chhûngkaw pathian milimte chu a rûksak a." 
Genesis31:20 Jakoba pawh chuan Suria mi Labana chu a thlim a, eng mah hrilh lovin ngaihngam takin a awmtîr a ni." 
Genesis31:21 Chutiang chuan a neih zawng zawng nên a kal ta a, Eufretis lui chu a kân sawk sawk a, Gilead tlângram chu a pan ta vang vang a." 
Genesis31:22 A ni thum ni chuan Jakoba tlânchhiat thu chu Labana an hrilh a. 
Genesis31:23 A ṭhuihruaite a khâwm a, a ûm ta a. Ni sarih a kal hnu chuan Gilead tlângramah a va ûmpha a." 
Genesis31:24 Suria mi Labana chuan zâna a mumangah Pathian a hmu a, “A chhia a ṭha Jakoba hnênah fîmkhur takin thu sawi rawh,” a rawn ti a." 
Genesis31:25 Labanan a ûmphâk khân Jakoba chuan tlâng sâng laiah puan in a lo zâr tawh a, Labana leh a ṭhuihruaite chuan Gilead tlângah bâwk an zâr ve ta a." 
Genesis31:26 Labana chuan Jakoba hnênah, “Ngaihngam takin min awmtîr a, min bum a, ka fanute hi engtizia nge râl man ang hrima i lâk daih le?" 
Genesis31:27 Min hrilh duh lo va, min thlim a, a rûka i tlân bo mai hi engtizia nge? Benchhek te leh perhkhuangte tumin hlim takin kan thlah tûr che alâwm." 
Genesis31:28 Ka tu leh fate thlahin a fawh takngial pawh min fawhtîr phal lo va. I thil tih dân hi a âtthlâk lutuk a ni. 
Genesis31:29 Tichhe vek thei che ka ni asin; mahse, nizâna ka mumangah i pa Pathian ka hmu a, ‘Jakoba hnênah a chhia emaw, a ṭha emaw, fîmkhur takin thu sawi rawh,’ min rawn ti a." 
Genesis31:30 I pa in lam i ngai a, i haw châk êm a nih pawhin kan chhûngkaw pathian leh zêl engati nge min rûksak?” a ti a." 
Genesis31:31 Jakoba chuan a chhâng a, “I fanute hi min chhuhsak mai ang tih ka hlau êm a ni." 
Genesis31:32 In chhûngkaw pathian erawh chu kan zînga lo la an awm a niha, i hmuh chhuah chuan thah ni rawh se. Hêng kan unaute hmaah ngei hian, eng pawh i ta i hmuh chuan la zêl ang che,” a ti a. Jakoba chuan Rakilin a lo ru tih a hre si lo." 
Genesis31:33 Jakoba puan in chu Labana chuan a dap hmasa a, Leaii puan in leh an chhiahhlawhte puan in chu a dap zêl a, a hmu zo lo va. Leaii puan in ata a lo chhuak a, Rakili puan inah chuan a lût a." 
Genesis31:34 Rakili chuan milimte chu sanghâwngsei zângdam zîngah a lo thukru hman a, a ṭhut hnan a. Labanan puan in chhûng chu a dap vek a, eng mah a hmu lo va." 
Genesis31:35 Rakili chuan a pa hnênah, “Ka lalpa chuan a hmaa ka tho lo hi ngaih loh lamah ngai teh suh se, hmeichhe dân angin ka fel loh lai a ni atin a ni,” a ti a. A dap ngun hle na a, milimte chu a hmu lo." 
Genesis31:36 Jakoba chu Labana chungah chuan a thinur a, a âng ve ta thung a. “Eng nge ka bawhchhiata, thil eng nge ka tih suala min rawn ûm hi?" 
Genesis31:37 Ka neih zawng zawng i dap chhuak a, in chhûngkaw thil pakhat tê pawh i hmu em ni? I hmu a nih chuan han phawrh teh; hêng kan unaute hian kan inkâr thu rêl mai teh se." 
Genesis31:38 “Kum sawmhnih i hnuaia ka thawh chhûng khân i berâm leh kêlpuite chuan no an chhiat ngai lo va, i berâmpa lah ka talh ngai hek lo." 
Genesis31:39 Ramsa seh ka sawi ngai lo, keiman ka rûl zêl a. A bo rêng rêng, zâna bo emaw, chhûna bo emaw, min rulhtîr zêl a." 
Genesis31:40 Chhûn nisain min em chau fo va, zân vûr tla khaw vawtin min hmet khawng fo bawk a, mutmu pawh ka tuah thei ṭhîn lo a ni." 
Genesis31:41 Kum sawmhnih i hnêna ka awm chhûng khân i fanute pahnih hlawh tûrin kum sâwm leh pali min chhawr a. Kum ruk, i ran hlawh tûra i ran ka vên chhûngin ka hlawh vawi sâwm i tidanglam a." 
Genesis31:42 Ka pa Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaka Ṭiha chu ka lamah ṭang lo se kut bêngin min kaltîr dâwn a nih hi. Amaherawhchu, Pathianin ka hahzia te, ka thawhrimzia te a hmu a, nizân khân i hriat tûrin ka thu a lo rêl fel a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:43 Labana chuan Jakoba chu a chhâng a, “Hêng hmeichhiate hi ka fanute an ni a, an fate pawh ka ta an ni, ran rual chen hian ka ta a ni, dân ang chuan i hmuh apiang hi ka ta a la ni. Ka fanute leh an fa hrinte hi vawiin hian eng nge ka tihsak tâk ang?" 
Genesis31:44 Ti teh, keini pahnih hi, kan inkârah thu i thlung teh ang; lung rem vûm ila, chu chu a chhinchhiahna ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:45 Jakoba chuan lung a la a, a phun ta a." 
Genesis31:46 Jakoba chuan a ṭhuihruaite chu, “Lung pu khâwm teh u,” a ti a. Lung a la khâwm a, an rem vûm a, chutah chuan chaw an ei ho ta a." 
Genesis31:47 Labana chuan chu chu Jegarsahadutha a vuah a; Jakoba erawh chuan Galeed a vuah a. 
Genesis31:48 Labana chuan, “He lung rem vûm hi vawiin aṭangin kan inkâra thuthlung chhinchhiahna ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:49 Chuvâng chuan a ni, a hmingah Galeed an vuah tâk ni. Mizpa an ti bawk, Labana chuan, “Hmêl kan inhmuh loh chhûngin Lalpa chuan min vêng tawn rawh se." 
Genesis31:50 Ka fanute hi i tihnawmnah emaw, nupui dang i neihsan emaw a nih chuan tu dangin min hre lo mah se, kan inkâra thuhretu chu Pathian a ni tih hre reng ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:51 Labana chuan Jakoba hnênah, “Hei, lung vawm vûm leh kan inkâra lungphuna ṭang tûr ka phun hi." 
Genesis31:52 Ka lung rem vûm leh lungphun hi ka pawi khawih tûrin i rawn pêl tûr a ni lo tih hriatna ni rawh se. 
Genesis31:53 Abrahama Pathian, Nahora Pathian, an pahniha Pathian chuan kan inkâr thuthlung hi vawng him rawh se,” a ti a. Jakoba chuan a pa Isaka Ṭiha chhâlin chhia a chham a." 
Genesis31:54 Tlâng sângah chuan Jakoban ran a hlân a, a sa ei tûrin a ṭhiante chu a sâwm a. An ei zawh chuan tlâng sângah chuan an riak a." 
Genesis31:55 A tûk zîngah chuan a fanute leh a tute chu Labana chuan a fâwp a, “Dam takin,” a ti a, a awmna lamah a haw ta a." 
Genesis32:1 Jakoba chu a kal zêl a, Pathian Vântirhkohte chuan an lo tâwk a." 
Genesis32:2 Anni chu a hmuhin Jakoba chuan, “He lai hi Pathian sipaite ṭanhmun a ni phawt mai,” a ti a, chu hmun chu Mahanaim a vuah a." 
Genesis32:3 A u Esauva chu Edom mite chênna Seir ramah a awm a, Jakoba chuan mi a tîr a, hetiang hian a hrilhtîr a:" 
Genesis32:4 “Ka Lalpa Esauva hnênah chuan ‘I chhiahhlawh Jakoba chuan heti hian a ti: Labana hnênah ka han awm a, tûn thlengin min lo chelh reng a ni." 
Genesis32:5 Bâwng leh sabengtung, berâm pawh, chhiahhlawh mipa leh hmeichhia nên ka nei ve ta. Min lo lawm beiseiin ka Lalpa hnênah ka chanchin hi ka rawn than lâwk a ni,” tiin." 
Genesis32:6 A mi tirhte chu an lo haw leh a, Jakoba hnênah, “I u Esauva chu kan va hmu a, hmuak tûr chein amah ngei pawh a lo kal e, mi zali a rawn hruai,” an ti a." 
Genesis32:7 Jakoba chuan a hlau ta hle a, a thlaphâng mangang chuan a mi hruai te, a ran te, a bâwng te leh sanghâwngsei te chu pâwl hnihah a ṭhen a." 
Genesis32:8 Esauvan pâwl khat hi rawn nangchîngin bei mah se, pâwl khat hi an la insaseng thei ang,” a ti rilru a ni." 
Genesis32:9 Jakoba chu a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, ka pa Isaka Pathian, ‘in ramah, i laichînte hnênah haw tawh rawh, i chungah ṭhat ka chhuah zêl dâwn,’ min ti a." 
Genesis32:10 I chhiahhlawh chungah ngil i nei tlat zêl ṭhîn hi ka phu loh a ni. Jordan lui ka kân khân ka tiang chauh lo chu eng mah ka nei lo va; tûnah zawng, pâwl hniha ṭhen tham hial ka lo nih tâk hi." 
Genesis32:11 Ka u Esauva lakah hian min hum teh, ka ngên a che; chutilo zawng, nunau lamin mi a rawn sâm dah ang e." 
Genesis32:12 Nang chuan, ‘I chungah ṭhat ka chhuah ngei ang a, tuipui kama ṭiau chhiar sên loh angin i thlahte ka tipung ang,’ i tih kha,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:13 Chumi hmunah chuan a riak a, a ran kawl zîng ata a u Esauva pêk tûr a thlang chhuak a." 
Genesis32:14 Kêlpui zahnih leh a pa sawmhnih, berâmpui zahnih leh a pa sawmhnih," 
Genesis32:15 sanghâwngsei sâwr lai sawmthum an notê nên; bâwngpui sawmli leh a pa sâwm; sabengtungpui sawmli leh a pa sâwm a dah hrang a. 
Genesis32:16 Chûng chu a pâwl zêlin a chhiahhlawhte a khalhtîr a, an hnênah chuan, “Lo kal hmasa rawh u, kâr nei deuhvin kal ang che u,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:17 A pâwl hmasa ber khalhtu hnênah chuan, “Ka u Esauvan a lo hmuh che-a, ‘Tu mi leh sa nge i nih, khaw nge i kal dâwn? I ran khalh zozai kha tu ta nge?’ a tih che chuan," 
Genesis32:18 ‘I nau Jakoba mi ka ni a, ka lalpa Esauva pêk tûr min khalhtîr a ni, amah Jakoba pawh kan hnung lawkah sâwn a lo kal,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:19 Chutiang bawkin pâwl hnihna khalhtu chu a hrilh a, a pâwl dang dang pawh a hrilh vek a, “Chutiang tak chuan Esauva hnên in thlen hunah sawi ang che u." 
Genesis32:20 ‘I chhiahhlawh Jakoba pawh hnung lawkah sâwn a lo kal e,’ ti tel ngei ngei ang che u,” a ti a. “Thilpêktea ka tihlungawi hmasak chuan amah ka hmuh hunah mi ngaidam ngei ang,” a ti rilru a ni." 
Genesis32:21 A thilpêkte chu lui an khalh kai hmasa a, chumi zânah chuan Jakoba chu bûkah chuan a riak a." 
Genesis32:22 Chumi zân chuan a tho va, a nupui pahnihte leh a chhiahhlawhnu pahnihte chu, a fa sâwm leh pakhatte nên a hruai a, Jabok lui kaiah chuan a kaipui a." 
Genesis32:23 A kaipui hnu chuan a thil neih zawng zawng pawh a thiar kai vek a. 
Genesis32:24 Jakoba chu amah chauhvin a awm ta a; khawvâr hma chu mi pakhat hian a buan a. 
Genesis32:25 Jakoba chu a hneh tâk loh avângin a khêl a khawihsak a, a khêlruh chu an inbuanna lamah chuan a pelh ta a." 
Genesis32:26 “Ni a chhuak dâwn, mi thlah rawh,” a ti a. Jakoba chuan, “Mal mi sâwm hma chu ka thlah lo vang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:27 Ani chuan, “Tu nge i hming?” a ti a. “Jakoba,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:28 “Jakoba an ti tawh lo vang che, Israela i ni tawh zâwk ang. Pathian leh mihring i buan a, i hneh tâk zâwk avângin,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:29 Jakoba chuan, “Khawngaih takin i hming min hrilh teh,” a ti a. “Engati nge ka hming min zawh?” a ti a, mal a sâwm a, a kalsan ta a." 
Genesis32:30 Jakoba chuan chumi hmun chu Peniel a vuah a, “A hmai chhanah Pathian ka hmu a; mahse, nungdamin ka la awm a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:31 Peniel a kalsan chuan ni a chhuak a, a khêl avâng chuan a bai ta suih suih a." 
Genesis32:32 Chuvângin, tûn thlengin Israela thlahte chuan khêlruh inzawmna lai tha hi an ei duh lo, Jakoba khêl tha thlung a khawihsak avângin." 
Genesis33:1 Jakoba chu a han dâk a, Esauva leh a mi hruai zali chu a hmu a. A fate chu an nute ṭheuh, Leaii te, Rakili te leh a hmeite bulah chuan a awmtîr a." 
Genesis33:2 A hmeite leh an fate chu an kal hmasa a, Leaii leh a fate chuan an dawt a, Rakili leh Josefa chu a hnuhnûng berah an kal a." 
Genesis33:3 Amah Jakoba chuan hma a hruai a, a u bul a thlen dâwn chuan vawi sarih lei si-a kûnin a u chu chibai a bûk a." 
Genesis33:4 Amah tâwk tûrin Esauva chu a lo tlân a, bek insiin an inpawm a, an infâwp a, an ṭap dûn ta a." 
Genesis33:5 Esauva chuan a han en vêl a, hmeichhiate leh naupangte chu a hmu a, “Hêng i mi hruaite hi tute nge ni?” a ti a. “Naupangte hi Pathianin i chhiahhlawh a khawngaih a, a pêkte an ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:6 Chhiahhlawhte chu an fate nên an lo kal a, Esauva hmaah chuan an kûn a, chibai an bûk a." 
Genesis33:7 Leaii leh a fate an lo kal a, a hmaah chuan an kûn a, a tâwp berah Josefa leh Rakili chu an lo kal a, an rawn kûn bawk a." 
Genesis33:8 Esauva chuan, “I hmaa ran i rawn khalhtîr zozai kha engtizia nge ni?” a ti a. “Min lo khawngaih theih nân ka ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:9 Esauva chuan, “E, Mama, kei pawhin ka ngah asin, i ta chu nei zêl zâwk rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:10 Jakoba chuan, “Ni lo ve, khawngaih takin ka thilpêk theih chhun che kha pawm hrâm teh, min lo lâwma, i hmêl ka hmu ngawt pawh hi Pathian hmu ang ka ni alâwm." 
Genesis33:11 Thilpêk ka rawn kensak che hi pawm hrâm teh. Pathianin min khawngaih a, ka la ngah alâwm,” a ti a. A tih tlat avâng chuan Esauva chuan a la ta a." 
Genesis33:12 Esauva chuan, “Ti rawh, i kal zêl ang, hma ka han hruaisak ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:13 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Naupangte hi an la tê hle a, berâm leh ran dangte pawh no hruai an ni tih ka lalpa chuan i hria, ni khat pawh khalh chak lui ila an thi mai ang." 
Genesis33:14 Chuvângin, ka lalpa chuan i chhiahhlawh hi lo kal hmasaksan la, kei chu zawi awiin naupang leh ran rual zai ngaiin Seir-ah ka lo kal ve ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:15 Esauva chuan, “Ka rawn kalpui, mi ṭhenkhat hi ka hnutchhiah ang che,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Engah nge ka tihhah ang che, a ṭûlna a awm lo ve,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:16 Esauva chu Seir lam pan chuan a haw ta a. 
Genesis33:17 Jakoba chu Sukot-ah a kal a, bâwk a khawh a, a rante awmna tûr a siam bawk a. Chumi avâng chuan chu hmun hming chu ‘Sukoth’ tih a ni ta a." 
Genesis33:18 Padan-aram aṭang chuan Jakoba chu Kanan ram Sekem khua chu dam takin a lo thleng a. Chu khaw bulah chuan awmhmun a khuar a. 
Genesis33:19 Chu hmun chu tangka sekel za-in Sekema pa Hamora thlahte hnên aṭangin a lei a. 
Genesis33:20 Tah chuan maichâm a siam a, a hmun hmingah chuan El-Elohe-Israel a vuah a." 
Genesis34:1 Leaiin Jakoba a hrinsak Dinaii chu, chu ram nulate tlawh tûrin a lêng a." 
Genesis34:2 Chu lai mite hotupa chu Hiv mi, Hamora a ni. A fapa Sekeman ani chu a lo man a, a mutpui lui a." 
Genesis34:3 Jakoba fanu Dinaii chu a ngaizâwng êm êm a, tihlâwm a tum ta a." 
Genesis34:4 Sekema chuan a pa hnênah, “Nula hi mi neihsak rawh,” a ti ta tlut tlut a." 
Genesis34:5 Jakoba chuan a fanu Dinaii chu Sekeman a lo tibawrhbâng tih a lo hria a, a fate kha ramhnuaiah ran rual nên an awm lai a ni a; an lo haw hma chu a ngawi mai a." 
Genesis34:6 Jakoba fanu dîl tûr chuan Sekema pa Hamora chu a lo kal a. 
Genesis34:7 Chutih lai chuan Jakoba fate chu ram aṭangin an lo haw a, chanchin an han hriat chuan an so sa phut a, an thin a ur ta êm êm a. Sekeman Jakoba fanu a lo pâwngsual mai chu Israel-te zîngah tih thiang lo a ni a, ngawihpui mai mai chi a ni lo." 
Genesis34:8 Hamora chuan an hnênah, “Ka fapa Sekema chuan in fanu hi duh tak têin a duh tlat a ni. Khawngaih takin neihtîr hrâm teh u." 
Genesis34:9 Inneih pawlh ila a ṭha ang. In fanute min neihtîr ula, kan fanute nei bawk ang che u." 
Genesis34:10 Tichuan, kan awm ho thei ang a, in duhna lai laiah in awm thei ang a, in duh angin in khawsa ang a, rante in nei thei dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis34:11 Nula pa leh a nuṭate hnênah Sekema chuan, “Min khawngaih teh u, in phût ang ang ka ti ang e." 
Genesis34:12 A man chu eng zât pawh min dîl ula, ka pe zêl ang che u, min neihtîr hrâm teh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis34:13 Jakoba fate chuan an farnu a tihbawrhbân avâng chuan Sekema leh a pa chu fing takin an chhâng a. 
Genesis34:14 “Kan remti thei lo; serh tan loh kan farnu kan neihtîr chuan kan tan thil zahthlâk a ni ang. 
Genesis34:15 Keimahni anga mipa zawng zawng serh in tan ve vek erawh chuan kan neihtîr thei ang che u. 
Genesis34:16 Tichuan, kan fanute in nei thei ang a, in fanute kan nei thei bawk ang a, in zîngah awmin laichîn unau kan ni thei ang." 
Genesis34:17 Serh in tan duh loh chuan kan farnu chu kan hruai ang a, kan kal daih ang,” an ti a." 
Genesis34:18 Hamora leh a fapa chuan an thil phût chu âwm an ti hle a. 
Genesis34:19 Jakoba fanu chu a duh êm kher a, tlangvâl chuan an thu chu a bawh zui ta chung chung a; a chipuite chuan ani chu an ngaisâng hle a ni." 
Genesis34:20 Hamora leh a fapa Sekema chu kulh kawngkaa khaw hotute hnênah chuan an kal a, an khaw mite hnênah chuan," 
Genesis34:21 “Hêngho hi nêlawm tak an ni. Ram hi kan thâwl bawk a, awm ve sela, an duh duhin sumdâwng teh se. An fanute nupuiah kan nei ang a, kan fanute pawh nupuiah nei ve rawh se." 
Genesis34:22 Hêng mite hian kan zînga awmin laichîn unau kan nih theih nân thil pakhat chauh an tih anga kan mipa zawng zawng serh tan an phût tlat a ni. 
Genesis34:23 An ran neih zozai, an sum leh pai, an sate nên hian kan ta a ni mai dâwn asin. Kan zînga an awm ve duh nân an phût ang chu i ti mai ang u,” an ti a." 
Genesis34:24 Hamora leh a fapa Sekema thu chu mi pangngai chin chuan rem an ti a, an zînga mipa pangngai chin chuan serh an tan ta vek a." 
Genesis34:25 A ni thum ni, a nat zual lai tak chuan Dinaii nuṭa Simeona leh Levia, Jakoba fapa pahnih chuan an khandaih an keng a, tu ma lo dan lohvin khuaah chuan an lût a, mipa zawng zawng chu an râwt ta vek a." 
Genesis34:26 Hamora leh a fapa Sekema pawh an sât hlum a, Sekema in aṭang chuan Dinaii chu an la chhuak a, an hâwn ta a." 
Genesis34:27 Jakoba fa dangte chuan an mi thahte an va hmuh chuan khua chu an suam ta a, an farnu tihbawrhbân man phuba an la a." 
Genesis34:28 An berâm te, bâwng te, sabengtung te, khaw chhûng leh pâwna an thil neih zawng zawng," 
Genesis34:29 an sum leh pai zawng zawng chu, an fate leh an nupuite nên an man a, an in chhûnga awm zawng zawng pawh an lâksak a." 
Genesis34:30 Jakoba chuan Simeona leh Levia hnênah, “He rama chêng Kanan mite leh Periz mite tana hnawksakah min siam a, mi timangang hle a ni. Kan tlêm si a, min rawn bei sela kan mi zawng zawngte nên hian min nuai bo ang asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis34:31 Anni chuan, “Kan farnu hi mihur anga lo sawisak tûr em ni?” tiin an chhâng a." 
Genesis35:1 Pathianin Jakoba hnênah, “Bethel-ah kal la, han awm rawh. I u Esauva i tlânbosan laia i hnêna inlâr Pathian kha maichâm siamsak ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis35:2 Jakoba chuan a chhûngte leh an zînga awm zawng zawng chu a hrilh a. “Pathian dang lim in kawlte chu paih bo rawh u. Inthian thianghlim ula, silhfên thar inbel ang che u." 
Genesis35:3 Bethel-ah kan kal dâwn a, ka mangan laia min ngaihventu Pathian tân maichâm ka siam dâwn a ni; ani chuan ka kalna apiangah min awmpui ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Genesis35:4 An zînga pathian dang lim awm zawng zawng chu Jakoba an pe a, an bengbehte pawh an pe a; Sekem sasaw thing hnuaiah an phûm a." 
Genesis35:5 An chhuak ta a, chûng lai hmuna awmte chu hlauhna nasa takin a man a, Jakoba hote chu an ûmzui ngam lo." 
Genesis35:6 Jakoba chuan Kanan ram Luz khua tih ṭhin Bethel chu a mite nên chuan an thleng ta a. 
Genesis35:7 Tah chuan maichâm a siam a, a u a tlân bosan laia chumi hmuna a hnêna Pathian a rawn inlâr avângin chu hmun chu El-bethel a vuah a." 
Genesis35:8 Tin, Rakili awmtu Debori chu a thi a, Bethel chuan hnuai sasaw bulah an phûm a, chu hmun chu Alon-bakut an vuah a." 
Genesis35:9 Padan-aram aṭanga Jakoba a lo hâwn khân a hnênah Pathian a inlâr a, mal a sâwm a." 
Genesis35:10 Pathian chuan a hnênah: “I hming Jakoba a ni a, Jakoba ka ti tawh lo vang che, I hming chu Israela a ni tawh ang,” a ti a. Chuvângin, Israela tih a ni ta a." 
Genesis35:11 Pathian chuan a hnênah: “El-Sadaia ka ni, I chi ṭha sela, pung duah duah ang che, Hnam, pung khâwm tih tham zet I thlah dâwn a ni. I ṭhâlbe aṭang tein lalte an lo chhuak ang." 
Genesis35:12 Abrahama leh Isaka ka pêk ram chu Tûnah ka pe a che, I thlah lo la awm tûrte tân He ram hi ka pe che a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis35:13 A biakna hmun ata chu Pathian chuan a kalsan a. 
Genesis35:14 Jakoba chuan Pathianin a biakna hmunah chuan lung a phun a, inthawina uain a bun a, hriak a leih a." 
Genesis35:15 Pathianin a rawn biakna hmun chu Jakoba chuan Bethel a vuah a. 
Genesis35:16 Bethel aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Efratha khaw thlen hma deuh chuan Rakili chuan nau a vei a, a na hle a." 
Genesis35:17 A nau vei nat vânglai chuan nau chhartu chuan, “Thlaphâng suh, fapa i nei leh dâwn e,” a ti a." 
Genesis35:18 A thi a ni ta mai a, a ṭawng hnuhnûngah a fa hmingah chuan Benoni a ti a. A pa erawh chuan a hmingah Benjamina a sa a." 
Genesis35:19 Rakili chu a thi ta a, Efratha khaw kawngah chuan an phûm a, Efratha chu Bethlehem an tih tâk hi a ni." 
Genesis35:20 A thlânah chuan Jakoban hriatrengna lung a phun a, chu chu tûn thlengin Rakili thlânah chuan a la awm a ni." 
Genesis35:21 Israela chu a kal zêl a, Mig-dal-eder piahah bûk a khuar a," 
Genesis35:22 heta a awm lai hian Reubenan a pa hmei Bilhaii a lo mutpui a, Israela chuan chu chu a hria. Jakoba chuan fapa sâwm leh pahnih a nei a." 
Genesis35:23 Leaii hrinte: Jakoba fa u ber chu Reubena a ni a; a dawttu chu Simona te, Levia te, Juda te, Isakara leh Zebuluna te an ni." 
Genesis35:24 Rakili hrinte: Josefa leh Benjamina. 
Genesis35:25 Rakili bawih Bilhaii hrinte: Dana leh Naftalia. 
Genesis35:26 Leaii bawih Zilpaii hrinte: Gada leh Asera. Khîng khi Jakoba fa, Padan-aram-a a awm laia piangte chu an ni." 
Genesis35:27 Kiriat-arba, Hebron an tih tâk rama Mamre khua, a pa Isaka awmna chu, Jakoba chuan a thleng ta a. Chu hmun chu a ni Abrahama leh Isaka mikhualna hmun chu." 
Genesis35:28 Isaka chu kum za leh sawmriata upa a ni a. 
Genesis35:29 A hnuk a chat a, tarkûn khûp bihin a thi ta a; a laichînte hnênah hruai a ni a. A fapa Esauva leh Jakoba chuan an phûm a." 
Genesis36:1 Hei hi Esauva thlahte chanchin chhuina a ni; ani hi Edoma tih a ni bawk. 
Genesis36:2 Esauva chuan hêng Kanan hmeichhiate hi nupuiah a nei a: Hit mi Elona fanu Adaii te, Hiv mi Zibeona fapa Ana fanu, Oholibami te," 
Genesis36:3 Ismaela fanu Nebaiota farnu Basemathi te hi. 
Genesis36:4 Adaii chuan Esauva chu fapa Elifaza a hrinsak a; Basemathiin Reuela a hring a; 
Genesis36:5 Oholibami chuan Jeusa te, Jalama te, Kora te a hring a. Khîng khi Esauva fapa, Kanan rama piangte chu an ni." 
Genesis36:6 Esauva chuan a nupui te, a fanu leh fapa te, an chhûng zînga awm ve zawng zawng te, a ran vulh, ran chi hrang hrang te, Kanan rama sum leh pai a neih tâk te chu chhawmin, a nau Jakoba dîp lo tûrin, Seir tlângramah a pêm ta a." 
Genesis36:7 An neihnun dun tâk êm avângin an awm ho hlei thei tawh lo a ni, an mikhualna ram chuan an ran tlatna tûr a daih tawh ngang lo." 
Genesis36:8 Tichuan, Esauva chu Seir tlângramah chuan a awm ta a. Esauva chu Edoma tih a ni bawk." 
Genesis36:9 Seir tlângrama Edom-ho thlahtu Esauva thlahte chanchin chu hetiang hi a ni: 
Genesis36:10 Hêng hi Esauva fate chu an ni; Elifaza, Esauva nupui Adaii hrin; Reuela, Esauva nupui Basemathi hrin." 
Genesis36:11 Elifaza chuan fapa - Temana te, Omara te, Zefoa te, Gatama te, Kenaza te a nei a." 
Genesis36:12 Esauva fa Elifaza chuan hmei, Timnai a nei a; chu chuan Elifaza chu fapa Amaleka a hrinsak a. Chûng chu Esauva nupui Adaii thlahte chu an ni." 
Genesis36:13 Hêng hi Reuela fate chu an ni: Nahata te, Zera te, Sama te, Miza te: chûng chu Esauva nupui Basemathi thlahte chu an ni." 
Genesis36:14 Esauva nupui Oholibami, Zibeona fapa Ana fanu chuan Esauva chu fapa pathum - Jeusa te, Jalama te, Kora te a hrinsak a." 
Genesis36:15 Esauva thlah chi hrang hrangte chu hêng hi an ni: Esauva fa tîr Elifaza thlahte: Teman-ho te, Omar-ho te, Zefo-ho te, Kenaz-ho te," 
Genesis36:16 Kora-ho te, Gatam-ho te leh Amalek-ho te hi an ni. Khîng khi Elifaza chi, Edom rama awm, Adaii thlahte an ni." 
Genesis36:17 Esauva fa Reuela thlahte chu hêng hi an ni: Nahat-ho te, Zera-ho te, Sama-ho te leh Miza-ho te; khîng khi Reuela chi Edom rama awm, Esauva nupui Basemathi thlahte chu an ni." 
Genesis36:18 Esauva nupui Oholibami thlahte chu hênghote hi an ni: Jeusa chi te, Jalam chi te, Zera chi te, khîngho khi Ana fanu Oholibami, Esauva nupui thlahte an ni." 
Genesis36:19 Chûng chu Esauva, Edoma an tih bawk, thlah chi hrang hrang hmingte chu a ni." 
Genesis36:20 He rama lo awm sa Hor mi, Seira thlahte chu hêng hi an ni: Lotana te, Sobala te, Zibeona te, Ana te," 
Genesis36:21 Disona te, Ezera te, Disana te, Edom rama Hor hnam Seira thlahte chu khîngte khi an ni." 
Genesis36:22 Lotana fate chu Hora leh Hemana an ni. Lotana chuan farnu Timnai a nei bawk. 
Genesis36:23 Sobalan fa hêngte hi a nei: Alvana te, Manahata te, Ebala te, Zefoa te, Onama te." 
Genesis36:24 Zibeonan fapa pahnih Aia leh Ana a nei. Ana hi a ni, a pa Zibeona sabengtung thlaha thlalêra tuihna hmu chhuaktu chu." 
Genesis36:25 Ana chuan fapa Disona leh fanu Oholibami a nei. 
Genesis36:26 Disona chuan fapa Hemdana te, Esbana te, Ithrana te, Kherana te a nei a." 
Genesis36:27 Ezera chuan fapa pathum Bilhana te, Zavana te, Akana te a nei a." 
Genesis36:28 Disana chuan fapa - Uza leh Arana a nei a. 
Genesis36:29 Lotana chi te, Sobal chi te, Zibeon chi te, Ana chi te," 
Genesis36:30 Dison chi te, Ezer chi te, Disan chi te hi Hor hnam an ni. Seir rama Hor hnam awmte chu a chi chiin khîngte khi an ni." 
Genesis36:31 Israel rama lal an awm hmain hêngte hi Edom rama lal awm tawhte chu an ni. 
Genesis36:32 Beora fapa Bela chu Edom ram lalah a ṭang a, a khawpui hming chu Dinhaba a ni." 
Genesis36:33 Bela a thih chuan Bozra khaw mi Zera fapa Jobaba chuan a ai a awh a. 
Genesis36:33 Bela a thih chuan Bozra khaw mi Zera fapa Jobaba chuan a ai a awh a. 
Genesis36:34 Jobaba a thih chuan Teman-ho rama mi Husaman a ai a awh a. 
Genesis36:34 Jobaba a thih chuan Teman-ho rama mi Husaman a ai a awh a. 
Genesis36:35 Husama a han thih ve chuan Bedada fapa Hadada chu a aiawhin a lal a, ani hi Moab rama Midian-ho hnehtu kha a ni; a khawpui hming chu Avit a ni." 
Genesis36:36 Hadada a thih chuan Masreka mi Samlaa chu a aiawhin a lal a. 
Genesis36:37 Samlaa a thih chuan Rehobot khaw awmna Luipui an tih aṭanga lo kal Saula chuan a ai a rawn awh a. 
Genesis36:38 Saula a thih chuan Akbora fapa Baal-hanana chu a aiawhin a lal a," 
Genesis36:39 a khawpui hming chu Pau a ni. A nupui chu Mehetabeli a ni a, Mezahaba fa Matredi fanu a ni." 
Genesis36:40 Hêng chi, Timna chi te, Alva chi te, Jethet chi te," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibam chi te, Ela chi te, Pinon chi te," 
Genesis36:42 Kenaz chi te, Teman chi te, Mibzar chi te," 
Genesis36:43 Magdiel chi te, Iram chi te hi Esauva thlahte an ni. An awmna bial chuan a awmte chi hming chu a pu ṭheuh zêl a. Chûng chu Esauva thlah, Edom mi, Edom rama chêngte chu an ni." 
Genesis37:1 Jakoba chu a pa mikhualna ram, Kanan ramah chuan a awm ta a. Hei hi Jakoba chhûngte chanchin chu a ni." 
Genesis37:2 Kum sâwm leh pasarih a tlinin Josefa chuan a ute berâm vênpuiin a pa hmei Bilhaii leh Zilpaii fate chu a zui ve ṭhîn a, an chanchin ṭha lo a pa hnênah a rawn thlen a." 
Genesis37:3 Israela chuan Josefa chu a tar lam fa a nih avângin a fa dang zawng aiin a duat zâwk a; kawrfual mawi tak a ṭhuisak a. 
Genesis37:4 An pa chuan a fa dang zawng zawng aiin ani chu a ngaina zâwk tih a ute chuan an hriatin an haw ta êm êm a, ṭawng ṭha pawhin an be duh ta lo hial a." 
Genesis37:5 Vawi khat chu Josefa chuan mumang a nei a, a ute chu a hrilh a, chumi avâng chuan an haw zual sauh va." 
Genesis37:6 An hnênah chuan, “Ka mumang hi lo ngaithla teh u." 
Genesis37:7 Lovah buhphal kan lo têl a, ka buhphal têl chu a ding hlut a, in buhphal têlte chuan an rawn din hual a, chibai bûkin zu rawn kûn a!” a ti a." 
Genesis37:8 A ute chuan, “Nang tehchai hian kan chungah ro i rêl ang maw? Kan hotu i ni vei ang maw?” an ti a; a mumang a sawi chu an huat lehzualna chhan a ni." 
Genesis37:9 Mumang dang a nei leh a, a ute chu a hrilh leh bawk a: “Ngai teh u, mumang dang ka nei leh asin. Tûn ṭuma ka mumangah chuan ni te, thla te leh arsi sâwm leh pakhatte khi ka hmaah lo zu kûn a!” a ti a." 
Genesis37:10 A pa pawh a hrilh a, ani chuan a lo zilh a, “I mumang hi engtihna nge ni ngai! Kei leh i nu te, i ute hi i hmaah lei siin kan la kûn ang maw!” a ti a." 
Genesis37:11 A ûte chu a chungah an lungni lo hle a, a pa erawh chuan a ngaihtuah neuh neuh ṭhîn a." 
Genesis37:12 Ni khat chu a ute chuan an pa berâm Sekem-ah an va thlah a. 
Genesis37:13 Israela chuan Josefa hnênah, “I uten Sekem-ah berâm an thlah kha. Ti teh, an hnênah ka tîr teh ang che,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Mi tîr ta che,” a ti a." 
Genesis37:14 “Kal ta la, i ute leh an berâmte chu eng angin nge an awm va chian la, min rawn hrilh leh ang che,” a ti a. Hebron ruam aṭang chuan a tîr chhuak a, Sekem lam chu a pan ta a." 
Genesis37:15 Phûla a tei a tei lai chuan mi pakhat a lo kal a, “Eng nge i zawn?” a ti a." 
Genesis37:16 Ani chuan, “Ka ute ka zawng a ni, Khawiah nge berâm an thlah i hre lo maw?” a ti a." 
Genesis37:17 Ani chuan, “Heta ṭanga an insawn dâwn khân, ‘Dothan lamah i kal ang u,’ an ti ni âwmin ka hria e,” a ti a. Tichuan, Josefa chuan a ute chu a ûmzui a, Dathan-ah chuan a va ûm phâk a." 
Genesis37:18 Hla fea a la awm laiin a ute chuan an lo hmu a, a lo thlen hnaih hma chuan tihhlum zai an lo rêl a." 
Genesis37:19 “En teh u, mumang neia a lo kal saw." 
Genesis37:20 Engah nge kan thah mai loh vâng? Khurah kan paih ang a, sa-in a seh a ni kan ti mai tûr alâwm. A mumang kha eng meuh nge a nih phah dâwn kan hre mai ang,” an inti a." 
Genesis37:21 Chu chu Reubenan a lo hria a, an kut ata chhan chhuah a tum a, “A thah zawng i that êm lo vang u. Thisen zawng chhuah teh suh u." 
Genesis37:22 Saw lai thlalêra khurah sâwn i thlâk mai ang u. Nangni meuh chuan kut thlâk lo hrâm teh u,” a ti a; an kut ata chhan chhuaha, an pa hnêna hawtîr a tum rilru a ni." 
Genesis37:23 Josefa a lo thlen chuan a ute chuan a kawr hâk lai, a kawrfual mawi takte nên chuan an hlihsak a," 
Genesis37:24 an man a, khurah an thlâk ta a. Khurah chuan eng mah a awm lo, tui tlêm pawh a awm hauh lo." 
Genesis37:25 Tin, chaw an fâk lai chuan an han thlîr a, Ismael-ho, sanghâwngsei rual nên, Gilead aṭanga lo kal an hmu a, beraw te, thinghnai damdawi te, Mura te an phur a, Aigupta ramah an chhukpui dâwn a ni." 
Genesis37:26 Juda chuan a unaute hnênah, “Kan nau hi i that lo vang u, kan thah a nih thu zêp bo thei pawh ni ila eng nge kan tân hlâwkna?" 
Genesis37:27 Ti rawh u, Ismael-ho hnênah i hralh mai ang u. Keimahni êm chuan kan nau, kan thisen zawmpui ngei chungah zawng kut i thlâk lo vang u,” a ti a. An unauza chuan an remti tlâng ta a." 
Genesis37:28 Chutih chhûng chuan Midian sumdâwng rual an lo kal a. Khur aṭang chuan Josefa chu an khai chhuak a, Ismael mite hnênah tangka sawmhnihin an hralh a. Josefa chu Aigupta ramah an hruai thla ta a." 
Genesis37:29 Reubena chu khurah chuan a va kal a, Josefa chu a lo awm tawh si lo va, a puan a pawtthlêr a," 
Genesis37:30 a unaute hnênah chuan a lo kîr a, “Ka nau a bo ta, engtin nge kan tih tâk ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis37:31 Josefa kawrfual mawi chu an la a, kêltê an talh a, a kawr chu thisenah chuan an hnim a." 
Genesis37:32 Kawrfual chu an pa hnênah an hâwn a, “Hei hi kan chhar ngawt a, i fapa kawr kha a ni nge ni lo en chiang teh,” an ti a." 
Genesis37:33 A lo hre mai a, “Ka fapa kawr zu nia le! Ramsain a seh a ni phawt ang. Josefa hi ramsa kutah a thi ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis37:34 Jakoba chuan a puan a pawtthlêr a, saiip a vêng a, ni rei tak chhûng a fapa chu a sûn a." 
Genesis37:35 A fapa leh a fanu zawng zawng chuan hnem an tum a; mahse, hnem rual a ni lo. “Hnem mi ka ni lo, lusûnin Seol-ah ka fa hnênah ka liam dâwn e,” a ti a. Chutiang chuan a pa chu amah ngaiin a ṭap ṭhîn a." 
Genesis37:36 Chutih chhûng chuan Midian-ho khân Josefa chu Aigupta ramah an kalpui a, Farawa hmaa milian Potifara hnênah an hralh a. Ani chu vêngtu pâwla hotu ber a ni." 
Genesis38:1 Chutih lai vêl chuan Juda chuan a unaute chu a kalsan a, mi pakhat, Adulam mi Hira chu a zu kawp a." 
Genesis38:2 Juda chuan Sua fanu nula chu a hmu a, nupuiah a nei ta a." 
Genesis38:3 Nau a pai a, fapa a hrinsak a, a hmingah Era a sa a." 
Genesis38:4 Nau a pai leh a, fapa a hring a, a nu chuan a hmingah Onana a sa a." 
Genesis38:5 Fa dang a hring leh a, a hmingah Sela a sa a; chu mi pian lai chuan Juda chu Khezib khuaah a awm a." 
Genesis38:6 Juda chuan a fa tîr Era chu nupui Tamari a neihsak a. 
Genesis38:7 Juda fa tîr Era chu Lalpa hmuhin a sual hle a, Lalpa chuan a tihlum ta a." 
Genesis38:8 Juda chuan Onana hnênah, “I u nupui hi pâwl teh, pasalte nau tih tûr chu tihsak la, i u tân chi thlahsak rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis38:9 Onana chuan chi thlah tûr chu ama fa a ni dâwn lo tih a hria a; a u nupui a pâwl apiangin a u tân chi a thlahsak lohna tûrin a chi chu leiah a titla ṭhîn a. 
Genesis38:10 A thiltih chu Lalpa ṭha tih loh zâwng tak a ni a, a tihlum ve ta mai a." 
Genesis38:11 Juda chuan a monu Tamari hnênah, “Ka fapa Sela hi a puitlin hma chu in in lamah pasal nei lovin va awm tawh,” a ti a; Sela pawh chu a ûte angin a thi ve mai ang tih a hlau a ni. Tamari chu a pate in lamah chuan a haw ta a." 
Genesis38:12 Rei fe hnuah chuan Sua fanu, Juda nupui chu a thi a. Lusûn hun bi a ral hnu chuan a ṭhianpa Adulam mi Hira nên chuan Timna khuaah berâm hmul mêt tûrin an chho va." 
Genesis38:13 Miin Tamari chu, “I pasala pa chu berâm hmul mêt tûrin Timna khuaah a lo chho dâwn,” tiin an hrilh a." 
Genesis38:14 A lusûn thawmhnaw chu a hlîp a, a hmêl hriat theih loh tûrin hmai khuhnain a intuam tlat a, Timna khaw kawnga kulh kawngah chuan a lo ṭhu a; Sela chu a puitling tawh si a, a pa chuan nupuiah a neihtîr lo zo ta a ni tih a hria a ni." 
Genesis38:15 Juda chuan ani chu a hmu a, a hmai a khuh tlat avângin nawhchizuar emaw a ti a:" 
Genesis38:16 kawng sîra a ṭhu chu a pan a, “Ti teh, i mu dûn ang,” a ti a, a monu kha a ni tih reng a hre lo. “Min mutpui manah eng nge min pêk ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis38:17 “Ka ran rual zînga kêl notê ka pe ang che,” a ti a. Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Min rawn pêk hmain eng emaw hrên tûr dahkham i nei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis38:18 “Eng nge dahkham ka pêk ang che?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “I hming nemna awrh leh i tiang kha le,” a ti a. Chûng chu a pe a, a mutpui a, nau a pai ta a." 
Genesis38:19 Tin, a tho va, a inkhuhna puan chu a hlîp a, a lusûn thuamhnaw chu a inbel leh ta a." 
Genesis38:20 Juda chuan a dahkham la kîr tûrin a ṭhian Adulam mi Hira chu kêltê kengin hmeichhe hnênah chuan a tîr a; a va hmu zo lo va. 
Genesis38:21 Chuta mite hnênah chuan, “Enaim kawng sîra hmeichhe inkhuh awm ṭhîn kha khaw nge a awm tâk?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Chutiang hmeichhia hetah an awm ngai lo,” an ti a." 
Genesis38:22 Juda hnênah chuan a lo kîr a, “Ka hmu zo hauh lo mai. Khuaa mite pawh ka zâwt a, ‘chutiang hmeichhe inkhuh ṭhîn an awm ngai lo,’ an ti asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis38:23 Juda chuan, “Kan dahkham chu nei hlen mai rawh se; mi nuihzatbûr kan ni mai dâwn alâwm. Ka tiam angin kêltê chu kei chuan ka pe ngei a, ani chu i va hmu si lo va le,” a ti a." 
Genesis38:24 Thla thum vêl hnuah chuan Juda chu, “I monu Tamari chuan tlangvâl a nei a, sâwn a pai asin,” tiin an hrilh a. “Kai chhuak ula, hâl hlum rawh u,” a ti khu khu a." 
Genesis38:25 An kaih chhuah lai chuan a pasala pa hnênah Tamari chuan, “Hêng neitu fa hi a ni ka pai; hêng hming nemna awrh leh tiangte hi tu ta nge lo en teh se,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
Genesis38:26 Juda chuan a lo hre mai a, “Kei aiin thil a tidik zâwk a ni; ka fapa Sela hi ka neihtîr ta si lo va,” a ti a. Ani chu a pâwl leh ngai tawh lo." 
Genesis38:27 Nau hrin a lo hun chuan phîr a pai a lo ni a. 
Genesis38:28 A han hrin dâwn chuan pakhat bân a lo lang a, nau chhartu chuan bân lo lang chu piang hmasa tih hriat nân la sen a buntîr a." 
Genesis38:29 A bân chu a pil leh a, a pakhat zâwk chu a lo chhuak ta a. Nau chhartu chuan, “Nangma thuin i lo chhuak ta mai a ni maw,” a ti a, a hmingah Pereza a sa a." 
Genesis38:30 La sen bun zâwk pawh chu a lo piang a, a hmingah Zera a sa a." 
Genesis39:1 Josefa chu Ismael-ho chuan Aigupta ramah an hruai chhuk a, Aigupta mi, mi pakhat, Farawa hnuaia milian, vêngtu hotu Potifara hnênah an hralh a." 
Genesis39:2 Lalpa chuan a awmpui avângin Josefa chu a hmuingîl hle zêl a; a pu, Aigupta mi chuan, in chhûng lam hna a thawhtîr a." 
Genesis39:3 Lalpa chuan a awmpui a, a thiltih apiangah a hlawhtling zêl tih a pu chuan a hmu a." 
Genesis39:4 A duh hle a, amah viltu bîkah a ruat a. An chhûngkaw enkawltu leh a neih zawng zawng kawltua a dah chinah," 
Genesis39:5 Josefa avângin Lalpa chuan Aigupta mi chhûngkua chu mal a sâwm a, a neih zawng zawngah, in lam leh ram lamah, Lalpa malsâwmna chu a dawng a." 
Genesis39:6 A neih zawng zawng chu Josefa kutah a dah vek a, ani a awm phawt chuan eng mah a ngaihtuah lo, a ei tûr bîk tih chauh lo chu. Josefa chu tlangvâl tlâwntlai ṭha deuh, hmêlṭha tak a ni a." 
Genesis39:7 Nakin deuhvah chuan a pu nupui chuan Josefa chu a ngaizâwng a, mutpuiah a thlêm ta a." 
Genesis39:8 Ani chu a ṭang a, a pu nupui hnênah chuan, “Kei ka awm phawt chuan ka pu hian in chhûng lam thil eng mah a ngaihtuah lo; a neih zawng zawng min kawltîr vek a ni." 
Genesis39:9 He in chhûngah hian kei aiin thu a nei chuang lo; nang, a nupui tih chauh lo hi chu ka tân ui pawh eng mah a nei lo. Chuvângin, Pathian lakah hetiang thil sual hi engtin nge ka tih theih ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis39:10 Ni tin a thlêm ngut ngut a; mahse, a duh lo tlat a, a bul hnaia awm pawh a duh lo." 
Genesis39:11 Ni khat chu in chhûngah hna thawk tûrin a lût a, chhiahhlawh tu mah in chhûnga an awm loh lai a ni." 
Genesis39:12 A puanah chuan a lo man a, “Ti rawh, i mu dûn ang,” a ti a; mahse, a tlân chhuahsan ta a, a puan erawh chu a kutah chuan a tlânsan a." 
Genesis39:13 A tlân chhuak a, a puan a tlânsan tih a hriat chuan," 
Genesis39:14 chhiahhlawhte chu a au ta chiam a, “En teh u, Hebrai mi, mi timualpho tûr a rawn hruai lût a lo nih hi. Min mutpui tumin khum pindanah a lo lût a;" 
Genesis39:15 mahse, theih tâwkin ka au va, puan pawh chuh lovin a tlân ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis39:16 Josefa pu a lo haw hma chuan puan chu a kawl a. 
Genesis39:17 A hnênah, “Hebrai mi i rawn hawn khân min sual a tum a, a lo lût a." 
Genesis39:18 Mahse, ka au chiam a, a puan pawh chuh lovin a tlânchhe ta a ni,” tiin chanchin a lo hrilh a." 
Genesis39:19 ‘I bawihin chutin khatin min ti’ a tih a han hriat chuan Josefa pu chu a thinur ta hle a. 
Genesis39:20 Tichuan, Josefa chu a hruai a, lal lung in tâng dahna lung inah a tântîr ta a." 
Genesis39:21 Tân ina a awm pawh chu Lalpa chuan a awmpui a, a khawngaih a, tân in vêngtu chu a duhsaktîr a." 
Genesis39:22 Tân in vêngtu chuan lung in tâng zawng zawng enkawltuah a hmang a; tih tûr awm apiang a titu a ni ṭhîn. 
Genesis39:23 Lalpa chuan a awmpui avângin tân in vêngtu tân eng mah tih ve a ngai lo, a tih apiangah Lalpa chuan a tihmuingîl zêl a ni." 
Genesis40:1 Chûng thil hnuah chuan Aigupta lal no kengtu leh chhang siamtu chuan an pu Aigupta lal hmaah thil tih fel loh an nei a. 
Genesis40:2 Farawa chu a chhiahhlawh pahnih, no kengtu leh chhang siamtu chungah chuan a thin a ur hle a." 
Genesis40:3 Josefa tânna hmun, tâng vêngtu hotu awmnaah chuan anni chu an rawn tântîr a." 
Genesis40:4 Tâng vêngtu hotu chuan chûng mi pahnihte tirhkah atân Josefa chu a ruat a. 
Genesis40:5 Rei fe an tân hnu chuan Aigupta lal no kengtu leh chhang siamtute pahnih chuan zan khatah mumang awmze hrang nei an mang ve ve a. 
Genesis40:6 A tûk zînga Josefa a lo kal chuan an hmêl a lo ngui hle mai a. 
Genesis40:7 A pu, tâng vêngtu hotu ina tâng ve, Farawa miliante chu, “Engtizia nge vawiin chu in va ngui ve?” a ti a." 
Genesis40:8 “Mumang kan nei a, tu man min hrilh fiahsak thei lo va ni,” an ti a. Ani chuan, “Mumang hrilh fiahnate chu Pathian pêk alâwm, mi han hrilh teh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis40:9 No kengtu lu ber chuan Josefa hnênah, “Ka mumangah chuan grep hrui zâm hi ka hmu a." 
Genesis40:10 Pêng pathum a nei a, a kuhmûm chauh tih chuan a pâr parh a, a rah ta mai a, a rah bâwr chu a hmin a." 
Genesis40:11 Farawa no ka lo keng a, grep rah chu ka lo va, Farawa novah chuan ka sâwr a, Farawa kutah no chu lo zu pe ia,” a ti a." 
Genesis40:12 Josefa chuan, “A awmzia chu hetiang hi a ni." 
Genesis40:13 Pêng thum chu ni thum tihna a ni, ni thumah Farawa chuan i lu a chawikâng ang a, i hna ngai a thawhtîr leh ang che, a no kengtu i nih laia i tih ṭhin angin no chu Farawa i hlân dâwn a nih chu." 
Genesis40:14 I chan a ṭhat hunah chuan heta ka awm dân hi hre reng la, Farawa hnênah hemi aṭanga mi chhuah tûrin kamkhat talin mi han sawisak ang che." 
Genesis40:15 Hebrai mite ram aṭanga rûk bo ka ni a, tân ina dahna khawp thil sual eng mah tih ka nei bawk si lo,” a ti a." 
Genesis40:16 Chhang siamtu chuan ṭha takin mang chu a hrilh fiah tih a hria a, Josefa hnênah, “Ka mang ve chu, bâwm pathum ka lo chhîpchhuan a," 
Genesis40:17 a chung berah chuan Farawa ei tûr chhang tuihnai chi tinrêng a awm a. Ka chhîpchhuan lai chu savaten an rawn chu noh noh mai zu nia!” a ti a. 
Genesis40:18 Josefa chuan a chhâng a, “Hei hi a awmzia chu a ni: bâwm thum chu ni thum tihna a ni." 
Genesis40:19 Ni thum a nihin Farawa chuan i lu a tan ang a, i taksa chu thingah a khai ang a, savate chuan i sa chu an rawn tlân noh noh dâwn a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Genesis40:20 A ni thum ni chuan Farawa chuan a pian champha lâwmin a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng tân ruai a ṭheh a. A no kengtu leh chhang siamtu chu a hre chhuak a. 
Genesis40:21 No kengtu chu a no kengtuah a dah leh a, Farawa no a keng leh ta a." 
Genesis40:22 Chhang siamtu lal ber erawh chu Josefa sawi ang khân thingah a khai ta a. 
Genesis40:23 No kengtu lu ber chuan Josefa chu a ngaihsak ta awzâwng lo va, a theihnghilh hmin dêr a." 
Genesis41:1 Kum hnih hnuah chuan Faraw-an mumang a nei a. Nail lui kamah a lo ding a. 
Genesis41:2 Lui aṭang chuan bâwngpui pasarih, thau ṭha tak tak an lo chhuak a, lui kam rairuang hmunah chuan an tla ta a." 
Genesis41:3 An hnung maiah chuan bâwngpui pasarih chêr chhe êm êm an lo chhuak a, a hmasate bulah khân an lo ding a." 
Genesis41:4 Bâwng chêr chhe tak tak chuan bâwng thau tak tak chu an ei zo ta mai a. Farawa chu a ṭhangharh ta a. 
Genesis41:5 A han muhîl leh a, mang a nei zawm a: buh kûng khatah vui sarih, ṭha tak, bit deuh a lo awm a." 
Genesis41:6 A dawtah vui sarih, sîn tê tê, thli lum chhêm ro rim rem a lo awm bawk a." 
Genesis41:7 Buh vui pasarih, sîn tê tê chuan vui sarih, ṭha pui pui chu an ei zo ta mai a. Farawa chu a ṭhangharh a, a mumang a lo ni a." 
Genesis41:8 A tûk zîngah chuan Farawa chu a buai rilru hle a. Aigupta mi, arsi chhui thiam te leh mi fing zawng zawng chu a ko va. Farawa chuan a mang chu a hrilh a; mahse, tu man an hrilh fiah thei lo." 
Genesis41:9 No kengtu lu ber chuan Farawa chu a bia a, “Vawiin hian ka haihawtzia ka hriat chhuah chu." 
Genesis41:10 Vawi khat, Farawa chu a chhiahhlawh chungah a thinur a, vêngtu hotu ber awmnaah kei leh chhang siamtu kha min tântîr a." 
Genesis41:11 Zan khat chu kan pahnihin mumang kan nei ve ve a, a awmzia erawh chu a inang lo." 
Genesis41:12 Hebrai saltâng tlangvâl pakhat, vêngtu chhiahhlawh chu a awm ve a; kan mumang chu kan hrilh a, min hrilh fiahsak a." 
Genesis41:13 Min hrilh ang chiahin thil a lo awm ta a. Kei chu ka hna ngaiah min dah leh a, chhang siamtu erawh chu thingah khai a nih tâk kha,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:14 Farawa chuan Josefa chu a kohtîr ta nghâl a. Rip chhûng aṭangin an la chhuak vat a; a inmêt fai a, a silhfên a inthlâk a, Farawa hmaah a va inlan ta a." 
Genesis41:15 Farawa chuan Josefa hnênah, “Tu ma hrilh fiah theih loh mumang ka nei a ni; mahse, nang chuan i hriat veleh i hrilh fiah thei an ti che a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:16 Josefa chuan Farawa chu a chhâng a, “Kei chuan thei lo ve; Pathian erawh chuan Farawa mumang chu dik takin a hrilh fiahsak ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:17 Farawa chuan Josefa hnênah, “Ka mumangah chuan Nail lui kamah ka lo ding a." 
Genesis41:18 Lui aṭang chuan bâwngpui pasarih, thau mûm ṭha tak tak an lo chhuak a, a kam rairuang hmunah chuan an tla a." 
Genesis41:19 An hnu lawkah chuan bâwngpui pasarih, berh êm êm, chêr chhe tak tak, thêp thin then hi an lo chhuak ve a - Aigupta ram zawng zawngah chutiang êma bâwng chêr chhia ka la hmu ngai lo." 
Genesis41:20 Bâwng chêr chhe êm êmte chuan bâwng thau tak lo chhuak hmasate chu an ei zo va. 
Genesis41:21 An ei zawh hnu pawh chuan a hma ang bawk khân an la thêp ta tho va: tu man a dangte kha an ei tih hriat tûr a ni lo. Tin, ka han harh ta a." 
Genesis41:22 Mumang ka neih lehah chuan buh kûng khatah vui sarih, lian tak tak leh pum ṭha tak tak ka hmu a." 
Genesis41:23 A dawtah buh vui pasarih, sîn tê tê, thli lum chhêm ro rim rem a lo chhuak leh a." 
Genesis41:24 Buh vui chhe tê tê chuan vui ṭha pui pui chu a lem zo ta maiin ka hmu a. Tin, arsi chhût thiam te ka hrilh a; mahse, tu mah hrilh fiah thei an awm lo,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:25 Josefa chuan Farawa hnênah, “Farawa mumang hi awmze thuhmun a ni. Pathianin a thil tih tûr Farawa hnênah a hrilh lâwk a nih hi." 
Genesis41:26 Bâwng thau tak tak pasarih kha kum sarih entîrna a ni, buh vui ṭha tak tak pasarih pawh kum sarih entîrna bawk a ni; mumang awmze thuhmun a ni." 
Genesis41:27 Bâwngpui chêr chhe tak tak rawn zuitu pawh chu kum sarih ṭâm tla tûr entîrna a ni. Chutiang bawkin buhvui sarih khawchhak thli chhêm ro, chhe tê tê kha kum sarih ṭâm tla tûr entîrna a ni." 
Genesis41:28 Farawa ka hrilh ang chiah khân Pathian chuan a thiltih tum Farawa hnênah a hrilh lâwk a ni. 
Genesis41:29 Kan hma kum sarih chhûng hian Aigupta ram zawng zawngah buh tawntawin a haw ang a; 
Genesis41:30 mahse, chu chu ṭâmpui mitthiin a zui ang a, tawntawa buh a haw lai kha an theihnghilh vek ang, ṭâm chuan ram chu a tichhia ang." 
Genesis41:31 Ramah ṭâm a nasat dâwn êm avângin buh tam lai hnuhma rêng rêng kha hmuh tûr a awm lo vang. 
Genesis41:32 Faraw-an awmze thuhmun mang a neih nawn hi Pathianin chu thil chu a nemnghet a, a rawn tithleng thuai dâwn tihna a ni." 
Genesis41:33 “Farawa chuan mi remhria leh fing zawng sela, Aigupta ram enkawltu atân siam rawh se." 
Genesis41:34 Farawa chuan hotute ruat sela, kum ṭhat kum, kum sarih chhûngin Aigupta ramah, buh chu hmun ngaa hmun khat chhûntîr sela." 
Genesis41:35 Kan hma kum sarih, kum ṭha tak lo awm tûr chhûng hian buh chu khawn khâwm sela," 
Genesis41:36 Farawa thupêkin buhte chu chhêk khâwm ni rawh se; khawpuia an la ei atân chhûn khâwm ni rawh se. Aigupta rama kum sarih ṭâm tla tûr atân chûng chu khêk ni rawh se, ṭam avânga ram pum a boral loh nân,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:37 Chûng thu chu Farawa leh a khâwnbâwlte chuan ṭha an tih zâwng tak a ni. 
Genesis41:38 Farawa chuan a hote hnênah, “Ani ang Pathian thlarau awmna hi kan hmu zo dâwn em ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis41:39 Farawa vêk chuan Josefa hnênah, “Pathianin hêng thil thleng tûr hi a hriattîr che a, nang anga thil hre thûk leh fing tu mah an awm lo vang." 
Genesis41:40 Ka ram enkawltu i ni ang a, ka mite chu i thu thuin an awm ang, thuneihnaa mi dawttu i ni ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:41 Farawa chuan Josefa hnênah heti hian a ti bawk: “Ngai teh, Aigupta ram zawng chunga hotu-ah ka siam tâk che hi,” a ti a."
