Exodus11:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Farawa leh Aigupta ram chu ṭum khat dang ka khawih leh ang a, a chhuah tawh ang che u. A chhuah vêk vêk che u chuan a hnawhin a ni a hnawh chhuah dâwn che u ni." 
Exodus11:2 Chuvângin, mipui hnênah rangkachak leh tangkaraw thawmhnaw an ṭhenawmte ta, a hawh man pe lovin dîl rawh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus11:3 Israel mite chu Lalpa chuan Aigupta-ho chu a duhsaktîr a. Mosia chu Aigupta ram mi lâr tak a ni a, Farawa hote leh a mite chuan an ngaisâng êm êm a ni." 
Exodus11:4 Tin, Mosia chuan Farawa hnênah “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti; ‘Aigupta ram chu zanlaiah ka fang dâwn." 
Exodus11:5 Aigupta mite fa tîr, Farawa fa tîr, lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu aṭanga bawihnu, buh râwtsawmtu fa tîr thlengin, an ran fa tîrte nên lam an thi vek ang." 
Exodus11:6 Chumi zân chuan Aigupta ram pumah an ṭap chuah chuah ang a, chutianga nasa chu a awm ngai lo va, a awm leh tawh ngai hek lo vang." 
Exodus11:7 Israel fate erawh chu tu mah, an rante lamin ui pawhin a bauh lo vang. Lalpa chuan Aigupta mite leh Israel fate chu a ngai danglam ngei a lo ni tih in hria ang,’ a ti a." 
Exodus11:8 I hote ka hnênah an lo kal ang a, ka hmaah an rawn kûn ang; ka mite chu hruaia kal bo daih tûrin min rawn ngên ang. Chumi hun chuan ka mite chu ka chhuahpui ang,” a ti a. Thinur takin Farawa chu a chhuahsan ta a." 
Exodus11:9 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Farawa chuan in thu a ngaithla chuang dâwn lo, Aigupta ramah thil mak tih belh a ngai dâwn a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Exodus11:10 Mosia leh Arona chuan chûng thil mak chu Farawa hmuh tûrin an ti a. Lalpa chuan Farawa chu a tiluhlul a, a ram ata Israel fate chu a chhuah duh lo." 
Exodus12:1 Aigupta ramah Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah," 
Exodus12:2 “Tûn thla hi thla chhiar ṭanna ni sela, kum khat chhûnga thla hmasa ber atân hmang ang che u." 
Exodus12:3 Israel pungkhâwmho hrilh rawh: Tûn thla ni sâwm ni hian chhûng tin mahni chhûng ei tâwk berâmno emaw, kêltê emaw thlang ṭheuh rawh se." 
Exodus12:4 Berâmno pakhat ei sêng lo khawpa chhûng tlêm an nih chuan an ṭhenawmte nên inthurual sela, an tam dân azir leh an ei theih tûr zât azirin insem rawh se." 
Exodus12:5 Berâm chu a hmêlhem tûr a ni lo, berâm rual emaw, kêl rual zînga mi emaw kum khat aia upa lo, a pa, hmêlhem lo, in duh zâwk zâwk in thlang thei ang." 
Exodus12:6 Ni sâwm leh pali ni thlengin in thlang ang a, chumi ni tlai lamah chuan Israel hnam pum pui chuan an talh tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:7 A thisen chu an la ang a, an eina tûr in kawngka biang tawnah leh kawngka lu chungah an tât tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:8 Chumi zân chuan sa chu an hem hmin ang a, an ei tûr a ni; dawidim telh loh chhang leh lambak nên an ei tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:9 A hela ei tûr a ni lo, chhum tûr a ni hek lo; a lu leh a ke te, a kawchhûngte nên lam meia hem hmin tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:10 In ei bâng chu zîng thlengin a awm tûr a ni lo; chutiang ei bâng in neih chuan in rawh ral tûr a ni. 
Exodus12:11 Pheikhawk bun diamin tiang in keng ang a, inchei fel sa vekin in ei sawk sawk tûr a ni. Lalpa chawimawi nâna kalhlên kût a ni e." 
Exodus12:12 Chumi zân chuan Aigupta ram ka fang chhuak ang a, Aigupta mi, fa tîr, mihring pawh ran pawh, a pa chu ka that vek dâwn; Aigupta pathiante pawh ka sawisa ang. Lalpa ka nih hi." 
Exodus12:13 Kawngka bianga thisen tah chu in awmna chhinchhiahna a ni ang a, thisen tah chu ka hmu ang a, chu in chu ka kal kân ang a; nangni chuan Aigupta mite angin in tuar ve lo vang." 
Exodus12:14 Chumi ni chu in tân ni serh a ni ang a, Lalpa thiltih in hriat reng nân in kût ṭhîn tûr a ni, ṭhangthar zêlte pawhin chu ni chu an serh kumkhua tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:15 Ni sarih chhûng chu dawidim telh loh chhang chauh in ei tûr a ni; a ni hmasa berah chuan in in chhûng ata dawidim rêng rêng in paih fai vek tûr a ni a, ni khat ni aṭanga a ni sarih ni inkâr chhûnga dawidim telh chhang ei chu Israel mite zînga chhiar tel loh tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:16 A ni khat ni leh a ni sarih ni chuan inkhâwmpui urhsûn in nei tûr a ni; chumi chhûng chuan eng hna mah in thawk tûr a ni lo; in ei tûr erawh chu in siam thei ang. 
Exodus12:17 Chhang dawidim telh loh kût hi in hmang ṭhîn tûr a ni, hemi ni hian Israel mipui chu Aigupta ram aṭangin ka hruai chhuak a ni; ṭhangthar zêlte pawhin dâna neihin he ni hi an hmang zêl tûr a ni;" 
Exodus12:18 thla hmasa ber ni sâwm leh pali tlai aṭangin ni sawmhnih leh pakhat tlai thlengin dawidim telh chhang in ei tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus12:19 Ni sarih chhûng chu in in chhûngah dawidim pakhat mah a awm tûr a ni lo va. Dawidim telh chhang ei chu, in zînga châm mai a ni emaw, in zînga piang a ni emaw, Israel mipui zînga chhiar tel tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus12:20 Dawidim tel rêng rêng in ei tûr a ni lo, in awmna apiangah chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus12:21 Mosia chuan Israel upaho chu a ko khâwm vek a, “Berâmno emaw, kêltê emaw thlang thuai ula, in chhûnga ei tûrin kalhlên kût sa atân talh rawh u." 
Exodus12:22 Husop têl khâwm ula, maihûna thisenah chuan in hnim ang a, kawngka biang tawnah leh kawngka lu chungah thisen chu in tât dâwn nia; a tûk khua a vâr hma chu tu mah mahni in ata in chhuak tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus12:23 Aigupta mite that tûrin Lalpa chuan a rawn fang dâwn a ni. Kawngka lu chung leh a biang tawna thisen a hmuh chuan kawngka chu a kal kân ang a, tihlumtu chu nangni that tûrin a lo luh a phal lo vang." 
Exodus12:24 He thil hi dâna neihin in serh ang a, in fate pawhin an serh kumkhua tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:25 Lalpa thutiam anga ram a pêk tûr che u in thlen hunah pawh hetiang serh leh sâng hi in chhunzawm zêl tûr a ni. 
Exodus12:26 “In faten, ‘Hetiang serh leh sâng hi eng tihna nge?’ tia an zawh che u chuan," 
Exodus12:27 ‘ Lalpa chawimawina Kalhlên Kût a nih hi. Ani chuan Aigupta mite a thah lai khân Aigupta rama awm Israel-te in a kal hlên a, min zuah a ni; chumi chawimawina chu a ni,’ in ti dâwn nia,” a ti a. Mipui chu an kûn a, Pathian chibai an bûk a." 
Exodus12:28 Israel fate chu an tho va, Mosia leh Arona hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang chuan an ti ta a." 
Exodus12:29 Zânlaiah Lalpa chuan Aigupta rama an fa tîr zawng zawng chu a tihlum ta a. Farawa fa tîr, lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr aṭanga ripa tâng fa tîr thlengin, ran, a pa piang hmasa ber te nên lam a that ta a." 
Exodus12:30 Zânlaiah Farawa chu a tho va, a hote zawng zawng leh Aigupta mi zawng zawng chu an tho va, mitthi awm lohna chhûng rêng a awm lo va, Aigupta mite chu ram pum puiah an ṭap ta chuah chuah a." 
Exodus12:31 A zân a zânin Mosia leh Arona chu Farawa chuan a ko va, “Ka mite hi chhuahsan ula, in sawi angin Israel fate nên Lalpa rawng chu va bâwl rawh u." 
Exodus12:32 In berâm te, in bâwng te pawh in duh angin hruai rawh u; chhuak thuai rawh u. Malsâwmna min dîlsak bawk ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus12:33 Aigupta mite chuan chhuak thuai thuai tûrin an tur ta sek a. “Kan thi zo mai dâwn alâwm,” an ti a." 
Exodus12:34 Mite chuan an chhang ur tûr hmeh sa dawidim la telh loh chu an fûn a, chhang hmeh thlêng chu puanin an tuam a, an kokiah an bât a." 
Exodus12:35 Mosia thu angin Israel fate chuan an ti a, Aigupta mite chu tangkarua leh rangkachak ṭhi leh thawmhnaw dangte an dîl a." 
Exodus12:36 Lalpa chuan mite chu Aigupta mite a khawngaihtîr a, an dîl apiang an pe a. Tichuan, Aigupta mite thil neih chu an rawk a ni ta ngawt a." 
Exodus12:37 Israel fate chu Ramases aṭangin Sukot an thleng a, kea kal chu an vaiin mi nuairuk an ni." 
Exodus12:38 Hnam dang tam tak an kal tel ve a, berâm te, kêl te, bâwngte nên an kawi duah mai." 
Exodus12:39 Aigupta ram aṭanga chhang hmeh sa dawidim telh loh an ken chu an kang a; Aigupta ram ata an hnawh chhuah tâk avângin an ei tûr pawh an siam ṭha hman lo a ni, an chhang hmeh sa pawh dawidim an phul hman lo." 
Exodus12:40 Israel fate Aigupta rama an awm chhûng chu kum zali leh sawmthum a ni. 
Exodus12:41 Kum zali leh sawmthum a ral ni ngei chuan Lalpa mite chuan Aigupta chu an chhuahsan leh ta a ni. 
Exodus12:42 Chumi zân chu Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuah zân a ni a, Lalpa zân serh a ni. Hemi zân hi Israel fate pawhin ṭhangthar zêl thlenga zân serha an hman kumkhua tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:43 Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah, “Hei hi Kalhlên Kût hman dân tûr thupêk chu a ni: Hnam dang miten kût sa hi an ei ve tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus12:44 Amaherawhchu, in chhiahhlawh, pawisaa in lei, an serh in tansakte chuan an ei ve thei ang." 
Exodus12:45 Ram dang mi, in zînga awm vete leh in hnêna inhlawhfate pawhin an ei tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus12:46 In khatah in ei tûr a ni, hmun dangah in la ṭhen tûr a ni lo va, a ruh in titliak tûr a ni hek lo." 
Exodus12:47 Israel pungkhâwmho chuan chutiang chuan an ti tûr a ni. 
Exodus12:48 Mikhual, in ina chêngte chuan Lalpa tâna kût sa chu an ei ve duh chuan mipa zawng zawng serh chu tansak phawt tûr a ni; chumi hnuah chuan in zînga piang ve ang chiahin en tawh tûr an ni a; kût sa te pawh an ei ve thei tawh ang; serh tan loh erawh chuan an ei tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus12:49 In zînga piang in mite leh hnam dang, in zînga lo pêm lûtte chu angkhatin dân thuhmun in hmantîr tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus12:50 Mosia leh Arona hnêna Pathian thupêk ang tak chuan Israel fate chuan an ti ta a. 
Exodus12:51 Chumi ni ngei chuan Israel fate chu Aigupta ram aṭangin Lalpa chuan a hruai chhuak ta vek a ni. 
Exodus13:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia a bia a. 
Exodus13:2 “Israel-te zînga fa tîr, mipa, chhûl keu tawh phawt chu, an ran no, a pa, piang hmasa ber nên ka tân serh hrang rawh, ka ta an ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus13:3 Mosia chuan mipuite hnênah, “Vawiin hi hre reng rawh u, Aigupta ramah bawih in ni a, in chhuak ta a nih hi. He hmun aṭangin Lalpa chuan a chakna hmangin a hruai chhuak che u a ni. Chhang dawidim telh in ei hauh tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus13:4 Abib thla, vawiin hian in chhuak a nih hi," 
Exodus13:5 Kanan mite ram, Hit mi te, Amor mi te, Hiv mi te, Jebus mite awmna, khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ram, in pate hnênah pêk che u a lo tiam tawh ram a hruai thlen hunah che u chuan, hemi thlaah hian kût hi in hmang ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Exodus13:6 Ni sarih chhûng dawidim telh loh chhang in ei tûr a ni a; a ni sarih ni chuan Lalpa chawimawi nân ruai ṭheh tûr a ni. 
Exodus13:7 Ni sarih chhûng chu dawidim telh chhang in ei tûr a ni lo, in ramah dawidim pawh, dawidim telh chhang pawh a awm tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus13:8 In fate hnênah, ‘Aigupta ram aṭanga kan chhuah dâwn laia Lalpa thiltih avânga hêng hi ti kan ni,’ tiin hrilh ang che u." 
Exodus13:9 “In kuta chhinchhiahna leh in mit kâra hriatrengna thil hrên in hrêng ang hian Lalpa dân chu lam nachâng in hriat theih nân in hmang ṭhîn dâwn nia. Aigupta ram aṭangin a thiltihtheihna ropui tak hmangin a hruai chhuak si che u a. 
Exodus13:10 Kum tin kût chu a hun takah in hmang ziah tûr a ni. 
Exodus13:11 “Kanan mite ram, in pate hnêna pêk che u a tiam chu Lalpa chuan a hruai thlen che ua, a pêk hunah che u chuan," 
Exodus13:12 in fa tîr apiang, mipa tawh phawt chu, Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni. In rante pawh an no hmasa, a pa tawh phawt chu, Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Exodus13:13 Sabengtungno hmasa ber erawh chu a aiah berâmno hlânin in tlan tûr a ni. In tlan duh loh chuan a ring elhtliak ang che u. In fa tîr te chu in tlan ngei tûr a ni. 
Exodus13:14 “Nakin hnuah in faten, ‘Hei hi eng tihna nge?’ tia an zawh che u chuan, ‘Aigupta rama bawiha kan awm, Lalpa chuan a chakna hmangin min hruai chhuak a." 
Exodus13:15 Faraw-an kan chhuah a phal loh lai khân, Aigupta rama fa tîr, mihring pawh ran pawh, a tihlum vek a; chuvângin, chhûl keu tawh phawt chu Lalpa hnênah kan hlân zêl a ni; keimahni fate erawh chu kan tlan ṭhîn a ni,’ in la ti dâwn nia." 
Exodus13:16 Chutia in tih chuan kut emaw, chal emaw hrên angin Aigupta ram aṭangin Lalpa chuan a chakna hmangin a hruai chhuak che u a ni tih in hre reng thei ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus13:17 Faraw-an mite a chhuah khân kawng hnai zâwk, Filistia mite rama kal tlang kawngah chuan a hruai lo va, miten indona an hmuhin an inchhîr palh ang a, Aigupta ramah an kîr leh mai ang tih a hlau a ni." 
Exodus13:18 Thlalêr lam, Tuipui Sen lamah a kual zâwngin a hruai ta zâwk a. Israel fate chu Aigupta ram aṭang chuan hriamhrei nên, a pâwl pâwlin an chhuak ta a." 
Exodus13:19 “Pathianin a hre reng ang che u a, ka ruhte hi in zâwn chho dâwn nia,” tia a chah anga tih an tiam tlat angin Mosia chuan Josefa ruhte chu a keng a." 
Exodus13:20 Sukot aṭang chuan an kal zêl a, thlalêr tâwp Etham-ah bûk an khuar a." 
Exodus13:21 Chhûn leh zâna an kal theih nân Lalpa chuan chhûnah chhûm dingin an hma a hruai a, zânah mei dingin an kawng a tieng a." 
Exodus13:22 Chhûna chhûm ding leh zâna mei ding chuan mite chu a kalsan ngai lo. 
Exodus14:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus14:2 “Israel fate chu hrilh rawh; kîr leh sela, Migdol leh Tuipui Sen inkârah Pi-hahirot ep Baal-zefon bulah riahhmun khuar rawh se," 
Exodus14:3 Farawa chuan, ‘Heti hian Israel fate chu kalna mumal hre lovin thlalêrah an tâng ta,’ a ti rilru dâwn nia." 
Exodus14:4 Farawa chu ka tiluhlul ang a, a ûm ang che u a, Farawa leh a hote chungah ka ropuizia ka tilang ang a, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” a ti a. Chutiang chuan an ti ta a." 
Exodus14:5 Israel-te an tlân chhuah tâk thu chu Aigupta lal an hrilh a. Farawa leh a ṭhuihruaite chu Israel-te chungah an thu a khauh ta hle a; “Israel-te tha chhawr lova kan chhuah ta mai hi engtizia nge?” an ti a. 
Exodus14:6 Farawa chuan a sakawrtawlailîr a buatsaihtîr a, a sipaite chu a hruai a." 
Exodus14:7 Sakawrtawlailîr ṭha ṭha zaruk leh Aigupta ram tawlailîr khalh thiam thlante nên an ûm ta a. 
Exodus14:8 Lalpa chuan Aigupta lal Farawa chu a tiluhlul a, Israel faten inchhuang taka Aigupta an chhuahsan hum hum chu an ûm ta a." 
Exodus14:9 Farawa sakawr leh a tawlailîr te, a sipai te leh sakawr chungchuang, Aigupta mite chuan Pi-hahiroth ep, Baal-zefon bulah Tuipui kama an awm chu an va ûmphâk a." 
Exodus14:10 Israel fate chuan Farawa hoten an rawn ûm pha dâwn ta mai tih an hmuhin an hlau hle a. Lalpa chu ṭanpuiah an sâwm ta a. 
Exodus14:11 Mosia hnênah, “Thlân a awm loh avângin em ni thi tûra thlalêra min hruai chhuah hi? Eng atân nge Aigupta ram aṭang khân min lo hruai chhuah le?”" 
Exodus14:12 Kan chhuah hma khân hetiangin thil a awm ang tih kan hrilh lo che em ni? Min nawr lui lo mai rawh, Aigupta mite rawng hi kan bâwl zêl mai ang e; thlalêra thihsâwn ai chuan Aigupta mite bawih nih a ṭha zâwk kan tih kha,” an ti a." 
Exodus14:13 Mosian mipui hnênah, “Hlau suh ula, zâm suh u, vawiina Pathianin a rawn chhanhim dân tûr che u hi thlîr mai rawh u. Vawiina Aigupta mi in hmuhte hi in hmu leh tawh ngai lo vang." 
Exodus14:14 Eng mah in tih ve a ngai lo vang, Lalpan a dosak dâwn che u alâwm,” a ti a." 
Exodus14:15 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Engah nge min auh chûl le? Israel fate chu hma lama kal zêl tûrin hrilh rawh." 
Exodus14:16 I tiang kha lek la, tuipui chungah i bân phar la, tui chu tiṭhen rawh, Israel fate chu Tuipui mawng leichârah an kal dâwn nia." 
Exodus14:17 Keiin Aigupta mite chu ka tiluhlul ang a, in hnungah an rawn ûmzui ang che u. Tichuan, Farawa leh a sipaite, a tawlailîr leh sakawr chungchuang mite avângin ropuina ka chang dâwn a ni." 
Exodus14:18 Farawa te, a tawlailîr te leh a sakawr chungchuang mite chunga ka intihropui hunah chuan kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus14:19 Israel-te hmaa awm ṭhîn Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a insawn a, an hnung lamah a awm ta a, an hmaa chhûm ding pawh kha an hnung lamah a insawn a." 
Exodus14:20 Israel-te leh Aigupta mite awmna inkârah chuan a awm ta a. Israel mite awmna chu a chhun êng a, Aigupta mite awmna erawh chu a tithim a." 
Exodus14:21 Mosia chuan tuipui chungah a bân a phar a, Lalpa chuan zankhuain khawchhak thli na tak a tlehtîr a, tuipui chu a chhêm kiang a, tui chu a inṭhen a, tuipui mawng chu leichârah a chang ta a." 
Exodus14:22 Israel fate chu tuipui mawng leichârah chuan an kal ta a, an ding lam leh vei lamah tui chu bang angin a ding tawn a." 
Exodus14:23 Aigupta mite chuan an ûm zêl a, Farawa sakawr te, a tawlailîr te, a sakawr chungchuang mite chuan tuipui mawngah chuan an ûmzui zêl a." 
Exodus14:24 A tûk khawfîng chah hmain Lalpa chuan Aigupta sipaite chu chhûm ding leh mei ding kârah chuan a zu hmu a, a zuk timangang ta a." 
Exodus14:25 An tawlailîr ke te chu a titâng a, a lîr ṭha hlei thei ta lo va. Aigupta mite chuan, “ Lalpan Israel-te lama ṭangin min do a nih hi; hawh u, i hawsan thuai ang u,” an ti a." 
Exodus14:26 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Tuipui chungah i bân phar rawh, tuite chuan Aigupta mi, an tawlailîrte leh an sakawr chungchuangte chu a chîm dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Exodus14:27 Mosia chuan tuipui chungah a bân a phar a, ni a lo chhuah chuan tui chu a insuih zawm leh ta pûng a, Aigupta mite chuan tlânchhiat an tum a; mahse, Lalpa chuan anni chu tuiah chuan a paih lût a." 
Exodus14:28 Tui lo infin leh chuan tawlailîr te, sakawr chungchuang mi te, Farawa sipai zawng zawng, tuipui mawnga ûmzuitute chu a chîm ta vek a, pakhat mah chhuak an awm lo." 
Exodus14:29 Israel fate erawh chu tuipui mawng leichârah chuan an kal a, bang angin an sîr tuakah chuan tui chu a ding luah a." 
Exodus14:30 Chumi ni chuan Lalpa chuan Israel-te chu Aigupta mite kut ata chu a chhanhim a, Aigupta mi, tuipuia thi ruangte chu an hmu a." 
Exodus14:31 Aigupta mite chunga Lalpa thiltih râpthlâk tak chu Israel-te chuan an hmu a; Lalpa chu an hlau va. Lalpa leh a chhiahhlawh Mosia chu rinpuiah an neih ta a. Mosia leh Israel fate chuan Lalpa chawimawi nân he hla hi an sa ta dual dual a: 
Exodus15:1 “ Lalpa fakin hla ka sa ang, Ropui takin a hneh ta si a. Sakawr leh a chungchuang tuipuiah a paih thla." 
Exodus15:2 Lalpa chu mi tichaktu, Zaia ka fak chu a ni; Min chhandamtu a ni, Ani chu ka Pathian a ni a, ka chawimawi ang. Kan pate Pathian a ni a, a ropuizia ka hril ang." 
Exodus15:3 Lalpa chu râl do mi a ni a, A hming chu Lalpa a ni." 
Exodus15:4 Farawa leh a tawlailîr chu a sipai rualte nên tuipuiah a paih thla a, Sipai hotu ṭhate pawh Tuipui Senah an pil." 
Exodus15:5 Tui thûkah chuan an tla a, Lungtum angin tuipui mawngah an pil." 
Exodus15:6 Aw Lalpa, i kut ding lam chu a va chak êm! Aw Lalpa, i hmêlmate chu i râwt sawm tâk hi." 
Exodus15:7 Nangmah dotute chu ropui takin i hneh a, I thinur alh chuan buhpâwl angin a kâng ral ta." 
Exodus15:8 I thâwk khum a, tui chu a lo intiang a, Bang ang maiin a lo ding ta luah a, A thûk laite chu a lo châr zo ta." 
Exodus15:9 ‘Kan ûm ang a, kan nangchîng ang a, Duhtâwkin an chungah kan che ang a, An neih zawng zawng kan insem ang,’ hmêlmate chuan an ti vei a." 
Exodus15:10 I thli i han chhêmtîr a, Tuipui chuan a chîm pil ta a, Tui thûkah chuan suan tlang angin an pil zo ta." 
Exodus15:11 ‘Aw Lalpa, nang ang rênga thianghlim leh ropui, Fak tlâk leh thiltithei Pathian dang an awm em ni le?’" 
Exodus15:12 I kut ding lam i han phar a, Hmêlmate chu leiin a dawlh zo ta." 
Exodus15:13 I mi, i tlante chu lainatin i hruai a, I ram thianghlimah i chaknain i hruai thleng a." 
Exodus15:14 Miten an lo hriatin an khûr a, Filistia rama awmte an thauvah a man." 
Exodus15:15 Edom ram hotute an thlabâr a, Moab hruaitute an thlaphâng a, Kanan rama mite an zâm zo ta." 
Exodus15:16 I mi, i mi thlanten an kal pelh hma loh chuan I chakzia an hmuhin hlauvin an khûr a, Lungtum ang maiin an chechâng lo. Hlau leh khûrin an khawng." 
Exodus15:17 I tlâng thianghlimah chuan i hruai thleng a, I phun ta a; Aw Lalpa, nangma chênna tûr hmun i siam ngeiah chuan." 
Exodus15:18 Lalpa chu chatuan chatuanin a lal ang.” 
Exodus15:19 Farawa sakawrte chu, a tawlailîrte leh sakawr chungchuangte nên tuipuiah an tlân lût a; Lalpa chuan tuipui tui chu a tikîr a, a chîmtîr a, Israel fate erawh chu tuipui mawng leichârah an kal kai a ni." 
Exodus15:20 Arona u, zâwlnei Miriami chuan perhkhuang a keng a, hmeichhe dangte pawh chuan perhkhuang kengin an zui a, an lâm a." 
Exodus15:21 Miriami-te chuan hetiangin hla an sa a: “ Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se, a ropui êm e, Sakawr leh a chungchuangte chu tuipuiah a paih thla,” an ti a." 
Exodus15:22 Mosia chuan Israel fate chu Tuipui Sen aṭang chuan a hruai zêl a, Sur thlalêr an thleng a, ni thum an kal a, tui a awm lo va." 
Exodus15:23 Tui awmna, Mara, an va thlen chuan a tui chu a khâk avângin an in thei si lo va, a hmingah pawh Mara an vuah rêng a ni." 
Exodus15:24 Mosia hnênah, “Eng nge kan in tâk ang?” tiin an phunnawi ta a." 
Exodus15:25 Mosia chuan Lalpa chu a au va, ani chuan thing pakhat a kawhhmuh a, chu chu tuiah chuan a chiah a, tui chu a lo tui ta a. Chutah chuan thupêk leh awm dân tûr a kawhhmuh a, anni chu hetiang hian a fiah ta a:" 
Exodus15:26 “In Pathian Lalpa thu hi in ngaihthlâka, a mit hmuha thil dik in tih chuan, a thupêkte in zawma, a dânte in pawisak bawk chuan Aigupta mite tuar ang hri kha ka tuartîr ve lo vang che u; tidamtu che u Lalpa ka nih hi,” tiin." 
Exodus15:27 Tuikhur sâwm leh pahnih leh tûm kûng sawmsarih awmna hmun Elim chu an thleng a. 
Exodus16:1 Elim aṭang chuan an kal zêl a, Aigupta ram an chhuahsan aṭanga thla hnih leh ni sâwm an kal ni chuan Israel fate chu Elim leh Sinai inkâr Sin thlalêr an thleng a." 
Exodus16:2 Israel pungkhâwmho chu Mosia leh Arona chungah an phunnawi a. 
Exodus16:3 An hnênah Israel fate chuan, “Aigupta rama sa bêl bula kan ṭhut lai te, puar taka chaw kan ei lai te khân Lalpa chuan min lo tihlum mai se a ṭha zâwk tûr, thlalêra rilṭâma thi tûrin mi hei zozai hi min hruai chhuak a nih hi,” an ti a." 
Exodus16:4 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ngai rawh, in ei tûr vân aṭangin ka rawn sûrtîr dâwn; mite chuan an ni khat tla chiah chhar rawh se; ka thu an zâwm dâwn nge dâwn lo ka fiah dâwn a ni." 
Exodus16:5 A ni ruk nia an chhar chu ei atân an buatsaih ang a, ni danga an chhar lêt an chhar tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:6 Mosia leh Arona chuan Israel zawng zawng hmaah chuan, “ Lalpa chuan Aigupta ram aṭangin a hruai chhuak ngei che u a ni tih nakin tlaiah chuan in hria ang a, Lalpa ropuizia in hmu ang." 
Exodus16:7 Lalpa chunga in phunnawi kha a lo hria a ni, keini hi eng nge kan niha kan chunga in phunnawi ang le?” an ti a." 
Exodus16:8 Mosia chuan, “ Lalpan tlaiah sa a rawn pe dâwn che u a, zîngah puar tâwka in ei tûr chaw a pe bawk ang che u, a chunga in phunnawi thu hi a lo hria a, kan chunga in phun hi Lalpa chunga phunnawi in ni zâwk asin,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:9 Mosia chuan Arona hnênah, “Israel fa pungkhâwmho chu, ‘In phunnawina thu Lalpa chuan a lo hria a, a bulah lo kal hnai teh u,’ tiin hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:10 Aronan Israel pungkhâwmho hnêna thu a sawi lai chuan, thlalêr lam an han thlîr a, chhûmah Lalpa ropuina a lo lang a." 
Exodus16:11 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus16:12 “Israel-te phunnawina chu ka lo hria e, an hnênah, ‘zanriahah sa in ei ang, zîngah chaw puar takin in ei bawk ang, Kei Lalpa hi in Pathian chu ka ni tih in hria ang chu, a ti,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:13 Tlaiah chuan vahmîm an lo thlâwk a, an bûk vêlah chuan an fu khat tlat a; zîngah chuan an bûk vêl chu daiin a khuh vek bawk a." 
Exodus16:14 Dai chu a han hul chuan thlalêr leiah chuan thil vâr pan tê tê, vûr ang maia thianghlim hi a lo awm ṭeuh va." 
Exodus16:15 Israel fate chuan, “Eng nge ni ngai?” an ti a; eng nge a nih an hre lo va ni. Mosia chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa chaw pêk che u a nih hi." 
Exodus16:16 Hei hi Lalpa thupêk chu a ni; mahni kham tâwk chiah chauh chhar ṭheuh rawh u; in ina awm zawng tân no hnih hisâpin chhar ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:17 Israel-te chuan chutiang chuan an ti ta a; ṭhenkhat chuan an chhar tam deuh va, ṭhenkhat erawh chuan an chhar tlêm deuh va." 
Exodus16:18 Nova an han teh chuan a chhar tam deuhte chuan an ngah bîk chuang lo va, a chhar tlêmte lahin an nei tlêm chuang bîk hek lo; mahni kham khawp chiah an chhar vek a ni." 
Exodus16:19 Mosia chuan, “A tûka ei atân tiin tu man khêk suh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:20 Mosia thu chu an awih duh chuang lo va, ṭhenkhat chuan an ei bâng chu a tûka eiah an khêk a; mahse, a lung a, a ṭawih chhia a; Mosia chu an chungah a thinur hle a." 
Exodus16:21 Tûk tin, mahni ei tâwk tûr chauh an chhar ta zêl a; ni a tlângsân chuan a tuiral vek ṭhîn." 
Exodus16:22 A ni ruk ni chuan a lehhniha tamin, mi pakhat tân no li zêl hisâpin an chhar a ni. Pungkhâwmho chunga rorêltute chuan Mosia chu an rawn hrilh a." 
Exodus16:23 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Hei hi Lalpa sawi kha a ni, naktûk hi ni serh, Lalpa tâna sabat thianghlim chu a ni. Vawiinah in ei duh zât chu hem hmin ula, chhum in duh zât chu chhûm rawh u; a bâng chu a tûk atân dah ṭha ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:24 Mosia thupêk ang chuan a tûk atân an khêk chu a ṭawih lo va, a lung hek lo." 
Exodus16:25 Mosia chuan an hnênah, “Chu chu vawiin chuan ei rawh u, vawiin hi Lalpa sabat a ni a, khawiah mah chhar tûr in hmu lo vang." 
Exodus16:26 Ni ruk chhûngin tûk tin in chhar ang a, a ni sarih ni erawh chu sabat a ni a, pakhat mah chhar tûr a awm lo vang,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:27 Ni sarih ni chuan mi ṭhenkhat chu an thil chhar ṭhin chhar tûrin an thawk chhuak a; mahse, chhar tûr rêng an hmu lo." 
Exodus16:28 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Eng chen nge ka thupêk leh ka dânte hi in zawm duh loh dâwn?" 
Exodus16:29 Kei Lalpa hian sabat ni ka siamsak che u a; chuvângin, a ni ruk niin in ei tûr ni hnih daih ka pe che u a ni; a ni sarih ni hi chuan mahni bûkah awm ṭheuh rawh u, tu mah kal chhuak suh u,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:30 Tichuan, mite chu ni sarih ni chuan an châwl a." 
Exodus16:31 Israel chhûngte chuan chu thil chu ‘Mana’ an vuah a, chhibung vâr chi ang hi a ni a, khawizu-a hmeh chhangpêr anga tui a ni." 
Exodus16:32 Mosia chuan, “ Lalpa thupêk chu hei hi a ni; in thlah zêlte hmuhah mana no khat dah ṭhat tûr a ni; Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuak che u a, thlalêra ka châwmna che u chaw a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:33 Mosian Arona hnênah, “Bêl la la, Mana no khat dah rawh. Ṭhang lo thar zêlte hmuh atân Lalpa hmaah dah ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:34 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Arona chuan Lalpa hmaa thuthlung bâwmah chuan a dah ṭha a. 
Exodus16:35 Israel fate chuan mihring chênna ram, Kanan ram an thlen hma chu kum sawmli chhûng ngawt mana chu an ei a ni." 
Exodus16:36 Tehna no sawmhnih hi ṭîn khat vêl a ni. 
Exodus17:1 Israel fa pungkhâwmho chu Sin thlalêr aṭang chuan Lalpa thupêk angin an insawn zêl a; Refidim-ah bûk an khuar a, mipui tân tui in tûr a awm lo va." 
Exodus17:2 Mite chuan Mosia chu an nawr a, “Tui in tûr min pe rawh,” an ti a. Mite chuan Mosia chu an mawhchhiat a." 
Exodus17:3 Mite tui chu a hâl êm êm a, Mosia chungah an phunnawi a; “Engah nge tuihâla thi mai tûrin Aigupta ram aṭang khân kan fate leh kan rante nên min lo hruai chhuah le?” an ti a." 
Exodus17:4 Mosian Lalpa chu a au va, “Hêng mite tân hian eng nge ka tih tâk ang? Lungin min dêng hlum mai dâwn e,” a ti a." 
Exodus17:5 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Israel upaho hruai la, Nail luipui i vuakna tiang kha kengin mipui hmaah kal ang che." 
Exodus17:6 I hmaah Horeb tlânga lungpui bulah ka lo ding ang; lung chu i vua ang a, mipuite in tûr tui a lo chik chhuak ang,” a ti a. Israel upate hnênah Mosian chutiang chuan a ti a." 
Exodus17:7 Chu hmun hmingah chuan Maasa tih leh Meriba tih a sa a; Israel faten an nawr avâng leh, ‘Kan zîngah Lalpa a tel meuh nge tel meuh lo,’ tia Lalpa an fiah avângin." 
Exodus17:8 Refidim-ah chuan Amalek-ho an lo kal a, Israel-te chu an rawn bei a." 
Exodus17:9 Mosia chuan Josua hnênah, “Mi ṭhenkhat thlang la, Amalek-ho bei tûrin kal rawh. Naktûkah chuan tlângchhîpah Pathian tiang kengin ka lo ding ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus17:10 Mosia sawi ang chuan Josua chuan Amalek-ho chu a bei a; Mosia chu Arona leh Hura nên tlângchhîpah an chho va. 
Exodus17:11 Mosian a bân a han phar chuan Israel-ho chu an chak a, a bân a lâk thlâk chuan Amalek-ho chu an chak a." 
Exodus17:12 Mosia bân chu a kham ta hle a, lungtum an rawn la a, Mosia chu a chungah an ṭhuttîr a, Arona leh Hura chuan Mosia bân chu lehlam lehlamah an chelh kânsak a, ni tlâk hma chu a bân a phar thei ta a." 
Exodus17:13 Amaleka leh a mite chu Josua chuan khandaihin a sawisa nek a. 
Exodus17:14 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “He thu hi hriat reng atân lehkhabu-ah ziak rawh. Vân hnuaia tu ma hriat zui loh tûrin Amalek-ho chu ka sawisa dâwn tih Josua hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Exodus17:15 Mosia chuan maichâm a siam a, a hmingah Lalpa Nisi a vuah a." 
Exodus17:16 “ Lalpa puanzâr chu lek sâng rawh u; Lalpa chuan Amalek-ho chu eng lai pawhin a bei reng dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:1 Midian-ho puithiam, Jethroa, Mosia puzawn chuan, Mosia leh a mite tâna Pathianin thil a tihsak, Lalpa ngeiin Israel-te Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuah thute chu a lo hria a." 
Exodus18:2 Mosia puzawn Jethroa chuan Mosia nupui Zipori, in lama a hnutchhiah kha, a fapa pahnih nên a rawn hruai a." 
Exodus18:3 A fapa upa zâwk chu Gersoma a ni, ‘ram dangah mikhual ka ni’ a tihna a ni." 
Exodus18:4 Pakhat zâwk hming chu Eliezara a ni, ‘ka pate Pathian chuan min pui ta a, Farawa khandaih lakah min chhanhim’ a tihna a ni." 
Exodus18:5 Pathian tlângah, bûk an khuarnaah chuan, Mosia puzawn chuan a fapa pahnih leh a nupui chu a rawn hruaisak a." 
Exodus18:6 Mosia hnênah, “Kei i puzawn, Jethroa hian ka rawn tlawh dâwn a che, i fapa pahnih leh i nupui pawh ka rawn hruai e,” a rawn ti a." 
Exodus18:7 Mosia chu a puzawn hmuak tûrin a chhuak a, a kûn a, chibai a bûk a, an dam leh dam loh te an inzâwt a; puan inah chuan an lût dûn ta a." 
Exodus18:8 Israel-te avânga Farawa leh Aigupta mite chunga Lalpa thil tih zawng zawng chu Mosian a puzawn chu a hrilh a; kalkawnga harsatna an tawh laka Lalpa chuan a chhanhim ṭhin dânte pawh a hrilh a. 
Exodus18:9 Aigupta mite kut ata leh Farawa kut ata Israel-te a chhan chhuak a, an chunga a ṭhat êm avângin Lalpa chungah chuan Jethroa chu a lâwm ta êm êm a." 
Exodus18:10 “Aigupta mite kut ata leh Farawa kut ata chhanchhuaktu che u Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se. 
Exodus18:11 Israel mite chuti taka hmusita an sawisak lai a chhan tâk avângin Lalpa chu pathian dang zawng zawng aiin a ropui zâwk tih ka hre ta,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:12 Mosia puzawn Jethroa chuan Pathian hnênah hâlral thilhlan leh inthawinate a hlân a. Arona leh Israel upa zawng zawngte chu Pathian hmaa Mosia puzawn inthawina chawhlui kîl tûr chuan an lo kal a. 
Exodus18:13 A tûkah chuan Mosia chu mite thu rem tûrin a ṭhu a, mite chuan Mosia chu zîng aṭangin tlai thlengin an din hual a." 
Exodus18:14 Mosia puzawn chuan mipui ro a rêlsak dân chu a hmu a, “Engtizia nge mipui tân hetianga ro i rêl? Nangmah vekin rêl tumin i ṭhu a, zîng aṭanga tlai thlengin an din hual che hi,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:15 Mosian a puzawn hnênah chuan, “Pathian râwn tûrin mite hi ka hnênah an lo kal alâwm." 
Exodus18:16 Thu pawi an neihin ka hnênah an rawn thlen miau si ṭhîn a, an ṭhenawmte nêna an inkâr thu ka lo rêl felsak ṭhîn a ni. Pathian thuruatte leh a dânte ka lo hrilh ṭhîn a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:17 Mosia puzawn chuan, “I thil tih dân hi a ṭha hauh lo mai." 
Exodus18:18 Nang leh hêng mite hi in intichau ngei ang; he hna hi i tân a hautak lutuk, nangmah mai chuan i thawk sêng lo vang." 
Exodus18:19 Ka thu hi ngaithla la, thurâwn ka han pe ang che a, Pathianin a awmpui ang che. Mipui aiawha Pathian hnêna kala, an thu Pathian hnêna thlentu tûr i ni." 
Exodus18:20 Pathian thuruatte leh a dânte chu i zirtîr ang a, an awm dân tûr leh an tih tûr i kawhhmuh ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Exodus18:21 Mipui zîng ata mi fel deuh deuh, Pathian ṭih mi, thu dik ngaina, hlêprûk haw mi thlang chhuak la, sâng chin chunga rorêl tûr te, za chin chunga rorêl tûr te, sawmnga chin chunga rorêl tûr te, sâwm chin chunga rorêl tûr te ruat rawh." 
Exodus18:22 Chûng chu rorêltu nghet ni rawh se, thu tênau chu rêl zêl sela, thu lian deuh erawh chu i hnên lo thleng ṭhîn rawh se; tichuan, an chhâwk zâng ang chia, i hahdam deuh thei ang." 
Exodus18:23 Pathian thupêk anga chutianga i tih chuan i intichau lo vang a, mipui lah an zângkhai ang a, an thu an rem fel thuai thuai ang a, an haw mai thei ṭhîn ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:24 Tichuan, a puzawn thu chu Mosia chuan a zâwm a, a sawi ang chuan a ti ta a." 
Exodus18:25 Israel-te zînga a fel fel Mosian a thlang chhuak a, mipuite hotu-ah a ruat a; sâng hotu tûr te, za hotu tûr te, sawmnga hotu tûr te, sâwm hotu tûr te a ruat ta a." 
Exodus18:26 Eng lai pawhin mite chu ro an rêlsak a, thu lian erawh chu Mosia hnênah an thlen a, thu tenau chu an rêl fel mai a ni." 
Exodus18:27 Mosia chuan a puzawn chu a va thlah a, Jethroa chu an ram lamah a haw leh ta a." 
Exodus19:1 Aigupta ram an chhuahsan aṭanga thla thumna, ni khat ni chuan, Israel fate chuan Sinai thlalêr an thleng a." 
Exodus19:2 Refidim aṭanga lo thleng an ni, tlâng bul thlalêr ramah chuan bûk an khuar a, Mosia chu Pathian tâwk tûrin tlângah chuan a lâwn chho va." 
Exodus19:3 Tlâng aṭangin Lalpa chuan a rawn ko va, “Jakoba chhûngte bia la, Israel fate chu hrilh rawh:" 
Exodus19:4 Aigupta mite ka sawisak dân in hmu a, thla zârin mupuiin a notê a chawi angin ka chawi che u a, keima tân ka hruai chhuak che u a." 
Exodus19:5 Chuvângin, ka aw in ngaihthlâk duh takmeuhva, ka thuthlung in vawn dâwn phawt chuan mi zawng zawng zînga ka ro hlu bîk in ni ang, khawvêl ram zawng zawng hi ka ta a ni si a." 
Exodus19:6 Ka tân hnam serh hran, puithiam in ni ang. Chûng chu Israel fate i hrilh tûr chu a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:7 Mosia chu tlâng ata chu a lo chhuk a, Israel upaho chu a ko va, Lalpa thupêk angin chûng thu chu a hrilh a." 
Exodus19:8 Mi zawng zawng chuan, “ Lalpa sawi apiang chu kan ti ang,” an ti tlâng a. Mipui thu chu Mosian Lalpa a hrilh chhâwng a." 
Exodus19:9 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ngai rawh, chhûm chhah takah i hnênah ka lo kal dâwn, i hnêna thu ka sawi lai miin an lo hria ang a, nang pawh kumkhuain an rin phah ang che,” a ti a. Mosian mipuite chhânna chu Lalpa a hrilh a." 
Exodus19:10 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Mite hnênah kal la, vawiinah leh naktûkah anni chu thian thianghlim ang che; an silhfênte su fai sela." 
Exodus19:11 A ni thum ni atân inpeih vek rawh se; a ni thum ni chuan mipui hmuh tûrin Sinai tlângah Lalpa chu a lo chhuk dâwn a ni. 
Exodus19:12 Tlâng hualin ri i kham kualsak tûr a ni. Tlâng va rap lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh se; a bul hnaiah pawh kal suh u; tlâng va rap chu tihhlum tûr a ni. 
Exodus19:13 Chumi chin chu tu man an khawih tûr a ni lo; lunga den hlum emaw, thala kah hlum tûr emaw a ni; hei hian mihring pawh ran pawh a huam a ni; tihhlum tûr an ni. Nimahsela, tawtawrâwt a rîk hunah mipui chuan tlâng chu an lo thleng tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:14 Mosia chu tlâng aṭang chuan a chhuk a, mipui chu a thian thianghlim a, an silhfênte chu an su fai a." 
Exodus19:15 Mipui hnênah, “Ni thum ni atân inpeih rawh u, in nupuite bulah mu suh ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:16 A ni thum ni zîngah chuan khawpui a ri dur dur a, kâwlte a phe a, tlâng chu chhûm chhah takin a khuh tlat a; tawtawrâwt a ri ruai ruai bawk a, mi zawng zawng chu hlauvin an khûr a." 
Exodus19:17 Pathian tâwk tûrin mite chu bûk aṭang chuan Mosia chuan a hruai chhuak a, tlâng bulṭhutah chuan an ding a." 
Exodus19:18 Sinai tlângah Lalpa chu mei nên a lo chhuk avângin a khu vung vung a, rawhtuina meipui khu ang maiin a khu a, tlâng chu a nghîng hluk hluk a." 
Exodus19:19 Tawtawrâwt chu a ri ring tial tial a, Mosia chuan thu a sawi a. Pathian chuan khawpui riin a rawn chhâng a." 
Exodus19:20 Lalpa chu Sinai tlângchhîpah chuan a lo chhuk a; tlângchhîpa chho tûrin Mosia chu Lalpa chuan a ko va; Mosia chu a chho ta a. 
Exodus19:21 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Chhuk la, Lalpa hmêl hmuh tumin mipuiin ri kham kha rawn kân suh se, an kân vaih chuan mi tam tak an thi ang." 
Exodus19:22 Lalpa hmaa kal ṭhîn puithiamte pawh an inthian thianghlim tûr a ni; chutilo chu, ka rawn hrem ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:23 Mosia chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Mipuite chuan Sinai tlâng an rap thei hlei nêm, ‘tlâng hualin ri kham ula, serh thianghlim rawh u,’ min tih kha,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:24 Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Chhuk ta la, Arona nên lo chho leh rawh u; puithiamte leh mipuite chuan ri kham khu Lalpa panin rawn kân suh se; an kân chuan ka lo sawisa mai ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:25 Tichuan, Mosia chu mipui awmnaah chuan a chhuk a, chûng thu chu a hrilh a." 
Exodus20:1 Pathian chuan thu a sawi a, a sawite chu hêngte hi a ni:" 
Exodus20:2 “Bawiha in awmna Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu che u Lalpa, in Pathian chu ka ni." 
Exodus20:3 Kei lo hi chu Pathian dang rêng rêng nei suh. 
Exodus20:4 I tân milem siam suh, chung lam vâna awm emaw, leia awm emaw lei hnuai tuia thil awm lem emaw i siam tûr a ni hek lo." 
Exodus20:5 Chûng chu kûnin chibai i bûk tûr a ni lo va, an rawng i bâwl tûr a ni hek lo. Kei Lalpa i Pathian hi Pathian thîkthuchhe tak ka ni, min hawtute chu an thlah chhuan thum chhuan li thleng pawhin ka hrem ṭhîn a;" 
Exodus20:6 min hmangaiha ka thupêk zâwmtute erawh chu an thlah chhuan sâng tam tak chungah pawh ngil ka nei ṭhîn. 
Exodus20:7 I Pathian, Lalpa hming chhâlin dâwt sawi suh; dâwta a hming chhâltu chu Pathianin hrem lohvin a chhuah lo vang." 
Exodus20:8 Sabat ni hi thianghlim taka serh tûr a ni tih hre reng rawh. 
Exodus20:9 Ni ruk chhûng hna i thawk ang a, i hna zawng zawng i thawk thei ang." 
Exodus20:10 A ni sarih ni erawh hi chu Lalpa tâna sabat ni a ni a, hna eng mah i thawk tûr a ni lo; i fapa te, i fanu te, i bawihpa te, i bawihnu te, i ran te, in khaw chhûnga hnam dang awm te pawhin hna an thawk tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus20:11 Lalpa pawhin ni rûk chhûngin tuifinriat te, lei leh vân leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng te a siam a, a ni sarih ni chuan a châwl a ni. Chuvângin, mal a sâwm a, a serh a ni." 
Exodus20:12 I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh; tichuan, Lalpa i Pathianin ram a pêk che-ah chuan i dam rei dâwn nia." 
Exodus20:13 Tual that suh. 
Exodus20:14 Uire suh. 
Exodus20:15 Ru suh. 
Exodus20:16 I vêngte dâwtin hêk suh. 
Exodus20:17 I vêngte in leh lo awt suh; i ṭhian nupui pawh ît suh, a bawihpa emaw, a bawihnu emaw, a bâwng emaw, a sabengtung emaw, a neih eng mah i awt tûr a ni lo,” tiin." 
Exodus20:18 Mipui chuan kâwlphe te, tawtawrâwt rite an hriata, kâwlphe te, tlânga meikhu vung vung te an hmuh chuan hlauvin an khûr a, hla fêah an ding a." 
Exodus20:19 Mosia hnênah, “Kan hnênah thu sawi la, kan lo ngaithla ang e, Pathian meuh chuan kan hnênah thu sawi teh suh se, kan thi mai dâwn alâwm,” an ti a." 
Exodus20:20 Mosia chuan, “Hlau suh u, Pathian chu in ṭih renga, a thu sawi in awih reng dâwn leh dâwn loh fiah tûr che uin a lo kal mai a ni e,” a ti a." 
Exodus20:21 Mosia chuan Pathian awmna chu a va hnaih a, mipui erawh chu hla fêah an ding ta tlat a." 
Exodus20:22 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Vân aṭangin ka rawn bia che tih Israel-te chuan an hria a, hetiang hian hrilh rawh." 
Exodus20:23 Tangkaruain emaw, rangkachakin emaw in tân kei bâk biak tûr siam suh u." 
Exodus20:24 Min biakna hmun tûr ka ruat apiangah ka tân hlum maichâm siam ula, chutah chuan hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan berâm leh bâwngte chu hlân ang che u, ka lo kal ang a, mal ka sâwm ang che u." 
Exodus20:25 Ka tâna lung maichâm in siam chuan chher suh ang che u, in chher chuan in thîrkhen avângin a bawrhbâng tawh a ni." 
Exodus20:26 Kailâwn siam ngai khawpa sângin maichâm siam hek suh u, in lâwn chhoh zawngin in lang palh ang e,” tiin." 
Exodus21:1 “Hêng dânte hi Israel-te zawm atân pe rawh. 
Exodus21:2 Hebrai mi bawihah an lei chuan kum ruk chhûng bawihah a ṭang ang a, a kum sarih kum chuan man lova chhuah tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:3 Amah maia lei a nih chuan amah chu a chhuak ang a, a nupui nêna lei a nih chuan a nupui nên chuan an chhuak tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:4 A puin nupui a neihsaka, fanu fapa an hrin chuan, a nupui fanaute chu a pu ta an ni; ani erawh chu amah chauhvin a chhuak thei ang." 
Exodus21:5 ‘Ka pu hi ka ngaina a, ka nupui fanaute ka hmangaih bawk si a, ka chhuahsan lo mai ang,’ a tih tlat chuan," 
Exodus21:6 a pu chuan Pathian inah a rawn hruai ang a, kawngkaah, kawngka biang bulah chuan a dintîr ang a, thîr zumin a beng a verhsak ang a, kumkhuain bawih a ni tawh ang." 
Exodus21:7 “Miin a fanu bawihan hralh sela, mipa anga chhuah ve tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus21:8 A nupui atâna lei a niha, a duh leh si lo a nih chuan, a pa chu a tlantîr leh tûr a ni; a bum avângin mi dang hnêna a hralh a thiang lo." 
Exodus21:9 A fapa nupui atân lei a nih chuan a fanu angin a en tûr a ni. 
Exodus21:10 A fapa chu nupui dang a neihsak chuan a nupui lei hmasak chu a châwm man te, a silhfên man te leh a chan ai thil dangte pawh a tihtlêmsak tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus21:11 Hêng thil pathum hi a tihsak loh chuan man lovin a chhuah tûr a ni. 
Exodus21:12 “Miin mi dang vua sela, a vuaka chu a thih chuan ani pawh chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:13 Tum rêng ni lova vaw hlum palh a nih chuan a tân himna tûr hmun ka ruatah chuan a sa him nân tlân rawh se. 
Exodus21:14 Him nân ka maichâmah tlân suh se, thinura, tum râna mi dang that chu hnuh chhuaha, tihhlum tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:15 “Mahni nu chungah emaw, pa chungah emaw kutthlâk chu tihhlum tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:16 “Hralh atân emaw, ama bawih atân emaw mihring rutu chu tihhlum tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:17 “A nu emaw, a pa emaw ânchhia lawhtu chu tihhlum tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:18 “Mi insual sela, pakhat zâwk chuan lungtumin chhu sela emaw, kuttumin emaw hnek sela, a thih loh chuan hrem tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus21:19 Sila khum beta a nata, tiang hawla khawlai a lên leh theih chuan a sil chhûnga a tha ai chu a tisiltu chuan a dam vâr thlengin a rûl tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:20 Miin a bawihpa emaw, a bawihnu emaw tiangin vua se, a vuak hlum chuan hrem ngei tûr a ni," 
Exodus21:21 ni hnih khat a dam erawh chuan an pu chu hrem tûr a ni lo, sum a chân ta tihna a ni." 
Exodus21:22 “Mi an insuala, hmeichhe nau pai an khawih chuan, amah chu hliam lo mah se a nau pai chu a tlâk chuan hmeichhe pasal phût zât, rorêltu remtihpuiin chawitîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:23 Hmeichhia chuan hliam a tuar chuan nun aiah nun," 
Exodus21:24 mit aiah mit, hâ aiah hâ, kut aiah kut, ke aiah ke," 
Exodus21:25 mei kan aiah mei kan, hliam aiah hliam, vuak aiah vuak tuartîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:26 “Miin a bawihpa mit emaw, a bawihnu mit emaw vuak delsak sela, a mit chhiat manah a chhuah tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:27 An hâ a tihbalsak pawhin an ha manah a chhuah tûr a ni. 
Exodus21:28 “Bâwngpain mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh si hlum sela, bâwng chu lunga den hlum tûr a ni, a sa chu ei tûr a ni lo; bâwng neitupa chu khawih zui tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus21:29 Bâwng chuan mi sîk a lo chîna, a neitupa chu an lo hrilh tawh ṭhina, thlung ṭha duh lova, mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw a sîk hlum chuan bâwng chu lunga den hlum tûr a ni; a neitupa pawh tihhlum tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:30 “Amaherawhchu, a neitupa chu a nun tlan an phalsak chuan a nun tlanna tûr an tuk zât zât chu a pe tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:31 Bâwng chuan naupang, mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw si hlum sela, puitling si hlum ang bawka rêl tûr a ni," 
Exodus21:32 bawihpa emaw bawihnu emaw si hlum sela, a neitu chuan tangka bûk sawmthum a chawi tûr a ni, a situ bâwng pawh den hlum tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:33 “Miin khur chhîn a hawn emaw, khur thar a laihin emaw, a chhin leh lohva, bâwngpa emaw, sabengtung emaw a tlâk hlum chuan," 
Exodus21:34 khur laitu chuan a chawi tûr a ni; a man a pêk hnuah erawh chuan a sa chu a nei thei ang. 
Exodus21:35 “Mi pakhat bâwngpa mi dang bâwngpain a tihhlum chuan a tihlumtu bâwngpa chu hralh tûr a ni, a man chu an insem ang a, a thi sa pawh an insem tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:36 “Bâwngpa chuan tûn hmaa mi sîk a chîn ṭhina, a neitu chuan thlung ṭha lo ni sela, a sîk hlum bâwngpa chu bâwngpa vêkin a rûl tûr a ni, a sa erawh chu a nei thei ang." 
Exodus22:1 “Miin bâwngpa emaw, berâm emaw a rûka, a talh emaw, a hralh emaw a nih chuan bâwngpa chu a lêt ngain a rûl ang a, berâm chu a lêt liin a rûl tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:2 A thil rûk chu a rûl ngei tûr a ni, rulhna a neih loh chuan a thil rûk rulh nân amah chu bawiha hralh tûr a ni. Bâwngpa emaw, sabengtung emaw, berâm emaw a rûk chu an la dam chuan a leh hnihin a rûl tûr a ni. “Rûkru, zâna lût chu lo manin lo vaw hlum pawh ni se tual that a tling lo. Ni chhuah hnua tih a nih erawh chuan tual that a tling a ni." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 Miin a ran a chhuaha, mi lovah emaw, grep hmunah emaw tla-in mi lova thlai chu ei chhia sela, a ei chhiat zât chu a ran neitupa chuan ama thlaiin emaw, grepin emaw a rûl tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:6 “Miin ramah mei chhêm sela, ram kâng chuan mi lo kâng kaiin buh ding lai emaw, zai tawh dah khâwm emaw kâng sela, mei chhuahtu chuan a kâng chhia chu a rûl tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:7 “Miin mi dang pawisa emaw, thil man tam tham emaw kawlsak sela, a kawl chhûng chuan bo ta sela, rûkru tih a niha, rûkru chu man a nih chuan a rutu chuan a lêt hnihin a rûl tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:8 A rutu man a nih loh erawh chuan a kawltu chu rorêltu hmaah hruai tûr a ni a, a ru lo tih hriat nân chhia a chhamtîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:9 “Thil inchuh rêng rêng, bâwngpa emaw, silhfên emaw, thil hloh chhar emaw a inchuhate chu rorêltu hmaa hruai tûr a ni. Rorêltuin thiam zâwka a ruat chu a thiam lo zâwk chuan a lêt hnih a pe tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:10 “Miin sabengtung emaw, bâwngpa emaw, berâm emaw, ran dang emaw, a ṭhianpa enkawltîr sela, lo thi palhin emaw, hliam emaw lo tuarin emaw, suamhmang rualin an chhuhsak emaw ni sela, hretu dang an awm si loh chuan" 
Exodus22:11 a kawltu chu biak inah hruai tûr a ni, a ṭhianpa ran chu a rûk a ni lo tih hriat nân chhia a chham tûr a ni. Ran chu a rûk a nih loh chuan a neitu khân a chân mai ang a, a kawltu khân a rulh a ngai lo." 
Exodus22:12 A rûk a nih erawh chuan a rûl tûr a ni. 
Exodus22:13 Sa seh a nih chuan a ei bâng ṭhenkhat, sa seh a nih hriatna a rawn la tûr a ni, sa seh chu a rulh a ngai lo." 
Exodus22:14 Miin mi dang ran a chhawr hawha, a neitu hmuh lohva inhliam emaw, thi palh emaw a nih chuan a hawhtu chuan a rûl tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:15 A neitu chuan a hmuh ve reng erawh chuan a rulh a ngai lo. Man neia hawh a nih pawhin, a hawh man chuan a huam a ni." 
Exodus22:16 “Nula hnahkhat, tu ma la hual loh miin a ngaih chuan, nupui man pangngai a pe ang a, nupuiah a nei tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:17 Nula pain neih a phal tlat loh pawhin nula hnahkhat man pangngai a pe tho tûr a ni. 
Exodus22:18 “Mitthi thlûk chîng hmeichhia chu tihhlum tûr a ni. 
Exodus22:19 “Ran rîmtu chu tihhlum tûr a ni. 
Exodus22:20 “ Lalpa hnênah ni lo, pathian dang hnêna inthawi chu tihboral daih tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:21 “In zînga hnam dang awm vete in tinawmnahin in tiduhdah tûr a ni lo; nangni pawh Aigupta ramah mikhuala in awm kha. 
Exodus22:22 Hmeithai emaw, fahrah emaw in tinawmnah tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus22:23 In tihduhdah vaih chuan kei Lalpa hian an mangang au chu ka lo ngaithla ang a," 
Exodus22:24 ka thin a ur ang a, khandaiha sah hlum in ni ngei ang; in nupuite chu an hmeithai ang a, in fate pawh an fahrah ang." 
Exodus22:25 “Ka mite chu an retheih avânga tangka i pûktîr chuan tangka pûktîrtu dangte angin ti suh; a pung i ṭhîng tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus22:26 I vêngte puan dahkhama i hrên chuan ni a tlâkah i pe kîr leh tûr a ni. 
Exodus22:27 A mut huna intuamlumna a neih chhun a ni a; i pêk kîr loh chuan a mangang ka hnênah a lo au vang a, ka lo chhâng ngei ang, ka khawngaih ngei dâwn a ni." 
Exodus22:28 Pathian ânkhum suh; in chunga rorêltu pawh ânchhia lawh suh. 
Exodus22:29 “I thlai rah i seng zawhah, oliv hriak i sâwr zawh chuan min pêk tûr ang chu min pe thuai ang che." 
Exodus22:30 “I fapa hrin hmasak ber chu min pe tûr a ni. Chutiang bawkin i bâwng leh berâm no neih hmasak ber chu min pe tûr a ni; a pui hnute ni sarih a hne ang a, a ni riat ni chuan mi rawn pe tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:31 “Ka mite in ni a, in thianghlim tûr a ni; chuvângin, rama sa seh sa rêng rêng in ei tûr a ni lo, ui pe ang che u." 
Exodus23:1 “Dâwt thuthang mai mai pu darh suh la; mi sual chhan tûrin thu dik lo sawi suh. 
Exodus23:2 Thil sual ti tûr chuan, a tam lam pawh ni se, zui suh la; dâwta mi dang thiam loh an chantîrnaah pawh tel hek suh la," 
Exodus23:3 rorêlna hmunah mi rethei ṭan bîk suh. 
Exodus23:4 “I hmêlma bâwngpa emaw, sabengtung emaw tlân bo i hmuh chuan i kaih hâwnsak ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:5 I mi huatzâwng tak pawh ni se a sabengtung chu a phurin lo delh sela, i kaihthawhsak tûr a ni, i kal pêl mai tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus23:6 “Mi rethei pawh, a thu chu dik takin i ngaihtuahsak tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:7 Dâwtin mi hek suh la, thiam lohna nei lo chu tihlum suh; chutiang ti apiang chu thiam loh ka chantîr ang." 
Exodus23:8 Thamna la suh, thamna chuan thil dik lakah mit a tidel ṭhîn a, mi dikte thu pawh a tichingpen ṭhîn," 
Exodus23:9 Ram dang mi i tiduhdah tûr a ni lo; nang pawh Aigupta ramah khân ram dang mi i ni tawh a, a hrehawmzia i hriat kha." 
Exodus23:10 “I lo chu kum ruk Chhûng nei la, a thar apiang seng ang che." 
Exodus23:11 A kum sarih kum erawh chuan i chawlhtîr tûr a ni. Chumi kum chhûnga seng tûr awm chu i hauh tûr a ni lo. Mi retheiten an chang ve tûr a ni; mi retheiho lâk bâng chu ramsain an tlân tûr a ni. Chutiang bawkin i grep leh oliv hmun chu i ti tûr a ni. 
Exodus23:12 “Ni ruk chhûng hna thawk la, a ni sarih ni erawh chuan i châwl tûr a ni; i bâwng te, i sabengtungte pawh an châwl tûr a ni. I bawihnute leh hnam dang hlawha i chhawrte pawh an châwl hahdam tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:13 “In hnêna ka sawi apiang pawisa rawh u, Pathian dang hming rêng rêng lam suh u, a sawi pawh sawi ri suh u." 
Exodus23:14 “Min chawimawi nân kum khatah vawi thum kût hmang rawh u. 
Exodus23:15 Abib thla, ka hun ruatah, chhang dawidim telh loh kût hmang ula, ni sarih chhûng dawidim telh loh chhang ei ang che u. Hemi hun hian Aigupta ram ata in lo chhuak a; chuvângin, ka hmaah tu mah kut ruakin in lo kal tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus23:16 Thlai thar hmasa thlai thar kût hmang ula, kum tâwpah in thil chîn zawng zawng in seng zawh hunah Pâwl Kût hmang bawk ang che u." 
Exodus23:17 In zînga mipa zawng zawng kum khatah vawi thum Lalpa Pathian hmaah in lo lang tûr a ni. 
Exodus23:18 “Dawidim telh chhang chu ka hnênah i thilhlan ran thisen nên i hlân tûr a ni lo. Inthawina ran hlan thau chu a tûk thlenga dah tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus23:19 In rama thlai rah hmasa, a ṭha ṭha chu, Lalpa i Pathian inah i rawn la tûr a ni. Kêlnote chu a pui hnutein chhûm suh." 
Exodus23:20 “Ngai teh, kawnga vêng tûr che leh ka hmun ruata hruai thleng tûr chein in hmahruaitu tûr vântirhkoh ka tîr a." 
Exodus23:21 A thu pawisa ula, ngaithla ṭhîn rawh u; ka tirh a ni asin. Amah chu dodâl suh u; chutilo chuan in bawhchhiatnate a ngaidam lo vang." 
Exodus23:22 “A thu in zawma ka sawi zawng zawng hi in tih chuan in hmêlmate hmêlma, a dotu che u dotu ka ni ang." 
Exodus23:23 Ka vântirhkoh chuan in hma a hruai ang a, Amor mi te, Hit mi te, Periz mi te, Kanan mi te, Hiv mi te, Jebus mi te ramah a hruai lût ang che u: anni chu ka tiboral dâwn a ni." 
Exodus23:24 An pathiante chu kûnin chibai in bûk ve tûr a ni lo va, an tih ang in ti ve tûr a ni hek lo; an pathiante chu in tichhe vek tûr a ni a; an thil phunte pawh tichhe vek ang che u." 
Exodus23:25 Lalpa, in Pathian chu chibai min bûk chuan ruahtuiah leh buhbâlah mal ka sâwm ang che u a, in zîng ata natna ka la bo bawk ang." 
Exodus23:26 In rama nu tu mahin nau an chhiat lo vang a, ching an awm hek lo vang; in nun pawh ka tisei ang." 
Exodus23:27 “In kalna tûr mite chu ka tithlabâr ang a, an chiai ang a, in hmêlmate chu in hmaah ka tlânchhiattîr ang." 
Exodus23:28 An hmaah khawinghal ka tîr ang a, Hiv mi te, Kanan mi te, Hit mi te chu an ûm darh ang." 
Exodus23:29 Kum khat chhûng maiin ka hnawt chhuak vek lo vang; an chhuah mai chuan engkim a ram chhe hman ang a, in tâna hnawk tham ram sakawlh pawh an pung hman ang." 
Exodus23:30 Ram pum luah tham in awm hma chu zawi zawiin ka hnawt chhuak chauh vang. 
Exodus23:31 In ram chu Tuipui Sen aṭanga Filistia-ho tuifinriat inkâr leh, thlalêr aṭanga Eufretis lui inkâr hi a ni ang. Chu rama chêngte chu in hneh vek ang a, ka hnawh chhuahtîr ang che u." 
Exodus23:32 Anni nên chuan thu in thlung tûr a ni lo, an pathiante pawh in ṭâwm tûr a ni hek lo." 
Exodus23:33 In ramah chuan hêng mite hi in awmtîr tûr a ni lo; ka lakah thil sual an tihtîr dah ang che u; an pathiante chibai in bûk ve vaih chuan in chhiatpui ang.” 
Exodus24:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Arona te, Nadaba te, Abihua te leh Israel upa sawmsarih te kha ka hnênah rawn chhohpui la; hla fea dingin chibai mi bûk tûr a ni." 
Exodus24:2 Nang erawh chu ka hmaah, nangmah chauhvin i lo kal tûr a ni, mipui phei chu an lo chho ve tûr a ni lo,” a ti a." 
Exodus24:3 Mosia chu a lo chhuk a. Lalpa thu sawi leh an invawn dân tûra a ruat chu a hrilh vek a, mi zawng zawng chuan “ Lalpa sawi chu kan ti ang,” tiin an chham rual dual dual a." 
Exodus24:4 Mosia chuan Lalpa thu zawng zawng chu a ziak chhuak a, zîng takah a tho va, tlâng bulṭhutah chuan maichâm a siam a. Israel hnam zâtin lung sâwm leh pahnih a phun a." 
Exodus24:5 Israel fate zînga tlangvâl ṭhenkhat chu a tîr a, Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan bâwngpa an hlân a." 
Exodus24:6 Chûng thisen zâtve chu Mosia chuan chawhtawlhah a dah a, a zâtve chuan maichâm chu a theh a." 
Exodus24:7 Thuthlung ziakna bu chu a la a, mipui hriatah a chhiar a; anni chuan, “ Lalpa sawi chu kan ti ang a, kan zâwm ang e,” an ti a." 
Exodus24:8 Mosia chuan thisen chu a la a, mipui chu a theh a, “Ngai teh u, Lalpa chuan hêng thu ang hian nangni nên thu a thlung ta, hei hi a thuthlunna thisen a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Exodus24:9 Tin, Mosia te, Arona te, Nadaba, te Abihua te leh Israel upa sawmsarih te chu tlângah chuan an han chho va." 
Exodus24:10 Israel-te Pathian chu an han hmu a. A ke hnuaiah chuan lungmantam safir rem khâwm ang, vân anga thiang hi a awm a." 
Exodus24:11 Israel milianho chungah chuan kut a thlâk lo, Pathian chu an han hmu a, an eiin an in ho va." 
Exodus24:12 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Tlângah ka hnênah lo chho la, i mi hruaite i zirtîr atân ka dân leh thupêkte ka ziakna lungphêk ka lo pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus24:13 Mosia leh amah puitu Josua chu an chhuak a, Mosia chu Pathian awmna tlângah chuan a chho ta a." 
Exodus24:14 Israel upate hnênah chuan, “Kan lo kîr leh hma chu he laiah hian min lo nghâk reng rawh u. Thu eng emaw nei in awm pawhin, hei, Arona leh Hura te in zîngah an awm a, an hnênah thlen ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus24:15 Mosia chu tlângah chuan a chho ta a. Tlângah chuan chhûm a zîng phui tlat a. 
Exodus24:16 Lalpa ropuina chu tlângah chuan a châm reng a, ni ruk chhûng chu tlâng chu chhûmin a tuam hnuin a ni sarih ni chuan Mosia chu a rawn ko va." 
Exodus24:17 Tlângchhîpa Pathian ropuina chu Israel-te hmuhah chuan mit tidel thei khawpa êng a ni. 
Exodus24:18 Mosia chu chhûmah chuan a han lût a, tlângah chuan a chho va, tlângah chuan ni sawmli a han awm a." 
Exodus25:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus25:2 “Israel fate chu thilpêk ka hnêna rawn hlân tûrin hrilh rawh. An phal ang ang rawn la rawh se. 
Exodus25:3 Rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te," 
Exodus25:4 la dumpâwl te leh a sen te, la senlâr leh zai sîn te, kêl hmul te," 
Exodus25:5 berâm vun tihsen te, savun ṭha chi te; sitim thing te," 
Exodus25:6 chhit atân hriak te, hriak thiha telh tûr leh hâla telh tûr thil rimtui te;" 
Exodus25:7 Efod leh âwmbela bel tûr Soham lung leh lungmantam te rawn keng rawh se. 
Exodus25:8 An zînga ka chên ve theih nân biakbûk min siamsak rawh se. 
Exodus25:9 Biakbûk chu a chhûng chei dân tûr nên lam a lem ka entîr che kha, khami ang chiah khân in sa tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:10 “Sitim thingin bâwm, a dung tawng hnih leh a chanve, a vâng tawng khat leh a chanve, a sân lam tawng khat leh a chanve in siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:11 A pâwn lam leh chhûng lam chu rangkachak ṭha chiin in luan ang a, a tlâng chu rangkachak hlang ngatin in tuam chhuak bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:12 Rangkachak beng pali siam ula, a ke pali-ah chuan vuah ang che u, lehlam lehlamah beng pahnih ve ve vuah ang che u." 
Exodus25:13 Sitim thingtlâwn pahnih siam ula, rangkachakin luan bawk rawh u." 
Exodus25:14 Sitim thingtlâwn chu bâwm zâwn nân a sîr bengah chuan rawlh ve ve ang che u. 
Exodus25:15 Thingtlâwn chu bâwmah chuan vuah reng tûr a ni a, lak sawn tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus25:16 Lungphêka thupêk ziak ka pêk tûr che chu a chhûngah dah ang che. 
Exodus25:17 Bâwm khuhna atân a dung tawng hnih leh a chanve, a vâng tawng khat leh a chanve, rangkachak hlîr phêk siam la." 
Exodus25:18 Cherub lem pahnih, rangkachaka siam, a chhera chher ngei, a chhîn hmâwr tawna dah tûr siam bawk ang che;" 
Exodus25:19 a chhîn rangkachak nên a hmâwra rangkachak cherub lem awm chu sakhat a ni tûr a ni. 
Exodus25:20 Cherub-te chu an inhawitawn ang a, an thla an zâr ang a, bâwm chhîn chu a khuh vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:21 Bâwm chhûngah lungphêk pahnih ka pêk tûr che chu dah la, a chhîn chuan i khuh dâwn nia." 
Exodus25:22 Bâwm bulah chuan kan intâwk ṭhîn ang a, cherub pahnih, Thuthlung Bâwm chunga awm inkâr aṭang chuan ka rawn bia ang che a, Israel-te hnêna thu ka pêk tûr zawng zawng chu ka rawn hrilh ṭhîn ang che." 
Exodus25:23 “Sitim thingphêkin dawhkân i siam bawk tûr a ni; a dung tawng hnih, a vâng tawng khat, a sân lam tawng khat leh a chanve." 
Exodus25:24 Rangkachak hlangin luan chhuak la, a tlâng chu rangkachakin kâwm rawh." 
Exodus25:25 Zung li bawka hlai a sîr kâwmna siam la, a tlâng chu rangkachakin kâwm rawh." 
Exodus25:26 “Rangkachak beng pali siam bawk la, a ke awmna kilah vuah thliah ang che." 
Exodus25:27 A zâwnfung rawlhna tûr beng chu a tlâng kâwmna bulah dah ang che. 
Exodus25:28 Thing tlâwn, zâwnfung tûr, siam la, rangkachak luan ang che." 
Exodus25:29 Thlêng te, bêl te, uain thâwl te, uain bunna tûr note rangkachak hlangin siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:30 Dawhkân chu Thuthlung Bâwm bulah hûn tûr a ni. Ka hmaa dawhkânah chuan chhang serh a awm reng tûr a ni. 
Exodus25:31 “Khâwnvâr dahna rangkachak hlîr hlakin i siam tûr a ni. A ngul leh a bul vâwng chu a chhera chher tûr a ni; a lu bâwk te, a chei mawina pangpâr kuhmûm leh pâr parh lemte nên chuan a inzawm vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:32 A kûngpui pêng aṭangin zâr paruk a pêng ang a, lehlam lehlamah zâr pathum ve ve." 
Exodus25:33 Zâr tinah a cheimawi nân theite pâr kuhmûm leh a pâr parh lem pathum zêl a awm tûr a ni. 
Exodus25:34 khâwnvâr ngul zidingah chuan a cheimawina theite pâr kuhmûm leh pâr parh lem pali a awm tûr a ni. 
Exodus25:35 A zâr chung zâwk leh hnuai zâwk inkârah pangpâr kuhmûm pakhat zêl a awm bawk tûr a ni. 
Exodus25:36 Pangpâr kuhmûm lem te, a zârte leh a zidingte chu rangkachak tlang sakhat aṭanga chher tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:37 Khâwnvâr zâr sarih lu bâwkte chu chhit tûrin siam la, han chhit chuan a hma lam ên rawh se." 
Exodus25:38 Khâwnvâr chhit vêl nâna hman tûr bakcheh leh meivâp dahna thlêng, rangkachak hlang hlakin siam bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:39 Khâwnvâr bâwr leh a hmanruate siam nân rangkachak hlîr hlak kg. sawmthum leh panga hmang ang che. 
Exodus25:40 Tlânga a lem ka entîr che ang chiah khân uluk takin siam ang che. 
Exodus26:1 “La zai sîn thlûr leh a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr tea tah Cherub lem mawi taka zeh puan sâwm, Biakbûk chhûngah chuan zâr ang che." 
Exodus26:2 Puanzâr chu a intiat vek tûr a ni, tawng sawmhnih leh pariata sei, tawng li-a hlai a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:3 Panga chu a hlai zâwnga ṭhui zawm tûr a ni a, a dang panga pawh chu a hrana ṭhui zawm bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:4 Panga ṭhui zawm sîr ber tlângah chuan a beng, la dumpâwl hrual vuah thliah tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:5 “Beng sawmnga ve ve, inzâwn thliaha vuah tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:6 A beng leh beng bah zawmna tûr thil kawm sawmnga rangkachakin siam la, chu chuan puan ṭhui khâwm pahnih chu bât zawm ang che; tichuan, Biakbûk chung zâr chu tlêp khat a ni dâwn nia." 
Exodus26:7 Biakbûk chung tûr kêl hmul puan sâwm leh pakhat tah tûr a ni. 
Exodus26:8 Kêl hmul puan chu a intiat vek tûr a ni, tawng sawmthuma sei, tawng li-a hlai ni rawh se." 
Exodus26:9 Chûng puan panga chu ṭhui zawm tûr a ni, a dang paruk pawh chu a hranga ṭhui zawm tûr a ni. Paruk ṭhui zawm chu biakbûk hma lamah zâr tûr a ni, a sîr ber chu thleh tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:10 Ṭhui khâwm sîr ber tlângah chuan beng sawmnga, inzâwn zêlin siam tawn bawk ang che." 
Exodus26:11 Dârin thil kawm siam la, chu chuan bât tawn la, biakbûk in chung zâr chu tlêp khat a ni dâwn nia." 
Exodus26:12 Biakbûk hnung lamah a khuhna sahmul puan lawr chu uai thla mai rawh se. 
Exodus26:13 A sîr tuaka a chunga lawr, tawng khat ve ve pawh chu uai thla mai rawh se." 
Exodus26:14 “A chung thuah belhna tûr berâm vun tihsen leh savun ṭha chi siam bawk ang che. 
Exodus26:15 “Biakbûk banga tun tûr sitim thing rem khâwm ang che. 
Exodus26:16 Tawng sâwma sâng, tawng khat leh a chanvea hlaiin rem ang che." 
Exodus26:17 Frêm pahnih ke chu inang chiahin tizuih la, a bulṭhuta a zu invuah hnuah a dangte nên a insi phui thei tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:18 Chhim lam bang atân chutiang remkhâwm chu sawmhnih siam la," 
Exodus26:19 a bulṭhut, a sîr zuih zu inphunna tûr tangkaraw tlang ker khuar, tlang sawmhnih siam bawk ang che." 
Exodus26:20 Biakbûk hmâr lama tun tûr chutiang sitim thing rem khâwm chu sawmhnih siam bawk ang che," 
Exodus26:21 a frêm ke zuih inphunna tûr tangkaraw tlang sawmli ker bawk la, tah chuan zu inphun rawh se." 
Exodus26:22 Biakbûk châr, khawthlang lamah chuan bang tun tûr thing rem khâwm paruk siam la," 
Exodus26:23 pahnih chu a kila ṭang tûr a ni. 
Exodus26:24 A kila ṭang tûrte chu a bul aṭangin a lêr thlengin kilh zawm tûr a ni, a kil bang tûr chu chutianga kilh zawm tûr chu a ni." 
Exodus26:25 Tichuan, a vaiin thing rem khâwm chu pariat a ni ang a, a bulṭhut ṭheuh tûr pawh tangkaraw tlang ker khuar bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:26 A bang tun ṭhui khâwm tûr, bangrel, sitim thingtlâwn sâwm leh panga siam la." 
Exodus26:27 A bangah chuan rel panga awm zêl rawh se, a châr lamah panga, a sîr tuakah panga ve ve." 
Exodus26:28 A laia a rel dah chuan Biakbûk bang chu a hual chhuak tûr a ni. 
Exodus26:29 Thing rem khâwm tun chu rangkachaka luan vek tûr a ni; a ṭhuikhâwmna tûr bangrel vuah nân rangkachak beng siam bawk ang che, a bangrelte pawh chu rangkachaka luan tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:30 Biakbûk chu tlânga a lem ka entîr che ang chiah khân din ang che. 
Exodus26:31 “Pindana zâr tûr la zai sîn, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr tea tahin cherub lemte zeh tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:32 Rangkachaka luan sitim ban siam la, a innghahna tûr tangkaraw tlang siam bawk ang che. Banah chuan thil bahna tûr kawm siam la, puan chu zâr ang che." 
Exodus26:33 Puanzâr pindan chhûngah chuan Thuthlung Bâwm chu dah la, puanzâr chu Hmun Thianghlim Ber leh Hmun Thianghlim daidanna a ni ang." 
Exodus26:34 Thuthlung Bâwm chu a chhîn chuan i chhîn ang a, Hmun Thianghlim Berah chuan dah ang che." 
Exodus26:35 Puanzâr pâwn lamah dawhkân kha hmâr lam pangah dah la, khâwnvâr kha chhim lam pangah dah ang che." 
Exodus26:36 “Biakbûk kawngkaa zâr tûr la zai sîn, thlûr, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr te mawi taka tah tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:37 Chumi zârna tûr chuan sitim ban panga, rangkachaka luan, a bulṭhut dâr tlang ker khuar leh puan bahna tûr thil kawm rangkachakin siam bawk ang che." 
Exodus27:1 “Maichâm, kil li nei, tawng nga bial, sitim thingin siam ang che; tawng thuma sâng a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:2 A kil tinah ki lawr chho a awm ṭheuh tûr a ni, maichâm nên chuan a inzawm vek tûr a ni; a vaiin dâr phêka tuam vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:3 Vut bâwm te, vutlawh te, maihûn te, thîrkut te, meilawh te dârin siam bawk ang che." 
Exodus27:4 Dâr tlâwn rem khâwm, a pangah chuan bel chhuak la, a kil li-ah chuan dâr beng dah zêl ang che." 
Exodus27:5 Chu dâr tlâwn rem khâwm chuan maichâm hnuai lam chanve thlengin a tuam tûr a ni. 
Exodus27:6 A zâwnfung tûr sitim tlâwn siam la, dârin tuam ang che." 
Exodus27:7 Zâwnfung pahnih chu maichâm panga beng chuan zâwn dâwnah vuah tûr a ni. 
Exodus27:8 Maichâm bangah thingphel bel la, a lai chu kawrawng rawh se; tlânga a lem ka entîr che ang khân siam ang che." 
Exodus27:9 “Biakbûk chu hung tûr a ni. Chhim lamah chuan la zai sîn thlûra tah puan tawng zaa sei zâr tûr a ni. 
Exodus27:10 Dâr ban sawmhnih leh a bulṭhut dâr tlang sawmhnih a awm tûr a ni. Banah chuan puanzâr bahna tûr thil kawm leh a zârna tûr thil tlâwn, tangkaruaa siam, dah bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:11 Biakbûk hmâr lamah pawh puan tawng zaa sei zâr tûr a ni, ban sawmhnih leh a bulṭhut sawmhnih, a bahna tûr kawm leh a zârna tûr thil tlâwn, tangkaruaa siam a awm bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:12 Khawthlang lamah chuan tawng sawmngaa sei puan zâr tûr a ni, ban sâwm leh a bulṭhut sâwm a awm ang a." 
Exodus27:13 Khawchhak lamah pawh a hungna chu tawng sawmngaa sei a ni bawk tûr a ni. 
Exodus27:14 Luhna tûr kawngka a awm ang a, luhna sîr bang chu tawng sâwm leh pangaa sei a ni ang, ban pathum leh bulṭhut pathum a nei ang." 
Exodus27:15 A luhna lehlam sîrah pawh bang, tawng sâwm leh pangaa sei, ban pathum leh bulṭhut pathum nei a awm bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:16 A luhna kawngkaa zâr tûr la zai sîn thlûr, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr tea tah, mawi taka zeh, tawng sawmhniha sei a awm tûr a ni; a zârna atân ban pali, bulṭhut nei ṭheuh a awm bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:17 Hungna ban zawng zawng chu tangkaraw tlâwna ṭhui zawm tûr a ni: puan bahna tûr thil kawm chu tangkarua a ni tûr a ni, a bulṭhut erawh chu dâr tlang a ni ang." 
Exodus27:18 A tual hungna chu a dung tawng za, a vâng tawng sawmnga, a sân lam tawng nga a ni ang a, a puanzâr tûr chu la zai sîn thlûr tah a ni ang, a ban bul erawh chu dâr a ni ang." 
Exodus27:19 Biakbûk sakna hmanrua zawng zawng, a kilh behna te, a hungna pal khen nghehna te chu dâr vek a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:20 “Khâwnvâra chhit tûr oliv hriak thlit fîm rawn la tûrin Israel fate chu hrilh rawh; khâwnvâr chu tlaiah chhit ziah tûr a ni. 
Exodus27:21 Arona leh a fate chuan Biakbûka Thuthlung Bâwm awmna pâwnah khâwnvâr chu dah sela, tlai aṭanga zîng thlengin Lalpa hmaah chuan chhi rawh se; Israel fate leh an thlah zêlte chuan hei hi tih dân nghetah neih rawh se." 
Exodus28:1 “I u Arona chu a fa Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te nên ko la, Israel mite zîng ata ka puithiam atân tihrang rawh." 
Exodus28:2 I u, Arona hâk tûr, kawr serh, amah tiropuia timawitu tûr siamsak ang che." 
Exodus28:3 Mi themthiam, pianpuia themthiamna ka pêkte chu ruai la, Arona inbel tûr thawmhnaw siam teh se, puithiam hna thawk tûra serh hran a ni dâwn si a." 
Exodus28:4 Hêng thawmhnawte hi an siam tûr a ni: âwmbel te, efod te, kawrfual te, kawrhnuai te, diar ṭial te, kâwnghrên te, i u Arona leh a fapate hâk atân puithiam kawr te hi siam sela, ka puithiamah an ṭang dâwn nia." 
Exodus28:5 Rangkachak te, la dumpâwl te, senduk te, senlâr leh la zai sîn te an hmang tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:6 Efod chu themthiam rual chuan rangkachak zai te, la zai sîn te, a dumpâwl te, a senlâr te, a senduk tein tah rawh se." 
Exodus28:7 Darbak pahnih, a hnung lam leh hma lama invuah, bah luh tlatna tûr siam sela." 
Exodus28:8 Kâwnghrên rangkachak zai sîn te, la zai sîn thlûr, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlârtea inchawih mawi taka tah tûr a ni. Kâwnga hrên behna tûr Efod kawr hmâwrah chuan efod puan ang chiaha zeh mawi tah zawm tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:9 Soham lungmantam pahnih la la, Israela thlah hnam sâwm leh pahnih hming ker ang che;" 
Exodus28:10 an upat dân indawtin an hming chu ker ang che, pakhatah paruk ve vein." 
Exodus28:11 Mi themthiam kertîr la, rangkachakah phûm rawh se." 
Exodus28:12 Lungmantam pahnih chu dârbakah chuan Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnih hriat reng nân bel ang che; Arona chuan Lalpa hmaah an hming chu dârbakah chuan a bât tel ang a, Israel hnamte chu ka hre chhuak ṭhîn dâwn nia." 
Exodus28:13 Lungmantam phûmna tûr rangkachak pahnih chher la; 
Exodus28:14 rangkachak hlîr hlak khaidiat inherh siam bawk la, chûng phûmnaah chuan vuah ang che." 
Exodus28:15 “La zai sîn thlûr, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr te leh rangkachak zai tea efod anga tah, Pathian râwn huna puithiam âwma bel tûr mi themthiamte chu inchawih mawi takin tahtîr ang che." 
Exodus28:16 Thlep la, thleh hnuah chuan kil li nei, khâp bial ni rawh se." 
Exodus28:17 Lungmantam tlar li-a phûmna tûr siam la, tlar khatah chuan Odam lung te, Pitda lung te, Bareket lung te awm sela;" 
Exodus28:18 tlar hnihnaah Nopek te, Safir te, Jahalom te awm sela," 
Exodus28:19 tlar thumnaah Lesem te, Sebo te, Ak-elama te awm sela;" 
Exodus28:20 tlar linaah Tarsis te, Soham te, Jaspi te awm sela; chûng lungmantamte chu rangkachak phêka phûm ṭhêt tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:21 Lungmantam pakhatah hian Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnih hming pakhat zêl ker tûr a ni, nemna zungbun anga ker tûr a ni; chung lungmantam sâwm leh pahnih chuan Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnih a entîr ang." 
Exodus28:22 Âwmbel khai nân rangkachak hlîr hlak khaidiat herh siam la," 
Exodus28:23 rangkachak beng pahnih, âwmbel tlânga vuah tûr siam bawk ang che." 
Exodus28:24 Khaidiat herh hmâwr hnih chu âwmbel tlânga bengah chuan vuah tûr a ni. 
Exodus28:25 A hmâwr lehlam pahnih chu, lungmantam pahnih phûmnaah khân tibet la, efod dârbak nên inzawm rawh se." 
Exodus28:26 Efod dep, âwmbel chhûng tlângah chuan rangkachak beng pahnih bel bawk ang che." 
Exodus28:27 Efod dârbak vuahna zâwn, efod hrên behna mawi taka tah tlângah rangkachak beng dang pahnih bel bawk ang che." 
Exodus28:28 Âwmbel leh efod-a rangkachak beng chu la dumpâwl hrualin suih zawm ang che; âwmbel chu kâwng zâwnah bei tlat rawh se, a che sawn thei tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus28:29 “Arona chu Hmun Thianghlima a lo luhin âwmbel, Israel hnamte hming chuanna chu, a rawn bel tûr a ni; chu chu, kei Lalpa hian, ka mite ka hriat chhuah theihna tûr a ni ang." 
Exodus28:30 “Efod kawrah chuan Urim leh Thumim chu dah la, kei Lalpa hi, mi râwn tûra a lo kal apiangin, Arona thinlung zâwnah chuan a awm ṭhîn dâwn nia." 
Exodus28:31 Chutianga Arona a lo kal apiangin Efod chu a ha ṭhîn ang a, mipuite thu zawh chu a chhâng ṭhîn ang. “Efod hnuaia hâk tûr kawrfual chu la dumpâwl veka tah tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:32 A laiah lu rawlhna tûr rek pawp la, a reh pawh tlâng chu a thlêr loh nân a chehna tûr puan tah chuan chep ang che." 
Exodus28:33 A kawrfual hmâwrah chuan la dumpâwl te, la senduk te leh la senlâr tea siam theibuhfai lem leh rangkachak tengeng inkârthlâk chiata vuah chhuah tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:34  
Exodus28:35 Chu chu puithiam hna a thawh hunah Arona chuan a ha ṭhîn tûr a ni. Hmun Thianghlima Lalpa hmaa a luhin emaw, a chhuahin emaw tengeng chu a ri ṭhîn ang a, a thi lo tih a hriat dâwn a ni." 
Exodus28:36 “Rangkachak hlîr hlak phêkah nemna zungbun ker angin, ‘ Lalpa pual’ tih ker ang che." 
Exodus28:37 Puithiam diar hma lamah bel la, la dumpâwl hrualin thlung bet ang che." 
Exodus28:38 Arona chuan diar chawpin a chalah a khim ṭhîn tûr a ni; tichuan, kei Lalpa hian Israel-te inthawina thil ka hnêna an rawn hlan chu ka lo pawm ang a, thil hlana tihsual an neih pawhin Arona chuan a mawh a phur ang." 
Exodus28:39 “Arona hâk tûr, kawr hnuai te, a khim tûr diar te, la zai sîna tah tûr a ni a; a hrên tûr kâwnghrên pawh la zai sîn tah tûr a ni, mawi taka chei tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:40 “Kawrfual te, kâwnghrên te, lukhum te, Arona fate tân siamsak bawk rawh, tiropuia timawitu ni rawh se." 
Exodus28:41 I u Arona leh a fapate chu hâktîr la, ka rawngbâwl tûra puithiam atân oliv hriak thih la, hlân la, serh hrang ang che." 
Exodus28:42 La zai sîna tah, kekawr hnuai siamsak bawk ang che, malpui thlenga fual ni rawh se, chutilo chu an lang palh ang e." 
Exodus28:43 Arona leh a fate chuan, Biakbûka an lo luhin emaw, Hmun Thianghlima awm maichâma puithiam hna thawk tûra an lo kalin emaw chûng chu an ha ziah tûr a ni; an lan palh chuan an thi mai ang. Hei hi Arona leh a thlahte tân kumkhaw tih dâna hman tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:1 “Ka rawng bâwla puithiam hna thawk tûr chu hetiang hian serh hran tûr a ni; bâwngtuai pakhat leh berâmchal pahnih, hmêlhem lo kai la," 
Exodus29:2 dawidim telh loh chhang te, hriaka hmeh chhangpêr te, hriaka tâl chhang pan te, chhangphut ṭha chiin siam ang che." 
Exodus29:3 Chûng chu fawngah dah la, bâwng leh berâm hlan hunah i hlân tel dâwn nia." 
Exodus29:4 Arona leh a fate chu Biakbûk kawngka bulah awm sela, dân angin tuiah insiltîr ang che." 
Exodus29:5 “Puithiam silhfên chu la la, kawrfual te, efod kawr te, efod hnuai kawrfual te, âwmbel te, kâwnghrên te chuan Arona chu inthuam rawh se." 
Exodus29:6 ‘ Lalpa pual’ tih belna diar chu khimtîr bawk ang che. 
Exodus29:7 Thih atân bîka siam oliv hriak chu la la, a lu-ah leihin thih ang che." 
Exodus29:8 “Arona fapate pawh lo kal sela, kawr hâktîr la," 
Exodus29:9 kâwnghrên hrêngin lukhumte chu khum sela, puithiamah chutiang chuan nemnghet la, puithiam an ni kumkhua tawh ang." 
Exodus29:10 “Bâwngtuai chu Biakbûk hmaah rawn kai ula, Arona leh a fate chuan bâwng lu-ah chuan an kut nghat sela." 
Exodus29:11 Biakbûk kawngka bul Lalpa hmaah talh ang che. 
Exodus29:12 Bâwng thisen chu la la, kutzungṭangin maichâm kil ki-ah chuan tât ang che; tah bâng chu maichâm bulah leihbua ang che." 
Exodus29:13 A rîlbawh thau te, a kal te leh a bawhtu thau te, a thin hlâwm ṭha laite la la, sual thawina atân maichâmah hâl ral rawh." 
Exodus29:14 A sa te, a vun te, a kawchhûng te erawh chu daipâwnah hâl ral ang che, sual thawina thilhlan a ni a, hâl ral vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:15 “Berâmchal pakhat chu kai la, Arona leh a fate chuan a lu-ah an kut nghat rawh se." 
Exodus29:16 Talh la, a thisen chuan maichâm chu theh kual ang che." 
Exodus29:17 A sa chu chan sawm la; a kawchhûng leh a kete chu sil fai la, a lu nên dah khâwm ang che." 
Exodus29:18 A zavai chuan maichâmah hâl la, Lalpa tâna hâlral thilhlan a ni, a rim chu Lalpa rimtui tih zâwng tak a ni." 
Exodus29:19 “Berâm pakhat pawh chu kai la, Arona leh a fate chuan a lu-ah an kut nghat rawh se." 
Exodus29:20 Talh la, a thisen chu Arona leh a fate beng ding lam tengengah te, kut ding lam zungpui hmâwrah te, kezungpui ding lam hmâwrah te tât la, maichâmah pawh theh kual ang che." 
Exodus29:21 Maichâma thisen te, oliv hriak thih chi te chu a ṭhen la la, Arona chu a kawrah nên theh ang che; a fate pawh an kawrah nên theh ang che; tichuan, Arona leh a fate chu an thawmhnaw nên ka tâna serh hran an ni tawh ang." 
Exodus29:22 “Berâm mei thau tak chu hlep la, a rîlbawh thau te, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai leh a kal pahnih leh a thau bawhtu leh a bawp ding lam chu la la," 
Exodus29:23 chhang hlan, fawnga dah, chi khat zêl, dawidim telh loh chhang te, hriak nêna hmeh chhangpêr te, hriaka tâl chhang pan te pakhat ṭheuh la la," 
Exodus29:24 chûng chu Arona leh a fate chu pe la, Lalpa hmaah thêntîr rawh." 
Exodus29:25 I lâksak leh ang a, maichâma hâlral thilhlan chungah dah la, Lalpa tân hâl ral ang che; Lalpa rimtui tih zâwng tak a ni." 
Exodus29:26 “Berâm irno chu la la, Lalpa hmaah thênin hlân ang che; chu chu i chanpual ve tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:27 Puithiam ruat nghehna berâm irno leh a bawp hi thênin ka hnênah hlân ula, puithiamte chanpual ve tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:28 Israel faten remna thilhlan an hlanin a irno leh a bawp chu puithiamho chan kumkhua atân ka ruat tlat a ni; hei hi mipui thilpêk ka dawn ve chu a ni. 
Exodus29:29 Arona puithiam thuam serh hi a faten an chhawm zêl tûr a ni, puithiam hna thawk tûra serh hrannaah an ha ve zêl tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:30 Arona fa, a aiawha puithiama ruat chuan rawngbâwl tûra Hmun Thianghlima a lo kal hunah ni sarih chhûng a ha tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:31 “Puithiam ruat nghehnaa berâmpa in hman sa chu Hmun Thianghlimah chhûm ang che," 
Exodus29:32 Arona leh a fate chuan Biakbûk kawngka bulah, fawnga chhang hlan nên a sa chu ei rawh se." 
Exodus29:33 Anmahni ruat nghehnaa sual thawina sa chu anmahni chauhvin an ei tûr a ni; thil thianghlim a ni a, puithiam chauh ei tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:34 A sa leh chhang chu ei sên loh a awm chuan zîngah hâl tûr a ni, sa serh a ni a, a ṭhing chu ei tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus29:35 Thu ka pêk che ang chuan Arona leh a fate chu ni sarih chhûng i tihrang tûr a ni. 
Exodus29:36 Ni tin, sual thawi nân bâwngchal hlân ang che; sual thawina chu hlânin maichâm chu i thian ang a, oliv hriak i hnawih ang a, i tithianghlim tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:37 Chutiang chuan ni sarih chhûng, ni tin ti ang che; tichuan, maichâm chu a lo thianghlim kim vek ang a, mi narânin an khawih chuan an tuar ang." 
Exodus29:38 “Maichâmah chuan ni tin berâm kum khat vêla upa i hlân ziah tûr a ni. 
Exodus29:39 Zîngah pakhat i hlân ang a, tlaiah pawh a dang pakhat i hlân dâwn nia." 
Exodus29:40 Berâm pakhat rual chuan chhangphut ṭha chi kg. khat leh oliv hriak thlit fîm litar khat i hlân tûr a ni; thilhlan ruala uain leihbuak tûr litar khat hlân tel bawk ang che. 
Exodus29:41 Tlai lama berâm pakhat hlan rual pawh chuan chhangphut ṭha chi te, oliv te, uain te hlân tel ang che. Hei hi ei tûr thilhlan, kei Lalpa hnêna hlan chu a ni, a hâl rim chu a tui a ni." 
Exodus29:42 Lalpa Biakbûk kawngkaa hâlral thilhlan chu in hlân kumkhua tûr a ni; chutah chuan ka mite ka rawn hmu ang a, thu ka hrilh ṭhîn ang." 
Exodus29:43 Chutah chuan Israel fate chu ka be ṭhîn ang a, ka ropuina chu a châm reng ang." 
Exodus29:44 Biakbûk leh maichâm chu ka tithianghlim ang a, ka rawngbâwltu atân Arona leh a fate chu ka tihrang ang." 
Exodus29:45 Israel mite zîngah chuan ka chêng ve ang a, an Pathian ka ni ang." 
Exodus29:46 An zînga ka tel ve ṭhin nân Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuak a, kha Pathian, Lalpa kha ka ni tih an hria ang; Lalpa, an Pathian ka nih hi." 
Exodus30:1 “Sitim thingin rimtui hâlna tûr maichâm siam ang che. 
Exodus30:2 Kil li nei, tawng khat bial, a sân lam tawng hnih ni sela, kil tinah a ki lawr awm sela, inzawm vek rawh se." 
Exodus30:3 A chung zâwl te, a sîr te, a kîte chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin luan tûr a ni, a tlâng chu rangkachaka luan tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:4 A zâwnfung vuahna tûr rangkachak beng pali siam la, a sîr lehlam lehlamah, a tlâng bulah vuah ang che." 
Exodus30:5 A zâwnfung chu sitim thing ni sela, rangkachaka luan tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:6 Rimtui hâlna maichâm chu Thuthlung Bâwm dahna puanzâr pindan pâwnah hûng ang che. Thuthlung Bâwm chhîn chu ka rawn biak ṭhinna tûr che a ni. 
Exodus30:7 Tûk tin, Aronan khâwnvâr a rawn tihfai pahin thil rimtui a hâl ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:8 Tlaiah pawh, khâwnvâr a rawn chhit dâwnin rimtui chu a hâl ziah tûr a ni. Lalpa hnêna rimtui hâl hi kumkhuaa chhunzawm zêl tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:9 Maichâmah hian hâl khap thil rimtui te, hâlral thilhlan te, chhang hlante i hâl tûr a ni lo, in tûr uain hlan pawh i leihbaw tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus30:10 Kum tin, vawi khat, sual thawina thilhlan thisen chu, Arona chuan, maichâm then thianghlim nân a ki-ah a hnawih tûr a ni; kumkhuain hei hi kum tin vawi khat tih ziah tûr a ni; maichâm chu Lalpa tân a thianghlim reng tûr a ni.”" 
Exodus30:11 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus30:12 “Chhiarpui laia hri-a mi an thih loh nân Israel mite i chhiar huna tel zawng chuan nun tlanna an pe tûr a ni. 
Exodus30:13 Chhiarpuia tel zawng zawngin pêk tûr tuk zât chu an pe tûr a ni, Inbiakna bûka hman lai bûkna dik taka bûk sekel chanve, Gera sâwm an pe tûr a ni; chu chu LALPA hnêna thilhlan a ni ang." 
Exodus30:14 Chhiarpuia chhiar tel, kum sawmhnih leh a chung lam zawng zawng chuan Lalpa hnênah hei hi an hlân tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:15 An nun tlanna Lalpa hnêna an hlan hun chuan sekel chanve mi tinin an hlân ṭheuh tûr a ni; mi hausain a aia tam an hlân tûr a ni lo, mi rethei pawhin chu aia tlêm chu an hlân tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus30:16 Israel mite hnên aṭangin he nun tlanna hi i khawn ang a, Biakbûk enkawl nân i hmang dâwn nia. He nun tlanna hi Lalpa tân Israel fate a hriat reng vena tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus30:17 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus30:18 “Insilna tui dah nân dâr chawhtawlh, a hûnna dâr nên siam ang che; hâlral hâlna maichâm leh Biakbûk inkârah hûng la, tui dah reng ang che." 
Exodus30:19 Arona leh a fate chuan an kut leh an ke hetah hian an sil ṭhîn tûr a ni. 
Exodus30:20 Biakbûk chhûnga an kal dâwnin emaw, thilhlan hâl tûra an kal hunah emaw an insil tûr a ni; tichuan, an thi lo vang." 
Exodus30:21 An thih loh nân an kut leh ke an sil ngei tûr a ni. Hei hi an thlahte pawhin kumkhaw dânah an neih ve zêl tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus30:22 Lalpan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus30:23 “Thil rimtui tak tak, Mura tui kg. ruk, thakthîng rimtui kg. thum, Saitronela rimtui kg. thum," 
Exodus30:24 Tez-pata kg. ruk, Inbiakna bûka hman lai bûklunga bûk vek la khâwm la, oliv hriak litar li nên chawhpawlh ang che." 
Exodus30:25 Têl rimtui anga siam rimtui chawhpawlh chu hriak thianghlim hnawih atân hmang ang che. 
Exodus30:26 Biakbûk te, Thuthlung Bâwm te," 
Exodus30:27 dawhkân leh a hmanrua te, rimtui hâlna maichâm te," 
Exodus30:28 thilhlan hâlna maichâm leh a hmanrua te, insilna dâr chawhtawlh te leh a hûnna te hnawihah chu chu hmang ang che."
