Exodus30:29 Chu hriak chu chutianga hnawihin hêngte hi tithianghlim la, an lo thianghlim vek ang a, a khawih apiangin an tuar ang." 
Exodus30:30 Ka rawngbâwl tûrin Arona leh a fate chu he hriak hi thih la, tihrang ang che." 
Exodus30:31 Israel fate chu hrilh rawh; he hriak thianghlim hi ka rawngbâwltu tûr serh hran huna thih atân hman kumkhua tûr a ni. 
Exodus30:32 Mi narân thih tûr a ni lo; thil chi hrang hrang chawhpawlh tûr zât hi tihdanglam tûr a ni hek lo; thil thianghlim a ni a, in serh hle tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:33 Hetianga thih tûr hriak leh thil dang chawhpawlh lo siam vete emaw, puithiam tûr ni lo thihtu emaw chu Israel mite zîng ata tuithlâr tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus30:34 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Hêng thil rimtui Netep te, Sekelet te, Kalbana te, Beraw fîmte inzât chiah zêlin la la," 
Exodus30:35 rimtuia hâl atân tel rimtui chawhpawlh angin chawhpawlh ang che, vêng hima tithianghlim tûrin chi tlêm telh ang che." 
Exodus30:36 A ṭhen chu râwt dip derh la, Biakbûkah, ka biak ṭhinna tûr che Thuthlung Bâwm bulah theh darh ang che; chu chu thil thianghlim berah neih tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:37 Nangma hman tûrin chutiang taka rimtui chawhpawlh chu i siam tûr a ni lo; thil thianghlim, Lalpa tâna serh hran a ni." 
Exodus30:38 Mahni hâl tûr chutianga rimtui chawhpawlh siam vetu rêng rêng chu a miten an tuithlâr tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus31:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Uria fapa, Bezalela, Hura tupa, Juda hnam zînga mi chu ka thlang chhuak ta." 
Exodus31:2 Finna te, hriatna te, hmangchâng hriatna te, thil engkim siam tûra" 
Exodus31:3 kut themthiamna te nei tûrin Pathian Thlarau ka pe ta. 
Exodus31:4 Thil mawi tûr ngaihtuah chhuaka, rangkachak te, tangkarua te leh dâr tea siam nghâl thiamna te," 
Exodus31:5 lungmantam kera phûm te, thing ker te, thil mawi chi tinrêng siam thiamna te ka pe a ni." 
Exodus31:6 Amah pui tûrin Dan hnama mi Ahisamaka fapa Oholiaba pawh ka thlang tawh a ni. Themthiam rual dang pawh, siam tûra ka tih zawng zawng siam thiamna ka pe a ni." 
Exodus31:7 Biakbûk an sa ang a, Thuthlung Bâwm leh a chhîn te, Biakbûk thuahna te," 
Exodus31:8 dawhkân leh a hmanrua te, rangkachak hlîr hlaka siam khâwnvâr bâwr leh a hmanrua te, rimtui hâlna maichâm te," 
Exodus31:9 thilhlan hâlna maichâm leh a hmanrua te, insilna tûr chawhtawlh leh a hûnna te," 
Exodus31:10 Arona leh a fate puithiam hna thawka ka rawng an bâwl huna an inthuamna tûr thuam ropui te," 
Exodus31:11 puithiam nemngheha thih tûr hriak te, Hmun Thianghlima rimtui hâl tûr te an siam dâwn nia. Ka sawi ang thlap khân hêng hi an siam tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus31:12 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus31:13 “Israel fate chu hrilh rawh: Ka sabat ni hi an serh tûr a ni; in thlah zêlte thlengin kei Lalpa hi, nangmahni thlang chhuaktu che u ka nih in hriat rengna tûr a ni." 
Exodus31:14 Sabat hi in tân ni thianghlim a ni ang; in serh tûr a ni a, a bawhchhia chu tihhlum tûr a ni; hna thawk lui pawh chu in zîng ata tihboral tûr a ni." 
Exodus31:15 Ni ruk chhûng hna thawhna hun in nei a, a ni sarihna chu Lalpa tân ni serh a ni a, in châwl tûr a ni; sabat nia hna thawk chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus31:16 Chuvângin, Israel fate chuan, kan inkâra thuthlung an hriat reng nân kumkhuain an serh tûr a ni." 
Exodus31:17 Kei leh Israel fate, kan inkâra thuthlung chhinchhiahna a ni ang; kei Lalpa hian ni ruk chhûngin lei leh vân ka siam zo va, a ni sarih ni chuan hna ka bânsan a, ka châwl a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus31:18 Pathianin Sinai tlânga Mosia a biak zawh chuan, a thupêk, amah Pathian ngeiin lungphêka a ziak chu Mosia hnênah chuan a pe a." 
Exodus32:1 Mosia chu tlâng aṭanga a lo chhuk tâk lawk loh avângin Arona hnênah mite chu an kal khâwm a, “Khai, min hruaitu tûr Pathian min siamsak teh; Aigupta ram aṭanga min hruai chhuaktupa Mosia lah hi a chanchin eng mah kan hre tawh si lo,” an ti a." 
Exodus32:2 Arona chuan, “In nupui te, in fapa te, leh in fanute rangkachak bengbeh thlawnsak ula, han la ta che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:3 Mi zawng zawng chuan an rangkachak bengbehte chu an thlawn a, Arona an pe a." 
Exodus32:4 Ani chuan a lo dawng a, rangkachak chu a rawh tui a, a chhûnna tûr a siamah chuan bâwngno, a pa lim a chhûng ta a. Mite chuan, “Aw Israel-te u, hei hi Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu che u pathian chu a ni,” an ti a." 
Exodus32:5 Chu chu Aronan a hriat chuan bâwngno lim hmaah chuan maichâm a siam a; “Naktûkah Lalpa chawimawina ruai kan ṭheh ang,” tiin a tlângautîr a." 
Exodus32:6 A tûk zîngah chuan hâlral thilhlan an hlân a, remna thilhlan an rawn la bawk a, an hlân a, mipuite chu ruai kîl tûr chuan an ṭhu a, inphalrai ruai a ni ta ngawt a." 
Exodus32:7 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Chhuk thuai teh, Aigupta ram aṭanga i hruai chhuah, i mite khu an khawlo zo ta." 
Exodus32:8 An awm dân tûr ka hrilh ang khân an awm rei peih ta hauh lo mai; rangkachak bâwngno lim an chhûng a, chibai an bûk a, inthawina an hlân e, ‘Aw Israel-te u, hei hi Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu che u in pathian chu a ni, an ti,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:9 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Hêng mite hi an luhlul hle mai ka ti!" 
Exodus32:10 Ka thinur êm mai, khawi nge, ka zu tihlum vek teh ang, nang chauh hi hnam ropui takah ka han din teh ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:11 Mosia chuan a Pathian, Lalpa chu a ngên a, “Aw Lalpa, ropui tak leh kut chak tak hmanga Aigupta ram ata i hruai chhuah i mite chungah engtizia nge chuti taka i thinur le!" 
Exodus32:12 ‘Tlângrama tihhluma, tihchimih tumin a mite chu Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuak a lo nih hi,’ Aigupta mite chuan an ti dâwn asin. Thinur tawh teh suh." 
Exodus32:13 I chhiahhlawh Abrahama te, Isaka te, Israela te kha hre reng teh; mahni inchhâlin an hnênah, ‘Arsi zâtin in thlahte ka tipung ang a, ka sawi ram zawng zawng hi in thlahte hnênah ka pe ang a, an nei kumkhua ang,’ tiin i tiam kha,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:14 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan a mite chunga thil ṭha lo tih a tum chu a ṭhulh ta a." 
Exodus32:15 Mosia chu tlâng aṭang chuan a chhuk thla a, a kut lehlam lehlam chuan thupêk ziakna lungphêk chu a keng a." 
Exodus32:16 Lungphêkte chu Pathian siam a ni; a ziak pawh chu Pathian ngeiin kerin a ziak a ni. 
Exodus32:17 Mipui au thâwm chu Josua chuan a han hria a, “Chu! riahhmuna thâwm chu indo thâwm a va ni âwm ve?” a ti a." 
Exodus32:18 Mosia chuan, “Hnehtu au thâwm a ni lo va, chan chau thâwm lah a ni hek lo, hlimhlawp zai thâwm a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:19 Tin, riahhmun chu a zu thleng hnai a, Mosia chuan bâwngno lim leh mipui lâm huai huai chu a han hmu a, a thin a ur ta êm êm a. Tlâng bulṭhutah chuan a lungphêk ken chu a vawm keh a." 
Exodus32:20 Bâwngno lim an chhûn chu a la lawk a, a rawh a, a râwt dip a, tuiah a phul a, Israel fate chu a intîr ta a." 
Exodus32:21 Arona hnênah, “Engtin nge mipuiin an tih che a heti taka thil sual i tihtîr tâk le?” a ti a." 
Exodus32:22 Arona chuan a chhâng a, “Ka Lalpa thinur chu ka chungah alh teh suh se, hêng mite hian thil sual tih an châk zek zekzia i hria alâwm." 
Exodus32:23 ‘Min hruaitu tûr pathian min siamsak rawh, Aigupta ram aṭanga min hruai chhuaktu Mosia lah hi a chanchin pawh kan hre tawh si lo,’ an rawn ti a." 
Exodus32:24 Keiin an hnênah, ‘Rangkachak nei chuan thlawn sela, rawn dah rawh se,’ ka lo ti a. An rawn dah a, keiin ka rawh a, bâwngno limah a chang ta mai alâwm maw le!” a ti a." 
Exodus32:25 Mipui chu an duh duhin an tâl a, an hmêlmate hmuhsit hial khawpin Arona chuan a lo tâltîr mai mai a ni tih Mosian a hmuh chuan," 
Exodus32:26 riahhmun lamah a va ding a, “ Lalpa lama ṭang duh chu ka hnênah hian lo kal rawh se,” a ti a. Levia thlah zawng zawng chu a lamah chuan an kal ta a." 
Exodus32:27 An hnênah, “Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘mipa chuan khandaih pai ula, riahhmun luhnaah lûtin bûkte chu fang chhuak ula, mahni unau pawh, ṭhian pawh, ṭhenawmpa pawh that rawh se,’ a ti,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:28 Levia thlahte chuan Mosia sawi ang chuan an ti a; chumi ni chuan mi sângthum lai an that a. 
Exodus32:29 Mosia chuan, “Mahni fate leh unaute bei hial khawpin Lalpa tân in inpe a, mal a sâwm ngei ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:30 A tûkah chuan Mosian mipui hnênah, “Thil sual râpthlâk tak in ti a; mahse, tûnah hian Lalpa hnênah ka han chho leh tâng e, in sual a lo ngaidam thei mial mahna,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:31 Mosia chu Lalpa hnênah a kal chho leh a, “Hêng mite hian thil sual râpthlâk tak an ti a, rangkachak pathian an siam tâk hi." 
Exodus32:32 Mahse, an sual hi i ngaidam thei hrâm ang emaw chu? I theih lul loh chuan i mite hming ziakna bu ata ka hming kha thai bo mai ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:33 Lalpa chuan Mosia chu a chhâng a, “Ka lehkhabu aṭangin ka chunga thil tisualtu hming chauh a ni ka thai bo dâwn ni." 
Exodus32:34 Kal ta la, ka hrilh tawh che hmunah he mite hi hruai rawh. Ngai teh, ka Vântirhkoh chuan i hma a hruai zêl ang a; ka rawn tlawh hunah chuan an sualna ngei chauhvah a ni ka rawn hrem dâwn ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:35 Tichuan, rangkachak bâwngno lim Arona an siamtîr avâng chuan Lalpa chuan mipui zîngah hri a lêntîr ta a." 
Exodus33:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Aigupta ram aṭanga i mi hruai chhuahte hi chhuahpui la, Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te hnêna pêk ka tiam ramah chuan kal rawh." 
Exodus33:2 Ka Vântirhkoh chuan in hma a hruai ang a, Kanan mi te, Amor mi te, Hit mi te, Periz mi te, Hiv mi te leh Jebus mi te chu ka ûm chhuak ang." 
Exodus33:3 Chu ram, khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ramah chuan kal ula, kei erawh chu ka lo kal ve lo vang, in luhlul êm a, kawng lakah ka tichimit hlauh dah ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:4 Miten chu thu ṭha lo tak chu an hriat chuan an lungngai ta êm êm a, an inchei duh ta lo va." 
Exodus33:5 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Mi luhlul tak in ni, in zînga ka kal ve zawngin ka tichimit mai ang che u. In chunga ka tih dân tûr ka han ngaihtuah ang e,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:6 Sinai tlâng an chhuahsan hnu chuan Israel fate chuan incheimawina an inbel tawh ngai lo. 
Exodus33:7 Israel-ten bûk an khuarna apiangah Mosia chuan Biakbûk chu bûk pâwn deuhvah a zâr ṭhîn a, Inbiakna bûk, a vuah a. Tu pawhin Lalpa an râwn duh chuan bûk pâwna Inbiakna bûkah chuan an pan ṭhîn." 
Exodus33:8 Inbiakna bûkah Mosia a kal dâwn chuan mi tin mahni puan in kawngkaah chuan an lo chhuak a, Inbiakna bûk a luh hma chu dingin Mosia chu an enzui ṭhap ṭhîn." 
Exodus33:9 Inbiakna bûka Mosia a luh vêleh chhûm ding kha a lo chhuk a, Inbiakna bûk kawngkaah chuan Mosia hnênah Lalpa chuan thu a sawi ṭhîn." 
Exodus33:10 Inbiakna bûk kawngkhâra chhûm ding an hmuh chuan mi zawng zawng chu an puan in kawngkaah chuan an kûn a, chibai an bûk ṭheuh ṭhîn." 
Exodus33:11 Miin a ṭhian a bia ang hian Lalpa chuan Mosia chu inhmachhawn meuhvin a be ṭhîn. Mosia chu bûkah a lo kîr ṭhîn a; amaherawhchu, amah puitu Nuna fapa tlangvâl Josua erawh chuan Inbiakna bûk chu a chhuahsan ngai lo." 
Exodus33:12 Mosia chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Hêng mite hi hruai chhuak tûrin min ti a, tu nge min kalpui dâwn tih min la hrilh si lo. Min hria a, min duhsak a ni tih min hrilh a." 
Exodus33:13 Khai le, min duhsak takmeuh a nih chuan i thiltum chu min hrilh teh; tichuan, i mit tlungin i rawng ka bâwl thei ang a, he mite hi i mi thlante chu an lo ni ngei tih ka hre thei bawk dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:14 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “In zîngah ka tel ve zêl ang a, ka chhâwk zâng zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:15 Mosia chuan, “Min kalpui ve zêl dâwn si loh phei chuan he hmun ata hi kan kal sawn lo mai ang." 
Exodus33:16 Kan zînga i tel ve zêl si loh chuan i mite leh ka chungah hian i lungawi a ni tih tu nge hria ang? I tel ve erawh chuan khawvêla mi tinin mi danglam bîk tak kan ni tih an hria ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:17 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ka hre chiang che a, mi tihlâwm hle avângin i ngen ang chuan ka ti ang e,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:18 Mosia chuan, “Khawngaih takin i hmêl chu min hmuhtîr ta che,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:19 Ani chuan, “I hnênah ka ṭhatzia ka tilang ang a, ka hming pawh i hriatah ka sawi ang, Lalpa ka nih hi. Ka duh apiang chungah ngil ka nei ang a, ka duh apiang chu ka khawngaih mai ang." 
Exodus33:20 Ka hmêl erawh chu i hmu thei lo vang; min hmu chu tu mah an nung thei lo a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:21 Lalpa chuan a sawi zêl a, “En teh, ka bulah hian din theihna lungpui a awm a, lo ding la," 
Exodus33:22 ropui taka ka lo kal hunah lungpui kehkârah hian ka dah ang chia, ka kal pelh hma che chu ka kutin ka hliah ang chia," 
Exodus33:23 ka liam dâwn hunah ka kut chu ka la sawn ang a, ka hnung lam chu i hmu thei ang, ka hmêl chu i hmu thei lo vang,” a ti a." 
Exodus34:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, ‘I tihkeh tâk lungphêk pahnih ang kha chher la, a hmaa ka thu ziak ang kha ka lo ziak leh ang e." 
Exodus34:2 Naktûk zîngah insiam la, Sinai tlângah rawn chhohpui la, ka hmaah rawn inlan rawh." 
Exodus34:3 Tu mah an lo kal ve tûr a ni lo; tlângah tu mah awm suh se, berâm rual leh bâwng rual pawh tlâng pangah tla suh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus34:4 Tichuan, a hmaa mi ang lungphêk pahnih Mosia chuan a chher a. Zîng takah a tho va, Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Sinai tlângah lungphêk chu a keng chho ta a." 
Exodus34:5 Chhûmah chuan Lalpa chu a lo chhuk a, a bulah a lo ding a, a hming Lalpa chu a ni tih a rawn puang ta a." 
Exodus34:6 Lalpa chu a hmaah a lo kal a, “Kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni, Pathian rinawm, khawngaih thei leh ngilnei, thinnel leh lainatna ngah," 
Exodus34:7 chhuan sâng thleng pawha khawngaih zui zêltu; khawlohna te, bawhchhiatna te, sualnate ngaidama, thiam loh changte erawh chu zuah lova, an pate khawlohna avânga an fate leh an tute, chhuan thum chhuan li thlêng pawha hrem ṭhîntu Pathian ka ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus34:8 Mosia chu rang zetin lei siin a kûn a, Lalpa chu chibai a bûk ta a." 
Exodus34:9 Heti hian a ti a, “Aw Lalpa, ka chungah i lâwm takzet a nih chuan Lalpa chu kan zîngah kal ve ngei teh se, hêng mite hi an luhlul hle na a, kan khawlohna leh kan sualna ngaidam la, i pual, i rochanah min nei ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus34:10 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Israel fate tân thu ka thlung e. Khawvêla tu hnam zîng maha la tih ngai loh an hmaah thil mak ka ti dâwn. In awmnaa mi zawng zawngin kei Lalpa hian thil ka tihtheihzia an hmu ang, thil mak elkhên ka tihsak dâwn che u a ni." 
Exodus34:11 “Vawiina ka thupêk che u hi zâwm tlat zêl ang che u; ngai teh u, in hmaah Amor mi te, Kanan mi te, Hit mi te, Periz mi te, Hiv mi te leh Jebus mi te ka ûm chhuak dâwn." 
Exodus34:12 Fîmkhur rawh u, in kalna tûr ram mite nên thu in thlung vaih ang e, in inâwk buai mai ang." 
Exodus34:13 An maichâm chu paih darh ula, an lung serh phunte chu vaw sawm ula, an pathiannu lim Aseri te chu kit vek ang che u." 
Exodus34:14 Pathian dang hmaah in kûn tûr a ni lo, Lalpa hi thîkthuchhia, Pathian thîkthuchhe tak a ni si a." 
Exodus34:15 Chu rama awmte nên thu in thlun hlauh chuan, an pathian chibai bûka an inthawina hmunah a sa ei tûrin an sâwm ang che u a, an pathian hnêna an thil hlan chu ei ve in châk mai dah ang e." 
Exodus34:16 In fate nupuiah an fanute in neihsak ang a, anni chuan ka hnên aṭangin an hruai bo ang a, an pathiante chu in fate chuan an be ve dah ang e." 
Exodus34:17 “I tân milem chhûn chawp pathian insiam suh. 
Exodus34:18 “Dawidim telh loh kût hmang ṭhîn rawh. Abib thla, ka hun ruatah, thu ka pêk che u angin ni sarih chhûng dawidim telh loh chhang in ei ṭhîn tûr a ni; Abib thla hi Aigupta ram in chhuahsan thla kha a ni." 
Exodus34:19 “Piang hmasa ber a pa tawh phawt chu ka ta a ni. I ran vulh, bâwng leh berâm no neih hmasak ber, a pa chu, min pe tûr a ni." 
Exodus34:20 Sabengtung no hrin hmasak ber, a pa chu, berâm novin i tlan tûr a ni; i tlan duh loh chuan a ring elh tliah tûr a ni. In fa tîr, mipa chu, in tlan zêl tûr a ni. Tu mah kut ruakin ka hnênah in lo kal tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus34:21 “Ni ruk chhûng hna in thawk ang a, a ni sarih ni chuan in thawk tûr a ni lo, leileh lai leh buh seng lai pawhin in châwl tho tûr a ni." 
Exodus34:22 “Huit seng tirhah Pentikos kût hmang ang che u, in theirahte in lawh fai vek hnu, favângah Bâwkte kût hmang ang che u." 
Exodus34:23 “ Lalpa Israel-te Pathian hmaah in zînga mipa zawng zawng chu kum khatah vawi thum an lo lang ziah tûr a ni. 
Exodus34:24 “In hmaa hnam dangte ka ûm chhuaha, in ramrite ka tihzauh hunah chuan in Pathian Lalpa chibai bûka ṭum thum in kal chhûng hian tu man in ram chu rawn lâk an tum lo vang." 
Exodus34:25 “Thilhlan in rawn hlanin dawidim telh chhang rawn hlân tel suh u. Kalhlên kût sa, a tûk atân a ṭhing pakhat mah dah suh u." 
Exodus34:26 “I lova thlai thar hmasa ber chu Lalpa, i Pathian inah han dah ang che. Kêl no chu a pui hnutein chhûm suh.”" 
Exodus34:27 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Hêng thu hi ziak chhuak rawh, hêng tlawhchhan hian a ni nang leh Israel-te hnêna thu ka thlun ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus34:28 Mosia chu ni sawmli leh zân sawmli eng mah ei lovin Lalpa bulah chuan a awm a, Lungphêkah chuan thuthlung, thupêk sâwm chu a ziak ta a." 
Exodus34:29 Thupêk sâwm ziakna lungphêk keng chuan Mosia chu Sinai tlâng aṭang chuan a lo chhuk a; a hmêl chu a êng sût a, Lalpa nên an inbiak avânga êng a ni, ani erawh chuan chu chu a hre lo." 
Exodus34:30 Arona leh Israel mipui chuan Mosia hmêl êng an hmuh chuan a bulah an kal hnai ngam ta lo va. 
Exodus34:31 Mosia chuan a au va, Arona leh Israel hotute chu an lo kîr a, Mosia chuan thu a lo hrilh a." 
Exodus34:32 Chumi hnu chuan Israel fate chu an vaiin Mosia bulah chuan an lo kal a, Sinai tlânga Lalpa thupêk zawng zawng chu a lo hrilh a." 
Exodus34:33 Mosian thu a sawi zawh chuan khuhnain a hmai chu a khuh a. 
Exodus34:34 Lalpa nêna inbe tûra Inbiakna bûka a kal apiangin, a lo chhuah leh hma chu, hmai khuhna chu a hlîp ṭhîn; a lo chhuahin Israel fate hnêna hrilh tûr thupêk chu a hrilh ṭhîn a." 
Exodus34:35 Israel faten Mosia hmêl an hmuhin a lo êng ta ṭhîn a, Pathian nêna inbe tûra a kal leh hma chu a inkhuh ṭhîn." 
Exodus35:1 Mosia chuan Israel fa pungkhâwmho chu a ko khâwm a, an hnênah, “Hêng hi in tih tûra Lalpa thupêk chu a ni." 
Exodus35:2 Ni ruk chhûng hna in thawk ang a, a ni sarih ni erawh chu in tân ni serh a ni ang a, Lalpa chawimawi nân urhsûn taka hman tûr a ni; hna thawk lui chu tihhlum tûr a ni." 
Exodus35:3 In awmna apiangah sabat ni chuan mei pawh in chhêm tûr a ni lo,” a ti a." 
Exodus35:4 Mosia chuan Israel fa pungkhâwmho hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Exodus35:5 Lalpa tân thilpêk han pe rawh u, mahni phal ang ang han pe rawh u; rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te," 
Exodus35:6 la dumpâwl te, la senduk te, la senlâr te, la zai sîn te, kêl hmul te," 
Exodus35:7 berâm vun tihsen te, savun ṭha chi te, sitim thing te," 
Exodus35:8 khâwnvâra chhit tûr oliv hriak te, thih tûr hriak te, hâl tûr thil rimtui te," 
Exodus35:9 soham lung te leh âwmbela dah tûr lungmantam te rawn dah khâwm rawh u. 
Exodus35:10 “In zînga mi themthiam rual lo thawk sela, Lalpa sawi angin hêng zawng zawng hi rawn siam rawh se." 
Exodus35:11 Biakbûk, a chung khuhna leh a thuahna te, a inbahna te, a bang tun te, a kaihna te, a ban te, a bulṭhut te," 
Exodus35:12 Thuthlung Bâwm leh a zâwnfung te, bâwm chhîn leh a zâr hliahna tûr puan te," 
Exodus35:13 dawhkân leh a zâwnfung te, a hmanrua zawng zawng leh chhang serh te," 
Exodus35:14 khâwnvâr bâwr chhit ên tûr leh a bungrua te, a chhitna tûr lu bâwk leh a tui tûr hriak te," 
Exodus35:15 rimtui hâlna dawhkân leh a zâwnfung te; hriak thih tûr te, hâl tûr thil rimtui te, Biakbûk luhna kawngka puanzâr tûr te;" 
Exodus35:16 thilhlan hâlna tûr maichâm, a sîra dâr tlâwn nên, zâwnfung leh a bungrua zawng zawng te, dâr chawhtawlh leh a hûnna te," 
Exodus35:17 a hungna puanzâr tûr, a ban leh a bulṭhut te, a tual kawngka luhnaa zâr tûr puan te," 
Exodus35:18 Biakbûk khen nghehna leh hungna pal khen nghehna leh a pawhna hrui te; 
Exodus35:19 Hmun Thianghlima rawngbâwltute hâk tûr thawmhnaw zeh mawi te, puithiam Arona kawr serh te, puithiam hna an thawha Arona fate hâk tûr kawr te siam rawh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus35:20 Israel fa pungkhâwmho chu an ṭîn darh a," 
Exodus35:21 Biakbûk sakna tûr, a chung khuhna tûr te leh thawmhnaw thianghlim tûr te chu mahni phal ang ang Lalpa hnênah chuan an rawn hlân a." 
Exodus35:22 Pêk châkna nei chu a hmei a pain an lo kal a, hnâr vuah te, bengbeh te, pinmawi te, ṭhi te, rangkachaka siamte chu rangkachak tlangte nên Lalpa tân an rawn pe a." 
Exodus35:23 La dumpâwl te, la senduk te, la senlâr te, la zai sîn te; kêl hmul te, berâm vun tihsen te, savun ṭha chi neite chuan an rawn pe bawk a." 
Exodus35:24 Tangkaruate pawh a pe thei chuan Lalpa chu an rawn pe a; Biakbûka hman tûr sitim thing nei chuan an rawn dah bawk a. 
Exodus35:25 Nu themthiam tak takte chuan la zai sîn te, la dumpâwl te, la senduk te, la senlâr te an kai a, an rawn pe a." 
Exodus35:26 Nu themthiam bîkten kêl hmul an thlûr chu an rawn pe bawk a. 
Exodus35:27 An hotute chuan soham lung leh lungmantam dang, efod-a dah tûr leh âwmbela târ tûr an rawn keng a." 
Exodus35:28 Thil rimtui leh hriak, chhit atân te, thih atân te, hâl atân te an rawn thawh bawk a." 
Exodus35:29 Mosia hnêna Lalpan siam tûra a tih siam nân Israel zînga mi, a hmei a pa, a duh apiangin thilpêk an rawn hlân bawk a." 
Exodus35:30 Mosian Israel fate hnênah, “Juda hnam zînga mi, Hura tupa Bezalela, Uria fapa chu Lalpa chuan a thlang ta." 
Exodus35:31 Finna te, hriatna te, hmangchâng hriatna te, engkim siam tûra kut themthiamna nei tûrin Pathian Thlarauvin a pe a ni." 
Exodus35:32 Rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr tea thil mawi tinrêng ruahmana siam thiamna te," 
Exodus35:33 phûm atân lungmantam zai mawi te, thing ker mawite leh thil chi tinrêng siam thiamna te a pe a ni." 
Exodus35:34 Dana thlaha mi, Ahisamaka fapa Oholiaba nên, an pahnihin, mi dang hnêna thil siam zirtîr thiamna pawh Lalpa chuan a pe bawk a ni." 
Exodus35:35 Thil ker thiam te, thil mawi hria ten puan zai sîn, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr tea puan tah thiamte anga engkim tih thiamna a pe a ni. Engkim an siam thiam a, a rel vêl pawh thiam tak an ni." 
Exodus36:1 “Bezalela te, Oholiaba te leh mi themthiam rual, Lalpa chênna Biakbûk atâna thil ṭûl zawng zawng siam dân thiamna leh finna Lalpa pêkte chuan Lalpa thupêk ang chuan engkim an siam tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus36:2 Mosia chuan Bezalela leh Oholiaba chu, thawk ve châk themthiam rual, Lalpa thilpêk hmang hriatna dawngte nên a ko khâwm a." 
Exodus36:3 Hmun Thianghlima rawngbâwl nâna Israel fate thilpêk an rawn dah chu Mosia hnên aṭangin an la a, an siam ta zêl a. Tûk tin, Mosia hnênah, phal takin thilpêk an rawn keng zêl bawk a." 
Exodus36:4 Hmun Thianghlima thil hman tûr siamin tûk tin an thawk bawk a. 
Exodus36:5 Mosia hnênah chuan, “Hmun Thianghlima rawngbâwl nâna Lalpan siam tûr a tih siamna atâna mamawh aia tam daih miten an rawn pe tawh a ni,” an ti a." 
Exodus36:6 Mosian thu a pe a, riahhmunah chuan an tlângau va, “Mipa pawhin, hmeichhia pawhin, Hmun Thianghlim atân tu man thilpêk rawn pe tawh suh se,” tiin. Tichuan, Lalpa hnêna thilpêk rawn pe zêl lo tûrin mipui chu an khap ta a." 
Exodus36:7 An pêk sa chuan an siam tûr chu a daih zân tawh a ni, hman sên rual a ni tawh lo." 
Exodus36:8 Themthiam rual zînga a thiam thiam chuan Biakbûk chu an siam ta a; chung zâr tûr puan sâwm, la zai sîn thlûr, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr te an tah a, cherub lemte mawi takin an zep a." 
Exodus36:9 Puan pakhat chu tawng sawmhnih leh pariata sei, tawng li-a hlai intiat vek a ni." 
Exodus36:10 Puan panga chu an ṭhui zawm a, a dang panga pawh chu a hranin an ṭhui zawm a." 
Exodus36:11 Panga ṭhui khâwm sîr ber tlângah chuan a beng atân la dumpâwl kual an vuah a; panga ṭhui khâwm dang tlângah pawh beng chu an vuah bawk a. 
Exodus36:12 Beng sawmnga ve ve an vuah a, a bengte chu a inzâwn thliah a ni." 
Exodus36:13 Rangkachakin thil kawm an siam a, thil kawm chuan puan ṭhui khâwm pahnih chu an bah zawm a, a in chung chu phêk khat a ni ta a." 
Exodus36:14 Biakbûk chung thuahna tûr kêl hmul pawh sâwm leh pakhat an tah bawk a. 
Exodus36:15 Puan pakhat chu tawng sawmthuma sei, tawng li-a hlai a ni; puan chu a vaiin a intiat vek a." 
Exodus36:16 Panga chu an ṭhui khâwm a; a dang paruk pawh chu a hrangin an ṭhui zawm a. 
Exodus36:17 Puan panga ṭhui khâwm sîr ber tlângah chuan beng sawmnga an siam a; paruk ṭhui khâwm tlângah pawh beng sawmnga an siam bawk a. 
Exodus36:18 Dârin thil kawm sawmnga an siam a; chu chuan kêl hmul puan ṭhui khâwm pahnih chu phêk khatah an bah zawm a. 
Exodus36:19 Biakbûk chung thuah nawn lehna tûr berâm vun tihsen leh savun ṭha chi chu an siam bawk a. 
Exodus36:20 A bang thuahna tûr sitim thing an rem khâwm bawk a. 
Exodus36:21 An thil rem phêk khat chu tawng sâwma sâng, tawng khat leh a chanvea hlai a ni." 
Exodus36:22 A phêk tlâng kâwmna pahnih chu a hmâwr a zuih a, chu chu a bulṭhuta a inphunna tûr a ni; chutiang hmâwr zuih chu an neihtîr vek a ni." 
Exodus36:23 Biakbûk chhim lam bang thuahna tûrin chutiang phêk sawmhnih chu an siam a. 
Exodus36:24 A bulṭhut tûr tangkaraw tlang ker khuar sawmli an chhûng a, thing rem khâwm pakhat chu bulṭhut pahnihah a inphun a ni." 
Exodus36:25 Biakbûk hmâr lam bang thuahna tûrin phêk sawmhnih an siam bawk a," 
Exodus36:26 bulṭhut tangkaraw tlang ker sawmli an chhûng bawk; phêk khat chu bulṭhut pahnihah a inphun zêl a ni. 
Exodus36:27 Biakbûk kawmchâr, khawthlang lamah bang thuahna tûr phêk ruk an rem bawk a." 
Exodus36:28 A kila ṭang tûr phêk hnih an siam bawk. 
Exodus36:29 A kila ṭang tûra siamte chu a bul aṭanga a lêr thlengin an kilh zawm a. 
Exodus36:30 Tichuan, kawmchâr bang thuahna tûr chu phêk riat a ni a, a bulṭhut tûr tangkaraw tlang sâwm leh paruk kerah chuan a sîr zuihte kha a inphun thliah a ni, phêk khat chuan bulṭhut pahnih a nei zêl a ni." 
Exodus36:31 A bangrel tûr sitim thing tlâwn panga zêl, hmâr lamah te, kawmchâr lamah te chuan an dah a," 
Exodus36:32  
Exodus36:33 a bangrel laita ber chu biakbûk bang tluan chuan an inzawmtîr a ni. 
Exodus36:34 A bang thuahna thing rem khâwmte chu rangkachak tuiin an luan a, a bangrel rawlhna tûr rangkachak beng te an siam bawk a, a bangrel pawh rangkachaka luan a ni." 
Exodus36:35 La dumpâwl te, la senduk te, la senlâr te, la zai sîn thlûrte chu inchawih mawi takin an tah a, cherub lem mawi tak tak an zep bawk a; chu chu pindan zârah an hmang a." 
Exodus36:36 Sitim thing ban pali, rangkachaka luan, a inphunna tûr tangkaraw tlang pali nên an siam bawk a." 
Exodus36:37 Biakbûk luhnaa zâr tûr la dumpâwl te, la senduk te, la senlâr te leh la zai sîn thlûr te, inchawih mawi takin an tah a," 
Exodus36:38 a zârna tûr Sitim thing ban panga, thil bahna tûr kâwm nei ṭheuh an siam a, a chhîp chu rangkachakin an tuam a, a puan zârna tûr rangkachak tlâwn an vuah bawk a, a bulṭhut tûr dâr tlang panga an siam bawk a." 
Exodus37:1 Bezalela chuan Thuthlung Bâwm chu a dung tawng hnih leh a chanve, a vâng tawng khat leh a chanve, a sân lam tawng khat leh a chanve Sitim thingin a siam a." 
Exodus37:2 A chhûng lam leh pâwn lam chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin a luan chhuak ve ve a, a kotlângte chu rangkachak phêkin a kâwm a." 
Exodus37:3 A zâwnfung rawlhna tûr rangkachak beng pali a chhûng bawk, bâwm sîr lehlam lehlamah chuan pahnih ve vein a vuah a." 
Exodus37:4 A zâwnfung tûr Sitim thing tlâwnte chu rangkachaka luan bawk a ni. 
Exodus37:5 A zâwnfungte chu a sîr lehlam lehlama bengah te chuan a vuah a," 
Exodus37:6 bâwm chhîn tûr, rangkachak hlîr hlakin tawng hnih leh a chanvea sei, tawng khat leh a chanvea hlai a siam a." 
Exodus37:7 A chhîn dung lam hmâwr ve ve-ah chuan rangkachaka siam cherub lem a chhera chher a dintîr a, a chhîn nên chuan a inzawm a, sakhat a ni." 
Exodus37:8  
Exodus37:9 Cherub-te chuan thla an zâr a, Thuthlung Bâwm chhîn chu an thla chuan a khuh a; inhmatawnin an ding a, a chhîn chu an bih a." 
Exodus37:10 Sitim thing dawhkân, a dung tawng hnih, a vâng tawng khat, tawng khat leh a chanvea sâng a siam bawk a." 
Exodus37:11 Rangkachak hlîr hlakin a luan a, a kotlâng chu a vêlin rangkachakin a kâwm a." 
Exodus37:12 A tlâng khuahna, rangkachak phêk kutphah bawk, a tlângah lallukhum ang a tlarin a bel chhuak a." 
Exodus37:13 A zâwnfung rawlhna tûr rangkachak beng pali a chhûng a," 
Exodus37:14 dawhkân tlâng tuamna bulah chuan a vuah a. 
Exodus37:15 A zâwnfung tûr, Sitim thing tlâwn a siam a, rangkachakin a luan a." 
Exodus37:16 Thlêng te, bêl te, uain thâwl te, uain bunna tûr no te, rangkachak hlangin a siam bawk a." 
Exodus37:17 Rangkachak hlîr hlakin khâwnvâr dahna zâr sarih nei a chher a, a bulṭhut leh a kûngpui chu rangkachak tlanga chher a ni; a lu bâwk te, a pangpâr kuhmûm lem te, a pâr parh lem te nên chuan an inzawm vek a ni." 
Exodus37:18 Zâr paruk, a kûngpui aṭanga pêng, a sîr lehlam lehlamah pathum ve ve a awm a," 
Exodus37:19 a zâr hmâwr chhîp, a lu chu, theite pâr ang a ni; a sîra kuangah chuan a kuhmûm leh pâr parh lem pathum a awm ṭheuh va." 
Exodus37:20 A kûng zidingah chuan a lu bâwk a awm a, kuhmûm leh pâr parh pali lem a awm bawk." 
Exodus37:21 A zâr chungnung leh hnuai zâwk inkâr, a kûngpuiah chuan kuhmûm lem a awm zêl a." 
Exodus37:22 Hêng kuhmûm te, a lu bâwk te, a zârte hi a inzawm vek a, sakhat a ni. Rangkachak hlîr hlak tlang khat aṭanga chher a ni." 
Exodus37:23 A khâwnvâr bûr, a lu bâwk pasarih te, chaicheh te, meivâp dahna te, rangkachak hlîr hlakin a siam a." 
Exodus37:24 A khâwnvâr bâwr leh a hmanrua zawng zawng siam nân rangkachak kg. sawmnga vêl an hmang a ni. 
Exodus37:25 Sitim thing dawhkân kil li nei, tawng khat bial, tawng hniha sâng a siam bawk a, a kila kite nên chuan a inzawm vek a ni." 
Exodus37:26 Rangkachak hlangin dawhkân leh a ki chu a luan a, a tlâng chu rangkachakin a tuam a." 
Exodus37:27 A zâwnfung rawlhna tûr rangkachak beng a chher a, a tlâng kâwmna bul, a sîr tuakah pahnih ve ve a vuah a," 
Exodus37:28 A zâwnfung tûr sitim thing tlâwn a siam a, rangkachakin a luan a." 
Exodus37:29 Hriak thianghlim thih tûr te, rimtui hâl tûr, tel rimtui anga chawhpawlh te a siam bawk a." 
Exodus38:1 Thilhlan hâlna tûr maichâm, Sitim thingin a siam bawk a; kil li nei, tawng nga bial, tawng thuma sâng a ni." 
Exodus38:2 A kilah ki lawr chho a siam ṭheuh a, maichâm nên chuan an inzawm tlat vek a ni; dârin maichâm leh a ki chu a tuam a." 
Exodus38:3 maichâma hman tûr vut bâwm te, vutlawh te, maihûn te, thîrkut kawm te, meilawh te dârin a siam a." 
Exodus38:4 Dâr tlâwn ram a tlângah chuan a bel kual a, a maichâm zâtve dâwn lai a awh a." 
Exodus38:5 Zâwnfung rawlhna tûr beng pali a chhûng a, kil tinah a dah thliah a." 
Exodus38:6 A zâwnfung tûr Sitim thing tlâwn a siam a, dârin a tuam a." 
Exodus38:7 Maichâm bang sir tuaka bengah chuan zâwnfungte chu a rawlh a. Maichâm chhûng chu a kawrawng, a bang chu thingphel a ni." 
Exodus38:8 Inbiakna bûk kawngka bula rawngbâwl ṭhîn nuhovin dârthlalanga an hman ṭhin dâr tle mi aṭangin dâr chawhtawlh leh a hûnna chu a siam a. 
Exodus38:9 La zai sîna tah puanin Biakbûk chu a hung a. 
Exodus38:10 Biakbûk chhim lam hung nân tawng zaa sei puan a hmang a, Ban sawmhnih leh a bulṭhut dâr tlang sawmhnih, thil bahna tûr kawm te, a zâr nâna tangkaraw tlâwn te a siam a." 
Exodus38:11 Biakbûk hmâr lamah pawh puan tawng zaa sei, ban sawmhnih, a bulṭhut dâr tlang sawmhnih leh thil inbahna tûr kawm leh tangkaraw tlâwn a siam bawk a." 
Exodus38:12 Biakbûk kawmchâr khawthlang lamah chuan puan tawng sawmngaa sei a zâr a, ban sâwm leh a bulṭhut dâr tlang sâwm a siam a, a bana thil kawm leh puan bahna thil tlâwn chu tangkaruaa siam a ni." 
Exodus38:13 Khawchhak lam pawh tawng sawmngaa zau a ni. 
Exodus38:14 Kawngka zau lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a sîr tawna zârah puan tawng sâwm leh panga ve ve a hmang a, ban pathum leh a bulṭhut pathum ve ve awmin a siam bawk a." 
Exodus38:15  
Exodus38:16 A hungna puanzâr chu la zai sîn thlûra tah vek a ni. 
Exodus38:17 A ban bulṭhut chu dâr a ni a, a kâwm te, a ngul te, a ban chhîp tuamna te chu tangkarua vek a ni." 
Exodus38:18 A hungna ban zawng zawng chu tangkaraw tlâwna vuak zawm vek a ni. A kawngka luhnaa puanzâr chu la zai sîn thlûr, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr te inchawih mawi taka tah a ni." 
Exodus38:19 A puanzâr chu tawng sawmhniha sei, tawng ngaa sâng, Biakbûk hungna puanzâr dang ang bawk a ni. Ban pali leh a bulṭhut dâr tlang pali te, a bahna kawm te, a ban lu bâwk te, a vuak zawmna tangkaraw tlâwn te chu tangkarua vek a ni." 
Exodus38:20 Biakbûk leh a hungna kilh khâwmna chu dâr vek a ni. 
Exodus38:21 Thupêk Sâwm ziakna lungphêk an dahna Biakbûk chu a sak nân hetiang hi an hmang. Mosia thupêkin puithiam Arona fapa Ithamara hovin Levia chiten a zât hi an chhût chhuak a ni. 
Exodus38:22 Juda hnama mi, Hura tupa Bezalela, Uria fapa chuan Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang zawng zawng chu a siam a." 
Exodus38:23 A thawhpui, Dan hnam, Ahisamaka fapa Oholiaba chu thil ker thiam, thil mawi hria, la zai sîn, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr tea tah pawlh dân hmang hre tak a ni a." 
Exodus38:24 Biakbûk thianghlim sak nâna Lalpa hmaa rangkachak an rawn dah chu chutih hun laia khawtlâng hman bûklung dik taka bûkin kg. sângkhat a ni. 
Exodus38:25 Chhiarpui an neiha mi tin thawh zât tûr an tuk anga tangkarua an rawn thawh chu khawtlâng hman lai bûklung dik taka bûkin kg. sângthum leh zali leh sawmthum a tling. 
Exodus38:26 Hei hi kum sawmhnih tling chin chhiarpuia chhiar tel mi nuairuk leh sângthum leh zanga leh sawmngaten sekel chanve an rawn pêk tluk kha a ni. 
Exodus38:27 Pindan puanzâr ban leh bang thuahna bulṭhut chu pakhat pawh tangkarua kg. sawmthum leh pali-a rit zêl a ni a, a vaiin kg. sângthum leh zali an hmang a ni." 
Exodus38:28 An hman bang tangkarua kg. sawmthum chuan Bezalelan puan zârna tlâwn te, a kawm te, a ban lu tuamna te a siam a." 
Exodus38:29 Lalpa tâna dâr an pêk chu kg. sânghnih leh zali leh sawmhnih leh panga a tling a. 
Exodus38:30 Hei hian Biakbûk hungna ban bul te, maichâma bel te, dâr tlâwn ram te, a bungbêl te, a luhna ban bul te," 
Exodus38:31 Biakbûk leh a hungna khen nghehna zawng zawng a siam a. 
Exodus39:1 Hmun Thianghlima rawng an bâwl huna puithiamho hâk tûr mawi tak leh Arona puithiam kawr serh chu Lalpa thupêk ang chuan la dumpâwl te, a senduk te leh a senlâr tein an siam a." 
Exodus39:2 Efod chu la zai sîn, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr te leh rangkachak zai tein an tah a." 
Exodus39:3 Rangkachak chu pan takin an chhu pêr a, la zai sîn te, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr te nêna zeh tûrin an zai thlêr seng a." 
Exodus39:4 Dârbak pahnih an siam a, efod kilah chuan a hmâwr an ṭhui belhbâwm a, chu chuan a man bet a ni." 
Exodus39:5 Kâwnga efod hrên behna tûr, efod ang chiah an tah a, Mosia hnênah Lalpa thupêk ang khân efod nên an tah zawm a." 
Exodus39:6 Soham lungmantam chu rangkachakah an phûm a, Jakoba fa sâwm leh pahnih hming chu mawi takin an ker a." 
Exodus39:7 Lalpa thupêk ang ngei khân efod dârbakah chuan an vuah a, chu chu Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnih entîrna a ni." 
Exodus39:8 Efod siam nâna an thil hman, la zai sîn thlûr te, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr te leh rangkachak zaite hmangin âwmbel pawh chu inchawih mawi takin an tah bawk a." 
Exodus39:9 An thlep a, thleh hnu chuan kil li nei, khâp khat bial a ni." 
Exodus39:10 Lungmantam tlar li an vuah a, tlar khatnaah chuan Odam te, Pitda te, Bareket lung te an dah a;" 
Exodus39:11 tlar hnihnaah chuan Nopek te, Safir te, Jahalom lung te an dah a." 
Exodus39:12 Tlar thumnaah chuan Lesem te, Sebo te, Aklama lung te an dah a;" 
Exodus39:13 tlar linaah chuan Tarsis te, Soham te, Jaspi lung te an dah a, lungmantam hi rangkachaka phûm tlar ṭhet a ni." 
Exodus39:14 Lung pakhatah Israel hnam pakhat hming a chuang zêl a, Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnih aiawh atân tih a ni." 
Exodus39:15 Âwmbel phuar behna tûr rangkachak hlîr hlak khaidiat herh a siam bawk a. 
Exodus39:16 Lungmantam phûmna rangkachak pahnih leh rangkachak beng pahnih an siam chu âwmbel kil chung lamah an vuah ve ve a. 
Exodus39:17 Rangkachak khaidiat herh chu a bengah chuan an thlung a; 
Exodus39:18 a hmâwr lehlam chu lungmantam phûmna rangkachak pahnih nên an zawm a; tichuan, âwmbel thlunna chu efod dârbak hma lamah a inthlung a ni." 
Exodus39:19 Rangkachak beng dang pahnih an siam a, âwmbel kil hnuai lam, a chhûng lamah, Efod depah an vuah a." 
Exodus39:20 Rangkachak beng dang pahnih a siam a, efod dârbak bul lam inbelna laia kâwnghrên chungah a vuah a." 
Exodus39:21 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin âwmbela rangkachak beng leh efod rangkachak beng chu la dumpâwlin an suih belhbâwm a; tichuan, a kâwnghrên chungah âwmbel chu a bei tlat a ni." 
Exodus39:22 Efod hnuaia kawrfual chu la dumpâwl hlîra tah a ni. 
Exodus39:23 Lu rawlhna tûr a laiah an rek a, a reh tlang chu a ṭeh loh nân puan themin an chep a." 
Exodus39:24 A kawrfual tlângah chuan la zai sîn te, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr tea siam theibuhfai lem an khai a," 
Exodus39:25 rangkachak tengeng nên inthlâk chiatin an khai a ni. 
Exodus39:26 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin rawngbâwlnaa hâk atân an siam a. 
Exodus39:27 Arona leh a fate tân kawrhnuai te," 
Exodus39:28 diar te, lukhum te, kekawr tûrte la zai sînin an tah a." 
Exodus39:29 La zai sîn thlûr te, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te, a senlâr te inchawih mawi takin kâwnghrên tûr an tah bawk, Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang khân." 
Exodus39:30 Rangkachak hlang hlakin lu hrên an siam bawk a; chutah chuan, “ Lalpa Pual” tih an ziak a." 
Exodus39:31 Diar hma lamah chuan la dumpâwl hrualin Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang chuan an thlung bet a. 
Exodus39:32 Biakbûk leh thil dangte chu an siam zo ta a. Israel fate chuan Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang zawng zawng kha an ti vek a. 
Exodus39:33 Mosia hnênah Biakbûk siamna tûr siam sa chu an rawn la a; thil kawm te, thingphel rem te, a ban te, a chehna te, a bulṭhut te," 
Exodus39:34 a chung khuhna berâm vun tihsen te, savun ṭha chi te, puan zâr tûr te," 
Exodus39:35 Thuthlung Bâwm leh a chhûnga lungphêk te, a zâwnfungte leh a chhîn te," 
Exodus39:36 dawhkân leh a bungrua zawng zawng leh Pathian tâna chhang serh te," 
Exodus39:37 khâwnvâr bâwr, rangkachak hlîr hlaka siam, a chhitna leh a bungraw dang te, a chhit tûr hriak te;" 
Exodus39:38 rangkachak maichâm te, thih tûr hriak te, rimtui hâl tûr te, Biakbûk luhna kawngkaa puanzâr tûr te;" 
Exodus39:39 dâra tuam maichâm leh a hûnna te; 
Exodus39:40 a hungnaa zâr tûr puan te, bante leh a bulṭhut tûr te, a hung chhûng luhna kawngkaa puanzâr leh a thlunna hrui te; Biakbûk khennghehna leh Biakbûk thuam nâna thil ṭûl zawng zawng te;" 
Exodus39:41 Hmun Thianghlima puithiamho hâk tûr thawmhnaw mawi tak tak te, puithiam Arona leh a fate kawr serh te chu an rawn la a." 
Exodus39:42 Israel fate chuan Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang chiah khân engkim an ti a. 
Exodus39:43 Mosia chuan ngun takin a lo en vek a, Lalpa thupêk ang chiahin an siam tih a hmuh chuan malsâwm tûrin Pathian hnênah a hlân a." 
Exodus40:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus40:2 “Thla hmasa ber, ni khatah Lalpa chênna tûr Biakbûk hi din ang che u." 
Exodus40:3 Thuthlung Bâwm, thupêk sâwm ziak awmna lungphêk chu a chhûngah dah ula, a pindan chu puan zâr hnan rawh u." 
Exodus40:4 Dawhkân chu la lût ula, a bungruate chu a chungah dah ula; khâwnvâr bâwr pawh la lût ula, a dahna tûrah dah rawh u." 
Exodus40:5 Rangkachak maichâm, rimtui hâlna tûr chu, Thuthlung Bâwm hmaah dah ula, Biakbûk luhna kawngkaa puan chu zâr rawh u." 
Exodus40:6 Hâlral hlanna maichâm chu Biakbûk kawtah dah ula," 
Exodus40:7 maichâm leh Biakbûk inkârah dâr chawhtawlh chu hûng ula, tui dah bawk ang che u." 
Exodus40:8 A tual chu hung ula, a luhna kawngka puanzâr pawh zâr rawh u." 
Exodus40:9 Biakbûk leh a chhûnga bungrua zawng zawng chu hriak thianghlim chulh la; tichuan, an lo thianghlim ve tawh ang a." 
Exodus40:10 Maichâm leh a bungbêlah te hriak thianghlim chu chulh bawk la, an lo thianghlim vek tawh ang." 
Exodus40:11 Insilna dâr chawhtawlh leh a hûnna pawh hriak thianghlim chu hnawihin thian thianghlim ang che. 
Exodus40:12 Arona leh a fate chu Biakbûk hung chhûngah ko lût la, dân angin insil rawh se." 
Exodus40:13 Arona chu puithiam thawmhnaw bel la, hriak thih la, puithiam hna thawk tûrin serh hrang rawh." 
Exodus40:14 A fate pawh ko lût la, kawrfual chu hâktîr ang che." 
Exodus40:15 An pa hriak i thih ang khân anni pawh puithiam hna thawk tûrin hriak thih ang che; hriak thih an nih hnu chuan puithiam an ni kumkhua tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus40:16 Lalpa thupêk ang chiah chuan Mosia chuan a ti a. 
Exodus40:17 Aigupta an chhuahsan kum hnihna, thla hmasa ber ni khat ni chuan Biakbûk chu a sa fel a." 
Exodus40:18 Mosia chuan a bulṭhutte chu a hûng a, a bangte chu a tung a, a bangrelte a vuah a, a bante a phun a." 
Exodus40:19 Biakbûk chung puan pawh a zâr a, a thuahnate pawh a kaih a. Lalpa thupêk ang khân a ti a." 
Exodus40:20 Lungphêk pahnih chu Thuthlung Bâwmah a khung a, a zâwnfungte chu a rawlh a, a chhinna chuan a chhîn a." 
Exodus40:21 Biakbûk chhûngah Thuthlung Bâwm chu a dah a, pindan puan chu a zâr hnan a, Lalpa thupêk ang zêl chuan a ti a." 
Exodus40:22 Biakbûk chhûng, pindan pâwn zâwk hmâr lamah chuan dawhkân chu a hûng a," 
Exodus40:23 Lalpa thupêk angin a chungah chhang serh chu a dah a. 
Exodus40:24 Chhim lamah khâwnvâr bâwr chu dawhkân epah a hûng bawk a. 
Exodus40:25 Lalpa hmaah chuan a thupêk angin khâwnvâr chu a chhi a. 
Exodus40:26 Rangkachak maichâm chu pindan puanzâr bulah chuan a hûng a. 
Exodus40:27 Lalpa thupêk angin thil rimtuite chu a hâl a. 
Exodus40:28 Biakbûk luhna kawngka puanzâr chu a zâr a. 
Exodus40:29 Puanzâr pâwn, Biakbûk tualah chuan, hâlral hlanna maichâm chu a hûng a; chutah chuan hâlral thilhlan leh buhbâl thilhlante chu a hlân a." 
Exodus40:30 Dâr chawhtawlh leh a hûnna chu Biakbûk leh maichâm inkârah chuan a dah a, tui a chhûng khat a." 
Exodus40:31 Chutah chuan Mosia te, Arona te leh a fate chuan an kut leh ke an sil a." 
Exodus40:32 Biakbûk chhûngah emaw, maichâmah emaw an kal dâwn apiangin Lalpa thupêk angin an insil ṭhîn a ni." 
Exodus40:33 Mosia chuan Biakbûk leh maichâm chu a hung kual a, a hung chhûng luhna kawngka puanzâr pawh chu a zâr bawk a. Tih tûr zawng zawng chu a ti zo ta a." 
Exodus40:34 Inbiakna bûk chu chhûm chuan a chîm a, Biakbûk chhûng chu Lalpa ropuinain a khat ta a." 
Exodus40:35 Chuvâng chuan, bûk chhûngah Mosia chu a lût thei lo, Lalpa ropuinain a khat tlat a ni." 
Exodus40:36 Chhûmin Biakbûk chu a kiansan veleh Israel-te chuan an bûk an sawn ṭhîn. 
Exodus40:37 Chhûmin a chîm chhûng chu an insawn lo. 
Exodus40:38 Thlalêra an vah chhûng zawng khân Israel-te mit hmuhah Lalpa chhûm chuan chhûnah bûk chu a chîm a, zânah zânkhuain meialh a ni thung a." 
Leviticus1:1 Inbiakna bûk aṭangin Mosia chu Lalpa chuan a ko va. 
Leviticus1:2 “Israel fate hnênah heti hian ti rawh: ‘ Lalpa hnêna thilhlan in rawn kenin in ran vulh, bâwng zînga mi emaw, berâm leh kêl zînga mi emaw in rawn la ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:3 Thilhlan chu hâlral thilhlan tûr a nih chuan ranrual zînga a pa, hmêlhem lo a ni ang a, Lalpa lo pawm atân Inbiakna bûk kawtah a hlântu chuan a rawn la tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:4 Hâl ral tûr ran lu-ah a kut a nghat ang a, a sual thawina atân pawm a ni ang." 
Leviticus1:5 Bâwngpa chu Lalpa hmaah a talh ang a, Arona fa, puithiamte chuan a thisen chu an hlân ang a, Inbiakna bûk luhna bula maichâm chu an theh kual chhuak tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:6 A vun chu a lip ang a, a sa chu a chan sawm ang a." 
Leviticus1:7 Arona fa puithiamte chuan maichâmah thing an lo dah ang a, mei an chhêm ang." 
Leviticus1:8 A sa chu a thau leh a lu nên puithiam chuan meiah chuan an rawh ang. 
Leviticus1:9 A kawchhûng leh a bawpte chu sil fai tûr a ni a, a hlântu puithiam khân maichâmah a vaiin a hâl ral tûr a ni. Hei hi hâlral thilhlan tih dân tûr chu a ni; chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak a ni." 
Leviticus1:10 ‘Berâm emaw, kêl emaw hâl rala a hlan dâwn chuan a pa, hmêlhem lo a ni ngei tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:11 Lalpa hmaah, maichâm hmâr lamah chuan a talh ang a, a thisen chu puithiamin maichâm a theh kual chhuak ang." 
Leviticus1:12 A sa chu a chan darh ang a, maichâm chunga thing alh hluah hluahah chuan puithiamin a lu leh a thau nên a rawh ang." 
Leviticus1:13 A kawchhûng leh a bawpte erawh chu sil fai phawt tûr a ni; a vai chuan puithiam chuan a hâl ral vek tûr a ni, hâlral thilhlan a ni a, Lalpa lâwmzâwng a ni." 
Leviticus1:14 ‘ Lalpa hnêna thilhlan tûr chu sava hâlral thilhlan a nih chuan ṭhuro emaw, pârva emaw rawn keng sela," 
Leviticus1:15 puithiam chuan a lo la ang a, maichâmah a hlân tûr a ni; a ring a ṭhuai chhum ang a, a thisen chu maichâm sîrah a far kangtîr ang a, a hâl ral tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:16 A chawkchaweng leh a chaw pai chu maichâm khawchhak lama vut dahnaah paih tûr a ni. 
Leviticus1:17 Pawt thla lovin a thla ki-ah keu phel tûr a ni, maichâmah hâl ral vek rawh se, hâlral thilhlan a ni a, Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak a ni." 
Leviticus2:1 ‘ Lalpa hnêna Buhbâl thilhlan pe chuan chhangphut ṭha chi han la sela, oliv hriak leh beraw telh rawh se." 
Leviticus2:2 Puithiam chuan chhangphut chu a ṭhâm ang a, hriak tlêm leh beraw zawng zawng nên chuan maichâmah a hâl ral tûr a ni, chu chu a vaia hâl ral a ni tih entîrna a ni; hâlral thilhlan a ni a, Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak a ni." 
Leviticus2:3 Thilhlana hâl bâng chu puithiam chanpual tûr a ni a, Lalpa hnêna hlan tawh, serh hran tlat a ni." 
Leviticus2:4 ‘Buhbâl thilhlanah thuka hem hmin a rawn ken chuan dawidim telh loh chhang a ni tûr a ni, hriak nêna hmeh a nih loh pawhin pan taka nuai, hriak chulh ni rawh se." 
Leviticus2:5 ‘Thîr thlêng kuma kan, buhbâl thilhlan chu chhangphut ṭha chi, dawidim telh loh, hriak nêna hmeh a ni tûr a ni." 
Leviticus2:6 Hlan dâwnah tihsawma hriaka tâl tûr a ni. 
Leviticus2:7 ‘Buhbâl thilhlan chu, chhangphut ṭha chi, thîrbêla hriaka kan a ni tûr a ni." 
Leviticus2:8 Chutiang thil chu Lalpa hnêna i hlan dâwn chuan puithiam pe la, ani chuan maichâmah a keng ang a," 
Leviticus2:9 a ṭhen a sâwk thla ang a, a sawh thlâk chu a hâl ral tûr a ni; chu chu a vaia hâl ral entîrna a ni ang. Hei hi hâlral thilhlan a ni a, Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak a ni." 
Leviticus2:10 Hlan bâng la awm chu, puithiamte ta tûr a ni, Lalpa hnêna hlan a ni tawh a, serh hran tlat a ni." 
Leviticus2:11 ‘Buhbâl thilhlan, Lalpa hnêna hlan rêng rêng chu dawidim telh tûr a ni lo; dawidim leh khawizu telh rêng rêng Lalpa hnênah hâl ral atân hlan tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus2:12 In buhbâl seng hmasak ber erawh chu Lalpa hmaah kum tin in rawn hlân tûr a ni, maichâmah hâl ve tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus2:13 Buhbâl thilhlanah hian chi a tel zêl tûr a ni, chi hi Pathian nêna in thuthlung entîrna a ni a, in thil hlanah telh zêl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus2:14 ‘In buhbâl thar hmasa in rawn hlan hunah chuan chhangpêr hlan tel ṭhin tûr a ni a," 
Leviticus2:15 oliv hriak leh beraw telh bawk tûr a ni. 
Leviticus2:16 Puithiam chuan chhangpêr leh hriak tlêm, a vai aiawh tûrin, a la ang a, beraw nên chuan buhbâl thilhlanah Lalpa tân a hâl ral tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:1 ‘Remna thilhlan tûr miin an ran zînga mi an rawn hlan chuan a nu emaw, a pa emaw, hmêlhem lo, Lalpa hmaah an rawn hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:2 A ran hlan lu-ah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, Inbiakna bûk tual luhna kawngka bulah a talh ang a, puithiamin a thisen chu maichâm a theh kual chhuak ang." 
Leviticus3:3 Remna thilhlan aṭang chuan Lalpa tân hêngte hi hlan tûr a ni; a rîlbawh thau zawng zawng," 
Leviticus3:4 a kal te, a bawhtu thau te, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai hleh te." 
Leviticus3:5 Chûng chu puithiamin maichâmah hâlral thilhlan dang a hâl rualin a hâl ral tûr a ni; chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak a ni. 
Leviticus3:6 ‘Remna thilhlan tûr miin a berâm emaw, a kêl emaw zînga mi a rawn hlan chuan a nu pawh, a pa pawh, hmêlhem lo a hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:7 Berâm a rawn hlân a nih chuan 
Leviticus3:8 a lu-ah a kut a nghat ang a, Inbiakna bûk kawtah Lalpa hmaah a talh tûr a ni; puithiam chuan a thisen chuan maichâm a theh kual chhuak tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:9 Remna thilhlan aṭang chuan Lalpa tân hêngte hi a hlân tûr a ni; a mei thau, a bul rêta tan, a rîlbawh thau zawng zawng," 
Leviticus3:10 a kalte leh a bawhtu thau, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai hleh." 
Leviticus3:11 Chûng chu puithiamin maichâmah, Lalpa hnênah ei tûr thilhlanah a hâl ral tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:12 ‘ Lalpa hnêna a thilhlan chu kêl a nih chuan," 
Leviticus3:13 a lu-ah a kut a nghat ang a, Inbiakna bûk kawtah a talh ang a, a thisen chuan puithiamin maichâm a theh kual chhuak tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:14 Hêng hi ei tûr thilhlan atân Lalpa hnêna a hlan tûr chu a ni; a rîlbawh thau zawng zawng," 
Leviticus3:15 a kal te, a bawhtu thau te, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai hleh te." 
Leviticus3:16 Hêng hi ei tûr thilhlan atân puithiam chuan maichâmah Lalpa lo lawm atân a hâl ral tûr a ni. A thau zawng zawng hi Lalpa ta tûr a ni. 
Leviticus3:17 ‘Israel mi tu mahin sa thau leh thisen an ei tûr a ni lo. Israel mite chuan khawiah pawh awm se he dân hi an zâwm kumkhua tûr a ni,’ ” a ti a." 
Leviticus4:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia chu a bia a," 
Leviticus4:2 “Israel fate hrilh rawh, mi tu pawhin Lalpa thupêk an bawhchhiat palh chuan hetia tih tûr hi a ni:" 
Leviticus4:3 Thil tisual palhtu chu puithiam lalber a nih a, mipuiin a sual mawh an phurh dâwn chuan, a sual thawi nân bâwngtuai, hmêlhem lo, Lalpa hnênah a hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:4 Lalpa hmaah, Inbiakna bûk kawtah, bâwngtuai chu a rawn kai ang a, a lu-ah a kut a nghat ang a, a talh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:5 A thisen ṭhen chu a keng ang a, Inbiakna bûk chhûngah a luhpui ang a," 
Leviticus4:6 a kutzungchalin Hmun Thianghlim puanzâr chu thisen chuan vawi sarih a theh ang a; 
Leviticus4:7 rimtui hâlna maichâm kila ki-ah chuan thisen ṭhen chu a tât ang a, a bâng zawng chu bûk kawta thilhlan hâlna maichâm bulah a leihbaw vek tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:8 Bâwng thau, a rîlbawh thau zawng zawng te," 
Leviticus4:9 a kal te leh a bawhtu thau te, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai hlehte chu" 
Leviticus4:10 puithiam chuan a la ang a, a thaute chu remna thilhlan tih dân ang khân hâlral hlanna maichâmah a hâl ral tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:11 A vun te, a sa te, a lu te, a ke te, a kawchhûng zawng zawng leh a rîl te nên" 
Leviticus4:12 riahhmun daipâwnah hmun serh, maichâm vut paih khâwmnaah meipui a chhep ang a, a hâl ral tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:13 “Israel hnam pumin thil sual an tih palh a, hre chhuak mai si lovin Lalpa thupêk an bawhchhiat chuan," 
Leviticus4:14 an thil sual tih chu an hriat chhuah veleh hnam pum chuan sual thawi nân bâwngtuai Inbiakna bûk kawtah an rawn la tûr a ni; 
Leviticus4:15 hnam hotute chuan a lu-ah kut an nghat zet ang a, talh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:16 Puithiam lalber chuan bâwng thisen chu Inbiakna bûkah a keng lût ang a," 
Leviticus4:17 Hmun Thianghlim Ber puanzâr chu vawi sarih a zungchalin thisen chu a tât tûr a ni. 
Leviticus4:18 Bûk chhûnga rimtui hâlna maichâm kila ki-ah chuan a tât bawk ang a; bûk kawta thilhlan hâlna maichâm bulah a bâng zawng chu a leihbaw tûr a ni. 
Leviticus4:19 A thaute chu maichâmah chuan a hâl ral tûr a ni. 
Leviticus4:20 Sual thawina bâwngtuai a cheibâwl ang khân a ti ve vek ang a, mipui sual thawina chu a hlân tûr a ni; tichuan, an sual chu ngaihdam a ni tawh ang." 
Leviticus4:21 Bâwngtuai chu riahhmun daipâwnah, ama sual thawina ang bawk khân a hâl ral tûr a ni. Hei hi hnam pum sual thawina atâna thilhlan ṭhin tûr chu a ni." 
Leviticus4:22 “Rorêltuin thil sual a tih palh a, Lalpa thupêk a bawhchhiat chuan," 
Leviticus4:23 a thil sual tih chu an hrilh a, a hriat chhuah veleh, a sual thawi nân kêlpa, hmêlhem lo a hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:24 Kêl lu-ah a kut a nghat ang a, maichâm hmâr lam, hâlral thilhlan an talhna hmunah chuan a talh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:25 Puithiamin a thisen chu a la ang a, maichâm kila ki-ahte chuan a tât ang a, a tah bâng chu maichâm bulah chuan a leihbaw tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:26 A thau zawng zawng chu Remna thilhlan a tih angin maichâmah chuan a hâl ral tûr a ni; chutiang chu rorêltu sual thawina puithiamin a hlan dân tûr chu a ni; tichuan, a sual chu ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus4:27 “Mi narânin thil sual a tih palh a, Lalpa thupêk a bawhchhiat chuan" 
Leviticus4:28 a thil sual tih a hriat chhuah veleh kêlnu, hmêlhem lo, a sual thawi nân a rawn hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:29 Kêl lu-ah a kut a nghat ang a, hâlral maichâm hmâr lamah hâlral thilhlan an talhna hmunah chuan a talh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:30 A thisen chu puithiamin maichâm kil kiahte chuan a zungchalin a tât ang a, a tah bâng chu maichâm bulah a leihbaw tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:31 A thau zawng zawng chu remna thilhlan a tih ang chiah khân maichâmah a hâl ral tûr a ni; chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak a ni. Chutiang chuan thil sual titu sual thawina chu a hlân ang a, ngaihdam a ni tawh ang." 
Leviticus4:32 “Sual thawi nân berâm a rawn ken chu, a nu, hmêlhem lo a ni ngei tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:33 Berâm lu-ah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, hâlral thilhlan an talhna hmun, maichâm hmâr lamah chuan a talh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:34 A thisen chu hâlral maichâm kila ki-ahte chuan a zungchalin puithiam chuan a tât ang a, a tah bâng chu maichâm bulah a leihbaw tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:35 Remna thilhlan berâm ang khân a thau zawng zawng chu a la ang a, Lalpa tâna buhbâl thilhlan nên khân a hâl ral tûr a ni. Chutiang chuan sual thawina chu puithiam chuan a hlansak ang a, a sual chu ngaihdam a ni tawh ang." 
Leviticus5:1 “Hetiang thilah hian sual thawina hlan a ngai. Rorêlna hmuna thuhretua koh chuan a thil hmuh emaw, a thil hriat emaw puang tûra tih a nih a, a puan duh loh chuan thil sual a ti a ni, a mawh a phur tûr a ni." 
Leviticus5:2 Miin thil thiang lo, ran ruang te, a lian emaw, a te emaw, ramsa tlaw ruang te emaw a khawih palh chuan thil sual a ti a ni a; a hriat chhuah chuan a mawh chu a phur tûr a ni, a bawlhhlawh ve ang." 
Leviticus5:3 Mihring aṭanga chhuak, thil thiang lo rêng rêng a khawih palh chuan a thiltih chu a dik lo tih a hriat veleh a thiang lo ve nghâl a ni." 
Leviticus5:4 “Miin thil ṭha emaw, ṭha lo emaw ti tûrin ngaihtuah chiang lovin chhia chham sela, a thiltih chu a ngaihtuah chian hnuah chauh a tihsual mawh chu a phur tawh ang." 
Leviticus5:5 “Miin thil sual a tih chuan, a thil sual tih chu a inpuang ang a," 
Leviticus5:6 a thil sual tih hrem nân Lalpa hnênah berâm emaw, kêl emaw, a nu a rawn hlân tûr a ni. Puithiam chuan chu mi sual thawina chu a hlansak tûr a ni." 
Leviticus5:7 Berâm emaw, kêl emaw a neih loh chuan a sual mana pêkah Lalpa hnênah ṭhuro pahnih emaw, pârva pahnih emaw a rawn hlân tûr a ni. Pakhat chu sual thawina thilhlan a ni ang a, pakhat chu hâlral thilhlan atân a ni ang." 
Leviticus5:8 Puithiam hnênah a rawn dah ang a, sual thawina chu a hlân hmasa tûr a ni. Ṭhuai bung lovin a ring a elh tliak ang a," 
Leviticus5:9 a thisen ṭhen chu maichâm pangah a theh ang a, maichâm bulah a thisen chu a far kang tûr a ni. Hei hi sual thawina thilhlan a ni. Pakhat chu dân angin hâlral thilhlanah a hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus5:10 Chutiangin Puithiam chuan mi thil sual tih thawina chu a hlân ang a, ngaihdam a ni tawh ang." 
Leviticus5:11 “Ṭhuro pahnih emaw, pârva pahnih emaw pawh a nei zo lo a nih chuan sual thawina thilhlan chhangphut ṭha chi kg. khat a rawn hlân tûr a ni. Oliv hriak emaw, beraw emaw a rawn telh tûr a ni lo; hâlral thilhlan a ni lo va, sual thawina thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus5:12 Puithiam hnênah a rawn dah ang a, ei tûr thilhlan angin Lalpa hnêna hlan vek a nih entîr nân a ṭhen a lo ṭhâm ang a, maichâmah ei tûr thil hlan angin a hâl ral ang. Sual thawina thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus5:13 Chutiang chuan thil sual titu tân puithiam chuan a lo hlansak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang. Buhbâl thilhlan ang bawk khân a hâl bâng chhangphut chu puithiam chanpual tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus5:14 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah: 
Leviticus5:15 “Miin Lalpa chanpual thil serh chu pe lo palh sela, a sual a ni. A sual manah thilhlan Lalpa hmaah berâm emaw, kêl emaw, a pa, hmêlhem lo a rawn keng tûr a ni, ran man zât chu biakbûk dân hman lai anga chhût tûr a ni." 
Leviticus5:16 A pêk loh zât hu chu a pe ang a, chu bâkah hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a pêk belh tûr a ni. Puithiam hnênah a pe ang a, berâmno chu anin bawhchhiat man thilhlanah a lo hlansak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus5:17 “Tih loh tûr thu-a Lalpa thupêk lo ti palh chuan thil sual a ti a ni, a mawh chu a phur ang." 
Leviticus5:18 Puithiam hnênah bawhchhiat man thilhlan atân berâm emaw, kêl emaw a pa, hmêlhem lo a rawn kai tûr a ni, ran man bi zât chu biakbûka dân hman lai anga chhût tûr a ni. Puithiam chuan bawhchhiat man thilhlan chu a thiltih sual palh thawi nân a lo hlansak ang a, a sual chu ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus5:19 Lalpa laka a bawhchhiat man thilhlan a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus6:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Leviticus6:2 “Israel mi tu pawhin a chipui hnêna thil a kawltîr te, a dahkham te pe kîr duh lo ta se, rûk ṭhensakin emaw, bum emaw ta sela;" 
Leviticus6:3 tin, thil bo a chhar si chhar lo angin chhia a chham chuan," 
Leviticus6:4 hetiang thil sual, a eng a pawh hi ti sela; Lalpa laka thil tisual a ni a; a rûk te, a bum te, a dahkham kîr duh loh te, thil bo a chhar te, dâwta chhia a chham hnan thil te chu a rûl kim vek tûr a ni; chu bâkah chuan hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a pêk belh tûr a nî; thil sual a ti tih hmuh chhuah niah a neitu hnênah a pe tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:5  
Leviticus6:6 Bawhchhiat man Lalpa hnêna hlan atân puithiam hnênah berâm emaw, kêl emaw, a pa, hmêlhem lo, a rawn kai tûr a ni; a man chu Hmun Thianghlima hman lai tangka hisâpa chhût tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:7 Puithiam chuan Lalpa hnênah sual thawina chu a hlansak ang a, a sualna chu ngaihdam a ni tawh ang.” a ti a." 
Leviticus6:8 Lalpa chuan Mosia a bia a: 
Leviticus6:9 “Arona leh a fate chu hâlral thilhlan chungchânga tih dân tûr hi hrilh rawh. Hâlral thilhlan chu zankhuain maichâmah chuan dah tûr a ni a, mei chu tihnun reng tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:10 A tûkah puithiam chuan a puan zai sîn kawr leh kekawr hnuai ha-in thuka thil rawh vâpte chu a rût ang a, maichâm sîrah chuan a dah tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:11 A thawmhnaw chu a thlâk ang a, riahhmun daipâwn hmun serhah vut chu a paih tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:12 Maichâma mei chu chhawm nun reng tûr a ni, a mit tûr a ni lo. Puithiam chuan tûk tin thing a tuah belh ang a, hâlral thilhlan tûrte chu a hâl ang a; remna thilhlan thaute pawh chu a hâl ral nghâl ang." 
Leviticus6:13 Maichâma mei chu chhawm nun reng tûr a ni; a mit hauh tûr a ni lo. 
Leviticus6:14 “Hetiang hi buhbâl thilhlan tih dân tûr chu a ni: Arona thlah puithiamin buhbâl thilhlan chu maichâmah Lalpa hmaah a hlân tûr a ni. 
Leviticus6:15 Hriak leh chhangphut veikhat a la ang a, beraw nên maichâmah a hâl ang; chu chu a vaiin Lalpa hnêna hlan a ni tih entîrna a ni, Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni." 
Leviticus6:16 Hlan bâng chu puithiamho ei tûr a ni. Inbiakna bûk tual hmun thianghlimah dawidim tel lova ei tûr a ni. 
Leviticus6:17 Dawidim nêna hmeh pawlha kan tûr a ni lo. Buhbâl thilhlan aṭanga an chanpual atân ka pêk a ni. Sual thawina leh bawhchhiat man thilhlan anga thil serh, serh hran tlat tawh chu a ni." 
Leviticus6:18 Arona thlah mipa tawh phawt chuan an ei thei ang. Lalpa hnêna ei tûr hlan kumkhuaa an chanpual tûra ruat a ni. Mi dang tu pawhin ei tûr thilhlan chu an khawih ve chuan an thiang lo nghâl ang,” a ti a." 
Leviticus6:19 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Leviticus6:20 “Arona leh a fate hriak thih ni chuan Lalpa hnênah chhangphut ṭha chi kg. khat, ni tina buhbâl thilhlan hlan tel zât, zîngah kg. chanve, tlaiah kg. chanve rawn hlân ṭheuh rawh se." 
Leviticus6:21 Oliv hriak nên hmeh pawlha chhang ur thlênga ur hmin tûr a ni a, sih sawma buhbâl thilhlan anga hlan tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:22 Arona thlah, a aiawhtu tûra hriakthih, Puithiam lalber chuan he thilhlan hi a hlân ṭhîn tûr a ni; hei hi kumkhuaa tih dân tûr a ni, Lalpa tân hâl ral vek tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:23 Puithiamin buhbâl thilhlan a hlan hi ei tûr a ni lo, hâl ral vek tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus6:24 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Leviticus6:25 “Arona leh a fate chu hrilh rawh: ‘Hetiang hi sual thawina thilhlan hlan dân tûr chu a ni: hâlral thilhlan tûr talhna hmunah sual thawina thilhlan chu Lalpa hmaah talh tûr a ni, thil serh tlat a ni." 
Leviticus6:26 A hlântu puithiam chuan a sa hi Inbiakna bûk tual hmun thianghlimah a ei tûr a ni. 
Leviticus6:27 ‘He sa hi a khawih apiang an thiang lo nghâl ang. Thawmhnaw eng pawh a thisenin a per chuan hmun thianghlima sûk tûr a ni. 
Leviticus6:28 A sa chhumna bêl chu hlumbêl a nih chuan tihkeh tûr a ni; dârbêl a nih erawh chuan nawh fai hliauva tuia sil tûr a ni. 
Leviticus6:29 Puithiam thlah mipa tawh phawt chuan a sa hi an ei thei ang, thil serh a ni." 
Leviticus6:30 Inbiakna bûk hung chhûng hmun thianghlimah thisen chu sual thawina atân lâk luh a nih chuan a sa chu hâl ral vek tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:1 ‘Hei hi Bawhchhiat man thilhlan tih dân tûr chu a ni: 
Leviticus7:2 Hâlral thilhlan ran talhna hmunah ran chu talh tûr a ni a, a thisen chu maichâma theh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:3 A mei thau te, a rîlbawh thau te," 
Leviticus7:4 a kal te leh a bawhtu thau te, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai hleh te chu" 
Leviticus7:5 Puithiamin maichâmah a hâl ral tûr a ni, bawhchhiat man thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus7:6 Puithiam chi, mipa tawh phawt chuan a sa chu an ei thei ang, serh hran tlat a nih avângin hmun thianghlima ei tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:7 ‘Sual thawina thilhlan leh bawhchhiat man thilhlan hi a hlan dân a inang reng tûr a ni; a hlântu puithiam hian a sa hi a nei tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:8 Hâlral thilhlana hman ran vun chu a hlântu puithiam neih tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:9 Buhbâl thilhlan thuka hem hmin te, chhang ur thlênga ur hmin te, thîrbêla kan te chu a hlântu puithiam neih tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:10 Buhbâl thilhlan la tihhmin loh, hriak telh pawh, telh loh pawh Arona thlah puithiamte ta tûr a ni: an insem zêl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:11 ‘ Lalpa hnêna remna thilhlan chu hetianga hlan tûr hi a ni. 
Leviticus7:12 Remna thilhlan chu Pathian hnêna lâwmthu sawina atân miin a rawn hlan chuan, ran hlan rualin chhang, dawidim telh loh leh oliv hriak nêna hmeh emaw, chhang pan oliv hriaka tâl emaw, oliv hriaka kan emaw a rawn hlân tel tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:13 Chûng bâkah chuan dawidim telh chhang tlang ur hmin a pe tel tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:14 Chhang chi hrang hrang a hlan zînga pakhat zêl chu Lalpa tân a pe tûr a ni, maichâma ran thisen thehtu puithiam neih tûr a ni ang." 
Leviticus7:15 A sa chu a hlan nia ei zawh vek tûr a ni; a tûk atân dah tûr a ni lo. 
Leviticus7:16 ‘Remna thilhlan chu thutiam hlawhtlinna avâng emaw, mahni duh thu-a thilhlan hrim hrim emaw a nih chuan, a sa chu a hlan niâ ei vek kher tûr a ni lo, a tûkah pawh ei theih a la ni ang." 
Leviticus7:17 Ei sên loh, a ni thum ni pawha la awm ta cheu chu hâl ral tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:18 A ni thum nia an la ei chuan Pathianin a thilhlan chu a pawm lo vang, a hlântu thil tih ṭhatah chhiar ahnêkin bawlhhlawhnaa ngaih a ni ang a, a eitu chuan a mawh a phur ang." 
Leviticus7:19 A sa-in thil bawlhhlawh a khawih chuan ei tûr a ni lo, hâl ral tûr a ni. Mi bawlhhlawh lai lo chuan a sa chu an ei thei ang." 
Leviticus7:20 Mi bawlhhlawh laiin remna thilhlan sa hi a ei ve chuan ensan tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:21 Mihring emaw, ran aṭangin emaw thil bawlhhlawh chhuak khawihtu chuan he sa hi a ei ve chuan ensan tûr a ni,’ ” a ti a." 
Leviticus7:22 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Leviticus7:23 “Israel fate chu hrilh rawh: Berâm te, bâwng te, kêl te, a eng thau mah an ei tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus7:24 Ran tlaw emaw, sa seh emaw thau chu ei tûr a ni lo; thil dangah erawh chuan hman theih a ni ang." 
Leviticus7:25 Ei tûr thilhlan Lalpa hnêna a thau hlan tawh ei chu ensan tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:26 Israel fate chu khawiah pawh awm se ran thisen emaw, sava thisen emaw an ei tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus7:27 He dân hi bawhchhia apiang ensan tûr an ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus7:28 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Leviticus7:29 “Israel mite chu hrilh rawh. Remna thilhlan Lalpa hnêna hlântu chuan a ṭhen Lalpa hnêna thilpêkah an pe tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:30 Amah ngeiin ei tûr thilhlan chu a rawn hlân tur a ni. Ran thau leh a irno chu a thên ang a, Lalpa hnênah a rawn hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:31 Puithiamin a thau chu maichâmah a hâl ang a, a irno erawh chu puithiam neih tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:32 Remna thilhlanah chuan a bawp ding lam chu puithiam pêk tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:33 Remna thilhlan thau leh thisen hlântu puithiam chuan a bawp ding lam chu a nei ang. 
Leviticus7:34 Israel-ten Lalpa hnêna remna thilhlan an hlanin a irno an thên leh a bawp hi puithiamte kumkhaw chanpual tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus7:35 Hei hi ei tûr Lalpa hnêna pêk aṭanga Arona leh a fate, puithiama ruat ngheh hnua an chanpual atâna pêk tûr chu a ni." 
Leviticus7:36 Chumi ni chuan a ni Lalpa chuan Israel mite hnênah he thên thilhlan hi an hnêna pe ṭhîn tûra thu a pêk ni. He dân hi Israel miten kumkhuain an zâwm tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:37 Tichuan, hâlral thilhlan te, buhbâl thilhlan te, sual thawina thilhlan te, bawhchhiat man thilhlan te, Puithiam nemngheh thilhlan te leh remna thilhlante chu chutianga hlan ṭhin tûr chu a ni." 
Leviticus7:38 Thlalêra Sinai tlângah Israel-te thilhlan dân tûr a hrilh ṭuma Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêkte chu chûng chu a ni. 
Leviticus8:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Leviticus8:2 “Arona leh a fate chu Inbiakna bûk luhnaah lo kal sela, puithiam thawmhnaw te, thih tûr hriak te, sual thawina tûr bâwngpatuai te, berâmchal pahnih leh dawidim telh loh chhang, fawngin han keng rawh se." 
Leviticus8:3 Israel pungkhâwmho chu ko vek ang che,” a ti a." 
Leviticus8:4 Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Mosia chuan a ti a, an lo pun khâwm hnu chuan an hnênah," 
Leviticus8:5 “Kan tih tûr hi Lalpa thupêk a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus8:6 Mosia chuan Arona leh a fate chu a rawn hruai a, dân angin a insiltîr a." 
Leviticus8:7 Kawrhnuai te, kawrfualte chu a hâktîr a, kâwnghrên pawh a hrêntîr a. Efod a hâktîr bawk a, a hrênna mawi taka tah chuan a kâwngah a hrêng bet a," 
Leviticus8:8 âwmbel chu a bel a, tah chuan Urim leh Thumim pawh chu a dah a." 
Leviticus8:9 Diar chu a khimtîr a, a chalah rangkachak phêk ‘ Lalpa Pual’ tih ziakna kha a inbel a. Chûng chu Lalpa thupêk angin a ti vek a." 
Leviticus8:10 Mosia chuan hriak thih mi chu a la a, Biakbûk leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng chu a chulh a, a tithianghlim a." 
Leviticus8:11 Hriak ṭhen chuan maichâm leh a bungbêl te, dâr chawhtawlh leh a hûnna te chu tihthianghlim nân vawi sarih a theh a." 
Leviticus8:12 Hriak ṭhenkhat chu Arona lu-ah a leih a, a serh hrang ta a." 
Leviticus8:13 Arona fate pawh chu Mosia chuan a hruai a, kawr ṭial a hâktîr a, kâwnghrên a hrêntîr a, lukhum a khumtîr bawk a; chûng chu Lalpa thupêk angin a ti a." 
Leviticus8:14 Mosia chuan sual thawina bâwng chu a kai a, Arona leh a fate chuan a lu-ah an kut an nghat a." 
Leviticus8:15 Mosia chuan a talh a, a thisen ṭhen chu zungchalin maichâm kila ki-ahte chuan tihthianghlim nân a tât a. A tah bâng chu maichâm bulah a leihbua a; chutiang chuan maichâm chu a serh hrang a, a tithianghlim a ni." 
Leviticus8:16 Mosia chuan a rîlbawh thau zawng zawng te, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai hleh te, a kal te leh a bawhtu thau te chu maichâmah chuan a hâl a." 
Leviticus8:17 Lalpa thupêk angin a vun te, a sa te, a rîlte chu riahhmun pâwnah a hâl a." 
Leviticus8:18 Hâlral thilhlan tûr berâm pawh chu Mosia chuan a kai a, Arona leh a fate chuan a lû-ah an kut an nghat a." 
Leviticus8:19 Mosia chuan a talh a, maichâm chu thisen chuan a theh kual a." 
Leviticus8:20 Lalpa thupêk angin berâm chu a chan sawm a, a rîl te leh a bawp te chu a sil a, a lu te, a thau te leh a sa te chu maichâmah a hâl ta vek a. Hâlral thilhlan a ni a, chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak a ni." 
Leviticus8:21  
Leviticus8:22 Mosia chuan berâm pakhat zâwk, puithiam nemnghehna chu a kai a. Arona leh a fate chuan a lu-ah an kut an nghat a." 
Leviticus8:23 Mosia chuan a talh a, a thisen ṭhenkhat chu Arona beng ding lam tengengah a hnawih a, a kutzungpui leh kezungpui ding lam hmâwr ve ve-ah a hnawih a." 
Leviticus8:24 Arona fate pawh chuan an rawn pan a, an beng ding lam tengengah te, an kut leh an kezungpui ding lam hmâwr ve ve-ah te a lo hnawih bawk a; a hnawih bâng chuan maichâm chu a theh kual a." 
Leviticus8:25 Berâm thau, a mei thau tak te, a rîlbawh te, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai hleh te, a kal te leh a bawhtu thau te leh a bawp ding lam chu a la a." 
Leviticus8:26 Lalpa hnênah Buhbâl thilhlan, dawidim telh loh chhang tlang khat leh chhang, hriak nêna hmeh te, hriaka chhang pan tâl te chu ran thau leh a bawp chungah chuan a dah a." 
Leviticus8:27 Arona leh a fate kutah a hlân a, Lalpa hmaah chuan an thên a, an hlân a." 
Leviticus8:28 Mosia chuan chûng chu a la leh a, hâlral thilhlan chungah nemnghehna thilhlanah a hâl ta a. Hei hi ei tûr thilhlan a ni; chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni." 
Leviticus8:29 Mosia chuan a irno chu a la a, Lalpa hmaah chuan a thên a, a hlân a; chu chu puithiam nemnghehna berâm aṭanga Mosia chanpual ve chu a ni. Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Mosia chuan engkim a ti a." 
Leviticus8:30 Mosia chuan hriak thih tûr ṭhen chu maichâma theh thisen ṭhen nên chuan a la a, Arona leh a fate chu an kawrah nên a theh a. Chutiang chuan an kawrte nên Lalpa tân a serh hrang ta a." 
Leviticus8:31 Mosia chuan Arona leh a fate hnênah, “Inbiakna bûk kawngka bulah a sa hi la ula, chhûm ula, fawnga nemnghehna thilhlan chhang nên khân Lalpa thupêk angin ei rawh u." 
Leviticus8:32 In ei bâng chu, sa pawh, chhang pawh hâl vek tûr a ni." 
Leviticus8:33 Nemnghehnaa tih tûr tih kim a nih hnu, ni sarih chhûng chuan Inbiakna bûk aṭangin pâwnah in chhuak tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus8:34 Lalpa thupêk angin khâng thil kha in sual thawina tûrin ka ti a ni. 
Leviticus8:35 Lalpa thupêk ang chuan ni sarih leh zan sarih Inbiakna bûk luhna bulah in awm tûr a ni. In awm duh loh chuan in thi ang, chu chu Lalpa thupêk a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus8:36 Tichuan, Arona leh a fate chuan Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk zawng zawng chu an ti ta vek a." 
Leviticus9:1 Ni riat ni chuan Mosian Arona leh a fate chu Israel upate nên a ko va," 
Leviticus9:2 Arona hnênah, “Bawngpatuai leh berâmchal hmêlhem lo kai la, bâwng chu sual thawina thilhlanah Lalpa hnênah hlân la, berâm chu hâlral thilhlanah hlân ang che." 
Leviticus9:3 Israel mite chuan sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa rawn kai sela; bâwngno leh berâmno, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo, hâlral thilhlan atân rawn kai bawk rawh se." 
Leviticus9:4 Bâwngchal leh berâmchal, remna thilhlan atân rawn kai sela, buhbâl thilhlan hriak nêna pawlh Lalpa hnênah rawn hlân bawk rawh se. Vawiin hian kei, Lalpa hi, in hmaah ka rawn inlan dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus9:5 Mosia thupêk ang chuan Inbiakna bûk kawtah chûng chu an rawn kai a, hnam pum chu Lalpa chibai bûk tûrin an pung khâwm a." 
Leviticus9:6 Mosia chuan an hnênah, “Hei hi ti tûrin Lalpa chuan thu a pe che u a ni: Lalpa ropuina êng chu a lo lang dawn si a,” a ti a." 
Leviticus9:7 Tin, Arona hnênah chuan, “Maichâmah i sual thawina tûr leh hâlral thilhlan hlân ang che, mipui sual thawina tûr pawh hlân bawk ang che, Lalpa thupêk angin mipui sual thawina chu hlansak rawh,” a ti a." 
Leviticus9:8 Arona chu maichâmah a kal a, ama sual thawina bâwngpatuai chu a talh a." 
Leviticus9:9 A fate chuan a thisen an rawn lâksak a, a zungchal a chiah a, maichâm kila ki-ah chuan a tât a, a tah bâng chu maichâm bulah a leihbua a." 
Leviticus9:10 A thau te, a kal te, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai hleh te chu Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang khân maichâmah chuan a hâl a." 
Leviticus9:11 A vun leh a sa erawh chu riahhmun pâwnah a hâl ral a. 
Leviticus9:12 Ama puala hâlral thilhlan pawh chu a talh a, a thisen chu a faten an rawn lâksak a, maichâm a theh kual chhuak a." 
Leviticus9:13 A lu leh a sa dangte pawh an rawn la a, maichâmah a lo hâl a." 
Leviticus9:14 A rîlte leh a bawp chu a sil fai a, maichâmah chuan a dang chunga dahin a hâl ta bawk a." 
Leviticus9:15 Chumi hnu chuan mipui thilhlan chu a hlân ve ta a. Mipui sual thawina thilhlan chu a talh a, ama sual thawina a hlan ang chiah khân a ti a." 
Leviticus9:16 Hâlral thilhlana hlan tûr ran pawh chu a tih dân tûr tuk angin a ti a. 
Leviticus9:17 Buhbâl thilhlan chhangphut chu a ṭhâm a, maichâmah chuan ni tin hâlral thilhlan zîngah chuan a hâl tel a." 
Leviticus9:18 Remna thilhlanah bâwngpa leh kêlchal mipuiin an rawn ken chu a talh a, ran thisen chu a faten an rawn la a, maichâm chu a lo theh kual chhuak a." 
Leviticus9:19 Arona chuan bâwng leh berâm thau, berâm mei thau tak leh a rîlbawh thau te, a kal te, a thin hlâwm ṭha lai hleh te chu," 
Leviticus9:20 a irno chungah a dah a, maichâmah a rawn hlân a." 
Leviticus9:21 Mosia sawi angin a irno leh a bawp chu Lalpa hmaah a thên a. 
Leviticus9:22 Aronan hêng hi a hlan zawh chuan mipui chungah a kut a phar a, malsâwmna a sawi a, maichâm ata chu a lo chhuk a." 
Leviticus9:23 Mosia leh Arona chu Inbiakna bûkah chuan an lût a, an lo chhuah chuan mipui tân malsâwmna an sawi a. Lalpa ropuina êng chu mite hmuhah a lo lang ta a." 
Leviticus9:24 Lalpa hnên aṭang chuan mei a lo chhuak a, maichâma hâlral thilhlan leh sathaute chu a rawn kâng ral ta a. Mipuiin chu chu an hmuhin an au va, an hmaia lei siin an bawkkhup ta a." 
Leviticus10:1 Nadaba leh Abihua, Arona fate chuan, an meilawhin meiling an rût a, rimtui hâl chi an phul a, Lalpa hmaah mei thiang lo chu an hmang a. Chutiang hman chu Lalpan a khap a ni." 
Leviticus10:2 Lalpa hnên aṭangin mei a lo chhuak zawk a, Lalpa hmaah an pahnih chuan an kâng hlum ta a." 
Leviticus10:3 Mosia chuan Arona hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan hemi thu-ah hian heti hian a ti, ‘Ka rawngbâwltute chuan ka thianghlimna hi an pawisa tûr a ni. Ka mite hmaah ka ropuizia ka tilang dâwn,’ a tih rêng kha,” a ti a. Arona chu a ngawi reng a." 
Leviticus10:4 Mosia chuan Arona pami Uziela fa Misaela leh Elzafana te chu a ko va, an hnênah, “Lo kal ula, in unaute ruang hi bûk thianghlim aṭang hian la chhuak ula, riahhmun pâwnah dah chhuak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Leviticus10:5 Tichuan, an lo kal a, Mosia sawi angin an ruang chu an puithiam kawr fual chuan riahhmun pâwnah an zâwn chhuak ta a." 
Leviticus10:6 Mosia chuan Arona leh a fa Eleazara leh Ithamara hnênah, “Lu in sûnin in sam thlah suh ula, in puan pawh pawtthlêr ve hek suh u; chutianga in tih chuan in thi ngei ang a, Lalpa chu hnam pum chungah a thinur ang. Lalpa meiin a kan hlumte chu in unau Israel dangte erawh chuan an ṭah thei ang." 
Leviticus10:7 Nangni chuan Inbiakna bûk hi chhuahsan suh u, in thi dah ang e, Lalpa hriak thih in nih tawh kha,” a ti a. Mosia sawi ang chuan an ti ta a." 
Leviticus10:8 Lalpa chuan Arona hnênah 
Leviticus10:9 “Inbiakna bûka in lo luh dâwnin nang leh i fate hian uain leh zu in in tûr a ni lo, in in chuan in thi ang. Hei hi inthlah zawng zawngten an zâwm tûr a ni." 
Leviticus10:10 Thil serh leh serh loh, thiang leh thiang lo in thlei thiam tûr a ni." 
Leviticus10:11 Mosia hnêna dân ka pêk zawng zawng che u chu Israel mite chu in zirtîr tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus10:12 Mosia chuan Arona leh a fapa pahnih la dam, Eleazara leh Ithamara-te hnênah, “Buhbâl thilhlan aṭanga Lalpa hnêna hlan bâng kha la ula, maichâm bulah ei rawh u: serh hran tlat a ni tawh si a." 
Leviticus10:13 Hmun thianghlimah chuan ei ula, Lalpa hnêna ei tûr hlan aṭanga in fate nêna in chanpual a ni. Hei hi Lalpa thupêk a ni." 
Leviticus10:14 A irno leh a bawp, Lalpa hmaa thên kha chu hmun thianghlimah chuan in fapate leh in fanute nên in ei thei ang. Hêng thilhlante hi in fate nêna in ei atân remna thilhlan aṭanga in chanpual tûr chu a ni." 
Leviticus10:15 Lalpa hmaa a bawp leh a irno an thên kha meia thilhlan Lalpa hnêna a thau an hlan rualin an rawn la tûr a ni. Lalpa thupêk angin hêng hi in fate nêna in kumkhaw chanvo tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus10:16 Mosia chuan sual thawina thilhlan kêl chungchâng thu chu dîlchhût takin a zâwt a, an lo hâl dêr tawh tih a hre ta a. Eleazara leh Ithamara chungah chuan a thinur ta hle a." 
Leviticus10:17 “Engtizia nge sual thawina thilhlan kêlpa sa chu hmun thianghlimah in ei loh, serh hran tlat tawh a nih kha; mipui sual thawina aṭanga in chan tûra Lalpa pêk che u a nih kha." 
Leviticus10:18 Inbiakna bûkah a thisen chu lâk luh a ni si lo va, ka hrilh tawh che u ang khân chutah chuan a sa in ei tûr alâwm,” a ti a." 
Leviticus10:19 Arona chuan a chhâng a, “Vawiin hian sual thawina sa chu ei ila, Lalpa chuan a remti meuh ang maw? Mipuite chuan Lalpa hnênah sual thawina chu an rawn hlân a, chuti chung pawhin hêng thil râpthlâk tak hi ka chungah a thleng a ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus10:20 Chûng chu Mosian a han hriat chuan a lungawi ta a. 
Leviticus11:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah," 
Leviticus11:2 “Israel mite chu hetiang hian hrilh rawh u. 
Leviticus11:3 ‘Khawmuala chêng hêng sate hi in ei thei ang: a tin kâk chhuak, chaw ṭhial nawn sa tawh phawt chu in ei thei ang." 
Leviticus11:4 Sanghâwngsei te, sangawi te, sazupuite chu in ei tûr a ni lo; hêngho sa hi sa bawlhhlawh a ni; chaw chu an ṭhial nawn a, an tin a kâk chhuak lo." 
Leviticus11:5  
Leviticus11:6  
Leviticus11:7 Vawksa ei suh u, sa bawlhhlawh a ni, a ketin chu a kâk chhuak a; mahse, chaw chu a ṭhial nawn lo a ni." 
Leviticus11:8 Hêng ran sate hi ei suh u, a thi ruang pawh khawih suh u, a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:9 ‘Sangha chi tinrêng, luia awm te, tuifinriata awm te, dîla awm te, phuhlip leh pângparh neite chu in ei thei ang." 
Leviticus11:10 Tuia chêng si phuhlip leh pângparh nei lo chu ei loh tûr a ni. 
Leviticus11:11 Chûng chu an tenawm a ni: an sa in ei tûr a ni lo va, a khawih pawh in khawih tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus11:12 Tuia chêng, phuhlip leh pângparh nei lo chu in ei tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus11:13 ‘Hêng savate hi sava tenawm an ni, an bawlhhlawh a, ei loh tûr a ni: mupui te, lungdûp te," 
Leviticus11:14 mutê te, ngawihûp chi rêng rêng te," 
Leviticus11:15 choak chi rêng rêng te," 
Leviticus11:16 sava sâng te, vabak te, tuifinriat sava te, mu chi rêng rêng te," 
Leviticus11:17 hrângkir te, luidung mu te, chingpirinu te," 
Leviticus11:18 chhimbuksialki nei te, mulukawlh te," 
Leviticus11:19 kânghlai te, dîl sava chi rêng rêng te, chhuangtuarte leh bâk te." 
Leviticus11:20 ‘Rannung thla nei, ke pali-a vâk chi rêng rêng chu in tân a tenawm a ni." 
Leviticus11:21 Zuankah theihna tûr bawppui nei chi erawh chu in ei thei ang. 
Leviticus11:22 Khaukhuap chi te, khauchher chi te, perhpâwng chi te, khau ṭial chi te in ei thei ang." 
Leviticus11:23 Thla nei, ke pali-a vâkte chu in tân a tenawm a ni." 
Leviticus11:24 A thi khawih apiang tlai thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang. 
Leviticus11:25 A thi sa pawh silhfênin a khawih chuan sûk tûr a ni, tlai thlengin a neitu chu a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:26 ‘Ran eng pawh tin kâk mah se chaw ṭhial nawn lo emaw, a tin kâk chhuak lo emaw chu a bawlhhlawh a ni, a ruang khawih apiang chu a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:27 ‘Ke pali nei, ke bâwr nei chi chu an bawlhhlawh a ni, an ruang khawih chu tlai thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:28 An ruang latu chuan a thawmhnaw a su tûr a ni, tlai thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang; hêng ruangte hi in tân a tenawm a ni." 
Leviticus11:29 ‘Leia a vaha vâkho hi in tân a bawlhhlawh bawk a ni: bui te, sazu te, tangkeu chi rêng rêng te," 
Leviticus11:30 chawke te, daidêp te, laikîng te, laitel te, kâwlchawr te;" 
Leviticus11:31 hêng bawkvâka kalte hi in tân a bawlhhlawh a ni. A thi khawih chu tlai thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang. 
Leviticus11:32 Tin, a thi chuan thing emaw, thawmhnaw emaw, savun emaw, ip emaw, thil dahnaa hman tawh phawt chu a delh chuan a bawlhhlawh ang a; tuia hnim tûr a ni, tlai thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang a, a thianghlim leh mai ang." 
Leviticus11:33 Hlumbêl chhûnga a tlâk chuan a chhûnga awm zawng zawng chu a bawlhhlawh ang a, a bêl chu vuak keh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus11:34 Thil ei theih chi rêng rêngah chutiang bêla tui lo awm chu leih a nih chuan a bawlhhlawh ve ang; chutiang bêla in theih chi awm rêng rêng pawh a bawlhhlawh ve a ni. 
Leviticus11:35 Hêngho thi ruang hi chhang ur bêlah emaw, khuhhriangah emaw a tlâk chuan a bawlhhlawh a, tihkeh sawm tûr a ni." 
Leviticus11:36 A thi ruang chu eng pawhin khawih se a khawihtu chu a bawlhhlawh a; mahse, tuikhuahah te, tuizêmahte tla se a bawlhhlawh ve lo." 
Leviticus11:37 Chîn atân thlai chi dah chungah tla pawh ni se thlai chi chu a bawlhhlawh ve lo. 
Leviticus11:38 Thlai chi chu tuia an chiah laiin hêng thi ruang hi a tlâk chuan a bawlhhlawh a ni. 
Leviticus11:39 ‘Sa ei thiang thi sela, a ruang khawih apiang tlai thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:40 A sa ei chuan a thawmhnaw a su tûr a ni: tlai thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang. A sa phurtu pawhin a thawmhnaw a su tûr a ni: tlai thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang. 
Leviticus11:41 ‘Rannung, leia bawkvâk chi te hi in ei tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus11:42 A tlenga tleng te, ke pali emaw, a aia tam emaw nei leia vâk chi rêng rêng hi in ei tûr a ni lo, a tenawm a ni."
