Numbers2:17 Inbiakna bûk chu zâwn a hunah Levia chite chu a laiah an kal ang a, an awmna zir zêlin pâwl dangte chu an kal ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Numbers2:18 Khawthlang lam pangah Efraim pâwlho an awm ang a, an pâwl chhinchhiahna puanzâr an zâr ang a, a bulah Efraim-ho chuan bûk an rem ang; an hruaitu chu Amihuda fapa Elisama a ni," 
Numbers2:19 mi sîngli leh zanga an tling. 
Numbers2:20 An dawta bûk rem tûrte chu Manasea thlahte an ni, an hruaitu chu Pedazura fapa Gamaliela a ni;" 
Numbers2:21 mi sîngthum leh sânghnih leh zahnih an tling. 
Numbers2:22 Anni dawta bûk rem tûr chu Benjamina thlahte an ni, an hruaitu chu Gideona fapa Abidana a ni;" 
Numbers2:23 sîngthum leh sângnga leh zali an tling. 
Numbers2:24 Anniho hi Efraim pâwla chhiar an ni, mi nuaikhat leh sângriat leh za an ni." 
Numbers2:25 Hmâr lam pangah Dan pâwlho an awm ang. An pâwl chhinchhiahna puanzâr an zâr ang a, a bulah Dan-ho chuan bûk an rem ang. An hotu chu Amisadaia fapa Ahiezera a ni;" 
Numbers2:26 mi sîngruk leh sânghnih leh zasarih an tling. 
Numbers2:27 An dawta bûk rem tûr chu Asera thlahte an ni, an hruaitu chu Okrana fapa Pagiela a ni;" 
Numbers2:28 mi sîngli leh sângkhat leh zanga an tling. 
Numbers2:29 A dawt leha bûk rem tûr chu Naftalia thlahte an ni; an hruaitu chu Enana fapa Ahira a ni," 
Numbers2:30 mi sîngnga leh sângthum leh zali an tling. 
Numbers2:31 Anniho hi Dan pâwla chhiar an ni, mi nuaikhat leh sîngnga leh sângsarih leh zaruk an ni. Anni hi hnu dâla kal tûr an ni." 
Numbers2:32 Hêng hi Israel mi, a chhûngkuaa thliara hming an ziakte chu an ni, an zaa fin khâwmin mi nuairuk leh sângthum leh zanga leh sawmnga an tling." 
Numbers2:33 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin Levia thlahte chu Israel-te chhiarnaah an telh ve lo. 
Numbers2:34 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin Israel-te chuan an ti a, a pâwl pâwlin bûk an rem a, chhûngkaw indawtin an kal ṭhîn." 
Numbers3:1 Sinai tlânga Lalpan Mosia a biak lai khân Arona leh Mosia thlahte chu hêng hi an ni. 
Numbers3:2 Arona fapa upa ber chu Nadaba a ni, a dangte chu Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te an ni." 
Numbers3:3 Puithiam atâna hriakthih, serh hran an ni." 
Numbers3:4 Nadaba leh Abihua erawh hi chu Sinai thlalêra mei thiang lo hmanga rimtui an hâl avângin, Lalpa hmaah an thi a, fa an nei lo; Eleazara leh Ithamara chauh chu an pa Arona dam laia puithiam hna thawk chu an ni." 
Numbers3:5 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers3:6 “Levia chite chu han hruai la, puithiam Arona rawngbâwlsaktuah dah rawh." 
Numbers3:7 Inbiakna bûka hna thawh tûr awm apiang an thawk ang a, puithiam leh mipuite rawng an bâwl tûr a ni." 
Numbers3:8 Inbiakna bûk chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng an enkawl ang a, Inbiakna bûka Israel mite an lo kalin an lo dawngsawng tûr a ni." 
Numbers3:9 Levia chite chauh hi Arona leh a fate chhawr atân Israel hnam zînga mi ka pêkte chu an ni. 
Numbers3:10 Arona leh a fate chauh hian puithiam hna an thawk ang a, mi dang lo inrawlh ve chu tihhlum tûr an ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers3:11 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers3:12 “Israel-te thlah, an fa tîr, piang hmasa, ka ta tûrte aiah Levia chite hi ka la ta a ni, anni chu ka ta, ka pual an ni ang." 
Numbers3:13 Aigupta mite fa tîr ka thah ni aṭang khân fa hrin hmasa berte hi ka ta an ni; Israel-te chu an fa tîr, an ran piang hmasate nên ka zuah a, ka ta tûr vek an ni, Lalpa ka nih hi,” a ti a." 
Numbers3:14 Sinai thlalêrah Lalpan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers3:15 “Levia thlahte chu a chi leh a chhûngkuaa thliarin an hming ziak rawh; mipa chu thla khat a chin chung lam chu telh vek ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers3:16 Mosia chuan Lalpa thupêk ang chuan a ti a. 
Numbers3:17 Levia fapate chu Gersona te, Kohata te, Meraria te an ni, an hming hi an thlahte chuan hnam hmingah an pu a." 
Numbers3:18 Gersona fate chu Libnia leh Simeia an ni. 
Numbers3:19 Kohata fate chu Amrama te, Izara te, Hebrona te, Uzela te an ni." 
Numbers3:20 Meraria fate chu Malia leh Musia an ni. Hêngho hming hi an thlahte chuan hnam hmingah an pu a ni. 
Numbers3:21 Gersona chia chhiarte chu Libni chi leh Simei chite hi an ni. 
Numbers3:22 Mipa zawng zawng thla khat a chin chung lam chu sângsarih leh zanga an tling. 
Numbers3:23 Gersona chite chuan Inbiakna bûk khawthlang lamah bûk an rem tûr a ni. 
Numbers3:24 An hruaitu chu Laela fapa Eliasafa a ni. 
Numbers3:25 Inbiakna bûka Gersona chite tih tûr chu Inbiakna bûk enkawltu ber an ni a, a in chung te, a thuahna te, a pindan puanzâr te," 
Numbers3:26 a tual hungna puanzâr te, a tual luhna puanzâr te an kutah a awm ang a, hêng thil chungchângah tih tûr awm apiang titu an ni ang." 
Numbers3:27 Kohata chia chhiarte chu Amram chi te, Izar chi te, Hebron chi te, Uziel chite hi an ni." 
Numbers3:28 Mipa zawng zawng, thla khat a chin chung lam chu sângriat leh zaruk an tling, Hmun Thianghlim enkawltu tûrte an ni." 
Numbers3:29 Kohata thlahte chu bûk chhim lamah an awm tûr a ni. 
Numbers3:30 An hruaitu chu Uziela fapa Elizafana a ni. 
Numbers3:31 An enkawl tûr chu Thuthlung Bâwm te, dawhkân te, khâwnvâr dahna te leh Hmun Thianghlim Ber luhna puanzâr te a ni ang." 
Numbers3:32 Puithiam Arona fapa, Eleazara chu Levia chite hotu a ni; Hmun Thianghlim enkawltute thu lâkna tûr a ni." 
Numbers3:33 Merari chia chhiarte chu Mali chi te leh Musi chite hi an ni. 
Numbers3:34 Mipa zawng zawng, thla khat a chin chung lam chu mi sângruk leh zahnih an tling." 
Numbers3:35 An hruaitu chu Abihaila fapa Zuriela a ni, Inbiakna bûk hmâr lamah bûk an rem tûr a ni." 
Numbers3:36 Meraria chite enkawl tûr chu Inbiakna bûk ban rem khâwm te, a kaihna hrui te a ni ang. Hêng thila tih tûr awm zawng zawng chu an tih tûr a ni." 
Numbers3:37 A hungna ban te, a bulṭhut te, a khen nghehna te, a kaihna hruite pawh an enkawl tûr a ni." 
Numbers3:38 Inbiakna bûk khawchhak lam, a kawtah Mosia te, Arona te leh an fate chuan bûk an rem tûr a ni. Anni chauh hi a ṭûl hun apianga Israel-te aiawha Hmun Thianghlima rawngbâwltu tûr an ni; mi dang lo tel ve chu tihhlum tûr a ni,’ a ti a." 
Numbers3:39 Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Mosia leh Arona chuan Levia chite chu, an chhûngkuaa thliarin an chhiar a, mi sînghnih leh sânghnih an tling." 
Numbers3:40 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Israel thlah fa tîr zawng zawng, mipa thla khat a chin chung lam hming ziak chhuak rawh." 
Numbers3:41 Levia thlahte chu Israel-te fa tîr zawng zawng aiah ka ta an ni ang. Israel-te ran piang hmasa ber aiah Levia chite ran chu ka tân dah bawk rawh, Lalpa chu ka nih hi,” a ti a." 
Numbers3:42 Lalpa thupêk angin Mosia chuan a ti a. Israel-te fa tîr zawng zawng chu a chhiar a," 
Numbers3:43 a upat dân indawtin thla khat a chin chung lam mipa zawng zawng hming chu a ziak chhuak a, sînghnih leh sânghnih leh zahnih leh sawmsarih leh pathum an tling." 
Numbers3:44 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers3:45 “Israel-te fa tîr zawng zawng aiah Levia chite chu ka ta an nih tâk thu puang rawh. Israel-te ran no piang hmasa ber aiah pawh Levia thlahte ran chu ka ta a ni. 
Numbers3:46 Israel-te fa tîrho hi Levia chite ai chuan mi zahnih leh sawmsarih leh pathumin an tam a, chûngho zât tlanna chu Israel-te chuan an pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers3:47 Mi pakhat tlanna man chu sekel nga a ni ang, sekel chu Tempula hman lai ang chiaha rit tûr a ni." 
Numbers3:48 Tangka chu Arona leh a fate pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers3:49 Mosia chuan intlanna tangka an lo lâk chuante chu a la khâwm a. 
Numbers3:50 Israel zînga fa tîr aṭangin tangkarua biakbûk tehna anga sekel sângkhat leh zathum leh sawmruk leh panga a la khâwm a. 
Numbers3:51 Lalpan thu a pêk angin Arona leh a fapate a pe a. 
Numbers4:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah," 
Numbers4:2 “Levia chi zînga Kohata thlahte a chi leh chhûngkuaa thliarin," 
Numbers4:3 kum sawmthum aṭanga kum sawmnga inkâr, Inbiakna bûka hna thawk tlâk zawng zawng hming ziak chhuak rawh." 
Numbers4:4 Inbiakna bûka Kohata thlahte thawh tûr chu thil thianghlim berte enkawl a ni. 
Numbers4:5 “Awmhmun sawn dâwn apiangin Arona leh a fate chu bûk chhûngah an lût ang a, Hmun Thianghlim Ber pindan puanzâr chu an hlîp ang a, chu chuan Thuthlung Bâwm kha an khuh tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:6 Savun ṭha chiin an khuh leh ang a, chu chu puan dumpâwlin an khuh leh tûr a ni; chumi zawhah a zâwnfung an vuah ang." 
Numbers4:7 Chhang serh dahna dawhkân chungah puan dumpâwl an phah ang a, chutah chuan thlêng te, bêl te, berhbu te, uain thâwl leh a bun chhuahna tûr note chu an dah ang a; chatlak lova chhang serh dah ṭhin chu chutah chuan an dah tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:8 Puan sendukin an khuh ang a, savun ṭha chiin an khuh leh ang a, a zâwnfung an vuah ang." 
Numbers4:9 khâwnvâr zâr kha a bâwrin chaicheh te, dawnthlêng te, hriak bûr zawng zawng nên puan dumpâwlin an khuh tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:10 A hmanrua zawng zawng nên savun ṭha chiin an khuh ang a, a zâwnnaah an dah tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:11 “Rangkachaka luan maichâm chu puan dumpâwlin an khuh ang a, savun ṭha chiin an khuh leh ang a, a zâwnfung an vuah tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:12 Hmun Thianghlima rawngbâwlna bungbêl zawng zawng chu puan dumpâwlin an fûn ang a, a zâwnnaah an dah tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:13 Maichâma meivâp chu an lâwk fai ang a, puan sendukin an khuh ang a;" 
Numbers4:14 a chungah chuan an rawngbâwlna bungbêl zawng zawng, meilawh te, thîrkut te, vutlawh te, chawhtawlh te leh maichâm bungbêlte an dah vek ang a, savun ṭha chiin an khuh ang a, a zâwnfung an vuah tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:15 “Awmhmun sawn hunah Arona leh a faten hêng hmanrua leh bungbêl thianghlimte hi an khuh fel hunah Kohata fate chuan an zâwn tûr a ni; mahse, thil thianghlimte hi an khawih tûr a ni lo, an thi ang e. Chu chu Inbiakna bûka Kohata fate thawh tûr chu a ni." 
Numbers4:16 Chhit tûr hriak te, rimtui te, buhbâl thilhlan te, hriak thih mi te, Inbiakna bûk pum leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng, Lalpa tâna serh hrante chu Eleazara kutah a awm ang.”" 
Numbers4:17 Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah," 
Numbers4:18 “Kohata thlahte chu," 
Numbers4:19 thil thianghlimte hi an khawih palha Levia chite zîng ata an thih fai mai loh nân, Arona leh a fate chuan an tih tûr leh an zâwn tûr ṭheuh an kawhhmuh ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:20 Puithiamin thil thianghlim zâwn tûra an buatsaih lai en tûrin Kohata thlahte chu Inbiakna bûk chhûngah an lût tûr a ni lo, an thi mai ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers4:21 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers4:22 “Gersona thlahte pawh, a chi leh a chhûngkuaa thliarin" 
Numbers4:23 kum sawmthum aṭanga kum sawmnga inkâr mi, Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl tlâk zawng zawng hming ziak vek rawh." 
Numbers4:24 Gersona thlahte chuan hêng hi an enkawl ang a, an zâwn ṭhîn ang:" 
Numbers4:25 Inbiakna bûk puanzâr te, a chung khuhna te, a thuahna te, a khuhna savun ṭha chi te, kawngka puanzâr te," 
Numbers4:26 bûk leh maichâm tual hungna puanzâr te, bûk luhna kawngka puanzâr te, a hrui te leh a hmanrua zawng zawng an zâwn ang a; tih ṭûl apiang an ti tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:27 Arona leh a faten tih tûra an ruatsak apiang chu Gersona thlahte chuan an ti ang a, zâwn tûr chu an zâwn ang a, in enpui ṭhîn dâwn nia." 
Numbers4:28 Hêng hi Inbiakna bûk chungchânga Gersona thlahte tih tûr pual chu a ni; an tih tûr ṭheuh chu puithiam Arona fapa Ithamaran a kawhhmuh ṭhîn ang. 
Numbers4:29 “Meraria thlahte chu a chi leh a chhûngkuaa thliarin 
Numbers4:30 kum sawmthum aṭanga kum sawmnga inkâr mi, Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl tlâk zawng zawng hming ziak chhuak vek rawh." 
Numbers4:31 Inbiakna bûk chungchânga an tih tûr pual leh an thil phurh tûr te chu hêng hi a ni: Bûk hmanrua, a bangrel te, a ban leh a bulṭhut te," 
Numbers4:32 tual hungna ban te leh a bulṭhut te, bûk kilh behna te, a kaihna hrui te leh a hmanrua zawng zawng te a ni; mi tin phurh tûr hming hmerha ruatsak ṭheuh tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:33 Chûng chu Meraria thlahte tih tûr chu a ni, puithiam Arona fapa Ithamaran an tih tûr chu a kawhhmuh ṭhîn ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers4:34 Mosia te, Arona te leh mipui hruaitu te chuan Kohata thlahte chu a chi leh a chhûngkuaa thliarin," 
Numbers4:35 Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl tlâk, kum sawmthum aṭanga kum sawmnga inkâr mi zawng zawng hming chu an ziak chhuak a." 
Numbers4:36 Hêng an hming ziakte hi mi sânghnih leh zasarih leh sawmnga an tling. 
Numbers4:37 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk zâwmin Mosia leh Aronan Kohata thlahte, Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl tlâk an ziak zât chu heti hi a ni." 
Numbers4:38 Gersona thlahte chu a chi leh a chhûngkuaa thliarin," 
Numbers4:39 Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl tlâk kum sawmthum aṭanga kum sawmnga inkâr mi zawng zawng hming chu an ziak chhuak a. 
Numbers4:40 Hming ziak hi mi sânghnih leh zaruk leh sawmthum an tling. 
Numbers4:41 Lalpa thupêk zâwma Mosia leh Aronan Gersona thlahte, Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl tlâk an ziak zât chu heti hi a ni." 
Numbers4:42 Meraria thlahte chu a chi leh a chhûngkuaa thliarin," 
Numbers4:43 Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl tlâk, kum sawmthum aṭanga kum sawmnga inkâr mi zawng zawng hming an ziak chhuak a." 
Numbers4:44 Hming ziak zawng chu mi sângthum leh zahnih an tling. 
Numbers4:45 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk awiha Mosia leh Aronan Meraria thlahte an ziak zât chu heti hi a ni. 
Numbers4:46 Levia chite chu a chi leh a chhûngkuaa thliarin Mosia leh Arona leh Israel hruaitute chuan," 
Numbers4:47 kum sawmthum aṭanga kum sawmnga inkâr, Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl tlâk, thil phur thei te" 
Numbers4:48 hming chu an ziak chhuak a, mi sângriat leh zanga leh sawmriat an tling." 
Numbers4:49 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin Mosia chuan mi tin an thawh tûr leh phurh tûr ṭheuh a ruatsak a, an hming pawh a chhinchhiah vek a." 
Numbers5:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah; 
Numbers5:2 “Israel-te chu hrilh rawh: vuna phâr natna vei te, thipût lai te, mitthi ruang khawih vânga bawlhhlawhte chu riahhmun ata an hnawt chhuak tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:3 Chutianga bawlhhlawhna nei chu hnawt chhuak vek rawh u; riahhmunah kei pawh ka awm ve si a, an tibawrhbâng ang e”, a ti a." 
Numbers5:4 Israel mite chuan Mosia hnêna Lalpa thu sawi chu an awih a, daipâwnah an hnawt chhuak ta vek a." 
Numbers5:5 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers5:6 “Israel-te chu hrilh rawh: Lalpa thu bawhchhiain tu pawhin mi chungah thil sual ti sela, thupha a chawi tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:7 A thil sual tih man chu kim takin a rûl ang a, tihsualna pa chu hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a pêk belh tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:8 Pêk tûra chu thi sela, laichîn hnai a neih bawk si loh chuan a rulhna tûr sum chu puithiam chanpual atân Lalpa hnêna pêk tûr a ni. Hei hi sual thawina thilhlana berâmchal bâka pêk tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:9 Israel miten chutiang thilpêk chu an rawn hlan chuan a dawngtu puithiam chuan a nei ang. 
Numbers5:10 Puithiamte chuan thilhlan an lo dawn rêng rêng an nei zêl tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers5:11 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers5:12 “Israel-te chu hetiang hian thu hrilh rawh: Tu nupui pawh rinawm lovin 
Numbers5:13 mi dangin mutpuiin uire sela, a pasal chuan a hriat chiah lohva, chesual ngei si, inpuang si lo, kut man ni bawk si lo chu," 
Numbers5:14 a pasalin a rinhlelha, a thîka, a nupui chu a chesual emaw, sual lo emaw a rinhlelh tlat si chuan," 
Numbers5:15 a nupui chu puithiam hnênah a hruai ang a, barli chhangphut kg. khat thilhlan tûra tuk zât chu, hriak telh loh, rimtui hâl tûr pawh tel lovin a rawn keng bawk tûr a ni; chu chu nupui rinhlelhawmte fiah nân thilhlan, an pasalten an rawn ken ṭhin tûr chu a ni." 
Numbers5:16 “Puithiam chuan hmeichhia chu a hruai ang a, Lalpa hmaah a dintîr ang a," 
Numbers5:17 hlumbêlin tui thianghlim a la ang a, Biakbûk chhuata vaivut chu a sâwk ang a, tuiah chuan a phul tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:18 Hmeichhia chu Lalpa hmaah chuan a dintîr ang a, a sam thlahin thîkthu avânga fiahna tûr chhangphut thilhlan ṭhenkhat chu a hûmtîr tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:19 Puithiam chuan hmeichhia chu chhia a chhamtîr tûr a ni. ‘Tu man an mutpui loh chea, i pasal laka thil bawlhhlawh i tih loh chuan ânchhe thlentu tui chhe lak ata hi i fihlîm ang;" 
Numbers5:20 amaherawhchu, i pasal laka khaw dang i hawia, i pasal ni lo mipain an mutpui chea, an tihbawrhbân che chuan i fihlîm lo vang,’ a ti ang a." 
Numbers5:21 Puithiam chuan hmeichhia chu a vau ang a, chhia a chhamtîr ang a, a hnênah, ‘ Lalpa chuan i chipuite ânchhe dawngah siam che rawh se;" 
Numbers5:22 ânchhe tuichhia i in tûr hian, i pum tipuar sela, i malpui inkâr tisâwng rawh se,’ a ti ang a, hmeichhia chuan, ‘Amen, Amen,’ a lo ti ang." 
Numbers5:23 Puithiam chuan ânchhe dawn tûr a chhamte chu lehkhaah a ziak ang a, tui chhiaah chuan a tleuh fai tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:24 A pum tina mai thei tui chhia chu a intîr hmain," 
Numbers5:25 thîkthu avânga fiahna tûr thilhlan chhangphut a hûmtîr kha puithiam chuan a lâksak ang a, Lalpa hmaah a thên ang a, maichâmah a rawn dah tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:26 Chhangphut thilhlan kha a vaia hlan vek a nih entîr nân a thên a thên ang a, maichâmah a hâl ral tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:27 Chumi zawhah chuan hmeichhia chu tui chhia kha a intîr tawh ang, a bawrhbâna a lo uire ngei a nih chuan tui chhia a in veleh a pum a na ang a, a dul a puar ang a, a mal inkâr a sâwng ang; mi ânchhedawngtu a ni ang." 
Numbers5:28 Hmeichhia chu a bawrhbân lohva, a thianghlim chuan eng mah a ti lo vang: nau a pai leh mai tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:29 Hetiang hi nupui, pasalte laka khaw dang hawi intibawrhbângte chungthu rêl dân tûr chu a ni." 
Numbers5:30 A pasalin mi dang laka a nupui chu a thîk miau si chuan puithiamin hmeichhia chu Lalpa hmaah a dintîr ang a, hêng thil hi a lo ti ang." 
Numbers5:31 A pasal chuan thiam lohna a nei lo vang a, a hmeichhia chuan thiam lohna a neih chuan a tuar tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers6:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers6:2 “Israel-te chu heti hian hrilh rawh: Mipain emaw, hmeichhiain emaw Nazarit-ho thutiam anga Lalpa hnênah a inhlan chhûng chuan," 
Numbers6:3 uain leh zu a nghei tûr a ni; uain thûr leh zu thûrte pawh a in tûr a ni lo, grep rah sâwr tui pawh a in tûr a ni lo, a rah pawh, a tharlâm emaw, pho ro emaw pawh a ei tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers6:4 Nazarit thutiama a inphuar chhûng chu grep aṭanga siam eng mah, a sâwr fu pawh a ei tûr a ni lo va." 
Numbers6:5 Nazarit thutiama a inphuar chhûng chu a lu pawh ziah kâwn tûr a ni hek lo; Lalpa tâna a inhlan chhûng chuan serh hran a ni a, a samte pawh a ṭhan ṭhanin a ṭhang mai tûr a ni." 
Numbers6:6 Lalpa tâna a inhlan chhûng hian mitthi ruang a khawih tûr a ni lo. 
Numbers6:7 A nu leh pa ruang pawh, a unaupa leh a farnu ruang pawh khawihin a intibawlhhlawh tûr a ni lo, a inserh hran lai a ni si a." 
Numbers6:8 Nazarit mi a nih chhûng chu Lalpa tâna serh hran a ni. 
Numbers6:9 A bula mi thi thut sela, a ruangin a sam chu khawih palhin tibawlhhlawh sela, ni sarih a nghâk ang a, a sam chu a ziat kawlh vek tûr a ni; tichuan, a thianghlim leh thei ang." 
Numbers6:10 A ni riat ni chuan ṭhuro pahnih emaw, pârva no pahnih emaw Inbiakna bûkah puithiam hnênah a rawn keng ang a," 
Numbers6:11 ani chuan sual thawi nân pakhat chu a lo hlansak ang a, pakhat chu hâlral thilhlanah a hâl ang a, mitthi ruangin a khawih avânga amah thenna chu a tihsak ang a, chumi ni vek chuan a sam chu a serh thar leh tûr a ni." 
Numbers6:12 Nazarit mi atân Lalpa hnênah a inhlân thar leh ang a, kum khat vêla upa berâmno, a pa, bawhchhiat man thilhlanah a hlân ang. A inserhhranna kha tihbawlhhlawh a nih avângin tûn hmaa Nazarit mi a nih chhûng kha a thlâwn mai a ni ang." 
Numbers6:13 “Nazarit miin a hun a tlâk hnuin hetiang hian thil a ti tûr a ni: Inbiakna bûkah a lo kal ang a," 
Numbers6:14 Lalpa hnêna thilhlan atân hêngte hi a rawn keng tûr a ni: hâlral thilhlan atân berâmno, a pa, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo; sual thawina thilhlan atân berâmno, a nu, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo; remna thilhlan atân berâmchal hmêlhem lo;" 
Numbers6:15 buhbâl thilhlan atân kho chhûngah dawidim telh loh, chhangphut ṭha chia siam, hriak nêna hmeh, chhang tlang te, hriaka tâl chhang pan te, in tûr thilhlan atân uain te hi." 
Numbers6:16 Puithiam chuan Lalpa hmaah a rawn keng ang a, sual thawina te, hâlral thilhlan te chu a hlân ang." 
Numbers6:17 Berâmchal chu remna thilhlanah a hlân ang a, a rual chuan buhbâl thilhlanah dawidim telh loh chhang kho khat chu in tûr thilhlan uain nên chuan a hlân bawk ang." 
Numbers6:18 Tin, Nazarit mi chuan a sam serh chu Inbiakna bûk kawngka bulah chuan a ziat fai ang a, remna thilhlan hâlnaah chuan a rawh tûr a ni." 
Numbers6:19 Puithiam chuan berâmchal dâr chhum hmin leh khova dah dawidim telh loh chhang tlang pakhat leh chhang pan pakhat chu a la ang a, Nazarit mi hnênah chuan, a lu a meh fai hnuah, a pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers6:20 Chu chu puithiam chuan thên thilhlanah a thên ang a, puithiam tâna serh hran a ni ang, a bawp leh a irno, puithiam chan tûra serh hran ṭhinte nên. Chumi zawh chuan Nazarit mi khân uain a in thei tawh ang." 
Numbers6:21 “Hei hi Nazarit mi tih tûr chu a ni; mahse, chu mi chuan tih tûr tuk bâk thilhlan pêk a lo tiam chuan, a tiam ang chu a ti ngei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers6:22 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah: 
Numbers6:23 “Arona leh a fate chu hrilh rawh, hetiang hian mipui tân malsâwmna an dîl tûr a ni:" 
Numbers6:24 Lalpa chuan malsâwm che uin vêng che u rawh se," 
Numbers6:25 Lalpa hmêl chu in chungah êng sela, khawngaih che u rawh se." 
Numbers6:26 Lalpa chuan in lam lo hawi sela, thlamuanna pe che u rawh se." 
Numbers6:27 Chutiang chuan Israel mite chungah ka hming in chham ang a, keiin mal ka sâwm ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers7:1 Mosian Biakbûk a din zawh chuan, Biakbûk leh a bungrua zawng zawng chu maichâm leh a bungbêl zawng zawng nên hriak a hnawih a, a thian thianghlim a." 
Numbers7:2 Israel hnam hruaitu, hotua an neih, chhiarpui titute kha, an lo kal a, thilhlan an rawn keng a." 
Numbers7:3 An thilhlan chu bâwngtawlailîr chung nei paruk leh bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih a ni, hruaitu pahnihin bâwngtawlailîr pakhat an thawh ṭâwm a, hruaitu tinin bâwngpa pakhat ṭheuh an tum a ni; Biakbûk kawtah chuan an rawn kai a." 
Numbers7:4 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers7:5 “Inbiakna bûk rawngbâwlna atân a ṭangkai ang, lo dawnsak la, an hna tam dân athuin Levia chite hnênah sem ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers7:6 Mosia chuan tawlailîrte leh bâwngpate chu a lo dawng a, Levia chite chu a sem a." 
Numbers7:7 Tawlailîr pahnih leh bâwng pali chu Gersona thlahte hnênah, an hna azirin a pe a." 
Numbers7:8 Tawlailîr pali leh bâwng pariat chu Meraria thlahte hnênah, an hna azirin a pe a; puithiam Arona fapa Ithamara kutah hêng hi dah a ni." 
Numbers7:9 Kohata thlahte erawh chuan chan an nei lo; thil thianghlimte chu anmahni ko ngeia zâwn tûra tih an nih avâng khân. 
Numbers7:10 Hruaitute chuan maichâm serh thianghlim lawm nân thilhlan tûr an rawn la a. 
Numbers7:11 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Hruaitu pakhat zêl hian, a ni indawtin maichâm serh hran lawm nân an thilpêkte chu rawn dah thliah thliah rawh se,” a ti a." 
Numbers7:12 A ni hmasa berah chuan Juda thlah hruaitu Aminadaba fapa Nasona chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn dah a. 
Numbers7:13 Tangkaraw thlêng, kg. khat leh a chanvea rit leh tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariata rit, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:14 rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk, rimtui hâl tûra khat nên - hêng hi Tempula bûkna hman laia bûk vek a ni." 
Numbers7:15 Hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno pakhat;" 
Numbers7:16 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:17 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Aminadaba fapa Nasona thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:18 A ni hnih ni chuan Isakara thlah hruaitu, Zuara fapa Nethanelan a thilpêk chu a rawn keng a;" 
Numbers7:19 hêng hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:20 rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk rimtui hâl tûra khat, hêng hi Tempula hman lai bûknaa bûk vek a ni." 
Numbers7:21 Hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat," 
Numbers7:22 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:23 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Nathanela, Zuara fapa thilpêkte chu a ni." 
Numbers7:24 Ni thum ni chuan Zebulun thlah hruaitu Helona fapa Eliaba chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:25 hêng hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:26 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk; hêng hi Tempula hman lai bûknaa bûk vek a ni. 
Numbers7:27 Hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat;" 
Numbers7:28 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:29 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga hêngte hi Helona fapa Eliaba thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:30 Ni li ni chuan Reubena thlah hruaitu Sedeura fapa Elizura chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:31 hêng hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:32 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk; hêng hi Tempula hman lai bûknaa bûk vek a ni. 
Numbers7:33 Hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat;" 
Numbers7:34 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:35 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêng hi Sedeura fapa Elizura thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:36 Ni nga ni chuan Simeona thlah hruaitu Zurisadaia fapa Selumiela chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:37 hêng hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh, gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:38 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk - hêng hi Tempula hman lai bûknaa bûk vek a ni; 
Numbers7:39 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat;" 
Numbers7:40 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:41 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Zerusadaia fapa Elizura thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:42 Ni ruk ni chuan Gada thlah hruaitu Deuela fapa Eliasafa chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:43 hêngte hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:44 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk - hêngte hi Tempula hman lai bûknaa bûk vek a ni. 
Numbers7:45 Hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat;" 
Numbers7:46 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:47 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Deuela fapa Eliasafa thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:48 Ni sarih ni chuan Efraima thlah hruaitu Amihuda fapa Elisama chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:49 hêngte hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:50 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk - hêngte hi Tempula hman lai bûknaa bûk vek a ni. 
Numbers7:51 Hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno, a pa pakhat," 
Numbers7:52 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat," 
Numbers7:53 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Amihuda fapa Elisama thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:54 Ni riat ni chuan Manasea thlah hruaitu Pedazura fapa Gamaliela chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:55 hêngte hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:56 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk - hêng hi Tempula bûkna hman laia bûk vek a ni; 
Numbers7:57 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat," 
Numbers7:58 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:59 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Pedazura fapa Gamaliela thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:60 Ni kua ni chuan Benjamina thlah hruaitu Gideona fapa Abidana chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:61 hêngte hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:62 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk - hêng hi Tempula bûkna hman laia bûk vek a ni. 
Numbers7:63 Hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat;" 
Numbers7:64 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:65 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Gideona fapa Abidana thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:66 Ni sâwm ni chuan Gada thlah hruaitu Amisadaia fapa Ahiezera chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:67 hêngte hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng, kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:68 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk - hêngte hi Tempula hman lai bûknaa bûk vek a ni. 
Numbers7:69 Hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat," 
Numbers7:70 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:71 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Amisadaia fapa Ahiezera thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:72 Ni sâwm leh ni khat ni chuan Asera thlah hruaitu Okrana fapa Pagiela chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:73 hêngte hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:74 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk - hêngte hi Tempula bûkna hman laia bûk vek a ni; 
Numbers7:75 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat;" 
Numbers7:76 sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:77 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Okrana fapa Pagiela thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:78 Ni sâwm leh pahnih ni chuan Naftalia thlah hruaitu Enana fapa Ahira chuan a thilpêkte chu a rawn keng a; 
Numbers7:79 hêngte hi a thilpêkte chu a ni: tangkaraw thlêng kg. khat leh a chanve bûk, tangkaraw chawhtawlh gram zariat bûk, buhbâl thilhlan tûr chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh, a vûm thâr ve ve;" 
Numbers7:80 rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu gram za leh sâwm bûk - hêngte hi Tempula bûkna hman laia bûk vek a ni; 
Numbers7:81 hâlral thilhlan tûr bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pakhat;" 
Numbers7:82 sual thawina thilhlan tûr kêl pakhat; 
Numbers7:83 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal panga, kêl panga leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi vêl panga - hêngte hi Enana fapa Ahira thilpêk rawn kente chu a ni." 
Numbers7:84 Hriak hnawiha maichâm hlan ni chuan a lawm nân hruaitute chuan hêng thilpêk hi an rawn keng a ni: a vaiin tangkaraw thlêng sâwm leh pahnih, tangkaraw chawhtawlh sâwm leh pahnih, rangkachak berhbu sâwm leh pahnih;" 
Numbers7:85 thlêng hi kg. khat leh a chanve zêl bûk a ni; chawhtawlh hi gram zariat zêla rit a ni; Tempula hman lai bûknaa bûkin tangkarua hi kg. sawmhnih leh pasarih leh gram zaruk a tling a ni. 
Numbers7:86 Rimtui hâl tûra khat rangkachak berhbu sâwm leh pahnih, gram za leh sâwm bûk zêl, a vaiin Tempula hman lai bûknaa bûkin kg. khat leh gram za leh sawmhnih a ni." 
Numbers7:87 Hâlral thilhlana hlan tûr bâwngtuai sâwm leh pahnih, berâmchal sâwm leh pahnih, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa sâwm leh pahnih leh chûng ruala telh tûr tuk zât buhbâl thilhlan chhangphut ṭha chi nên; sual thawina thilhlan atân kêl sâwm leh pahnih;" 
Numbers7:88 remna thilhlan atân bâwngtuai sawmhnih leh pali, berâmchal sawmruk; kêl sawmruk, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa sawmruk. Hêng hi hruaituten hriak hnawiha maichâm hlan nia an thilpêkte chu a ni." 
Numbers7:89 Mosia chu Lalpa be tûrin Inbiakna bûkah chuan a lût a. Thuthlung Bâwm chhîn, cherub pahnih aṭang chuan Lalpa ṭawng chu a hria a." 
Numbers8:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers8:2 “Arona chu hrilh rawh, khâwnvâr a hâlin a khâwnvâr pasarih chuan a hma lam a ên tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers8:3 Arona chuan chutiang chuan a ti a, Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang chuan hma lam ên tûr chuan khâwnvârte chu a chhi a." 
Numbers8:4 Khâwnvâr dahna chu a bul vâwng leh a zâr, pangpâr lema chei te nên chuan, rangkachaka chher a ni; siam dân tûr Mosia hnêna Lalpa sawi ang chiaha chher a ni." 
Numbers8:5 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers8:6 “Israel mite zîng aṭangin Levia chite hi tihrang la, thian thianghlim rawh." 
Numbers8:7 Hetiang hian thian ang che: tlenfaina tui theh la, an hmul zawng zawng ziat fai rawh se, an puan su sela, inbualtîr rawh." 
Numbers8:8 Bâwngtuai rawn la sela, a ruala hlan tel tûr buhbâl thilhlan atân chhangphut ṭha chi hriaka hmeh rawn la tel rawh se; sual thawina thilhlana hlan tûr bâwngtuai dang la bawk ang che." 
Numbers8:9 Israel-ho chu pung khâwm tûrin ko la, Levia chite chu Inbiakna bûk hmaah chuan dintîr ang che." 
Numbers8:10 Israel mite chuan Levia chite lu-ah chuan an kut an nghat ang a," 
Numbers8:11 Lalpa rawngbâwltu an nih theih nân Arona chuan Levia chite chu Israel-te zîng ata chu ka ta ni tûrin thên thilhlanah a hlân tûr a ni. 
Numbers8:12 Levia chite chuan bâwngtuai lu-ah chuan an kut an nghat ang a, an sual thawina tûrin bâwngtuai pakhat chu sual thawina thilhlanah hlansak tûr a ni, pakhat chu hâlral thilhlana hâl tûr a ni." 
Numbers8:13 “Levia chite chu Arona leh a fate kaihhruai tûrin Lalpa tân thên thilhlanah i hlân tûr a ni. 
Numbers8:14 Israel mite zîng aṭang chuan Levia chite chu i tihrang ang a, ka ta an lo ni tawh ang." 
Numbers8:15 I tihthianghlima i hlan hnu chuan Levia chite chu Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl tlâk an ni tawh ang. 
Numbers8:16 Israel-te fa tîr, chhûl keuho, ka neih tûrte aiah anni hi ka nei dâwn a ni, anni neitu chu keimah chauh hi ka ni." 
Numbers8:17 Aigupta mite fa tîr ka tihhlum lai khân Israel mite fapa upa berte leh an ran piang hmasa berte chu ka tân ka zuah a ni. 
Numbers8:18 Tûnah Israel-te fa tîr aiah Levia chite hi ka nei dâwn a ni. 
Numbers8:19 Arona leh a fate puitu atân an hnêna Israel-te thilpêk an ni; Israel mite tân Hmun Thianghlimah rawng an bâwl ang a; Israel mite chungah thil ṭha lo a thlen loh nân Inbiakna bûka an kal tûr anni hian an lo vêng ṭhîn ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers8:20 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Mosia te, Arona te leh Israel pungkhâwmho chuan Levia chite chu an hlân a." 
Numbers8:21 Levia chite chu an intifai a, an puante an su a, Arona chuan Lalpa hnêna thên thilhlanah anni chu a hlân a. Sual thawina thilhlan pawh chu a tihsak a." 
Numbers8:22 Levia chite chungchânga Lalpa thupêk zawng zawng chu mite chuan an ti a. Tichuan, Levia chite chu Hmun Thianghlima Arona leh a fate hnuaia rawngbâwltu an ni ta a." 
Numbers8:23 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers8:24 “Kum sawmhnih leh panga an tlinin Levia chite chu Inbiakna bûkah hna an thawk ṭheuh tûr a ni; 
Numbers8:25 kum sawmnga an tlin chuan an châwl tûr a ni. 
Numbers8:26 Hemi hnu hi chuan an Levia chipui, Inbiakna bûka hna thawk an pui ve thei ang: anmahni pual chuan eng mah an ti tûr a ni tawh lo; Levia chite thawh dân tûr chu hetianga rel tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers9:1 Aigupta an chhuahsan hnu kum hnihna, thla khatnaah chuan Sinai thlalêrah Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers9:2 “Israel-te chuan Kalhlên kût a hun takah hmang rawh se. 
Numbers9:3 Tûn thla ni sâwm leh pali ni hian ni tlâk aṭangin tih dân tûr rêl diam tawh angin in hmang tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers9:4 Tichuan, Mosia chuan mipui chu Kalhlên kût hmang tûrin a hrilh a," 
Numbers9:5 thla khatna, ni sâwm leh pali tlaiah, Sinai thlalêrah chuan an hmang ta a. Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang chiah zêl chuan mite chuan engkim an ti a." 
Numbers9:6 Mi ṭhenkhat, mitthi ruang an khawih avânga bawlhhlawh an awm a, chûng mite chuan a ni tak chuan Kalhlên kût chu an hmang ve thei lo va." 
Numbers9:7 Mosia leh Arona hnênah an lo kal a, “Mitthi ruang kan khawih a ṭûl avânga bawlhhlawh kan ni a; Israel mi dangte ang bawkin Lalpa hnênah thil kan hlân ve thei dâwn lâwm ni?” an rawn ti a." 
Numbers9:8 Mosia chuan, “ Lalpa thu ka dawn hma chu lo nghâk teh u,” a ti a." 
Numbers9:9 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers9:10 “Israel mite chu hrilh rawh. In zînga mi emaw, in thlahte emaw mitthi ruang an khawih avânga an bawlhhlawhin emaw, ram hla taka an zinin emaw, Kalhlên kût hman an duh ve si chuan," 
Numbers9:11 thla khat hnuah, thla hnihna ni sâwm leh pali ni tlai lamah an hmang ve thei ang. Chhang dawidim telh loh leh lambak nên hmang ang che u." 
Numbers9:12 A sa in ei bâng chu a tûk thlengin dah tûr a ni lo, a ruhte pawh pakhat mah titliak suh u; Kalhlên kût hman dân tûr tuk ang takin in hmang tûr a ni." 
Numbers9:13 Bawlhhlawh ni lo, ram hla taka zin pawh ni si lovin Kalhlên kût hi a hman duh loh chuan a mite zîng ata hnawh chhuah tûr a ni, a hun ruatah ka hnêna thilhlan a rawn hlan duh loh avângin a thil sual tih mawh chu a phur tûr a ni." 
Numbers9:14 “In zînga chêng hnam dangin Kalhlên kût hi a hman ve duh chuan a dân ang thlapin a hmang tûr a ni. Tu tân pawh, a khual a tualin, a hman dân tûr a thuhmun a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers9:15 Biakbûk an din zawh ni chuan chhûmin a rawn khuh a, tlaiah chuan a tûk zîng thlengin mei anga êng a awm a." 
Numbers9:16 Chutiang chuan chhûmin a khuh a, zânah mei anga êng chu a awm ziah a." 
Numbers9:17 Chhûm a kian apiangin Israel-te chuan awmhmun an sawn a, chhûmin a rawn khuhna hmunah chuan awmhmun an khuar leh ṭhîn." 
Numbers9:18 Lalpa thupêk ang zêlin bûk an sawn a, a thu vêkin bûk an khuar a. Chhûmin Biakbûk a khuh chhûng chu an awmna ngaiah an awm reng ṭhîn a ni." 
Numbers9:19 Chhûm chuan rei tak chhûng Biakbûk chu a khuh pawhin Lalpa thu chu an awih a, an insawn lo." 
Numbers9:20 A châng chuan Biakbûk chu chhûmin ni rei lo tê chauh a khuh pawhin Lalpa thupêk angin an insawnin an insawn lo. 
Numbers9:21 Zan khat chauh, tlai aṭanga a tûk zîng thleng chauhva a awm châng a awm a, chhûm a kian veleh an insawn mai ṭhîn a ni." 
Numbers9:22 Ni hnih khat mai emaw, thla khat dâwn lai emaw, kum khat emaw, a aia rei emaw Biakbûk chunga chhûm a awm chhûng chu an insawn lo, a kian veleh an insawn ṭhîn." 
Numbers9:23 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang zêlin bûk an khuar a, awmhmun an insawn ṭhîn." 
Numbers10:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers10:2 ‘Tangkaraw tawtawrâwt pahnih chher rawh; mipui koh khâwm nân leh kal chhuah a hunah in hâm dâwn nia. 
Numbers10:3 A ruala an ham chuan Israel-ho chu Inbiakna bûkah, i bulah an lo pung khâwm ang a," 
Numbers10:4 pakhat chauh an ham erawh chuan hruaituho, sâng chunga hotute chauh khân an rawn pan tûr che a ni." 
Numbers10:5 Rang taka an ham sek sek chuan khawchhak lama bûk neiho kha tawlh chhuak rawh se. 
Numbers10:6 Rang taka an ham nawn leh hunah chhim lama bûk neiho kha an tawlh chhuak tûr a ni. An ham sek sek chuan tawlh chhuah tûr tihna a ni. 
Numbers10:7 Rei tak thlûka an ham chuan kal khâwm tûr tihna a ni. 
Numbers10:8 Arona leh a thlahte hi tawtawrâwt hâmtu tûrte chu an ni. Hetiang hi kumkhaw tih dân tûr a ni. 
Numbers10:9 “In ramah indona a awma, in hmêlma rawn beitute laka lo ṭang zâwk in nih chuan, tawtawrâwt chu hâm sek sek ula, kei Lalpa hian ka lo hria ang a, in hmêlmate lak ata ka rawn chhan ang che u." 
Numbers10:10 In lâwmna nikhuaah, thla thar kûtahte leh hun serh in hman ṭuma hâlral thilhlan in hlantein hâm bawk ang che u, chu chu ka lo hria ang a, ka ngaihven ang che u, Lalpa, in Pathian ka nih hi." 
Numbers10:11 Aigupta an chhuahsan kum hnihna, thla hnih, ni sawmhnih ni chuan Inbiakna bûk chunga Lalpa chhûm chu a kiang a," 
Numbers10:12 Sinai aṭang chuan zawi zawiin an inchhawp sawn a; Paran thlalêr an thlen chuan chhûm chu a ding leh ta a. 
Numbers10:13 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin a pâwl indawtin an chhuak a. 
Numbers10:14 Juda pâwla chhiarho chu an puanzâr nên an chhuak hmasa ber a, Juda thlahte chu Aminadaba fapa Nasonan a ho va." 
Numbers10:15 Isakara thlahte chu Zuara fapa Nethanelan a ho va. 
Numbers10:16 Zebuluna thlahte chu Helona fapa Eliaban a ho va. 
Numbers10:17 Biakbûk chu an ṭhiat a, Gersona fate leh Meraria faten an zâwn a, an zui a." 
Numbers10:18 Reubena pâwla chhiarte pawh chu an puanzâr nên an chhuak a, Reubena thlahte chu Sedeura fapa Elizuran a ho va." 
Numbers10:19 Simeona thlahte chu Zurisadaia fapa Selumielan a ho va. 
Numbers10:20 Gada thlahte chu Deuela fapa Elisafan a ho va. 
Numbers10:21 Kohata thlahte chuan bûk chhûnga thil thianghlimte an zâwn a, a dawtah an kal a, an bûk khuarna tûr hmun an va thlen ve chuan bûk chu an lo zâr zo tawh ṭhîn." 
Numbers10:22 Efraim pâwlhova chhiarte chuan an puanzâr nên an zui a. Efraima thlahte chu Amihuda fapa Elisaman a ho va. 
Numbers10:23 Manasea thlahte chu Pedazura fapa Gamalielan a ho va. 
Numbers10:24 Benjamina thlahte chu Gideonia fapa Abidanan a ho va. 
Numbers10:25 Dana pâwla chhiarte chu an puanzâr nên an chhuak hnuhnûng ber a. Dana thlahte chu Amisadaia fapa Abiezeran a ho va. 
Numbers10:26 Asera thlahte chu Okrana fapa Pagielan a ho va. 
Numbers10:27 Naftalia thlahte chu Enana fapa Ahiran a ho va. 
Numbers10:28 Chutianga pâwl indawt thliah chuan Israel fate chu awmhmun an insawnin an kal ṭhîn. 
Numbers10:29 Mosia puzawn, Midian mi, Reuela fa Hobaba hnênah Mosia chuan, ‘ Lalpa chuan ram min pêk a tiam a; chu ram chu kan thleng ṭhelh ṭhelh tawh a ni. Israel mite chu tihhmuingîl a tiam a, lo tel ve la, kan zâr i zo dâwn nia,’ a ti a." 
Numbers10:30 Hobaba chuan, ‘Tel ve lo ve, kan ram lamah ka haw leh dâwn,’ a ti a." 
Numbers10:31 Mosia chuan, ‘Min hâwnsan lo hrâm teh. Nang chuan thlalêra bûk khuarna hmun ṭha i hre vek a." 
Numbers10:32 I lo tel ve phawt chuan Lalpa malsâwmna kan dawn zawng zawng kan sem ve zêl ang che,’ a ti a." 
Numbers10:33 Lalpa tlâng aṭang chuan ni thum an kal a, Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm chu an hmaah, an riahna tûr hmun zawngin a kal zêl a." 
Numbers10:34 An riahhmun ata an chhuah chuan Lalpa chhûm chu an chungah a awm zêl a. 
Numbers10:35 Thuthlung Bâwm a chêt sawn dâwn apiangin Mosia chuan, ‘Aw Lalpa, tho la, i hmêlmate chu ûm darh la, a hawtu che chu tlânchhe rawh se,’ a ti ṭhîn a." 
Numbers10:36 Bâwm chu an nghah veleh, ‘Aw Lalpa, Israel chhûngkaw sâng tam tak zîngah hian lo haw leh rawh,’ a ti ṭhîn." 
Numbers11:1 Mipui chu an hahin an mangang a, Lalpa chungah an vui a. Lalpa chuan a lo hriatin a thinur hle a, mipui zîngah chuan mei a chhuahtîr a, an riahhmun hmâwrtawng ber thlêr khat chu a kâng chhe vek a." 
Numbers11:2 Mite chuan Mosia an au va, ani chuan Lalpa hnênah a dîl a, mei chu a rêm ta a." 
Numbers11:3 Lalpa mei an zînga a chhuah avângin chu hmun hmingah chuan Tabera an vuah a. 
Numbers11:4 Israel-te zîngah hnam dang tel ve zêl an awm a, chûng chuan sa an châk hle a, Israel mite pawh chuan, “Sa kan va châk ve le:" 
Numbers11:5 Aigupta ramah lah khân duh duhin sangha kan ei a, a man sawi tham a ni si lo; fanghma te, dawnfawh te, zo-purûn te, vai-purûnsen te, vai-purûnvâr te tak kha aw:" 
Numbers11:6 Kan va râwp ta ve, mana mai lo hi chu thil dang lah a awm si lo,” an ti a." 
Numbers11:7 Mana chu chhibung vâr ang deuh, tuikeplung anga vâr hi a ni." 
Numbers11:8 An chhar khâwm a, râwt lungah te an râwt dip a, sumah te an dêng a, a chângin an chhûm a, a chângin chhangah an siam a, an ur a, a tui dân chu oliv hriaka hmeh chhang kan ang a ni." 
Numbers11:9 Zânah dai tlâk rualin mana chu a lo tla ve ṭhîn. 
Numbers11:10 A chhûng chhûngin an phun a, an bûk kawngka bula an âng sup sup chu Mosian a lo hria a. Lalpa chu an chungah a thinur viau tih a hriat chuan Mosia chu a mangang ta hle a." 
Numbers11:11 Lalpa hnênah, “Engtizia nge min va timangang ve? Hêng mite mawh hi engtizia nge min phurhtîr, min va khawngaih lo ve?" 
Numbers11:12 Hêng mite hi ka fate pawh an ni lo va, engtizia nge nau hnute hne lai nuin a pua ang hrima an pate hnêna pêk i tiam ram paw thleng tûra min tih le?" 
Numbers11:13 Khawi lama sa nge kei tehlulin ka pêk ang? ‘Sa kan châk êm mai, min pe rawh,’ tiin ṭap chungin min rawn nawr buai hi?" 
Numbers11:14 Keimah mai zawngin hêng mite hi ka tuar dâwn lo, a hahthlâk lutuk." 
Numbers11:15 Hetianga min tih dâwn zawngin min khawngaih la, min tihlum zâwk mai teh, heti taka tihretheih hi zawng ka peih ta lo,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:16 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Mipui zînga hruaitu deuh deuh mi sawmsarih han khâwm la, Inbiakna bûkah rawn hruai la, i bulah lo ding teh se." 
Numbers11:17 Ka lo chhuk ang a, ka rawn be dâwn che nia. I chunga thlarau awm kha ka sem ve ang, mipui enkawlna mawh chu nangmah maiin i phur tawh lo vang a, an phurhpui tawh ang che." 
Numbers11:18 Mipui hnênah, ‘Naktûk atân inserh thianghlim rawh u, sa in ei dâwn e; ‘sa ei tûr nei teh ila aw, Aigupta rama a tam ṭhin vei nên,’ tia in sa châk ṭap thâwm chu Lalpa beng a thleng a ni; Lalpa chuan sa a pe ngei dâwn a che u, in ei mawlh ang." 
Numbers11:19 Ni hnih khat mai ni lo, ni nga emaw, ni sâwm emaw, ni sawmhnih emaw mai pawh ni lo," 
Numbers11:20 a thlaa thla khat pumhlûm, luakchhuak hlui khawpin in ei ang a, a ngei hluah hluah ang che u, ‘Engtiziaa Aigupta ram chhuahsan ta mai nge maw kan nih le?’ tiin in zînga awm Lalpa chu in hnâwl a, ṭapin in nawr buai si a,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:21 Mosia chuan, “Ka mi hruaite hi, mahni kea kal thei ngawt pawh, mi nuairuk zet an ni a, ‘thla khat pumhlûm an ei tûr sa ka pe dâwn’ i ti a," 
Numbers11:22 berâm leh ran rual zawng zawng pawh talh ila, an ei khawp a tling dâwn em ni? Tuifinriat sangha zawng zawng pawh man ila, an kham dâwn em ni?” a ti a." 
Numbers11:23 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Tih theih loh ka nei ta em ni? Ka sawi anga thil a awm dâwn leh dâwn loh i hre mai ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:24 Mosia chu a chhuak a, Lalpa thu chu mipuite a hrilh a, an upa sawmsarihte chu a hruai a, Biakbûk vêlah chuan a dintîr a." 
Numbers11:25 Lalpa chu chhûmah a lo chhuk a, a rawn bia a; a chunga thlarau dah ṭhenkhat chu a la a, mi sawmsarihte chungah chuan a dah a; chutia an chunga thlarau a lo awm veleh chuan zâwlnei angin thu an sawi ta a, rei erawh chu an sawi lo." 
Numbers11:26 Sawmsarih zînga tel mi pahnih Eldada leh Medada chu Biakbûk kal ve lovin an riahhmunah an awm a, anni pawh chuan zâwlnei angin thu an sawi ve bawk a." 
Numbers11:27 Tlangvâl pakhat hi Mosia hnênah a lo tlân a, “Eldada leh Medadan riahhmunah thu an sawi bual bual mai,” a rawn ti a." 
Numbers11:28 Mosia puitu Josua, Nuna fapa chuan, “Ka pu, khap teh,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:29 Mosia chuan, “Ngaimawh viauvin mi ring a ni maw? Lalpa chuan a thlarau chu mi zawng zawng pe se, zâwlnei ni vek se tih nâk alai a,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:30 Mosia leh upa sawmsarihte chu riahbûk lamah an haw a. 
Numbers11:31 Lalpa chuan thli a tlehtîr a, tuifinriat aṭang chuan vahmîm a rawn lên a, tawng hnih vêl leka sânga thlâwkin an bûkah leh a vêl ni khat kal hual chhûngah chuan an ṭum a." 
Numbers11:32 Chumi ni leh a tûkah chuan nilêng zânkhuain vahmîm chu an man khâwm a, a man tlêm ber pawhin kuintal sâwm vêl an man a ni; an bûk vêlah chuan ni sa-ah an rêp a." 
Numbers11:33 A sa an ei mêk lai chuan Lalpa thin an tiur a, an zîngah hri na tak a lêng ta a." 
Numbers11:34 Mi râwp tak takte chu chutah chuan an phûm avângin chu hmun chu Kibrot-hatava an vuah a. 
Numbers11:35 Kibrot-hatava aṭang chuan Hazaroth-ah an insawn a, chutah chuan an châm rei ta deuh va." 
Numbers12:1 Miriami leh Arona chuan Mosian Kus mi nupuia a neih avângin an hmusit a. 
Numbers12:2 “ Lalpa hian Mosia hnênah chauh em ni thu a sawi bîk? Keini pawh min be lo vem ni?” an ti a. Lalpa chuan chu chu a lo hria a. 
Numbers12:3 Mosia chu mi inngaitlâwm tak a ni a, khawvêla mi inngaitlâwm thei ber a ni hial ang." 
Numbers12:4 Lalpa chuan Mosia te, Arona te leh Miriami te chu a ko va, “Inbiakna bûkah in pathumin lo kal teh u,” a ti ta thut mai a, an kal ta a." 
Numbers12:5 Lalpa chu chhûm dingah chuan a lo chhuk a, bûk kawngkaah chuan a ding a. Arona leh Miriami chu a ko va, an va pan a." 
Numbers12:6 An hnênah, “Ka thu hi ngaithla teh u, in zînga zâwlneite chuan zêlin emaw min hmu a, mumangah emaw an hnênah thu ka sawi chauh ṭhîn." 
Numbers12:7 Ka chhiahhlawh Mosia hnênah chuan chutiangin ka ti ve ngai lo, a kutah ka mi Israel-te ka dah a," 
Numbers12:8 inhmatawnin kan inbe ṭhîn a ni, fiah takin thu ka sawi a, tehkhin thu leh thu awmze rûk neiin ka be ngai lo, ka riruang pawh a hmu a ni. Engtizia nge ka chhiahhlawh Mosia hi in hmuhsit ngam le?” a ti a." 
Numbers12:9 An chungah chuan a thinur hle a, a kalsan ta mai a." 
Numbers12:10 Biakbûk aṭanga chhûm a kian chuan Miriami chu vûr anga vârin a phâr vâr ta uar a. Arona chuan Miriami chu a han en a, a lo phâr reng mai a." 
Numbers12:11 Arona chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ka pu, kan ât leh kan sual mawh hi min phurhtîr lo hrâm ang che." 
Numbers12:12 Thi leh dam kâra lêng, piangsual saa piang ang êm chuan awm lul suh se,” tiin a ngên a." 
Numbers12:13 Mosia chuan Lalpa a au va, “Aw Pathian, tidam hrâm teh, ka ngên a che,” a ti a." 
Numbers12:14 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “A pain a hmaiah chil chhâk sela, zakin ni sarih chu a biru dâwn lâwm ni? Ni sarih chhûng chu daipâwnah dah rawh, chutah in hruai lût leh dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Numbers12:15 Miriami chu daipâwnah ni sarih an dah a, a lo luh leh hma chu an insawn lo." 
Numbers12:16 Hazerot chu an chhuahsan a, Paran thlalêrah bûk an khuar a." 
Numbers13:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers13:2 “Hnam tin aṭangin mi fel tak pakhat zêl thlang chhuak la, Israel mite ka pêk tûr Kanan en thlithlai tûrin tîr rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers13:3 Israel mite zînga hotu deuh deuh chu Lalpa thupêk angin hêng mite hi Paran thlalêr aṭang chuan a tîr a. 
Numbers13:4 Reubena thlah aṭangin Zakura fapa Samua; 
Numbers13:5 Simeona thlah aṭangin Horia fapa Safata; 
Numbers13:6 Juda thlah aṭangin Jefunea fapa Kaleba," 
Numbers13:7 Isakara thlah aṭangin Josefa fapa Igala; 
Numbers13:8 Efraima thlah aṭangin Nuna fapa Hosea; 
Numbers13:8 Efraima thlah aṭangin Nuna fapa Hosea; 
Numbers13:9 Benjamina thlah aṭangin Rafua fapa Paltia; 
Numbers13:10 Zebuluna thlah aṭangin Sodia fapa Gadiela; 
Numbers13:11 Josefa fa Manasea thlah aṭangin Susia fapa Gadia; 
Numbers13:12 Dana thlah aṭangin Gemalia fapa Amiela; 
Numbers13:13 Asera thlah aṭangin Mikaela fapa Sethura; 
Numbers13:14 Naftalia thlah aṭangin Vopsia fapa Nabia; 
Numbers13:15 Gada thlah aṭangin Makia fapa Geuela. 
Numbers13:16 Hêng mite hi ram en thlithlai tûra a mi tirhte chu an ni. Nuna fapa Hosea hming hi a thlâksak a, Josua a vuah a." 
Numbers13:16 Hêng mite hi ram en thlithlai tûra a mi tirhte chu an ni. Nuna fapa Hosea hming hi a thlâksak a, Josua a vuah a." 
Numbers13:17 Mosia chuan Kanan ram en thlithlai tûrin a tîr a, “Heta ṭangin hmâr lamah kal ula, tlângramah khian chho vang che u," 
Numbers13:18 eng ang ram nge en thlithlai ula, mi an tam nge tam lo, an chak nge chak lo tih te," 
Numbers13:19 an ram chu a ṭha nge ṭha lo, khawpui kulh neiahte nge an chên bûk mai maiah;" 
Numbers13:20 ram chu a chênghnâwng nge chênghnâwng lo tih te, ngaw a ṭha nge ṭha lo tihte han en thlithlai rawh u, an thei rah ṭhenkhat chu han hâwn ngei ang che u,” a ti a. Grep rah vânglai a ni." 
Numbers13:21 Zin thlalêr aṭangin Hamath kalkhân bul Rehob thlengin an fang a. 
Numbers13:22 Chhim lam an tlawh chhuak hmasa a, Hebron-ah an kal a. Hetah hian Anaka thlah Ahiman hnam te, Sesai hnam te, Talmai hnam te an la awm a. Hebron khua hi Aigupta khawpui pakhat Zoan khua aiin kum sariha din hmasak a ni." 
Numbers13:23 Eskol phai an thleng a, grep bâwr khat chu a ṭang nên an hlep a, pahnihin an zâwn a, theibuhfai te, theipui rahte pawh an lo va." 
Numbers13:24 Chu hmun chu an grep rah bâwr chawiin Eskol an vuah a ni. 
Numbers13:25 Ni sawmli an thang a, ram an en thlithlai hnu chuan an kîr leh ta a." 
Numbers13:26 Mosia te, Arona te leh Israel mipui awmna hmun Paran thlalêra Kades chu an lo thleng a, an thei lawhte chu an entîr a." 
Numbers13:27 “Min tirhna ramah chuan kan han kal a, khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ram a lo ni teh meuh mai; thei rahte hi en teh u." 
Numbers13:28 A mi chêngte erawh chu mi kawlhsen tak tak an ni, khaw lian tak tak, kulh ṭha deuh deuhvah an awm a, Anak thlah miliante pawh kan hmu ṭeuh mai." 
Numbers13:29 Chhim lamah Amalek-ho an awm a, thlang lam ramah Hit mi te, Jebus mi te, Amor mi te an awm a, Mediteranean tuipui kamah leh Jordan lui ruamah Kanan mite an awm,” an ti a." 
Numbers13:30 Kaleba chuan Mosia hmaa mipui phun mur mur chu a tingawi ṭhuap a, “I rûn nghâl ang u, an ram chu kan luahlân mai ang, kan tam tâwk a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers13:31 Kaleba kalpuite chuan, “Keini aiin an tam a, kan ngam hauh lo vang,” an ti a." 
Numbers13:32 Israel mite zîngah chuan a ṭha lo lamin ram chanchin chu an sawi a. 
Numbers13:33 “Kan ram han en thlithlai chu ei khawp thar theihna pawh a ni lo, kan mi hmuhte lah pa lian pui pui an ni. Milian chi, Anak thlahte pawh kan hmu; an lakah khau ang lek kan ni a, anni pawhin khau ang lekin min hmu âwm e,” an ti a." 
Numbers14:1 Israel pungkhâwmho chu mangangin an ṭap zânkhua a. 
Numbers14:2 Mosia leh Arona chu an dem a, “Aigupta ramah khân lo thi ta zâwk ila a ṭha tûr, he thlalêrah pawh hian thi mai ila a ziaawm zâwk ang." 
Numbers14:3 Engtizia nge Lalpa hian indonaa thi tûr leka he rama min hruai le? Kan nupui fanau tê tê pawh hian an tuar ngei dâwn; Aigupta ramah kîr leh zâwk mai ila a ṭha ang,” an ti a." 
Numbers14:4 An inrâwn tlâng a, “Aigupta ramah min kîrpui thei tûr hruaitu i ruat ang u,” an ti a." 
Numbers14:5 Mosia leh Arona chu Israel pungkhâwmho hmaah chuan hmaia lei siin an kûn a. 
Numbers14:6 Ram en thlithlaitute zînga mi Nuna fapa Josua leh Jefunea fapa Kaleba pawh chuan pawi an ti a, an puan an pawtthlêr a," 
Numbers14:7 Israel pungkhâwmho hmaah chuan, “Kan ram en chu ram ṭha tak asin." 
Numbers14:8 Kan chungah Lalpa a lungnih phawt chuan min hruai ang a, khawizu leh hnutetui luanna ram chu min pe ngei ang." 
Numbers14:9 Lalpa lakah nuar lo hrâm rawh u: chûng ram mite chu hlau hek suh u, Lalpa chuan an rinchhan pathian lemte chu a hneh tawh a, bêl chhûnga sa ang mai an ni; hlau suh u,” an ti a." 
Numbers14:10 Mahse, pungkhâwmho chuan lunga den hlum an tum a, chutih lai chuan Israel mi zawng zawng hmuh tûrin Lalpa êng chu Inbiakna bûk chungah chuan a êng ta pum a." 
Numbers14:11 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Eng chen nge maw hêng mite hian min hmuhsit reng dâwn le? Thil mak heti zozai ka tihsak hnu pawhin min la ring lo fo em ni?" 
Numbers14:12 Hri ka lêntîr ang a, ka tiboral vek mai dâwn e; i fate aṭangin an aia tam zâwk leh thil ti thei zâwk ka din mai teh ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers14:13 Mosia chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Aigupta ram aṭangin ropui takin i hruai chhuak a, Aigupta miten an chunga thil tih i tum chu an hriat chuan," 
Numbers14:14 he rama awmte hi heti hian an hrilh ngei ang. Hêng mite hian nang, Lalpa hi kan zîngah i tel ve zêl a, chhûma bûk i rawn khuh apiangin nang pawh an hmu ṭhîn che a, chhûnah chhûm dingin i hruai a, zânah pawh mei dingin an hma i hruai ṭhîn tih an lo hre daih tawh a ni." 
Numbers14:15 I mite hi i tihhlum vek mai chuan, i hming ṭhatzia hretute chuan," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Pêk a tum ramah a hruai thleng thei lo va, an thi zo ta a ni,’ an ti ngei ang le!" 
Numbers14:17 Tichuan, aw Lalpa, i thiltihtheihzia han tilang la, i thutiam angin han ti teh." 
Numbers14:18 ‘Kei, Lalpa hi thinnel tak ka ni a, ngilnei tak, an sualna leh bawhchhiatna ngaidam ṭhîntu ka ni; amaherawhchu, thil tisual ngeite chu ka chhuah lo vang, an pate sualna avângin an fate, an tûte, chhuan thum chhuan li thleng thlengin ka hrem ang,’ i tih kha." 
Numbers14:19 I ngilneih avâng leh hêng mite hi Aigupta ram ata tawh i ngaihdam ṭhîn ang khân tûnah pawh ngaidam leh tûrin ka ngên a che,” a ti a." 
Numbers14:20 Lalpa chuan, “Mi dîl angin ka ngaidam ang e," 
Numbers14:21 Kei, Lalpa hi mi nung ka nih hi, ka ropuina leiah a khat a ni." 
Numbers14:22 Ka ropuina hmutu, Aigupta ramah leh thlalêra ka thiltih mak hmututen vawi sâwm chuang min fiah a, ka thu ngaithla duh lotute leh" 
Numbers14:23 min pawisa lotute hian an pate hnêna pêk ka tiam ram chu an lût ve tawp lo vang. 
Numbers14:24 Ka chhiahhlawh Kaleba hi chuan rilru dang a pu a, ka thu a awih êm avângin a va en thlithlai ramah chuan ka hruai ang a, a thlahte chuan chu ram chu an nei ang." 
Numbers14:25 Chu ram phaiah chuan Amalek leh Kanan mite an awm avângin naktûkah chuan Tuipui Sen panin kîr rawh u,” a ti a." 
Numbers14:26 Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah," 
Numbers14:27 “Hêng mi sual tak tak, phunchiar êm êmte hi eng chen nge ka dawh theih ang? Ka laka an phunchiarzia ka hria." 
Numbers14:28 An hnênah, ‘Mi nung ka nih hi, in duh ang chu ka tihsak ang che u, kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh hi," 
Numbers14:29 in thi ang a, in ruang chu thlalêrah hian a let pheng phung ang." 
Numbers14:30 In phunchiar êm avângin Nuna fapa Josua leh Jefunea fapa Kaleba te chauh lo hi chuan, kum sawmhnih a chin chung lam rêng rêng chu in hnêna pêk ka tiam ramah chuan in lût tawp lo vang." 
Numbers14:31 ‘Kan fanau tê tê hian an tuar ang a’ in tihte hi chu ka hruai lût ang a, a chanchin chauh in hriat ram chu an luah ang." 
Numbers14:32 Nangni erawh hi zawng thlalêrah in ruang a thal rem rum dâwn a ni. 
Numbers14:33 In fate chu thlalêrah kum sawmli an vâkvai ang a, in thih zawh hma chu in suahsual man in tuar dâwn a ni." 
Numbers14:34 Ram en thlithlai tûrin ni sawmli an thang a, ni khat aiah kum khat, a vaiin kum sawmli an vâkvai dâwn a ni, ka lâwm lo a ni tih in hria ang." 
Numbers14:35 Nangni mi sual pungkhâwmho, min kalh min kalh vei ṭhînte u, thlalêrah hian in thi phiar ang; kei, Lalpa hian ṭawng ka thlah tâk hi,” a ti a." 
Numbers14:36 Ram en thlithlai tûra tirh an lo kîra a ṭha lo zawnga ram chanchin sawia, mipui tilunghnûrtute chu," 
Numbers14:37 Lalpa hmaah hri veiin an thi ta a. 
Numbers14:38 Ram en thlithlaitute zîngah Nuna fapa Josua leh Jefunea fapa Kaleba chauh chu a dam chhun an ni ta a. 
Numbers14:39 Mosian chûng thu chu Israel mite a hrilh a; an lungawi lo hle a. 
Numbers14:40 A tûk zîngah chuan an tho va, tlângram lam pan an tum a, “Heti thleng hi kan lo kal tawh a, tûnah zawng Lalpa sawi rama luh kan inpeih ta, kan lo tisual a ni,” an ti a." 
Numbers14:41 Mosia chuan, “In hlawhtling dâwn lo tih hre reng chungin engtizia nge Lalpa thupêk in awih loh?" 
Numbers14:42 Lalpa chuan a awmpui lo vang che u; in hmêlmate lo thah mai mai tûrah chho duh ting suh u. 
Numbers14:43 Amalek mite leh Kanan mite in beih ni chuan an khawlaiah in thi ngei ang, Lalpa in zui duh si lo va, a pui lo vang che u,” a ti a." 
Numbers14:44 Mahse, tlângram chu bei tûrin an pan lui hrâm a. Thuthlung Bâwm leh Mosia erawh chu an kal ve lo." 
Numbers14:45 Amalek leh Kanan mi, chu laia awmte chuan an rawn bei a, an hneh a, Horma thlengin an ûm a." 
Numbers15:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers15:2 “Israel mite chu hrilh rawh. In awmna atân ka pêk tûr che u ram ka hruai thlen hunah che u chuan," 
Numbers15:3 bâwngpa te, berâmchal te, berâmpui te, kêl te, Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlan atân te, mahni duh thu-a thilhlanah te, kût nikhuaa thilhlanah te in hmang tûr a ni, hêng thil hlan rim hi Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni." 
Numbers15:4 Hâlral thilhlan atân berâm emaw kêl emaw in rawn hlan chuan pakhat zêlah buhbâl thilhlan atân chhangphut ṭha chi kg. khat leh oliv hriak litar khat in rawn keng tûr a ni, in tûr thilhlanah uain litar khat nên." 
Numbers15:5  
Numbers15:6 Berâmchal in hlan dâwn chuan buhbâl thilhlan atân chhangphut ṭha chi kg. hnih leh Oliv hriak litar khat leh a chanve in rawn keng tel tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:7 In tûr thilhlanah uain litar khat leh a chanve han keng tel bawk ang che u. Hêng thilhlan hâl hi Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni. 
Numbers15:8 Hâlral thilhlan atân Lalpa hnêna bâwngpa in rawn hlanin emaw, tiamkam tlâkna thilhlan atân emaw, remna thilhlan atân emaw inhlan rualin" 
Numbers15:9 chhangphut ṭha chi kg. thum, oliv hriak litar hnih in rawn keng tel tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:10 Uain litar hnih pawh in rawn keng tel tûr a ni. Hêng thilhlan rim hi Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni. 
Numbers15:11 “Bâwngpa te, berâmchal te, berâmpui te leh kêlte in rawn hlan rualin pakhat hisâp zêla in rawn hlan tel tûr chu hêng zât hi a ni." 
Numbers15:12 In ran hlan a tam dân azirin hêng thil dang pawh hi in telh tam tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:13 Israel mi tawh phawt chuan ei tûr thilhlan Lalpa lawmzâwng hâl tûr a rawn lâk chuan khitiang khian tih tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:14 Hnam dang, in zînga piangin emaw, lo awm ve zawkin emaw ei tûr thilhlan Lalpa lawmzâwng an hlan chuan khitiang bawk khian an ti tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:15 Mikhual leh khawtual pawhin in thlahte thleng pawhin tih dân thuhmun in hmang tûr a ni. Lalpa hmaah in thuhmun vek si a. 
Numbers15:16 Nangni leh in zînga hnam dangte pawhin chûng chu kumkhuain in zâwm tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers15:17 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers15:18 “Israel mite chu hrilh rawh: ram ka pêk tûr che u in lo thlena," 
Numbers15:19 in buh thar hmasa in ei hunah chuan Lalpa hnêna hlan tûr a ṭhen in dah hrang tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:20 In barli thar aṭanga in chhang siam hmasak ber tlang khat pawh Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni; in buh vuak hmasa Lalpa hnêna in pêk ang bawk khân pêk tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:21 Kumkhuain in chhang siam hmasak tlang khat chu Lalpa hnênah in pe ziah tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:22 “Mosia hnêna Lalpa thil tuk hi tuin emaw ti lo palh se emaw," 
Numbers15:23 hnam pum puiin Mosia hnêna thupêk zawng zawng hi an tih loh palhin emaw," 
Numbers15:24 an thil tihsual palh chu chinchâng an hriat loh vâng a nih chuan hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpa an hlân tûr a ni; a telh tûr bituk zât buhbâl thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan uain nên; chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng chu a ni si a. Sual thawina thilhlan atân kêlpa an hlân tel bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:25 Puithiam chuan hnam pum sual chu a thawi ang a, an thil tihsual chu an tih palh tak tak a ni si a; sual thawina thilhlan Lalpa hnêna an hlan tawh avângin ngaihdam an ni tawh ang." 
Numbers15:26 Israel hnam pum pui chu, an zînga hnam dang awm vete nên lam ngaihdam an ni ang, an za-in thil an tisual palh a ni." 
Numbers15:27 Mi mal pawhin hre lova thil sual a tihpalh chuan, sual thawina thilhlan atân kêlno, a nu, kum khat vêla upa, a hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:28 Puithiam chuan maichâmah chu mi sual thawina thilhlan chu a tihsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni tawh ang." 
Numbers15:29 Mi malin emaw, a hnam pumin emaw thil tihsual palh thu-ah Israel-te zîngah chuan a khual a tualin he dân hi an zâwm tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:30 “Tu pawh, hre reng chunga thil tisual chu khawtual pawh, mikhual pawh, Lalpa sawichhia a ni: in tihlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:31 Lalpa thu chu a pawisak lova, a thupêkte a bawhchhiat luih avângin tihhlum daih tûr a ni, a sual mawh chu a phur ang.”" 
Numbers15:32 Vawi khat chu Israel-te thlalêra an awm lai khân mi pakhatin sabat ni-ah thing a fawm a. 
Numbers15:33 Mosia te, Arona te leh pungkhâwmho hnênah chuan an hruai a." 
Numbers15:34 Engtia tih tûr nge tih a chian mai loh avângin ripah an khung a. 
Numbers15:35 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Tihhlum tûr a ni, vântlângin daipâwnah lunga den hlum tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers15:36 Lalpa thupêk angin vântlâng chuan daipâwnah an hruai a, lungin an dêng hlum ta a." 
Numbers15:37 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers15:38 “Israel-te chu hrilh rawh: In silhfên tlâng kilah pehbuk siam ṭhîn rawh u, la dumpâwlin siam ula, thil chîn kumkhuaah in neih dâwn nia." 
Numbers15:39 Chu pehbuk chuan ka thupêkte a hriat chhuahtîr ang che u a, in zâwm ṭhîn ang; tichuan, min hawisan lo vang a, mahni duh thu leh mahni châk zâwng angin in khawsa dâwn lo nia." 
Numbers15:40 Pehbuk chuan ka thupêk zawng zawng zâwm tûr in ni tih te, ka tâna invawng thianghlim tlat tûr in nih te a hriat chhuahtîr ṭhîn ang che u." 
Numbers15:41 In Pathian ni tûrin, kei, Lalpa in Pathian hi Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu che u kha ka ni. Lalpa in Pathian ka nih hi,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:1 Levia chi, Kohata thlah, Izara fapa Kora chuan Mosia luahlan a tum a. Reubena thlah Dathana leh Abirama, Peleta fa, Eliaba leh Ona fate chuan an thlâwp a." 
Numbers16:2 Israel mi, hruaitua an thlan, pa fel tak tak mi zahnih leh sawmngain an thlâwp bawk a." 
Numbers16:3 Mosia leh Arona hnênah a rualin an lo thawk a, “I inlek lu ta, mi tin Lalpa ta kan ni vek a, Lalpa chuan min awmpui ve ṭheuh alâwm. Chuvângin, nang Mosia, eng vangin nge Lalpa mite zînga lal bika i indah?” an rawn ti a." 
Numbers16:4 Mosian a lo hriat chuan a bawkkhup a, a ṭawngṭai a." 
Numbers16:5 Kora leh a ṭhiante hnênah chuan, “Naktûk zîngah Lalpa chuan ama ta te chu a rawn tifiah mai ang; a mi thlante chauh maichâma an lo kal a phal dâwn a ni." 
Numbers16:6 Kora, i ṭhiante nên hian in meilawh keng ula, meiling dah ula, naktûk zîngah Lalpa hmaah rimtui hâl ang che u." 
Numbers16:7 Lalpa chuan tu nge a thlan kan hre mai ang. Nangni Levia thlahte hi a ni inlek lu ta chu,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:8 Mosia chuan Kora hnênah, “Levia thlahte u, ngaithla teh u." 
Numbers16:9 Israel mipui zîng ata a bula awma, Lalpa Biakbûka rawngbâwl tûr te, thil ṭûl apiang mipui lo tihsak tûr tea a serh hrang che u hi thil nêp tak em ni?" 
Numbers16:10 Chu chanvo ropui tak chu nang leh Levia thlah dangte hi a chantîr che u a, puithiam nih leh zêl in tum a ni maw?" 
Numbers16:11 Arona chunga i hote nên in vui hi Pathian laka vui in ni asin” a ti a. 
Numbers16:12 Mosia chuan Eliaba fa Dathana leh Abirama chu a ko va, anni chuan, “Kan lo kal lo vang," 
Numbers16:13 khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ram ata hetiang thlalêr hmuna thi mai tûra min hruai chhuak hi thil nêp tak em ni? I intilal hle lehnghâl a. 
Numbers16:14 Khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ram awzâwngah min hruai loh hi; lo te, grep hmun te lah kan nei teuh si lo. Meng ve reng si min bum i tum a nih hi, kan lo kal lo vang,” an ti a." 
Numbers16:15 Mosia chu a thinur hle a, Lalpa hnênah, “An thilhlan eng mah lo pawm suh ang che; an chungah eng mah tihsual ka nei lo va, tu sabengtung mah ka lâksak ngai hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:16 Mosia chuan Kora hnênah, “Naktûkah i hote nên, Inbiakna bûkah lo kal ula, Arona pawh a lo kal ang." 
Numbers16:17 Mahni meilawh rawn keng ṭheuh ula, meiling dah ula, rimtui hâl tûr chu phul ula, maichâmah han keng ang che u, Arona pawhin a rawn keng ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:18 Tichuan, mahni meilawhah meiling an dah ṭheuh va, rimtui chu an phul a, Inbiakna bûk luhnaah chuan Mosia leh Arona te nên an ding tlâng a." 
Numbers16:19 Kora chuan a hote lo kal khâwm chu Inbiakna bûk kawngkaah chuan Mosia leh Arona te chu a hmachhawntîr a, Lalpa ropuina chu mi tin hmuhah a lo lang ta thut a." 
Numbers16:20 Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah," 
Numbers16:21 “Hêng pungkhâwmho hi inthiar fihlîmsan teh u, ka han tiboral phiar teh ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:22 Anni chu an bawkkhup a, “Aw Pathian, mi tin nunna hnâr i ni a, mi pakhat sual avângin mi zawng zawng chungah i thinur dâwn em ni?” an ti a." 
Numbers16:23 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers16:24 “Mipui chu Kora te, Dathana te Abirama te bûk aṭanga insaseng tûrin hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:25 Mosia chu Israel hruaitute chuan an zui a, Dathana leh Abirama hnênah chuan an kal a." 
Numbers16:26 Mosia chuan mipui hnênah, “Hêng mi sualho bûk bulah hian tu mah awm suh u, an thil eng mah khawih hek suh u, an sual avângin nangni pawh in ral mai ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:27 Tichuan, Kora te, Dathana te leh Abirama te bûk aṭang chuan an insaseng a; Dathana leh Abirama pawh an bûk aṭang chuan an lo chhuak a: kawngka bulah chuan an nupui leh an fanau te nên chuan an ding a." 
Numbers16:28 Mosia chuan mipui hnênah, “Pathianin hêng thil hi ti tûrin min tîr a ni tih in hria ang, ka duh thu-a ti ka ni lo ve." 
Numbers16:29 Hêng mite hi thih dân pangngaia an thiha, danglam deuhva hrem an nih loh chuan min tîr a ni lo vang." 
Numbers16:30 Lalpa hian thil la hriat ngai loh a rawn tiha, lei a khîk phuka, an thil neih zawng zawng nên a nung chunga mitthi khuaa an chhuk chuan hêng mite hian Lalpa chu an hnâwl ngei tihna a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:31 A sawi zo hman chiah a, Dathana leh Abirama awmna lei chu a kak phuk a," 
Numbers16:32 an chhûngte leh Kora ho mi dangte pawh chu an neih zawng zawng nên an tla pil ta vek a. 
Numbers16:33 Tichuan, an neih zawng zawng nên mitthi khuaah an chhuk ta a ni: lei kak chu a ping leh a, anni chu an pil bo ta a." 
Numbers16:34 Chuta awm ve Israel mi zawng zawng chuan ṭê teng tung thâwm an hriat chuan an tlânchhia a, “Tlân rawh u, kan tla pil ve mai ang e,” an ti a." 
Numbers16:35 Lalpa chuan mei a rawn tîr a, rimtui hâltu mi zahnih leh sawmngate chu a rawn kâng hlum ta vek a." 
Numbers16:36 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers16:37 “Puithiam Arona fapa Eleazara hrilh rawh: Kâng hlum tate dâr meilawh ken kha chhar khâwm sela, a meihawlte chu daipâwnah paih rawh se; dâr meilawh zawng zawng kha serh hran tawh a ni si a." 
Numbers16:38 Lalpa maichâma hlan an nih khân thil thianghlim an lo ni ta si a. 
Numbers16:39 An sual vânga kâng hlum tate meilawh chu la khâwm la, chhu pêr la, maichâm chhînah siam rawh, Israel mite tân ṭihkhai a ni dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:40 Puithiam Eleazara chuan meilawh chu a la khâwm a, a chher phêktîr a, maichâm chhîn chu a siam ta a. Arona thlahte tih loh chuan maichâmah Lalpa tân tu man rimtui an rawn hâl tûr a ni lo tih Israel-ten an hriatna tûr a ni ta a. Kora leh a fate angin an thi ve mai ang. Eleazara hnêna thupêk, Mosia hnêna Lalpa sawi ang chuan hêng hi an ti a." 
Numbers16:41 A tûkah chuan Israel pungkhâwmho zawng zawng chuan Mosia leh Arona chu an dem a, “ Lalpa mite in tihlum vei a,” an ti a." 
Numbers16:42 Mipuiin Mosia leh Arona an zim luai luai lai chuan Inbiakna bûk an han en a, chhûmin a lo khuh a, Lalpa ropuina chu an hmu a." 
Numbers16:43 Mosia leh Arona chu bûk kawtah an kal a. 
Numbers16:44 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah: 
Numbers16:45 “Mipui zîng ata kha lo kal hrang teh, ka han tihlum phiar teh ang,” a ti a. An pahnih chuan hmai lei siin an kûn a." 
Numbers16:46 Mosia chuan Arona hnênah, “I meilawh kha keng la, maichâm mei saw va rût la, mipui zîngah, an sual thawi nân rimtui va hâl thuai teh; Lalpa thinurna chu a lo thleng dêr tawh a nia; hmanhmawh rawh, hri an vei ṭan e,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:47 Arona chuan Mosia thu chu a awih a, mipui zîngah a va kal chuan hri an lo vei nual tawh a; rimtui chu a hâl a, mipui sualna chu a thawi ta a." 
Numbers16:48 A thi leh a la damte inkârah chuan a ding a, hri chu a kiang ta a." 
Numbers16:49 Kora helna avânga thite chu an vaiin mi sîngkhat leh sângli leh zasarih an ni. 
Numbers16:50 Hri a reh hnu chuan Arona chu Inbiakna bûkah Mosia hnênah chuan a kal leh ta a. 
Numbers17:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers17:2 “Israel mite hrilh rawh: tiang sâwm leh pahnih, hnam tin hruaitu tân pakhat zêl rawn la teh se." 
Numbers17:3 Levia chite tiangah chuan Arona hming ziak ang che; hnam khat hruaitu hming an tiangah chuan a chuang zêl tûr a ni. 
Numbers17:4 Inbiakna bûkah, Thuthlung Bâwm hma, kan inbiakna ṭhinah, i dah dâwn nia." 
Numbers17:5 Ka mi thlan chu tu ber hi nge in hriata, tu mah in vui tawh loh nân ka mi thlan tiang chu ka chawrtîr dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers17:6 Mosia chuan Israel-te chu a hrilh a, hnam hruaitute chuan tiang pakhat ṭheuh an rawn pe a, a vaiin sâwm leh pahnih a ni; Arona tiang pawh a tel ve." 
Numbers17:7 Mosia chuan bûk chhûng Thuthlung Bâwm hmaah chuan a dah a. 
Numbers17:8 A tûk zîngah chuan Mosia chu Inbiakna bûkah chuan a lût a, Arona tiang Levia thlahte hminga dah chu a lo chawr a, a kuhmûm a, a pâr a, theitê a lo rah a." 
Numbers17:9 Mosia chuan tiang zawng zawng chu Lalpa hma ata chu a la chhuak a, Israel-te chu a entîr a, mahni tiang tiang an la ta sang sang a." 
Numbers17:10 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Thuthlung Bâwm hmaah Arona tiang chu dah leh rawh; Israel mi, hel chîngho hi an vui leh chuan an thi mai ang tih hriatna tûrin dah reng ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers17:11 Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Mosia chuan a ti ta a. 
Numbers17:12 Israel mite chuan Mosia hnênah: “Chuti chu kan va thi rem rum mai âwm ve? 
Numbers17:13 Lalpa Biakbûk bul hnaihtu ngawt pawh an thih chuan kan va mang mai âwm ve!” an ti a. 
Numbers18:1 Lalpa chuan Arona hnênah, “Nang leh i fate leh Levia chite hian Inbiakna bûka rawngbâwl hna tihdik lohvah mawh in phur ang; puithiam rawngbâwlna bîka tihsual mawh chu nang leh i fate chauhvin an phur ang." 
Numbers18:2 In laichîn, Levia chite chu, bûka in rawngbâwl hna thawh ṭanpui tûr che uin pun rawh u." 
Numbers18:3 An puibâwm ang che u a, bûk enkawl hna hi an mawhphurhna a ni ang; amaherawhchu, hmun thianghlim leh maichâm thil serh chu an khawih ve tûr a ni lo, an khawih hlauh chuan nangni pawh, anni pawh in thi mai ang." 
Numbers18:4 Bûka rawngbâwl hna zawng zawngah an pui ang che u a, an hna chu anmahni ngeiin an tifel tûr a ni; mi dang mi narânin an pui tûr che u a ni lo." 
Numbers18:5 Nang leh i fate chauhvin Hmun Thianghlim leh maichâm chu in enkawl tûr a ni, Israel-te chungah ka thinur leh thut loh nân." 
Numbers18:6 I laichîn Levia chite hi nangmah ṭanpui tûra Israel-te zîng ata ka thlang chhuak a, thilpêka petu che kei hi ka ni." 
Numbers18:7 Inbiakna bûka thawk tûrin ka tâna serh hran an ni tawh, Hmun Thianghlim Bera awm leh maichâma puithiam rawngbâwl hna erawh hi chu nang leh i fate chauhvin in ti tûr a ni. Puithiam hna hi ka pe che u a; chuvângin, hêng hi in mawhphurhna a ni, mi narânin an tih ve chuan tihhlum tûr an ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers18:8 Lalpa chuan Arona hnênah, “Israel miten ka hnênah thên thilhlan an rawn hlan, serh hran tawh rêng rêng chu nang leh i fate hnênah puithiam sa atân kumkhuain ka pe a che u." 
Numbers18:9 Buhbâl thilhlan te, sual thawina thilhlan te, bawhchhiat man thilhlan te an rawn hlân a, maichâma hâl bâng zawng zawng chu in chan tûr a ni." 
Numbers18:10 Hmun Thianghlimah ngei chûng sa chu in ei tûr a ni, mipa chauhvin ei tûr a ni: thil serh a ni e." 
Numbers18:11 “Israel mite thilhlan chi hrang hrang, thêna hlan rêng rêng chu, in fapate in fanute nêna kumkhuaa in chanpual atân ka pe a che u, in chhûng zînga mi thiang apiang chuan in ei thei ang." 
Numbers18:12 “Oliv hriak fîm ber te, uain thlum ber te, vaimîm ṭha ber te Israel miten min pêk ṭhin tûr chu ka pe a che u, in ta tûr a ni;" 
Numbers18:13 An ram chhûnga an theirah hmin hmasa Lalpa hnêna an rawn hlante pawh in chan tûr a ni. In chhûng zînga a thiang apiangin in ei thei ang. 
Numbers18:14 Israel-te zînga kawh bîk nei thilhlan tih loh chu in ta vek tûr a ni. 
Numbers18:15 “Mihring pawh, ran pawh, a piang hmasa ber, chhûl keutu, Israel-ten Lalpa an pêk ṭhin chu, in ta tûr a ni; mihring leh ei thiang lo ran chu, tlan theih a ni ang." 
Numbers18:16 Naupang thla khat chin tlanna tûr chu biakbûka an hman lai mêk tangkaraw sekel nga bûk a ni ang. 
Numbers18:17 Bâwng no te, berâmno te, kêlno te, hrin hmasak chu tlan theih a ni lo vang, serh hran an ni. Talh tûr a ni a, a thisen chu maichâma theh tûr a ni a, a thau pawh maichâma hâl ral tûr a ni: chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni." 
Numbers18:18 Thên thilhlan angin a irno leh a bawp chu in ei ve tûr a ni. 
Numbers18:19 “Israel-ten ka hnêna thên thilhlan an rawn ken chu in fanu leh in fapate nêna in chan kumkhua atâna ka ruat a ni. Hei hi nang leh i thlahte nêna ka kumkhaw thuthlung bawhchhiat loh tûr chu a ni.” 
Numbers18:20 Arona hnênah Lalpa chuan, “Ro atân ram i nei ve tûr a ni lo va, Israel miten ram an sem ve tûr che a ni hek lo. Kei hi i ro, Israel-te zînga i chanvo chu ka ni." 
Numbers18:21 “Levia chite chu Inbiakna bûk an enkawl hah manah Israel miten sâwma pakhat an pêk hi an chanvo atân ka ruatsak a ni. 
Numbers18:22 Tûn chinah chuan Israel-te hi Inbiakna bûk bulah an lo kal tûr a ni tawh lo, thil sual an tipalh ang a, an thi dah ang e. He dân hi in thlahte tân pawh a ni." 
Numbers18:23 Israel ramah Levia chite hian in-lo-ram nghet an nei ve tûr a ni lo. Israel miten sâwma pakhat ka hnêna an pêk chu," 
Numbers18:24 an tân dah hran a ni; chuvângin alâwm, ‘ram insemnaah chan in nei ve tûr a ni lo’ tia ka sawi ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers18:25 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers18:26 “Levia chite chu hrilh rawh: Israel mite hnên aṭanga in dawn, in chan atâna Lalpa ruat aṭanga sâwma pakhat chu Lalpa tân in pe ve tûr a ni." 
Numbers18:27 Chu chu hruiha an buh vuakte leh uain khura an uain tling an pe ṭhîn ang bawkin in pe ve ang a, pawmsak in ni ang." 
Numbers18:28 Israel mite hnên aṭanga sâwma pakhat in dawn, Lalpa hnêna sâwma pakhat in pêk ve chu, puithiam Arona hnênah in pe ve tûr a ni." 
Numbers18:29 In thil dawn zînga a ṭha berte chu Lalpa tân hlân ve leh zêl rawh u; buh thar leh uain thar anga ngaih a ni ang. 
Numbers18:30 Lo neituin a ṭhen a nei ta angin nangni pawhin in pêk bâng chu in nei ve dâwn nia. 
Numbers18:31 Chûng chu Biakbûk enkawl hna in thawh hlawh a ni a, in chhûngte nên in duh duhnaah in ei thei ang." 
Numbers18:32 A ṭha ber Lalpa hnêna in hlan tawh chuan a bâng chu ei mah ula, in tisual lo ve; in hlan loh erawh chuan Israel-te thilpêk thianghlim tibawrhbâng in ni ang a, in thi mai ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers19:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah," 
Numbers19:2 “Israel-te hnênah Lalpa thupêk hi hrilh rawh u. Bâwngla sen, hmêlhem lo, leileta la chhawr ngai loh, in hnêna rawn kai tûrin hrilh rawh u." 
Numbers19:3 Puithiam Eleazara pe sela, ani chuan riahhmun pâwn, daiah a kalpui ang a, a hmuh ngeiah a talhtîr tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:4 Puithiam Eleazaran a thisenah chuan a zungṭang a chiah ang a, Inbiakna bûk kawt lam hawiin vawi sarih a theh tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:5 Bâwngla chu a vun te, a sa te, a thisen te leh a ek te nên a hmuh ngeiah a hâltîr tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:6 Puithiam chuan sidar thing te, husop te, la sen te a la ang a, bâwngla hâlna meiah chuan a rawh tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:7 Puithiam chuan a silhfênte chu a su ang a, a inbual tûr a ni; chumi zawhah riahhmunah a lo lût thei ang; mahse, tlai thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Numbers19:8 Bâwngla hâltu pawh khân a silhfênte chu a su ang a, a inbual tûr a ni: tlai thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Numbers19:9 Mi thiang, bawlhhlawh lovin, bâwngla vâp chu a rût khâwm ang a, Israel pungkhâwmho tâna hman tûrin hmun serhah chuan a dah ṭha ang; sual tlenfaina tui theh tûrah phul ṭhin tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:10 Bâwngla vâp rût khâwmtu pawh chuan a silhfên a su ang a, tlai thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang. Hei hi Israel mite leh an zînga hnam dang chêng vete tân kumkhaw dânah neih tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:11 “Tu ruang pawh ni se, mitthi ruang rêng rêng khawih chu, ni sarih chhûng an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Numbers19:12 Chu mi chuan a ni thum ni-ah leh a ni sarih ni-ah thenfaina tui khân a inthehtîr tûr a ni; tichuan, a lo thiang tawh ang; a ni thum ni-ah leh a ni sarih ni-ah tuia theh thianghlim a nih loh chuan a bawlhhlawh reng ang." 
Numbers19:13 Tu ruang pawh ni se, mitthi ruang rêng rêng khawih chuan tui hmang hian a intithianghlim tûr a ni; tui hi theh a nih loh chuan a bawlhhlawh a, a bawlhhlawhna chu a la reh lo a ni; Lalpa hmun thianghlim chu a tibawrhbâng a, Israel mite zîng ata ensan tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:14 “Bûk chhûngah mi a thihin a chhûnga awmte leh a bula lo lût apiang ni sarih chhûng an bawlhhlawh ang. 
Numbers19:15 Bungbêl te, tuibêlte pawh chhin loh chu ni sarih chhûng a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Numbers19:16 Indonaa thi ruang te, tâmlaka tlu hlum ruang te, mihring ruh te, thlân te khawih apiang chu ni sarih chhûng an bawlhhlawh ang."
