Numbers19:17 “Chutiang bawlhhlawh chu hetianga then fai tûr a ni: Novin tui luang lai an suak ang a, sual thenna tûr bâwngla vâp kha phul tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:18 Mi thiangin tuiah chuan husop a chiah ang a, chu chuan bûk te, a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng te, a chhûnga mi zawng zawng te a theh ang a; chutiang bawkin râl thi ruang te, tlu hlum ruang te, mihring ruh leh thlân khawihtute chu a theh tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:19 Mi thiang chuan mi bawlhhlawh chu a ni thum ni leh a ni sarih ni-in tui chuan a theh tûr a ni; ani chuan a silhfên a su ang a, a inbual bawk ang a, tlaiah a lo thianghlim tawh ang." 
Numbers19:20 Chutianga bawlhhlawh chu a inthen fai duh lohva, thenfaina tuia theh a nih loh chuan a bawlhhlawhna chu a reh lo va, Lalpa Hmun Thianghlim a tibawrhbâng a ni a, Israel miten an ensan tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:21 Tui theh tûr thehtu pawh chuan a silhfên a su tûr a ni, tui theh tûr khawihtute chu tlai thlengin an bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Numbers19:22 Mi bawlhhlawhin a khawih apiang a bawlhhlawh ve a, chu mi bawlhhlawh khawihtu pawh chu tlai thlengin a bawlhhlawh a ni.”" 
Numbers20:1 Thla khatnaah chuan Israel mite chu an za-in Zin thlalêr an thleng a. Kades-ah chuan an châm a, Miriami chu a thi a, an phûm ta a." 
Numbers20:2 Israel mite chuan tui an nei lo va, Mosia leh Arona chu an rawn hual a," 
Numbers20:3 Mipui chuan Arona chu an chhâl a, “Kan unaute thih rual khân Biakbûk kawtah khân lo thi ve ila a ṭha zâwk tûr." 
Numbers20:4 Engtizia nge kan rante nêna thi mai tûra he thlalêra Lalpa mite hi min hruai luh le? 
Numbers20:5 Engah nge Aigupta ram ata hetiang ram ro takah hian min hruai le? Buh chîn theihna tûr pawh a nih loh hi, theipui te, grep te, theibuhfaite han ṭha rual a ni hlei nêm, in tûr takngial pawh tui a awm loh hi,” an ti a." 
Numbers20:6 Mosia leh Arona chuan mipui chu an kalsan a, Inbiakna bûk kawngkaah lei siin an kûn a, Lalpa ropuina chu an hmuhah a lo lang a," 
Numbers20:7 Lalpa chuan an hnênah," 
Numbers20:8 “Tiang kha la la, Israel-te chu i u Arona nên ko khâwm rawh u; an hmaah, saw lungpui saw, tui tichhuak tûrin hrilh ang che u; lung aṭang chuan pungkhâwmho leh an rante in tûr tui a lo chhuak mai ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers20:9 Lalpa thupêk angin Mosia chu a kal a, tiang chu a la a," 
Numbers20:10 Arona nên Israel pungkhâwmho chu lungpui bulah chuan a ko khâwm a, Mosia chuan, “Hel hmangte u, in in tûr tui lungpui aṭang hian kan lâk chhuahsak dâwn che u em ni?” a ti a." 
Numbers20:11 Mosia chuan a bân a phar a, tiang chuan lungpui chu vawi hnih a vua a, tui a lo chhuak ta hawk hawk a; pungkhâwmho leh an rante chuan an in ta a." 
Numbers20:12 Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah, “Min ring lo va, Israel-te hmaah min chawimawi loh avângin ka pêk tûr ramah chuan hêng mite hruai lûttu in ni dâwn lo ve,” a ti a." 
Numbers20:13 Israel miten Lalpa an chhuahchhalhna hmuna tui hi Meriba tui an vuah ta a ni; anmahni avâng chuan a thianghlimzia a tilang ta a. 
Numbers20:14 Kades aṭang chuan Edom lal hnênah Mosian palai a tîr a, “In unau Israel-ten hrehawm tam tak an tuar thu in lo hre tawh châwk ang a." 
Numbers20:15 Min thlahtute chu Aigupta ramah an pêm lût a, kum tam fe kan awm a, Aigupta mite chuan kan pate nên min tiduhdah hle a." 
Numbers20:16 Kan mangangin Lalpa kan au va, anin kan aw a lo ngaithla a, Aigupta ram aṭangin min hruai chhuak tûr vântirhkoh a rawn tîr a; ngai teh, in ram chhim tâwp Kades kan lo thleng ta." 
Numbers20:17 Kan ngên a che, in ram hi kalkawngah ka rawn hmang ang e; lovah te, grep hmunahte kan kal lo vang a, in tuikhur pawh kan rawn ṭâwm lo vang che u. Lamlianpuiah kan kal ang a, in ram kan kal pelh hma chu ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw kan pêng hauh lo vang,” tiin thu a chah a." 
Numbers20:18 Edom lal chuan, “Ka rama in lo luh vaih chuan khandaihin ka bei ang che u,” a lo ti a." 
Numbers20:19 Israel mite chuan, “Lamlianpuiah kein kan kal ang, kan rante nên in tui kan in chuan a man kan pe ang che u, in pawi kan khawih hauh lo vang,” an tih pawhin" 
Numbers20:20 Edom lal chuan, “In kal ka phal lo,” a ti tlat a. Anni lo dang tûrin Edom lal chu mi tam fe nên a lo thawk chhuak a." 
Numbers20:21 Edom lal chuan an rama an kal tlang a phal tâk loh avâng chuan Israel-te chu an kîr ta a. 
Numbers20:22 Israel fate chu an vaiin an kal leh ta a, Hor tlâng an va thleng a." 
Numbers20:23 Edom ramri bul a la ni a, tah chuan Mosia leh Arona hnênah Lalpa chuan," 
Numbers20:24 “Israel mite hnêna pêk ka tiam ramah chuan Arona hi a lût ve dâwn lo, in pahnihin Meriba-ah khân ka thupêk in awih loh avâng khân." 
Numbers20:25 Arona leh a fapa Eleazara chu Hor tlângah hruai la," 
Numbers20:26 chutah chuan Arona puithiam kawr chu hlihsak la, Eleazara hâktîr ang che, Arona chu a thi mai dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers20:27 Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Mosia chuan a ti a, mipui hmuhah tlângah chuan an chho va." 
Numbers20:28 Mosia chuan Arona puithiam kawr chu a hlihsak a, Eleazara chu a hâktîr a. Tlângchhîpah chuan Arona chu a thi ta a; Mosia leh Eleazara chu an lo chhuk a." 
Numbers20:29 Israel pungkhâwmho chuan Arona thih thu chu an hria a, ni sawmthum an sûn a." 
Numbers21:1 Kanan ram chhim lama Kanan mi Arad lal chuan Israel-te chu Atharim lamah an lo kal tih a hriatin a lo bei a, mi ṭhenkhat chu a man a." 
Numbers21:2 Israel-ho chuan Lalpa hnênah thu an intiamkam a. “Hêng mite hi min hnehtîr chuan i tân an khuate lamin kan hlân vek ang a, kan tiboral vek ang,” an ti a." 
Numbers21:3 Lalpa chuan a lo hria a, chûng Kanan mite chu a hnehtîr a. Israel-te chuan an that vek a, an khuate pawh chu an tichhe vek a, a hmun hmingah Horma an vuah a." 
Numbers21:4 Hor tlâng aṭang chuan an kal zêl a, Edom ram hêlna, Tuipui Sen kawng lamah chuan an kal a, a kawng a kual avângin an ning a." 
Numbers21:5 Mipui chu Pathian leh Mosia lakah an vui a, “Engah kher nge Aigupta ram ata he thlalêra thi mai tûra min hruai chhuah? Chaw a awm si lo, tui lah a awm hek lo, he mana chhang teivet lah hi kan ning hlui tawh si,” an ti a." 
Numbers21:6 Lalpa chuan rûl chuk na tak a tipuang a, Israel mi tam tak chu an chu hlum a." 
Numbers21:7 Mipui chu Mosia hnênah an lo kal a, “Thil sual kan ti a ni, Lalpa chungah leh i chungah kan vai hian thil dik lo kan ti a ni; rûl tirêm tûr hian Lalpa min ngensak rawh,” an ti a. Mosian mipui chu a ṭawngṭaisak a." 
Numbers21:8 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Dârin rûl lem siam la, mi tin hmuh theih tûrin thingtlâwn lêrah khai rawh; rûl chuk apiangin chu chu an en chuan an dam zêl ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers21:9 Mosia chuan dârin rûl lem a siam a, thingtlâwn lêrah a khai a, rûl chuk apiangin dâr rûl chu an en phawt chuan an dam ta zêl a." 
Numbers21:10 Israel-te chu an kal zêl a. Obot-ah bûk an khuar a; chu hmun chu an chhuahsan a," 
Numbers21:11 Moab ram chhak lam thlalêrah Abarim khaw ramah bûk an khuar leh a. 
Numbers21:12 Zered ruamah bûk an khuar leh a," 
Numbers21:13 chuta ṭang chuan an insawn leh a, Arnon lui hmâr lamah bûk an khuar leh a; Arnon lui chu Amor ram dep thlenga awm a ni, Amor leh Moab ramri lui a ni." 
Numbers21:14 He lai ram hi ‘ Lalpa indona’ tih lehkhabu-ah chuan ‘Sufa ruama Vahep khua Arnon ruam te," 
Numbers21:15 Ar khaw lama thluang, Moab ri dep ram awihtlân pangpêr,’ tih a ni." 
Numbers21:16 Chuta ṭang chuan Beer an tih chu an thleng a; chu hmun chu tuichhunchhuah awmna a ni. Lalpa chuan, “Mipui ko khâwm rawh, tui ka pe dâwn,” a ti a, chu tuichhunchhuah chu a pe a nih kha." 
Numbers21:17 Israel-te chuan he hla hi an sa a, ‘Aw tuichhunchhuah, lo chik chhuak teh, Zaiin kan lo awi ang che." 
Numbers21:18 Mi lian leh hnam hruaitute laih Lal tiang leh talhfiak leka an laih chu,’ tiin. Thlalêr aṭang chuan Matana-ah an insawn a." 
Numbers21:19 Nahaliel-ah an kal zêl a, Bamot an thleng a." 
Numbers21:20 Bamot aṭang chuan Moab ram phai, Pisga tlâng ṭhut an thleng a. Chu tlângchhîp aṭang chuan thlalêr chu a lang vek a ni." 
Numbers21:21 Israel fate chuan Amor lal Sihona hnênah palai an tîr a. 
Numbers21:22 “I ramah kan kal tlang ang e, kan rante nên in lovah te, in grep hmunahte kawngpui ata kan pêng lo vang a, in tuichhunchhuah tui pawh kan chawi lo vang, in ram kan pelh hma chu Lamlianpuiah chauh kan kal ang,” an ti a." 
Numbers21:23 Sihona chuan Israel-ten an ram an kal tlang chu a lo phal bîk awzâwng lo va, lo dang tûrin a mite a khâwm a, thlalêr Jahaz hmunah a lo kal a, Israel-te chu a lo bei a." 
Numbers21:24 Israel-te chuan an lo that ṭeuh va, an ram hmâr lam, Arnon lui aṭanga Jabok lui thlengin an neihsak ta a. Jabok hmâr lam chu Amon mite ram a ni; anni chuan an ramri chu an lo vêng hneh hle a ni." 
Numbers21:25 Israel-te chuan Amor-ho khawpuite chu an la vek a; khawpuiahte chuan Israel-te chu an awm ta a. Hesbon leh a chhehvêl khuate pawh an luahsak vek a. 
Numbers21:26 Hesbon chu Amor lal Sihona khawpui a ni. Tûn hmain Moab lal nên an inbei a, Arnon lui thlengin Moab ram chu a lo chhuhsak tawh a ni." 
Numbers21:27 Chuvângin, hetiangin hla an phuah a: Sihona khawpui Hesbon-ah lo kal ula, I din ṭhain i sa ṭha leh ang u;" 
Numbers21:28 Hesbon aṭangin mei a chhuak a, Sihona khawpui chu a kâng a, Moab ram Ar khua a kai a, Arnon lui hmârthlang ramte chu a kâng fai e." 
Numbers21:29 Moab mite tak chu aw! Khemosa betute chu an chhe zo ta, A betute chu an râltlân a; A fanute chu salah an man, Amor lal Sihona hote chuan." 
Numbers21:30 Hesbon chu a chhe ta, Dibon thlengin thalin kan kâp; Nofa thlengin kan tiram, Medeba bula awm chu." 
Numbers21:31 Israel-te chu Amor ramah chuan an awm ta a. 
Numbers21:32 Jazer khaw beih dân tûr en thlithlai tûrin Mosian mi a tîr a. Israel-te chuan a chhehvêl khuate nên an la a, chûng khuaa awm Amor mite chu an hnawt chhuak vek a." 
Numbers21:33 An lo kual a, Basan lal Oga chuan lo dan a tum a, a mite a pun ṭeuh va. Edrei hmunah Israel-te chu a va bei a." 
Numbers21:34 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ani chu hlau suh, a mi zawng zawngte leh a ram chu i kutah ka pe tawh a che; Hesbon khaw lal Sihona chunga i tih ang khân a chungah pawh ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers21:35 Tichuan, ani chu a fate nên an that a, a mite pawh bâng awm miah lovin an tihlum a, a ram chu an neihsak ta a." 
Numbers22:1 Israel mite chu an insawn zêl a, Moab ram phai, Jordan lui chhak lam Jeriko zâwnah bûk an khuar ta a." 
Numbers22:2 Zipora fapa Balaka chuan Amor mite chunga Israel-te thil tih chu a hmu a. 
Numbers22:3 Israel mite chu an tam êm avângin Moab mite chuan an hlau hle a. 
Numbers22:4 Moab-ho chuan Midian hotute hnênah, “Bâwngin hnim a pet duak duak ang hian hêng mite hian kan chhehvêl mi zawng zawng hi min ei zo vek dâwn alâwm,” an ti a." 
Numbers22:5 Chutih laia Moab lal chu Zipora fapa Balaka a ni. Eufretis lui kama Pethor khua, a laichînte awmna rama awm, Beora fapa Balaama ko tûrin mi a tîr a." 
Numbers22:6 “Aigupta ram aṭangin mi tam deuh an lo chhuak a, ram an dâp a ni ngawt mai. Kan ram min chhuhsak vek dâwn alâwm; khawngaih takin lo kal la, hêng mite hi ngam rual an ni si lo va, ânchhia min lawhsak teh, kan ngamin kan ram ata kan ûm bo thei mial mahna, mal i sâwmsakte chu an nihlawh ṭhîn a, ânchhia i lawhte chu an chan a chhe ṭhîn tih ka hre si a,” ti tûrin a tîr a." 
Numbers22:7 Moab upate leh Midian upate chu aien man tûr kengin an kal ta a. Balaama hnên an thleng a, Balaka thu chu an hrilh a." 
Numbers22:8 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Zânin chu riak ula, Lalpa thu ka dawng mahna, ka hrilh ang che u,” a ti a. Moab miliante chu Balaama inah chuan an riak ta a." 
Numbers22:9 Balaama hnênah Pathian a lo kal a, “I mikhualte khu tute nge ni?” a rawn ti a." 
Numbers22:10 Balaaman Pathian hnênah chuan, “Moab lal Zipora fapa Balaka mi tirhte an ni." 
Numbers22:11 ‘Aigupta ram aṭangin mi tam deuh an lo chhuak a, ram an dâp a ni ngawt mai; lo kal la, ânchhia mi han lawhsak teh, kan hneh theiin kan ram ata kan ûm bo thei mahna, an rawn ti,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:12 Pathian chuan Balaama hnênah, “Kal suh, chûng mite chu ânchhia i lawh tûr a ni lo, ka mi duhsakte an ni e,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:13 Zînga an thawh chuan Balaaman Balaka miliante hnênah, “In ramah haw leh mai rawh u, Lalpa chuan ka kal a phal lo ve,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:14 Moab miliante chu an tho va, Balaka hnênah an kîr a, “Balaama chu a lo kal duh lo,” an ti a." 
Numbers22:15 Balaka chuan mi zahawm zâwk mi dang a tirh belh leh a. 
Numbers22:16 Balaama hnên an lo thleng a, “Zipora fapa Balaka chuan heti hian a ti." 
Numbers22:17 ‘Eng mahin ka hnêna i lo kal dâl suh se. Nasa takin ka chawimawi ang chia, i sawi apiang ka ti zêl ang, hêng mite hi ânchhia min lawhsak phawt mai teh’ a ti,” an ti a." 
Numbers22:18 Balaka ṭhuihruaite chu Balaama chuan a chhâng a, “Balaka chuan a in khat tangka leh rangkachak mi pe mah sela, ka Pathian Lalpa thu chu, a tê emaw, a lian emaw, ka bawhchhe thei lo." 
Numbers22:19 Zânin chu riak phawt mai teh u, Lalpa chuan eng nge a sawi ka han ngaichâng ang e,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:20 Zânah chuan Pathian chu Balaama hnênah a lo kal a, “Hêng mite hi ko tûr che-a lo kal an nih chuan, zui mai rawh; mahse, ka hrilh che chauh i ti tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:21 Zîngah Balaama chu a tho va, a sabengtung a siam a, Moab miliante chu a zui ta a." 
Numbers22:22 A kal ve tâk mai avâng chuan Pathian chu a thinur hle a, lo dang tûrin Lalpa vântirhkoh chu kawngah a lo ding a. Sabengtung chunga chuang a ni a, a chhiahhlawh pahnihin an zui bawk a." 
Numbers22:23 Sabengtung chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh khandaih kenga kawnga a ding chu a hmu a; rampalailêngah hêl a tum a; kawnga kîr leh tûrin Balaama chuan a vua a. 
Numbers22:24 Lalpa vântirhkoh chu grep huanpal leh pal inkârah, kawng laiah a lo ding a." 
Numbers22:25 Sabengtung chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a hmu a, pal nêkin a kal a, Balaama ke chu palah chuan a nghêng bet a, Balaama chuan a vaw leh a." 
Numbers22:26 Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a insawn a, kawng zîm lai, inpelh theih hauh lohna laiah chuan a lo ding leh a." 
Numbers22:27 Sabengtung chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a hmu a, Balaama chu a bawhpui ta ngawt a. Balaama chu a thinur hle a, sabengtung chu a vaw ta ṭhuai ṭhuai a." 
Numbers22:28 Lalpa chuan sabengtung chu a ṭawngtîr a, “Thil sual eng nge ka tih vawi thum tlawng mi vuak tâk le?” a ti a." 
Numbers22:29 Balaama chuan sabengtung hnênah, “Min pawisa lo êm alâwm, khandaih phei chu keng ila, ka sât hlum hial tawh ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:30 Sabengtung chuan Balaama hnênah, “I sabengtung, tûn thleng pawha i chuanna reng ṭhin ka ni a, hetiang hian ka ti ngai em ni?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ti ngai lo ve,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:31 Lalpa chuan Balaama mit chu a tihvârsak a, khandaih kenga Lalpa vântirhkoh kawnga ding chu a hmu ve ta a, a kûn a, lei siin a bawkkhup ta a." 
Numbers22:32 Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan, “Engtizia nge ṭum thum ngawt i sabengtung i vuak le: Ka duh loh anga i kal luih avângin kawnga dang tûr chein ka lo thawk chhuak a ni." 
Numbers22:33 Sabengtung chuan min hmu a, ṭum thum min pelh a tum a, pêng ṭhîn lo se ka lo that mai ang che, ani erawh chu ka zuah ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:34 Balaama chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh hnênah, “Thil ka tisual a ni e, mi lo dang tûrin kawngah i ding tih ka hre lo a ni; chuvângin, i lâwm loh zâwng ti ka nih chuan ka kîr leh mai ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:35 Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan Balaama hnênah, “Hêng mite hi zui rawh, i hnêna ka sawi chauh i sawi chhâwng tûr a ni,” a ti a. Tichuan, Balaama chu Balaka miliante rual chuan a kal ve ta zêl a." 
Numbers22:36 Balaama a lo kal tih a hriat chuan Balakan an ramri tâwp, Arnon lui kama Ir-Moab khuaah hmuak tûrin a kal a." 
Numbers22:37 Balaka chuan, “Ṭhahnemngai takin ka rawn kohtîr che a, engtizia nge i lo kal duh mai loh le? Mi ropui takah ka siam thei lo che em ni?” a ti a." 
Numbers22:38 Balaama chuan Balaka hnênah, “Ngai teh, ka lo kal na a, thu dang sawi thei em ka nih? Pathian min sawitîr chauh ka sawi ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:39 Balaama chu Balaka rual chuan a kal ve ta a, Kiriat-huzot an thleng a." 
Numbers22:40 Balaka chu bâwngpate leh berâmtein a inthawi a. Balaama leh a kalpui miliante chu a sa ei atân a sâwm a. 
Numbers22:41 A tûkah chuan Balaka chuan Balaama chu a hruai a, Bamot-baal-ah a kalpui a; chuta ṭang chuan Israel mite chu an hmu thei a." 
Numbers23:1 Balaama chuan Balaka hnênah, “Maichâm pasarih mi siamsak teh, bâwngchal pasarih leh berâmchal pasarih han la bawk ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:2 Balaama sawi ang chuan Balaka chuan a ti a; an pahnih chuan maichâm tinah bâwngchal leh berâmchal pakhat zêl an hlân a. 
Numbers23:3 Balaama chuan Balaka hnênah, “Mi be tûrin Lalpa a lo kal dâwn nge dâwn lo ka va ngaichâng ang e. Hâlral thilhlan hi in lo vil dâwn nia, min hrilh apiang ka hrilh leh ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:4 Pathian chu a lo kal a, Balaama chuan a hnênah, “Maichâm chu ka siam a, bâwngchal pakhat leh berâmchal pakhat pawh ka hlan ta e,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:5 Lalpa chuan Balaka hnêna sawi tûr Balaama chu a hrilh a. Balaka hnênah chuan a kîr a," 
Numbers23:6 a zu thlen chuan Balaka leh Moab miliante chu hâlral thilhlan maichâm bulah chuan an lo la ding reng a. 
Numbers23:7 Balaama chuan hetiang hian thu a chham ta a: “Aram tlângram ata Moab lal Balakan min ko va, ‘Jakoba hi ânchhia min lawhsak teh Israela hi min hausak rawh,’ min ti a." 
Numbers23:8 Lalpa ânchhe lawh loh keiin engtin nge ânchhia ka lawh theih ang? Lalpa huat loh, engtin nge ka huat theih ang?" 
Numbers23:9 Anni chu lungpui aṭangin ka hmu pha a, Tlângchhîp aṭangin an lang vek a ni. A hlanga awm tûr hnam an ni a, Hnam dang ang mai an ni lo." 
Numbers23:10 Israel thlahte chu ṭiauvaivut anga tam an ni a, Chhiar sên rual an ni lo; Thil dik tih vânga thi ka nih chuan Thlamuang takin a ni ka thih dâwn ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:11 Balaka chuan Balaama hnênah, “Engtizia nge chutianga min tih le? Ka hmêlmate ânchhia lawh tûrin ka pun che a, mal i sâwmsak tâk hlauh mai le?” a ti a." 
Numbers23:12 Ani chuan, “ Lalpa min hrilh ang chiah ka sawi tûr a ni dâwn lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Numbers23:13 Balaka chuan, “Ti rawh, hmun dangah i kal teh ang, an vaia i hmuh vek theih lohna hmun, a ṭhen chauh i hmuh theihna tûrah i kal ang; tichuan, ânchhia i lawh ngam ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:14 Pisga tlângchhîpa Zofim hmunah chuan a hruai a; maichâm pasarih a siam a, bâwngchal leh berâmchal maichâmah chuan a hlân ṭheuh va." 
Numbers23:15 Balaka hnênah chuan, “Hâlral thilhlan hi lo vil la, saw laiah sâwn Pathian ka va hmu tâng e,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:16 Lalpa chuan Balaama chu a rawn tâwk a, sawi tûr a hrilh a, “Balaka hnênah kîr la, ka hrilh che kha hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:17 A hnên a lo thleng a, Moab miliante nên chuan maichâm bulah an la ding reng a." 
Numbers23:18 Balaka chuan, “ Lalpan eng nge a lo sawi?” a ti a." 
Numbers23:19 Balaama chuan hetiang hian a chham a: “Balak, tho la, ngaithla teh, Zipora fapa, ka thu hi bengkhawn teh: Pathian hi daw mai mai ṭhîn mihring ang a ni lo va, Lamlêt leh hni hne hringfa ang a ni hek lo. A sawi tawh chu a ti dâwn lâwm ni? A ṭawng tawh chuan a hlen dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Numbers23:20 Mal sâwmsak tûrin min tîr a, Mal a sâwm tawh chu keia sût rual em ni?" 
Numbers23:21 Jakoba hian thil ṭha lo a tawng dâwn lo, Israelan harsatna a tâwk lo vang. Lalpa, an Pathian chuan a awmpui a, Lalah an neih tlat si a." 
Numbers23:22 Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu Pathian chu An tân vêngtu ṭha tak, selechal ang a ni." 
Numbers23:23 Jakoba chu dawi hneh rual a ni lo va, Israela chu ânchhe ngam loh a ni. Miten Israel mite an hmuhin, ‘Pathian hian a va ti mak em!’ an ti ang." 
Numbers23:24 Sakeibaknei zîng tho, Sapêl tûra thawk chhuak, Sa a seh a ei zawha, A thisen a liah fai hma chu Bawk leh ngai lo ang hi a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:25 Balaka chuan Balaama hnênah, “Ânchhia i lawh ngam loh pawhin mal chu sâwmsak lul teh suh,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:26 Balaama chuan Balaka chu a chhâng a, “ Lalpa min hrilh ang chiah ka sawi ang tih ka hrilh che kha,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:27 Balaka chuan Balaama hnênah, “Ngawi teh, hmun dangah i kal teh ang, chuta ṭang chuan Pathianin hêng mite hi ânchhia i lawh a remti mahna,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:28 Peor tlângchhîpah Balaka chuan Balaama chu a hruai a, chuta ṭang chuan thlalêr chu a lang thei vek a." 
Numbers23:29 Balaama chuan, “Maichâm pasarih mi siamsak leh rawh, bâwngchal pasarih leh berâmchal pasarih pawh han la leh bawk ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:30 Balaka chuan Balaama thu ang chuan a ti a, maichâmah chuan bâwngchal pakhat leh berâmchal pakhat a hlan ta ṭheuh va." 
Numbers24:1 Israel-te chu Lalpa chuan mal a sâwm duh tlat a ni tih Balaaman a hriat chuan a hma ang khân aien tûrin a kal hrang duh ta lo va. Thlalêr lam chu a thlîr a," 
Numbers24:2 Israel-ten a chi chi-a bûk an inzâr dul chu a hmu a, Pathian thlarau chu a chungah a lo thleng a," 
Numbers24:3 hetiang hian a chham ta a: “Beora fapa Balaama thu: Mit tihvâra thu chu," 
Numbers24:4 Pathian thu ngaithlatua thu Engkimtitheia inlârna dawngtu, Tlua, mit vâr taa thu chu:" 
Numbers24:5 Aw Jakob, in puan inte chu a va mawi êm! Aw Israel, in bûkte chu a mawi mang e!" 
Numbers24:6 Tûm thing tlar ṭhut ang mai, Lui kama huan hring dup; Lalpa phun thingrai hmun chu, Lui kam sidar hmun ang a ni." 
Numbers24:7 Ruahtui tam tâwk an dawng ang a, Tui ṭhatna hmunah thlai an chîng ang. An lal chu Agaga aiin a ropui a, A ram chu a ropui hle ang." 
Numbers24:8 Aigupta ram aṭanga hruaichhuaktu Pathian chu An tân ki ṭha tak nei sele ang a ni. A hmêlma, hnamte chu a phîn darh ang a, A thalte chuan a chhun hlum ang." 
Numbers24:9 Sakeibaknei angin chhûnah a bawk a, Tu nge titho ngam ang? Mal sâwmsaktu che chu an nihlawh e, ânchhe lawhtu che chuan ânchhia an dawng ve ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers24:10 Balaka chu Balaama chungah chuan a thinur ta hle a, a inhûm ruh a, “Ka hmêlma ânchhe lawh tûrin ka pun che a, vawi thum lai mal i sâwmsak vei maw?” a ti a." 
Numbers24:11 “In khaw lamah haw vat rawh, ropui taka chawimawi che ka lo tum a, Lalpa chuan a phalsak lo che a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Numbers24:12 Balaama chuan Balaka hnênah, “I mi tirhte hnênah, ‘Balaka chuan a in khat tangka leh rangkachak" 
Numbers24:13 min pe mah se, Lalpa thu chu a chhia ka tih angin emaw, a ṭha ka tih angin emaw ka tidanglam thei lo, Lalpa min hrilh ang chu ka sawi ang,’ ka tih rêng kha. Ka haw tâng e” a ti a." 
Numbers24:14 Balaama chuan Balaka hnênah, “En teh, ka chhûngte hnênah ka haw dâwn; ka kal hmain hêng mite hian nakin lawka i mite chunga an thil tih tûr ka hrilh ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers24:15 Heti hian a chham ta a: “Beora fapa Balaama thu: Mit tihvâra thu chu," 
Numbers24:16 Pathian thu ngaithlaa thu, Chungnungbera thurûk hriaa thu, Engkimtitheia inlârna dawngtu, Tlua, mit vâr taa thu chu:" 
Numbers24:17 Ani chu ka hmu, tûnah zawng ni lovin, Ka han en a, a hnaih zawng a hnai lo. Jakoba aṭangin arsi a lo lang ang a, Israela aṭangin lal tiang a lo chawr ang. Moab ram kil tin a hâwl nek ang a, Setha thlahte a vaw hrep ang." 
Numbers24:18 Edom ram chu a ta tûr a ni a. A hmêlma, Seir-ho chu, a nei ang, Israel chu tu man an ngam lo vang." 
Numbers24:19 Jakoba laka chhuak lal chuan, Khuaa thi bângte chu a nuai bo vang.”" 
Numbers24:20 Amalek lam a hawi a, hetiang hian a chham a: “Amalek chu hnam ropui tak ni ṭhîn mah se, A tâwpah an chhe hlen ang,” tiin." 
Numbers24:21 Ken mite lam a hawi a, hetiang hian a chham a: “In chênna chu him hle mah se, Khâm sângah bu nei mah ula," 
Numbers24:22 Ken mite u, in boral ang, Asuria lalin salah a man lawk dâwn a che u,” a ti a." 
Numbers24:23 Hetiang hian thu a chham bawk: “Pathian a chêt hunah tu nge dam khawchhuak awm ang? 
Numbers24:24 Kitim aṭangin lawngin an lo kal ang a, Asuria te, Eber te an tirethei ang, Anmahni pawh an la boral ang,” tiin." 
Numbers24:25 Balaama chu a tho va, a haw ta a; Balaka pawh a haw ta a." 
Numbers25:1 Israel-te Sitim ruama an awm lai chuan Moab nulate an ngai a," 
Numbers25:2 chûng chuan an pathian biakna ruai ṭhehahte an sâwm a, an kîl ve a, milemte chibai an bûk ve ta mai a." 
Numbers25:3 Israel miten Peor-a Baal an be ve ta mai chu Lalpa chuan a haw hle a. 
Numbers25:4 Mosia hnênah, “Israel hruaitu zawng zawng ko la, thu ka pêk che angin hêng mite hi chhûn êngah khai hlum rawh; tichuan, Lalpa thinur na tak chu Israel-te hian an pumpelh dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Numbers25:5 Mosian Israel hotute hnênah chuan, “In hote zînga Peor-a Baal be vete kha that vek rawh u,” a ti a." 
Numbers25:6 Inbiakna bûk kawngkaa pawiti taka an ṭah lai chuan Mosia leh Israel pungkhâwmho hmuhah, Israel mi pakhatin Moab nula a bûkah a rawn hruai lût a." 
Numbers25:7 Arona tupa Finehasa, Eleazara fapa chuan a hmu a, pungkhâwmho zîng aṭang chuan a chhuak a, fei a la a," 
Numbers25:8 Moab nula hruaitu, Israel tlangvâl chu, a bûkah a zui lût a, an pahnih chuan an dulah a chhun tlang a. Tichuan, Israel-te zîngah hri lêng chu a tâwp ta a." 
Numbers25:9 Hri vei avânga thi chu mi sînghnih leh sângli an tling hman a ni. 
Numbers25:10 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers25:11 “Eleazara fapa Finehasa chuan ka tân ṭhahnem a ngaih êm avângin kei pawh Israel mite laka ka thinur a dai ta a; chuvângin, ka tiboral vek ta lo a ni." 
Numbers25:12 Tichuan, a tân leh a thlahte tân inṭhianna thu ka thlung ta e;" 
Numbers25:13 a thlahte nên ka puithiam an ni kumkhua ang a; ka tân ṭhahnem a ngai êm a, Israel-te an sual avânga thi tûr a chhanhim tâk avâng hian,” a ti a." 
Numbers25:14 Israel tlangvâl Moab nula avânga thi ta chu Simeona thlah zînga hotu Salua fapa Zimria a ni. 
Numbers25:15 Moab nula chu Midian hnam lal pakhat, Zura fanu, Kusii a ni." 
Numbers25:16 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers25:17 “Midian-ho hi bei ula, tu tlâwm dêr rawh u;" 
Numbers25:18 Peor-ah an bum che u a, hri lên laia an chhun hlum, an lal fanu Kusii hmangin in chungah thil ṭha lo tak an tih kha,” a ti a." 
Numbers26:1 Hri lêng a reh chuan Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona fapa puithiam Eleazara hnênah," 
Numbers26:2 “Israel pungkhâwmho zînga râlkai chin, kum sawmhnih chung lam chu a chhûng chhûnga thliarin chhiar rawh u,” a ti a." 
Numbers26:3 Tichuan, Mosia leh Eleazara chuan Moab phai, Jeriko zâwn, Jordan lui kamah chuan mipui hnênah," 
Numbers26:4 Mosia hnêna thupêk ang khân, Israel mi, kum sawmhnih chin chung lam, Aigupta ram aṭanga lo kalte kha chhiar rawh u,” an ti a." 
Numbers26:5 Israela fa tîr chu Reubena a ni; Reubena thlahte: Hanoka, Hanok hnam thlahtu; Palua, Palu hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:6 Hezrona, Hezron hnam thlahtu; Karmia, Karmi hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:7 Hêng hi Reubena thlahte chu an ni, an za-in mi sîngli leh sângthum leh zasarih leh sawmthum an ni." 
Numbers26:8 Palua hian fapa Eliaba a nei a," 
Numbers26:9 Eliaba hian Nemuela te, Dathana te, Abirama te a nei a. Dathana leh Abirama chu Kora pâwla mite kha an ni. Anniho hi Lalpa lakah an hel a, Mosia leh Arona beitute kha an ni." 
Numbers26:10 Lei kakah Kora hovin an tla hlum a, mi dang zahnih leh sawmnga pawh meiin a kan hlum kha. Chu chu Israel-te ṭihkhai atân a ni." 
Numbers26:11 Kora fate erawh chu an thi ve lo. 
Numbers26:12 A chhûngkua diat diatin Simeona thlahte chu: Nemuela, Nemuel hnam thlahtu; Jamina, Jamin hnam thlahtu; Jakina, Jakin hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:13 Zera, Zer hnam thlahtu; Saula, Saul hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:14 hêngho hi Simeona thlahte chu an ni, mi sînghnih leh sânghnih leh zahnih an ni." 
Numbers26:15 A chhûngkua diat diatin Gada thlahte chu: Zefona, Zefon hnam thlahtu; Hagia, Hagi hnam thlahtu; Sunia, Suni hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:16 Oznia, Ozni hnam thlahtu; Eria, Eri hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:17 Aroda, Arod hnam thlahtu; Arelia, Areli hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:18 Hêngho hi Gada thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngli leh zanga an ni." 
Numbers26:19 Juda chuan fapa Era leh Onana a nei a; Era leh Onana chu Kanan ramah an thi a. 
Numbers26:20 A chhûngkua diat diatin Juda thlahte chu: Sela, Sela hnam thlahtu; Pereza, Perez hnam thlahtu; Zera, Zer hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:21 Tin, Pereza thlahte chu: Hezrona, Hezron hnam thlahtu; Hamula, Hamul hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:22 Hêngho hi Juda thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngsarih leh sângruk leh zanga an ni." 
Numbers26:23 A chhûngkua diat diatin Isakara thlahte chu: Tola, Tol hnam thlahtu; Pua, Pu hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:24 Jasuba, Jasub hnam thlahtu; Simrona, Simron hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:25 Hêngho hi Isakara thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngruk leh sângli leh zathum an ni." 
Numbers26:26 A chhûngkua diat diatin Zebuluna thlahte chu: Sereda, Sered hnam thlahtu; Elona, Elon hnam thlahtu; Jaleela, Jaleel hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:27 Hêngho hi Zebuluna thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngruk leh zanga an ni." 
Numbers26:28 A chhûngkua diat diatin Josefa thlahte; Josefa chuan fapa Manasea leh Efraima a nei a. 
Numbers26:29 Manasea thlahte: Makira, Makir hnam thlahtu; Makira chuan fapa Gileada a nei, Gilead-ho thlahtu chu." 
Numbers26:30 Hêngho hi Gileada thlahte chu an ni: Iezera, Iezer hnam thlahtu; Heleka, Helek hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:31 Asriela, Asriel hnam thlahtu; Sekema, Sekem hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:32 Semida, Semid hnam thlahtu; Hefera, Hefer hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:33 Hefera fapa Zelofehada chuan fapa a nei lo; a fanute chu Malaii te, Novaii te, Hoglaii te, Milkaii te, Tirzaii te an ni." 
Numbers26:34 Hêngho hi Manasea thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngnga leh sânghnih leh zasarih an ni." 
Numbers26:35 A chhûngkua diat diatin Efraima thlahte chu: Suthela, Suthel hnam thlahtu; Bekera, Beker hnam thlahtu; Tahana, Tahan hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:36 Suthela chuan Eran hnam thlahtu fapa Erana a nei a. 
Numbers26:37 Hêngho hi Efraima thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngthum leh sânghnih leh zanga an ni. Chûng zawng zawng chu Josefa thlahte an ni." 
Numbers26:38 A chhûngkua diat diatin Benjamina thlahte chu: Bela, Bel hnam thlahtu; Asbela, Asbel hnam thlahtu; Ahirama, Ahiram hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:39 Sefufama, Sefufam hnam thlahtu; Hufama, Hufam hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:40 Tin, Bela hian fapa Arda leh Naamana a nei a. Arda chu Ard hnam thlahtu a ni; Naamana chu Naaman hnam thlahtu a ni." 
Numbers26:41 Hêngho hi Benjamina thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngli leh sângnga leh zaruk an ni." 
Numbers26:42 A chhûngkua diat diatin Dana thlahte chu: Suhama, Suham hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:43 Hêngho hi Dana thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngruk leh sângli leh zali an ni." 
Numbers26:44 A chhûngkua diat diatin Asera thlahte chu: Imnaa, Imna hnam thlahtu; Isvia, Isvi hnam thlahtu; Beria, Beri hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:45 Beria thlahte chu: Hebera, Heber hnam thlahtu; Malkiela, Malkiel hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:46 Asera fanu chu Seri a ni. 
Numbers26:47 Hêngho hi Asera thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngnga leh sângthum leh zali an ni." 
Numbers26:48 A chhûngkua diat diatin Naftalia thlahte: Jazeela, Jazeel hnam thlahtu; Gunia, Guni hnam thlahtu;" 
Numbers26:49 Jezera, Jezer hnam thlahtu; Silema, Silem hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:50 Hêngho hi Naftalia thlahte chu an ni, mi sîngli leh sângnga leh zali an ni." 
Numbers26:51 Israela thlah chhiar tling chin chu mi nuairuk leh sîngkhat leh zasarih leh sawmthum an ni. 
Numbers26:52 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers26:53 “Ram chu an ro atân a chhûngkua diat diatin, an tam dân athuin sem rawh." 
Numbers26:54 Chhûng tam deuh chu ram i pe zau deuh vang a, a tlêm deuh chu i pe zîm deuh dâwn nia, tûna hming ziak hi an tam lam chhûtna tûr a ni." 
Numbers26:55 “An thlahtu hmingin an chan tûr ram chu ṭhumvâwra sem tûr a ni. 
Numbers26:56 A hnam tam deuh leh tlêm deuh athuin ram chu ṭhumvâwra sem tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers26:57 A chhûngkua diat diatin Levia chia chhiarte chu hêng hi an ni: Gersona, Gerson hnam thlahtu; Kohata, Kohat hnam thlahtu; Meraria, Merari hnam thlahtu." 
Numbers26:58 Hêng chite pawh hi Levia thlahte an ni: Libna chi te, Hebron chi te, Mahlia chite, Musia chi te, Kora chi te. Tin, Kohata khân fapa Amrama a nei a." 
Numbers26:59 Amrama nupui Jokebedi chu Levia thlah, Aigupta rama piang a ni; ani chuan Arona te, Mosia te leh an farnu Miriami te chu Amrama a hrinsak a." 
Numbers26:60 Arona chuan fapa Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te a nei a." 
Numbers26:61 Nadaba leh Abihua hian hman thiang lo mei, rimtui hâl nân an hmang a, an thih phah a nih kha." 
Numbers26:62 Levia thlahte hi mipa, thla khat chin chung lam an chhiar chin chu: mi sînghnih leh sângthum an ni; Israel hnam zîngah ro atân ram sem ve an nih loh avângin an hming hi Israel khawchhiarbu-a telh ve loh a ni." 
Numbers26:63 Moab ram, Jeriko khaw zâwn, Jordan chhak lam lui kama an awm laia Mosia leh puithiam Eleazaran Israel-te an chhiar khân khiti zât khi an ni." 
Numbers26:64 Sinai thlalêra Mosia leh puithiam Aronan Israel mi an chhiarte kha dam an awm tawh lo. 
Numbers26:65 Lalpa chuan, ‘Thlalêrah an thi ngei ang,’ tia a sawi ang khân Jefunea fapa Kaleba leh Nuna fapa Josua chauh lo chu tu mah dam an awm tawh lo." 
Numbers27:1 Josefa thlah, Manasea chuan fapa Makira a nei a; chu mi fa chu Gileada a ni; Gileada chuan fapa Hefera a nei a, chu mi fa Zelofehada chuan fanu hêngte hi a nei: Malaii te, Novaii te, Hoglaii te, Milkaii te, Tirzaii te." 
Numbers27:2 Anni chu Inbiakna bûk kawngkaah Mosia te, puithiam Eleazara te, hruaitute leh pungkhâwmho hmaah an lo kal a." 
Numbers27:3 “Kan pa chu Kora ho, Lalpa laka helte zîngah khân a tel ve lo va; mahse, thlalêrah a thi ta a, fapa a nei lo va, ama sual vânga thi a ni a." 
Numbers27:4 Fapa a neih loh avângin kan pa hming hi chhungkaw chhiarna zîngah a bo bîk tûr em ni? Kan pa chhûngte zîngah chanvo atân ram min pe ve rawh u,” an rawn ti a." 
Numbers27:5 Mosia chuan chu thu chu Lalpa hnênah a thlen a. 
Numbers27:6 Lalpan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers27:7 “Zelofehada fanute thu hi a dik e, an pa unaute zîngah chanvo tûr ram in pe ve tûr a ni; an pa chan ai chu chang rawh se." 
Numbers27:8 Israel-te chu hrilh rawh: Mi fapa nei lovin thi sela, a ram chu a fanuin a chang tûr a ni." 
Numbers27:9 Fanu a neih loh chuan a unauten an nei ang. 
Numbers27:10 Unau a neih loh chuan a pamiten an chang ang; 
Numbers27:11 pami a neih loh chuan a laichîn chhûng hnaiin a chang ang a, a nei hlen ang. Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin he dân hi Israel-te tân dân nghet a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers27:12 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah: “Abarim tlângah chho la, Israel mite ka pêk tûr ram chu thlîr rawh." 
Numbers27:13 I thlîr zawhah i u Arona ang khân i chipuite hnênah hruai i ni ve ang. 
Numbers27:14 Zin thlalêrah, ka thupêk ang chiaha in tih loh avâng leh ka chunga Israel pungkhâwmho Meriba hmuna an vui khân, in pahnihin, an hmuhah min chawimawi lo a nih kha. Meriba tui hi Zin thlalêr, Kades bula awm kha a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers27:15 Mosia chuan Lalpa hnênah," 
Numbers27:16 “Mi zawng zawng nunna petu Lalpa chuan Israel pungkhâwmho hruaitu tûr mi ruat teh se. 
Numbers27:17 Ani chuan an hma hruaiin an hnung dâl ṭhîn sela, Lalpa mi, Israel pungkhâwmho hi vêngtu nei lo berâm ang mai ni suh se,” a ti a." 
Numbers27:18 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Nuna fapa Josua, pa rilru nei tak chu hruai la, a lu-ah i kut nghat ang che." 
Numbers27:19 Puithiam Eleazara hnênah hruai la, a hmaah leh Israel pungkhâwmho hmaah, an hma ngeiah, i aiawhtuah ruat rawh." 
Numbers27:20 I thuneihna chu hlân rawh; tichuan, Israel mi, pungkhâwmho chuan a thu an zâwm dâwn nia." 
Numbers27:21 Urim leh Thumim hmanga Pathian râwn hi puithiam Eleazara tih tûr a ni ang a; a thu ngaichângin Josua chuan Israel pungkhâwmho chu bûk khuar tûrin emaw, insawn tûrin emaw a hrilh ṭhîn ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers27:22 Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Mosia chuan a ti a, Josua chu puithiam Eleazara leh Israel pungkhâwmho hmaah a dintîr a." 
Numbers27:23 Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Josua lu-ah Mosia chuan a kut a nghat a, a aiawhtu atân a ruat ta a." 
Numbers28:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah; 
Numbers28:2 “Israel mite chu hrilh rawh: a hun ruat takah Pathian hnêna buhbâl thilhlante chu hlan ṭhin tûr a ni, a lâwmzâwng tak chu hlân ṭhîn rawh u." 
Numbers28:3 Buhbâl thilhlan, Lalpa hnêna hlan ṭhin tûr chu hetiang hi a ni: Ni tin hâl ral atân berâmno a pa pahnih, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo hâlral thilhlan hlan tûr a ni." 
Numbers28:4 Berâm pakhat chu zîngah hlân ula, pakhat chu tlaiah." 
Numbers28:5 Pakhat rual chuan buhbâl thilhlanah chhangphut ṭha chi kg. khat, oliv hriak thlit fîm litar khat nêna pawlh hlan tel tûr a ni." 
Numbers28:6 Hei hi Sinai tlâng ata ni tina hâl ral vek tûra an buhbâl thilhlan ṭhin chu a ni; chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni. 
Numbers28:7 Berâm pakhat hlan rualin in tûr thilhlan uain litar khat maichâmah bun ṭhin tûr a ni. 
Numbers28:8 Tlaiah berâm pakhat pawh chu, zîng lama mi ang chiah khân hlan tûr a ni, in tûr thilhlan uain nên. Hei hi ei tûr thilhlan, Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni." 
Numbers28:9 “Sabat ni chuan berâmno a pa pahnih, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo te, buhbâl thilhlan, chhangphut ṭha chi kg. hnih, Oliv hriak nêna chawhpawlh te, uain thilhlante hlan tûr a ni." 
Numbers28:10 Sabat ni apiangin hâlral thilhlan pangngai bâkah he hâlral thilhlan hi uain nên hlan ṭhin tûr a ni. 
Numbers28:11 “Thla thar ni apiangin Lalpa hnêna hâlral thilhlanah hêngte hi han keng ṭhîn ang che u: bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal pakhat, berâmno a pa pasarih, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek." 
Numbers28:12 Buhbâl thilhlanah chhangphut ṭha chi oliv hriak nêna pawlh in rawn hlân bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers28:13 Bâwngtuai pakhatah chhangphut kg. thum, berâmchal pakhatah kg. hnih; berâmno pakhatah kg. khat; hêng hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlante hi Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni." 
Numbers28:14 In tûr thilhlan chu bâwngtuai pakhatah uain litar hnih, berâmchal pakhatah litar khat telh zêl tûr a ni. Hei hi kum tluanin thla thar ni apianga hâlral thilhlana hlan ṭhin tûr chu a ni." 
Numbers28:15 Ni tina in tûr thilhlan uain nên hâlral thilhlan in hlan ṭhin bâkah sual thawina thilhlan atân Lalpa hnênah kêlpa pakhat in hlân bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers28:16 “ Lalpa chawimawi nân Kalhlên kût chu thla hmasa ber, ni sâwm leh pali niin hmang ṭhîn ang che u." 
Numbers28:17 Ni sâwm leh panga niin kûtpui chu ṭan a ni ang a, ni sarih chhûng chhang dawidim telh loh chauh ei tûr a ni." 
Numbers28:18 Ni hmasa berah chuan inkhâwmpui urhsûn in nei tûr a ni, in hna pangngai in thawk hauh tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers28:19 Ei tûr thilhlan atân bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal pakhat, berâmno a pa pasarih, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers28:20 Hêng rual hian buhbâl thilhlan bâwngtuai pakhatah kg. hnih," 
Numbers28:21 berâmno pakhat zêlah kg. khat hlan tel bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers28:22 Sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa pakhat hlân ula, chutiangin in sual chu thian fai ṭhîn ang che u." 
Numbers28:23 Hêng hi tûk tin thil hlan ṭhin bâka hlan tûr a ni. 
Numbers28:24 Chutiangin ni sarih chhûng chu Lalpa hnênah ei tûr thilhlan hi hlan ziah tûr a ni; chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni. Ni tin hâlral leh in tûr thilhlan ṭhin bâkah hêng hi hlan tûr a ni. 
Numbers28:25 A ni sarih ni chuan inkhâwmpui urhsûn nei leh ula, mahni hna pangngai in thawk tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers28:26 “In barli thar, buhbâl thilhlana Lalpa hnêna in rawn hlan hun, Chawlhkâr Kûtah pawh inkhâwmpui urhsûn, in nei tûr a ni: in hna pangngai in thawk hauh tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers28:27 Hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai pahnih, berâmchal pakhat, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa pasarih, hmêlhem lo vek, hlân ang che u; chu chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu a ni." 
Numbers28:28 Buhbâl thilhlanah chhangphut ṭha chi, oliv hriak pawlh, bâwngtuai pakhatah kg. thum, berâmchal pakhatah kg. khat leh a chanve," 
Numbers28:29 berâmno pakhatah kg. khat hlan tel zêl tûr a ni. 
Numbers28:30 Sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa pakhat hlân bawk ang che u, chutiang chuan mipui sual in thian fai dâwn nia." 
Numbers28:31 Ni tina hâlral thilhlan bâkah hêng hi uain thilhlan nên in hlân ṭhîn tûr a ni. 
Numbers29:1 “Thla sarihna, ni khat ni chuan, inkhâwmpui urhsûn nei ang che u. In hna pangngai in thawk tûr a ni lo. Hemi ni hian tawtawrâwt in hâm ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:2 Hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, berâm a pa pasarih, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek hlân ang che u." 
Numbers29:3 Buhbâl thilhlanah chhangphut ṭha chi oliv hriak nêna pawlh, bâwngtuai pakhatah kg. thum, berâmchal pakhatah kg. hnih," 
Numbers29:4 berâmno pakhatah kg. khat hlân tel bawk ang che u. 
Numbers29:5 In sual thawina tûr kêlpa, sual thawina thilhlanah hlân ang che u." 
Numbers29:6 Chûng chu thla thar hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlan ṭhin leh ni tina hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlan ṭhin leh a dân tûr anga in tûr uain hlan ṭhinte bâka hlan tûr a ni. Chûng chu meia thilhlan, Lalpa tâna rimtui a ni." 
Numbers29:7 “Thla sarihna, ni sâwm ni chuan inkhâwmpui urhsûn in nei tûr a ni; chaw nghei ula, in hna pangngai thawk suh u." 
Numbers29:8 Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, berâmno a pa pasarih, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek, hlân ang che u." 
Numbers29:9 Buhbâl thilhlanah chhangphut ṭha chi oliv hriak nêna pawlh, bâwngtuai pakhatah kg. thum, berâmchal pakhatah kg. hnih," 
Numbers29:10 berâmno pakhatah kg. khat hlân bawk ang che u. 
Numbers29:11 In sual thawina tûr kêlpa, sual thawina thilhlanah in hlân bawk tûr a ni; mipui sual thenfaina tûr kêlpa hlan ṭhin bâkah leh ni tin hâlral thilhlan, buhbâl leh in tûr thilhlan ṭhin bâkah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:12 “Thla sarihna, ni sâwm leh ni nga ni chuan inkhâwmpui urhsûn nei ṭhîn rawh u; in hna pangngai in thawk tûr a ni lo, ni sarih chhûng chu Lalpa chawimawiin kût in hmang tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:13 A ni khat ni chuan hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai sâwm leh pathum, berâmchal pahnih, kum khat vêla upa berâmno a pa sâwm leh pali, hmêlhem lo vek, Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:14 Chûng rual chuan buhbâl thilhlanah chhangphut ṭha chi, Oliv hriak pawlh, bâwngtuai pakhatah kg. thum," 
Numbers29:15 berâmchal pakhatah kg. hnih, berâmno pakhatah kg. khat in hlân tel bawk tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:16 Sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa pakhat pawh in hlân tûr a ni. Ni tina hâlral leh buhbâl thil hlan ṭhin, in tûr thil hlan nên tiam lovin in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:17 A ni hnih ni chuan hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai sâwm leh pahnih, berâmchal pahnih, berâmno a pa sâwm leh pali, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek, Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:18 Bâwng tuai te, berâmchal te leh berâmno rual chuan buhbâl thilhlan tûr tuk zât chhangphut ṭha chi, oliv hriak pawlh in hlân tel tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:19 Ni tina hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan bâkah sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa in hlân bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers29:20 “A ni thum ni chuan hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai sâwm leh pakhat, berâmchal pahnih, berâmno a pa sâwm leh pali, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek, Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:21 Bâwngtuai te, berâmchal te, leh berâmno rual chuan buhbâl thilhlan tûr tuk zât chhangphut ṭha chi, oliv hriak pawlh in hlân tel tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:22 Ni tina hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan ṭhin bâkah sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa in hlân bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers29:23 “A ni li ni chuan hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai sâwm, berâmchal pahnih, berâmno a pa sâwm leh pali, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek, Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:24 Bâwngtuai te, berâmchal te leh berâmno rual chuan buhbâl thilhlan tûr tuk zât chhangphut ṭha chi, oliv hriak pawlh in hlân tel tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:25 Ni tina hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan ṭhin bâkah sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa in hlân bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers29:26 “A ni nga ni chuan hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai pakua, berâmchal pahnih, berâmno a pa sâwm leh pali, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek, Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:27 Bâwngtuai te, berâmchal te leh berâmno rual chuan buhbâl thilhlan tûr tuk zât chhangphut ṭha chi, oliv hriak pawlh in hlân tel tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:28 Ni tina hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan ṭhin bâkah sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa in hlân bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers29:29 “A ni ruk ni chuan hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai pariat, berâmchal pahnih, berâmno a pa sâwm leh pali, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek, Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:30 Bâwngtuai te, berâmchal te leh berâmno rual chuan buhbâl thilhlan tûr tuk zât chhangphut ṭha chi, oliv hriak pawlh in hlân tel tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:31 Ni tina hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan ṭhin bâkah sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa in hlân bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers29:32 “Ni sarih ni chuan hâlral thilhlanah bâwngtuai pasarih, berâmchal pahnih, berâmno a pa sâwm leh pali, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek, Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:33 Bâwngtuai te, berâmchal te leh berâmno rual chuan buhbâl thilhlan tûr tuk zât chhangphut ṭha chi oliv hriak pawlh in hlân tel tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:34 Ni tin hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan bâkah sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa in hlân bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers29:35 “A ni riat ni chuan inkhâwmpui urhsûn in nei leh ang a, in hna pangngai in thawk tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers29:36 Hâlral thilhlanah bâwngchal pakhat, berâmchal pakhat, berâmno a pa pasarih, kum khat vêla upa, hmêlhem lo vek, Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak chu in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:37 Bâwngchal te, berâmchal te, berâmno te chu buhbâl thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan, ran chi hrang hrang pakhat ruala telh tûr tuk zât in hlân tel zêl bawk tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:38 Ni tina hâlral leh buhbâl leh in tûr thilhlan ṭhin bâkah sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa in hlân bawk tûr a ni. 
Numbers29:39 “Intiamkam hlen thilhlan te, mahni duh thu-a thilhlan te, hâlral thilhlan te, buhbâl thilhlan te, in tûr thilhlan te, remna thilhlan te in hlan ṭhin bâkah khîng khi in hlân ngei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers29:40 Lalpa thupêk zawng zawng chu Mosian Israel-te chu a hrilh a. 
Numbers30:1 Mosia chuan Israel hnam hruaitute hnênah," 
Numbers30:2 “Miin Lalpa hminga thil eng emaw a hnêna pêk a intiamkamin emaw, thil eng emaw ti lo tûra a intiamkamin emaw a thu chu a bawhchhe tûr a ni lo, a sawi ang chuan a hlen ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers30:3 “Nula pate ina la awm pawhin Lalpa hnênah eng emaw pêk intiamkamin emaw, eng emaw ti lo tûra a intiamkamin emaw," 
Numbers30:4 a pain a lo hriata, a ngawihsan mai chuan a thu chu a hlen ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers30:5 A pain a thu chu hlen a phalsak loh tlat chuan, a fihlîm mai ang. A pain a thutiam hlen a phalsak loh avângin Lalpa chuan a ngaihhnathiam ang." 
Numbers30:6 “Hmeichhia pasal nei lovin tum lui rânin emaw, ngaihtuah chiang mang lovin emaw, thil eng emaw pêk intiamkamin emaw, thil eng eng emaw ti lo tûra intiamkam chungin emaw pasal nei ta sela," 
Numbers30:7 a pasalin a hriata, a ngawihsan mai chuan, a thu chu a hlen ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers30:8 A pasalin a hriata, hlen a phalsak loh chuan a intiamkamna ata chu a fihlîm ang. Lalpa chuan a ngaihhnathiam ang." 
Numbers30:9 “Hmeithaite leh mâkchhiat tâwkte erawh chuan pêk an tiam chu an pe tûr a ni a, ti lo tûra an tiam chu an ti lo tûr a ni." 
Numbers30:10 “Pasal nei laiin eng emaw pêk te, eng emaw ti lo tûr tein intiamkam sela," 
Numbers30:11 a pasalin a hriata a hnial loh chuan a thu chu a hlen vek tûr a ni. 
Numbers30:12 A pasalin a hriata, a khapsak chuan a fihlîm mai ang. A pasalin a thutiam chu a khapsak tlat avângin Lalpa chuan a ngaihhnathiam ang." 
Numbers30:13 Hmeichhiain thil pêk, tih loh tûr emaw, intiamkamna a neih rêng rêng chu a pasalin a phalin a phal lo thei a ni." 
Numbers30:14 A pasalin a intiamkam tih a hriat ni ngeia a hnial loh chuan pêk a tiam emaw, tih loh a tiam emaw chu a hlân ngei tûr a ni, a pasalin a intiamkamna thu a nemnghehsak tihna a ni." 
Numbers30:15 A hnu deuhvah a pasalin a intiamna chu a sûtsak chuan a hlen loh mawh chu a pasal chuan a phur ang.” 
Numbers30:16 Hei hi pasal nei lo, pate ina la awm emaw, pasal nei laiin emaw intiamkamna an neiha tih dân tûr Lalpan Mosia a hrilh chu a ni." 
Numbers31:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers31:2 “Israel-te phuba chu Midian-ho chungah la zet la, i laichînte hnêna hruai i ni dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Numbers31:3 Mosia chuan mipui hnênah, “Midian-ho do tûrin râlthuam inbel rawh u; Midian-ho chungah Lalpa phuba in la tûr a ni." 
Numbers31:4 Israel hnam tin aṭangin mi sâng ṭheuh, indonaa kal tûr, indâwk chhuak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Numbers31:5 Tichuan, Israel hnam tin aṭangin mi sâng ṭheuh an indâwk chhuak a, an vaiin sîngkhat leh sânghnih an ni." 
Numbers31:6 Indonaa kal tûr chuan hnam tin zînga mi sâng dawh chhuah chu puithiam Eleazara fapa Finehasa hovin indo tûr chuan a tîr ta a, bungbêl thianghlimte leh tawtawrâwt ham tûr chu an keng a." 
Numbers31:7 Mosia hnênah Lalpa sawi ang khân Midian-ho chu an bei a, mipa zawng zawng an that a." 
Numbers31:8 Mi dang rualin Midian lal panga Evia te, Rekema te, Zura te, Hura te, Reba te pawh hi an that a, Beora fapa Balaama pawh indonaah chuan an that a." 
Numbers31:9 Israel mite chuan Midian hmeichhiate chu an fate nên an man a, an bâwng te, berâm leh kêl rualte leh an thil neih dang pawh an lâksak vek a." 
Numbers31:10 Chûng rama an chênna khuate leh an bûkte chu an hâlsak vek bawk a. 
Numbers31:11 An thil lâk leh man, mihring leh ran nên, an kawi vek a." 
Numbers31:12 Mosia te, puithiam Eleazara te leh Israel pungkhâwmho hnênah, an riahhmun Moab phaizâwl Jeriko zâwn Jordan lui kamah chuan an rawn hâwn a." 
Numbers31:13 Mosia te, puithiam Eleazara te leh Israel pungkhâwmho te chu riahhmun pâwnah anni chu hmuak tûrin an lo chhuak a." 
Numbers31:14 Indona aṭanga lo haw sipai sâng hotute leh za hotute chungah Mosia chu a thin a ur ta hle a. 
Numbers31:15 Mosia chuan an hnênah, “Hêng hmeichhiate hi engati nge in la zuah?" 
Numbers31:16 Balaama fuihpawrhin Peor-ah khân Israel mite chu Lalpa lakah thil sual a tihtîr a nih kha. 
Numbers31:17 Mipa tawh phawt chu, naupang tê pawh that vek ula, hmeichhia pawh mipa pâwl tham tawhho zawng chu that vek rawh u." 
Numbers31:18 Hmeichhe naupang, mipa la pâwl tham lohho kha erawh chu zuah ula, nei mai rawh u." 
Numbers31:19 Mi that leh mitthi ruang khawih zawng zawng chu riahhmun pâwnah riak rawh u; ni thum ni-ah leh ni sarih ni-ah in mi mante nên inthianfai ang che u. 
Numbers31:20 Silhfên te, savuna siam thil rêng rêng te, kêl hmula siam zawng zawng te, thinga siam zawng zawngte nên tihthianghlim zet tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers31:21 Puithiam Eleazara chuan indonaa kalte hnênah, “Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk chu hei hi a ni:" 
Numbers31:22 Rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dar te, thîr te, ṭin te, suan te," 
Numbers31:23 meia rawha chhe mai thei lo chu meiah in rawh ang a, a thianghlim ang, tlenfaina tui erawh chu theh tûr a ni. Meia rawh theih loh chu sil tûr a ni." 
Numbers31:24 In silhfênte pawh a ni sarih niin in su ang a, in thianghlim ang a, chumi hnuah riahhmunah in lo lût thei ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers31:25 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers31:26 “Nang nên, Puithiam Eleazara nên, Israel pungkhâwmho hruaitute nên râllâk thil an rawn hawn, mihring leh ran te chu chhiar ula," 
Numbers31:27 inzâtin hmun hnihah ṭhen phawk ula, ṭhen khat chu indonaa kalte pe ang che u; a dang chu Israel pungkhâwmho hnênah pe ang che u." 
Numbers31:28 Indonaa kalhote chan aṭangin mihring te, bâwng te, sabengtung te, berâm leh kêl te, zanga zêlah pakhat Lalpa tân lâksak la," 
Numbers31:29 Lalpa tâna serh hran chu Eleazara pe ang che. 
Numbers31:30 A zâtve, Israel pungkhâwmho chan aṭang chuan mihring te, bâwng te, sabengtung te, berâm leh kêl te, sawmngaa pakhat zêl lâksak la, Lalpa biakbûk enkawltu Levia chite pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers31:31 Lalpa thu ang chuan Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan an ti a. 
Numbers31:32 Anmahni puala an thil lâk chhiar lovin indonaa kalte thil rawn hawn chu heti zât hi a ni: Berâm leh kêl nuairuk leh sîngsarih leh sângnga; 
Numbers31:33 bâwng sîngsarih leh sânghnih," 
Numbers31:34 sabengtung sîngruk leh sângkhat," 
Numbers31:35 hmeichhe naupang mipa la pâwl loh sîngthum leh sânghnih; 
Numbers31:36 a zâtve indonaa kalte chan chu berâm leh kêl nuaithum leh sîngthum leh sângsarih leh zanga a ni; 
Numbers31:37 Lalpa tâna lâk chu zaruk leh sawmsarih leh panga a ni. 
Numbers31:38 Bâwng chu sîngthum leh sângruk a ni a, Lalpa tâna lâk chu sawmsarih leh pahnih a ni." 
Numbers31:39 Sabengtung chu sîngthum leh zanga a ni a, Lalpa tâna lâk chu sawmruk leh pakhat a ni." 
Numbers31:40 Hmeichhe naupang chu sîngkhat leh sângkhat an ni, Lalpa tâna lâk chu mi sawmthum leh pahnih an ni." 
Numbers31:41 Lalpa thupêk angin Lalpa tâna serh hran chu puithiam Eleazara chu an pe a. 
Numbers31:42 Indonaa kalte thil hawn zâtve," 
Numbers31:43 Israel mipuite hnêna Mosian a sem chu kêl leh berâm nuaithum leh sîngthum leh sângsarih leh zanga a ni. 
Numbers31:44 Bâwng chu sîngthum leh sângruk a ni; 
Numbers31:45 sabengtung chu sîngthum leh zanga a ni. 
Numbers31:46 Hmeichhe naupang chu sîngkhat leh sângruk an ni. 
Numbers31:47 Israel mipuite chan aṭang chuan sawmngaa pakhat zêl, ran pawh mihring pawh a la a; Lalpa Biakbûk enkawltu Levia chite hnênah Lalpa thu ang chuan a pe a." 
Numbers31:48 Sipai sâng hotute leh za hotute chu Mosia hnênah an lo kal a," 
Numbers31:49 Mosia hnênah, “Kan hote kan han chhiar a, pakhat mah kan inhloh lo." 
Numbers31:50 Rangkachaka siam incheina: bânbun te, ngûn te, khaidiat ṭhi te, nemna zungbun te, bengbeh te, kâwnghrên te, mahni pual atâna kan lâkte hi, Lalpa chuan kan nun min vênhimsak manah Lalpa hnênah kan rawn hlân a ni,” an ti a." 
Numbers31:51 Mosia leh Eleazara chuan rangkachak chher sa chu an lo dawng a. 
Numbers31:52 Sipai hotuten Lalpa hnêna thilpêk an rawn ken rangkachak chu kg. zathum lai a ni. 
Numbers31:53 Sipai narânho erawh chuan mahni puala an lâk chu an nei mai a. 
Numbers31:54 Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan rangkachak chher sate chu Lalpa chuan a mite a hriat reng theih nân Biakbûkah chuan an dah a. 
Numbers32:1 Reubena leh Gada thlahte chuan kêl leh berâm an ngah hle a. Jazer leh Gilead ram chu ran tlat nâna ṭha tak a ni tih an hmuhin 
Numbers32:2 Mosia te, puithiam Eleazara te leh Israel pungkhâwmho hruaitu te hmaah an lo kal a," 
Numbers32:3 “Atarot te, Dibon te, Jazer te, Nimra te, Hesbon te, Elealeh te, Sebam te, Nebo te, Beon ram te," 
Numbers32:4 Lalpa min hnehsak ramte hi, ran tlatna chi a ni a, keini lahin ran kan ngah a," 
Numbers32:5 rem in tihzâwng a nih chuan Jordan lui râl kai ve lovin he ram hi kan chanvo atân min pe mai teh u” an ti a. 
Numbers32:6 Mosian Reubena leh Gada thlahte hnênah chuan, “In unauten râl an bei ang a, nangni he laiah in lo ṭhu mai mai bîk ang maw?" 
Numbers32:7 Engtizia nge Israel mite hi Lalpa ram pêka an kal tûr rilru in tihhnual le? 
Numbers32:8 Kades-barnea aṭanga ram en thlithlai tûra mi ka tirh pawh khân in paten mi dang rilru an tihnual a nih kha. 
Numbers32:9 Eskol ruam an han thlena ram chu an han hmuh chian khân Lalpa pêk rama kal ngam lo tûrin Israel mite rilru an tizâm a. 
Numbers32:10 Chutah Lalpa chu a thinur ta hle a. 
Numbers32:11 ‘Aigupta ram aṭanga lo chhuak kum sawmhnih aia upaho chuan Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te hnêna pêk ka tiam ram chu an thleng ve tawp lo vang, mi zui tak tak lo a ni;" 
Numbers32:12 Keniz mi Jefunea fapa Kaleba leh Nuna fapa Josua-te pahnih chauh hi an thleng ve ang, anni hi chuan min zui tak tak a ni,’ tiin thu a tiam hial a nih kha." 
Numbers32:13 Lalpa chu a thinur tâk êm avângin thil ṭha lo titute an thih mang hma chu thlalêrah kum sawmli zet kan vâkvai a nih hi. 
Numbers32:14 In pate ang hlauh kha in nih hi, mi sual rual, Israel-te chunga Lalpa thinur tizualtu in nih hi." 
Numbers32:15 Ani chu tûnah in zui duh lo tak tak a nih chuan thlalêrah min hnutchhiah leh ang a, nangni hian Israel mite hi in tihlum vek dâwn a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Numbers32:16 Mosia lam chu an hawi a, “Kan berâm rual tân huang kan siam ang a, kan fanaute awmna tûr kulh nei khua kan din ang." 
Numbers32:17 Keiniho hian hriamhrei kengin kan unau Israel-te hma kan hruai zêl ang a, an awmna tûr hmun chu kan thlen ang. Kan nupui fanaute erawh chu hêng lai mite avângin kulh nei khuaahte chuan lo awm mai rawh se." 
Numbers32:18 Israel mi tinin an ram neih tûr an luah hma chu, in lamah kan kîrsan lo vang." 
Numbers32:19 Jordan lui râl ram chu kan neihpui ve lo vang e, Jordan he lam kamah kan chanvo tûr zawng a awm hi,” an ti a." 
Numbers32:20 Mosia chuan, “Chutiangin in ti meuh ang maw? Indo peiha Lalpa hmaa hriamhrei in kena," 
Numbers32:21 Lalpa hmaa Jordan lui kânin hmêlmate a hnawh chhuah hma chu in tel ve zêla," 
Numbers32:22 Lalpan ram chin a hneh hnua kîr leh chauh tûr in nih chuan, Lalpa leh Israel-te chungah thiam lohna in nei lo vang a, he lai ram hi Lalpa chuan in neih a remti ngei ang." 
Numbers32:23 In duh loh erawh chuan Lalpa chungah thil in tisual a ni ang; in sual mawh chu in phur ngei ang. 
Numbers32:24 In fanaute tân khawpui kulh neite chu din ula, berâm huangte siam ula, in duh ang chuan ti ta che u,” a ti a." 
Numbers32:25 Gada leh Reubena thlahte chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ka pu, i thu ang chuan i chhiahhlawhte hian kan ti ang." 
Numbers32:26 Kan nupui fanau te, kan bâwng te, kan berâm leh kêlte chu Gilead ram khaw kulhahte hian an awm ang a." 
Numbers32:27 I chhiahhlawh te, indonaa hriamhrei keng tlâk zawng zawng te hi chuan i thu angin Jordan lui kan kai ve vek ang,” an ti a." 
Numbers32:28 Mosia chuan puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te leh Israel hnam hruaitu te chu thu a chah a." 
Numbers32:29 “Gada leh Reubena thlah indonaa hriamhrei keng tlâkte hian Lalpa hmaa Jordan an kaipui che ua, ram chu in hnehpui chuan Gilead ram hi an chanvo-ah pe ang che u." 
Numbers32:30 Hriamhrei kenga Jordan an kânpui duh loh che u erawh chuan Kanan ramah, in zîngah, chanvo an nei ve mai tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers32:31 Gada leh Reubena thlahte chuan, “I chhiahhlawhte hnêna Lalpa sawi ang chuan kan ti ang a, Kanan ramah," 
Numbers32:32 Lalpa hmaah chuan hriamhrei kan keng ang a, kan ram chanvo ve tûr erawh chu khawchhak lama mi hi ni rawh se,” an ti a." 
Numbers32:33 Mosia chuan Gada leh Reubena thlahte chu Manasea thlah zâtvete nên Amor lal Sihona leh Basan lal Oga ram chu an khawpui leh a chhehvêl ramte nên chuan a sem a. 
Numbers32:34 Gada thlahte chuan kulh nei khua - Dibon khua te, Atarot khua te, Aroer khua te," 
Numbers32:35 Atrot-sofan khua te, Jazer khua te, Jogbeha khua te," 
Numbers32:36 Bethnimra khua te, Beth-haran khaw kulh te chu an din ṭha leh a, berâm huangte pawh an siam a." 
Numbers32:37 Reubena thlahte chuan Hesbon khua te, Elealeh khua te, Kiriathaim khua te," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo khua te, Baal-meon khua te, Sibma khaw kulh te an siam ṭha a, hming an sa thar a." 
Numbers32:39 Manasea fa, Makira thlahte chu, Gilead khuaah an kal a, an la a. Chuta awm Amor mite chu an hnawt chhuak a." 
Numbers32:40 Mosian Gilead khua chu Manasea fa, Makira chu a pe a, chutah chuan a awm ta a." 
Numbers32:41 Manasea fa vêk, Jaira chu a thawk chhuak a, a chhehvêl khuate chu a la a, Havot-jair a vuah a." 
Numbers32:42 Noba pawh a thawk chhuak a, Kenat leh a chhehvêl khuate chu a la a, ama hming chawiin Noba a vuah a." 
Numbers33:1 Mosia leh Arona hovin Aigupta ram aṭanga Israel mite, a huhova an kal zêl dân chu hetiang hi a ni:" 
Numbers33:2 Mosia chuan Lalpa thupêk angin an chhuahna aṭanga an kalna apiang kha a indawtin a ziak zêl a. 
Numbers33:3 Thla khatna, ni sâwm leh panga niin Rameses aṭangin Israel-te chu Kalhlên Kût tûk khân Aigupta mite hmuh ngeiah anmahni thamlo takin an chhuak hlawm a." 
Numbers33:4 Aigupta mite lah chu an fa tîr Lalpa tihhlumte kha phûmin an ṭûl a, an pathian pawhin Lalpa chu a ngam lo a ni." 
Numbers33:5 Israel mite chu Ramases aṭang chuan Sukot-ah an riak a," 
Numbers33:6 thlalêr dep Etham-ah an riak leh a. 
Numbers33:7 Etham aṭang chuan Baal-zefon ep Pi-hahirot-ah an kual a, Migdol depah bûk an khuar a." 
Numbers33:8 Pi-hahirot aṭang chuan tuipui an kân a, Etham thlalêrah ni thum an kal a, Mara-ah bûk an khuar a." 
Numbers33:9 Mara aṭang chuan tuihna sâwm leh pahnih awmna, tûm thing sawmsarih ṭona Elim an thleng a, bûk an khuar a." 
Numbers33:10 Elim aṭangin Tuipui Sen kamah an riak a. 
Numbers33:11 Chuta ṭangin Sin thlalêrah bûk an khuar a," 
Numbers33:12 Sin thlalêr aṭang chuan Dofka-ah an riak a. 
Numbers33:13 Alus-ah an riak leh a," 
Numbers33:14 chuta ṭang chuan tui in tûr awm lohna, Refidim-ah bûk an khuar a." 
Numbers33:15 Refidim aṭang chuan Sinai thlalêr an thleng a," 
Numbers33:16 an kal zêl a, Kibrot-hatava-ah bûk an khuar leh a." 
Numbers33:17 Hazerot-ah bûk an khuar leh a. 
Numbers33:18 Chuta ṭangin Ritma-ah an riak a," 
Numbers33:19 Rimon-perez-ah an riak leh a. 
Numbers33:20 Chuta ṭangin Libna-ah bûk an khuar a," 
Numbers33:21 Risa-ah bûk an khuar leh a. 
Numbers33:22 An kal zêl a, Kehela-ah an riak a," 
Numbers33:23 Sefer tlângah an riak leh a. 
Numbers33:24 Chuta ṭangin Harada-ah bûk an khuar a," 
Numbers33:25 Mekhelot-ah bûk an khuar leh a. 
Numbers33:26 An kal zêl a, Tahat-ah an riak a," 
Numbers33:27 Tera-ah an riak leh a. 
Numbers33:28 An kal zêl a, Mitka-ah an riak a," 
Numbers33:29 Hasmona-ah bûk an khuar leh a. 
Numbers33:30 An kal zêl a, Moserot-ah an riak a," 
Numbers33:31 Bene-jaakan-ah an riak leh a," 
Numbers33:32 An kal zêl a, Hor-hagidgad-ah bûk an khuar a," 
Numbers33:33 Jotbata-ah bûk an khuar leh a. 
Numbers33:34 An kal zêl a, Abrona-ah an riak a," 
Numbers33:35 Ezion-geber-ah an riak leh a. 
Numbers33:36 Chuta ṭangin Zin thlalêr Kades-ah bûk an khuar a. 
Numbers33:37 Kades aṭang chuan Edom ramri Hor tlâng an thleng a. 
Numbers33:38 Lalpa thu angin Aigupta ram Israel-ten an chhuahsan aṭangin kum sawmli, thla ngana, ni khat ni chuan he tlângah hian Arona chu a thi ta a." 
Numbers33:39 Arona a thih chuan kum za leh sawmhnih leh pathuma upa a ni. 
Numbers33:40 Kanan ram chhim lama awmho, Kanan mi, Arad lal chuan Israel mite lo kal thâwm chu a lo hria a." 
Numbers33:41 Hor tlâng aṭang chuan an kal zêl a, Zalmon-ah bûk an khuar a." 
Numbers33:42 Punon-ah bûk an khuar leh a. 
Numbers33:43 An kal zêl a, Obot-ah an riak a," 
Numbers33:44 Moab ramria Iye-abarim hmunah an riak leh a. 
Numbers33:45 An kal zêl a, Dibon-gad-ah bûk an khuar a." 
Numbers33:46 Almon-diblathaim-ah bûk an khuar leh a. 
Numbers33:47 An kal zêl a, Nebo tlâng bul Abarim tlâng an thleng a." 
Numbers33:48 Chuta ṭangin Jordan lui kam, Jeriko khaw zâwnah, bûk an khuar ta a." 
Numbers33:49 Jordan lui dung, Moab phairuamah chuan Beth-jesimot aṭanga Abel-sitim thlengin an inzâr a." 
Numbers33:50 Jordan lui kam Jeriko khaw zâwn, Moab phaiah Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers33:51 “Israel mite chu hrilh rawh: Jordan lui kâna Kanan ram an thlen hun chuan," 
Numbers33:52 chuta awmte chu in hnawt chhuak vek ang a, an lung milim te, an phun milim te tihchhiatsak vek tûr a ni; an hmunsângte pawh ṭhiat vek ang che u." 
Numbers33:53 Chûng rama chêngte chu hnawt chhuak vek ula, in luahlân tûr a ni, in neih atâna ram ka pêk che u chu a ni." 
Numbers33:54 In chhûngkaw tam dân athuin in insem ang. Ṭhumvâwrin sem ula, in chan chu in nei zêl ang, chhûngkaw tam deuh chuan an chang zau deuh vang a, a tlêm deuh chuan an nei zîm deuh vang." 
Numbers33:55 Chûnga lo awmte chu in hnawh chhuah vek duh loh chuan in tân hlîng ang an ni ang a, an kâp reng ang che u a, in ramah chuan an tibuai fo dâwn che u a ni." 
Numbers33:56 Anni chu hnawh bo daih ka tiam a, in hnawh bo duh loh chuan nangni pawh ka hnawt bo vang che u,” a ti a." 
Numbers34:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers34:2 “Israel mite chu hrilh rawh. Kanan ram in thlen hun chuan in ram atâna ka pêk tûr che u ram chin chu hetiang hi a ni ang. 
Numbers34:3 Chhim lam ri chuan Zin thlalêr aṭangin Edom ram a chhun ang a, khawchhak lam ri chu Tuipui Thi tâwpah a inṭan ang a," 
Numbers34:4 chhim zâwngin Akrabim kalkhânah kal tlangin Zin thlalêra Kades-barnea a chhun ang. Hmâr zawngin Hazar-adar thlengin a kal ang a, Azmon a pan ang a," 
Numbers34:5 Aigupta ramri luite hawiin a inher ang a, Mediteranean tuipui a chhun ang." 
Numbers34:6 “Khawthlang lam ri chu Mediteranean tuipui a ni ang. 
Numbers34:7 Hmâr lam ramri chu Mediteranean tuipui aṭangin Hor tlâng chhunin a kal ang a," 
Numbers34:8 chuta ṭangin Hamath kalkhânah a kal ang a," 
Numbers34:9 Zedad leh Zefron kal tlangin Hazar-enan a chhun ang, chu chu hmâr lam ramri chu a ni ang." 
Numbers34:10 “Khawchhak lam ramri chu Hazar-enan aṭangin Sefam-ah a kal ang a. 
Numbers34:11 Ain chhak lam Ribla panin a chhuk ang a, Galili dîl chhak lam tlâng pangah a chhuk zêl ang a;" 
Numbers34:12 Jordan luidungah, Tuipui Thi a chhun ang. Ramri hual chhûng ram hi in ram tûr chu a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers34:13 Mosia chuan Israel mite chu a hrilh a, “He ram hi a ni in insem tûr ram, hnam kua leh a chanve hnêna Lalpa pêk chu." 
Numbers34:14 Reubena leh Gada thlahte leh Manasea thlah zâtve te chuan an chhûngkaw tam dân azirin ram an insem tawh a," 
Numbers34:15 Jordan lui, Jeriko zâwn, khawchhak lam ram chu an nei tawh a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers34:16 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers34:17 “Puithiam Eleazara leh Nuna fapa Josua chuan i ai awhin ram chu an sem tûr a ni. 
Numbers34:18 Hnam tin aṭangin hruaitu thlang chhuak la, chûng mite chuan sempui rawh se." 
Numbers34:19 Chûng mite chu hêngte hi an ni ang: Juda hnamah Jefunea fapa Kaleba; 
Numbers34:20 Simeona hnam aṭangin Ammihuda fapa Semuela; 
Numbers34:21 Benjamina hnam aṭangin Kislona fapa Elidada; 
Numbers34:22 Dan hnam aṭangin Joglia fapa hotu Bukia; 
Numbers34:23 Josefa thlah Manasea hnam aṭangin Efoda fapa hotu Haniela," 
Numbers34:24 Efraim hnam aṭangin Siftana fapa hotu Kemuela; 
Numbers34:25 Zebulun hnam aṭangin Parnaka fapa hotu Elizafana; 
Numbers34:26 Isakara hnam zîng aṭangin Azana fapa hotu Paltiela," 
Numbers34:27 Asera hnam aṭangin Selomia fapa hotu Ahihuda; 
Numbers34:28 Naftali hnam aṭangin Amihuda fapa hotu Pedahela,” a ti a." 
Numbers34:29 Hêng mite hi Lalpa chuan Kanan ram Israel-ten an chan ṭheuh tûra semtu atân a ruat a ni. 
Numbers35:1 Jeriko zâwn, Jordan râlah, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers35:2 “Israel mite chu hrilh rawh: an ram chan chhûngah Levia chite tân khaw ṭhenkhat, a chhehvêla ran tlatna tûr nên an pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:3 Chûng khuate chu Levia chite ta a ni ang a, chutah chuan an awm khâwm tûr a ni. Ran tlatna tûr ramah chuan an bâwng te, kêl te, berâmte an tlattîr tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:4 Levia chite in hleh tûr ram âwl chu khua aṭanga tawng sângkhat thleng tûr a ni. 
Numbers35:5 Ram âwl zawng zawng chuan kil li a nei ang a, kil tin tawng sânghnih a ni ang a, a laiah khua chu a awm tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:6 Levia chite in pêk khaw ruk chu tualtlânna khuaah hman tûr a ni. 
Numbers35:7 Hêng khaw paruk bâkah khaw dang sâwm li leh pahnih, a chhehvêl ram âwl nên, in pe bawk tûr a ni, a vaiin khaw sawmli leh pariat a nih chu." 
Numbers35:8 Hnam tinin, an ram chan a zau leh zau loh athuin Levia chite awmna tûr khua an siamsak tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers35:9 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers35:10 “Israel mite chu hrilh rawh: Jordan lui in kaia, Kanan ram in thlen hun chuan," 
Numbers35:11 tual that palhte humhimna tûr tualtlân lehna khua ruat ang che u; 
Numbers35:12 Israel pungkhâwmhovin an thu an rêl fel hmain chûng khuaahte chuan an tlân ang a, thisen phuba latuin a that mai dâwn lo nia." 
Numbers35:13 Chutianga tualtlânna tûr khua paruk ruat ang che u," 
Numbers35:14 Jordan ral chhak lamah khaw thum in ruat ang a, Kanan ramah khaw thum bawk in ruat dâwn nia, chûng chu tualtlânna khua a ni ang." 
Numbers35:15 Israel mi te, ram dang mi te leh in zînga lo pêm te tân hêng khaw rukte hi an tualtlânna tûr a ni, mi that palh chu, tu pawh chutah chuan an tlân thei ang." 
Numbers35:16 “Miin thîr hmanga mi a beiha a tihhlum chuan tual that a tling a, tual that chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:17 Lunga chhu hlum a nih pawhin tual that a ni, tual that chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:18 Talhtuma vaw hlum a nih chuan tual that a ni, tual that chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:19 A laichîn hnai, thisen phuba latu tûr chuan a hmuhna apiangah tualthattu chu a that ve thei ang." 
Numbers35:20 A huat avângin mi a namthlu chawrh thei a, lo chângruin engin emaw a vawm thei a," 
Numbers35:21 an inhuat avângin a hnek chawrh thei bawk a, chutianga mi a tih chu a thih chuan tual a that a ni: tual that chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni; thisen phuba latu chuan a hmuhna apiangah a that thei ang." 
Numbers35:22 “Huat vâng ni lovin mi a nêk thut thei a, chângru lêm lovin mi a vawm palh thei a," 
Numbers35:23 hmu lovin a lung vawm chuan mi a dêng palh thei a; inhmêlmâkna pawh an nei ngai lo va, tihnat pawh a tum ngai lo va; mahse, a mi tih chu a thi hlauh thei." 
Numbers35:24 Chutiang thilah chuan dân angin an ngaihtuah ang a. 
Numbers35:25 Phuba latu lakah an hum tûr a ni; a tualtlânna khuaah khân an tlântîr ang a, puithiam lalber ṭang lai thih thlengin chutah chuan a awm tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:26 Mi tihlumtu chuan a tualtlânna khua chu a kalsan vaih chuan 
Numbers35:27 thisen phuba latuin a lo thah pawhin a thisen mawh chu a phur lo vang. 
Numbers35:28 Puithiam lalber ṭang lai a thih erawh chuan ama in leh lovah a haw leh thei ang. 
Numbers35:29 He dân hi in awmna apiangah i hmang kumkhua tûr a ni. 
Numbers35:30 “Mihring that chu hretu eng emaw zât thu avâng chauhva tihhlum tûr a ni; thuhretu pakhat chauh thu avângin mi tihhlum tûr a ni lo. 
Numbers35:31 Tual that, tihhlum ngei tûr chu tlan theih a ni lo, a thi ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:32 Tualtlânna khuaa tlân chu puithiam lalber ṭang lai a thih hma chuan an khaw lamah haw duh mah se, a nun humna tûrin a intlanchhuah phal tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers35:33 In awmna ram chu tibawrhbâng suh u: thisen chhuah hian ram a tibawrhbâng a ni; thisen luanna ram chu thisen chhuahtu thisen ngawt lo chuan tihthianghlim leh theih a ni lo. 
Numbers35:34 Ka ram, in chên vena ram chu, in tibawrhbâng tûr a ni lo; kei Lalpa hi, ka mi Israel-te zîngah ka awm zêl ṭhîn a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers36:1 Josefa thlah, Manasea fa, Makira fapa Gileada thlahte chhûngkaw hotute chu an lo kal a. Mosia leh hruaituho, Israel chhûngkaw puipate hnênah chuan," 
Numbers36:2 “ Lalpa chuan kan pu hi Israel mite zîngah ṭhumvâwra ram sem tûrin a ti che a. Lalpa vêkin kan pu chu kan unaupa Zelofehada chan ai a fanute hnêna pe tûrin a ti bawk che a. 
Numbers36:3 Israel hnam dang zînga mi pasalah nei ta se, an ram chu an chhawm ang a, an pasalte hnam ramah a bei dâwn a, kan hnam chanpual aṭangin an ram chu hnam dang chanah suan tûr tihna a ni ta a." 
Numbers36:4 Israel-te tâna Jubili kumah pawh an ram chu kan rama belh ni lovin an pasalte hnam rama bei tûr a ni ta si a, kan hnam ram chan chu kan hloh hlen dâwn a ni,” an ti a." 
Numbers36:5 Mosia chuan Lalpa thupêk chu Israel-te a hrilh a, “Josefa thlahte hian an sawi dik a ni." 
Numbers36:6 Zelofehada fanute chungchânga Lalpa thupêk chu hetiang hi a ni: An chi zînga mi chauh pasalah duh duh an nei thei ang. 
Numbers36:7 Tichuan, Israel hnam khat ram chu hnam dang ramah suan theih a ni lo vang. Israel-te chuan an hnam ram chu, chu hnam ngei chuan an nei reng tûr a ni." 
Numbers36:8 Tu fanu pawhin ram chu rochung sela, a ram neitu hnam zînga mi pasalah a nei ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers36:9 Hnam khat ram chu hnam dang ramah suan tûr a ni lo, mahni hnam ram chu an nei tlat tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers36:10 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Zelofehada fanu Malaii te, Tirzaii te, Hoglaii te, Milkaii te, Novaii te chuan an pa chipui pasalah an nei ta a." 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 Josefa fa, Manasea fate zînga mi an neih avângin an ram chu an pate ram a ni ta reng a." 
Numbers36:13 Moab phai, Jeriko zâwn, Jordan lui kamah hêng thupêkte leh dânte hi Israel-te tân Mosia hnêna Lalpa pêk chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Hei hi Jordan lui chhak lam thlalêra Israel-ho an awm laia an hnêna Mosia thu sawi ziakna bu a ni. Jordan lui phai, Sufa ruama Tofel khua te, Laban khua te, Hazerot khua te, Dizahab khua te leh Paran thlalêr inkâra an awm lai a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Horeb tlâng aṭangin Kades-barnea chu Edom tlângrama kalin ni sâwm leh pakhat kal a ni. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Aigupta ram an chhuahsan kum sawmlina, thla sâwm leh pakhat, ni khat ni chuan an hnêna hrilh tûr Lalpa sawi zawng zawng chu Mosia chuan Israel-te chu a hrilh a." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Lalpa chuan Amor mi, Hesbon khaw lal Sihona chu a hneh a, Basan rama Astarot leh Edrei khaw lal Oga pawh a hneh tawh a." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Moab ram, Jordan lui chhak lama an awm lai khân Pathian dân leh thupêkte chu Mosian a sawi fiah a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:6 Ani chuan, “Horeb tlânga kan awm lai khân Lalpa kan Pathian chuan, ‘He tlângah hian in awm rei tâwk ta." 
Deuteronomy1:7 In bûk ṭhiat ula, tawlh sawn rawh u. Amor-ho ram, tlângramah chuan kal ula, a vêl ramte fang rawh u. Jordan lui phai te, tlângram te, chhim lam ram te, Mediteranean tuipui kam thlengin kal rawh u. Kanan-ho ram te, Lebanon tlâng piah Eufretis lui thlengin kal rawh u." 
Deuteronomy1:8 He ram hi a ni, in thlahtu Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te leh an thlahte hnêna pêk ka tiam ram chu, fang ula, va hneh rawh u le,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Mosia chuan mipui hnênah, “Horeb tlânga kan awm lai khân ka hrilh che u kha. Keimah ngawt chuan rit ka ti lutuk ta che u a, ka tlin ta lo." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Lalpa, in Pathian chuan vâna arsi zâtin a titam ta che u a." 
Deuteronomy1:11 In thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chuan tûna in lêt sângin tipung che u sela, a tiam angin tihmuingîl che u rawh se." 
Deuteronomy1:12 In thubuai rem chu hahthlâk tham a ni ta; keimah maia tih sên a ni ta lo. 
Deuteronomy1:13 Mi fing, thil chhût thiam leh hre zau, hnam tin aṭangin thlang chhuak ula, an kutah ka hlân ang che u:" 
Deuteronomy1:14 chu chu thil tih âwm tak a nih pawh in hria a. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Tichuan, mi fing leh thil hre zau te, in hnam zawng zawng zînga thlan chhuahte chu ka kawltîr ta che u a; ṭhenkhat chu mi sâng chungah rorêl tûr an ni a, a ṭhen chu za chungah, a ṭhen chu sawmnga chungah. Chûng bâkah pawh hnam tina hotu tûr ka ruatsak bawk che u a." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Anni chu hetiang hian ka hrilh a: In mite zînga thubuai awm rêng rêng chu ngun takin ngaithla ula, nangmahni mi chauh inkâr thu a ni emaw, in zînga hnam dang awm vete nêna in inkâr thu emaw dik takin, hleih nei lovin rêl ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Duhsak bîk nei suh ula, tu pawh ni se, thuhmun veka enin an thu rêlsak ang che u. Tu mah vênthâwn nei suh ang che u, in thu rêl thlûk chu Pathian aṭanga lo chhuak a ni. In tâna rêl khirh lutuk chu ka hnênah in rawn thlen ṭhîn ang a, ka lo rêl ang." 
Deuteronomy1:18 In tih tûr dangte pawh ka hrilh che u kha. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Kan Pathian Lalpa thu ang chuan kan ti a. Horeb tlâng kan chhuahsan a, thlalêr ram zau tak leh râpthlâk taka Amor-ho awmna tlângram kawng chu kan kal tlang a, Kades-barnea kan va thleng a." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Kei chuan, ‘Amor-ho tlângram in lo thleng ta, Lalpa kan Pathian min pêk ram chu." 
Deuteronomy1:21 En teh u, Lalpa, in Pathian chuan ram chu a pharh duai hi, lût ula, in pate Pathian, Lalpa sawi angin nei rawh u, hrilhhaiin hlauthâwng suh u,’ ka ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Mahse, in zain in lo kal a, ‘Ram chu va ena, kan kalna tûr te, kan luhna tûr khawpui chanchin te rawn thlen leh tûrin en thlithlaitu i tîr ang u,’ in ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ṭha ka ti ve bawk a, hnam tin zîng aṭangin mi pakhat zêl, mi sâwm leh pahnih kan thlang chhuak a." 
Deuteronomy1:24 An kal ta a, tlângramah chuan an han chho va, Eskol ruam an thleng a, an en thlithlai vek a." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Theirahte chu an rawn hâwn a, thu an rawn thlen a, ‘ Lalpa, kan Pathian min pêk ram chu a lo ṭha kher mai!’ an ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Nimahsela, in kal duh lo va, Lalpa in Pathian thupêk chu in nawrhsan ta a." 
Deuteronomy1:27 In phunnawi a, ‘ Lalpa hian min hua a ni; Aigupta ram aṭangin min hruai chhuak a, Amor-ho kutah min pe dâwn a lo ni, min tihchhiat a lo tum a nih hi." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Engah tehlul nge kan chhoh vang, chuta awmte chu keini aia lian leh sâng pui pui an ni a, an khuate lah a lian a, vân tawng tawnga kulh nei an ni; Anak-ho pawh kan hmu, tia kan unauten an rawn sawi kha kan hlau a ni’ in ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Anniho chu hlau suh ula, zâm phah hek suh u," 
Deuteronomy1:30 Lalpa in Pathian chu in hmahruaitu a ni a, ani chuan a dopui dâwn che u alâwm; Aigupta ramah in hmuh ngeiah in tân thil a tih ṭhin ang khân a ti zêl dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:31 Thlalêra in thang chhûng zawng pawh khân kawng engkimah a hruai che u a, pain a fa a pua angin he hmun hi a paw thleng che u tih in hre reng si a." 
Deuteronomy1:32 He thilah hian Lalpa in Pathian chu in ring ngam lo a ni; 
Deuteronomy1:33 in hma a hruai zêl a, in bûk khuarna tûr a zawn chhuahsak che u a, zânah mei êng, chhûnah chhûm dingin a hruai ṭhîn che u a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “ Lalpa chuan in thâwm a lo hria a, a thinur hle a." 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘He chhuan sual tak zînga pakhat mah hian, ram ṭha tak an pate hnêna pêk ka tiam chu an hmu hauh lo vang." 
Deuteronomy1:36 An zînga mi pakhat Jefunea fapa Kaleba chauh hian a hmu ang, a rah apiang ram chu a fate rochan zêl tûrin ka pe ang, Lalpa chu a zui tlat avângin’ tiin thu a tiam tlat a." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Nangmahni avângin Lalpa chu ka chungah pawh a thinur a, ‘Nang pawhin ram chu i hmu lo vang," 
Deuteronomy1:38 Nuna fapa, i kaihza vêngtu Josua erawh hi chuan a hmu ang: fuih sauh sauh rawh, he ram hi Israel-te a neihtîr dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:39 In fanau tê tê, ‘râl man mai mai tûr’ in tihte, a chhia a ṭha la hre pha lote erawh hi chu, chu ramah chuan an lût ang a, an nei ang." 
Deuteronomy1:40 In za hian kîr leh ula, Tuipui Sen lam panin thlalêrah kal rawh u,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Nangni chuan ka hnênah, ‘ Lalpa chungah thil sual kan ti a ni, tlângramah chuan kan han chho vang a, kan Pathian, Lalpa thupêk ang chuan kan han bei ang e,’ in ti a. Hriam in keng ṭheuh va, tlângrama han chhoh chu awlsam hle tûrah in ngai vei a." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, ‘Chho teh suh u, han bei hek suh u, in zîngah ka awm lo, an lo that ngei ang che u,’ tiin hrilh rawh min ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Chu chu ka hrilh che u a, in ngaithla duh lo va; Lalpa thupêk chu in zâwm duh lo va, tlângramah chuan in kal chho lui ta a." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Chûng lai tlângrama awm, Amor mite chuan an rawn bei lêt che u a, khuaiin mi a ûm ang maiin an ûm che u a. Horma thleng rawkin an ûm thla che u a, Edom tlângramah an hneh ta che u a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Lalpa lam in lo hawi a, a hnênah in ṭap a; mahse, Lalpa chuan in aw a lo hre duh lo va, a lo ngaithla duh hek lo." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Tichuan, Kades-barnea-ah chuan rei tak in awm ta a." 
Deuteronomy2:1 “A tâwpah zawng Lalpa thupêk angin kan kîr leh ta nge nge a; Tuipui Sen lam kan pan a, Edom tlângram chu rei tak kan hêl a." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Lalpa chuan," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Hêng tlâng hi in hêl rei lutuk ta, hmâr lam pan rawh u,’ min ti a." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Edom tlângram in kal tlang dâwn a, in laichîn hla tawh tak, Esauva thlahte ram chu in kal tlang dâwn, an lo hlau hle ang che u." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Mahse, in bei tûr a ni lo, an ram chu tawng hnih khat lek pawh ka pe dâwn lo a che u. Seir tlângram chu Esauva thlahte tân ka pe tawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Chaw leh tui in duh chuan an hnên aṭangin in lei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy2:7 “ Lalpa in Pathian chuan kawng tinrêngah mal a sâwm che u a, thlalêr zau taka in vah lai te khân a enkawl zêl che u a, in Pathian Lalpa chuan kum sawmli chhûng chu a awmpui che u a, eng mah in tlâkchham loh kha." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Tichuan, kan kal zêl a, kan unau Esauva thlah, Seir tlânga awmte chu kan hêl a. Elath leh Ezion-geber aṭangin Jordan phai kawngah kan kal a; hmârchhak lam hawiin Moab ram kan pan ta a." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, ‘Lota thlah, Moab-ho chu tibuai suh u, in bei tûr a ni lo. Ar khawpui chu an neih atâna ka pêk a ni, an ram chhetê pawh ka pe dâwn lo che u a ni,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Ar khuaah hian milian chak tak tak Em an tihte chu an awm ṭhîn. Milian chi dang, Anak an tihho tluka sâng bawk an ni." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Refa-ho tih an ni bawk, mahse, Moab-ho chuan Em-ho an ti ṭhîn." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Edom ramah hian Hor-ho an awm ṭhîn a; mahse, Esauva thlahte hian an ûm chhuak a, an tidarh vek a, an ram chu an luah ta a ni. Chutiang bawkin Israel pawhin Lalpan ram a pêka lo awmte chu an hnawt chhuak a ni.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “ Lalpa thupêk angin Zered lui kan kân a," 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kades-barnea kan chhuahsan aṭang khân kum sawmthum leh pariat a vei tawh a; khatih laia râlkai chin zawng zawng chu Lalpa sawi ang ngei khân an thi vek tawh a ni. 
Deuteronomy2:15 Lalpan chûng mite chu a ngaimawh tlat a, an thi zo ta nge nge a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:16 “An thih zawh vek hnuin," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Vawiin hian Moab-ho ramri, Ar khawpui kiangah in kal tlang dâwn a."
