Deuteronomy2:19 Amon-ho, Lota thlahte ram in va thleng ang a, anni chu chawk buai suh ula, bei hek suh ang che u, an ram chu an awmna atân ka pe tawh a ni, chhetê pawh ka pe lo vang che u,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Chûng ram chu Refa-ho ram tih a ni ṭhîn. Amon-ho chuan hêng mite hi Zamzum-ho an ti. 
Deuteronomy2:21 Anak-ho ang bawka sâng an ni, tam tak an ni a, hnam chak tak an ni ṭhîn; mahse, Lalpa chuan a tihlum zo va; Amon-hovin an ram chu an nei a, an luah ta a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Esauva thlah, Edom mite tân Seir chu Lalpan chutiang bawk chuan a tihsak a ni. Lalpa chuan Hor-ho chu a tiral a; Edom-hovin an ram chu an luah ta a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Mediteranean tuipui kamah Kret thliarkâr mite an lo awm a, a tîra awm Av-ho chu an tiboral a, an ram chu an luah a, Gaza thlengin an neihsak ta vek a ni.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Moab ram kan pelh hnuin Lalpa chuan, ‘Tho la, Arnon lui hi kân rawh u, Amor lal Sihona, Hesbon khaw lal chu, a ramte nên, in kutah ka pe ta a; bei ula, a ram chu chhuhsak rawh u." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Vawiin aṭang hian in hmaah vân hnuaia awm zawng zawng ka tizâm dâwn a ni, in hming mai pawh an hriatin an khûr zawih zawih ang,’ min ti a." 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Kedemot thlalêr aṭangin Hesbon lal Sihona hnênah remthu kengin palai ka tîr a. 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘I ramah kan lo kal tlang ang e, lamlianpui chauh kan zawh ang a, ding lam leh vei lamah kan pêng lo vang." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Kan ei tûr chaw leh kan in tûr tui pawh in hnên aṭangin kan lei vek ang; kan Pathian Lalpa min pêk ram, Jordan râl kan thlen hma hian kan lo kal tlang ang e." 
Deuteronomy2:29 Seir rama chêng Esauva thlahte leh Ar khuaa Moab awmte hnêna kan tih ang bawk khân i ram kan kal tlang ringawt min phalsak teh khai’ ka ti a. 
Deuteronomy2:30 Hesbon lal Sihona chuan a rama kan kal tlang chu a phal lo va; kan hneha a ram kan neihsak theih nân Lalpa chuan a rilru a tikhauh va, a tiluhlul a ni; tûn thlengin a ram chu kan neihsak ta rêng a." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “ Lalpa chuan, ‘Sihona leh a ram chu i kutah ka pêk tâk che hi, a ram pawh neihsak ula, luah rawh u,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Sihona leh a ho zawng zawngte chuan Jahaz-ah min rawn bei a. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Kan Pathian, Lalpa chuan ani chu a fate leh a ho zawng zawngte nên min pe a, kan that vek a." 
Deuteronomy2:34 A khua zawng zawng kan la a, khuaa awmte chu a hmei a pa, a lian a te, kan tiboral vek a, tu mah kan zuah lo." 
Deuteronomy2:35 An rante erawh chu râllâk sumah kan la a, khuaa râllâk sum dangte nên kan nei a." 
Deuteronomy2:36 “Arnon luiruam chung tlânga khua Aroer aṭanga a luidunga khawpui awmte chu Gilead thlengin kan lâk theih loh rêng a awm lo, Lalpa kan Pathianin min pe vek a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Amon-ho ram erawh chu kan tlawh lo, Jabok lui kan kai lo; luidunga khawpuite leh tlângrama khawpuite, Lalpa kan Pathianin tlawh a khapah te chuan kan kal lo." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Hmâr lam panin Basan ram kan thleng a. Edrei khaw bulah an lal Oga chuan a mi zawng zawng nên min lo bei a. 
Deuteronomy3:2 Lalpa chuan, ‘Huphurh suh, a mite leh a ram hi, amah chawpin ka pe tawh a che. Amor lal Sihona, Hesbon khaw lal i sawisak ang bawk khân sawisa ang che,’ min ti a." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Tichuan, Lalpa kan Pathianin Basan lal Oga chu a mite nên min pe a, pakhat mah zuah lovin kan that vek a." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Argob bial, Basan lal Oga ram chhûnga awm khawpui zawng zawng chu kan la a, khaw sawmruk zet a ni, a khua lâksak loh rêng kan nei lo." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Hêng khuaahte hian kulh bang sâng pui pui, kawngkhâr leh a kalhna ṭha tak tak a awm vek a, an chhehvêl khuate pawh kan la vek a ni." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Hesbon lal Sihona kan sawisak ang bawk khân an khuate chu kan tichhe vek a, a hmei a pa, naupangte nên lam kan that vek a." 
Deuteronomy3:7 An rante leh an thil neihte erawh chu râllâk sumah kan nei zêl a. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Hêng Amor lal pahnih ram, Jordan lui chhak lama mi hi Arnon lui aṭanga Hermon tlâng thlengin kan chhuhsak a." 
Deuteronomy3:9 Hermon hi Sidon-ho chuan Sirion an ti a, Amor-ho erawh chuan Senir an ti." 
Deuteronomy3:10 Basan lal Oga ram zawng zawng chu kan chhuhsak vek a ni; tlângchhîp zâwla khua te, Gilead biala mi te chu Basan bial pum pui Saleka leh Edrei thlengin kan nei ta a." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Refa-ho zînga la dam chhun chu Basan lal Oga hi a ni; ngai teh, a kuang chu lung kuang a ni a, tawng pangngai tawng kuaa sei, tawng li-a zau a ni: tûn thlengin Amon-ho khua Raba-ah a la awm." 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Hêng ram kan lâk hnu hian Reubena leh Gada thlahte hnênah Arnon lui ruam chung tlânga Aroer khaw hmâr lam ram chu Gilead tlângram chanve nên kan pe a. 
Deuteronomy3:13 Gilead ram la awm leh Basan ram chu Manasea thlah zâtve hnênah kan pe bawk a. Basan ram pum pui hi Refa-ho ram tih a ni ṭhîn. 
Deuteronomy3:14 Manasea thlah Jaira chuan Argob bial, Basan ram hi, Gesur-ho leh Maaka-ho ramri thlengin a la a; khuate chu a hming chawiin hming thar a sa a, Havot-jair tûn thlengin an la ti." 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Gilead ram chu Makira, Manasea fa ka pe a." 
Deuteronomy3:16 Reuben leh Gad thlahte chu Gilead leh Arnon lui inkâr ram hi ka pe a. Chhim lama an ramri chu Arnon lui lai tak zêl a ni a, hmâr lamah chuan Jabok lui a ni, Amon-ho nên an inri." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Khawthlang lam ri chu Jordan lui hi a ni a, Galili dîl aṭangin Tuipui Thi, Pisga tlâng bulṭhut a thleng." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Chûng lai chuan thu ka pe che u a, ‘ Lalpa in Pathianin he ram hi in chanpual atân a pe che u a, in zînga hriam keng thei chin chu in unau Israel nâwlpui hmaah Jordan lui in lo kai hmasa tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Ran in ngah hle a, in ran te, in nupui fanaute hi chu hêng ka pêk che u khuaahte hian an lo awm ang a," 
Deuteronomy3:20 nangmahni ang bawka in unaute hian Jordan thlang lam ram Lalpa pêk tûrah râlmuang taka an awm ve theih hma chu in unaute hi in pui tûr a ni. Chumi hnuah chuan ka pêk tûr che u in ram chanpualah hian in haw thei ang. 
Deuteronomy3:21 Josua hnênah pawh ka hrilh a, in mit ngeiin lal pahnih chunga Lalpa in Pathian thiltih chu in hmu a; chutiang bawkin in kalna tûra lalte chu Lalpa chuan a sawisa dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Anni chu huphurh suh ang che u, Lalpa in Pathian chuan a dopui zêl dâwn che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Chutih lai chuan Lalpa hnênah, ‘Aw Lalpa Pathian, i chhiahhlawh hi i ropuizia leh i thiltihtheihzia i entîr ṭan chauh a la ni." 
Deuteronomy3:24 Leiah leh vânah hêng thil ropui i tih ang ti thei ve hi pathian dang rêng an awm lo. 
Deuteronomy3:25 Aw Lalpa, Jordan lui kal kaiin ram ṭha tak, tlângram mawi tak tak, Lebanon tlângte chu, khawngaih takin min hmuhtîr ve teh,’ tiin ka ngên." 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Nangmahni avângin Lalpa chu ka chungah a thinur a, ka thu chu a ngaithla duh lo va, Lalpa chuan, ‘A tâwk e, sawi pawh sawi tawh suh." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Pisga tlângchhîpah chho la, khawthlang lam te, hmâr lam te, chhim lam te, khawchhak lam te thlîr vêl ang che; i mit chuan hmu la, a rah zawng i rap ve dâwn lo a ni, Jordan lui i kai ve lo vang." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Josua chu a tum tiruh tûrin fuih sauh sauh la, i hmuh ramah hian he mite hi a hruai ang a, a neihtîr dâwn a ni,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Tichuan, Beth-peor khaw ep ruamah chuan kan awm ta rih a." 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Khai le, Israel-te u, thuruat leh awm dân tûr ka zirtîr che u kha pawisa ula, in fate hnênah Lalpa in thlahtute Pathianin a pêk che u ram chu dam taka in luah theih nân zâwm rawh u." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Thu ka pêk che u hi in belhchhah tûr a ni lo va; Lalpa in Pathian thu ka hrilh che u chu hmaih in nei tûr a ni hek lo. 
Deuteronomy4:3 Peor tlânga Lalpa thiltih in hmuh ṭheuh kha, Peor tlânga Baal betute a tihhlum vek kha." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Nangni Lalpa vuan tlattute erawh chu tûn thlengin in la dam hi. 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Ngai teh u, kan Pathian Lalpa min hrilh ang ngeiin, a thuruatte leh awm dân tûr ka zirtîr che u kha, in luah tûr ram in thlen hunah zâwm ngei ang che u." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Hêng dânte hi pawisa ula, zâwm tlat ang che u; hnam dangten an hriat ve hunah, ‘He hnam hi hnam fing tak leh changkâng tak an lo nih hi,’ an ti ang a, in finzia leh in changkân bîkzia an hria ang." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Lalpa kan Pathian, a mite au lo chhâwn zêl ṭhîntu ang hi, hnam dang, hnam ropui berte pawhin an nei ve hlei nêm." 
Deuteronomy4:8 Vawiina dân ka zamsak che u anga dân leh thupêk ṭha pawh hi hnam ropui ber te pawhin an nei ve em ni? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Tichuan, fîmkhur ula, in mit ngeia in thil hmuhte kha in dam chhûnga in theihnghilh loh nân vawng tlat ula, in fate leh in tute pawh, hrilh ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Horeb tlângah khân Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, ‘Mite chu ko khâwm la, an damchhûng zawnga ka thu an awih a, an fate pawh min ṭih dân an zirtîr theih nân ka thu sawi hi hria se ka duh a ni’ mi ti a; chutiang ngei chuan tlângah khân in Pathian Lalpa hmaah in ding a ni tih theihnghilh lovin, in fate chu hrilh ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Tlâng chu a kâng a, meikhu chhah takin a khuh tlat a, a thim mup a, vân thlengin a thim a, a bulṭhutah in va kal a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Lalpa chuan mei aṭangin a rawn bia che u a, a aw chu in hria a; mahse, a riruang hmuh tûr a awm lo va, a aw chauh in hria a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy4:13 A thuthlung chu vawng tlat tûrin a hrilh che u a, thupêk sâwm, lungphêk pahniha a ziak chu zâwm tlat tûrin a ti che u a." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Lalpa chuan a dân zawng zawng chu zirtîr tûr che uin min ti a. In awmna tûr ram in thlen hunah chûng chu in zawm tlat tûr a nih thu te in fate in hrilh ṭhîn tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Horeb tlângah khân mei aṭangin Lalpa chuan in hnênah thu a sawi a; mahse, a riruang chu in hmuh loh kha; fîmkhur hle rawh u." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Milem, in biak atân milim siamin intibawlhhlawh suh u; mipa lem emaw, hmeichhe lem emaw tuk suh ula, chher bawk hek suh u." 
Deuteronomy4:17 Leia awm rannung rêng rêng lem te, chunglêng sava lem te," 
Deuteronomy4:18 leia bawkvâka kal lem te, lei hnuai tuia sangha lem te, in biak atân in siam tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Vân lam in han thlîr ang a, ni te, thla te, arsi te leh vâna thil dang awm rêng rêng te khi chibai bûka an rawngbâwl in châk hlauh dah ang e; fîmkhur rawh u - Lalpa in Pathian chuan khîngte khi hnam dang biak ve atân lek a dah a ni." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Nangni zawng, Aigupta ram, rawhtuina meipui ata chu a la chhuak che u a, tûna in awm anga ama pual ni tûrin Lalpan a hruai chhuak che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Kei zawng, nangmahni avângin Lalpa in Pathianin luah atâna a pêk tûr che u ram, ram ṭha taka kal tûrin Jordan lui ka kai ve a phal tlat lo a ni." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Kei chu Jordan kal kai ve lovin he lai ramah hian ka thi dâwn a ni, nangni erawh chu kai ula, ram chu in va nei tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Lalpa in Pathianin thu a thlunpui che u kha in theihnghilh hlauh ang e. Eng lem mah in biak atân Lalpa in Pathianin in siam a phal loh kha. 
Deuteronomy4:24 In Pathian, Lalpa hi kan ral hmang mei ang a ni a, Pathian thîkthu chhe tak a ni." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Chu rama rei tak in awm hnu, fate neia tuchhuan, chhuan hnih chhuan thum in neih hunah pawh milem rêng rêng in siam a, Lalpa in Pathian duh loh zâwng in tih chuan, lei leh vân chhâlin ka sawi hi," 
Deuteronomy4:26 Jordan lui kâna in va luah tûr ramah chuan in dam rei lo vang a, in boral mai ang." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Lalpa chuan hnam tin zîngah a tidarh ang che u a, chûngah chuan a dam khawchhuak chu tlêm tê chauh in ni ang." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Chûng ramah chuan mihring siam milim, thing emaw, lung emaw, ṭawng thei hlei lo, hre thei bawk si lo, hmu thei lo leh thil rim pawh hre thei lo in bia ang." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Mahse, chûng ram aṭang chuan, Lalpa in Pathian in ṭih takzeta, rilru zawng zawng nêna amah in zawn chuan in hmu leh ang." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ni hnuhnûngahte chuan hrehawm in tuar ang a, a thu in awih tawh ang." 
Deuteronomy4:31 In Pathian, Lalpa hi Pathian ngilnei tak a ni a, a hlamchhiah lo vang che u a, a tichhe hek lo vang che u; in pate hnêna thu a tiam tlat chu a theihnghilh bawk hek lo vang." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Tûn hma, in pian hma daih, Pathianin leia mihring a siam aṭang khân chhui teh u; khawvêl pum pui hi zâwt chhuak ula, in thil hmuh ang leh in thil hriat ang hi an hre ve ngai em zâwt teh u." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Nangni anga mei aṭanga Pathian thu sawi ngaithlaa dam khaw chhuak hnam dang tu nge awm ve le? 
Deuteronomy4:34 Aigupta ram ata in Pathian Lalpa chuan a mi atân a hruai chhuak che u ang khân tu Pathianin nge hmun khat aṭangin a mi tûr hnam hruai chhuak ve ngai? Nangni zawng, in Pathian chuan, a thiltihtheihzia leh a chakzia in hmuhah a tilang a; hri te leh indona te a awmtîr a; thil mak leh chhinchhiahna mak tak tak a ti a; thil hlauhawm pui puite thlentu a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy4:35 Lalpa hi Pathian chu a ni a; amah lo hi Pathian dang rêng an awm lo tih in hriat theih nân chûng chu a hmuhtîr che u a ni. 
Deuteronomy4:36 A zirtîr theih nân che u vân aṭangin a aw a hriattîr che u a, leiah ngei a mei ropui chu a hmuhtîr che u a, chuta ṭang chuan a rawn bia che u a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy4:37 In pate kha a ngainat êm avângin an thlahte chu a thlang che u a, Aigupta ram aṭangin amah ngeiin hneh takin a hruai chhuak ta che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy4:38 In hmaah, in aia hnam lian zâwk leh thiltithei zâwkte a ûm chhuak a, an awmnaah a hruai lût ang che u a, ro atân an ram chu a pe dâwn che u a ni. Tûn thlengin chûng chu in ta a la ni ngai lo." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Chuvângin, vawiin hian hre rawh u, theihnghilh hauh suh ang che u: Lalpa hi chung lam vân leh hnuai lam leia Pathian awm chhun a ni, Pathian dang rêng an awm lo." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Chuvângin, a thuruat te leh a thupêk te chu zâwm rawh u, in tân a ṭha ang a, in fate tân pawh a ṭha ang; kumkhuaa in neih atâna a pêk che u ramah chuan in dam rei bawk ang.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Jordan lui chhak lamah inhumhimna tûr khawpui pathum a ruat a. 
Deuteronomy4:42 Chûng khuaah chuan miin a hmêlma pawh ni lo, mi a tihhlum palh chuan a tlân thei ang a; an lo hum dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Reuben thlahte ramah, tlâng zâwl Bezer khua te, Gad thlahte ramah Gilead biala awm Ramot khua te, Manasea thlahte ramah Basan bial Golan khua te chu a ruat a." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Hei hi Israel-te tân Mosian Dân a târlan chu a ni. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Hêng thupêk te, thuruat te leh awm dân tûr te hi Aigupta ram aṭanga Israel-te an lo chhuah lai khân Mosian a hrilh a." 
Deuteronomy4:46 A hrilhna hmun chu Beth-peor tlâng ep, Jordan lui chhak lam Amor lal Sihona ram chhûngah a ni a, ani chu Mosia leh Israel-ten an hneh a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Chu ram chu an neihsak a, Basan lal Oga ram pawh an neihsak bawk a. Hêng Amor lal pahnihte hi Jordan lui chhak lama awm an ni." 
Deuteronomy4:48 An ram lâk chu Arnon luiruam ko chunga awm Aroer khua aṭanga Hermon tlâng an tih inkâr ram hi a ni. 
Deuteronomy4:49 Jordan lui kam chhak lam phai pawh Tuipui Thi thlengin tlâng pang nên a huam. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mosia chuan Israel mi zawng zawng chu a ko khâwm a, an hnênah “Israel-te u, hêng thuruat leh awm dân tûr in beng hriata ka sawite hi ngaithla rawh u, zir ula, zâwm rawh u." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Kan Pathian, Lalpa chuan Horeb tlângah thu min thlunpui a." 
Deuteronomy5:3 Lalpa thuthlung hi kan pate tân a ni lo, keini, vawiina heta awmte tân hian a ni zâwk." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Tlânga mei aṭang khân Lalpa chuan inhmachhawnin in hnênah thu a sawi a nih kha. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Khatih lai khân Lalpa leh nangni inkârah ka ding a, mei in hlauh avângin tlângah in lâwn ngam ve si lo va, Lalpa thu sawi sawichhâwngtuah ka ṭang a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy5:6 “ Lalpa chuan hetiang hian a ti, ‘Bawiha in awmna Aigupta ram aṭanga hruaichhuaktu che u Lalpa, in Pathian chu ka ni." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “Kei lo hi chu Pathian dang rêng rêng nei suh. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “I tân milem siam suh, chung lam vâna awm emaw, leia awm emaw, lei hnuai tuia thil awm lem emaw i siam tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Chûng chu kûnin chibai i bûk tûr a ni lo va, an rawng i bâwl tûr a ni hek lo. Kei Lalpa, i Pathian hi, Pathian thîkthu chhe tak ka ni; min hawtute chu an thlahte chhuan thum chhuan li thleng pawhin ka hrem ṭhîn a," 
Deuteronomy5:10 min hmangaiha ka thupêk zâwmtute erawh chu an thlah, a sânga sâng thleng chungah pawh ngil ka nei ṭhîn." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “I Pathian, Lalpa hming chhâlin dâwt sawi suh; dâwta a hming chhâltu chu Lalpa chuan hrem lohvin a chhuah lo vang." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Lalpa i Pathianin thu a pêk che angin sabat ni hi hmang la, serh ang che." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ni ruk chhûng hna i thawk ang a, i hna zawng zawng i thawk tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy5:14 A ni sarih ni erawh hi chu Lalpa tâna sabat ni a ni a, hna eng mah i thawk tûr a ni lo; i fapa te, i fanu te, i bawihpa te, i bawihnu te, i bâwngpa te, i sabengtung te, i ran rêng rêng te leh in khaw chhûnga hnam dang awm ve te pawhin hna an thawk tûr a ni lo; nangmah ang bawkin, a hmei a pa, an châwl ve tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Aigupta ramah, mi chhiahhlawh in nih kha hre reng rawh u. Chuta ṭang chuan Lalpa in Pathian hian a thiltihtheihna ropui tak hmangin a hruai chhuak che u a nih kha. Chuvângin, Lalpa in Pathian chuan sabat ni hi serh tûrin a ti che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ Lalpa i Pathianin thu a pêk che ang khân i nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh; chutichuan, i dam rei ang a, Lalpa i Pathian pêk che ramah i hmuingîl ang." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Tual that suh. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Uire suh. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Ru suh. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “I vêngte dâwtin hêk suh. 
Deuteronomy5:21 I vêngte nupui i ît tûr a ni lo, a in te, a bawihpa te, a bawihnu te, a bâwngpa te, a sabengtung te, a ta rêng rêng i awt tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Lalpa chuan hêng thupêkte hi a ni Horeb tlâng bula in lo kal khâwm laia a hrilh che u kha. Mei aṭang leh chhûm chhah thim mup aṭangin hêng thu hi ring takin a sawi a nih kha; thu dang sawi a nei tawh lo. Lungphêk pahnihah a ziak a, min pe a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Tlâng chu a alh hluah hluah a, thim chhah mup aṭanga aw in hriat khân, hnam tin hruaitute leh in upate nên ka hnênah in lo kal a;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 ‘ Lalpa kan Pathian chuan a ropuizia leh a lenzia min hmuhtîr ta, mei aṭanga a aw chu kan hria a, vawiin hian Pathianin mihring a bia a, mihring chu a thi kher lo tih kan hre ta a ni." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Amaherawhchu, engah nge thi mai theia kan awm leh ang? Mei râpthlâk tak khân min rawn kâng ral ang a, Lalpa kan Pathian aw chu kan hriat leh chuan kan thi tawh ngei ang." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Mei aṭanga Pathian aw hre si mihring dam khawchhuak rêng an awm ve em ni? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Lalpa kan Pathianin a sawi zawng zawng chu min hrilh la, kan lo ngaithla ang a, kan zâwm ang,’ an ti a." 
Deuteronomy5:28 “ Lalpa chuan ka hnêna in thu sawi chu a lo hria a. Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, ‘Hêng miten i hnêna an thu sawi hi ka lo hria a, an sawi dik e." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Chutiang rilru chu pu fo ṭhîn sela a va ṭha dâwn em! Min ṭih ang a, ka thupêkte an zâwm ang a, an fate nên lam an hmuingîl kumkhua tûr:" 
Deuteronomy5:30 An hnênah zuk chhuk la, an bûkah hawtîr rawh." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Nang erawh chu ka bulah hian lo ding la, ka thupêk zawng zawng te, ka thuruat te leh awm dân tûr ka tih ka lo hrilh ang che; chu chu anniho hi i zirtîr dâwn nia; tichuan, ro atâna ram ka pêk tûrah chuan in zâwm ṭhîn dâwn nia,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy5:32 “ Lalpa in Pathian thupêk hi in zâwm fîmkhur hle tûr a ni; pakhat mah in hmaih tûr a ni lo va, in belh tûr a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Lalpa in Pathianin in kalna tûr a tihah chuan in kal zêl tûr a ni; tichuan, in dam ang a, in hmuingîl ang a, in ram neih tûrah chuan rei tak in dam dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Hêng thupêk te, thuruat te leh awm dân tûr te hi Lalpa, in Pathian chuan zirtîr tûr che uin min ti a ni. Chu ram chu in luah hunah zâwm ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy6:2 In fate leh in tûte pawhin Lalpa in Pathian thuruat leh thupêk ka hrilh che u hi an zâwmin an ti tûr a ni; tichuan, an dam rei dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Chuvângin, aw Israel-te u, hria ula, ti ngei tûrin inpuahchah rawh u; in tân a ṭha ang a, khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ramah hian in pate hnêna Lalpa in Pathianin a tiam ang khân nasa takin in pung dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Aw Israel-te u, ngaithla teh u, Lalpa, Lalpa chauh hi kan Pathian chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Lalpa in Pathian chu in thinlung zawng zawngin, in theihtâwpin hmangaih rawh u." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Vawiina he ka thupêk che u hi in thinlungah châm tlat sela," 
Deuteronomy6:7 ngun takin in fate zirtîr ang che u. In chhûnga in ṭhut lai te, kawnga in kal lai te, in mut dâwnah te, in thawh dâwnah te sawi sawi ang che u." 
Deuteronomy6:8 In hriat reng theih nân in bânah te hrêng ula, chalhrênah te hmang ang che u." 
Deuteronomy6:9 In kawngka biangah te ziak ula, in tual kawngkaah te pawh târ ang che u." 
Deuteronomy6:10 “In pu Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te hnêna pêk a tiam ram chu Lalpa in Pathianin a pe dâwn che u a; khawpui lian tak tak leh mawi tak tak, in din ni hauh lo chu in nei dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Chuta in chhûngah chuan thil ṭha tak tak in dah ni lo a awm ang a; in laih hah loh tuichhunchhuah te a awm bawk ang a; grep huan leh Oliv hmun, in siam hah ni lo te in nei ang. Lalpan chu rama a hruai thlen hunah che u chuan ei tûr eng mah in tlachham lo vang." 
Deuteronomy6:12 Fîmkhur ang che u, bawih in nihna, Aigupta ram aṭanga hruaichhuaktu che u Lalpa hi in theihnghilh hlauh ang e." 
Deuteronomy6:13 “ Lalpa in Pathian chu ṭih ula, amah chauh chibai bûk ula, a hming chauh chhâlin thu tiam ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy6:14 In vêla awmte pathian chu pakhat mah be ve suh u. 
Deuteronomy6:15 In zînga chêng Lalpa in Pathian hi Pathian thîkthu chhe tak a ni, in chungah Lalpa in Pathian hi a thinur chuan khawvêl ata hi a tibo daih mai ang che u." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Masa tui hmuna in tih ang khân Lalpa in Pathian hi fiah suh u. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Lalpa in Pathian thupêk chu uluk takin zâwm ula, a thupêkte leh a thuruat a hrilh che u chu awih ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Lalpa ṭha tihzâwng leh dik a tih chu ti ula, in tân a ṭha ang a, in pate pêk a tiam tawh ramah in lût ang a, in nei dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy6:19 Lalpa sawi tawh angin in hmêlmate chu in hmaah a hnawh chhuahsak vek ang che u. 
Deuteronomy6:20 Nakin hnuah in faten, ‘Hêng thupêk te, thuruat te, awm dân tûr te, Lalpa kan Pathian hrilh che u hi engtizia nge?’ tia an zawh hunah che u chuan," 
Deuteronomy6:21 hetiang hian chhâng ang che u, ‘Aigupta ramah Farawa bawih kan ni a, Lalpa chuan Aigupta ram ata chu min hruai chhuak a." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Lalpa chuan thil mak te, chhinchhiahna ropui tak tak leh râpthlâk tak tak Aigupta ramah te, Farawa leh a hote chungah te a ti a." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Chuta ṭang chuan min hruai chhuak ta a, he ram, kan pate hnêna pêk a tiam ramah hian min hruai luha min pêk a tum a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Lalpa chuan hêng thuruatte hi ti vek tûrin thu min pe a, kan ṭhatna tûrin Lalpa kan Pathian chu ṭih fo tûrin min ti a; tichuan, kan za-in vawiin thleng hian min la zuah ta zêl a nih hi." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Hêng a thupêk min hrilh zawng zawng hi ngun taka kan zawm chuan kan tân a ṭha ang,’ ti ang che u." 
Deuteronomy7:1 “ Lalpa in Pathian chuan in neih tûr ramah chuan a hruai lût ang che u a, chûnga awm hnam sarih, nangni aia tam zâwk leh chak zâwk, Hit mi te, Girgas mi te, Amor mi te, Kanan mi te, Periz mi te, Hiv mi te leh Jebus mi te chu a hnawh chhuahsak ang che u." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Lalpa in Pathianin in kuta a pêk hunah che u chuan in hneh ang a, in that vek tûr a ni. Thu thlunpui suh ula, lainat hek suh u." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Inneih pawlh suh u, in fate nupui pasalah neihsak hek suh u." 
Deuteronomy7:4 In fate an hruai kawi ang a, pathian dang an biaktîr mai ang; tichuan, Lalpa chu in chungah a thinur ang a, a tiboral mai ang che u." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Chuvângin, an maichâmte chu ṭhiatsak vek ula, an lungphunte tichhia ula, an Aseri lim phunte chu kit ula, an thing milimte chu hâl vek ang che u." 
Deuteronomy7:6 “Nangni zawng, Lalpa, in Pathian tâna serh hran in ni a; Lalpa, in Pathian chuan khawvêla hnam tinrêng zîng ata a pual bîk ni tûrin a thlang tawh che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Hnam dang aia in tam zâwk avânga hmangaiha thlang che u a ni lo va; hnamah chuan a tlêm ber in ni asin. 
Deuteronomy7:8 Lalpa chuan a hmangaih hrim hrim avâng che u leh in pate hnêna a thutiam tihpuitlin a duh avângin, Aigupta lal Farawa bawih ata, kut chak takin a tlan chhuak che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Chuvângin, hre rawh u, Lalpa, in Pathian chauh chu Pathian a ni a, Pathian rinawm, a thutiam vawng tlat a, amah hmangaiha a thupêk zâwmtute chunga chhuan sâng thlênga ngilnei ṭhîn chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Amah hawtute erawh chu tichhe tûrin a thungrûl ang a, amah hawtu chu a zuah lo vang a, an dam chhûng la lain a hrem ang." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Chuvângin, thupêk te, thuruat te leh awm dân tûr te vawiina ka hrilh che u hi in zâwm tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Hêng awm dân tûrte hi in pawisak a, hetianga in awm a, in zawm chuan Lalpa, in Pathian chuan in pate hnêna a tiam ang khân a thuthlung chu in tân a hlen ang a, in chungah ngil a nei ang." 
Deuteronomy7:13 A hmangaih ang che u a, malsâwmin a tipung ngei ang che u. In pate hnêna pêk a tiam ramah chuan in fate chu mal a sâwm ang a, in rama in thei phunte a tirah tiar tuar ang a, in buh te, in uain te, in hriak te a tihlâwk ang a, in kêl leh berâm te tam takin a tipung ang." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Hnam dang zawng zawng aiin in hmuingîl ang a, in zînga mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw ching an awm lo vang." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Lalpa chuan in zîng ata natna tinrêng a la bo ang a, Aigupta rama hri te kha in vei ve lo ang a, nangmahni hawtuten an vei thung ang." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u rama hnamte chu tiboral ula, khawngaih suh u, an pathiante pawh in be ve tûr a ni lo; chu chu in awhna tûr thang a ni si a." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Hêng hnamte hi keini aiin an tam a, engtin nge kan hnawh chhuah theih ang?’ ti rilru suh u." 
Deuteronomy7:18 Anni chu in hlau tûr a ni lo. Farawa leh Aigupta mite, Lalpa, in Pathianin a sawisak dân kha hre reng ang che u." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Râpthlâk tak taka Farawa a hrem te kha in hmu a, thil mak leh chhinchhiahna te tiin ama kut chak tak hmangin a hruai chhuak che u a nih kha: khatiang bawk khân in mi hlauhte chungah ti ve leh rawh se." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Chu lo pawh chu, Lalpa, in Pathianin in zîngah khawinghal a tîr ang a, in thah bângte leh biru in hmuh lohte chu an zûk hlum vek ang." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Anni chu hlau rêng rêng suh u, Lalpa in Pathian, Pathian ropui tak leh hlauhawm tak hian a awmpui reng che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:22 “ Lalpa, in Pathian chuan chûng hnamte chu zawi zawiin a ni a hnawh chhuah dâwn ni; anni chu in tihboral thuai a phal dâwn lo; chutilo chuan ram sakawlh an pung chak lutuk ang." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Lalpa, in Pathian chuan anni chu a pe ngei dâwn che u a; a tichiai chiam ang a, an chhe zo tho dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:24 An lalte chu in kutah a pe ang a, vân hnuaia an hming hriat tawh hauh loh tûrin a tiboral ang; tu mah lo dang thei che u an awm lo vang a; in tichhe vek dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Thing milim, an tuk chawpte chu in hâl ang a, a tuamna tangkarua leh rangkachakte chu ît suh ula, la hek suh u; in tân awhna thang hlauhawm tak a ni thei ang. Lalpa, in Pathian tân thil tenawm a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Chutiang thil tenawm chu in inah in la lût tûr a ni lo, nangni pawh chûng ang mai chuan in tenawm ve dah ang e. In ten êm êm ang a, in haw hle bawk tûr a ni, Lalpa ânchhe dawng an ni si a." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “In pate hnêna Lalpa, in Pathianin ram pêk a tiam chu dam taka in luah a, in neiha, in pun theih nân vawiina thupêk ka hrilh che u hi zâwm vek ang che u." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Lalpa, in Pathian chuan kum sawmli chhûng thlalêrah a vahvaihtîr che u kha hre reng rawh u; a tirethei che u a, a fiah che u a, a thupêkte chu in zâwm dâwn nge dâwn lo in rilru hriat a duh a ni." 
Deuteronomy8:3 A tirethei che u a, a tirilṭâm che u a, a chângin in hriat ngai loh, in pi pute pawhin an hriat ngai loh chawin a hrai che u a; mihring hi chaw ring ringawtin a nung tûr a ni lo va, Lalpa kâ aṭanga thu tinrêng chhuakte chu a ring bawk tûr a ni tih in zir a duh avâng a ni." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Hêng kum sawmli chhûng hian kawr pakhat mah in ha chhe lo va, in keruh a nâin a vûng hek lo." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Miin a fa a thunun a, a hrem ang hian, Lalpa, in Pathian chuan a thunun ṭhîn che u a ni tih in hre reng tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Lalpa, in Pathian thupêk chu in zâwm ang a, a duh angin in nung ang a, ani chu in ṭih tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Lalpa, in Pathian chuan ram ṭha takah a hruai dâwn che u a ni, luite tui luang hawk hawk tamna, tuihna leh lei chhûngrila tui lo chik chhuak tamna, tlâng leh ruam nuam tak tak te," 
Deuteronomy8:8 huit leh barli ṭhatna ram, grep te, theipui te, theibuhfaite rah duhna, Oliv leh khawizu tamna ramah chuan a hruai dâwn che u a;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 chutah chuan, tlâkchham nei lovin duh tâwkin chaw in ei ang a; chûng rama lungte chu thîr a ni a, tlângah te chuan dâr laih chhuah tûr a tam mai." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Kham tâwk ei tûr in neih a, ram ṭha tak a pêk che u avângin Lalpa, in Pathian chu in fak ang." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “A thupêk te, awm dân tûr a tih te, a thuruatte vawiina ka hrilh che u hi zâwm duh lovin Lalpa, in Pathian hi in theihnghilh hlauh ang e, fîmkhur rawh u." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Puar tâwk leh kham tâwk ei tûr in neih a, in ṭha tak tak in saka in luah hunah," 
Deuteronomy8:13 in bâwng te, berâm leh kêl te a lo puna, tangka leh rangkachak in lo ngah a, in neih apiang a lo hmuingîl viau hunah," 
Deuteronomy8:14 in chapo anga Aigupta bawih aṭanga hruaichhuaktu che u Lalpa, in Pathian chu in theihnghilh hlauh dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Ani chuan thlalêr ram zau tak leh hlauhawm pui puiah a hruai tlang che u a, rûl te, rûl chuk na mi te leh khawmualkaikuang tamna ramah te, tui awm lohna ram rovah te in kal khân lungpui chang tak aṭangin tui a pe che u a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Thlalêrah khân in pate pawhin an hriat ngai loh Mana chuan a châwm che u a, fiah nân che u leh in tân a ṭha dâwn nge dâwn lo in hriat theih nân hrehawm a tuartîr ṭhîn che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Tichuan, in chak avâng leh thil in tih theih avânga hausa emaw inti suh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Lalpa, in Pathianin hausa thei tûrin a tichak che u a ni tih hre reng ang che u; in thlahtute hnêna a thutiam chu ani chuan a la thlah loh avâng a ni e." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Lalpa, in Pathian chu theihnghilh rêng rêng suh u, pathian dangte ngaihsakin chibai bûksan hek suh u; chutianga in tih vaih chuan, ka hrilh lâwk a che u, in boral ngei ngei ang." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Lalpa, in Pathian aw hi in pawisak loh chuan, Lalpan in luahlan tûr hnamte a tiboral angin nangni pawh a tiboral ngei ang che u." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Aw Israel-te u, ngaithla teh u, vawiin hian Jordan lui in kân dâwn ta a; nangni aia tam leh chak zâwk hnam luahlan tûr leh khawpui lian tak tak, an kulh bang vân tawng hial te chu in lâksak dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy9:2 A mi chêngte lah mi lian pui pui, sâng tak tak, Anak-ho thlahte an ni a, ‘tu nge Anak-hote chu dang zo vang?’ an tih ṭhinte chu an ni." 
Deuteronomy9:3 Vawiin hian hre rawh u, Lalpa, in Pathian chu in hmahruaitu a ni, in hmaah meialh chak tak angin a kal zêl dawn, a tichhia ang a, in hmaah a titlâwm zêl dâwn. Lalpa lo sawi tawh angin in hnawt chhuak vek ang a, an boral thuai ang." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Hêng mite hi Lalpa, in Pathianin a hnawh chhuah hunah, ‘kan ṭhat avângin Lalpa chuan he ram hi min pe a, hêng hnamte hi an sual avângin a hnawt chhuak a ni,’ in ti ang e." 
Deuteronomy9:5 In ṭhat avâng leh in nun a ngîl avânga an ram hi neihsak in ni lo; hêng hnamte hi an sual êm avângin Lalpa, in Pathian hian a hnawt chhuak a ni; Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te hnêna a thutiam kha tihpuitlin a tum a ni." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Chuvângin, Lalpa, in Pathianin ram ṭha tak hi, in ṭhat avânga pe che u a ni lo tih hre reng rawh u, mi luhlul tak in nih hi." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Thlalêrah khân Lalpa, in Pathian chu in tihthinur ṭhin kha hre reng ula, theihnghilh suh u. Aigupta ram in chhuahsan ni aṭanga tûn thlengin Lalpa lakah hel in chîng hle a ni." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Horeb tlângah pawh khân Lalpa chu in tithinur a, tihboral vek che u duh hial khawpin a thinur a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Nangni nêna Lalpa thuthlung, lungphêka ziak chu, la tûrin tlângah ka han kal a, ni sawmli leh zan sawmli eng mah ka ei lo va, ka in hek lo." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Inkhâwmpui lai khân mei aṭangin Lalpa chuan in hnênah thu a sawi a, chûng zawng zawng chu lungphêkah, Pathianin ama kut ngeiin a ziak a, Lalpa chuan mi pe a." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a ral hnu chuan thuthlung ziakna lung phêk pahnih chu Lalpa chuan mi pe a. 
Deuteronomy9:12 “ Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, ‘Tho la, chhuk thla vat teh, Aigupta ram aṭanga i mi hruai chhuahte khu an che khawlo nasa mai, awm dân tûr ka hrilh an pênsan a, milim chhûn chawp an siam tâk khu,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy9:13 “ Lalpa chuan, ‘Hêng mite luhlulzia hi ka hria alâwm." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Lo ngawi mai rawh, tu ma hriat tawh hauh loh tûrin ka han tiboral teh ang. Nangma thlahte aṭangin anni aia thil ti thei zâwk leh tam zâwk hnam ka din mai teh ang,’ a ti bawk a." 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Tlâng aṭang chuan ka kîr thla a, thuthlung ziakna lungphêk pahnih chu ka keng a." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Lalpa, in Pathianin awm dân tûr a hrilh che u kha in lo pênsan dêr tawh a, bâwngno lim chhûng chawpin in Pathian lakah thil sual in ti ta tih ka hmu a." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Lungphêk pahnih chu ka keng a, in hmuh ngeiah ka vawm keh ta a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy9:18 In sualna avâng leh Lalpa tithinur tûra a pawi in khawih luih avângin Lalpa hmaah chuan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli eng mah eia in lovin ka bawkkhup leh a. 
Deuteronomy9:19 Nuai bo vek che u duh khawp hialin Lalpa chu a thinur a; a thinurna nasa tak chu a lo thawk ang tih ka hlau a ni; mahse, chumi ṭum pawh chuan ka thu chu Lalpa chuan min lo ngaihthlâksak a." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Tihhlum duh hial khawpin Arona chungah pawh Lalpa chu a thinur a, a tân pawh ka ngensak a." 
Deuteronomy9:21 In thil sual tih bâwngno lim chu ka la a, meiah ka rawh a; vaivut anga dipin ka râwt a, tlâng aṭanga lui lo luang thlaah chuan ka phul a." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Tabera-ah te, Masa-ah te, Kibrot-hatava-ah te khân Lalpa in Pathian chu in tithinur a." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Kades-barnea-ah khân, ‘Kal ula, ram ka pêk tûr che u chu han luah rawh u le,’ tiin Lalpa chuan a tîr che u a; mahse, Lalpa in Pathian thupêk chu in do tlat a, a thu chu in ring ngam lo va, in ngaithla duh lo a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Ka hriat tirh che u aṭangin Lalpa lakah in hel reng mai. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Tihhlum vek che u a tum avângin ni sawmli leh zan sawmli chu Lalpa hmaah ka bawkkhup a; 
Deuteronomy9:26 Lalpa hnênah chuan ka ṭawngṭai a, ‘Aw Lalpa Pathian, i mi, i rochante hi tihlum vek teh suh, Aigupta ram ata chu ropui takin i tlan chhuak a, kut chak takin i hruai chhuak a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy9:27 I chhiahhlawh Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te hre reng la, hêng mite luhlulna te, an sualna leh an khawlohnaah te ngawt hian en teh suh." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Chutilo zawng, Aigupta miten, ‘ Lalpa chuan pêk a tiam ram chu a hruai thleng zo lo a ni; a huat avângin thlalêra thah atân a hruai chhuak a lo nih zâwk hi,’ an ti ang asin." 
Deuteronomy9:29 I mi, i rochante an ni miau a, kut chak leh bân phar meuhva i hruai chhuahte kha an ni si a,’ ka ti a." 
Deuteronomy10:1 “ Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, ‘Lungphêk pahnih, a hmaa mi ang kha chher la, tlângah ka hnênah lo chho leh ang che; a bâwm tûr thingrem siam bawk rawh." 
Deuteronomy10:2 I tihkeh tâk lunga chuang ang kha, chûng lungah chuan ka lo ziak leh ang e, bâwmah chuan i dah dâwn nia’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Tichuan, Sitim thingin thingrem ka siam a, a hmaa mi angin lungphêk pahnih ka chher a, a pahnih chuan ka chhohpui ta a." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Lungphêkahte chuan a hmaa thu ziak ang chiah, thupêk sâwm kha a lo ziak leh a; tlâng bula in pun khâwm ni-a mei aṭanga in hnêna a thu sawi chu Lalpa chuan min pe a." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Tlâng aṭang chuan ka lo kîr a, bâwm ka siamah chuan Lalpa min hrilh angin lung phêkte chu ka dah a, tûn thlengin a la awm ta a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:6 “Israel-te chu Beerot-bene-jaakan aṭangin Mosera-ah an insawn a, chutah chuan Arona chu a thi a; kan phûm a, a fapa Eleazara chuan puithiam lalber hna chu a thawk ta a." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Chuta ṭang chuan Gudgod-ah an insawn a, tui tam tak awmna hmun Jotbata-ah chuan an insawn a." 
Deuteronomy10:8 “Chutih lai chuan Levia thlahte chu Lalpa chuan Thuthlung Bâwm enkawltu atân leh zâwn ṭhîntu atân a ruat a; Lalpa hmaa dinga, a rawng bâwl a, a hminga mipui mal sâwmsak ṭhîn tûrin tûn thlengin a ruat ta a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Chuvâng chuan, Levia chite chuan an unau dangte angin ram bîk leh chanpual hran an nei ve dâwn lo va, Lalpa in Pathian sawi angin Lalpa hnêna thilhlan hi an chanpual ve tûr chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Tlângah chuan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli ka awm a, Lalpa chuan chumi ṭum pawh chuan ka thu a lo ngaithla a, Lalpa chuan tihhlum loh che u a remti ta a." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Lalpa chuan, ‘Tho la, i mite hma hruai rawh, an pate hnêna pêk ka tiam tawh ram chu luah tûrin kal zêl rawh se,’ mi ti a." 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Khai le, Israel-te u, Lalpa in Pathian hian in lakah eng nge a phût? Lalpa, in Pathian chu ṭih a, a duhzâwng apiang tih a, tihtakzeta rilru zawng zawnga amah chauh hmangaih leh a rawngbâwl te," 
Deuteronomy10:13 in ṭhatna tûra vawiina ka hrilh che u, a thupêk leh a thuruat zawm te hi a ni lâwm ni?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 Vân pum pui te, lei leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng te neitu hi Lalpa chu a ni;" 
Deuteronomy10:15 chuti taka mi ropui chuan in pute chu a hmangaih êm êm a, hnam dang zawng zawng aiin a thlang ta hial che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Tichuan, tûn chinah zawng Lalpa thu chu awih ula, luhlul tawh suh u." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Lalpa in Pathian hi pathiante Pathian, lalte Lal, Pathian ropui, thiltithei leh ṭihbaiawm tak chu a ni; tu mah thlei bîk a nei lo va, tlawn lungawi theih lah a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Fahrahte leh hmeithaite thu chu dik takin a ngaihtuahsak ṭhîn a, in zînga hnam dang awmte pawh a hmangaih a, an ei tûr te, silh tûr te a pe tho a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Chuvângin, in zînga awm ram dang mite chu hmangaih ve ula, Aigupta ramah mikhual in zu nih tawh kha." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Lalpa in Pathian chu ṭih ula, a rawng bâwl ula, amah chu vuan tlat rawh u; intiamkam nân a hming chauh chhâl ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy10:21 In mit ngeia in hmuh, thil ropui tak tak leh mak tak tak tia chawimawitu che u chu in Pathian hi a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:22 In pute, mi sawmsarih chu Aigupta ramah an chhuk a, tûnah zawng Lalpa in Pathian chuan arsi zâta tamin a tihpun tâk che u hi." 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Tin, Lalpa in Pathian chu hmangaih ula, a thuruat te, awm dân tûr a tih te, a thupêk te chu zâwm reng rawh u." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Lalpa chungchâng, nangmahni ngeiin in hriatte kha ngaihtuah ṭhîn rawh u. Chûng thil hretute chu in fate an ni lo, nangmahni ngei hi in ni, Lalpa in Pathian thununna natzia te, a ropuizia te, thu a neihzia te leh thil a tihtheihzia te in hmu a;" 
Deuteronomy11:3 Aigupta lal Farawa leh a ram chhûnga chhinchhiahna thil mak tak tak a tih te," 
Deuteronomy11:4 Aigupta sipaiho, an sakawrte leh an sakawrtawlailîr a sawisak dân te leh an ûm lai che ua Tuipui Sen a chîmpiltîr dân te, vawiin thlenga a tihchhiat tâk thu te in hre vek a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:5 He hmun in lo thlen hma, thlalêra in awm laia in chunga a thiltih te," 
Deuteronomy11:6 Reubena thlah zînga Eliaba fa Dathana leh Abirama te chu an chhûng te, an puan in te, an chhiahhlawh te leh an ran te nên lam bûk dang kiang maia awm an ni na a, lei a lo kak a, an tlâk tâk bîkzia te kha in hria a," 
Deuteronomy11:7 Lalpa thil ropui tak tak tihte chu in mit ngeiin in hmuh kha. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Thupêk, vawiina ka hrilh zawng zawng che u hi zâwm ula; tichuan, in lo chak ang a, in kalna tûr ramah chuan in lût ang a, in nei mai thei ang a," 
Deuteronomy11:9 khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ram, in pate hnên pawha pêk a tiam tawh che u ramah chuan in dam rei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy11:10 In ram, in neih tûr hi, in awmna ṭhin Aigupta ram ang kha a ni ve lo; chuta in thlai chînte chu tuia châwmin in duat a ṭûl ṭhîn." 
Deuteronomy11:11 In neih tûr ram chu tlâng leh ruama khat a ni a, vân ruahtui dawng tam ram a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Lalpa in Pathian chuan chu ram chu a duat hle a, kum tîr aṭanga kum tâwp thlengin a vil reng a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Tichuan, vawiina ka hrilh che u thupêkte hi zâwm rawh u, Lalpa in Pathian hi hmangaih ula, tihtakzetin a rawngbâwl rawh u." 
Deuteronomy11:14 Ruah hmasa leh ruah hnuhnûngte chu in ramah a hun takah a sûrtîr ang a, in buh te, in grep te, in oliv te, a hun takah in seng thei ang a;" 
Deuteronomy11:15 in ran ei tûr hnimte pawh a tiduah ang. Nangni pawhin puar taka ei tûr in nei reng ang a, in tlai hle ang." 
Deuteronomy11:16 “Fîmkhur rawh u, mahni inbum chawpin in pêng hlauh ang e, pathian dangte chibai bûkin an rawng in bâwl ve dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Lalpa chu a thinur ang a, vânte khi khârin ruahte a sûrtîr lo vang a, leiah eng mah a rah lo mai ang. Lalpa pêk che u ram ṭha tak aṭang hian in boral thuai mai ang." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Chuvângin, a thute hi in rilru leh in thinlungah vawng ṭha ula, hlut hle rawh u, in hriat reng theih nân in bânah te phuar bet ula, in mit inkâr chalhrênah te dah rawh u." 
Deuteronomy11:19 In fate pawh zirtîr rawh u, in chhûnga in ṭhut lai te, kawnga in kal lai te, in mut dâwnah te leh in thawh dâwnah te sawi sawi ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy11:20 In kawngka biangah te ziak ula, in tual kawngkhârah te târ ang che u;" 
Deuteronomy11:21 tichuan, in pate hnêna pêk a tiam ramah hian, lei hi vânin a khuh chhûng chu in fate nên rei tak in dam ang." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “A thupêk ka hrilh zawng zawng che u hi zâwm ula, ti ṭhîn rawh u. Lalpa in Pathian chu hmangaih ula, a duh ang chuan awm ula, amah chu vuan tlat rawh u." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Lalpa chuan in hmaah hêng hnam zawng zawng hi a ûm chhuak ang a, in aia hnam tam zâwk leh chak zâwkte chu an ram in luhchhuahsak ang." 
Deuteronomy11:24 In rah apiang chu in ram a ni zêl ang. Thlalêr leh Lebanon inkâr, Eufretis lui leh Mediteranean tuipui inkâr ram chu in ram a ni vek ang." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Tu mah lo dang thei che u an awm lo vang. Lalpa in Pathian chuan a sawi tawh angin in kalna apiangah in hmaah mite a tizâm zêl dâwn a ni. 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Ngai teh u, vawiinah hian malsâwmna dawn theihna leh ânchhe dawn theihna kawng ka hrilh che u hi." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Vawiina ka hrilh che u Lalpa, in Pathian thupêk zawm hi malsâwm dawn theihna kawng chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:28 Vawiina ka hrilh che u Lalpa in Pathian thupêk awih duh lo te, tih tûr ka hrilh che u ti lova pêng bo te, in la hriat ngai hleih loh pathian dang biakte hi ânchhe dawnna kawng chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:29 “ Lalpa in Pathianin in luah tûr ram a hruai thlen hunah che u chuan Gerizim tlângah malsâwmna kawng hi puang ula, Ebal tlângah ânchhe dawnna kawng hi puang bawk ang che u." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Hêng tlângte hi Jordan lui thlang lam, Kanan ram chhûnga awm Jordan ruam khawthlang lam, More sasaw thing kiang, Gilgal khaw bula awm a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Jordan lui in kân ṭêp tawh a, Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk che u chu in luah dâwn hnai ta. Chûng ram chu in lâka, awmhmun in benbel hunah chuan," 
Deuteronomy11:32 thuruatte leh awm dân tûr vawiina ka hrilh che u zawng zawng hi zâwm ngei ang che u. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “ Lalpa in Pathian pêk che u ram in luaha, in dam chhûnga ngun taka in zawm tûr thuruatte leh awm dân tûrte chu hêng hi a ni:" 
Deuteronomy12:2 In va luahlan tûr hnamten an pathian an biakna hmun, tlâng sâng tak taka mi te, muala mi te, thingbuk tinrêng hlima mi te chu in tihchhiatsak vek tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:3 An maichâmte chu in theh darh ang a, an lungphunte chu in chhu chhia ang a, Aseri lem an thingphunte chu in hâl ang a, thinga milim an tukte chu in chêk chhe vek ang a, hêng hmaahte hian chibai bûka an kûn leh tawh lohna tûr khawpin tichhe hlauh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Hêng mite biak dân ang hi chuan Lalpa in Pathian chu in be ve tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Israel hnam zawng zawng ram chanpual aṭangin Lalpa chuan a hming awmna tûr hmun pakhat a thlang ang a, chutah chuan, a hmaah in lo kal khâwm ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Chutah chuan in hâlral thilhlante leh in thilhlan dangte in rawn hlân tûr a ni; in sâwma pakhat te, in thilpêk te, in intiamkam tlâkna thilhlan te, mahni duh thu-a thilhlan te, in ran no piang hmasa ber te in rawn dah ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Chutah chuan Lalpa in Pathian hmaah, in hnathawh mal a sâwm avânga in thil ṭha neihte chu in chhûngin hlim takin in ei ṭhîn dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Chumi hunah chuan tûna mahni duh duha in tih ang hian in ti tawh tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy12:9 Tûnah zawng, Lalpa, in Pathianin a pêk tûr che u ramah lûtin in la châwl rih lo va." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Jordan lui in kai a, Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk tûr che u rama in chên a, in vêla in hmêlmate laka râlmuang taka in awm hunah erawh chuan," 
Deuteronomy12:11 Lalpa in Pathianin a hming awmna tûr hmun a thlanah chuan, ka hrilh zawng zawng che u kha in rawn keng tûr a ni in hâlral thilhlan te, in inthawina te, in sâwma pakhat te, in thilpêk te, Lalpa hnêna intiamkam tlâkna thilhlan te chu rawn keng ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy12:12 In fanu fapa te, in bawihpa leh in bawihnu te, in khuaa awm Levia chite nên Lalpa, in Pathian hmaah hlim takin eiin bâr ang che u." 
Deuteronomy12:13 In duh duhna hmunah in hâlral thilhlante hi in hlân tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy12:14 In zînga hnam khat ram chanpual Lalpa hmun thlanah chauh in hâlral thilhlante hi in hlân ang a, tih tûr ka hrilh zawng zawng che u hi in ti tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “In ran vulhte erawh chu in awmna apiangah in talh thei ang. Lalpa in Pathianin sa a pêk apiang che u chu in ei thei ang; mi bawlhhlawh leh mi thiangte pawhin sakhi leh sazuk sa angin in ei thei ang. 
Deuteronomy12:16 Sa thisen erawh chu in ei tûr a ni lo, leiah a luang ral tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Sâwma pakhat in pêk buh te, uain te, oliv hriak te, in ran no neih hmasak te, in intiamkam tlâkna sa te, mahni duh thua thilhlan sa te leh in thên thilhlan sa rêng rêng te chu mahni khuaah in ei tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Lalpa in Pathian hmun thlanah chuan a hmaah ngei in ei tûr a ni. In fanu in fapa te, in bawihpa leh in bawihnu te, in khuaa awm Levia chi te nên, Lalpa hmaah chuan in thawhrah te chu hlim leh lâwm takin in ei tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:19 In rama in awm chhûng chuan Levia chite hi ngaihthah hauh suh ang che u. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Lalpa in Pathianin a tiam anga in ramri a tihzau hunah chuan in duhna apiangah in sa châkzâwng chu in ei thei ang. 
Deuteronomy12:21 Lalpa in Pathianin a hming dahna tûr hmun a thlan chu, in awmna aṭanga a hlat viau chuan Lalpa pêk che u in ran vulhte chu ka hrilh che u ang hian in talh thei ang: in duh tâwkin mahni inah a sa chu in ei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Sakhi leh sazuk sa in ei angin mi thiangte leh mi bawlhhlawh lai te pawhin a sa chu an ei thei ang. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Sa thisen erawh chu ei rêng rêng suh u, nunna chu thisenah a awm a, a nunna chawpin in ei tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Thisen chu tui angin leiah leihbua ula, ei suh u." 
Deuteronomy12:25 A thu anga in tih chuan, Lalpa chu a lâwm ang a, in thlahte leh in tân a la ṭha ang." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Lalpa hnêna hlan in tiam thil serhte erawh chu a hmun ruatah chuan in rawn dah tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy12:27 Lalpa, in Pathian maichâma hâlral thilhlan chi te, maichâma thisen theha, a sa ei ho tûr chite chu, chutah ngei chuan in rawn dah tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Hêng ka thu hrilh zawng zawng che u hi zâwm thlap ula, Lalpa ṭha tihzâwng leh a lâwmzâwng chu in ti a ni ang a, in thlahte leh nangni hian kumkhuain in ṭhatpui ang." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “ Lalpa, in Pathianin, in va luhchhuah tûr hnamte chu a tihboral a, an ram in neih a, in luahsak hunah chuan," 
Deuteronomy12:30 a tihboral phahna ang thil kha in ti ve hauh tûr a ni lo; an biak pathiante chu zawng chhuakin, ‘Engtin nge an biak ṭhin le?’ tiin, an tih anga biak ve tum suh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy12:31 An pathiante an biak angin Lalpa in Pathian hi in be tûr a ni lo; Lalpa tenzâwng, thil chi tinrêng tih an chîng ṭhîn. An maichâmahte chuan an fanu leh fapate ngei pawh hâlral thilhlanah an hâl ṭhîn a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Ka hrilh zawng zawng che u hi ti ngei ang che u; eng mah belh suh ula, eng mah hmaih bawk hek suh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “In zînga zâwlneiin emaw, mang neih chîngin emaw thil mak tak tak leh chhinchhiahna hrilh lâwk che u sela," 
Deuteronomy13:2 an hrilh lâwk ang thil mak tak tak leh chhinchhiahna te chu thleng dik ṭhîn mah se, ngaihven suh u. ‘Ti rawh u, pathian dang biak tûr i zawng ang, in la hriat ngai lohte rawng i bâwl ang,’ ti mah se;" 
Deuteronomy13:3 chutianga ti zâwlnei leh mang neih chîngte thu chu bengkhawn suh ang che u; Lalpa in Pathian chu tihtakzet leh rilru zawng zawngin in hmangaih nge hmangaih lo tih Lalpa in Pathianin a fiahna che u a ni. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Lalpa in Pathian hnung chu zui ula, a rawng chu bâwl rawh u." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Chutiang zâwlnei leh mang neih chîngho chu in tihlum tûr a ni, Lalpa in Pathian, Aigupta ram aṭanga hruaichhuaktu che u lakah an heltîr che u a, Lalpa in Pathianin awm dân tûr a kawhhmuh che u ata an pêntîr che u a ni, in zînga chutiang mi sual awm chu in thian fai tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “In unau, in nu hrin ve ngeiin emaw, in fapain emaw, in fanuin emaw, in nupui pawm laiin emaw, in ṭhian bul berin emaw in nu leh in pate la hriat ngai loh pathian be tûra an thlêm che u chuan duh suh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy13:7 In bul hnaia chêngte pathian emaw, ram hla taka awmte pathian emaw, leia chêng rêng rêng mi dang pathian emaw be tûra an sâwm che u chuan," 
Deuteronomy13:8 an thu chu ngaithla suh ula, ngaihven hek suh ang che u; anni chu khawngaih suh ula, lainat hek suh u, hum pawh tum hek suh u." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Chûngho chu in tihlum tûr a ni, nangin kut i thlâk hmasa ang a, an chungah mipui an che ve dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Bawih in nihna Aigupta ram aṭanga hruaichhuaktu che u Lalpa in Pathian laka pên botîr che u an tum avângin lungin in dêng hlum tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Tichuan, Israel mi zawng zawngin an hria ang a, an hlau vang; in zîngah chutiang thil sual chu a awm leh tawh ngai lo vang." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “ Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u khawpuiah te in awm hunah," 
Deuteronomy13:13 in zînga mi sual, tlâktlai lo tak takten an awmna khuaa mite chu in la biak ngai loh pathian be tûrin an thlêm thlu ta tih in hriat chuan," 
Deuteronomy13:14 in chhui ang a, ngun takin in zâwt vêl ang a, in zîngah chutiang thil tenawm ti chu an awm ngei a ni tih in hriat chuan," 
Deuteronomy13:15 chu khuaa mite chu khandaihin in that tûr a ni, a chhûnga mi zawng zawng leh an rante chu in that vek tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy13:16 An thil neih zawng zawng in lâkte chu khawpui tual zau laiah in la khâwm ang a, an khua leh an sum in lâksakte chu in hâl vek tûr a ni; Lalpa tâna serh hran tawh chu tu man la suh se; Lalpa in Pathian tâna hâlral thilhlana hâl ral vek tûr a ni; chu khua chu thil chim chhe awm khâwm mai a ni kumkhua ang a, tu man an din leh tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Lalpa tâna serh hran tawh chu tu man la suh se; tichuan, Lalpa thinur chu a dai ang a, a khawngaih ang che u a, in chungah ngil a nei ang a, in pate hnêna a tiam tawh angin a tipung leh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Lalpa in Pathian aw hi ngaithla ula, a thupêk ka hrilh che u hi zâwm ula, Lalpa in Pathian duhzâwng chu ti phawt mai teh u." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “ Lalpa in Pathian mite in ni a, lu in sûnin inzai thi suh ula, in chalsam ziat kawlh ve hek suh u." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Khawvêla awm zawng zawng zîngah nangni hi Lalpa in Pathian tâna hnam serh, a pual bîk atâna Lalpa thlan chhuah chu in ni e." 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Thil tenawm rêng rêng in ei tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy14:4 An sa in ei theih tûr rante chu hêngte hi a ni: bâwng, kêl leh berâm," 
Deuteronomy14:5 sakhi, sangai, sazuk, sathâr, saza, ramsial, ram berâm te hi." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Sa tinrêng, a ke tin kâk phak leh chaw ṭhial nawn chi chu in ei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Chaw ṭhial nawn a, tin kâk lo, tin kâka chaw ṭhial nawn lo sa chu in ei tûr a ni lo. Sanghâwngsei te, sazupui te, sangawi te hi in ei tûr a ni lo; chaw chu an ṭhial nawna, an tin a kâk lo a ni; in tân a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Vawk hi a tin a kâk; mahse, chaw a ṭhial nawn lo va, a sa in ei tûr a ni lo, in tân a bawlhhlawh a ni. An sa in ei tûr a ni lo va, a thisâwn chu khawih pawh in khawih tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Tuia awm hêngte hi in ei thei ang: phuhlip leh pângparh nei zawng zawng sa in ei thei ang. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Pângparh nei lo, phuhlip pawh nei lo sa chu in ei tûr a ni lo, in tân a tenawm a ni." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Sava ei thiang apiang chu in ei thei ang. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Hêngte erawh hi chu in ei tûr a ni lo: mupui, lungdûp, muârla," 
Deuteronomy14:13 mulukawlh, ngawihûp, mutê chi rêng rêng te," 
Deuteronomy14:14 choak chi rêng rêng te; 
Deuteronomy14:15 sava sâng vabak, tuifinriat sava mu chi rêng rêng," 
Deuteronomy14:16 hrângkir, chhimbuk, chingpirinu, chhimbuksialki," 
Deuteronomy14:17 tuivalawng, mulukawlh, luidung mu," 
Deuteronomy14:18 kânghlai, dîl sava chi rêng rêng, chhuangtuar, bâk te hi." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Rannung thla nei, ke pali-a vâk chi rêng rêng chu in tân a bawlhhlawh a, ei tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Thlâwk thei chi sa thiang tawh phawt chu in ei thei ang. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Amaha thi chu eng sa mah in ei tûr a ni lo, in khaw chhûnga ram dang mi awm vete ei atân an hnênah in pe thei ang a, in hralh thei bawk ang. Lalpa in Pathian tâna inserh thianghlim tûr hnam in ni. Kêl notê chu a pui hnutein in chhûm tur a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “In lo rama thlai tharte chu sâwma pakhat kum tin dah hrang rawh u. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Lalpa in Pathianin a hming awmna tûra a thlan hmunah chuan kalpui ula, a hmaah chuan in buh te, uain te, oliv hriak te; in bâwng leh berâmno hrin hmasak ber sâwma pakhat in pêkte chu ei ṭhîn ang che u. Lalpa in Pathian chu ṭih nachâng in lo hriat theih nân." 
Deuteronomy14:24 In awmna chu a hlat hle a, Lalpa, in Pathian malsâwmna in dawn chu ken a harsat chuan," 
Deuteronomy14:25 hralh ula, a man chu têl ula, Lalpa in Pathianin a thlan hmunah chuan kalpui ang che u." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Chu chuan bâwng te, berâm te, uain te, zu te, in châk zawng apiang lei ula, in chhûngkuain Lalpa in Pathian hmaah hlim leh lâwm takin ei ho ang che u." 
Deuteronomy14:27 In khuaa Levia chi awm vete chu in ngaihthah tûr a ni lo, in zîngah ram chanpual an nei ve lo a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy14:28 “Kum thum kuma in sâwma pakhat chu in awmna khuaa hmun pakhatah la khâwm ṭhîn ang che u. 
Deuteronomy14:29 Ram chanpual an neih ve loh avângin Levia chite chuan chu chu an ei ang; mikhual te, fahrah leh hmeithai, in khaw chhûnga awmte pawhin an ei tûr a ni; puar takin an ei ve tûr a ni. Hetiang hian ti ula, Lalpa, in Pathian chuan in thiltih apiang a tihmuingîl ang che u." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Kum sarih dan zêlah in leiba in ngaidam tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Hetiang hi ngaihdam dân tûr chu a ni: Israel mi rêng rêngin a Israel-pui tangka pûktîr sela, a kum sarih tâwpah chuan a ngaidam tûr a ni, a tangka ba chu a ṭhîng tûr a ni lo; Lalpa ngeiin a ba chu a nuai bosak tawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Hnam dangin in lei an bat chuan in ṭhîng thei ang; nangmahni miin in hnêna lei an bat chu in ṭhîng tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy15:4 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ramah chuan mal a sâwm dâwn che u avângin in zîngah tu mah rethei in awm tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy15:5 Lalpa in Pathian aw chu ngaithla ula, vawiina ka hrilh che u, a thupêk zawng zawng hi zâwm phawt mai teh u." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Lalpa in Pathian hian a tiam tawh angin mal a sâwm ang che u a, hnam tam tak in pûktîr ang a, nangni chuan in pûksak lo vang; hnam tam tak chungah thu in nei ang a, in chungah erawh chuan thu an nei lo vang." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “ Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ramah chuan in khaw chhûnga awm ve, in chipui ngei tlachham lakah inchhungêng suh ula, ṭanpui hreh suh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Phal takin an mamawh zât zât chu pûktîr rawh u. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Rilru sual pu suh ang che u, ‘Kum sarihna, leiba ngaihdamna hun a lo hnai ta si,’ tiin in unau rethei chu huphurhin melh suh ula, eng mah kawmpui suh ang che u; in chunga a vui thu Lalpa hnêna a sawi hlauh chuan thil sual ti in ni mai ang." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Ui rilru chungin pe suh u, phal takin pe ula; chutianga in tih chuan Lalpa in Pathian chuan in kutkawih mal a sâwm ang a, in tih apiangah in hmuingîl ang." 
Deuteronomy15:11 In ramah rethei an awm reng dâwn a; chuvângin, thu ka pe a che u, in rama rethei te, tlachham te leh in unau te lakah thilphal hle rawh u." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “In Israel-pui, mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw bawihah an rawn inhralh chuan, kum ruk in chhawr ang a, in chhuah tûr a ni. A kum sarihnaah chuan in zalêntîr tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Chutia in chhuahtîr chuan, kut ruakin in kaltîr tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Berâm emaw, uain emaw Lalpa hnên aṭanga malsâwmna in dawn chu phal takin pe ve ang che u." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Aigupta ramah khân bawih in nih kha hre reng rawh u; Lalpa in Pathianin bawih ata a chhuahtîr che u a nih kha. 
Deuteronomy15:16 “In bawih chuan nangni leh in chhûngkua a ngainat che u avângin ‘Ka chhuak lo vang’ lo ti ta sela. 
Deuteronomy15:17 Chuti a nih chuan in kawngka bulah in dintîr ang a, a beng in verh ang a; tichuan, a dam chhûng chuan in bawih a ni tawh ang. In bawihnu pawh chutiang bawk chuan ti ang che u." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Ui chungin in bawih chu chhuah suh u; in hna kum ruk a thawk tawh a, hlawhfa ruai ni ula in sum let hnih in sêng tawh ang. Chutiang chuan ti ula, kawng engkimah in Pathian chuan a tihmuingîl ang che u." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “In bâwng leh berâmno hrin hmasak berte chu Lalpa in Pathian tân dah hrang ang che u. Bâwng chu chhawr suh ula, berâm pawh a hmul mêt hek suh u." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Kum tin Lalpa hun ruatah chuan, Lalpa in Pathian hmaah in chhûngkuain in ei ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy15:21 A kebai emaw, a mitdel emaw, hmêlhem nasa deuh emaw chu Lalpa in Pathian hnênah chuan in hlân tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy15:22 In khaw chhûngah erawh chuan in ei thei ang, sakhi sa leh sazuk sa in ei angin mi thiangte leh bawlhhlawh lai te pawhin an ei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy15:23 A thisen erawh chu in ei tûr a ni lo; tui angin leiah leihbaw rawh u. 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Abib thla hian Lalpa, in Pathian chuan Aigupta ram aṭangin zânah a hruai chhuak che u a; Abib thla hian Lalpa in Pathian tân Kalhlên kût hi hmang ṭhîn rawh u." 
Deuteronomy16:2 A hming awmna tûr Lalpa hmun thlanah chuan, in bâwng emaw, berâm emaw, kêl emaw Kalhlên kût atân Lalpa in Pathian hnênah hlân rawh u." 
Deuteronomy16:3 A sa chu chhang dawidim telh nên in ei tûr a ni lo; Aigupta ram in chhuahsan dâwna hmanhmawh taka in ei ang khân tuarna entîrna chhang dawidim telh loh chu, ni sarih chhûng in ei tûr a ni. In dam chhûngin Aigupta, in retheihna ram in chhuahsan ni in hriat reng nân ei ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy16:4 “In ram chhûngah rêng rêng ni sarih chhûng chu dawidim a awm tûr a ni lo. A ni hmasa ber tlaia in thilhlan, in ran talh in ei bâng sa a tûk atân dah tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Lalpa in Pathianin luah tûra a pêk che u khaw chhûngah pawh Kalhlên kût sa hi in hlân tûr a ni lo; 
Deuteronomy16:6 Lalpa in Pathianin a hming awmna tûra a thlanah ngei chuan in Kalhlên kûtna tûr chu, tlai ni tlâk dâwn, Aigupta ram in chhuahsan hun angah khân in hlân ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Lalpa, in Pathian hmun ruatah chuan in chhûm ang a, in ei ang a, a tûk zîngah chuan in puan in lamah in haw leh tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Ni ruk chhûng chu dawidim telh loh chhang in ei ang a, a ni sarih ni chuan Lalpa in Pathian tân inkhâwmpui urhsûn tak nei ula, chumi ni chuan hna rêng rêng thawk suh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Favaha buh in hleh ṭan ni aṭangin hapta sarih chhiar ula; 
Deuteronomy16:10 tichuan, Pentikos kût chu hmang ang che u. Lalpa in Pathianin malsâwmna tam tak a vûr che u aṭangin amah chawimawi nân in thilthlâwn pêkte chu hlân rawh u." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Lalpa hmaah chuan in fa te, in chhiahhlawh te, a hmei a pain in khuaa Levia chi te, hnam dang te, fahrah te leh hmeithai te in zînga awm ve te nên chuan hlim takin Lalpa in Pathianin a hming awmna tûra a thlanah chuan ruai ṭheh rawh u." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Hêng thuruatte hi ngun takin zâwm ula, Aigupta ramah bawih in nih ṭhin kha hre reng ang che u." 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Buh te in seng zawh vek a, in grepte in sâwr zawh vek hnuah, ni sarih chhûng Bâwkte kût hmang ṭhîn ang che u." 
Deuteronomy16:14 In fa te, in bawihnu leh bawihpa te, Levia chi te, ram dang mi awm ve te, fahrahte leh hmeithai, in khuaa awm te nên hlim takin ruai ṭheh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Lalpa in Pathianin a hming awmna tûra a thlanah chuan ni sarih chhûng hmang ang che u. Lalpa in Pathian chuan in kutkawihte chu mal a sâwm a, a tihhmuingîl che u avângin in lâwm hle tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “In zînga mipa zawng zawng chu Lalpa in Pathian hmun thlanah chuan kum tin ṭum thum in lo kal ṭhîn tûr a ni: Kalhlên kûtah te, Pentikos kûtah te, Bâwkte kûtah te, Lalpa hmaah chuan eng mah keng lovin in lo kal tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Mi tinin Lalpa in Pathian malsâwmna in dawn ang zêlin in theih ang ang in pe tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy16:18 “ Lalpa in Pathianin khawpui a pêk che u apiangah rorêltu leh hotu tûrte ruat ṭhîn ang che u. 
Deuteronomy16:19 Dik takin ro an rêl ang a, hleih an nei tûr a ni lo. Thamna an la tûr a ni lo, thamna hian mi fingte mit pawh a tidel ṭhîn a, mi dikte chungthu pawh dik lo takin a rêltîr ṭhîn." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Eng lai pawhin a âwm tâwk tak leh dik takin thil ti ṭhîn ang che u; tichuan, Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk che u hi dam takin in luah reng thei ang." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Lalpa in Pathian maichâm in siamna bulah chuan Aseri lim, thing in phun tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Lalpa in Pathian huatzâwng lung pawh in phun tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “ Lalpa in Pathian hnênah hmêlhemna nei bâwng emaw, berâm emaw in hlân tûr a ni lo, a tenzâwng tak a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Lalpa in Pathianin khua a pêk che u chhûngah rêng rêng chuan mipain emaw, hmeichhiain emaw in Pathian ngaimawh zawng tak tiin a thuthlung bawhchhiain," 
Deuteronomy17:3 pathian dangte ûmin an rawng a bâwla, biak loh tûr ka tih - nî te, thla te leh thil dang tam tak te khi bia sela," 
Deuteronomy17:4 chutiang mi chu an awm tih in hriat chuan ngun takin in zâwt chhuak ang a, Israel-te zîngah chutiang thil tenawm ti in hriat chian chuan," 
Deuteronomy17:5 kulh kawngkaah, chutiang mi, mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw chu in rawn hruai ang a, chu mi chu lungin in dêng hlum tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Thuhretu pahnih tal thu avâng chauhvin in tihlum thei ang; mi pakhat thu avâng mai chuan in tihlum tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Thuhretute chuan lung chuan an dêng hmasa ang a, mipuiin an dêng ve chauh vang. Chutiang chuan in zînga thil ṭha lote chu in thian fai tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Mihring thah chu tihpalh a nih leh nih loh thu-ah te, rûkrûk leh rûk loh thu ah te, invuak palh leh palh loh thu-ah te dânin a huam loh tihthlûk harsa in khuaa in neih chuan, Lalpa in Pathianin a thlan hmunah chuan in kalpui tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Levia chi, puithiamte leh chûng laia rorêltu tûra ruatte chu in râwn ang a, anni chuan a rêl dân tûr an hrilh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Lalpa hmun thlan aṭanga tih dân tûr an hrilh che u ang ngei chuan in rêl tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy17:11 An hrilh che u ang ngei leh an thu tihthlûk ang chiah chuan in rêl ṭhîn tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy17:12 “ Lalpa, in Pathian rawngbâwltu puithiam thu emaw, rorêltu tûra dah thu emaw duh lova tidanglam hlektu chu tihhlum tûr a ni, Israel ram chhûngah chutiang thil ṭha lo chu in thian fai tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Mi tinin an hria ang a, an hlau vang a, thil an ti mai mai tawh lo vang." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “ Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk tûr che u in thlena, in neiha, awmhmun in benbel hnu chuan, ‘Kan vêla hnamte angin lal i nei ve ang,’ in la ti ang." 
Deuteronomy17:15 In lal tûr chu Lalpa in Pathian mi thlan ngei ni rawh se; nangmahni mi a ni ngei tûr a ni; hnam dang chu in lalah siam suh u. 
Deuteronomy17:16 Lal chuan a sipaite tân sakawr a ngah viau tûr a ni lo, Aigupta ramah sakawr lei belh tûrin mi a tîr tûr a ni hek lo; Lalpa chuan ‘Chu lamah chuan in kîr leh tawh tûr a ni lo,’ a ti si a." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Nupui pawh a nei ṭeuh tûr a ni lo, Pathian a hawisan phah ang e. Tangka leh rangkachak pawh a ngah viau tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy17:18 “A ram lalṭhutthlênga a ṭhut hun chuan Levia chi, puithiamhovin an kawl Dân bu hi a ziak chhâwntîr ang a;" 
Deuteronomy17:19 chu chu a kawl ang a, a dam chhûngin a chhiar ṭhîn tûr a ni; hênga dânte leh thuruatte hi uluk takin a zâwm ang a, Lalpa a Pathian chu a chawimawi ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Chutichuan, a chipui Israel dangte aiin a indah sâng lo vang a, Lalpa thupêk pakhat tê pawh a namnûl lo vang a, rei tak a dam ang a, a thlahte pawhin Israel-te chungah ro an rêl reng ang." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Israel-te zîngah Levia chi, puithiamte chuan ram chanpual an nei ve tûr a ni lo, Lalpa hnêna thil hlan hâl bâng chu an nei ang a, chu chu an chanpual tûr chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Hnam dangin ram chanpual an nei angin ram an nei ve tûr a ni lo, Lalpan a tiam angin an chanpual chu Lalpa chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:3 ‘Bâwng emaw, berâm emaw miin Lalpa hnêna an hlan apiang a dâr te, a khabe khing hnih te leh a pumpui te chu puithiam sa tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:4 In buh thar hmasa te leh in uain sâwr hmasak te leh in oliv hriak her chhuah hmasak ber te chu puithiam in pe tûr a ni; in berâm hmul meh hmasak ber pawh pe ang che u. 
Deuteronomy18:5 Lalpa in Pathian chuan in zîng ata anni hi an thlah zêlte nên a hmaa ding a, a rawngbâwl tûrin kumkhua atân a ruat a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:6 “A duh phawt chuan Levia chi rêng rêng chu, khawii khua aṭang pawhin Lalpa hmun ruatah chuan a lo kal thei ang." 
Deuteronomy18:7 Chutah chuan Levia chi mi dangte ang bawkin Lalpa a Pathian rawng chu a bâwl ve thei ang. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Puithiam dangte dawn ang ei tûr chu a dawng ve vek tûr a ni, ama chhûngten thil an rawn thawn erawh chu a nei bil thei ang." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “ Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ram in thlen hunah, chuta lo awmte thil tenawm tih ang chu ti ve suh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy18:10 In zînga tu mahin maichâma hâl ral tûrin in fate in hlân ve tûr a ni lo; aien te, ṭhumvâwr te, aisân te, dawi te," 
Deuteronomy18:11 kêl mei awrh te, ramhuaizâwl rawih te, thlarau zâwl te, mitthi thlûk te chîng ve suh u." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Chutiang tih chîng chu Lalpa tenzâwng tak an ni; chuvâng alâwm Lalpa, in Pathianin hêng thil tenawm tih chîngte hi in hmaa a hnawh chhuah ni." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Lalpa, in Pathian hmaah chuan hêng thil tenawm lakah hian in fihlîm vek tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:14 “Hêng hnam, in luhchhuah tûrte hian aisân an chîng a, ramhuaizâwl thu an ngaithla ṭhîn; nangni zawng Lalpa in Pathian hian chutiang in tih ve a phal lo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 In zînga mi, keimah ang, zâwlnei a rawn pe ang che u, ani thu chu in zâwm dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Horeb tlâng bula in pun khâwm ni khân Lalpa in Pathian hmaah, ‘ Lalpa kan Pathian aw chu hre tawh lo ila, a mei râpthlâk tak pawh chu hmu tawh lo ila, kan thi mai dâwn alâwm,’ tiin in ngên a." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, ‘An sawi chu a dik e," 
Deuteronomy18:18 An zînga mi ngei zâwlnei ka ruatsak ang a, an hnêna sawi tûr ka hrilh ang a, ka thupêk chu a hrilh chhâwng ang." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ka hminga thu sawi ngaithla duh lo apiang chu keiman a chungthu ka ngaihtuah ang. 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ka tirh ni si lova, ka hminga thu sawitu zâwlnei emaw, pathian dang hming sawitu zâwlnei emaw chu tihhlum tûr a ni,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy18:21 ‘ Lalpa sawi a nih leh nih loh engtin nge kan hriat ang?’ in tih chuan, hei hi a thliar dân tûr chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy18:22 Zâwlneiin Lalpa hminga thu a sawi chu a lo thlen lohva, a dik loh chuan, chu chu Lalpa hminga sawi a ni lo vang, ama duh thu-a sawi a ni, hlau suh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “In luahlan tûr hnamte chu Lalpa in Pathian chuan a tihborala, an ram chu in lâk a, an khuate in neih a, an inahte in chên hunah chuan," 
Deuteronomy19:2 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ram chu hmun thumah ṭhen ula, ram bung tinah, pan awlsam tûr, khaw pakhat ṭheuh ruat ang che u. Miin mihring tihlum sela, chûng khuaah chuan an tualtlân thei ang a, an lo hum tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy19:3  
Deuteronomy19:4 Miin mahni hmêlma ni lo, mi dang that palh sela, chûng khuaah chuan an tlân ang a, an him thei ang." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Mi pakhat chuan a ṭhian nên thing kit dûn sela, a hreipui fang chu chêk thlawnin, a ṭhianpa chu dêng hlum ta sela, hêng khaw eng berah hian emaw a tlân ang a, a him thei ang." 
Deuteronomy19:6 A tualtlânna tûr khua chu a hlat viau chuan a tihhluma thisen phuba latu thinur ling chuan a ûm pha ang a, tûn hma pawha inhuatna nei lo thah ve kher loh tûr chu a that mai dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Chuvângin, khaw pathum ruat tûrin ka ti che u a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy19:8 “ Lalpa in Pathian chuan a tiam ang ngeia ram a pêk belh che u a, in pate hnêna pêk a tiam ram zawng zawng a pêk hunah che u chuan," 
Deuteronomy19:9 khawpui pathum dang thlan belh leh ang che u. (Lalpa in Pathian chu in hmangaih takzeta, a thu anga awm in tum tlat a, vawiina ka hrilh che u zawng zawng hi in zawm phawt chuan ram chu a pe ngei dâwn si che u a ni.)" 
Deuteronomy19:10 Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk che u-ah hian chutiang chuan ti ula, pawi khawih lo thisen chhuah suh u, a mawh in phurh loh nân." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Miin a hmêlma chu lo châng ruin lo beiin, lo tihlum ta sela; hêng tualtlânna khuaah hian tlân ve mah sela," 
Deuteronomy19:12 chutiang thilah chuan ama awmna khaw upaten an ko ang a, a thaha laichîn hnai, thisen phuba latu tûr hnênah chuan an pe ang a, a lo tihlum ang." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Khawngaih hauh suh u, Israel-te zîngah tual thah tibo rawh u; tichuan, kawng engkimah in hmuingîl ang." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “ Lalpa in Pathianin ram hi a pêk lai che ua phun tawh, in ṭhenawmte ramri lung chu sawn suh." 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Thuhretu pakhat mai avângin mi an thil tihah thiam loh chantîr tûr a ni lo; mi pahnih pathum thu-a nemngheh tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy19:16 Mi pakhatin mi dang tihchhiat tumin dâwtin hêk sela," 
Deuteronomy19:17 an pahnih chuan Lalpa hmun ruatah chuan an kal ang a, chuta puithiamte leh rorêltu tûra ruatte hmaah chuan an ding dûn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Rorêltu chuan ngun takin a chhui ang a, a hêktu chuan dâwta hêk a nih chuan," 
Deuteronomy19:19 a hêka tihchhiat a tumna ang chiah chuan a hêktu chungah chuan an ti tûr a ni; chutiang thil ṭha lo chu in zîng ata in tibo tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Chutiang ti ve lote chuan an hriatin an hlau ang a, chutiang thil ṭha lo chu in zînga tu mahin an ti ve dâwn lo nia." 
Deuteronomy19:21 In lainat tûr a ni lo, nun aiah nun, mit aiah mit, hâ aiah hâ, kut aiah kut, ke aiah ke a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Indo tûra in thawh chhuahin sakawr-tawlailîr te, sakawr te leh in aia tam sipai in hmuhin in hlau tûr a ni lo. Lalpa in Pathian, Aigupta ram aṭanga hruaichhuaktu che u chu in lamṭang a ni si a." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Hmêlma bei tûra in chhuah dâwn hunah chuan puithiam lalber a lo kal ang a, mite chu a rawn fuih ang." 
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Aw Israel-te u, hre rawh u, vawiin hian in hmêlma in do dâwn ta a, zâm suh ula, hlau hek suh u; thlaphâng suh ula, huphurh hek suh u." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Lalpa in Pathianin a awmpui che u a, a chhan him dâwn a che u,’ a ti ang." 
Deuteronomy20:5 Mipui hotute chuan mite hnênah, ‘In thar sa, la hlân lo in awm em? A in lamah haw rawh se, indonaah a thi palh ang a, a in sak chu mi dangin an hlansak dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Grep phuna a rah la ei lo in awm em? A in lamah haw rawh se, a grep rah chu mi dangin an ei dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Nupui huala, la nei si lo in awm em? Inah haw rawh se, chutilo chuan indonaah a thi hlauh ang a, mi dangin an neihsak dah ang e,’ an ti tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Chumi zawhah chuan sipai hotute chuan, ‘Zâm leh hlau in awm em? In awm chuan in lamah haw mai rawh u, a sipaipuite rilru a tizâm dah ang e,’ an ti ang." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Sipai hotuten chutia an tih zawh hnu chuan sipai pâwl tin tân hruaitu ruat thliah tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Khawpui in beih dâwnin khuaa mite chu inpe tûrin ngên hmasa ṭhîn ang che u. 
Deuteronomy20:11 An kulh kawngkhâr an lo hawnsak che u a, in hnêna inpe an nih chuan in bawihah an awm ang a, duh duhin in chhawr thei ang." 
Deuteronomy20:12 An inpêk duh lohva, indo an thlan chuan in hual tlat tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Lalpa in Pathianin khua chu a lâktîr hunah che u chuan mipa zawng zawng chu that vek ang che u. 
Deuteronomy20:14 Hmeichhia te, naupang te, ran te leh khaw chhûnga thil dang te chu mahni tân in nei thei ang. In hmêlmate thil chu Lalpa in Pathian chuan a pe tawh che u a, in duh duhin in ti thei ang." 
Deuteronomy20:15 In luah tûr rama khawpui ni lo, ram pâwn daiha khawpuite in lâk hunah pawh chutiang chuan in sawisa tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy20:16 “ Lalpa in Pathianin in rochan atâna a pêk che u khawpuite in lâk hunah chuan, a chhûnga mi thaw thei tawh phawt chu pakhat mah zuah suh u." 
Deuteronomy20:17 In that fai vek tûr a ni. Hit mi te, Amor mi te, Kanan mi te, Periz mi te, Hiv mi te, Jebus mi te chu Lalpa in Pathian thupêk awihin that vek ang che u." 
Deuteronomy20:18 An pathian biaknaa thil tenawm tak tak an tih ṭhinte chu an zirtîr loh nân che u, that ula, Lalpa in Pathian lakah thil sual in ti dâwn lo nia." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Khua lâk in tum a, rei tak hual a ṭûl pawhin a vêla thei kûng chu kit suh ang che u. A rah chu in ei thei ang, a kûng erawh chu kit suh u, thingte chu in hmêlma an ni lo ve." 
Deuteronomy20:20 A rah ei theih a ni lo tih in hriat chian thing erawh chu in kit thei ang, hmêlma khua chu in lâk hma chuan in hmêlmate beihna hmanruaah in hmang thei ang." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “ Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ram chhûngah mi ruang hmu ula, a thattu hre si lo ula," 
Deuteronomy21:2 in hruaitute leh rorêltuten ruangin tu khua nge a hnaih ber tih an teh tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy21:3 A hnaih ber khaw hotute chuan bâwngla, la chhawr ngai loh, an thlang chhuak ang a." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Lui kang ngai lo bulah an kai chhuk ang a, lei la leh ngai lohvah, eng mah la chînna ngai lovah bâwngla ring chu an elhtliak tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Levia chi puithiam pawh an tel ve tûr a ni; tual thah thubuai rêng rêng hi a remtu tûr an ni si a. Lalpa in Pathianin ama rawngbâwltuah leh a hminga malsâwmna sawi ṭhîntuah a ruat a ni. 
Deuteronomy21:6 Tual thi ruang hnaih ber khaw upate chuan, lui kama bâwngla, a ring an elhtliah chungah chuan an kut an sil ang a," 
Deuteronomy21:7 ‘He mi hi kan thah a ni lo va, a thattu pawh kan hre lo." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Aw Lalpa, i mi Israel, Aigupta ram aṭanga i hruai chhuahte hi ngaidam teh. Ngaidam la, pawi khawih lote thisen mawh chu i mite phurhtîr suh ang che,’ an ti ang." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Chutia Lalpa tuk anga an tih chuan tual thah mawh chu in phur lo vang. 
Deuteronomy21:10 “ Lalpa in Pathianin indona a hnehtîr che u a, mi in man ṭeuhva," 
Deuteronomy21:11 chûng zînga nula hmêlṭha in tih zâwng tak nupuia in duh in hmuh chuan 
Deuteronomy21:12 hâwn ula, an lu an ziat kawlh ang a, an tin an hlep vek bawk ang a." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Man laia a kawr hâk chu an thlâk ang a, in inah chuan an awm reng tawh ang, thla khat chhûng chu an nu leh pate an hmuh tawh loh tûrte chu an sûn ang. Chumi hnu chuan nupuiah in nei thei ang a, in nupui an ni tawh ang." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Nupuia in duh loh leh chuan an duhna apiangah in kaltîr ang a, nupuia in neih tawh avângin, bawih angin in en tûr a ni tawh lo va, in hralh tûr a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Miin nupui pahnih nei sela, fapa hrinsak ve ve sela; a nupui ngainat loh zâwka fa chu a ngainat zâwka fa ai chuan upa zâwk sela," 
Deuteronomy21:16 a fate hnêna ro a sem dâwn hunah, a nupui ngainat zâwk fa chu, duhsakin fa u chan a pe tûr a ni lo," 
Deuteronomy21:17 a fapa upa zâwk chu, a nupui ngainat zâwka fa ni lo mah sela, chan hnih a pe tûr a ni. Fa tîrte hi ngaih pawimawh tûr an ni a, dân ang taka an chanvo pêk tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Miin fapa luhlul, tihmawh deuh mai nei sela, a nu leh a pate chuan hrem ṭhîn mah se, sâwt si lo sela;" 
Deuteronomy21:19 a nu leh pate chuan an awmna khaw hotute ṭhu khâwm hmaah chuan an rawn hruai ang a; 
Deuteronomy21:20 upate hnênah chuan, ‘Kan fapa hi a luhlul a, mi ngawltâwt tak a ni, kan thu rêng rêng a awih duh lo va, zu leh sa ngawt a ngaihtuah mai,’ an ti ang a." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Khuaa mi zawng zawng chuan lungin an dêng hlum tûr a ni; chutiang thil ṭha lo chu in zîng ata in thian fai vek tûr a ni. Israel mi zawng zawngin an hria ang a, an hlau ang." 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Thil eng emaw a tihsual avânga tihhlum chu thinglêra khai a nih chuan," 
Deuteronomy21:23 a ruang chu a zânriak tûr a ni lo, a thih ni la lain phûm tûr a ni. Chutiang mi khai hlum chu Pathian ânchhe dawng a ni a, Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ram hi in tibawrhbâng tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “I chipui, Israel mi bâwng emaw, berâm emaw thlun chhuak i hmuh chuan hai der suh, khalh hâwnsak rawh." 
Deuteronomy22:2 A neitu chu khaw dang hla taka awm a nihin emaw, a neitu i hriat bawk si loh emaw chuan i inah kai haw ang che." 
Deuteronomy22:3 A sabengtung bo i hmuhin emaw, a puan hloh i chharin emaw, thil eng pawh, i unau Israel thil hloh i hmuh chuan, chutiang chuan ti ang che." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “In unau Israel bâwngpa emaw, sabengtung emaw kawnga tlu i hmuh chuan haider suh, kaihthawhpui ang che." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Hmeichhiain mipa thawmhnaw a inbel tûr a ni lo; mipain hmeichhe thawmhnaw a inbel tûr a ni hek lo; Lalpa in Pathianin chutiang chu a ten a ni. 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Thingah emaw, leiah emaw sava bu awp lai, a tui keu tawh emaw, keu lo emaw i hmuh chuan a pui man suh," 
Deuteronomy22:7 a notê chu i la thei ang, a pui erawh chu i chhuah tûr a ni; tichuan, i tân a ṭha ang a, i dam rei bawk ang." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “In i sak chuan chungzâwl khuaptu i siam tûr a ni; tichuan, tu emaw pawh tla palhin thi sela, a mawh i phur lo vang." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Grep huanah thei dang phun suh, i phun kawp chuan i grep rah pawh, i thil phun rah pawh Pathian tâna serh hran a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Bâwngpa leh sabengtung lei rih duntîr suh. 
Deuteronomy22:11 La leh sahmul kaih pawlh kawr ha suh. 
Deuteronomy22:12 I puan sin kil li-ah pehbuk siam ṭhîn ang che. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Miin nupui a nei a, nakin deuhvah chuan a ning ta a." 
Deuteronomy22:14 Dâwt phuahchawpin thil ṭha lo pui pui a puh a, ‘nula thianghlim a nihna pawh ka hmu lo’ tiin a timualpho va." 
Deuteronomy22:15 Chutiang thilah chuan hmeichhe nu leh pate chuan an induh zâna an âwngphah thisen kai chu nula thianghlim ngei a ni tih fiah nân khaw upate hnênah an thlen tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Hmeichhe pa chuan upate hnênah, ‘He mi hi ka fanu ka neihtîr a, a duh leh ta si lo va." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Dâwtin thil ṭha lo pui pui a puh a, ‘ka neih khân nula thianghlim a lo ni lo’ te a ti a. Kan fanu hi nula thianghlim ngei a ni tih fiah nân hei, an induh zâna an âwngphah thisen kai hi en teh u,’ a ti ang a; upaho hmaah chuan a phawrh ang." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Khaw upate chuan chu pa chu an vua ang. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Israel nula thianghlim hming a tihchhiat avângin tangkaraw tlang za an chawitîr ang a, hmeichhe pa hnênah chuan an pe ang, a nupui a ni reng ang a, a dam chhûng chuan a ma thei lo vang." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Chu pa chuan thu dik a sawi a, nula thianghlim a nihna fiahna a awm loh chuan," 
Deuteronomy22:21 a pa kawtah an hruai ang a, khuaa mite chuan lungin an dêng hlum tûr a ni. Israel mite zîngah thil tenawm tak a ti a ni, a pa ina a la awm lai, pasal a la neih hmain tlangvâl a lo nei a ni. Chutiang chuan Israel zîngah thil ṭha lo in thian fai tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Mi dang nupui mutpuitu chu a hmeichhia nên an pahnihin tihhlum tûr an ni. Chutiang chuan Israel zîngah thil ṭha lo in thian fai tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Nula thianghlim, pasal hual nei chu, khaw chhûngah miin a lo mutpui chuan,"
