Deuteronomy22:24 an pahnih chuan khaw kulh kawngka bulah in hruai ang a, lungin in dêng hlum tûr a ni; hmeichhia chu khaw chhûnga awm siin a au lo va, mipa pawh chu mi nupui hual a lo mutpui avângin den hlum tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Nula thianghlim pasal hual nei, ram hnuaiah miin lo sual sela, a mipa chauh chu den hlum tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Hmeichhe chungah chuan kutthlâk tûr a ni lo, thihna khawp eng mah thil sual a ti lo; mi pakhatin mi dang a bei a, a that ta mai ang hi a ni." 
Deuteronomy22:27 A mipa khân mi nupui hual ramhnuaiah a sual lui a, a hmeichhia chu au mah se tu mah chhan tûr an awm lo va ni." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Miin nula thianghlim, pasal hual la nei lo, sual sela," 
Deuteronomy22:29 mipa chuan hmeichhe pa hnênah nupui man pangngai tangkaraw tlang sawmnga a pe tûr a ni; a sual lui a, a nupui a ni nghâl ang. A dam chhûngin a ma thei lo vang." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Tu man, mahni pa nupuite zînga mi mutpuiin a pa chu a timualpho tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Tilmu keh emaw, zahmawh tan emaw chu Lalpa mite pung khâwm zîngah an tel ve tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Sâwn chu Lalpa mite pung khâwm zîngah an tel tûr a ni lo, a thlah, chhuan sâwmna pawh Lalpa mite pung khâwm zîngah an tel thei lo vang." 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Amon mite leh Moab mite chu Lalpa mite pung khâwm zîngah an tel tûr a ni lo; an mite chu chhuan sâwm pawh ral mah se, Lalpa mite pung khâwm zîngah an tel hauh tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Aigupta ram ata in lo chhuah khân ei tûr leh tuisik takngial pawh kengin an lo hmuak duh lo che u a; Mesopotamia ram, Pethor khaw mi Beora fapa Balaama kha ânchhe lawh tûr che uin an ruai zâwk a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Lalpa in Pathian chuan Balaama thu chu a bengkhawn duh lo va, Lalpa in Pathian hian a hmangaih êm che u avângin a ânchhia chu malsâwmnaah a chantîr ta hlauh va;" 
Deuteronomy23:6 chuvângin, eng lai mahin anni nên hian inremna siam suh ula, an hmuingîlna tûr pawh in dam chhûng chu eng mah tihsak suh u." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Edom mite chu in ten tûr a ni lo, in unaute an ni; Aigupta mi pawh in ten tûr a ni lo, an ramah an lo mikhual che u kha." 
Deuteronomy23:8 An fa chhuan thumnate chu Lalpa mite pung khâwm zîngah an tel ve thei tawh ang. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Hmêlma do tûra in thawh chhuah a, bûka in riah khâwm chuan, thil ṭha lo tinrêng lakah in inthiarfihlîm tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy23:10 In muthilh hlânin in zînga mi tu pawh, a chi tla sela, riahhmun pâwnah nilêngin a awm tûr a ni; bûkah a lo lût tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Tlaiah a inbual ang a, ni a tlâk chuan bûkah a lo lût leh thei tawh ang." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Riahhmun pâwnah daikalna tûr hmun bîk in nei tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Thil zum in keng ang a, chu chuan lei in cho khuar ang a, in vûr leh tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy23:14 “In bûkah chuan vêng tûr che u leh in hmêlmate hnehtîr tûr che uin Lalpa in Pathian chu a lo kal ve ṭhin avângin in bûk chu in vawng thianghlim tûr a ni, thil tenawm a hmuh hlauh chuan a kalsan mai ang che u." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “A pu hnên ata bawih tlân bo chu in hnêna a lo tlân luh chuan tîr kîr suh u. 
Deuteronomy23:16 In zîngah chuan awm ve sela, in khaw pakhat, a duhna berah awm ve rawh se, tinawmnah suh u." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Israel mi tu mah, mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh, Tempula nawhchizuarah an ṭang tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh, an inzawrh hlawh chu intiamkam tlâkna atân Lalpa in Pathian inah ken luh tûr a ni lo; chutiang mite chu Lalpa in Pathian tenzâwng tak an ni." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “In unau Israel-te hnênah tangka te, buh te leh thil dang rêng rêng, a pung neiin in pûktîr tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Hnam dang chu a pung i ṭhîng thei ang, in unau Israel-te erawh chu a pung in ṭhîng tûr a ni lo; tichuan, Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk tûr che u ramah in awm hunin in thil tih apiangah in hmuingîl thei ang." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “ Lalpa in Pathian hnêna pêk in tiam tawh chuan, muang lovin pe thuai rawh u. Lalpa in Pathian chuan in tiam anga in tih a phût dâwn si a; chutilo chuan, thil sual ti in lo ni mai ang." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Thil pe tûra intiam loh hi sual a ni lo," 
Deuteronomy23:23 in tiam vêk vêk si chuan in hlen ngei ngei tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Mi grep huana in kalin in duh tâwk in ei thei ang; amaherawhchu, pakhat mah in êmah in khung tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Mi buh ding lai lova in kalin an buh vui chu duh tâwk in thliak thei ang; amaherawhchu, favahin in hlep tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Miin nupui nei sela, nakin deuhvah a duh loh zâwng thil eng emaw a hmuh avângin duh leh ta lo sela, inmâkna lehkha a ziak ang a, a pe ang a, a in ata a chhuahtîr ang." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Chu hmeichhia chuan pasal dang nei leh sela," 
Deuteronomy24:3 chu mi pawh chuan duh lo leh ta se, inmâkna lehkha ziaksakin a in ata chhuahtîr ve leh sela; a nih loh leh, a pasal pahnihna chu a sûn pawh a ni thei;" 
Deuteronomy24:4 a enga pawh chu ni se, a pasal hmasa khân a nei leh tûr a ni lo; tihbawrhbânah a ngai tûr a ni; chutiang chu Lalpa tenzâwng tak a ni a, Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ramah chutiang thil ṭha lo chu in ti tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Nupui nei hlim chu indonaah a kal ve tûr a ni lo, vântlâng hnaah pawh phût tûr a ni lo; kum khat chhûng chu a nupui nên hlim takin an awm dûn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Tu man chhangphut râwtna lung emaw, a chung zâwk chauh emaw pawh, thil pûk dahkhamah hrênsak suh u, an chhûng eizawnna in lâksak tihna a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Israel miin Israel mi dang ruin bawihah chhawr sela emaw, salah emaw a hralh chuan chu mi chu tihhlum tûr a ni; chutiang chuan in zînga thil ṭha lo chu in thian fai tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Phâr natna in vei chuan Levia chi puithiamin tih tûr a tih chu ngun takin ti ula, an hnêna ka hrilh ang khân ti ang che u." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Aigupta ram aṭanga in lo chhuah kawngah Miriami chunga Lalpa in Pathian thiltih kha hre reng rawh u. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “I ṭhenawm thil i pûktîrin a dahkham tûr, a in aṭangin va la suh," 
Deuteronomy24:11 pâwnah i ding ang a, i thil pûktu chuan a dahkham tûr chu a rawn la chhuak tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Mi rethei tak a nih chuan a puan dahkham chu mut nân hmansak suh. 
Deuteronomy24:13 Ni a tlâk chuan i kîr leh tûr a ni; ama puan ngei chuan a intuam lum ang a, i chungah a lâwm bawk ang; Lalpa, in Pathian chuan thil ṭha ti-ah a lo pawmsak ang che." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Mi rethei leh pachhia chu, nangmahni chipui a ni emaw, in khaw chhûnga awm ve hnam dang a ni emaw hna thawka in chhawr chuan tinawmnah suh ang che u;" 
Deuteronomy24:15 a tlâkbal êm avângin a hlawh chu a nî la lain, ni tlâk hma ngeiin in pe tûr a ni. In laka vuiin Lalpa hnênah a thlen hlauh ang a, thil sual ti in ni mai ang." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “An fate sualna avângin pate chu tihhlum tûr a ni lo; pate sualna avângin an fate pawh tihhlum tûr a ni hek lo; mi chu ama sualna avâng chauhvin tihhlum tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy24:17 In zînga awm ve hnam dang emaw, fahrah emaw chanvo chu tihheusak suh. Hmeithai puan chu dahkhamah lâksak suh." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Aigupta ramah nangni pawh bawih in nih kha hre reng rawh u; Lalpa in Pathianin a tlan chhuak che u a nih kha; chuvângin, hêng thu hi ka pe che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Buh in sengin buhphal lâk hmaih in neih chuan vai leh tawh suh u; hnam dang te, fahrah te leh hmeithai te chan ve tûr a ni; tichuan, Lalpa in Pathian chuan in kutkawih zawng zawngah mal a sâwm ang che u." 
Deuteronomy24:20 In oliv rah, duh tâwka in sâwi ṭilh hnu chuan sawi ṭilh tum leh tawh suh u; hnam dang te, fahrah te leh hmeithai te tân khêk rawh u." 
Deuteronomy24:21 In grep rah in lawh pawhin in lawh hmaih chu vai leh tawh suh u, hnam dang te, fahrah te leh hmeithai te tân zuah rawh u." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Aigupta ramah bawih in nih kha hre reng rawh u; chuvângin, hêng thu hi ka pe che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Israel mi, thubuai nei, rorêltu hmaa an inkhin chuan, pakhat zâwk chuan thiam a chang ang a, pakhat zâwk chuan a chang lo vang." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Thiam chang lo chu vuaka hrem tûr a nih chuan rorêltu chuan a hmuh ngeiah a thil sual tih phu tâwk a vuaktîr tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy25:3 Vawi sawmli chin vuak theih a ni, a aia tam chu vuak tûr a ni lo; a aia tam in vuak chuan in unau chu in hmusit a ni." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Bâwngpa buh i chîltîr laiin a hmui chu phuar suh. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Unauza chhûng khatah awm ho sela, pakhat chu fapa nei lovin thi sela, a nupui chu an chhûngkaw zînga mi ni lo, mi dang neihtîr tûr a ni lo. A pasala unau tu emaw chuan nupuiah a nei ang a, a unau thi ta ai kha a awh ang." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Fapa an neih hmasak ber chu a unaupa thi ta fapa anga ngaih tûr a ni ang a, Israel inthlah chhâwng hming chhiarnaah te a hming chu a bo bîk tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Thi ta-a unaupain a neih duh loh chuan, khaw hotute hnênah hmeichhia chu a kal ang a, ‘Ka pasala unau hian unaupa tih tûr, a unau thi ta thlah, Israel zînga an mang loh nân chi a thlahsak duh lo,’ a ti tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Khaw upate chuan an ko ang a, an lo sawipui ang a; a la duh chuan loh chuan," 
Deuteronomy25:9 khaw hotute hmaah a pheikhawk pakhat chu hmeichhia chuan a hlihsak ang a, ‘Mahni unau chi thlahsak duh lo chu hetianga tih a ni ang’ a ti ang a, a hmaiah chil a chhâk tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy25:10 “Chu mi thlahte chu Israel zîngah, ‘Pheikhawk hlihsak chhûng’ an ti ang." 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Pa pahnih insual sela, pakhat nupui chuan a pasal chhan tumin a sualpuipa zahmawh pawhsak sela," 
Deuteronomy25:12 chu hmeichhia chu khawngaih hauh lovin a kut tansak tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Bâwmah bûklung rit deuh leh zâng deuh kawl kawp suh. 
Deuteronomy25:14 Tehna no lian deuh leh tê deuh pawh nei kawp suh. 
Deuteronomy25:15 Bûklung dik tak, tehna no dik tak in hmang tûr a ni; tichuan, Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk che u-ah hian in dam rei ang." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Chutianga thil dik lo tia mi bum chîngte chu Lalpa tenzâwng tak an ni. 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Aigupta ram aṭanga in lo chhuaha, kawnga in awm laia Amalek-ho thil tih dân kha hre reng rawh u." 
Deuteronomy25:18 Pathian ṭihna rêng an nei lovin, in kal hah lai leh in chauh lai khân hnung lam aṭangin an rawn bei che u a; in zînga chau zual, hnufual deuhte chu an thah vek kha." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Chuvângin, Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk che u-ah in hmêlmate laka râlmuang taka a awmtîr hunah che u chuan Amalek-ho hi in that fai vek tûr a ni, vân hnuaiah an sûlhnu hmuh tûr pakhat mah in zuah tûr a ni lo. Theihnghilh rêng rêng suh u." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “ Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk tûr che u in va thlen a, in hneha, awmhmun in benbel hunah," 
Deuteronomy26:2 Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk che u a thil in thar hmasak ṭhenkhat chu êmah in dah ang a, Lalpa in Pathian hming awmna tûra a hmun thlanah chuan keng ang che u." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Chuta puithiam lo awm hnênah chuan, ‘Kan pate hnêna Lalpa ram pêk tiam chu kan va luah ta tih vawiinah hian Lalpa i Pathian hmaah ka puang e,’ i ti tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Puithiam chuan êm chu a la ang a, Lalpa in Pathian maichâm hmaah chuan a hûng ang." 
Deuteronomy26:5 “ Lalpa in Pathian hnênah hetiang hian in sawi bawk tûr a ni: ‘Ka pa chu mi vâkvai, Aram mi a ni a. Aigupta ramah a chhuk a, tah chuan a awm ta a; an la tlêm hle a; mahse, chutah chuan hnam ropui tak, chak tak leh rual tak an ni ta a." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Aigupta mite chuan bawihah min siam a, min tinawmnah a, min chhawr rethei êm êm a." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Lalpa, kan pate Pathian chu kan au ta a, Lalpa chuan a lo ngaithla a, min tihretheihzia te, kan rimzia te, min tihduhdahzia te chu a hmu a." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Lalpa chuan Aigupta ram ata chu, a bân tha chak hmangin, thil mak leh chhinchhiahna râpthlâk tak tak a ti a, min hruai chhuak ta a," 
Deuteronomy26:9 khawizu leh hnutetui luanna ram hi min pe ta a. 
Deuteronomy26:10 Aw Lalpa i ram min pêka thar hmasa ber chu, hei, ka rawn kensak a che,’ i ti ang a; Lalpa i Pathian hmaah chuan i dah ang a, a hmaah chuan i kûn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Lalpa, in Pathianin thil ṭha, nang leh i chhûngte a pêk avângin lâwmthu sawi la, in zînga awm leh Levia chiten lâwm takin in zâr zo rawh se." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “A kum thumnaah in thlai thar sâwma pakhat chu, in zînga awm Levia chi te, hnam dang te, fahrah te leh hmeithai te pe ang che u; tichuan, khaw tinah ei tûr an nei ṭheuh dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Chutia in tih hnu chuan, ‘Thil serh, sâwma pakhat chu, ka inah tûnah pakhat mah ka kawl tawh lo; thu min pêk angin Levia chi te, hnam dang te, fahrah te, hmeithai te hnênah ka pe tawh a ni; sâwma pakhat pêk chungchânga i thupêk zawng zawng zawm loh rêng ka nei lo va, theihnghilh ka nei hek lo." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Lusûn laiin pakhat mah ka ei lo va, mitthi chaw atân pakhat mah ka hlân hek lo; aw Lalpa, i thu ka awih a, sâwma pakhat pêk chungchânga i thupêk zawng zawng chu ka ti ta vek a ni." 
Deuteronomy26:15 I vân hmun thianghlim aṭang chuan han thlîr thla la, i mi Israel-te hi mal han sâwm ang che. Min thlahtute hnêna pêk i tiam tawh ram, khawizu leh hnutetui luanna ram hi malsâwm ang che,’ in ti tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Vawiin hian Lalpa in Pathian chuan hêng thuruatte leh awm dân tûrte hi zâwm tûrin a tih che u hi. Rilru zawng zawngin, tihtakzetin zâwm rawh u." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Vawiin hian Lalpa chu Pathianah in pawm ta a, a thuruat te, a thupêk leh awm dân tûr a tih te chu zâwma tih in tiam a." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Vawiin hian Lalpa chuan a tiam angin a mi atân a pawm ta tak tak che u a ni. 
Deuteronomy26:19 A siam, hnam dang zawng zawng aiin a tiropui che uin, fak in hlawh ang a, in hming a thang bawk ang a, miin an chawimawi ang che u, a tiam ang ngeiin Lalpa in Pathian tân hnam thianghlim in ni ang” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Mosia chuan Israel upate nên mite hnênah, “Vawiina thupêk ka hrilh zawng zawng che u hi zâwm vek ang che u." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Jordan lui in kân a, Lalpa, in Pathianin ram a pêk che u in va luh hunahin chuan lung hlai tak tak phun ang che u; chinaiin zût mâm ula;" 
Deuteronomy27:3 tah chuan, hêng Dân zawng zawng hi ziak ang che u. Lalpa in Pathianin pêk a tiam che u, khawizu leh hnutetui luanna ram chu in luh a," 
Deuteronomy27:4 Jordan thlang lam rala in awm hunah vawiina ka hrilh che u ang hian Ebal tlângah lung pathum phun ula, chinaiin zût mâm ang che u." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Thîra chher loh lungin maichâm siam ang che u. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Lalpa in Pathian tâna maichâm in siam rêng rêngin lung chher loh hman tûr a ni; chutah ngei chuan hâlral thilhlan chu in hâl tûr a ni," 
Deuteronomy27:7 Remna thilhlan pawh chutah chuan in hlân ang a, in ei tûr a ni, Lalpa hmaah chuan hlim takin awm ang che u." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Lungphunah chuan hêng Dân thute hi in ziak tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Mosia chuan Levia thlah puithiamte nên Israel mi zawng zawng hnênah, “Aw, Israel-te u, in beng chhi ula, ka thu hi ngaithla teh u. Vawiin hian in Pathian, Lalpa mite in nih tâk hi." 
Deuteronomy27:10 A thu awih ula, a thuruat, vawiina ka hrilh zawng zawng che u hi zâwm rawh u,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Mosia chuan Israel-te chu thu a pe a: 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Jordan lui kai hnuah chuan mipuite malsâwm tûrin hêng hnam - Simeon-ho te, Levia chi te, Juda-ho te, Isakar-ho te leh Benjamin-ho te hi Gerizim tlângah an ding ang a;" 
Deuteronomy27:13 ânchhia puang chhuak tûrin hêng hnam: Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Aser-ho te, Zebulun-ho te, Dan-ho leh Naftali-ho te hi Ebal tlângah an ding tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Hêng thu hi Levia chite chuan ring takin an sawi tûr a ni: 
Deuteronomy27:15 ‘Themthiam kut chhuak Lalpa tenzâwng milem chher chawp emaw, chhûn chawp emaw kawl ru a, chibai bûktu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawngin, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:16 ‘A nu emaw, a pa emaw, zah lo chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:17 ‘Ṭhenawmte ramri lung sawntu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:18 ‘Kawng ni lova mitdel kaltîrtu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:19 ‘Hnam dang te, fahrah te leh hmeithai te laka hleih neih chîng chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:20 ‘Mahni pa nupuite zînga mi lo mutpui a, pate timualphotu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a. Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:21 ‘Ran pâwltu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:22 ‘Nu hrang emaw, pa hrang emaw pawh ni se, mahni farnu sualtu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:23 ‘Mahni pizawn mutpuitu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:24 ‘A rûka tualthattu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:25 ‘Pawi khawih lo that tûra thamna latu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy27:26 ‘Hêng Dânte hi pawm ṭha duh lova, zâwm duh lotu chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ an ti ang a, Mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen’ tiin an lo chhâng ang." 
Deuteronomy28:1 “ Lalpa in Pathian thu hi in awih a, a thupêk vawiina ka hrilh zawng zawng che u hi in zawm thlap chuan khawvêla hnam dang zawng zawng aia ropuiin a siam ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Lalpa, in Pathian thu chu awih phawt ula, hêng malsâwmna zawng zawng hi in dawng ang a, in dawng zui zêl ang." 
Deuteronomy28:3 In lam leh ram lamah Pathianin mal a sâwm ang che u. 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Fanau malsâwmna in dawng ang a, in buhbâl a tihlâwk ang a, in ran vulhte a tihhmuingîlsak ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Pathianin in êm te, in chawthlêng te mal a sâwm ang." 
Deuteronomy28:6 “In thiltih apiangah a tihmuingîl ang che u. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “In hmêlmate nêna in inbeihin Lalpa chuan a hnehtîr ang che u; a huhovin rawn bei che u mah sela, kil tinah an tlânchhia ang a, an darh vek ang." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “ Lalpa in Pathian chuan in hnathawh apiang mal a sâwm ang a, in buh inte a tikhat ang a, Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk che u chu a tihhlâwksak ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “ Lalpa in Pathian thu hi in awih a, a thupêkte in zawm takzet chuan a tiam angin ama pual, a mi thianghlim atân a tinghet ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Khawvêla mi zawng zawngin Lalpa mi thlante in ni tih an hria ang a, an hlau ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:11 In pate hnêna pêk a tiam ramah Lalpa chuan fa te, ran rual te, buhbâl te a neihtîr ṭeuh ṭeuh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Lalpa chuan a robâwm ata a hun takah ruah a rawn sûrtîr ang a, in thiltih mal a sâwm ang a, hnam tinrêng in thil neih in pûktîr ang a; an thil erawh chu in pûk a ngai ve lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Lalpa in Pathian chuan hnam dangte zuitu ni lovin, an hruaituah a siam ang che u; a thupêk vawiina ka pêk che u hi rinawm taka in zawm phawt chuan in lo hmuingîl ang a, in hlawhchham ngai lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Engti kawng mahin in bawhchhe tûr a ni lo va, pathian dangte biain an rawng in bâwl tûr a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “ Lalpa in Pathian thu in awih lohva, a thupêkte leh a thuruatte vawiina ka hrilh che u hi in zawm duh lohva, in tih duh hek loh chuan hêng thil ṭha lo hi in chungah a thleng ang:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 “In lam leh ram lamah chhiatna in tâwk ang. 
Deuteronomy28:17 “ Lalpa chuan in êm leh in chawthlêng a leihbuaksak ang che u. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “ Lalpa chuan ânchhia a lawh ang chia, fa thu-ah te, buhbâl thu-ah te, ran vulh thu-ah te in hmuingîl lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “In thiltih apiangah in hlawhchham ang. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Thil in tihsual a Lalpa in kalsan chuan ânchhia in dawng ang a, in hnathawh rêng rêngah in hmuingîl lo vang a, in buaiin in beidawng ang a, rang takin in chhe vek ang." 
Deuteronomy28:21 “In ram neih tûrah chuan vânduaina hlîrin a tlâkbuak ang che u a, dam khawchhuak tu mah in awm lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Lalpa chuan hri a veitîr ang che u a, khawsikpui te in vei ang a, in vûng bawk ang. Khua a tikhêng ang a, in thlai te a tiro bawk ang a, in thi mai ang." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ruah rêng a sûr lo vang a, in lote chu thîr angin a châr ang." 
Deuteronomy28:24 In lovah lei dip leh vaivut a sûrtîr ang a, a rawn tichhe vek ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “ Lalpa chuan in hmêlmate chu hnehtu zâwkah a ṭantîr ang a, a huhovin bei mah ula, kil tinah in tlânchhia ang a, in darh vek ang. Khawvêla mi zawng zawngin in chunga thil thleng chu râpthlâk an ti ang." 
Deuteronomy28:26 In thih hunah in sa chu sava leh ramsaten an rawn tlân ang a, tu mah lo hnawttu an awm lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Aigupta-ho vei ang dam thei lo khawihli te, ngâwt te, pânchhia te, uithak te Lalpa chuan a veitîr ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Lalpa chuan a ti-â ang che u a, in mit a tidel ang a, a timangang hle ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Mitdel angin chhûn êngah pawh in dap dun dun ang; in thil tih rêng rêngah in hmuingîl lo vang a, an tirethei hle ang che u, an tichêp hle ang che u; an rawk fo ang che u a, chhantu rêng in nei lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Nupui in hual ang a, mi dangin an nei hlauh vang; in in sa ang a, in luah lo vang; grep huan in siam ang a, a rah in ei lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:31 In bâwngpa chu an talh ang a, a sa pawh in ei ve lo vang; in hmuh lai ngeiin in sabengtung chu an lâksak ang che u, tu man an chhan lo vang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:32 In fanu in fapate chu in hmuh lai ngeiin hnam dang bawihah an pe ang a; ni tin anmahni ngaiin in thlîr ang a, in mit a vai zo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Hah taka in thlawh chhuah chu in hriat ngai loh hnam dangin an rawn lâksak ang che u; a manah tihduhdah leh chêksawlh mai lo chu eng mah in têl lo vang. 
Deuteronomy28:34 In thil hmuhte chu in ât phah ang. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Lalpa chuan in ke-ah pân dam thei lo a veitîr ang che u a, kephah aṭanga in chhîp thlengin khawihli in vei ang." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “ Lalpa chuan in lalte nên, hnam dang ram, in pi pute la awm ngai lohna ramah chuan salah a hruai ang che u; chûng ramah chuan thing leh lunga siam pathiante in bia ang." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Lalpa tihdarhna che u ramah chuan a hmu apiang che u chuan in chunga thil thleng chu mak an ti ang a, an hmusit ang che u a, nuihza siam nân an hmang ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Thlai chi in chîng ṭeuh ang a, tlêm tê chauh in seng si ang; khauvin a ei zawhsak ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Grep huan in siam duai ang a, ngun takin in enkawl ang a; mahse, a rah lawh tûr emaw, uain in tûr emaw in hmu lo vang a, a ngêt zo vek ang." 
Deuteronomy28:40 In ram pumah oliv thing awm chûk mah se, a hriak thih tûr pawh in nei lo vang, a hlamtla zo vek ang." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Fanu fapa in ngah hle ang a, an tha in chhawr si lo vang, salah an awm vek ang." 
Deuteronomy28:42 In thei kûng leh thlai dangte chu khauvin a ei kawlh vek ang. 
Deuteronomy28:43 “In zînga hnam dang awm vete chu an lal tual tual ang a, nangni chan erawh chu a chau tial tial ang." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Tangka an pûktîr ang che u a, nangni chuan pûktîr tûr tangka in nei ve lo vang. A tâwpah chuan in pute an la ni ang." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “ Lalpa in Pathian thu in awih lohva, a thupêk leh a thuruat an hrilh che u kha in zawm lohva, in tih duh loh chuan hêng thil ṭha lo zawng zawng hian a tlâkbuak ang che u, in tuar zêl ang." 
Deuteronomy28:46 In chungah leh in fate chungah Pathian a lungawi lo tih in hriat theih nân chhinchhiahna a ni ang; 
Deuteronomy28:47 malsâwmna tinrêngin a vûr che u a, hlim leh lâwm taka Lalpa, in Pathian rawng chu bâwl tûr in ni asin." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Rilṭâm leh tuihâlin, saruak leh engkim tlachhamin Lalpa tirh, in hmêlmate rawng chu in bâwl ang a, in chauh dêr thlengin in nghâwngah thîr nghâwngkawl an bahtîr ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:49 “An ṭawng pawh in hriat ngai loh mi râwng pui pui, kâwlkil aṭangin Lalpa chuan a rawn beihtîr ang che u, mu angin an lo bir thut ang." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Naupang pawh, tar pawh, tu mah rêng an khawngaih lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:51 In ran te, in thlaite an ei zo vang a, rilṭâmin in thi ang; in buh te, in uain te, in oliv hriak te, in ran te an zuah lo vang; rilṭâmin in thi ang." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk tûr che u rama in chênna khua zawng zawng an bei ang a, in kulh sâng tak tak, nghet in tih êm êmte chu an tichim vek ang." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “In hmêlmaten in kulhte an hual hunah chuan in ril a ṭâm khawp ang a, Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u in fate sa in ei ang." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Mi ṭha leh mi neinung ber ṭhîn, eng mah ren nei ngai lo chuan a unaupa emaw, a nupui pawm lai ngei emaw, a fa la dam chhunte emaw pawh ei tûr pe phal lovin a rûkin a ei duh ang a;" 
Deuteronomy28:55 hmêlmaten in khua an hual rei êm avângin ei tûr a nei lo mangangin a fate sa ngei a ei ang a, mi dang a pe ve phal lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Hausanu, lei pawh rap ngai lo, ngilnei tak tak ṭhînte pawhin an pasalte, an fanu leh fapate hriat lohvin a rûkin an ei ang." 
Deuteronomy28:57 Hmêlmaten an hual rei êm avângin eng mah ei tûr a awm tawh lo vang a, an rilṭâm mangangin an nau hrin leh an chhûl chu a rûkin an ei ang." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “He lehkhabua ziak Dân thu chuang zawng zawng hi ṭha taka in zawm lohva, in tih duh lohva, Lalpa hming ropui tak leh hlauhawm tak hi in chawimawi duh loh chuan," 
Deuteronomy28:59 in thlahte nên tihdam theih loh hri a veitîr ang che u a, in pûl puk puk ang." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Aigupta rama an vei ang hri hlauhawm tak tak in hmuh kha a veitîr ang che u a, in dam khawchhuak tawh lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:61 He Dân lehkhabua chuang tel lo, natna chi hrang hrang Lalpa chuan a veitîr bawk ang che u." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Lalpa, in Pathian thu in zawm loh chuan vâna arsi zâtin tam mah ula, dam chhuak in awm pheuh pheuh lek ang." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Lalpa chuan thil ṭha tihsak che u leh tihpunsak che u a châk ṭhîn; chutiang bawkin tihchhiata tihhlum che u a châk dâwn a ni. In luah tûr ram aṭang hian a la chhuak dâwn a che u. 
Deuteronomy28:64 “ Lalpa chuan khawvêl pum puiah, hnam tin zîngah a tidarh ang che u; chûngah chuan thinga siam leh lunga siam pathiante chibai in bûk ang a, in pi pute pawhin an biak ngai lohte chu in be dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Khawiah mah râlmuang taka awm hle hle theihna hmun in nei lo vang. Lalpa chuan a tithlaphâng reng ang che u a, in beidawngin in beisei a bo hial ang." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Thih hlau rêng rêngin in awm ang a, a chhun a zânin thlabâr takin in awm ang a, in dam khawchhuak dâwn nge dâwn lo pawh in hre lo vang." 
Deuteronomy28:67 In thil hlauh leh in mita hlauhawm in hmuhte avâng chuan zîngah, ‘Tlai ni tawh se,’ in ti ang a, zânah chuan, ‘Khua vâr tawh mai se,’ in ti ang." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Lalpa chuan Aigupta ramah lawngin a tawlh thla ang che u; in chhuk leh tawh lo vang, ka ti na a; mahse, in chhuk ang a, in hmêlmate lei tûrin bawihpa emaw, bawihnu atân emaw in inzuar ang a; mahse, tu man an lei duh lo vang che u.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah Israel-te nên Moab ramah hetianga thu thlung tûr hian a hrilh a; Horeb tlânga a thuthlung belhchhahna a ni. 
Deuteronomy29:2 Mosia chuan Israel mi zawng zawng chu pung khâwm tûrin a hrilh a, an hnênah, “In mit ngeiin Aigupta lal Farawa leh a ṭhuihruaite leh an ram chhûnga Lalpa thiltih kha in hmu a." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Hri hlauhawm pui pui te, thil mak tak takte leh thil ropui tak tak a tihte kha in hmu a." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Vawiin thlengin in thil hmuhte kha a ngaihna in hre lo va, a awmzia tak in la hre hek lo." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Kum sawmli chhûng Lalpa chuan thlalêrah a vahvaihtîr che u a; mahse, in kawrte leh in pheikhawkte chu a hlui chuang lo va." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Chaw pângngai ei tûr nei lovin, uain leh zu in tûr pawh in nei lo va; mahse, Lalpa chuan ei tûr a tumsak che u a ni; Lalpa hi in Pathian chu a ni tih in zir theih nân." 
Deuteronomy29:7 He hmun in lo thlen khân Hesbon lal Sihona leh Basan lal Oga chuan min lo bei a, kan hneh a;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 an ram pawh kan neihsak a; Reubena thlah te, Gada thlah te leh Manasea thlah zatve te chu an chanpualah kan pe a." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Chuvângin, he thuthlung thute hi zâwm ula, in thil tih apianga in hmuingîl theih nân ti rawh u." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Vawiin hian Lalpa in Pathian hmaah in hruaitu te, in hotu te, in mipa te," 
Deuteronomy29:11 in hmeichhia te, in fa te, in zînga awm ve hnam dang te, thing phura tuichawisaktu che u te nên in vaiin in ding a nih hi." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Vawiin hian Lalpa in Pathian chuan thu a thlunpui dâwn che u a ni; 
Deuteronomy29:13 tichuan, Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te hnêna thu a tiam angin a mite atân a tinghet ang che u a, in Pathian a ni bawk ang." 
Deuteronomy29:14 “Nangni nên chauh he thuthlung hi a siam a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy29:15 Vawiina heta dingte tân mai ni lovin kan thlah lo la piang tûrte tân pawh he thuthlung hi a siam a ni. 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Aigupta rama kan awm laia kan nun dân kha in hria e, kan lo chhuah kawnga hnam dang lo awmte khawsak dân te in hria," 
Deuteronomy29:17 thingtum te, lungtum te, tangkarua leh rangkachaka siam milem tenawm tak tak te an bia a," 
Deuteronomy29:18 mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh, chhûngkua emaw, hnam pum emaw pawhin, Lalpa kan Pathian hawisanin hêng hnam dang pathiante hi in be hlauh dah ang e, thil zung chawr, tûr kha tak paia ṭhang lian ta ang hi a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy29:19 “Vawiina thu urhsûn tak tak kan ngaihthlâk hi kan zînga ngaithla vetu tu mahin, ‘Luhlul taka mahni duh ang anga awm pawh a pawi lo a nih chu,’ ti rilru suh se; chumi avâng chuan mi sual emaw, mi ṭha emaw in boral vek mai ang." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Chutiang mi chu Lalpan a ngaidam lo vang, a chungah Lalpa thinur chu a alh zâwk ang. He lehkhabua ziak thil ṭha lo zawng zawngte hian a tlâkbuak ang a, Lalpa chuan a tiboral vek ang." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Lalpa Dân bu thuthlung ziaknaa ânchhe dawn tûr chuang zawng zawng chhiatna chu a chungah a thlentîr ang. 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Rei fe hnuah chuan, in thlahte leh hnam dangte, ram hla tak taka awmte chuan in rama chhiatna leh tuarna; Lalpa thlentîr chu an hmu ang a;" 
Deuteronomy29:23 in lote chu ram ṭiau, kât leh chi tamna ram a ni ang a, eng mah phun theih a ni lo vang, hnim takngial pawh a ṭo thei lo vang. In ram chu Sodom leh Gomora te, Adma leh Zeboim te, Lalpan thinur taka a tihchhiat tak khuate ang kha a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Khawvêla mi zawng zawngin, ‘ Lalpa hian engtiziaa he ram hi heti taka sawisa nge maw a nih le? Eng nge chuti taka a thinur chhan?’ an ti huai huai ang." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Hetiang hian an chhâng ang: ‘An thlahtute Pathian chuan Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuah lai khân thuthlung a siampui a, Lalpa mite chuan chu chu an bawhchhia a;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 tûn hmaa an biak ngai loh hnam dang pathian, Lalpan biak a khapte chu an be ta a;" 
Deuteronomy29:27 chuvângin, Lalpa chu a mite chungah a thinur a, he lehkhabua chhiatna ziak zawng zawngte hi an ramah a thlentîr ta a ni," 
Deuteronomy29:28 Lalpa chuan a thinur êm avângin a hnawt chhuak a, hnam dang ramah an awm ta daih a ni,’ an ti ang." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Lalpa kan Pathian hian thurûk ṭhenkhat chu a puang lo; amaherawhchu, a Dân chu a rawn puang a, kan thlahte nên chu chu kan zâwm tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Malsâwmna dawn nge in duh ânchhia, in thlan tûr ka siamsak che u a ni. Lalpa chuan in chungah hêng thil ṭha lote hi a thlentîr a, a hnawhchhuahna che u hnam dang rama in awm hunah duh thlang thei in nih kha hre reng ang che u." 
Deuteronomy30:2 In thlahte nên Lalpa lam in lo hawi leh a, vawiina ka hrilh che u, a thupêkte hi tihtakzeta in awih chuan," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Lalpa in Pathian chuan in chungah ngil a nei leh ang a, hnam hrang hrang zînga a tihdarhna che u ram aṭangin a rawn hruai kîr leh ang che u a, a tihmuingîl leh ang che u." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Khawvêl ram hla berah kal daih mah ula, Lalpa in Pathian chuan a hruai khâwm leh ang che u a, a rawn hruai kîr leh ang che u;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 tichuan, in pi leh pute awmna ṭhin ram chu in nei leh ang a, in thlahtute ai khân in tam zâwk ang a, in neinung zâwk bawk ang." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Lalpa in Pathian chuan in thlahte nên thu awih theihna thinlung a pe ang che u a; tichuan, ani chu tihtakzetin in hmangaih ang a, chu ramah chuan in awm reng thei dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Hêng ânchhia zawng zawng hi in hmêlma, nangmahni hawtu leh tiduhdahtute hi a dawntîr ang a;" 
Deuteronomy30:8 a thu in awih tawh ang a, vawiina a thupêk ka hrilh zawng zawng che u hi in zâwm tawh bawk ang." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Lalpa chuan in thiltih apiangah a tihmuingîl ang che u a, fate in ngah ang a, in ran vulhte nasa takin a pung ang; in lote chu a hlâwk êm êm ang. In pi leh pute tihhmuingîl a châk ang bawk khân nangni pawh tihhmuingîl che u a châk ang." 
Deuteronomy30:10 A thu erawh chu in zâwm thlap tûr a ni a, a Dân bu-a chuang thuruat leh thupêk zawng zawng chu in awih vek tûr a ni a, tihtak meuhvin a lam in hawi bawk tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Vawiina thu ka pêk che u hi in tân zawm har lutuk a ni lo va, hriat phâk loh tûr a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy30:12 ‘A thu kan hriat a kan zawm tûrin tu nge vânah han lâwn ang a min rawn lâksak ang?’ tih tûrin vâna awm daih a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy30:13 ‘Kan hriata kan zawm tûrin tu nge tuifinriat râlah kal ang a min rawn lâksak ang?’ tih tûra tuifinriat râl daiha awm a ni hek lo. 
Deuteronomy30:14 Thu chu hetah, i bula hi a awm reng alâwm, i hriat fo tawh, sawi pawh i sawi fo ṭhin kha a ni a, zâwm mai rawh." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Vawiin hian eng nge in thlan duh, thil ṭha nge thil ṭha lo, nun nge thih, thlang rawh u." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Lalpa in Pathian thupêk vawiina ka hrilh che u hi in awih a, ani chu in hmangaih a, a thu in ngaihthlâk a, a dânte in zawm chuan in hmuingîl ang a, hnam ropui tak in ni ang." 
Deuteronomy30:17 A thu in awih lohva, in ngaihthlâk duh lohva, pathian dangte in biak phawt chuan," 
Deuteronomy30:18 chiang takin ka hrilh a che u: in boral ngei ang; Jordan râl, in luah tûr ramah chuan in dam rei lo vang." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Vawiinah hian nunna nge in duh thihna, Pathian malsâwm dawn nge in duh ânchhia, a eng zâwk nge in thlan, hretuah lei leh vân ka sâwm e. Nangmahni leh in thlahte in dam zêl theih nân nunna thlang rawh u." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Lalpa in Pathian chu hmangaih ula, a thu awih ula, amah chu vuan tlat rawh u; tichuan, in thlahtu Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te hnêna pêk a tiam ramah chuan in thlahte nên in dam rei dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Mosia chuan Israel mite hnênah thu a sawi zêl a," 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Kum za leh sawmhniha upa ka ni ta a, duh duha chhuakvâk thei pawh ka ni ta lo; Lalpa chuan ‘Jordan lui i kân ve dâwn lo,’ min ti si a." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Lalpa in Pathian chuan in hma a hruai zêl dâwn a, chûnga hnam awmte chu a tihboralsak ang che u; in luahlân dâwn a ni; Lalpa sawi tawh angin Josua hian a ho ang che u." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Lalpa chuan Amor-ho lal Sihona te, Oga te leh an ram te a tichhia a, an mite a tihhlum vek ang khân anni pawh a tiboral ve ang." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Lalpa chuan anni chu a pe ang che u, thu ka pêk che u ang tak hian in tiboral tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Intipaukhauh ula, ṭang sauh sauh rawh u; hlau suh ula, zâm hek suh u; anni chu huphurh hek suh u; amah Lalpa, in Pathian ngei chuan a kalpui zêl ang che u a, a thlahthlamin a kalsan hek lo vang che u,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Josua chu Mosian a ko va, Israel mi zawng zawng hriatah, “Intipaukhauh la, ṭang nasa rawh, an pate hnêna pêk Lalpa tiam ramah chuan Israel mite hi i hruai lût ang a, i luahtîr tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Amah ngei, Lalpa chuan a kalpui dâwn che u a, a awmpui zêl ang che u; a thlahthlam lo vang che u a, a kalsan bawk hek lo vang che u, hlau suh ula, zâm hek suh u,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Mosia chuan he Pathian Dân hi lehkhabu-ah a ziak a, Levia chi, Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntu puithiamte chu a pe a, Israel upate pawh a pe a," 
Deuteronomy31:10 Mosia chuan an hnênah, “Kum sarihna tâwp, leiba ngaihdamna hun ruat apiangah Bâwkte kût laiin," 
Deuteronomy31:11 Israel-ho chu Lalpa in Pathian hmun ruatah a hmaah an rawn inlan tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy31:12 Mipui khâwm ula, Lalpa, in Pathian ṭih nachâng an hriat a, ka dân bu-a thu chuang zawng zawng hi an zawm theih nân paho te, nuho te, naupang te leh hnam dang in khuaa awm te chuan ngaithla rawh se." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Chutiang chuan Lalpa in Pathian dân la hre ve lo, in thlahte pawhin an hre ve ang a, Jordan lui kâna in luah tûr rama in awm chhûng zawng chu Lalpa in Pathian ṭih nachâng an hre ve dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “I dam rei dâwn tawh lo; Josua ko la, Inbiakna bûkah rawn hruai rawh, a tih tûr ka lo hrilh ang e,” a ti a. Mosia leh Josua chu Inbiakna bûkah chuan an kal a, an va inlan a." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Lalpa chu Inbiakna bûkah chuan chhûm dingin a lo lang a, bûk kawngkaah chuan chhûm chu a ding luah a." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ngai teh, i pi leh pu hnênah i mu ve thuai dâwn ta; hêng mite hian i thih hnu chuan min uiresan ang a, thu ka thlunpuite kha an bawhchhia ang a, min kalsan ang a; an va chênna tûra lo awm hnam dangte pathian chu min biaksan ang." 
Deuteronomy31:17 An chungah ka thin a rim ang a, ka kalsan ang a, an chhe vek ang. Thil ṭha lo pui puiin a tlâkbuak ang a; kei an Pathianin ka awmpui tawh loh avângin hêng thil hi an tuar a ni tih an hria ang." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Thil ṭha lo tak an ti a, Pathian dang an biak tâk avângin an lakah ka hmêl ka thup daih dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Chuvângin, he hla hi ziak chhuak la, Israel mite chu zirtîr rawh; an chunga ka lungnih lohzia an hriatna tûr a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy31:20 An thlahtute hnêna pêk ka tiam, khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ram chu ka hruai thleng ngei ang. Amaherawhchu, duh tâwk tâwk ei tûr an neia an thau mûm tul hunah chuan, pathian dangte lam an hawiin chibai an bûk ang a; min hmusitin ka thuthlungte chu an bawhchhia ang." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Thil râpthlâk tak takin a tlâkbuak hnuah pawh he hla hi an fate pawhin an la chham thei zêl ang a, chu chuan an sualzia a hriattîr ang. Pêk ka tiam ka hruai thlen hma pawh hian, an rilru put dân chu ka hre reng alâwm,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Chumi ni ngei chuan Mosia chuan hla chu a ziak chhuak a, Israel-te chu a zirtîr ta tlut tlut a." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Lalpa chuan Nuna fapa Josua hnênah, “Intipaukhauh la, ṭang nasa rawh, Israel mite hi pêk ka tiam ramah chuan hruai ang che, ka awmpui zêl nâng che,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Mosia chuan Pathian Dân chu lehkhabu-ah kimchang takin a ziak a. 
Deuteronomy31:25 A ziak zawh chuan Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntu Levia chite chu a pe a. 
Deuteronomy31:26 “He Dân bu hi la ula, Lalpa in Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm bulah dah rawh u, in awm dân tehna-ah a ṭang dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy31:27 In tihmawhzia leh in luhlulzia ka hria, kei ka la dam lai ngei pawhin Lalpa lakah in nuar a, ka thih hnu phei chuan eng ang takin awm ang che u maw." 
Deuteronomy31:28 In upate leh in hruaitute chu lo pung khâwm sela, hêng hi ka lo hrilh ang e; lei leh vân ka thuhretu atân ka koh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ka thih hnu chuan in che khawlo hle ang a, ka thu zirtîr che u kha in zâwm duh lo vang. Nakin deuhvah phei chuan Lalpa khap chu in ti lui ang a, a thin in tiur ang a, in boral mai ang,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Mosia chuan he hla hi a sawi chhuak a, Israel mi zawng zawng chuan an ngaithla ṭhuap a." 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Vânte u, ka thu hi bengkhawn ula, leilung pawh hian ka thu hi ngaithla rawh se." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ka zirtîrna hi ruah angin a sûr ang a, ka thu hi dai angin a tla ang. Hlobet chunga ruah si tla, thlai chawrno nan seng seng ang hian." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Lalpa hming chu ka puang ang a, Kan Pathian chu chawimawi rawh u." 
Deuteronomy32:4 Engkim ṭha taka titu, Lungpui a ni, Dik takin ro a rêl ṭhîn, Pathian rinawm, khawlohna nei lo, Thil ṭha leh dik ti ṭhîntu a ni." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Khawlohna a nei em ni? Nei suh e, A fate a ni demawm chu, Chhuan bengtla lo leh tihmawhte chu." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Mi â leh mi chhâwte u, hetiang hian em ni Lalpa in thungrulh dâwn? A hringtu che u, in pa a ni, a siam che u a, a tipuitling che u a ni." 
Deuteronomy32:7 Tûn hma kha ngaihtuah chhuak teh u, Hun liam daih tawhte kha, Eng thil nge thleng in pate zâwt ula, Hmânlai lal chanchin in upate sawitîr teh u." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Chungnungberan hnamte ram a sem a, Mite awmna tûr a ruatsak lai khân, Pathian fate zâtin an ramri a khamsak a." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Lalpa chuan a chanpual atân Jakoba thlahte a thlang a ni. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Thlalêra an vâkvai a hmu a, Ram ṭiau, thlichhe tlehnaah chuan A hliahkhuh a, a duat hle a, A mitnautê angin a vêng;" 
Deuteronomy32:11 Mupuiin a bu a thai darh a, A note vilin a thlâwk vut vut a; A thla zârin a dâwm a dâwm a, A thlawhpui ṭhîn ang hian." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Lalpa chauh chu an hruaitu a ni a, Hnam dang pathian an tel ve lo." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Tlângramah a chuanchhuahtîr a, Rama thil ṭote chu an ei a, Lung kârah khawizu an la a, Lung hmunah pawh an oliv a rah tiar tuar." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Hnutetui an ngah, an bâwngte leh kêlte nên; An berâmte lah an thau, Basan ram berâm leh kêlchal ang, Buh tui ber leh uain ṭha ber an nei." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Israel-te chu an lo hausa a, An induh ta hle a, An thau mûm tûl a, Siamtu, an Pathian chu an kalsan a, Chhandamtu, an Lungpui chu an ngainêp." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Milem an bia chu a haw êm êm a, Thil tenawm an tihte chuan a tithinur." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Pathian ni lo, ramhuai an bia a, An pate hriat ngai loh leh hlauh ngai loh An be ta, pathian tharlâm tê tê chu." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Anmahni hringtu Lungpui chu an pawisa lo va, Anmahni siamtu Pathian chu an kalsan ta." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Lalpa chuan a hmuhin a thin a ur a, A fanaute chu a hnâwl ta." 
Deuteronomy32:20 ‘Ka bîkbosan ang a, Engtin nge an awm dâwn ka thlîr teh ang, Chhuan tihmawh tak leh Fa sual rin tlâk loh tak an ni." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Pathian ni hlei lo an bia, Ka thîkthu an chawk tho va, An milemte chuan min tithinur. Chî anî-a chhiar tham lohte ka thîktîr ang, Hnam â takte hmangin ka tithinur bawk ang." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ka thinur chu mei angin a alh ang a, Leia thil zawng zawng a kâng ral ang. Seol pawh a kâng thleng ang a, Tlâng nghahchhante a kâng ral ang." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Chhiatna tinrêng an chungah ka thlentîr ang a, Thalin ka kâp ang." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Rilṭâm khawsikin an thi ang a, Hri râpthlâk tak tak an vei ang. Ram sakawlhten an seh ang a, Vaivuta tleng rûl tûr neiten an chu ang." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Tuallaiah khandaih an tawng ang a, In chhûngah thil râpthlâk tak tak nên, Nula tlangvâl, ṭhalai an that ang a, Naupang pawh, tar pawh an zuah lo vang." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Tu ma hriat tawh loh tûrin Tihmang dêr ka tum hial a. 
Deuteronomy32:27 Mahse, an hmêlmaten uangthuang takin, ‘A mite chu kan sawisa nek,’ an tih ka hlau a ni." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Hnam â tak zawng an lo ni, Thil rêng an hrethiam lo." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Fing deuh se chu an hrethiam tûr An awm dân tûr an thlîr thiam ang a. 
Deuteronomy32:30 An Lungpui chuan kalsan lo se, An Pathian, Lalpa chuan thlauhthla lovin, Pakhatin sâng têl a ûm dâwn em ni? Pahnih lekin sîng têl an ngam ang maw?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 An hmêlmate pawhin an pathian chu Israel-te Pathian ai chuan a nêp zâwk tih an hria. 
Deuteronomy32:32 An hmêlmate chu Sodom leh Gomora anga sual, Grep kha, tûr nei ang hi an ni." 
Deuteronomy32:33 An uain pawh chu rûl tûr ang, Rûl chuk anga hlauhawm a ni." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Lalpa chuan an hmêlmate thil tih chu a hre reng a, Phuba lâk hun remchâng a zawng." 
Deuteronomy32:35 An ke rah chu a tleu hunah, Phuba ka la ang a, ka thungrûl ang, An chhiat hun chu a lo hnai ta; An chunga lo thleng tûr chu an tuar thuai ang." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Lalpa chuan a mite a chhan ang a, A chhiahhlawhte chan chauhzia te, Bawih leh bawih lo te pawh; Thi bâng tlêmzia a hmuhin a lainat ang a, A chhan chhuak ang." 
Deuteronomy32:37 A mite chu, ‘In pathian thiltithei, In rin ṭhinte chu khawiah nge?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 In thilhlante chuan in châwm a, Uain in tûr nên lam in chhawpsak kha? Lo kal sela, chhan che u rawh se, Lo tlân sela, hum che u rawh se,’" 
Deuteronomy32:39 Keimah chauh hi Pathian chu ka ni. An awm tak tak lo, pathian dang zawng, Ka tihlum a, ka tinung a, Ka hliam a, ka tidam a, Ka ta min chhuhsak thei tu mah an awm hlei nem." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Pathian nung ka nih hi, Bân pharin thu ka tiam ṭhîn." 
Deuteronomy32:41 Khandaih ka tât hriam ang a, Dik takin ro ka rêl ang. Ka hmêlmate chungah phuba ka la ang a, Min hawtute chu ka hrem ang." 
Deuteronomy32:42 An thisen chu ka thalah a luang ang a, Ka khandaih chuan thisen a chhuah ang a, Hmêlma sam sei tak takte chu a sât hlum ang." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Hnam tinte u, Lalpa mite hi fak rawh u, Anni thattute chu a hrem zêl a, A hmêlmate chungah phuba a la, A mite sual a ngaidam ṭhîn.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mosia leh Nuna fapa Josua chuan chu hla chu mipui hriatah an sawi a. 
Deuteronomy32:45 Mosian hêng thu hi Israel mite hnêna a sawi zawh chuan," 
Deuteronomy32:46 ‘Hêng, thu ka pêk zawng zawng che u hi ngaihtuah ngun ula, hêng dân thute hi zâwm tûrin in fate zirtîr rawh u." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Hêng thu hi thu mai mai a ni lo, nunna thu a ni. Jordan lui kal kâna in va neih tûr ram in thlen hunah chuan zâwm ula, in dam rei ang,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Chumi ni chuan Lalpan Mosia hnênah," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Moab ram, Jeriko ep, Abarim tlânga Nebo tlângchhîpah chuan chho la, an chanpual atân Israel-te ka pêk Kanan ram chu thlîr ang che;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 I u Arona Hor tlângah a thi a, a mite hnênah hruai a ni ta ang khân tah chuan i thi ang a, i pi leh pute hnênah i kal ve ang." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Zin thlalêr, Meriba-kades tui hmunah khân, Israel-te zîngah ka thu i bawhchhia a, Israel-te hmaah min chawimawi lo a ni." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Chumi avâng chuan ram chu hla tak aṭang chauhvin i hmu thei ang; Israel mite awmna tûra ka pêk ram chu i rap ve lo vang,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Pathian mi Mosia chuan a thih hmain hetiang malsâwmna hi Israel mite tân a dîlsak a. 
Deuteronomy33:2 “ Lalpa chu Sinai tlâng aṭangin a lo kal a, Ni angin Edom ramah a chhuak. Paran tlâng aṭangin a mite a rawn chhun êng a, Vântirhkoh sâng sâwmin an zui a, Mei a alh hluah hluah mai, a ding lamah." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Lalpa chuan a mite a lainat a, A tâte chu a vêng. A thupêkte an dawng a, A hniakhnung an zui a," 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mosian Dân thu min pe a, Jakoba thlahte ro hlu ber chu." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Lalpa chu a mi Israel-te lal a ni, Hnam hruaitute leh Israel pungkhâwmho chungah chuan a lal.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 Reubena chungchâng hetiangin a sawi: “Reubena chu thi mang suh se, Tlêm hle tawh mah se.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Juda chungthu sawiin: “Aw Lalpa, Juda mangang au ngaithla la, A unaute fin leh rawh se, A hmêlmate beihpui ang che.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Levia chungthu a sawi a: “I chhiahhlawh rinawm Levia thlahte chuan, Urim leh Thumim kawl se, i thu hrilh ṭhîn ang che, Masa-ah khân i fiah a, Meriba tuiah in inchhuahchhalh kha." 
Deuteronomy33:9 A nu leh pa, a unaute leh a fate pawh Hrechang lovin a vuan che a. I thupêk a awih a, I thuthlung a vawn tlat kha." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Jakoba thlahte chu i thuruatte an zirtîr ang a, Israel fate chu i dân an zirtîr ang. I hmaah rimtui an hâl ang, I maichâmah hâlral thilhlan an hâl ṭhîn ang." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Aw Lalpa, a neihte chu malsâwm la, A thiltihte lo lâwm ang che. A hmêlmate chu an tha chhahsak la, A hawtute chu dingchhuak suh se.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Benjamin thlahte chungchâng hetiangin a sawi: “ Lalpa duhsak leh lainat, A thla hnuaiah a khawsa, Nilênga a vên, a puak tlat ṭhin a ni.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Josefa thlahte chungchâng hetiangin a sawi: ‘An ram chu Lalpa chuan vân daifîmin châwm sela, Lei chhûngril aṭanga tui nên." 
Deuteronomy33:14 An theirahte chuan ni hmu ṭha sela, A hun takah hmin tiar tuar rawh se," 
Deuteronomy33:15 An tlâng chhuanawm tak tak leh mualte chu Thei tui tak takin khat rawh se. 
Deuteronomy33:16 An ramah chuan thil ṭha khat sela, Hnimbuka thusawitu khân malsâwm rawh se, A malsâwmna chu Josefa lu-ah rawn vûr sela, A unaute kaihruaitu a ni asin." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Josefa zawng, bâwngchal anga chak a ni, Sele ki ang ki ṭha a nei, A kîte chu Manasea thlah sâng rual Efraim thlah sîng rual an ni. Hnam dang a si ang a, Kâwlkil thlengin a vawrh darh ang.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Zebulun leh Isakar chungchâng hetiangin a sawi: “Tuifinriata sumdâwng, Zebulun chu hmuingîl rawh se, Isakar pawh in lamah a chan ṭha rawh se." 
Deuteronomy33:19 An tlângrama awm tûrin hnam dang an sâwm a, Tah chuan inthawina dikin an inthawi ang. Tuifinriat hausakna an chaw a, A kam ṭiauva thil ṭha an khâwm.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Gada chungchâng hetiangin a sawi: “Gad ram tizautu chu fak rawh u; Bân seh chhûma, lu vun hîk tûra Sakeibaknei biru ang hi a ni." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Ram ṭha ber an thlang a, Israel hruaitute an pun khâwm khân Hotu chanvo an chantîr a, Lalpa thupêk leh dân an zâwm.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Dana thlah chungchâng hetiangin a sawi: “Dana chu sakeibakneituai; Basan ram aṭangin a lo zuang chhuak a ni.” 
Deuteronomy33:23 Naftali chungchâng hetiangin a sawi: “Naftali chuan Lalpa malsâwmna a dawng a, Hnianghnârin duhsakna a dawng; A ram chuan dîl aṭangin chhim lam a thleng.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Asera chungchâng hetiangin a sawi: “Fa dangte aiin Asera chu a nihlawh e, A unaute duhsakna dawng sela, A ke chu hriakah chiah rawh se." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Thîr leh dârin an khua chu an kalh ang a, Him takin chêng reng rawh se.”" 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Israel-te u, in Pathian ang hi pathian dang an awm lo, Ṭanpui tûr che u-in ropui taka chhûm chunga chuangin Vân khi a fang zung zung." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Chatuan Pathian chu in vêngtu a ni, A bân chak chuan a hum ṭhîn che u a, In hmaah hmêlma a hnawt chhuak a, ‘Tiral vek rawh u,’ a ti." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Jakoba thlah Israel-te chu muang takin an awm ta a, Buh leh uain tamna ramah an awm der der, Vân daifîm châwm len te chu an ring." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Aw Israel, i va nihlawh kher êm! Nang ang rêng tu mah an awm lo, Lalpa chhandam hnam i ni a, I himna tûr leh hnehtu i nih theih nân Lalpa chu i phaw leh i khandaih a ni. I hmêlmaten khawngaih an dîl ang che; Nangin i lo rapbet ang.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Mosia chu Moab phai, Jeriko khaw ep aṭang chuan Nebo tlângchhîp, Pisga an tihah chuan a lâwn chho va. Lalpa chuan ram chu Gilead aṭangin Dan thlengin a entîr a." 
Deuteronomy34:2 Naftalia te, Manasea te, leh Efraima te ram chu Mediteranean tuipui thlengin a thlîr a." 
Deuteronomy34:3 Judai ram chhim lam ram, Zoar aṭanga Tûm khawpui Jeriko khaw thlengin a thlîrtîr bawk a." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Lalpa chuan a chhiahhlawh Mosia hnênah, “Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te hnêna an thlahte pêk ka tiam ram chu hei hi a ni. Ka entîr che a, i kal erawh chu ka phal lo,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Lalpa sawi angin Moab ramah chuan Mosia chu a thi ta a. 
Deuteronomy34:6 Beth-peor khaw dep, Moab phaiah chuan a phûm a, tûn thlengin tu man a thlân awmna chu an hre lo." 
Deuteronomy34:7 A thih chuan Mosia chu kum za leh sawmhnih a upa a ni a, a mit pawh a la thim lo, a la chak hle a ni." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Moab phaiah chuan Israel-te chuan ni sawmthum an sûn a. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Nuna fapa Josua chu Mosian a aiawhtua a ruat a nih avângin a fing êm êm a, Israel-te chuan Josua thu chu an zâwm a, Mosian Lalpa thupêk a hrilhte pawh an ti a." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Israel zîngah Mosia ang zâwlnei an awm ngai lo; Lalpa chuan hmaichhanah a be ṭhîn a ni. 
Deuteronomy34:11 Aigupta lal leh a ṭhuihruaite mit hmuhah leh an ram chhûngah te Mosia hmanga thil mak leh chhinchhiahna ropui a tih ang ti tûrin zâwlnei dang tu mah a hmang ngai lo. 
Deuteronomy34:12 Israel-te hmuha thil ropui leh hlauhawm, Mosia tih ang ti ve zâwlnei dang an awm hek lo." 
Joshua1:1 Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia thih hnuin Mosia puitu, Nuna fapa, Josua hnênah Lalpa chuan," 
Joshua1:2 “Ka chhiahhlawh Mosia chu a thi ta a, Israel mi zawng zawng hi Jordan lui kânpui rawh, ka pêk tûr rama kal tûrin inpuahchah rawh u." 
Joshua1:3 Mosia hnêna ka hrilh tawh ang khân in kephaha in rah apiang, nangni, ka mite hi ka pe ang che u." 
Joshua1:4 Chhim lam thlalêr aṭanga hmâr lam Lebanon tlâng chhak lam Eufretis luipui aṭanga khawthlang lam Hit mite ram, Mediteranean tuipui thlengin in ram a ni ang." 
Joshua1:5 Josua, i dam chhûngin, tu man an chelh lo vang che. Mosia hnêna ka awm ang khân i hnênah pawh ka awm reng ang a, ka awmpui reng ang chia, ka thlahthlam tawp lo vang che." 
Joshua1:6 Huai takin ṭan la rawh; tichuan, an thlahtute hnêna pêk ka tiam tawh ram chu i luahpui dâwn nia." 
Joshua1:7 Huai takin ṭan la vak phawt mai rawh; Mosian ka dân a hrilh che kha zâwm vek la, pakhat tê mah ngaihthah suh; tichuan, kawng engkimah i hmuingîl ang." 
Joshua1:8 Eng lai mahin ka dân bu chhûnga thu ziakte chu chhiar theihnghilh suh, i zawm vek theih nân a chhûn a zânin sawi ṭhîn ang che; tichuan, kawng engkimah i tluang ngei ang." 
Joshua1:9 Huai takin ṭang rawh ka tih che kha hre reng rawh, hlau suh la, zâm hek suh; kei, Lalpa hian i kalna apiangah ka awmpui zêl che a ni,” a ti a." 
Joshua1:10 Josua chuan Israel-ho hruaitute hnênah," 
Joshua1:11 “Riahhmunah kal vek ula, mite hnênah, ‘Ni thum chhûngin, Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ram luah tûrin Jordan lui in kai dâwn a, ei tûrte buatsaih rawh u’ ti ang che u,” a ti a." 
Joshua1:12 Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te leh Manase-ho zâtve te hnênah Josua chuan," 
Joshua1:13 “ Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian in hnênah hetiangin a sawi a nih kha hre reng rawh u, ‘In Pathian, Lalpa chuan Jordan lui chhak lamah in ram chanpual tûr a pe ve ang che u;" 
Joshua1:14 in nupui te, in fanau te, in ran vulh te chu he laiah hian an lo awm ang a, in zînga râlthuam kengte hi chuan lui in lo kai hmasa ang a, in unau Israel-te hi in pui tûr a ni." 
Joshua1:15 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk tûr che u ram, Jordan lui khawthlang lam chu an luah fel a, Israel hnamten an awmna tûr ṭheuhva him taka an awm hunah chauh in kîr thei ang a, Jordan chhak lam ram, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian a pêk che u-ah hian in awm thei ang,’ a tih kha,” a ti a." 
Joshua1:16 Josua chu an chhâng a, “Min hrilh apiang kan ti ang e, kal rawh u i tihna apiangah kan kal zêl ang." 
Joshua1:17 Mosia thu kan awih ṭhîn ang khân i thu pawh kan awih ang; Lalpa i Pathian chuan Mosia a awmpui ṭhîn ang khân awmpui zêl che rawh se. 
Joshua1:18 I thu kalha, i thupêk zâwm duh lo chu tihlum mai ang che. Huai takin ṭan la sauh sauh phawt mai teh,” an ti a." 
Joshua2:1 Nuna fapa Josua chuan Sitim ruam aṭang chuan enthlatu tûr mi pahnih a tîr a, “Ram chu a rûkin va en thlithlai teh u, Jeriko khua phei chu en chiang zual ang che u,” a ti a. Khua an va thlen chuan riah tumin nawhchizuar Rahabi in an pan a." 
Joshua2:2 Jeriko lal chuan, Israel-te tirh enthlatute chu chumi zân chuan an lo thleng tih a lo hriatin" 
Joshua2:3 Rahabi hnênah, “I ina lo thlengte kha ram en thlithlai tûra lo kal an ni, han hruai rawh,” ti tûrin mi a tîr a." 
Joshua2:4 Chu nu chuan mikhual pahnihte chu a hruai a, a thukru a, “Mi pahnih chu an lo thleng ngei mai a, khawi lam mi nge an nih ka hre hauh lo." 
Joshua2:5 Khaw thim dâwn ṭêp, kulh kawngka khâr hma chiah khân an chhuak leh ta a nih kha: khawi lamah nge an kal dâwn ka hre miah lo; ûm thuai ula, in la ûm pha hman ang,” a ti a." 
Joshua2:6 Chu mite chu in chungah a hruai a, ziza kuang a pho zîngah chuan a thukru a ni." 
Joshua2:7 Lal mi tirhte chu Israel-te ûm tûr chuan an tlân chhuak a, kulh kawngkapui chu an khâr leh a, Jordan lui thlengin an ûm a." 
Joshua2:8 An mut hmain Rahabi chu in chungah a chho va. 
Joshua2:9 An hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan ram hi a pe tawh che u tih ka hria." 
Joshua2:10 Hêng lai mite hi hlau lo che u tu mah an awm lo, an zâm zo ta. Aigupta ram in chhuahsan a, Lalpa chuan in hmaa Tuipui Sen a tihchah thu te kan lo hria a, Jordan chhak lama Amor lal Sihona leh Oga in thah dânte pawh kan lo hria a." 
Joshua2:11 Chûng chu kan hriatin kan zâm chhia a, nangmahni hlauvin mu leh mal pawh kan nei tawh lo; in Pathian, Lalpa hi lei leh vâna rorêltu a ni si a." 
Joshua2:12 Ka tih ṭhat che u ang bawkin kan chhûnga min ti ṭha ve tûrin in Pathian hming chhâlin thu tiam ula, chumi hriatna tûr chuan chhinchhiahna min pe ang che u." 
Joshua2:13 Ka pa te, ka nu te, ka nuṭate leh ka laizâwn te, an chhûngkuain zuah ang che u, min that lo tûrin thu tiam rawh u,” a ti a." 
Joshua2:14 Chûng mite chuan, “Min hum chuan kan hum ngei ang che; kan lo kal dân hi tu mah i hrilh loh chuan, ram hi Lalpan min pêk hunah, ṭha takin kan ti ang che u,” an ti a." 
Joshua2:15 Khaw kulh bang ringa in nei a ni a, tukverh aṭang chuan anni chu hruizênin a thlâk thla a." 
Joshua2:16 “Tlâng lamah in kal loh chuan ûmtuten an hmu mai ang che u, ni thum biru ula, a rawn ûmtu che u an lo kîr hunah in duh duhnaah in kal dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Joshua2:17 Mite chuan, “I tih ang chuan thu kan tiam ang a, hetianga i tih ve loh erawh chuan a mawh kan phur lo vang." 
Joshua2:18 He ram kan lo thlen hunah he la sen hi min thlâkna tukverhah ṭâwn bet ang che. I pa te, i nu te, i nuṭate leh i pa chhûngte i inah hian ko khâwm la;" 
Joshua2:19 khawlaiah tu mah chhuak suh se; chhuak an awm chuan an thisen mawh chu anmahniin an phur ang. 
Joshua2:20 Kan thu hi tu mah i hrilh tûr a ni lo, i hrilh vaih chuan keini pawhin thu min tiamtîr ang hian kan ti bîk lo vang,” an ti a." 
Joshua2:21 Ani chuan, “In thu ang chuan ni rawh se,” a ti a. A kaltîr a, an chhuak ta a. La sen chu tukverhah chuan a ṭâwn bet a." 
Joshua2:22 Tlâng lamah chuan an kal a, ni thum an biru a. Ûmtute chuan an rawn zawng haw zêl a; mahse, an hmu lo." 
Joshua2:23 Chu mite pahnih chu tlâng lam ata an lo chhuak a, lui an kân a, Josua hnên an lo thleng a, an thil tawh zawng zawng chu an hrilh a." 
Joshua2:24 Josua hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan ram chu min pe ngei a lo ni, kan thâwmah mi an zâm chhe zo vek mai,” an ti a." 
Joshua3:1 A tûkah Josua hovin Israel-te chu zîng takah an tho va, Sitim zâwl aṭang chuan lui bulah an insawn a, lui an kân hmain an riak a." 
Joshua3:2 Chumi tûk tûk lehah chuan hotute chuan bûk chu an fang a," 
Joshua3:3 “ Lalpa in Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm chu puithiamten an zâwn in hmuh hunah intêl fel ula, in zui nghâl dâwn nia." 
Joshua3:4 In kalna ngai lohva kal tûr in ni a, an hnung in zui zêl dâwn nia; amaherawhchu, Thuthlung Bâwm hnaih lutuk suh ang che u, tawng sânghnih vêl in inkârah tla rawh se,” an ti a." 
Joshua3:5 Josua chuan mipui hnênah, “Inthian thianghlim rawh u, naktûk hian Lalpa chuan kan zîngah thil mak tak a ti dâwn e,” a ti a." 
Joshua3:6 Josua chuan puithiamho hnênah, “Thuthlung Bâwm chu zâwn ula, kal hmasa rawh u le,” a ti a." 
Joshua3:7 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah, “Vawiin hian Israel-te hmuhah ka chawimawi dâwn che a ni, Mosia hnêna ka awm ang khân i hnênah pawh ka awm ṭhîn dâwn tih an hre dâwn nia." 
Joshua3:8 Puithiamte chu Jordan lui kamah tui daia ding tûrin hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Joshua3:9 Josua chuan Israel mite hnênah, “Lo kal ula, Lalpa in Pathian thu hi ngaithla teh u,” a ti a." 
Joshua3:10 Josua chuan, “Pathian nung chu in zîngah a awm tih leh Kanan mite leh Jebus mite chu in hmaah a hnawt chhuak ngei dâwn tih hetiang hian in hria ang." 
Joshua3:11 Jordan luiah in hma hruaiin khawvêl zawng zawng Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm chu a kal hmasa ang a. 
Joshua3:12 Mi sâwm leh pahnih, Israel hnam tina mi pakhat ṭheuh thlang chhuak ula," 
Joshua3:13 khawvêl zawng zawng Lalpa Thuthlung Bawm zâwntu puithiamte ke-in Jordan lui a dai vêleh, Jordan lui tui luang chu a chat ang a, chhak lam aṭanga lo luang zawng zawng chu a tling khâwm vek ang,” a ti a." 
Joshua3:14 Mipui chu Jordan kai tum chuan an puan in aṭang chuan an chhuak a; Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntu puithiamte chu an kal hmasa a. 
Joshua3:15 Chutih lai chu buh seng hun, Jordan lui len lai a ni a, a kuang a liam hial a. Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntuten Jordan lui an han dai chuan," 
Joshua3:16 chhak lam aṭanga tui lo luang chu a chat a, a hnâr lamah Zarethan bul Adam khawpui thlengin a tling khâwm a. Araba lam Tuipui Thi a luang lût ṭhîn chu a kang chat ta vek a; Jeriko khaw bul maiah mipui chuan lui chu an kal kai ta a." 
Joshua3:17 Israel mite chu an zavaiin lei chârah Jordan lui chu an kal kai a; Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntute chu li laiah chuan leichârah mipui kai zawh hma chu an ding a. 
Joshua4:1 Hnam puma Jordan lui an kai zawh vek hnu chuan Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah," 
Joshua4:2 “Israel hnam tin zînga in thlan chhuah mi sâwm leh pahnihte khân," 
Joshua4:3 Jordan luia puithiamte dinna aṭangin lung sâwm leh pahnih, pakhat ṭheuhvin, pu chhuak sela, zânina in riahna tûrah dah teh se,” a ti a." 
Joshua4:4 Josua chuan hnam tin aṭanga Israel miten an thlan chhuah mi sâwm leh pahnihte chu a ko va," 
Joshua4:5 an hnênah, “ Lalpa in Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm chu kal pêl ula, lung pakhat ṭheuh, a vaiin Israel hnam zât, Jordan lui lai aṭangin pu ula," 
Joshua4:6 chûng lung chu Lalpa thiltih hriat reng nân a ni ang. Nakin hnuah in faten, ‘Hêng lungte hi engtihna nge’ an tih hunah," 
Joshua4:7 ‘ Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwmin Jordan lui a kai dâwn khân Jordan lui luang chu a chat a, kumkhuaa chumi hriatrengna tûr a nih hi,’ in la ti dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Joshua4:8 Josua thu ang chuan Israel-te chuan an ti a, Jordan lui ata lung sâwm leh pahnih, Josua hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang khân, an pu chhuak a; Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnih zât chu an riahna tûrah chuan an dah a." 
Joshua4:9 Josua chuan Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntute dinnaah tak, Jordan luiah chuan, lung a dahtîr bawk a, tûn thlengin chûng chu a la awm a ni." 
Joshua4:10 Bâwm zâwntu puithiamte chu luiah chuan an ding a, mipui chu an kal kai sawk sawk a." 
Joshua4:11 An kai vek hnu chuan Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntu puithiamte chu mipui hmaah an kal ta a. 
Joshua4:12 Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te leh Manase-ho zâtve te chuan hriamhrei kengin, Mosia hnêna thupêk ang khân, mipui hma an hruai a." 
Joshua4:13 Lalpa hmaa indo peih reng mi sîngli laiin Jeriko bul zâwl an va thleng ta a. 
Joshua4:14 Chumi ni chuan Israel zawng zawng hmuhah Lalpa chuan Josua chu a chawimawi a, a dam chhûng chu Mosia ang bawkin an ngaisâng a." 
Joshua4:15 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah," 
Joshua4:16 “Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntu puithiamte kha Jordan lui ata lo chhuak rawh se,” a ti a." 
Joshua4:17 Josuan puithiamho hnênah, “Jordan lui ata kha lo chhuak rawh u le,” a ti a." 
Joshua4:18 Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntute Jordan lui ata an lo chhuaha, lui kam lei an rah veleh Jordan tui chu a luang leh ta dûl dûl a, a hma ang khân a kuang a liam hial a." 
Joshua4:19 Jordan lui chu thla khatna ni sâwm ni-in an kal kai a ni. Jeriko chhak lam ramri bul Gilgal-ah bûk an khuar a. 
Joshua4:20 Jordan lui aṭanga an lung lâk chu Josua chuan Gilgal-ah chuan a phun a. 
Joshua4:21 Israel mite hnênah chuan, “Nakin hnuah in faten an pate hnênah, ‘hêng lung hi engtihna nge?’ tia an zawh che u hunah," 
Joshua4:22 ‘He laiah hian Israel-ten leichârah lui an kal kai a ni,’ in ti dâwn nia." 
Joshua4:23 Tuipui Sen kân hmaa tuipui tui a tichat ang bawk khân Lalpa chuan Jordan lui kan kai vek hma chu lui tui luang a tichat a. 
Joshua4:24 Hêng avâng hian khawvêla hnam tinin Lalpa thiltihtheihzia an hria ang a, kumkhuain in Pathian, Lalpa hi in chawimawi dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Joshua5:1 Jordan lui thlang lama awm, Amor lal zawng zawng leh Mediteranean kama Kanan lal awm zawng zawngin Israel-ten Jordan an kân chhûng zawng lui tui chu a tihchahsak tih an lo hriat chuan an zâm chhe zo ta a." 
Joshua5:2 Chutih lai chuan Lalpan Josua hnênah, “Meilung hriam siam la, Israel mi serh la tan lohho serh tansak rawh,” a ti a." 
Joshua5:3 Josua chuan meilung hriam a siam a, Israel-te chu Gibeat-haaralot-ah an serh a tantîr a." 
Joshua5:4 Aigupta ram aṭanga râlkai chin lo chhuak zawng zawng chu thlalêrah an thi vek tawh a," 
Joshua5:5 an chhuah tirh khân serh an tan vek a ni; an lo kal chhûnga piangte erawh chu an serh la tan loh a ni. 
Joshua5:6 Israel mite chu thlalêrah kum sawmli an vâkvai a, Aigupta ram ata an chhuah aṭanga râlkai tawh chin chu an thi hman vek a ni. Lalpa thu an ngaihthlâk loh chuan khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ram pêk a tiam chu an thleng ve lo vang tia a sawi tawh ang khân." 
Joshua5:7 An aiah, an fate a tipuitling a, chûng mite chu a ni Josuan serh a tansakte chu; kawngah an serh an la tan lo a ni." 
Joshua5:8 Mi zawng zawng serh an tan hnu chuan an dam hma chu bûkah an awm a. 
Joshua5:9 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah, “Vawiin hian Aigupta miten an hmuhsitna che u kha ka nuai bo ta e,” a ti a. Chumi hmun chu tûn thlengin Gilgal an ti ta a ni." 
Joshua5:10 Gilgal-ah chuan Israel-ten bûk an khuar a, Jeriko phaizâwlah chuan chumi thla, ni sâwm leh pali ni chuan Kalhlên kût an hmang a." 
Joshua5:11 Kalhlên kût zawh tûkah chuan, chu rama thar barli chhangphut, dawidim telh loh chhang leh chhangpêr an ei ve ta a." 
Joshua5:12 Chu ram buh an ei tûk aṭang chuan mana pawh a tla ta lo va. Israel-te chuan mana ei tûr an nei ta lo va, chumi kum aṭang chuan Kanan ram buhbâl thar an ring ta a." 
Joshua5:13 Jeriko bul lawka a awm laiin Josua chuan a han en a, mi pakhat, khandaih keng hi a hmaah a lo ding reng a, a han hnaih a, “Kan sipai nge i nih a, hmêlma sipai?” a ti a." 
Joshua5:14 “A khawia mah ka ni lo, Lalpa sipaite ho tûra lo kal ka nih hi,” a ti a. Josua chu lei siin a kûn a, “I chhiahhlawh hnênah eng nge sawi i duh?” a ti a." 
Joshua5:15 Lalpa sipai hotu chuan Josua hnênah, “I pheikhawk kha phelh rawh, i dinna kha hmun thianghlim asin,” a ti a, Josua chuan a phelh ta a." 
Joshua6:1 Israel-te luh theih loh tûrin Jeriko kulh chu a inkhâr tlat a; tu mah an chhuak thei lo va, an lût thei hek lo." 
Joshua6:2 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah, “Jeriko khua chu an lal leh a sipai huaite nên ka pe tawh a che." 
Joshua6:3 Khua chu hual la, ni tin vawi khat, râlkai chin chuan kal hual ṭhîn rawh se; chutiangin ni ruk in ti ang a," 
Joshua6:4 a ni sarih ni chuan puithiam pasarihin berâmpa ki tawtawrâwt kengin Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntute hma an hruai ang a, berâm ki chu an hâm ang a, vawi sarih in kal hual tûr a ni." 
Joshua6:5 Tawtawrâwt chu fân ruaiin an hâm ang a, chu chu in hriat veleh theihtâwp chhuahin mi zawng zawng au dur dur ula; kulh chu a chim rup mai ang; mahni hma zâwn ṭheuhvah in tlân lût mai thei ang,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:6 Nuna fapa Josua chuan puithiamho chu a ko va, “ Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm chu zâwn ula, tawtawrâwt keng ṭhiau puithiam pasarihin hma hruai sela, zui ang che u,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:7 Mipui hnênah, “Kal ula, khua chu kal hual rawh u, Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm hmaah râlthuam keng kal hmasa rawh se,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:8 Josuan mipui hnêna thu a sawi zawh chuan, a tih ang chuan an ti a; tawtawrâwt keng puithiam pasarih chuan tawtawrâwt chu an hâm a; Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntute chuan an zui a." 
Joshua6:9 Tawtawrâwt hâmho puithiam hmaah râlthuam keng an kal a, Thuthlung Bâwm hnungah râlthuam kengten hnung an dâl a. Tawtawrâwt chu chhum lo chat lovin an hâm a." 
Joshua6:10 Josua chuan mipui hnênah, “Au rawh u’ ka tih hunah theihtâwpin in au dâwn nia, chumi hma chuan au tûr a ni lo,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:11 Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm zâwn chung chuan khua chu vawi khat an kal hual a, bûkah an kîr leh a, zân an riak a." 
Joshua6:12 A tûkah Josua chu zîng takah a tho va, puithiamho chuan bâwm chu an zâwn leh a." 
Joshua6:13 Râlthuam kengin hma an hruai a, puithiam pasarih, tawtawrâwt kengin an zui a, tawtawrâwt chu chhum lo chat lovin an hâm a; Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntute chu râlthuam kengin an rawn chhawm a." 
Joshua6:14 A ni hnihnaah pawh khua chu vawi khat an kal hual a, bûk lamah an haw leh a. Chutiang hlîr chuan ni ruk an ti a." 
Joshua6:15 A ni sarih ni erawh chuan kâwl ênah an tho va, an tih dân pângngaiin khua chu an kal hual leh a; chumi ni erawh chuan vawi sarih an kal hual a." 
Joshua6:16 An kal hual vawi sarihnaah chuan Josuan, “Au rawh u le, Lalpa chuan khua hi a pe ta che u;" 
Joshua6:17 a khaw pum leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng te hi tihchhiat tûra Lalpa tâna serh hran vek a ni. Kan mi tirhte lo humtunu avângin Rahabi leh a ina mi awm zawng zawng erawh chu zuah tûr a ni. 
Joshua6:18 Serh hran tlat tawh chu in awt palh ang e, pakhat tê pawh in la tûr a ni lo, in lâk chuan Israel-ho bûkah chhiatna râpthlâk tak in tithleng ang." 
Joshua6:19 Tangkarua te, rangkachak te, dâr te leh thîr te erawh chu Lalpa sum bâwmah dah ṭhat tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:20 Tichuan, puithiamte chuan tawtawrâwt chu fân ruaiin an han hâm a, miten chu chu an hriatin an au chiam a, kulh bang chu a chim ta a; mahni hma zâwn zâwnah an lût ta sung sung a, khua chu an la ta a." 
Joshua6:21 Khua chu an tichhe vek a, a chhûnga awm a hmei a pa, a pui a pang, bâwng te, berâm te, sabengtung te nên khandaihin an sât hlum vek a." 
Joshua6:22 Ram enthlatute hnênah, Josua chuan, “Nawhchizuar inah kal ula, kha nu kha a neih zawng zawng nên va hruai chhuak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:23 Enthlatu tlangvâl, a ina thlengte khân Rahabi chu a pa te, a nuṭa te leh a laichîn hnai a awmpui te chu a neih zawng zawng nên an hruai chhuak a, Israel riahhmunah chuan an hruai a." 
Joshua6:24 Khua leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng chu an hâl vek a; tangkarua te, rangkachak te, darbêl te, thîr te erawh chu Lalpa ina sum bâwmah an dah ṭha a." 
Joshua6:25 Jeriko enthla tûra Josua mi tirhte a lo hum avângin nawhchizuar Rahabi chu a pa chhûngte nên, a neih zawng zawng nên Josua chuan a zuah a, Israel zîngah tûn thlengin an la tel ta reng a ni." 
Joshua6:26 Chûng zawh chuan Josuan mipui chu a vau ta a: “Jeriko khaw din leh tumtu chuan Lalpa ânchhia dawng rawh se, A lungphûm rem lehtu chuan a fa tîr chân sela, A kulh kawngka siamtu chuan a fa tlum chân rawh se,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:27 Lalpa chuan Josua chu a awmpui a, ram pumah a hming a thang ta a." 
Joshua7:1 Israel-te chuan thil serh hran tlat chu an pawisa lo va; Juda thlah Zera fa, Karmia fapa Akana chuan thil serh tlat ṭhenkhat chu a lo la a, Israel-te chungah Lalpa chu a thinur ta hle a." 
Joshua7:2 Bethel chhak lam Beth-aven bula awm Ai khua en thlithlai tûrin Josua chuan Jeriko aṭangin mi a tîr a. Anni chu an chho va, Ai chu an han en thlithlai a." 
Joshua7:3 An lo haw a, Josua hnênah, “Mi zawng zawng chho teh suh se, mi sânghnih sângthum vêl chauh chho sela, Ai chu han bei rawh se, an tlêm khawp mai; mi zawng zawng tihhah a ṭûl lo,” an ti a." 
Joshua7:4 Mi sângthum vêl chuan an han bei a, Ai khaw mite hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ta a." 
Joshua7:5 Ai khaw mite chuan kulh aṭangin Sebarim thleng rawkin an ûm a, an tlân chhuk chu mi sawmthum leh paruk lai an that a. Israel-ho rilru chu a hnual a, an zâm ta hle a." 
Joshua7:6 Josua leh Israel upate chuan an puan an pawtthlêr a, Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm hmaah chuan an bawkkhup a, an lu-ah vaivut an phul a, tlai thlengin an bawk a." 
Joshua7:7 Josua chuan, “A va pawî em, Lalpa Pathian, Amor mite sawisak tûr leh tihral mai tûrin engah kher nge Jordan lui min kal kaitîr teh rêng le? Jordan chhak lama awm kha lo lungawi tâwk mai ila a ṭha tûr." 
Joshua7:8 Aw Lalpa, Israel-te chu an hmêlmaten an ûm ta mai si a, ṭawngna tûr pawh kan neih tâk loh hi." 
Joshua7:9 Kanan mite leh hêng rama awmten an hriatin min hual ang a, min that vek ang a, a mite pawh a hum zo lo an ti ngei ang che le,” a ti a." 
Joshua7:10 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah, “Tho teh, bawk reng teh suh," 
Joshua7:11 Israel-ten thil sual an ti alâwm. Ka thuthlung zâwm tûra ka tih chu an bawhchhia a, thil serh hran tlat aṭangin lâk an nei, an ru a, an zêp a, an thawmhnaw zîngah an thukru lehnghâl a." 
Joshua7:12 Chuvâng alâwm Israel-te hian an hmêlmate an ngam lohva, an tlânchhiat ni; ânchhia an dawng a ni. Lâk loh tûr in lâk kha in tihboral hma chu in hnênah ka awm lo vang." 
Joshua7:13 Tho la, mipuite chu thian fai la, an hnênah, naktûkah chuan inthian fai tûrin hrilh rawh. Israel-te Pathian chuan, ‘Israel-te u, in zîngah ânchhia a awm a ni, chu chu in zîng ata in then fai hma chuan in hmêlmate in ngam lo vang,’ a ti e, tiin hrilh rawh." 
Joshua7:14 Tichuan, zîngah a hnam hnamin lo kal sela, Lalpa lo man hnam chu a chi chiin an lo kal leh tûr a ni; Lalpan chi a lo man aṭang chuan chhûngkuain an lo kal ang a, chhûngkua a lo man aṭang chuan, paho an lo kal leh tûr a ni." 
Joshua7:15 Thil serh tlat latu man chhuah chu hâl tûr a ni, a neih zawng zawng nên, Lalpa thupêk, lâk loh tûr a tih chu a bawhchhia a, Israel tân thil zahthlâk tak a ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Joshua7:16 Josua chu zîng takah a tho va, a hnam hnamin Israel-ho chu an lo kal a, Juda thlahte chu man an ni ta a." 
Joshua7:17 Juda thlah zîngah Zer chi man an ni leh a, Zer-ho zîng aṭang chuan Zabdia chhûng man an ni leh a." 
Joshua7:18 Chu mi chhûngte zîng aṭang chuan Karmia fapa Akana, Zabdia tupa chu man a ni ta a." 
Joshua7:19 Josua chuan Akana hnênah, “Ka fapa, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hmaah thu dik tak sawi rawh aw: Thupha chawi mai teh, eng nge i tih, zêp lovin min hrilh teh,” a ti a." 
Joshua7:20 Akana chuan Josua chu a chhâng a, “Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa lakah thil sual ka lo ti a ni." 
Joshua7:21 Kan thil man zîngah Babulon puan mawi tak, tangkarua sekel za bûk vêl leh sekel sawmnga vêl bûk rangkachak nên ka hmu a, ka awt êm a, ka la ta mai a ni. Ka puanin chhuatah ka phûm a, a hnuaihnung berah tangkarua chu ka dah kha,” a ti a." 
Joshua7:22 Josua chuan mi a tîr a, puan inah chuan an kal a, a lo thukru ngei rêng a, a hnuai berah tangkarua chu a lo awm a." 
Joshua7:23 Puan in ata chu an la a, Josua leh Israel-te hmaah chuan an rawn la a, Lalpa hmaah chuan an dah a." 
Joshua7:24 Josua leh Israel-te chuan Zera fapa Akana chu puan te, tangkarua te, rangkachakte leh a nupui fanau te, a bâwng te, a sabengtung te, a berâm te leh a neih zawng zawng nên Akor ruamah an hruai a." 
Joshua7:25 Josua chuan, “Min timangang hle mai a, Lalpa chuan vawiin hian a timangang ve dâwn che a nih hi,” a ti a. Mi zawng zawngin Akana leh a chhûngte chu lungin an dêng a, an neih zawng zawng nên chuan an hâl ta a." 
Joshua7:26 A chungah chuan lung an vawm vûm thûr a, Lalpa thinur chu a dai ta a. Vawiin thlengin chu ruam chu Akor ruam tih a la ni ta reng a." 
Joshua8:1 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah, “Hlau suh la, beidawng hek suh; Israel-te zînga indo thiam hruai vek la, Ai khua bei tûrin chho rawh. Ai khaw lal te, a mi te, a khawpuite leh a ramte chu i kutah ka pe tawh a che." 
Joshua8:2 An khua leh an lal chu Jeriko khua leh an lal i sawisak ang khân sawisa ang che; tûn ṭum hi chuan an berâm leh an rante chu mahni tân in lâksak dâwn nia. Khaw hnung lam aṭangin bei thut ang che u,” a ti a." 
Joshua8:3 Ai khua bei tûr chuan Josua leh a hote chu an insiam a. Josua chuan mi fel deuh deuh sîngthum a thlang chhuak a, zânah a kal chhohtîr a." 
Joshua8:4 “Khua chu a hnung lamah châng ru ula, khua aṭanga hla lovah biru ang che u, inring reng ang che u." 
Joshua8:5 Ka mite nên khua chu a hma lamah kan rawn bei ang a, min bei tûrin an lo chhuak ang a; a hma angin kan tlânchhe der ang a;" 
Joshua8:6 khua aṭanga hla fe thleng min ûm hnuah, a hma ang khân kan tlânchhe tak tak emaw an ti ang." 
Joshua8:7 In bihrûkna ata in lo chhuak ang a, khua chu la ang che u. In Pathian, Lalpa chuan a pe ang che u." 
Joshua8:8 Khua in lâk hnu chuan Lalpa thu angin hâl rawh u. In tih tûr chu, chu chu a ni,” a ti a." 
Joshua8:9 Josua chuan anni chu a kaltîr a, Ai khaw thlang lam Bethel nêna an inkârah chuan an hual ru a, zânah Josua ho chu puan inah an riak a." 
Joshua8:10 Josua chu zîngah a tho va, a mite chu a ko khâwm a, Israel upate nên Ai khua chu an pan ta a." 
Joshua8:11 Khaw kawtchhuah, hmâr lam tlângah a hote chuan ṭanhmun an khuar a, Ai khua nêna an inkârah chuan ruam a awm." 
Joshua8:12 Ai khawthlang lam, Bethel nêna an inkârah a rûka châng tûr mi sângnga a dah a." 
Joshua8:13 A sipai bupui chu hmâr lam aṭanga Ai khua bei tûr chuan an inrâlring a, khaw thlang lama lo châng tâwk an awm bawk a. Chumi zân chuan Josua chu ruamah chuan a kal a." 
Joshua8:14 Ai khaw lal chuan a lo hmu a, a mite nên zîngah an tho va; Israel-ho nêna an inbeihna Araba ruamah khân Israel-ho bei tûr chuan an chhuk leh ta a, an hnung lam aṭangin khawpui bei tûr biru an awm tih an hre lo." 
Joshua8:15 Josua leh Israel-te chu hlau âwm takin thlalêr lam panin an tlânchhe der a," 
Joshua8:16 Ai khuaa mite chu ûm tûrin an inpun khâwm a, Josua chu an ûm a, khua chu an chhuahsan ta vek a." 
Joshua8:17 Ai khaw mi zawng zawngin Israel-te chu an ûm a, khaw vêngtu pakhat mah an awm lo, khua chu a inhawng huai mai." 
Joshua8:18 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah, “I fei khân Ai khua tin rawh, khua chu ka pe dâwn che a ni,” a ti a." 
Joshua8:19 Josuan a fei ken chuan Ai khua chu a tin a. Chutia a han tin vêleh chângtute kha an bihrûkna ata an lo zuang chhuak a, khuaah an lût a, an la ta mai a; khua chu an hâl ta hluah hluah a." 
Joshua8:20 Ai khaw mite chu an han lehhawi a, an khaw kâng khu ngun ngun chu an hmu a, thlalêr pana tlânho khân an rawn bei lêt bawk a, tlânna tûr lam rêng an hre ta lo va." 
Joshua8:21 Josua leh Israel-te chuan châng rutute khân khua chu an la a, an hâl khu ngun ngun ta tih an hmuh chuan an lêt leh a, Ai mite chu an that ṭan ta a." 
Joshua8:22 Khaw latute khân an rawn ûm bawk a, Israel-te chuan an kârcheh a, tu mah dam emaw, tlân chhuak emaw awm miah lovin an that a." 
Joshua8:23 Ai khaw lal erawh chu a nungin an man a, Josua hnênah an rawn hruai a." 
Joshua8:24 Ai khaw mi, Israel ûmtute kha, thlalêrah an lo that vek a, an sah hlum zawh chuan Ai khuaah Israel mi zawng zawng chu an kal a, chuta mi zawng zawng chu khandaihin an that vek a." 
Joshua8:25 Ai khaw mi, chumi nia an thah chu a hmei a pain mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih an tling." 
Joshua8:26 Ai khaw mi an thah zawh fai phiar hma chu Josua chuan a fei kha a lek reng a. 
Joshua8:27 Josua hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin ran an mansak te, an râllâk sumte chu mahni tân an nei a." 
Joshua8:28 Tin, Josua chuan Ai khua chu a hâl chim vek a, tûn thlengin a ram a, bawlhhlawh vûm mai a ni ta." 
Joshua8:29 Ai khaw lal chu a khai hlum a, tlai thlengin thingah a khai a, ni a tlâk chuan Josua thu angin a ruang chu an la thla a, khaw kulh kawngka sîrah chuan an paih a, lung an vawm hnan thûr a, tûn thlengin chûng chu a la awm." 
Joshua8:30 Josua chuan Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa tân Ebal tlângah maichâm a siam a." 
Joshua8:31 Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian Israel-te hnêna thu a pêk, Mosia Dân bu-a ziak angin lung chher loh, thîra chher lohvin maichâm an siam a, Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan an hlân a." 
Joshua8:32 Israel-ho hmuh lai ngeiin Josua chuan Mosia dân chu lungah chuan a ziak chhuak a. 
Joshua8:33 Israel-ho chu an upa te, hruaitu te, rorêltu te leh an zînga hnam dang awm vê te nên puithiam Levia-ho zâwn, Thuthlung Bâwm hawiin, lehlam lehlamah chuan an ding a. A zâtve chuan Gerizim tlâng an hmachhawn a, a zâtve chuan Ebal tlâng chu an hmachhawn a. Israel mipuite mal an sâwmsak dâwnin hetianga din ṭhin tûr tih Mosia thupêk ang khân an ding a." 
Joshua8:34 An din fel chuan Dân bu-a thu zawng zawng, malsâwmna thu te, ânchhe dawn tûr thu te chu Josuan a chhiar chhuak a." 
Joshua8:35 Israel mipui hmaah, hmeichhia te, naupangte leh an zînga kal ve hnam dang mite hmaah Mosia thupêk zawng zawng chu chhiar hmaih a nei hauh lo." 
Joshua9:1 Jordan thlang lam tlângrama awm te, tlâng bulṭhut rama awmte leh Mediteranean tuipui kama Lebanon tlâng thlenga awm Hit-ho lal te, Amor lal te, Kanan lal te, Periz lal te, Hiv-ho lal te, Jebus lal te chuan Israel-ho chakzia an lo hria a." 
Joshua9:2 An inko khâwm a, Josua leh Israel-te chu lo beih rawn zai an rêl a." 
Joshua9:3 Gibeon khuaa awm Hiv mite chuan Jeriko leh Ai khua Josuan a sawisak dân an hriat chuan," 
Joshua9:4 finrâwl an thawh ve ta a. Palai ni âwm tak tak an insiam a, ip hlui tak hi sabengtung an phurhtîr a, an uain savun ip, hlui peh ver vurte chu bel ṭup a ni a," 
Joshua9:5 pheikhawk hlui, bel ṭiam ṭuam an bun a, kawr hlui tak tak an ha a. An chhang kente chu a khirin a hmuar uar a." 
Joshua9:6 Israel-te riahhmun Gilgal-ah chuan Josua an rawn pan a, a hnênah, “Ram hla tak aṭangin kan lo kal a, inremna thu i thlung ang u,” an ti a." 
Joshua9:7 Israel mite chuan, “He lai hnaia mite in nih chuan thu kan thlunpui thei lo vang che u,” an ti a." 
Joshua9:8 Josua hnênah, “I chhiahhlawh kan nih hi,” an ti a. Josua chuan, “Tute nge in nih? Khawi lam aṭanga lo kal nge in nih?” a ti a." 
Joshua9:9 Anni chuan, “I chhiahhlawhte hi ram hla tak aṭanga lo kal kan ni. In Pathian, Lalpa chanchin kan lo hria a, Aigupta rama a thil tih hmingthang tak tak te,"
