Joshua9:10 Jordan râla Amor lal Sihona, Hesbon lal chungah te, Basan lal Astarot khua Oga chunga a thil tih te kan lo hria a." 
Joshua9:11 Kan upate leh kan ram mite chuan, ‘Zan riak chaw keng ula, anni chu va hmu ula, in chhiahhlawh kan ni a, thu min thlunpui rawh u, va ti ang che u,’ min ti a." 
Joshua9:12 Kan chhang kente hi kan lo chhuah tûk chuan a la lum thar thar a; tûnah zawng a khirin a hmuar tawh hi. 
Joshua9:13 Kan savun ip tharte pawh a peh zo tawh a, kan thawmhnaw te, kan pheikhawkte pawh kan lo kal thui êm tawh avângin a hniar veng vung tawh a nih hi,” an ti a." 
Joshua9:14 Israel mite chuan an chhang chu an lo eisak a. Lalpa an râwn lo. 
Joshua9:15 Josua chuan ṭhiana inhmang tûrin thu a thlunpui a, tihhlum loh a tiam a, Israel pungkhâwmho hruaitute pawh chuan an tiam a." 
Joshua9:16 Thu an tiam hnu ni thum lekah chuan chûng mite chu an ṭhenawm, an bul lawka awmte an ni tih an hre ta a." 
Joshua9:17 Tichuan, Israel-hote chu ân insawn a, ni thum an kal a; chung mite awmna khua Gibeon te, Kafira te, Kiriat-jearim te chu an va thleng a." 
Joshua9:18 Chûng mite chu Israel mite chuan an khawih thiang lo, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hmingin an hotute chuan thu an lo tiam tlat tawh si a. Pungkhâwmho chuan an hotute chu an dem hle a." 
Joshua9:19 Hruaitute chuan pungkhâwmho hnênah, “Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hming chhâlin thu kan lo tiam a, kan khawih a thiang tawh lo." 
Joshua9:20 Kan thutiam avângin an nun kan zuah tûr a ni: chutilo chu, Pathian kut kan tuar ang." 
Joshua9:21 Zuah ila, kan thing phurtuah leh tui chawitu-ah an ṭang dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
Joshua9:22 Gibeon mite chu Josuan a ko va, “Kan bul hnai maia awm si, ram hla tak aṭanga lo kal kan ni tiin engtizia nge min bum le?" 
Joshua9:23 Hetianga in tih avângin Pathian ânchhia in dawng ta, Pathian ina tuah tûr thing phurtu leh tui chawitu atân chhiahhlawh in ni reng dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Joshua9:24 Josua chu an chhâng a, “ Lalpa, in Pathian chuan a chhiahhlawh Mosia chu ram pum pui hi pe tûr che uin a ti a, in kalnaa awm apiang that vek tûrin a ti ngei bawk che u a. Chu chu kan lo hria a, kan hlau êm êm che u a, khati khân kan ti ta mai a nih kha, kan hlauh vâng che u a ni." 
Joshua9:25 In kutah kan awm hi, ṭha in tih ang chuan min ti ang chu,” an ti a." 
Joshua9:26 Josua chuan hetiang hian a ti ta a: anni chu a hum a, Israel-ten an thah a khap a," 
Joshua9:27 bawihah a siam thung a. Israel mipuite leh Lalpa maichâm tâna thing phurtu leh tui chawitu-ah a dah ta a. Vawiin thleng hian amah an biakna tûr Lalpa hmun ruatah chuan chûng hna chu an thawk ta a ni. 
Joshua10:1 Chutih lai chuan Jerusalem khaw lal chu Adoni-zedeka a ni a. Josuan Ai khua a lâk a, a tihchhiat vek thu te, Jeriko leh an lal a sawisak ang khân Ai khua leh an lal a sawisa tih thu te a lo hria a; Gibeon mite pawhin Israel-te nên inremna an nei a, an zîngah an tel ve ta tih te an lo hre bawk a." 
Joshua10:2 Chuvângin, Jerusalem mite chuan an hlau hle a; Gibeon khua phei chu lal nei khaw dang tluk bawka tam an ni a. Ai khua ai pawhin an tam, indo pawh an thiam hle a ni." 
Joshua10:3 Jerusalem lal Adoni-zedeka chuan Hebron lal Hohama te, Jarmut khaw lal Pirama te, Lakis lal Jafia te, Eglon lal Debira te chu thu a chah a." 
Joshua10:4 “Lo kal ula, Gibeon-ho hi i bei teh ang, Josua leh Israel-te nên inremna an lo siam reng alâwm,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:5 Amor-ho lal panga, Jerusalem lal te, Hebron lal te, Jarmut lal te, Lakis lal te, Eglon lal te chu an ṭang rual a, Gibeon khua chu an hual a, an bei ta a." 
Joshua10:6 Gibeon mite chuan Gilgal-ah Josua hnênah zualko an tlântîr a, “I chhiahhlawhte hi thlahthlam teh suh, lo chho vat la, min han pui rawh,” an ti a." 
Joshua10:7 Tichuan, Josua chu Gilgal aṭang chuan indo mi, mi huaisen rualte chu hruaiin a chho ta a." 
Joshua10:8 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah, “Huphurh suh, anni chu ka pe tawh a che; tu mahin an lo dang hauh lo vang che,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:9 Gilgal aṭang chuan zankhuain Gibeon thlengin an kal a. Amor mite chu an bei ta thut a. 
Joshua10:10 Amor mite chuan Israel-te an hmuh chuan Lalpan a tizâm a, Gibeon-ah chuan Israel-te chuan an that chiam a, a ṭhen chu Beth-horon kalkawngah an ûm thla a, chhak lamah Azeka leh Makeda thleng zakin an ûm a." 
Joshua10:11 Kalkawnga an tlân laiin Lalpa chuan rial lian pui pui a dentîr a, Azeka thleng rawkin a dêng a. Israel-ho thah ai chuan rial dena thi chu an tam zâwk mah." 
Joshua10:12 Lalpa chuan Israel mite chu Amor-ho a hnehtîr ni chuan Josuan Lalpa chu a bia a, Israel-te hriatah: “Chungtûrni, ding reng rawh, Gibeon chungah Chhawrthlapui, nang pawh Aijalon ruamah ding ve rawh,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:13 Ni chu a ding a, thla chu a che bawk lo. An hmêlmate an sawisak nek hma chu. ‘Jasar lehkhabu’ an tihah chu thu chu ziak a ni. Vânlaizâwlah ni chu a ding a, ni khat hu lai a ding." 
Joshua10:14 Chutiang khawpa mihring thu mai Lalpa chuan a zawm ni a la awm ngai lo, awm pawh a awm leh hek lo vang. Lalpa chuan Israel-te chu a dopui a ni." 
Joshua10:15 Chûng hnu chuan Josua leh a hote chu an riahhmun Gilgal-ah an kîr leh ta a. 
Joshua10:16 Amor lal panga kha an tlânchhia a, Makeda pûkah an biru a." 
Joshua10:17 Josua hnênah, “Lal pangate kha kan hmu ta, Makeda pûkah an biru a ni,” an rawn ti a." 
Joshua10:18 Josua chuan, “Pûk kawngka chu lung lian pui puiin chhîn ula, mi ṭhenkhat vêng tûrin dah rawh u." 
Joshua10:19 Nangni erawh chuan hmêlmate chu tlân khalh ula, an khaw kulha an tlân lût tûr dang tlat rawh u, Lalpa, in Pathian chuan a hnehtîr che u hi,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:20 Josua leh Israel-te chuan an hmêlmate chu an that chiam a, an that fai a ni deuh mai, an thah bâng tlêm chu an khaw kulhahte an tlân lût a." 
Joshua10:21 Josua bûk khuarna Makeda-ah chuan a hote chu râlmuang takin an lo kal a; Israel-ho chu hnialkalh ngam rêng an awm lo. 
Joshua10:22 Josua chuan, “Pûk kawngka kha hawng ula, lal pangate kha han hruai chhuak teh u,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:23 Jerusalem lal te, Hebron lal te, Jarmut lal te, Lakis lal te leh Eglon lal te chu pûk ata an rawn hruai chhuak a." 
Joshua10:24 Hêng lal pangate hi a hnêna an rawn hruai chuan Israel mite chu a ko khâwm a, a sipai hruai hotute hnênah chuan, “Lo kal ula, hêng lal pangate hi an nghâwngah rap rawh u,” a ti a. An lo kal a, an nghâwngah an rap a." 
Joshua10:25 Josua chuan, “Hlau mah ta che u, zâm pawh zâm suh u, huai takin ṭang sauh sauh rawh u. Lalpa chuan in do apiang hetiang hian a tihsak dâwn che u asin,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:26 Chumi hnu chuan lalte chu Josua chuan a that a, thing pangaah a khai a; tlai thlengin an ruang chu a inkhai a." 
Joshua10:27 Ni a tlâk dâwnah an ruang chu a lâk thlâktîr a, an bihrûkna pûkah chuan a paihtîr a, pûk kawngka chu lung lian pui puiin an chhîn a, tûn thlengin a la awm." 
Joshua10:28 Chumi ni chuan Makeda khua chu Josua chuan a bei a, a la a, an lal pawh a man a, khuaa mi zawng zawng chu Jeriko lal a thah ang khân a that a." 
Joshua10:29 Josua chu Makeda aṭang chuan Israel-hote nên Libna-ah an kal a, khua chu an bei a." 
Joshua10:30 Lalpa chuan chu khua leh an lal chu Israel-te kutah a pe a; khuaa mi zawng zawng chu an sât hlum a, tu mah nungdamin an chhuah lo. An lal pawh Jeriko lal an thah angin an that a." 
Joshua10:31 Libna khua aṭang chuan Josua leh Israel-te chu Lakis khuaah an kal a, an hual a, an bei a." 
Joshua10:32 Israel-te kutah Lakis khua chu Lalpan a pe a, a ni hnih ni-ah an la ta mai a. Libna khua an tih ang bawk khân khuaa mi zawng zawng chu a sât hlum vek a." 
Joshua10:33 Gezer khaw lal Horama chu Libna khua pui tûrin a lo chho va, Josua chuan ani chu a sipaite nên a lo hneh a, pakhat mah hmaih lovin a lo that a." 
Joshua10:34 Josua leh Israel-te chu Libna aṭang chuan Eglon khuaah an kal a, an hual a, an bei a." 
Joshua10:35 Chumi ni vêk chuan an la a, chumi ni chuan mi awm zawng zawng an sât hlum phiar a, Lakis an sawisak ang bawk khân an sawisa a." 
Joshua10:36 Josua leh Israel-te chu Eglon aṭang chuan Hebron khuaah an chho va, an bei a." 
Joshua10:37 Khua chu an la a, chuta awm zawng zawng chu an lal nên lam an sât hlum a, an chhehvêl khuaa awmte pawh an sât hlum a. Eglon khua an tih ang khân Hebron pawh chu an tichhe vek a, tu mah nungdamin an chhuah lo." 
Joshua10:38 Josua leh Israel-te chu an kir a, Debir khua an bei a." 
Joshua10:39 Khua chu an la a, an lal chu an man a; an chhehvêl khuate pawh an la a. Chûnga awm zawng zawng chu an sât hlum vêk a, Josua chuan Debir khua leh an lal chu Libna khua leh an lal an tih ang khân a ti a." 
Joshua10:40 Josua chuan ram chu a la ta vek a. Tlângram te, khawchhak tlâng pang te, khawthlang tlâng bulṭhut phai te, chhim lam ramte nên lam a la a, an lalte chu a hneh vek a, tu mah a zuah lo. Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa thupêk angin thaw thei tawh phawt chu a that vek a." 
Joshua10:41 Kades-barnea aṭangin Gaza inkâr ram zawng zawng, Gosen ram pawh, Gibeon thlengin Josua chuan a la a." 
Joshua10:42 Chûng rama lal zawng zawng leh an ram chu, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chuan a beihpui avângin ṭum khatah Josua chuan a la a ni." 
Joshua10:43 Josua leh Israel-te chu an riahhmun Gilgal-ah chuan an haw leh ta a. 
Joshua11:1 Hêng thu hi Hazor lal Jabinan a lo hriat chuan Madon khaw lal Jobaba te, Simron khaw lal te, Aksaf khaw lal te," 
Joshua11:1 Hêng thu hi Hazor lal Jabinan a lo hriat chuan Madon khaw lal Jobaba te, Simron khaw lal te, Aksaf khaw lal te," 
Joshua11:2 hmâr lam tlângram lal te, Galili dîl chhim Araba khaw lal te, Mediteranean tuipui kam Dor khaw lal te," 
Joshua11:3 khawchhak lam leh khawthlang lama Kanan lal awm te, Amor-ho lal te, Hit-ho lal te, Periz-ho lal te, tlângrama Jebus-ho lal te, Mizpa ram Hermon tlâng bula Hiv-ho lal te chu a pun khâwm a." 
Joshua11:4 An sipaite nên an lo thawk a, tuipui kama ṭiau zât hiala tam an ni. Sakawr te, sakawr-tawlailîr te pawh an rawn keng ṭeuh va." 
Joshua11:5 Hêng lalte hi an ṭangrual a, Israel-te bei tûrin Merom lui kamah ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
Joshua11:6 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah, “Hêngho hi huphurh suh, naktûk hetih hunah hian tihlum vekin Israel-te hnênah ka hlân ang, an sakawrte chu an tha chhahsak la, an tawlailîrte hâl ang che,” a ti a." 
Joshua11:7 Josua leh a hruai ṭhin indo mite chu an thawk chhuak a, Merom luiah chuan an va bei thut a." 
Joshua11:8 Lalpa chuan Israel-te kutah a pe a, an bei a, an thah zawh vek hma chu Misrefotmaim leh Sidon thleng rawkin an ûm a, chhak lamah Mizpa ruam thlengin an ûm bawk a." 
Joshua11:9 Lalpa thupêk angin Josua chuan an sakawr tha te chu a chhahsak a, an tawlailîrte chu a hâl a." 
Joshua11:10 Josua chu a kîr a, Hazor khua a la a, an lal chu a sât hlum a, tûn hma chuan hêng lai khuaah Hazor hi khaw lian ber a ni ṭhîn." 
Joshua11:11 Khuaa mi zawng zawng chu a sât hlum vek a, thaw thei tawh phawt chu zuah rêng a nei lo. Hazor khua chu a hâl a." 
Joshua11:12 Josua chuan hêng khua zawng zawng hi a la vek a, an lalte pawh a man a, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia thu ang khân a tihlum vek zêl a." 
Joshua11:13 Hazor khua, Josua hâl tih loh chu, Israel-te chuan an khaw tihchhiata in la dingte chu an hâl lo." 
Joshua11:14 Hêng khuaa an râllâk sum leh rante chu Israel-te chuan mahni tân ṭheuh an nei a, mihring erawh chu an sât hlum vek a ni; thaw thei tawh phawt chu hmaih rêng an nei lo." 
Joshua11:15 A chhiahhlawh Mosia hnênah Lalpa chuan thu a pe a. Mosia chuan chutiang bawkin Josua chu thu a pe a; chutiang tak chuan Josua chuan a ti a. Mosia hnêna Lalpa sawi, thil bawlhhlawh rêng rêng chu, tihbo loh eng mah a nei lo." 
Joshua11:16 Josuan ram zawng zawng chu a la a, Negeb leh tlângram te, Gosen ram phai te, tlâng bulṭhut phai te, Jordan ruam te, Israel tlângram te, a vêl tlâng bulṭhut phai te chu a la vek a." 
Joshua11:17 A ram lâk chuan chhim lamah Halak tlâng, Seir bul aṭangin hmâr lamah Baalgad, Lebanon ruam Hermon tlâng bul a thleng a. An lalte chu a hneh a, a man a, a that a." 
Joshua11:18 Josua leh hêng lal zawng zawng hi rei tak an indo a ni. 
Joshua11:19 Gibeon khuaa awm Hiv-ho chauh lo chu Israel-te nêna inbe rem khaw pakhat mah an awm lo, a lâkin an la vek a ni." 
Joshua11:20 Lalpa chuan Israel-te bei tûrin hêngho hi a tiluhlul a ni; Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin lainat miah lova tihmang vek an nih phah ta a. 
Joshua11:21 Josua chu a kal zêl a, tlângrama Hebron khuaah te, Debir khuaah te, Anab khuaah te, milian Anak an tih la awmte chu a that vek a. Judai leh Israel tlângrama awmte pawh an zavaiin, an khuate nên a tiral vek a." 
Joshua11:22 Israel mite ramah chuan milian rêng an awm tawh lo. Gaza khuaah te, Gath khuaah te, Asdod khuaah te erawh chuan an la awm pheuh pheuh." 
Joshua11:23 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang khân Josua chuan ram a lâka a lâk vek hnuin an ramro atân Israel-te chu a hnam hnamin a sem ta a. Ramah chuan indona a awm ta lo va. 
Joshua12:1 Jordan chhak lam Arnon lui aṭanga Hermon tlâng thlengin Jordan luiruam ramte chu Israel-te chuan an hneh a, an neihsak tawh a." 
Joshua12:2 Amor mi, Hesbon lal Sihona leh Basan lal Oga an hneh a. Sihona ram chuan Gilead chanve a huam a ni; Arnon luiruam ko chunga Aroer khua leh Arnon lui kama khua aṭangin Jabok lui a thleng a, chu chu Amon-ho nêna an inrina a ni." 
Joshua12:3 An ram chuan Jordan kam chhak lam, Galili dîl aṭanga chhim lam lui phai zawng zawng, Beth-jesimot, Tuipui Thi chhak lam Pisga thlengin a huam bawk." 
Joshua12:4 Basan lal Oga chu milian, Refaim an tih la dam awmchhun zînga mi a ni, Astarot leh Edrei khuaah a lal a." 
Joshua12:5 A ram chuan Hermon tlâng te, Seleka te leh Basan ram zawng zawng, Gezer leh Maaka ramri thleng a huam a; Gilead ram zâtve leh Hesbon lal Sihona ramri thlengin a huam bawk." 
Joshua12:6 Hêng lal pahnihte hi Mosia hovin Israel-te chuan an hneh a, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia chuan Reubena thlah leh Gada thlahte leh Manasea thlah zâtve te hnênah an ram chanpual atân a pe a." 
Joshua12:7 Hmâr lama Baal-gad, Lebanon ruama awm leh chhim lam Seir tlâng bula Halak tlâng inkâr ram zawng zawng, Jordan lui khawthlang lama awm leh an lalte chu Josua leh Israel-te chuan an hneh a. Chûng ram chu Josuan Israel hnamte hnênah ram chanpual atân a sem a." 
Joshua12:8 Hei hian hêngte hi a huam: tlângram te, khawthlang lam tlâng bulṭhut te, Jordan luiruam te, a dawt tlâng bulṭhut zâwl te, chumi chhak tlâng te leh Negeb thlalêr te hi. Chûng rama lo awmte chu Hit mi te, Amor mi te, Kanan mi te, Periz mi te, Hiv mi te leh Jebus mi te an ni." 
Joshua12:9 Lal an hneh, an thahte chu hêng hi an ni: Bethel khaw bula Ai khaw lal, Gezer lal;" 
Joshua12:10 Jerusalem lal, Hebron lal," 
Joshua12:11 Jarmut lal, Lakis lal;" 
Joshua12:12 Eglon lal, Gezer lal;" 
Joshua12:13 Debir lal, Geder lal;" 
Joshua12:14 Horma lal, Arad lal;" 
Joshua12:15 Libna lal, Adulam lal;" 
Joshua12:16 Makeda lal, Bethel lal;" 
Joshua12:17 Tapua lal, Hefer lal;" 
Joshua12:18 Afek lal, Saron lal;" 
Joshua12:19 Madon lal, Hazor lal," 
Joshua12:20 Simron-meron lal, Aksai lal;" 
Joshua12:21 Taanak lal, Megido lal;" 
Joshua12:22 Kades lal, Karmel tlânga Jokneam lal;" 
Joshua12:23 Mediteranean tuipui kam Dor lal, Gilgal-a Goim lal;" 
Joshua12:24 Tirza lal te hi. An lal thah zawng zawng chu an vaiin sawmthum leh pakhat an ni. 
Joshua13:1 Josua chu a lo upa a, a tar ta hle a; Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I lo upain i tar ta hle a, ram lâk tûr lah chu a la tam mai si a." 
Joshua13:2 Filistia leh Gesur-ho awmna ram te," 
Joshua13:3 chhim lam ram Avim-ho awmna te la lâk loh a ni. Aigupta ramri Sihor lui aṭanga hmâr lam Ekron thleng hian Kanan mite rama ngaih a ni. Filistia-ho chu Gaza-ah te, Asdod-ah te, Askelon-ah te, Gath-ah te lalah an ṭhu a ni." 
Joshua13:4 Kanan-ho ram leh Sidon-ho ram Meara chu Amor ramri Afek thlengin la lâk loh a ni. 
Joshua13:5 Gebal mite ram, Lebanon tlâng chhak lam Hermon tlâng bula Hamath kalkawng thleng lâk loh a la ni bawk." 
Joshua13:6 “Lebanon tlâng leh Misrefot-maim inkâr tlângrama awm zawng zawng Sidon mite chu, keiman Israel mite hmaah ka la ûm chhuak ang; thu ka pêk che angin an ram chanpual atân Israel-te chu pe phawt mai rawh." 
Joshua13:7 Khai le, ram hi Israel hnam kua leh Manasea thlah zâtve te hnênah, an ram chanpual atân sem rawh,” a ti a." 
Joshua13:8 Manasea thlah zâtve te nên Reubena thlah leh Gada thlahte chuan Jordan chhak lamah ram chanpual tûr Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia pêk kha an nei a. 
Joshua13:9 Arnon luiruam ko chunga khua Aroer leh luidung khua aṭangin tlâng zâwl, Medeba leh Dibon inkâr," 
Joshua13:10 Amor mi, Hesbon khaw lal Sihona ram zawng zawng Amon-ho ramri thlengin a huam a." 
Joshua13:11 Gilead ram huamin Gesur-ho leh Maakat-ho awmna nên, Hermon tlâng leh Basan rama Seleka a thleng a." 
Joshua13:12 Astarot leh Edrei lal Oga ram Basan te a huam a, ani chu Refaim la awmchhunte zînga mi a ni; Mosia khân chûngho chu a hneh a, a ûm chhuak a ni." 
Joshua13:13 Gesur mite leh Maakat mite chu Israel-te chuan an ûm chhuak lo, tûn thlengin Israel-ho zîngah an la awm ve a ni." 
Joshua13:14 Levia thlahte erawh chu ram chanpual an pe ve lo. Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hnêna an thilhlan hâl bâng chu an chanpual atân pe tûrin Lalpa chuan Mosia chu a hrilh a nih kha." 
Joshua13:15 Mosian Reubena thlahte chu a chhûng chhûnga insem tûr ram a pe a nih kha. 
Joshua13:16 An ram chhim lam ri chu Arnon luiruam ko chung Aroer khua leh lui kama khaw awm kha a ni; Medeba tlâng zâwl te," 
Joshua13:17 Hesbon khua leh a chhehvêl khua, tlâng zâwla awm te, Dibon te, Mamoth-baal te, Beth-baal-meon te," 
Joshua13:18 Jahaz leh Kedemot te, Mefaat te;" 
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaim te, Sibma te, Zereth-sahar, ruam zâwla awm te;" 
Joshua13:20 Beth-peor te, Pisga tlâng pang te, Beth-jesimot te a huam a." 
Joshua13:21 Tlâng zâwl khua zawng zawng leh Amor mi Hesbon lal Sihona ram zawng zawng a huam bawk a. Ani chu Mosian a hneh a, Midian hotu Evia te, Rekema te, Zura te, Hura te leh Reba te pawh a huam tel a; hêngho hi Sihona hnuaia rorêltu an ni." 
Joshua13:22 Israel miten Beora fapa Balaama, aienthiam chu an that bawk." 
Joshua13:23 Khawthlang lama an ramri chu Jordan lui a ni. Reubena thlahte neih atân khîng khawpuite leh an chhehvêl khuate khi an pe a. 
Joshua13:24 Mosia chuan Gada thlahte chu a chhûng chhûnga insem atân an ram chanpual tûr a pe a. 
Joshua13:25 An ram chuan Jahaz leh Gilead khawpui zawng zawng a huam a, Amon-ho ram zâtve, Raba chhak lama awm Aroer a huam thleng a." 
Joshua13:26 Hesbon leh Ramat-mizpa leh Betonim inkâr ram te, Mahanaim aṭanga Lo-debar ri inkâr te a huam bawk a." 
Joshua13:27 Jordan luidungah chuan Beth-haram te, Beth-nimra te, Sukot te, Zafon te leh Hesbon lal Sihona ram ṭhînte a huam tel bawk a. Khawthlang lama an ramri chu Jordan lui, Galili dîl thlengin a ni." 
Joshua13:28 Gada thlahte neih atân khîng khawpuite leh a chhehvêl khuate khi an pe a. 
Joshua13:29 Mosia chuan Manasea thlah zâtve tân a chhûng chhûnga insem atân ram chanpual an neih tûr a pe a. 
Joshua13:30 An ram chuan Mahanaim aṭanga Basan ram, Basan lal Oga ram zawng zawng a huam a, Basan ram Jair bial khaw sawmruk pawh a huam a ni." 
Joshua13:31 Gilead bial zâtve, Astarot te, Edrei te, Oga ram Basan khawpuite chu a pe tel bawk a. Manasea fa Makira thlahte hnênah khîng ramte khi a pe a ni." 
Joshua13:32 Moab phaia an awm lai khân, Jeriko khaw chhak lam ram chu khitiang khian Mosian a sem a." 
Joshua13:33 Mosian Levia thlahte chu ram a ruatsak ve lo. Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hnêna thilhlan chu an chanpual atân a ruat a ni." 
Joshua14:1 Jordan lui thlang lama Kanan ram chu Israel mite hnênah puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te leh Israel hnam hruaitute chuan hetiang hian an sem a." 
Joshua14:2 Lalpa thupêk angin hnam kua leh a chanve chan tûrin ṭhum an vâwr a, an sem a." 
Joshua14:3 Jordan chhak lama hnam hnih leh a chanve chu Mosian ram chanpual tûr a pe tawh a; an zîngah Levia chite ram a pe ve lo. 
Joshua14:4 Josefa thlahte kha hnam hnih, Manasea leh Efraim hnamah ṭhen an ni a; mahse, Levia thlahte chu ram chanpual a pe ve lo. Awmna khua erawh chu an bâwngte leh berâm leh kêl tlatna tûr ram nên an pe a." 
Joshua14:5 Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang chuan Israel-te chuan ram chu an insem ta a. 
Joshua14:6 Gilgal-a an awm laiin Juda thlah zînga mi ṭhenkhat Josua hnênah an lo kal a. An zînga pakhat, Keniz mi, Jefunea fapa Kaleba chuan Josua hnênah, “Kades-barnea kan awm laia Pathian mi Mosia hnêna kan pahniha chungchâng Lalpa sawi kha i hria a." 
Joshua14:7 Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian he ram hi en thlithlai tûra min tirh khân kum sawmli-a upa ka ni a, thil ka hmuh dân ang chiah ka hrilh a nih kha." 
Joshua14:8 Ka kalpui, ka unaute khân, mipui an tilunghnûr a, kei erawh chuan ka Pathian, Lalpa thu ka zâwm tlat a nih kha." 
Joshua14:9 Kan Pathian, Lalpa thu i zawm tlat avângin i kein a rah ram chu in ram chanpual atân i nei ngei ang,’ tiin Mosian khami ni khân thu a tiam a nih kha." 
Joshua14:10 Khai le, tûnah khatia Mosia hnêna Lalpa thu sawi kha kum sawmli leh panga lai a ni ta a, Israel-te thlalêra an tei an tei lai ata tûn thlengin Lalpa chuan a sawi angin nungdamin min la zuah tâk rêng hi; en teh, kum sawmriat leh panga zu ni ta ia!" 
Joshua14:11 Mosian min tirh lai ang mai khân vawiinah pawh ka la chak a ni. Indonaah pawh kala, duh duha chhuakvâk theiin ka la chak a ni." 
Joshua14:12 Chuvângin, kan kalpuite nêna thu kan thlen laia Lalpa sawi, he lai tlângram hi, min pe ta mai che, Anak mi, milianho chu kulh lian pui puiah an awm tiin kan hrilh che kha; Lalpa chuan min awmpui ang a, Lalpa thupêk angin ka luhchhuak vek mai thei asin,” a ti a." 
Joshua14:13 Josua chuan mal a sâwmsak a, Jefunea fapa Kaleba chu ram chanpual atân Hebron chu a pe ta a." 
Joshua14:14 Tichuan, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa thu chu a awih tak tak avângin tûn thlengin Hebron chu Jefunea fapa, Keniz mi Kaleba ram chanpual a ni ta a." 
Joshua14:15 Hebron chu tûn hma chuan Kiriat-arba tih a ni ṭhîn a, chu chu Arba khua tihna a ni. Arba chu Anak-ho zîngah chuan lal ropui ber a ni. Ram chu a râlmuang ta a." 
Joshua15:1 Juda thlahte, a chhûng chhûnga an insem tûr ram chuan chhim tâwpa Edom ram leh Zin thlalêr a thleng a." 
Joshua15:2 Chhim lam ramri chu Tuipui Thi chhim lam kil tâwpah a inṭan a. 
Joshua15:3 Chhim lam panin Akrabim kalkawng a kal a, Zin thlalêrah a lût a, Kades-barnea chhim lamah Hezron thlengin a kal a, Adar-ah a chho va, Karka lamah a inher a," 
Joshua15:4 Azmon-ah a kal zêl a, Aigupta ramri luiah a chhuk a, lui chu zuiin Mediteranean tuipui a zu chhun a. Hei hi Judai ram chhim lam ri chu a ni." 
Joshua15:5 Khawchhak lam ri chu Tuipui Thi a ni, Jordan lui chhuah thlengin a ni." 
Joshua15:6 Hmâr lam ramri chu Jordan lui chhuahah a inṭan a, Beth-hogla-ah a chho va, Beth-araba hmâr lamah a kal a, Bohana lung a chhun a. Bohana hi Reubena fa a ni." 
Joshua15:7 Akor ruam aṭangin Debir khuaah a chho va, hmâr lam panin chumi ram chhim tâwpa Adumin kalkawng hawi zâwnga awm Gilgal a thleng a. En-semes tuikhurah a kal zêl a, En-rogel-ah a kal a." 
Joshua15:8 Jebus-ho khua Jerusalem awmna chhim lam ruam Hinom chu a thleng a. Hinom thlang lam tlângah ri chu a kal zêl a, Refaim ruamah a chhuk a:" 
Joshua15:9 Neftoa tuikhurah a kal a, Efron tlânga khuaahte chuan a kal tlang a; Baala khaw lamah a inher a; chu khua chu Kiriat-jearim an ti bawk." 
Joshua15:10 Thlang lam hawiin Baala a kal hual a, Seir tlâng a thleng a, Jearim tlâng hmâr lam pangah a kal a, Beth-semes-ah a chhuk a, Timna a kal pêl a," 
Joshua15:11 Ekron khaw hmâr lam tlâng a zui a, Sikeron lamah a inher a, Baala tlâng pêlin Jamnia khua a thleng a, chuta ṭangin Mediteranean tuipuiah a tâwp a." 
Joshua15:12 Tuipui zau tak chu khawthlang lama a ramri a ni. Chu ramri chhûng chu Juda thlahte awmna tûr chu a ni. 
Joshua15:13 Lalpa thupêk angin Josua chuan Jefunea fapa Kaleba chu Juda thlahte ram chan zîngah ram chanpual a pe ve a. Hebron khua, Kiriat-arba an tih, Arba khua chu a nei a, Arba chu Anaka pa a ni." 
Joshua15:14 Kaleba chuan Anaka fate pathum Sesaia te, Ahimana te, Talmaia te chu a ûm chhuak a." 
Joshua15:15 Tûn hmaa Kiriat-sefer an tih ṭhin Debir khua chu a han bei zui a. 
Joshua15:16 Kaleba chuan, ‘Kiriat-sefer han beia latu chu ka fanu Aksaii nupuiah ka pe ang,’ a ti a." 
Joshua15:17 Kenaz mi, Kaleba nau, Othniela chuan khua chu a la a, Aksaii chu nupuiah a nei ta a." 
Joshua15:18 A lawi ni chuan a pa hnêna ram dîl tûrin a lo fuih a. A sabengtung ata a chhuk a; Kaleba chuan a hnênah, “Eng nge i duh ang?” a ti a." 
Joshua15:19 “Min khawngaih la, i ram min pêk hi ram ro a ni a, tui awmna min pe tel ta che,” a ti a. Chuanchung leh chuanhnuai tuihna awmna chu a pe ta a." 
Joshua15:20 A chhûng chhûnga an insem tûr Juda thlahte chan chu hêng hi a ni: 
Joshua15:21 A chhim berah Edom ramri bâka an neihte chu hêng hi a ni: Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona, Adada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedes, Hazor, Itnan," 
Joshua15:24 Zif, Telem, Bealot;" 
Joshua15:25 Hazor-hadata, Kiriot-hezron, Hazor an ti bawk," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Sema, Molada;" 
Joshua15:27 Hazar-gada, Hesmon, Beth-pelet;" 
Joshua15:28 Hazar-sual, Beer-seba, Biziothia;" 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iim, Ezem;" 
Joshua15:30 Eltolad, Kesil, Horma;" 
Joshua15:31 Ziklag, Madmana, Sansana," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaot, Silhim, Ain, Rimon leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, a vaiin khawpui chu sawmhnih leh pakua a ni." 
Joshua15:33 Tlâng bulṭhuta awmte chu: Estaol, Zora, Asna," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa, En-ganim, Tapua, Enam;" 
Joshua15:35 Jarmut, Adulam, Soko, Azeka;" 
Joshua15:36 Saaraim, Adithaim, Gedera, Gederothaim leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui chu sâwm leh pali a ni." 
Joshua15:37 Hêng khuate pawh hi a ni: Zenan, Hadasa, Migdalgad," 
Joshua15:38 Dilean, Mizpa, Joktheel," 
Joshua15:39 Lakis, Boskat, Eglon," 
Joshua15:40 Kabon, Lahmam, Kitlis," 
Joshua15:41 Gederot, Beth-dagon, Naama, Makeda leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui sâwm leh paruk a ni." 
Joshua15:42 Hêng khuate pawh hi a tel: Libna, Ether, Asan," 
Joshua15:43 Ifta, Asna, Nezib," 
Joshua15:44 Keila, Akzib, Maresa leh an chhehvêl khuate nên khawpui pakua a ni." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron pawh a chhehvêl khuate nên a tel. 
Joshua15:46 Asdod bula khawpui leh a chhehvêl khuate, Ekron leh Mediteranean tuipui inkâra khuate pawh a tel." 
Joshua15:47 Asdod leh Gaza, an chhehvêl khuate nên, Aigupta ramri lui nêna an inkâr Mediteranean tuipui kama khaw awmte a tel bawk." 
Joshua15:48 Tlângramah hêng khuate hi a tel bawk: Samir, Jatir, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Danna, Kiriat-sana, Debir tih a ni bawk;" 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Estemo, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Gosen, Holon, Gilo leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui sâwm leh pakhat a ni." 
Joshua15:52 Hêng khuate pawh hi a tel: Arab, Duma, Esan," 
Joshua15:53 Janim, Beth-tapua, Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 Humta, Hebron, Zior leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui pakua a ni." 
Joshua15:55 Hêng khuate pawh hi a tel: Maon, Karmel, Zip, Juta," 
Joshua15:56 Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kain, Gibea, Timna leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui sâwm a ni." 
Joshua15:58 Hêng khuate pawh hi a tel: Halhul, Beth-zur, Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 Maarat, Beth-anot, Eltekon leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui paruk a ni." 
Joshua15:60 Hêng khuate pawh hi a tel: Kiriat-baal, Kiriat-jearim an ti bawk, Raba leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui pahnih a ni." 
Joshua15:61 Thlalêrah hêng khuate hi a awm: Beth-araba, Midin, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibsan, chi khawpui (Ir-hmalak), Engedi leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui paruk a ni." 
Joshua15:63 Juda thlahte chuan Jebus-ho, Jerusalema awmte chu an hnawt chhuak zo lo. Juda thlahte nên, Jebus-ho chu tûn thlengin an la awm ho ta reng a ni." 
Joshua16:1 Josefa thlahte ram chan chhim lam ri chu Jordan luia Jeriko lui chhuah bulah a inṭan a, Jeriko kal tlangin thlang lam tlâng lamah a chho va, thlalêr kal tlangin Bethel a chhun a." 
Joshua16:2 Luz khaw thlengin Ark-ho awmna Atarot-ah a kal a," 
Joshua16:3 thlang lam hawiin Jaflet-ho awmna ram a kal tlang a, Beth-horon chuanhnuai a chhun a. Gezer kal tlangin Mediteranean tuipui a chhun a ni." 
Joshua16:4 Josefa thlahho, Efraim leh Manasea thlahte chuan hei hi ram chanpual atân an chang a ni." 
Joshua16:5 Efraim thlahte, a chhûng chhûnga an insem tûra an chan hmâr lam ramri chu hetiang hi a ni: Chhak lama awm Atarot-adar leh Beth-horon inkâr a ni." 
Joshua16:6 Hmâr tâwp khua Mikmethat aṭangin khawchhak lam panin ri chu Tanat-silo-ah a kal a, Janoa khuaah te," 
Joshua16:7 Atarot khuaah te, Naara khuaah te a kal a, Jeriko a chhun a, Jordan lui a thleng a." 
Joshua16:8 Khawthlang lamah Mikmethat khua aṭangin Tapua khuaah, Kana luia chhuakin luidung chu a zui a, Mediteranean a zu thleng a. Chumi chhûng ram chu Efraima thlahten a chhûng chhûnga an insem tûra an chan ram chu a ni." 
Joshua16:9 Manasea thlahte chan aṭangin Efraim-ho chu khawpui ṭhenkhat, an chhehvêl khuate nên an pe bawk a." 
Joshua16:10 Gezer khuaa lo awm Kanan mite chu an ûm chhuak lo, tûn thlengin chûng Kanan mite chu Efraim-ho zîngah an la awm, chhiahhlawhah an chhawr a ni." 
Joshua17:1 Josefa fa tîr, Manasea thlahte ram chan chu hei hi a ni: Josefa fapa upa zâwk Manasea fapa Makira, Gileada pa chu, mi huaisen a ni a. Jordan chhak lama Gilead leh Basan ram chu a chanpualah an pe a." 
Joshua17:2 Jordan thlang lamah Manasea fa dangte tân ram an pe bawk a, chûng mite chu: Abiazera, Heleka, Asriela, Sekema, Hefera leh Semida te an ni. Hêngho hi Josefa fapa Manasea fa, mipaho chhûngkaw lute chu an ni." 
Joshua17:3 Hefera fapa Zelofehada chuan fapa nei lovin fanu chauh a nei a. A pu chu Makira, Manasea fa a ni. Zelofehada fanute chu, Mahlaii te, Novaii te, Hoglaii te, Milkaii te, Tirzaii te an ni." 
Joshua17:4 Puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te leh Israel hnam hotu te hnênah an lo kal a, “ Lalpa chuan kan unau mipate ang bawkin ram min pe ve tûrin Mosia a hrilh kha,” an rawn ti a. Lalpa thupêk ang chuan an unau mipate ang bawkin ram chu an chang ve ta a." 
Joshua17:5 Jordan chhak lama Gilead leh Basan ram telin Manasea thlahte chan sâwm an nei bîk a ni. 
Joshua17:6 Mipa ang bawka an fa hmeichhiaten ram an chan ve tâk avângin Gilead ram chu Manasea thlah dangten an chang ta a ni. 
Joshua17:7 Manasea thlahte ram chan chu Aser-ho ram chan aṭangin Sekem khaw chhak lam Mikmethat khaw inkâr chu a ni. Chhim zâwngin ramri chu a kal a, Entapua-a awmte chu a huam a." 
Joshua17:8 Tapua ram hi Manase-ho chan a ni, a khawpui Tapua erawh hi chu Efraim-ho ta a ni." 
Joshua17:9 Ramri chu Kana luitêah a chhuk a. Luite kam chhim lama khuate chu Efraim-ho ta a ni, Manase-ho ram chhûnga awm ni mah se; ramri chu luite hmâr lam kamah a kal zêl a, Mediteranean tuipuiah a chhuak a." 
Joshua17:10 Chhim lamah Efraim-ho an awm a, hmâr lamah Manase-ho an awm a nih chu; Aser-ho chu hmârthlang lamah an awm a, an ram hmârchhak lamah Isakar-ho an awm a." 
Joshua17:11 Aser-ho leh Isakar-ho chan chhûngah Manase khua Beth-sean leh Ibleam khawpui, an chhehvêl khuate nên a awm. Tuipui kama Dor khua te, Endor te, Taanak te, Megido te leh an chhehvêl khuate pawh a awm." 
Joshua17:12 Hêng khuaa awmte hi Manasea thlahte chuan an ûm chhuak thei lo; chuvângin, Kanan-ho chu an la awm ta zêl a ni." 
Joshua17:13 Israel-ho an lo chak hle hnu pawh khân an hnawt chhuak chuang lo, hna thawk tûr erawh chuan an phût lui ṭhîn." 
Joshua17:14 Josefa thlahte chuan, “ Lalpa chuan mal min sâwm a, kan rual ta hle si a, hmun khat chauh engati nge min pêk le?” an ti a." 
Joshua17:15 Josua chuan, “In rual viau a, Efraim tlângram hi a zîm deuh a nih chuan Periz leh Refaim-ho awmna ram ngâwte han tu-dar mai rawh u,” a ti a." 
Joshua17:16 Anni chuan, “A tlângram ngawt chu a zîm deuh vang; phaia Kanan-ho lahin thîr-tawlailîr an nei a; Jezreel phaia awmte leh Beth-sean khawpui leh a chhehvêl khuate chuan indo thîr-tawlailîr an nei vek a ni,” an ti a." 
Joshua17:17 Josua chuan Efraim leh Manasea thlahte chu a chhâng a, “In parual hle a, in chak hle bawk alâwm. Chan khat mai ni lo in nei dâwn nia." 
Joshua17:18 Tlângram khi in chan tûr a ni ang. Ngaw hlîr ni mah se, tu-dar ula, a pumin hneh ang che u, Kanan-ho chu an thîr-tawlailîrte nên chak hle mah se, in ûm chhuak mai ang,” a ti a." 
Joshua18:1 Israel mite chu Silo-ah an lo pung khâwm a, Inbiakna bûk kha an zâr a, ram chu an la tawh a." 
Joshua18:2 Israel zîngah hnam sarih an chan tûr sem ve loh an la awm a. 
Joshua18:3 Josua chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa, in pate Pathianin ram a pêk che u hi in va luah har ve?" 
Joshua18:4 Hnam tinin mi pathum thlang chhuak ula, anni chu ram fang chhuak tûrin ka lo tîr ang e; hnam tin chanpual tûr ruat sela, ka hnênah rawn thlen rawh se." 
Joshua18:5 Ram chu hmun sarihah ṭhen sela, Juda leh Josefa thlahte chu an chan ram chhûngah an awm mai ang." 
Joshua18:6 Ram hmun sariha ṭhen dân tûr chu an ziak chhuak ang a, an rawn keng ang a, keiin Lalpa, kan Pathian hmaah ṭhum ka lo vâwrsak ang che u." 
Joshua18:7 Levia chite chu sem ve suh u, Lalpa puithiam hna hi an chanvo ve tûr chu a ni si a. Reubena te, Gada te leh Manasea thlah zâtve te lahin Jordan chhak lamah, Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosia khân an chan tûr chu a pêk tawh kha,” a ti a." 
Joshua18:8 Josua sawi anga ti tûr chuan mite chu an thawk chhuak a, an hnênah, “Ram pum fang chhuak ula, chhinchhiah vek ang che u; chutah in lo haw leh dâwn nia. Keiin Lalpa hmaah ṭhum ka lo vâwrsak ang che u,” a ti a." 
Joshua18:9 Chûng mite chu an chhuak a, ram chu an fang vek a, khawpui awmte chhinchhiah vekin hmun sarihah an sem a, an ziak chhuak a. Silo khuaa riahhmunah Josua hnênah an ziakna bu chu an rawn hâwn a." 
Joshua18:10 Silo khuaah chuan Josuan Lalpa hmaah ṭhum a vâwr a, Israel mite chu a hnam hnamin ram chu a sem ta a." 
Joshua18:11 Benjamin thlahte chan tûr, a chhûng chhûnga insem tûr chu ruat hmasak ber a ni a, Juda leh Josefa thlahte inkârah an awm ta a." 
Joshua18:12 An hmâr lam ramri chu Jordan lui aṭangin Jeriko ep tlâng pangah a chho va; khawthlang zâwngin Beth-aven thlalêr a thleng a. 
Joshua18:13 Luz khuaah (Bethel an ti bawk) a kal zêl a, chhim lam zâwngin a kal a, Atarot-adar, Beth-horon tlâng chuanhnuaia khua chu a thleng a." 
Joshua18:14 He tlâng thlang lamah, chhim zâwngin ramri chu a inher a, Kiriat-baal khua, Kiriat-jearim an tih bawk chu a thleng a; he khua hi Juda thlahte chan khawpui a ni. Hei hi khawthlang lama a ramri chu a ni." 
Joshua18:15 Chhim lam ramri chu Kiriat-jearim aṭangin a inṭan a, chhak lam panin Nefto tuikhurah a kal a." 
Joshua18:16 Hinom chhuntu tlângdunga kalin Refaim phai luhnaah a chhuk a, Hinom ruam a pan a, Jebus-ho khaw chhim lamah a kal a, En-rogel a thleng a." 
Joshua18:17 Hmâr lamah a inher a, En-semes a thleng a; Adumin kalkawng epa Gelilot khuaah a kal a, Bohana lungah (Bohana chu Reubena fapa a ni) a kal zêl a." 
Joshua18:18 Jordan dep tlâng hmâr lama kalin ruamah a chhuk a," 
Joshua18:19 Beth-hogla tlângdung hmâr lamah a kal zêl a, Jordan lui chhuah Tuipui Thiah a chhuak a ni." 
Joshua18:20 Hei hi Benjamina thlah chhûng tin ram chan tûr ramri chu a ni. 
Joshua18:21 Benjamina thlah, a chhûng chhûnga an insem tûr khuate chu hêng hi a ni: Jeriko, Beth-hogla, Emek-kezia;" 
Joshua18:22 Beth-araba, Zemaraim, Bethel;" 
Joshua18:23 Avim, Para, Ofra;" 
Joshua18:24 Kefaramoni, Ofni, Geba leh an chhehvêl khuate nên khawpui sâwm leh pahnih a ni." 
Joshua18:25 Gibeon te, Rama te, Beerot te," 
Joshua18:26 Mizpa te, Kafira te, Moza te," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem te, Irpeel te, Tarala te," 
Joshua18:28 Zela te, Haelef te, Jebus te (Jerusalem an ti bawk), Gibea te, Kiriat-jearim te leh an chhehvêl khua te nên, khawpui sâwm leh pali a ni. Hêng hi Benjamin thlah chhûng tin chan tûr khua chu a ni." 
Joshua19:1 Chan hnihna chu Simeona thlahten a chhûng chhûnga an insem tûrin an chang a. An ram chan chu Juda thlahte ram chan chhûnga mi a ni. 
Joshua19:2 Hêng hi a huam: Beer-seba, Seba, Molada;" 
Joshua19:3 Hazar-sual, Bala, Ezem;" 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad, Bethul, Horma;" 
Joshua19:5 Ziklag, Beth-markabot, Hazar-susa;" 
Joshua19:6 Beth-lebaot, Saruhen leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui chu sâwm leh pathum a ni." 
Joshua19:7 Hêng pawh hi a tel: Ain, Rimon, Ether, Asan leh an chhehvêl khuate, khawpui pali a ni." 
Joshua19:8 Hei hian an chhehvêl khua Balat-beer (Rama an tih bawk) chhim lam thlengin a huam a ni. Simeona thlahte chuan he lai ram hi an chanpual atâna an dawn chu a ni. 
Joshua19:9 Juda thlahte hian an mamawh aia zau ram an neih avângin an ram ṭhenkhat chu Simeona thlahte hnêna pêk a ni. 
Joshua19:10 Zebuluna thlahten a chhûng chhûnga insem tûr ram chan thumna chu an chang a, a chhim tâwpah Sarid khua a awm." 
Joshua19:11 Chuta ṭangin thlang lamah Marala a pan a, Dabeset pal tlangin Jokneam chhak lama luiah a chhuak a." 
Joshua19:12 Sarid chhak lamah Kislot-tabor ramri a han chhun a, Daberat pal tlangin ramri chu Jafia-ah a chho va." 
Joshua19:13 Chhuk zâwngin Gath-hefer-ah a kal zêl a, Eth-kazin thlengin Rimon kawnga Nea panin a kual a." 
Joshua19:14 Hmâr lam panin ramri chu Hanathon-ah a kal a, Iftahel ruamah a tâwp a ni." 
Joshua19:15 Kata te, Nahalal te, Simron te, Idala te, Bethlehem te leh an chhehvêl khuate nên khawpui sâwm leh pahnih a huam tel a ni." 
Joshua19:16 Zebulun-ho chan ramah chuan hêng khawpui leh an chhehvêl khuate hi a awm a ni. 
Joshua19:17 Chan lina chu Isakara thlahte chuan a chhûng chhûnga insem tûrin an chang a. 
Joshua19:18 Hêng hi a huam: Jezreel, Kesulot, Sunem;" 
Joshua19:19 Haferaim, Sion, Anaharat," 
Joshua19:20 Rabit, Kision, Ebez;" 
Joshua19:21 Remet, En-ganim, En-hada, Beth-pazez." 
Joshua19:22 An ramri chuan Tabor tlâng a kal tlang a, Sahazumai leh Beth-semes kal tlangin Jordan a thleng a, khawpui sâwm leh paruk leh an chhehvêl khuate nên a huam a." 
Joshua19:23 Isakara thlahte chuan chhûng tin insem tûrin hêng khawpuite hi, an chhehvêl khuate nên an chang a ni." 
Joshua19:24 Chan ngana chu Asera thlahte chuan a chhûng chhûnga insem tûrin an chang a. 
Joshua19:25 Hêng hi a huam tel: Helkat, Hali, Beten, Aksaf;" 
Joshua19:26 Alam Melek, Amad, Misal. Khawthlang lama a ramri chuan Karmel leh Sihor-libnat a pal tlang a," 
Joshua19:27 khawchhak zâwngin a inher a, Beth-dagon pal tlangin Zebulun ram a chhun a, Iftahel ruamah a lût a, hmâr lam panin Beth-emek leh Neiel a pan a, Kabul a thleng a." 
Joshua19:28 Ebron-ah te, Rehob-ah te, Hamon-ahte, Kana-ah te a kal a, Sidon khawpui a chhun a." 
Joshua19:29 Ramri chu a inher a, Rama leh Tura khawpui kulh a chhun a, Hosa-ah a inher a, Mediteranean tuipuiah a tâwp a. Mahalab te, Akzib te," 
Joshua19:30 Uma te, Afek te, Rehob te leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui sawmhnih leh pahnih a ni." 
Joshua19:31 Hêng khawpui leh an chhehvêl khuate hi Asera thlahte chuan chhûng tin insem atân an ram chan chu a ni. 
Joshua19:32 Chan rukna chu Naftalia thlahte chuan a chhûng chhûnga an insem tûrin an chang a. 
Joshua19:33 Hmâr lam ramri chu Helef-ah a inṭan a, chhak lamah Elon-Bazananim kal tlangin Adami-nekeb-ah a kal a, Jabneel tlawhin Lakum a thleng a, Jordan-ah a tâwp a." 
Joshua19:34 Khawthlang lam panin Aznot-tabor-ah a kal a, Hukok a thleng a, chhim lamah Zebulun hrûlah a kal a, Aser-ho ram a va chhun a. Chhak lamah Jordan, thlang lamah Aser-ho ram a ri a." 
Joshua19:35 Kulh nei khua te: Zidim, Zer, Hamath, Rakat, Kineret;" 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Hazor;" 
Joshua19:37 Kedes, Edrei, En-hazor;" 
Joshua19:38 Iron, Migdalel, Horem, Bethanat, Beth-semes leh an chhehvêl khuate nên, khawpui sâwm leh pakua a huam tel." 
Joshua19:39 Hêng khawpuite leh an chhehvêl khuate hi Naftali thlahte chuan chhûng tin insem atân an chang. 
Joshua19:40 Chan sarihna chu Dana thlahten a chhûng chhûnga insem atân an chang a. 
Joshua19:41 Hêng hi a huam: Zora, Estaol, Ir-semes;" 
Joshua19:42 Saalabin, Aijalon, Ithla;" 
Joshua19:43 Elon, Timna, Ekron;" 
Joshua19:44 Elteke, Gibethon, Baalat;" 
Joshua19:45 Jehud, Bene-berak, Gath-rimon;" 
Joshua19:46 Mejarkon, Rakon leh Jopa khaw vêl ramte nên." 
Joshua19:47 Dana thlahte hi hmêlmaten an ram an lâksak a, Lais khuaah an kal a; an bei a, an la a, mite chu an that a; anmahni tân an nei ta a. A khaw hming hi an thlahtu hming chawiin Dan an ti a." 
Joshua19:48 Hêng khawpuite leh an chhehvêl khuate hi Dana thlahte chuan chhûng tin insem tûrin an chang a. 
Joshua19:49 Ram an insem zawh chuan, Israel mite chuan Nuna fapa Josua chu a hranpain ram an pe ve a." 
Joshua19:50 Lalpa thupêk angin a duhthlan Timnat-sera khua an pe a, Efraim tlângrama awm a ni; khua chu a din ṭha a, a awm ta a." 
Joshua19:51 Puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te leh Israel hnam hruaitu te chuan hêng ram hrang hrang hi ṭhumvâwrin Silo khuaah chuan Inbiakna bûk kawngkaah an sem fel ta a ni." 
Joshua20:1 Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah 
Joshua20:2 “Israel mite hrilh rawh, Mosia ka hrilh ang khân inhumhimna tûr khua ruat rawh u." 
Joshua20:3 Tihpalh emaw, hmuh loh avâng emawa mihring tihlum palhte thisen phuba latu laka an tlân a, an him theih nân." 
Joshua20:4 Chûng khuaah chuan an tlân ang a, khawpui luhnaah an ding ang a, chu khaw upate hnênah chuan an lo tlân chhan an hrilh tûr a ni; anni chuan hmun an lo ngaihtuahsak ang a, an zîngah an awmtîr ang." 
Joshua20:5 Thisen phuba latuin an rawn ûm pawhin an lo hum tûr a ni; an tihpalh a ni a, huat vânga tihlum an ni lo." 
Joshua20:6 Chu khuaah chuan Israel pungkhâwmin a chungthu an rêl fel hma emaw, puithiam lalber ṭang lai a thih hma emaw a awm tûr a ni; chumi zawhah chuan mi that palhtu chu a lo kalna, an khuaah, ama inah ngei a haw leh thei tawh ang." 
Joshua20:7 Hêng khuate hi Israel mite tân leh an zînga awm hnam dangte tân inhumhimna tûra an ruatte chu a ni; Kades khua, Naftali ram tlângram Galili bialah; Sekem khua, Efraim-ho ram tlângramah; Kiriat-arba khua (Hebron an ti bawk), Juda thlahte ram chhûng tlângramah." 
Joshua20:8 Jordan chhak lamah: Bezer khua, Reuben-ho ram tlâng zâwl thlalêr khuaah; Ramot khua, Gad-ho bialah; Golan khua, Manasea-ho ram Basan bialah." 
Joshua20:9 Khîng khi a ni Israel mite leh an zînga hnam dang awmte tâna inhumhimna tûr khua an ruatte chu. Tu pawhin mi tihlum palh sela, hêng khuaah hian an tlân thei ang; an chungthu Israel pung khâwmin an rel fel hma chu thisen phuba latu kutah an thi mai dâwn lo nia." 
Joshua21:1 Levia chi hruaitute chu, puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te leh Israel hnam hruaitute hnênah," 
Joshua21:2 Kanan ram Silo khuaah chuan an lo kal a, “ Lalpa chuan kan awmna tûr, khawpuite leh a chhehvêl ran tlatna tûr ram âwl pe tûrin Mosia chu a hrilh kha,” an rawn ti a." 
Joshua21:3 Israel mite chuan, an ram chan chhûngah hêng khawpuite hi, a chhehvêl ram âwl, ran tlatna tûr nên, Lalpa thu angin Levia chite chu an pe a." 
Joshua21:4 Levia thlah zîngah Kohata thlahte chu khawpui an sem hmasa ber a. Arona thlah puithiamho chu Juda thlah te, Simeona thlahte leh Benjamina thlahte ram chan aṭangin khawpui sâwm leh pathum an pe a." 
Joshua21:5 Kohata thlahte chu Efraim te, Dan te leh khawthlang lama Manase thlah zâtve ram aṭangin khawpui sâwm an pe a." 
Joshua21:6 Gersona thlahte chu Isakar te, Naftali te, khawthlang lama Manase te chan aṭangin khawpui sâwm leh pathum an pe a." 
Joshua21:7 Meraria thlahte chu Reuben te, Gad te leh Zebulun ram aṭang tein khawpui sâwm leh pahnih an pe a." 
Joshua21:8 Mosia hnênah Lalpa thupêk angin Israel mite chuan ṭhumvâwrin hêng khuate hi a chhehvêl ram âwl, ran tlatna tûr nên Levia chite chu an pe a." 
Joshua21:9 Juda leh Manasea thlahte ram aṭangin hêng khawpuite hi 
Joshua21:10 Levia thlah Kohata fa Arona thlahte hnêna an pêk chu a ni a; anni hi khua an sem dawng hmasa ber an ni. 
Joshua21:11 Juda tlângram khawpui Anaka pa, Arba khua, Hebron an tih bawk chu, a chhehvêla ram âwlte nên an pe a." 
Joshua21:12 A khawpui chhehvêla ram leh khuate chu Jefunea fapa Kaleba hnêna pêk a nih tawh kha. 
Joshua21:13 Inhumhimna tûr khuaa ruat Hebron khaw bâkah hêng khawpuite hi puithiam Arona thlahte tân an ruat: Libna," 
Joshua21:14 Jatir, Estemoa," 
Joshua21:15 Holon, Debir," 
Joshua21:16 Ain, Juta, Beth-semes, an chhehvêl ram âwlte nên Juda leh Simeona thlahte ram chan aṭangin khawpui pakua an pe a." 
Joshua21:17 Benjamin ram aṭangin hêng khawpui pali hi an pe bawk: Gibeon, Geba," 
Joshua21:18 Anathot, Almon leh an chhehvêl ram âwlte nên." 
Joshua21:19 A vaiin khaw sâwm leh pathum, an chhehvêl ram âwl, ran tlatna tûr nên puithiam Arona thlahte chu an pe a." 
Joshua21:20 Levia fa Kohata thlah dangte hnênah Efraim-ho ram aṭangin khaw ṭhenkhat an pe bawk. 
Joshua21:21 Khawpui pali an pe; inhumhimna tûra ruat Efraim tlângrama khawpui Sekem te, Gezer te," 
Joshua21:22 Kibzaim te, Beth-horon te leh an chhehvêl ram âwlte nên." 
Joshua21:23 Dan ram aṭangin khaw pali an pe bawk: Elteke te, Gibethon te," 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon te, Gath-rimon te leh an chhehvêl ram âwlte nên." 
Joshua21:25 Thlang lama awm Manasea thlahte ram aṭangin khawpui pahnih an pe: Taanak leh Gath-rimon leh an chhehvêl ram âwlte nên. 
Joshua21:26 Kohata thlah dangte hnênah chuan hêng khaw sâwm leh an chhehvêl ram âwl; ran tlatna tûr te nên an pe a. 
Joshua21:27 Levia chi, pâwl khat, Gersona thlahte chu chhak lam Manasea thlahte rama mi khawpui pahnih an pe a; inhumhimna tûra ruat Basan biala Golan leh Beestera te leh an chhehvêl ram âwl, ran tlatna tûr nên." 
Joshua21:28 Isakara thlahte ram aṭangin khawpui pali - Kision te, Daberat te," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmut te, En-ganim te, an chhehvêl ram âwl, ran tlatna tûr nên an pe a." 
Joshua21:30 Aser-ho ram aṭangin khawpui pali - Misal te, Abdon te," 
Joshua21:31 Helkat te, Rehob te leh an chhehvêl ram awl, ran tlatna tûr nên an pe a." 
Joshua21:32 Naftali-ho ram aṭangin khawpui pathum - inhumhimna tûra ruat Galili rama Kedes te, Hamot-dor te, Kartan te leh an chhehvêl ram âwl ran tlatna tûr nên an pe a." 
Joshua21:33 Gersona thlah chhûngkaw hrang hrang chuan khawpui sâwm leh pathum leh a vêl ram âwl ran tlatna tûr nên an chang. 
Joshua21:34 Levia chi mi dang, Meraria thlahte chu Zebulun-ho ram aṭangin khawpui pali - Jokneam te, Karta te," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna te, Nahalal te leh an chhehvêl ram âwl, ran tlatna tûrte nên an pe a." 
Joshua21:36 Reuben-ho ram aṭangin khawpui pali - Bezer te, Jahaz te," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemot te, Mefaat te leh an chhehvêl ram âwl; ran tlatna tûr nên an pe a." 
Joshua21:38 Gad-ho ram aṭangin khawpui pali - inhumhimna tûra ruat Gilead biala Ramot te, Mahanaim te," 
Joshua21:39 Hesbon te, Jazer te, an chhehvêl ram âwl; ran tlatna tûr te nên an pe a." 
Joshua21:40 Meraria thlahte chu a vaiin khawpui sâwm leh pahnih an pe. 
Joshua21:41 Israel mite ram chhûnga Levia chite khawpui atâna ruat chu khaw sawmli leh pariat a ni, an chhehvêl ram âwl, ran tlatna tûr nên." 
Joshua21:42 Lalpa chuan an thlahtute hnêna ram pêk a tiam tlat ram zawng zawng chu Israel mite hnênah chuan a pe ta a. An lâk hnu chuan an luah ta a. 
Joshua21:43 An thlahtute hnêna pêk a lo tiam tawh ram chu Lalpa chuan Israel-te chu a pe a, an lâk hnu chuan awmhmun an khuar ta a." 
Joshua21:44 Lalpa chuan a tiam angin ram pum chu a tirâlmuang a; an hmêlmate a hnehtîr zêl ṭhin avângin tu mahin an lo dang zo lo. 
Joshua21:45 Israel-te hnêna thu a tiam tawh phawt chu Lalpa chuan a hlen zêl a ni. 
Joshua22:1 Josua chuan Reubena thlah te, Gada thlahte leh Manasea thlah zâtve te chu a ko va," 
Joshua22:2 an hnênah, “ Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia thu in awih a, ka hrilh apiang che u in zâwm zêl a;" 
Joshua22:3 in unaute chu hun rei tak chhûng hâwnsan mai lovin in Pathian, Lalpa thupêk in zâwm thlap zêl a." 
Joshua22:4 Tûnah zawng, Lalpa, in Pathianin a tiam angin in unau Israel-te chu râlmuang takin a awmtîr tâk hi. Chuvângin, Lalpa, in Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosian Jordan râla ram a pêk che u-ah haw tawh rawh u le." 
Joshua22:5 Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian dân a pêk che u kha zâwm ngei ula, in Pathian, Lalpa chu hmangaihin a thupêkte chu awih ula, a duhzâwng ti ṭhîn ula, amah chu vuan tlatin, tihtak zet leh ṭhahnemngai takin a rawng bâwl ang che u,” a ti a." 
Joshua22:6 Tichuan, Josuan mal a sâwm a, a hawtîr a; in lamah an haw ta a." 
Joshua22:7 Mosia khân Manasea thlah zâtve chu Jordan chhak lamah Basan ram a pe a, a zâtve dang hnênah Josuan Jordan thlang lamah ram a pe bawk a. Josuan a hâwntîr khân mal a sâwm a," 
Joshua22:8 “Berâm leh kêl te, tangka leh rangkachak te, dâr leh thîr te leh thawmhnaw tam tak nên, hausa hnawkin in haw dâwn a, in hmêlmate thil in lâksakte chu in unau dangte sem ve ang che u,” a ti a." 
Joshua22:9 Reubena thlah te, Gada thlah te leh Manasea thlah zâtve te chu Silo khua aṭang chuan an haw ta a. Israel dangte chu Kanan rama Silo khuaah chuan an kalsan a. Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk angin an ram chan Gilead ram chu an pan ta a." 
Joshua22:10 Reubena thlah te, Gada thlahte leh Manasea thlah zâtve te chuan Jordan thlang lama awm, Kanan rama Galilot chu an thleng a, lui kamah chuan hmuhnawm tham taka ropuiin maichâm an siam a." 
Joshua22:11 Israel mi dangte chu, “Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te leh Manase-ho te chuan Kanan ram Jordan lui kamah, Israel mite ram lamah chuan maichâm an siam luah mai,” tiin an rawn hrilh a." 
Joshua22:12 Israel pungkhâwmhovin an lo hriatin beih an tum a, Silo-ah an lo kal khâwm a." 
Joshua22:13 Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Manase-ho zâtve te chu Gilead-a an awm laiin Israel mite chuan puithiam Eleazara fapa Finehasa chu," 
Joshua22:14 Israel hnam sâwm hruaitute, khawthlang lam hnam sâwm hruaitu ber pakhat zêl nên an tîr a." 
Joshua22:15 Gilead an lo thleng a, Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te leh Manase-ho zâtve te hnênah chuan," 
Joshua22:16 “Pungkhâwmho, Lalpa mite chuan, he thil sual tak hi Israel-te Pathian chungah engtiziaa ti nge in nih? He maichâm in siam hi Lalpa chungah in hel ta tihna a ni, a thu in awih ta lo a nih hi." 
Joshua22:17 Peor hmuna thil sual kan tih kha in la hre reng lâwm ni? Lalpa chuan ama mite ngei pawh hri a veitîr a, a hrem a nih kha." 
Joshua22:18 Lalpa chu engtizia nge in zui duh loh? Vawiina Lalpa chunga in hel avângin naktûkah chuan Israel pungkhâwmho chungah a thinur dâwn asin. 
Joshua22:19 In ram hi amah biakna tlâk loh khawpa bawlhhlawh a nih chuan Lalpa bûk, Inbiakna bûk awmna lamah lo kal ula, kan zîngah ram in nei ve mai tûr alâwm; Lalpa lakah leh kan laka helin kan Pathian maichâm lo chu maichâm dang siam teh suh u." 
Joshua22:20 Zera fapa Akana khân thil serh a bawhchhia a, Israel pungkhâwmho chungah thinurna a thleng a, amah mai ni lovin mi dang pawh an thih kha,” an ti a." 
Joshua22:21 Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Manase-ho zâtvete chuan Israel hotute chu an chhâng a," 
Joshua22:22 “ Lalpa chu pathiante Pathian a ni. Pathiante Pathian, Lalpa chuan kan tih chhan a hria alâwm; nangni pawhin hre ve ula kan duh asin. Lalpa laka hel kan niha, a laka rinawm lo kan nih chuan, min zuah lo mai rawh u." 
Joshua22:23 Lalpa thu awih lovin hâlral thilhlan te, buhbâl thilhlan te, remna thilhlante kan hlanna tûr keimahni maichâm kan siam a nih hrim chuan Lalpa ngei chuan min hrem rawh se." 
Joshua22:24 Chutiang a ni lo; nakinah in thlahten kan thlahte hnênah hetiang hian an la ti ang tih kan hlau a ni zâwk: 
Joshua22:25 ‘ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu be ve tûr em in nih? Jordan lui chu Reuben leh Gad-ho nêna kan inri atân a siam a, Lalpa hi be ve tûr in ni lo’ tiin in thlahte chuan kan thlahte an la khap mai ang." 
Joshua22:26 Tichuan, hâlral thilhlan leh inthawina chi dang hlan nân maichâm hi siam kan ni lo." 
Joshua22:27 In mite leh kan mite, ṭhangthar zêlten, Lalpa hnênah ngei kan hâlral thilhlan te, remna thilhlante leh inthawinate kan hlân ṭhîn tih an hriat theih nân leh in thlahten kan thlahte hnênah, ‘ Lalpa rawn be tûr in ni lo,’ an tih loh nâna siam kan ni." 
Joshua22:28 Chuvângin, chutianga kan thlahte hnêna an tih tâkin ‘Min thlahtute hian Lalpa maichâm ang chiahin he maichâm hi an lo siam a ni, hâlral thilhlan emaw, inthawina emaw kan hlanna tûr a ni lo,’ tia an chhân theih nân siam kan ni." 
Joshua22:29 Lalpa lakah hel kan tum awzâwng lo, amah hawisanin kan thilhlan hâlna, kan buhbâl thilhlan leh inthawinate hlanna tûr maichâm hrang siam kan tum a ni hek lo, kan Pathian maichâm, a Bâwkte kawta mi lo kha chu maichâm hrang kan din dâwn hauh lo,” an ti a." 
Joshua22:30 Puithiam Finehasa leh pungkhâwmho hruaitu, khawthlang lama awm hnam hruaitu sâwmte chuan Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Jordan chhak lam Manase-ho zâtve te thu chu an hriatin an lungawi ta a." 
Joshua22:31 Finehasa, Puithiam Eleazara fapa chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa zawngin min lo awmpui ngei zawng a lo ni tih kan hre ta e; Lalpa lakah in lo hel loh hi; Lalpa pawhin Israel-te a hrem dâwn lo a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Joshua22:32 Reubena leh Gada thlahte awmna Gilead aṭang chuan puithiam Eliazara fapa Finehasa leh Israel hotute chu Israel mite awmna Kanan ramah chuan an kîr a, an thu chu an thlen a." 
Joshua22:33 Israel mite chu an lung a awi ta a, Pathian an fak a; Reubena leh Gada thlahte chu an awmna ram aṭanga nuai bo tûra thawh chhuah thu an sawi ta lo va." 
Joshua22:34 Reubena thlah leh Gada thlahte chuan chu maichâm chu “Kan inkârah Lalpa hi Pathian chu a ni tih hretu a ni,” an ti a, Thuhretu an vuah a." 
Joshua23:1 Lalpa chuan Israel-te chu an hmêlmate laka rei fe râlmuang taka a awmtîr hnu chuan Josua chu a kum a tamin a lo upa ta hle a. 
Joshua23:2 Israel mi zawng zawng - upa te, hruaitu te, rorêltu te leh hotu te chu a ko khâwm a, an hnênah, “Ka lo upain ka lo tar ta hle mai a:" 
Joshua23:3 Nangmahni avângin hêng lai hnamte chunga in Pathian, Lalpa thiltihte in hmu a; Lalpa, in Pathian chu in hmêlmate dosaktu che u a ni." 
Joshua23:4 Kan hneh tawhho hnam awmna ram leh kan la hneh lohte awmna ram chu in ram chanpual atân ka sem fel vek tawh che u a ni; khawchhak lamah Jordan lui aṭanga khawthlang lama Mediteranean tuipui thlengin. 
Joshua23:5 Lalpa in Pathianin in hmaah a tlânchhiattîr zêl ang a, a ûm bo vek ang; Lalpa, in Pathianin a tiam tawh angin an ram chu in neihsak ngei ang." 
Joshua23:6 Chuvângin, Mosia dân lehkhabua ziak apiang awih tum tlat ula, ti ngei ang che u, pakhat mah hmaih suh ang che u." 
Joshua23:7 In zînga hnam dang la awmte nên hian inchiahpiah suh u; an pathian lam suh ula, an hming chhâlin chhia chham hek suh u: chibai bûkin an hmaah kûn tawp suh ang che u." 
Joshua23:8 Lalpa chu vuan tlat zâwk ang che u, tûn thleng pawha in la vuan ang hian." 
Joshua23:9 Hnam tam tak leh chak pui pui in hmaah Lalpa chuan a hnawt chhuak zêl a, tu mah lo dang thei che u an awm lo a ni." 
Joshua23:10 “A tiam angin Lalpa in Pathian chuan in hmêlmate a dosak che u avângin mi pakhat pawhin sâng têl in ûm a nih kha. 
Joshua23:11 Lalpa, in Pathian chu hmangaih ngei ngei ang che u." 
Joshua23:12 In hawisana, in zînga hnam dang lo awmte nên in inchiahpiaha, in inneih pawlh vaih chuan," 
Joshua23:13 Lalpa, in Pathian chuan hêng hnamte hi in hmaah a hnawh chhuahsak tawh hauh lo vang che u. Lalpa, in Pathianin he ram ṭha tak a pêk che u aṭanga in boral vek hma chu in tân thang leh tlâkna khur hlauhawm an ni ang a, vuakna hruihrual leh mita chhuntu hlîng an ni ang tih hre chiang rawh u." 
Joshua23:14 “Ngai teh u, tûnah zawng, leilung dân angin ka kal a hun ta. Tu pawhin ngun taka in chhût chuan Lalpa, in Pathian chuan thil ṭha a tiam zawng zawng che u chu a pe zêl che u tih in hria ang. A tiam ang chuan a ti zêl a, pakhat mah tih loh a nei lo." 
Joshua23:15 Lalpa, in Pathian chuan thil ṭha a tiam chu a hlen zêl ang ngeiin a pêk che u ram aṭanga in boral vek hma chu thil ṭha lo tih a tiam pawh chu a ti ngei ang." 
Joshua23:16 Lalpa, in Pathianin zâwm tûra a tih che u, a thuthlung chu in bawhchhiata, pathian dangte in pana, an rawng in bâwl chuan, Lalpa thinur chu a alh ang a, ram ṭha tak a pêk che u aṭang hian in boral mai ang,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:1 Josua chuan Israel hnamte chu Sekem khuaah a ko khâwm a. Israel upa te, an hnam hruaitu te, rorêltu te leh hotu te chu Pathian hmaah an rawn inlan a." 
Joshua24:2 Josua chuan mi zawng zawng hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Hmânlaiin in thlahtute chu Eufretis lui piahah an awm ṭhîn a, pathian dangte an be ṭhîn. Chûng zînga pakhat chu Abrahama leh Nahora pa Tera a ni." 
Joshua24:3 In pu Abrahama chu Eufretis lui piah aṭang chuan Kanan ram pumah ka hruai kual a, fapa Isaka ka pe a, a thlahte ka tipung a." 
Joshua24:4 Isaka chu fapa Jakoba leh Esauva ka pe a, Seir tlângte chu Esauva hnênah a chênna atân ka pe a. Jakoba leh a fate erawh chu Aigupta ramah an chhuk a." 
Joshua24:5 Nakinah chuan Mosia leh Arona chu ka tîr a, Aigupta mite chu ka timangang nasa hle a; nangni erawh chu ka hruai chhuak ta che u a." 
Joshua24:6 In pute chu Aigupta ram aṭangin ka hruai chhuak a, Aigupta mite chuan sakawrtawlailîr nên, sakawr chungchuang mite nên an rawn ûm a;" 
Joshua24:7 mahse, Tuipui Sen an lo thlen khân mangangin Lalpa an au va, Aigupta mite nêna an inkârah thim a awmtîr a, tuipui chuan Aigupta mite chu a chîm a, an pil ta a. Aigupta rama ka thiltihte chu in hria a, thlalêrah rei fe in awm a." 
Joshua24:8 Jordan chhak lama awm Amor mite awmna chu ka hruai thleng che u a, in indo va, ka hnehtîr che u a; an ram chu in nei ta a. In hmaah anni chu ka tiboral a nih kha." 
Joshua24:9 ‘Zipora fapa Balaka, Moab lal chuan Israel-te chu a lo bei a; Beora fapa Balaama chu ânchhia lawh tûr che uin a pun a." 
Joshua24:10 Balaama thiltum chu ka remti lo va, mal a sâwmsak ta hlauh zâwk che u a; chutiang chuan Balaka kut ata ka chhan che u a," 
Joshua24:11 Jordan lui in kai a, Jeriko khuaa mite chuan an lo bei che u a; Amor mi te, Periz mi te, Kanan mi te, Hit mi te, Girgas mi te, Hiv mi te leh Jebus mi te pawhin an lo bei che u a; mahse, ka hnehtîr vek che u a." 
Joshua24:12 Amor lal pahnih phei chu khandaih emaw, thal emaw hman ngai lovin in hmaah khawinghal ka ûm chhuahtîr a." 
Joshua24:13 In chei hah ni hauh lo ram ka pe che u a, in sak hah loh khawpuiah ka awmtîr che u a. Tûnah zawng in phun loh grep rah in tlân a, in phun loh oliv rah in ei hi.’" 
Joshua24:14 “Chuvângin, Lalpa chu zah ula, tihtak zetin a rawng bâwl tlat rawh u. Mesopotamia ram leh Aigupta rama in pute biak ṭhin pathian lemte kha paih vek rawh u." 
Joshua24:15 Lalpa rawngbâwl hi ṭha in tih loh chuan in thlahtute biak, Mesopotamia rama pathiante rawng kha nge in bâwl duh, tûna in awmna rama Amor-ho pathiante hi, vawiin hian in duh zâwk chu thlang rawh u. Kei leh ka chhûngte erawh hi zawngin Lalpa rawng a ni kan bâwl dâwn ni,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:16 Mipui chuan, “ Lalpa rawngbâwl hi ṭha lo kan ti awzâwng hlei nêm: pathian dangte rawng chu kan bâwl hauh lo vang." 
Joshua24:17 Aigupta rama bawiha kan awm min hruaichhuaktu chu Lalpa, kan Pathian hi a ni alâwm; kan hmuhah thil ropui tak tak te a ti a, hnam tin chi tin zînga kan kalna apiangah min hum zêl ṭhîn a ni." 
Joshua24:18 He ram kan lo thlen pawh khân Lalpa chuan kan hmaah hênga awm Amor-hote a hnawt chhuak vek a nih kha. Chuvângin, Lalpa rawng a ni kan bâwl dâwn ni, amah chauh hi kan Pathian chu a ni,” an ti a." 
Joshua24:19 Josua chuan mipui hnênah, “ Lalpa rawng hi in bâwl thei ngût ang emaw chu: Mi thianghlim a ni a, pathian dang rêng a ngaithei lo va, in bawlhhlawhnate, in sualte a ngaidam lo vang." 
Joshua24:20 Lalpa chu hawisanin pathian dang rawng in bâwl vaih chuan a hawisan ang che u a, a hrem ang che u; in chungah ṭha hle ṭhîn mah se, a tiboral mai ang che u,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:21 Mipui chuan Josua hnênah, “Pathian dangte rawng zawng kan bâwl hauh lo vang; Lalpa rawng a ni kan bâwl dâwn ni,” an ti a." 
Joshua24:22 Josua chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa rawngbâwl in thlang ngei a ni tih hretu chu nangmahni hi in ni e,” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Ni e, thuhretute kan ni e,” an ti a." 
Joshua24:23 Josua chuan, “Chuti chu hnam dang pathian lim in kawlte kha paih bo rawh u le: Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chauh chu pawm rawh u,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:24 Mipui chuan Josua chu an chhâng a, “Kan Pathian, Lalpa rawng chu kan bâwl ang a, a thu pawh kan zâwm zêl ang,” an ti a." 
Joshua24:25 Tin, chumi ni chuan Josua leh mipui chuan thu an thlung a; an zawm tûr dân leh thupêk a siamsak a." 
Joshua24:26 Josuan chûng chu Pathian dân bu-ah chuan a ziak lût a; lung lian tak a la a; Sekem khuaa Lalpa Hmun Thianghlim sasaw thing bulah chuan a phun a. 
Joshua24:27 Josua chuan mipui hnênah, “En teh u, he lung hi kan thuhretu a ni; kan hnêna Lalpa thu sawi zawng zawng kha a hre vek a, in Pathian in kalsan loh nân in thuhretu a ni,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:28 Josua chuan mipui chu a hawtîr a, mahni ram ṭheuhvah an haw ta a." 
Joshua24:29 Chumi hnu chuan kum za leh sâwm a nihin Josua chu a thi ta a. 
Joshua24:30 Gaza tlâng hmâr lam, Efraim tlângrama ama chanpual Timat-sera-ah chuan an phûm ta a." 
Joshua24:31 Josua dam chhûng chuan Israel-te chuan Lalpa rawng an bâwl a, a thih hnuah pawh, anmahni mit ngeia Lalpa thiltih zawng zawng hmutute dam chhûng chu an bâwl zêl a." 
Joshua24:32 Josefa ruang, Israel-ten Aigupta ram aṭanga an rawn lâk chhoh kha Sekem khuaah, Jakoban tangkaraw tlang zaa Sekema pa Hamora thlahte hnên aṭanga a leiah khân an phûm a. He ram hi Josefa thlahte khân an rochung zêl a ni." 
Joshua24:33 Arona fapa, Eleazara pawh a thi a, Efraim-ho tlângrama awm, a fapa Finehasa puala an pêk ram Gibea khuaah an phûm a." 
Judges1:1 Josua thih hnu chuan Israel-te chuan Lalpa an râwn a, “Kanan-ho bei tûrin kan zîngah tu hnam nge thawk chhuak hmasa ber ang?” an ti a." 
Judges1:2 Lalpa chuan, “Juda thlahte thawk chhuak hmasa ber rawh se; ram hi an kutah ka pe a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges1:3 Juda thlahte chuan, an unau Simeona thlahte hnênah, “Kan chanpuala ruat ramah hian lo kal ula, Kanan mite hi i beih rawn ang u; keini pawh, chutiang bawkin in ram chanpualah kan lo kal ve ang,” an ti a." 
Judges1:4 Simeon-ho chu an thawk ve ta a. Lalpa chuan Kanan mite leh Periz mite chu a hnehtîr a, Bezek-ah mi sîngkhat an hneh a." 
Judges1:5 Chutah chuan Adoni-bezeka a lo awm a, an bei a;" 
Judges1:6 a tlân chhuak a, an ûmzui a, an man a, a kutzungpui leh a kezungpui an tansak a." 
Judges1:7 Adoni-bezeka chuan, “Lal sawmsarih kutzungpui leh kezungpui ka tansak a, chûng chuan ka buhmal tla an chhar ṭhîn. An chunga ka tih angin Pathianin ka chungah a ti ve ta a nih hi,” a ti a. Jerusalem-ah an hruai a, chutah chuan a thi ta a." 
Judges1:8 Juda thlahte chuan Jerusalem an bei a, an la a, mi an that a, khua chu an hâl a." 
Judges1:9 Chumi zawhah Juda thlahte chu tlângram te, tlâng bulṭhut te leh Negeb hmuna awm Kanan-ho chu bei tûrin an thawk chhuak a." 
Judges1:10 Hebron khua, Kiriat-arba tih ṭhin chu an bei a, Sesai-ho te, Ahiman-ho te leh Talmai-ho te chu an hneh a." 
Judges1:11 Chuta ṭang chuan Juda thlahte chu Debir bei tûrin an kal a; tûn hma chuan chu khua chu Kiriat-sefer tih a ni ṭhîn. 
Judges1:12 Kaleba chuan, “Kiriat-sefer beia, han la thei chu, ka fanu Aksaii nupuiah ka pe ang,” a ti a." 
Judges1:13 Kaleba nau Kenaza fapa Othniela chuan a la a; a fanu chu nupuiah a pe ta a. 
Judges1:14 An inneih ni chuan a pa hnêna ram dîl tûrin Othniela chuan a lo nawr a. A sabengtung chung aṭang chuan a lo chhuk a, Kaleba chuan, “Eng nge i duh ang?” a ti a." 
Judges1:15 Ani chuan, “Mal min sâwmsak teh; chhim lam ram rovah min awmtîr a, tuihna awmna min pe tel rawh,” a ti a. Kaleba chuan chuanchung leh chuanhnuai tuihna awmna chu a pe ta a." 
Judges1:16 Mosia puzawn thlah, Ken-hote chu Juda thlahte nên Tûmzâwl khua an tih Jeriko aṭang chuan Arad khaw chhim lam Judai ram thlalêrah an kal a, chûnga awmte zîngah chuan an awm ve ta a." 
Judges1:17 Juda thlahte chu Simeon-ho nên an thawk chhuak a, Zefat khuaa awm Kanan mite chu an bei a; khua chu an tichhe vek a, a hmingah Horma an vuah a." 
Judges1:18 Gaza te, Askelon te, Ekron te leh an chhehvêl khuate chu Juda thlahte chuan an la a." 
Judges1:19 Lalpa chuan Juda thlahte chu a awmpui a, a tlângrama awmte chu an hnawt chhuak a; phaia awmte erawh chuan thîr tawlailîr an nei a; Juda thlahte chuan an hnawt chhuak thei lo." 
Judges1:20 Mosia thu angin Hebron chu Kaleba an pe a; ani chuan Anaka fa pathumte chu a hnawt chhuak a. 
Judges1:21 Benjamina thlahte chuan Jerusalem a awm Jebus mite chu an luhchhuak lo; Jebus mite chu Benjamina thlahte nên Jerusalem-ah tûn thlengin an la awm. 
Judges1:22 Josefa thlahte pawh Lalpa chuan a awmpui a, Bethel bei tûrin an thawk a." 
Judges1:23 Tûn hma chuan Bethel chu Luz tih a ni. Khaw en thlithlai tûr an kal a. 
Judges1:24 Mi pakhat hi khua aṭangin a lo chhuak a, enthlatute chuan, “Khawpui luh rûkna min hrilh la, eng mah kan tih lo vang che,” an ti a." 
Judges1:25 Khawpui luhna chu a kawhhmuh a, khua chu an la a, khandaihin mi an that ṭeuh va; chu mi erawh chu a chhûngte nên an zuah a." 
Judges1:26 Ani chu Hit ramah a pêm a, khua a siam a, a hmingah Luz a vuah a; tûn thlengin chu chu hmingah a la pu a ni." 
Judges1:27 Manasea thlahte chuan Beth-sean khuaa awm te, Taanak khuaa awm te, Dor khuaa awm te, Ibleam khuaa awmte leh Megido khuaa awm te, Kanan-ho chu, an chhehvêl khuaa awmte nên an hnawt chhuak lo. Kanan mite chu an la awm ve ta reng a ni." 
Judges1:28 Israel mite an lo chak deuh hnu erawh chuan chhiah khuaah an siam a, an hnawt chhuak lo." 
Judges1:29 Efraim-ho chuan Gezer khuaa Kanan mi awmte chu an hnawt chhuak lo. Kanan mite chu an zîngah Gezer khuaah chuan an awm ve ta zêl a ni. 
Judges1:30 Zebulun-ho chuan Kitron leh Nahalal khuaa awmte an hnawt chhuak lo. Kanan-ho chu an zîngah an la awm ta zêl a; mahse, chhiahhlawhah an siam." 
Judges1:31 Aser-ho chuan Ako khuaa awm te, Sidon khuaa awm te, Ahlab khuaa awm te, Akzib khuaa awm te, Helba khuaa awm te, Afek khuaa awm te, Rehob khuaa awmte an hnawt chhuak lo." 
Judges1:32 Aser-ho chu Kanan-ho zîngah an awm ve mai a, an hnawt chhuak lo a ni." 
Judges1:33 Beth-semes khuaa awm te, Beth-anat khuaa awmte chu Naftali-ho chuan an hnawt chhuak lo; chûng laia Kanan-ho awmte nên an awm ho va; Beth-semes leh Beth-anata awmte erawh chu chhiah khuaah an siam a." 
Judges1:34 Amor-ho chuan Dana thlahte chu tlângramah an hnawt tawm a, an awmnaa an luh an phal lo a ni." 
Judges1:35 Harhares-ah te, Aijalon-ah te, Saalabin khuaah te chuan Amor-ho an ṭang tlat a; mahse, Josefa thlahte chu an chak zâwk deuh va, chhiah khuaah an siam ta a." 
Judges1:36 Sela hmâr lamah Amor-ho ramri chu Akrabim kalkhân a kal tlang a ni. 
Judges2:1 Gilgal aṭangin Lalpa Vântirhkoh Bokim khuaah a lo kal a, Israel-te hnênah chuan, “Aigupta ram aṭangin ka hruai chhuak che u a, in pate hnêna pêk ka tiam ramah chuan ka thlen che u a; ‘ka thuthlung hi ka bawhchhe ngai lo vang; rama lo awmte nên chuan" 
Judges2:2 thuthlung in siam tûr a ni lo va, an maichâmte in ṭhiatsak tûr a ni’ ka ti a; mahse, ka thu awih duh lovin eng thil nge in tih tâk le?" 
Judges2:3 Chuvângin, ka hrilh a che u, in hmaah hêngho hi ka hnawt chhuak dâwn lo: in tân hmêlma an ni ang a, an pathiante be tûrin an zâwl thlu ngei ang che u,” a ti a." 
Judges2:4 Lalpa Vântirhkohvin chûng thu a han sawi zawh chuan Israel-te chu an ṭap ta hawm hawm a. 
Judges2:5 Chuvângin, chu khua chu Bokim an ti ta a ni. Chutah chuan Lalpa hnênah thilhlan an hlân a." 
Judges2:6 Josua chuan Israel mite chu a ṭintîr a; mahni chan ram ṭheuh luah tûrin an kal ta sang sang a. 
Judges2:7 Josua dam chhûng zawng chuan Israel mite chuan Lalpa rawng an bâwl a. Josua thih hnuah pawh, Israel upaho, Lalpa thiltih hmu phâkte dam chhûng chu a rawng an bâwl zêl a." 
Judges2:8 Lalpa chhiahhlawh Nuna fapa Josua chu kum za leh sâwma upa a nihin a thi a. 
Judges2:9 Gaza tlâng hmâr lam, Efraim tlângrama ama ram chanpual Timnat-heres-ah an phûm ta a." 
Judges2:10 Chûng upaho pawh chu an thi fai a, Lalpa hre ngai lo, Israel-te tâna a thiltih hre ve pha lo, ṭhangthar an lo ṭhang lian a." 
Judges2:11 Tichuan, Israel-te chuan Lalpa ngaihmawhzâwng thil sual an ti a, Baal-te kha an be ve ta mai a." 
Judges2:12 Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu, an pate Pathian, Lalpa chu an hawisan a, an chhehvêla awm pathiante lam chu an hawi a, an be ve ta a: Lalpa chu an tithinur ta a ni." 
Judges2:13 Lalpa hawisanin Baal te, Astarte te chibai an bûk ta a." 
Judges2:14 Israel-te chungah, Lalpa chu a thinur ta êm êm a, suamhmangte a rawktîr a; an vêla awm hnam dangte kutah a pe a, an ngam ta lo a ni." 
Judges2:15 Indo tûra an thawh chhuah apiangin a sawi ang ngeiin Lalpa chu an lamah a ṭang ta awzâwng lo va, an mangang êm êm ṭhîn." 
Judges2:16 Lalpa chuan anmahni sawisatute laka chhantu tûr hruaitute zawng a pe ṭhîn; 
Judges2:17 mahse, chûng hruaitute thu chu an ngaithla duh lo va, pathian dang an ûm a, chibai an bûk leh mai ṭhîn. An pate chuan Lalpa thupêkte chu an zâwm a; mahse, an pate awm dân chu an zâwm ve duh ṭhîn lo." 
Judges2:18 Lalpa chuan hruaitute a rawn pêk khân, a pêka chu a awmpui a, a dam chhûng chu an hmêlmate lakah a hum ṭhîn; anmahni tiretheia rapbettute avânga an rûm chu Lalpa chuan a khawngaih ṭhîn a ni." 
Judges2:19 An hruaitu chu a thih chuan an lamlêt a, an pate ai mahin an khawlo zâwk ṭhîn; pathian dang biak leh chibai bûk an uar sauh va, hnam dang tih dân tinrêng an la a, an luhlul a zual ṭhîn." 
Judges2:20 Israel-ho chungah Lalpa thinrim chu a alh ṭhîn a, “An pate zâwm tûra ka tih ka thuthlung chu he chite hian an bawhchhia a, ka aw lah an ngaithla duh hek lo; Josua a thiha, hnam dang a hnawh chhuah lohte kha" 
Judges2:21 kei pawhin ka hnawt chhuak tawh bîk lo vang; 
Judges2:22 chûngho chu, an pate angin ka kawng an zawh dâwn nge dâwn lo fiah nân ka hmang dawn a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges2:23 Chuvângin, Josua kha, hêngho hi a hnawhchhuahtîr mai lo va, a awmtîr ta zêl a ni." 
Judges3:1 Kanan ram rûnnaa tel pha lote fiah nân hêng hnam ṭhenkhat hi Lalpa chuan a la zuah a ni. 
Judges3:2 Israel thlah, ṭhang lo thar zêl te, indonaa la tel ngai lohoten indo an zir theih nân a zuah a ni." 
Judges3:3 Chûngte chu: Filistia lal panga te, Kanan mi zawng zawng te, Zidon mi te, Lebanon tlâng, Baal-hermon leh Hamat kalkhâna awm Hiv-ho te an ni." 
Judges3:4 An pate hnêna Lalpa thupêk, Mosia a hrilh kha, Israel-te chuan an zâwm dâwn nge dâwn lo tih tilang chiang tûrin hêng mite hi a ruat a ni." 
Judges3:5 Israel-te chu Kanan mi te, Hit mi te, Amor mi te, Periz mi te, Hiv mi te leh Jebus mi te zîngah an chêng a." 
Judges3:6 Chûnghote nên chuan nupui pasal an inneih pawlh a, an pathiante chu an be ve ta a." 
Judges3:7 Tichuan, Israel-te chuan Lalpa ngaihmawhzâwng thil sual an ti a, an Pathian, Lalpa chu an hawisan a, Baal-te leh Aseri-te chu an be ve ta a." 
Judges3:8 Chuvângin, Lalpa chu Israel-te chungah a thinur a, Aram-Naharaim ram lal Kusan-risathaima a hnehtîr a. Israel-ho chu a thuhnuaiah kum riat an awm a." 
Judges3:9 Israel-te chuan Lalpa chu an au va; Kenaza fapa, Kaleba nau, Othniela chu Lalpa chuan Israel-te chhan chhuak tûrin a tîr a." 
Judges3:10 Lalpa thlarau chu a chungah a awm a, Israel-te chu a ho ta a. Indo tûrin a thawk chhuak a, Lalpa chuan Aram-Naharaim lal Kusan-risathaima chu a hnehtîr a, a kut ata Israel-te chu a chhan chhuak ta a." 
Judges3:11 An ram chu kum sawmli chhûng a râlmuang a. Kenaza fapa Othniela chu a thi ta a. 
Judges3:12 Israel-te chuan Lalpa ngaihmawhzâwng thil sual an ti leh a. Lalpa chuan Moab lal, Eglona chu Israel-te ai chuan a tichak ta a." 
Judges3:13 Amon mite leh Amalek mite a ṭanrualpui a, Israel-te chu a bei a, a hneh a; tûmzâwl khawpui Jeriko chu a chhuhsak a." 
Judges3:14 Israel-te chu Moab lal Eglona hnuaiah kum sâwm leh kum riat an awm a. 
Judges3:15 Mahse, Israel-ten Lalpa chu an au va, chhantu tûr a pe a. Chu mi chu Benjamin thlah, Gera fapa, Ehuda, veikhawr a ni. Israel mite chuan Moab lal Eglona chu thilpêk an thawn a." 
Judges3:16 Ehuda chuan chemte hriam tawn, tawng khat dâwn laia sei a chher a, a puan hnuai, a malpui ding lamah chuan a thukru a." 
Judges3:17 Moab lal Eglona chu pa thau zet hi a ni a. Ehuda chuan thilpêk chu a han pe a; 
Judges3:18 thilpêk a pêk zawh chuan a kengtute chu a tîr haw a. 
Judges3:19 Gilgal lung khur aṭangin ani chu a kîr leh a, “Lalber hnênah thurûk thlen tûr ka nei e,” a ti a. Ani chuan a ṭhuihruaite hnênah, “Min chhuahsan teh u,” a ti a. An chhuahsan ta a." 
Judges3:20 A pindan chungnung thawveng takah chuan amah chauhvin a lo ṭhu a. Ehuda chuan, “I hnênah Pathian thuchah sawi tûr ka nei,” a ti a. A ṭhutna ata chu a lo tho va." 
Judges3:21 Ehuda chuan a vei lam chuan a khêl ding lama chemte chu a phawi a, a dulah chuan a vit ta thawih a." 
Judges3:22 Chemte fawng chu a tlum hial a, a fawng a pil avâng chuan a phawi lo; hnung lamah chemte lu chu a lawr tut mai a." 
Judges3:23 Bathlarah Ehuda chu a chhuak a, pindan chungnung chu a khâr a, a kalh hnan ta a." 
Judges3:24 A chhuah daih hnu chuan lal chhiahhlawhte chu an lo kal a, pindan kawngka chu a lo inkalh a. ‘A pindan rilah a daikal a ni ngei ang,’ an ti a." 
Judges3:25 Rei tâwk ta nia an hriat hnu chuan chabi an la a, kawngka chu an han hawng a, an pu chu a thi a; chhuatah a lo lum reng a." 
Judges3:26 An buai liai liai chhûng chuan Ehuda chu a chhuak a, lung khur a kal pêl a, Seira-ah a tlân ta a." 
Judges3:27 Efraim tlângram a han thlen chuan tawtawrâwt a hâm a, Israel-te chuan tlângram aṭang chuan an zui chhuk a, anin hma a hruai a." 
Judges3:28 An hnênah, “Min zui rawh u, in hmêlma Moab-ho chu in kutah Lalpa chuan a pe ta e,” a ti a. Ani chu an zui chhuk a, Jordan lui kai chu Moab-ho an chhuhsak a, tu mah an kaitîr lo." 
Judges3:29 Chumi ni chuan Moab-ho chu mi sîngkhat lai an that a ni, mi hleitling tak tak, an pasalṭha rualte chu; tu mah tlân chhuak an awm lo." 
Judges3:30 Chumi ni chuan Israel-te chuan Moab-ho chu an titlâwm a. Ramah chuan kum sawmriat chhûng râlmuangin an awm a. 
Judges3:31 Ani thih hnu chuan Anata fapa Samgara pawhin Filistia mi zaruk zet bâwng chhunna tiangin a vaw hlum a, ani pawhin Israel-te chu a chhan chhuak ve a ni." 
Judges4:1 Ehuda thih hnu chuan Israel-ten Lalpa ngaihmawhzâwng thil sual an ti leh ta a. 
Judges4:2 Lalpa thuin Kanan lal Jabina chuan Israel-te a hneh a, Hazor khuaah a lal a; a sipai hotu chu Haroset-goim-a awm Sisera a ni." 
Judges4:3 Thîr-tawlailîr zakua a nei a, kum sawmhnih chhûng chu Israel-te a tirethei êm êm a, Israel-te chuan Lalpa an au va." 
Judges4:4 Zâwlneinu, Debori, Lapidota nupui chu Israel-ho zînga thusa ber a ni." 
Judges4:5 Efraim tlângrama Bethel leh Rama khaw inkâr, Debora khuaa tûm thing hnuaiah a ṭhu a, Israel mite chuan a hnênah thu an rawn thlen ṭhîn." 
Judges4:6 Kedes-naftali-a awm Abinoama fapa Baraka chu a ko va, a hnênah, “Israel-te Pathian chuan ‘Naftalia leh Zebulun thlahte aṭangin mi sîngkhat hruaiin Tabor tlâng lamah kal rawh,’ a ti che a ni lâwm ni?" 
Judges4:7 Kanan lal Jabina sipai hotu Sisera chu a thîrtawlailîrte leh a sipaite nên Kison luiah ka rawn hruai ang a, i kutah ka rawn pe dâwn a che a tih kha,” a ti a." 
Judges4:8 Baraka chuan, “I kal ve dâwn chuan ka kal ang a, i kal dâwn loh chuan ka kal bîk lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges4:9 Debori chuan, “Ka kal ve nâng e; i kal pawhin i ropui phahna tûr a nih dâwn loh hi; Lalpa chuan Sisera chu hmeichhia a thahtîr dâwn e,” a ti a. Debori chu a tho va, Baraka nên Kedes an pan a." 
Judges4:10 Baraka chuan Naftali leh Zebulun-ho a ko khâwm a, mi sîngkhat chuan an zui a, Debori pawh a kal ve a." 
Judges4:11 Ken mi Hebera chu Mosia puzawn Hobaba thlah a ni a, Ken-ho zîng ata chu a tla hrang a, Elon-Bazananim bul Kedes vêlah chuan bûk a rawn khuar a." 
Judges4:12 Tabor tlâng lamah Abinoama fapa Baraka a kal thu Sisera chu an hrilh a. 
Judges4:13 Sisera chuan a thîr-tawlailîr zakua chu a khalh khâwm a, Haroset-goim aṭanga a sipai zawng zawng chu Kison luiah chuan a hruai a." 
Judges4:14 Debori chuan Baraka hnênah, “Tho teh, vawiin hian Lalpa chuan i kutah Sisera hi a pe dâwn. Lalpa chuan i hma a hruai a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a. Tichuan, Baraka chu Tabor tlâng aṭang chuan a sipai sîngkhat nên an chhuk a." 
Judges4:15 Baraka chuan Sisera chu khandaihin a bei thut a, Lalpa chuan Sisera chu a thîr-tawlailîrte leh a sipaite nên a tichiai zo ta a. Sisera chu a tawlailîr ata a chhuk a, kein a tlânchhia a." 
Judges4:16 Baraka chuan tawlailîrte leh sipaite chu a ûm a, Haroset-goim thlengin a ûm a, Sisera sipaite chu a sât hlum vek a, pakhat mah tlân chhuak an awm lo." 
Judges4:17 Sisera chu Ken mi, Hebera nupui Jaeli puan inah a tlân lût a, Hazor lal Jabina leh Hebera chhûngte chu an inrem rêng a ni." 
Judges4:18 Sisera hmuak tûrin Jaeli chu a tlân chhuak a, “Lo tlân teh, ka pu, ka hnênah lo biru rawh; hlau rêng rêng suh,” a ti a. A puan inah chuan a tlân lût a, puanin a khuh a." 
Judges4:19 Sisera chuan, ‘Tui in tûr mi han pe teh, ka tui a hâl e,” a ti a. Bâwnghnute bûr a hawng a, a intîr a; amah chu a khuh leh ta a." 
Judges4:20 Sisera chuan, “Puan in kawngkaah khân awm la, mi an lo kala, ‘Hetah awm an awm êm?’ tia an zawh che chuan, ‘awm lo’ i ti dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Judges4:21 Hebera nupui chuan puan in khenbehna leh tuboh a la a; a muthilh hnu chuan zawi têin a va lût a; a bekah khenbehna chu a khêng lût a, leiah a khêngbêt ta tlat a; a mu nghet hle a, a thi nghâl ta a." 
Judges4:22 Baraka chuan Sisera chu a rawn ûm a, Jaeli chu hmuak tûrin a lo chhuak a, a hnênah, “Lo kal teh, i mi zawn chu ka entîr ang che,” a ti a. An lût dûn ta a, Sisera chu a lo thi reng a, puan in khenbehna chu a bekah a bûr ngur mai a." 
Judges4:23 Chumi ni chuan Israel-te hmaah Kanan lal Jabina chu Lalpa chuan a titlâwm a. 
Judges4:24 Kanan lal Jabina chu Israel-te chuan an hneh zui ta zêl a, a tâwpah phei chuan an tiboral thei ta a." 
Judges5:1 Chumi ni chuan Debori leh Abinoama fapa Baraka chuan hetiang hian hla an sa a: 
Judges5:2 Hotu ṭhaten an ho meuh chuan Mipuiin an zui dûl dûl mai, châk takin, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Judges5:3 Lalte u, ngaithla ula, Hotute u, bengchhi teh u; Lalpa fakin zai ka vâwr dâwn e. Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chu ka chawimawi ang." 
Judges5:4 Aw Lalpa, Seir tlâng i kalsan a, Edom ram i chhuahsan khân, Lîrpui a nghîng a, khuangruah a sûr a, Ruahthimpui a lo hâwn kha." 
Judges5:5 Lalpa hmaah chuan tlângte an khûr a, A saw Sinai tlângpui meuh pawh saw A sai hlawk hlawk e, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hmaah." 
Judges5:6 Anata fa Samgara leh Jaeli vânglai khân Lampui a ṭhing ṭhuap a, Khualzinte chuan kawngṭum an zawh." 
Judges5:7 Debori a lo chêt hmaa, Israel-nu a lo thawh hma khân, An awm lo ve, Israel zîngah, An awm lo thusa thei." 
Judges5:8 Miten pathian dang biak an thlang, Kan ramah hian indo a chhuak ta a. Israel mi sîngli zîngah Phawsial leh fei chawi awm maw?" 
Judges5:9 Ka va han lainat êm, Israel hruaitute; Châk taka zuitute pawh chu: Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Judges5:10 Sabengtung vâr chunga chuang ṭhînte u, Nangni ṭhutphah dûpa ṭhute pawhin. Lamtluang zawhtute nên he thu hi puang rawh u." 
Judges5:11 Tuikhura zai mite thâwm chu: Lalpa thil tih ṭhatzia an sawi, Israel rama thil ropui a tih chu an hril, Kulh kawngkaahte pawh an pung khâwm e." 
Judges5:12 Harh teh, harh teh, Debor, Harh la, zai han vâwr teh: Abinoama fapa, tho teh, Barak, tho teh, Râl tam tak salah hruai dum dum rawh." 
Judges5:13 Mi lian rualte pawh chuan an zui ve a, Hmêlma dopui tûrin Lalpa mite an chhuk thla." 
Judges5:14 Efraim ram aṭangin lui lam an pan, An unau Benjamin-ten an rawn pui a, Makir-ho mi liante an chhuk thla ve Zebulon-ho lal liante nên." 
Judges5:15 Isakar mi lianten Debori an zui; Berâm huanga ṭhut mai a hun ta lo, An sûl zuiin luipui kamah an pung." 
Judges5:16 Ran rual awihna phênglâwng tum ngaithlaa, Berâm huanga ṭhut mai a hun ta lo, Reuben-ho lah an inhnial buai e." 
Judges5:17 Gad-ho pawh Jordan râlah an awm daih si. Dana chuan lawng chauh a lungkham a, Aser pawh tuipui kamah, Vaukamah a vuaicha hle." 
Judges5:18 Zebulun leh Naftali erawh chuan Thih dâwn lovin an bei. 
Judges5:19 An lalte chuan an rawn bei ve, Kanan ram lalte chu an ṭang hle a, Megido lui kam Tanak-ah chuan Râllâk tûr rêng an nei lo ve." 
Judges5:20 Vâna arsite pawh an che ve a, Lamtluang an zawh pahin Sisera chu an bei." 
Judges5:21 Kison lui lian chuan a la a, A ni, hmânlai Kison lui chuan a lên a, Khawi nge, ka’n ûm duai duai teh ang." 
Judges5:22 Sakawrten phei an vâwr a, An ter ut ut mai e." 
Judges5:23 ‘Meroz khua chu ânchhia lawh r’u; A chhûnga mite chu lawh bawrh bawrh r’u,’ Lalpa pui tûrin an lo kal duh lo va, hmêlma an bei duh lo va ni." 
Judges5:24 Jaeli nge nge a chhuanawm e, hmeichhia azawngah, Hebera nupui, Ken-nu mawlh hi Puan ina chêng zîngah a lawr fâl e." 
Judges5:25 Tui a dîl a, hnutetui a intîr a, No mawi takin a dak a rawn kensak." 
Judges5:26 Puan in khenbehna a rawn keng a, Themthiam tuboh a chawi, Dim lo lêkin a chhu, Sisera chu, a tuboh chuan Thlunglu pawpin a chhu, A bekbawrah a khêng tlang zawk." 
Judges5:27 A awp rup a, a let thla e, A ke bulah a thal dêr a, A thi bul mai." 
Judges5:28 Sisera nu chuan a lo thlîr a, Tukverhah te a bih thla a, ‘A tawlailîr a lo va haw har ve, A sakawrte chu an va muang awm vei êm,’ a ti." 
Judges5:29 A ṭhiannu fing ber chuan a lo hnêm a, Mahni a inṭawng thlamuan ta a." 
Judges5:30 ‘Man belh tûr an zawng a ni ngei ang, An insem khawtlai a ni phawt ang: Nula pahnih khat man belh tûr an vai a ni ang e, Sisera hawn atân puan mawi deuh an dap a ni ang, Lalnu bah tûr an zawng khawtlai a ni ang e,’"
