Judges5:31 Aw, Lalpa, i hmêlmate chutiang chuan ral sela, I ṭhiante erawh chu ni chhuak angin êng phût rawh se,’ tiin. Kum sawmli chhûng a ram chu a râlmuang a." 
Judges6:1 Israel mite chuan Lalpa ngaihmawhzâwng thil sual an ti a; kum sarih chhûng Midian-ho hnuaiah a awmtîr a. 
Judges6:2 Midian-ho chu Israel-te ai chuan an chak a, tlâng pangah bihrûkna tûr kua an siam a, pûkah te an biru a, kulh te an siam a." 
Judges6:3 Midian-ho te, Amalek-ho te leh thlalêra chêngho te chu an lo kal ṭhîn a." 
Judges6:4 Bûk an khuar a, Israel-te thlai chînte chu an tichhe zêl a, Gaza thlengin Israel ramah chuan ei tûr a awm lo; berâm te, bâwng te, sabengtung te an la zêl a ni." 
Judges6:5 An ran rualte an rawn khalh a, puan inte an rawn keng a, khau puang ang mai an ni; ram chu an tikawlh fer fur a." 
Judges6:6 Israel-te chu an rethei ta êm êm a. Israel-te chuan Lalpa an au va. 
Judges6:7 Midian-ho vânga Israel-te mangang au chu Lalpan a lo hria a," 
Judges6:8 Israel-te hnênah zâwlnei pakhat a tîr a, “Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Aigupta ram aṭangin bawiha in awm kha ka hruai chhuak che u a." 
Judges6:9 Aigupta hotu leh nangmahni tiduhdahtute kut ata ka chhan chhuak che u a, he ram hi ka pe che u a ni:" 
Judges6:10 Lalpa, in Pathian chu ka ni. Amor-ho rama awm in ni a, an pathiante chu zah suh u ka ti che u a, ka thu in awih duh lo,’ a ti e” a ti a." 
Judges6:11 Lalpa Vântirhkoh chu Ofra khuaah a kal a, Abiezer mi Joasa sasaw bulah chuan a ṭhu ta a; Joasa fapa Gideona chuan uain sâwr khurah Midian-ho hmuh loh tûrin buh a chîl a." 
Judges6:12 Lalpa Vântirhkoh chu a hmu a, ani chuan a hnênah, “Nang mi huaisen, Lalpa chu i hnênah a awm.” a ti a." 
Judges6:13 Gideona chuan, “Ka pu, Lalpa chu kan hnêna a awm si chuan hêng thil zawng zawng hi engtizia nge kan chunga a thlen le? Kan paten a thiltih ropui tak tak min hrilhte kha khawiah nge a awm tâk? Lalpa chuan Aigupta ram aṭangin min hruai chhuak maw? Tûnah zawng, Lalpa hian min paihthla a, Midian-ho kutah min pe ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Judges6:14 Lalpa chuan a lam a hawi a, “I chak khawp alâwm, Israel-te chu Midian-ho kut ata hi chhan chhuak ta che, ka tîr che a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Judges6:15 Gideona chuan, “Ka pu, engtin nge Israel-te chu ka chhan chhuah ang le? Manasea thlah zînga pachhe ber chhûng kan ni a, kan chhûng zîngah lah a naupang ber ka ni si,” a ti a." 
Judges6:16 Lalpa chuan, “Ka awmpui zêl dâwn che alâwm. Midian-ho chu mi pakhat ang lekin i hneh mai ang,” a ti a." 
Judges6:17 Gideona chuan, “Min khawngaih la, Lalpa chu i ni ngei tih hriatna tûr min tihsak ang che." 
Judges6:18 Kal bo mai lo la, thilpêk ka han la ang a, i ke bulah ka han dah ang e,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “I lo kal leh hma loh chu ka lo awm reng ang e,” a ti a." 
Judges6:19 Gideona chu inah a lût a, keltê a talh a, dawidim telh loh chhangphut kg. sâwm a keng bawk a. Sa chu fawngah a dah a, a tui chu bêlah. Sasaw thing hnuaiah chuan a rawn kensak a." 
Judges6:20 Lalpa Vântirhkoh chuan, “A sa leh chhang dawidim telh loh kha la la, lung chungah khân dah la, a tui kha leih rawh,” a ti a. Chutiang chuan a ti a." 
Judges6:21 Lalpa Vântirhkoh chuan a tiang ken hmâwr chuan sa leh chhang dawidim telh loh chu a khawih a; lung aṭang chuan mei a lo chhuak a, sa leh chhang chu a kâng ral ta a. Lalpa Vântirhkoh chu a kal bo ta a." 
Judges6:22 Gideona chuan Lalpa Vântirhkoh ngei a ni tih a hre ta a, “Khai aw, Aw Lalpa P athian, lalpa Vântirhkoh nên inhmachhawnin kan inhmuh tâk chu!” a ti a." 
Judges6:23 Lalpa chuan, “Thlaphâng suh, thlamuang takin awm rawh, i thi lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges6:24 Chutah chuan Gideona chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a, Lalpa Salom a vuah a. Abiezer mite rama Ofra khuaah chu chu tûn thlengin a la awm." 
Judges6:25 Chumi zân chuan Lalpan a hnênah, “I pa bâwngpa leh bâwngpa dang kum sariha upa kai la, i pa siam Baal maichâm chu tichhia la, a bula Aseri phun pawh chu kit rawh." 
Judges6:26 Maichâm chhe chim vûm chungah chuan i Pathian, Lalpa tân maichâm rinawm tak siam la, bâwngpa pahnihna kha hâlral thilhlanah hlân rawh; a hâlna thingah i kih thlûk Aseri kha hmang ang che,” a ti a." 
Judges6:27 Tichuan, Gideona chuan a chhiahhlawh sâwm a hruai a, Lalpa sawi ang chuan a ti a. A chhûngte leh khuaa mite a hlauh avângin chhûnah chuan a ti lo, zânah a ti ta a." 
Judges6:28 A tûk zînga mite an han thawh chuan Baal maichâm chu a lo chim a, a bula Aseri lim thing phun a lo tlu chu an hmu a; maichâm tharah chuan bâwngpa pahnihna kha hâlral thilhlanah an lo hlân a." 
Judges6:29 “Tu tih nge?” an inti a. An han zâwt chiang a, “Joasa fapa Gideona tih a ni,” an ti a." 
Judges6:30 Khuaa mite chuan Joasa hnênah, “I fapa kha han hruai chhuak rawh, kan that dâwn a ni. Baal maichâm a ṭhiat a, a bula Aseri phun pawh a kit a ni,” an ti a." 
Judges6:31 Joasa chuan chutia rawn titute chu a chhâng a, “Baal hi in ṭan a, chhan in tum em ni? Baal ṭan apiang chu tûkin zîngah la la hian thah in ni ang. Pathian a nih tak tak chuan amah inhum ang hmiang, ama maichâm alâwm an tihchhiatsak,” a ti a." 
Judges6:32 Chuvângin, chumi ni chuan a hmingah Jerubaala an sa ta a, ‘a maichâm a tihchhiat avângin Baala chuan rawn bei ang hmiang’ an ti a ni." 
Judges6:33 Midian-ho te, Amalek-ho te leh thlalêra chêng te chu an pung khâwm a, Jezreel ruamah bûk an rawn khuar a." 
Judges6:34 Lalpa thlarau chu Gideona hnênah a awm a, Abiezer mite koh khâwm nân tawtawrâwt a hâm a." 
Judges6:35 Manase-ho te, Aser-ho te, Zebulun-ho te leh Naftali-ho te chu a chah khâwm a, amah tâwk tûrin an lo kal a." 
Judges6:36 Gideona chuan Lalpa hnênah “Min hmanga Israel mite hi chhan chhuah i duh tak meuh a nih chuan," 
Judges6:37 en teh, hruihah berâm hmul hi ka dah ang a, berâm hmulah chauh dai a tlâka, a vêl lei a ro si chuan i sawi angin min hmangin Israel-te hi i chhan chhuak dâwn a ni tih ka hria ang,” a ti a." 
Judges6:38 A tûk zîngah an han thawh chuan berâm hmul chu a han sâwr a, no khat dâwn lai dai a sâwr chhuak a." 
Judges6:39 Gideona chuan, “Ka chungah thinrim suh aw, ka han sawi leh teh ang, ka han en chhin leh ang e: Zânin chu berâm hmul hi ro phak sela, a vêl lei hi chu daiin huh hnêp teh se,” a ti a." 
Judges6:40 Chumi zân chuan Pathianin berâm hmul chu a tihul phiang a, leiah erawh chuan dai a tlâktîr ṭeuh va." 
Judges7:1 Jerubaala an tih Gideona chuan a hnêna lo kal zawng zawng chu zîng takah a thawhpui a, Harod bulah bûk an khuar a. Midian-ho chuan an awmna hmâr lam ruam More-ah bûk an khuar ve bawk a." 
Judges7:2 Lalpa chuan Gideona hnênah, “I mite hi an tam êm mai, in kuta Midian-ho ka pêk chuan, Israel-te hian min uankhum ang e, anmahni hneh emaw an ti mai ang asin." 
Judges7:3 Mipui hnênah, ‘Tu pawh, indo huphurha thlaphâng apiang chu Gilead tlâng aṭang hian haw mai rawh se,’ tiin tlângau rawh se,” a ti a. Mi sînghnih leh sânghnih chu an haw a, sîngkhat chu an la awm a." 
Judges7:4 Lalpa chuan Gideona hnênah, “Mi an la tam lutuk fo, luiah hruai thla la, ka thlan chhuahsak ang che. ‘Hei hi kal rawh se,’ ka tih chu kalpui la, ‘hei chu kal suh se,’ ka tih chu hawtîr ang che,” a ti a." 
Judges7:5 Tichuan, luiah a hruai thla a, Lalpa chuan Gideona hnênah, “Ui anga tui liak chu dah hrang la, ṭhingṭhia tui dâwt chu i dah hrang bawk dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Judges7:6 Kuta tui thâla liak chu mi zathum an ni a, mi dang zawng chuan ṭhingṭhiin tui an dâwt a ni." 
Judges7:7 Lalpa chuan Gideona hnênah, “Mi zathum, kuta tui thâla liakho hmang hian ka chhan dâwn che u a, Midian-ho chu in kutah ka pe ang,” a ti a." 
Judges7:8 Ei tûr kengtute leh tawtawrâwt pûte leh mi zathum tih loh, mi dang chu an in lamah a hâwntîr ta vek a. Midian-ho bûk chu an thlang lawk phaiah a awm a ni." 
Judges7:9 Zânah Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Tho la, an bûkah zu chhuk rawh, i kutah ka pe tawh a ni." 
Judges7:10 Nangmaha kal i hlauh deuh chuan i tlangvâl hruai Pura kha hruai ang che. 
Judges7:11 An titi zu ngaithla la, chumi hnu chuan an bûk zu beih i châk hle ang,” a ti a. Pura nên chuan hmêlma sipai awmna hmâwrtawng berah chuan an zu kal a." 
Judges7:12 Midian-ho te, Amalek-ho te leh thlalêra chêng te chu zâwlah chuan an awm hmur mai a, khau puang ang mai an ni, an sanghâwngseite pawh ṭiau vaivut anga chhiar sên loh a ni." 
Judges7:13 Gideona te an zu thlen thlâk chuan mi pakhatin a ṭhian chu a mumang a lo hrilh a, “Mumang ka nei a, kan bûkah hian barli chhang a lo lum a, bûk chu a rawn delh a, a delh thal dêr a, a pêr vek mai zu nia,” a ti a." 
Judges7:14 A ṭhian chuan “Joasa fapa Gideona khandaih lo chu eng nge ni ta ang? Chu Israel-pa kutah chuan Midian-ho hi Pathianin a pe ta a nih chu!” a ti a. 
Judges7:15 Gideonan mumang leh a awmzia an sawi chu a hriatin Pathian chibai a bûk a; Israel-te bûkah a chho va, an hnênah, “Tho teh u, Midian-ho rual chu Lalpa chuan in kutah a pe ta,” a ti a." 
Judges7:16 Mi zathum chu pâwl thumah a ṭhen a; bêl ruak leh a chhûnga meichher awm, tawtawrâwt nên a pe ṭheuh va;" 
Judges7:17 an hnênah, “Min en ula, ka tih angin ti ve zêl ang che u, an bûk sir ber ka thlen huna ka tih ang chu in ti ve dâwn nia." 
Judges7:18 Kei leh ka kalpuiten tawtawrâwt kan ham chuan kil tinah hâm ve ula, ‘ Lalpa leh Gideona tân’ tiin au dur dur ang che u,” a ti a." 
Judges7:19 Gideona leh a ho mi za te chu zânlaiah, râl vêng an inthlâk fel hlim hlawlah bûk hmâwrtawng chu an thleng a; an tawtawrâwt chu an hâm a, an bêl ken chu an vaw keh a." 
Judges7:20 Pâwl dangte chuan an tawtawrâwt chu an hâm a, bêl chu an tikeh a, meichher chu kut lehlamin an chhi a, tawtawrâwt chu lehlama vuanin an hâm a, “Khandaih chu, Lalpa leh Gideona tân!” tiin an au ta chiam a." 
Judges7:21 Hmêlma bûk hual chuan mahni dinna tûr ṭheuhvah an ding a; bûka sipaite chu an au ruan ruan a, an tlânchhe ta chum chum a." 
Judges7:22 Tawtawrâwt zathum chu an hâm tuar tuar a; Lalpa chuan hmêlma zawng zawng chu anmahni leh anmahni a insahtîr ta sawk sawk a. Zarethan lamah Beth-sita thlenga tlânchhiate an awm a, Tabat bul Abel-mehola ri thlenga tlânchhia pawh an awm." 
Judges7:23 Naftalia thlah te, Asera thlah te leh Manasea thlah, Jordan chhak lam leh thlang lama awm te chu Midian-ho ûm tûrin an pun a." 
Judges7:24 Gideona chuan Efraim tlângramah mi a tîr chhuak bawk a, “Lo chhuak ula, Midian-ho rawn bei ula, Midian-hovin Jordan leh lui dang an kân tûr lo châng rawh u,” a ti a." 
Judges7:25 Midian hotu pahnih Oreba leh Zeeba chu an man a, Oreb lung hmunah Oreba chu an that a, Zeeb grep sâwrkhurah Zeeba chu an that a. Jordan râlah Oreba leh Zeeba lu chu Gideona hnênah an rawn keng a." 
Judges8:1 Efraim mite chuan Gideona hnênah, “Midian-ho bei tûra min sâwm ve lo hi engtizia nge?” an ti a, an hau na hle a." 
Judges8:2 Ani chuan, “Nangnin in tih ṭhin ai chuan ka thil tih ve chhun hi eng tham mah a ni nêm! Nangni Efraim-hovin in tih chhunte pawh keini hnam tê, Abiezer-ho tih ai chuan a ropui daih alâwm." 
Judges8:3 Pathianin in kutah Midian hotu lian Oreba te, Zeeba te a pe che u a, kei chuan eng tham mah tih ka nei hlei nem,” a ti a. Chutianga a ṭawng hnu chuan an thinur pawh chu a dai ta a." 
Judges8:4 Gideona leh a mi zathum chuan Jordan an kai a, an chau hle mai a, hmêlmate chu an ûm zêl bawk si a." 
Judges8:5 Sukoth khaw mite hnênah chuan Gideonan, “Midian lal Zeba leh Zalmuna kan ûm a, ka hote hi an hah hle tawh a, khawngaih takin ei tûr lo pe teh u,” a ti a." 
Judges8:6 Sukoth khaw hotute chuan, “Zeba leh Zalmuna chu in kuta awm em an nih a, i sipai chaute ei tûr kan han pêk na tûr?” an ti a." 
Judges8:7 Gideona chuan, “ Lalpan Zeba leh Zalmuna ka kuta mi pêk hun chuan thlalêra hlîng leh râlsamkuaiin in vun ka kai thlêr vek ang maw le,” a ti a." 
Judges8:8 Chuta ṭang chuan Penuel-ah an kal a, an hnênah chuan Sukoth mite a tih ang bawk khân a ti a; anni pawh chuan an chhân ang bawk khân an lo chhâng a." 
Judges8:9 Penuel-a mite hnênah pawh chuan, “Ralmuanga ka lo kîr leh hun chuan in khua hi ka tichim ngei ang maw le,” a ti a." 
Judges8:10 Zeba leh Zalmuna chu Karkor khuaah, an sipaite nên an awm a. Thlalêra chêngho chu mi nuaikhat leh sînghnih indonaah an thi tawh a, a thi bâng mi sîngkhat leh sângnga lai chuan an la zui zêl a ni." 
Judges8:11 Gideona chu Noba leh Zogbeha chhak lam thingtlâng kawngah a kal a, hmêlma inring lo chu a bei thut a." 
Judges8:12 Midian lal Zeba leh Zalmuna chu an tlân bo va; mahse, an ûm a, an man a; an sipaite chu an buai ta nuai nuai a." 
Judges8:13 An inbeih zawh chuan Gideona chu Heres kalkhân lamah a lo haw a. 
Judges8:14 Sukoth tlangvâl pakhat hi a man a, an khaw hotute leh upate hming a zâwt a, tichuan Sukkoth khuaa mi lianhote leh upate hming chu a ziaksak vek a, sawmsarih pasarih an ni a." 
Judges8:15 Sukoth a thlen chuan an hnênah, “Zeba leh Zalmuna hi en teh u, ‘Zeba leh Zalmuna chu in kuta awm em an niha i sipai chaute ei tûr kan han pêk na tûr’ tia min tihel vei kha,” a ti a." 
Judges8:16 Thlalêr hlîng leh râlsamkuai a la a, khaw hotute chu a man a, Sukoth mite hmaah hlîng chuan a hrût ta nek a." 
Judges8:17 Penuel kulh bangte chu a tichim bawk a, a chhûnga mite chu a that a." 
Judges8:18 Gideona chuan Zeba leh Zalmuna chu, “Tabor tlânga in mi thahte mi eng ang nge an nih?” tiin a zâwt a. Anni chuan, “An ang khawp mai che, lal fa ni âwm tak an ni,” an ti a." 
Judges8:19 Ani chuan, “Ka unau, ka nu hrin ve te ngei an nih chu. Lalpa hming chhâlin ka sawi hi, zuah ula chuan nangni pawh ka that lo tûr che u,” a ti a." 
Judges8:20 A fapa upa ber Jethera hnênah, “Tho la, that teh,” a ti a. Mahse, khandaih chu a phawi lo, a that ngam lo a ni, a la naupang êm a ni." 
Judges8:21 Zeba leh Zalmuna chuan, “Nangmah kha lo tho la, pa leh pa inbeih tûr alâwm,” an ti a. Gideona chu a tho va, Zeba leh Zalmuna chu a that a, an sanghâwngsei nghâwngawrh pawh a lâksak a." 
Judges8:22 Israel mite chuan Gideona hnênah, “Midian-ho lakah min chhanhim a, kan chunga rorêltuah ṭang rawh, i fate, i tute pawh ṭang zêl rawh se,” an ti a." 
Judges8:23 Gideona chuan, “In chunga rorêltuah ka ṭang lo vang; ka fate pawh an ṭang lo vang. In chunga rorêltu tûr chu Lalpa a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges8:24 Gideona chuan an hnênah, “Mi tinin râl bengbeh in lâk kha pakhat min pe ṭheuh ula ka va ti êm!” a ti a. Râlte chu Ismael mi an nih avângin rangkachak bengbeh an lâksak ṭeuh a ni." 
Judges8:25 Anni chuan, “Kan ui hauh lo, kan pe ang che,” an ti a. Puan an phah a, râl bengbeh an lâk chu an pe ṭheuh va." 
Judges8:26 Chutianga an pêk khâwm rangkachak bengbeh chu kg. sawmhnih dâwn lai a ni. Midian lalho incheina, ṭhi te, puan senduk te leh an sanghâwngsei nghâwngawrh a neih te chu chûng zîngah chuan chhiar tel a ni lo." 
Judges8:27 Gideona chuan chûng chuan Efod a siam a, a awmna khua Ofra-ah a dah a. Israel-te chuan an pên bo phah a, Gideona leh a chhûngte tân thang hlauhawm tak a lo ni ta a." 
Judges8:28 Midian-ho chu Israel-te chuan an tudawl a, a inlek leh ngai tawh lo. Gideona dam chhûng zawng kum 40 chhûng ram chu a râlmuang a." 
Judges8:29 Gideona, Zerubaala an tih bawk chu, ama inah a haw a." 
Judges8:30 Gideona chuan nupui a ngah hle a; fapa sawmsarih a nei a. 
Judges8:31 Sekem khuaa a hmei chuan fapa a hrinsak bawk a, a hmingah Abimeleka a sa a." 
Judges8:32 Joasa fapa Gideona chu a tar hle hnu chuan a thi a, Abiezer mite ram Ofra khuaah, a pa Joasa thlânah an phûm ve ta a." 
Judges8:33 Gideona chu a thi ta chauh tihin Israel mite chu Baal lamah an pêng leh a, Baal-berith chu pathianah an neih ta a." 
Judges8:34 Kil tina an hmêlmate kut ata chhanchhuaktu Lalpa, an Pathian chu Israel-te chuan an hre reng duh lo va;" 
Judges8:35 Gideonan Israel-te a khawngaih ṭhîn ang khân anni chuan Gideona chhûngte chu an khawngaih ve duh lo va. 
Judges9:1 Gideona fapa, Abimeleka chu Sekem khuaa a nu inah chuan a kal a, a nu chhûngte leh a nu pa chhûngte hnênah," 
Judges9:2 “Sekem mite hian, ‘Gideona fa sawmsarihten in chungah rorêl se nge in tih pakhat chauhvin, sawi rawh u,’ in ti dâwn nia; kei hi a fate zînga in thisen zawmpui awm chhun ka nih hi hre reng bawk ang che u,” a ti a." 
Judges9:3 A nu nuṭate chuan Sekem mite hnênah chûng thu chu an hrilh a, Abimeleka hnung zui chu an châk ta a, “Kan unaupa a ni tak alâwm,” an ti a." 
Judges9:4 Tichuan, Baal-berith an biakna in ata tangkaraw tlang sekel sawmsarih an pe a. A ṭhuihruai atân mi bengtlalo leh pâwngpawrh tak tak chu Abimeleka chuan tangka chuan a ruai a." 
Judges9:5 A pa chhûngte awmna Ofra khuaah chuan a va kal a, Gideona fa sawmsarihte chu lung pakhat chungah a that a; an naupang ber Jothama erawh chu a biru a, a that ve lo." 
Judges9:6 Sekem mi leh Beth-milo mi zawng zawng chu an pung khâwm a, Sekem bula sasaw thing hnuaiah Abimeleka chu lalah an siam ta a." 
Judges9:7 Chu chu Jothama an hrilh a, Gerizim tlângchhîpah chuan a kal a, theihtâwpin a au va, heti hian a ti a, “Sekem mite u, ka thu hi ngaithla teh u; tichuan, Pathian pawhin in thu a ngaithla dâwn nia." 
Judges9:8 Vawi khat chu lal thlan tumin thing zawng zawng an pung khâwm a, Oliv thing hnênah ‘Kan lalah ṭang ta che’ an ti a." 
Judges9:9 Oliv thing chuan, ‘In lal ka niha, ka tei ka tei chuan ka hriak, Pathian leh mihring chawimawi nâna an hman ṭhin chu, ka nei thei tawh lo vang asin,’ a ti a." 
Judges9:10 Theipui hnênah, ‘A nih, nang lo kal la, kan lalah lo ṭang ta che,’ an ti a." 
Judges9:11 Mahse, theipui chuan, ‘In lala ṭangin tei tei ila, thlum tak tak leh tui tak takin ka rah hman hlei ang,’ a ti a." 
Judges9:12 Grep hrui hnênah an kal a, ‘Nang tal lo kal la, kan lalah lo ṭang rawh,’ an ti a." 
Judges9:13 Grep hrui chuan, ‘In lalah ṭangin tei tei ila, Pathian leh mihring tilâwmtu uaina sâwr tûr grep rah ka nei hman nâng,’ a ti a." 
Judges9:14 “Thing zawng zawng chu hmupa hnênah an kal a, ‘Nang hi zawng kan lalah i ṭang ngei tûr a ni,’ an ti a." 
Judges9:15 Hmupa chuan, ‘Lala min duh tak meuh chuan ka buk hnuaiah lo kal rawh u; in lo kal loh chuan ka ṭang hlîng ata mei a lo chhuak ang a, Lebanon sidarte lam a kang fai ang,’ a ti a.”" 
Judges9:16 Jothama chuan a sawi zêl a, “Abimeleka lala in siam hi duh tak meuhva ti em in nih? Gideona chu ngaisângin a phu ang ngeiin a chhûngte pawh tihtakmeuhvin in chawimawi duh em ni?" 
Judges9:17 Ka pa, Gideona chuan Midian-ho lakah a chhan chhuak che u a, thih huamin a ṭang a nih kha." 
Judges9:18 Tûnah zawng, ka pa chhûngte chungah in inlek a, a fapa sawmsarih chu lung pakhat chungah in that a, a chhiahhlawhnu fapa, in chipui fa a nih avângin lalah in siam tâk hi." 
Judges9:19 Gideona leh a chhûngte chunga thil dik tak ti nia in inhriat chuan Abimeleka chu lâwm takin zui ula, ani pawhin lâwm takin ho che u rawh se." 
Judges9:20 Chutiang a nih loh chuan Abimeleka aṭangin mei lo chhuak sela, Sekem leh Beth-milo khua chu kâng rawh se. Sekem leh Beth-milo kâng chuan Abimeleka chu kâng rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges9:21 A unaupa Abimeleka chu a hlauh avângin Jothama chu a tlân bo va, Beer khuaah a awm ta a." 
Judges9:22 Abimelekan Israel-te chu kum thum a ho va. 
Judges9:23 Abimeleka leh Sekem mite chu Pathianin a inhuattîr a, Sekem mite chuan Abimeleka chu vervêk takin an ti ta a." 
Judges9:24 Gideona fa sawmsarih râwng taka a thah avângin an thisen mawh chu Abimeleka leh amah thlâwptu Sekem mite chungah chuan a tla ta a ni. 
Judges9:25 Sekem mite chuan tlângah, rawlrâlin Abimeleka chângtute an dah a, chûng mite chuan lo kal apiang an lo rawk ṭhîn. Chu chu Abimeleka an hrilh a." 
Judges9:26 Ebeda fapa Gaala chu a unaute nên Sekem-ah an lo kal a; Sekem mite chuan an lo ring hle a. 
Judges9:27 Lovah te an kal a, grep rah te an lo va, kût an hmang a, an pathian inah an lût a, an eiin an in a, Abimeleka chu ânchhia an lawh a." 
Judges9:28 Ebeda fapa Gaala chuan, “Sekem mite hian eng nge maw an hriata Abimeleka rawng an bâwl le? Gideona fapa kha a ni lâwm ni? Zebula lah hi a thu thu-a awm a ni si a. In pu Hamora thlahte rawng bâwl ta zâwk che u." 
Judges9:29 Hruaitu che u ni ila chu Abimeleka hi ka hnawt bo ngei ang; ‘Abimelek, sipai lâk belh la, lo chhuak rawh, inbei ang’ ka ti ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Judges9:30 Khaw hotu Zebula chuan Ebeda fapa Gaala thu sawi a hriat chuan a thinur hle a. 
Judges9:31 Abimeleka hnênah a rûk têin Aruma-ah zualko a tîr a, “Sekem-ah Ebeda fapa Gaala leh a unaute an lo kal a, khuaa mite hi i lakah an tihel zo dâwn." 
Judges9:32 Chuvângin, a zân a zânin lo kal la, i hote kha han hruai la, daiah châng ru ang che u." 
Judges9:33 Zîng takah in tho ang a, khawpui chu rawn ṭhâwng thut ula; bei tûr che ua a mite nêna an lo chhuak chu duh tâwkin in lo ching dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Judges9:34 Abimeleka chu a hote nên a zân a zânin an thawk chhuak a, Sekem khua chu hmun li-ah an châng a." 
Judges9:35 Ebeda fapa Gaala chu a lo chhuak a, kulh kawngkaah chuan a ding a. Abimeleka leh a hote chu an bihrûkna aṭang chuan an lo chhuak a." 
Judges9:36 Anni chu Ebeda fapa Gaala chuan a han hmuhin Zebula hnênah, “Tlâng aṭangin, saw, mi an lo kal chhuk ka ti,” a ti a. Zebula chuan, “Tlâng hlim saw mi emaw tiin i hmusual a ni ang e,” a ti a." 
Judges9:37 Gaala chuan, “En mah teh, tlâng bula saw! Mi an lo chhuk ngei alâwm, pâwl khat dang pawh Meonenim lam aṭangin an lo kal saw!” a ti a." 
Judges9:38 Zebula chuan heti hian a ti ta a, “Abimeleka hi tu nge maw a nih a a rawng kan bâwlna tûr!’ i tihna hmui kha khawiah nge a awm tâk? I hmuhsit êm êmte kha an nih saw. Chhuak la, va bei ta che,” a ti a." 
Judges9:39 Gaala chuan Sekem mite chu a hruai chhuak a, Abimeleka chu a bei a." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleka chuan a ûm a, a tlânchhe ta a. Kulh kawngka bul thlengin hliam tam tak an tlu phung a." 
Judges9:41 Abimeleka chu Aruma khuaa awm a ni a. Zebula chuan Gaala leh a unaute chu Sekem aṭang chuan a hnawt chhuak a, an awm thei ta lo va." 
Judges9:42 A tûk chuan Abimelekan Gaala leh a unaute chu Sekem khaw pâwnah an tlân chhuak dâwn tih a hriatin 
Judges9:43 a mite chu a hruai a, pâwl thumah a ṭhen a, pâwnah chuan a lo châng a. Mite chu an lo chhuak a, a tho va, a bei ta a." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleka leh a hote chu kulh kawngka bulah an tlân a, a ṭhiante pâwl hnih chuan pâwna chhuak tawhte chu an bei zui a, an that phiar a." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleka chuan khua chu nilêngin a bei a, a la ta a. A chhûnga mite chu a that a, khua chu a tichhia a, chi a phul chiam a." 
Judges9:46 Sekem khuaa hotu lian deuh deuhte chu Baal-berith biakna in kulhbîngah chuan an tlân khâwm a. 
Judges9:47 Khaw hotu deuh deuh an tlân khâwm thu chu Abimelekan a lo hria a. 
Judges9:48 Zalmon tlângah chuan Abimeleka chu a chho va, a hote zawng zawng chuan an zui a. Abimeleka chuan hreipui a la a, thing ṭang a chêk thla a, a pu chho va; a hote hnênah chuan, “Ka tih ang hian han ti ve sawk sawk teh u,” a ti a." 
Judges9:49 A hote zawng zawng chuan thing ṭang an thlâk ṭheuh va, Abimeleka tih angin kulhbîngah chuan an dah zêl a, kulhbîng chu a hâl hnan ta a; khaw hotu deuh deuhte pawh chu an thi ve ta vek a, mipa leh hmeichhia sângkhat lai an thi." 
Judges9:50 Abimeleka chu Thebes khuaah a kal a: a hual a, a la ta a." 
Judges9:51 Khuaah chuan in sâng pakhat, rinawm tak hi a awm a. Chutah chuan mi zawng zawng, a hmei a pa, khaw hotute nên an tlân khâwm a, an inkalhkhum tlat a. In sâng chhîp zâwlah chuan an chho va," 
Judges9:52 Abimeleka chu in sâng bulah chuan a lo kal a, kawngka chu hâl tumin a va hnaih a." 
Judges9:53 Nu pakhat hian buh râwtna lung chungnung zâwk hi a lu-ah a zu thlâk a, a luruh chu a tlâk keh a." 
Judges9:54 Tlangvâl, a râlthuam kengtu chu a han ko thuai a, “I khandaih kha phawi la, min that rawh, hmeichhe tihhlum min ti khanglâng dah ang e,” a ti a." 
Judges9:55 Tlangvâl chuan a chhun hlum ta a. Israel mite chuan Abimeleka a thi ta tih an hriat chuan mahni in lamah an haw ta ṭheuh va. 
Judges9:56 Chutiang chu a pa leh a unau sawmsarih chunga a thil sual tih avângin Pathianin a tuartîr a; 
Judges9:57 Sekem mite pawh an thil sual tih avângin Pathianin a tuartîr a, Gideona fapa Jothama ânchhia chu an chungah a tla ta a ni." 
Judges10:1 Abimeleka a thih hnu chuan Isakara thlah zînga mi Pua fapa Tola, Dodoa tupa, Efraim tlângram Samir khuaa awm chu Israel-te chhan chhuak tûrin a lo thawk a." 
Judges10:2 Kum sawmhnih leh pathum chhûng Israel-te chu a ho va, a thi a, Samir khuaah chuan an phûm a." 
Judges10:3 Tola thih hnuah Gilead mi Jaira a lo awm leh a. 
Judges10:4 Israel-te chu kum sawmhnih leh pahnih a ho va. Fapa sawmthum a nei a, chûngte chuan chuanna tûr sabengtung an nei ṭheuh va." 
Judges10:5 Gilead ramah chuan khawpui sawmthum an nei a, chung khaw hming chu ‘Jair khua’ tih a ni vek a. Jaira chu a thi a, a awmna Kamon-ah an phûm a." 
Judges10:6 Israel mite chuan Lalpa ngaihmawhzâwng thil sual an ti leh a; Baal te, Astarte te, Aram-ho pathian te, Zidon-ho pathian te, Moab-ho pathian te, Amon-ho pathian te, Filistia-ho pathian te an be ve a. Lalpa chu an hawisan a, a rawng an bâwl duh lo va." 
Judges10:7 Lalpa chu Israel chungah a thinur hle a, Filistia-ho leh Amon-ho kutah a pe a." 
Judges10:8 Amon-ho chuan kum sâwm leh pariat chhûng chu Jordan chhak lama Amor-ho ram Gilead-a Israel awmte chu an tiduhdah a, an tirethei êm êm a." 
Judges10:9 Amon-ho chuan Jordan lui kânin Juda thlah te, Benjamin-ho te leh Efraim-ho te chu an bei a, an timangang êm êm ṭhîn a." 
Judges10:10 Israel-ho chuan Lalpa an au va, “Kan Pathian kan hawisan a, Baal rawng kan bâwl a, a chungah thil sual kan ti a ni,” an ti a." 
Judges10:11 Lalpa chuan Israel-te hnênah, “Aigupta mi te, Amon mi te, Amor mi te, Filistia mi te," 
Judges10:12 Zidon mi te, Amalek mi te leh Maon mi te chuan an tiduhdah che u a, min au va, ka chhan chhuak che u a nih kha." 
Judges10:13 Chuti chung pawhin min hawisan a, pathian dang rawng min bâwlsan a; chuvângin, ka chhan chhuak tawh lo vang che u." 
Judges10:14 In duh zâwk pathian dangte hnênah chuan kal rawh u; chhan chhuak tûr che uin ngên ta che u, in mangang hi rawn chhan che u rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges10:15 Israel-te chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Kan sual a ni: âwm i tih ang angin min ching mai rawh; hêngho lakah hian min chhan chhuak phawt mai teh,” an ti a." 
Judges10:16 Pathian dang lim an kawlte chu an paih a, Lalpa chu chibai an bûk ta zâwk a; Israel-te retheihzia a hmuh chuan a lainat hle a." 
Judges10:17 Amon-ho chu an pung khâwm a, Gilead-ah bûk an khuar a, Israel-te pawh an pung khâwm a, Gilead biala Mizpa khuaah bûk an khuar ve bawk a." 
Judges10:18 Israel mite leh Gilead-a an hruaitute chuan, “Amon-ho bei tûrin tu nge hma hruai ang? Hma hruaitu chu Gilead ram hotu a ni ang” an ti a." 
Judges11:1 Gilead mi, Jeftha chu pa huai tak a ni a; a nu chu nawhchizuar a ni. Gileada fa a ni." 
Judges11:2 Gileada nupui chuan fapa a hring ṭeuh va, chûngte chu an lo puitlin chuan Jeftha chu an hnawt chhuak a, ‘Kan pa ro chang ve tûr i ni lo, nu dang fa i nih hi,” an ti a." 
Judges11:3 Jeftha chu a unaute khua aṭang chuan a tlân chhuak a, Tob ramah a awm ta a. Jeftha chu mi ho tak takten an zui a." 
Judges11:4 Amon-hovin Israel-te an rawn bei a," 
Judges11:5 Gilead hruaitute chu Tob khuaa awm Jeftha chu hruai tûrin an kal a. 
Judges11:6 “Ti rawh, min ho la, Amon-hote kan han bei dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
Judges11:7 Jeftha chuan Gilead upate chu a chhâng a, “Min huat avângin in pa in ata min hnawt chhuak a, in mangan veleh engtizia nge min rawn pan leh si le?” a ti a." 
Judges11:8 Gilead upate chuan Jeftha chu an chhâng a, “Chuvâng chuan alâwm, Amon-ho beihnaa min ho tûra kan duh che, Gilead mite hi i ho dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
Judges11:9 Jeftha chuan, “Amon-ho bei tûra min hruai kîra, Lalpan min hnehtîr chuan in hotu-ah ka ṭang ang,” a ti a." 
Judges11:10 Gilead upate chuan, “I duh ang chuan kan ti ang, Lalpa chu kan thuhretu a ni,” an ti a." 
Judges11:11 Tichuan, Jeftha chuan Gilead upate chu a zui a, mite chuan an hotu-ah leh hruaituah an siam ta a, Jeftha chuan a thil phût chu Mizpa khuaah chuan Lalpa hmaah a puang a." 
Judges11:12 Jeftha chuan Amon lal hnênah palai a tîr a, “Kan ram bei tûrin engtizia nge i rawn inrawlh le,” a ti a." 
Judges11:13 Amon lal chuan palaite hnênah “Aigupta ram ata Israel-te an lo chhuah khân ka ram min chhuhsak ṭeuh va, chuvâng alâwm. Arnon lui leh Jabok lui inkâr, Jordan ruam chu min lâksak a, hênga khuate hi sawi tam lovin min pe kîr tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges11:14 Jeftha chuan palaite chu Amon lal hnênah a tîr kîr leh a," 
Judges11:15 “Moab leh Amon ram Israel-ten an chhuhsak hlei nêm. 
Judges11:16 Aigupta ram aṭanga Israel-te an lo chhuah khân thlalêra kal tlangin Tuipui Senah an kal a, Kades an thleng a." 
Judges11:17 Edom lal hnênah, ‘I ramah kan lo kal tlang ang e,’ tia an dîl khân a lo phal lo va. Chutiang bawkin Moab lal pawh an dîl a, a phal lo va; Israel-te chu Kades-ah chuan an châm ta reng a." 
Judges11:18 Edom kal tlang lovin thlalêrah a kual zawngin an kal a, Moab ram pawh an hêl a, Moab khawchhak lamah an kual a; Moab ram lût lovin an ramri lui Arnon phai, an ram lo lamah, bûk an khuar a." 
Judges11:19 Israel-te chuan Amor mi, Hesbon lal Sihona hnênah pawh, ‘Kan rama kal tûrin i ramah kan lo kal tlang ang e,’ tia an dîl chu," 
Judges11:20 Sihona chuan a phal lo va, a mite a ko khâwm a, Jahaz-ah bûk a khuar a, Israel-te chu a bei ta a." 
Judges11:21 Israel-te Pathian Lalpa chuan Sihona leh a mite chu Israel-te kutah a pe a, an that a; chu lai rama Amor mite awmna chu an nei ta vêk a." 
Judges11:22 Tichuan, Amor-ho ram, Arnon lui leh Jabok lui inkâr, thlalêr leh Jordan lui inkâr ram chu an nei ta a ni." 
Judges11:23 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin Amor mite a pêk chu nangin neihsak i tum em ni?" 
Judges11:24 I pathian Khemosa ram pêk che chu nei mai la, kan Pathian Lalpa min pêk chin ram chu keinin kan nei ang." 
Judges11:25 Moab lal Zipora fapa Balaka ai khân chakin i inhria em ni? 
Judges11:26 Kum zathum zet chu Israel-te hian Hesbon khawpui leh Aroer khawpui hi, an chhehvêl khuate nên, Arnon lui kam khawpui zawng zawng nên hian an lo luah tawh a, chumi chhûng zawng chuan chhuhsak rêng i tum ngai si lo." 
Judges11:27 Chuvângin, keinin tihsual kan nei hlei nem, nangin mi rawn bei mai hi i ti dik lo zâwk a ni. Lalpa, Rorêltu chuan, Israel mite leh Amon mite inkâr thu hi rel fel mai teh se,” a ti a." 
Judges11:28 Amon lal chuan Jeftha thu chu a ngaithla duh chuang lo. 
Judges11:29 Lalpa thlarau chu Jeftha chungah a lo thleng a, Gilead leh Manasea ram chu a fang a, Gilead bial Mizpa khuaah chuan a lo kîr leh a. Amon-ho ramah chuan a kal ta a." 
Judges11:30 Jeftha chu Lalpa hmaah a inṭawng tiam a, “Amon mite hi mi hnehtîr phawt chuan," 
Judges11:31 in aṭanga râl ram kan haw min hmuak tûra lo chhuak hmasa ber chu tu pawh ni se, Lalpa tâna serh hran tlat a ni ang a, hâlral thilhlanah ka hmang ang,” a ti a." 
Judges11:32 Jeftha chu Amon mite ramah chuan a kal ta a; a va bei a, Lalpa chuan a hnehtîr ta a." 
Judges11:33 Aroer khua aṭanga Minit bial khaw sawmhnih, Abel-Keramim thlengin a la kîr a, a that ṭeuh va. Israel mite hmaah chuan Amon-ho chu an tlâwm ta a." 
Judges11:34 Jeftha chu Mizpa khuaa a inah a lo haw a. Ngai teh, amah hmuak tûrin a fanu chu benchhek nên a lo lâm chhuak a. Ani chu a fa neihchhun a ni; mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw fa dang rêng a nei lo." 
Judges11:35 A fanu a han hmuh chuan a puan a pawtthlêr a, “A va pawi em! Ka fanu, nang ber kher chu! Ka lung i tichhiain min va timangang tak êm! Lalpa hnênah ṭawng ka lo thlah tawh a, sût leh rual a ni si lo,” a ti a." 
Judges11:36 Ani chuan, “Ka pa, Lalpa hmaa ṭawng i thlah tawh si chuan i thu ang chuan ti rawh; Lalpa chuan i hmêlma Amon-ho chungah phuba a la tawh alâwm,” a ti a." 
Judges11:37 A pa hnênah chuan, “Heti hian i ti ang; thla hnih chhûng chu min thlah fâl la, ka ṭhiante nên tlângah te kan kal ang a, nulât laia ka thi mai tûr hi ka sûn ang e,” a ti a." 
Judges11:38 A kaltîr a, thla hnih chhûng chu a thang botîr a. A ṭhiante nên chuan tlângah an kal a, fa nei lova a thi tûr chu an sûn a." 
Judges11:39 Thla hnih hnu chuan a pa hnênah a lo haw a, Lalpa hnêna a thutiam chu a hlen ta a; nula thianghlimin a thi ta a." 
Judges11:40 Israel-te zîngah, Israel nulate chuan, kum tin Gilead mi Jeftha fanu sûn tûrin ni li an thang bo ṭhîn, dânah an neih ta a." 
Judges12:1 Efraim-ho chu an inpun khâwm a, Jordan ral Zafon-ah an kai phei a. Jeftha hnênah, “Amon mite bei tûrin ramri i pêl a, engtizia nge tel ve tûra min sâwm loh? I in kan hâlsak ang che,” an ti a." 
Judges12:2 Jeftha chuan, “Amon mite leh kan mite hi kan inhal hle a ni. Min ṭanpui tûrin ka sâwm che u a, min rawn chhan duh lo a nih kha." 
Judges12:3 Mi pui dâwn lo tih ka hriatin thih dâwn lovin ramri ka kân ta a; kan va bei a, Lalpa chuan min hnehtîr ta a ni. Chuvângin, min bei tûrin engtizia nge in lo thawh mai le?” a ti a." 
Judges12:4 Jeftha chuan Gilead mite chu a ko khâwm a, Efraim-ho chu a bei a, a hneh ta a. Efraim-ho chuan, “Nangni Gilead-ho hi Efraim leh Manasea ram aṭanga dawihzepho tlân khâwm in ni’ an ti ṭhîn." 
Judges12:5 Gilead-ho chuan Jordan dai kai theihna lai apiang an luah a, Efraim mi, tlânchhia tawh phawtin dai kai rawn dîl apiangte chu Gilead-ho chuan, “Efraim mi i ni em?” an lo ti zêl a. “Ni lo ve,” a tih chuan," 
Judges12:6 “Shibolet han ti teh,” an ti a; a lam fiah theih lohva, ‘Sibolet’ a tih chuan an man a, Jordan lui kaiah chuan an that mai ṭhîn. Chumi nia Efraim mi thi zawng zawng chu sîngli leh sânghnih an ni." 
Judges12:7 Jeftha chuan Israel-te chu kum ruk a ho va, a thi a, Gilead-a a awmna khuaah an phûm a." 
Judges12:8 Jeftha hnuah Bethlehem khaw mi Ibzana chuan Israel-te chu a ho va. 
Judges12:9 Fapa sawmthum leh fanu sawmthum a nei a. A fanu sawmthumte chu a chipui ni lo khaw dang mi pasal a neihtîr a; a fapa sawmthumte pawh a chipui ni lo nupuiah a neihsak a. Ibzana chuan Israel-te chu kum riat a ho va. 
Judges12:10 A thi a, Bethlehem-ah an phûm a." 
Judges12:11 Ibzana hnu chuan Zebulun mi Elona chuan Israel-te chu kum sâwm a ho va," 
Judges12:12 A thi a, Zebulun ram Aijalon khuaah an phûm a." 
Judges12:13 Elona hnu chuan Pirathon khaw mi Hilela fapa Abdona chuan Israel-te chu a ho va. 
Judges12:14 Fapa sawmli leh tupa sawmthum a nei a, an chuanna ṭheuh tûr sabengtung sawmsarih a nei a. Abdona chuan Israel-te chu kum riat a ho va." 
Judges12:15 A thi a, Efraim ram, Amalek-ho awmna tlângram Pirathon khuaah an phûm ta a." 
Judges13:1 Israel mite chuan Lalpa ngaihmawhzâwng thil sual an ti leh a, kum sawmli chhûng chu Filistia hnuaiah Lalpa chuan a awmtîr a." 
Judges13:2 Zora khuaah Dana thlah, mi pakhat, Manoa a awm a; a nupui chu a ching a, fa rêng an nei lo." 
Judges13:3 Hmeichhe hnênah chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh a inlâr a, “Ngai teh, fa nei thei lovin i ching na a, nau i pai ang a, fapa i hring ang." 
Judges13:4 Chuvângin, fîmkhur la, uain emaw, zu emaw in suh la, sa thiang lo pawh ei hauh suh ang che." 
Judges13:5 I nau pai, fapa i hrin tûr chu, a lu ziah kawlh bawk loh tûr a ni. Pathian tân a pian aṭangin Nazarit mi a ni ang. Ani chuan Filistia mite lakah Israel-te chhan chhuah hna a thawk ṭan ang,” a ti a." 
Judges13:6 Hmeichhia chu a kal a, a pasal hnênah, “Pathian mi ka hnênah a lo kal a, Lalpa vântirhkoh hmêl pu a ni, a hlauhawm khawp mai. Khawi lam mi nge a nih ka zâwt lo va, a hming pawh min hrilh hek lo," 
Judges13:7 ‘Ngai teh, nau i pai ang a, fapa i hring dawn, uain emaw, zu emaw in hauh suh, sa thiang lo pawh ei rêng rêng suh, i nau hrin chu a pian aṭanga a thih thlengin Pathian tân Nazarit mi a ni ang,’ tiin min hrilh a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges13:8 Manoa chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Aw Lalpa, Pathian, mi i rawn tirh kha lo kal leh sela, nau lo piang tûr chu engtin nge kan enkawl ang, min zirtîr teh se,” a ti a." 
Judges13:9 Pathian chuan Manoa dilna chu a ngaithla a, lova a ṭhut laiin hmeichhe hnênah Pathian vântirhkoh chu a rawn inlâr leh a, a pasal Manoa chu a awm ve lo." 
Judges13:10 Hmanhmawh takin hmeichhia chu a pasal hnênah a tlân a, “Hmân ni-a lo kal ka sawi kha a lo kal leh ta e,” a va ti a." 
Judges13:11 Manoa chu a tho va, a nupui chu a zui a, mi chu an va hmu a, “Hmeichhe hnêna thusawitu kha i ni em?” a ti a. “Ni e” a lo ti a." 
Judges13:12 Manoa chuan, “I thu anga thil a lo thlen hunah nau chu engtia enkawl tûr nge ni anga, eng angin nge a khawsak ang?” a ti a." 
Judges13:13 Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan, “Hmeichhe hnêna ka hrilh ang khân awm sela," 
Judges13:14 grep kûng aṭangin thil eng mah a ei tûr a ni lo, uain emaw, zu emaw in hek suh se. Ka hrilh zawng zawng kha zâwm sela, thil thiang lo pawh ei suh se,” a ti a." 
Judges13:15 Manoa chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh hnênah, “Kan han chelh lawk teh ang che, kêltê kan han talh ang e,” a ti a." 
Judges13:16 Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan, “Min chelh mah ula in chaw chu ka ei lo vang, hâlral thilhlan i hlân dâwn a nih chuan Lalpa tân hlân ang che,” a ti a." 
Judges13:17 Manoa chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh hnênah, “I thu anga thil a lo thlen hunah kan chawimawi theih nân che i hming min hrilh teh,” a ti a." 
Judges13:18 Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan, “Engah nge ka hming mi zawh, sawi mi a ni hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
Judges13:19 Tichuan, Manoa chuan kêltê chu a talh a, buhbâl thilhlan nên hâlral thilhlanah lungpui chungah chuan Lalpa tân a hlân ta a. Thil mak tak lo awm ta chu Manoa te nupa chuan an en reng a." 
Judges13:20 Lungpui maichâm aṭanga mei khu vân lama a han chhoh chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh chu meiah chuan vânah a chho ta a. 
Judges13:21 Manoa te nupa chuan chu mi chu Lalpa vântirhkoh a ni tih an hre ta a; hmai lei siin an kûn ta a. Vântirhkoh chu an hmu leh tawh lo. 
Judges13:22 Manoa hnênah emaw, a nupui hnênah emaw Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a inlâr leh tawh lo. Manoa chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh ngei a ni tih a hre ta a." 
Judges13:23 Manoa chuan a nupui hnênah, “Pathian kan hmu a, kan thi ngei dâwn a nih hi,” a ti a. A nupui erawh chuan, “ Lalpa chuan min tihlum duh ni se kan hâlral thilhlan leh buhbâl thilhlan kha a pawm lo vang a, hêng thil hi min hrilh lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges13:24 Hmeichhia chuan fapa a hring a, a hmingah Samsona a sa a; nau chu a lo ṭhang lian a, Lalpa chuan mal a sâwm a," 
Judges13:25 Lalpa thlarau chuan Zora leh Estaol inkâr Mahane-dan-ah Samsona chu a rawn pâwl ṭan ta a. 
Judges14:1 Samsona chu Timna khuaah a zu chhuk a, Timna khuaa Filistia nula pakhat chu a zu hmu a:" 
Judges14:2 A haw chho va, a nu leh a pa hnênah, “Timna khuaah Filistia nula pakhat ka hmu a, nupuiah min neihsak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Judges14:3 A nu leh a pa chuan, “Kan chipuite zîngah emaw, kan mite zîngah emaw nupui tûr an awm lo em ni? Engtizia nge serh tan loh Filistia-ho fa nupuia neih i duh tâk?” an ti a." 
Judges14:4 Samsona chuan, “Min neihsak mai teh u, hmêlṭha ka tihzâwng tak a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges14:5 Filistia mite chunga chêtna tûr remchâng zawngin Lalpa chuan Samsona chu a hmang a ni tih a nu leh pa chuan an hre lo. Chutih lai chuan Filistia-ho chu Israel-te chunga rorêltu an ni. 
Judges14:6 A nu leh pa hruaiin Samsona chu Timna khuaah chuan a zu chhuk a. Timna-ho grep huan an thleng a, sakeibaknei tuai hian a lo rûm khum a." 
Judges14:7 Lalpa thlarau chuan a rawn man thut a, eng mah ken a nei lo na a, kêltê ang lekin a lo pawt sawm vêk a, a nu leh pa pawh a hrilh lo." 
Judges14:8 Khuaah chuan a kal a, nula chuan a tilâwm hle a. Hun eng emawti hnuah chuan hruai tumin a chhuk leh a, sakeibaknei ruang kha en tûrin a pêng zawk a, khuai an lo awm mur mur a, a zu pawh a tam hle a." 
Judges14:9 Khuai chu a la a, kal pahin a ei zêl a, a nu leh pa pawh a pe a, an ei a; sakeibaknei ruang aṭanga a lâk a ni tih a hrilh lo." 
Judges14:10 A pa chu nula inah chuan a zu lêng a; tlangvâlho tih ṭhin dân angin Samsona chuan ruai a ṭheh a. 
Judges14:11 Filistia-ho chuan a ṭhianah tlangvâl sawmthum an ruatsak a. 
Judges14:12 Samsona chuan an hnênah, “Thu khirh ka han hrilh ang che u, ruai ṭheh chhûng ni sariha a awmzia in hriat chuan puan zai sîn sawmthum, inthlâkna tûr nên, ka pe ang che u." 
Judges14:13 In hriat loh erawh chuan puan zai sîn sawmthum leh inthlâkna tûr sawmthum min pe a ni ang chu,” a ti a. “I thu khirh chu han sawi la, kan lo ngaithla ang chu,” an ti a." 
Judges14:14 An hnênah chuan, “Eitu aṭangin ei tûr a lo awm a, Chak tak aṭangin thil thlum a lo chhuak,’ tih hi,” a ti a. Ni thum an ngaihtuah pawhin a awmzia an hre thei lo va." 
Judges14:15 A ni sarih ni chuan Samsona nupui hnênah an kal a, “I pasal chu a thu khirh hrilh tûr chein ngên rawh; chutilo chu, nang leh i chhûngte hi kan hâl hlum ang che u. Min tikawnkâw tûrin em ni ṭhianah min sâwm?” an ti a." 
Judges14:16 Samsona nupui chu a hmaah a ṭap a, “Min lo hmangaih tawp lo va, min haw zâwk a nih hi; kan mi, tlangvâlte thu khirh i zâwt a, a awmzia pawh min hrilh duh si lo,” a ti a. A hnênah chuan, “Ka nu leh pa pawh ka hrilh lo va, nang ka hrilh ang che maw?” a ti a." 
Judges14:17 Ruai an ṭheh chhûng ni sarih chhûng chu a ṭap a ṭap a; a ngen tlut tlut avâng chuan a ni sarih ni chuan a hrilh ta nge nge a. A nupui chuan a mite chu a hrilh ta a. 
Judges14:18 Chu khaw tlangvâlte chu a ni sarih ni, ni tlâk hmain a hnênah an lo kal a, “Khawizu aia thlum eng nge awm? Sakeibaknei aia chak zâwk eng nge ni?” an ti a. Samsona chuan, “Ka bâwngla hi lei rîtah chhawr lo ula chu Ka thu khirh in hre hauh lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges14:19 Lalpa thlarau chuan a rawn man thut a. Askelon-ah a chhuk a, mi sawmthum a zu that a, an thawmhnaw chu a lâksak a; a thu khirh hretute kha inthlâkna puante chu a pe a. A thinur hle a, a pa inah a haw chho va." 
Judges14:20 Samsona nupui chu a ṭhian pakhat kha an lo neihtîr ta mai a. 
Judges15:1 Nakin deuhah chuan huit seng hun laiin Samsona chuan kêltê kengin a nupui chu a zu tlawh dâwn a, “Ka nupui pindanah ka va lût ang e,” a ti a; mahse, a puzawn chuan a phal lo va," 
Judges15:2 “I duh ta hauh lo a nih hi kan ti a, i ṭhian pakhat kha kan lo neihtîr ta asin. A nau hi a hmêl a ṭha zâwk a, khawngaih takin a aiah nei mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Judges15:3 Samsona chuan, “Tûn ṭum chu Filistia mite pawi khawih mah ila, dem theih ka ni lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges15:4 Samsona chu a chhuak a, sihal zathum a man a, pahnih zêl mei a ṭawn zawm a, a ṭawn zawmnaah chuan meichher a dah a." 
Judges15:5 Meichher chu a chhi a, Filistia-ho lova huit hmunah chuan sihalte chu a chhuah a. Huit phal leh a ding lai chu a kâng ta duai duai a, oliv hmunte pawh a kâng tel a." 
Judges15:6 Filistia mite chuan, “Tu tih nge?” an ti a. “Timna khaw mi mâkpa Samsona tih alâwm. A nupui a lâksak a, a ṭhianpa a pe vei a nih kha,” an ti a. Filistia-ho chu an lo kal a, chu hmeichhia leh a pa chu an hâl hlum ta a." 
Judges15:7 Samsona chuan, “Hetianga in tih chuan in chungah ka ṭuan zet ang a, ka ti tawh lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges15:8 Tichuan, an chungah a che ta chiam a, a that ṭeuh va, Etam khâm pûkah a chhuk a, a awm ta reng a." 
Judges15:9 Filistia mite chu an chho va, Judai ramah bûk an khuar a, Lehi hmunah an inzâr darh a." 
Judges15:10 Judai ram mite chuan, “Engtizia nge min bei tûra in lo chhoh mai le?” an ti a. Anni chuan, “Samsona phuara, min sawisak anga sawisa ve tûrin kan lo thawk a ni,” an ti a." 
Judges15:11 Judai ram mi sângthum Etam khâm pûkah chuan an chhuk a, Samsona hnênah, “Filistia-ho hi kan chunga thuneitute an ni tih i hre na nge? Kan chunga i thiltih hi engtizia nge ni ta ngai?” an ti a. “Min tih angin an chungah ka han ti ve a nih kha,” a lo ti a." 
Judges15:12 “Filistia mite pêk atân kan rawn phuar dâwn che a ni,” an ti a. Samsona chuan, “Nangmahniin ka chunga kut thlâk loh tiam phawt rawh u,” a ti a." 
Judges15:13 A hnênah chuan, “Ni e, kan phuar ang che a, an kutah kan pe ang che, kan that tawp lo vang che,” an ti a. Hruizên thar pahnihin an phuar a, pûk ata chu an rawn hruai chho va." 
Judges15:14 Lehi an lo thlen chuan Filistia-ho chuan an lo hmuak a, an au dur dur a; Lalpa thlarau chuan a rawn man thut a, an phuarna hrui chu la zai kâng ang maiin a chat hmek hmek a." 
Judges15:15 Sabengtung khaberuh tharlâm tak hi a hmu a, a la a, mi sângkhat zet a vaw hlum a." 
Judges15:16 Samsona chuan, “Sabengtung khaberuh maiin ka talh vûm thûr a, A sâng têl ka vaw hlum, Sabengtung khaberuh rovin,” a ti a." 
Judges15:17 Chutia a sawi zawh chuan sabengtung khaberuh chu a paih a, chu hmun chu Ramat-lehi an vuah a." 
Judges15:18 A tui a hâl êm êm a, Lalpa chu a au va, “I chhiahhlawh hi ropui takin min hnehtîr a, tuihâlin ka thi mai dâwn alâwm, serh tan lohhovin min rawn that mai ang e,” a ti a." 
Judges15:19 Lehi hmuna khuar awm chu Lalpa chuan a tikhi a, tui a lo chhuak a; a han in chuan a chau chu a reh a, a harh ta huai a. Chu tuikhur chu En-hakore an vuah a, Lehi-ah chuan tûn thlengin a la awm." 
Judges15:20 Filistia-ho vânglaiin Samsona chuan Israel mite chu kum sawmhnih a ho va. 
Judges16:1 Samsona chu Gaza khuaah a kal a, nawhchizuar a hmu a, a mutpui a." 
Judges16:2 Gaza khaw hotute chuan Samsona a lo kal tih an hriat chuan an hual a, “Khawvâr hunah aw kan thah ang,” an ti a; ngawi ṭhapin kulh kawngka bulah an châng a." 
Judges16:3 Samsona chu zanlai thleng chauhvin a awm a; zânlaiah chuan a tho va, khawpui kulh kawngka chu a vuan a, a ban chawpin a pawt phawng a, a kalhnate nên lam a pu a, Hebron tlâng ep chhîpah a dah ta a." 
Judges16:4 Chumi hnu chuan Sorek ruama awm nula pakhat, Delili chu a ngaizâwng a." 
Judges16:5 Filistia hotute chu a hnênah an lo kal a, “Eng vânga heti taka chak nge a niha, engtin nge kan hneh theih ang hriat tum teh; kan phuar ang a, kan ching nek dâwn nia. Tangka sângkhat leh za ṭheuh kan pe ang che,” an rawn ti a." 
Judges16:6 Delili chuan Samsona hnênah, “Eng vânga heti taka chak nge maw i nih min hrilh teh; engtin nge phuar che ila, kan sawisak theih ang che?” a ti a." 
Judges16:7 Samsona chuan a hnênah, “Thal hrui thar pasarih, la tihro lohvin min phuar sela, ka chau dêr ang a; mi dang ang mai ka ni ang,” a ti a." 
Judges16:8 Filistia hruaitute chuan thal hrui thar pasarih, la tihro loh Delili hnenah an rawn keng a, chung chuan Samsona chu a phuar a." 
Judges16:9 A pindan chhûngrilah châng rutu an awm a. A hnênah chuan, “Samson, tho teh, Filistia-hovin an rawn bei dâwn a che,” a ti a. Thal hruite chu mei linga la zai deh chhum ang maiin a tichat ta a. A chak chhan chu an la hre ta chuang lo va." 
Judges16:10 Delili chuan Samsona hnênah, “Min va han thamlo ve, dâwt min han hrilh le; engin nge maw phuar beh theih i nih ang, min hrilh teh,” a ti a." 
Judges16:11 Ani chuan, “Hruizên thar, la hman hlek lohvin min phuar sela, ka khawng reng mai ang, mi dang ang mai bawk ka ni ang,” a ti a." 
Judges16:12 Delili chuan hruizên thar la hman hlek loh chu a la a, a phuar a, “Samson, Filistia miten an rawn bei dâwn a che,” a ti a. Chângtute chu pindan chhûngrilah an awm a, an lo chhuak a. La zai ang maiin hruizên pawh chu a tichat ta mai a." 
Judges16:13 Delili chuan, “Min lo thamlo hle zawng a nih hi, dâwt bawk min hrilh leh ta. Engti takin nge maw phuar che ila i chak theih loh vang le?” a ti a. Samsona chuan, “Ka sam phiar sarih hi puanah tah hnan la, kilh bet tlat la, a ni mai,” a ti a." 
Judges16:14 A sam chu a kilh bet a, a hnênah, “Samson, Filistia-hovin an rawn bei dâwn a che,” a ti a. Ani chu a lo harh a, a tah hnanna puanbute chu a pawt phawng a, a sam chu a pawt dâwk a." 
Judges16:15 Delili chuan, “Vawi thum ngawt dâwt min hrilh a, chuti chungin engtin nge ka hmangaih che min la tih theih le? Min lo hmangaih tak tak loh hi, i chak chhan pawh min hrilh duh si lo,” a ti a." 
Judges16:16 Ni tin a nawr a, a zawh tlut tlut avâng chuan a ning tawngkhawng chuan a hrilh ta mai a." 
Judges16:17 Engkim a hrilh ta a, “Ka pian tirh ata Pathian tâna Nazarit mi ka ni a, ka sam hi ziah kawlh a la ni lo. Ka lu hi meh ni sela ka chakna hi a bo vang a, mi dang ang bawkin ka chak lo ve ang,” a ti a." 
Judges16:18 Delili chuan engkim a hrilh ta tak tak a ni tih a hriat chuan Filistia hotute chu a ko va, “Lo chho thuai teh u, engkim min hrilh ta e,” a ti a. Filistia hotute chu an lo kal a, tangka chu an rawn keng a." 
Judges16:19 A mal chung lukhamin a muttîr a, mi pakhat a ko va, a sam phiar pasarih chu a hlehtîr a; a han beng harh a, a chakna chu a lo bo ta a." 
Judges16:20 “Samson, Filistia-hovin an rawn bei dâwn che,” a ti a. A muhîl chu a lo harh a, “Tûn hma ang khân ka chak ang a, ka haw mai ang,” a ti a. Lalpa chuan a kalsan tih a hre lo." 
Judges16:21 Filistia-ho chuan an man a, a mitmu an kherchhuahsak a. Gaza khuaah an hruai thla a, dâr kawl an buntîr a; tân inah chuan chhangphut an râwtdiptîr ṭhîn a;" 
Judges16:22 a lu an mehsak chu a lo hnim leh ṭan ta a. 
Judges16:23 Filistia hotute chu an pathian Dagona hnênah thilhlan tam tak hlân tûrin an lo pung khâwm chiam a, “Kan hmêlma Samsona chu kan pathianin min mansak ta,” tiin an lâwm dâwn a ni." 
Judges16:24 Samsona an hmuh chuan an pathian an fak a, “Min that ṭeuh va, kan ram tichhetu kha pathian chuan min mansak ta,” an ti a." 
Judges16:25 An hlim hle a, “Samsona kha han hruai teh u, nuihza siam nân i hmang ang u,” an ti a. Tân in aṭang chuan Samsona chu an la chhuak a, nuihza siam nân an hmang ta a, ban pahnih inkârah an thlung a." 
Judges16:26 Samsona chuan a kaitu naupang hnênah chuan, “He in innghahna banpui ber hi min dehtîr hrâm teh, ka han nghêng teh ang?” a ti a." 
Judges16:27 Inah chuan Filistia hruaitu, mipa leh hmeichhia an awm khat hmur a; a chhâwng chungah pawh chuan mipa leh hmeichhia sângthum lai an awm a. Samsona nuihza siam nâna an hmang chu an thlîr a." 
Judges16:28 Samsona chuan Lalpa a au va, “Aw Lalpa Pathian, min hre reng la, mi han tichak teh; aw Pathian, tûn ṭum chauh hi mi han tichak teh; ka mit khinghnih phuba hi Filistia mite chungah hian ka han la teh ang,” a ti a." 
Judges16:29 Chu in innghahna banpui pahnih chu a bân ding lam leh vei lamin a kuah a, a rinchhan a," 
Judges16:30 “Filistia mite hi ka han thihchilh teh ang,” a ti a, ban chu theihtâwpin a nawr vak a, in chu a chim ta rup a, an hruaitute leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng chu a delh hlum ta a. A dam laia a thah ai chuan a thihchilhte chu an tam zâwk a ni." 
Judges16:31 A unaute leh a pa chhûngte chu an lo chhuk a, a ruang chu an la chho va, a pa Manoa thlân Zora leh Estaol inkârah chuan an phûm ta a. Israel-te chu kum sawmhnih a ho a ni." 
Judges17:1 Efraim tlângramah mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Mika a ni." 
Judges17:2 A nu hnênah chuan, “Miin i tangkaraw tlang sângkhat leh za an rûksak che a, ânchhia i lawh a, kei pawh min hrilh kha, ka lâk a ni e, ka la kawl vek asin,” a ti a. A nu chuan, “E, ka fapa, Lalpa chuan mal sâwm che rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges17:3 Tangkaraw sângkhat leh za chu a nu a pe leh a, a nu chuan, “Ka ânchhia ka fapa chunga a tlâk loh nân keimah ngeiin hêng tangka hi Lalpa tân ka hlân a ni. Thing milem luan nân leh a chhûna chhûn milem siam nân hman tûr a ni. Tangkarua chu ka pe kîr leh ang che,” a ti a." 
Judges17:4 A nu a pêk kîr tangka chu a nu chuan tlang zahnih a la a, themthiam hnênah thing milem tangkaruaa luan tûr leh a chhûna chhûn tangkaraw milem siam nân a pe a; Mika inah chuan an dah a." 
Judges17:5 Mika chuan pathian in a sa a, Efod leh milem a siam a, a fapa pakhat chu puithiam atân a ruat a." 
Judges17:6 Chûng hun lai chuan Israel ramah lal an nei lo, ṭha an tih ang angin mi tin an awm mai a ni." 
Judges17:7 Judai rama Bethlehem khuaah tlangvâl pakhat Levia chi hi a awm a. 
Judges17:8 Chu mi chuan awmna tûr zawngin Judai rama Bethlehem khua chu a chhuahsan a, Efraim tlângramah a lo kal a, Mika in chu a lo thleng a." 
Judges17:9 Mika chuan, “Khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Judai rama Bethlehem khuaa awm Levia chi ka ni a, awmna tûr zawngin ka lo kal a ni” a ti a." 
Judges17:10 Mika chuan a hnênah, “Ka hnênah awm ve mai la, ka pa leh puithiam atân ṭang ta mai che; kum khatah tangka tlang sâwm ka pe ang che, i silhfên sin khat leh ei pawh ka tum ang,” a ti a. Levia chi tlangvâl chu a awm ve ta a." 
Judges17:11 Chu mi inah chuan Levia chi chu lungawi takin a awm a, a fapa pakhat ang maiin a awm ve ta a." 
Judges17:12 Mika chuan Levia chu a serh hrang a, tlangvâl chu a puithiamah a ṭantîr ta a; Mika inah chuan a chêng ve a." 
Judges17:13 “Levia chi ngei puithiamah ka nei ta a, Lalpa chuan min tiṭha ngei ang maw le!” a ti a." 
Judges18:1 Chûng lai chuan Israel ramah lal an nei lo. Israel zînga ram chanpual tûr an sem lai khân Dana thlahte chu ram chanpual tûr an ruatsak ve lo va, ram chanpual luah tûr an zawng reng a ni." 
Judges18:2 Chuvâng chuan, Dana thlahte chuan an chite zîng aṭangin mi panga fel tak tak, Zora leh Estaol khua aṭangin an thlang chhuak a, ram ṭha zawnga en thlithlai tûrin an tîr a. Efraim tlângram an han thlen chuan Mika inah an kal a, an riak ta a." 
Judges18:3 Mika ina Levia chi tlangvâl ṭawng an han hriat chuan a aw phawi chu an hre ta a, an pan a, “Eng nge hetah i tih? Tu nge hruai che?” an ti a." 
Judges18:4 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Mika inah ka lo kal a, puithiam atân min ruat a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges18:5 “Kan kalna tûrah hian kan hmuingîl dâwn nge dâwn lo Pathian min râwnsak teh,” an ti a." 
Judges18:6 Puithiam chuan, “Ngaihngam takin kal rawh u, Lalpa chuan in kalna tûrah hian in hma a hruai e,” a ti a." 
Judges18:7 Mi panga chu an kal a, Lais khua an va thleng a. Sidon mite ang bawkin chu khaw mite chu ngaihngam takin an awm tih an hmu a. Mi nunnêm, awm mai mai, tu mah tai nei lo, engkima intodelh an ni. Sidon khua aṭang chuan hla tak a ni a, mi dang hnêk hnai an nei hek lo." 
Judges18:8 Mi panga chu Zora leh Estaol khuaa mite hnên an thlen leh chuan," 
Judges18:9 “Ti rawh u, Lais khua chu i han bei ang u, a ram kan han hmu a, ram ṭha tak a ni. Hetah awm mai mai teh suh u; hmanhmawh ila, i han la ang u." 
Judges18:10 Han thleng mah ila, an lo inrâlring lo vang. A ram pawh zau tâwk tak a ni; mihring mamawh engkim an hnianghnâr a ni; Lalpa chuan a pe tawh a che u,” an ti a." 
Judges18:11 Tichuan, Dana thlahte, hriamhrei keng mi zaruk chu Zora leh Estaol khua aṭang chuan an thawk chhuak a." 
Judges18:12 Judai ramah an chho va, Kiriat-jearim-ah bûk an khuar a; chuvângin, chu khua chuan Mahane-dan tih hming a la pu ta reng a ni." 
Judges18:13 An kal zêl a, Efraim tlângram Mika in chu an han thleng a." 
Judges18:14 Lais leh a vêl ram han en thlithlaitu mi panga khân an ṭhiante hnênah, “Hêng in pakhat chhûngah hian thing milem tangkaruaa luante a awm tih in hria em? Milem dangte leh Efod pawh a awm, engtin nge ti ila ṭha ang?” an ti a." 
Judges18:15 Levia chi tlangvâl awmna Mika inah chuan an kal a, chu tlangvâl chu, “I dam em?” an ti a." 
Judges18:16 Kawngkhâr bulah chuan hriamhrei kengin Dana thlahte chu mi zaruk an ding a. 
Judges18:17 Mi pangate kha erawh chu inah chuan an lût a, tangkaraw luan thing milem te, a chhûna chhûn milem te leh Efod te chu an la a; puithiam chu mi zaruk zîngah chuan an dintîr a." 
Judges18:18 Mi pangaten Mika ina thil serh awmte chu an lâk laiin puithiam chuan, “Engtin nge in tih dâwn?” a ti a." 
Judges18:19 “Ngawi mai rawh, ṭawng ve suh, kan hnênah lo kal zâwk la, kan puithiamah ṭang ang che, Israel hnam pum puithiam nih chu chhûng khat puithiam mai nih ai chuan i duh zâwk lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
Judges18:20 Puithiam chu a lâwm hle a; tichuan, thil serhte chu amah chuan a keng a, an zîngah chuan a kal ve ta a." 
Judges18:21 An lo kalna lamah an kîr a, an naupangte leh rante nên chuan an chhuak ta a; a kal hmasaten an bungruate chu an lo kalpui a." 
Judges18:22 Thui fe an kal tawh a, Mika chuan a ṭhenawm khawvêngte a pun a, bei tûrin a ûm a." 
Judges18:23 Dana thlahte chu an va ûm pha a, an au va. Dana thlahte chu an lo hawi a, Mika hnênah, “Eng nge ni ta, in va tam ve?” an ti a." 
Judges18:24 “Eng nge ni ta te in han ti a; ka puithiam min chhuhsak a, pathian, ka siamte chu min rûksak a, eng mah hnutchhiah in nei hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
Judges18:25 Dana thlahte chuan, “Thu dang eng mah sawi teh suh, hêng mite hi an thinur hlauh ang a, an bei mai ang che. In chhûngkuain an timang mai ang che u asin,” an ti a." 
Judges18:26 An kal ta zêl a, Mika chuan a aiin an chak zâwk hle tih a hriatin a kîr a, a haw leh ta a." 
Judges18:27 Mika milem siam leh a puithiam chu an hruai a, Lais an va thleng a, ngaihngam taka an awm hle hle chu an bei a, khandaihin an sât hlum a, khua chu an hâl a." 
Judges18:28 Rawn chhan tûr tu mah an awm lo, Sidon khua aṭangin hla tak a ni a. Khua chu an din ṭha leh a, an awm ta a." 
Judges18:29 An thlahtu Dana, Israela fa hming chawiin chu khaw hmingah chuan Dan an sa a, a hming hmasa chu Lais a ni." 
Judges18:30 Dana thlahte chuan thing milem tangkaruaa luan chu an be ta a. Mosia fa Gersoma fapa Jonathana chu puithiamah an hmang a; chu mi thlahte chu saltân thleng khân Dan-ho puithiamah an ṭang a; 
Judges18:31 Mika milem siamte chu a awm ta reng a. Inbiakna bûk, Pathian an biakna kha erawh chu Silo khuaah a awm." 
Judges19:1 Israel rama lal an neih hma khân Levia chi mi pakhat Efraim tlângram tâwpah a awm a, Judai ram Bethlehem khuaa mi hmei a nei a." 
Judges19:2 A hmei chuan a kalsan a, a pa in lamah, Judai ram Bethlehem khuaah chuan a haw a, thla li lai a awm a." 
Judges19:3 A pasal chu a tho va, ṭawng ṭhaa thlêma hruai kîr leh tumin chhiahhlawh pakhat leh sabengtung pahnih nên a va kal a. Hmeichhia chuan a pa inah a hruai lût a; hmeichhe pa chu a lâwm hle a." 
Judges19:4 Hmeichhe pa, a puzawn chuan a chelh a; ni thum chu an eiin an in a." 
Judges19:5 A ni li ni chuan zîngah an tho va; ani pawh chu chhuah tumin a tho va; mahse, a puzawn chuan, “Eng emaw tal ei zet ula, in chhuak dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Judges19:6 Tichuan, an ṭhu ho va, an eiin an in ta a. A puzawn chuan, “Zânin chu riak leh mai rawh u, hmanhmawh tehchiam a ṭûl lo ve,” a ti a." 
Judges19:7 Chumi ni chuan chhuah an han tum leh a; mahse, a puzawn chuan a chelh leh a, an châm leh ta a." 
Judges19:8 A ni nga ni chuan chhuak tawh tûrin zîng takah a tho va, a puzawn chuan, “Ni nêm deuh hma chu awm rih ula, eng emaw tal chu ei rih teh u,” a ti a." 
Judges19:9 A hmei nên, a chhiahhlawh nên kal tûra an han thawh chhuah chuan a puzawn chuan, “Ngawi teh u, khua a va tlai ta ve, châm leh rih mai teh u; ni a tla dâwn mai tawh si a, hetah riak ula, chaw te i ei ho leh teh ang u. Naktûk zîngah in tho vang a, in khaw ban tûrin in chhuak dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Judges19:10 Mahse, châm leh chu a duh lo va, a tho va, a chhuak ta a. Jebus-ho khua Jerusalem khaw bul chu, a thawmhnaw phur sabengtungte nên chuan an thleng a, a hmei pawh chu a tel ve a." 
Judges19:11 Jebus-ho khua an thlen chuan ni a hniam hle tawh a, a chhiahhlawh chuan, “En teh, Jebus-ho khuaah hian i riak mai ang u,” a ti a." 
Judges19:12 A pu chuan, “Israel mi ni lo, hnam dang khuaah kan riak tûr a ni lo. Gibea khua i pan ang u,” a ti a." 
Judges19:13 A chhiahhlawh hnênah chuan, “Gibea khuaah emaw, Rama khuaah emaw kan riak ang chu,” a ti a." 
Judges19:14 An kal ta zêl a Gibea khua an thlen chuan ni a tla ta a. Gibea chu Benjamin-ho khua a ni. 
Judges19:15 Riah tumin Gibea khua chu an pan a, thleng tûra lo sâwm tu mah an awm loh avângin khawpui tual laili chu an pan a, an ṭhu ta a." 
Judges19:16 Tlaiah putar pakhat feh haw hi a lo kal a; amah chu Efraim tlângram mi a ni a, Gibea khuaah a awm ve mai a ni; Gibea mite chu Benjamina thlahte an ni." 
Judges19:17 Chu mi chuan khawpui tual laili chu a han en chuan mikhual ṭhu a hmu a, “Khawi lamah nge i kal dâwn? Khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a." 
Judges19:18 Ani chuan, “Judai ram Bethlehem-ah kan va kal a, Efraim tlâng ram tawpa kan awmnaah kîr leh tur kan ni a, Lalpa inah kal kan tum a ni; tu mah min thleng duh an awm lo va ni." 
Judges19:19 Sabengtung ei tûr buhpâwlte pawh kan intodelh a, kei leh i bawihnu leh tlangvâl tân pawh chaw ei tûr kan nei: neih loh eng mah kan nei lo,” a ti a." 
Judges19:20 Putar chuan, “Mangang hauh suh u, in mamawh zawng zawng chu ka tum vêk ang, khawlaiah zawng riak lul teh suh u,” a ti a." 
Judges19:21 Tichuan, a inah a hruai lût a, sabengtungte chu buhpâwl a pe a, an ke an sil a, an eiin an in ta a." 
Judges19:22 Hlim taka chaw an ei lai chuan khawpuia mi sual rual chuan in chu an rawn hual a, kawngka chu an rawn chhuih dawt dawt a, in neitu putar hnênah, “I mikhualpa kha han hruai chhuak teh, kan lo pâwl ang e,” an ti a." 
Judges19:23 In neitupa chu a chhuak a, “Ni lo ve, ka unaute u, chutiang thil ṭha lo tak chu tih tum teh suh u; he mi hi ka ina thleng a ni a, he thil ṭha lo hi a chungah ti suh u." 
Judges19:24 En teh u, ka fanu, mipa la pâwl loh leh he mi hmei hi, ka rawn la chhuak ang a, in duh leh in tlâwm ang a, in duh ang angin in sawisa dâwn nia; he mi chungah erawh hi chuan thil ṭha lo ti teh suh u,” a ti a." 
Judges19:25 Mite chuan a thu an ngaithla duh lo va; chutichuan, kha mi khân a hmei chu a hruai chhuak a, an lo pâwl a, zânkhuain an sawisa a, zîng a lo niha, ni a lo lan dâwn chuan an chhuah ta a." 
Judges19:26 Hmeichhia chu zîngah a pasal thlenna inah chuan a lo kal a, kawngka bulah chuan a tlu tawp a, khaw ên hma chu a awm ta a." 
Judges19:27 A pasal chu zîngah a tho va, kal chhuah tumin kawngka chu a han hawng a, a hmei chu kawngka bulah chuan a lo let dêr a, a kut chuan kawngka chu a ban a." 
Judges19:28 A hnênah, “Tho teh, i kal ang,” a ti a; chhâng tûr a lo awm tawh lo va. A sabengtung chungah chuan a dah a, a tho va, a in lamah chuan a haw ta a." 
Judges19:29 In a va thlen chuan chem a la a, a hmei fuke chu sâwm leh pahnihah a chan sawm a, Israel ram chhûngah chuan a thawn darh ta vek a." 
Judges19:30 A lo hmu apiang chuan, “Israel-te zîngah Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah aṭanga tûn thlengin hetiang thil hi a la awm ngai lo; ngaihtuah ula, inrawn khâwmin ngaih dân i sawi teh ang u,” an ti a." 
Judges20:1 Israel mi zawng zawng chu thukhat vuain Mizpa khuaah Lalpa hmaah an pung khâwm a, Dan leh Beer-seba khaw inkâra mi zawng zawng leh Gilead ram mite nên an lo kal khâwm a ni." 
Judges20:2 Israel hnam tin hruaitute pawh Pathian mite pungkhâwmho zîngah chuan an tel a. Khandaih lek thei ṭhalh mi nuai li an tling a. 
Judges20:3 Benjamina thlahte chuan Israel-te chu Mizpa khuaah an pung khâwm tih an lo hria a. Israel mite chuan, “Engtin nge he thil ṭha lo tak hi a lo thlen dân han sawi chiang teh,” an ti a." 
Judges20:4 Levia chi, an thah tak hmeichhe pasal chuan, “Benjamin-ho khua Gibea ka va thleng a, ka hmei nên hian kan riak a." 
Judges20:5 Gibea mite chu zânah mi bei tûrin an lo thawk a, ka thlen in an rawn hual a; min thah an tum a, ka hmeinu chu an sual lui a, a thi ta hial a ni." 
Judges20:6 Ka hmei chu inah ka hâwn a, a fuke chu ka chan a, Israel ramah ka thawn darh a nih kha; hetiang khawpa tenawmin an hur a ni." 
Judges20:7 Ngai teh u, Israel fate u, hetah in awm kim vek a, engtia tih tûr nge in ngaih dân sawi teh u,” a ti a." 
Judges20:8 Mipui zawng zawng chu thukhat vuain an tho va, “Puan ina awm kan ni emaw, ina awm kan ni emaw, tu mah kan haw lo vang." 
Judges20:9 Hetiang hian Gibea chu kan sawisa ang: ṭhumvâwrin kan inbeih chhâwk ang a. 
Judges20:10 Israel-te zinga mi sawma pakhat zelin mipuite ei tur an hlân ang a, mi dang chuan Gibea mite chu hetiang hurna thil tenawm hi an tih avâng hian an ching nek dâwn a ni,” an ti a." 
Judges20:11 Tichuan, Israel rama mipa zawng zawng chu lungrual takin khua chu tihchhiat tumin an pung khâwm a." 
Judges20:12 Israel hnamte chuan Benjamin-ho hnam ram tinah zualko an tîr a, “Engtizia nge hetiang thil sual hi in tih le?" 
Judges20:13 Gibea khaw mi, hetiang mi khawloho hi han hruai ula, kan lo that ang e, hetiang thil sual hi Israel zîngah kan tiboral tûr a ni,” an ti a. Mahse, Benjamin-ho chuan Israel-ho thu chu engah mah an ngai lo va." 
Judges20:14 Benjamin-ho khaw tin aṭang chuan Israel mi dangte lo bei tûrin Gibea khuaah an lo kal khâwm a. 
Judges20:15 Gibea khuaa mite bâkah Benjamin mi khaw hrang hrang aṭanga lo kalte chu khandaih keng ṭhalh sînghnih leh sângruk an ni. Gibea mi pawh, thlan chhuah ṭhalh zasarih an ni." 
Judges20:16 Hêng mi thlan chhuah zînga zasarih chu veikhawr an ni a, virvawmin samzai pawh ṭhelh lovin an vawm chhum thei a ni." 
Judges20:17 Israel mi, Benjamin-ho bei tûr chu mi nuaili, khandaih keng ṭhalh, indonaa kal tawh vek an ni." 
Judges20:18 Israel mite chu an tho va, Bethel-ah an kal a, Pathian an râwn a, “Benjamin-ho bei tûrin tu hnam nge kal hmasa ang?” an ti a. Lalpa chuan, “Juda thlahte kal hmasa rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges20:19 Israel mite chu zîngah an tho va, Gibea khua hualin bûk an khuar a." 
Judges20:20 Benjamin-ho bei tûr chuan an thawk chhuak a, khaw ep chuan an sipaite an tlar a." 
Judges20:21 Benjamin-ho chu Gibea khua aṭang chuan an lo chhuak a, chumi ni chuan Israel mite chu mi sînghnih leh sânghnih an that a." 
Judges20:22 Israel mite chu an infuih sauh sauh va, a hma nia bei tûra an han insiamna hmunah vêk khân an han intlar a." 
Judges20:23 Chumi ni hma chuan Israel-te chu Lalpa hmaah ṭapin tlai thlengin an awm a, “Kan unau Benjamin-ho bei tûrin kan thawk leh ang em?” tiin an zâwt a. Lalpa chuan, “Bei leh rawh u,” a ti a ni." 
Judges20:24 A ni hnih ni pawh chuan Israel-te chu Benjamin-ho bei tûr chuan an thawk leh a. 
Judges20:25 Benjamin-ho chu a ni hnih ni pawh chuan Gibea khua aṭangin an lo chhuak a, khandaih keng ṭhiau mi sîngkhat leh sângriat an that leh ta a." 
Judges20:26 Israel mi zawng zawng chu Bethel-ah an chho va, Lalpa hmaah an ṭap a, an ṭhu a, tlai thlengin chaw an nghei a, hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan an hlân a." 
Judges20:27 Chûng lai chuan Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm chu chutah chuan a awm a, Lalpa chu an râwn a." 
Judges20:28 Arona fa Eleazara fapa Finehasa chu bâwm hmaah chuan a ding a, “Benjamin-ho, kan unaute bei tûrin kan thawk leh dâwn nge dâwn lo?” tiin a zâwt a. Lalpa chuan, “Kal leh rawh u, naktûk chuan in kutah ka pe ang,” a ti a." 
Judges20:29 Israel mite chuan Gibea khaw bulah chângrutu an dah a. Ni dang ang bawkin Israel-te chu, a ni thum ni chuan Benjamin-ho bei tûr chuan an han intlar a." 
Judges20:30 Benjamin-ho chu bei lêt tûrin an lo thawk a, khua ata chu an tlân chhuak a; ni dang ang bawk khân lovah te, kawngpui - Bethel leh Gibea panna kawngah te chuan Israel mi sawmthum zet an that leh ta mai a." 
Judges20:31 Benjamin-ho chuan, “Tûn hma ang bawk khân kan that leh ta e,” an ti a." 
Judges20:32 Israel-te chuan, “Tlânchhia ila, khawpui ata kawngpuiah hian min rawn ûm sela, lo chhuak teh se,” an ti a ni." 
Judges20:33 Israel sipai nâwlpui chu Baaltamar-ah an tlân khâwm a, ṭan an lo la ta a; tin, Gibea khaw huala lungpui kâra biruho kha an lo zuang chhuak bawk a." 
Judges20:34 Chûng mi thlan bîk sîngkhat chuan Gibea khua chu an bei ta chiam a, Benjamin-ho chuan an ralthum dâwn tih rêng an inhre lo." 
Judges20:35 Lalpa chuan Israel-te chu Benjamin-ho a hnehtîr a, Israel-te chuan mi sînghnih leh sângnga leh za lai an that." 
Judges20:36 Benjamin-ho chuan an chan a chhe ta dêr tih an inhre ta a. Israel sipai bupui chuan Gibea khua huala châng rutu an dahte kha rinchhanin an tawlh kîr a ni. 
Judges20:37 Gibea khuaah chuan an tlân lût a, an insem darh a, an hmuh apiang an that a." 
Judges20:38 Israel sipai bupui leh biruho khân rem an insiam a, khua aṭangin mei khu luih luih an hmuh chuan," 
Judges20:39 indona hmuna Israel awmte chu lo lêt tûr an ni. Benjamin-ho khân Israel mi sawmthum an that hman tawh a, “Tûn hmaa kan tih ang bawkin kan ti leh dâwn e,” an ti a." 
Judges20:40 Khua aṭanga mei a khûk chhoh ngut ngut veleh Benjamin-ho chuan an han thlîr lêt a, khua a kâng ta vek tih an hmuh chuan mak an ti êm êm a." 
Judges20:41 Israel-te pawh an lo lêt a; Benjamin-ho chuan tihhlum vek an ni mai dâwn tih an inhriat chuan an chiai zo ta a. 
Judges20:42 Israel-ho lak aṭang chuan an tawlh kîr a, tu ma awm lohna lamah tlân an tum a; mahse, an tlân chhuak thei lo, sipai nâwlpui leh khua aṭanga lo tlân chhuakte khân lehlam lehlamah an bei a ni." 
Judges20:43 Israel-te chuan an hmêlmate chu ruangchaicheh an thlâk hnan a, Gibea chhak lamah an tlân a, an ûm a, an that zêl a." 
Judges20:44 Benjamin sipai ṭha ṭha mi sîngkhat leh sângriat an that a. 
Judges20:45 A ṭhen chu Rimon pûk panin an tlân a, kawngah mi sângnga lai chu an thi bawk a. Israel-te chuan Gidom thlengin an ûm a, mi sânghnih chu an that a." 
Judges20:46 A vaiin Benjamin-ho chu mi sînghnih leh sângnga, indo mi hlîr, an thi a ni." 
Judges20:47 Mi zaruk erawh chu Rimon pûkah an tlân a, thla li lai chutah chuan an awm a." 
Judges20:48 Israel-te chu Benjamin-ho chungah chuan an che zêl a, mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh, naupang pawh, an rante chenin an that fai vek a. Chûng lai vêla an khua zawng chu an hâl vek bawk a." 
Judges21:1 Israel-te Mizpa khuaa an pun khâwm khân Lalpa hmaah thu an tiam tlat a, “Tu mahin kan fanute Benjamin-ho kan neihtîr lo vang,” an ti a." 
Judges21:2 Israel mite chu Bethel-ah an kal a, Pathian hmaah tlai thlengin an ṭhu a, ring tak leh lungchhe takin," 
Judges21:3 “Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, hetiang thil hi engtia lo thleng nge ni le, Israel-te zîngah Benjamin thlah an boral mai bîk dâwn hi,” an ti a." 
Judges21:4 A tûkah chuan zîng takah maichâm an siam a, remna thilhlan leh hâlral thilhlan an hlân a." 
Judges21:5 “Israel hnam zîngah Mizpa khuaa kal khâwmnaa tel ve lo an awm em?” tiin an inzâwt a. Mizpa khuaa kal lo chu tihhlum tûr an ti a, kal lo an awm lo a ni." 
Judges21:6 Israel-te chuan an unau Benjamin-ho chu an khawngaih a, “Vawiin hian Israel-te chuan kan zînga hnam pakhat kan chân dâwn alâwm." 
Judges21:7 Benjamin hnam la damte tân nupui engtin nge kan zawnsak ang? Lalpa hmaah kan fanute chu neihtîr tawp lo tûrin thu kan lo tiam tlat tawh si a,” an ti a." 
Judges21:8 Mizpa khuaa inkhâwmpuia kal ve lo hnam an awm em tia an han inzawh chian chuan Gilead ram, Jabes khaw mi lo chu an awm vek a." 
Judges21:9 Hming an han lam khân Jabes khaw mi chhâng tûr an awm lo. 
Judges21:10 Pungkhâwmho hotute chuan an zînga mi huaisen sîngkhat leh sânghnih an tîr a, “Kal ula, Jabes khuaa mi zawng zawng, hmeichhia leh naupang lamin va that rawh u." 
Judges21:11 Mipa that vek ula, hmeichhia pawh, mipa pâwl tawh chu that vek ang che u,” an ti a." 
Judges21:12 Jabes-ho zîngah chuan nula, mipa la pawl loh zali an hmu a, Silo-ah Kanan ramah chuan an rawn hruai a." 
Judges21:13 Rimon pûka awm Benjamin-ho hnênah palai an tîr a, beih an tum tawh loh thu an hrilh a." 
Judges21:14 Benjamin-ho chu an lo kîr a, Israel-te chuan Jabes nula, an thah lohho chu, nupuiah an pe a; mahse, an indaih lo." 
Judges21:15 Lalpa chuan Israel inpumkhatna a tihdarh tâk avângin mite chuan pawi an ti a, Benjamin-ho chu an lainat a." 
Judges21:16 Pungkhâwm hotute chuan, “Benjamin zîngah nupui tûr hmeichhia an awm tawh si lo," 
Judges21:17 nupui tûr la nei ve lote tân engtin nge nupui kan zawnsak ang? Israel-te hian kan zînga hnam pakhat mang kan phal tûr a ni lo. 
Judges21:18 Benjamin-ho din chhuah lehna ngaihtuahpui tûr a ni; kan fanute lah kan neihtîr thei si lo: ‘mahni fanu Benjamin mi neihtîr chu ânchhia dawng rawh se,’ kan lo ti tawh si a,” an ti a." 
Judges21:19 “Ngai teh u, Lalpa tâna kum tin Silo khuaa kût awm ṭhîn chu a hun leh ṭêp tawh alâwm,” tiin an ngaihtuah a. (Silo hi Bethel hmâr lam, Bethel aṭanga Sekem panna lamlian khawchhak lama awm, Lebona chhima awm a ni)." 
Judges21:20 Benjamin thlahte chu thu an pe a, “Kal ula, grep huanah te lo châng ru ula," 
Judges21:21 Silo khaw nulate lâm tûr an lo chhuak ang a, grep huan aṭang chuan lo chhuak ula, Silo nulate chu mahni nupui tûr ṭheuh lo man ula, Benjamin ramah in hâwnpui dâwn nia." 
Judges21:22 An paten emaw, an nuṭaten emaw an rawn sawi buai dâwn pawhin, ‘Khawngaih takin neih hlentîr mai teh u, râl anga inbeiin nupuiah an man pawh a ni lo va; nangni lahin in duh thu-a in pêk a ni hek lo va, in thutiam pawh in bawhchhe hlei nem,’ kan lo ti ang e,” an ti a." 
Judges21:23 An sawi ang chuan Benjamin-ho chuan an ti a, Silo khuaa nula lâm zînga mi mahni nupui tûr ṭheuh an man a, an ramah an hâwnpui a, an awm ta a." 
Judges21:24 Israel dangte chu mahni ram chanpualah an chi leh hnam ram ṭheuhvah an haw ta a. 
Judges21:25 Chutih lai chuan Israel ramah lal an awm lo, ṭha an tih ang angin mi tin an awm mai a ni." 
Ruth1:1 Rorêltuten ro an rêl lai khân, Israel ramah ṭâm a tla a. Judai ram Bethlehem khuaa mi pakhat chu a nupui leh a fapa pahnih nên Moab ramah ṭâm tlân tûrin an kal a." 
Ruth1:2 Chu mi hming chu Elimeleka a ni a, a nupui hming chu Naomi a ni; an fate hming chu Mahlona leh Kiliona a ni. Judai ram Bethlehem khuaa Efrata mi an ni. Moab ramah chuan an kal a, chutah chuan an awm ta reng a." 
Ruth1:3 Naomi pasal Elimeleka chu a thi a; tichuan, Naomi chu a fapa pahnihte nên chauh an awm ta a." 
Ruth1:4 A fate chuan Moab mi nupuiah an nei a, pakhat hming chu Orpi a ni a, a dang hming chu Ruthi a ni. Chuta kum sâwm lai an awm hnu chuan" 
Ruth1:5 Mahlona leh Kiliona chu an thi ve leh ta a, chu nu chu a pasal leh a fapate chuan an thihsan ve leh ta a." 
Ruth1:6 Tin, Lalpa chuan a mite a ṭanpui a, ei tûr a pe tih Moab ram aṭang chuan an lo hria a, a mote nên chuan Moab ram ata haw tûrin an insiam ta a." 
Ruth1:7 A mo pahnih nên chuan an awmna hmun chhuahsanin Judai ram an pan ta a. 
Ruth1:8 Nakinah chuan Naomi chuan a mo pahnihte hnênah chuan, “In nute in lamah haw ve ve zâwk rawh u, ka chungah leh in pasal thi tate chunga khawngaihna in lantîr ang khân, Lalpa chuan khawngaih che u rawh se." 
Ruth1:9 Lalpan in pahnihin thlamuang taka pasal te hmua in awm theih nân khawngaih che u rawh se,” a ti a. Anni chu a fâwp a, râwl chhuah meuhvin an ṭap ta a." 
Ruth1:10 A mote chuan, “Kan haw lo vang, i mite hnêna i kal tûr hi kan zui ve zâwk ang che,” an ti a." 
Ruth1:11 Naomi chuan, “Ka fanute u, haw zâwk rawh u. Engah nge ka hnênah chuan in kal ve kher ang? In pasal tûr fapa ka nei leh thei dâwn em ni?" 
Ruth1:12 Ka fanute u, in in lamah haw leh rawh u. Pasal han nei tûrin ka upa lutuk tawh si a, ‘ka bei a la sei reng e,’ tiin zâninah pawh hian pasal neiin fapa te pawh han nei tehrêng ila," 
Ruth1:13 an puitlin thlengin in nghâk dâwn em ni ang? Pasal lovin in awm reng dâwn em ni? Ni lul lo ve, ka fanute u, nangmahni avâng hian ka rilru a na êm êm a ni, Lalpa kut ka tuar ta si a,” a ti a." 
Ruth1:14 Chu veleh râwl chhuah meuhvin an ṭap leh ta a, Orpi chuan a pi chu a fâwp a, a kîrsan ta a. Ruthi erawh chuan a vuan tlat a." 
Ruth1:15 Naomi chuan, “En teh, i mopui pawh a chite leh a pathian hnênah a hâwn leh tâk saw, i mopui saw zui haw ve rawh,” a ti a." 
Ruth1:16 Ruthi erawh chuan, “Nangmah ṭhen tûr leh kîrsan tûr che chuan min thlêm lo hrâm rawh; i kalna apiangah ka kal ang a, i riahna apiangah ka riak ang; i chite chu ka chite an ni ang a, i Pathian chu ka Pathian a ni ang." 
Ruth1:17 I thihnaah ka thi ang a, chutah chuan min phûm ve mai rawh se. Nang leh kei hi thihna chauh lo chuan thil dangin min ṭhen dâwn ai chuan Lalpan eng ang pawhin; a duh duhin min ti rawh se,” a ti a." 
Ruth1:18 A hnêna kal ve a tum tlat tih a hriatin Naomi chuan a ngawihsan ta a. 
Ruth1:19 Tichuan, Bethlehem thlengin an kal dûn ta a. Bethlehem an han thlen chuan a khuain an phu ta mur mur a, nuho chuan, “Hei Naomi kha a ni maw?” an ti a." 
Ruth1:20 Naomi chuan an hnênah, “Naomi min ti tawh suh u, Marai min ti zâwk rawh u. Engkimtitheia chuan na takin min thunun ta si a." 
Ruth1:21 Kokim takin kan kal chhuak a, Lalpa chuan kutbêngin min hruai hâwng leh ta a nih hi. Engati nge, Naomi min la tih cheu le, Lalpa chuan min thunun a, Engkimtitheia chuan ka chungah chhiatna a thlentîr ta si a,” a ti a." 
Ruth1:22 Naomi chu a monu Moab mi nên Moab ram aṭangin an lo kîr a, barli seng ṭan tirh laiin Bethlehem khua chu an lo thleng a ni." 
Ruth2:1 Naomi chuan a pasal Elimeleka laichîn, a hming Boaza, mi neinung tak chhûng hnai a nei a." 
Ruth2:2 Moab mi Ruthi chuan Naomi hnênah, “Ka va feh ang a, buhṭo ka va zawng ang e, min lo khawngaih thei an lo awm mahna,” a ti a. Naomi chuan, “Kal ta che, ka fanu,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:3 Tichuan, a kal ta a, buhsengtute buh lâk hmaih chu a va zawng a. Elimeleka laichîn Boaza lovah a va kal fuh hlauh va." 
Ruth2:4 Boaza pawh Bethlehem aṭang chuan a lo thleng ve a, buhsengtute hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa in hnênah awm rawh se,” a ti a. Anni chuan, “ Lalpa chuan malsâwm che rawh se,” tiin an lo chhâng a." 
Ruth2:5 Boaza chuan a chhiahhlawh, buhseng hotu hnênah chuan, “Hei, khawi lam hmeichhia nge ni le?” a ti a." 
Ruth2:6 A chhiahhlawh, buhseng hotu chuan, “He mi hi Moab hmeichhia, Naomi ruala Moab ram aṭanga lo kal kha a ni." 
Ruth2:7 ‘Buhsengtute buhphal khâwm hmaih ka zawng ang e,’ tiin min dîl a; rei lo tê bûka a han châwl zawk tih loh chu zîng aṭangin tûn thlengin rim takin a thawk reng a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:8 Boaza chuan Ruthi hnênah chuan, “Ka fanu, ka hrilh a che. Lo dangah buhṭo zawng suh la, heta ta hi kal sawn suh ang che. Chhiahhlawh nulate hnênah hian awm ve reng la;" 
Ruth2:9 khawi lamah nge buh an seng en thlithlai la, nulate hi zui zêl ang che. Tlangvâlte pawh eng mah tih lo tûr chein thu ka pe a; i tui a hâl chângin tuibêla tlangvâlte tui chawi sa hi i in ṭhîn dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:10 Tichuan, ani chu hmai lei siin a kûn a, “Kei hnam dang mi lehnghâl min hre duh a, heti taka min khawngaih hi engtizia nge ni le?” a ti a." 
Ruth2:11 Boaza chuan heti hian a chhâng a, “I pasal thih a chin tûn thlengin i pi chunga i thil tih zawng zawng miin min hrilh a; i nu te, i pa te, i pianna ram te kalsana, i la hriat loh mite zînga chêng tûra i lo kal dân te pawh min hrilh a ni." 
Ruth2:12 Lalpa chuan i thiltih man rûl che sela; Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, inhumhim nâna a thlahnuai i rawn chuha chuan i ṭhat man pe ṭeuh che rawh se,” tiin." 
Ruth2:13 Ani chuan, “Ka pu, nangin min khawngaih avângin ka thla a muang ta. I chhiahhlawh nulate zînga mi ni lo mah ila, i chhiahhlawhnu hi ṭha takin i be ta si a,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:14 Chawfâk a lo hun chuan Boaza chuan a hnênah, “Hetah lo kal la, chhang te hi ei ve la, chhang hi uain thûrah te han chiah ve rawh khai,” a ti a. Tichuan, buhsengtute kiangah chuan a ṭhu ve a, chhangpêr a lo pe a, puar taka a ei hnuin a la ei bâng ta cheu va." 
Ruth2:15 Buhṭo chu a han zawng leh a, Boaza chuan tlangvâlte hnênah chuan, “Buh ahna zînga mi pawh la sela, hau suh ang che u." 
Ruth2:16 A têl aṭangin buhvuite phawichhuahsak ula, a chhar tûrin hnutchhiah ang che u, hau rêng rêng suh u,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:17 Lovah chuan tlai thlengin buhṭo chu a zawng a, a zawn sa chu a vua a, efa khat lai a ni." 
Ruth2:18 A phur a, khuaah a hâwnpui ta a, a pi chuan a buhṭo lâk chu a lo hmu a, Ruthi chuan an chhang ei bâng chu a phawrh a, ani chu a pe a." 
Ruth2:19 A pi chuan a hnênah, “Vawiinah khawi lama buhṭo nge i zawn a, tu lovah nge i va thawh le? A lo khawngaihtu che chu malsâwmin awm rawh se,” a ti a. Ruthi chuan a pi hnênah chuan a va thawhna chu hetiang hian a hrilh a: “Vawiina ka va thawhna pa chu a hming Boaza a ni,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:20 Naomi chuan a monu hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa, mi nung leh mitthi chunga a khawngaih bâng chuang ngai lova chuan ani chu malsâwm rawh se, chu mi chu kan chipûi, kan laichîn hnai tak a ni asin,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:21 Moab mi Ruthi chuan, “ ‘Buh hi an seng zawh thlengin hnathawktute zîngah hian thawk ang che’ min ti nghe nghe asin,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:22 Naomi chuan a monu Ruthi hnênah chuan, “A ṭhat chu, a hnathawk nulate zîngah hlîr thawk la, lo dangah zawng an khawih buai palh ang che,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:23 Tichuan, Ruthi chu Boaza nula chhawrte zîngah chuan barli leh huit seng zawh thlengin buhṭo zawng chuan a awm a, a pi hnênah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Ruth3:1 Chumi hnu chuan a pi Naomi chuan a hnênah, “Ka fanu, ngaihngam taka i khawsak theihna tûr ka ngaihtuahsak ang che." 
Ruth3:2 A chhiahhlawh nulate nêna hna i va thawhna pa kha kan laichîn bul Boaza a ni. Ngai teh, zânin hi hruihah barli a zah fai zân a ni a." 
Ruth3:3 Inbual la, rimtui te inchulh la, i thawmhnaw ṭha ber inbelin hruihah chuan zu kal rawh. Amaherawhchu, a eia a in zawh hma chuan a hnênah inlan suh ang che." 
Ruth3:4 A mut hunah a mutna chhinchhiah la, a ke chu hlim la, mu ve ang che. Tichuan, i tih tûr chu a lo hrilh mai ang che,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:5 Ruthi chuan, “I sawi ang chuan ka ti ang e,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:6 Tichuan, hruih lamah chuan a chhuk a, a pi hrilh ang chuan a ti ta a." 
Ruth3:7 A eia a in zawh hnu chuan Boaza chu hlim takin buh vûm sirah chuan a mu ta a. Nakinah chuan Ruthi chu dîm têin a va kal a, a ke chu a hlîm a, a mu ve ta a." 
Ruth3:8 Zanlaiah chuan Boaza chu a lo ṭhangharh a, a han hawi a, a ke bula hmeichhe lo mu reng chu a hmu ta a." 
Ruth3:9 “Tu nge i nih?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “I chhiahhlawhnu Ruthi ka ni. Kan laichîn bul i ni bawk a, i puan kha mi han zâwn teh,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:10 Ani chuan, “ Lalpa chuan malsâwm che rawh se; tlangvâl rethei emaw, hausa emaw i zui mai mai loh dânah hian, tûnhma ai mahin tûnah hian i chhûngte laka i rinawmzia i tilang ta a ni." 
Ruth3:11 Hlauthâwng suh aw, i thil duh chu ka tihsak vek ang che. Kan khaw mipuite hian hmeichhe fel tak i nih an hria asin." 
Ruth3:12 Eng pawh ni se, in laichîn bul chu ka ni ngei mai; amaherawhchu, kei aia bul zâwk a la awm."
