Ruth3:13 Zânin chu hetah mu ve phawt la, naktûkah laichîn bul tih tûr a tih duh loh erawh chuan keiman ka ti ang tih Lalpa chhâlin tûnah ka tiam a che, khawvâr hma chu mu ve phawt mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:14 Khawvâr hma chu a ke bulah chuan a mu a, zîng takah tu ma hriat hmain a tho va; Boaza chuan, “Hruiha i lo kal hi tu man hre suh se,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:15 Tin, a hnênah, “I puan bah lai kha han la la, dawh rawh le,” a ti a. Tichuan, a phah a, barli ṭîn khat zet a ruhsak a, puanah chuan a chhûng a, Ruthi chuan khuaah a hâwnpui ta a." 
Ruth3:16 A pi hnên a han thlen chuan, “Ka fanu, eng nge i an le?” a lo ti a. Ruthi chuan a chunga Boaza thil lo tih zawng zawng chu a hrilh a." 
Ruth3:17 “I pi hnênah chuan saruakin haw suh, tiin he barli ṭîn khat hi min pe a ni,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:18 Naomi chuan, “Ka fanu, thil inher dân tûr i hriat hma chu nghâk hle hle mai rawh; thil a chin fel hma chu a ngawi mai mai dâwn si lo,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:1 Boaza chu rorêlna hmun kulh kawngkaah chuan a chho va, a ṭhu a. An laichîn bul, a chungchâng Boazan a sawi kha a lo kal a. Boaza chuan, “Unaupa, hetah lo kal la, ṭhu teh khai,” a ti a. A lo kal a, a ṭhu ta a." 
Ruth4:2 Boaza chuan chu khuaa upa sâwm a khâwm a, an hnênah, “Hetah hian ṭhu teh u khai,” a ti a, an ṭhu ta a." 
Ruth4:3 An laichîn bul bera hnênah chuan, “Moab ram aṭanga lo kîr Naomi chuan kan unaupa Elimeleka ram kha hralh a duh a;" 
Ruth4:4 nang hi hrilh hmasak che ṭhain ka hria a, i tlan duh chuan hêng upaho hriatah hian tlan ta che; i tlan duh loh erawh chuan min hrilh rawh; nang lo chu tu mah tlantu tûr an awm lo; tin, kei hi i dawt chu ka ni,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ka tlan ang e,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:5 Boaza chuan, “Naomi hnên aṭanga ram i lei hun chuan mitthi hming dai lova ram chanpual luahtu tûr an awm zêl theih nân Moab hmeichhia, mitthi nupui chu, i nei tel bawk tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:6 An laichînpa chuan, “Ka tân chuan ka tlan thei lo, chutilo zawng, ka roluah chungchângah harsatna ka siam dah ang e, tlantu tûr ka nihna pawh nangman chang mai la, ka tlan thei lo a ni e,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:7 Hmânlaiin Israel-ho zîngah thil an leiin emaw, an inthlengin emaw a nemngheh nân a hralhtuin a pheikhawk a phelh a, a leitu hnênah a pe ṭhîn. Hei hi Israel-te zîngah tih ṭhin dân a ni." 
Ruth4:8 An laichînpa chuan Boaza hnênah, “I tân nangman lei mai rawh,” tiin a pheikhawk a phelh a, a pe a." 
Ruth4:9 Boaza chuan upaho leh mipui zawng zawng hnênah, “Vawiin hian Elimeleka thil neih zawng zawng te, Kiliona leh Mahlona thil neih zawng zawng nên Naomi hnên aṭangin ka lei ta tih hretu in ni e." 
Ruth4:10 Chu bâkah, mitthi hming chu dai lova, a ro luahtu siamsak tûr leh mitthi chu a chipuite zîngah leh a awmna khaw kulh kawngkaa hriat reng a nih theih nân, Moab hmeichhia, Mahlona nupui chu, ka nupui atân ka nei ta a; tûnah, nangniho hi a hretute in ni e,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:11 Tichuan, kulh kawngkaa upaho leh mipui awm zawng zawng chuan, “Hretute kan ni e, i ina hmeichhia lo lawi chu, Israel chhûngkaw dintu pahnih Rakili leh Leaii ang khân Lalpa chuan siam rawh se. Nang pawh, he hnam zîngah hian mi ropui tak ni la, Bethlehem mi hmingthang tak ni ang che." 
Ruth4:12 Lalpan he hmeichhe lakah hian fate pe che sela, i chhûngkua chu Juda-in Tamari laka fa a hrin Pereza chhûngkua ang lo ni rawh se,” an ti a." 
Ruth4:13 Boaza chuan Ruthi chu nupui atân a hruai a, an awm dûn ta a. Lalpa chuan nau a paitîr a, fapa a hring ta a." 
Ruth4:14 Chuta hmeichhiate chuan Naomi hnênah, “Vawiina laichîn bul chham lova awmtîrtu che Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se; I tupa chu Israel ram pum puiah a hming lo thang sela," 
Ruth4:15 ani chu i nun tihlimtu leh i tar châwmtu lo ni rawh se. I monu, nangmah hmangaihtu, fapa pasarih aia tama hlu zâwk chuan ani hi a hrinsak ta si che a,” an ti a." 
Ruth4:16 Naomi chuan nau chu a la a, a pawm a, a awm ta a." 
Ruth4:17 An vênga hmeichhiate chuan a hming an sa a, “Naomi tân fapa a lo piang ta,” tiin a hmingah Obeda an sa a, chu mi chu Davida pu, Jesaia pa a ni." 
Ruth4:18 Hei hi Pereza chhûngkua inthlah chhâwn dân chu a ni. 
Ruth4:19 Hezrona chu Rama pa a ni, Rama chu Aminadaba pa a ni a." 
Ruth4:20 Aminadaba chu Nasona pa a ni a, Nasona chu Salmona pa a ni." 
Ruth4:21 Tin, Salmona chu Boaza pa a ni a, Boaza chu Obeda pa a ni," 
Ruth4:22 Obeda chu Jesaia pa a ni a, Jesaia chu Davida pa a ni." 
1Samuel1:1 Efraim tlângrama Ramathaim-zofim khuaah mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Elkana a ni. Chu mi chu Jehorama fapa a ni a, Jehorama chu Elihua fapa a ni. Elihua chu Tohua fapa a ni." 
1Samuel1:2 Nupui pahnih a nei a, pakhat hming chu Hani a ni a, pakhat hming chu Penini a ni. Penini chuan fate a nei a, Hani erawh chuan fa a nei ve lo." 
1Samuel1:3 Chu mi chu Engkim Lalpa chibai bûk tûr leh a hnêna thilhlan hlân tûrin kum tin a awmna khua aṭang chuan Silo khuaah a chho ṭhîn. Chutah chuan Elia fapa pahnih, Hofnia leh Finehasa, Lalpa puithiamte chu an awm a." 
1Samuel1:4 Elkanan thilhlan a hlan ni chuan a fapa te, a fanu te tân chanvo a siamsak ṭheuh va." 
1Samuel1:5 Hani chu hmangaih hle mah se, Lalpa chuan fa nei thei lova a siam avângin chan khat chauh a siamsak ṭhîn." 
1Samuel1:6 Fa a neih theih loh avânga a lungngaihna tizual tûrin amah ertu Penini chuan a deusawh ṭhîn a. 
1Samuel1:7 Chutianga kum tin Lalpa ina an kal ṭhin lai chuan a ertunu chuan a tilungngai hle ṭhîn a ni. Chuvâng chuan, a ṭap a ṭap a, chaw pawh a ei lo va." 
1Samuel1:8 A pasal Elkana chuan, “Hani, engtizia nge chaw i ei duh loh? Engati nge i rilru a nat le? Fapa sâwm aiin i tân ka hlu zâwk lo em ni?” a ti ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel1:9 Vawi khat chu Silo khuaa an eia an in zawhin Hani chu a tho va. Chutih lai chuan puithiam Elia chu Lalpa in kawngka ban bul ṭhutthlêngah a ṭhu a. 
1Samuel1:10 Hani chu lungchhe taka ṭap chungin Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a. 
1Samuel1:11 Hetiang hian thu a tiam ta a, “Aw Engkim Lalpa, i bawihnu chan chhiatzia hi min hriatsak a, i bawihnu hi thlahthlam lova fapa min pêk chuan a dam chhûng zawng Lalpa ka pe ang a, a lu pawh meh a ni rêng rêng lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel1:12 Chutianga Lalpa hnêna a ṭawngṭai lai chuan a hmui phun chu Elia chuan a lo en reng a," 
1Samuel1:13 Hani chu ṭhahnemngai takin a ṭawngṭai a, ri lovin a hmui chauh a phun a, Elia chuan zu a rui emaw a ti a." 
1Samuel1:14 Elia chuan a hnênah, “Eng chen nge i ruih dâwn le? I uain in chu dah bo teh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel1:15 Hani chuan, “Ka pu, ka rui lo asin, hmeichhe lungngai tak ka nih hi, uain pawh, zupui pawh ka in rêng rêng lo; Lalpa hnênah ka rilru natna ka thlen a nih hi." 
1Samuel1:16 I bawihnu hi hmeichhe sualah puh suh; lungngai leh mangang takin ka ṭawngṭai a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel1:17 Elia chuan, “Thlamuang takin kal la, a hnêna i dîl chu Israel-te Pathian chuan pe che rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel1:18 Ani chuan, “I chhiahhlawhnu hi min duhsak zêl rawh aw,” a ti a. Tichuan, Hani chu a chhuak a, chawte a ei a, lungngai hmêl a pu ta lo va." 
1Samuel1:19 A tûkah chuan zîng takah an tho va, Lalpa hnênah an ṭawngṭai a, Rama khuaa an in lamah chuan an haw ta a. Elkana chuan a nupui Hani chu a pâwl a. Lalpa chuan ani chu a hre reng a." 
1Samuel1:20 Chumi hnu chuan Hanin nau a pai a, fapa a hring a, “ Lalpa hnêna ka dîl chhuah a ni” tiin a hmingah Samuela a sa a." 
1Samuel1:21 Elkana leh a chhûngte chu Lalpa hnêna an kum tin thilhlan hlân tûr leh an thutiam hlen tûrin an chho va," 
1Samuel1:22 Hani erawh chu a kal ve lo. A pasal hnênah chuan, “Naupang hian hnute hnêk a bân hunah ani chu ka hruai ang a, Lalpa hnênah ka hlân ang a, chutah chuan a awm reng tawh ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel1:23 A pasal Elkana chuan a hnênah, “Ṭha i tih ang chuan ti rawh, hnute hnêk i bântîr thlengin awm la, Lalpa chuan i tih ang chuan thlentîr rawh se,” a ti a. Hani chuan a fapain hnute hnêk a bân hma chuan inah a awmpui ta a." 
1Samuel1:24 Hnute hnêk a bântîr hnu chuan a fapa chu a hruai a, chhangphut kg. sâwm leh uain bûr khat a keng a, bâwngpa kum thuma upa kaiin Silo khuaa Lalpa inah chuan a kal ta a, a fa chu a la naupang hle a." 
1Samuel1:25 Bâwngpa chu an talh a, naupang chu Elia hnênah chuan an hruai a." 
1Samuel1:26 Tin, ani chuan, “Aw ka pu, nangmah ngeiin i hria a; ih e, ka pu, kei hi he laia i hmaa Lalpa hnêna ṭawngṭai hmeichhia kha ka ni asin." 
1Samuel1:27 He naupang dîl hian ka ṭawngṭai a; tichuan, Lalpan ka dîl chu min pe ta a." 
1Samuel1:28 Chuvângin, ani chu Lalpa hnênah ka hlân a ni. A dam chhûng zawng Lalpa tâna hlan a ni,” a ti a. Chutah chuan Lalpa hmaah an kûn ta a." 
1Samuel2:1 Hani chu hetiang hian a ṭawngṭai a: Lalpa chungah ka va lâwm êm! Thil ropui tak mi tihsak ta si a. Ka hmêlmate laka uanna tûr ka nei ta, A chhandamnaah chuan ka lâwm êm êm a ni." 
1Samuel2:2 Lalpa anga thianghlim an awm lo, Nangmah ang rêng an awm si lo, Kan Pathian ang hi humhimtu dang an awm lo." 
1Samuel2:3 Chapo takin ṭawng mai mai suh la, Chaltlai takin thu sawi suh. Lalpa chu engkim hretu Pathian a ni, Ani chuan mi tin thiltih a bûk fel ṭhîn." 
1Samuel2:4 Mi chakte thalngul a titliak a, Mi chak lote a tichak thar leh ṭhîn." 
1Samuel2:5 Tlai taka awm ṭhînte chu ei tûr zawngin an inhlawhfa a, Rilṭâm taka awm ṭhînte chu tlai takin an awm ta. Chingin fa pasarih a nei a, Fa tam tak hringtu chu khawharin a awm ta." 
1Samuel2:6 Lalpa chuan a tihlum ṭhîn a, a tinung bawk ṭhîn. Thlânah a chhuktîr a, a hruai chhuak bawk ṭhîn." 
1Samuel2:7 Lalpa chuan a tipachhia a, a tihausa ṭhîn; A titlâwm a, a chawisâng bawk ṭhîn." 
1Samuel2:8 Retheite chu vaivut ata a kaitho va, Pachhiate chu êkdûr ata a chawikâng ṭhîn. Anni chu milian zîngah a teltîr a, Chawimawina lalṭhutthlêng a chantîr ta. Leilung nghahchhan chu Lalpa ta a ni a; A chungah khawvêl hi a nghat a ni." 
1Samuel2:9 A mi thianghlimte ke chu a vêng ang a, Mi sualte erawh chu thim zîngah an boral ang. Tu mah, an chak avângin an dingchang lo vang." 
1Samuel2:10 Lalpa dotute chu an thlabâr ang a, Vân aṭangin khawpui riin a do vang a, A ruat, lal chu a tichak ang a, A hriakthiha chu a chawimawi ang,” tiin." 
1Samuel2:11 Chutichuan, Elkana chu Rama khuaa a inah a haw ta a, naupang erawh chu Lalpa rawng bâwlin puithiam Elia hnênah chuan a awm ta a." 
1Samuel2:12 Elia fapate chu an sual hle a, Lalpa pawh an pawisa lo." 
1Samuel2:13 Mipui laka puithiamte awm dân tûr angin an awm lo va. Thil hlân tûra mi an lo kalte hian an chhiahhlawhte chu thîrkut kengin an lo kal a," 
1Samuel2:14 bêl rawng zau emaw, bêl dâwt nei emaw, bêl khaina nei emaw, bêl pangngai emaw chhûng chu an zu chhun a, sa thurna thîrkuta an lâk chhuah apiang chu puithiamin a nei ṭhîn a. Chutiang chuan Israel mi Silo khuaa lo kal zawng zawngte chu an lo tihsak ṭhîn a ni." 
1Samuel2:15 Chu chauh a ni lo, a thau chu an hâl hmain chhiahhlawhte chu an lo kal a, inthawina hlântu hnênah chuan, “Puithiam tâna hem hmin tûr sa min pe rawh, i sa chhum hminsa a duh lo, a hel a ni a duh ni,” an ti ṭhîn." 
1Samuel2:16 Inthawina hlântu chuan a hnênah, “A thau chu hâl phawt sela, chumi hnuah i duh zât zât la ang che,” an lo tih pawhin, “Ni lo, min pe nghâl rawh, min pêk loh chuan ka la lui rêng rêng dâwn,” an ti ṭhîn." 
1Samuel2:17 Tichuan, Lalpa hnêna thilhlan chu miten an lo ngainêp ta hle a; chuvângin, tlangvâlte sualna chu Lalpa mit hmuhah a huatthlala êm êm a ni." 
1Samuel2:18 Samuela chu la naupang hle mah se, puithiam kawr, puan zaisîna siam hâ-in Lalpa rawng a bâwl a." 
1Samuel2:19 Kum tinin a nuin kawrfual a ṭhuisak a; kum tin a pasal nên thil hlân tûra an kal apiangin a kensak ṭhîn. 
1Samuel2:20 Elia chuan Elkana leh a nupui chu mal a sâwm a, “ Lalpa tâna fa in hlan rulh nân he hmeichhia hi fa dang pe rawh se,” a ti a; tichuan, an in lamah an haw ta a." 
1Samuel2:21 Lalpa chuan hmeichhia chu a kan a; tichuan, nau a pai leh a, fapa pathum leh fanu pahnih a hring ta a. Tin, naupang Samuela chu Lalpa kiangah chuan a seilian ta a." 
1Samuel2:22 Elia chu a lo tar ta hle a; a fapaten Israel mite chunga an thil sual tih zawng zawng leh Inbiakna bûk kawngka bula rawngbâwltu hmeichhiate an lo mutpui ṭhin thute chu a lo hria a. 
1Samuel2:23 Tichuan, an hnênah, “Engati nge hetiang thil hi in tih le? Hêng thil ṭha lo in tih hi mi tinin min hrilh asin." 
1Samuel2:24 Ka fate u, ti tawh rêng rêng suh u, Lalpa mite zînga thuthang ka hriat hi thil ṭha lo tak a ni." 
1Samuel2:25 Mi pakhat mi dang chunga a sual chuan Pathianin a sawipui ṭhîn; amaherawhchu, Lalpa chunga mi a sual chuan tu nge hum ta ang le?” a ti a. Chuti chung pawhin an pa thu chu an awih duh chuang lo va; chuvangin, Lalpa chuan anni chu tihhlum a tum ta a ni." 
1Samuel2:26 Tin, naupang Samuela chu a lo ṭhang lian deuh deuh va; Lalpa leh mihringte duhsak a hlawh a." 
1Samuel2:27 Tin, Elia hnênah chuan Pathian mi, mi pakhat a lo kal a, a hnênah, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, “Aigupta rama Farawa bawiha an awm lai khân in pate hnênah ka inlâr a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Samuel2:28 Arona chu Israel hnam zawng zawng zîng ata ka maichâma kala, rimtui hâla, puithiam kawr haa ka hmaa puithiam ni tûrin ka ruat a ni lâwm ni? Tin, i pute chu Israel mite hâlral thilhlan zawng zawng ka pe a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Samuel2:29 Ka hnêna inthawina leh ka tâna thilhlan, ka chanpual atâna ka ruat chu engati nge in hmuhsit le? Engati nge kei aia i fate i dah pawimawha mahni intihthau nâna ka mi Israel-te inthawina, a ṭha ṭha in ît le?" 
1Samuel2:30 I chhûngte leh i pa chhûngte chuan kumkhuain ka hmaah rawng an bâwl ang, tiin ka lo tiam tawh na a; tûnah, Lalpa thuchhuak chuan heti hian a ti; ‘In bâwl tawp lo vang, mi chawimawi apiang ka chawimawi ang a, mi hmusittu chu ka hmusit ang." 
1Samuel2:31 Ngai teh, i chakna te, i pa chhûngte chakna te ka tihchhiat ni chu a lo thleng dâwn ta; in chhûng zîngah tarkûna dam rêng in awm lo vang." 
1Samuel2:32 Israel mi dangte mal ka sâwmna chu i hmuhin i awt ang a, i thîk ang, i fate tu mah tarkûna dam an awm lo vang." 
1Samuel2:33 Tin, ngai teh, i thlah, ka maichâma rawngbâwl tûra ka zuah chhun chu i mit tikhamtu leh i rilru tinatu mai a ni ang; i thlah i ina lo piang dang zawng zawng chu an vânglai takin an thi ang." 
1Samuel2:34 Hei hi i tâna chhinchhiahna lo thleng tûr chu a ni: I fapate pahnih Hofnia leh Finehasa hi ni khatah an thi dûn ang. 
1Samuel2:35 Ka tân puithiam rinawm tak ka din thar leh ang a, chu chuan ka duhzâwng takin thil a ti ang. An chhûngkua nghet takin ka din ang a, ka hriakthiha hmaah chuan rawng a bâwl reng ang," 
1Samuel2:36 Tin, i thlah la dam chhunte chu a hmaah chuan chhang nawi leh pawisa dîlin an kûn ang a, ‘Ei tûr kan hmuh theih nân puithiam hna eng emaw tal min thawhtîr ta che,’ an ti ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:1 Naupang Samuela chuan Elia kaihhruaiin Lalpa rawng a bâwl a. Chûng lai chuan Lalpa thu a thleng khât hle a, inlârna pawh a thleng zen zen lo." 
1Samuel3:2 Tin, Elia mit chu a chak tawh lo va, khua pawh a hmu ṭha tawh lo va, a dân pangngaiin a mut hmunah chuan a mu a." 
1Samuel3:3 Samuela chu Lalpa in, Thuthlung Bâwm hûnna bulah chuan a mu a. Khua a vâra, khâwnvâr an tihmih hmain," 
1Samuel3:4 Lalpa chuan Samuela chu a ko va. Samuela chuan, “Eng nge ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:5 Elia hnênah chuan a kal a, a hnênah, “Eng atân nge min koh?” a va ti a. Elia chuan, “Ka ko lo che, va mu leh tawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, a kal a, a va mu leh ta a." 
1Samuel3:6 Lalpa chuan Samuela chu a ko leh a; tichuan, Samuela chu a tho va, Elia hnênah chuan a kal leh a, “Eng atân nge min koh?” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:7 Samuela chuan Lalpa aw a ni tih a la hre rih lo, Lalpa aw chu a la hre ngai lo va ni." 
1Samuel3:8 Lalpa chuan Samuela chu a ko leh a, chu chu a vawi thumna a ni. Tichuan, a tho va, Elia hnênah a kal leh a, “Eng atân nge min koh?” a ti a. Elia chuan naupang chu Lalpan a ko a ni tih a hre ta a." 
1Samuel3:9 Elia chuan Samuela hnênah chuan, “Kal la, va mu leh la, a koh leh che chuan, ‘Aw Lalpa, thu sawi rawh, i chhiahhlawh hian a ngaithla e,’ ti ang che,” a ti a. Samuela chu a kal a, a va mu leh ta a." 
1Samuel3:10 Lalpa chu a lo kal a, a ding a, a hmaa a koh ang khân, “Samuel, Samuel,” a rawn ti a. Samuela chuan, “Thu sawi rawh, i chhiahhlawh hian a ngaithla e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:11 Lalpa chuan Samuela hnênah, “Ngai teh, Israel ramah hian a hria apiang thin tiṭhâwng zawk tûr ka thlentîr dâwn." 
1Samuel3:12 Chumi ni chuan Elia chhûngkaw chungchânga ka lo sawi tawh chu a bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin ka thlentîr ang. 
1Samuel3:13 A fapaten Pathian laka thil sual an tih hre reng chunga a khap loh avângin an chhûngkua chu ka hrem kumkhua dâwn tih ka hrilh tawh si a. 
1Samuel3:14 Chuvângin, Elia chhûngkaw bawhchhiatna chu inthawinain emaw, thilhlanin emaw engtikah mah tihkian theih a ni lo vang’ tiin Elia chhûngkaw chungchâng thu ka lo tiam tawh a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:15 Samuela chu zîng thlengin a mu a, Lalpa in kawngkhârte chu a hawng a, inlârna thu chu Elia hrilh a hreh hle a." 
1Samuel3:16 Nimahsela, Elia chuan Samuela chu a ko va, “Samuel, ka fapa,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Eng nge ni, ka pu?” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:17 Elia chuan, “Eng thu nge i hnênah a sawi? Ka hnênah eng mah zêp suh; i hnêna a sawi eng pawh ka laka i zêp chuan Pathianin na takin a hrem ang che,” tiin a vau va." 
1Samuel3:18 Tichuan, Samuela chuan eng mah zêp lovin a hrilh ta vek a. Elia chuan a hnênah, “ Lalpa a nih chu, ṭha a tih ang zêlin ti rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:19 Samuela chu a lo ṭhang lian deuh deuh va, a hnênah Lalpa chu a awm a, a sawi apiang a lo thleng dik zêl a." 
1Samuel3:20 Dan aṭanga Beer-seba thlengin Israel mi zawng zawng chuan Samuela chu Lalpa zâwlnei dik tak a ni tih an lo hre ta a. 
1Samuel3:21 Silo khuaah chuan Lalpa chu a inlâr zui zêl a. Silo-ah chuan Lalpa chu thuin Samuela hnênah a inlâr a. 
1Samuel4:1 Samuela thu chu mi zawng zawngin an ngaichâng a. Israel mite chu Filistia mite do tûrin an lo chhuak a, Ebenezer-ah ṭanhmun an khuar a. Filistia mite pawhin Afek-ah ṭanhmun an khuar bawk a." 
1Samuel4:2 Filistia sipaite chu Israel-te bei tûrin an inzâr pharh a, an han inbei a, Filistia mite chuan Israel-te chu an hneh a, indona hmunah chuan mi sângli lai an that a." 
1Samuel4:3 An ṭanhmuna sipaite an lo kîr hnu chuan Israel upate chuan, “Engtizia nge vawiinah Lalpan Filistia mite hmaah min tihtlâwm aw. Hawh u, Silo khuaa Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm kha han la ila; tichuan, kan keng zêl ang a, kan hmêlmate lakah min chhanhim dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
1Samuel4:4 Mite chuan Silo-ah mi an tîr a, Cherub chunga ṭhu Lalpa Engkimtitheia Thuthlung Bâwm chu an va la a; chutah chuan Elia fa Hofnia leh Finehasa pawh an tel a." 
1Samuel4:5 Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm chu an riahhmun an rawn thlenpui veleh Israel mi zawng zawng chu lei nghawr ri dur dur khawpin an au va. 
1Samuel4:6 An au thâwm chu Filistia mite chuan an lo hria a, “Hebrai-ho bûkah chuan engtizia nge an au chiam mai le?” an ti a. An bûkah Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm a lo thleng a ni tih an hre ta a." 
1Samuel4:7 Filistia mite chuan an hlau va, “An riahhmunah an Pathian a lo kal ta a nih chu! Kan boral dâwn ta, tûn hmain hetiang hi a la awm ngai lo." 
1Samuel4:8 Kan chung a va pik êm, chu Pathian chak tak kut ata chu tu nge min chhan chhuak ang? Chu Pathian chu a ni thlalêra Aigupta mite hri ṭha lo pui puia tihlumtu kha." 
1Samuel4:9 Mahse, Filistia mite u, zâm lovin huaisen takin bei rawh u, intimipa ula, bei rawh u, in chhiahhlawha an awm ang khân Hebrai-hote chhiahhlawha in awm loh nân,” an ti a." 
1Samuel4:10 Tichuan, Filistia mite chuan an han bei vak a, Israel mite chu an tlâwm ta a, mi tin mahni in lamah an tlân haw ta a. Indonaah chuan Israel sipaite chu an that chiam a, sîngthum lai an thi a." 
1Samuel4:11 Pathian Bâwm chu an lâksak a, Elia fa pahnih Hofnia leh Finehasa pawh chu an that bawk a." 
1Samuel4:12 Chumi ni tak chuan Benjamina thlah mi pakhat indona hmun aṭang chuan a lo tlan haw a, a puan a pawtthlêr a, a luah vaivut a phul a, Silo khua a lo thleng a." 
1Samuel4:13 A lo thlen chuan Elia chu kawng sîra ṭhutthlêngah a lo ṭhu a. Pathian Bâwm chu a ngaihtuah êm êm avângin a lo thlîr reng a; chu mi chuan khua a lo thlen chuan thil awmzia chu a rawn sawi a, a khuain an ṭap ta chuah chuah a." 
1Samuel4:14 Elia chuan an ṭap thâwm chu a lo hriatin, “Engtizia ta mur mur nge?” a ti a. Chu pa chu Elia hnênah hmanhmawh takin a lo tlân a, a hrilh ta a." 
1Samuel4:15 Elia chu kum sawmkua leh pariat lai a ni a, a mit a chak tawh lo va, khua pawh a hmu ṭha thei lo." 
1Samuel4:16 Chu mi chuan Elia hnênah, “Indona hmun aṭangin ka lo haw a, vawiinah chu hmun aṭangin ka lo tlânchhia a ni,” a ti a. Elia chuan, “Ka fapa, eng angin nge thil a awm le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel4:17 Chanchin thar rawn thlentu chuan, “Israel mite chu Filistia-ho hmaah an tlânchhia a, mi tam tak an that bawk a. I fate pahnih Hofnia leh Finehasa pawh an thi a, Pathian Bâwm pawh an chhuhsak ta,” a ti a." 
1Samuel4:18 Pathian Bâwm chanchin a sawi lai tak chuan kawngka bula a ṭhutna aṭang chuan a zangthalin a tlu a, a ring a tliak a, a thi ta a. Tar tak a ni a, a inzo tawh lo va ni. Kum sawmli chhûng Israel-te chu a kaihruai a." 
1Samuel4:19 Tin, a monu, Finehasa nupui chuan nau a pai a, a hrin a hun ṭêp tawh a. Pathian Bâwm an lâksak thu te, a pasala pa leh a pasal thih thu te a han hriat chuan nau a vei a, a hring ta nghâl a, a chau hle a." 
1Samuel4:20 A hnuk a chat ṭêp a, nau chhartu hmeichhiate chuan, “Hlau suh, fapa i nei a nia,” an ti a; mahse, a chhâng miah lo va, a ngaihsak hek lo." 
1Samuel4:21 “A hmingah Ikaboda ni rawh se, Israel ropuina chu a chuai ta si a,” a ti a. Pathian Bâwm an lâksak a, a pu leh a pasal an thi ta si a," 
1Samuel4:22 Pathian Bâwm an lâksak avângin ‘Israel ropuina chu a chuai ta,’ a ti a ni." 
1Samuel5:1 Filistia miten Pathian Bâwm an lâksak hnu chuan Eben-ezer aṭangin Asdod khuaah an kalpui a," 
1Samuel5:2 Filistia mite chuan Pathian Bâwm chu Dagona biak inah an la lût a, Dagona bulah an dah a." 
1Samuel5:3 A tûk zînga Asdod mite an han thawh chuan, ngai teh, Dagona chu bawkkhupin Lalpa Bâwm hmaah chuan a lo tlu dêr a. Tichuan, Dagona chu an la a, a hmun ngaiah an dah leh a." 
1Samuel5:4 A tûk leh zînga an thawh chuan, ngai teh, Dagona chu Lalpa Bâwm hmaah chuan bawkkhupin a lo tlu leh dêr a. Dagona lu leh a kut bungte chu kawngka bulah a lo lum reng bawk a, a taksa chauh chu a lo awm reng a." 
1Samuel5:5 Chu thil avâng chuan Dagona puithiamte leh Dagona biak ina lo kal ṭhîn zawng zawng chuan Asdod khuaa Dagona biak in kawngka bul chu tûn thlengin an la rap ngam lo va ni. 
1Samuel5:6 Lalpa chuan Asdod-a mite chu na takin a hrem a, ngâwt na chi a veitîr a." 
1Samuel5:7 Chu thil thleng chu Asdod miten an hmuh chuan, “Israel-te Pathian Bâwm chu kan hnênah awm tawh suh se, kan Pathian Dagona chungah leh kan chungah a kutthlâk a na êm mai,” an ti a." 
1Samuel5:8 Tichuan, Filistia lal zawng zawng an ko khâwm a, “Israel-te Pathian Bâwm hi engtin nge kan tih tâk ang le?” an ti a. Anni chuan “Israel-te Pathian Bâwm hi Gath khuaah kalpui rawh u,” an ti a; tichuan, Israel-te Pathian Bâwm chu an va kalpui ta a." 
1Samuel5:9 Khua an thlenpui hnu chuan Lalpa chuan chu khua chu a hrem a, khuaa mite chu natna râpthlâk tak a tuartîr a, a tê ber aṭanga a lian ber thlengin ngâwt na chi an vei ta a." 
1Samuel5:10 Tin, Pathian Bâwm chu Ekron khuaah an thawn a, Pathian Bâwm a lo thlen chuan Ekron khuaa mite chuan, “Israel-te Pathian Bâwm chu keini leh kan mite tihlum tûrin an rawn la ta a nih hi,” tiin an au chiam a." 
1Samuel5:11 Filistia lal zawng zawng chu an ko khâwm a, “Israel-te Pathian Bâwm hi la sawn ula, keini leh kan mite min tihhlum loh nân a awmna ngaiah dah leh rawh u,” an ti a. Pathian hremna chu a nat êm avângin khaw pum pui chu an buai nuai nuai a." 
1Samuel5:12 A thi bangte chuan ngâwt na chi chu an vei a, chu khaw ṭap thâwm chuan vân a thleng a ni." 
1Samuel6:1 Lalpa Bâwm chu Filistia ramah chuan thla sarih a awm a. 
1Samuel6:2 Filistia mite chuan, puithiam te, aienthiam te an râwn a, “ Lalpa bâwm hi engtin nge kan tih dâwn le, a hmun ngaia thawn kîr leh dân tûr min hrilh rawh u,” an ti a." 
1Samuel6:3 Anni chuan, “Israel-te Pathian Bâwm hi in thawn kîr a nih chuan a ruakin thawn kîr suh u, a hnênah tihsual man thilhlan hlân ngei ngei ang che u. Tichuan, tihdam in ni ang a, eng vânga a kut tuar nge in nih in hria ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel6:4 Mipui chuan, “Kan bawhchhiat thawi nâna a hnêna kan hlan tûr chu engte nge ni ang?” an ti a. Anni chuan, “Filistia lal zâtin ngâwt lem panga leh chaichîm lem panga rangkachakin siam rawh u; in hripui vei leh in lalte hri vei hi a thuhmun reng a ni." 
1Samuel6:5 Ngâwt lem panga leh in ram tichhetu chaichîm lem panga in siamte chuan Israel-te Pathian chu chawimawi rawh u. Tichuan, nangni leh in puithiamte chu, in rante nên a hrem nêp deuh che u mahna." 
1Samuel6:6 Farawa leh Aigupta miten an rilru an tikhauh ang khân engah nge in rilru in tihkhauh le? Na taka a sawisak hnuah Israel-te chu an chhuahtîr a, an kal ta a ni lo vem ni?" 
1Samuel6:7 “Tichuan, tûnah tawlailîr thar buatsaih ula, bâwngpui pahnih, a hnute sâwr lai, nghâwngkawl la bât ngai lo buatsaih bawk ula. Bâwng chu tawlailîr hnuhtîr ula, an note erawh chu in lamah hruai hawsak rawh u." 
1Samuel6:8 Lalpa Bâwm chu la ula, tawlailîrah chuan dah rawh u. Tin, tihsual man thawina rangkachaka siam in pêkte kha bâwm dangah thun ula, Lalpa Bâwm sîrah dah ula, tawlailîr chu kaltîr rawh u." 
1Samuel6:9 En reng ula, a awmna ram lam a pana, Beth-semes khaw lam pana a kal chuan hêng chhiatna nasa tak, kan chunga lo thleng hi ama tih a ni ngei ang. A kal loh erawh chuan min hremtu chu amah ni lovin kan chunga vânduaina lo thleng ve hrim hrim a ni ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel6:10 An hrilh ang chuan an ti ta a; bâwngpui hnute sâwr lai pahnih chu tawlailîr an hnuhtîr a, an note chu in lamah an khung a." 
1Samuel6:11 Lalpa Bâwm chu tawlailîrah chuan an dah a, rangkachaka siam ngâwt leh chaichîm lem nên chuan an dah a." 
1Samuel6:12 Bâwngpuite chu Beth-semes panin dîng takin an kal a, bû chung zêlin kawngpui chu an zawh a, ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw an pêng hauh lo. Filistia lalte chuan Beth-semes ramri thlengin an zui a." 
1Samuel6:13 Beth-semes mite chuan ruamah buh an lo seng a; an han dâk a, bâwm chu an hmu ta a, an hlim hle a." 
1Samuel6:14 Tawlailîr chuan Beth-semes khuaa mi Josua lo a va thleng a, lungpui lian tak awmnaah chuan a ding ta reng a, tawlailîr thing chu an ek a, bâwngpuite chu Lalpa hnêna hâlral thilhlanah an hmang a," 
1Samuel6:15 Levia chite chuan Thuthlung Bâwm leh rangkachak ngâwt leh chaichîm dahna bâwm chu an chawi sawn a, lungpuiah chuan an hûng a. Beth-semes khuaa mite chuan chumi ni vêk chuan hâlral leh thilhlan dangte chu Lalpa hmaah an hlân a." 
1Samuel6:16 Filistia lal panga chuan an en reng a, chumi ni chuan Ekron khaw lamah an haw leh ta a." 
1Samuel6:17 An khawpui panga Asdod te, Gaza te, Askelon te, Gath te leh Ekron pual ṭheuhvin Filistia-ho chuan rangkachaka siam ngâwt lem panga Lalpa tân sual manah an hlân a." 
1Samuel6:18 Kulh nei leh nei lo khuaa an lal panga hming kimin rangkachak chaichîm lem panga an telh bawk a. Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm chu Beth-semes khaw mi Josua lova lungpui chungah an rawn dah a; chu lungpui chu tûn thlengin a la awm reng a ni. 
1Samuel6:19 Lalpa Bâwm chhûng an en avâng chuan Beth-semes khuaa mite chu a hrem a, mi sawmsarih lai a tihlum a. Lalpan a hrem nasat êm avâng chuan mite chu an mangang hle a." 
1Samuel6:20 Beth-semes mite chuan, “He Pathian thianghlim Lalpa hmaah hian tu nge ding thei ang le? Kan hnên ata tu hnênah nge a kal leh tâk ang?” an ti a." 
1Samuel6:21 Tichuan, Kiriat-jearim mite hnênah mi an tîr a, “Filistia mite chuan Lalpa Bâwm an rawn dah leh ta a, lo chhuk thla ula, in hnênah i dah chho vang u,” an ti a." 
1Samuel7:1 Tichuan, Kiriat-jearim mite chu an lo kal a, Lalpa Bâwm chu an la chho va, tlânga Abinadaba inah chuan an la lût a, a fapa Eliezara chu Lalpa Bâwm enkawltu atân an serh hrang ta a." 
1Samuel7:2 Kiriat-jearim-ah chuan Bâwm chu kum rei tak, kum sawmhnih lai a awm ta a. Israel mite chuan Lalpa chu an ngai hle a." 
1Samuel7:3 Samuela chuan Israel chhûng tin hnênah, “Thinlung leh tihtakzetin Lalpa lam hawi ula, ram dang pathiante leh Astarte limte chu dah bo ula, Lalpa hnênah chauh thilhlante hlân ula, a rawng chauh bâwl rawh u; tichuan, Filistia mite kut ata hi a chhan chhuak dâwn che u nia,” a ti a." 
1Samuel7:4 Tichuan, Israel-te chuan Baal pathiante leh Astarte limte chu an paih bo va. Lalpa rawng chauh an bâwl ta a." 
1Samuel7:5 Samuela chuan, “Israel mi zawng zawng Mizpa khuaah lo kal khâwm ula, Lalpa hmaah ka ṭawngṭaisak ang che u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel7:6 Mizpa khuaah chuan an kal khâwm a, tui an chawi a, Lalpa hmaah an leihbua a, chumi ni chuan chaw an nghei a; chutah chuan “ Lalpa lakah kan lo sual ta a ni,” tiin an inpuang a. Mizpa khuaah chuan Samuela chu Israel-te chunga rorêltuah a ṭang ta a." 
1Samuel7:7 Filistia mite chuan Mizpa khuaah Israel-te an kal khâwm tih an hriat chuan, Filistia rorêltute chu anmahni bei tûrin an lo chho va. Chu chu Israel-ten an hriat chuan Filistia-hote chu an hlau ta hle a." 
1Samuel7:8 Samuela hnênah chuan, “Filistia mite laka kan him theih nân kan Pathian, Lalpa hnênah min dîlsak ngat ngat rawh,” an ti a." 
1Samuel7:9 Samuela chuan, berâmno hnute hne lai a la a, hâlral thilhlanah Lalpa hnênah a hlân a, Israel mite tân Lalpa hnênah a dîlsak a. Lalpa chuan a chhâng a," 
1Samuel7:10 Samuelan hâlral thilhlan a hlan lai tak chuan Israel-te bei tûrin Filistia mite chuan an rawn pan a; nimahsela, Lalpa chuan chumi ni chuan Filistia mite chungah khawpui nasa takin a rîktîr dur dur a, chu chuan a timangang a, Israel-te hma ata chu an tlân darh ta vek a." 
1Samuel7:11 Israel mite chu Mizpa khua aṭang chuan an lo chhuak a, Filistia mite chu an ûm ta a, Beth-kar hnuai thlengin kawngah chuan an that zêl a." 
1Samuel7:12 Samuela chuan lung a la a, Mizpa leh Sen inkârah chuan a phun a, “Hei chen hi Lalpan min pui a ni,” tiin a hmingah Eben-ezer a vuah a." 
1Samuel7:13 Tichuan, Filistia mite chu an tlâwm ta a, Israel ram chu an rûn leh ta lo va. Samuela dam chhûng zawng Lalpa chuan Filistia mite lakah Israel-te chu a vêng a." 
1Samuel7:14 Filistia miten Ekron leh Gath inkâra Israel-te khua an lâksak zawng zawng chu an pe kîr leh a. Israel-te chuan an ram chu Filistia mite kut ata an la leh a. Israel mite leh Amor mite pawh an inrem ta bawk a. 
1Samuel7:15 Samuela chu a damchhûng zawng Israel-te rorêltu a ni a. 
1Samuel7:16 Kum tin, Bethel te, Gilgal te, Mizpa khua te a tlawh kual a; chûng khuaa Israel-te chu ro a rêlsak ṭhîn." 
1Samuel7:17 A in awmna, Rama khuaah chuan a lo kîr leh ṭhîn a, chuta awm Israel mite chu ro a rêlsak a; tin, chutah vêk chuan Lalpa maichâm a siam a." 
1Samuel8:1 Samuela chu a lo upa ta hle a, a fapate chu Israel-te chunga rorêltuah a ruat a." 
1Samuel8:2 A fa tîr hming chu Joela a ni a, a dawttu chu Abija a ni. Anni chuan Beer-seba-ah ro an rêl a." 
1Samuel8:2 A fa tîr hming chu Joela a ni a, a dawttu chu Abija a ni. Anni chuan Beer-seba-ah ro an rêl a." 
1Samuel8:3 A fate chuan an pa chu an chhûn lo va, dik lo takin ro an rêl a." 
1Samuel8:4 Chûng vâng chuan Israel upa zawng zawng chu Rama khuaa Samuela hnênah chuan an lo kal khâwm a," 
1Samuel8:5 a hnênah, “Hei le, i lo upa ta hle si a, i fapate lah nangmah angin an khawsa si lo va; hnam dangte angin kan chunga rorêltu tûr lal min ruatsak rawh,” an ti a." 
1Samuel8:6 A hnênah, “Ro min rêlsaktu tûr lal min ruatsak rawh,” an tih avâng chuan Samuela chu a lungni lo hle a, Lalpa hnênah a thlen ta a." 
1Samuel8:7 Lalpa chuan Samuela hnênah, “Mipuiin i hnêna thil an sawi zawng zawng chu ngaithla teh; nang an duh lo che a ni lo, kei hi an lal atân min duh lo tihna a ni zâwk e." 
1Samuel8:8 Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah ni aṭanga tûn thlengin an thiltih dân zawng zawnga min hawisana, pathian dangte rawng min bâwlsan ṭhîn ang khân i chungah pawh an ti ve ta a nih hi." 
1Samuel8:9 Tûnah, an thu ngaithla la, an chunga rorêltu lal chêt dân tûr ngunthlûk takin hrilh vek rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel8:10 Samuela chuan Lalpa thu sawi zawng zawng chu lal dîltu mipui chu a hrilh a. 
1Samuel8:11 An hnênah, “Hetiang hian in rorêltu lal chu a awm dâwn a ni: In fapate chu a sakawr-tawlailîr leh a sakawr enkawltuah a hmang ang a, a sakawr-tawlailîr hma lamah an tlân ṭhîn ang." 
1Samuel8:12 Ṭhenkhat sipai sâng hotu-ah te, sawmnga hotu-ah te a ruat ang a; ṭhenkhat a leilettuah te, buh sengtuah te a ruat ang. Ṭhenkhatin indo hmanrua te, a sakawr-tawlailîr thuamte an siam ang a." 
1Samuel8:13 In fanute chu rimtui siamtuah te, chawchhûmtu atân te, chhang siamtu atânte a hmang ang." 
1Samuel8:14 In lo te, in grep huan te, in oliv huan te, a ṭha ṭha a chhuhsak ang che u a, a ṭhuihruaite hnênah a pe ang." 
1Samuel8:15 In thlai leh in grep thar aṭangin sâwma pakhat a la ang a, hotute leh a ṭhuihruaite a pe ang." 
1Samuel8:16 In chhiahhlawh mipa te, in chhiahhlawh hmeichhia te, in tlangvâl chak te, in sabengtung te a hna thawktu atân a lâksak ang che u." 
1Samuel8:17 In berâm rual zîng ata sâwma pakhat a lâksak ang che u a, a chhiahhlawhah in ṭang ang." 
1Samuel8:18 In thlan lalte lakah chhantu dîla in au hun a lo thleng dâwn; chutih hunah chuan Lalpa chuan a chhâng lo vang che u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel8:19 Mahse, mipui chuan Samuela thu chu an ngaithla duh lo va, “Ni lo, lal kan nei ngei tûr a ni;" 
1Samuel8:20 tichuan, hnam dang zawng zawng ang kan lo ni ang a, kan lal chuan ro min rêlsak ang a, kan râl dote min dopui dâwn a ni,” an ti a." 
1Samuel8:21 Samuela chuan mipui thu sawi zawng zawng chu a hria a, Lalpa hnênah a thlen leh a." 
1Samuel8:22 Lalpa chuan Samuela hnênah, “An thu chu zâwm la, lal chu ruatsak rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, Samuelan Israel mite hnênah, “Mi tin mahni khuaah haw ṭheuh rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:1 Benjamin thlah, mi pakhat huaisen tak leh chak tak a awm a, a hming chu Kisa a ni. Kisa chu Abiela fapa a ni, Abiela chu Zerora fapa a ni a, Zerora chu Bakorata fapa a ni, Bakorata chu Afia fapa a ni." 
1Samuel9:2 Kisa chuan fapa a nei a, a hming chu Saula a ni. Ani chu tlangvâl hmêlṭha tak a ni a, Israel-te zîngah a tluka hmêlṭha tu mah an awm lo va, a koki thleng pawh an awm hek lo." 
1Samuel9:3 Saula pa sabengtungte chu a bo va. Kisa chuan a fapa Saula hnênah, “Chhiahhlawh zînga pakhat hruai la, sabengtung bo va zawng teh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:4 Tichuan, Efraim tlângram an fang vek a, Salisa ramte pawh an fang a; mahse, an hmu chuang lo. Saalim ram an fang leh a, chutah pawh chuan a awm lo va; tichuan, Benjamin mite ram an fang leh a; mahse, chutah pawh chuan an hmu ta lo fo va." 
1Samuel9:5 Zufa ram an thlen chuan Saulan a chhiahhlawh hruai hnênah, “Khai, i hâwng teh ang, ka pain sabengtung ai mahin keimahni min ngaihtuah dah ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:6 Ani chuan, “E taka, he khuaah hian Pathian mi, mi zahawm tak a awm a, a sawi apiang a thleng dik ṭhîn. Tûnah a hnênah kal ila, kan thil zawn kan hmuh theihna tûr kawng min hrilh thei mial mahna,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:7 Saula chuan a chhiahhlawh hnênah, “Kal ila, ani chu eng nge kan pêk ang? Kan chhang bâwm a ruak vek tawh si a, Pathian mi hnêna pêk tûr eng mah kan nei hauh lo, eng nge kan la neih le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:8 A chhiahhlawh chuan ani chu a chhâng a, “En teh, hei, pawisa tlêm chu kan la nei e, Pathian mi chu ka pe ang a; tichuan, kan kalna tûr chu min hrilh mai ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:9 Tûn hmain Israel-te zîngah miin Pathian râwn an duh chuan, ‘hawh teh, hmutheitua hnênah i kal teh ang,’ an ti ṭhîn. Tûnlaia zâwlnei hi tûn hma chuan hmutheitu an ti ṭhîn a ni." 
1Samuel9:10 Saulan a chhiahhlawh hnênah, “A ṭhat chu, i kal teh ang hmiang,” a ti a. Pathian mi awmna khuaah chuan an kal ta a." 
1Samuel9:11 Khawpui pana tlânga an chhoh lai chuan nula rual tuichawi tûr an tâwk a, “Hetah hian hmutheitua a awm em?” an ti a." 
1Samuel9:12 Anni chuan, “Awm e, in lo thlen hma lawk khân a lo thleng a; hmanhmawh ula, vawiinah hmunsângah mi an inthawi a, kan khuaah a lo thleng chiah a ni." 
1Samuel9:13 Khua in han luh veleh inthawina hmuna chaw a ei hmain in han hmu mai ang. A thlen hma chuan miten chaw an ei lo vang; chu inthawina malsâwmna sawitu tûr chu a ni a, chumi zawhah mi sâwmte chuan chaw an ei thei a ni. Chho zêl ula, in han hmu mai ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel9:14 Khuaah chuan an chho va, an han luh chuan inthawina hmuna Samuela kal tûr chu an han hmu a." 
1Samuel9:15 Saula lo thlen hma ni chuan Lalpa chuan Samuela chu a lo hrilh a," 
1Samuel9:16 “Naktûk tûn ang hunah Benjamin chi mi pakhat i hnênah ka rawn tîr dâwn; ani chu ka mi Israel-te hotu atân hriak thih la; ani chuan Filistia mite kut ata ka mite chu a chhan chhuak ang. Ka mite au thâwm ka beng a lo thleng ta a, ka ngaihven dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:17 Samuelan Saula a hmuh veleh Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I hnêna ka sawi kha he mi hi a ni; ani chuan ka mite ro a rêlsak ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:18 Saula chuan kulh kawngka bula Samuela awm chu a va hnaih a, “Hmutheitua in hi khawiah nge a awm, khawngaih takin min hrilh thei em?” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:19 Samuela chuan, “Hmutheitua chu keimah hi ka ni, inthawina hmun panin ka hmaah chho ve la, vawiinah ka hnênah chaw ei ang che u. Naktûk zîngah in thil duh chu ka hrilh ang che u a; tichuan, in kal dâwn nia." 
1Samuel9:20 In sabengtung, ni thum lai bo tawh chu lungkham suh u, an hmu tawh e. Israel-te mamawh ber chu tu nge ni? Nang leh i pa chhûngte hi an ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:21 Saula chuan, “Israel hnam zînga te ber, Benjamina hnam ka ni a, kan chhûngkua pawh Benjamin chi zînga tê ber kan ni asin. Engtizia nge ka hnêna chutiang thu i sawi le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:22 Samuela chuan Saula leh a chhiahhlawh chu pindan lian takah a hruai lût a, an mi sâwm sawmthum zîngah chuan a hmun ṭha berah a ṭhuttîr a." 
1Samuel9:23 Samuela chuan chawchhûmtu hnênah chuan, “Dah hran tûr ka tih che sahrang kha han la rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:24 Tichuan, chawchhûmtu chuan a bawp a rawn la a, Saula hmaah chuan a hlui a. Samuela chuan, “Hei hi i chanpual tûr a ni, ei rawh, ka mi sâwmte nên tûna kan ei ho atân kan khêk a nih kha,” a ti a. Chumi ni chuan Saula chu Samuela te nên chaw an kîl ho ta a." 
1Samuel9:25 Inthawina hmun aṭanga khuaa an chhuk hnu chuan Samuela chuan Saula chu in chung zâwlah a titipui a. 
1Samuel9:26 Zîng takah an tho va, Samuela chuan in chunga Saula awm chu a ko va, “Insiam la, ka kaltîr tawh ang che” a ti a. Saula chu a insiam a, Samuela nên chuan an chhuak ta a." 
1Samuel9:27 Kawtchhuah an zu thlen chuan Samuelan Saula hnênah, “I chhiahhlawh hi kal hmasaktîr teh,” a ti a; chhiahhlawh chu a kal ta a. “Nang chu hetah ding rih la, Pathian thu lo thleng ka hrilh ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:1 Samuela chuan hriak bâwm chu a la a, Saula lu-ah chuan a leih a, a fâwp a, “A mi Israel-te chunga rorêltu atân Lalpa chuan hriak a thih ta che. Lalpa mite chungah ro i rêl ang a, anni chu an vêla an hmêlmate kut ata i chhan chhuak ang. Tin, hei hi, a mi Israel-te chunga rorêltu atân Lalpa chuan hriak a thih che a ni tih chhinchhiahna a ni ang:" 
1Samuel10:2 Vawiina min kalsan hnu hian Benjamin ramri Zelza hmun, Rakili thlân kiangah, mi pahnih i tâwk ang a, anni chuan i hnênah, ‘I sabengtung zawnte kha an hmu tawh e; i pa pawhin sabengtungte chu a ngaihtuah tawh lo, nangmah mawlh hi a ngaihtuah che a ni, ‘ka fapa chu engtin tak awm ang maw, a ti a ti mai,’ an ti ang." 
1Samuel10:3 “Chuta ṭang chuan kal zêl la, Tabor hmuna sasaw thing dinna i va thleng ang a, chutah chuan Bethel hmuna Pathian be tûr mi pathumin an tâwk ang che a, pakhat chuan kêlno pathum a pawm ang a, pakhatin chhang tlang thum a keng ang, pakhat leh chuan uain bûr a keng bawk ang." 
1Samuel10:4 Chibai an bûk ang che a, chhang tlang hnih an pe ang che a, la ang che." 
1Samuel10:5 Chumi hnuah Gibea hmuna Pathian tlâng, Filistia sipaiho hmun i va thleng ang a; tin, khua i luh dâwn chuan zâwlnei rual an hmahruaituten perhkhuang te, benchhek te, phênglâwng te, ṭingṭang te tum chungin hmunsâng aṭanga lo chhuk i tâwk ang, thu an sawi dual dual ang." 
1Samuel10:6 Lalpa thlarau chu nasa takin i chungah a lo thleng ang a, an ṭawng ang chuan i ṭawng ve ang a; tichuan, i nun a lo danglam ang." 
1Samuel10:7 Tin, hêng chhinchhiahna hi i chunga a lo thlen kim hunah Pathianin a awmpui dâwn che a, a hruai ang zêl chein awm ang che." 
1Samuel10:8 Gilgal-ah lo zu kal hmasa la, kei pawh hâlral thilhlante leh remna thilhlante hlân tûrin i hnênah ka lo chhuk ve ang. I hnêna ka lo kala, tih tûr ka rawn hrilh hma che chuan ni sarih thleng min lo nghâk ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:9 Saulan Samuela a kalsan veleh Pathianin Saula chu thinlung thar a pe a, chung chhinchhiahna zawng zawng chu chumi ni chuan a chungah a lo thleng ta a." 
1Samuel10:10 Gibea tlâng an han thlen chuan zâwlneiho chuan an lo tâwk a; tichuan, Pathian thlarauvin a man thut a, anmahni angin thu a sawi a, a lâm ve ta a." 
1Samuel10:11 Tûn hmaa amah lo hre tawhten zâwlneiho angin thu a sawi ve ta tih an hmuh chuan, “Kisa fapa chungah hian eng thil nge lo thleng ta le? Saula chu zâwlnei zîngah a tel ve ta a ni maw?” tiin an inzâwt a." 
1Samuel10:12 Chu khuaa mi pakhat chuan a chhâng a, “Hêng zâwlneiho pawh hi, an pate tute nge an nih bîk?” a ti a. “Saula zâwlnei a ni ve ta elo?” tih chu ṭawngkam takah an neih ta a ni." 
1Samuel10:13 Zâwlnei anga thu a sawi zawh chuan Saula chu hmunsâng lamah a chho ta a. 
1Samuel10:14 Saula pami chuan Saula leh a chhiahhlawh chu, “Khawi lamah nge in kal?” tiin a zâwt a. Ani chuan, “Sabengtung kan zawng a; kan hmuh zawh tâk loh avângin Samuela hnênah kan kal ta a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:15 Saula pami chuan, “Samuela chuan in hnênah thu eng nge a sawi min hrilh teh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:16 Saula chuan, “Sabengtung chu an hmu leh tawh tih min lo hrilh,” a ti a. Samuelan lal tûra a lo tih thu erawh chu a pami chu a hrilh lo." 
1Samuel10:17 Samuela chuan mipui chu Mizpa khuaah Lalpa be tûrin a ko khâwm a. 
1Samuel10:18 Israel fate hnênah chuan, “Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Israel-te chu Aigupta ram aṭangin ka hruai chhuak a; Aigupta-ho kut ata leh nangmahni tiduhdahtu lal zawng zawng lak ata ka chhan chhuak che u a." 
1Samuel10:19 In manganna leh chhiatna tinrêng laka chhanchhuaktu che u in Pathian ka ni a; nimahsela, tûnah min duh lo va, rorêlsaktu tûr lal min dîl a. Chuvângin, tûnah, a hnam leh a chi chiin Lalpa hmaah rawn inlan ṭheuh rawh u,’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:20 Samuela chuan Israel hnam zawng zawng chu a rawn inlantîr a; Benjamina hnam chu ṭhumvâwra thlan an lo ni ta a. 
1Samuel10:21 Benjamin hnam chu a chhûng chhûngin an rawn inlan leh a, Matria chhûngte chu thlan an lo ni leh ta zêl a. A tâwpah Kisa fapa Saula chu thlan a ni ta a. Ani chu an han zawng a, an hmu ta lo va." 
1Samuel10:22 Lalpa an râwn nawn leh a, “Ani hi a lo kal em ni?” an ti a. Lalpa chuan, “Kal e, bungraw zîngah a biru a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:23 Tichuan, an tlân a, an va hruai chhuak a, mi zînga a han din chuan a sâng ber a, a koki pêl pawh an awm hauh lo va." 
1Samuel10:24 Samuelan mi zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa mi ruat hi in hmu em? Mi zawng zawng zîngah amah ang rêng an awm loh hi,” a ti a. Mipui chu an au va, “Lal chu dam reng rawh se,” an ti a." 
1Samuel10:25 Samuela chuan mipuite chu lal dinhmun leh a tih tûrte a hrilh a; lehkhabu-ah a ziak a, Lalpa inah a dah ta a. Samuela chuan mite chu an in lamah a hâwntîr ta ṭheuh va." 
1Samuel10:26 Saula pawh Gibea khuaa a inah a haw ve ta a, mi huaisen, an thinlung Pathianin a khawihte chuan an zui a." 
1Samuel10:27 Mi ṭhenkhat, kawhmawhbâwlho erawh chuan, “Engtin nge he pa hian min chhanhim theih tehlul ang?” an ti a. Ani chu an hmusit hle a, thilpêk eng mah an pe duh lo va. Saula erawh chu a ngawi reng a." 
1Samuel11:1 Amon mi Nahasa chu Gilead rama Jabes khua bei tûrin a lo thawk a, a rawn hual a. Jabes mi zawng zawng chuan, “Kan hnênah thu thlung la, i rawng kan bâwl ang e,” an ti a." 
1Samuel11:2 Amon mi Nahasa chuan, “In hnêna thu ka thlun dân tûr chu hetiang hi a ni ang: In mitmu ding lam ka kher chhuak vek ang a, chu chu Israel mi zawng zawng ka tihmualpho dân tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel11:3 Jabes khaw upaho chuan a hnênah, “Israel ram pumah zualko kan tlântîr theih nân ni sarih chhûng hun min pe rawh; chutah min chhantu tûr tu mah an lo lan loh chuan i hnênah kan inpe ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel11:4 Tin, zualkote chuan Saula awmna Gibea khua an va thleng a, mipui hnênah chuan chu thu chu an hrilh a. Mi zawng zawng chu mangangin an ṭap ta chuah chuah a." 
1Samuel11:5 Chutih lai chuan Saula chu a bâwng khalhin lo lam aṭangin a lo hâwng a. Saula chuan, “Engati nge mipui chu an ṭah chuah chuah le?” a ti a. Jabes khaw mite thu rawn thlen chu an hrilh a." 
1Samuel11:6 Chûng thu chu Saulan a hriat veleh Pathian thlarau chu a chungah a lo thleng chiam a, a thin a rim ta hle a." 
1Samuel11:7 Bâwngpa pahnih a talh a, a sa chu a chansawm a, ram pumah a semtîr a, “Tu pawh Saula leh Samuela zui duh lo chu an bâwng hetianga tihsak a ni ang,” tiin a hrilh vek a. Mipui chuan Lalpa chu an hlau ta hle a, thukhat vuain an lo thawk chhuak a." 
1Samuel11:8 Tin, Bezek hmunah a lo chhiar a, Israel mi chu nuaithum an ni a, Juda mi chu sîngthum an ni." 
1Samuel11:9 Mi tirhte hnênah chuan, “Jabes mite chu ‘Naktûk ni tlângsân hmain kan chhan chhuak ang che u,’ tiin va hrilh rawh u,” an ti a. Mi tirhte chu an hâwng ta a, Jabes mite chu an va hrilh a; anni chu an lâwm ta hle a." 
1Samuel11:10 Jabes mite chuan, “Naktûkah in hnênah kan inpe ang a; tichuan, in duh duhin min ti dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
1Samuel11:11 A tûkah chuan Saula chuan mipui chu pâwl thumah a ṭhen a, vârṭianah Amon mite riahhmun an luhchilh a, ni tlângsân fe thlengin an that ta chiam a. An thah bangte chu an tlân darh vek a, pahniha awm dûn rêng rêng an awm lo." 
1Samuel11:12 Mite chuan Samuela hnênah, “ ‘Saulan kan chungah ro a rêl tehlul ang maw’ titute kha tute nge ni? Chûng mite chu rawn hruai la, kan lo that ang e,” an ti a." 
1Samuel11:13 Saula erawh chuan, “Vawiinah tu mah tihhlum tûr a ni lo; vawiinah hian Israel-te chu Lalpan a chhan chhuak ta si a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel11:14 Samuela chuan mipui hnênah, “Hawh u, Gilgal-ah kal ila, chutah chuan lal neih hi i tinghet ang u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel11:15 Mipui chu Gilgal-ah chuan an kal ta a, Saula chu Lalpa hmaah lal atân an tinghet ta a; tin, Lalpa hnênah inthawina an hlân ho va, Saula leh Israel mi zawng zawng chu an lâwm hle a." 
1Samuel12:1 Samuela chuan Israel mi zawng zawng hnênah, “Ngai teh u, ka hnêna in sawi apiang ka ngaithla a, lal ka ruatsak ta che u a." 
1Samuel12:2 Tûnah hian nangmahni hruaitu tûr lal in nei ta a. Kei chu ka lo tarin ka lute pawh a lo ṭuak ta a, ka fapate pawh in zîngah an awm a. Ka tleirâwl aṭanga vawiin thlengin ka kaihruai che u a." 
1Samuel12:3 Khai le, Lalpa hmaah leh a hriakthih lal hmaah hian ka sualna han sawi teh u. Tu bâwngpa nge ka chhuhsaka, tu sabengtung nge ka chhuhsak ngai le? Tu nge ka buma, tu nge ka tihduhdah in hria em? Ka mit tidel tûrin thamna ka la ngai em ni? Hêng hi ka lo ti a nih chuan ka rûl leh vek ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel12:4 Anni chuan “Min bum ngai lo,” an ti a." 
1Samuel12:5 Samuela chuan an hnênah, “Vawiin hian ka tihsual eng mah in hmu lo tih Lalpa leh a hriakthih lal chu hretu an ni e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel12:6 Samuela chuan mipui hnênah, “ Lalpa chu Mosia leh Arona ruattu leh in pute Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu a ni." 
1Samuel12:7 Chutichuan, ngun takin ngaithla rawh u, Lalpan in pute leh in chunga dik taka thil a tih ṭhin dân Lalpa hmaah ka hrilh ang che u." 
1Samuel12:8 Aigupta rama Jakoba a luh hnu khân in pute chuan puitu atân LALPA an au va; LALPA chuan Mosia leh Arona a tîr a, in pute chu Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuak a, he ramah hian a awmtîr ta a." 
1Samuel12:9 Nimahsela, Lalpa, an Pathian chu an theihnghilh a, ani chuan Hazor khaw sipai hotu Sisera kutah te, Filistia-ho kutah te, Moab lal kutah te a pe a, anni chuan an rawn hneh a." 
1Samuel12:10 Tin, Lalpa chu an au va, ‘ Lalpa kan hawisan a, Baal te, Aseri rawngte kan bâwl avângin kan lo bawhchhe ta a ni. Tûnah kan hmêlmate lak ata min chhan chhuak la; tichuan, i rawng kan bâwl ang,’ an ti a." 
1Samuel12:11 Lalpa chuan, Jerubaala te, Bedana te, Jeftha te, Samuela te a tîr a, anni chuan hmun tina in hmêlmate lak ata an chhan chhuak che u a, him takin in awm ta ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel12:12 Tin, Amon mite lal Nahasa chu nangmahni do tûra a lo kal in hmuhin Lalpa in Pathian chu in lal a ni reng chungin ka hnênah, ‘Kan chunga rorêltu tûr lal kan duh ve,’ in ti a." 
1Samuel12:13 Tûnah hian lal in dîl leh in thlan chu en teh u. Lalpa chuan lal a pe ta che u a nih hi. 
1Samuel12:14 Lalpa in ṭih a, a rawng in bâwla, a thu in awih a, a dân in zawm a, nangni leh in lal, in chunga rorêltute nên chuan Lalpa in Pathian in zui chuan a ṭha ang." 
1Samuel12:15 Amaherawhchu, Lalpa aw in pawisak lohva, a dân in zawm loh chuan in puten Lalpa kut an tuar ang khân nangni pawhin in tuar ve ang." 
1Samuel12:16 Tûnah, ngaithla ngun rawh u, in tân thil ropui tak in mit hmuha a tih tûr hi lo en rawh u." 
1Samuel12:17 Vawiinah hian huit an seng a ni lâwm ni? Khawpui rîktîr tûr leh ruah sûrtîr tûrin Lalpa chu ka au vang a; tichuan, lal dîl thu-ah hian Lalpa lakah thil in tihsual nasatzia in hria ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel12:18 Samuela chuan Lalpa chu a au va, chumi ni chuan Lalpa chuan khawpui a rîktîr a, ruah a sûrtîr bawk a; tichuan, mi zawng zawngin Lalpa leh Samuela chu an hlau ta hle a." 
1Samuel12:19 Mite chuan Samuela hnênah, “Kan thih loh nân i chhiahhlawhte hi Lalpa, i Pathian hnênah min dîlsak teh, kan sualna dang zawng zawng belhchhahin he thil ṭha lo tak, lal hi kan lo dîl ta si a,” an ti a." 
1Samuel12:20 Samuela chuan mipui hnênah, “He thil ṭha lo tak hi in lo ti ngei tak a; mahse, Lalpa chu hawisan chuang lo ula; tih tak zetin Lalpa rawng chu bâwl zâwk rawh u." 
1Samuel12:21 Ṭangkaina nei lo milem chu be suh u, thil ṭha an tihsak lo che u a, an chhan chhuak thei hek lo che u a ni, engmah lo mai mai an ni si a." 
1Samuel12:22 A hming ropui tak avângin Lalpa chuan a mite a paihthla dâwn lo. Lalpa chuan a mi atâna siam che u hi a lawmzâwng tak a ni si a. 
1Samuel12:23 Kei pawhin ṭawngṭaisak che u bânsana, Lalpa chunga sual chu ka tân tih theih a ni lo. Thil dik leh ṭha chu ka kawhhmuh zêl ang che u." 
1Samuel12:24 Amaherawhchu, Lalpa hi ṭih ula, rinawm tak leh ṭhahnemngai takin a rawng hi bâwl ang che u; in tân thil ropui tak a tihte kha hre reng rawh u." 
1Samuel12:25 In sual luih zêl erawh chuan in lalte nên lam in boral vek ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel13:1 Saula chuan kum hnih chhûng Israel ramah ro a rêl a. 
1Samuel13:2 Saula chuan Israel mi sângthum a thlang chhuak a. Mikmas-ah leh Bethel tlângramah a hovin an awm a, sângkhat chu Benjamin bial Gibea khuaah Jonathana hovin an awm a, mi dang chu a hâwntîr vek a." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonathana chuan Geba hmuna Filistia sipai hmun chu a la a; chu chu Filistia mite chuan an lo hria a, Saula chuan “Hebrai mite khân lo hre rawh se,” tiin ram pumah tawtawrâwt a hamtîr a." 
1Samuel13:4 Israel mi zawng zawng chuan, “Saulan Filistia sipai awmna hmun a bei a, Israel-te chungah chuan Filistia mite chu an thinur hle,” tih thu an lo hria a. Tichuan, Saula pui tûrin Gilgal-ah mipui an lo kal khâwm ta chiam a." 
1Samuel13:5 Filistia mite pawh Israel-te do tûrin an lo pung khâwm bawk a; tawlailîr sîngthum, sakawr chungchuang mi sângruk leh sipai, tuifinriat kama ṭiau zât lai an ni, Beth-aven chhak lam Mikmas hmunah an lo chho va, ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel13:6 Israel mite chuan an dinhmun hlauhawmzia leh dan chêp an nih an inhriatin pûkah te, lei kuaah te, lungpui phênah te, tuichhunchhuahah te an biru a." 
1Samuel13:7 Hebrai mi ṭhenkhat chu Jordan râla Gad ram leh Gilead ramah te an tlânchhia a. Saula chu Gilgal-ah a awm reng a, a hnêna sipai awm zawng zawng chu hlauvin an khûr an khûr a." 
1Samuel13:8 Samuelan a lo tiam angin ni sarih a nghâk a, mahse, Samuela chu Gilgal-ah a lo kal lo va; tichuan, mite chuan an tlânchhiatsan ta a." 
1Samuel13:9 Saula chuan, “Hâlral thilhlan tûr leh remna thilhlan tûrte chu ka hnênah han la rawh u” a ti a, hâlral thilhlan chu a hlân ta a." 
1Samuel13:10 Hâlral thilhlante a hlân zo chiah tihah Samuela chu a lo thleng a, lo dawngsawng tûrin Saula chu a chhuak a." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuela chuan, “Eng nge i tih le?” a ti a. Saula chuan, “Miten min tlânsan tawh tih ka hria a, nang lah chu i ni ruatah i lo thleng bawk si lo. Filistia mite chu Mikmas-ah an pung khâwm luih tawh mai si a." 
1Samuel13:12 Gilgal-ah min rawn bei ṭêp a ni a; min pui tûrin Lalpa ka la ngên bawk si lo; chuvângin, hâlral thilhlan chu hlân lo thei ka ni lo va ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel13:13 Samuela chuan, “I thil tih dân hi a âtthlâk hle a ni. Lalpa, i Pathianin dân a pêk che hi i zâwm lo va, zâwm la chu Lalpan Israel-te chungah kumkhuain a laltîr tûr che a ni a le." 
1Samuel13:14 Nimahsela, i lalna chu a tâwp dâwn ta, Lalpa thupêk i zawm loh avângin Lalpa chuan a mi duhzâwng tak a zawng a, a mite chunga rorêltu tûr a ruat tawh a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel13:15 Samuela chuan Gilgal chu a chhuahsan a, Benjamin biala Gibea khuaah chuan a chho va, Saula chuan a hnêna la awm ve chu a chhiar a, zaruk lai an la ni." 
1Samuel13:16 Saula leh a fapa leh an hnêna mi la awmte chuan Benjamin biala Gibea khuaah ṭan an la a, Filistia-ho erawh chuan Mikmas-ah ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel13:17 Filistia zînga râl hrât zualte chu pâwl thumah an inṭhen a, an bûk aṭang chuan pâwl khatin Sual rama Ofra lam an pan a," 
1Samuel13:18 pâwl khatin Beth-horon lam an pan a; pâwl dang leh chuan thlalêr dep Zeboim ruam lam hawi ramri kawng an zawh a. 
1Samuel13:19 Filistia mite chuan Israel ram pum puiah thîrdêng awm an phal lo va, “Hebrai mite hian, khandaih te, fei te an siam dah ang e,” an ti a ni." 
1Samuel13:20 Israel mite chu bâwngtuthlawh te, leilehna thîr te, hreipui te, leilehna hmanrua te tah hriamtîr tûrin Filistia mite hnênah an chhuk ṭhîn." 
1Samuel13:21 Bâwngtuthlawh leh lungrâl tihhriam man chu duli pahnih a ni a. Thîr hmâwr zum te, hreipui te, chhuntiang te tihhriam man chu duli a ni." 
1Samuel13:22 An indo ni chuan Saula leh a fapa Jonathana chauh lo chuan an hote tu mahin khandaih emaw, fei emaw an nei lo." 
1Samuel13:23 Filistia mite chuan an sipai pâwl khat chu Mikmas kalkhân vêng tûrin an tîr a. 
1Samuel14:1 Ni khat chu Saula fapa Jonathana chuan a râlthuam kengtu hnênah, “Hawh, râl lehlama Filistia sipai hmunah sâwn i va kal teh ang,” a ti a. A pa chu a hrilh lo va." 
1Samuel14:2 Saula chu Gibea ram hmâwr Migron hmuna theibuhfai buk hnuaiah a awm a. A hnêna awm sipaite chu zaruk lai an ni. 
1Samuel14:3 Puithiam Ahija pawh puithiam kawr hain a awm bawk a. Ani hi Silo khuaa Lalpa puithiam, Elia fa Finehasa fapa Ikaboda unaupa Ahituba fa a ni. Jonathana chu râl lehlamah a kal tawh tih tu mahin an hre lo." 
1Samuel14:4 Filistia sipai bûk Jonathanan a panna khân sîr tawnah chuan lungpui tohlâwt a awm a: a pakhat hming chu Boze a ni a, pakhat dang chu Senea a ni." 
1Samuel14:5 Pakhat chu hmâr lam Mikmas lam hawi zâwngin a awm a, pakhat chu chhim lam Geba hawi zâwngin a awm a." 
1Samuel14:6 Jonathanan a râlthuam kengtu tlangvâl hnênah chuan, “Hawh, serh tan lohho awmnaah sâwn i kal teh ang, Lalpan min ṭanpui ngei ang. An tam emaw, an tlêm emaw Lalpa tân min hnehtîr harsatna eng mah a awm lo,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:7 A râlthuam kengtu chuan, “I duh ang chuan ti la, ka zui zêl ang che. Ka phatsan lo vang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:8 Jonathana chuan, “Aw le, hnaih ila, hmuh tûrin i va inlan ang." 
1Samuel14:9 ‘In hnêna kan lo kal hma chu lo awm rawh u,’ min tih chuan kan hmunah kan awm reng ang a, an hnênah kan chho lo vang." 
1Samuel14:10 ‘Lo chho teh rêng u,’ min tih chuan kan chho vang a, chu chu Lalpan anni chu kan kutah min pe tawh a ni tih chhinchhiahna a ni ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:11 Tichuan, an pahnihin Filistia sipaiho hmuh tûrin an va inlan a. Filistia mite chuan, “En teh u, Hebrai mite an bihrûkna hmun ata an lo chhuak e,” an ti a." 
1Samuel14:12 Vênbûka sipaite chuan Jonathana leh a râlthuam kengtu chu an au va, “Lo chho teh rêng u, in hre mai ang,” an ti a. Jonathana chuan a râlthuam kengtu hnênah chuan, ‘Mi rawn zui chho rawh, Lalpa chuan anni chu Israel-te kutah a pe ta e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:13 Jonathana chu a vâk chho ta a, a râlthuam kengtu chuan a zui zêl a. Jonathana hmaah chuan anni chu an tlu ta zawih zawih a, a hnungah a râlthuam kengtu chuan a rawn that zêl a." 
1Samuel14:14 Inbeih hmasak ber ni chuan Jonathana leh a râlthuam kengtu chuan fîng chanve vêl chhûngah chauh mi sawmhnih lai an that a. 
1Samuel14:15 Sipai zawng zawng, riahbûka awm te, phûla awm te, vênbûka awm te, hmatâwng pâwlte chu an chiai a, an buai ta mur mur a. Lîr te a nghîng a, Pathianin manganna nasa tak a thlentîr ta a." 
1Samuel14:16 Benjamin bial Gibea khuaa Saula râlvengtu sipaite chuan an han thlîr a; ngai teh, Filistia-ho chu mangang takin an tlân darh chum chum a." 
1Samuel14:17 Saula chuan a sipaite hnênah, “Inchhiar ula, tute nge kim lo han en teh u,” a ti a. An han inchhiar chuan Jonathana leh a râlthuam kengtu chu an lo awm ve lo va." 
1Samuel14:18 Saula chuan Ahija hnênah, “Puithiam kawr kha han phawrh teh,” a ti a. Ani chuan puithiam kawr chu Israel-te hmaah a ha a ni." 
1Samuel14:19 Saulan puithiam a biak lai chuan Filistia riahhmuna an buaina chu a zual tawlh tawlh a, Saulan puithiam hnênah chuan, “Dah leh mai rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:20 Tichuan, Saula leh a hnêna mipui awmte chu an pung khâwm a, indona hmunah an kal ta a. Ngai teh, Filistia mite chu anmahni leh anmahni khandaihin an lo inbei chiam a, an buai nuai nuai a." 
1Samuel14:21 Tûn hma lama Filistia ṭan ṭhîn Hebrai mite leh riahhmuna lo awmte chu Israel lamah an lo pakai a, Saula leh Jonathana lamah an ṭang ta a." 
1Samuel14:22 Chutiang bawkin Efraim tlângrama Israel mi, biru zawng zawng pawh chu Filistia mite an tlânchhia tih an hriatin indonaah chuan an lo tel ve a, an rawn ûm ve nghâl a." 
1Samuel14:23 Chumi ni chuan Israel-ho chu Lalpan a hnehtîr a, Beth-aven thleng rawkin an bei zui a." 
1Samuel14:24 Saulan mipuite chu a vau va, “Ka hmêlmate chunga phuba ka lâk ni hian khaw thim hmaa chaw ei chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,” a tih avângin chumi ni chuan tu man eng mah an ei lo, Israel-te chu an chau hle a." 
1Samuel14:25 Mipui chuan ngaw an va thleng a, khawizu a lo tam hle a." 
1Samuel14:26 Mipuiin ngaw chhûng an luh chuan khawizu chu a lo far zawih zawih a, ânchhe dawn an hlauh avângin tu man an pir lo." 
1Samuel14:27 Jonathana erawh chuan a pain mipui a vauna kha a hre ve lo va, tiang hmawrin khawithlâr chu a chhun a, a han tem a, a lo harh ta sawt a." 
1Samuel14:28 An zînga mi pakhat chuan a hnênah, “I pain hetiangin min vau asin, ‘Tu pawh, vawiina chaw ei apiangin ânchhia dawng rawh se,” a tih avângin mite chu an chau zo ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:29 Jonathana chuan, “Ka pa hian mite tân harsatna a siam mai mai a nih hi; en ta che u, kei pawhin khawizu tlêm tê ka han tem a, ka harh tâk hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:30 “Mite hian an hmêlmate laka an thil lâk hi an duh duhin vawiin hian ei sela chu an chak phah ang a, Filistia mite hi kan that tam lehzual tûr’” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:31 Chumi ni chuan Filistia mite chu an hneh a, Mikmas aṭangin Aijalon thlengin an ûm a, Israel-te pawh chu an chau ve ta hle a." 
1Samuel14:32 Mite chuan an râllâk thil: berâm te, bâwngpa te, bâwngno te chu an la sawk sawk a, leiah an phet thlu a, an talh a, a thisen chawpin an ei ta mai a." 
1Samuel14:33 Saula hnênah, “Mite chuan thisen chawpin sa an ei a Lalpa lakah thil an tisual ta e,” tiin an sawi a. Ani chuan, “Dik lo takin thil in ti ta a ni, hetah hian lung min han lâk teh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:34 Saulan chûng mite hnênah chuan, “Vâk darh ula, mi hnênah, ‘mi tinin bâwngpa leh berâm han la sela, hetah hian talh sela, ei rawh se. A thisen chawpa eiin Lalpa chungah thil tisual suh u,’ tiin hrilh rawh u,” a ti a. Chumi zân chuan an bâwngpa an rawn kai ṭheuh va, chutah chuan an talh a." 
1Samuel14:35 Saula chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a, chu chu Lalpa tâna a maichâm siam hmasak ber a ni." 
1Samuel14:36 Saula chuan, “Zânah Filistia mite chu bei ila, zîng khaw ên thlengin i bei ang u, tu mah zuah tûr a ni lo,” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Ṭha i tih ang chuan ti rawh,” an ti a. Puithiam erawh chuan, “Pathian i râwn rih ang u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:37 Saula chuan, “Filistia mite chu ka zu bei ang em? Israel-te kutah i pe ang em?” tiin a zâwt a. Chumi ni chuan Pathianin a chhâng lo." 
1Samuel14:38 Saula chuan, “Nangni mipui hotu zawng zawngte u, lo hnai ula, vawiin hian eng nge kan tihsual hriat chhuah i tum teh ang." 
1Samuel14:39 Lalpa, Israel-te chhanhimtu, mi nunga chhâlin ka sawi e, ka fapa Jonathana tihsual pawh ni se, a thi ngei tûr a ni,” a ti a. Nimahsela, mipui zîng aṭangin tu mahin an chhang lo." 
1Samuel14:40 Israel mi zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Inbûk ila, nangniho hi lehlamah ṭang ula, kei leh ka fapa Jonathana hi lehlamah kan ṭang ang e,” a ti a. Mite chuan Saula hnênah, “Ṭha i tih ang chuan ti mai rawh,” an ti a." 
1Samuel14:41 Saula chuan Israel-te Pathian hnênah chuan, “A dik tak chu han tar lang ta che,” a ti a. Ṭhumvâwr chu Saula leh Jonathana chungah chuan a tla a, mipui chu an fihlîm ta a." 
1Samuel14:42 Saula chuan, “Kei leh ka fapa Jonathana thlei nân ṭhumvâwr rawh u,” a ti a. Jonathana chungah chuan a tla ta a." 
1Samuel14:43 Saula chuan Jonathana hnênah, “Eng nge i tihsual min hrilh rawh” a ti a. Jonathana chuan a hnênah, “Ka tiang hmâwra khawizu tlêm chu ka tem ngei alâwm; chuvângin, ka thi mai tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:44 Saula chuan, “Jonathan, i thi ngei tûr a ni, i thih loh chuan na deuh pawhin Pathianin a tih tihin min ti rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:45 Mite chuan Saula hnênah, “Israel-te tâna hnehna ropui tak thlentu Jonathana hi a thi ang maw? A thi tawp lo vang. Lalpa nunna chhâlin kan sawi e, a samzai pakhat pawh leiah a tla lo vang,” an ti a. Mipui chuan Jonathana chu thi lo tûrin an chhan chhuak ta a." 
1Samuel14:46 Chumi hnu chuan Saulan Filistia mi a ûm chu a kîrsan a, Filistia mite pawh an ram lamah an haw ta a." 
1Samuel14:47 Saula chu Israel lal a lo nih chuan kil tina an hmêlma Moab mi te, Amon mi te, Edom mi te, Zoba lal te, Filistia mite chu a do va. A hawina lam apiangah a hneh zêl a." 
1Samuel14:48 Huai takin a bei a. Amalek mite pawh a hneh a, Israel-te chu rapbettute kut ata a chhan chhuak a." 
1Samuel14:49 Saula fate chu Jonathana te, Isvia te, Malkisua te an ni; a fanu upa zâwk chu Merabi a ni a, a naupang zâwk chu Mikali a ni." 
1Samuel14:50 Saula nupui hming chu Ahinoami, Ahimaaza fanu a ni. A sipai hotu ber hming chu Abnera a ni, a pami Nera fapa a ni." 
1Samuel14:51 Kisa chu Saula pa a ni a, Abnera pa Nera chu Abiela fapa a ni." 
1Samuel14:52 A dam chhûng zawng, Saula chu Filistia mite nên nasa takin an indo ṭhîn a, Saula chuan mi chak emaw, mi huaisen emaw a hmuh apiang lamṭang atân a siam zêl ṭhîn." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuela chuan Saula hnênah, “ Lalpan a mi Israel-te chunga rorêltu atân hriak thih tûr chein min tîr a; chuvângin, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh le." 
1Samuel15:2 Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, ‘Israel-te chu Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah lai khân Amalek-hovin kawng lakah an lo tihbuai avângin ka hrem dâwn a ni." 
1Samuel15:3 Amalek-ho bei tûrin chhuak la, an thil neih zawng zawng tiboral vek ang che. A hmei a pa, nausên hnute hne lai chenin, an bâwngpa te, berâm te, sanghâwngsei te, sabengtung te nên tihlum vek ang che,’ a ti e” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:4 Tichuan, Saulan Telem khuaah mipui a ko khâwm a, Israel mi nuaihnih leh Juda mi sîngkhat lai an ni." 
1Samuel15:5 Saula chuan Amalek khawpui chu a pan a, ruamah lambun tumin a lo châng a." 
1Samuel15:6 Aigupta ram aṭanga Israel-te an lo chhuah khân, Ken mite chuan an lo khawngaih hle a, Saula chuan an hnênah, “Lo chhuak ula, Amalek mite zîng ata inthiarfihlîm rawh u; chutilo zawng an zîngah ka tiboral ve dah ang che u,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Ken mite chu Amalek mite zîng ata chu an chhuak a." 
1Samuel15:7 Saula chuan Amalek mite chu Havila aṭanga Aigupta ram dep Sur thlengin a hneh a. 
1Samuel15:8 Amalek lal Agaga chu a nung chungin a man a, mi dang zawng chu khandaihin a that a." 
1Samuel15:9 Saula leh a mite chuan Agaga te, berâm ṭha ṭha te, bâwngpa ṭha leh thau thau te, berâmno ṭha ṭha te chu an tihlum duh lo va, ṭha lo deuh leh an duh loh chauh chu an that vek a." 
1Samuel15:10 Lalpa thu chu Samuela hnênah a lo thleng a," 
1Samuel15:11 “Saula, lal atân ka lo ruat ta chu pawi ka ti hle mai; min hawisan a, ka thupêk a zâwm si lo,” a ti a. Samuela chu a thin a ur hle a, zankhuain Lalpa a au va." 
1Samuel15:12 A tûkah chuan Samuela chu zîng takah a tho va, Saula hmuh tumin a chhuak a; mahse “Saula chu Karmel-ah a kal a, chutah chuan dam lai lung a phun a, a lo kîr leh a, Gilgal-ah a chhuk leh ta,” tiin Samuela chu miin an lo hrilh a." 
1Samuel15:13 Samuela chuan Saula hnên a lo thleng a, Saula chuan, “ Lalpan malsâwm che rawh se; Lalpa thupêk ang chuan ka ti ta e,” a lo ti a." 
1Samuel15:14 Samuela chuan, “Chûng berâm bê leh bâwng bû ka hriatte chu engtizia nge ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:15 Saula chuan, “Amalek mite ta an rawn lâksak a ni. Mite chuan berâm leh bâwng, a ṭha ṭha chu Lalpa, i Pathian hnêna thilhlan atân an rawn la a, a dang zawng chu kan tihlum vek e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:16 Samuela chuan Saula hnênah, “Nizâna Lalpan ka hnêna thu a sawi ka hrilh teh ang che,” a ti a. Saula chuan, “Sawi ta che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:17 “Inngai pawimawh lo mah la, Israel hnam hotu atân ruat i ni lâwm ni? Lalpan Israel lal atân hriak a thih che a." 
1Samuel15:18 Lalpan thil ti tûrin a tîr chhuak che a, ‘Kal la, mi sualho, Amalek mite chu tihlum vek rawh, an boral vek hma chuan bei zêl rawh,’ a ti che a." 
1Samuel15:19 Engati nge Lalpa thu zâwm lova râllâk thil i lâk bawrh bawrha, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo i tih le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:20 Saula chuan Samuela hnênah, “ Lalpa thu chu ka zâwm alâwm. Lalpa min tirhnaah chuan ka kal a, Amalek lal Agaga ka rawn man a, Amalek mite chu ka that vek asin." 
1Samuel15:21 Amaherawhchu, mite chuan râllâk thil - berâm leh bâwngte tihboral tûr zînga a ṭha ṭha chu Lalpa i Pathian hnêna Gilgal-a hlan atân an rawn la a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:22 Samuela chuan: “Hâlral thilhlan leh inthawinate aiin: Lalpa chuan a thu awih a lâwm zâwk lo vem ni? Ngai teh, thilhlan aiin thu awih a ṭha zâwk a, Berâmno thau aiin a thu pawm a ṭha zâwk." 
1Samuel15:23 Hei hi aien sualte nên thuhmun a ni. Luhlul hi milem biak tluk a ni. Lalpa thu i zawm loh avângin Ani pawhin lal atân a duh bîk ta lo a che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:24 Saula chuan Samuela hnênah, “Ka lo tisual dêr mai a, Lalpa thupêk leh i thu ka zâwm lo a ni e, mipui ka hlau va, an thu ka zâwm mai a ni." 
1Samuel15:25 Tûnah ka ngên a che, ka sual ngaidam la, Lalpa ka biak theih nân min hawpui leh rawh aw,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:26 Samuela chuan Saula hnênah, “Ka hawpui tawp lo vang che, Lalpa thu i duh lo va, Lalpa pawhin Israel-te lal atân a duh bîk ta lo che a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:27 Samuela chu kal tuma a han her chuan, Saulan a puan fêmah a lo chelh a, a thlêr ta a." 
1Samuel15:28 Samuelan a hnênah, “Vawiin aṭang hian Lalpan Israel ram chu a chhuhsak ta che a; mi, nang aia ṭha zâwk mi dang hnênah a pe ta a ni." 
1Samuel15:29 Israel Miropuia chu a daw lo vang, a lamlêt hek lo vang; mihring anga lamlêt leh mai mi a ni si lo,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:30 Saula chuan, “Ka lo tisual ta a ni; mahse, ka mite zînga upaho leh Israel-te hmaah min zahder hrâm la, min hâwnpui leh rawh; Lalpa i Pathian chu ka bia ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:31 Tichuan, Samuelan Saula chu a hâwnpui a, Saula chuan Lalpa chu chibai a bûk ta a." 
1Samuel15:32 Samuela chuan, “Amalek lal Agaga chu ka hnênah han hruai rawh,” a ti a. Agaga chu khûr chungin a hnênah a va kal a, “Thihna râpthlâk chu ka pumpelh tawh a ni ang chu maw?” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:33 Samuela chuan, “I khandaihin hmeichhiate fa nei lova i siam ṭhîn ang khân i nu pawh hmeichhe zînga fa nei lo nu a ni ang,” a ti a. Samuela chuan Gilgal khuaah Lalpa mit hmuhin a sât sawm ta berh a." 
1Samuel15:34 Samuela chu Rama khuaah a kal a, Saula pawh a awmna Gibea khuaah ama inah a haw chho ta a." 
1Samuel15:35 Samuela chuan a dam chhûngin Saula chu a tlawh leh ta lo va. Samuela chu Saula avâng chuan a rilru a na hle a; Lalpa chuan, Israel lal atân Saula a lo siam chu pawi a ti hle a." 
1Samuel16:1 Lalpa chuan Samuela hnênah, “Israel lal atâna Saula ka duh loh avâng hian eng chen nge i lungngaih dâwn le? I hriak ûmah hriak thun khat la, kal rawh. Bethlehem mi Jesaia hnênah ka tîr ang che. A fapate zînga mi lal tûr ka ruat diam tawh e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:2 Samuela chuan, “Engtin nge ka kal theih ang, Saulan a lo hriat chuan min that mai ang,” a ti a. Lalpa chuan, “Bâwngla kai la, ‘ Lalpa hnêna thil hlân tûrin ka lo kal a ni,’ ti ang che." 
1Samuel16:3 Thilhlannaah chuan Jesaia sâwm la; tichuan, i tih tûr chu ka hrilh ang che, a hming ka hrilh che chu hriak min thihsak dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:4 Samuela chuan Lalpa thupêk ang chuan a ti a, Bethlehem-ah a kal ta a. Chumi khuaa upaho chuan khûr chungin an lo hmuak a, “Ṭha lam thu-a lo kal i ni em le?” an ti." 
1Samuel16:5 Ani chuan, “Ṭha lam thilah ni e, Lalpa hnêna thil hlân tûra lo kal ka ni. Intifai ula, thilhlannaah chuan lo kal ve rawh u,” a ti a. Jesaia leh a fapate chu a thian fai a, thilhlannaah chuan a sâwm a." 
1Samuel16:6 Tin, an lo thlen chuan Eliaba chu ngun takin a en a, “ Lalpa hmaa ding hi a hriak thiha chu a ni phawt ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:7 Nimahsela, Lalpan a hnênah, “A hmêl ṭhat lam emaw, a sân lam emaw en suh, ani hi chu ka duh lo. Lalpa chuan mihring thlîr dân angin a thlîr ve si lo; mihring chuan pâwn lam lan dân an en ṭhîn a, Lalpa erawh chuan thinlung lam a en ṭhîn” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:8 Tichuan, Jesaian Abinadaba a ko leh a, Samuela hnênah a rawn hruai a, ani chuan, “Hei pawh hi Lalpa thlan a ni lo,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:9 Jesaia chuan Sama a va kaltîr leh a, ani chuan, “Ani pawh hi Lalpa thlan chu a la ni chuang lo,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:10 Chutiang chuan Jesaia chuan a fapa pasarihte chu a hmaah a inlantîr a, Samuela chuan Jesaia hnênah, “Hêngho hi Lalpa thlan an la ni ta lo cheu mai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:11 Samuela chuan Jesaia hnênah, “I fate hetah an awm kim em?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “A tlum ber a la awm ve lo; tûnah hian berâm a vêng a ni,” a ti a. Samuela chuan Jesaia hnênah, “Va kohtîr rawh, a lo thlen hma chu inthawina kan hlân lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:12 A va ko va, a hmaah a rawn hruai a. Ani chu sâr veng vawng, meng mawi tak, hmêlṭha tak a ni. Lalpa chuan, “Hriak thih rawh le, hei ngei hi a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:13 Samuela chuan a hriak ûm chu a la a, a unaute hmaah ani chu hriak a thih ta a. Chumi ni aṭang chuan Lalpa thlarau chu nasa takin Davida chungah a lo thleng ta a. Samuela chu a tho va, Rama khuaah a kal ta a." 
1Samuel16:14 Lalpa thlarau chuan Saula chu a chhuahsan a, Lalpa tirh thlarau sualin ani chu a tibuai ta a." 
1Samuel16:15 Saula chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Pathian tirh thlarau sualin a tibuai ta che a nih hi." 
1Samuel16:16 Ka pu, i chhiahhlawh, i tirhkahte hi thu min pe la, ṭingṭang tum thiam kan zawnsak ang che, Pathian tirh thlarau sualin a man hunah che ani chuan ṭingṭang a tumsak ang che a; tichuan, i ṭha leh mai ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel16:17 Saula chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah chuan, “Chutiang tum thiam tak chu mi zawnsak ula, ka hnênah rawn hruai rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:18 An zînga tlangvâl pakhat chuan a chhâng a, “Ngai teh, Bethlehem mi, Jesaia fapa, ṭingṭang tum thiam tak, mi huaisen, indo thiam, thu sawi thiam tak, hmêlṭha tak a awm a, a hnênah Lalpa chu a awm a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:19 Saula chuan Jesaia hnênah mi a tîr a, “I fapa, Davida, berâm vênga awm chu, han kaltîr rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:20 Jesaia chuan sabengtung phur khat chhang leh uain bûr khat leh kêlno, Saula pêk atân a fapa Davida chu a kentîr a." 
1Samuel16:21 Davida chu Saula hnênah chuan a va kal a, a bulah chuan a awm ta a. Saula chuan a lo ngaina hle a, a râlthuam kengtuah a ṭang ta a." 
1Samuel16:22 Saula chuan Jesaia hnênah, “Davida hi ka mit a tlung hle a; chuvângin, ka hnênah awm reng mai rawh se,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
1Samuel16:23 Pathian tirh thlarau sualin Saula chu a man châng apiangin Davida chuan ṭingṭang a la a, a tumsak ṭhîn a, thlarau sual chuan a chhuahsan a, Saula chu a lo harhin a lo ṭha leh ṭhîn." 
1Samuel17:1 Filistia mite chuan indo tûrin an sipaite an khâwm a, Judai ram chhûng Soko khuaah an kal khâwm a. Efes-damim an tih hmun, Soko leh Azeka inkârah chuan ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel17:2 Saula leh Israel mite pawh an inpun khâwm a, Ela ruamah ṭanhmun an khuar a. Filistia mite lo dang tûrin an inzâr darh a." 
1Samuel17:3 Filistia mite chu tlângah an awm a, Israel-te pawh a râl lehlam tlângah an awm bawk a, an inkârah chuan ruam a awm a." 
1Samuel17:4 Filistia mite ṭanhmun aṭang chuan an mi chak Goliatha, Gath khuaa mi hi a lo chhuak a," 
1Samuel17:5 Dâr lukhum a khum a, dâr âwmphaw a ha bawk a, a âwmphaw rih lam chu kg. sawmnga leh pasarih a ni a, tawng ruk leh khâp khata sâng a ni." 
1Samuel17:6 A ngalah chuan dâr ngalphaw a bun a, a dârah dârfei a pai a." 
1Samuel17:7 A fei ngul chu suk tiat a ni a, a fei lu chu kg. sariha rit a ni, a phaw kengtu chu a hmaah a kal a," 
1Samuel17:8 A ding a, Israel sipaiho chu a au va, an hnênah, “Indo tûra inep reng a ṭûl em ni? Kei Filistia mi ka ni a, nangni Saula chhiahhlawh in ni. In zîng ata mi thlang chhuak ula, ka hnênah lo chhuk teh se." 
1Samuel17:9 Min hneha min tihhlum chuan in chhiahhlawh kan ni ang a, keiin ka ngama ka tihhlum chuan kan chhiahhlawh in ni ang a, kan bawihah in awm ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:10 Filistia mi chuan, “Vawiin hian Israel-ho sipaite chu ka cho a ni, mi pakhat han thlang chhuak ula, kan lo inbei ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:11 Saula leh Israel mi zawng zawngin chu Filistia mi thu sawi chu an hriatin an zâm a, an hlau ta êm êm a." 
1Samuel17:12 Davida chu Judai ram Bethlehem khua Efratha mi, Jesaia fapa a ni. Jesaia chuan fapa pariat a nei a, Saula a lo lal khân upa tak, tar tawh tak a ni." 
1Samuel17:13 Jesaia fapa pathumin Saula chu indonaah an zui a. A fapa pathum indonaa kalte chu a upa ber Eliaba te, a dawttu Abinadaba te, a pathumna Sama te an ni." 
1Samuel17:14 Davida chu a naupang ber a ni a, a upa pathumte chuan Saula chu an zui a ni." 
1Samuel17:15 Davida chu Saula hnên aṭangin a pa berâm enkawlin Bethlehem-ah a va kal ṭhîn a. 
1Samuel17:16 Filistia mi chuan ni tin, zîng leh tlaiah, a va pan a, ni sawmli chhûng a va intâr lang ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel17:17 Jesaia chuan a fapa Davida hnênah, “Buhfai kan ro kg. sâwm leh chhang tlâwn sâwm keng la, i ûte riahhmuna awm va pe thuai rawh khai." 
1Samuel17:18 Tin, bâwnghnute khal tlang sâwm hi an pâwla sâng hotu kensak la, i ûte engtin nge an awm han zâwt la, an chanchin han hre ngei ang che." 
1Samuel17:19 Saula leh i ûte chu Israel mi zawng zawng nên Filistia mite beiin Ela ruamah an awm e.” a ti a. 
1Samuel17:20 Davida chu zîng takah a tho va, berâm chu vêngtu pakhat kutah a hnutchhiah a, Jesaia thupêk ang chuan a keng a, a kal ta a. Indona hmun pana chhuak mêk sipaiho chu inbei tûra an lo au dur dur laiin ani chuan riahbûk chu a va thleng a." 
1Samuel17:21 Israel-ho leh Filistia mite chu inbei tûrin an lo inzâr a, sipai leh sipai chu an lo inep ut mai a," 
1Samuel17:22 Davida chuan a thil ken chu bungraw enkawltu hnênah chuan a dah a, sipaiho zîngah chuan a va tlân a, a ûte chu chibai a va bûk a." 
1Samuel17:23 Anni chu a biak laiin, ngai teh, an mi chak Gath khuaa Filistia mi, a hming Goliatha chu Filistia sipaiho zîng aṭang chuan a lo chhuak a, a thu sawi ngai bawk kha a han sawi a. Chu chu Davida chuan a lo hria a." 
1Samuel17:24 Israel mi zawng zawngin chu mi chu an hmuhin an tlânsan a, an hlau êm êm a." 
1Samuel17:25 Israel mite chuan, “Kha pa lo chhuak kha in hmu em? Israel mite cho tûra lo chhuak a nih ngei kha. Tu pawh amah tihlum chu lalin sum tam tak a pe ang a, a fanu a neihtîr bawk ang; tin, a pa chhûngte chuan Israel ramah chhiah an awl ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel17:26 Davida chuan a kianga dingte hnênah chuan, “Israel-te tithlabârtu, he Filistia mi thattu hi eng lâwmman nge an pêk dâwn? Pathian nung sipaiho cho veitu, he serh tan loh Filistia mi hi tu nge maw a nih le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:27 Mite chuan an chhâng a, “A tihlumtu apiang chu kan sawi ang khân tihsak a ni ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel17:28 Tichuan, an u ber Eliaba chuan chutianga mi hnêna a thu sawi chu a lo hriatin Davida chungah a thin a ur ta hle a. “Engah nge i lo chhuk ve? Thlalêra berâm tlêm tê kha tu nge i vêntîr? I luhlul leh chapozia hi, indo en tûrin i lo kal mai mai a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:29 Davida chuan, “Eng dang ti lo ve, thu ka zâwt a ni ve mai alâwm,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:30 Davida chuan mi dang hnên lam a hawisan a, a sawi ngai bawk a sawi leh a, mite chuan a hmaa an chhân ang bawkin an chhâng leh a." 
1Samuel17:31 Davida thu sawi chu an hriatin Saula an hrilh a, ani chuan a ko ta a." 
1Samuel17:32 Davida chuan Saula hnênah chuan, “He pa avâng hian tu mah zâm suh se, i chhiahhlawh hian he Filistia mi hi ka va bei ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:33 Saula chuan Davida hnênah, “He Filistia mi hi bei tûrin i kal thei em lo vang a, i la naupang si a, ani zawng a tleirâwl lai ata indo mi a ni tawh asin,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:34 Davida chuan Saula hnênah, “I chhiahhlawh hian ka pa berâm ka vêng ṭhîn a, sakeibaknei emaw, savawm emaw an lo kala berâm rual zîng ata berâmno an lâk te hian," 
1Samuel17:35 ka ûm ṭhîn a, ka bei a, an sa seh chu ka chhuhsak ṭhîn. Min rawn beih dâwnte hian an baksamah ka man a, ka ṭhuai a, ka that ṭhîn a ni." 
1Samuel17:36 I chhiahhlawh hian sakeibaknei leh savawmte ka that tawh a, he serh tan loh Filistia mi pawh hi chutiang chuan ka sawisa dâwn a ni, Pathian nung sipaite a cho vei a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:37 Tin, Davida chuan, “Sakeibaknei lak ata leh savawm lak ata min chhanchhuaktu Lalpa chuan Filistia mi lak ata chu min chhan chhuak ang,” a ti a. Saula chuan, “Kal ta che le, Lalpan ṭanpui che rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:38 Saula chuan Davida chu ama râlthuam a bel a, dâr lukhum a khumtîr a, âwmphaw a hâktîr bawk a." 
1Samuel17:39 Davida chuan a phaw chungah khandaih a pai a, kal a han tum chhin a; chutiang chuan a la inthuam ngai si lo va. Davida chuan Saula hnênah, “Ka kalpui thei hauh lo mai a, hetiang hi ka la inbel ngai si lo va,” a ti a. Davida chuan a hlîp ta a." 
1Samuel17:40 Tichuan, tiang a la a, luitêa ṭiau lung panga a thlang a, a berâm vên iptêah chuan a ak a, virvawm chu a keng a, Filistia mi chu a pan ta a." 
1Samuel17:41 Filistia mi chu a lo kal a, Davida chu a rawn pan a, a phaw kengtu chu a hmaah a kal zêl a." 
1Samuel17:42 Filistia mi chu a han hawi a, Davida a han hmuh chuan a hmusit hle a; tleirâwl tê, sâr veng vawng a ni a, a zaidam hmêl hle bawk si a." 
1Samuel17:43 Filistia mi chuan Davida hnênah, “Uicho em ka niha, engati nge tiang nêna min rawn pan le?” a ti a. Filistia mi chuan a pathiante chhâlin Davida chu ânchhia a lawh a." 
1Samuel17:44 Filistia mi chuan Davida hnênah, “Lo kal teh, i sate kha chunglêng savate leh ramsate ka han eitîr teh ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:45 Davida chuan Filistia mi hnênah chuan, “Khandaih te, thal te, fei te kengin i lo thawk a; kei zawng Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, i chova hmingin ka lo thawk a ni." 
1Samuel17:46 Vawiinah hian Lalpan nang hi ka kutah min pe a ni; ka that ang che a, i lu ka tansak ang che, Filistia sipai ruangte chu vawiin hian chunglêng savate leh ramsate ka pe ang a; tichuan, mi zawng zawngin Israel-te zîngah Pathian a chêng reng a ni tih an hria ang." 
1Samuel17:47 Indona hneh nân Lalpa chuan khandaih leh fei, hmanruaah a hmang chuang lo tih heta pung khâwm zawng zawngin an hria ang; ani chuan nangniho hi ka kutah min pe dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:48 Filistia mi chu Davida bei tûra a lo kal hnaih lai chuan Davida chu inbeihna hmun lam panin Filistia mi chu tâwk tûrin a tlan vat a. 
1Samuel17:49 Davida chuan a ip a zen a, lung a han phawrh a, a virvawm chuan a han vawm a, Filistia mi chu a chaldârah tak a fuh a, lung chu a chalah a lût a, bawkkhupin a tlu ta dêr a." 
1Samuel17:50 Davida chuan Filistia mi chu virvawm leh lungin a bei a, Filistia mi chu a vawm a, a that ta a. Davida chuan khandaih a keng lo." 
1Samuel17:51 Davida chu a tlân a, Filistia mi kiangah chuan a va ding a, a khandaih chu a pai ata a phawisak a, a lu a tansak ta a. Filistia mite chuan an mi chak a thi tih an hriat chuan an tlânchhe ta a."
