1Samuel17:52 Israel mite leh Juda mite erawh chu an tho va, an au va, Filistia mite chu Gath leh Ekron kulh kawngkhâr thleng rawkin an ûm ta a. Filistia mi, hliam tuarte chu Saraim aṭanga Gath leh Ekron thlengin kawng tluanin an tlu rum a." 
1Samuel17:53 Israel mite chuan Filistia mite an ûm chu an kîrsan a, an riahhmun chu an suam a." 
1Samuel17:54 Davida chuan Filistia mi lu chu a la a, Jerusalem-ah a kalpui a, a râlthuam erawh chu a puan inah a dah a." 
1Samuel17:55 Filistia mi bei tûra Davida a kal lai chu Saulan a lo hmu a, a sipaihotu Abnera hnênah, “Abner, he tlangvâl hi tu fa nge?” a ti a. Abnera chuan, “Aw lalber, ka lo hre hauh lo mai a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:56 Lal chuan, “He naupang hi tu fa nge a nih zâwt chhuak rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:57 Davida chuan Filistia mi a that haw chu Abnera chuan a hruai a, Filistia mi lu keng chungin Saula hnênah a kalpui a." 
1Samuel17:58 Saula chuan a hnênah, “Tlangvâl, tu fapa nge i nih?” a ti a. Davida chuan a chhâng a, “I chhiahhlawh Jesaia, Bethlehem mi fapa ka ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:1 Davidan Saula a biak hnu chuan Jonathana leh Davida chu an inngaina ta hle a. Jonathana chuan amah tlukin ani chu a hmangaih a. 
1Samuel18:2 Chumi ni aṭang chuan Saula chuan a hnênah a awmtîr a, a pa hnênah a hawntîr phal ta lo va." 
1Samuel18:3 Jonathana chuan amah ang chiaha a hmangaih avângin Davida nên chuan thu an thlung ta a. 
1Samuel18:4 Jonathana chuan a thuam inbel lai a hlîp a, Davida a pe a, a âwmphaw te, a ngûnhnâm te, a thal te, a kâwnghrên te nên lam a pe a." 
1Samuel18:5 Davida chu Saulan a tirhna lam apiangah a kal a, a hlawhtlin zêl avângin a sipaihotu pakhatah a dah a. Chu chu mi zawng zawng ngaihah leh Saula sipaihote ngaihah pawh tih âwm tak a ni rêng a." 
1Samuel18:6 Davidan Filistia mi a thah hnu khân an lo haw a, Israel khawpui tin aṭangin hmeichheho hla saa lâm chungin, benchhek leh perhkhuang tumin hlim takin Saula hmuak tûrin an lo chhuak a." 
1Samuel18:7 Hmeichhiate chuan lâm chungin hlain an inchhâwn a, “Saulan sâng tam tak a that a, Davidan sîng tam tak a that,” an ti a." 
1Samuel18:8 An hla sak chuan Saula chu a tithinur ta hle a, “Davida chu sîng thattu an ti a, kei sâng chauh thattu min ti a, hetiang a nih chuan ka ram hi a chang mai dâwn alâwm,” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:9 Tichuan, chumi ni aṭang chuan Saula chuan Davida chu a îtsîk ta hle a." 
1Samuel18:10 A tûkah chuan Pathian tirh thlarau sualin ina Saula awm chu a man ta a, a ṭawng ta bual bual a. Davida chuan ni dang ang bawkin ṭingṭang a tum a, Saula chuan a fei chu a hûm reng a." 
1Samuel18:11 Saula chuan a fei a lek a, “Bangah sâwn Davida hi ka khawh bet tlat teh ang,” a ti a. Davida chu ṭum hnih a kiang hman a." 
1Samuel18:12 Lalpa chu Davida hnênah a awm avângin Saulan a hlau ta hle a, ani lah chu Lalpan a kalsan tawh si a." 
1Samuel18:13 Tichuan, Saula chuan ani chu a sawn bo va, a sipai sâng chunga hotu-ah a dah a, sipai zîngah Davida chu a khawsa ta a." 
1Samuel18:14 Lalpan a awmpui zêl avângin Davida chu a thiltih apiangah a hmuingîl zêl a. 
1Samuel18:15 Saulan chu chu a hriatin a hlau lehzual a. 
1Samuel18:16 Israel mite leh Juda mite erawh chuan a thil tih apiangah a kaihhruai zêl ṭhin avângin Davida chu an ngaina hle a. 
1Samuel18:17 Saula chuan Davida hnênah, “Ka fanu upa zâwk Merabi hi nupui atân ka pe ang che, huaisen takin min ṭan la, Lalpa tân bei zêl ang che,” a ti a. Saula chuan, “Ka kut tuar lovin Filistia mite kut tuar zâwk rawh se,” a ti rilru a ni." 
1Samuel18:18 Davida chuan Saula hnênah, “Tu nge maw ka niha, Israel rama ka pa chhûngte pawh eng mi nge an niha lal mâkpa ka han nihna tûr chu le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:19 Saula fanu Merabi chu Davida neihtîr a lo hun chuan Meholat mi Adriela nupui atân a pe ta thên a. 
1Samuel18:20 Saula fanu Mikali chuan Davida chu a hmangaih hle a. Saula an hrilh a, chu thu chuan a tilâwm hle a." 
1Samuel18:21 Saula chuan, “A awhna thang atân leh Filistia mite kut a tuar theih nân ani hi ka pe teh ang,” a ti a. Saula chuan Davida hnênah “Tûnah chuan ka mâkpa i ni tawh ang,” a ti leh a." 
1Samuel18:22 Saula chuan a chhiahhlawh a tîr a, “Davida chu a rûk têin bia ula, lal hi i chungah a lâwm hle a, a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng pawhin an ngaina che a, tûnah chuan lal mâkpa i ni tawh ngei ang,” tiin a hrilhtîr a." 
1Samuel18:23 Davida chuan, “Mi rethei leh tu ma ngaihsân hlawh lo, keini ang tâna lal mâkpa han nih chu tih rual em ni ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:24 Saula chhiahhlawhte chuan Davida chhân dân chu an hrilh a. 
1Samuel18:25 Saula chuan, “Davida hnênah hetiangin sawi rawh u, ‘Lal chuan a hmêlma phuba lâk nân Filistia mite serh vun za tih loh chu a fanu man atân eng mah a la duh lo’ ti rawh u,” a ti a. Saula chuan Filistia mite kuta thihtîr a tum tlat a ni." 
1Samuel18:26 A chhiahhlawhten chu thu chu Davida an han hrilh chuan lal mâkpa a ni tûr chu a lâwm hle a. Hun tiam chu a la thleng rih lo. 
1Samuel18:27 Davida chu a mite nên an vâk chhuak ta a, Filistia mi zahnih an va that a, an serh vunte chu Davida te chuan an rawn hâwn a; tin, lal mâkpa a nih theihna tûr chuan kim takin an pe ta a. Saula chuan a fanu Mikali chu nupuiah a neihtîr ta a." 
1Samuel18:28 Saula chuan Davida hnênah Lalpa chu a awm reng tih a hre chiang ta a, a fanu Mikali chuan Davida chu a duh hle a." 
1Samuel18:29 Saula chuan Davida chu a hlau ta tawlh tawlh a, a dam chhûng zawngin Saula chu Davida hmêlma a ni ta reng a." 
1Samuel18:30 Filistia sipaiten an rawn beih châng apiangin Davida chu Saula sipai hotute aiin a che ṭhain a hlawhtling ṭhîn a, a hming chu a lo thang ta hle a." 
1Samuel19:1 Saula chuan a fapa Jonathana leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng chu Davida that tûrin a ti a. Nimahsela, Saula fapa Jonathana chuan Davida chu a hmangaih hle a." 
1Samuel19:2 Jonathana chuan Davida hnênah, “Ka pa hian thah a tum che a; chuvângin, naktûk zîngah chuan fîmkhur la, hmun fianrialah biru la; tah chuan awm rêng ang che." 
1Samuel19:3 Tin, ka pa chu ka hruai chhuak ang a, i bihrûkna lam phûlah kan lo kal ang a, i chungchâng ka sawipui ang a, kan inbiak dân chu ka hrilh leh ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:4 Jonathana chuan a pa Saula kiangah chuan Davida chu a va fak a, a hnênah, “lalber, i chhiahhlawh Davida chungah chuan thil sual ti lul suh. I chungah eng mah a tisual lo va, i tân thil ṭha hlîr a ti zâwk ṭhîn asin." 
1Samuel19:5 Thih huamin Filistia mi kha a bei a, Israel mi zawng zawng tân Lalpan hnehna a siamsak a; chu chu nang pawhin i hmu a, i lâwm hle kha. Eng vângin nge pawi khawih awm lova Davida chu i thah mai ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:6 Saula chuan Jonathana thu sawi chu a pawm a, “Davida chu ka that lo vang,” tiin Lalpa hming chhâlin thu a tiam a." 
1Samuel19:7 Jonathana chuan Davida chu a ko va, chûng thil zawng zawng chu a hrilh a. Tichuan, Davida chu Saula hnênah a hruai a, tûn hma ang khân a hnênah a awm leh ta a." 
1Samuel19:8 Indona a lo awm leh a, Davida chu a thawk chhuak a, Filistia mite chu a va bei a, a that chiam a, a hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ta vek a." 
1Samuel19:9 Saula chu ama fei kenga a ṭhut laiin Lalpa tirh thlarau sual a chungah a lo thleng leh a; chutih lai chuan Davida chuan ṭingṭang a tum a. 
1Samuel19:10 Saula chuan Davida chu bangah feia khawh beh tlat a tum a; mahse, Davida chu a kiang hman a, fei chu bangah chuan a khawh bûr ta ngur a. Davida chu a tlân chhuak a, a him ta a." 
1Samuel19:11 Saula chuan Davida chu a ina va huala, a tûk zînga that tûrin mi a tîr a. Davida nupui Mikali chuan, “Zânina i tlân chhuah loh chuan naktûkah an that dâwn che a ni,” tiin a hrilh a." 
1Samuel19:12 Tichuan, Mikali chuan Davida chu tukverhah a thlâk thla a, a tlân chhuak a, a him ta a." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikali chuan milem a la a, khumah a zalh a, a lû lamah kêl hmul lukham a dah a, puanin a khuh ta a." 
1Samuel19:14 Davida hruai tûra Saula mi tirhte hnênah chuan, “A dam lo a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:15 Saula chuan Davida va en tûrin mi a tîr leh a, “A khum chawpin han zâwn ula, ka lo that ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:16 Mi tirhte chu an va luh chuan, ngai teh, milem chu a lu lama kêl hmul lukhamin a lo mu a." 
1Samuel19:17 Saulan Mikali hnênah, “Engtizia nge hetianga mi buma, ka hmêlma chu i tlân chhuahtîr le?” a ti a. Mikali chuan, “Ka kaltîr loh chuan mi thah a tum si alâwm,” tiin Saula chu a chhâng a." 
1Samuel19:18 Davida chu a tlânchhia a, a him ta a. Rama khuaah Samuela hnênah a va kal a, a chunga Saula thil tih dân zawng zawng chu a hrilh a. Tin, Samuela nên chuan Naioth-ah an kal a, tah chuan an awm ta a." 
1Samuel19:19 Saula hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, Davida chu Rama khuaa Naioth-ah a awm,” tiin an hrilh a." 
1Samuel19:20 Saula chuan Davida man tûrin mi a tîr a. Zâwlnei rual thu sawi dual dual Samuelan a hruai lai chu an va hmu a, Saula mi tirhte pawh chuan thu an sawi ve ta a." 
1Samuel19:21 Chu thu chu Saula an hrilh a, mi dang a tîr leh a, chung mite pawh chuan thu an sawi ve leh ta a." 
1Samuel19:22 Ani pawh chu Rama khaw lamah chuan a kal ve ta a; Seku hmuna tuichhunchhuah lian tak a va thlen chuan, “Samuela leh Davida hi khawiah nge an awm?” a ti a. Mi pakhat hian, “Ngai teh, Rama khuaa Naioth-ah an awm,” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:23 Tichuan, Naioth-ah chuan a va kal a, Pathian thlarau a chungah a lo thleng ve ta a, Rama khuaa Naioth a thlen thlengin thu a sawi ve ta a." 
1Samuel19:24 A silhfênte a hlîp a, Samuela hmaah chuan thu a sawi ve ta a. Chumi ni chuan nilêng leh zankhuain saruakin a awm a; chuta ṭang chuan, “Saula pawh zâwlnei a ni ve ta elo?” tih hi an chîng hlen ta a ni." 
1Samuel20:1 Davida chu Rama khuaa Naioth aṭang chuan a tlân chhuak a, Jonathana hnênah a kal a, “Eng nge ka tih a, eng nge ka bawhchhiat le? I pa chungah eng nge ka tihsuala hetia mi thah a tum mai le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:2 Ani chuan, “A that tawp lo vang che, i thi hauh lo vang. Ngai teh, ka pa chuan thil lian emaw, thil tê emaw min hrilh lovin eng mah a ti ngai lo. Engah tehlul nge hêng thu hi ka hnênah a zêp ang? A zêp hauh lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:3 Davida chuan, “Nangin min hmangaihzia hi i pa chuan a hre chiang hle a; chuvângin, i rilru tihnat a hlauh avângin ‘He ka thiltih tum hi chu hre suh se,’ a ti a ni ang. Nimahsela, Lalpa nunna leh i nunna chhâlin ka hrilh a che, tlêmah tlêmah ka thi lo chauh a ni,” tiin a chhâng a." 
1Samuel20:4 Jonathana chuan Davida hnênah, “I duh apiang chu ka tihsak zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:5 Davida chuan Jonathana hnênah, “Ngai teh, naktûk hi thla thar tûk a ni dâwn a, lal hnêna chaw kîl ngei tûr ka ni a; mahse, ni thum ni tlai lam thlengin phûlah biru tûrin ka kal ang a." 
1Samuel20:6 Tin, i pain ka awm lo a ni tih a hre ta a nih chuan, ‘Davida chuan an khua Bethlehem-ah an chhûngkuaa an kum tin thilhlan hlân tûrin kal min dîl ngawih ngawih a, a kal ta a ni,’ ti la;" 
1Samuel20:7 ani, a ṭha alâwm a tih chuan i chhiahhlawha tân a muanawm ang a, a thinrim erawh chuan ka chungah thil ṭha lo tih a tum tih hria ang che." 
1Samuel20:8 I chhiahhlawh hi khawngaih rawh, Lalpa hmaah thu i thlunpui si a; ka lo bawhchhia a nih chuan nangman min that mai rawh; engah nge i pa hnênah chuan min hlan kher ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:9 Jonathana chuan, “Chutiang chu ring rêng rêng suh, ka pain i chungah thil ṭha lo tih a tum ka hriat phawt chuan ka hrilh loh che i ring em ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:10 Davida chuan Jonathana hnênah, “I pain bung takin a chhâng che tih tuin nge min hrilh ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathana chuan Davida hnênah, “Hawh teh, phûlah sâwn i kal teh ang,” a ti a. Tichuan, phûlah chuan an va kal ta a." 
1Samuel20:12 Jonathana chuan Davida hnênah, “Israel-te Pathian Lalpa chu thuhretu ni rawh se, naktûk hetih hunah hian emaw, a tûk lehah emaw, ka pa ka han dâwp vêl ang a, i chungchâng ṭha taka a sawi chuan mi ka rawn tîr ang a, ka rawn hrilh ngei ngei ang che." 
1Samuel20:13 Ka pain i chungah thil ṭha lo tih a tum tih ka hriata, ka rawn hrilh lo che a nih phawt chuan Lalpa chuan a tih tihin min ti sela, chutiang thil ṭha lo chu ka chungah ti ve rawh se. Him taka i awm theihna kawng ka zawnsak ngei ngei ang che. Lalpa chu ka pa hnêna a awm ṭhîn angin i hnênah pawh awm zêl rawh se." 
1Samuel20:14 Ka damchhûng zawng Lalpa angin ka chungah ngilneihna tilang zêl la; 
1Samuel20:15 ka thiha Lalpan Davida hmêlmate lei ata a tibo vek a nih pawhin, ka chhûngte chu i lo khawngaih kumkhua dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:16 Jonathana chuan Davida chhûngte tân pawh thu a thlung tel a, “ Lalpa chuan tu pawh Davida chunga thil sual ti chu hrem zêl rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:17 Jonathana chuan amah a inhmangaih angin Davida chu a hmangaih a, chutianga amah chu hmangaih ve tûrin Davida chu a tiamtîr a." 
1Samuel20:18 Jonathana chuan a hnênah, “Naktûk hi thla thar a ni a, i ṭhut hmun a ruah dâwn avângin i awm loh a lang ngei ang." 
1Samuel20:19 Naktûk tûklehah chuan hmâna i bihrûkna hmunah khân biru leh la, lungpui phênah khân awm reng ang che." 
1Samuel20:20 Inthemthiam ni âwm takin a sîrah thal pathum ka rawn kâp ang a. 
1Samuel20:21 Tin, ‘Kal la, thal va chhar rawh,’ tiin naupang ka rawn tîr ang a; naupang hnênah, ‘En teh, thal chu i sîrah khân a awm; kal la, la rawh’ ka tih chuan i tân a muanawm a, hlauh tûr a awm lo tih Lalpa chhâlin ka sawi a ni." 
1Samuel20:22 Amaherawhchu, naupang hnênah, ‘En teh, thalte chu i piah lamah sâwn a awm’ ka tih chuan kal bo vang che, Lalpa chuan a kal botîr che a ni ang." 
1Samuel20:23 Tin, nang nêna kan sawi dun tâk chungchângah chuan Lalpa chu thuhretu ni kumkhua rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:24 Tichuan, Davida chu phûlah chuan a biru a, thla a lo thar chuan lal chuan chawhlui a rawn kîl a." 
1Samuel20:25 Lal chu ni danga a ṭhutna ngai bang bulah chuan a ṭhu a, Jonathana chu a hma zâwnah a ṭhu a. Abnera chu Saula kiangah a ṭhu a, Davida ṭhuthmun erawh chu a ruak a." 
1Samuel20:26 Chumi ni chuan Saula chuan eng mah a sawi rih lo. ‘Eng emaw thiam lohna a nei a ni ang a’ a ti rilru a. 
1Samuel20:27 Thla thar ni hnih ni chuan Davida ṭhuthmun a la ruak ta cheu va. Saula chuan a fapa Jonathana hnênah, “Engati nge Jesaia fapa Davida hi niminah leh vawiinah chawhlui kîl tûra a lo kal loh?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathana chuan Saula chu a chhâng a, “Davida chuan Bethlehem-a kal mi dîl ngawih ngawih a," 
1Samuel20:29 ‘Min kaltîr hrâm rawh, khuaah chuan kan chhûngkuain inthawina kan hlân dâwn a, ka unaupain chuta awm ve ngei tûr chuan min ti si a; chuvângin, min khawngaih la, min kaltîr hrâm rawh, ka unaute ka va tlawh ang e,’ a ti a; chuvângin, lal chaw kîl tûrin a lo kal lo a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:30 Saula chu Jonathana chungah chuan a thinur ta thut a, “Nang hmeichhe lepchiah leh luhlul fapa, i mualpho nân i nu a hringtu che tizak tûrin Jesaia fapa hi i ṭan tih ka hre chiang a ni." 
1Samuel20:31 Jesaia fapa hi a dam chhûng chuan nang leh kan ram hi a ding chhuak dâwn lo tih hre ta che; tûnah, mi kohtîr la, ka hnênah han hruai rawh, a thi ngei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:32 “Eng vânga thi tûr nge a nih, eng nge a tihsual?” tiin Jonathana chuan a pa chu a chhâng a." 
1Samuel20:33 Tichuan, Saula chuan khawh hlum tumin a tin a, a pa chuan Davida chu thah a lo tum ngei a ni tih a hre ta a." 
1Samuel20:34 Jonathana chuan thinur takin a chaw kil chu a thawhsan a, chumi thla thar ni hnih ni chuan chaw chu a ei duh ta lo, a pain Davida a tihmualpho nasat êm avângin a rilru a na hle a." 
1Samuel20:35 A tûkah chuan Jonathana chu naupang hruaiin phûl lamah Davida nêna an hmun ruatah chuan a kal ta a. 
1Samuel20:36 A naupang hruai hnênah, “Tlân la, ka thal kahte kha va zawng rawh,” a ti a. Naupang tlân lai chuan a piah lamah thal a kâp leh a," 
1Samuel20:37 Naupangin Jonathana thal kahna hmun a va thlen chuan Jonathanan naupang chu a au va, “Thal chu i piah lamah khân a awm lo maw?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:38 Jonathana chuan naupang chu a au va, “Hmanhmawh la, kal thuai thuai la, muang suh,” a ti a. Jonathana hruai naupang chuan thalte chu a va chhar a, a pu hnênah chuan a rawn la a." 
1Samuel20:39 Naupang chuan eng mah a hre lo va, Jonathana leh Davida erawh chuan thil kalhmang chu an hria a." 
1Samuel20:40 Jonathana chuan naupang hnênah a thalte chu a pe a, “Kal ta la, khuaah hâwnpui rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:41 Naupang chu a kal liam veleh Davida chu a bihrûkna lung phên aṭang chuan a lo chhuak a, bawkkhupin vawi thum chibai a rawn bûk a; tin, an infâwp a, an ṭap dûn ta a. Davida chu a lung a chhe lehzual a." 
1Samuel20:42 Jonathana chuan Davida hnênah, “Thlamuang takin kal rawh aw, nang nêna kan inṭhianna chu Lalpa hminga thu kan thlun tawh kha. Lalpa chu nang nêna kan inkârah te, i thlahte leh ka thlahte inkârah te, thuhretu ni kumkhua rawh se,” a ti a. Davida chu a tho va, a kal ta a, Jonathana pawh khuaah a haw ta a." 
1Samuel21:1 Davida chu Nob khaw puithiam Ahimeleka hnênah a kal a. Ahimeleka chuan khûr chungin Davida chu a lo hmuak a, a hnênah, “Engtizia nge tu mah hruai lova i lo kal le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:2 Davida chuan puithiam Ahimeleka hnênah chuan, “Lalin tih tûr min tuk a, ka hnênah, ‘Ka tirhna che leh tih tûr ka tuk che hi tu mah hrilh suh,’ a ti tlat a. Tlangvâlte nên kan thiltih tûr leh kan tihna hmun tûr kan ruat diam a." 
1Samuel21:3 Tûnah, engte nge i neih le? Chhang tlang nga min pe la, thil dang i neih apiang pawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:4 Puithiam chuan Davida chu a chhâng a. “Chhang panga chu ka nei lo va, chhang thianghlim chauh ka nei; tlangvâlte chu hmeichhe lakah an thianghlim emaw chu?” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:5 Davida chuan, puithiam chu a chhâng a, “Kan rammut dâwn apiangin tlangvâlho chu hmeichhe lakah an intibawlhhlawh ngai lo; tûnah lek phei hi chuan an intihbawlhhlawh loh tûrzia mai chu,” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:6 Tichuan, puithiam chuan chhang thianghlim chu a pe ta a, chutah chuan Pathian hnêna an hlan chauh lo chu chhang dang a awm si lo va; Lalpa hnêna an hlan chhang hlui chu ni tin chhang tharin an thlâk ṭhîn a ni." 
1Samuel21:7 Chumi ni chuan Saula chhiahhlawh pakhat a awm ve a, ani chu Lalpa hnêna thutiam nei lai mêk a ni. A hming chu Doega a ni: Edom mi, Saula ran rual veng hotu ber a ni." 
1Samuel21:8 Davida chuan Ahimeleka hnênah, “Fei emaw, khandaih emaw i kawl lo maw? Lalin hmanhmawh taka min tirh avângin ka khandaih leh ka hriamhrei, a eng mah ka rawn keng hman ta lo va ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:9 Puithiam chuan, “Filistia mi, Ela ruama i thaha khandaih chu en teh, puithiam kawr phênah hian tuamin a awm reng mai. Chu chu i duh chuan la rawh, chu lo chu hetah eng mah dang a awm lo,” a ti a. Davida chuan, “Chu lo liam, min pe mai rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:10 Tichuan, Davida chu a tho va, chumi ni chuan Saula hlauvin a tlân bo va, Gath lal Akisa hnênah a kal ta a." 
1Samuel21:11 Akisa chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “He mi hi an ram lal Davida kha a ni lâwm ni? ‘Saulan sâng tam tak a that a, Davidan sîng tam tak’ tia lâm chunga hlaa an awih kha a ni lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
1Samuel21:12 Hêng thu avâng hian Davida chu a râlṭi ta a, Gath lal Akisa chu a hlau hle a." 
1Samuel21:13 Chuvângin, an mit hmuhah a awm dân a tidanglam a, an hmaah a â der ta chiam a. Kawngkhârte a ham vak vak a, a chilthli chu a khabehmulahte a luang duah duah a." 
1Samuel21:14 Akisa chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah, “En teh u, he mi hi mi â a nih hre reng chungin engati nge ka hnêna in rawn hruai?" 
1Samuel21:15 Mi â tlachham min tih vâng em ni he mi hi ka hmaah âtso tûra in rawn hruai? He mi hi ka inah a lo lût ang maw?” a ti a. 
1Samuel22:1 Chuta ṭang chuan Davida chu a chhuak a, Adulam pûkah a awm ta a. A unaute leh a pa chhûngten chu chu an hriatin an zu fin ve ta a." 
1Samuel22:2 Hnehchhiah tuar te, lei bat nei te, lungawi lote chuan an rawn bêl a, an hotu-ah a ṭang ta a. Tichuan, mi zali lai a hnênah chuan an awm ta a." 
1Samuel22:3 Chuta ṭang chuan Davida chu Moab rama Mizpa-ah a kal a, Moab lal hnênah chuan, “Pathianin eng nge min tihsak dâwn tih ka hriat hma chuan ka nu leh ka pate hi i hnênah lo awm rawh se aw,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:4 Tichuan, anni chu Moab lal hnênah chuan a hnutchhiah a, pûk hima Davida a awm chhûng chu chutah chuan an awm a." 
1Samuel22:5 Zâwlnei Gada chuan Davida hnênah, “Pûkah hi chuan awm reng suh; chhuak la, Judai ramah kal rawh,” a ti a. Davida chu a chhuak a, Heret ngâwah a lût ta a." 
1Samuel22:6 Saula chuan Davida awmna an hre ta tih a lo hria a. Chutih lai chuan Saula chu Gibea khuaah a awm a, tlâng panga Esel thing hnuaiah a fei kengin a ṭhu a, a ṭhuihruai zawng zawng chu a kiangah an ding a." 
1Samuel22:7 Saula chuan a kianga ding a ṭhuihruaite hnênah chuan, “Nangni Benjamin mite u, ngaithla rawh u. Jesaia fapa chuan lo te, grep huante pe che uin za hotu-ah te, sâng hotu-ah te a siam vêk dâwn che u em ni?" 
1Samuel22:8 In vaiin min phiar a ni lâwm ni? Ka fapain Jesaia fapa thu a thlunpui thu tu mahin min hrilh lo va, tu mahin pawi min tihpui hek lo. Ka fapain ka chhiahhlawh Davida hi mi do tûr leh vawiinah pawh min châng ru tûrin a fuih thu hi tu mahin in sawi duh si lo va,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:9 Edom mi, Doega, Saula chhiahhlawh zînga ding ve chuan a chhâng a: “Jesaia fapa chu Nob khuaah, Ahituba fapa Ahimeleka hnêna a lo kal ka hmu a." 
1Samuel22:10 Tin, ani chuan Lalpa a râwnsak a, ei tûr a pe a, Filistia mi Goliatha ngûnhnâm a pe bawk a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:11 Lal chuan puithiam Ahimeleka, Ahituba fapa leh a pa chhûngkua, Nob khuaa puithiam zawng zawng chu a kohtîr a," 
1Samuel22:12 Saula chuan, “Ahituba fapa tûnah ngaithla rawh,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Eng nge ni ka pu?” tiin a chhang a." 
1Samuel22:13 Saula chuan a hnênah, “Engati nge nang leh Jesaia fapa hian min phiar le? Chhang leh khandaih i pe a. Pathian i râwnsak a; chuvângin, min do va, vawiinah hetiangin min châng ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleka chuan lal chu a chhâng a, “Lal mâkpa, vêngtu hotu, in chhûngkaw chawimawitu leh i chhiahhlawhte zînga mi rinawm ber Davida ang hi tu nge awm?" 
1Samuel22:15 Vawiin hi Pathian ka râwnsak ni hmasa ber em ni? A ni lo, lal chuan a chhiahhlawh hi ka pa chhûngte nên nangmah phiarruah min puh lo hrâm rawh. I chhiahhlawh hian hêng thil hi a eng mah ka hre lo tak meuh a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:16 Lal chuan, “Ahimelek, i thi ngei tûr a ni, nang leh i pa chhûngte zawng zawng nên,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:17 Tin, lal chuan a kianga vêngtu sipai dingte hnênah chuan, “Kal ula, Lalpa puithiamte hi that rawh u; Davida lamah an ṭang a, a tlân bo tih hre reng sia ka hnêna an sawi loh avângin,” a ti a. Nimahsela, vêngtu sipaite chuan Lalpa puithiamte chungah kut an thlâk duh lo va." 
1Samuel22:18 Lal chuan Doega hnênah, “Kal la, puithiamte chu va that rawh,” a ti a. Edom mi Doega chu a kal a, puithiamte chu a va bei a, chumi ni chuan puithiam kawr ha chin sawmriat leh panga a that a." 
1Samuel22:19 Tichuan, puithiam khua Nob chu khandaihin a bei a, a hmei a pa, naupang hnute hne lai lamin, bâwng te, sabengtung te, berâm te nên lam khandaihin a sât hlum a." 
1Samuel22:20 Ahimeleka fate zînga Ahitupa fapa, Abiathara chu a tlân chhuak a, Davida hnênah a tlan ta a." 
1Samuel22:21 Abiathara chuan Lalpa puithiamte Saulan a thah thu chu Davida a hrilh a. 
1Samuel22:22 Davida chuan Abiathara hnênah, “Khami nia Doega ka hmuh khân, Saula a hrilh ang tih ka ring rêng a ni. I pa chhûngte zawng zawng chu keimah avânga thi an ni." 
1Samuel22:23 Ka hnênah awm la, hlau suh, mi thah tumtu chuan nang pawh thah a tum che a ni, ka hnêna i awm chuan i him ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:1 “Filistia miten Keila khua an bei a, hruihzâwla an buhte an lâksak vek mai,” tiin Davida chu an rawn hrilh a." 
1Samuel23:2 Ani chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Hêng Filistia mite hi ka zuk bei ang em?” tiin a zâwt a. Lalpa chuan, “Kal la, Filistia mite chu bei la, Keila khua chu chhan chhuak rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:3 Davida mite chuan a hnênah, “Judai ram aṭang pawhin kan hlau a ni a, Keila khuaa zuk kala, Filistia sipaiho zuk beih chu a va hlauhawm lehzual âwm ve?” an ti a." 
1Samuel23:4 Davida chuan Lalpa chu a râwn leh a, Lalpa chuan a chhâng a, a hnênah, “Keila khuaah chuan chhuk rawh, Filistia mite chu i kutah ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:5 Davida leh a mite chu Keila khuaah chuan an kal ta a, Filistia mite chu an zuk bei a, an rante an lâksak a, an that chiam a; chutiang chuan Keila khuaa mite chu Davida chuan a chhan ta a." 
1Samuel23:6 Ahimeleka fapa Abiathara chu Keila khuaa Davida hnênah chuan puithiam kawr kengin a tlân a. 
1Samuel23:7 Tin, Keila khuaah Davida a kal tih Saula an hrilh a, Saula chuan, “Pathianin ka kutah min pe ta a nih chu; kulh kawngka kalhna nei khuaah amah a inkhung ta si a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:8 Saula chuan mi zawng zawng, Keila khua zuk beia Davida leh a hote hual tûrin a ko khâwm a." 
1Samuel23:9 Saulan beih a tum tih Davida chuan a lo hria a, puithiam Abiathara hnênah, “Puithiam kawr kha han la teh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:10 Davida chuan, “Aw Lalpa Israel-te Pathian, Saula chuan kei i chhiahhlawh avâng hian Keila khuaa lo kala, rawn tihchhiat vek a tum tih ka lo hria a." 
1Samuel23:11 Keila khuaa mite hian a kutah min pe dâwn em? I chhiahhlawhin ka lo hriat ang hian Saula chu a lo chhuk dâwn em? Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, hei hi min hrilh teh,” a ti a. Lalpa chuan, “Lo kal a tum,” tiin a chhâng a." 
1Samuel23:12 Davida chuan a zâwt leh a, “Keila mite hian kei leh ka hote hi Saula kutah min pe ang em?” a ti a. Lalpa chuan, “An pe dâwn che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:13 Davida leh a hote, mi zaruk emaw lai chu an tho va, Keila khua ata chu a remchânna lai apiangah an chhuak ta a. Davida chu Keila khua ata a tlân chhuak ta tih Saulan a hriat chuan Keila khuaa kal chu a tum ta lo va." 
1Samuel23:14 Davida chu Zif tlângram thlalêrah chuan a rawl a, a awm ta reng a. Saula chuan ni tin a zawng a; Pathianin a kutah a pe lo va." 
1Samuel23:15 Davida chu Zif thlalêr Hores hmuna a awm lai chuan amah thah tumin Saula a lo thawk tih a hria a. 
1Samuel23:16 Saula fapa Jonathana chu a lo thawk a, Davida hnênah Hores-ah chuan a lo kal a. “Pathianin a vêng zêl dâwn che a ni,” a rawn ti a." 
1Samuel23:17 A hnênah chuan, “Hlau rêng rêng suh, ka pa Saula chuan i chungah kut a thlâk lo vang. Israel lalah i ṭang ang a, kei i dawttu ka ni ang, ka pa pawhin chu chu a hria a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:18 An pahnih chuan Lalpa hmaah thu an thlung a, Jonathana chu in lamah a hâwng a, Davida erawh chu ramhnuaiah a awm ta reng a." 
1Samuel23:19 Zif mite chuan Gibea khuaah Saula chu an han hmu a, a hnênah, “Davida chu Hakila tlângram, Jesimon chhim lam Hores hmunah kan bul maiah a awm reng alâwm." 
1Samuel23:20 Tûnah, aw lalpa, lo chhuk la, i duhthusâm ang takin ani chu lal kutah kan lo hlân mai tûr alâwm,” an ti a." 
1Samuel23:21 Saula chuan, “Mi in ṭanpui ṭhin avângin Lalpa chuan mal sâwm che u rawh se." 
1Samuel23:22 Kal ta ula, va hre chiang lehzual rawh u. Khawi lamah nge a kal ṭhina, tu nge chutah chuan hmu ṭhîn va zawng chhuak rawh u, mi bum a thiam hle tih ka hre si a." 
1Samuel23:23 A bihrûkna ṭhinte zawng chhuak vek ula; tichuan, engkim hre chiangin ka hnênah lo kîr leh ang che u. Tin, in rualin ka lo kal ve ang a, chu lai rama a la awm phawt chuan Juda hnam tam tak zîng aṭangin ani chu ka man chhuak ngei ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:24 Tichuan, an tho va, Saula kal hmain Zif-ah chuan an kal a, Davida leh a mite chu Jesimon chhim Araba rama Maon thlalêrah chuan an awm a." 
1Samuel23:25 Saula leh a mite chuan an zawng ṭan ta a, chu thu chu Davida an hrilh a; tichuan, Maon thlalêr lungpui hmunah a chhuk a, chutah chuan a awm ta reng a. Chu chu Saulan a lo hriat chuan Maon thlalêr lamah Davida chu a ûm ta a." 
1Samuel23:26 Saula chuan tlâng pang lehlam kawngṭum a zawh a, Davida leh a hote chu chu tlâng pang lehlam kawngah Saula hlauvin hmanhmawh takin an kal a. Saula leh a hote chuan Davida leh a hote chu an man teuh hle tawh a." 
1Samuel23:27 Zualko pakhat hi Saula hnênah a lo kal a, “Rang takin lo haw rawh, Filistia miten ram an rûn e,” a rawn ti a." 
1Samuel23:28 Saulan Davida a ûm chu a kîr a, Filistia mite bei tûrin a kal ta a. Chuvângin, he hmun hi Sela-hamalekot an ti ta a." 
1Samuel23:29 Chuta ṭang chuan a chho va, Engedi hmunah a biru ta a." 
1Samuel24:1 Saulan Filistia mite a ûm chu a lo haw chuan, “Ngai teh, Davida chu Engedi thlalêrah a awm e,” tiin an hrilh a." 
1Samuel24:2 Saula chuan Israel mi sângthum a thlan chhuahte nên chuan sathâr chênna lungpui hmuna Davida leh a hote awm chu a zawng ta a. 
1Samuel24:3 An kalna kawng sirah chuan berâm huang a lo awm a. Chutah chuan pûk a awm, Saula chu inthiar tûrin a va lût a, Davida leh a hote chu pûk chhûngril lamah chuan an lo awm reng a." 
1Samuel24:4 Davida hote chuan, “ Lalpan i hnêna a sawi, ‘Ngai teh, i hmêlma chu i kutah ka pe ang che, a chungah ṭha i tih angin ti ang che,’ a tih kha a lo thleng ta a nih hi,” an ti a. Davida chu a tho va, a rûk têin Saula kawrfual hmâwr chu a va hlep a." 
1Samuel24:5 Chumi hnu chuan Davida chuan Saula kawrfual hmâwr a hleh avâng chuan a inthiam lo hle a. 
1Samuel24:6 A hote hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa hriakthih, ka pu chunga kut ka lo lek hi ka tih loh tawp tûr ka lo ti a ni; ani chu Lalpa hriakthih a ni ngei si a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel24:7 Davida chuan hêng thu hian a mite chu a thlêm dai a, Saula beih chu a remti ta lo va. Saula pawh chu a tho va, pûk aṭang chuan a chhuak a, a kal leh ta a." 
1Samuel24:8 Chumi hnu chuan Davida pawh chu a lo tho va, pûk aṭang chuan a lo chhuak a, “Lalpa, ka lalpa,” tiin Saula chu a au zui a, Saula chu a lo hawi a, Davida chuan bawkkhupin zah takin chibai a bûk a." 
1Samuel24:9 Davida chuan Saula hnênah, “Ngai teh, ‘Davidan i chhiatna a zawng a ni,’ tia miten i hnêna an sawi chu engah nge i awih ṭhin le?" 
1Samuel24:10 Ngai teh, vawiin hian he pûk chhûng ngeiah hian Lalpan ka kutah a hlân che tih nangmah ngeiin i hria. That tûr chein mi ṭhenkhatin min nawr a; mahse, ka zuah che a ni. ‘Ka lalpa chungah kut ka thlâk lo vang, Lalpa hriakthih a ni si a;’ ka ti a ni." 
1Samuel24:11 En teh, ka pu, i puan fêm ka ken reng hi, i puanfêm pawh ka hlep ngei a; mahse, ka that duh lo che a ni; i chungah ka hel lo va, thil sual tih pawh ka nei hek lo. Thah tumin min zawng mah la, kei chuan i chungah thil sual tih ka duh lo tih hria ang che." 
1Samuel24:12 Lalpa chuan nang nêna kan inkâr thu hi rêl sela, kei zawngin i chungah kut ka thlâk dâwn lo, Lalpa chuan i lakah phuba la zâwk rawh se." 
1Samuel24:13 Hmânlai thufingin, ‘Mi sualin thil sual an ti ṭhîn,’ a ti a; kei chuan i chungah kut ka thlâk lo vang." 
1Samuel24:14 Israel lal chu tu beih tumin nge a lo chhuah? Tu nge i ûm le, ui thisâwn nge uihli?" 
1Samuel24:15 Lalpa chuan nang nêna kan inkâr thu rêl sela, tifel rawh se. Ka chungthu hi ngaihvenin mi sawipui sela, i kut ata mi chhan chhuak rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel24:16 Chûng thu chu Davidan Saula hnêna a sawi zawhin Saula chuan, “Ka fapa David, i aw a ni maw?” a ti a, ring takin a ṭap chhuak a." 
1Samuel24:17 Davida hnênah chuan, “Kei ai chuan i fel zâwk daih a ni, nang chuan ka chungah thil ṭha i ti a, kei erawh chuan thil ṭha lo ka ti a ni." 
1Samuel24:18 Vawiin hian ka chunga i ṭhatzia i tilang ta, Lalpan i kuta min pêk pawhin min that duh lo va." 
1Samuel24:19 Miin a hmêlma hmu fuh sela, a khawih duh lo vang em ni? Vawiina ka chunga i thil tih dânah hian Lalpa chuan thil ṭhain rûl che rawh se." 
1Samuel24:20 Ngai teh, lal i la ni ngei dâwn a, Israel-te lalram chu i kutah tihngheh a la ni ngei dâwn tih ka hre ta." 
1Samuel24:21 Ka thlahte tiboral lo tûr leh ka pa chhûngkaw zîng ata ka hming thai bo lo tûrin tûnah Lalpa hming chhâlin chhia chham rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel24:22 Tichuan, Davida chuan Saula hnênah chhia a chham a; Saula chu in lamah a hâwng a, Davida leh a hote chu an bihrûkna lamah an chho ta thung a." 
1Samuel25:1 Samuela chu a thi a, Israel mi zawng zawng chu amah sûn tûrin an lo kal khâwm a. Rama khuaa a in kiangah chuan an phûm a. Tin, Davida chu a tho va, Paran thlalêrah chuan a chhuk a." 
1Samuel25:2 Maon khuaah chuan mi pakhat a awm a, Karmel-ah ram a nei a, a hausa hle a ni. Kêl sângkhat leh berâm sângthum a nei a, Karmel tlângah chuan a berâm hmulte chu a mêt a." 
1Samuel25:3 Chu pa hming chu Nabala a ni a, a nupui hming chu Abigaili a ni. Chu hmeichhia chu a felin a hmêl a ṭha hle a, a pasal erawh chu mi kawm tak leh thinbutut nei a ni. Ani chu Kaleba thlah a ni a." 
1Samuel25:4 Chutah chuan Nabalan berâm hmul a mêt tih Davida chuan thlalêr aṭangin a lo hria a. 
1Samuel25:5 Davida chuan a hnênah tlangvâl sâwm a tîr a, a mi tirhte hnênah chuan," 
1Samuel25:6 “Karmel tlânga Nabala hnênah chho ula, ka hmingin chibai bûk ang che u. ‘I chungah te, in chhûngkaw chungah te, i neih zawng zawng chungah te thlamuanna awm rawh se." 
1Samuel25:7 He laiah berâm hmul i mêt tih ka lo hria a, i berâmpute pawh kan zîngah an khawsa ṭhîn a, an pawi eng mah kan khawih ngai lo, Karmel tlânga an awm chhûngin an thil eng mah a bo ngai hek lo." 
1Samuel25:8 I hote zâwt la, an hrilh thei ang che. Chuvângin, ka hote hi lo khawngaih la, hei in ruai ṭheh ni takin an lo kal hi, i neih ang ang, i chhiahhlawhte leh i fapa Davida hi lo pe tûrin ka ngên a che,’ va ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:9 Davida hote chu an kal a, chûng thu zawng zawng chu Davida hmingin an sawi a; tichuan, an nghâk ta a." 
1Samuel25:10 Davida hote chu Nabala chuan a chhâng ta a, “Davida chu tu nge maw ni le: Jesaia fapa chu tu nge ni? Tûnlai hian chhiahhlawh pute tlân bosan an tam mai a." 
1Samuel25:11 Ka chaw te, ka tui te, ka berâm hmul mêttu te tâna ka talh sa te hi tute nge maw an nih pawh ka hriat hleih loh hnênah ka pe tehlul ang maw” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:12 Davida tirh tlangvâlte chu an lo kîr leh a, chûng thu zawng zawng chu an hrilh a." 
1Samuel25:13 Davida chuan a mite hnênah, “Khandaih pai ṭheuh rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, khandaih an pai ta sang sang a, Davida pawh chuan a khandaih a pai a, mi zali laiin an zui chho va, mi zahnih chu bungraw vêngin an awm a." 
1Samuel25:14 Chhiahhlawh pakhatin Nabala nupui Abigaili hnênah, “Ngai teh, Davida chuan thlalêr aṭangin kan pu chibai bûk tûrin mi a rawn tîr a, ani chuan a lo hau va." 
1Samuel25:15 Chûng mite chu an ṭha hle a, kan pawi eng mah an khawih lo va, phûla kan awm ho chhûng zawng khân eng mah kan hloh ngai hek lo." 
1Samuel25:16 Berâm vênga an bula kan awm chhûngin kan tân chhûn leh zânah kulh an ni ngawt mai a. 
1Samuel25:17 Tûnah, he thil hi engtin nge i tih dâwn ngaihtuah teh; chutilo chu kan pu chungah leh a chhûngkaw chungah thil ṭha lo a thleng mai ang e; kan pu lah hi a sual khawp a, thu hrilh theih pawh a ni si lo,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:18 Abigaili chuan hmanhmawh takin chhang tlang zahnih leh uain bûr hnih leh berâm panga, a hmin sa te, vaikan kg. sâwm leh pasarih leh grep pho ro bâwr te, theipui hlâwm zahnih nên a rawn la a, sabengtung a phurhtîr a." 
1Samuel25:19 A chhiahhlawh tlangvâlte hnênah chuan, “Lo kal hmasa ula, ka rawn zui ang che u,” a ti a. A pasal Nabala erawh chu a hrilh lo." 
1Samuel25:20 Sabengtung chungah chuan a chuang a, a kal ta a. Leisekawt a thlen laiin Davida leh a hote chuan an rawn pan a, an intâwk ta a." 
1Samuel25:21 Davida chuan, “He pa thil neih zawng zawng hi pakhat mah bo lovin thlalêrah khân a thlâwnin ka lo vênsak a nih hi le, a chunga ka ṭhatna hi thil ṭha lovin min rûl ta si a." 
1Samuel25:22 Khawvâr hmaa an zînga mipa naupang pakhat tê pawh ka zuah chuan Pathianin a tih tihin, na tak pawhin min ti rawh se,” a ti rilru a ni." 
1Samuel25:23 Abigaili chuan Davida a hmuh veleh a sabengtung aṭangin a chhuk a, Davida chu bawkkhupin chibai a bûk a." 
1Samuel25:24 A ke bulah a kûn a, a hnênah, “Ka pu, keima thiam loh vâng chauh a ni e, a mawh chu ka phur ang. I chhiahhlawhnuin i hnêna ka ngen hi khawngaih takin min ngaihthlâksak ang che." 
1Samuel25:25 Ka pu, he mi sualpa thu hi ngaimawh suh, a hming Nabala a ni ang ngei hian mi â a nih hi, â takin thil a ti ṭhîn a ni, kei i chhiahhlawhnu hian ka pu mi tirhte ka lo hmu lo atin a ni." 
1Samuel25:26 Tûnah ka pu, Lalpa mi nung leh i hming chhâlin ka sawi e, “Thisen chhuah lo tûr leh phuba la lo tûrin Lalpa chuan a vêng che a, i hmêlma, i ṭhat lohna zawngtute chu Nabala ang hian awm rawh se." 
1Samuel25:27 Tin, hei ka pu, i chhiahhlawhnuin i tân thilpêk ka rawn ken hi i ṭhuihruai tlangvâlte hian min dawnsak sela," 
1Samuel25:28 i chhiahhlawhnu sualna hi khawngaih takin ngaidam ang che. Lalpa chuan ka pu lalna chu tinghet sela; ka pu hi Lalpa tâna do i ni si a, i dam chhûngin thil ṭha lo i tih hmuh tûr awm suh se." 
1Samuel25:29 Miten tihhlum tumin ûm che mah sela, ka pu nunna chu Lalpa i Pathian chuan vênghim tlat sela, i hmêlmate nunna erawh chu lungtê an perh bo daih ang hi ni rawh se." 
1Samuel25:30 Israel-te hruaitu atân a ruat tawh si che a, Lalpa chuan i tâna thil ṭha a lo tiam tawh zawng zawng chu thlentîr rawh se." 
1Samuel25:31 Chhan awm lova thisen i chhuah ngai loh leh phuba i lâk ngai loh hi, ka pu, i inchhîr rêng rêng lo vang. Lalpan ka pu hi a tihhlawhtlin hunah i chhiahhlawhnu hi min hre reng ang che aw,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:32 Davida chuan Abigaili hnênah, “Vawiina mi lo hmuak tûra tîrtu che Israel-te Pathian Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se." 
1Samuel25:33 I remhriatna avângin duhsakna dawng ang che, thisen chhuah sualna lak ata min vên avâng leh phuba la lo tûra vawiina ka kut i chelh avâng hian." 
1Samuel25:34 Tina lo tûr che ua min khaptu Israel-te Pathian Lalpa, mi nung hmingin ka sawi e. Nang chuan mi lo hmuak lo la chu Nabala leh a mite chu tu mah zuah lovin naktûk zîng khaw ên hmain thah vek ka lo tum asin,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:35 Davida chuan a thil rawn ken chu a lo dawnsak a, “Thlamuang takin haw rawh, i dîl chu ka hria e, i duh ang chuan ka tihsak ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:36 Abigaili chu Nabala hnênah chuan a hâwng ta a, inah chuan ruai ropui tak an lo ṭheh a, Nabala chu a rui hle a, a lo ṭawng lûng lûng a. chuvângin, a tûk khawvâr hma chuan a hnênah eng mah a sawi lo." 
1Samuel25:37 A tûkah chuan Nabala pawh a rui tawh lo va, a nupui chuan thil awmzia zawng zawng chu a han hrilh chuan a mit sulh a, a che thei ta lo va." 
1Samuel25:38 Ni sâwm hnuah Nabala chu Lalpa kut tuarin a thi ta a. 
1Samuel25:39 Nabala thih thu Davidan a lo hriat chuan, “Nabalan min hmuhsitna phuba min lâksak a, thil sual ti lo tûra a chhiahhlawh min vêngtu Lalpa chu fakin awm sela, Lalpa chuan Nabala chu a thil tihdik loh avângin a tuartîr a nih hi,” a ti a. Davida chuan Abigaili chu a nupui atâna va be tûrin mi a tîr a." 
1Samuel25:40 Davida chhiahhlawhte chu Karmel tlângah Abigaili hnênah chuan an va kal a, a hnênah, “Davida chuan a nupui atân hruai tûr chein min tîr a ni,” an ti a." 
1Samuel25:41 Tichuan, Abigaili chu a tho va, bawkkhupin chibai a bûk a, “Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhnu hi ka pu chhiahhlawhte ke sil tûr pawhin ka inpeih e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:42 A tho thuai a, sabengtung chungah a chuang a, a tirhkah nula panga nên chuan Davida mi tirhte chu an zui a; tichuan, a nupuiah a awm ta a." 
1Samuel25:43 Davida chuan Jezreel mi, Ahinoami a lo nei tawh bawk a, an pahnih chuan nupuiah a nei ta a." 
1Samuel25:44 Saula khân a fanu Mikali, Davida nupui kha, Galim khaw mi Laisa fapa Paltia a lo neihtîr tawh reng a ni." 
1Samuel26:1 Zif-ho chu Gibea khuaa Saula hnênah an lo kal a, “Davida chu Jesimon thlalêr bul Hakila tlângah a biru,” an rawn ti a." 
1Samuel26:2 Tichuan, Saula chu Israel mi zathum thlan chhuah hruaiin thlalêr lamah chuan Davida zawng tûrin a chhuk ta a." 
1Samuel26:3 Saula chuan Jesimon thlalêr bul Hakila tlâng kawng sîrah riahhmun a khuar a; Davida erawh chu thlalêrah a awm a, Saulan a rawn zawng a ni tih a hria a." 
1Samuel26:4 Enthlatu a tîr a, Saulan a rawn zawng ngei tih a hre chiang ta a." 
1Samuel26:5 Davida chu a tho va, Saula riahhmun khuarnaah chuan a va kal a; Saula leh a sipai hotu Abnera, Nera fapa mut hmun chu a va hria a. Saula chu an riahhmun lai takah a mu a, a vêlin a sipaite an mu a." 
1Samuel26:6 Davida chuan Hit mi Ahimeleka leh Joaba u, Zeruii fapa Abisaia hnênah, “Saula awmnaah tu zâwkin nge mi zui dâwn?” a ti a. Abisaia chuan, “Keiman ka zui ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:7 Davida leh Abisaia chu zânah sipai awmnaah chuan an kal a, Saula chu an riahhmun lai takah chuan a mu a, a lu bulah a fei a vit bûr a, Abnera leh a sipaite chuan an lo mut hual a." 
1Samuel26:8 Abisaia chuan Davida hnênah, “Hei le, Pathianin i kutah i hmêlma hi a pe ta che a nih hi, khawi nge fei hian leiah ka han chhun bet tlat ang e, nawn leh a ngai tawh lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:9 Davida chuan Abisaia hnênah, “That suh, Lalpa hriakthih chunga kutthlâk tu nge thiam chang awm ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:10 Davida vêk chuan, “ Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, Lalpan a chungah kutthlâk zâwk sela; a nih loh leh a thih ni a lo thleng emaw, indonaah a la boral mai emaw a ni ang." 
1Samuel26:11 Lalpa hriakthih chungah hian kut ka thlâk tawp lo vang, a lu bula fei leh a tuithâwl erawh hi chu la ila, i kal ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:12 Tichuan, Davida chuan Saula lu bula fei leh tuithâwl chu a la a, an kalsan ta a. Tu man an hmu lo va, an hre hek lo." 
1Samuel26:13 Davida chu râl lehlamah a kal a, tlângchhîpah a ding a, an inkâr chu hla tak a ni." 
1Samuel26:14 Davida chuan sipaiho leh Abnera chu a au va, “Abner, mi han chhâng dâwn na nge?” a ti a. Abnera chuan a chhâng a, “Lal han au veitu chu tu nge maw i nih le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:15 Davida chuan Abnera hnênah, “Mipa i ni na nge? Israel zîngah tu nge nang tluk awm? Engati nge lal, i pu chu i vên ṭhat loh? I pu that tûrin mi an lo luh kha le." 
1Samuel26:16 I tih dân hi a ṭha lo, Lalpa, mi nung chhâlin ka hrilh a che, Lalpa hriakthih i vên ṭhat loh avângin thi tlâk i ni, lal fei leh a tuithâwl, a lu bula mi kha khawiah nge a awm tâk?” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:17 Saula chuan Davida aw a ni tih a hria a, “Ka fapa David, nang i ni maw?” a ti a. Davida chuan, “Ni e, lalber, ka pu, keimah ka ni e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:18 Davida chuan, “Eng vângin nge ka pu hian a chhiahhlawh hi a ûm le? Eng thil nge ka tiha, eng nge ka tihsual?" 
1Samuel26:19 Lal, ka pu chuan, a chhiahhlawh thu hi lo ngaithla teh se. Min bei tûra tithinurtu che hi Lalpa a nih chuan ka inpe mai tûr alâwm; mihring an nih erawh chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se. Chûng mite chuan kan ram Judai ram ata hi min ûmchhuaka, ‘Kal la, pathian dang rawng va bâwl rawh’ min ti a ni ngawt mai alâwm." 
1Samuel26:20 Chuvângin, Lalpa awm lohna ramah chuan min that suh se; miin tlânga varung an veh ṭhîn ang hian Israel lal chuan kei uihli mai hi min rawn veh a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:21 Saula chuan, “Thil ka lo tisual a ni, ka fapa David, lo hâwng leh rawh. Vawiinah ka nun i zuah avângin i chungah kutthlâk ka tum leh tawh ngai lo vang. Â takin ka lo ûm che a, ka lo tidik lo a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:22 Davida chuan, “Aw Lalpa, heta hi i fei a awm e, i mite zînga pakhat lo kal sela han la rawh se," 
1Samuel26:23 Lalpa chuan mi tin an fel leh rinawm man a pe dâwn si a. Vawiinah nang hi Lalpan ka kutah min pe a, Lalpa hriakthih chungah kut ka thlâk duh lo va ni." 
1Samuel26:24 Vawiina i nunna ka zuah ang bawk hian Lalpa chuan ka nunna min zuahsak sela, buaina lak ata hi min chhan chhuak rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:25 Saula chuan Davida hnênah, “Ka fapa David, lo hmuingîl zêl la, i thil tih apiangah hlawhtling zêl ang che,” a ti a. Davida chu a kal ta a, Saula pawh a hmun lamah a haw ta a." 
1Samuel27:1 Davida chu hetiang hian a inngaihtuah a, “Engtikah emaw chuan Saula hian min that ngei dâwn zawng a nih hi, Filistia rama tlan bo aia ṭha hi ka tân a awm dâwn lo a ni; tichuan, Saulan Israel ram chhûngah min zawn a beidawng ang a, a kut ata ka him thei ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel27:2 A insiam a, amah leh a ho mi zaruk chu Gath lal Maoka fapa Akisa hnênah an kal ta a." 
1Samuel27:3 Davida chu Gath khuaa Akisa hnênah chuan a mite, an chhûngkua ṭheuh nên, a nupui pahnih Jezreel mi Ahinoami leh Karmel tlânga awm Nabala thihsan Abigaili te nên chuan an awm ta a." 
1Samuel27:4 Davida chu Gath khuaah a tlân tih Saula an hrilh a; tichuan, a zawng zui ta lo va." 
1Samuel27:5 Davida chuan Akisa hnênah, “Min khawngaih la, i rama khaw pakhat min pe la; tah chuan, kan lo awm ang e: engah nge lal khuaah hian i kiangah kan awm ve reng ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel27:6 Chumi ni chuan Akisa chuan Ziklag khua chu a pe a; tûn thlengin Ziklag khua chu Juda lalten an chang hlen ta a. 
1Samuel27:7 Filistia rama Davida a awm chhûng chu kum khat leh thla li a ni. 
1Samuel27:8 Davida leh a mite chu Gesur mite, Girzi mite, Amalek mite beiin an thawk chhuak ṭhîn a, chûng hnamte chu hmânlai ata tawh Sur ram leh Aigupta ram thlenga lo awm ṭhîn an ni." 
1Samuel27:9 Davida chuan chûng ram chu a beih châng apiangin a hmei a pain a that vek ṭhîn a, an berâm te, an bâwng te, an sabengtung te, an sanghâwngsei te, an silhfen te nên a lâksak a. Akisa hnênah a rawn hâwn ṭhîn." 
1Samuel27:10 Akisa chuan, “Vawiinah tu nge i va rûn le?” a lo ti a. Davida chuan, “Judai ram chhim lam te, Israel-ho chênna chhim ram te, Kanan-ho chênna chhim ram te ka va rûn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel27:11 Davida chuan a hmei a pain tu mah a zuah ngai lo va; a chhan chu, ‘Davida chu hetiangin a che ṭhîn,’ tiin kan chanchin an sawi dah ang e,” a ti a ni. Chu chu Filistia rama a awm chhûnga a tih dân a ni." 
1Samuel27:12 Akisa chuan Davida thu sawi chu a awih hle a, “A mi Israel-te huatah a insiam ta si a; chuvângin, kan thuhnuaiah an awm reng tawh dâwn a nih hi,” a tih phah a." 
1Samuel28:1 Chûng lai chuan Filistia mite chuan Israel-te do tûrin an sipai an khâwm chiam a, Akisa chuan Davida hnênah, “Nang leh i mite chuan ka sipaite in dopui ngei ang chu,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:2 Davida chuan, “Dopui e, i chhiahhlawh hian eng nge ka tih ṭhin i hre mai ang,” a ti a. Akisa chuan Davida hnênah, “A ṭhat chu! Mi vêngtu atân i awm kumkhua mai dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:3 Samuela chu a thi a, Israel mi zawng zawngin an ṭah a; a chênna khua Rama-ah chuan an phûm tawh a. Saula chuan aienthiam te, dawithiam te a ram ata a hnawt chhuak vek tawh bawk a." 
1Samuel28:4 Filistia mite chu an pung khâwm a, Sunem-ah ṭanhmun an khuar a. Saula chuan Israel mi zawng zawng a khâwm a, Gilboa khuaah ṭanhmun a khuar bawk a." 
1Samuel28:5 Saulan Filistia sipaiho a hmuh chuan a hlau va, a zâm ta a." 
1Samuel28:6 Lalpa a râwn a, Lalpa chuan mumangin emaw, Urim-in emaw, zâwlnei emaw pawhin a chhâng rêng rêng lo va." 
1Samuel28:7 Saula chuan a ṭhuihruaite hnênah, “Ka va râwn tûr mitthi thlûk thiam hmeichhia min zawnsak rawh u,” a ti a. Anni chuan, “E tak a, mitthi thlûk thiam hmeichhia pakhat chu Endor khuaah a awm asin,” an ti a." 
1Samuel28:8 Tichuan, Saula chu a inbâwl danglam a, thawmhnaw dang a inbel a, mi pahnih hruaiin hmeichhe hnênah chuan zânah an va kal a, a hnênah, “Thlarau min râwnsak la, a hming ka lam chu min koh chhuahsak teh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:9 Hmeichhia chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Saula thiltihte chu i hria a, engati nge ka thihna tûrin ka tân thang i kam le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:10 Saula chuan, “ Lalpa hmingin ka tiam e, Lalpa mi nung chhâlin he thil avâng hian i thi lo vang tih ka tiam a che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:11 Hmeichhia chuan, “Tu nge ka koh chhuahsak ang che?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Samuela mi koh chhuahsak rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:12 Hmeichhia chuan Samuela a han hmuh chuan a ṭê ṭhawt a, Saula hnênah, “Engati nge Saula ni reng si-a mi bum?” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:13 Lal chuan hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “Hlau suh, eng nge i hmuh le?” a ti a. Hmeichhia chuan Saula hnênah, “Lei ata Pathian ni âwm tak lo chhuak ka hmu,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:14 Ani chuan, “Eng ang nge a nih?” a ti a. Hmeichhia chuan, “Putar a ni, kawrfual a ha,” a ti a. Saula chuan Samuela a ni tih a hre ta a, bawkkhupin chibai a bûk a." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuela chuan Saula hnênah, “Engati nge min koh chhuaha, mi tihbuai le?” a ti a. Saula chuan, “Ka mang a ang êm êm a, Filistia miten min rawn bei a, Pathian lah chuan min hawisan ta si a; zâwlnei emaw, mumang emaw pawhin min chhâng ta si lo va; chuvângin, ka tih tûr min hrilh tûrin ka ko ta che a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:16 Samuela chuan, “Chutia Pathianin a hawisan chea, a hmêlma i nih tawh si chuan engtizia nge kei mi la rawn koh cheu va?" 
1Samuel28:17 Lalpan ka hnêna a sawi tawh ang khân i chungah a ti a nih chu, Lalpa chuan i lalna a chhuhsak che a, i lam hnai a pe tawh." 
1Samuel28:18 Lalpa thu i zâwm lo va, Amalek-ho kha i tihchimih vek loh avângin tûnah he thil hi i chungah a lo thleng ta a nih hi." 
1Samuel28:19 Lalpa chuan nang leh Israel-te chu Filistia mite kutah a pe che u ang a, naktûkah, nang leh i fate chuan min rawn zui ve ang a, Lalpa chuan Israel sipaite chu Filistia mite kutah a pe ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:20 Chu veleh Saula chu leiah a tlu a, Samuela thu sawi avâng chuan a hlau ta êm êm a, nilêng leh zankhuaa chaw ei lo a nih avângin a chau hle a." 
1Samuel28:21 Hmeichhia chu Saula hnênah a lo kal a, a mangang hle tih a hria a, a hnênah, “En teh, i chhiahhlawhnu hian i thu ka zâwm a, thih leh thih tiin mi hrilh angin ka ti a." 
1Samuel28:22 Tûnah, i chhiahhlawhnu thu awih ve la, ei tûr ka siam ang che a, chu chu ei la, i lo harh ang a, i hâwng thei mai ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:23 “Ka ei dawn lo,” tiin a hnial a. A ṭhuihruaite chuan hmeichhe sawi ang chuan ei tûrin an tur a, an thu chu a zâwm ta a; tichuan, lei ata a lo tho va, khumah chuan a ṭhu a." 
1Samuel28:24 Hmeichhia chuan inah bâwngno chawm thau a nei a, a va talh sawk sawk a, chhangphut a la a, a hmet a, dawidim tel lovin chhang a siam a." 
1Samuel28:25 Saula leh a ṭhuihruaite hmaah chuan a hlui a, an ei ta a. Tichuan, an tho va, chumi zân chuan an kal chhuak leh ta a." 
1Samuel29:1 Filistia mite chuan an sipai zawng zawng chu Afek-ah an ko khâwm a. Israel-te chuan Jezreel ruam tuikhur bulah ṭanhmun an khuar a. 
1Samuel29:2 Tichuan, Filistia lalho chu za rual te, sâng rual tein an lo kal duah duah a, Davida leh a mite chuan Akisa hovin hnu an dâl a." 
1Samuel29:3 Filistia sipai hotute chuan, “Hêng Hebrai-te hian hetah eng nge an tih ve?” an ti a. Akisa chuan Filistia sipai hotute hnênah chuan, “He mi hi Israel lal Saula ṭhuihruai Davida a nih hi, kum khat zet ka hnênah a awm tawh a, ka hnêna a lo tlûkluh ni ata tûn thlengin a dik lohna rêng rêng ka hmu lo,” a ti a." 
1Samuel29:4 Nimahsela, Filistia sipai hotute chu Akisa chungah an thinur hle a, a hnênah, “Ani chu i khaw pêkah chuan hâwntîr rawh, indonaah kan zîngah a chhuk ve tûr a ni lo, kan hmêlmate lama ṭangin kan mite lu a la ang a, a pu nên an inrem leh hlauh si ang e." 
1Samuel29:5 He Davida hi a ni lâwm ni lâm chunga: ‘Saulan sâng tam tak a that a, Davidan sîng tam tak a that,’ tia hlaa an awih kha?” an ti a." 
1Samuel29:6 Tichuan, Akisa chuan Davida chu a ko va, a hnênah, “ Lalpa hmingin ka sawi e, mi rinawm tak i ni a, kei chuan indonaah kan hnêna kal ve atân ka duh hle che a; ka hnên i lo thlen ni ata vawiin thlengin i dik lohna ka hmu rêng rêng lo; mahse, lalhote hian an duh lo che a ni." 
1Samuel29:7 Chuvângin, Filistia lal dangte hi i tihlungawi si loh chuan kîr leh ta mai la, lungawi takin kal ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel29:8 Davida chuan Akisa hnênah, “Eng nge ka tihsual? I hnêna ka lo thlen ni ata vawiin thlengin thil fel lo eng nge i chhiahhlawh chungah i hmuh? Ka pu, lal hmêlma dopui tûra ka kal theih loh chhan hi eng nge ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel29:9 Akisa chuan Davida chu heti hian a chhâng a, “Pathian vântirhkoh ang maiin ka mit hmuhah i fel a; nimahsela, Filistia lal dangte hian: ‘Indonaah kan zîngah a lo tel ve tûr a ni lo,’ an ti tlat si a." 
1Samuel29:10 Chuvângin, zîng takah tho la, i hnêna i pu chhiahhlawhte nên hian naktûk zîngah, khua a ên veleh, chhuak vat rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel29:11 Tichuan, Davida leh a mite chu Filistia rama kîr leh tûrin a tûk zîng takah chuan an tho va, Filistia mite erawh chu Jezreel-ah an chho ta a." 
1Samuel30:1 Ni thum nia Davida leh a mite chuan Ziklag an va thlen chuan Amalek mite chuan chhim lam ram leh Ziklag khua chu an lo rûn a, Ziklag khua an lo la a, an hâl vek a." 
1Samuel30:2 Hmeichhiate leh chu khuaa awm zawng zawng, naupang aṭanga tar thlengin salah an man a; tu mah that lovin an hruai a, an lo hâwnpui vek a." 
1Samuel30:3 Davida leh a miten khua an va luh chuan a lo kâng chhe vek a, an nupui te, an fanu leh fapate chu salah an lo hruai vek a." 
1Samuel30:4 Davida leh a mite chu nasa takin an ṭap a, chau hnêp khawpin an ṭap a." 
1Samuel30:5 Davida nupui pahnih, Jezreel mi Ahinoami leh Karmel tlânga awm Nabala nupui thihsan Abigaili pawh salah an hruai bawk a." 
1Samuel30:6 An fanute leh an fapate sala an hruai avângin mite chu an thin a rim êm êm a, Davida chu den hlum an rawt a; chu thil avâng chuan Davida pawh a mangang hle a; mahse, Lalpa, a Pathian chuan a tichak thar a." 
1Samuel30:7 Davida chuan puithiam Abiathara, Ahimeleka fapa hnênah chuan, “Puithiam kawr kha han la teh,” a ti a. Abiathara chuan Davida hnênah puithiam kawr chu a rawn la a." 
1Samuel30:8 Davida chuan, “Min rûntute chu ûm ila, ka la ûm pha ang em?” tiin Lalpa a râwn a. Ani chuan, “Ûm rawh, i ûm pha ang a, i chhan chhuak vek ang,” tiin a chhâng a." 
1Samuel30:9 Tichuan, Davida chu a hnêna mi zaruk awmte nên chuan an thawk chhuak ta a, Besor lui an va thleng a. Chutah chuan mi ṭhenkhat a hnutchhiah a." 
1Samuel30:10 Davida chuan mi zali hruaiin a ûm zêl a, mi zahnih erawh kha chu an chauh lutuk avângin Besor lui chu an kai ve thei lo va, an hnutchhiah ta a ni." 
1Samuel30:11 Phûlah chuan Aigupta mi an va hmu a, Davida hnênah an rawn hruai a. Tui in tûr leh chaw ei tûr an pe a." 
1Samuel30:12 Theipui chhang hlâwm khat leh grep rah pho ro bâwr hnih an pe bawk a. Tin, chûng chu a han ei a, a lo harh ta a, ni thum leh zan thum lai ei leh in lovin a lo awm tawh a ni." 
1Samuel30:13 Davida chuan a hnênah, “Tu mi nge i niha, khawi aṭangin nge i lo kal?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Aigupta mi, Amalek-ho chhiahhlawh ka ni. Ni thum lai a ni ta, ka dam loh avângin ka puin min kalsan ta mai a ni." 
1Samuel30:14 Keret mite chênna ram chhim lam te, Judai ram chhim lam te, Kaleb-ho ram chhim lamte kan rûn a, Ziklag khua pawh kan bei bawk,” a ti a." 
1Samuel30:15 Davida chuan a hnênah, “Chûng ram rûntute hnênah chuan min hruai thei ang em?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Min that lo tûr leh ka pu kuta min hlân lo tûra in Pathian hming chhâla thu min tiam chuan an hnênah ka hruai ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel30:16 An hnênah chuan a zu hruai ta a, anni chuan Filistia ram leh Judai ram aṭanga an râllâk tam tak chu lâwmin ruai an lo ṭheh a, hmun tinah an lo awm darh a." 
1Samuel30:17 Davida chuan khawvâr tirh aṭangin a tûk tlai lam thlengin anni chu a bei a; tlangvâl zali, sabengtung chunga chuanga tlânchheho chauh lo chu tu mah dama chhuak reng an awm lo." 
1Samuel30:18 Davida chuan Amalek miten an lâksak zawng zawng chu a chhuh leh vek a, a nupui pahnih te pawh a chhan chhuak a." 
1Samuel30:19 Tichuan, naupang leh tar te, an fanu leh fapate leh an thil an lâksak tawh zawng zawng chu kim takin an la kîr leh vek a. Davida chuan a vaiin a hâwnpui leh ta a." 
1Samuel30:20 Davida chuan berâm rual leh ran rual zawng zawng chu a la a, a mite hma lamah chuan an kaltîr a, “Hei hi Davida râllâk a nih hi,” an ti a." 
1Samuel30:21 Mi zahnih, an chauh lutuk avânga Davida zui thei ta lo, Besor lui kama an hnutchhiah tâkte hnên chu Davida chuan a va thleng a. Anni chu Davida leh a hnêna kal vete hmuak tûrin an lo chhuak a, Davida leh a mite chuan an rawn pan a, anni chu chibai an bûk a." 
1Samuel30:22 Amaherawhchu, Davida zuitute zînga mi sualho leh kawhmawh bâwl ṭhînte chuan, “Anni hi kan hnêna an kal ve loh avângin râllâk thil kan va lâkte chu kan pe ve lo vang, an nupui leh an fate erawh chu an hâwnpui thei ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel30:23 Davida chuan a chhâng a, “Ka unaute u, chutiang chu a ni lo ve. Lalpa min pêk hi chutianga tih tûr a ni lo. Ani chuan min hum a, min beitute chu kan kutah min pe a ni si a." 
1Samuel30:24 He thilah hian tu nge in thu pawm thei ang le? Indonaa zuk kalte chan ang bawk bungraw vênga lo awmte hian an chang ve tûr a ni; inang vekin chan tûr a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel30:25 Davida chuan Israel-te tân chutiang chuan dân leh thupêk a siam nghâl a, tûn thlengin an zâwm ta a ni." 
1Samuel30:26 Davida chuan Ziklag khua a thlen chuan a râllâk sumte chu Judai ram hruaitu, a ṭhiante chu a sem ṭheuh va, “Hei, Lalpa hmêlmate laka râllâk ka rawn thawn che u a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel30:27 Tichuan, Bethel-a awm te, Rama chhima awm te, Jatira-a awm te," 
1Samuel30:28 Aroer-a awm te, Sifmot-a awm te, Estamo-a awm te," 
1Samuel30:29 Rakal-a awm te, Jerami-ho te, Ken-ho te," 
1Samuel30:30 Horma-a awm te, Borasan-a awm te, Athak-a awm te," 
1Samuel30:31 Hebron-a awmte leh Davida chettlat ṭhinna hmuna awm zawng zawng te pawh a thawn vek a. 
1Samuel31:1 Filistia mite chuan Israel-hote chu an bei a; tichuan, Israel-te chu Filistia-ho lakah an tlânchhia a, mi tam tak Gilboa tlângah chuan an that a." 
1Samuel31:2 Saula leh a fate chu Filistia mite chuan an rawn nangchîng a, a fapa pathum Jonathana te, Abinadaba te, Malkisua te chu an that a." 
1Samuel31:3 Nasa lehzualin Saula chu an rawn bei a, thal kâptute chuan na takin an hliam ta a." 
1Samuel31:4 Saula chuan a râlthuam kengtu hnênah, “I khandaih khân min han chhun tlang teh, chuti lo zawng, serh tan lohho an lo kal ang a, min rawn chhun ang a, nuihza siam nân min rawn hmang dah ang e,” a ti a. A râlthuam kengtu chuan a hlauh êm avângin chu chu a ti duh lo va; tichuan, Saula chuan a khandaih chu a la a, a bawh ta a." 
1Samuel31:5 A râlthuam kengtu chuan Saula a thi tih a hriat chuan a khandaih chu a bawh ve ta a, an thi dûn ta a ni." 
1Samuel31:6 Chumi ni chuan Saula te, a fapa pathum te, a râlthuam kengtu te leh a mite chu an za-in an thi a." 
1Samuel31:7 Phairuam râl lehlama Israel mite leh Jordan râla awmte chuan Israel sipaite an tlânchhia tih leh Saula leh a fapate an thi tih an hriat chuan an khua an chhuahsan a, an tlan bo va, Filistia mite chuan an luahsak ta a." 
1Samuel31:8 A tûkah chuan Filistia mite chu an râlthuamte hlîp tûrin an va chhuak a, Saula leh a fa pathum, Gilboa tlânga thi chu an va hmu a." 
1Samuel31:9 Saula lu chu an tan a, râlthuam chu an hlîp a. Chu thu chu mi zawng zawng hrilh tûrin an milem biakna inah te, Filistia ram pumpuiah mi an tîr bawk a." 
1Samuel31:10 Saula râlthuam chu Astoret biak inah an dah a, a ruang chu Beth-san kulh bangah an phuar bet a." 
1Samuel31:11 Jabes-gilead miten Saula chunga Filistia mite thiltih chu an lo hriat chuan," 
1Samuel31:12 mi huaisenho chu an lo thawk a, zankhuain Beth-san panin an kal a. Saula leh a fate ruang chu Beth-san kulh bang ata an la thla a, Jabes-ah an rawn la a; tichuan, an hâl a." 
1Samuel31:13 An ruhte chu an la a, Jabes hmuna Esel thing hnuaiah an phûm a, ni sarih chaw an nghei a." 
2Samuel1:1 Saula a thih hnuin Davida chuan Amalek-ho a va hneh a, a lo haw a, Ziklag khuaah ni hnih a châwl a." 
2Samuel1:2 A ni thum ni chuan mi pakhat, Saula riahhmun aṭangin a lo kal a, a kawrte a thlêr vek a, a lu-ah lei a kai luam a. Davida hnên a lo thlen chuan leia bawkkhupin chibai a bûk a." 
2Samuel1:3 Davida chuan, “Khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Israel-te riahhmun aṭangin ka lo tlân chhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:4 Davida chuan, “Eng thil nge lo thleng ta le, min hrilh teh,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Indonaah mite chu an tlânchhia a, mi tam tak an that a; Saula leh a fapa Jonathana pawh an thi asin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:5 Davida chuan chu thu rawn hrilhtu tlangvâl hnênah chuan, “Saula leh a fapa Jonathana engtin nge an thi tih i hriat?” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:6 A hrilhtu tlangvâl chuan, “Gilboa tlângah ka va kal hlauh va, Saula chu a fei rinchhanin a ding a; chutih lai chuan tawlailîr leh sakawr chungchuang mite chuan an rawn nangchîng ṭêp a." 
2Samuel1:7 Tichuan, a hawi vêl ruai a, mi hmu ta a, mi han au va, ‘Eng nge ni ta le?’ ka ti a." 
2Samuel1:8 Ani chuan, ‘Tu nge i nih?’ min ti a. Keiin, ‘Amalek mi ka ni,’ tiin ka chhâng a." 
2Samuel1:9 Ani chuan ka hnênah, ‘Lo kal la, mi han that mai teh; eng mah ka ni ta lo, ka dam zo dâwn lo ve,’ a ti a." 
2Samuel1:10 Tichuan, ka va kal a, a dam zo dâwn lo tih ka hriat avângin ka that ta a. A lallukhum khum lai leh a bânbun lai chu ka la a, hei ka pu, i hnênah ka rawn thlen a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:11 Davida chuan a silhfênte a pawtthlêr a, a hnêna mi awm zawng zawngte pawh chuan an puan an pawtthlêr ve a." 
2Samuel1:12 Saula leh a fapa Jonathana te leh Lalpa mi, Israel-te chu khandaiha an thah avângin an sûn a, an ṭah a, tlai thlengin chaw an nghei a." 
2Samuel1:13 Davida chuan chûng thu rawn hrilhtu tlangvâl hnênah chuan, “Khawi lam mi nge i nih?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ram dang mi, Amalek hnam ka ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:14 Davida chuan, “ Lalpa hriakthih tihlum tûra a chunga kutthlâk engtiziaa hlau lo nge i nih?” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:15 Davida chuan a mite zînga mi pakhat a ko va, “Kal la, va that rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, a va sât hlum ta a." 
2Samuel1:16 Davida chuan a hnênah, “I thisen chhuah man chu nangmah ngeiin tuar ang che; nangmah ngeiin, ‘ Lalpa hriakthih chu ka that a ni’ tiin i sawi si a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:17 Davida chuan Saula leh a fapa Jonathana chu heti hian a ṭah a. 
2Samuel1:18 Chu ṭah hla chu Juda thlahte zirtîr tûrin a hrilh a, chu chu Jasar bu-ah ziak a ni." 
2Samuel1:19 “Israel mi ropui chu tlângah an that a, mi chak, huaisente pawh an tlûk tâk hi!" 
2Samuel1:20 Gath khuaah hril suh ula, Askelon kawtthlêrah puang hek suh u; Filistia nuho an lâwm ang a, Serh tan lohho fanute an hlim dah ang e." 
2Samuel1:21 Gilboa tlângahte chuan ruah leh dai tla suh se, Loahte eng mah rah suh se, Tah chuan mi huaisen phaw mualpho takin an thehthal a, Saula phaw chu an tuaihnûm ta lo." 
2Samuel1:22 Jonathana thalah mi huaisen thau leh thisen A kai luai ṭhîn, Saula khandaih pawhin râl a hlah ngai hek lo." 
2Samuel1:23 Saula leh Jonathana chu an inhmangaih êm êm a, An thih pawhin, an dam pawhin an inṭhen lo, Mupui aiin an ṭuan a ṭha, Sakeibaknei aiin an chak zâwk bawk." 
2Samuel1:24 Nangni, Israel nute u, Saula hi ṭah teh u, Puan senduk mawi takin a tuam che u a, Rangkachaka cheimawi puan a sintîr che u kha." 
2Samuel1:25 Mi huaisente indonaah an thi ta e, Jonathana pawh tlângah chuan an that ta," 
2Samuel1:26 Aw, ka unaupa Jonathan, ka va han lainat tak che êm! Ka tân i hlu êm êm a, I mi hmangaihna chu a mak a, Nu hmangaihna pawhin a tluk lo." 
2Samuel1:27 Mi huaisente chu an tlu a, An râlthuamte pawh an thlah ta e,” tiin." 
2Samuel2:1 Chumi hnu chuan Davidan Lalpa hnênah, “Judai ram khaw puiahte chuan ka han chho ang em?” tiin a zâwt a. Lalpa chuan, “Chho ta che,” a ti a. Davida chuan “Khawiah nge ka han kal ang?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Hebron-ah” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:2 Tichuan, Davida chu a nupui pahnih, Jezreel mi Ahinoami leh Karmel tlânga Nabala nupui thihsan Abigaili hruaiin chutah chuan a han chho va." 
2Samuel2:3 Davida chuan a mi, a ṭhuihruaite chu, an chhûngte ṭheuh nên a hruai bawk a; Hebron leh a chhehvêl khuaahte chuan an awm ta a." 
2Samuel2:4 Judai ram mite chu an lo kal a, Davida chu Judai ram lal atân hriak an thih ta a. Jabes-gilead mite chuan Saula an phûm tih Davida chu an hrilh a." 
2Samuel2:5 Ani chuan Jabes-gilead mite hnênah mi a tîr a, “In pu, Saula chungah in rinawm hle a, ani chu in lo phûm tâk avângin Pathianin malsâwm che u rawh se." 
2Samuel2:6 Lalpa chuan khawngaih che uin a rinawmzia in chungah lantîr zêl sela, he thil in lo tih avâng hian kei pawhin in chungah ṭhat ka chhuah ve ang." 
2Samuel2:7 Tûnah ngaihngam takin awm ula, zâm rêng rêng suh u. In pu Saula chu thi tawh mah se, kei hi Juda mite chuan an lal atân hriak min thih ta a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:8 Chutih lai chuan Nera fapa Abnera, Saula sipai hotu chuan Isboseta chu Jordan ral Mahanaim hmunah a rawn hruai a." 
2Samuel2:9 Gilead-ah te, Aser-ah te, Jezreel-ah te, Efraim-ah te, Benjamin ramah te leh Israel ram zawng zawng chunga lal atân a siam a." 
2Samuel2:10 Saula fapa Isboseta chu Israel lal a nih tirh chuan kum sawmlina upa a ni; kum hnih chhûng a lal a. Juda mite erawh chuan Davida chu lalah an pawm a. 
2Samuel2:11 Davida chu Hebron khuaah kum sarih leh thla ruk lai Juda mite chungah a lal ta a. 
2Samuel2:12 Nera fapa Abnera chu Saula fapa Isboseta mite nên Mahanaim aṭangin Gibeon-ah an lo kal a. 
2Samuel2:13 Zeruii fapa Joaba leh Davida mite pawh an lo kal a, Gibeon dîl kamah an intâwk a. Ho khat dîl râl lehlamah an ṭhu a, a ho dang râl lehlamah an ṭhu bawk a." 
2Samuel2:14 Abnera chuan Joaba hnênah, “Tlangvâlte chu zât leh zâtin thlang chhuak ila, kan hmaah han inbei teh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:15 Tichuan, Benjamin lamṭangte chu mi sâwm leh pahnih an lo chhuak a, chutiang bawkin Davida lamṭangte pawh an lo chhuak bawk a." 
2Samuel2:16 Mahni khingpui ṭheuh lu-ah an ṭhâm a, an bitum ṭheuhte nên chuan an invit a, an thi za ta vek a. Chuvâng chuan, chu hmun chu Helkat-Hazurim an ti ta a, chu chu Gibeon-a awm a ni." 
2Samuel2:17 Chumi ni chuan nasa takin an inbei ta a, Davida mite chuan Abnera leh Israel mite chu an hneh a." 
2Samuel2:18 Chu inbeihnaah chuan Zeruii fapa pathum Joaba te, Abisaia te, Asahela te an tel a, Asahela chu zukpui ang maia ngalchak a ni." 
2Samuel2:19 Asahela chuan ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw pawh pêng lovin Abnera chu a ûm ngat ngat a." 
2Samuel2:20 Abnera chu a han lehhawi a, “Nang i ni maw, Asahel,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ni e,” tiin a chhâng a." 
2Samuel2:21 “Ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw min pênsan la, tlangvâl pakhat kha man mai la, a râlthuam hlihsak rawh,” a ti a. Asahela chuan a ûm chu a bânsan duh lo." 
2Samuel2:22 Abnera chuan Asahela hnênah, “Min ûm tawh suh, ka that palh ang che, i u Joaba hmêl ka hmu ngam dâwn em ni?” a ti leh a." 
2Samuel2:23 Mahse, Asahela chuan a ûm lui zêl a; Abnera chuan a fei hmâwr zum lo lamin a pumah a lo chhun a, fei chu a hnungah a tlang a, chumi hmunah chuan a tlu tawp a, a thi ta a. Asahela a tlûka, a thihna hmun lo thleng apiang chu an ding chawt zêl a." 
2Samuel2:24 Joaba leh Abisaia chuan Abnera chu an la ûm zêl a, Gibeon thlalêr panna Gia chhak lama Ama tlâng an thlenin ni a tla a." 
2Samuel2:25 Benjamin thlahte chu Abnera bulah chuan an pung khâwm a, pâwl khata insiamin tlângchhîpah ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
2Samuel2:26 Abnera chuan Joaba chu a au va, “Kan inbei reng dâwn em ni? Hei hian a tâwpa inhuatna mai lo chu eng mah sâwtna a awm lo tih i ngaihtuah na nge? Engtikah nge mite chu an unaute ûm tawh lo tûra i hrilh dâwn?” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:27 Joaba chuan, “Pathian nung chhâlin ka sawi e, eng mah sawi lo la chu, mite chuan naktûk zîng thlengin an unaute an la ûm dâwn asin le’” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:28 Tichuan, Joaba chuan tawtawrâwt a han hâm a, a mite chu an ding ṭhup a, Israel-te chu an ûm ta lo va, an bei leh ta hek lo." 
2Samuel2:29 Abnera leh a mite chu zankhuain an kal a, Araba an kal tlang a, Jordan lui an kân a, nilêngin an kal leh a, Mahanaim chu an thleng ta a." 
2Samuel2:30 Joaba chuan Abnera a ûm chu a kîrsan a, a mite chu a ko khâwm vek a, Asahela bâkah Davida mite sâwm leh pakua lai an kim lo tih a hre ta a." 
2Samuel2:31 Davida hote erawh chuan Benjamin hnam Abnera hote chu mi zathum leh sawmruk lai an that a. 
2Samuel2:32 Asahela ruang chu an la a, Bethlehem-a a pa thlânah an phûm a, Joaba leh a mite chu zankhuain an kal a, a tûk khawvârah chuan Hebron an thleng ta a." 
2Samuel3:1 Saula chhûngte leh Davida chhûngte chu rei tak an indo va, Davida chu a chak tial tial a, Saula chhûngte chu an chak lo tial tial a." 
2Samuel3:2 Davida chuan Hebron-a an awm laiin fapa paruk a nei a. A u ber chu Amnona, Jezreel mi Ahinoami laka mi a ni." 
2Samuel3:3 A dawttu chu Kileaba, Karmel tlânga Nabala thihsan a nupui Abigaili laka mi a ni. A pathumna chu Absaloma, Gesur lal, Talmaia fanu Maaki laka mi a ni." 
2Samuel3:4 A palina chu Adonija, Hagiti hrin a ni. A pangana chu Sefatia, Abitali hrin a ni." 
2Samuel3:5 A parukna chu Ithreama, Davida nupui Ekli laka mi a ni; hêng hi Davida fa, Hebron-a piangte chu an ni." 
2Samuel3:6 Saula chhûngte leh Davida chhûngte chu an indo zêl a, Saula chhûngte zîngah Abnera chuan thu a nei ta tial tial a." 
2Samuel3:7 Saula chuan hmei a nei a, a hming chu Rizpii a ni a, Aii fanu a ni a. Isboseta chuan Abnera hnênah, “Engtizia nge ka pa hmei i mutpui le?” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:8 Isboseta thu sawi avâng chuan Abnera chu a thinrim hle a, a hnênah, “Juda lamṭang uicho em ka nih, tûn thlengin i pa Saula chhûngte, a unaute leh a ṭhiante tân rinawm takin ka thawk a, nang pawh Davida kutah ka hlân lo che a; mahse, nang chuan he hmeichhe laka sualah min puh vei maw?" 
2Samuel3:9 Lalpa thu lo thlun tawh," 
2Samuel3:10 lalna chu Saula chhûngte hnên ata chhuhsaka Israel leh Judai ram, Dan aṭanga Beer-seba thlenga Davida lalṭhutthlêng tungding tûra ka tihhlawhtlin loh vaih chuan Pathianin Abnera chu na takin khawih sela, tihlum hial rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:11 Isboseta chuan kamkhat pawhin a chhâng lo, Abnera chu a hlau hle si a." 
2Samuel3:12 Tichuan, Abnera chuan Davida hnênah palai a tîr ta a, a hnênah, “He ram hi tu ta nge? Inremna siam ila, Israel mi zawng zawng i lama ṭang tûrin ka beihpui ang che,” a ti ta a." 
2Samuel3:13 Davida chuan, “Aw le, nang nêna inremna kan siam dân tûr chu hetiang hi ni rawh se: mi hmu tûra i lo kal hunah Saula fanu Mikali rawn hruai ngei ngei ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:14 Davida chuan Saula fapa Isboseta hnênah, “Ka nupui, Mikali, Filistia mi serh vun zaa ka lei kha min rawn pe rawh,” tiin mi a tîr bawk a" 
2Samuel3:15 Isboseta chuan, a pasal Paltiela, Laisa fapa hnên ata chu chhuhsak tûrin mi a tîr a." 
2Samuel3:16 A pasal chuan ṭap chungin Bahurim thlengin a zui a, Abnera chuan a hnênah, “Kîrsan tawh rawh,” a ti a: tichuan, a kîr ta a." 
2Samuel3:17 Abnera chuan Israel upaho chu a berâwn a, an hnênah, “Tûn hma khân Davida chu in lalah in duh ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel3:18 Tûnah lalah nei tawh rawh u le, Lalpa chuan Davida hnênah thu a thlung a, ‘Ka chhiahhlawh Davida chuan, ka mi Israel-te chu Filistia mite kut ata leh an hmêlmate kut ata a chhan chhuak ang,’ a tih kha,” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:19 Abnera chuan Benjamina thlahte pawh a bia a. Tichuan, Israel mite leh Benjamin chhûngte chuan ṭha an tih thu hrilh tûrin Hebron khuaa Davida hnênah an va kal ta a." 
2Samuel3:20 Abnera chu mi sawmhnih hruaiin Hebrona Davida hnênah a kal ta a, Davida chuan ruai a lo ṭhehsak a." 
2Samuel3:21 Abnera chuan Davida hnênah, “Ka va chhuak ang a, ka pu, lal tân hian Israel mi zawng zawng ka va ko khâwm ang a; tichuan, anni nên chuan inremna in siam ang a, a ṭha i tih ang takin an chungah ro i rêl dâwn nia,” a ti a. Davida chuan Abnera chu ngaihṭha takin a kal chhuahtîr ta a." 
2Samuel3:22 Chumi hnu chuan Joaba leh Davida sipai ṭhenkhat, an rammu an lo hâwng a, râllâk sum tam tak an rawn hâwn a. Abnera chu Hebron khuaah Davida hnênah a lo awm tawh lo va; ani chu Davida chuan a chhuahtîr a, ngaihngam takin a kal chhuak a." 
2Samuel3:23 Joaba leh a sipaite an lo thlen chuan, “Nera fapa Abnera chu lal hmaah a lo kal a, lal chuan a chhuahtîr a, ngaihngam takin a kal ta,” tih an lo hrilh a." 
2Samuel3:24 Joaba chu lal hnênah a kal a, “I thil lo tih hi engtizia nge ni le? Ngai teh Abnera chu i hmaah a lo kal a, engtizia nge i chhuahtîr leh mai? Hei, a bo leh daih tawh hi." 
2Samuel3:25 Nera fapa Abnera hi tu nge a nih i hria a, nangmah bum tumin, i chettlat dân leh i thiltih zawng zawng hriat tumin a lo kal a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:26 Davida hnên ata a chhuah hnu chuan Joaba chuan Abnera ûm tûrin mi a tîr a; Sira tuichhunchhuah aṭangin ani chu an rawn hruai kîr a. Davida chuan chu chu a hre lo. 
2Samuel3:27 Abneran Hebron a lo thlen chuan Joaba chuan kulh kawngkhâr bulah a fâla biak tum ni âwm takin a hruai a; tichuan, a unau Asahela a lo thah phuba chu a la ta a, Joaba chuan a dulah a vit a, a thi ta a." 
2Samuel3:28 Davidan chu thu chu a lo hriat chuan, “Nera fapa Abnera thah thu-ah kei leh ka ram chu Lalpa mit hmuhin kan thiang kumkhua ang." 
2Samuel3:29 A thisen mawh chu Joaba leh a pa chhûngte chungah tla rawh se, Joaba chhûngte zîngah panchhe vei te, phâr te, ramtuileilo te, khandaiha thi te, ṭâm tuarte awm reng rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:30 Joaba leh a u Abisaia chuan Gibeon indonaah an nau Asahela chu Abneran a thah avângin an that ve a ni. 
2Samuel3:31 Davida chuan Joaba leh a hnêna sipai zawng zawng hnênah, “In puante pawtthlêr ula, saiip puan sinin Abnera vui tûrin a hmaah kal rawh u,” a ti a. Lal Davida pawhin hlâng chu a zui a." 
2Samuel3:32 Abnera chu Hebron-ah an phûm a; a thlânah lal chu ring takin a ṭap a, mipui zawng zawng an ṭap bawk a." 
2Samuel3:33 Lal chuan Abnera chu hetiangin a ṭah a: “Engtizia nge Abnera chu mi â thiha a thih tâk le? 
2Samuel3:34 I kut phuar a ni lo, i ke hlin a ni hek lo, mi sualte kut tuar ang maiin i thih tâk le?” a ti a; tichuan, mi zawng zawng chuan an ṭah leh a." 
2Samuel3:35 Chhûnah chuan Davida chu eng emaw tal ei tûrin an ngên a; mahse, hetiangin thu a lo tiam tawh a, “Ni tlâk hma chu chaw pawh, thil dang pawh, eng mah ka ei lo vang, ka ei chuan Pathianin a tih tihin min ti rawh se, na tak pawhin ka chungah ti rawh se,” tiin." 
2Samuel3:36 Mi zawng zawngin chutianga a tih chu an hria a, an lâwm a, lal thiltih dân chuan mipui a tilâwm hle a." 
2Samuel3:37 Chumi ni chuan mipui leh Israel mi zawng zawngin Nera fapa Abnera thah chungchângah lalin inhnamhnawihna a nei lo tih an hre chiang ta a. 
2Samuel3:38 Lal chuan a mite hnênah, “Vawiin hian Israel milian, mi ropui tak a thi tih in hre na nge?" 
2Samuel3:39 Lal atân hriak min thih hlim a ni a, ka la chak lo va, Zeruii fate hi an huangtau lutuk ta deuh a ni. Lalpa chuan thil sual titute chu an thiltihin a phu ang ngeiin hrem rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel4:1 Saula fapa Isboseta chuan Abnera chu Hebron-ah an that tih a lo hriat chuan a thlaphâng ta hle a. Israel mi zawng zawng pawh an mangang a. 
2Samuel4:2 Saula fapa Isboseta chuan rammu pâwl hotu pahnih a nei a, an hming chu Baana leh Rekaba an ni. Chûng mite chu Benjamin thlah Beerot mi Rimona fapate an ni. Beerot chu Benjamin ram chhûnga ngaih a ni." 
2Samuel4:3 Beerot khuaa awmte chu Gitaim-ah an tlân a, tûn thlengin chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
2Samuel4:4 Saula fapa Jonathana chuan fapa a nei a, ani chu a ke a bai a. Saula leh Jonathana thih thu Jezreel aṭanga an hriat lai chuan ani chu kum nga mi a ni. A awmtunu chuan a pawm a, a tlânchhia a, a hmanhmawh lutukna lamah a thlauh a; tichuan, a ke a lo bai ta a ni. A hming chu Mefiboseta a ni." 
2Samuel4:5 Beerot khaw mi Rimona fapa Rekaba leh Baana chu Isboseta in lam panin an chhuak a; chu chu ni sat vânglai tak a ni. Isboseta chu a chhûn chawlh lai a ni a. 
2Samuel4:6 Kawngkhâr vêngtu hmeichhia chu a mut a chhuak hle a, a buhthlei lai chu a lo muthlu a; chutih lai chuan Rekaba leh a nau Baana chu an lût a." 
2Samuel4:7 Pindanah an lût a, Isboseta chu a mut pindana tui taka a mu lai chu a dulah an vit a, an that ta a. A lu an tansak a, an la a, Araba lam kawngah zânkhuain an kalpui a." 
2Samuel4:8 Isboseta lu chu Hebron khuaa Davida hnênah an rawn thlen a, lal hnênah chuan, “Hei, i hmêlma, thah tumtu che Saula fapa Isboseta lu kan rawn hâwn e. Ka pu, lal phuba chu, Lalpa chuan vawiin hian Saula leh a thlahte chungah a la ta a ni,” an ti a." 
2Samuel4:9 Davida chuan Berot khaw mi Rimona fapa Rekaba leh a nau Baana chu heti hian a chhâng a, “Ka manganna tinrêng laka min chhanchhuaktu Lalpa, mi nung hmingin ka sawi e;" 
2Samuel4:10 thu lâwmawm rawn thlenah inngaiin, ‘Saula chu a thi ta’ tih thu rawn sawitu chu ka lo man a, Ziklag khuaah ka that a, chu chu a thu ‘Lâwmawm’ a rawn thlen mana ka pêk chu a ni." 
2Samuel4:11 Pawisawi lo, ama in chhûng lum, a khumlaizâwla mu lai ngei thattu, nangni mi sual lakah hian a thisen phuba chu ka va han la dâwn tehrêng êm! Tûnah hian leilung ata ka tiboral dâwn che u a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel4:12 Davida chuan a sipaite chu thu a pe a, an kut leh kete an tan a, an ruang chu Hebron dîl kamah an khai a, Isboseta lu erawh chu an la a, Hebron khuaah, Abnera thlânah chuan an phûm ta a." 
2Samuel5:1 Israel hnam zawng zawng chu Davida hnênah Hebron-ah chuan an lo kal a, a hnênah, “I thisen zawmpuite kan ni a." 
2Samuel5:2 Tûn hmaa Saula kan chunga a lal lai khân Israel-te chu an rammutnaah i hruai ṭhîn a. Lalpa chuan i hnênah, ‘Ka mi Israel-te hi i kaihruai ang a, an chungah i lal ang,’ a tih che kha,” an ti a." 
2Samuel5:3 Tichuan, Israel upa zawng zawng chu Hebron khuaah lal hnênah an lo kal a, lal chuan anni chu Hebron khuaah chuan thu a lo thlunpui a, Davida chu Israel lal atân hriak an thih ta a." 
2Samuel5:4 Davida chu lal a lo nih khân kum sawmthuma upa a ni, kum sawmli chhûng ro a rêl a." 
2Samuel5:5 Hebron-ah Juda-te chungah kum sarih leh thla ruk a lal a, Jerusalem-ah Israel leh Juda-te chungah kum sawmthum leh pathum a lal bawk a." 
2Samuel5:6 Lal leh a mite chu, chu lai hmuna chêng Jebus-ho bei tûrin Jerusalem an pan ta a. Davida chu a luh theih loh ringin a hnênah, “Hetah hian i lo lût tawp lo vang, mitdel leh kebaite pawhin an lo dang thei ang che,” an lo ti a." 
2Samuel5:7 Mahse, Davida chuan Zion kulh chu a la ta mai a, chu chu Davida khawpui a ni." 
2Samuel5:8 Chumi ni chuan Davidan a hote hnênah, “Tu pawh Jebus-hote ka huat anga huaa thah duh chu anmahni bei tûrin tuiluankawr lamah chho sela, ka hmêlma, mitdel leh kebaite chu bei rawh se,” a ti a. Chuvâng chuan alâwm, ‘mitdel leh kebaite chu’ Lalpa inah an lût ve thei lo vang,” an tih tâk ni." 
2Samuel5:9 Davida chu kulhah chuan a awm a, “Davida khawpui” tih a lo ni ta a. Davida chuan a vêlin kulh a siam a, Milo aṭangin lal in thlengin a siam ṭha a." 
2Samuel5:10 Davida chu a lo ropui deuh deuh va, Engkim Lalpa chu a hnênah a awm reng a." 
2Samuel5:11 Tura lal Hirama chuan Davida hnênah mi a tîr a, Sidar thing te, kut themthiam te, lungchher thiamte a thawn a, Davida in chu an saksak a." 
2Samuel5:12 Davida chuan amah chu Israel-te lal atân Lalpan a tinghet a, a mi Israel-te avângin ram chu a chawimawi a ni tih a hre ta a." 
2Samuel5:13 Hebron a chhuahsan hnu chuan Davida chuan hmei leh nupui, Jerusalem-ah a neih belh a, fanu fapa a nei ta ṭeuh va." 
2Samuel5:14 Hêng hi Jerusalem-a a fa neihte chu an ni: Samua te, Sobaba te, Nathana te, Solomona te," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibhara te, Elisua te, Nefega te, Jafia te," 
2Samuel5:16 Elisama te, Eliada te, Elifeleta te an ni." 
2Samuel5:17 Israel miten Davida chu lal atân hriak an thih tih an hriatin Filistia mi zawng zawng chu Davida bei tûrin an lo thawk a, chu chu Davidan a lo hria a, kulhbîngah a chhuk a." 
2Samuel5:18 Filistia mite chu Refaim ruamah an inzâr a. 
2Samuel5:19 Davida chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Filistia mite chu ka zu bei ang em, ka kutah anni chu mi pe dâwn em?” tiin a zâwt a. Lalpa chuan, “Kal rawh, Filistia-ho chu i kutah ka pe ngei dâwn,” a ti a." 
2Samuel5:20 Tichuan, Davida chu Baal-perazim-ah a kal a, chutah chuan Filistia-ho chu a hneh a, “Tuikhuah sah ang maiin Lalpa chuan ka hmêlmate min tihdarhsak ta,” a ti a, chu hmun chu Baal-perazim a vuah ta a." 
2Samuel5:21 Filistia mite chuan an pathian lemte an tlânchhiatsan a, Davida leh a mite chuan an la a." 
2Samuel5:22 Filistia mite chu an lo chho leh a, Refaim ruamah an inzâr leh a." 
2Samuel5:23 Davida chuan Lalpa chu a râwn leh a, ani chuan, “Va pan mai suh, an hnung lamah hual la, thingtheihmu hmun aṭangin anni chu bei ang che." 
2Samuel5:24 Tin, thingtheihmu lêr aṭanga kal ri ṭhup ṭhup ang thâwm i hriat veleh bei thut rawh, chu chu Filistia-ho bei tûrin Lalpa chu i hmaah a kal tihna a ni ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel5:25 Davida chuan Lalpa thupêk ang chuan a ti a, Filistia mite chu Geba aṭanga Gezer thlengin a ûm ta a." 
2Samuel6:1 Davida chuan Israel-te zîng aṭanga mi sîngthum a thlante chu a ko khâwm a. 
2Samuel6:2 Davida leh a mite chu Judai rama Baala khuaa Pathian Bâwm, Engkim Lalpa, cherub chunga chuang hming chuanna chu la tûrin an thawk chhuak a." 
2Samuel6:3 Pathian Bâwm chu tawlailîr tharah an dah a, tlânga Abinadaba in ata chu an la chhuak a, Abinadaba fapa Uza leh Ahioa chuan tawlailîr thar chu an khalh a." 
2Samuel6:4 Ahioa chu Pathian Bâwm hma lamah chuan a kal a. 
2Samuel6:5 Davida leh Israel mi zawng zawng chuan ri thei chi hrang hrang: ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te, khuangtê te, darbenthek te leh tawtawrâwt te nên nasa takin Lalpa an fak a." 
2Samuel6:6 Nakona hruihzâwl an thlen chuan bâwngpa chu a petek avângin Uza chuan a kut a phar chhuak a, Pathian Bâwm chu a va dawm a." 
2Samuel6:7 Lalpa chu, Uza chungah, a tih dik loh avâng chuan, a thinur ta thut a; chutah chuan Pathianin a tihlum a, Pathian Bâwm bulah chuan a thi ta a." 
2Samuel6:8 Lalpa thinur chu Uza chunga a tlâk avângin Davida chu a thinur hle a, chu hmun chu Perez-uza a vuah a, tûn thlengin a hmingah a la pu ta reng a ni." 
2Samuel6:9 Chumi ni chuan Lalpa chu a hlau hle a, “Engtin nge Lalpa Bâwm chu ka hawn theih tâk ang le?” a ti a."
