2Samuel6:10 Tichuan, Pathian Bâwm chu Davida khawpuiah chuan a hâwnpui duh ta lo va. Git mi Obed-edoma inah a dah ta zâwk a." 
2Samuel6:11 Lalpa Bâwm chu Git mi, Obed-edoma inah chuan thla thum a awm a, Obed-edoma te chhûngkua chu Lalpa chuan mal a sâwm a." 
2Samuel6:12 “Pathian Bâwm avângin Lalpan Obed-edoma chhûngkua leh a in-leh-lo zawng zawng chu mal a sâwm a ni,” tiin Davida an hrilh a. Davida chuan Pathian Bâwm chu Obed-edoma in aṭangin Davida khawpuiah lâwm takin a la ta a." 
2Samuel6:13 Lalpa Bâwm zâwntuten bâwm chu pên ruk an han kalpui a, Davida chuan a dintîr rih a, bâwngpa leh ran chawm thau inthawina a hlân a." 
2Samuel6:14 Davida chuan puan zai sîna siam puithiam kawr a inbel a, a theihtâwpa nasain Lalpa hmaah chuan a lâm a." 
2Samuel6:15 Davida leh Israel mite chuan hlim taka auva, tawtawrâwt hâm chung zêlin Lalpa Bâwm chu an la chho ta a." 
2Samuel6:16 Lalpa Bâwm chu Davida khawpuia an luhpui lai chuan Saula fanu Mikali chuan tukverh aṭangin a lo thlîr a; Lalpa hmaa Davida zuang leh lâm chu a hmusit rilru hle a. 
2Samuel6:17 Lalpa Bâwm chu an la lût a, a dahna tûra Davida zâr, puan in chhûngah chuan an dah a; Davida chuan Engkim Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlan te, remna thilhlan te a hlân a." 
2Samuel6:18 A hlan zawh chuan Engkim Lalpa hmingin mipui tân malsâwmna a dîlsak a. 
2Samuel6:19 Israel mipui zawng zawng, a hmei a pain, mi tin hnênah chhang hlawm khat leh sahrang khat leh grep rah pho ro hlawm khat a pe a. Tichuan, mahni in lamah an hâwng ta ṭheuh va." 
2Samuel6:20 A chhûngte tân malsâwmna dîlsak tûrin Davida chu a lo haw chuan Saula fanu Mikali chu amah hmuak tûrin a lo chhuak a, a hnênah, “Vawiin chu Israel lal a va han intiropui ve le! Zah nachâng hre lo mite ang maiin a chhiahhlawh nulate hmuhah saruaka a tal chiam le!” a lo ti a." 
2Samuel6:21 Davida chuan Mikali hnênah, “I pa leh a chhûngte zawng zawng aia Israel-te chunga lala min thlangtu Lalpa hmaah asin ka lâm; Lalpa chu ka chawimawi zêl dâwn." 
2Samuel6:22 Tûn ai mah hian zahpuiawm min la ti ang; engah mah min ngai lo na ang a, hêng chhiahhlawh nula i sawite hian min ngaisâng ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel6:23 Tichuan, Saula fanu Mikali chuan a thih thlengin fa a nei ta lo va." 
2Samuel7:1 Lal chu a inah a awm a, Lalpa chuan a hmêlma zawng zawng lakah râlmuang takin a awmtîr a." 
2Samuel7:2 Lal chuan zâwlnei Nathana hnênah, “Kei chu Sidar thinga sak inah ka awm a, Pathian Bâwm erawh chu puan in maiah a awm si a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel7:3 Nathana chuan lal hnênah, “Ṭha i tih ang chuan va ti rawh, Lalpa chu i hnênah a awm alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Samuel7:4 Chumi zan vek chuan Lalpa chuan Nathana hnênah," 
2Samuel7:5 “Ka chhiahhlawh Davida chu hetiang hian va hrilh rawh. Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ka chên nân in mi saksak i tum em ni? 
2Samuel7:6 Israel fate Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah aṭangin tûn thlengin inah ka awm lo va, hmun hrang hrangah te awm sawnin puan inah te ka awm zâwk ṭhîn." 
2Samuel7:7 Hmun hrang hranga ka vah kualpui Israel fate leh ka mi Israel-te enkawltu atâna ka ruat rorêltute hnenah, ‘Engati nge Sidar thing in min saksak loh?’ ka ti ngai em ni?" 
2Samuel7:8 Tûnah ka chhiahhlawh Davida chu hetiang hian hrilh rawh: Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘I berâm vênna hmun ata, ka mi Israel-te chunga rorêl tûrin ka ko che a." 
2Samuel7:9 I vahvêlna apiangah i hnênah ka awm ṭhîn a, i hmaa hmêlma awmte chu ka hnehsak ṭhîn che a; tûnah, leia mi ropuite angin i hming ka tiropui dâwn." 
2Samuel7:10 Ka mi Israel-te chu an awm hlenna tûr ram ka pe ang a, tu ma tihbuai lohvin thlamuang takin an awm tawh ang. Tûn hma ang khân mi sualten an hnehchhiah tawh lo vang." 
2Samuel7:11 Ka mite chunga rorêltute ka ruat ṭhin lai ang khân an awm hek lo vang. In hmelmate lak ata thlamuang takin in awm tawh ang a; chu bâkah, kei Lalpa hian i chhûngkua chu ka tungding ang tih ka hrilh a che." 
2Samuel7:12 I ni a kina i pute hnêna i chawlh hunah nangmah thlâktu zînga mi, i rîla rah ngei chu, ka tungding ang a, a ram chu ka tinghet ang." 
2Samuel7:13 Ani chuan ka tân in mi saksak ang a, a ram chu kumkhua atân ka tinghet ang." 
2Samuel7:14 A pa ka ni ang a, ani chu ka fapa a ni ang. Thil a tihsual chuan pain an fate an tiang hmanga an thunun angin ka thunun ang." 
2Samuel7:15 “I hma ata Saula ka la bo va, ka khawngaihna a hnên ata ka la kîr angin ani zawng ka khawngaihna chuan a kalsan lo vang." 
2Samuel7:16 I chhûngkua leh i ram chu kumkhuain ka tinghet ang a, i lalṭhutthlêng chu nghet takin a awm reng ang,’ ” a ti a." 
2Samuel7:17 Pathianin a hrilh zawng zawng chu Nathana chuan Davida chu a hrilh vek a. 
2Samuel7:18 Lal Davida chu Lalpa inah a lût a, a ṭhu a, hetiang hian a ṭawngṭai a. “Aw, Lalpa Pathian, kei leh ka chhûngte hi eng nge maw kan niha, hetiang taka min ngaihnat le?" 
2Samuel7:19 Aw Lalpa Pathian, chu chu tâwk ti lovin i chhiahhlawh thlahte leh zêl pawh din ngheh i la tum ta fo va. Aw Lalpa Pathian, hei hi i mite i hruai dân a lo ni maw?" 
2Samuel7:20 Davida chuan i hnênah eng nge a sawi leh chuan tâk ang? Aw Lalpa Pathian, i chhiahhlawh hi i hre vek a." 
2Samuel7:21 I thu leh i duh dân angin he thil ropui tak hi i ti a, i chhiahhlawh i hriattîr ta." 
2Samuel7:22 Aw Lalpa Pathian, i va ropui tak êm! Nang ang hi tu mah an awm kan hre lo, nang lo chu Pathian dang an awm hek lo." 
2Samuel7:23 An saltânna ata i mi atâna i hruai chhuah Israel hnam ang hi khawvêlah an awm lo. An tân thil ropui leh mak tak tak i ti a, lei pum puiah i hming a lo thang ta. Aigupta ram ata i pual atân i hruai chhuahte hmaah chuan hnam dangte chu an pathiante chawpin i hnawt bo va." 
2Samuel7:24 I mi Israel-te chu kumkhuaa i ta ni tûrin i tinghet a; Aw Lalpa, nang chu an Pathian i lo ni ta." 
2Samuel7:25 Tûnah, Lalpa Pathian, i chhiahhlawh leh a chhûngte chungchânga thu i lo tiam tawh chu kumkhua atân hlen la, i lo sawi tawh ang chuan ti ang che." 
2Samuel7:26 Engkim Lalpa chu Israel-te Pathian a ni, tiin i hming chawimawi kumkhua sela; tichuan, i chhiahhlawh Davida chhûngte chu i tân din nghet ang che." 
2Samuel7:27 Aw Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, i chhiahhlawh hnênah hian, ‘I chhûngkua chu ka tungding ang,’ tiin i lo hrilh tawh a, chuvâng alâwm ngênngâwl taka hei hi ka dîl che ni." 
2Samuel7:28 Aw Lalpa Pathian, nang chu Pathian i ni a, i thute chu a rinawm a, i chhiahhlawh hnênah he thu hlu tak hi i tiam ta si a." 
2Samuel7:29 I chhiahhlawh chhûngte hian i duhsakna an dawn reng theih nân khawngaih takin malsâwm ang che. Aw Lalpa Pathian, nangin i tiam tawh a, i chhiahhlawh chhûngte hi kumkhuain malsâwm ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel8:1 Chumi hnuah Davida chuan Filistia mite a hneh a, an tlâwm ta a. Metheg-ama chu Filistia mite a chhuhsak a." 
2Samuel8:2 Moab mite a hneh bawk a, mi an mante chu leiah a muttîr a, hruiin a hlîng a, a chhiar vek a, pathuma pahnih chu a that a, a dang zawng chu a zuah a. Moab mite chu Davida thuhnuaiah an awm ta a, a hnênah chhiah an chawi a." 
2Samuel8:3 Zoba lal Rehoba fapa Hadadezera chu Eufretis chhak lama a ram la lêt leh tûrin a kal a, Davida chuan a lo bei bawk a;" 
2Samuel8:4 Davida chuan sakawr chungchuang mi sângkhat leh zasarih leh sipai sînghnih a mansak a, tawlailîr za hnûktu atân sakawr za a zuah a, a dang zawng chu an tha a chhahsak a." 
2Samuel8:5 Damaska khua aṭanga Zoba lal, lal Hadadezera chhan tûra Suria mi lo kalte chu sînghnih leh sânghnih a that a." 
2Samuel8:6 Tin, Suria ram Damaska khuaah chuan a sipaite a dah a, Suria mite chu a thuhnuaiah an awm ta a, a hnênah chhiah an chawi ṭhîn a. Lalpan a ṭanpui avângin Davida chuan a râl do a hneh zêl a ni." 
2Samuel8:7 Davida chuan Hadadezera hote chu an rangkachak phawte a lâksak a, Jerusalem-ah a hâwn a." 
2Samuel8:8 Tin, Hadadezera awp khua Beta leh Berothai aṭangin lal Davida chuan dâr tam tak a hâwn bawk a." 
2Samuel8:9 Hamath lal Toia chuan Hadadezera sipai zawng zawng Davidan a hneh tih a lo hria a. 
2Samuel8:10 Toia chuan vawi tam tak a lo do ṭhin Hadadezera chu a hneh avângin lawmpuina chibai bûk tûrin a fapa Jorama chu a tîr a. Jorama chuan tangkarua leh rangkachak leh dâra siam hmanraw tam tak a pe a. 
2Samuel8:11 Chûng chu ram hrang hrang a hnehte hnên ata tangkarua leh rangkachak a lâkte nên lal Davida chuan Lalpa a hlân a. 
2Samuel8:12 A hneh rama mite chu, Edom mi te, Moab mi te, Amon mi te, Filistia mi te, Amalek-ho te an ni. Zoba lal Rehoba fapa Hadadezera laka a râllâk pawh a hlân bawk a." 
2Samuel8:13 Davida chuan chi ruamah Edom mi sîngkhat leh sângriat lai a that a, chuta chin chu a hmingthang ta hle a." 
2Samuel8:14 Edom ram hmun hrang hrangah sipai a dah a, Edom mite chu Davida khua leh tui an lo ni ta a. Lalpa chuan Davida chu a kalna apiangah a hnehtîr zêl a." 
2Samuel8:15 Davida chuan Israel ram pum puiah ro a rêl a, a mite chungah chuan dik tak leh ṭha takin ro a rêl a ni." 
2Samuel8:16 Zeruii fapa Joaba chu sipai hotu a ni a, Ahiluda fapa Jehosafata chu chanchin ziaktu a ni." 
2Samuel8:17 Ahituba fapa Zadoka leh Abiathara fapa Ahimeleka chu puithiam an ni a, Seraia chu ziaktu a ni." 
2Samuel8:18 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu Keret mi leh Pelet mite hotu a ni. Davida fapate chu khâwnbâwl an ni. 
2Samuel9:1 Davida chuan, “Saula chhûngte zîngah dam an la awm em aw? Jonathana avângin ka khawngaih dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:2 Saula chhûngkuate chhiahhlawh, a hming Ziba a awm a, Davida hnêna kal tûrin an ko va, lal chuan a hnênah, “Ziba i ni em?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ni e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:3 Lal chuan, “Pathian khawngaihna a chunga ka lantîr theih nân, Saula chhûngte zîngah dam an la awm em? a ti a. Ziba chuan lal hnênah, “Jonathana fapa pakhat a awm, a ke a bai nghe nghe asin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:4 Lal chuan a hnênah, “Khawiah nge a awm?” a ti a. Ziba chuan lal hnênah, “Amiela fapa Makira in Lo-debar khuaah a awm,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:5 Lal Davida chuan Amiela fapa Makira in Lo-debar khua ata chu hruai tûrin mi a tîr a. 
2Samuel9:6 Saula fa Jonathana fapa Mefiboseta chu Davida hnênah chuan a lo kal a, kûnin chibai a bûk a, Davida chuan, “Mefiboset,” a ti a. Ani chuan “Eng nge ka pu?” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:7 Davida chuan a hnênah, “Hlau suh aw, i pa Jonathana avângin i chungah ṭhat chhuah ka duh a ni. I pu Saula ram zawng zawng chu ka pe ang chia, ka hnênah i eiin i in bawk ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:8 Mefiboseta chuan chibai a bûk leh a “Kei, ui thisâwn ang lek, i chhiahhlawh hi eng emaw ka niha, heti taka mi i ngaihsak le?” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:9 Lal chuan Saula chhiahhlawh Ziba chu a ko va, a hnênah, “I pu Saula ram zawng zawng leh an chhûngkaw thil neih zawng zawng hi a tupa hnênah hian ka pe a ni." 
2Samuel9:10 Nang leh i fate leh i chhiahhlawhte chuan ram chu in enkawlsak ang a, thlai thar chu i pu tupa chhûngte tân in rawn la ang a, Mefiboseta erawh chuan ka hnênah a eiin a in ve ang,” a ti a. Ziba chuan fapa sâwm leh panga leh chhiahhlawh sawmhnih a nei a." 
2Samuel9:11 Ziba chuan lal hnênah, “I chhiahhlawh hian, ka pu, nang lalin tih tûr min ruatsak apiang chu ka ti zêl ang,” a ti a. Mefiboseta erawh chu lal fate ang bawkin Davida inah chuan a eiin a in ve ta a." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefiboseta chuan fapa la naupang tak a nei a, a hming chu Mika a ni. Ziba ina awm zawng zawng chu Mefiboseta chhiahhlawh an ni." 
2Samuel9:13 Mefiboseta chu Jerusalem-ah a awm ve ta a, lal inah chuan a eiin a in ṭhîn a, a ke khinghnih a ṭha lo a ni." 
2Samuel10:1 Chûng hnu chuan Amon mite lal chu a thi a, a fapa Hanuna chu a aiah a lal a." 
2Samuel10:2 Davida chuan, “A pain min lo khawngaih angin kei pawhin Nahasa fapa Hanuna chu ka khawngaih ve ang,” tih thu hrilh tûrin Hanuna hnênah mi a tîr a. Davida mi tirhten Amon ram an lo thlen chuan," 
2Samuel10:3 Amon thlah hruaitute chuan an pu Hanuna hnênah, “Davida hian i pa a zah avângin nangmah thlamuantu tûr i hnênah a rawn tîr a nih i ring em? Davida hian khawpui rawn en thlithlaia tihchhiatna zawngin enthlatu a rawn tîr a ni mai lo vang maw?” an ti a." 
2Samuel10:4 Hanuna chuan Davida mi tirhte chu a man ta mai a, an khabehmul ṭhenkhat a mehsak a, an silhfênte chu a laiah a tanbunsak a, mawng lang rengin a hâwntîr ta a." 
2Samuel10:5 Chu thu chu Davida an hrilh a, ani chuan hmuak tûrin mi a tîr a, anni chu an zak hle a. Lal chuan, “In khabehmul a chawr sei hma chu Jeriko-ah awm rih ula, chumi hnuah in lo hâwng dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Samuel10:6 Amon mite chuan Davida hmêlma an ni ta tih an inhriat chuan Beth-rehob leh Zoba-a mi, Suria sipai sînghnih leh Maaka-a mi sângkhat leh Tob mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih an chah a, an ruai ta a." 
2Samuel10:7 Chu thu chu Davidan a hriat chuan Joaba chu, a sipai indo mi zawng zawng nên a tîr a." 
2Samuel10:8 Amon mite chu an lo thawk a, khawpui luhna kawngkhâr bulah ṭanhmun an rem a; mi dang, Zoba leh Rehob aṭanga Suria mite, Tob mite leh Maaka mite erawh chu a hrangin phûlah an awm a." 
2Samuel10:9 Joaba chuan an hma lamah leh an hnung lamah an rawn bei dâwn tih a hriatin Israel zînga sipai ṭha ṭha a thlang chhuak a, Suria mite bei tûrin ṭanhmun a lo rem a." 
2Samuel10:10 Mi dang zawng zawng chu a u Abisaia kutah a dah a, Amon mite bei tûrin a ti a." 
2Samuel10:11 Joaba chuan, “Suria-ho hi ka hneh dâwn loh chuan min rawn pui ang a, Amon-ho hi i hneh dâwn loh chuan ka rawn pui ang che." 
2Samuel10:12 Ṭan la la, kan mite leh kan Pathian khawpui tân huaisen takin i bei ang. Lalpa chuan ṭha a tih ang zêlin ti rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel10:13 Tichuan, Joaba leh a sipaite chu Suria-ho bei tûrin an lo thawk a, anni chu an tlânchhe ta a." 
2Samuel10:14 Amon miten Suria-ho tlânchhia an hmuh chuan anni pawh chu Abisaia hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ve ta a. Khawpuiah chuan an tlân lût ta a. Tichuan, Joaban mi a ûm chu a kîrsan a, Jerusalem-ah a haw ta a." 
2Samuel10:15 Suria mite chuan Israel-ten an hneh tih an inhriatin an inpun khâwm ṭha leh ta a. 
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezera chuan Eufretis lui ral lehlama Suria mite chu a va hruai chhuak a, Helam-ah an kal a. Chutah chuan Hadadezera sipai hotu Sobaka chuan an hma a hruai a." 
2Samuel10:17 Chu thu chu Davida an hrilh a; tichuan, Israel mi zawng zawng a khâwm a, Jordan lui kânin Helam-ah chuan a va kal a. Suria mite chuan Davida do tûrin ṭan an lo rem a." 
2Samuel10:18 Mahse, Suria mite chu Israel mite hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ta a. Davida chuan Suria-ho sakawr chungchuang mi zasarih leh sipai kea kal sîngli a that a. An sipai hotu Sobaka pawh na takin a hliam a, chutah chuan a thi ve ta a." 
2Samuel10:19 Tichuan, Hadadezera chhiah khaw lal zawng zawngten Israel-te hmaah an chan a chhe ta tih an hriatin Israel-ho nên inremna an siam a, Israel khua leh tuiah an awm ta a. Suria mite chuan Amon mite chu an pui ngam ta lo va." 
2Samuel11:1 Khua a lo ṭhâl a, indo tûra lalte an feh chhuah ṭhin hun a lo thleng a, Davida chuan Joaba chu, hotute leh Israel sipai zawng zawng nên a tîr chhuak a. Amon mite an va hneh a. Raba khua chu an hual a; Davida erawh chu Jerusalem-ah a awm reng a." 
2Samuel11:2 Tlai khat chu Davida chhun mu chu a tho va, lal in chung zâwlah chuan a lêng vêl a. Chuta ṭang chuan hmeichhe pakhat inbual lai hi a hmu a, hmeichhia chu a hmêl a ṭha hle a." 
2Samuel11:3 Davida chuan tu nge a nih zâwt tûrin mi a tîr a. A mi tirh chuan, “Eliama fanu Bathsebi, Hit mi Uria nupui a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:4 Davida chuan va hruai tûrin mi a tîr a; ani chu a hnênah an rawn hruai a; a lo mutpui a (a felloh zawha a inthen hlim a ni) Bathsebi chu a haw leh ta a. 
2Samuel11:5 Hmeichhia chu a lo rai ta a. “Nau ka pai ta,” tiin Davida chu a hrilh a." 
2Samuel11:6 Davida chuan Joaba hnênah, “Hit mi Uria kha rawn hâwntîr rawh,” a ti a. Joaba chuan Uria chu Davida hnênah a kaltîr a." 
2Samuel11:7 Uria chu Davida hnên a lo thlen chuan Joaba chanchin te, sipaihote dinhmun te leh indona chungchâng a lo zâwt a." 
2Samuel11:8 Davida chuan Uria hnênah, “I inah hâwng la, va châwl hahdam rawh khai,” a ti a. Uria chu lal in ata a chhuak a, lal chuan ei tûrte a pe bawk a." 
2Samuel11:9 Nimahsela, Uria chu a pu chhiahhlawhte nên lal in kawngka bulah a mu ve a, a inah a riak duh lo va." 
2Samuel11:10 Davida chu, “Uria a in lamah a haw duh lo,” tia an hrilh chuan Davida chuan a hnênah, “Rei tak i thangbo tawh si a, engah nge i in lamah i hâwn loh?” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:11 Uria chuan Davida hnênah, “Pathian Bâwm te, Israel-te leh Juda mite chu puan inah an awm a, ka pu Joaba leh kan hotute pawh ramhnuaiah an inkulh a; kei ina hâwngin ka eiin ka in ang a, ka nupui bulah ka mu bîk ang maw? Chutiang thil tih âwm loh chu ka ti tawp lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:12 Davida chuan a hnênah, “Vawiin chu hetah châwl rih la, naktûkah i kal leh dâwn nia,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Uria chu chumi ni leh a tûk thlengin Jerusalem-ah a awm a." 
2Samuel11:13 Davida chuan zanriah a eipui a, rui hnêp khawpin a hrai a. Chumi zân pawh chuan a ina hâwng lovin lal chhiahhlawhte zîngah chuan mu tûrin a chhuak a." 
2Samuel11:14 A tûk zîngah Davida chuan Joaba hnênah lehkha a thawn a, Uria chu a kentîr a." 
2Samuel11:15 Lehkhaah chuan, “Uria chu râl zualna lai berah hma tâwntîr la, an rawn beiha an thah theih nân tawlh kîrsan ang che u,” tiin a ziak a." 
2Samuel11:16 Khua chu Joaba chuan a hual ta a, Uria chu inbeihna nasatna lai ber, hmatâwngah a ṭantîr a." 
2Samuel11:17 Khuaa mite chu an lo chhuak a, Joaba chu an rawn bei a. Davida sipai ṭhenkhat chu an rawn that a, Hit mi Uria pawh a thi tel ve a." 
2Samuel11:18 Joaba chuan Davida hnênah indo chanchin a hrilh a. 
2Samuel11:19 A mi tirh hnênah chuan, “Indo chanchin zawng zawng lal chu i hrilh zawhin," 
2Samuel11:20 ani chu a thinur thut thei a, i hnênah, ‘Engati nge hnai têa khua chu in va beih? Kulh bang aṭangin an kâp mai ang che u tih in hre lâwm ni?" 
2Samuel11:21 Jerubeseta fapa Abimeleka kha tu nge that kha? Hmeichhiain kulh bang aṭangin buh râwtsawmna lungin a zu vawm a, Thebez-ah khân a thi ta a ni lâwm ni? Engati nge kulh bang bula in va kal?’ tia thu a lo zawh che chuan, ‘I chhiahhlawh Hit mi Uria pawh kha a thi asin,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:22 Mi tirh chu a kal a, a va thleng a, Joaban sawi tûr a tih zawng zawng chu Davida a hrilh a." 
2Samuel11:23 Mi tirh chuan Davida hnênah, “Mite chuan min rawn nawr a, phûlah min rawn bei a; mahse, kulh kawngkhâr bul thlengin kan nawr lêt a." 
2Samuel11:24 Thal kâptute chuan kulh bang aṭangin i chhiahhlawhte chu an rawn kâp a, ṭhenkhat an thi a, i chhiahhlawh, Hit mi Uria pawh kha a thi tel ve asin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:25 Davida chuan mi tirh hnênah chuan, “Joaba hnênah heti hian va sawi rawh, ‘He thil hi tu man pawiti tehchiam suh u, indonaah chuan tu nge thi dâwn tih tu man an hre lâwk hlei nêm. Nasa lehzualin khua chu bei ula, tichhe vek rawh u,’ tiin Joaba chu va fuih rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:26 Uria nupui chuan a pasal a thi ta tih a hriat chuan ani chu a sûn a. 
2Samuel11:27 A sûn hun bi a kim chuan Davida chuan a inah a hruai a, nupui atân a nei ta a. Fapa a hrinsak a, Lalpa chu Davida thil tih dânah chuan a lâwm lo hle a." 
2Samuel12:1 Lalpa chuan Nathana chu Davida hnênah a tîr a, Nathana chu a kal ta a. Davida hnênah chuan, “Khaw pakhatah mi pahnih an awm a; Pakhat chu a hausa hle a, pakhat erawh chu a rethei hle a." 
2Samuel12:2 A hausa zâwk chuan berâm tam tak leh bâwng tam tak a nei a. 
2Samuel12:3 A rethei zâwk erawh chuan ama suma a lei berâmnotê, a nu pakhat a nei a. A duat êm êm a, a fate zîngah an inah chuan a puitlin thlengin a chêntîr a. An ei ang ang a eiin a in ve a. A pawm a, a fanu ang maiin a duat a." 
2Samuel12:4 Mikhual pakhat hi mi hausa hnênah chuan a thleng a, chu mi chuan a mikhual eipui atân ama berâm leh ran chu talh phal lovin mi rethei berâmno chu a chhuhsak a, a mikhual eipui atân a talhsak ta a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:5 Chu mi hausaa chungah chuan Davida chu a thinur ta hle a, Nathana hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa hming chhâlin ka sawi e, chu mi chu thi tlâk a ni." 
2Samuel12:6 Chu thil chu a tih avâng leh khawngaihna a neih loh avângin berâmno chu a lêt liin a rûl leh tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:7 Nathana chuan Davida hnênah, “Chu mi chu nangmah hi i ni alâwm. Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Israel-te lal atân hriak ka thih che a, Saula kut ata ka chhan chhuak che a." 
2Samuel12:8 I pu in leh lote, i pu nupuite i kutah ka pe a. Israel chhûng te leh Juda chhûng te pawh ka pe bawk che a. Hêng hi a la tlêm lutuk a nih chuan a dang pawh ka pêk belh zêl tûr che alâwm." 
2Samuel12:9 Engati nge Lalpa thupêk zâwm lova, a mit hmuha thil ṭha lo chu i tih le? Hit mi Uria chu i that a, Amon mite khandaih chuan i tihlum a, a nupui i neihsak a." 
2Samuel12:10 Ka thu i awih loh avâng leh Hit mi Uria nupui i neihsak avângin i thlahte chu khandaihin an thi an thi ang. 
2Samuel12:11 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘I chhûngkua aṭang ngeiin i chungah buaina ka thlentîr ang. I hmuh reng laiin i nupui ka lâksak ang che a, mi dang hnênah ka pe ang a, chhûn êngah i nupuite chu an mutpui ang." 
2Samuel12:12 Nang chuan a rûkin i ti a, kei erawh chuan Israel mi zawng zawng hmuh tûrin chhûn êngah ka ti ang,’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:13 Davida chuan Nathana hnênah, “ Lalpa chungah thil sual ka lo ti ta a ni,” a ti a. Nathana chuan, “ Lalpa chuan a ngaidam ta che a, i thi lo vang." 
2Samuel12:14 Amaherawhchu, he i thiltih hian Lalpa chu nasa taka a tihhmingchhiat avângin i fa chu a thi ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:15 Nathanan a in lama Davida a hâwnsan hnuin Lalpa chuan Uria nupui laka Davida fa chungah chuan kut a thlâk ta a, a dam lo ta a." 
2Samuel12:16 Davida chuan naupang tân Pathian hnênah a ngên chiam a; chaw te a nghei a, a pindanah a lût a, zankhuain chhuatah a mu a." 
2Samuel12:17 A ina upaho a mutna ata kaihthawh tumin a kiangah an rawn ding a; mahse, a tho duh lo va, an hnênah pawh chaw a kîl duh lo." 
2Samuel12:18 A ni sarih ni chuan naupang chu a thi ta a. Davida chhiahhlawhte chuan naupang thih thu hrilh chu an huphurh hle a, “Naupang a la dam lai pawh khân a hnênah thu kan sawi a, a ngaithla duh si lo va, engtin nge naupang chu a thi ta tih kan hrilh ngam ang?” an ti a." 
2Samuel12:19 A chhiahhlawhte an inbekbawr chu a hmuhin Davida chuan naupang chu a thi a ni tih a ring a, a chhiahhlawhte hnênah chuan, “Naupang chu a thi ta elo?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Thi ta e,” an ti a." 
2Samuel12:20 Davida chu chhuat aṭangin a lo tho va, a inbual a, hriak a thih a, a thawmhnaw a inthlâk a, Lalpa inah a kal a, chibai a bûk a, inah a haw leh a, chaw ei tûr a lam a, an rawn hlui a, a ei ta a." 
2Samuel12:21 A chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “Engtiziaa hetianga ti nge i nih? Naupang chu a dam lai khân chaw te i nghei a, i ṭap a; mahse, naupang chu a thih veleh i lo tho va, chaw te i ei ta zâwk mai si a,” an ti a." 
2Samuel12:22 Davida chuan, “Naupang chu a la dam lai khân chaw te ngheiin ka ṭap ngei tak a, Lalpa chuan min khawngaih ang a, naupang chu a dam leh mial mahna ka tih vâng a ni." 
2Samuel12:23 Mahse, tûnah a thi ta a, engah nge chaw ka nghei tawh ang? Ka ko kîr leh thei em ni? Kei pawh a hnênah ka la kal dâwn, ani zawng ka hnênah a lo kîr leh dâwn tawh lo,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:24 Davida chuan a nupui Bathsebi chu a hnêm a, a hnênah a kal a, a mutpui a; tichuan, fapa a hring a, a hmingah Solomona a sa a. Lalpa chuan naupang chu a hmangaih hle a." 
2Samuel12:25 Lalpa chuan a hmangaih avângin chu nau hmingah chuan Jedidia sa tûrin zâwlnei Nathana chu a chah a. 
2Samuel12:26 Joaba chuan Amon mite khawpui Raba chu a rûn a, lal inte a la ṭêp a." 
2Samuel12:27 Davida hnênah mi a tîr a, “Raba khua ka bei a, an tui tlan dîl lian pawh ka la ta." 
2Samuel12:28 Tûnah, sipai la awm zawng zawng khâwm la, khua chu rawn hual la, rawn la rawh. Chutilo zawng, khawpui chu ka la ang a, a hmingṭhatna ka khum dah ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:29 Davida chuan sipai zawng zawng a khâwm a, Raba chu a pan a, a bei a, a la ta a." 
2Samuel12:30 An milim pathian Milkoma rangkachak lallukhum chu a la a, a rih lam chu kg. sawmthum leh panga a ni; lunghlua chei a ni a; tin, Davida chu an khumtîr a, khawpuia mi sum tam tak a la bawk a." 
2Samuel12:31 Chu khuaa mite chu a kawi chhuak a, thingzaina te, leilehna thîr te, hreipui te hmangin hna a thawhtîr a, leirawhchan te a siamtîr bawk a. Amon mi, khawpui danga awm zawng zawng pawh chutiang chuan a thawhtîr a. Tichuan, Davida leh a hote chu Jerusalem-ah an haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel13:1 Davida fapa Absaloma chuan farnu hmêlṭha tak a nei a, a hming chu Tamari a ni. Davida fapa Amnona chuan ani chu a ngaizâwng ta hle a." 
2Samuel13:2 A farnu Tamari a ngaihzâwn êm avângin Amnona chuan a âtchilh ta a. Tamari chu nula thianghlim a ni a, tihngaihna a hre lo va." 
2Samuel13:3 Amnona chuan ṭhian a nei a, a hming chu Jonadaba a ni. Ani chu Davida u Sama fapa a ni. Jonadaba chu fing vervêk tak a ni." 
2Samuel13:4 Amnona hnênah chuan, “Nang, lal fapa hi, engtizia nge a ni têla i chêr tulh tulh chu le? Eng vâng nge ni min hrilh teh,” a ti a. Amnona chuan a hnênah, “Ka unaupa Absaloma farnu Tamari hi ka ngaizâwng êm atin a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadaba chuan a hnênah, “Na der la, khumah mu reng la, i pain a rawn en hunah che a hnênah, ‘Khawngaih takin ka farnu Tamarin min rawn kan sela, ei tûr min rawn pe teh se, ka mit hmuhah ei tûr mi siamsak sela, a siam ngei chu ka lo ei ang e,’ lo ti rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:6 Tichuan, Amnona chu a mu a, a na der ta a. Tin, lal chuan a va kan a, Amnona chuan lal hnênah, “Khawngaih takin ka farnu Tamari lo kal sela, ka mit hmuhah chhang min siamsak sela, a siam ngei chu ka lo ei ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:7 Lal chuan lal in chhûnga awm Tamari hnênah chuan, “I nuṭa Amnona inah kal la, ei tûr va siamsak teh,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
2Samuel13:8 Tamari chu a nuṭa Amnona inah chuan a kal ta a, ani chu a lo mu reng a. Chhangphut a la a, a hmet a, chhangpêr a siam a, a hmuh lai chuan a ur hmin ta a." 
2Samuel13:9 A urna thlêng ata a la chhuak a, chhang chu a hmaah a hlui a; mahse, a ei duh lo va. Amnona chuan, “Mi dang zawng zawng hi heta ta chhuahtîr vek rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:10 Amnona chuan Tamari hnênah, “Ka mut pindanah hian chaw chu han la rawh le, i mi pêk ngei ka lo ei ang e,” a ti a. Tamari chuan a chhang siam chu a la a, a nuṭa Amnona chu a mut pindanah chuan a rawn pe a." 
2Samuel13:11 Ei tûr a pêk lai tak chuan Amnona chuan a lo man a, a hnênah, “Ka farnu, lo mu ve teh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:12 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Ni lo ve, ka nuṭapa, mi tilui suh, hetiang thil hi Israel-te zîngah tih tûr a ni lo, he thil sual tak hi ti lul suh khai." 
2Samuel13:13 Ka tân mualphona tâwp a ni a, ka meng ngam dâwn em ni? Nang pawh Israel-te zînga mi sual tâwpa ngaih i ni dâwn asin. Khawngaih takin lal hnênah sawi zâwk la, kan inneih a hnial lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:14 Nimahsela, a thu sawi chu a ngaithla duh lo va, a aiin a chak si a, a mutpui lui ta a." 
2Samuel13:15 Amnona chuan ngei tak têin a ngei leh ta si a, a hnênah, “Tho la, chhuak vat rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:16 Tamari chuan a hnênah, “Chuti mai tûr chu a ni lo vang; min hnawh chhuah hi ka chunga i tih tâk ai mah khân a sual zâwk a ni,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a ngaithla duh chuang lo va." 
2Samuel13:17 A tirhkah chhiahhlawh chu a ko va, a hnênah, “He hmeichhia hi heta ta hi hnawt chhuak la, kawng hi kalh tlat rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:18 A chhiahhlawh chuan ani chu a hnawt chhuak a, kawng chu a kalh ta a. Tamari chuan kawrfual ze hrang hranga ṭial mawi a ha a, chutiang kawrfual chu lal fanu thianghlimten an ha ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamari chuan a lu-ah vaivut a phul a, kawrfual ze mawi tak a hâk lai chu a pawtthlêr a, a chhîpah a kut a suih a, ring taka ṭap chungin a kal ta a." 
2Samuel13:20 A nuṭa Absaloma chuan, a hnênah, “I nuṭa Amnona chuan a khawih che a ni maw? Ka farnu, ngawi hrâm hrâm rawh, i nuṭa a ni alâwm. I rilru tina duh suh,” a ti a. Tichuan, Tamari chu a nuṭa Absaloma inah khawhar takin a inkhung ta a." 
2Samuel13:21 Chûng thu chu Davidan a lo hriatin a thin a ur hle a. 
2Samuel13:22 Absaloma chuan Amnona chu biak pawh a be ṭha duh ta lo va, a farnu Tamari a tihmualpho avângin Amnona chu a haw ta hle a." 
2Samuel13:23 Kum hnih a ral hnu chuan Efraim khaw kianga Baal-hazar-ah Absaloma chuan berâm hmul a mêt a, Absaloma chuan lal fapa zawng zawng chutah chuan a sâwm a." 
2Samuel13:24 Absaloma chu lal hnênah a kal a, a hnênah, “Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhin berâm hmul ka mêt a, lal leh a ṭhuihruaite chu i chhiahhlawh hnênah hian kal ve teh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:25 Lal chuan Absaloma hnênah, “Ni lo ve, ka fapa, kan za chuan kal lo ve, kan tihautak lutuk dah ang che,” a ti a. Absaloma chuan a sâwm lui a; mahse, a kal duh chuang lo va, mal a sâwmsak ta zâwk a." 
2Samuel13:26 Absaloma chuan, “A nih loh leh ka unaupa Amnona tal ka hnênah kal ve rawh se,” a ti a. Lal chuan a hnênah, “Engah nge a kal bîk ang?” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:27 Nimahsela, Absaloma chuan a ngên luih tlat avângin Amnona leh lal fapa dang zawng zawng chu a kaltîr ta a." 
2Samuel13:28 Absaloma chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah, “Amnonan uain a ruih thatho lai takin, ‘Amnona that rawh u’ ka ti ang a; tichuan, in that dâwn nia. Hlau rêng rêng suh u, hei hi in hnêna ka thupêk a ni, ngaihṭha takin awm ula, thlaphâng suh u” tiin a lo hrilh diam a." 
2Samuel13:29 Absaloma mite chuan an pu thupêk ang chuan Amnona chu an that ta a, lal fapa dang zawng zawng chu an sakawr chungah an zuangkai a, an tlânchhe ta vek a." 
2Samuel13:30 Kawng laka an la awm lai chuan, “Absaloman lal fapa zawng zawng chu pakhat mah zuah lovin a that vek mai,” tiin Davida chu an rawn hrilh a." 
2Samuel13:31 Lal chu a tho va, a silhfênte a pawtthlêr a, leiah a mu a, a kianga a chhiahhlawh awm zawng zawng pawhin an silhfênte chu an pawtthlêr ve a." 
2Samuel13:32 Davida u Sama fapa Jonadaba chuan, “Ka pu chuan lal fapa tlangvâl zawng zawng chu an thah vek ring suh se, Amnona chauh a ni thi ni. A farnu Tamari a tihhmingchhiat avâng hian hetianga tih hi Absaloma chuan a tum rêng a ni." 
2Samuel13:33 Chuvângin, ka pu, Lalpa chu lal fapa zawng zawng an thi emaw tiin lungngai duh suh se, Amnona chauh a ni thi ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:34 Absaloma erawh chu a tlân bo ta a. Râlvêngtu tlangvâl chu a han hawi vêl a, a hnung lam tlângah chuan mi tam tak lo kal a hmu a." 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadaba chuan, lal hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, lal fapate chu an lo hâwng a, i chhiahhlawhin a sawi ang chiah kha a ni e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:36 Chu thu a sawi zawh chuan lal fate chu an lo thleng a, an ṭap hawm hawm a, lal leh a chhiahhlawhte pawh chu lungchhe takin an ṭap a." 
2Samuel13:37 Absaloma chu a tlân bo va, Gesur lal Amihuda fapa Talmaia hnênah a kal a. Lal chuan Amnona chu rei tak a sûn a." 
2Samuel13:38 Absaloma chu a tlân bo va, Gesur ramah a kal a, chutah chuan kum thum a awm a." 
2Samuel13:39 Lalin Amnona a ngaih chu a reh ta a, Absaloma erawh chu a ngai êm êm a." 
2Samuel14:1 Zeruii fapa Joaba chuan Absaloma chu lalin a ngai hle tih a hria a. 
2Samuel14:2 Joaba chuan Tekoa khuaa hmeichhe fel tak pakhat a kohtîr a. Hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “Lusûn angin awm la, lusûn thuam inbel bawk la, hriak pawh thih suh. Rei tak lusûn tawh angin awm rawh." 
2Samuel14:3 Tin, lal hnênah va kal la, hetiangin thu va sawi ang che,” a ti a, sawi tûr nên lam a hrilh vek a." 
2Samuel14:4 Tekoa khua hmeichhia chu lal hnênah a kal ta a, bawkkhupin chibai a bûk a, a hnênah, “Aw lalber, mi pui rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:5 Lal chuan, “Engtizia nge ni ta?” a ti a. Ani chuan “Hmeithai rethei tak ka ni a, ka pasalin min thihsan a." 
2Samuel14:6 I bawihnu hian fapa pahnih ka nei a, lovah an insual a; tu mah ṭhelhtu an awm si lo va, pakhat zâwk chuan a unaupa chu a that ta a." 
2Samuel14:7 A thi-a chhûngte zawng zawng chuan i bawihnu hi min do rawn a, ‘A unaupa thattu kha, a unaupa a thah phuba laa kan thah ve theih nân min pe rawh; roluahtu nei lovin kan han siam teh ang,” an ti a. Chutianga ka innghahna awm chhun an thah leh zêl chuan ka pasal thlah a mang ang a, leiah hian a hming a dai mai dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:8 Lal chuan hmeichhe hnênah, “Va hâwng ta la, i chungthu chu ka tihfelsak mai ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:9 Tekoa khaw hmeichhia chuan lal hnênah, “Aw lalber, ka pu, eng pawh ti la, a mawh chu kei leh ka pa chhûngten kan phur ang, lal leh a ram chuan phur suh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:10 Lal chuan, “Mi tu pawhin an vau che chuan ka hnênah han hruai la, an tibuai leh tawh lo vang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:11 Hmeichhia chuan, “Phuba lâk tumtuten ka fapa dam chhun hi an thaha, chhiatna nasa lehzual an thlentîr loh nân lal chuan, Lalpa, i Pathian min ngensak rawh,” a ti a. Lal chuan, “ Lalpa mi nung hmingin ka tiam a che, i fapa chu engtin mah an tina lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:12 Hmeichhia chuan, “Khawngaih takin i bawihnu hian, ka pu, lal hnênah thu kam khat chauh ka sawi leh thei ang em?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Sawi ta che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:13 Hmeichhia chuan, “Engtizia nge Pathian mite chunga hetiang thil dik lo hi i tih? Lal chuan a fapa tlân bo chu a hruai hâwn leh duh loh chuan tûna a ṭawngka chhuak ngei khân thiam loh a chantîr a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Samuel14:14 Kan la thi ṭheuh dâwn, leia tuisik bua, ruh leh theih loh ang hi kan ni. Pathian pawhin mitthi tawh chu a nuntîr leh lo. Lal erawh hi chuan a hnên ata ram hla taka tlân bo chu hruai hâwn zai rêl teh se." 
2Samuel14:15 Aw lalber, ka pu, miten min vau avângin he thu hi i hnênah ka rawn sawi ngam a ni. I bawihnu hian, ‘Lal hnênah ka thlen ang a, ka dîl hi min lo tihsak mahna,’ ka ti a ni." 
2Samuel14:16 Lal chuan kei i bawihnu leh ka fapa hi Pathianin min pêk ram aṭanga min tihboral tumtute laka min chhanhim ka beisei a ni. 
2Samuel14:17 Lalber, ka pu, ka ngên a che, i bawihnu hi min thlamuan la, lalber ka pu chu Pathian tirhkohte anga engkim hre vektu i ni si a, Lalpa, i Pathian chu i hnênah awm zêl rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:18 Lal chuan hmeichhe hnênah, “Ka zawh apiang eng mah zêp lovin min chhâng teh aw,” a ti a. Hmeichhia chuan, “Ka pu lalber chuan sawi ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:19 Lal chuan, “Hêng hi Joaba tihtîr che em ni?” a ti a. Hmeichhia chuan, “ Lalpa ka pu, i hmaah ka puang e, i thu zawh chu dik taka chhân loh theih a ni lo. Ni e, i chhiahhlawh Joaba chuan i bawihnu hi hêng thu zawng zawng hrilh tûr chein min tîr a ni." 
2Samuel14:20 I chhiahhlawh Joaba chuan thil siam ṭhat a tum a ni. Ka pu chu Pathian tirhkohte angin a fing a, ram chhûng thil thleng tinrêng a hre vek si a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:21 Tichuan, lalin Joaba hnênah, “I remruat chu a ṭha e; kal la, tlangvâl Absaloma chu va hruai hâwng rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:22 Joaba chuan bawkkhupin zah takin chibai a bûk a, lal chu a fak a. Joaban, “Lal chuan a chhiahhlawh ngenna a hlawhtlintîr avângin i chhiahhlawh hian lalber, ka pu mit ka tlung tih vawiinah hian ka hre ta,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:23 Joaba chu Gesur-ah a kal a, Absaloma chu Jerusalem-ah a rawn hruai hâwng a." 
2Samuel14:24 Lal chuan, “A in lamah kal sela, ka hmêl rawn hmu suh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:25 Israel-te zîngah Absaloma anga hmêlṭha chungchuang an awm lo va, a ke phah aṭanga a chhîp thlengin sawisêl tûr rêng a awm lo." 
2Samuel14:26 A sam a ṭha êm êm a, a sei a, a buk lutuk châng apiangin a mêt ṭhîn a. A sam rih zâwng chu kg. hnih lai a ni ṭhîn." 
2Samuel14:27 Absaloma chuan fapa pathum leh fanu pakhat a nei a, a fanu hming chu Tamari a ni a, a hmêl pawh ṭha tak a ni." 
2Samuel14:28 Absaloma chu kum hnih lai lal hmêl hmu lovin Jerusalem-ah a awm a. 
2Samuel14:29 Lal hnêna tirh atân Absaloma chuan Joaba chu a chah a; mahse, a lo kal duh lo va. A chah nawn leh pawhin a lo kal duh chuang lo va." 
2Samuel14:30 A tâwpah a chhiahhlawhte hnênah, “Ka lo kiang kha Joaba lo a ni a, barli a chîng a, kal ula, va hâl rawh u,” a ti a. Absaloma chhiahhlawhte chuan lo chu an va hâl ta a." 
2Samuel14:31 Joaba chu Absaloma inah a kal a, a hnênah, “Engtizia nge i chhiahhlawhten ka lo an hâl mai le?” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:32 Absaloma chuan Joaba chu a chhâng a, “Ka hnêna lo kala, lal hnênah, “Eng atân nge Gesur ata ka lo hâwn? Chutah chuan awm reng ila, ka tân a ṭha zâwk tûr,’ tia sawi tûrin ka chah che a ni lâwm ni? Tûnah, lal hnênah min hruai la, thil ka tisual a nih chuan min that mai rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:33 Tichuan, Joaba chu lal hnênah a kal a, chûng thu chu a hrilh a. Lal chuan Absaloma chu a ko va, ani chu a lo kal a, bawkkhupin lal chu chibai a bûk a. Lal chuan Absaloma chu a lo fâwp a." 
2Samuel15:1 Chumi hnuin Absaloma chuan amah vêng tûrin tawlailîr te, sakawr te, mi sawmnga lai nên a buatsaih a." 
2Samuel15:2 Absaloma chu zîng takah a tho va, kulh kawngka bulah chuan a lo ding ṭhîn a, lal hnêna thubuai sawi tûr neite chu Absaloma chuan a lo ko va, “Khawii khua nge i nih le?” a lo ti ṭhîn a. Anni chuan, “I chhiahhlawh hi Israel hnam zînga mi ka ni,” an ti zêl a." 
2Samuel15:3 Absaloma chuan, “I thu hi a dik khawp mai; mahse, lo ngaihtuahsak tûr che tu mah lal chuan a ruat si lo a nih hi,” a lo ti ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel15:4 Absaloma vek chuan, “Rorêltu chu han ni ve ila chuan thubuai nei te, beisei neite chu dik takin ka lo rêlsak tûr,” a ti bawk a." 
2Samuel15:5 Amah chibai bûk tuma rawn pantute chu a vuan a, a kuah a, a lo fâwp ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel15:6 Israel mi, lal hnêna thubuai sawi tûra lo kal apiangte hnênah Absaloma chuan chutiang chuan a lo ti zêl a. Tichuan, Israel miten Absaloma chu an ngaina ta hle a." 
2Samuel15:7 Kum li a vei hnuin Absaloman lal hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa hnêna ka thutiam hlen tûrin Hebron-ah min kaltîr rawh." 
2Samuel15:8 I chhiahhlawh hi Suria ram Gesura ka awm lai khân, ‘ Lalpa chuan Jerusalem-a min hruai kîr leh chuan Hebron khuaah Lalpa chibai ka bûk ang,’ tiin ka lo tiam tawh si a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:9 Lal chuan, “Thlamuang takin kal ta che,” a ti a. Hebron-ah chuan a kal ta a." 
2Samuel15:10 Absaloma chuan Israel hnam tin hnênah a rûkin mi a tîr a, “Tawtawrâwt ri in hriat veleh, ‘Absaloma chu Hebron-ah a lal ta’ ti ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:11 Tin, mi zahnihin Absaloma chu Jerusalem aṭangin an zui a. Chûng mite chu a sâwm chhuah an ni, thil awmzia eng mah an hriat loh avângin rilru thianghlim takin an zui a." 
2Samuel15:12 Absaloman inthawina a hlan lai chuan Gilo mi, Ahitofela, Davida rorêlpui chu, a awmna khua Gilo aṭangin a chah a. Lal an phiarna chu a nasa tawlh tawlh a, Absaloma lamṭang chu an pung tual tual a." 
2Samuel15:13 Mi pakhat hian Davida hnênah, “Israel-te chu Absaloma lamah an ṭang ta,” tiin a rawn sawi a." 
2Samuel15:14 Davida chuan a ṭhuihruai Jerusalem-a awmte hnênah, “Hawh u, i tlânchhia ang, tu mah Absaloma lakah kan him lo vang. I chhuak thuai ang u; chutilo zawng, min rawn nangchîng ang a, khua hi khandaihin a rawn bei ang a, min that dah ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:15 Lal ṭhuihruaite chuan, “I chhiahhlawhte hi kan pu lalin a sawi apiang ti tûrin kan inpeih e,” an ti a." 
2Samuel15:16 Lal chu a chhuak a, a laina zawng zawngin an zui a, a hmei sâwm erawh chu lal in nghâk tûrin a hnutchhiah a." 
2Samuel15:17 Lal chu a chhuak a, a mite chuan an zui vek a, khaw hmâwr in bulah chuan an innghâkkhâwm a." 
2Samuel15:18 A chhiahhlawh Keret mi te, Pelet mi te, Git mi te leh mi zaruk, Gath aṭanga amah rawn zuitute nên lal chu an bêl a, an kal a." 
2Samuel15:19 Lal chuan Git mi Itaia hnênah, “Engtizia nge kan zîngah i lo kal ve? Kîr la, lal thar hnênah chuan awm rawh. Nang zawng, ram dang mi, i ram ata râltlân mai i ni si a." 
2Samuel15:20 Nimin lawkah i lo kal a, engah nge vawiinah ka vahvaihpui ang che? Ka thangna tûr chin pawh ka hre lo. Chuvângin, kîr la, i mite kha hruai ang che. Lalpa chuan khawngaih che uin vêng zêl che u rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:21 Itaia chuan lal chu a chhâng a, “ Lalpa nunna leh ka pu lal nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, khawiah pawh ka pu lal awmna tawh phawtah chuan thih leh thih, dam leh dam, i chhiahhlawh hi a awm ve zêl ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:22 Davida chuan Itaia hnênah, “Chuti chu i kal zêl ang u,” a ti a. Tichuan, Git mi Itaia chu a hote leh an chhûngte nên chuan an kal ve ta a." 
2Samuel15:23 An kal ta chu a ram ṭahin an ṭap a, Lal chuan Kidron lui a kân a, a mite chuan an zui a, thlalêr lam panin an kal ta a." 
2Samuel15:24 Zadoka leh Levia chite chuan Pathian Bâwm zâwnin an zui ve a, mipuiin khua an chhuahsan vek hma chu Bâwm chu an nghat a. Abiathara chu maichâmah a chho va." 
2Samuel15:25 Lal chuan Zadoka hnênah, “Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm chu khawpuiah kîrpui leh rawh u, Lalpa mit ka tlun chuan min hruai hâwng leh ang a, Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm chu a hmun ngaiah ka hmu leh ang." 
2Samuel15:26 “I chungah ka lâwm lo a ni,” a tih chuan ṭha a tih ang angin min ti mai rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:27 Lal chuan puithiam Zadoka hnênah, “Zâwlnei i ni alâwm, in fate pahnih, i fapa Ahimaaza leh Abiathara fapa, Jonathana te nên thlamuang takin khawpuiah haw leh rawh u." 
2Samuel15:28 Kei chu, chanchin min rawn hrilh hma chu thlalêra lui kaiah kan lo awm ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:29 Zadoka leh Abiathara chuan Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm chu Jerusalem-ah an kîrpui a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
2Samuel15:30 Davida chu ṭap chungin oliv tlângah a chho va, a lu a khuh a, ke lâwngin a kal a. A hnêna awm zawng zawng pawhin an lu an khuh a, ṭap chungin an chho ve a." 
2Samuel15:31 Davida hnênah chuan, “Ahitofela chu phiarrutute Absaloma hote zîngah chuan a tel ve ta,” tiin an hrilh a. Davida chu, “Aw Lalpa, Ahitofela thurâwn chu engmahlovah chantîr ang che,” tiin a ṭawngṭai a." 
2Samuel15:32 Davida chuan miten pathian an biakna ṭhin hmunsâng chu a han thlen chuan Ark mi Husaia chuan thawmhnaw thlêr phung inbelin, lu-a vaivut kai luam chungin a lo hmuak a." 
2Samuel15:33 Davida chuan a hnênah, “Ka hnêna i kal ve chuan ka tân phurrit mai i ni ang." 
2Samuel15:34 Khawpuiah kîr leh zâwk la. Absaloma hnênah, ‘Aw Lalpa, i chhiahhlawhah ka awm ang e; tûnhma khân i pa chhiahhlawh ka ni ṭhîn a; mahse, tûnah i chhiahhlawhah ka awm tawh ang e,’ ti la; tichuan, Ahitofela remruat chu i hnial ṭhîn ang a, min ṭanpui thei zâwk ang." 
2Samuel15:35 Puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara pawh chutah chuan i kiangah an awm ang a, lal ina thil thleng i hriat apiang anni chu hrilh ang che." 
2Samuel15:36 An fate pahnih, Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza leh Abiathara fapa Jonathana pawh chutah chuan an awm kha. I thil hriat apiang mi rawn hrilh tûrin anni chu rawn tîr ṭhîn ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:37 Absaloman Jerusalem khua a luh ni chuan Davida ṭhian Husaia pawh chu a lo thleng ve a. 
2Samuel16:1 Davida chuan tlângchhîp a pêl chauh tihin Mefiboseta chhiahhlawh Ziba chuan a lo hmuak a. Ani chuan sabengtung pahnih, thuam bel sa, chhang tlang zahnih, grep pho ro bâwr za, theirah bâwr za leh uain peng khat nên a rawn keng a." 
2Samuel16:2 Lal chuan Ziba hnênah, “Eng atân nge hêng hi i rawn ken duh le?” a ti a. Ziba chuan “Sabengtung hi lal chhûngkuate chuan nân ka ti a, chhang leh thei hi chu tlangvâlte ei atân a ni, uain erawh hi chu thlalêra chau apiang in atân a ni e,” tiin a chhâng a." 
2Samuel16:3 Lal chuan, “Khawiah nge i pu fapa chu?” a ti a. Ziba chuan lal hnênah chuan, “Jerusalem-ah a awm. ‘Vawiin hian Israel-te chuan ka pa ram chu min pe leh dâwn,’ a ti nghe nghe asin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:4 Lal chuan Ziba hnênah, “Mefiboseta thil zawng zawng chu i ta a ni e,” a ti a. Ziba chuan, “Ka pu, i chhiahhlawh tlâwm tak ka ni e, i mittlunga awm zêl ka tum ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:5 Lal Davidan Bahurim a lo thlen chuan Saula laichînte zînga mi, a hming Simeia, Gera fapa chu a lo chhuak a, kal pahin ânchhia a rawn lawh bawrh bawrh a." 
2Samuel16:6 Davida chu a sipaiten a ding lam leh vei lamah an vêng na a, Simeia chuan Davida leh a ṭhuihruaite chu lungin a rawn vawm a." 
2Samuel16:7 Simeia chuan heti hian ânchhia a lawh a, “Kal bo daih rawh, kal bo daih rawh, tual thah chîng leh mi sualpa," 
2Samuel16:8 Saula ram chu i chhuhsak vei a, a chhûngte chunga thisen i chhuah man Lalpa chuan a thungrûl ta che a nih hi. Lalpa chuan ram chu i fapa Absaloma hnênah a hlân ta. Thisen chhuah i chîn chu i chhiat phah ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:9 Zeruii fapa Abisaia chuan lal hnênah, “He uicho hian engtizia nge, Lalpa ka pu hi ânchhia a lawh? Khawi nge, a lu ka va lâksak teh ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:10 Lal chuan, “E! Zeruii fate u, ka chungchângah lo inrawlh ve suh u. Lalpa chuan, ‘Davida ânchhia lawh rawh’ a hnêna a tih chuan ânchhia chu min lawh mai rawh se. ‘Engati nge hetianga i tih le,’ ti thei tu nge awm?” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:11 Davida chuan Abisaia leh a chhiahhlawhte hnênah chuan, “Ka fapa, ka rîla rah ngei pawhin mi thah a tum si chuan he Benjamin mi phei hi chuan a tum lehzual âwm rêng alâwm. Eng mah tih suh u, ânchhia chu min lawh mai rawh se, Lalpa tihtîr a ni si a." 
2Samuel16:12 Lalpa chuan ka lungngaihna min hriatpui ang a, vawiina ânchhia min lawh hi malsâwmnaah a chantîr mai thei asin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:13 Davida leh a mite chu kawngah chuan an kal zêl a, ral lehlam tlâng aṭangin Simeia chuan kal chungin ânchhia a lawh reng a, lungin a vawm a, vaivutte a rawn theh bawk a." 
2Samuel16:14 Lal leh a mite chuan Jordan lui an lo thleng a, an chau hle a; chutah chuan an châwl hahdam a." 
2Samuel16:15 Absaloma chu a hnêna Israel awm zawng zawng nên Jerusalem-ah an lo lût a. Ahitofela pawh an zîngah a tel ve a. 
2Samuel16:16 Ark mi, Husaia, Davida ṭhian chu Absaloma hnênah a lo kal a, a hnênah, “Lal chu dam reng rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:17 Absaloma chuan Husaia hnênah, “I ṭhian i hmangaih dân chu hetiang hi a ni maw? Engtizia nge i ṭhian hnêna i kal loh?” a lo ti a." 
2Samuel16:18 Husaia chuan Absaloma hnênah, “Ka kal lo vang, Lalpa leh hêng mipuite leh Israel mi zawng zawngin an thlana lamah ka ṭang ang a, a hnênah ka awm zâwk ang." 
2Samuel16:19 Tu dang rawng nge ka bâwl ang? A fapa rawng chu ka bâwl dâwn lâwm ni? I pa rawng ka bâwl ang bawkin i rawng pawh ka bâwl ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:20 Absaloma chuan Ahitofela hnênah, “Rem mi han ruatpui teh, eng nge ka tih ang le?” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofela chuan, “I pa hmei, lal in nghâka a dahte chu mutpui la; tichuan, Israel mi zawng zawngin i pa pawi lian tak i khawih tih an hria ang a; nangmah zuitute chuan an ṭan sauh ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:22 Tichuan, Absaloma tân lal in chungah puan in an zâr a, Israel mi zawng zawng mit hmuhin Absaloma chu a pa hmei mutpui tûrin a lût a." 
2Samuel16:23 Chûng lai chuan Ahitofela thurâwn chu mite chuan Pathian thu chhuak ang maiin an ngaisâng a, Davida leh Absaloma ngei pawh chuan Ahitofela thurâwn zawng zawng chu an pawisa ṭhîn." 
2Samuel17:1 Ahitofela chuan Absaloma hnênah, “Mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih ka thlang chhuak ang a, zâninah Davida ka va ûm teh ang." 
2Samuel17:2 A chauh chhiat lai tak ka va nangchîng ang a, ka ṭhâwng thut ang a, a mite zawng zawngin an tlânchhiatsan ang a, amah chu ka va that mai ang." 
2Samuel17:3 Tichuan, mite chu, mo, a pasal hnêna a lawi angin i hnênah ka rawn hruai kîr vek ang. Thah i tum mi pakhat bâk chu an him vek ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel17:4 Chu thurâwn chu Absaloma leh Israel upaho chuan ṭha an ti hle a. 
2Samuel17:5 Absaloma chuan, “Ark mi Husaia han ko ula, eng nge sawi tûr a neih i lo ngaithla ve phawt teh ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel17:6 Husaia chu a lo kal a, Absaloma chuan a hnênah, “Ahitofela chuan hetiangin thu min râwn a, a sawi ang hian kan ti ang em? Ṭha i tih loh chuan i ngaih dân han sawi ve teh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel17:7 Husaia chuan Absaloma hnênah, “Tûn ṭuma Ahitofela remruat hi a ṭha lo va ni." 
2Samuel17:8 I pa mite chu i hria a, râl beih thiam, savawm a notê an lâksak ang maia kawlhsen an ni a. Chu bâkah, i pa hi râl rêl thiam a ni a, a sipaite zîngah a riak kher lo vang." 
2Samuel17:9 Tûnah pawh pûkah emaw, hmun dangah emaw a biru daih ang. In inbei chauh tiha i mite an thih hlauh phei chuan a hria apiangin, ‘Absaloma sipaite an that chiam mai,’ an ti ang a." 
2Samuel17:10 Sipai huaisen, sakeibaknei rilru pute pawh hlauvin an khûr ang a, Israel mi zawng zawngin i pa indo thiamzia, a hotute huaisenzia te an hre vek si a." 
2Samuel17:11 Hetiangin ti zâwk teh: Israel mi, Dan leh Beer-seba inkâra awm zawng zawng chu tuifinriat ṭiauvut zât ngawt ko khâwm la, nangmah ngeiin indonaah chuan hma hruai la;" 
2Samuel17:12 tichuan, kan hmuhna apiangah kan bei ang a, leia dai tla ang maiin ani chu kan bei tluar tluar ang a; a hote nên pakhat mah kan zuah lo vang." 
2Samuel17:13 Khuaa a tlân luh chuan Israel mi zawng zawng hruizên nên kan thawk ang a, a khaw chawpin kawrah kan hnuk thla mai ang, lungtê pakhat pawh kan zuah lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel17:14 Absaloma leh Israel mite chuan “Ark mi Husaia remruat chu Ahitofela remruat aiin a ṭha zâwk,” an ti a. Absaloma chhiatna tûrin Ahitofela remruat ṭha tak chu Lalpa chuan dâl a lo tum rêng a ni." 
2Samuel17:15 Husaia chuan puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara hnênah chuan Ahitofelan Absaloma leh Israel upate rem a ruatpui dân te, amah pawhin rem a ruatpui dânte a hrilh bawk a." 
2Samuel17:16 “Zâninah thlalêr lui kaia riak tawh lovin lui chu kân ngei rawh se. Chutilo zawng, lal leh a hote chu an rawn man vek mai ang’ tiin Davida chu hrilh thuai rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel17:17 Jonathana leh Ahimaaza chu Jerusalem daifêm, En-Rogel-ah an awm a. Bawihnu pakhat hian anni chu thu thar a va hrilh ṭhîn a, annin Davida an hrilh chhâwng leh ṭhîn a ni. Khawpuia an lût chu tu man an hmu tûr a ni si lo va." 
2Samuel17:18 Naupang pakhat hian a lo hmu hlauh va, Absaloma a hrilh a; tichuan, anni pahnih chu an tlân bo ta thuai a, Bahurim-a mi pakhat inah an tlân lût a. Ani chuan a tualah tuichhunchhuah a nei a, a chhûngah chuan an lût ta a." 
2Samuel17:19 In neitupa nupui chuan a chhinnain tuichhunchhuah chu a chhîn a, a chungah buh a pho va; tu man an hmu lo va." 
2Samuel17:20 Absaloma chhiahhlawhte chu hmeichhe hnênah chuan an va kal a, a hnênah, “Ahimaaza leh Jonathana te kha khawiah nge an awm?” an ti a. Hmeichhia chuan, “Lui râl an kai daih tawh ang,” a ti a. Mite chuan an va zawng a; mahse an hmu lo va, Jerusalem-ah an kîr leh ta a." 
2Samuel17:21 Chûng mite kal liam hnu chuan anni chu tuichhunchhuah ata chu an lo chhuak a, lal Davida chu an hrilh ta a, a hnênah, “Tho la, lui hi kân thuai rawh u, Ahitofela chuan in chhiatna a zawng rêng si a,” an ti a." 
2Samuel17:22 Davida leh a hote chu an chhuak a, Jordan lui chu varṭianah an kai vek a." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahitofelan a remruat an zâwm lo tih a hriatin a sabengtung a thuam a, a khaw lamah a hâwng ta daih a. A chhûngkaw awm dân tûr a rel fel a, a inâwkhlum ta a. A ruang chu a pa thlânah an phûm a." 
2Samuel17:24 Absaloma leh a hnêna Israel awm zawng zawngin Jordan lui an kai lai chuan Davida chuan Mahanaim a thleng a. 
2Samuel17:25 Absaloma chuan Joaba aiah Amasa chu sipai hotu-ah a dah a. Amasa chu Ismael mi Jethera fapa a ni a, Nahasa fanu Abigaili hrin a ni, Abigaili chu Joaba nu Zeruii laizâwn a ni." 
2Samuel17:26 Israel mite leh Absaloma chuan Gilead ramah ṭanhmun an khuar a. 
2Samuel17:27 Davida chuan Mahanaim khua a thlen chuan Amon mi, Raba khuaa Nahasa fapa Sobia te, Lo-debar khua aṭanga Amiela fapa Makira te, Rogelim aṭanga Gilead mi Barzilaia te chuan puanthuah te," 
2Samuel17:28 thleng te, eirêlna bungbêl te an rawn ken a, huit te, barli te, chhangphut te, vaikan te, bê te, thlaihnah te," 
2Samuel17:29 khawizu te, bâwnghnute dak te, berâm te, bâwnghnute um te, Davida leh a mite ei atân an rawn ken a, “Mite chu thlalêrah rilṭâm leh tuihâlin an chau hle tawh,” tih an lo hre si a." 
2Samuel18:1 Davida chuan a hotute chu a ko khâwm a, sâng chunga hotu te, za chunga hotute a ruat a." 
2Samuel18:2 Davida chuan sipai chu pâwl thumin a tîr chhuak a. Pâwl khat chu Joaban a ho va, pâwl khat chu Joaba u, Zeruii fapa Abisaian a ho va, pâwl thumna chu Git mi Itaian a ho va. Lal chuan sipaiho hnênah, “Kei pawh in hnênah ka kal ve dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:3 Mite chuan, “Kal lo ve; keiniho hi chu tlânchhia pawh ni ila min ngaimawh vak lo vang. A zâtve lai va thi pawh ni ila pawi an ti tehchiam lo vang. Nang erawh zawng keiniho sîng tlukin i hlu si a, khua aṭanga min lo ṭanpui hi a ṭha zâwk e,” an ti a." 
2Samuel18:4 Lal chuan, “Ṭha in tih ang chuan ka awm ang e,” a ti a. Lal chu kulh kawngka bulah a ding a; sipaite chu za rual te, sâng rual tein an chhuak ta nguah nguah a." 
2Samuel18:5 Lal chuan Joaba te, Abisaia te, Itaia te hnênah, “Keimah avângin tlangvâl Absaloma chu va tina suh u aw,” tiin thu a pe a. Mi tinin Absaloma chungchânga lalin sipai hotute thu a pêk lai chu an hria a." 
2Samuel18:6 Sipaite chu Israel-te bei tûrin indona hmun panin an chhuak ta a, an inbeihna hmun chu Efraim ngawpuiah a ni." 
2Samuel18:7 Davida mite chuan Israel sipaite chu an hneh a, chumi ni chuan mi sînghnih zet an that a." 
2Samuel18:8 Chu lai ram kil tinah chuan an inbei a, khandaiha thah ai mahin ram ngawa tluhlum an tam a." 
2Samuel18:9 Absaloma chuan Davida mite a va tâwk ta thut a. Absaloma chu sabengtung chungah a chuang a, sabengtung chu sasaw thing hnuaiah a tlân lût a, Absaloma lu chu thingzârah a tâng a, a chuanna sabengtung chu a tlân zêl si a, thingzârah chuan a inkhai ta reng a." 
2Samuel18:10 Mi pakhat hian Joaba hnênah, “Absaloma sasaw thing zâra a inkhai reng ka hmu,” tiin a hrilh a." 
2Samuel18:11 Joaba chuan a rawn hrilhtu hnênah, “I hmu maw? Engati nge i tihhlum nghâl mai loh? That la chu tangka sâwm leh kâwnghrên ka pe tûr che a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:12 Ani chuan, “Tangka sâng pawh mi pe dâwn mah la, lal fapa chu ka that chuang lo vang, ka hriat lai ngeiin lalin i hnênah te, Abisaia hnênah te, Itaia hnênahte, ‘Tlangvâl Absaloma chu tu man khawih suh ang che u!’ a tih kha." 
2Samuel18:13 Lal thu zâwm lovin lo that pawh ni ila, lalin a hre leh tho vang a; nang lah chu i inthiarfihlîm leh daih âwm si a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:14 Joaba chuan, “Chutiang mai mai, ka nghâk khawtlai hman lo che,” a ti a; fei pathum a la a, sasaw thingzâra Absaloma dama la inkhai reng chu a thinhnûnah a chhun a." 
2Samuel18:15 Joaba râlthuam kengtu sâwmin an rawn hual a, an chhun hlum ta a." 
2Samuel18:16 Joaba chuan tawtawrâwt a hâm a, sipaiten Israel-te an ûm chu an bânsan a, a ko kîr ta vek a." 
2Samuel18:17 Absaloma ruang chu an la thla a, ngaw chhûnga khuarkhurum thûk takah an paih a, a chungah lung an vawm khâwm thûr a. Israel mi zawng zawng chu mahni in lamah an tlân hâwng ta vek a." 
2Samuel18:18 Absaloma khân “Lal Ruam” an tihah a dam lai khân dam lai lung a phun a, “Ka hming daih loh nân, fapa pawh ka nei si lo va,” a ti a ni. Chu lung dawh pawh chu a hming chawiin “Absaloma Hriatrêngna Lung” an ti a, tûn thlengin hmingah a la pu ta reng a ni." 
2Samuel18:19 Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza chuan, “Ka va tlân ang a, Lalpa chuan a hmêlma laka lal phuba a lâksak dân ka va hrilh teh ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:20 Joaba chuan, “Vawiin chuan chanchin thar chu va hrilh suh. Ni dangah i la hrilh dâwn nia. Lal fapa chu a thi si a, vawiinah zawng va hrilh rêng rêng suh u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:21 Joaba chuan Kus mi hnênah, “Kal la, lal chu i thil hmuh va hrilh rawh,” a ti a. Kus mi chuan Joaba chu kûnin chibai a bûk a, a tlân ta a." 
2Samuel18:22 Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza chuan Joaba hnênah, “Eng pawh ni se, Kus mi hnungah ka va tlân ve ang e,” a ti leh a. Joaba chuan, “Ka fapa, engah nge i tlân ve kher ang? Chanchin hrilh man i dawng dâwn si lo va,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:23 Ani chuan, “Eng pawh ni rawh se, ka tlân rêng rêng dâwn,” a ti a. Joaba chuan “Tlân ta che,” a ti a. Ahimaaza chu phaizâwl lam kawngah a tlân a, Kus mi chu a lehpêl a." 
2Samuel18:24 Davida chu kulh kawngka chhûng zâwk leh pâwn zâwk inkârah a lo ṭhu a. Râlvêngtu chu kulh kawngka pâwn zâwk chung lamah chuan a lâwn chho va, a han hawi vêl a, mi pakhat lo tlân hi a hmu a." 
2Samuel18:25 Râlvêngtu chu a au va, lal chu a hrilh a, lal chuan “Pakhat mai a nih chuan thu ṭha rawn thlen tûr a ni ang,” a ti a. Mi chu a lo hnai telh telh a." 
2Samuel18:26 Râlvêngtu chuan mi dang lo tlân a hmu leh a, kawngkhâr vêngtu chu a au va, “En teh, mi pakhat a lo tlân leh e,” a ti a. Lal chuan, “Ani pawh thu ṭha rawn thlen tûr a ni ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:27 Râlvêngtu chuan, “A hmasa zâwk tlân dân chu Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza tlân dân a ang mang e,” a ti a. Lal chuan, “Ani zawng mi ṭha a ni a, thu ṭha a rawn thlen ngei ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaaza chuan lal chu a au va, “A ṭha e,” a ti a. Bawkkhupin chibai a bûk a, a hnênah, “Ka pu, lal laka helho, i kuta petu Lalpa, i Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:29 Lal chuan, “Tlangvâl Absaloma chu a him alâwm maw?” a ti a. Ahimaaza chuan, “I chhiahhlawh hi Joaban min tirh chhuah laiin an buai mur mur ka hmu a; mahse, eng vang nge tih chu ka hre lo,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:30 Lal chuan, “Lo kal hnai teh,” a ti a. A bulah chuan a va ding a." 
2Samuel18:31 Kus mi chu a lo thleng ve a, lal hnênah chuan, “Ka pu, lal tân chanchin lâwmawm ka rawn thlen e; Lalpa chuan i laka helho zawng zawng phuba chu a lâksak ta che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:32 Lal chuan Kus mi hnênah chuan, “Tlangvâl Absaloma chu a dam alâwm maw?” a ti a. Kus mi chuan, “Ka pu, lal hmêlmate leh thah tumtu che chu, he tlangvâl ang hian awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:33 Lal chu a mangang ta hle a, kulh kawngka chunga pindanah a chho va, a ṭap a, kal chungin, “Aw ka fapa Absalom, ka fapa, ka fapa Absalom, i aiah han thi zâwk ila aw, Absalom, ka fapa, ka fapa,” tiin a ṭap a." 
2Samuel19:1 Joaba hnênah, “Lalin Absaloma a sûn a, a ṭap a ṭap mai” an ti a." 
2Samuel19:2 Chu mi nia an hnehna chu sipai zawng zawng tân lungngaihna a ni ta zâwk a. Lal chu a fapa ngaiin a ṭap a ṭap mai tih an hre vek si a. 
2Samuel19:3 Chumi ni chuan mite chu indonaa sipai tlânchhia ang maiin zak takin khuaah an lût nghiai nghiai a. 
2Samuel19:4 Lal chuan a hmai a hup a, “Aw ka fapa Absalom, aw Absalom, ka fapa,” tiin a ṭap hawm hawm a." 
2Samuel19:5 Joaba chu lal awmna inah chuan a lût a, a hnênah, “Vawiinah hian nang leh i fanu leh i fapate, i nupui leh i hmei te nunna chhanhimtute chu i tizak hle mai." 
2Samuel19:6 Nang mah hawtute chu i hmangaih a, nangmah hmangaihtute i hua a, i hote leh sipaiho chu engmahlovah min ngai tih vawiinah hian i tilang chiang hle mai. Absaloma chu dam sela, keini zawng zawng hi thi vek zâwk ila, chu chu i duh dân niin ka hria." 
2Samuel19:7 Tûnah kal chhuak la, i mite fuih harh rawh, Lalpa chhâlin ka hrilh a che, i va chhuah loh zawngin naktûk zîngah chuan tu mah i hnênah an awm tawh lo vang. Chu chu i tleirâwl lai ata vawiin thlenga i chunga chhiatna lo thleng tawh zawng zawng ai daiha pawi thui zâwk a ni ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:8 Lal chu a ṭhu chhuak ta a, kulh kawngka bulah chuan a ṭhu a, “Lal chu kulh kawngka bulah a ṭhu e,” tiin mite chu an va hrilh a. Chu chu an hriatin a mite chu an lo pung khâwm ta a. Israel-te erawh chu mahni puan in ṭheuhvah an tlân hâwng a." 
2Samuel19:9 Israel zawng zawng chuan, “Davida chuan kan hmêlmate lak ata min chhan chhuak a, amah ngeiin Filistia mite lak ata min humhim a; tûnah Absaloma râl hlauvin ram hi a chhuahsan a." 
2Samuel19:10 Kan rorêltu atâna hriak kan thih Absaloma lah chu a thi ta si a. Engtizia nge lal chu hruai hâwn leh zai kan rêl loh?” an ti a, an inhnial mur mur a." 
2Samuel19:11 Lal Davida chuan Zadoka leh Abiathara hnênah mi a tîr a, “Juda upate hnênah heti hian va sawi rawh u, ‘Lal a in lama hruai hâwn thu-ah engtizia nge a muang bera in ṭan le? Israel miten lal hruai hâwn an rawt thu chuan lal beng a thleng tawh si a." 
2Samuel19:12 Ka unaute u, ka thisen zawmpui in ni a, lal hruai hâwn thu-ah a zawiawi bera ṭang tûr em in nih?’ ti ula;" 
2Samuel19:13 Amasa hnênah pawh, ‘Ka thisen zawmpui i ni lo vem ni? Tûn aṭangin ka sipai hotu atân Joaba aiah ka dah loh che chuan Pathianin a tih tihin mi ti sela, na tak pawhin min sawisa mai rawh se, a ti e,’ va ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:14 Davida chuan Juda mi zawng zawng rilru chu aikhatah a luantîr ta dual a, lal hnênah chuan, “I mite zawng zawng nên lo haw leh rawh u,” tia hrilh tûrin mi an tîr ta a." 
2Samuel19:15 Lal chu a lo hâwng a, Jordan lui thlengin a lo kal a, Jordan luia hruai kai tûrin Juda mite chu Gilgal an lo thleng a." 
2Samuel19:16 Gera fapa Simeia, Benjamin hnam, Bahurim khuaa mi chu lal Davida hmuak tûrin Juda mite rualin hmanhmawh takin a lo chhuak ve a." 
2Samuel19:17 A rual chuan Benjamin mi sângkhat leh Saula chhûngkaw enkawltu Ziba te, a fapa sâwm leh panga leh a chhiahhlawh sawmhnih lai lal thlen hmain Jordan an lo thleng a." 
2Samuel19:18 Lal chhûngkuate hruai tûr leh ṭûl a tih a piang ti tûrin lui chu an kal kai a. Gera fapa Simeian Jordan lui a kai veleh lal hmaah a bawkkhup a," 
2Samuel19:19 Lal hnênah chuan, “Ka pu, khawngaih takin min ngaidam rawh; ka pu, Jerusalem i chhuahsan nia i chhiahhlawhin i chunga ka tihsual chu min theihnghilhsak tûrin ka ngên a che." 
2Samuel19:20 Kei, i chhiahhlawh hian thil ka tisual tih ka hria; mahse, vawiinah ka pu lal lo hmuak tûrin Josefa chhûngte zînga he hmun rawn thleng hmasa ber hi ka ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:21 Zeruii fapa Abisaia chuan, “ Lalpa hriakthih ânchhia a lawh avângin Simeia hi tihhlum tûr a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:22 Davida chuan, “Zeruii fate u, min rêlpui tûr eng nge awm? Min hnial min hnial mai a. Vawiinah, Israel mi rêng rêng, tu mah tihhlum tûr a ni lo; kei hi Israel-te lal ka ni lo vem ni?” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:23 Lal chuan Simeia hnênah, “I thi lo vang,” tiin a tiam a." 
2Samuel19:24 Saula tupa Mefiboseta chu lal hmuak tûrin a lo chhuak a. Lalin Jerusalem a chhuahsan aṭanga dam taka a lo hâwn leh thlengin ani chuan a kete a sil lo va, a khabehmul a mêt lo va, a puante a su hek lo." 
2Samuel19:25 Lal hmuak tûrin Jerusalem aṭang chuan a lo kal a, lal chuan a hnênah, “Mefiboset, engati nge ka hnênah i lo kal ve loh?” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:26 Ani chuan, “ Lalpa, ka pu, ka chhiahhlawhin min bum atin a ni, a hnênah, ‘lal hnêna ka kalna tûr sabengtung buatsaih rawh,’ ka ti a, kei lah hi ka ke a zeng si a." 
2Samuel19:27 Ani chuan, ka pu lal hnênah chuan min hêk a; mahse, Lalpa, ka pu chu Pathian vântirhkohte ang a ni a, ṭha i tih ang angin ti ang che." 
2Samuel19:28 Ka pa chhûngte zawng zawng chu, Lalpa, ka pu chuan tihlum vek âwm rêng a ni; mahse, i chhiahhlawh hi i chaw kîlpuiah min siam a. Chuvângin, lal hnênah hian eng dang han dîl ngam tûr ka ni em ni?” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:29 Lal chuan a hnênah, “In chungchâng thu hi engah nge i sawi leh ṭhin? Nang leh Ziba chuan Saula ram chu insem rawh u ka tih tawh kha,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:30 Mefiboseta chuan lal hnênah, “Ziba chuan ram chu nei vek rawh se, ka pu lal chu ama in ngeiah râlmuang takin a lo thleng tawh si a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:31 Gilead mi Barzilaia chu Rogelim aṭangin Jordan luia lal hruai kai tûrin lal rualin a lo chhuk ve a. 
2Samuel19:32 Barzilaia chu upa tak, kum sawmriat mi lai a ni a. Mi awm thei tak a nih avângin Mahanaim-a lal Davida a chawlh chhûng zawng zawng khân ei tûr a tumsak a." 
2Samuel19:33 Lal chuan Barzilaia hnênah, “Jerusalem-ah lo kal ve la, ka bulah awm ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:34 Barzilaia chuan lal hnênah, “Ka dam rei tawh awm si lo va, eng vângin nge Jerusalem-ah lal hnêna ka han chhoh ve kher ang?" 
2Samuel19:35 Kum sawmriat lai ka ni tawh a, eng mah hi ka tâna nuam a awm tak tak tawh lo va, i chhiahhlawh hian a tui leh tui lo pawh ka hre tawh lo va, nula tlangvâl zai ri lah ka hre thei tawh si lo. Engah nge i chhiahhlawh hian, ka pu lal ka tihhautak ang che?" 
2Samuel19:36 I chhiahhlawh hian, lal hi, Jordan lui kaipui che ka tum mai a ni. Engah nge lal chuan chutianga lâwmman min pêk i tum le?" 
2Samuel19:37 Khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh hi min hâwntîr mai la, ka nu leh pa thlân bul, kan khuaah ka thi ang e. Amaherawhchu, hei, i chhiahhlawh, ka fapa Chimhama hi hruai la; ka pu lalin ṭha i tih angin i chhawr atân awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:38 Lal chuan a chhâng a, “Chimhama chuan min zui sela, ṭha i tih apiang ka tihsak ang a, eng pawh i dîl apiang ka lo pe zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:39 Mi zawng zawngin Jordan lui an kal kai a, lal pawhin a kai ve a; lal chuan Barzilaia chu a fâwp a, mal a sâwmsak a; tichuan, a in lamah a haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel19:40 Lal chuan Gilgal a lo thleng a, Chimhama pawh a hruai a, Juda mi zawng zawng leh Israel hnam zâtve laiin lal chu an vêng ta a." 
2Samuel19:41 Israel mi zawng chuan lal hnênah, “Engati nge kan unau Juda-te hian nang leh i chhûngte chu i hote nên Jordan lui a rûka an lo hruai kai bîk mai che le?” an ti a." 
2Samuel19:42 Juda mi zawng zawng chuan, “Lal hi kan lamhnai a nih avâng chauhva hruai kai kan ni a; engtiziaa thinur mai nge in nih le? Lal neih kan eiin lâwmman kan dawng a ni bîk hlei nêm,” an ti a." 
2Samuel19:43 Israel-te chuan Juda-te chu an chhâng a, “Davida lala siam thu-ah in lamhnai ni mah se, a lêt sâwmin thu kan nei asin. Lala hruai kîr leh rawt hmasatu kan nih kha hre ta rêng che u,” an ti a. Mahse, Juda mite thu chu Israel mite thu ai chuan a rum ta zâwk mah a." 
2Samuel20:1 Gilgal-ah chuan Benjamin hnam, Bikria fapa Seba, mi sual tak a lo awm kher a. Ani chuan tawtawrâwt a hâm a, “Davida hnênah chan kan nei lo va, Jesaia fapa hnênah eng mah chan tûr kan nei lo. Aw Israel mite u, inah haw vek rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:2 Chutichuan, Israel mi zawng zawngin Davida zui duh lovin Seba chu an zui ta a. Juda mite erawh chuan Jordan aṭangin Jerusalem thlengin an lal chu rinawm takin an zui tlat a." 
2Samuel20:3 Davida chuan Jerusalem-a lal in chu a lo thleng a, a in nghâka a dah, a hmei sâwmte chu a hruai a, a vêng tlat a, a châwm a; mahse, an hnênah a lût lo. An damchhûngin a khung tlat a, hmeithai angin an awm a." 
2Samuel20:4 Lal chuan Amasa hnênah, “Ni thum chhûngin Juda mite hi ko khâwm la; tah chuan, nang pawh lo awm ve ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:5 Amasa chu Juda mi ko khâwm tûrin a chhuak a; mahse, hun ruat aiin a va thang rei a." 
2Samuel20:6 Davida chuan Abisaia hnênah, “Bikria fapa Seba hian Absaloma ai mahin min tibuai dâwn alâwm le; i pu vêngtute hruai la, ûm rawh u; chutilo zawng, kulh nei khuaahte a lût ang a, kan hmuh phâk lovah a chhuak hlauh dah ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:7 Joaba hote, Keret mi te, Pelet mi te leh an mi chak zawng zawng te chuan Abisaia chu an zui a, Jerusalem aṭang chuan Bikria fapa Seba ûm tûr chuan an chhuak ta a." 
2Samuel20:8 Gibeon lungpui lian an va thleng a, Amasa chuan a lo hmuak a. Joaba chuan indo thuam a inbel a, a kâwnghrênah khandaih, a pâi chawpin a pai a. A kal zâwng chuan khandaih chu a dawk chhuak a." 
2Samuel20:9 Joaba chuan Amasa hnênah, “Unaupa, i dam zêl alâwm maw?” a ti a. Joaba chuan Amasa chu fawh tum awm takin a khabehmul a kut ding lamin a chelhsak a," 
2Samuel20:10 Amasa chuan Joaban khandaih a keng tih a hre lo va, Joaba chuan a pumah a vit a, a rîlte a tla ta nuai a, vih nawn ngai lovin Amasa chu a thi ta a. Joaba leh a unaupa Abisaia chuan Bikria fapa Seba chu an ûm zêl a." 
2Samuel20:11 Joaba mite zînga pakhat Amasa ruang bulah chuan a ding a, “Tu pawh Joaba leh Davida lama ṭang apiangin Joaba zui rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:12 Amasa ruang chu kawng laiah a awm a, thi-in a bual nasa hle mai a, lo kal apiang chuan an en a, an ding zêl a; chu mi chuan mi zawng zawngin an dinchilh zêl tih a hmuhin Amasa ruang chu kawng ata phûlah a hnûk thla a, puanin a khuh ta a." 
2Samuel20:13 Kawng ata a lâk sawn hnu chuan Bikria fapa Seba ûm tûrin mi zawng zawng chuan Joaba chu an zui ta a. 
2Samuel20:14 Seba chuan Israel hnam tin ram chu a fang chhuak a, Abel-beth-maaka khua a lo thleng a, Bikri mite chu an pung khâwm a, ani chu an pui ta a." 
2Samuel20:15 Joaba mite chu an lo thleng a, Abel-beth-maaka chu an rawn hual a, kulh bang pâwnah chuan lei an chhûng pâwng a, a kulh bang tihchim tumin an chhu bur bur a." 
2Samuel20:16 Hmeichhe fing tak hi kulh aṭang chuan a rawn au va, “Khaih, Joaba kha lo kal hnai sela, thu ka lo hrilh ang e, tih han hrilh teh u khai,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:17 Tichuan, hmeichhe hnênah chuan a va kal hnai a, hmeichhia chuan a hnênah, “Joaba i ni em?” a lo ti a. Ani chuan, “Ni e,” a ti a. Hmeichhia chuan a hnênah, “I bawihnu thu sawi hi ngaithla teh,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ka ngaithla e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:18 “Hmânlai chuan ‘Abel’ khuaah thurâwn va dawng rawh,’ an ti ṭhîn a, chutiang chuan thu an titlu ṭhîn." 
2Samuel20:19 Keini hi Israel zînga inremna duhtu leh rinawm taka awm ṭhîn kan ni a; mahse, nang chuan Israel ram khaw hlun, Lalpa pual chu tihchhiat i tum a nih hi le,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:20 Joaba chuan, “Chutiang a ni awzâwng lo, tihchhiat leh nuai bo ka tum hlei nêm." 
2Samuel20:21 Chutiang lam a ni lo. Amaherawhchu, Efraim tlângram mi, Bikria fapa Seba kha lal Davida lakah a hel a, ani chu min pe ula, khua chu ka tawlh kîrsan ang e,” a ti a. Hmeichhia chuan Joaba hnênah, “Aw le, a lu chu kulh bang pâwnah ka rawn vawm chhuak ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:22 Hmeichhia chuan fing takin mipui chu a va hmin a, Bikria fapa Seba lu chu an tansak a, Joaba hnênah an rawn theh chhuak ta a. Tin, Joaba chuan tawtawrâwt a hâm a, khawpui chu an ṭînsan ta a. Mite chu mahni in lamah an haw ṭheuh va, Joaba pawh lal hnênah Jerusalem-ah a haw ta a." 
2Samuel20:23 Joaba chu Israel sipai zawng zawng hotu a ni a; Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu Keret mite leh Pelet mite hotu a ni a. 
2Samuel20:24 Adorama chu kuli hotu a ni a, Ahiluda fapa Jehosafata chu chanchin la khâwmtu a ni." 
2Samuel20:25 Seva chu ziaktu a ni a, Zadoka leh Abiathara te chu puithiam an ni." 
2Samuel20:26 Jair mi Ira pawh chu Davida puithiam a ni. 
2Samuel21:1 Davida lal laiin kum thum a zâwnin ṭâm nasa tak a tla a. Davida chuan Lalpa a râwn a. Lalpa chuan, “Saula leh a chhûngten thisen an chhuah vâng a ni e, Gibeon mite a that a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel21:2 Gibeon mite chu Israel thlah an ni lo va. Amor mi la dam chhunte thlah an ni, Israela thlahte chuan zuah an lo tiam tawh a; mahse, Saulan Israel-te leh Juda-te tâna ṭhahnem a ngaih êm avângin tihchimih a tum a ni." 
2Samuel21:3 Davida chuan Gibeon mite hnênah, “Eng nge ka tihsak ang che u, in chunga Saula thil sual tih man ka rûl ang che u; tichuan, Lalpa mite hi mal in sâwmsak dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Samuel21:4 Gibeon mite chuan a hnênah, “Saula leh a chhûngte nêna kan inkâr thu hi tangka leh rangkachaka tihfel mai chi a ni nêm. Keinin Israel-te tihhlum a thiang si lo va,” an ti a. Ani chuan, “In duh apiang ka tihsak ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel21:5 Anni chuan lal hnênah, “Israel ram puma kan boral chimih vekna tûr ruahmantu," 
2Samuel21:6 Saula fapa pasarih min pe la, Lalpa mi ruat Saula khua Gibea-ah Lalpa hmaah kan khai hlum ang e,” an ti a. Lal chuan, “Ka pe ang che u,” a ti a" 
2Samuel21:7 Lal chuan Saula fa, Jonathana fapa Mefiboseta chu Saula fapa Jonathana nên Lalpa hmaa thu an lo tiam tawh avângin a hum a." 
2Samuel21:8 Lal chuan Aii fanu Rizpii laka Saula fapa pahnih Armonia leh Mefiboseta erawh chu a hruai a; Meholat mi Barzilaia fapa Adriela leh Saula fanu Mikali fapa panga nên. 
2Samuel21:9 Gibeon mite hnênah a hlân a; tichuan, tlângah Lalpa hmaah chuan an khai hlum a. An pasarih chuan an thi ta a. An thah hun chu buhseng ṭan tirh, barli seng ṭan tirh lai a ni." 
2Samuel21:10 Aii fanu Rizpii chuan saiip puan a la a, Lungpui hmun, mitthi ruang awmnaah chuan a zâr a, chutah chuan buhseng tirh aṭangin ruahtui tlâk thlengin a awm a. Chhûnah chunglêng sava lo kalte chu a vêng a, zânah ramsate a vêng bawk a." 
2Samuel21:11 Saula hmei, Rizpii, Aii fanu thiltih chu Davida chu an hrilh a." 
2Samuel21:12 Davida chu a chhuak a, Saula ruh leh a fapa Jonathana ruh chu Jabes Gilead mite hnên ata a la a. (Chûng mite chuan Filistia miten Gilboa tlânga Saula an thah ni khân Beth-san muala an khai chu an ru a ni)" 
2Samuel21:13 chuta ṭang chuan Saula leh Jonathana ruhte chu an la a, an khaihlumte ruh nên chuan an chhar khâwm a." 
2Samuel21:14 Saula ruh te, Jonathana ruhte nên Benjamin rama Zela khuaa a pa Kisa thlânah an phûm ta a. Lalin thu a pêk ang chuan an ti ta a. Chumi hnu chuan ram tâna an dîlna chu Pathianin a chhâng ta a." 
2Samuel21:15 Filistia mite leh Israel mite chu an indo leh a. Davida leh a hote chu an chhuk a, Filistia mite chu an bei a, Davida pawh a chau hle a." 
2Samuel21:16 Milian fate zînga mi Isbibenoba chu dâr fei kg. thum leh a chanvea rit leh khandaih thar pai chuan Davida thah a tum a. 
2Samuel21:17 Mahse, Zeruii fapa Abisaian a lo chhan a, Filistia mi chu a bei a, a that ta a. Davida mite chuan a hnênah, “Israel-te khâwnvâr a mih loh nân indo tûrin kan zîngah i chhuk ve tawh hauh lo vang,” tiin chhia an chham a." 
2Samuel21:18 Chumi hnu chuan Filistia mite nên indona Gob khuaah a awm leh a. Husa mi Sibekaia chuan milian fate zînga mi Safa a that a. 
2Samuel21:19 Filistia mite nên Gob khuaah bawk an indo leh a. Bethlehem mi Jaira fapa Elhana chuan Git mi Goliatha chu a that a, a fei ngul chu kechâwn tiat lai a ni." 
2Samuel21:20 Gath khuaah indona a awm leh a, chutah chuan milian tak, kutzungṭang leh kezungṭang paruk ve ve nei, a vaia sawmhnih leh pali nei a awm a, ani pawh chu milian thlah a ni." 
2Samuel21:21 Israel mite chu a cho va. Davida u Simeia fapa Jonathana chuan a lo that a. 
2Samuel21:22 Chûng mi palite chu Gath khuaa milian thlah an ni a, Davida leh a mite chuan anni chu an that a." 
2Samuel22:1 Davida chuan Lalpan a hmêlmate kut ata leh Saula kut ata a chhan chhuah ni chuan Lalpa fak nân he hla hi a sa a. 
2Samuel22:2 “ Lalpa chu ka lungpui leh ka kulhbîng, Min chhandamtu a ni." 
2Samuel22:3 Ka Pathian chu min humhimtu, ka hahchawlhna a ni, Ka phaw leh ka himna ber, ka kulhbîng sâng, Ka tlûkluhna tûr a ni. Min beitu laka chhantu chu i ni." 
2Samuel22:4 Fak tlâk Lalpa chu ka ko vang a, Ka hmêlmate lakah ka him ang." 
2Samuel22:5 Thihna tuifâwnte chuan min chîm a, Chhiatna tuifâwnte chuan min khuh zo ta." 
2Samuel22:6 Seol hrualhruite chuan mi phuar a, Thihna chuan thangin min hual vêl." 
2Samuel22:7 Mangang takin Lalpa chu ka au va, Ka Pathian chu ka ko va, Ani chuan a Tempul aṭangin ka aw a lo hria a, Ka au thâwm chu a lo ngaithla." 
2Samuel22:8 A thinur avângin lei hi a nghîng a, A che hlawk hlawk a, Vân innghahna chu a nghîng a, a khûr dur dur a." 
2Samuel22:9 A hnâr aṭangin meikhu a lo chhuak ngut ngut a, A kâ aṭanga lo chhuak mei chu a alh hluah hluah a, A ṭêk chuai chuai mai." 
2Samuel22:10 Ani chuan vânte chu a tihawng a, a lo chhuk a, A ke hnuaiah thim chhah mup a awm." 
2Samuel22:11 Cherub chunga chuangin a thlâwk a, Thli chuan a thlawhpui." 
2Samuel22:12 Thim chhah mupin a hual vêl a, Chhûm chhah tak ruah pai chhûm chuan a hual a." 
2Samuel22:13 A hmaa êng awmah chuan, Meilingte chu a alh hluah hluah." 
2Samuel22:14 Lalpa chuan vânah khawpui a tiri dur dur a, Chungnungbera chu a au va." 
2Samuel22:15 Hmêlmate chu thalin a kâp a, ṭêk a dentîr a, a ûm darh zo ta." 
2Samuel22:16 Lalpa chuan a hau va, A hnâra thawin a chhêm vak a, Tuipui mawngte leh leilung nghahchhante chu A lang zo ta." 
2Samuel22:17 Chung lam aṭangin mi rawn ban a, mi chelh a, Tui thûk tak ata min hnûk chhuak a." 
2Samuel22:18 Ka hneh loh, ka hmêlma hlauhawm tak tak, Mi hawtute laka ta chu mi chhan chhuak a." 
2Samuel22:19 Anni chuan ka mangan laiin min bei a, Lalpa chuan mi hum a." 
2Samuel22:20 Ani chuan hmun râlmuangah min dah a, Ka chunga a lâwm avângin mi chhanhim ta." 
2Samuel22:21 Lalpa chuan dik taka ka tih avângin mal min sâwm a, Pawi ka khawih loh avângin mi zuah ta." 
2Samuel22:22 Lalpa kawngte chu ka zawh a, Ka Pathian chu ka sual bosan ngai lo." 
2Samuel22:23 Awm dân tûra a tih zawng zawng ka pawisa a, A thuruatte chu ka zâwm lo ngai lo." 
2Samuel22:24 A hmaah chuan sawisêlbovin ka awm a, Sual lakah ka invêng ṭhîn." 
2Samuel22:25 Lalpa chuan dik taka ka tih avângin mal min sâwm a, Pawi ka khawih lo, A hmu reng a ni." 
2Samuel22:26 Mi ngilneite chungah ngil i nei a, Sawisêlbote lakah sawisêlbo i ni." 
2Samuel22:27 Mi thianghlimte tân i thianghlim a, Mi luhlulte lakah i luhlul a." 
2Samuel22:28 Mi tlâwmte chu i chhan a, Mi chapote chu i titlâwm ta." 
2Samuel22:29 Aw Lalpa, nang hi ka êng i ni a, Lalpa chuan ka nun thimte a tiêng ta." 
2Samuel22:30 A ni, râl bei tûrin min tichak a, Ka Pathian ṭanpuinain an kulh bangte ka ṭhiat." 
2Samuel22:31 Pathian hi zawng a dik famkim a, Lalpa thute chu innghahna tlâk a ni. Amah pantute tân ani chu phaw a ni." 
2Samuel22:32 Lalpa lo chu tu nge Pathian dang awm, Kan Pathian lo chu tu nge lungpui dang awm?" 
2Samuel22:33 He Pathian hi ka tlûkluhna kulh nghet, Ka kawng tihimtu chu a ni." 
2Samuel22:34 Ka kete chu zukpui anga chakin a siam a, Tlâng sângah te him takin mi awmtîr a." 
2Samuel22:35 Ka kutte hi râl do a zirtîr a, Ka bânte hian dâr thalngul a kuai zo ta hial a." 
2Samuel22:36 Min hmu a, i phawin min khuh ta; Min ṭanpui avângin ka ropui ta." 
2Samuel22:37 Ka ke pên i tisau va, Min man phâk ta lo." 
2Samuel22:38 Ka hmêlmate ka ûm a, ka hneh a, Ka tihboral vek hma chu ka kîrsan lo." 
2Samuel22:39 Ka thehthlu a, ka thehthal rum a, An tho leh tawh ngai lo, Ka rapbet ta a ni." 
2Samuel22:40 Indo tûrin min tichak a, Ka hmêlmate chu min tihtlâwmsak ta." 
2Samuel22:41 Ka hmêlmate ka ûm a, Min hawtute chu ka tiboral ta." 
2Samuel22:42 An hawi vêl a; mahse, chhantu an nei si lo, Lalpa an au va; mahse, a chhâng duh lo." 
2Samuel22:43 Leia vaivut angin ka vaw dip a, Kawtthlêra chirh angin ka rap pherh a." 
2Samuel22:44 Nangin ka laka helhote kut ata min chhan chhuak a, Israel-te hotu atân mi humhim a, Ka hriat ngai lohte pawh ka khualehtui an lo ni ta." 
2Samuel22:45 Ram dang mite chuan min rawn tlawn a, Ka sawi apiang an awih." 
2Samuel22:46 Hnam dangte chu an zâm a, An kulhbîng ata khûr chungin an lo chhuak ta." 
2Samuel22:47 Lalpa mi nung, ka lungpui chu fakin awm rawh se, Ka inhumhimna lungpui, Pathian chu chawimawiin awm rawh se." 
2Samuel22:48 Ani chu phuba mi lâksaktu Pathian a ni, Hnamte chu ka ke hnuaiah a dah." 
2Samuel22:49 Ka hmêlmate lak ata min chhan chhuak a, A ni, mi dotute chungah mi dah ta, Mi nunrâwngte lakah chuan min chhan ta." 
2Samuel22:50 Chuvângin, aw Lalpa, hnam tin zîngah ka fak ang chia, I hming fakin ka zai ang." 
2Samuel22:51 A lal thlan chu ropui takin a hnehtîr a, A hriakthih Davida chungah leh a thlahte chungah, Kumkhuain a ngilneihzia a lantîr ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel23:1 Hei hi Davida thu sawi hnuhnûng ber chu a ni, Jesaia fapa Davida thu sawi chu:" 
2Samuel23:2 Sâng taka Pathian chawisân, Jakoba thlah Pathian hriakthih, Israel tâna hla mawi tak tak phuahtu thute chu. “ Lalpa thlarau chuan ka hnênah thu a sawi a, A thute chu ka kâah a dah ta." 
2Samuel23:3 Israel-te Pathian, an lungpui chuan ka hnênah thu a sawi: ‘Mite chunga dik taka rorêla, Pathian ṭih chunga ro rêl ṭhîntu hnênah chuan." 
2Samuel23:4 Chu mi chu khaw thiang ni chhuak mawi tak ang hi a ni, Ruahsûr bân khaw thianga thlai lo harh sêrh ang hi.’" 
2Samuel23:5 Chu chu Pathianin kan chhûngkua min din dân a ni lâwm ni? Kumkhua atân ka hnênah thu a thlung a, Tihdanglam leh tawh loh tûr chu. Min chhandamin duhthusâm min pe lo vang em ni?" 
2Samuel23:6 Mi suaksualte erawh chu hlîng anga paih bo an ni ang, Kut lâwnga khawih ngam an ni si lo va." 
2Samuel23:7 Khawihtu tûr chuan thîr leh feingul hmang sela, Hâl ral vek tûr an ni." 
2Samuel23:8 Hêng hi Davida sipai huaisente hming chu a ni: Takemon mi Joseb-basebeta chu ‘huaisen pathum’ zînga chhuanvâwr ber a ni, Ezni mi Adinoa tih a ni bawk. Ani chuan fei a lek a, an inbeihnaah ṭum khatan mi zariat a that a ni." 
2Samuel23:9 A dawt chu Eleazara, Aho chi, Dodoa fapa a ni. Chumi chu Filistia mite indo tûra an pun khâwma Israel-te an tlân darh vek lai khân Davida nêna hmêlmate chotu, ‘sipai huaisen pathumte’ zînga mi kha a ni." 
2Samuel23:10 A thawk lawk a, Filistia mite a that chiam a, a kut kham lutuk avângin a khandaih pawh a thlah thei lo hial a ni. Chumi ni chuan Lalpan ropui takin a hnehtîr a, Israel sipaite chu râllâk sum chuh tûr ngawtin an lo kîr leh a nih kha." 
2Samuel23:11 A dawt lehtu chu Sama, Harar mi, Agea fapa a ni. Filistia mite chu dailuah tamna hmun Lehi-ah an pung khâwm a, Israel-te chu hmêlma hmaah an tlânchhia a," 
2Samuel23:12 ani erawh chu a ṭanhmunah a ding tlat a, Filistia mite chu a that a, Lalpa chuan ropui takin a hnehtîr a." 
2Samuel23:13 Buhseng ṭan tirh laiin mi huaisen sawmthum zînga pathumte chu Davida awmna Adulam pûkah an chhuk a. Filistia sipai pâwl khat chuan Refaim-ho hmunah ṭanhmun an khuar a. 
2Samuel23:14 Chutih lai chuan Davida chu kulhbîngah a awm a, Filistia sipaiho erawh chu Bethlehem-ah an awm a." 
2Samuel23:15 Davida chuan, “Aw, Bethlehem kulh kawngkhâr kianga tuichhunchhuah tui kha tuin emaw min va chawisak se ka va ti em!” a ti a." 
2Samuel23:16 Sipai huaisen pathumte chuan Filistia-ho riahhmun chu an tâwn tlang a, kulh kawngkhâr kianga tui chu an va chawi a, Davida hnênah an rawn la a. Nimahsela, ani chuan a lo in duh ta lo va. Lalpa tân a bun chhuak ta zâwk a." 
2Samuel23:17 Heti hian a ti a, “Aw Lalpa, hei hi ka in loh tûrzia mai chu. Thih huama kalte thisen chu ka in ang maw?” a ti a. Tichuan, a in duh ta lo va. Chûngte chu huaisen pathumte thiltih chu a ni."
