2Samuel23:18 Zeruii fa Joaba u Abisaia chu ‘mi huaisen sawmthum’ zînga hotu ber a ni a. Mi zathum a feiin a that a, ‘huaisen sawmthumte’ zîngah chuan hmingṭhat a hlawh a." 
2Samuel23:19 Mi huaisen sawmthum zînga chhuanawm ber a ni a, chuvângin, an hotu-ah an siam a; mahse, mi huaisen pathum an tihte zîngah a tel pha lo." 
2Samuel23:20 Jehoiada fapa Benaia, Kabzeel khaw mi pawh a huaisen hle, thil ropui tak a ti, Moab mi huaisen pahnih a that a. Tin, vûr tlâk laiin pûka tawm sakeibaknei a that bawk a." 
2Samuel23:21 Aigupta mi, palian tak a that bawk. Aigupta mi chuan fei a keng a, Benaia chuan tiang nên a pan thla a, Aigupta mi fei chu a chhuhsak a, a fei ngei chuan a chhun hlum a." 
2Samuel23:22 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chuan chutiang thil chu a tih avângin ‘Sipai huaisen sawmthum’ zînga chhiar tel a ni. 
2Samuel23:23 ‘Mi huaisen sawmthum’ zîngah chuan a hming a ṭha ber a; mahse, mihuaisen pathumte zîngah chuan a tel pha lo. Davida chuan amah vêngtu hotu-ah a dah a." 
2Samuel23:24 Joaba nau Asahela chu mi huaisen sawmthum zînga mi a ni a. Bethlehem khuaa mi Dodoa fapa Elhanana te," 
2Samuel23:25 Harod mi Sama te, Harod mi Elika te," 
2Samuel23:26 Pelet mi Heleza te, Tekoa mi Ikesa fapa Ira te," 
2Samuel23:27 Anathot mi Abiezera te, Husa mi Mebunaia te," 
2Samuel23:28 Aho mi Zalmona te, Netofa mi Maharaia te," 
2Samuel23:29 Netofa mi Baana fapa Heleba te, Benjamina thlah Gibea khaw mi Ribaia fapa Itaia te," 
2Samuel23:30 Pirathon mi Benaia te, Gaas luitêa mi Hidaia te," 
2Samuel23:31 Arabat mi Abi-Albon-a te, Bahurim mi Azmaveta te," 
2Samuel23:32 Salbon mi Eliaba te, Jasena fapate zînga mi Jonathana te," 
2Samuel23:33 Harar mi Sama te, Harar mi bawk Sarara fapa Ahiama te," 
2Samuel23:34 Maaka mi Ahasbaia fapa Elifeleta te, Gilo mi Ahithofela fapa Eliama," 
2Samuel23:35 Karmel mi Hezroa te, Arba mi Paaraia te," 
2Samuel23:36 Zoba mi Nathana fapa Igala te, Gad mi Bania te," 
2Samuel23:37 Amon mi Zeleka te, Joaba râlthuam kengtu Beerot mi Naharaia te," 
2Samuel23:38 Jatir mi Ira leh Gareba te," 
2Samuel23:39 Hit mi Uria te an ni. An za chuan sawmthum leh pasarih an ni. 
2Samuel24:1 Israel-te chungah chuan Lalpa chu a thin a ur ta a. Davida chu an chunga buaina thlen tûrin a chawk tho va, a hnênah, “Kal la, Israel-te leh Juda-te chhiar rawh,” tiin." 
2Samuel24:2 Lal chuan a sipai hotu Joaba hnênah, “I sipai hotute nên Israel mite awmna hmun tin, Dan aṭanga Beer-seba thlengin fang chhuak ula, mi eng zât nge an nih hre tûrin chhiar vek rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:3 Joaba chuan lal hnênah, “ Lalpa, i Pathian chuan i mite chu a lêt za aia tamin tipung sela, i mit ngeiin chu chu hmuhtîr che rawh se; amaherawhchu, eng atân nge chu chu ka pu lal hian hriat i duh kher le?” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:4 Nimahsela, Joaba leh a sipai hotute chuan lal thu chu an hnial ngam si lo va, Joaba leh sipai hotute chu Israel-te chhiar tûr chuan lal hnên ata chu an chhuak ta a." 
2Samuel24:5 Jordan lui an kân a, Gad mite lui ruama Aroer khaw chhim lamah awmhmun an khuar a, hmâr lam panin Jazer-ah an kal a." 
2Samuel24:6 Gilead-ah te, Hit-ho ram Kades-ah te an kal a, Dan an pan a, khawthlang lama inherin Sidon an thleng a," 
2Samuel24:7 chhim lam an pan a, Tura kulh an tlawh a, Hiv leh Kanan-ho khua an tlawh vek a, Judai ram chhim lam Beer-seba an thleng a." 
2Samuel24:8 Ram an fan chhuah hnu, thla kua leh ni sawmhnih hnu chuan Jerusalem-ah an lo kîr a." 
2Samuel24:9 Joaba chuan mihring an chhiar chhuah zât chu lal a hrilh a, Israel ramah chuan khandaih keng mi, mi huaisen nuai riat an awm a, Juda mi chu nuai nga an awm tih a hrilh a." 
2Samuel24:10 Chhiarpui an zawh hnu chuan Davida chu a inthiam lo ta hle a. Davida chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Thil ka lo tisual nasa hle mai; mahse, tûnah hian, Aw Lalpa, i chhiahhlawh khawlohna hi la bo tûrin ka ngên a che, thil âtthlâk takin ka lo ti a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:11 Zînga Davida a lo thawh chuan Lalpa thu chu Davida zâwlnei Gada hnênah a lo thleng a. 
2Samuel24:12 “Thil chi thum thlan tûr ka ruatsak a; kal la, a chunga ka tih tûr ber pakhat thlang tûrin Davida chu hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:13 Gada chu Davida hnênah a kal a, chûng thu chu a hrilh a, a hnênah, “A eng ber chu nge i thlan dâwn inngaihtuah rawh le: I rama kum thum chhûng ṭâm tuar nge, i hmêlmaten thla thum chhûng an ûm che nge, i rama ni thum chhûng hripui lêntîr? Mi tîrtu engtin nge ka chhân ang min hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:14 Davida chuan Gada hnênah, “Thlan ngaihna ka va hre lo ve. Lalpa kutah tlulût phawt mai ila, a lainatna a nasa a, mihring kutah chuan min tlûkluhtîr lul suh ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:15 Lalpa chuan Israel-te chungah ni thum chhûng hripui a lêntîr ta a, Dan aṭanga Beer-seba thlengin mi sîngsarih an thi a." 
2Samuel24:16 Vântirhkohvin tichhe tûra Jerusalem lama a kut a han lek chuan Lalpan chu thil ṭha lo tak tih a tum chu a sût a, mite tiboraltu Vântirhkoh hnênah chuan, “A tâwk tawh e, i kut lek tawh suh,” a ti a. Lalpa tirh Vântirhkoh chu Jebus mi Arauna hruih bulah a awm a." 
2Samuel24:17 Davidan mite tiboraltu Vântirhkoh chu a hmuhin Lalpa hnênah, “Ngai teh, ka lo sual a ni, dik lo takin ka lo ti ta a; mahse, hêng berâmte hian eng nge an tihsual? Kei leh ka chhûngte hi min hrem zâwk tûrin ka ngên a che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:18 Chumi ni chuan Gada chu Davida hnênah a lo kal a, a hnênah, “Chho la, Jebus mi Arauna hruihzâwlah Lalpa tân maichâm siam rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:19 Lalpa thupêk, Gadan a hrilh ang chuan Davida chu a chho ta a." 
2Samuel24:20 Arauna chu a han hawi a, lal leh a chhiahhlawhte a lam pana an lo kal chu a hmu a, Arauna chuan a pan a, bawkkhupin lal chu chibai a bûk a." 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna chuan, “Engtiziaa Lalpa, ka pu chu, a chhiahhlawh hnênah lo kal nge a nih le?” a ti a. Davida chuan, “Mipui zînga hri lêng a kian theih nân Lalpa maichâm siamna tûrin i hruihzâwl rawn lei ka tum a ni” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna chuan Davida hnênah, “Ka pu, lal chuan ṭûl i tih chu hmang la, i duh apiang chu hlân rawh. Hei hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpa te, thingtuah atân hruih hmanrua te leh bâwng nghâwngkawl te a awm a." 
2Samuel24:23 Hêng zawng zawng hi, aw lalber, ka pe vek a che,” a ti a. Arauna chuan lal hnênah, “ Lalpa i Pathian chuan i thilhlan chu lo pawm rawh se,” a ti bawk a." 
2Samuel24:24 Lal chuan Arauna hnênah, “Chutiang zawng ni lo ve, a leiin ka lei zâwk ang e; eng mah insêng lovin Lalpa ka Pathian hnênah hâlral thilhlan ka hlân tawp lo vang,” a ti a. Tichuan, Davida chuan hruihzâwl leh bâwngpate chu tangka tlang sawmngain a lei ta a." 
2Samuel24:25 Davida chuan chutah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a, hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan a hlân a, Lalpa chuan ram tâna a dîlna chu a chhâng a, Israel rama hri lêng chu a reh ta a." 
1Kings1:1 Davida chu a lo upain a lo tar ta hle a, puan an sintîr pawhin a mu lum zo ta lo va." 
1Kings1:2 A chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “Ka pu, i kianga awma enkawl tûr che nula kan zawng ang e. Ani chu i bulah a mu ang a, kan pu hi i mu lum thei dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
1Kings1:3 Tichuan, Israel ram pumah nula hmêlṭha an zawng ta a. Sunam mi, Abisagi an va hmu a, lal hnênah an rawn hruai a." 
1Kings1:4 Chu nula chu hmêlṭha tak a ni. Lal chu a enkawl a, a kiangah a awm reng a; mahse, lal chuan a pâwl lo." 
1Kings1:5 Hagiti laka Davida fapa Adonija chu lal fa la damte zînga upa ber a nih avângin lal tûrah a lo inngai a. Tawlailîr te, sakawr chungchuang mite leh amah vêngtu mi sawmnga a ruat diam a." 
1Kings1:6 A pa lah chuan, “Engati nge hetianga i khawsak le?” tiin a kamkhat ngai si lo va. Tlangvâl hmêlṭha tak Absaloma dawt chiah a ni." 
1Kings1:7 Adonija chuan Zeruii fapa Joaba leh puithiam Abiathara te chu a râwn a, anni chu a lamah an ṭang a, an pui ṭhîn a." 
1Kings1:8 Puithiam Zadoka te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia te, zâwlnei Nathana te, Simeia te, Reia te leh mi huaisen, Davida vêngtu te erawh chuan Adonija chu an zui ve lo." 
1Kings1:9 Adonija chuan En-rogel kianga Zebelet lungpui zâwlah chuan inthawi nân berâm te, bâwngpa te, ran châwm thau te a talh a. A unau lal fapa zawng zawng leh Judai rama lal khâwnbâwl zawng zawng a sâwm a." 
1Kings1:10 Zâwlnei Nathana te, Benaia te, mi huaisen lal vêngtu te leh a unau Solomona erawh chu a sâwm ve lo." 
1Kings1:11 Nathana chuan Solomona nu Bathsebi hnênah, “Hagiti fapa Adonija hi kan pu Davida hriat lohvin a lal ta tih i hre na nge?" 
1Kings1:12 Tûnah, i himna tûr leh i fapa Solomona himna tûr ka hrilh ang che." 
1Kings1:13 Lal Davida hnênah va lût la, a hnênah, ‘Aw lalber, ka pu, i chhiahhlawh hnênah hian, ‘Solomona hi ka aiawha lal tûr a ni, ka lalṭhutthlêng a luah ang’ tiin i tiam a ni lâwm ni? Engtizia nge Adonija hi a lal tâk mai le?’ va ti la," 
1Kings1:14 Lal chu i biak laiin ka lo lût ve ang a, i thu sawi chu ka rawn nemnghet dâwn nia,” tiin thu a râwn a." 
1Kings1:15 Bathsebi chu lal pindanah a va kal a, lal chu a tar hle tawh a, Sunam mi Abisagi chuan a lo awm a." 
1Kings1:16 Bathsebi chuan lal chu kûnin chibai a bûk a, Lal chuan, “Eng nge i duh le?” a lo ti a." 
1Kings1:17 Ani chuan, “Ka pu, i bawihnu hnênah hian Lalpa, i Pathian hming chhâlin, ‘I fapa Solomona hi ka aiawhin a la lal ang a, ka lalṭhutthlêng a luah ang’ tiin i tiam a;" 
1Kings1:18 mahse, hei, Adonija a lal ta reng mai. Ka pu lah hian i hre ve si lo." 
1Kings1:19 Bâwngpa te, ran châwm thau te a talh ṭeuh va, lal fapa te, puithiam Abiathara te, sipai hotu Joaba te a sâwm a, i chhiahhlawh Solomona erawh chu a sâwm ve lo." 
1Kings1:20 Ka pu, Israel mi zawng zawng hian lalṭhutthlêngah tu nge i ṭhuttîr dâwn tih an thlîr reng a ni." 
1Kings1:21 Hei hi i tihfel loh chuan, ka pu hi, i thih hunah kei leh ka fapa Solomona chu phiarrutuah min puh dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:22 Chutia lal a biak lai tak chuan zâwlnei Nathana chu a lo lût a. 
1Kings1:23 “Zâwlnei Nathana pawh a lo kal e,” tiin lal chu an hrilh a. Lal hnênah chuan a va kal a, a kûn a, bawkkhupin chibai a bûk a." 
1Kings1:24 Nathana chuan, “Ka pu lalber hian ‘Adonija chu ka aiawhin a lal ang a, ka lalṭhutthlêng a luah ang,’ a ti em ni?" 
1Kings1:25 Vawiin hian a thawk chhuak a, bâwngpa tam tak te, ran châwm thau te, berâm te a talh a, lal fapa zawng zawng leh sipai hotu te, puithiam Abiathara te a sâwm a. Tûnah hian an eiin an in ho va, ‘Lal Adonija dam reng rawh se,’ tiin an au va." 
1Kings1:26 Kei i chhiahhlawh hi puithiam Zadoka te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia te leh i chhiahhlawh Solomona te nên min sâwm ve lo." 
1Kings1:27 Hei hi ka pu lalber thu-a tih a nih si chuan, ka pu hian a thih hnua a lalṭhutthlêng luahtu tûr a chhiahhlawhte a hrilh ve lo a ni maw?” a ti a." 
1Kings1:28 Lal Davida chuan, “Bathsebi han ko teh u,” a ti a. Ani chu lal hnênah chuan a va kal a, a hmaah a ding a." 
1Kings1:29 Lal chuan heti hian a sawi a, “Manganna tinrêng laka min humhimtu Lalpa hming chhâlin ka tiam a che, Israel te Pathian Lalpa hming chhâla i hnêna ka tiam tawh chu tûnah ka hlen ngei ngei dâwn." 
1Kings1:30 I fapa Solomona chu ka aiawhin a lal ang a, ka lalṭhutthlêng hi a luah ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:31 Bathsebi chuan bawkkhupin lal chu chibai a bûk a, “Ka pu, lal Davida chu dam reng rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:32 Lal Davida chuan, “Puithiam Zadoka te, zâwlnei Nathana te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia te han ko teh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:33 Lal hnênah chuan an lo kal a, Lal chuan an hnênah, “Mi lianho hruai ula, ka fapa Solomona chu ka sabengtung chungah chuantîr ula, Gihon-ah hruai thla rawh u." 
1Kings1:34 Chutah chuan Puithiam Zadoka leh zâwlnei Nathana chuan Israel lal atân hriak thih rawh se. Tawtawrâwt hâm ula, ‘Lal Solomona chu dam reng rawh se,’ tiin au rawh u." 
1Kings1:35 Ani chu in rawn zui ang a, ka lalṭhutthlêngah ṭhu sela, ka aiah a lal ang. Ani hi Israel leh Judai ram chunga rorêltu atân ka ruat a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:36 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chuan, “Amen, ka pu, i Pathian, Lalpa chuan nemnghet rawh se." 
1Kings1:37 Lalpa chu, ka pu lalber hnêna a awm ṭhîn angin Solomona hnênah pawh awm sela; ka pu lal Davida lalṭhutthlêng aiin a lalṭhutthlêng chu tinghet zâwk rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:38 Puithiam Zadoka te, zâwlnei Nathana te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia, Keret mite leh Pelet mite chu an kal a, Solomona chu Davida sabengtung chungah an chuantîr a, Gihon-ah chuan an hruai thla a." 
1Kings1:39 Puithiam Zadoka chuan Hmun Thianghlima hriak dahna ki chu a la a, Solomona chu a thih a. Tawtawrâwt an hâm a, mi zawng zawng chuan, “Lal Solomona dam reng rawh se,” an ti a." 
1Kings1:40 Mi zawng zawngin ani chu an zui chho va, phênglâwngte an tum a, an hlim êm êm a, an thâwm chuan lei a nghawr dur dur a." 
1Kings1:41 Adonija leh a mi sâwm, a hnêna awm zawng zawngin ruai an ṭheh zawh chuan thâwm chu an hria a. Tawtawrâwt ri an hriatin Joaba chuan, “Khawpui chhûnga thâwm ri dur dur chu engtizia nge ni ta le?” a ti a." 
1Kings1:42 Chu thu a sawi lai mêk chuan puithiam Abiathara fapa Jonathana a lo thleng a. Adonija chuan, “Lo kal teh khai, nang zawng tlangvâl fel tak i ni a, chanchin lâwmawm i rawn thlen châwk ang chu maw?” a lo ti a." 
1Kings1:43 Jonathana chuan, “Thlen awzâwng lo, kan pu lal Davida chuan Solomona chu lalah a siam ta." 
1Kings1:44 Lal chuan puithiam Zadoka te, zâwlnei Nathana te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia te, Keret mi te, Pelet mi te chu vêng tûrin a tîr a. Ani chu lal sabengtung chungah an chuantîr a." 
1Kings1:45 Puithiam Zadoka leh zâwlnei Nathana chuan Gihon-ah lal atân hriak an thih ta. Chuta ṭang chuan hlim takin an lo chho va, an thâwm chu khawpui a khat a, chu chu in hriat hi a ni e." 
1Kings1:46 Solomona chuan lalṭhutthlêng a luah ta a ni. 
1Kings1:47 Milianho pawh an lo kal a, kan pu lal Davida hnênah, “I Pathian chuan Solomona chu nang aiin tiropui sela, a lalṭhutthlêng pawh i lalṭhutthlêng aiin tiropui rawh se,” tiin an rawn lawmpui a." 
1Kings1:48 Lal pawhin a khumlaizâwl aṭangin chibai a bûk a, ‘ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, vawiina ka lalṭhutthlênga ka aiawhtu tûr ka mit ngeia min hmuhtîrtu chu fakin awm rawh se,’ tiin a sawi a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:49 Chu veleh Adonija mi sâwmho chuan an hlau va, an tlân darh ta vek a." 
1Kings1:50 Adonija chuan Solomona chu a hlau ta hle a, a tho va, maichâm ki a vuan ta a." 
1Kings1:51 Solomona hnênah chuan, “Adonija chuan lal Solomona a hlauh êm avângin maichâm ki a vuan reng mai. ‘Lal Solomonan a chhiahhlawh hi khandaiha that lo tûrin chhia chham teh se,’ a ti,” tiin Solomona chu an va hrilh a." 
1Kings1:52 Ani chuan, “Rinawm taka a awm phawt chuan a samzai pakhat pawh ka khawih lo vang. A sualna hmuh a nih erawh chuan a thi ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:53 Lal Solomona chuan mi a tîr a, maichâm ata an va hruai chhuak a, Adonija chu a lo kal a, Lal Solomona chu kûnin chibai a bûk a, ani chuan, “In lamah va haw tawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:1 Davida thih hun chu a lo hnai a, a fapa Solomona chu hetiang hian thu a chah a." 
1Kings2:2 “Mi dangte ang bawkin ka lo thi ve dâwn ta a, patling takin awm la, zâm rêng rêng suh." 
1Kings2:3 Lalpa, i Pathianin a phûtte chu zâwm la, a kawng zawh la, a thuruat te, a thupêk te, awm dân tûr a tih te leh a thu hriattîr, Mosia Dân bu-a ziak te chu zâwm la; tichuan, i thiltih apiangah te, i kalna apiangah te i lo hmuingîl thei ang." 
1Kings2:4 Lalpa chuan, ‘I thlahte chu fîmkhur taka an khawsaka, thinlung leh tih tak zeta ka thupêkte an zawm chuan Israel-te lalṭhutthlêng hi an luah reng ang,’ tia a tiam kha a hlen ang." 
1Kings2:5 Zeruii fapa Joaba hian ka pawi a khawih kha hre reng rawh; Israel sipai hotu pahnih, Nera fapa Abnera leh Jethera fapa Amasa a thah kha. Râlmuan laiin indo lai ang ziazângin thisen phuba a la a, pawi khawih lo thisen a chhuah hi a mawh ka phur a, ka tân a pawi hle a ni." 
1Kings2:6 Tih dân tûr chu i hre mai ang, tarkûnin dam suh se." 
1Kings2:7 Gilead mi Barzilaia fate chu lo khawngaih la, i dawhkânah chaw kîltîr ve ang che. I unaupa Absaloma hlauva ka tlânchhiat lai khân min lo khawngaih si a." 
1Kings2:8 “Tin, hei, Bahurim khuaa mi Benjamina thlah, Gera fapa Simeia hi i hnênah a awm a; ani hi Mahanaim pana ka kal lai khân ânchhia min lawh a; mahse, Jordan-ah mi hmuak tûrin a lo chhuk a, chutah chuan, “Khandaihin ka that lo vang che,” tiin Lalpa hming chhâlin a hnênah thu ka tiam a." 
1Kings2:9 Mahse, hrem loh chuan chhuah suh ang che, patling i ni a, tih dân tûr chu i hre mai ang. A tar hunah i that dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:10 Davida chu a thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a." 
1Kings2:11 “Israel-te chungah kum sawmli a lal a, kum sarih Hebron-ah, kum sawmthum leh pathum chu Jerusalem-ah." 
1Kings2:12 Solomona chu a pa aiawhin a lal ta a, ram chu a nghet ta hle a ni." 
1Kings2:13 Hagiti fapa Adonija chu Solomona nu Bathsebi hnênah a kal a, ani chuan, “Ṭha lam thu-a lo kal em i nih?” a ti a. Adonija chuan, “Aw, ṭha lam thu ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:14 Ani chuan, “I hnênah eng emaw sawi tûr ka nei e,” a ti a. Bathsebi chuan, “Sawi ta che,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:15 Ani chuan, “Ram hi ka ta a ni tawh zet a, Israel-ho zawng zawng pawhin an lal angah min en tih i hria a; mahse, thil a inher danglam a, ram chu ka unaupa chan a lo ni leh ta zâwk a, chu chu Lalpa remruat a ni." 
1Kings2:16 Tûnah, thil pakhat dîl che ka duh, mi remtihsak hrâm rawh;” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Eng nge ni a?” a ti a." 
1Kings2:17 Adonija chuan, “Khawngaih takin lal Solomona mi biaksak rawh, i thu zawng a hnial âwm si lo va, Sunam mi Abisagi hi nupuiah mi neihtîr teh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:18 Bathsebi chuan, “Ni e, lal chu ka lo biaksak ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:19 Bathsebi chu Adonija biaksak tûrin lal Solomona hnênah a kal a; lal chu amah lo lâwm tûrin a tho va, kûnin chibai a bûk a, lalṭhutthlêngah chuan a ṭhu leh ta a. Lal nu tân ṭhutthlêng dang an rawn la a, a ding lamah chuan an ṭhuttîr a." 
1Kings2:20 Lal nu chuan, “Thil tê tham tê ka dîl duh che a, min remtihsak hrâm ang che,” a ti a. Lal chuan, “Eng nge ni le? Ka nu, ka remtihsak ngei ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:21 Ani chuan, “Sunam mi Abisagi hi i unaupa Adonija nupui atân pe rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:22 Lal Solomona chuan a nu hnênah, “Engtiziaa Sunam mi Abisagi hi Adonija tâna dîl nge i nih? Lalṭhutthlêng pawh hi dilsak ta law law che. Ka u a ni a, a tân te, a lamṭang puithiam Abiathara leh Zeruii fapa Joaba tân te pawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:23 Lal Solomona chuan Lalpa hming chhâlin hetiangin chhia a chham a, “Adonija chuan a thihna tûr a dîl a nih loh nâ chuan Pathianin a tih tihin min ti sela, na tak pawhin,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:24 “Tûnah, Lalpa, a thutiam anga ka pa lalṭhutthlênga min ṭhuttîra min tinghettu, kan chhûngkua lalna min dinsaktu nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, vawiinah Adonija hi tihhlum tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:25 Lal Solomona chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu a tîr a, Adonija chu a bei a, a va that ta a." 
1Kings2:26 Lal chuan, Abiathara hnênah, “I khua Anathot-ah haw rawh, thi mai tlâk zawng i ni a; mahse, tûnah zawng ka that rih lo vang che. Ka pa Davida hmaa Engkim Lalpa Bâwm i lo zâwn ṭhin avâng leh harsatna a tuarte i tuarpui ve avângin,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:27 Solomona chuan Abiathara chu Lalpa puithiam a nihna a bân a, Elia chhûngte chungchâng Silo khuaa Lalpa sawi chu a lo thleng ta a." 
1Kings2:28 Chu thu chu Joaban a lo hria a, Absaloma lamah a ṭang lo na a, Adonija lamṭang a ni si a. Tichuan, Lalpa inah a tlân lût a, maichâm ki a vuan ta a." 
1Kings2:29 “Joaba chu Lalpa puan inah a tlân lût a, maichâm bulah a tawm,” tiin lal Solomona an hrilh a. Solomona chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia hnênah, “Kal la, va that rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:30 Benaia chu Lalpa puan inah a lût a, Joaba hnênah chuan, “Lalin lo chhuak rawh a ti,” a va ti a. Ani chuan, “Ni lo ve, hetah hian ka thi mai ang e,” a ti a. Benaia chuan, “Joaba chuan hetiangin min lo chhâng e,” tiin lal chu a va hrilh a." 
1Kings2:31 Lal chuan, “A sawi ang chuan va that la, phûm nghâl rawh. Kei leh ka pa chhûngte hi Joaban pawi khawih lo thisen a chhuah lak ata kan fihlîm thei ang." 
1Kings2:32 Ka pa Davida hriat lohvin mi pahnih a bei a, khandaihin a that a, Lalpa chuan a thisen chhuah man thungrûl rawh se. Chûng mi pahnih, Nera fapa Abnera, Israel sipai hotu leh Jethera fapa Amasa, Juda sipai hotute kha, amah aia ṭha leh tling an ni si a." 
1Kings2:33 An thisen chhuah man chu Joaba leh a thlahte lu chungah tla kumkhua rawh se. Davida te, a thlah te, a chhûngkua leh a lalṭhutthlêng te erawh chu Lalpa chuan tihmuingîl zêl rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:34 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu a han chho va, Joaba chu a bei a, a that ta a; thlalêra ama inah chuan an phûm ta a." 
1Kings2:35 Lal chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu sipai hotu ber atân Joaba hmunah a dah a, puithiam Zadoka chu Abiathara ai a awhtîr bawk a." 
1Kings2:36 Lal chuan Simeia a kohtîr a, a hnênah, “Jerusalem-ah in sa la; tah chuan awm la, khawiah mah kal chhuak suh." 
1Kings2:37 I chhuaha Kidron ruam i kân ni chu i thih ni a ni mai tih hre rawh; i thisen mawh chu nangman i phur ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:38 Simeian lal hnênah, “Ni e, Lalpa, ka puin i sawi ang chuan i chhiahhlawhin a ti zêl ang,” a ti a. Simeia chu Jerusalem-ah a awm ta rêng a." 
1Kings2:39 Kum thum hnuah chuan Simeia chhiahhlawhte zînga mi pahnih chu Gath khaw lal Maaka fapa Akisa hnênah an tlân a. Miin Simeia hnênah, “I chhiahhlawhte Gath khuaah an awm e,” tiin an hrilh a." 
1Kings2:40 Chu veleh Simeia chuan a sabengtung a thuam a, a chhiahhlawhte chu zawng tûrin Gath khuaa Akisa hnênah a kal ta a. Simeia chuan chhiahhlawhte chu Gath ata a rawn hruai hâwng leh a." 
1Kings2:41 Simeia chu Jerusalem aṭangin Gath khuaah a kal a, a lo kîr leh tih Solomona chu an hrilh a." 
1Kings2:42 Lal chuan Simeia chu a ko va, a hnênah, “Hmun danga i chhuah chuan i kal ni la lain i thi ang tiin Lalpa hming chhâlin chhia ka chhamtîr che a, ka hrilh lâwk che a ni lâwm ni? Chutih lai chuan nang pawhin ka hnênah, ‘Ni e, ka zâwm ang e,’ i ti a." 
1Kings2:43 Engati nge Lalpa hnêna i thutiam chu i zawm lohva, thu ka pêk che chu i bawhchhiat?” a ti a." 
1Kings2:44 Lal chuan Simeia hnênah, “Ka pa Davida chunga i sualzia kha i la hre vek a, tûnah Lalpa chuan i suahsual man a thungrûl ve ang che." 
1Kings2:45 Kei erawh chu mal min sâwm ang a, Davida lalṭhutthlêng chu Lalpa hmaah nghet takin a ding reng ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:46 Lal chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu thu a pe a, ani chuan a va bei a, a that ta a. Solomona chu nghet takin a lal ta a." 
1Kings3:1 Solomona chuan Aigupta lal Farawa nên inkûngkaih nân a fanu chu nupuiah a nei a; lal in te, Tempul te, Jerusalem khaw kulh bangte a siam zawh hma chuan a nupui chu Davida khawpuiah a dah a." 
1Kings3:2 Mite chu hmunsângahte an inthawi ṭhîn a, Lalpa Tempul sak a la nih rih loh avângin." 
1Kings3:3 Solomona chuan Lalpa chu a hmangaih a, a pa Davida zirtîrnate chu a zâwm a; mahse, hmunsângahte thilhlante a hlân a, rimtui te a hâl ṭhîn." 
1Kings3:4 Lal chu thilhlan hlân tûrin Gibeon-ah a kal a, chu chu thilhlanna hmunpui ber a ni. Solomonan chuta maichâmah chuan hâlral thilhlan atân ran sângkhat zet a hlân a." 
1Kings3:5 Gibeon-ah chuan Solomona mangah Lalpa chu a inlâr a, Pathian chuan, “I duh apiang min dîl rawh, ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:6 Solomona chuan, “I chhiahhlawh Davida, ka pa chu i lakah a rinawm a, dik tak leh thinlung thianghlim taka a awm avângin i ngaina êm êm ṭhîn a, a chunga i ngilneihna nasa tak avângin tûnah a lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr fapa i pe a." 
1Kings3:7 Tûnah hian, aw Lalpa ka Pathian, i chhiahhlawh hi ka pa Davida aiawhin min laltîr a, kei lah naupang mai ka ni a, ka tih tûr hlen chhuah dân pawh ka hre si lo." 
1Kings3:8 I chhiahhlawh hi i mi, i thlan, eng zât nge an nih pawh hriat lohte chungah lalah mi siam a." 
1Kings3:9 Thu dik leh dik lote thliara fel taka i mite ro ka rêlsak theih nân i chhiahhlawh hi finna pe ang che. Chuti lo zawng, mi heti zozai hi ro ka rêlsak thei lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:10 Solomona thil dîl avâng chuan Lalpa chu a chungah a lâwm ta hle a. 
1Kings3:11 Pathian chuan a hnênah, “Dam reina te, hausakna te, i hmêlmate thihna tûr dîl lovin dik taka rorêl thiamna i dîl zâwk avângin," 
1Kings3:12 i dîl chu ka pe ang che, i hmaa mi tu ma neih ngai loh i hnua mite pawhin an neih loh tûr finna leh rorêl thiamna ka pe ang che." 
1Kings3:13 I dîl loh hausakna leh hmingthanna ka pe bawk ang che. I dam chhûngin lal tu mahin an tluk lo vang che. 
1Kings3:14 I pa Davida anga ka kawngte i zawha, ka thuruat leh ka thupêkte i zawm chuan rei tak ka damtîr ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:15 Solomona chu a lo harh a, a mumangah Pathianin thu a sawi a ni tih a hria a. Jerusalem-ah a lo hâwng a, Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm hmaah a ding a, hâlral thilhlante leh remna thilhlante a hlân a, a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng tân ruai a ṭheh a." 
1Kings3:16 Ni khat chu nawhchizuar pahnih lal hnênah an lo kal a, a hmaah an ding a." 
1Kings3:17 Pakhat chuan, “Ka pu, he hmeichhia nên hian in khatah kan chêng dûn a; chuta kan awm lai chuan nau ka nei a." 
1Kings3:18 Ka nau neih aṭanga ni thum niah he hmeichhia hian nau a hring ve a. Chu inah chuan tu mah dang an awm lo va, kan pahnih chauhvin kan awm dûn a ni." 
1Kings3:19 Zânah he hmeichhia hian a fapa chu a delh hlum a. 
1Kings3:20 Zan laiah a tho va, i bawihnu hi ka muthilh laiin ka fapa, ka kianga mu chu, a la a, a pawm ta a, a fapa thi chu mi pawmtîr ta a ni." 
1Kings3:21 Zînga hnute pe tûra ka han thawh chuan nautê thi chu ka hmu a, ka han en chian chuan ka fapa, ka hrina kha a ni ta hauh lo mai a,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:22 Pakhat zâwk chuan, “Ni lo, a dam zâwk hi ka fapa a ni a, a thi hi i fapa a ni,” a ti a. A hmasa zâwk chuan, “Ni lo, a thi hi i fapa a ni a, a dam zâwk hi ka fapa a ni,” a ti tlat a. Chutiang chuan lal hmaah an inhnial a." 
1Kings3:23 Lal chuan, “He nu hian, ‘A dam zâwk kha ka fapa a ni a, a thi kha i fapa a ni,’ a ti a. Ani lah hian, ‘Chutiang a ni lo, a thi zâwk hi i fapa a ni a, a dam hi ka fa zâwk a ni,’ a ti si a." 
1Kings3:24 Khandaih mi han pe teh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:25 Khandaih chu an han pe a, lal chuan, “Naute la dam chu bung hnihah chhuah ula, a chanve pakhat pe ula, a chanve dang chu hmeichhe pakhat kha pe rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:26 Naupang dam zâwka nu chuan a fapa chu a lainat êm avângin lal hnênah chuan, “Ka pu, khawngaih takin nautê chu he mi hi pe mai rawh; that lul suh ang che,” a ti a. Pakhat zâwk chuan, “Bung hnihah chhuah mai rawh, tu mah mahin kan chang lo mai ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:27 Lal chuan hetiangin thu a rem ta a; “Nausên dam chu he nu, thu rawn sawi hmasatu hi pe rawh u, that suh u, hei hi a nu tak a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:28 Israel mi zawng zawngin lal thurem chu an hriatin lal chu an zah ta hle a, Pathianin dik taka rorêl thiamna a pe tih an hria a." 
1Kings4:1 Lal Solomona chu Israel mi zawng zawng lal a ni a. 
1Kings4:2 Hêng hi a miliante chu an ni: An puithiam chu Zadoka fapa Azaria a ni. 
1Kings4:3 Ziaktu lian chu Elihorefa leh Sisa fapa Ahija an ni. Ahiluda fapa Jehosafata chu chanchin ziaktu a ni. 
1Kings4:4 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu sipai hotu a ni. Zadoka leh Abiathara te chu puithiam an ni. 
1Kings4:5 Nathana fapa Azaria chu ram bial ṭhen enkawltute chunga hotu ber a ni. Nathana fapa Zabuda chu lal puithiam leh lal kaiza vêngtu a ni. 
1Kings4:6 Ahisara chu lal in enkawltu a ni a; Abda fapa Adonirama chu hnathawka rawih luihte hotu a ni. 
1Kings4:7 Solomona chuan Israel ram pum pui chu bial sâwm leh pahnihah a ṭhen a, an chungah hotu a ruat vek a. Chûngte chuan lal tân leh lal chhûngkaw tân ei tûr an pe ṭhîn. Hotu pakhatin thla khat chhûng tumin kum tluanin ei tûr an tumsak ṭhîn." 
1Kings4:8 Hêng hi hotute hming leh an thawhna bial hming chu a ni: Efraim tlângramah Ben-Hura. 
1Kings4:9 Makaz te, Salbim te, Beth-semes te, Elon te leh Beth-hanan khaw hotu chu Ben-dekera a ni." 
1Kings4:10 Arubot leh Soko te leh Hefer ram zawng zawng nêna enkawltu chu Ben-heseda a ni. 
1Kings4:11 Dor bial pum enkawltu chu Ben-Abinadaba a ni. Ani chuan Solomona fanu Tafati nupuiah a nei a. 
1Kings4:12 Tanak leh Megido te, Zerethan dep Jezreel hnuai, Beth-sean aṭanga Abel Mehola leh Jokmeam thlengin, Beth-sean ram pum nêna enkawltu chu Ahiluda fapa Baana a ni." 
1Kings4:13 Gilead rama Ramot khua te, Manasea thlah, Jaira chhûngte chênna khua Gilead rama mi te, Basan ram, Argob biala kulh leh dâr tlâwn kawngkhâr kalhna nei khaw sawmruk te enkawltu chu Ben-gebera a ni." 
1Kings4:14 Mahanaim bial enkawltu chu Idoa fapa Ahinadaba a ni. 
1Kings4:15 Naftali bial enkawltu chu Ahimaaza a ni. Ani chuan Solomona fanu Basemathi nupuiah a nei a. 
1Kings4:16 Aser leh Bealoth bial enkawltu chu Husaia fapa Baana a ni. 
1Kings4:17 Isakar bial enkawltu chu Parua fapa Jehosafata a ni. 
1Kings4:18 Benjamin bial enkawltu chu Ela fapa Simeia a ni. 
1Kings4:19 Gilead ram, Amor lal Sihona ram Gilead te, Oga ram Basan te huama enkawltu chu Uria, Gebera fapa a ni. Hêng mi sâwm leh pahnih bâkah a ram pum pui chunga hotu pakhat a la awm bawk." 
1Kings4:20 Juda-te leh Israel-te chu tuifinriat kama ṭiau zât zetin an tam a. An eiin an in a, an hlim hle a." 
1Kings4:21 Solomona chuan Eufretis lui aṭanga Aigupta ram dep Filistia ram thlengin ro a rêl a. Chûng lai ram zawng zawng chuan Solomona hnênah chhiah an pe a, Solomona dam chhûng chu a khua leh tui an ni." 
1Kings4:22 Solomona ni khat ei ral chu chhangphut ṭha chi kg. sângnga, chhangphut narân kg. sîngkhat;" 
1Kings4:23 ran châwm thau sâwm, rama tla ṭhîn bâwngpa sawmhnih, berâm za leh sakhi te, sazuk te, saza te, âr châwm thau te a ni." 
1Kings4:24 Solomona chuan Eufretis luipui khawthlang Tifsa khua aṭanga Gaza thlengin ro a rêl a. A chhehvêla ram dangte nên an inrem a. 
1Kings4:25 Solomona dam chhûng chuan Juda-te leh Israel-te chu Dan aṭanga Beer-seba thlengin mi tin mahni grep huanah leh theipui hmunah thlamuang takin an awm a. 
1Kings4:26 Solomona chuan tawlailîr hnûktu sakawr sîngli leh sakawr chungchuang mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih a nei a. 
1Kings4:27 Ramawptute chuan mahni chan thla ṭheuhvah lal Solomona leh a dawhkâna chaw kîltute tân ei tûr an ngaihtuah a, eng mah an tlachham ngai lo." 
1Kings4:28 Chûng mite chuan a indawtin sakawr te, tawlailîr hnûk sakawrte tân an tla tâwk buhpâwl leh barli an rawn pe ṭhîn." 
1Kings4:29 Pathianin Solomona chu finna leh hriatna thûk tak a pe a, rilru zau tak, chhui chhuah rual loh khawp a pe bawk." 
1Kings4:30 Solomona chu khawchhak mi fingte leh Aigupta mi fingte aiin a fing a. 
1Kings4:31 Khawvêla mi fing ber a ni. Ezra mi Ethana te, Mahola fa Hamana te, Kalkola te leh Darda te aiin a fing zâwk a, a chhehvêl ram tinah a hming a thang hle a." 
1Kings4:31 Khawvêla mi fing ber a ni. Ezra mi Ethana te, Mahola fa Hamana te, Kalkola te leh Darda te aiin a fing zâwk a, a chhehvêl ram tinah a hming a thang hle a." 
1Kings4:32 Thufing sângthum a siam a, hla sângkhat leh panga a phuah a." 
1Kings4:33 Thlai chanchin, Lebanon tlânga sidar thing aṭanga kulh banga ṭo husop chenin a zir vek a. Ramsa te, sava te, bawkvâka kal leh sangha chanchin te pawh a hre hle a ni." 
1Kings4:34 Khawvêla lal zawng zawng chuan Solomona finzia zir tûrin an mite a hnênah an tîr ṭhîn. 
1Kings5:1 Tura lal Hirama chuan Solomona chu a pa Davida aiawh tûra hriakthih a ni tih a lo hriatin a hnênah palai a tîr a. A pa Davida nên an lo inṭhian si a. 
1Kings5:2 Solomona chuan Hirama hnênah hetiangin thu a thawn lêt a: 
1Kings5:3 “Ka pa Davida kha, a chhehvêl ramte nên an indo ṭhîn a, Lalpa chuan a hmêlmate a hnehtîr vek hma chuan, Lalpa, a Pathian a biakna tûr Tempul a sa thei lo tih i hria." 
1Kings5:4 Tûnah, Lalpa, ka Pathianin kan chhehvêl ramte nên min inremtîr a, hmêlma leh min tibuaitu tûr an awm ta lo." 
1Kings5:5 Lalpa chuan ka pa Davida hnênah, ‘I fapa, lalṭhutthlêng luahtu tûr chuan ka hming chawimawi nân Tempul a la sa ang,’ tia a lo tiam tawh angin Lalpa, ka Pathian hming ropui nân Tempul sak ka tum ta a ni." 
1Kings5:6 Tûnah, Lebanon tlânga sidar thing mi rawn pe tûrin thu pe rawh; ka mite leh i miten thawk ho sela, i mite chu i tih zât zât hlawh ka lo pe ang e. Sidon mite anga thing kih thiam tu mah ka nei lo tih i hre si a,” a ti a." 
1Kings5:7 Hiraman Solomona thu a lo hriat chuan a lâwm hle a, a hnênah, “He hnam ropui tak chunga rorêl tûra fapa fing tak Davida hnêna petu Lalpa chu vawiin hian fakin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings5:8 Hirama chuan Solomona hnênah, “I thu mi chah chu ka lo hria a, sidar thing leh fâr thing chu i duh zât zât ka pe ang che." 
1Kings5:9 Ka mite chuan thing chu Lebanon tlâng aṭangin tuifinriatah an rawn hnûk thla ang a, an têl khâwm ang a, dahna tûr i tih hmunah an rawn tawlh thleng ang a, chutah chuan an phelh darh hnuah i mite chuan an lo la dâwn nia. Nang pawhin ka mite hi ei tûr i lo tumsak ve a ni ang chu,” a ti a." 
1Kings5:10 Hirama chuan sidar leh fâr thing a mamawh zât chu a lo pe ta a. 
1Kings5:11 Solomona pawhin Hirama chu chhangphut ṭin nuai li leh oliv hriak ṭha chi ṭin zali a mite ei atân a pe a. Chutiang chuan kum tin Solomona chuan Hirama chu a pe a. 
1Kings5:12 A lo tiam tawh angin Lalpa chuan Solomona chu finna a pe a, Hirama leh Solomona inlaichînna chu a ṭha hle a, inremna thu an thlung a." 
1Kings5:13 Solomona chuan Israel ram pumah hna thawka rawih luih pâwl a siam a, chûng chu mi sîngthum lai an ni." 
1Kings5:14 Adonirama chu chûngho enkawltu chu a ni. Anni chu pâwl thumah a ṭhen a, a inchhâwkin sîngkhat zêl Lebanon-ah thla khat chhûng an han thang a, thla hnih in lamah an awm leh ṭhîn." 
1Kings5:15 Solomona chuan thuamphur mi sîngsarih leh lung chher mi sîngriat tlângramah chuan a nei a. 
1Kings5:16 Chûng bâkah hnathawkho vêngtu mi sângthum leh zathum a nei bawk. 
1Kings5:17 Lal thupêk ang chuan lung ṭha chi lian tak tak Tempul lungphûma rem tûr an rawn la a. 
1Kings5:18 In satuho Solomona mi te, Hirama mi te leh Biblos khuaa mi te chuan lung te, thing te chu Tempul hmanrua atân an buatsaih ta a." 
1Kings6:1 Israel faten Aigupta an chhuahsan aṭanga kum zali leh sawmriat, Israel-te chunga Solomona a lal kum lina thla hnihna Ziv thlaah Solomona chuan Lalpa Tempul a sa ṭan a." 
1Kings6:2 Solomonan Lalpa tâna Tempul a sak chu a dung tawng sawmruk, a vâng tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni." 
1Kings6:3 Tempul Hmun Thianghlim ber hma lamah chuan pindan hmasa, a in vâng tawng sawmhniha zau leh a thûk lam tawng sâwm a awm a." 
1Kings6:4 Tempul bangah chuan tukverh tê tak tê tê a siam a. 
1Kings6:5 Tempul bang rinchhanin pindan chhâwng thuma sâng a siam a. 
1Kings6:6 A hnuaihnung ber chu tawng ngaa zau a ni a, a laita chu tawng ruk, a chhâwng chung ber chu tawng sariha zau a ni. Tempul pindan chungnung bangte chu a hnuai bang aiin a pan zâwk avângin kalkhangte chu a chhawrdawhah a innghat mai a ni." 
1Kings6:7 Tempul sakna lungte chu lunglâkna hmuna chher sa vek a nih avângin Tempul sak lai chuan tuboh ri te, thîrkhen ri te hriat tûr a awm lo." 
1Kings6:8 In chhâwng hnuai ber luhna chu Tempul chhim lamah a siam a, chhâwng hnihna leh chhâwng thumna kal nân kailâwn a dawh bawk a." 
1Kings6:9 Chutiang chuan Tempul chu an sa zo ta a, a chhûng lam chu sidar thingphelin a thuah vek a." 
1Kings6:10 Tempul bang nghênga pindan sak chu chhâwng tin tawng ngaa sâng a ni; chhâwng tinah sidar kalkhang a hmang vek a. 
1Kings6:11 Lalpa thu chu Solomona hnênah a lo thleng a. 
1Kings6:12 “Tûnah Tempul chu i sa zo ta a, ka dân leh ka thuhriattîr i pawisaka, ka thupêkte i zawm chuan i pa Davida hnêna ka thutiam kha i lakah ka hlen ang." 
1Kings6:13 Israel-te zîngah ka awm ang a, ka mi Israel-te chu ka thlahthlam lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Kings6:14 Solomona chuan Tempul chu a sa zo ta a. 
1Kings6:15 Tempul chhûng bang thuah nân sidar thingphel a hmang a, a chhuat aṭanga a chung thlengin thingphel a bel vek a, a chhuat atân fâr thingphel a phah a." 
1Kings6:16 Pindan chhûngril Hmun Thianghlim Ber an tih chu Tempul kawmchâr lamah tawng sawmhnih bialin a siam a, a chhuat aṭanga a chung thlengin a chhûng lamah sidar thingphelin a thuah vek a." 
1Kings6:17 Hmun Thianghlim Ber luh dâwn chiaha pindan chu tawng sawmli-a sei a ni. 
1Kings6:18 Tempul chhûng thuahna sidar thingphelah chuan pangpâr kuhmûm lem leh a pâr parh lem an ker a, a chhûng chu sidar thinga chei vek a nih avângin a bang lung chu a lang lo." 
1Kings6:19 Tempul chhûng hmun ril ber chu Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm dahna atân a siam a. 
1Kings6:20 Chu pindan chu tawng sawmhnih bial, a sân lam tawng sawmhnih bawk a ni. A chhûng chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin a luan a. Sidar thinga siam maichâm pawh chu rangkachakin a luan bawk a." 
1Kings6:21 Solomona chuan Tempul chhûng chu rangkachakin a luan vek a, pindan chhûngril ber luhna kawngkaah chuan rangkachak khaidiat a thlung a, kawngka pawh chu rangkachaka luan a ni." 
1Kings6:22 Tempul chhûng lam zawng zawng leh Hmun Thianghlim Bera maichâm awm chu rangkachaka luan vek a ni. 
1Kings6:23 Hmun Thianghlim Berah chuan Oliv thinga siam cherub thla pahnih nei, tawng sâwma sâng ve ve a awm a." 
1Kings6:24 Cherub pakhat thla chu tawng ngaa sei a ni a, a thla lehlam pawh tawng ngaa sei a ni. A thla hmâwr lehlam aṭanga a hmâwr lehlam chu tawng sâwm a nih chu." 
1Kings6:25 Cherub-te chu an pianhmang leh an lenzâwng a inang a," 
1Kings6:26 tawng sâwma sâng ve ve an ni. 
1Kings6:27 Tempul chhûng Hmun Thianghlim Berah chuan Cherub-te chu a dah tlar a, an thla an zâr duai a. Cherub thla pahnih chu a laiah a insi a, Cherub pakhat zâwk thla lehlam hmâwr chuan bang a dek a, Cherub dang thla lehlam hmâwr chuan bang lehlam a dek bawk." 
1Kings6:28 Chûng Cherub-te chu rangkachaka luan vek a ni. 
1Kings6:29 Tempul chhûng lam bangah te, Hmun Thianghlim Ber chhûng lam bangah te chuan Cherub lem te, tûm thing lem te, pangpâr lem te an ker thluah a." 
1Kings6:30 Hmun Thianghlim Ber chhuat leh pindan dang chhuatte pawh chu rangkachaka luan a ni. 
1Kings6:31 Hmun Thianghlim Ber luhna kawngkhârte chu oliv thinga siam a ni. Kawngka lu chung chu a zum a. 
1Kings6:32 Oliv thingin kawngkhâr pahnih a siam a, Cherub lem te, tûm thing lem te, pangpâr lem te kerin a cheimawi a. Cherub lem te, tûm thing lem te, pang pâr lem te chu rangkachakin a luan a." 
1Kings6:33 Tempul chhûng luhnaah chuan kawngkhâr kil li nei, kil tin inchen vek, oliv thingin a siam a." 
1Kings6:34 Kawngkhâr kaihthleh theih pahnih fâr thingin a siam bawk a. 
1Kings6:35 Chûngah chuan cherub thla nei lem te, tûm thing lem te, pangpâr lem te a ker a, rangkachakin a luan leh vek a." 
1Kings6:36 Tempul hma lamah chuan kawt zâwl chhûngril zâwk a siam a, lungchher chhâwng thum leh sidar thingphêk thuah khatin a hung a." 
1Kings6:37 Solomona lal kum lina, Ziv thlaah Tempul lung chu an phûm a." 
1Kings6:38 Solomona lal kum sâwm leh pakhatna, thla riatna, Bul thlaah ruahman lâwk ang ngeiin Tempul chu an sa zo a ni. Kum sarih chhûng an sa a ni." 
1Kings7:1 Solomona chuan a in chu kum sâwm leh pathum chhûngin a sa zo va. 
1Kings7:2 In lian tak, ‘Lebanon Ngawpui In’ a tih chu a dung tawng za, a vâng tawng sawmnga, a sân lam tawng sawmthumin a sa bawk a. Sidar ban tlar thum a phun a, a chungah sidar liang a chhuang a, a siling chu sidar thing a ni." 
1Kings7:3 Tlar khatah ban sâwm leh panga zêl a awm a, ban sawmli leh panga a nei a." 
1Kings7:4 Sâng takah tukverh tlar thum a siam a, a bang chhak lama mi leh thlang lama mi chu a inzâwn vek a." 
1Kings7:5 Tukverh leh kawngkate pawh kil li nei, intiat vekin a siam a, hma lama tukverh tlar thumte leh hnung lama tukverh tlar thumte chu a inzâwn thliah bawk." 
1Kings7:6 Ban neiin hulhliap a siam a, a dung tawng sawmnga, a vâng tawng sawmthum a ni, bathlâr ban neiin a siam bawk a, a luhna kailâwn nên." 
1Kings7:7 Rorêlna pindan a siam leh a, chutah chuan lalṭhutthlêng a hûng a, chu chu rorêlna hmun a ni. A chhuat aṭanga a chung thlengin sidar thingphelin a thuah vek a." 
1Kings7:8 Rorêlna in hnungah chuan ama chênna tûr, in dang a sak ang bawkin a sa leh a. Tin, a nupui, Farawa fanu pualin in dang a sa bawk a." 
1Kings7:9 Chûng in zawng zawng chu, a kawtzâwl chenin, a lungphûm aṭanga liang thlengin lung ṭha chi a ni a, lungkhura chher, a chhûng lam leh pâwn lam mâm taka nawh sa vek a ni." 
1Kings7:10 A lungphûm atân lung ṭha chi, lian pui puia chher tawng sâwm te, tawng riatte a hmang a." 
1Kings7:11 A chungah chuan lung ṭha chi, a tâwk chiah tûra chher sa a rem chho va, liang atân sidar thing a hmang a." 
1Kings7:12 Kawtlai zau tak chu a vêlin lungchher chhâwng thum leh sidar thing thuah khatin a hung a, Lalpa Tempul kawtzâwl anga chei a ni." 
1Kings7:13 Lal Solomona chuan Tura khuaa mi pakhat, Hurama chu a chah a. A nu chu Naftali hnam, hmeithai a ni." 
1Kings7:14 A pa chu Tura khaw mi, dâr chhûn thiam tak a ni. Hurama pawh chu mi themthiam, dâr chi hrang hrang rei tak lo chher tawh a ni. Lal Solomona hnênah a lo kal a, thawh tûr an ruatsak zawng zawng chu a thawhsak ta a." 
1Kings7:15 Hurama chuan dâr ban pahnih, tawng sâwm leh pariata sâng ve ve, teh kuala tawng sâwm leh pahniha lian, Tempul luhna bulah a phun a." 
1Kings7:16 Ban chhîpah chuan dârin lu bâwk a siam leh a, ban lu bâwk chu tawng nga laia sâng a ni ve ve a." 
1Kings7:17 Ban lu bâwk chu khaidiat lem, vawi sariha vêtin a cheimawi a." 
1Kings7:18 Theibuhfai lem tlar, ban lu bâwkah chuan a siam chhuak ve ve a." 
1Kings7:19 Hulhliap ban lu bâwkte chu lili pâr ang maiin a mawi a, tawng lî-a sâng a ni." 
1Kings7:20 Ban lu bâwk pahnih, mûm pul, khaidiat lema veh chhuah chung chiahah chuan theibuhfai lem zahnih a kual chhuakin a siam a." 
1Kings7:21 Tempul hma lama dâr ban pahnih a hûnte chu a chhim lama mi chu Jakin ban an ti a, hmâr lama mi chu Boaza ban an ti." 
1Kings7:22 Ban lu bâwk chu lili pâr anga mawi a ni. Chutiang chuan bante chu a siam zo ta a. 
1Kings7:23 Hurama chuan dâr tuizêm lian pui a siam bawk a, a laia hawlh tlangin tawng sâwm a ni a, a thûk zâwng chu tawng nga a ni. A tlânga teh kualin tawng sawmthum a ni." 
1Kings7:24 A tlâng hnuai chu kuhmûm lem hian a vêl chhuak a, kuhmûm lem chu tlar hnihin a awm a; chûng chu a tuizêm nên a ruala chhûn nghâl vek a ni." 
1Kings7:25 Tuizêm chu bâwngpa lem sâwm leh pahnih chungah a innghat a, pathumin hmâr lam a hawi a, pathumin chhim lam a hawi a, pathumin chhak lam a hawi a, pathumin thlang lam a hawi a. An chungah chuan tuizêm chu a hûng a, bâwngpa lem mawng lam chu a inchhawn vek a." 
1Kings7:26 Tuizêm chhah zâwng chu kutphah bawk a ni, a kotlâng chu no tlâng ang a ni, lili kuhmûm angin a mûm a, tui litar sîngli lai dawng a ni." 
1Kings7:27 Hurama chuan dârin bâwm nawrlirh sâwm a siam a, kil li nei, tawng li bial a ni a. A sân lam chu tawng thum a ni." 
1Kings7:28 A bang chuan kâwm a nei ṭheuh va, a bangah chuan sakeibaknei lem te, bâwngchal lem te, cherub lem te a chuang a." 
1Kings7:29 A kâwm chung lam leh hnuai lam sakeibaknei leh bâwng lem inkâr chu an chhûng vial chiat a. 
1Kings7:30 Bâwm tinah chuan a ke pali, dâra siam, dâr tlâwn vuah a awm ṭheuh va. Bâwm chhûng kil tinah tuizêm inhûnna tûr dâr, inherh chiata chhûn a awm ṭheuh va." 
1Kings7:31 Bâwm chhînah chuan tuizêm chelhtu tûr dâr belvâl a awm a; tuizêm chu a chung lamah tawng khat a lawr a, bâwm chhûngah chuan tawng khat leh a chanve a pil a." 
1Kings7:32 A ke palite chu dâr a ni a, tawng khat leh a chanve hawlh tlang a ni, a bâwm bang hnuaia awm a ni." 
1Kings7:33 A ke vir chu sakawrtawlailîr ke ang a ni; a vuahna bâwr te, a kual dotu te leh a ke kual te chu dâr veka siam a ni." 
1Kings7:34 A bâwm kil tinah chuan, bâwm nêna inzawm, dotu pali a awm ṭheuh va." 
1Kings7:35 A tlâng vêttu tawng chanvea hlai a awm bawk. A dotu bante chu a bâwm bangte nên chhûn zawm vek a ni. 
1Kings7:36 A donaah te leh a bâwm bangah te chuan hmun âwl lai apiangah cherub lem te, sakeibaknei lem te, tûm thing lem te an chuantîr zêl a, a lem huam loh chin a tlâng te chu inherh chiatin an siam zêl a." 
1Kings7:37 Huraman chutiang chuan nawrlirh bâwm sâwm a siam a, an inang vek a, an intiat vek bawk." 
1Kings7:38 Hurama chuan tuizêm sâwm, nawrlirh bâwm tina dah tûr a siam bawk a. Tuizêm chu a bial a, tawng li hawlh tlang a ni a, tui litar zariat vêl a dawng ṭheuh." 
1Kings7:39 Nawrlirh panga chu Tempul chhim lamah a dah a, panga dang chu hmâr lamah. Dâr tuizêm kha Tempul chhimchhak kilah an hûng a." 
1Kings7:40 Hurama chuan insilna bêl te, vutlawh te, maihûn te a siam a. Tichuan, Lalpa Tempul atâna lal Solomona a siamsak zawng zawng chu a peih ta a." 
1Kings7:41 Dâr ban pahnih, ban lu bâwk, no bial anga kum te, ban lu bâwka khaidiat lem tlar hnih awm kual te," 
1Kings7:42 ban lu bâwka theibuhfai lem zali, tlar hnih, za zêla kual chhuak te chu a siam a." 
1Kings7:43 Bâwm nawrlirh sâwm leh tuizêm sâwm te," 
1Kings7:44 bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih chunga dâr tuizêm te," 
1Kings7:45 bêl te, vutlawh te, thîrkutte nên; Lalpa Tempul bungrua Huraman lal Solomona a siamsak zawng zawng chu dâr tle mia siam vek a ni." 
1Kings7:46 Lal chuan Jordan phaizâwl Sukoth leh Zereda inkâr bellei hmunah chûng chu a chhûntîr a. 
1Kings7:47 Hêng bungbêlte hi a tam êm avângin Solomona chuan bûk lovin a dah mai a, a zât hriat a ni lo." 
1Kings7:48 Solomonan Lalpa Tempul bungbêl a siamte chu rangkachak maichâm te, Pathian hnêna hlan tûr chhang serh dahna tûr rangkachak dawhkân te," 
1Kings7:49 rangkachak hlîr hlaka siam khâwnvâr dahna zâr sarih nei sâwm, Hmun Thianghlim Ber hma lamah a hûng a, chhim lamah panga, hmâr lamah panga, pangpâr te, khâwnvâr te, chaicheh te nên." 
1Kings7:50 Rangkachak no te, khâwnvâr huh hlumna te, rimtui hâlna berhbu te, meilawh te nên rangkachak vekin a siam a. Tempul Hmun Thianghlim Ber leh pâwn lam pindan indaidanna kawngkhâr leh a kalhnate chu rangkachaka siam vek a ni." 
1Kings7:51 Lal Solomonan Lalpa Tempul a sak zawh hnu chuan a pa Davidan Lalpa tâna a lo serh hran tawh tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêl te chu Tempul sum dahnaah chuan a dah ta a." 
1Kings8:1 Lal Solomona chuan Israel upate, hnam hruaitute chu Davida khawpui Zion aṭanga Jerusalem, a chênna hmuna Thuthlung Bâwm chu laa Tempul-a dah sawn tûrin a ko khâwm a." 
1Kings8:2 Israel mi zawng zawng chu thla sarihna, Ethanim thlaah kût hmang tûrin lal Solomona hnênah chuan an lo kal khâwm a." 
1Kings8:3 Israel upate an lo thlen chuan puithiamte chuan Bâwm chu an zâwn a. 
1Kings8:4 Lalpa Bâwm te, Inbiakna puan in te, bungbêl thianghlim zawng zawng te chu tempulah chuan an dah ta a. Puithiam leh Levia chite chuan an zâwn chho va." 
1Kings8:5 Israel mi, a hnêna awm zawng zawng chu lal Solomona hovin Thuthlung Bâwm hmaah chuan an lo kal khâwm a; berâm leh bâwng chhiar sên rual lohvin an inthawi a." 
1Kings8:6 Puithiamho chuan Lalpa Bâwm chu Tempul chhûngah an zâwn lût a, a awmna tûra ruat Hmun Thianghlim Berah, cherub thlazâr hnuaiah chuan an dah a." 
1Kings8:7 Cherub thlazâr chuan Bâwm leh a zâwnfung chu a khuh a. 
1Kings8:8 A zâwnfung hmâwr chu Hmun Thianghlim Ber kawngka hmazâwn taka din chuan a lang thei, pâwn lam aṭang erawh chuan a lang thei lo. A zâwnfungte chu tûn thlengin a la awm reng a ni." 
1Kings8:9 Bâwm chhûngah chuan eng mah dang a awm lo, Israel fate Aigupta ram aṭanga an lo chhuah laia Horeb tlânga Lalpa Thuthlung ziakna lungphêk pahnih Mosia dah chauh kha a awm a ni." 
1Kings8:10 Puithiamhovin Hmun Thianghlim Ber an chhuahsan veleh Lalpa Tempul chu chhûmin a khuh ta a. 
1Kings8:11 Chhûm avâng chuan puithiamte chuan rawng an bâwl thei ta lo va, Lalpa ropuina chuan Tempul chu a tikhat vek si a." 
1Kings8:12 Solomona chu a ṭawngṭai a, “ Lalpa chuan, ‘Thim chhah mupah ka awm ang,’ i lo ti a." 
1Kings8:13 Tempul ropui tak i tân ka sa ta e, kumkhuaa i chên nân a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings8:14 Israel mi zawng zawng chu chutah chuan an ding a, Solomona chuan an lam a hawi a, Pathian malsâwmna a dîlsak a." 
1Kings8:15 Hetiangin a sawi a: “Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chu fak rawh u, ani chuan ka pa Davida hnêna a thutiam a rawn tihpuitlin tâk hi." 
1Kings8:16 Lalpa chuan, “Ka mite Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah ni aṭang khân tûn thlengin Israel khawpui khawiah mah min biakna tûr Tempul sakna hmun ka la thlang lo. David, nang erawh hi chu ka mite rorêltu atân ka thlang che a ni, a tih kha,” a ti a." 
1Kings8:17 Solomona chuan a sawi zêl a, “Ka pa Davida khân Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian biak nân Tempul sak a lo tum ṭhîn a." 
1Kings8:18 Mahse, Lalpa chuan ka pa Davida hnênah, ‘Tempul min saksak i tum ṭhîn a, i ti ṭha e." 
1Kings8:19 Mahse, nang chuan ka Tempul i sa lo vang; i fapa, i rîla rah ngei chuan ka Tempul chu a sa zâwk ang,’ a ti a nih kha." 
1Kings8:20 “ Lalpa chuan thu a lo tiam tawh chu a vawng reng a, ka pa Davida ai ka awh a, tûnah Israel-te lal ka lo ni ta a, Lalpa lo tiam tawh angin Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chibai bûk nân Tempul chu ka sa ta a ni." 
1Kings8:21 Thuthlung Bâwm, min thlahtute Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuaha Lalpa nên thu an thlun ziakna lungphêk pawh tempulah dah a ni ta e,” a ti a." 
1Kings8:22 Solomona chu mipui hma lam, Lalpa maichâm bulah a ding a, bân phar chungin" 
1Kings8:23 a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, chung lam vânah te, hnuai lam leiah te, nang ang Pathian dang rêng an awm lo. I mite nêna i thuthlung chu i vawng reng a; tih tak zeta i thu an zawm phawt chuan i hmangaihzia i lantîr ṭhîn." 
1Kings8:24 Ka pa Davida hnênah i thutiam i hlen a, vawiin hian i tipuitling ta a ni." 
1Kings8:25 “Aw Lalpa Israel-te Pathian, ka pa Davida khân i dânte a pawisak ṭhin anga a thlahten an pawisak ve phawt chuan a thlah pakhat tal chu Israel lalṭhutthlêngah an ṭhu reng ang tih i tiam pawh kha hlen bawk ang che." 
1Kings8:26 Ka pa Davida, i chhiahhlawh hnêna i tiam zawng zawng kha, Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, vawiina i tihhlawhtlin ang hian tihlawhtling zêl ang che." 
1Kings8:27 “Mahse, nang Pathian meuh chu lei mite zîngah i chêng duh ngût ang emaw chu? Vânah meuh pawh i leng lo a ni a, ka Tempul sakah hian i leng dâwn em ni le?" 
1Kings8:28 Aw Lalpa, ka Pathian, i chhiahhlawh ka ni a, vawiina i hnêna ka dîl hi ngaithla la, ka ngen hi min phalsak ang che." 
1Kings8:29 He Tempul, nangmah biak nâna i thlan hi, a chhûn a zânin vêng la, he Tempul lam hawia ka ṭawngṭai hi lo ngaithla ang che." 
1Kings8:30 Ka ṭawngṭai ngaithla la, i mite pawh he Tempul lam hawia an ṭawngṭai chuan ngaithla ang che. I chênna vân aṭangin lo hria la, min ngaidam ang che." 
1Kings8:31 “Tu pawh, thil tisuala puh, i maichâm hmaa a lo kala, a tihsual lohzia chian nâna chhia a rawn chham chuan," 
1Kings8:32 Aw Lalpa, vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, i chhiahhlawhte chungthu chu dik takin rêlsak la, thil tisualtu chu a phu angin hrem la, pawi khawih lo chu chhuah ang che." 
1Kings8:33 I chunga an sual avânga, i mi Israel-te chu hmêlmaten an hneha, i lam an lo hawia, he Tempula inngaitlâwma ngaihdam an rawn dîl chuan" 
1Kings8:34 vân aṭangin lo ngaithla ang che. I mite sualna chu ngaidam la, an thlahtute hnêna i pêk ramah hian hruai kîr leh ang che." 
1Kings8:35 I miten thil an tihsual avânga khua i khêntîra, an sual sima he Tempul lam hawia an ṭawngṭai chuan," 
1Kings8:36 vân aṭangin lo ngaithla ang che. Lalte sualna leh Israel mite sualna ngaidam la, thil dik tih zirtîr ang che. Tichuan, Aw Lalpa, i mite chên rengna tûra i pêk ramah hian ruah sûrtîr ang che." 
1Kings8:37 He ramah hian ṭâm a tlâka, hri a lêna, thli lumin thlai a chhêm chhiata, khaute a puana, hmêlmaten i mite an rawn do hun leh damloh hritlân an tawh hunah," 
1Kings8:38 an ṭawngṭaina chu lo ngaithla ang che. I mi Israel tu pawh, sim takzeta he Tempul lam hawia bânphara a ṭawngṭai chuan," 
1Kings8:39 an ṭawngṭaina chu lo ngaithla ang che, i chênna vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, ngaidam la, ṭanpui ang che. Nang chauhvin mihring ngaihtuahna chhûngril i hre thei a. Mi tin an phu tâwk zêlin rêlsak la;" 
1Kings8:40 tichuan, he ram, kan pute hnêna i pêkah hian an dam chhûngin i mite chuan i thu an zâwm zêl dâwn nia." 
1Kings8:41 “Hnam dang, Israel mi ni lo, ram hla taka awmte pawhin i ropuizia leh i thiltihtheihzia an hriata, nangmah be tûra an lo kala, he Tempula an ṭawngṭai chuan," 
1Kings8:42  
1Kings8:43 an dîl chu ngaithla la, i chênna vân aṭang chuan lo ngaithla la, an ngen chu tihsak ang che. Tichuan, khawvêla mi zawng zawngin i mi Israel-te ang bawkin an hria ang chia, i thu an zâwm dâwn nia. He Tempul ka sak hi nangmah chibai bûkna hmun a ni tih an hria ang a." 
1Kings8:44 An hmêlmate do tûra i mite an chhuaha, khawi aṭang pawha i thlan he khua emaw, i tâna ka Tempul sak lam hawi emawa an ṭawngṭai chuan," 
1Kings8:45 an dîl chu lo hria la, vân aṭangin ngaithla la, an hmêlmate hnehtîr ang che." 
1Kings8:46 “I miten i laka thil an tihsuala, (tu mah thil tisual lo an awm si lo) i thinura an hmêlmate i hnehtîra, sala an hruaiin an hruaina ram chu hla hle mah se," 
1Kings8:47 i mite ṭawngṭai chu ngaithla ang che. Chu ramah chuan an sual an sima, an sualna leh an khawlohna thupha an chawi chuan aw Lalpa, an ṭawngṭai ngaithla ang che." 
1Kings8:48 Chu rama an awm hnua an sual an sim takzeta, inchhîra an thlahtute hnêna i pêk ram lam te, i khawpui thlan lam te, i tâna ka sak he Tempul lam hawi tea an ṭawngṭai chuan," 
1Kings8:49 lo ngaithla la, i chênna vânsâng aṭang chuan lo hria la, an chungah zahngai ang che." 
1Kings8:50 I mite sualna leh an bawhchhiatna zawng zawng chu ngaidam la, an hmêlmate chu an chungah ṭhat chhuahtîr ang che." 
1Kings8:51 Rawhtuina mei, Aigupta ram aṭanga i hruai chhuah, nangma mite ngei an nih hi." 
1Kings8:52 Engkim Lalpa, i mi Israel-te leh an lalte chungah zah ngai la, ṭanpui dîla an koh hun apiangah lo ngaithla ang che." 
1Kings8:53 Anni chu khawvêl hnam zawng zawng ata i pual atân i thlang a, i chhiahhlawh Mosian kan pute Aigupta ram aṭanga a hruai chhuah lai khân an hnênah i sawi tawh si a,” tiin." 
1Kings8:54 Solomona chu Lalpa hnêna a ṭawngṭai zawh chuan bân phara a ṭawngṭaina hmun maichâm hma ata chu a lo ding chhuak a. 
1Kings8:55 Mipui pung khâwm zawng zawng tân Pathian malsâwmna ring takin a dîlsak a. 
1Kings8:56 “A lo tiam tawh anga a mite hnêna remna petu Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se. A chhiahhlawh Mosia hmanga a thutiam hlu tak tak chu a vawng reng a," 
1Kings8:57 kan pute hnêna a awm ṭhîn angin Lalpa kan Pathian chu kan hnênah awm rawh se. 
1Kings8:58 A thu awih thei tûrin min pui sela; tichuan, a duh angin kan nung ang a; kan pute hnêna dân leh thupêkte chu kan zâwm thei ang." 
1Kings8:59 Lalpa, kan Pathian chuan kan ṭawngṭaina leh a hnêna kan dîlte chu hre reng rawh se. Israel-te leh an lalte khawngaih sela, an mamawh pe zêl rawh se." 
1Kings8:60 Tichuan, khawvêla hnam tinin Lalpa chauh hi Pathian a ni tih an hria ang." 
1Kings8:61 Nangni, a mite u, Lalpa, kan Pathian lakah rinawm takin awm ula, a dân leh a thupêkte chu vawiina in zâwm ang hian zâwm zêl ang che u,” a ti a." 
1Kings8:62 Lal Solomona leh chuta Israel mi awm zawng zawng chuan Lalpa hnênah thilhlan an hlân a. 
1Kings8:63 Remna thilhlan atân bâwngpa sînghnih leh sânghnih leh berâm nuaikhat leh sînghnih an hlân a. Tichuan, lal leh Israel mipui chuan Tempul chu an hawng ta a." 
1Kings8:64 Chumi ni bawk chuan Solomonan tual hung chhûng kawtlai, Tempul kawta mi chu a hawng bawk a. Hâlral thilhlan te, buhbâl thilhlan te leh remna thilhlana ran thau te chu a hâl a. Dâr maichâm a siam kha hêng zawng zawng hlan nân hian a tê lutuk a, maichâma leng lo chu tualah chuan a hâl mai a ni." 
1Kings8:65 Lal Solomona leh Israel mipui chuan tempulah chuan Bâwkte kût, ni sarih chhûng an hmang a. Chutah chuan Israel ram hmâr tâwp Hamath kalkhân aṭanga Israel ram chhim lam Aigupta lui inkâra mi zawng zawng an lo kal khâwm a, mi an tam kher mai." 
1Kings8:66 A ni riat ni chuan Solomona chuan mite chu an in lamah a hawtîr a, Lalpa chuan a chhiahhlawh Davida leh a mite chu mal a sâwm avângin hlim takin an ṭin a, Solomona chu an fak a." 
1Kings9:1 Lal Solomonan Tempul te, lal in te, in dang te a sak zawh hnu chuan" 
1Kings9:2 Gibeona a awm lai ang khân Lalpa chu a hnênah a inlâr leh a. 
1Kings9:3 Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I ṭawngṭai ka lo ngaithla a, he Tempul i sak hi kumkhuaa min biakna hmun atân ka thlang ta e. Ka vil ang a, ka vêng reng ang." 
1Kings9:4 I pa Davida angin rinawm tak leh dik taka ka rawng i bâwl a, ka dânte leh i hnêna ka thupêkte i zawm chuan," 
1Kings9:5 i pa Davida hnêna ka thutiam, a thlahte chu Israel-te lalah an ṭang reng ang, tia ka tiam kha ka hlen ang." 
1Kings9:6 Nang leh i thlahten min zui in bânsana, in tâna ka dân leh thupêkte hi in zawm lohva, pathian dangte in biak erawh chuan," 
1Kings9:7 ka mi Israel-te chu an tâna ka pêk ram ata ka paih chhuak ang. He Tempul, min biakna hmun atâna ka tihthianghlim tawh pawh hi ka rauhsan ang. Khawvêla hnam tinin Israel-te chu an hmusitin an nuihzat ang a," 
1Kings9:8 he Tempul hi a chhe vek ang a, a kianga kal apiangin mak ti takin, ‘Engtizia nge Lalpa hian he ram leh he Tempul hi heti taka a sawisak le?’ an ti ang a," 
1Kings9:9 mite chuan, ‘An thlahtute Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu Lalpa an Pathian chu an kalsan atin alâwm maw le, pathian dangte an vuan a, an rawngte an bâwlsan avângin Lalpa hian a sawisa a nih hi,’ tiin an chhâng ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings9:10 Solomona chuan Lalpa Tempul leh ama in chu kum sawmhnih chhûng a sa a," 
1Kings9:11 Tura lal Hirama chuan sidar thing te, fâr thing te, rangkachak te, a mamawh apiang hêng in sak nân hian a pe a. In sak a zawh hnu chuan Lal Solomona chuan Hirama chu Galili ram bial chhûnga khaw sawmhnih a pe a." 
1Kings9:12 Hirama chuan khuate chu a va hmuh chuan a lâwm lo hle a. 
1Kings9:13 Tichuan, Solomona hnênah, “Unaupa, hetiang hi a ni maw min pêk le?" 
1Kings9:14 Eng atân maha hman tlâk loh, Kabul ram a nih hi,” a ti a. Tûn thlengin chu hming chu a pu hlen ta a. Hirama chuan Solomona chu rangkachak kg. sângli lai a lo thawn tawh si a." 
1Kings9:15 Lal Solomona chuan Tempul te, ama in te, khawpui chhak lam khuar hnawh khat tûr te, kulh bang siam tûr tein hnathawktu rawih luih pâwl a siam a. Tin, hêng khua Hazor te, Megido te, Gezer te hi a din ṭha bawk a." 
1Kings9:16 Aigupta lal Farawa khân Gezer khua a rûn a, a hâl vek a, khawpuia chêng chu a that vek bawk a. A fanu, Solomona nupui chu a chhawmtîr a." 
1Kings9:17 Solomona chuan a din ṭha a; hna thawka a chhawr luihte chu Beth-horon chuanhnuai te; 
1Kings9:18 Baalat khua te, Judai ram thlalêra Tamar khua te a din ṭhattîr bawk a." 
1Kings9:19 Kudâm awmna khua te, sakawr leh sakawr-tawlailîr dahna khua te, Jerusalem-ah te, Lebanon-ah te leh ram chhûng hmun tinah sak ṭûl a tih zawng zawng chu a sa zo ta a." 
1Kings9:20 Hêng hnam Amor te, Hit te, Periz te, Hiv te, Jebus mite hi" 
1Kings9:21 Israel-ten Kanan ram an luh khân an that vek lo va, Solomona khân hnathawka chhawr luih atân an thlahte chu a hmang a, tûn thlengin bawih an ni ta zêl a ni." 
1Kings9:22 Solomona chuan Israel mi tu mah bawihah a chhawr lo, sipai atân te, hotu atân te a chhawr thung a." 
1Kings9:23 Solomona in sak hrang hranga mi chhawrte enkawltu mi zanga leh sawmnga an awm a. 
1Kings9:24 Solomona nupui Aigupta lal fanu chu Davida khawpui aṭangin a puala in a sakah chuan a sawn chho va, chumi hnu chuan khawpui chhak lam ruam chu a chhûng khat a." 
1Kings9:25 Solomona chuan Lalpa tâna maichâm a siamah chuan hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan, kum khatah vawi thum a hlân a. Lalpa tân rimtui a hâl bawk a. Tichuan, Tempul sak chu a zo ta a." 
1Kings9:26 Lal Solomona chuan Edom rama Eloth kiang, Agaba litengsâwl Ezion-geber khuaah lawng rual a siam a." 
1Kings9:27 Lal Hirama chuan a lawng mite chu Solomona mite pui tûrin a tîr a. 
1Kings9:28 Ofir ramah an kal a, rangkachak kg. sângkhat leh zali an va la a. Solomona chu an rawn pe a." 
1Kings10:1 Seba lalnuin Solomona hming thanzia a lo hriatin thu har tak tak zâwta fiah tûrin Jerusalem-ah a lo kal a. 
1Kings10:2 Ṭhuihruai tam tak a nei a, sanghâwngsei tam tak a hruai a; mosola te, lungmantam te, rangkachak te a keng ṭeuh bawk a. Solomona nên an inhmuh chuan zawh tûr a neih zawng zawng chu a zâwt vek a." 
1Kings10:3 A zawh apiang Solomona chuan a chhâng thei zêl a, chhân harsa tih rêng a nei lo." 
1Kings10:4 Seba lalnu chuan Solomona finzia chu a hria a, a in sak ropuizia te a hmu a;" 
1Kings10:5 Solomona ei tûr an rawn hlui te, a chhiahhlawhho awmna in te, lal hna thawktu hna insem dân te, an thawmhnaw hâk mawizia te, a viltute inchei mawizia te, Tempula hâlral thilhlan a hlan hnemzia te a han hmuh chuan mak a ti a, awm ngaihna rêng a hre ta lo va." 
1Kings10:6 Lalnu chuan Solomona hnênah, “I thil tihte leh i finzia te kan rama ka lo hriat kha a lo dik ngei a nih hi." 
1Kings10:7 Ka lo kal a, keimah ngeiin ka rawn hmuh hma chuan an sawi chu ka lo awih ṭhîn lo va; mahse, i finzia leh i hausakzia hi a zâtve pawh an lo sawi hlei nêm, an sawi ai daihin a ropui a ni." 
1Kings10:8 I nupuite chu an va nihlawh êm! I chhiahhlawh, ni tin i bula awma i finzia ngaithla ṭhînte pawh hi an va nihlawh êm!" 
1Kings10:9 I Pathian, Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se. Ani chu i chungah a lâwm a, Israel-te lalah a siam che a nih hi. I Pathian chuan Israel-te a hmangaih a, dik taka an chunga rorêltu atân lalah a duh che a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Kings10:10 Thilpêk tûr a ken chu a pe a, rangkachak kg. sângli chuang, mosola tam tak, lungmantam pawh tam tak a pe a ni. Mosola thil rimtui chutiang zât chu tûn hma zawng zawngin a la dawng ngai lo." 
1Kings10:11 Hirama lawng rual, Ofir ram aṭanga rangkachak rawn phurte chuan almug thing leh lungmantam an rawn phur ṭeuh bawk a." 
1Kings10:12 Lal chuan chûng thing chu Lalpa Tempul leh lal in hung nân a hmang a, zaipâwl ṭingṭangte leh perhkhuang siam nân a hmang bawk a. Chutianga tam almug thing chu Israel ramah lâkluh a la ni ngai lo, hmuh pawh an hmu leh tawh ngai hek lo." 
1Kings10:13 Lal Solomona chuan Seba lalnu chu a dîl leh a duh apiang a pe a; chu bâkah, a thil rawn kensak do lêt nân thil tam tak a lo pe ve a. Tichuan, a ṭhuihruaite nên an ram lamah an haw leh ta a." 
1Kings10:14 Solomona chuan kum tin rangkachak kg. sîngthum bûk lai a dawng ṭhîn a. 
1Kings10:15 Sumdâwngtute leh dâwrkaiten chhiah an pe a, Arabia lalte leh Israel ram bial tina ram awptuten rangkachak leh tangka an pe bawk a." 
1Kings10:16 Solomona chuan phaw lian pui pui, rangkachak den phêk zahnih a siam a, phaw pakhatah rangkachak kg. sarih zêl a hmang." 
1Kings10:17 Phaw tê deuh, rangkachak kg. hnih vêl zêla luan zathum lai a siam bawk a, phâwte chu ‘Lebanon ngawpui In’ an tih pindanah chuan a dah a." 
1Kings10:18 Lalṭhutthlêng ropui, sainghovin a siam a, rangkachak hlîr hlakin a luan a." 
1Kings10:19 Lalṭhutthlêng lâwn chhohna kailâwn, rahka paruk nei a siam a, vawnbân a nei a." 
1Kings10:20 Rahka sîr tawnah chuan sakeibaknei lem a dintîr a, a vaiin sâwm leh pahnih a nih chu. Lalṭhutthlêng hnung lamah chuan bâwngpa lu lem a awm a, a sîr tuakah chuan sakeibaknei lem a awm bawk a. Chutiang khawpa lalṭhutthlêng ropui chu khawii ramah mah a awm lo." 
1Kings10:21 Solomona no chu rangkachak vek a ni. ‘Lebanon ngawpui In’ an tih pindan chhûnga an thil eina bungbêlte phei chu rangkachak hlîr hlaka siam a ni. Solomona hun lai chuan tangkaruate hi an ngaihlu vak lo va, engah mah an hmang lo." 
1Kings10:22 Lawng rual a nei bawk a, Lal Hirama lawng rualte nên a inkawp a, Tarsis-ah te kalin kum thum danah an lo haw a, rangkachak te, tangkarua te, saingho te, zâwng te, ârâwn te an rawn hâwn ṭhîn." 
1Kings10:23 Lal Solomona chu khawvêl lal dang zawng zawng aiin a hausa a, a fing zâwk bawk a." 
1Kings10:24 Pathianin a hnêna finna a pêk chu zir tûrin khawvêl ram tin aṭangin mi an lo kal huai huai a. 
1Kings10:25 A hnêna lo kal apiangte chuan tangkarua leh rangkachaka thil siam te, puan te, râlthuam te, mosola te, sakawr te, sakawr puakphur chi te an rawn pe zut zut a. Hetiang hian kum tin an rawn pe ṭhîn." 
1Kings10:26 Solomona chuan sakawrtawlailîr sângkhat leh zali leh sakawr chungchuang mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih lai a nei a. A ṭhen Jerusalem-ah a dah a, a dang chu khawpui hmun hrang hrangah a dah a." 
1Kings10:27 A lal chhûng chuan tangkarua chu lungtê ang maiin Jerusalem-ah chuan a tam a, sidar thing pawh tlâng bulṭhut khawthlang lama theipui thing ang maiin a tam bawk." 
1Kings10:28 Lal mi rawihte chuan Musri leh Kue aṭangin sakawr an tawlh chhuak a. 
1Kings10:29 Aigupta rama sakawr-tawlailîr an tawlh chhuak bawk. Hit mite leh Suria lalte hnênah sakawr-tawlailîr pakhat tangkaraw tlang zaruk leh sakawr pakhat tangkaraw za leh sawmnga zêlin an hralh ṭhîn. 
1Kings11:1 Solomona chuan Farawa fanu chang lo pawh hnam dang nula a hmangaih a, nupui atân Moab mi te, Amon mi te, Edom mi te, Sidon mi te leh Hit mi te pawh a nei bawk a." 
1Kings11:2 Lalpa chuan Israel-te hnênah, “Hnam dang nulate nupuiah nei suh u, an pathiante in zui palh ang e,” a ti chungin nupuiah a nei a." 
1Kings11:3 Solomona chuan lal fanu zasarih nupuiah a nei a, hmei zathum a nei bawk a; a nupuite chuan ani chu an hruai kawi ta a ni." 
1Kings11:4 A lo tar hnu chuan a nupuite chuan an pathian lamah an hruai ta a, a pa Davida ang khân Lalpa, a Pathian lakah a rinawm ve ta lo va." 
1Kings11:5 Sidon mite pathiannu Astarte leh Amon mite pathian tenawm tak Milkoma te chu a zui ve ta a. 
1Kings11:6 Solomona chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual a ti a, a pa Davida ang khân a rinawm ve ta lo va." 
1Kings11:7 Jerusalem chhak tlângah Moab mite pathian tenawm tak Khemosa biakna a siam a, Amon mite pathian tenawm tak Milkoma biakna a siam bawk a." 
1Kings11:8 Hnam dang mi nupuia a neihte tân an pathian hnêna rimtui hâlna leh inthawina hmunte a siamsak bawk a. 
1Kings11:9 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu, a hnênah vawi hnih lai a inlâr a, hnam dang pathiante be lo tûra a tih pawhin," 
1Kings11:10 Solomona chuan Lalpa thu a zâwm lo va, Pathian a hawisan ta a." 
1Kings11:11 Lalpa chu Solomona chungah a thin a ur ta hle a, a hnênah, “Nang nêna kan thuthlung i bawhchhe lui a, ka thupêk i zâwm loh avângin ram chu ka chhuhsak ang che a, i hote zînga mi pakhat ka pe ang tih ka hrilh a che." 
1Kings11:12 Amaherawhchu, i pa Davida avâng khân i dam chhûng ni lovin i fapa rorêl chhûngin chu thil chu ka ti ang." 
1Kings11:13 Ram pum pui chu ka chhuhsak lo vang a, ka chhiahhlawh Davida leh ka tâna ka din Jerusalem avângin hnam khat chu a la chang ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings11:14 Lalpa chuan Solomona do tûrin Edom lal thlah Hadada chu a chawk tho va. 
1Kings11:15 Tûn hmain Davida leh Edom mite an indo va, Davida sipai hotu Joaba chu an mi thahte phûm tûrin a han chho va." 
1Kings11:16 Joaba leh a sipaite chu Edom ramah thla ruk an awm a, chumi chhûng chuan mipa zawng zawng an that vek a." 
1Kings11:17 Hadada chu a pa chhiahhlawhte nên Aigupta ramah an tlânchhia a, ani chu naupang tê a la ni nghe nghe a." 
1Kings11:18 Midian ram an chhuahsan a, Paran-ah an kal a, mi ṭhenkhatin an zâwm a. Aigupta-ah an chhuk a, lal chuan chênna tûr ram te, in te leh ei tûr te a lo pe a." 
1Kings11:19 Hadada chuan lal rin a kai a, lalnu Tahpenesi laizâwn chu Aigupta lal chuan nupuiah a neihtîr a." 
1Kings11:20 A nupui chuan fapa, Ganubata a hrinsak a, lal fapa dangte angin lalnu chuan a enkawl a." 
1Kings11:21 Davida thih thu leh a sipai hotu Joaba thih thu Hadadan Aigupta ram aṭang chuan a lo hria a, lal hnênah chuan, “Kan ramah min hâwntîr tawh rawh le,” a ti a." 
1Kings11:22 Lal chuan, “Engah maw? Eng nge i tlâkchhama in rama hâwn i duh tâk mai le?” a ti a. Hadada chuan, “Eng mah tlâkchham ka nei lo; mahse, min hâwntîr mai teh,” a ti a. Edom lal Hadada chu Israel-te hmêlma tawh khirh ber a lo ni ta a." 
1Kings11:23 Pathianin Eliada fapa Rezona chu Solomona a huattîr bawk a. Rezona chu a pa Hadadezera, Zoba lal hnên aṭangin a tlân bo va," 
1Kings11:24 helho hruaitu a lo ni ta a. Hei hi Davidan Hadadezera a hneh a, a hmêlma Suria-ho a thah chiam hnua thil thleng a ni. Rezona leh a mite chu an chhuak a, Damaska khuaah an awm a, a zuitute chuan Suria ram lal atân an ruat ta a." 
1Kings11:25 Solomona dam chhûng zawng Israel-te hmêlma a lo ni ta a ni. 
1Kings11:26 Solomona dotu dang pakhat chu a ṭhuihruai zînga mi, Jeroboama, Nebata fapa, Efraim ram Israel khuaa mi a ni. A nu chu Zeruii, hmeithai a ni." 
1Kings11:27 A hel dân chu hetiang hi a ni. Solomonan Jerusalem chhak lam ruam a chhûng khat a, kulhte a siam ṭha a." 
1Kings11:28 Jeroboama chu tlangvâl fel tak leh taima tak a ni tih hriain Manasea bial leh Efraim bial chunga hna thawktu chhawr luihte enkawltu atân a ruat a. 
1Kings11:29 Ni khat chu Jerusalem aṭangin Jeroboama chu a lo kal a, Silo khua aṭanga lo kal zâwlnei Ahija nên ramhnuaiah an intâwk a." 
1Kings11:30 Ahija chuan a kawrfual thar hâk chu a hlîp a, phel sâwm leh pahnihah a pawtthlêr a." 
1Kings11:31 Jeroboama hnênah, “Phel sâwm hi nei rawh; Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh, Solomona ram hi ka chhuhsak ang a, hnam sâwm hi ka pe ang che." 
1Kings11:32 Ka chhiahhlawh Davida avâng leh Israel ram puma ka puala ka thlan Jerusalem avângin hnam khat chu a chang ve ang chu. 
1Kings11:33 Ani chuan Sidon mite pathiannu Astarte te, Moab mite pathian Khemosa te, Amon mite pathian Milkoma te min zuisan a, a pa Davida angin ka dân leh thupêk a pawisa lo va, ka kawng a zawh lo va, ka mite hmuha thil dik a tih hek loh avângin." 
1Kings11:34 Mahse, Solomona chu ram pum pui ka chhuhsak lo vang. Ka chhiahhlawh Davida, ka thlan leh ka dân leh thupêkte zâwmtu avângin a dam chhûng chuan ka laltîr ang." 
1Kings11:35 A fapa kut ata ram chu ka chhuhsak ang a, hnam sâwm ka pe ang che." 
1Kings11:36 Hnam khat erawh chu a fapa ka pe ang a, min biakna hmun atâna ka thlan Jerusalem khuaah Davida thlahte chuan ro an rêl ang." 
1Kings11:37 Nang erawh chu ram zau tak chungah ro i rêl ang a, Israel-te lalah i awm ang." 
1Kings11:38 Ka chhiahhlawh Davida anga ka thu zâwma, ka dân pawisaa, ka mithmuha ṭha taka i awm chuan i hnênah ka awm reng ang. Israel-te lalah ka siam ang che a, Davida hnêna ka tiam angin i thlahten i hnuah pawh ro an rêl zêl ang." 
1Kings11:39 Solomona sualna avângin Davida thlahte chu ka hrem dâwn, kumkhua erawh chuan ka hrem lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Kings11:40 Solomona chuan Jeroboama chu thah a tum ta a, Jeroboama chu Aigupta lal Sisaka hnênah a tlân a, Solomona thih hma chuan a awm ta reng a." 
1Kings11:41 Solomona chanchin dang, a thiltihte leh a finna thute chu Solomona chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang a." 
1Kings11:42 Israel ram pum puiah kum sawmli chhûng Jerusalem-ah ro a rêl a. 
1Kings11:43 Solomona chu a thi a, a pa Davida khawpuiah an phûm a, a fapa Rehoboama chu a hmunah a lal ta a." 
1Kings12:1 Rehoboama chu Sekem khuaah a kal a, chutah chuan lala siam tûrin Israel-ho hmâr lama awmte chu an lo pung khâwm a." 
1Kings12:2 Nebata fapa Jeroboama chu Solomona hlauvin Aigupta ramah a tlân bo va, a thih thu a hriatin a lo haw leh ta a." 
1Kings12:3 Hmâr lama Israel-te chuan an va pun a, Rehoboama hnênah chuan an kal ho ta a, a hnênah," 
1Kings12:4 “I pa khân min chhawr nasa hle a, kan phur a tirit êm êm a, nang chuan min chhawr nêpin kan phur min tihzânsak deuh la, i khua leh tuiah kan awm ang e,” an ti a." 
1Kings12:5 Rehoboama chuan, “Ni thum hnuah lo kal leh ang che u,” a ti a. Mite chu an ṭîn ta a." 
1Kings12:6 Lal Rehoboama chuan a pa Solomona dam laia a bula awm ṭhîn upate chu a râwn a, “Hêng mite hi engtia chhân tûr nge ni le?” a ti a." 
1Kings12:7 Anni chuan, “Hêng mite hi ṭha taka enkawl i duh chuan an dîl hi ṭha takin chhâng la; tichuan, i lakah an rinawm kumkhua ang,” tiin an chhâng a." 
1Kings12:8 Upaho thurâwn chu a pawm duh lo va, tlangvâl, ama rualpui, a kawm ṭhînte chu a râwn a." 
1Kings12:9 “Hêng mi, kan phur min tihzânsak deuh rawh titute hi engtin nge ka chhân ang?” a ti a." 
1Kings12:10 A rualpui tlangvâlho chuan, “Hêngho, ‘I pain kan phur a tirit êm a, min tihzânsak rawh,’ titute hi heti hian chhâng mai rawh: ‘ka kutzungtê pawh hi ka pa kâwng ai chuan a khauh vang." 
1Kings12:11 Ka pain in phur a tirit hle a nih chuan kei chuan ka belhchhah ang. Tiangin a vua che u a, kei chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hrem ang che u,’ ti ang che,” an ti a." 
1Kings12:12 Ni thum hnuah chuan Jeroboama leh Israel mite chu Rehoboama sawi ang khân an lo kal a. 
1Kings12:13 Lal chuan upaho thurâwn kha a zâwm duh lo va, mite chu ram takin a lo bia a." 
1Kings12:14 Tlangvâlte thurâwn ang khân mite hnênah chuan, “Ka pa khân in phur a tirit hle maw? Kei chuan ka belhchhah ang. Tiangin a vua che u a, kei chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hrem ang che u,” a ti a." 
1Kings12:15 Silo khuaa zâwlnei Ahijan Nebata fapa Jeroboama hnêna a sawi a thlen theih nân Lalpa chuan a tihtîr a ni. Hei vâng hian lal chuan mipuite chu a lo chhâwn ṭha duh lo va. 
1Kings12:16 Israel mite chuan lalin an thu a ngaihsak lo tih an hriatin lal chu an chhâng a, “Davida ramah chan eng nge kan neih ve le? Jesaia thlahte zîngah chanvo eng nge kan neih? Davida thlahte chu an awm awmin awm rawh se,” an ti a. Israel mi zawng zawng chu in lamah an haw ta a." 
1Kings12:17 Judai rama awm Israel mite chungah chauh chuan Rehoboama chu a lal ta a. 
1Kings12:18 Lal Rehoboama chuan hna thawka chhawr luih pâwl hotu Adonirama chu Israel-ho ko tûrin a tîr a. Ani chu lungin an lo dêng hlum a. Chu veleh Rehoboama chu a tawlailîrah a chuang sawk sawk a, Jerusalem-ah a tlân haw ta a." 
1Kings12:19 Chutichuan, hmâr lam rama awm Israel mite chu Davida thlahte lakah tûn thlengin an hel ta a ni." 
1Kings12:20 Israel miten Jeroboama chu Aigupta ram aṭangin a lo haw tih an hriat chuan an pun khâwmnaah an sâwm a, ani chu Israel lalah an siam ta a. Juda hnam chauh chu Davida thlahte lamah an ṭang ta a." 
1Kings12:21 Lal Rehoboaman Jerusalem a thlen chuan Benjamin mi leh Juda mi zînga sipai ṭha ṭha nuaikhat leh sîngriat a khâwm a, hmâr lama awm Israel-te chu a thuhnuaia dah leh tûrin beih a tum ta a." 
1Kings12:22 Mahse, Pathian mi, Simeia hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a." 
1Kings12:23 Juda lal Solomona fapa Rehoboama hnênah te, Juda hnam pum pui leh Benjamin hnam hnênah te leh mi dang awm vete hnênah," 
1Kings12:24 “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, ‘in unau, Israel-te chu han bei suh u, in vaiin haw vek rawh u, an thil tih hi keima tih a ni e,’ tiin a sawi,” a ti a. Tichuan, Lalpa thupêk chu pawmin mahni inah an hâwng ta vek a." 
1Kings12:25 Israel lal Jeroboama chuan Efraim tlângrama Sekem khua chu kulhin a hung a, chutah chuan rei lo tê a awm a. A chhuak leh a, Penuel khua chu kulhin a hung leh a." 
1Kings12:26 Jeroboama chuan, “Ram hi Davida chhûngten an chang leh mai ang a!” a ti rilru a ni." 
1Kings12:27 “Mite chu Jerusalem-ah Lalpa hnêna inthawi tûra an chhoh fo chuan an pu Rehoboama, Juda lal an bêl ang a, min that mai ang,” a ti bawk a." 
1Kings12:28 Chutiang thil a ngaihtuah hnu chuan rangkachakin bâwngno lem pahnih a siam a. A mite hnênah chuan, “In tân Jerusalem-a chhoh fo a harsa si a, hei hi in pathian, Aigupta ata hruai chhuaktu che u kha a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings12:29 Pakhat chu Bethel-ah a dah a, pakhat chu Dan khuaah a dah a." 
1Kings12:30 Mite chuan Bethel leh Dan khuaahte kalin thil an lo tisual ta a. 
1Kings12:31 Jeroboama chuan tlângchhîpahte pathian biakna hmun a siam a, Levia chi pawh ni lo, a duh duh puithiamah a ruat a." 
1Kings12:32 Jeroboama chuan Judai rama kût an neih ṭhin angin thla riatna, ni sâwm leh panga ni chu kût ni atân a ruat a. Bethel-a maichâmah chuan rangkachaka siam bâwngno, ama kutchhuak hnênah a inthawi ta a. Tlângchhîp inthawina hmunah puithiamte a dah ang khân Bethel-ah chuan puithiamte a dah a." 
1Kings12:33 Thla riatna, ni sâwm leh panga ni, Israel mipui tâna kût ni a ruatsakah chuan Bethel-ah a kal a, maichâmah chuan inthawina a hlân a." 
1Kings13:1 Jeroboama chu thil hlân tûra maichâm hmaa a din lai chuan Lalpa mi tirh, zâwlnei, Judai ram aṭangin Bethel-ah a lo thleng a." 
1Kings13:2 Lalpa thupêkin zâwlnei chuan maichâm chu hetiangin a hau va: “Maichâm, maichâm, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Davida thlah aṭangin a hming Josia a lo piang ang a, i chunga milem pathian hnêna rimtui hâl ṭhîntu puithiamte chu a rawn sâm ang a, i chungah an ruhte nên a rawn hâl ang,” tiin." 
1Kings13:3 Zâwlnei chuan a sawi zêl a, “He maichâm hi a phel phawk ang a, a chunga meivâpte pawh a la darh vek ang. Tichuan, Lalpa chuan keimah mi hmangin thu a sawi a ni tih in hria ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:4 Bethel-a maichâm chu Pathian miin a hau tih lal Jeroboama chuan a hriatin maichâm bul aṭang chuan ani chu a kâwk a, “Man rawh u,” a ti a. Chu veleh lal bân chu a khawng a, a la thla thei ta lo va." 
1Kings13:5 Maichâm chu a phel phawk a, meivâpte chu Lalpa hminga zâwlneiin a sawi ang khân leiah a darh ta vek a." 
1Kings13:6 Lal Jeroboama chuan zâwlnei hnênah, “Khawngaih takin, Lalpa, i Pathian hnênah ka bân damna hi min dilsak rawh,” a ti a. Zâwlnei chu Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, lal bân chu a dam ta a." 
1Kings13:7 Lal chuan zâwlnei hnênah, “Ka inah lo kal la, ka hnênah eiin in la; tichuan, lâwmman ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:8 Zâwlnei chuan lal hnênah, “I sum zâtve pawh min pe dâwn mah la, i inah chuan ka kal lo vang a, i eng mah ka eiin ka in lo vang." 
1Kings13:9 Lalpa chuan eng mah eia in lo tûr leh ka lo kalna kawngah pawh kîr leh tawh lo tûrin min ti a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:10 Tichuan, Bethel panna, a lo kal kawnga hâwng lovin kawng dangah a hâwng ta a." 
1Kings13:11 Zâwlnei putar pakhat hi Bethel-ah chuan a awm a. A fapa pakhat chuan chumi nia Judai ram aṭanga zâwlnei lo kalin Bethel-a a thil tih leh lal Jeroboama hnêna a thu sawite chu a hrilh a. 
1Kings13:12 Zâwlnei putar chuan a fate hnênah, “Khawii lamah nge a kal tâk?” a ti a. A kalna lam an hrilh a." 
1Kings13:13 Sabengtung buatsaihsak tûrin a fate chu a ti a, an buatsaih zawh chuan," 
1Kings13:14 Judai ram aṭanga zâwlnei lo kal chu a ûm ta a. Ani chu sasaw thing hlimah a lo ṭhu a, “Judai rama zâwlnei kha i ni em?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:15 Zâwlnei putar chuan, “Lo kal la, ka inah chaw rawn ei rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:16 Judai ram zâwlnei chuan, “I ruala lo kîr thei ka ni lo, i hnêna ei leh in thei ka ni hek lo." 
1Kings13:17 Lalpa chuan eng mah ei lo tûr leh ka lo kalna kawng ngaia kîr leh lo tûrin min ti tlat a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:18 Bethel zâwlnei putar chuan a hnênah, “Kei pawh nang ang bawkin zâwlnei ka ni a, Lalpa tirh Vântirhkohvin ka hnênah, ‘I ina eia in tûrin ani chu rawn hruai hâwng rawh,’ min ti a ni,” tiin dâwt a hrilh a." 
1Kings13:19 Judai ram zâwlnei chuan zâwlnei putar chu a zui a, a hnênah chaw a ei ta a." 
1Kings13:20 Chaw an kîl lai chuan Lalpa thu chu zâwlnei putar hnênah a lo thleng a. 
1Kings13:21 Judai ram aṭanga zâwlnei hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa thu i zâwm lo va, a thupêk angin i ti hek lo." 
1Kings13:22 I kîr leha, ei leh in lo tûra a tihna hmunah i eia i in avângin i thi ang a, i ruang chu in chhûngkaw thlânah phûm a ni ve lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:23 An ei kham chuan zâwlnei putar chuan Judai ram zâwlnei tân a sabengtung a buatsaih a, a chuantîr ta a." 
1Kings13:24 Kawngah chuan sakeibaknei a va tâwk a, a lo seh hlum a. A ruang chu kawngah a lo thal reng a, a sîrah sabengtung leh sakeibaknei chu an lo ding reng bawk a." 
1Kings13:25 Kawnga mi lo kalin a ruang chu an va hmu a, sakeibaknei a bula ding nên chuan. Bethel khuaah an va tlân a, an thil hmuh chu an va sawi a." 
1Kings13:26 A rawn hruai kîrtu zâwlnei putarin a lo hriat chuan, ‘E, Lalpa thupêk zâwm lotu zâwlnei kha a nih chu. Lalpa sawi tawh angin ani chu seh hlum tûrin sakeibaknei a tîr a nih chu,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:27 A fate hnênah chuan, “Ka sabengtung kha min han buatsaihsak teh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:28 An buatsaih zawh chuan a tlân a, zâwlneipa ruang, kawnga lo thal reng leh a bula sabengtung leh sakeibaknei lo ding reng chu a va hmu a. Sakeibaknei chuan zâwlnei chu a ei lo va, sabengtung pawh a bei zui hek lo." 
1Kings13:29 Zâwlnei putar chuan a ruang chu a hlâwm a, sabengtung chuan a phur a, Bethel-a phûm tûrin a la ta a." 
1Kings13:30 Zâwlnei putar chuan an chhûngkaw thlânah a phûm a, “Aw ka unaupa, ka unaupa,” tiin a fate nên an ṭah a." 
1Kings13:31 An vui zawh chuan zâwlnei chuan a fate hnênah, “Ka thih hun chuan he thlânah hian min phûm ve ula, he mi bulah hian min zalh ang che u." 
1Kings13:32 Lalpa thupêka Bethel maichâm thu leh Samaria khawpuia inthawina hmun zawng zawng chungthu a sawite chu a lo thleng dik ngei dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:33 Israel lal Jeroboama chuan a nun sual a sim duh chuang lo va; mi narân zîng aṭangin a maichâm dina rawngbâwl tûr puithiamte a ruat belh zêl a. Puithiam nih duh apiang hmunsânga rawngbâwl tûrin a ruat a. 
1Kings13:34 He thil sual a tih hian ama chhiatna leh a thlahte thlenga boralna a thlen ta a ni. 
1Kings14:1 Jeroboama fapa Abija chu a damlo va. 
1Kings14:2 Jeroboama chuan a nupui hnênah, “Ka nupui i ni tih tu man an hriat theih loh nân inchei danglam la, Israel lal ka nih tûr thu min hrilhtu zâwlnei Ahija, Silo khuaa awm hnênah va kal teh." 
1Kings14:3 Chhang tlâwn sâwm leh kêk tlêm azâwng leh khawizu ûm khat kensak la, naupang awm dân tûr hi a lo hrilh thei ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings14:4 A hrilh ang chuan Jeroboama nupui chu Silo khuaa Ahija inah chuan a va kal a, Ahija chu a upat tawh avângin a mit a fiah tawh lo va."
