1Kings14:5 Lalpa chuan Ahija hnênah, “Jeroboama nupui, a fa damlo chungchâng zâwt tûr chein a lo kal a, hetiangin lo chhâng ang che. Mi narân angin a inchei danglam a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings14:6 Kawngkaa lo lût thâwm Ahijan a hriat chuan, “Lo lût rawh, Jeroboama nupui i ni lâwm ni? Engtiziaa inchei danglam nge i nih? Chanchin lâwmawm lo tak ka lo hrilh ang che." 
1Kings14:7 Kal la, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian thuchhuak hi Jeroboama hnênah hetiangin va sawi rawh. ‘Mipui zîng ata ka chawisâng che a, ka mi Israel-te hruaitu atân ka dah che a." 
1Kings14:8 Davida chhûngte ram ka chhuhsak a, ka pe che a. Mahse, ka chhiahhlawh Davida angin i awm lo va, ani chuan ka thupêkte a zâwm a, tih tak zetin mi zui a, ka mit hmuhah thil dik chauh a ti ṭhîn." 
1Kings14:9 Nang zawng, i hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin i sual a; ka huatzâwng tak, pathian dangte leh milem chhûnte i siam a, mi hawisan ta a." 
1Kings14:10 Hêng avâng hian i thlahte, mipa fa tawh phawt chu naupang aṭanga puitling thlengin ka tiboral vek dâwn. Bawlhhlawh phiah fai ang maiin i chhûngkua chu ka la bo vek ang." 
1Kings14:11 ‘Jeroboama chhûngte, khawpuia thite chu, ui-in an ei ang a, tâmlaka thi chu chunglêng savaten an tlân ang,’ chu chu Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings14:12 “Nang pawh haw la, khuaa i luh veleh naupang chu a thi ang." 
1Kings14:13 Israel mi zawng zawngin an sûn ang a, an phûm ang. Jeroboama chhûngte zîngah ani hi zawng Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian mit hmuha ṭha a nih avângin amah chauh hi Jeroboama chhûngte zîngah thlâna phûm a ni ang." 
1Kings14:14 Jeroboama chhûngkaw tiboral tûrin Lalpa chuan Israel-te chunga rorêltu a mi duhzâwng tak a ruat thuai dâwn. 
1Kings14:15 Lalpa chuan Israel-te chu a hrem ang a, lui kam phairuang angin a tinghîng dual dual ang. Israel mite chuan pathiannu Aseri lemte an siam a, Lalpa an tihthinur avângin an pute hnêna a pêk ram ṭha tak aṭangin a sawn chhuak ang a, Eufretis lui râlah a sawn darh vek ang." 
1Kings14:16 Israel-te chu Jeroboaman a hruaisual avângin Lalpa chuan a hawisan ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings14:17 Jeroboama nupui chu Tirza khuaah a hâwng leh ta a, in a thlen veleh an fa chu a thi ta a." 
1Kings14:18 Lalpa chhiahhlawh Ahijan a lo sawi tawh ang khân Israel mite chuan naupang chu an ṭah a, an phûm ta a." 
1Kings14:19 Jeroboama chanchin dang, a râl beih thu te, a rorêl dân te chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
1Kings14:20 Jeroboama chu kum sawmhnih leh pahnih chhûng a lal a, a thi a, an phûm a, a fapa Nadaba chuan a ai a awh ta a." 
1Kings14:21 Solomona fapa Rehoboama chu kum sawmli leh pakhat a nihin Judai ramah a lal ṭan a. Israel pum puia amah biakna hmun tûr Lalpa thlan Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh pariat ro a rêl a. A nu chu Naami, Amon hnam a ni." 
1Kings14:22 Juda mite chu Lalpa mit hmuhah an sual hle a, an pute ai mahin Lalpa an tithinur zual a." 
1Kings14:23 Milem pathian biakna hmun tam tak an siam a, tlângah te, thingbuk hnuaiah te lung serh leh pathiannu Aseri lim te an phun a." 
1Kings14:24 Chu aia la sual zâwk chu an milem biaknaah chuan mipa leh hmeichhiate bawlhhlawh takin an khawsa ho va. Israel fate Kanan ram an lo luha, an hmaa an hnawh chhuah tâk hnamte awm dân mawi lo zawng chu Juda mite hian an la ve ta a ni." 
1Kings14:25 Lal Rehoboama lal kum nganaah Aigupta lal Sisaka chuan Jerusalem a rûn a. 
1Kings14:26 Lalpa Tempula ro te, lal ina ro te, Solomonan rangkachaka phaw a siamte nên a phur hâwng chiam a." 
1Kings14:27 Lal Rehoboama chuan chûng phaw an lâksak tâk aiah dârin phaw dang a siam leh a, lal in kawngka vêngtute a kawltîr a." 
1Kings14:28 Lal chu Lalpa Tempula a kal apiangin vêngtute chuan phaw chu an keng a, chumi hnuah pindanah an dah leh hlawm ṭhîn a." 
1Kings14:29 Rehoboama chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawng chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a. 
1Kings14:30 A lal chhûng zawngin Rehoboama leh Jeroboama chu an indo reng a. 
1Kings14:31 Rehoboama chu a thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a. A nu chu Naami, Amon hnam a ni. A fapa Abija chuan a ai a awh ta a." 
1Kings15:1 Nebata fapa Jeroboama, Israel lal chu kum sâwm leh pariat a lal kumin Judai ramah Abija a lo lal ve a." 
1Kings15:2 Jerusalem-ah kum thum a lal a, a nu chu Maaki, Absaloma fanu a ni." 
1Kings15:3 A pa angin thil sual a ti a, a pu Davida hlan ang khân a thinlung chu Lalpa hnênah a hlân ve lo." 
1Kings15:4 Nimahsela, Davida avângin Lalpa, a Pathian chuan Abija chu a thih hnua Jerusalem-a lal tûr fapa a pe a, Jerusalem khua pawh a humhimsak a." 
1Kings15:5 Hit mi, Uria chunga thil sual a tih bâk chu Davida chuan Lalpa thupêkte a bawhchhe ngai lo va, a mit hmuha thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a." 
1Kings15:6 Abija rorêl chhûng zawng Jeroboama leh Abija chu an indo reng a. 
1Kings15:7 Abija chanchin dang, a thiltihte chu Juda lalte chanchin ziaknaah a chuang." 
1Kings15:8 Abija chu a thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a, a fapa Asa chu a pa aiawhin a lal a." 
1Kings15:9 Israel lal Jeroboama kum sawmhnih a lal kumah, Asa chu Judai ramah a lo lal a." 
1Kings15:10 Kum sawmli leh pakhat Jerusalem-ah a lal a, a pi chu Absaloma fanu Maaki a ni." 
1Kings15:11 Ani chuan a pu Davida angin Lalpa lâwmzâwng a ti ṭhîn. 
1Kings15:12 Milem pathian biakna hmuna mipa leh hmeichhe inzuarte chu ram chhûng ata a hnawt chhuak a, a puten milem pathian an siam zawng zawng chu a tichhia a." 
1Kings15:13 A pi Maakin Aseri lim tenawm tak chu a phun avângin, lalnu a nihna a hlihsak a, Asa chuan milem pathiante chu a kit a, Kidron ruamah a hâl a." 
1Kings15:14 Ram chhûnga pathian dang an biakna hmun zawng zawng chu lal Asa chuan tibo vek lo mah se, a dam chhûng zawng Lalpa chauh a vuan a." 
1Kings15:15 A pain Pathian hnêna a thilpêk zawng zawng chu Asa chuan tempulah a dah a; amah ngeiin rangkachak leh tangkarua a hlante chu a dah bawk a. 
1Kings15:16 Juda lal Asa leh Israel lal Baasa chu an lal chhûng zawng an indo va. 
1Kings15:17 Israel lal Baasa chuan Judai ram a han rûn a, Judai ram aṭanga mi an lo chhuaha, mi dang Judai rama an luh theih loh nân Rama khuaah kulh a siam a." 
1Kings15:18 Asa chuan Tempul sum bâwm ata leh lal ina rangkachak leh tangkaruate chu a la chhuak a, Damaska khuaa awm Suria lal Ben-hadada hnênah a thawn a. Ben-hadada chu, Heziona tupa, Tabrimona fa a ni. A mi tirhte chuan hetiangin an sawi a:" 
1Kings15:19 “Ka pa leh i pa an ṭang dûn ang khân keini pawh i ṭang dûn teh ang. En teh, rangkachak leh tangkarua ka rawn thawn a che: Israel lal Baasa nên in inṭhianna titâwp la, kan ram chhûnga a sipaite hnûk kîr teh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings15:20 Ben-hadada chuan Asa thu rawt chu a lo remti a, a sipai hotu a ko va, a sipaite chuan Israel ram chu an rûn ta a. Izon te, Dan te, Abel-beth-maaka te an la a, Galili dîl kiang ramte leh Naftali bial pum pui chu an lâksak ta a." 
1Kings15:21 Chûng thu chu Lal Baasan a hriatin Rama khaw kulh a siam chu a chawlhsan a, Tirza khuaah a awm ta a." 
1Kings15:22 Lal Baasan Rama khaw kulh a siam nân lung leh thing a hmante chu la tûrin Asa chuan Juda ram mi zawng zawng chu a pun a. Benjamin biala Geba leh Mizpa khaw kulh siam nân a hmang ta a. 
1Kings15:23 Lal Asa thil tih dang, a huaisenzia te, khaw kulh a siam thu te Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. A tar hnuin a ke-ah hri ṭha lo a vei a, a bawksawp ta a." 
1Kings15:24 Asa chu a thi a, Davida khawpuia lal chhûngkaw thlânah an phûm a, a fapa Jehosafata chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings15:25 Juda lal Asa lal kum hnihnaah, lal Jeroboama fapa Nadaba chu Israel ramah a lal a, kum hnih ro a rêl a." 
1Kings15:26 A pa ang bawkin Lalpa mite hmuha thil sual a ti a, Israel-te chu a hruai sual ta a." 
1Kings15:27 Ahija fapa Baasa, Isakar hnama mi chuan Nadaba chu a phiar ru a, Nadaba leh a sipaite chuan Filistia rama Gibethon khua an hual laiin Baasa chuan Nadaba chu a that a." 
1Kings15:28 Juda lal Asa lal kum thumnaah Baasa chuan Nadaba chu a that a, a aiawhin Israel ramah chuan a lal ta a." 
1Kings15:29 A lal ṭan chauh tihin Jeroboama chhûngte chu a that vek a. Lalpa chuan a chhiahhlawh Ahija, Silo khuaa mi hnêna a sawi tawh ang khân Jeroboama chhûngte chu tu mah zuah lovin a that ta a." 
1Kings15:30 Jeroboama thil sual tih chuan Israel te chu a hruai sual a, chu chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian a tithinur a ni." 
1Kings15:31 Nadaba chanchin dang, a thiltih zawng zawng chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang a." 
1Kings15:32 Juda lal Asa leh Israel lal Baasa chu an lal chhûng zawng an indo a ni. 
1Kings15:33 Juda lal Asa lal kum thumnaah Ahija fapa Baasa chu Israel mi zawng zawng chungah a lal a, Tirza khuaah kum sawmhnih leh pali ro a rêl a." 
1Kings15:34 Lalpa mit hmuhah thil sual a ti a, Jeroboama angin Israel-te hruai sualtu a ni." 
1Kings16:1 Baasa chungchâng, Zâwlnei Jehua, Hanania fapa hnênah Lalpa thu hetiangin a lo thleng a," 
1Kings16:2 “Eng mah ni lo kha, Israel-te rorêltu atân ka ruat che a. Tûnah Jeroboama anga thil sual tiin ka mi Israel-te i hruai sual a, an sualna chuan min tithinur ta a ni." 
1Kings16:3 Chuvângin, Nebata fapa Jeroboama chhûngte chunga ka tih angin nang leh i chhûngte hi ka tiboral vek dâwn." 
1Kings16:4 I chhûngte zînga mi khawpuia thi chu ui-in an sa an tlân ang a, ramhnuaia thite chu chunglêng savaten an tlân ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings16:5 Baasa chanchin dang, a thiltih te, a huaisenzia te chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang." 
1Kings16:6 Baasa chu a thi a, Tirza khuaah an phûm a, a fapa Ela chu a aiawhin a lal a." 
1Kings16:7 Baasa leh a chhûngte chuan Lalpa mit hmuha thil sual an tih nasat êm avângin Hanania fapa zâwlnei Jehua hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a. Lal Jeroboama anga thil sual a tih avâng leh Jeroboama chhûngte a thah vek avângin Lalpa chu a chungah a thinur ta hle a ni. 
1Kings16:8 Juda lal Asa kum sawmhnih leh paruk a lal kumah Baasa fapa Ela chu Israel ramah a lal a. Tirza khuaah kum hnih a lal a. 
1Kings16:9 A hote zînga pakhat, Zimria, a tawlailîr zâtve lai chunga hotu chu a lakah a hel a. Chutih lai chuan Ela chu Tirza khuaah a awm a. Lal in enkawltu Arza inah zu a lo rui a." 
1Kings16:10 Zimria chu inah chuan a va lût a, Ela chu a that a, a aiah a lal ta a. Chu chu Juda lal Asa kum sawmhnih leh pasarih a lal kum a ni." 
1Kings16:11 Zimrian lalṭhutthlêng a luah veleh Baasa chhûngte chu a that vek a, a laichîn leh a ṭhian, mipa tawh phawt chu tu mah a zuah lo." 
1Kings16:12 Baasa chungchânga zâwlnei Jehua hnêna Lalpa thu lo thleng ang chuan Zimria chuan Baasa chhûngte chu a that vek a. 
1Kings16:13 Milem pathian an bia a, Israel-te an hruai sual avângin Baasa leh a fapa Ela chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu an tithinur atin a ni." 
1Kings16:14 Ela thiltih zawng zawng chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang. 
1Kings16:15 Juda lal Asa, kum sawmhnih leh pasarih a lal kum chuan Zimria chu Tirza khuaah ni sarih chhûng Israel-te chungah a lal a. Israel sipaite chuan Filistia khua Gibethon chu an hual a." 
1Kings16:16 Zimrian lal a phiara, lal chu a that tih an hriat chuan chu khaw hualtute chuan, an riahhmunah chuan an hotupa Omria chu Israel lalah an siam ta a." 
1Kings16:17 Omria leh a hnêna mi awm zawng chuan Gibethon an ṭînsan a, Tirza khua chu an han hual ta a." 
1Kings16:18 Khua an la tih a hriat chuan Zimria chu lal in chhûnga kulhah a tlân lût a, lal inah chuan a inkalhkhum a, a kâng hlum ta a." 
1Kings16:19 Lalpa mit hmuhin thil a tisual a, Jeroboama kawng a zawh a, Israel-te a hruai sual avângin chu thil chu a chungah a lo thleng ta a ni." 
1Kings16:20 Zimria chanchin dang te, a phiar rûk thu te chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
1Kings16:21 Israel mipui chu pâwl hnihah an inṭhen a, a zâtve chuan Ginata fapa Tibnia chu lala siam an duh a, a zâtve chuan Omria an zui a." 
1Kings16:22 Omria zuitute chuan Ginata fapa Tibnia zuitute chu an hneh ta a. Tibnia chu a thi a, Omria chu a lo lal ta a." 
1Kings16:23 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmthum leh pakhat kumin Omria chu Israel-te chungah a lo lal ṭan a. Kum sâwm leh pahnih a lal a, a hun hmasa lam kum ruk chhûng chu Tirza khuaah a lal a." 
1Kings16:24 Semera hnên aṭangin Samaria tlâng tangkarua sângrukin a lei a, chutah chuan khawpui a din a, kulh a siam a. Tlâng neitu hmasa Semera hming chawiin a khaw hmingah Samaria a sa a." 
1Kings16:25 Omria chuan Lalpa mit hmuhah thil sual a ti ṭhîn a, a hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin a sual a." 
1Kings16:26 Nebata fapa Jeroboama awm dân ṭha lo zawng zawng a la a, Israel-te chu a hruai sual a, an milem biakte avâng chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu an tithinur hle a." 
1Kings16:27 Omria chanchin dang, a thil tih theihzia te chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang." 
1Kings16:28 Omria chu a lo thi ve ta a, Samaria khuaah an phûm a, a fapa Ahaba chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings16:29 Juda lal Asa chu kum sawmthum leh pariat a lal kumin Omria fapa Ahaba chu Israel-te chungah a lal ṭan a, Omria fapa Ahaba chu Samaria khuaah kum sawmhnih leh pahnih a lal a." 
1Kings16:30 Omria fapa Ahaba chuan a hmaa lal zawng zawng ai khân thil sual a ti nasa zâwk a. 
1Kings16:31 Nebata fapa Jeroboama anga sual chu tâwk a ti lo va, Sidon lal Ethbaala fanu Jezebeli chu nupuiah a nei a. Baal pathiante a be ve ta zêl a." 
1Kings16:32 Samaria khuaah Baal pathian maichâm a din a, Baal biakna inte a sa a." 
1Kings16:33 Ahaba chuan Aseri lim a phun bawk a, a hmaa Israel lal zawng zawng aiin Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu a tithinur a." 
1Kings16:34 Ahaba lal laiin Bethel mi Hiela chuan Jeriko khua a din ṭha a; Nuna fapa Josua hnêna Lalpa sawi tawh ang khân Hiela chuan lungphûm a phûm avângin a fapa upa ber Abirama a chân a, kulh kawngkhâr a siam ṭhat avângin a fapa naupang ber Seguba a chân bawk." 
1Kings17:1 Gilead ram Tisbe mi Elija chuan Ahaba hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian rawng ka bâwl ṭhina hmingin ka hrilh a che, kum hnih kum thum chhûng chu ka thu lo chuan leiah ruah leh dai a tla lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:2 Lalpa thu chu Elija hnênah a lo thleng a. 
1Kings17:3 “Heta ta hi chhuak la, khawchhak lam pan la, Jordan chhaka Kerith lui kamah han biru rawh." 
1Kings17:4 Luite tui chu i tlân ang a, nangmah châwmtu tûrin choakte thu ka pe tawh e,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:5 Lalpa sawi ang chuan a ti a, Jordan chhaka Kerith lui chu a pan a, tah chuan a awm ta a." 
1Kings17:6 Zîng leh tlaiah choakte chuan chhang leh sa an rawn lâksak ziah ṭhîn a, luite tui chu a tlân a." 
1Kings17:7 Chu ramah chuan ruah rêng a sûr tâk loh avângin luite tui chu a kang ta a. 
1Kings17:8 Lalpa chuan Elija hnênah," 
1Kings17:9 “Tho la, Sidon biala Zarefat khuaah kal la, tah chuan awm rawh, châwm tûr chein hmeithai pakhat ka ruat tawh e,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:10 Zarefat khuaah chuan a kal ta a. Chu khaw kulh kawngka a va thlen chuan hmeithai pakhat hian thing a lo fawm a, Hmeithai chu a han au va, “Tui tlêm min han suahsak la, ka lo in ang e,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:11 La tûra a kal lai chu, “Khawngaih takin chhang tlêm min han pe bawk ang che,” a ti zui a." 
1Kings17:12 Hmeithai chuan, “ Lalpa, i Pathian nung hmingin ka hrilh a che, chhang zawng ka nei lo, bêlah chhangphut vei khat lek leh bûrah hriak tlêm tê chauh ka nei a. Ka fapa nêna kan ei tûr siam nân thingṭang tlêm tê ka fawm a, chu chu kan ei zawhah rilṭâmin kan thi tawh mai ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:13 Elija chuan, “Mangang suh, hâwng la, in ei tûr chu va siam rawh. Amaherawhchu, chhang tlêm min han siamsak phawt la, mi han pe ang che, a bâk chu i tân leh i fapa tân i siam dâwn nia." 
1Kings17:14 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ruah ka sûrtîr hma chu chhangphut bêl chu a ruak lo vang a, hriak bûr chu a kang hek lo vang’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:15 Hmeithai chu a kal a, Elija sawi ang chuan a va ti a; tichuan, an vaia ni rei tak ei tûr chhang a lo awm ta a." 
1Kings17:16 Lalpan Elija hnêna a sawi ang chuan chhangphut bêl chu a ruak lo va, hriak ûm pawh a kang hek lo." 
1Kings17:17 Chumi hnu chuan hmeithai fapa chu a dam lo va, a na chu a zual tawlh tawlh a, a thi ta hial a." 
1Kings17:18 Hmeithai chuan Elija hnênah, “Pathian mi, engati nge hetianga mi tih le? Pathian hmaa ka sualna târ lang tûr leh ka fapa tihlum tûra lo kal i nih hi le,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:19 Elija chuan, “I fapa chu mi han pe teh,” a ti a. A nu pawm lai chu a lâksak a, a chênna pindan chungnungah a pawm chho va, ama khumah a muttîr a." 
1Kings17:20 Ring takin a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, ka Pathian, engtizia nge he thil ṭha lo tak hi he hmeithai chungah hian i thlentîr le? He nu hi a ngilneiin min ti ṭha hle si a, engati nge a fapa hi i tihhlum mai le?” a ti a." 
1Kings17:21 Tichuan, naupang chungah chuan vawi thum a bawk a, a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, ka Pathian, he naupang hi tidam leh teh,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:22 Lalpa chuan Elija ṭawngṭai chu a chhâng a, naupang chu a lo thaw chhuak a, a dam leh ta a." 
1Kings17:23 Elija chuan naupang chu a nu hnênah a chhukpui a, a hnênah, “Hei i fapa chu a dam leh ta e,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:24 Hmeithai chuan, “Pathian mi i ni a, Lalpa chuan i hnênah thu a sawi tih tûnah ka hre ta,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:1 Kum thum lai khua a khen hnu chuan Lalpa thu chu Elija hnênah a lo thleng a, “Ahaba hnênah va kal rawh, ruah ka sûrtîr dâwn e,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:2 Elija chu Ahaba hmu tûrin a kal ta a, Samaria ramah chuan ṭâm chu a na hle a." 
1Kings18:3 Ahaba chuan lal in enkawltu Obadia a ko va, ani chu Lalpa ṭih mi tak a ni a." 
1Kings18:4 Jezebelin Lalpa zâwlnei a thah chiam lai khân Obadia hian zâwlnei za a hruai a, pâwl hniha siamin sawmnga ve vein pûkah a thukru a, chaw leh tui a pe ṭhîn a." 
1Kings18:5 Ahaba chuan Obadia hnênah, “Hawh teh, luikawr zawng zawng fang ila, tui i va zawng teh ang. Sakawr leh sabengtungte hi kan chhanhim theih nân hlobet awmnate i va zawng teh ang; chutilo zawng, rante hi kan chân vek dah ang e,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:6 Fan tûr ram an insem a, Ahaba leh Obadia chu mual hran ve veah an kal ta a." 
1Kings18:7 Obadia chu a kal zêl a, kawngah chuan Elija a tâwk thut a, Obadia chuan ani chu a hria a, kûnin chibai a bûk a, a hnênah, “Ka pu Elija, nang i ni maw?” a ti a." 
1Kings18:8 Ani chuan, “Ni e, keimah ka ni; kal la, i pu hnênah, Elija hetah a awm tih va hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:9 Obadia chuan, “Eng nge ka tihsuala i chhiahhlawh hi thi tûra Ahaba kuta mi hlan i tum?" 
1Kings18:10 Lalpa, i Pathian nung chhâlin ka sawi e, ka puin ram tin mi tin zîngah a zawng mêk che asin. ‘Hetah a awm lo’ titu chu lalin an hmu lo ngei che a ni tih fiah nân chhia a chhamtîr ziah ṭhîn." 
1Kings18:11 Nang erawh chuan ka pu hnênah kala, ‘Elija chu hetah a awm,’ tih hrilh tûrin mi ti a." 
1Kings18:12 Ka kalsan hnu chein Lalpa Thlarauvin ka hriat lohna lamah a hruai daih ang che a, Ahaba ka va hrilha, a hmuh si loh che chuan min that mai dâwn asin. Kei i chhiahhlawh hi ka tleirâwl chhuah ata Lalpa betu ka ni a." 
1Kings18:13 Ka pu hian Jezebelin Lalpa zâwlneite a thah chiam laia ka thiltih kha i hria a ni lâwm ni? Lalpa zâwlnei za, pâwl hniha siamin sawmnga ve ve pûkah ka thukru a, chaw leh tui ka pêk ṭhin kha." 
1Kings18:14 Tûnah ka pu hnêna kal a, ‘Elija hetah a awm,’ tih thu va hrilh tûra min ti mai hi min lo that ngei dâwn asin,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:15 Elija chuan, “A rawng ka bâwl, Lalpa, Engkim Lalpa, mi nung hmingin vawiinah Ahaba hnênah ka inlan ngei ngei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:16 Obadia chu Ahaba hmu tûr chuan a kal ta a, a va hrilh a; Ahaba chu zâwlnei Elija hmu tûrin a kal ta a." 
1Kings18:17 Ahaban Elija a hmuh chuan a hnênah, “Israel ram chawkbuaitu chu hetah hian a ni maw i lo awm?” a ti a." 
1Kings18:18 Elija chuan, “Israel-te ka tibuai hlei nêm; nangmah leh i pa hi a tibuaitute chu in ni zâwk e. Lalpa thupêk in pawisa lo va, Baal te in be vei a." 
1Kings18:19 Tûnah, Israel mi zawng zawng min hmu tûrin Karmel tlângah ko khâwm rawh; Baal zâwlnei zali leh sawmnga leh Aseri zâwlnei zali, Jezebeli châwmte chu rawn hruai ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:20 Ahaba chuan Israel ram pumah thu a than a, Baal zâwlneite chu Karmel tlângah a ko khâwm a." 
1Kings18:21 Elija chu mipui zîngah a lo ding chhuak a, an hnênah, “Tuilairapin eng chen nge in awm dâwn? Lalpa chu Pathian a nih chuan bia ula. Baal chu Pathian a nih leh bia ang che u,” a ti a, Mipui chu an ngawi reng a." 
1Kings18:22 Elija chuan mipui hnênah, “ Lalpa zâwlnei la dam chhun ka ni a, Baal zâwlneite erawh chu zali leh sawmnga lai an ni." 
1Kings18:23 Bâwngpa pahnih han la ula, pakhat chu Baal zâwlneite pual atân talh sela; chan sawm sela, thing chungah dah sela hâl rih suh se. Bâwngpa dang chu keiin ka buatsaih ve ang a, thing chungah ka dah ang a, ka hâl bîk lo vang." 
1Kings18:24 Nangni Baal zâwlneiten in pathian in ko vang a, keiin Lalpa ka ko vang a, meia rawn hâltu zâwk chu Pathian dik a ni ang,” a ti a. Mipui chuan, “Ni ang hmiang,” an ti a." 
1Kings18:25 Elija chuan Baal zâwlneite hnênah, “Nangni in tam zâwk a, bâwngpa pakhat hi buatsaih hmasa rawh u, in pathian chu ko ula hâl erawh chu hâl suh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:26 An puala bâwngpa ruat chu an la a, an buatsaih a, “Aw Baal, min han chhâng teh,” tiin zîng aṭangin chhûn thlengin an au an au va, an maichâm siam chu an lâm hual an lâm hual a; mahse, a rawn chhâng lo." 
1Kings18:27 Chhûnah chuan Elija chuan nuihzatbûr chungin, “Au ta vak vak che u, pathian a ni lâwm ni? A inngaihtuah mêk emaw, a inthiar emaw, a zin emaw a ni mai thei! A muhîl a ni ang, kaitho rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:28 An au ring tawlh tawlh a, an tih ṭhin dân angin chemte leh feiin thisen chhuak zawih zawih khawpin an invit a." 
1Kings18:29 Ni a lo thlang her a, tlai lam inthawi hun thlengin an au dual dual a, tu mah chhângtu an awm lo va, thâwm eng mah hriat a ni lo." 
1Kings18:30 Elija chuan mipui hnênah, “Lo kal hnai teh u khai,” a ti a. Mite chuan an va hnaih a, Lalpa maichâm chim rem rum chu a siam ṭha a." 
1Kings18:31 Lalpan, “I hming chu Israela an ti ang,” tia a lo sawi Jakoba fa sâwm leh pahnih pualin lung sâwm leh pahnih Elija chuan a la a." 
1Kings18:32 Chûng lung chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a. Maichâm vêl chuan lei a lai khuar a, chu chu tui litar sâwm leh pali dawng lai a ni." 
1Kings18:33 Maichâm chungah chuan thing a chhep a, bâwngpa chu a chan sawm a, thing chungah chuan a dah a. Mite hnênah, “Bêl pali-ah tui chhûng khat ula, hâlral thilhlan leh thing hi leih huh vek rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:34 An leih huh ta vek a, vawi thum an leih nawn a," 
1Kings18:35 maichâm vêla lei laih khuar khat vek khawpin maichâm chu an leih huh hnêp a. 
1Kings18:36 Tlai lam inthawi hunah zâwlnei Elija chuan maichâm chu a rawn pan hnai a, a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te Pathian, Israel Pathian i nih te, i thupêka hêng thil hi ti ka nih te tûnah han târ lang teh." 
1Kings18:37 Aw Lalpa, ka ṭawngṭai ngaithla la, min han chhâng teh! Tichuan, hêng mite hian Lalpa Pathian chu i ni tih an hria ang a, simin i lamah an lo kîr leh dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:38 Lalpa chuan mei a rawn tîr a, hâlral thilhlan te, thing te, lung te chu a kâng ral vek a, lei pawh a kâng sen huam a, khuara tui tling chu a hîp kang vek a." 
1Kings18:39 Mipuiin chu chu an hmuhin leiah an bawkkhup a, “ Lalpa hi Pathian chu a ni, Lalpa hi Pathian chu a lo ni ngei e,” tiin an au chhuak a." 
1Kings18:40 Elija chuan mipui hnênah, “Baal zâwlneite hi tu mah chhuah lovin man vek rawh u,” a ti a. Mite chuan an man a, Elija chuan Kison ruamah a hruai thla a, chutah chuan a that ta vek a." 
1Kings18:41 Elija chuan Ahaba hnênah, “Khai le, eiin in tawh rawh, ruah a lo sûr dâwn tawh e,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:42 Ahaba chu ei leh in tûrin a kal ta a. Elija erawh chu Karmel tlâng chhîp lamah a chho va, a khûp kârah a kûn reng a." 
1Kings18:43 A chhiahhlawh hnênah chuan, “Kal chhuak la, tuifinriat lam han thlîr teh,” a ti a. Ani chu a tho va, a han hawi vêl a, “Eng mah ka hmu lo,” a ti a. Elija chuan chutianga hawi vêl tûrin vawi sarih lai a kaltîr a." 
1Kings18:44 A vawi sarihnaah chuan a chhiahhlawh chuan, “Tuifinriat aṭangin kuttum tiat lek chhûm a lo chho nel nel e,” a ti a. Elija chuan a chhiahhlawh hnênah, “Kal la, Ahaba chu a tawlailîr buatsaiha chhuak vat tûrin hrilh rawh, ruahin a dang dah ang e,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:45 Rei lo teah chhûm dum vânah a lo lang tup tup a, thlite a lo tleh ta hum hum a, ruahpuivânâwn a lo sûr ta a; Ahaba chu a tawlailîrah a zuang lût a, Jezreel lamah a tlân haw ta a." 
1Kings18:46 Lalpa thiltihtheihna chu Elija chungah a lo thleng a, a kawrfual chu a kâwngah a vêt chhîng sauh sauh va, Jezreel panin Ahaba chu a tlân pêl ta a." 
1Kings19:1 Ahaba chuan Jezebeli hnênah Elija thiltih zawng zawng, zâwlneiho khandaiha a thah thute chu a hrilh a." 
1Kings19:2 Jezebeli chuan Elija hnênah, “Zâwlneiho chunga i tih angin naktûk tûn ang huna ka thah loh vaih che chuan pathianten an tih tihin min ti sela, nasa tak pawhin min sawisa rawh se, a ti,” tia hrilh tûrin mi a tîr a." 
1Kings19:3 Elija chuan a hlau va, himna zawngin a tlânchhe ta a. Judai rama Beer-seba a lo thleng a, chutah chuan a chhiahhlawh chu a hnutchhiah a." 
1Kings19:4 Ani chu thlalêrah nilêngin a kal leh a, thingbuk hnuaiah a ṭhu a, thih a dîl ta a, “Ka tlin ta lo, aw Lalpa, ka nun hi la mai teh, ka tân thih a ṭha zâwk e,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:5 Thingbuk hnuaiah chuan a mu a, a lo muhîl ta a. Vântirhkoh hian a rawn khawih harh a, a hnênah, “Tho la, ei rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:6 A han hawi a, a lu bulah chuan chhang ur hmin sa leh tuithâwl a lo awm a. Chhang chu a ei a, tui a in bawk a, a mu leh ta a." 
1Kings19:7 Lalpa tirhkoh chu a lo kal leh a, a rawn khawih harh a, “Tho la, ei rawh, i kalna tûr a la hla hle si a,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:8 A tho va, a eiin a in a, a thil ei chuan a tichak thar leh ta a. Pathian tlâng Horeb a thlen thlengin ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a kal a." 
1Kings19:9 Chuta pûk pakhatah chuan riak tûrin a lût a. Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Elija, hetah hian eng nge i tih?” a rawn ti a." 
1Kings19:10 Ani chuan, “Engkim Lalpa tân ṭhahnem ka ngai êm êm ṭhîn a; mahse, Israel-te chuan i thuthlung an bawhchhia a, i maichâm an tichim a, i zâwlneite khandaihin an that a; kei chauh hi ka la dam a, kei pawh hi min thah an tum a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:11 Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Lo chhuak la, tlângchhîpah lo kal la, Lalpa hmaah lo ding rawh,” a ti a. Lalpa chu a lo kal a, thlipui na tak a rawn tlehtîr a, tlâng chu a chhêm chim a, lungpuite a chhêm keh rem rum a; mahse, thliah chuan Lalpa chu a awm lo. Thli chu a reh a, lîr a nghîng leh dur dur a, lîrnghîngah chuan Lalpa chu a awm lo." 
1Kings19:12 Lîr nghîn zawh chuan mei a lo chhuak a; mahse meiah pawh chuan Lalpa chu a awm lo. Mei a lo chhuah zawhah chuan ri lo aw a lo chhuak a. 
1Kings19:13 Elijan a han hriat chuan a kawrfualin a hmai a hup a, pûk kawngkaah a lo ding chhuak a, aw chuan, “Elija, hetah hian eng nge i tih?” a ti a." 
1Kings19:14 Ani chuan, “Engkim Lalpa tân ṭhahnem ka ngai êm êm a; mahse, Israel-te chuan i thuthlung an bawhchhia a, i maichâmte an tichim a, i zâwlneite khandaihin an that a, kei chauh hi ka la dam a, kei pawh hi min thah an tum a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:15 Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Thlalêr kawngah kîr leh la, Damaska khuaah lût la, Hazaela chu Suria lal atân hriak thih la," 
1Kings19:16 Nimsia fapa Jehua pawh Israel lal atân hriak thih bawk ang che. Tin, Abel Mehola khuaah Safata fapa Elisa chu i aiawha zâwlnei ni tûrin hriak thih bawk ang che." 
1Kings19:17 Hazaela khandaih pumpelh apiang Jehuan a that ang a, Jehua khandaih pumpelh chu Elisan a lo that ang." 
1Kings19:18 Israel ramah hian Baal hmaa la ṭhingṭhi ngai lo leh la fâwp ngai lo mi sângsarih ka tân ka zuah dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:19 Elija chu a chhuak a, Safata fapa Elisa ho chuan bâwngpa tuak sâwm leh pahnih lei letah an lo chhawr a, a tuak sâwm leh pahnihna chu Elisa chuan a khalh a. Elija chuan a va pan a, a puan sin lai chu a bahtîr a." 
1Kings19:20 Elisa chuan a bâwngte chu a tlânsan a, Elija chu a ûm ta a. Elija hnênah chuan, “Ka nu leh pa ka va chibai zet ang e; tichuan, ka rawn zui ang che,” a ti a. Elija chuan, “Va kal rawh, i chunga ka thiltih kha i hria alâwm maw?” a ti a." 
1Kings19:21 Elisa chu a kîr leh ta a, a bâwng chhawr laite chu a va talh a, leilehna hmanruate chu a sa chhum nân a hmang a, sa chu mite a pe a, an ei a. Tichuan, Elija zui tûrin a chhuak a, a rawng a bâwlsak ta a." 
1Kings20:1 Suria lal Ben-hadada chuan a sipai rual a khâwm a, lal sawmthum leh pahnihin an sakawr leh tawlailîrte nên an ṭanpui a. Samaria khua an pan a, an bei ṭan ta a." 
1Kings20:2 Ani chuan khawpui chhûngah mi a tîr a, Israel lal Ahaba hnênah chuan," 
1Kings20:3 “I hausakna zawng zawng leh in nupui fanaute nên khân inpe rawh u,” tiin a vau va." 
1Kings20:4 Israel lal chuan “Aw lalber ka pu, i sawi ang chuan kei leh ka neih zawng zawng hi i ta a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:5 Ben-hadada chuan Ahaba hnênah mi a tîr leh a, “In tangkarua leh rangkachak te, in nupui fanau te nên inpe rawh u ka ti tak na a," 
1Kings20:6 naktûk tûn ang hunah ka mite ka rawn tîr zâwk ang e; lal in leh milianhovin an rawn dap ang a, in ro hlu zawng zawng an rawn lâksak ang che u,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:7 Israel lal chuan ram hruaitu zawng zawng a ko khâwm a, an hnênah, “He mi hian mi tihboral a tum tih in hria e, ka nupui leh fanau te, ka tangkarua leh rangkachak te a rawn ngên a, ka lo remti a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:8 Hruaituho leh mipui chuan, “A thu pawisa suh la, a dîl pawh eng mah pe suh,” an ti a." 
1Kings20:9 Ahaba chuan Ben-hadada hnênah mi a tîr a, “Lalber ka pu chu hetiangin va hrilh rawh u, ‘I chhiahhlawh hian i dîl hmasak zâwk chu ka remti a, a hnuhnûng erawh chu ka remti thei lo,’ a ti,” tiin mi tirhte chuan a sawi ang chuan an va sawi a." 
1Kings20:10 Ben-hadada chuan hetiangin a rawn sawi lêttîr leh a. “Samaria khua tichhe vek tûrin ka mite tam tak ka rawn tîr ang, eng mah an zuah lo vang. Chutianga ka tih loh vaih chuan pathianten an duh tâwkin min sawisa mai rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:11 Israel lal chuan, “Sipai huaisen zawng indo hma ni lovin indo zawhah a nia an uan ṭhin tih va hrilh rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:12 Ben-hadada leh a ṭanrualpui lalte chuan an puan ina zu an in lai chuan chu thu chu an lo hria a, a sipaite chu khawpui bei tûrin thu a pe a, an insiam ta a." 
1Kings20:13 Chutih lai chuan zâwlnei pakhat hi lal Ahaba hnênah a lo kal a, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Hêng sipai rual tam tak hi hlau reng reng suh, vawiinah i kutah ka pe dâwn a ni; tichuan, Lalpa ka ni tih i hria ang,’ a ti,” a rawn ti a." 
1Kings20:14 Ahaba chuan, “Tu-in nge ho vang?” a ti a. Zâwlnei chuan, Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘Ram bung hrang awptu hnuaia sipaiho thlan chhuahten an ho vang,’ a ti,” a ti a. Ahaba chuan, “Tu nge hruai ang?” a ti a. Zâwlnei chuan “Nangin le,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:15 Ahaba chuan ram bung hrang hrang awptute hnuaia sipai thothâng ṭha tak takte chu a ko khâwm a, an vaiin zahnih sawmthum pahnih an ni. Israel sipai zawng zawng a ko khâwm leh a, an vaiin sângsarih an ni a." 
1Kings20:16 Chhûnah an bei ṭan a, Ben-hadada leh a ṭanrualpui lal sawmthum leh pahnih chu an puan inah an lo rui hle a." 
1Kings20:17 Ram bung hrang awptute hnuaia sipai thlante chuan an rawn pan a, Ben-hadada dah râlvêngtu chuan, “Samaria khua aṭangin sipai an lo thawk chhuak e,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:18 “Rem thu sawi tûr an ni emaw, min rawn bei tûr an ni emaw a nung chungin lo man rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:19 Ram bung hrang awptute hnuaia sipai thlante chuan an rawn bei a, anmahni zuitu sipai dangte chuan an rawn pui a." 
1Kings20:20 Mi tinin an bitum chu an that ta ṭheuh va, Suria-ho chu an tlânchhe ta a. Israel-hote chuan an ûm a, Suria lal Ben-hadada chu a sakawr chungchuang mi ṭhenkhat nên an tlân chhuak hrâm a." 
1Kings20:21 Israel lal chuan a va pan a, sakawr leh tawlailîrte chu a bei a, Suria mite chu a that ṭeuh va." 
1Kings20:22 Lal Ahaba hnênah zâwlnei chu a lo kal leh a, a hnênah, “Hâwng la, sipai lâk belh sauh sauh rawh, fîmkhur takin thil ruahman ang che, nakkum ṭhâlah Suria lal hian a rawn bei leh dâwn che a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:23 Suria lal hnênah a ṭhuihruaite chuan, “Israel Pathiante chu tlângram Pathian an ni a; chuvângin, alâwm kan hneh loh, phaizâwlah bei ila kan hneh ngei ngei ang." 
1Kings20:24 Lal sawmthum leh pahnihte chu an thuneihna chhuhsak vek la, an aiawhtu tûr hruaitu dang ruat rawh." 
1Kings20:25 Sipai i hloh zât chiah la thar leh la; chutiang bawkin sakawr leh sakawr-tawlailîrte pawh buatsaih leh ang che. Tichuan, Israel-te chu phaizâwlah kan bei ang a, kan hneh tawh ang,” an ti a. Benhadada chuan an thurâwn ang chuan a ti a." 
1Kings20:26 A kum leh ṭhalah chuan Ben-hadada chuan a sipaite chu a khâwm a, Israel-te bei tûrin Afek khuaah a chho va." 
1Kings20:27 Israel-te pawh chu an pung khâwm a, ei tûrte an chhêk a. An lo thawk chhuak a, Suria-ho epah chuan hmun hnihah ṭanhmun an khuar a. Suria-ho lakah chuan Israel-te chu kêlno tlêm tê bawk khâwm ang lek an ni a. Suria-ho erawh chu a ram khahin an khat mup a." 
1Kings20:28 Zâwlnei pakhat hi Israel lal Ahaba hnênah a lo kal a, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Suria-hovin Lalpa chu tlângram Pathian a ni a, phaizâwl Pathian zawng a ni lo an tih avângin hêng sipai tam tak hi i kutah ka pe ang a, nang leh i mite hian Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang,’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:29 Ni sarih chhûng Suria-ho leh Israel-te chu an ṭanhmunah chuan an inep a, a ni sarih ni chuan an inbei ṭan ta a. Israel sipaite chuan Suria sipai nuai khat lai ni khat chhûngin an that a." 
1Kings20:30 A la dam zawng chu Afek khaw chhûngahte an tlân lût a, kulh bang chimin mi sînghnih leh sângsarih a delh hlum leh a; Ben-hadada chu khawpuiah a tlân lût a, pindan chhûngrilah a biru a." 
1Kings20:31 A hote chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Israel lalte chu an ngilnei hle ṭhîn tih kan hria a, saiip puan vengin kan lu-ah hruizên kan vêt ang a, Israel lal hnênah min va kaltîr la, anin a zuah mial mahna che,” an ti a." 
1Kings20:32 Tichuan, saiip puan an fêng a, an nghâwngah hruiin an hlîng a, Israel lal hnênah chuan an va kal a, a hnênah, “I chhiahhlawh ‘Ben-hadada chuan, khawngaih takin min zuah hrâm rawh se,’ a ti e” an ti a. Ahaba chuan, “A la dam a ni maw? Ka unaupa a ni alâwm,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:33 Mite chuan ngaihṭha takin, “Aw, i unaupa a ni e,” an lo ti ve var a. Lal chuan, “Va kal ula, rawn hruai rawh u,” a ti a. Ben-hadada chu a lo chhuak a, Ahaba chuan a bulah tawlailîra chuang ve tûrin a sâwm a." 
1Kings20:34 Ben-hadada chuan, “Ka pain i pa khua a lo lâksakte chu ka pe kîr leh ang che a, ka pain sumdâwnna hmun Samaria khuaa a siam ang khân Damaska khuaah i siam ve dâwn nia,” a ti a. Ahaba chuan, “Chutianga thu i tiam avâng chuan ka chhuah leh ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:35 Zâwlneiho zînga pakhat hian Lalpa thupêkin a zâwlneipui pakhat hnênah, “Mi han vaw teh khai,” a ti a. Ani chuan a vaw duh lo va." 
1Kings20:36 Zâwlnei chuan, “ Lalpa thu i awih loh avângin mi kalsan veleh sakeibakneiin a lo seh ang che,” a ti a. Chu mi chu a kal chhuak a, sakeibaknei chuan a lo seh hlum a." 
1Kings20:37 Zâwlnei chuan mi dang a va hmu a, a hnênah, “Mi han vaw teh,” a ti leh a. Ani chuan na takin a vua a, a sil ta a." 
1Kings20:38 Zâwlnei chuan a hmêl thup nân a hmai puanin a tuam a, Israel lal lo kal nghâkin kawng sîrah chuan a ding a." 
1Kings20:39 Lal a lo kal chuan zâwlnei chuan a lo au va, a hnênah, “I chhiahhlawh hi indona hmunah ka kal a, mi pakhat hi a sal man nên a lo kal a, ‘He mi hi vêng rawh, a tlân bo chuan a aiah ka that ang che, anih loh leh tangka zathum i chawi ang,’ min ti a." 
1Kings20:40 I chhiahhlawh hian thil dang ka tih buai laiin ani chu a tlân bo ta daih mai si a,” a ti a. Israel lal chuan, “I thiam lo a nih chu, a mawh chu nangman i phur tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:41 Chu veleh zâwlnei chuan a mit tuamna a phelh a, Israel lal chuan zâwlneiho zînga pakhat kha a ni tih a hre ta a." 
1Kings20:42 Lal hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Mi thi tûra ka ruat i chhuah avângin a thih ai i thi ang a, a mite tuar ai i miten an tuar ang,’ a ti,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:43 Israel lal chu thinur ṭeuh leh lunghnûr takin Samaria khuaah a haw ta a. 
1Kings21:1 Jezreel khuaa Samaria lal Ahaba in kiangah chuan Jezreel mi Nabota an tih chuan grep huan a nei a. 
1Kings21:2 Ahaba chuan Nabota hnênah, “Ka in kianga i grep huan hi thlai huan atân min pe rawh. A aiah grep huan ṭha zâwk ka pe ang che, i duh zâwk phei chuan, a man âwm tâwk tangka ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:3 Nabota chuan Ahaba hnênah, “Kan pute hun lai aṭanga kan huan ro a ni a, chutiang han pêk che chu Lalpa ngaihin a âwm lo ve,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:4 Jezreel mi Nabotan, “Kan pute huan ro ka pe thei lo vang che,” a tih avângin lunghnûr tak leh thinur ṭeuhvin Ahaba chu a in lamah a hâwng ta a. Bang lam hawiin a khumah a mu a, chaw a ei duh ta lo va." 
1Kings21:5 A nupui Jezebeli chu a va kal a, a hnênah, “Engtizia nge i ngui bûra, chaw i ei duh loh le?” a ti a." 
1Kings21:6 Ani chuan, “Jezreel mi Nabota chu a grep huan leiah ka dîl a, a duh zâwk phei chuan a aiah grep huan dang ka pe ang che ka ti a. Ani chuan, ‘Ka grep huan zawng ka pe lo vang che,’ tiin min chhâng alâwm maw le,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:7 A nupui Jezebeli chuan a hnênah, “Tho la, hlim takin chaw ei rawh, Jezreel mi Nabota grep huan neihsak dân tûr keiman ka ngaihtuahsak ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:8 Tichuan, Ahaba hmingin lehkha a ziak a, a chhinchhiahna a chhu a, Nabota awmna khuaa awm ve upate, rorêltute chu a thawn a." 
1Kings21:9 Heti hian a ziak a, “Chaw nghei ni puang ula, mipui ko khâwmin Nabota chu mipui hmaah ṭhuttîr ula," 
1Kings21:10 mi sual pahnih amah hêktu tûr a hma zâwnah ṭhuttîr ula, ‘Pathian leh lal i sawichhia a ni,’ tiin hêk sela, khua ata hnûkchhuak ula, dêng hlum ang che u,” tiin." 
1Kings21:11 Tin, Nabota chênna khaw upate leh rorêltute chuan Jezebelin tih dân tûr a hrilh ang chuan an ti ta a." 
1Kings21:12 Chaw nghei ni an puang a, mipui an ko khâwm a, Nabota chu a laiah an ṭhuttîr a." 
1Kings21:13 Mi sual pahnih hian, “Pathian leh lal a sawichhia a ni,” tiin an hêk a. Nabota chu khua ata an hnûk chhuak a, an dêng hlum ta a." 
1Kings21:14 Jezebeli hnênah chuan, “Nabota chu a thi ta,” tiin an hrilh a." 
1Kings21:15 Jezebelin Nabota an dêng hlum ta tih a hriat veleh Ahaba hnênah chuan, “Tho la, Jezreel mi Nabota grep huan, a leitîr phal loh che kha, va neihsak rawh le, ani chu a thi tawh e,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:16 Ahaba chuan Nabota a thi tawh tih a hriat chuan a grep huan neihsak tûr chuan a chhuak ta a. 
1Kings21:17 Lalpa thu chu Tisbe mi Elija hnênah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings21:18 “Tho la, Samaria khuaa awm Israel lal Ahaba hmu tûrin kal tawh. Tûnah Nabota grep huan neihsak tumin chutah chuan a awm e." 
1Kings21:19 A hnênah, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Nabota tihhlum tâwk ti lovin a huan leh zêl neihsak i tum elo?’ va ti rawh, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ui-in Nabota thisen an liahna hmun ngeiah hian i thisen an liak ang,’ ” a ti a." 
1Kings21:20 Ahaba chuan Elija hnênah, “Mi hre chhuak ta a ni maw ka hmêlma pa?” a ti a. Elija chuan, “Aw, ka rawn hre ta che a nih hi, Lalpa mit hmuha thil dik lo ti tûrin inhralh ta hek che." 
1Kings21:21 I chungah chhiatna ka rawn thlentîr dâwn a ni. In chhûngkuaa mipa fa tawh phawt chu naupang leh tar pawh, nangmah nên ka tiboral vek ang che u." 
1Kings21:22 I chhûngkua chu Nebata fapa Jeroboama chhûngkua ang leh Ahija fapa lal Baasa chhûngkua angin ka sawisa ang; min tithinur tûra Israel-te i hruai sual tâk avângin. 
1Kings21:23 Lalpa chuan Jezebeli chungthu pawh heti hian a ti: ‘Jezreel khawpuiah ui-in a sa an la ei ang. Ahaba chhûngkaw zînga mi khawpuia thi apiang ui-in an ei ang a," 
1Kings21:24 ramhnuaia thi apiang chunglêng savaten an tlân ang,’ ” a ti a." 
1Kings21:25 A nupui Jezebeli fuihpawrha Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo ti tûra inpe Ahaba ang hi tu mah an awm rêng rêng lo. 
1Kings21:26 Israel-te hmaa Lalpa hnawh chhuah Amor-ho angin Ahaba hian milemte a bia a, thil tenawm tak tak a ti ṭhîn." 
1Kings21:27 Elijan chutiang thu a hrilh zawh chuan Ahaban a puan a pawtthlêr a, saiip puan a sin a, chaw a nghei a, saiip puan chungah a mu a, ngui takin a awm ta a." 
1Kings21:28 Lalpa thu chu Tisbe mi Elija hnênah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings21:29 “Ahaba ka hmaa a inngaihtlâwmzia hi i hria maw? Hetianga a inngaihtlâwm avângin a dam chhûng chuan a chungah chhiatna ka thlentîr lo vang a, a fapa hun chhûngin a chhûngte chungah chhiatna ka thlentîr ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:1 Kum thum chhûng chu Suria-ho leh Israel-te chu indo lovin an awm a. 
1Kings22:2 A kum thum kum chuan Juda lal Jehosafata chu Israel lal Ahaba hnênah a zu kal a. 
1Kings22:3 Israel lal chuan a upate hnênah, “Gilead rama Ramot khua hi kan ta a ni reng si a, engtizia nge Suria lal hnên ata kan lâk lêt loh?” a ti a." 
1Kings22:4 Jehosafata hnênah chuan, “Ramot khua mi han beihpui peih em?” a ti a. Jehosafata chuan Israel lal hnênah chuan, “Kal i peih hun hunah kei leh ka sipaite chu kan inpeih alâwm, kan pui ang che." 
1Kings22:5 Amaherawhchu, Lalpa, i râwn hmasa zet teh ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:6 Ahaba chuan zâwlnei zali rual lai chu a ko va, “Ramot khua ka han bei ang em?” tiin a râwn a. Anni chuan, “Bei rawh, Lalpa chuan a hnehtîr ang che,” an ti a." 
1Kings22:7 Jehosafata chuan, “Zâwlnei dang, Lalpa min râwnsak tûr an awm lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
1Kings22:8 Israel lal chuan Jehosafata hnênah, “Imla fapa Mikaia chu a awm. Ani hian thil ṭha eng mah min hrilh lâwksak ngai lo va, ka ngei hle asin. Thil ṭha lo eng emaw a hril lâwk zêl ṭhîn a ni,” a ti a. Jehosafata chuan, “Lal meuhvin chuti êma tih tûr em ni le?” a ti a." 
1Kings22:9 Lal chuan hotu pakhat a ko va, Mikaia hruai tûrin a tîr a." 
1Kings22:10 Lal pahnih chu Samaria khawpui kawngkhâr pâwn hruihah, lalṭhutthlêng an chhawpah chuan an ṭhu a, zâwlnei rual chuan an kal hual a, thu an hril bual bual a." 
1Kings22:11 An zînga pakhat, Kenaana fapa Zedekia chuan thîr, seki lem a siam a, Ahaba hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Suria-ho chu hêng hian i bei ang a, i tudawl dêr ang,’ a ti,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:12 Zâwlnei dangte pawh chuan chutiang bawk chuan an ti a, “Kal la, Ramot khua chu han bei rawh, i hneh ngei ang, Lalpa chuan a hnehtîr ang che,” an ti a." 
1Kings22:13 Mikaia hruaitu tûra an tirh chuan a hnênah, “Zâwlnei dang zawng zawngin a ṭha lamin lal hnênah thu an puang a, nang pawhin chutiang chuan ti ve mai ta che,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:14 Mikaia chuan, “ Lalpa, mi nung hming chhâlin ka sawi e, Lalpa chuan sawi tûra min tih chauh ka sawi ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:15 Lal Ahaba hnên a va thlen chuan lal chuan, “Mikai, Gilead rama Ramot khua hi kan han bei ang nge bei lo vang?” a ti a. Mikaia chuan, “Han bei teh rêng u, in hneh mawlh ang, Lalpa chuan hnehtîr che u ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:16 Ahaba chuan, “ Lalpa hminga ka hnêna thu i sawiin thu dik chauh min hrilh rawh vawi eng zât nge ka tih dâwn che,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:17 Mikaia chuan, “Vêngtu nei lo berâm angin Israel mite chu tlânga an darh chum chum ka hmu, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Hêng mite hian hruaitu an nei lo, thlamuang takin mahni in lamah hâwng mai rawh se,’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:18 Ahaba chuan Jehosafata hnênah, “Ngai ta che, ka tâna thil ṭha tûr eng mah a sawi ngai lo tih ka hrilh che kha, thil ṭha lo lam hlîr a ni a sawi ṭhin,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:19 Mikaia chuan a sawi zêl a, “ Lalpa thu hi lo ngaithla teh. Vâna a lalṭhutthlêngah Lalpa ṭhu ka hmu a; Vântirhkohte chuan an din hual a." 
1Kings22:20 ‘Tu nge Ahaba hnênah zu chhuk ang a, Ramot beia thi tûrin zu bum ang?’ Lalpa chuan a ti a. Vântirhkoh ṭhenkhat chuan thu khat an sawi a, a dangin thu dang an sawi bawk a." 
1Kings22:21 Thlarau pakhat hi a lo kal a, Lalpa hmaah chuan a va ding a, ‘Ka zu bum ang e,’ a ti a." 
1Kings22:22 Lalpa chuan, ‘Engtin nge i bum ang?’ a ti a. Thlarau chuan, ‘Ka zu kal ang a, Ahaba zâwlneite chu dâwt ka hrilh ang,’ a ti a. Lalpa chuan, ‘Kal la, zu bum rawh, i hlawhtling ngei ang,’ a ti a.”" 
1Kings22:23 Mikaia chuan, “Chutiang chu a ni, Lalpa chuan hêng zâwlneite hi i hnênah dâwt a sawitîr a ni, Lalpa ngeiin i chhiatna tûr a ruat tawh a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:24 Zâwlnei Zedekia chuan Mikaia chu a pan a, a bêng a, “Engtik lai khân nge Lalpa thlarauvin min kalsana, i hnêna thu a sawi tâk le?” a ti a." 
1Kings22:25 Mikaia chuan a chhâng a, “Pindan chhûngrila i bihrûk hunah i hre mai ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:26 Ahaba chuan hotu pakhat hnênah, “Mikaia kha man la, khaw awptu Amona hnênah hruai la, Lal fapa Joasa pawh hmuhtîr rawh u." 
1Kings22:27 Dam têa ka lo kîr leh hma chu ripah khung sela, chhang leh tui chauh pe rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:28 Mikaia chuan, “Nungdama i lo haw chuan Lalpa hian mi be lo a ni ang. Ka sawi hi mi tinin hre rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:29 Lal Ahaba leh lal Jehosafata chu Gilead biala Ramot khua bei tûr chuan an kal ta a. 
1Kings22:30 Ahaba chuan Jehosafata hnênah, “Kan inbeih hunah, ka inchei danglam ang a, nang chu lal incheiin inchei zêl ang che,” a ti a. Lal Ahaba chu a inchei danglam a, inbeihnaah chuan a tel ve ta a." 
1Kings22:31 Suria lal chuan tawlailîr khalhtu hotu sawmthum leh pahnih chu, “Israel lal chauh lo chu tu mah bei suh ang che u,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:32 Chûngho chuan Jehosafata an hmuh chuan Israel lal emaw an ti a, an rawn bei ta a. Jehosafata chu a au chiam a," 
1Kings22:33 Tawlailîr khalhtu hotu chuan Israel lal a ni lo tih a hre ta a, a rawn ûm duh ta lo va." 
1Kings22:34 Suria sipai thal kâp mai mai hian lal Ahaba chu a râlthuam inkârah a kâp fuh palh a. A tawlailîr khalhtu hnênah chuan, “Hliam ka tuar e, lêt la, inbeihna hmun ata tlân chhuak rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:35 An inbeih mup mup lai chuan Ahaba chu a tawlailîr bang nghêngin Suria mite lam hawiin an tung a. Thisen chu tawlailîr chhuata tling rui khawpin a chhuak a, tlai lamah chuan a thi ta a." 
1Kings22:36 Ni tlâk dâwn ruai chuan Israel sipai zawng zawng hnênah thu a lo thleng a, “Mi tin mahni khaw lamah hâwn vek tûr,” an ti a." 
1Kings22:37 Lal Ahaba chu a thi ta a, a ruang chu Samaria khuaah an hâwnpui a, an phûm ta a." 
1Kings22:38 A tawlailîr chu nawhchizuarte insilna ṭhin Samaria dîlah chuan an sil fai a; uite chuan a thisen chu an liak a, Lalpa sawi ang chu a lo thleng ta a ni." 
1Kings22:39 Lal Ahaba thiltih dangte, a lal in sainghova a chei dân te, khawpui a din ṭan te chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a." 
1Kings22:40 A thih hnu chuan a fapa Ahazia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a. 
1Kings22:41 Israel lal Ahaba lal kum linaah Asa fapa Jehosafata chu Judai ramah a lal ṭan a," 
1Kings22:42 Jehosafata chu a lal tirh chuan kum sawmthum leh panga a ni. Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh panga chhûng ro a rêl a. A nu chu Azubi, Silhia fanu a ni." 
1Kings22:43 A pa angin Pathian mit hmuha thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn. Milem biakna hmunsâng erawh chu a tichhe lo va; chuvângin, mipuite chu hmunsângahte chuan an la inthawi reng a, rimtuite an hâl ṭhîn." 
1Kings22:44 Jehosafata chu Israel lal nên an inrem a. 
1Kings22:45 Jehosafata thil tih dang, indonaa a huaisenzia te chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a." 
1Kings22:46 A pa Asa dam laia mipa leh hmeichhia milem biakna hmuna inzuar ṭhînte chu a tibo vek a. 
1Kings22:47 Edom ram chuan lal an nei lo va, Juda lalin a aiawhtu a dah a." 
1Kings22:48 Ofir rangkachak phur tûrin lal Jehosafata chuan lawng rual a siam a; mahse, Ezion-geber-ah a chhiat tâk avângin an zin ngai ta lo." 
1Kings22:49 Israel lal Ahazia chuan a mite chu Jehosafata mite nên zin ho se a ti a; mahse, Jehosafata chuan a duh lo va." 
1Kings22:50 Jehosafata chu a thi ta a, Davida khawpuia lalho thlânah an phûm a, a fapa Jehorama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings22:51 Juda lal Jehosafata lal kum sâwm leh pasarih kumin Ahaba fapa Ahazia chu Israel-te chunga ro rêl tûrin Samaria khuaah a lo lal a. Kum hnih chhûng ro a rêl a. 
1Kings22:52 Lalpa duh loh zâwng thil sual a ti a; a pa Ahaba te, a nu Jezebeli te, lal Jeroboama te ang bawkin thil sual a ti a, Israel-te hruai sualtu a ni." 
1Kings22:53 A pu ang bawkin Baal pathian rawng a bâwl avângin Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chu a tithinur hle a." 
2Kings1:1 Israel lal Ahaba a thih hnuin Moab-ho chu Israel lakah an hel a. 
2Kings1:2 Lal Ahazia chu Samaria khuaa a in chung zâwl aṭangin a tla a, a na hle a, a dam dâwn leh dâwn loh thu-ah Filistia-a Ekron khaw pathian Baal-zebuba râwn tûrin mi a tîr a." 
2Kings1:3 Lalpa Vântirhkoh chuan Tisbe mi Elija chu, “Tho la, Samaria lal mi tirhte tâwk tûrin kal rawh. Israel ramah Pathian a awm lo vem ni? Engtizia nge Ekron pathian Baal-zebuba râwn tûra in kal le?" 
2Kings1:4 Lalpa chuan, ‘I kaina khum aṭang khân i lo chhuk leh tawh lo vang, i thi ngei dâwn,’ a ti,” ti tûrin a tîr a. Elija chu a kal ta a." 
2Kings1:5 Lal mi tirhte chu a hnênah an lo haw leh vat a; an hnênah, “Engtizia nge in lo kîr leh mai?” a lo ti a." 
2Kings1:6 Anni chuan, “Mi pakhatin min rawn tâwk a, ‘A tîrtu che u lal hnênah chuan kîr leh ula, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Israel ramah Pathian a awm lo vem ni? Ekron pathian Baal-zebuba râwn tûra mi i tirh le? I kaina khum ata kha i lo chhuk leh tawh lo vang, i thi ngei ang, tiin hrilh rawh u,’ min ti,” an ti a." 
2Kings1:7 “Hêng thu sawia rawn tâwktu che u chu eng ang mi nge maw a nih le?” a ti a. 
2Kings1:8 Anni chuan, “Pa hmulphurh chhe tak a ni; savun kâwnghrên a hrêng,” an ti a. Ani chuan, “Tisbe mi Elija a nih chu,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:9 Lal chuan sipai hotu, a sipai sawmnga nên a tîr a. Ani chuan tlâng chhîpa Elija lo ṭhu chu a va hmu a, a hnênah, “Nang Pathian mi, lalin, ‘Lo chhuk rawh,’ a ti a che,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:10 Elija chuan, “Pathian mi ka nih tak zet chuan vân ata mei lo tla sela, nang leh i hote kha rawn kâng hlum che u rawh se,” a ti a. Vân aṭang chuan mei a lo tla a, sipaite chu an hotu nên chuan an kâng hlum ta a." 
2Kings1:11 Lal chuan sipai dang sawmnga leh an hotu a tîr leh a. Ani chu a chho va, Elija hnênah, “Nang Pathian mi, lal chuan lo chhuk thuai tûrin a ti a che,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:12 Elija chuan, “Pathian mi ka nih tak zet chuan vân ata mei lo tla sela, nang leh i hote kha kâng hlum che u rawh se,” a ti a. Pathian mei chu a lo tla ta nghâl a, sipai hotu chu a hote nên chuan an kâng hlum ta a." 
2Kings1:13 Lal chuan sipai sawmnga dang, an hotu nên a tîr leh a. Tlângah chuan a han chho va, Elija hmaah chuan a ṭhingṭhi a, “Aw Pathian mi, kei leh ka hote hi min khawngaih la, kan nunna hi min zuahsak teh." 
2Kings1:14 Sipai hotu pahnih lah an hote nên vân aṭanga lo tla meiah an kâng hlum a, keini hi chu khawngaih takin min zuah teh,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:15 Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan Elija hnênah, “A rualin chhuk rawh, hlau suh,” a rawn ti a. Tichuan, a tho va, a rual chuan a chhuk a, lal hmu tûr chuan a kal ve ta a." 
2Kings1:16 Lal hnênah chuan, “Ekron pathian Baal-zebuba râwn tûrin mi i tîr vei maw? Israel ramah râwn tûr Pathian a awm lo vem ni? I kaina khum ata kha i lo chhuk leh tawh lo vang, i thi ngei ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:17 Elija sawi Lalpa thu ang chuan Ahazia chu a thi ta a. Ahazia chuan fapa a nei lo va, Judai ram lal Jehosafata fapa Jehorama a lal kum hnih kum chuan a nau Jorama chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Kings1:18 Lal Ahazia thiltih dang zawng chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang. 
2Kings2:1 Lalpa chuan Elija chu ṭhâwngaleivira vâna a lâk chhoh hun a lo thleng ta a. Elija leh Elisa chu Gilgal aṭang chuan an kal chhuak a, kawnga an kal lai chuan," 
2Kings2:2 “Hetah hian lo awm teh, Lalpa chuan Bethel-a kal tûrin min tîr e,” Elija chuan a ti a. Elisa erawh chuan, “Pathian nung leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka awmsan tawp lo vang che,” a ti a. Bethel-ah chuan an kal dûn ta a." 
2Kings2:3 Chumi laia zâwlnei rual awmte chu Elisa hnênah an lo kal a, “Vawiin hian i pu hi Lalpa chuan a la dâwn tih i hria em?” an ti a. Ani chuan, “Hria e, ngawi mai teh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:4 Elija chuan Elisa hnênah, “Hetah hian lo awm rawh, Lalpa chuan Jeriko-a kal tûrin min ti e,” a ti a. Elisa erawh chuan, “Pathian nung leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka awmsan tawp lo vang che,” a ti a. Tichuan, Jeriko-ah chuan an kal dûn ta a." 
2Kings2:5 Chuta zâwlnei rual awmte chu Elisa hnênah an lo kal a, “Vawiin hian Lalpa chuan i pu hi a lâksak dâwn che tih i hria em?” an ti a. Ani chuan, “Hria e, ngawi mai teh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:6 Elija chuan Elisa hnênah, “Hetah hian lo awm rawh, Lalpa chuan Jordan luia kal tûrin min ti e,” a ti a. Elisa erawh chuan a chhâng a, “Pathian nung leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka awmsan tawp lo vang che,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:7 An kal dûn ta zêl a, zâwlnei sawmnga chuan an zui a, hla fe aṭangin an thlîr a. Jordan lui kamah chuan an ding a." 
2Kings2:8 Elija chuan a puan a hlîp a, a têl a, lui tui chu a vua a, a inṭhen phak a, leichârah an kal kai ta a." 
2Kings2:9 Lui an kal kai hnu chuan Elija chuan Elisa hnênah, “I hnên ata lâk ka nih hmain eng nge tihsak che ila i duh?” a ti a. Elisa chuan, “I thlarau chan leh hnih dawng ila ka duh e,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:10 Elija chuan, “Thil harsa tak i ngên a ni; amaherawhchu, min lâk lai i hmuh chuan i chang ngei ang, i hmuh loh erawh chuan i chang lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:11 An kal paha an titi dun lai chuan mei-sakawr, mei-tawlailîr hnûk an lo kal thut a, an rawn su ṭhen a. Elija chu ṭhâwngaleivirah vânah a la chho ta a." 
2Kings2:12 Elisa chuan a hmu a, “Ka pa, ka pa, Israel-te chhantu ropui, i kal ta maw?” a ti a. A hmu ta lo va, a puan sin lai chu a phelh a, phel hnihah a pawtthlêr a." 
2Kings2:13 A chunga Elija puan lo tla chu a la a, a kîr leh ta a. Jordan lui kamah chuan a ding a," 
2Kings2:14 a chunga Elija puan lo tla chu a la a, tui chu a vua a, “Khaw nge Elija Pathian Lalpa chu?” a ti a; tui a han vuak chuan tui chu a inṭhen a, Elisa chuan râl lehlam chu a kai ta a." 
2Kings2:15 Jeriko-a zâwlnei awm sawmngate khân an hmuhin, “Elija thlarau dawn kha Elisa chungah a fu ta a nih hi,” an ti a." 
2Kings2:16 Amah tâwk tûrin an kal a, a hmaah leiah an bawkkhup a, “Ngai teh, hei mi chak tak tak sawmnga kan awm a, I pu chu Lalpa thlarau chuan a la a, khawi lai tlângah emaw, ruamah emaw a hnutchhiah ta mai te hi a ni ang e, khawngaih takin kan va zawng ang e,” an ti a. Elisa chuan a chhâng a, “Kal duh suh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:17 A tân zahthlâk khawpa an nawr takah chuan, “Kal ta che u,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:18 Chutichuan, mi sawmnga chuan ni thum an zawng a, an hmu lo va. Jeriko-a Elisa a la awm lai chuan an lo haw a, “Kal duh suh u ka tih rêng kha,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:19 Jeriko khaw mi ṭhenkhat chu Elisa hnênah an lo kal a, “Kan khua hi i hmuh angin khaw nuam tak a ni a; amaherawhchu, tui hi a ṭhat loh avângin nau an chhiat zêl mai,” an ti a." 
2Kings2:20 Ani chuan, “Berhbu tharah chi dah ula, han la teh u,” a ti a. An rawn lâksak a." 
2Kings2:21 Tuikhurahte chuan a kal a, chi chu a phul a, “ Lalpa chuan tui chu a titui ta, tu man an thih phah tawh lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:22 Tûn thlengin Elisa sawi ang chuan tuite chu a tui ta a. 
2Kings2:23 Chuta ṭang chuan Bethel khuaah a chho va; kawnga a chhoh lai chuan khua aṭangin naupang an lo kal a, nuihza siam nân an lo hmang a, “Lu kawlh, lu kawlh, tlân bo rawh,” an ti a." 
2Kings2:24 A han lehhawi a, anni chu a hmu a, Lalpa hmingin ânchhia a lawh a. Ngâw aṭangin savawm pui hnih an lo chhuak a, an zînga naupang sawmli leh pahnih chu an seh hlum ta a." 
2Kings2:25 Chuta ṭang chuan Samaria khuaah a haw leh ta a. 
2Kings3:1 Judai rama Jehosafata kum sâwm leh pariat a lal kum khân, Ahaba fapa Jehorama chu Israel ramah a lal ṭan a. Samaria khuaah kum sâwm leh pahnih a lal a." 
2Kings3:2 Lalpa hmuhah thil sual a ti a, a nu Jezebeli leh a pa ang êm zawngin a sual lo. A pa milem, Baal biakna hmuna a dahte chu a tichhia a;" 
2Kings3:3 mahse, a hmaa lal Nebata fapa Jeroboama thil sual tihte chu a bânsan duh lo, Israel-te chu a hruai sual a, a sim duh lo." 
2Kings3:4 Moab lal Mesa chuan berâm a vulh a, kum tin Israel lal hnênah chhiah angin berâmno nuaikhat leh berâmchal nuaikhat hmul a pe ṭhîn a." 
2Kings3:5 Israel lal Ahaba a thih khân Moab lal chu Israel lakah a hel a. 
2Kings3:6 Lal Jehorama chu Samaria khua aṭang chuan a chhuak vat a, a sipaite chu a khâwm a." 
2Kings3:7 Juda lal Jehosafata hnênah, “Kan lakah Moab lal a hel ta a, min beihpui thei ang em?” tiin thu a thawn a. Lal Jehosafata chuan, “Ka rawn pui ang che; ka mite leh i mite chu pumkhat kan ni alâwm." 
2Kings3:8 Khawi lam kawng aṭangin nge ka rawn beih ang?” a ti a. Jehorama chuan, “A hla lam Edom thlalêr aṭangin ka rawn bei ang e,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:9 Lal Jehorama te, Juda lal leh Edom lalte chu an thawk chhuak a, ni sarih an kal hnuin tui an tlachham ta a. Mihring in tûr pawh, an puakphur ran in tûr pawh a awm hiau tawh lo." 
2Kings3:10 Jehorama chuan, “ Lalpa, kan Pathian hian Moab lal duh duha tih tûrin min hruai khâwm a lo nih hi, a va pawi êm!” a ti a." 
2Kings3:11 Lal Jehosafata chuan, “ Lalpa min râwnsak thei tûr zâwlnei an awm em?” a ti a. Jehorama sipai hotu pakhat chuan, “Safata fapa Elisa he laiah hian a awm, zâwlnei Elija hnungzui ṭhîntu kha,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:12 Lal Jehosafata chuan, “Zâwlnei dik tak a nih chu,” a ti a. Lal pathum chu zâwlnei Elisa hnênah chuan an kal ta a." 
2Kings3:13 Elisa chuan Israel lal hnênah, “Engah nge ka ṭanpui ang che, i nu leh pate biakrâwn zâwlneite kha va râwn la a ni mai alâwm,” a lo ti a. Jehorama chuan, “Amah, Lalpa hi alâwm he lai lal pathum hi Moab lal kuta min dahtu chu,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:14 Elisa chuan, “A rawng ka bâwl, mi nung Lalpa chhâlin, Judai ram lal Jehosafata hi pawisa lo ila chu, kawng eng mahin ka pui lo vang che, ka lo ti asin le,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:15 Elisa chuan, “Ṭingṭang tum thiam han tîr teh u,” a ti a. Ṭingṭang tum thiamin ṭingṭang a han tum chuan, Lalpa kut chuan Elisa chu a rawn khawih a." 
2Kings3:16 “ ‘Hemi ruamah hian khur lai chuk rawh u,’ Lalpa chuan a ti e;" 
2Kings3:17 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Thli tleh lovin chhûm hmu lo mah ula, ruam chu tuiin a khat dâwn; chu chu in rante leh in sate nên in in dâwn nia,’ a ti e." 
2Kings3:18 Chutiang lek chu Lalpa tân tih harsa tham a ni lo, in kutah Moab-ho pawh a pe dâwn." 
2Kings3:19 Kulh nei khua leh khaw nuam deuh deuh tawh phawt chu in tichhia ang a, thing ṭha deuh deuhte chu in kit ang a, tuikhur zawng zawng in hnawh ang a, lo ṭha laiah lung in dah thluah dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:20 A tûk zîng hâlral thilhlan an hlan ṭhin hun lai chuan Edom ram lam aṭangin tui a lo luang a, ruamah chuan tui a khat ta a." 
2Kings3:21 Moab-ho chuan anmahni bei tûr lal pathumte chu an lo kal tih an hriat chuan mipa râlkai chin tawh phawt chu, naupang ber pawh, upa ber pawh an pung khâwm a, an ramri an lo vêng a." 
2Kings3:22 A tûk zîng khua a lo vâra, ni a lo chhuah chuan tui chu a rawn chhun sen phût a, thisen ang maia senin a lang a." 
2Kings3:23 “Thisen a nih khu, sipai pâwl thumho an inbei ang a, an inthat a ni ngei ang. Ti rawh u, an bûk i zu suam ang,” an ti a." 
2Kings3:24 Hmêlma bûk an zu thlenin Israel-te chuan an lo bei a, an ûm kîr a, Israel-ho chuan an ûm zêl a, Moab-ho chu an that ṭeuh va." 
2Kings3:25 An khuate chu an tihchhiatsak a, an lo ṭha laiah te chuan Israel-ho veivâk chuan lung an paih zêl a, an lote chu lunghmun a ni ta ngawt a. Tuikhurte chu an hnawh a, thei kûngte an kit a, a tâwpah chuan khawpui ber ‘Kir-hareset’ chauh a la chhe lo va, chu pawh chu virvawma beituten an hual a." 
2Kings3:26 Moab lal chuan hmêlmate chu a hneh dâwn lo tih a hriat chuan khandaih keng sipai zasarih nên hmêlma rual chu sut tlanga, Suria lalrama tlân a tum a; mahse, a thei lo." 
2Kings3:27 Tichuan, a fapa upa ber, a aiawhtu tûr chu a man a, Moab-ho pathian hnênah kulh bang bulah chuan a talh a, a hlân a. Israel miten an hmuh chuan an hlau hle a, khua chu an kalsan a, an ram lamah an haw ta a." 
2Kings4:1 Zâwlnei pâwl khat zînga mi pakhat nupui chu zâwlnei Elisa hnênah a lo kal a; “Ka pu, i chhiahhlawh, ka pasal chu a thi a, i hriat angin Pathian ṭih mi tak a ni a. A leibatna pain a fapa pahnih bawih atân ka pasal leiba aia lâk tumin a lo thawk e,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:2 Elisa chuan, “Eng nge ka tihsak ang che le! Inah neih i nei em?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Eng mah ka nei lo, Oliv hriak bûr tê tak tê pakhat chauh a ni ka neih,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:3 Elisa chuan, “Haw ta la, i ṭhenawmte bûr va hawh tawh, i hawh theih zât hawh ang che." 
2Kings4:4 I fate nên inkhârkhum ula, bûrah chuan hriak chu ruak zêl ula, a khah veleh dah sawn zêl ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:5 A haw ta a, a fate nên kawng an inkhârkhum a, bûr chu a fate chuan an rawn la a, ani chuan a lo thun khat zêl a." 
2Kings4:6 An bûr hawh a thun khah hnu chuan, “Bûr dang han la zêl rawh u,” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Bûr a awm tawh lo,” an ti a. Hriak pawh chu a kang ta a." 
2Kings4:7 Pathian mi chu a va hrilh a, ani chuan, “Kal la, hriak chu va hralh rawh, in leiba chu rûl ula, a bâng chu i fate nên ei ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:8 Ni khat chu Sunam khuaah Elisa chu a kal a; chu khuaah chuan nu hausa tak pakhat hi a awm a. Elisa chu chaw eiah a sâwm a. Chumi hnu chuan Sunam khuaa a kal apiangin a hnênah chaw a lam ṭhîn a. 
2Kings4:9 A pasal hnênah, “Heta min rawn pal fotu hi Pathian mi thianghlim tak a ni phawt ang." 
2Kings4:10 Ti teh, in chungah a riahna tûr pindan siamsak ila, khum te, dawhkân te, ṭhutthlêng te dah ila, mi a rawn tlawh apiangin a awm ṭhîn dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:11 Ni khat chu Elisa a lo kal leh a, pindanah chuan a mu hahdam a." 
2Kings4:12 Sunam hmeichhia chu ko tûrin a hnungzui Gehazia chu a tîr a, hmeichhia chu a lo thleng a," 
2Kings4:13 Elisa chuan Gehazia hnênah, “He nu hian min duat hle mai a, eng nge kan tihsak ve ang le? Lal emaw, sipai hotu emaw biaksak a duh em zâwt teh,” a ti a. Chu nu chuan, “Mahni chipuite zînga awm ka ni alâwm, mamawh ka nei lo ve,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:14 Elisa chuan Gehazia hnênah, “Eng nge ka tihsak tak ang?” a ti a. Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Fapa a nei lo asin, a pasal lah a tar hle tawh si a,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:15 Elisa chuan, “Hetah hian lo kal teh se,” a ti a. A lo kal a. Kawngkaah chuan a ding a." 
2Kings4:16 Elisa chuan a hnênah, “Nakkum hetih hunah hi chuan fapa i pawm tawh ang,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Khai, Pathian mi i ni a, dâwt min hrilh teh suh,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:17 Elisa sawi ang chuan nau a pai a, a kum leh chutih hun lai vêl chuan fapa a hring ta a." 
2Kings4:18 Naupang chu a lo ṭhang lian a, tûk khat chu a pa hnênah buhsengtute nên buh an sengnaah a kal a." 
2Kings4:19 A pa hnênah chuan, “Ka lu, ka lu,” a ti ta chûl a. A chhiahhlawh hnênah chuan, “A nu hnênah paw haw rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:20 Chhiahhlawh chuan a nu hnênah a paw haw ta a. Chhûn lai thlengin a nu chuan a chawi a, a thi ta a." 
2Kings4:21 Elisa pindanah a luhpui a, a khumah chuan a mut a; a chhuak a, kawng chu a khâr hnan a." 
2Kings4:22 A pasal chu a ko va, “Chhiahhlawh pakhat leh sabengtung pakhat han tîr teh, Pathian mi hnênah ka va kal ang a, ka lo kîr leh mai ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:23 Ani chuan, “Thla thar kût emaw, sabat ni emaw a ni si lo va, eng atân nge vawiin ber khera a hnêna kal i duh le?” a ti a. “Kal a ṭûl a ni e,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:24 Sabengtung chu an buatsaih fel hnu chuan chhiahhlawh hnênah, “A chak thei ang berin sabengtung hi khalh ang che; ka hrilh loh che chuan muang hauh suh ang che,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:25 Elisa awmna Karmel tlâng lam pan chuan an chhuak ta a. Hla fea a la awm lai chuan Elisa chuan a lo hmu a, a hnungzui Gehazia hnênah, “En teh, Sunam-nu kha a lo kal e." 
2Kings4:26 A pasal te, a fate an za-in an dam emaw lo zâwt tûrin va hmuak vat rawh,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Kan dam e,” tiin a lo chhâng a." 
2Kings4:27 Tlânga Pathian mi hnên a lo thlen chuan a ke chu a vuan ta tlat a, Gehazia chuan rawn nam kian a tum a; mahse, Pathian mi chuan, “Eng mah tih suh, a rilru a na hle a nih hi, Lalpa lah chuan ka lakah a la thup a, min la hrilh si lo,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:28 Hmeichhia chuan, “Ka pu, fapa ka dîl che em ni kha? ‘Min tihder suh’ ka ti che a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Kings4:29 Gehazia hnênah chuan, “In siam la, ka tiang hi kengin kal rawh. Mi i tawh rêng rêng chibai bûk suh la, chibai an bûk che pawhin chhâng hek suh. Ka tiang hi naupang hmaiah va kham rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:30 Naupang nu chuan, “ Lalpa, mi nung leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e; i tel lo chuan ka haw hauh lo vang,” a ti a. Tichuan, a tho va, hmeichhia chu a zui ta a." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazia chu an hmaah a kal a, naupang hmaiah tiang chu a han kham a; mahse, thâwm rêng a nei lo va, a ngawi reng mai a. Elisa tâwk tûrin a lo kîr leh a, “Naupang chu a tho hauh lo mai,” a rawn ti a." 
2Kings4:32 Elisa chu inah a lo thleng a, naupang chu a thi a, a khumah khân an lo mut a." 
2Kings4:33 A lût a, an pahnih chauh chuan a inkhârkhum a." 
2Kings4:34 Khumah chuan a lâwn a, naupang chu a bawh a, a hmui leh a hmui, a mit leh a mit, a kut leh a kut a chuktuah a; chutia a bawh lai chuan naupang pang chu a lo lum leh ṭan ta a." 
2Kings4:35 Khum ata a lo chhuk a, chhuatah vawi hnih khat a vei hnuin a lâwn leh a, naupang chungah chuan a bawk leh a, naupang chu vawi sarih a hahchhiau dawt dawt a, a lo nung ta a." 
2Kings4:36 Gehazia chu a ko va, “Sunam-nu kha han ko teh,” a ti a. A han ko va, a lo kal chuan, “I fapa hi, kha, pawm rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:37 Pindan chhûngah chuan a lût a, a ke bulah chuan a bawkkhup a, a fapa chu a pawm chhuak ta a." 
2Kings4:38 Ṭum khat, ram puma ṭâm a tlâk laiin Elisa chu Gilgal-ah a haw a; zâwlnei rual a zirtîr a; a chhiahhlawh hnênah chuan, “Bêl lian kha la la, zâwlnei zirho hi sawhchiar siamsak teh,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:39 An zînga pakhat chu thil thlâk tûr zawngin ramah a kal a, ram hruizâm a hmu a, a rah chu a theih tâwk a rawn pawm hâwng a; an chan a, eng tih an hre si lo va, sawhchiarah chuan an thlâk ta a." 
2Kings4:40 Ei tûr an suak chhuak a, an han ei dâwn chuan, “E heu, Pathian mi, bêlah hian tûr a awm a ni,” an ti a, an ei thei ta lo va." 
2Kings4:41 Ani chuan, “Chhangphut han la teh u,” a ti a. Bêlah chuan a phul a, mite hnênah chuan, “Suak ula, a ei theih tawh e,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:42 Baal-salisa aṭangin mi pakhat a lo kal a, Pathian mi chu barli thar chhang tlang sawmhnih leh buh vui a rawn kensak a. “Hêng mite hi eitîr rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:43 A chhiahhlawh chuan, “Eng â ni? Hei hi patling za zet ka hlui ang maw?” a ti a. Ani erawh chuan, “Hlui rawh, ei rawh se, Lalpa chuan ‘Ei sela, an ei sêng lo vang,’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:44 Tichuan, a han hlui a, an ei a, Lalpa thu ang chuan an ei sêng ta lo va." 
2Kings5:1 Suria sipai hotu ber Naamana chu Lalpa chuan Suria hmêlma hnehsaktua a hman ṭhin avângin lal chuan a ngaisâng a, a duhsak hle bawk a. Mi chak, mi huaisen ni mah se phâr a ni." 
2Kings5:2 Suria sipaite chu a pâwl pâwlin an rammu ṭhîn a, Israel ram aṭangin hmeichhe naupang tê hi an man a. Naamana nupuiin chhiahhlawhah a chhawr a." 
2Kings5:3 A pi hnênah chuan, “Ka pu hi Samaria khuaa zâwlnei hnênah va kal se ka va ti êm, a phâr hi a dam ngei ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:4 Naamanan chu chu a hriat chuan a pu lal hnênah a kal a, “Israel rama hmeichhe naupang chuan chutiang chuan zu sawi a le,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:5 Suria lal chuan, “Va kal ta che, Israel lal hnêna pêk tûr lehkha ka kentîr ang che,” a ti a. A kal ta a, tangka tlang sîngthum, rangkachak tlang sângruk leh puan zai sîn sin sâwm a keng a." 
2Kings5:6 Israel lal hnênah lehkha chu a pe a, hetianga ziak a ni: “He lehkha kengtu, ka chhiahhlawh Naamana hi a phâr a, i tihdam tûrin ka rawn tîr a ni,” tiin." 
2Kings5:7 Israel lalin lehkha a han chhiar chuan a puan a pawtthlêr a, “Mi thata tidam thei Pathian em ka niha, he mi hian phâr tidam tûra mi rawn tih hi? Min beihna remchâng chhuanlam a zawng a ni phawt mai,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:8 Lal mangangin a puan a pawtthlêr hial tih Pathian mi Elisa chuan a lo hriatin lal hnênah chuan mi a tîr a, “Engati nge i puan i pawhthlêr le? Ka hnênah lo kal sela, Israel ramah zâwlnei a awm tih a hre mai ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:9 Naamana chu a sakawr leh a sakawr-tawlailîr nên chuan Elisa hnênah a lo kal a. 
2Kings5:10 Elisa chuan mi a tîr a, “Kal la, Jordan luiah vawi sarih va inbual ang che, i vun chuan a ngai a awh leh ang a, i thianghlim tawh ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:11 Naamana erawh chu thinur deuhvin a kal tau ta a, “A lo chhuak ang a, ka hmaa dingin a Pathian, Lalpa hming a lam ang a, a na lai chungah a kut han dahin a tidam dâwn emaw tih nâk alai a;" 
2Kings5:12 Damaska bula Abana leh Pharpar lui tui kha Israel lui tui ai chuan a thianghlim zâwk a ni lâwm ni? Chûngah chuan inbualin ka thianghlim thei tho dâwn lâwm ni?” a ti a. A lehhawi a, thinrim deuhvin a haw dâwn ta a." 
2Kings5:13 A chhiahhlawh te chu a hnênah an lo kal a, “Ka pu, zâwlnei khân thil khirh tak tih tûr tuk che sela i ti dâwn lâwm ni? ‘Va inbual la, i thianghlim ang,’ a tih chuan tih mai tûr a ni lâwm ni?” an rawn ti a." 
2Kings5:14 Zâwlnei sawi ang chuan Naamana chu Jordan luiah a chhuk a, vawi sarih a inhnim a, a vun chu naupang vun ang a lo ni leh a, a thianghlim ta a." 
2Kings5:15 A hote zawng zawng nên Pathian mi hnênah a lo kîr a, a hmaah chuan a ding a, “Israel ramah lo chuan ram dangah Pathian a awm lo tih ka hre ta, en teh, i chhiahhlawhin thil a pêk che hi khawngaih takin la teh,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:16 Ani chuan, “A hmaa ka awmna ṭhin mi nung, Lalpa chhâlin ka sawi e, ka la tawp lo vang,” a ti a. La hrâm tûrin a ngên a, mahse, a duh lo tlat a." 
2Kings5:17 Naamana chuan, “I lâk duh si loh chuan i chhiahhlawh hi sabengtung phur hnih lei min pe rawh; i chhiahhlawh hian Lalpa hnênah lo chuan eng pathian dang hnênah mah hâlral thilhlan ka hlân dâwn tawh lo." 
2Kings5:18 Amaherawhchu, Suria pathian Rimona be tûra ka pu a kalin a hnung ka zui a ṭûl ṭhîn a; chutianga Rimona tempula ka kala, ka ṭhingṭhit ve pawhin Lalpa chuan min ngaidam a ni ang chu,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:19 Ani chuan, “Thlamuang takin kal rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, a kal ta a." 
2Kings5:20 Thui a kal hmain Pathian mi Elisa hnungzui Gehazia chuan, ‘Ka pu hian Naamana chu eng mah sêng lovin a kaltîr tâk mai hi: kha Suria pain pêk a tum kha la se a ṭha tûr. Khawi nge, Lalpa mi nung chhâlin ka sawi e, ka ûm ang a, eng emaw tal chu ka lâksak teh ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:21 Tichuan, Naamana chu Gehazia chuan a ûmzui ta a. Naamanan mi pakhat rawn ûmtu a hmuh chuan lo hmuak tûrin a tawlailîr aṭang chuan a lo chhuk a, a hnênah, “A ṭha lam em ni?” a lo ti a." 
2Kings5:22 Ani chuan, “Ṭha lam ni e, ka pu chuan, ‘Efraim tlângram aṭangin zâwlnei pahnih an lo kal a, tangka tlang sângthum leh puan sin hnih i pe thei lâwm ni?’ a ti a che,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:23 Naamana chuan, “Tangka sângruk tal hi la teh,” a ti a. La tûrin a nawr chiam a, tangka chu ip hnihah a khung a, puan sin hnih nên a chhiahhlawhte a phurhtîr a, an kal ta a." 
2Kings5:24 Tlângchhîp a lo thlen chuan an kut ata chu a la a, in chhûngah a dah ṭha a, mite chu a tîr haw leh ta a." 
2Kings5:25 Ani chu inah a lût a, a pu hmaah chuan a va ding a, Elisa chuan, “Gehazi, khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Khawiah mah ka kal hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:26 Ani chuan, “Mi, nangmah hmuak tûra a tawlailîr ata a lo chhuk lai khân ka thlarau chu i hnênah a awm lo vem ni? Tangka leh puan kha i la a ni lâwm ni? Grep huan te, berâm leh bâwng te, chhiahhlawh mipa leh hmeichhiate pawh lei ta mai che." 
2Kings5:27 Naamana phâr hi nang leh i thlahten in kai hlen ang,” a ti a. A pu hma ata chu a chhuak a, vûr angin a vun a phâr vâr ta a." 
2Kings6:1 Zâwlnei zirho chuan Elisa hnênah, “I hova kan khawsakna in hi a chêp hle si a," 
2Kings6:2 Jordan lui kamah zuk kal ila, thing kan la ang a, kan awmhona tûr in kan zu sa ang e,” an ti a. “Kal ta che u,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:3 An zînga pakhat chuan, “Khawngaih takin lo kal ve ta che,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Kal ve e maw le,” a ti a;" 
2Kings6:4 an rual chuan a kal ve ta a. Jordan lui an zu thlen chuan thing chu an kit ta a. 
2Kings6:5 Mi pakhatin thing a kih lai chuan a hrei chu a thlawn a, tuiah a tla ta a; “Ka pu, a va pawi em! Mi ta kan hawh a ni si a,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:6 Pathian mi chuan, “Khawiah tak nge a tlâk?” a ti a, a tlâkna lai chu a kawhhmuh a." 
2Kings6:7 Thingṭang a tan a, a khawh lût a, hreifang chu a tilâng ta a, “La rawh le,” a ti a, a han ban a, a la ta a." 
2Kings6:8 Suria lal chuan Israel lal a rûn dâwn a, khawi khawia chân rûk nge ṭha ang tih a hote nên an sawi tlâng a." 
2Kings6:9 Pathian mi Elisa chuan Israel lal hnênah, “Hêngah te hian kal suh, Suria lal hovin an châng ru dâwn che a ni,” tiin a hrilh zêl a." 
2Kings6:10 Israel lal chuan Pathian miin a sawi hmuna awmte chu a hrilh a, an inrâlring hman zêl a ni; chutiang chuan vawi tam tak an ti a." 
2Kings6:11 Suria lal chu a mangang ta a, a hote chu a ko va, “Israel lal lamṭang ru kan zîngah tu hi nge min hrilh teh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:12 A hotu zînga pakhat chuan, “Kan zîngah chutiang pakhat mah kan awm lo, aw lalber, Israel zînga zâwlnei Elisan i pindan chhûngrila i thu sawi chen khân Israel lal a hrilh ṭhîn alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:13 Ani chuan, “Khaw nge a awm va zawng teh u, mi ka tîr ang a, va man teh se,” a ti a. “Dothan khuaah a awm,” an ti a." 
2Kings6:14 Tichuan, sakawr te, tawlailîr te, sipai tam tak nên a tîr ṭeuh va, khua chu zânah an va hual a." 
2Kings6:15 Pathian mi chhiahhlawh tlangvâl chu zîngah a tho va, a va chhuah chuan sipai tam takin sakawr leh tawlailîrte nên khua an hual chu a va hmu a, a pu hnênah chuan, “Ka pu, a va pawi em! Engtin nge kan tih tâk ang?” a ti a." 
2Kings6:16 “Thlaphâng suh, kan lamṭang chu an lamṭang aiin an tam zâwk asin,” a lo ti a." 
2Kings6:17 Elisa chu a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, a mit hi han tihmensak teh,” a ti a. Lalpa chuan tlangvâl mit chu a tihmensak a, a hmu ve ta a, Elisa awmna chhak tlâng khatin mei-sakawr leh mei-tawlailîr a lo awm khup mai a." 
2Kings6:18 Elisa hualtute a hnêna an lo chhuk chuan Elisa chu Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, “An mit tihdelsak teh,” a ti a. Elisa thu ang chuan an mit chu a tihdelsak ta a." 
2Kings6:19 Elisa chuan an hnênah, “Hei hi kawng a ni lo ve, in mi zawn awmna khua lah a ni hek lo, a awmnaah ka hruai ang che u,” a ti a. Samaria khuaah a hruai lût ta a." 
2Kings6:20 Samaria khua an va thleng a, Elisa chuan, “Aw Lalpa, hêng mite mit hi tihmensak teh, hmu teh se,” a ti a. Lalpa chuan an mit a tihmensak a, an hmu thei ta a. An han hawivêl chuan Samaria khaw chhûngah an lo awm reng a." 
2Kings6:21 Israel lal chuan Elisa hnênah, “Kan that mai dâwn lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Kings6:22 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “That lo ve, khandaih leh thala inbeiha in mi mante mah in that hlei nêm. Ei tûr chaw leh tui pe la, eiin in sela, an pu hnênah haw rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:23 Chaw tam tak a chhumsak a, an eia an in kham hnu chuan a chhuah a, an pu hnênah an kal ta a. Suria lal sipaite chuan Israel ram chu an rawn rûn leh tawh lo." 
2Kings6:24 Chumi hnu fê chuan Suria lal Ben-hadada chuan sipai a khâwm a, Samaria khuaah a chho va, a hual ta a." 
2Kings6:25 An hual rei avângin Samaria khua chu an ṭâm ta hle a, sabengtung lu hi tangka tlang sawmriatin an hralh a, ṭhuro êk gram zahnih tangka tlang nga man a ni bawk." 
2Kings6:26 Israel lal chu kulh bang fangin a kal a, nu pakhat hian, “Min pui teh, aw lalber, ka Lalpa,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:27 “ Lalpa chuan a puih ngawt loh che chuan hruiha buh emaw, khura hriak emaw eng mah ka nei tawh bîk hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:28 Lal chuan, “Eng i ti nge?” a ti leh a. Ani chuan, “He hmeichhia hian, ‘I fa kha han thawh la, vawiinah kan ei ang a, naktûkah ka fa kan ei dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:29 Ka fa chu kan chhûm a, kan ei ta a. A tûkah chuan, ‘I fa chu han la la, kan ei dâwn nia,’ ka ti a; mahse, a fa chu a thukru ta daih si,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:30 Lalin chu thu chu a han hriatin a puan a pawtthlêr a; kulh bang a fang a ni a, mipuiin an han en chuan a puan hnuaiah saiip puan a lo sin reng mai a." 
2Kings6:31 “Vawiin ni a tlâk hmain Safata fapa Elisa lu hi ka lâka ka lâk loh hrim chuan Lalpa chuan a duh duhin, na tak pawhin min sawisa rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:32 Elisa chu a inah a ṭhu a, upaho pawh an ṭhu ve a. Lal chuan mi a tîr a, chu mi lo thlen hma chuan Elisa chuan upaho hnênah, “Ngai teh u, he tual thah chîngpa hian ka lu lâk tumin mi a rawn tîr a nih hi. A mi tirh chu kawngkhâr hnan ula, lo dang tlat ang che u. Chu! A rawn zuitu thâwm chu a pu, lal kal thâwm a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Kings6:33 A la ṭawng lai chuan lal chu a lo thleng ve ta nghâl mai a: “Heti khawpa mi timangangtu chu Lalpa hi a ni a, engah nge Lalpa thu ka la ngaih cheu vang?” a ti a." 
2Kings7:1 Elisa chuan, “ Lalpa thu hi ngaithla teh; naktûk hetih hunah hian Samaria khuaah chhangphut ṭha chi kg. thum pawh, barli chhangphut kg. ruk pawh tangka tlang khatin in lei thei ang,’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
2Kings7:2 Lal vêngtu bîk sipai hotu chuan, Pathian mi chu a chhâng a, “ Lalpa chuan vân tukverh pawh hawngin ruah sûrtîr mah se, chutiang êm chu a thleng ngût lo vang e!” a ti a. Elisa chuan, “A hmuh zawng i hmu ang a, a ei zawng i ei ve dâwn lo a nih chu,” a ti a." 
2Kings7:3 Samaria khaw kulh pâwnah chuan phâr pali hi an awm a; “Eng atân nge maw thih nghâk ngawta kan ṭhut reng le? 
2Kings7:4 Khaw chhûngah lût ila, rilṭâmin kan thi ve mai âwm si a, hetah pawh awm reng ila kan thi mai bawk dâwn si a. Ti teh u, Suria-ho bûkah i tlulût mai teh ang; a thah leh min lo that mai ang chu; min lo zuah mial mai thei asin,” an ti a." 
2Kings7:5 Thimhlimah chuan Suria-ho bûka kal tûrin an thawk chhuak ta a. Suria-ho bûk fêm an va thlen chuan tu mah an lo awm lo va. 
2Kings7:6 Lalpa chuan Suria-ho chu sakawr-tawlailîr tlân leh sakawr tlân ri dur dur thâwm te, sipai tam tak kal ṭhup ṭhup thâwmte a hriattîr a, “Israel lal hian Hit lal te, Aigupta lal te, min bei tûrin a pun a ni phawt mai,” an ti a ni." 
2Kings7:7 Chuvângin, khaw thim dâwnah chuan baklêngin an tlânchhia a, an bûk te, an sakawr te, an sabengtung te, an bûka an thil chhêk te chu an hnutchhiah a, an tlânsan pheng phung a." 
2Kings7:8 Phârhovin bûk an thlen chuan bûk pakhatah an han lût a, an eiin an in a; tangka te, rangkachak te leh silhfên te chu an la a, an va thukru a, bûk dangah an lût leh a, chuta mi pawh chu an chheprelh leh a." 
2Kings7:9 An inbia a, “Kan tih dân hi a ṭha hauh lo mai. Vawiin hi ni lâwmawm a ni, kan ngawih mai maia, khawvâr kan nghah chuan hrem kan tuar ngei ang; chuvângin, chanchin ṭha hi lal chhûngte i va hrilh ang u,” an ti a." 
2Kings7:10 Khaw kulh kawngkhârah chuan an kal a, kawngkhâr vêngtu hnênah chuan, “Suria-ho bûkah kan va kal a, tu mah an lo awm lo, han biak tûr pawh pakhat mah an awm lo. An sakawr te, an sabengtung te chu an la thlung vek a ni, an bûk te pawh a ngai ngaiin a la ding vek,” an ti a." 
2Kings7:11 Kawngkhâr vêngtute chu lal in chhûngah an kal a, an va hrilh a." 
2Kings7:12 Zânah lal chu a tho va, a hote hnênah chuan, “Suria-hovin min tihder an tum dân hi ka hrilh ang che u. Khua kan ṭâmzia an hria a, bûk chhuahsanin ram hnuaiah an biru a ni ngei ang, ‘khua ata an lo chhuak ang a, a nung chungin kan man ang a, khua chu kan la mai ang,’ an ti a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings7:13 A hote zînga mi pakhat chuan, “He khuaa mite hi kan chan a chau ta sa reng reng mai a, tam tak kan thi tawh a. Ti rawh u, sakawr panga la dam kan nei a, a chunga chuang tûr i ruat ang u, he thil hi finfiah teh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings7:14 Mi an thlang chhuak a, lal chuan sakawr-tawlailîr pahnih a pe a, Suria sipaite chanchin en fiah tûrin a tîr ta a." 
2Kings7:15 Chûng mite chu Jordan lui thlengin an kal a, Suria sipai tlânchhiain an kawr leh thawmhnaw an thlauh zel zul chu an hmu zêl a; an lo haw leh a, lal hnênah thu an rawn thlen a." 
2Kings7:16 Samaria mite chu khua ata an tlân chhuak a, Suria-ho bûk chu an rawk ta chiam a. Lalpa sawi ang khân chhangphut ṭha chi kg. thum pawh, barli chhangphut kg. ruk pawh tangka tlang khatin an hralh ta a." 
2Kings7:17 Israel lal chuan amah vêng ṭhîntu sipai hotu kha kawngkhâr vêng tûrin a lo ti kher a. Elisa hmu tûra lal nên an kala, a lo sawi ang khân chu sipai hotu chu mipui chuan an chîl a, a thi ta a." 
2Kings7:18 Elisa chuan, “Naktûk hetih hunah chhangphut ṭha chi kg. thum pawh, barli chhangphut kg. ruk pawh tangka tlang khat man a ni ang,” a ti a," 
2Kings7:19 kha sipai hotu khân, “ Lalpa chuan vân tukverh pawh hawngin ruah sûrtîr mah se, chutiang êm chu a thleng ngût lo vang,” a ti a, Elisa chuan a chhâng a, “A hmuh zawng i hmu ang a, a ei zawng i ei ve dâwn lo a nih chu,” a ti a nih kha." 
2Kings7:20 Chutiang tak chuan thil a lo awm ta a, khaw kulh kawngkhârah chuan mipuiin an chîl a, an chîlhlum ta a ni." 
2Kings8:1 Lalpa chuan kum sarih chhûng Israel ramah chuan ṭâm a tlâktîr dâwn tih Elisa chuan Sunam-nu, a fapa a tihdamsak kha a hrilh a, an chhûnga hmun danga insawn tûrin a hrilh a." 
2Kings8:2 Pathian mi thu chu a zâwm a, an chhûng chuan Filistia ramah an kal a, kum sarih an thang bo va."
