2Kings8:3 Kum sarih a ral hnu chuan hmeichhia chu Israel ramah a lo kîr leh a, lal hnênah a in leh a ram kha pêk kîr leh a rawn dîl a." 
2Kings8:4 Lal leh Elisa hnungzui Gehazia chu an lo inbia a, Elisa thil mak tih lal chuan a hre duh a, a lo zâwt a." 
2Kings8:5 Elisan mitthi a tihnun leh thu Gehazian a hrilh lai chuan chu hmeichhia chu lal hmaah a lo kal ve chiah a. Gehazia chuan, “Ka pu, ka sawi hmeichhia kha he nu hi a ni; Pathian mi Elisan a tihnun leh pawh kha hei, a fapa hi alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:6 Lalin a dik leh dik loh a han zawh ve chuan, “Dik e,” a ti a. Lal chuan a thu ngaihtuah fel tûr hotu pakhat a ruatsak a, “A neih ṭhin zawng zawng chu pe kîr la, a awm loh chhûnga a ram aṭanga thil thar zawng man chhûtin pêk tûr zât chu pe ang che,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:7 Suria lal Ben-hadada a dam loh laiin Elisa chu Damaska khuaah a kal kher a, “Pathian mi a lo kal e,” tiin an hrilh a." 
2Kings8:8 Lal chuan Hazaela hnênah, “Thilpêk tûr eng emaw keng la, Pathian mi chu va hmu teh, ka dam chhuak dâwn nge dâwn lo, Lalpa min râwnsak teh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:9 Tichuan, Hazaela chu amah hmu tûrin a kal ta a. Damaska khuaa thil ṭha ṭha, thilpêk a keng ṭeuh va, sanghâwngsei phur sawmli lai a keng a ni. A lo kal a, a hmaah chuan a ding a, “I fapa, Suria lal, Ben-hadada chuan i hnênah min tîr a ni. ‘Ka nâ hi ka dam leh ang em?’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:10 Elisa chuan a hnênah, “Kal ta la, a dam leh ngei ang tih hrilh rawh. Amaherawhchu, Lalpa chuan a thi ngei dâwn tih min hmuhtîr e,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:11 Hazaela chu zahthlâk khawpin a melh ta rûn a, Pathian mi chu a ṭap ta a." 
2Kings8:12 Hazaela chuan, “Ka pu, engtizia nge i ṭah tâk le?” a ti a. Ani chuan, a chhâng a, “Israel mite chunga thil ṭha lo i tih tûr ka hmu a ni, an kulh te i hâlsak dâwn a, an tlangvâlte khandaihin i sât hlum ang a, an nausênte leichârah i vaw hlum ang a, an hmeichhia, nau pai laite chu an dul i pir ṭehsak dâwn,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:13 Hazaela chuan, “Kei, i chhiahhlawh uicho mai hi chutiang ti tûr em ka nih?” a ti a. Elisa chuan a chhâng a, “ Lalpa chuan Suria lala i ṭang min hmuhtîr a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:14 Elisa chu a chhuahsan a, a pu hnênah chuan a kal ta a. Ani chuan, “Elisa chuan eng nge a lo hrilh che?” a ti a. “I dam leh ngei dâwn thu min lo hrilh e,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:15 A tûkah chuan Hazaela chuan puan a la a, tuiah a chiah a, lal chu a hup hlum ta a. Hazaela chu Ben-hadada aiah Suria ram lal a lo ni ta a." 
2Kings8:16 Israel lal Ahaba fapa Jorama lal kum nga kum chuan Jehosafata fapa Jehorama chu Judai ram lal a lo ni ta a. 
2Kings8:17 Kum sawmthum leh pahnih a nihin a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum riat a lal a." 
2Kings8:18 A nupui chu Ahaba fanu a ni. Ahaba chhûng dangte ang bawkin Israel lalte awm dân ṭha lo chu a la a. Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti a. 
2Kings8:19 Lalpa chuan Juda-te chu tihboral vek a hreh a ni, a chhiahhlawh Davida hnênah, “I thlahte chu lalah an ṭang reng ang,” tia a lo tiam tlat tawh avângin." 
2Kings8:20 Jehorama lal lai hian Judai ram lakah Edom-ho an hel a, mahni lal an nei a," 
2Kings8:21 Jehorama chu Zair lamah a sakawr-tawlailîr nên a kal a. Edom-ho chuan an lo hual a, zânah a tawlailîr pute nên an tlân chhuak thei hrâm a, a sipaite chu an darh a, in lamah an haw ta a." 
2Kings8:22 Chuta chin chu Edom hi Juda-ho hnuaiah an awm lo hlen ta a. Hetih hun lai bawk hian Libna khua pawh an hel a. 
2Kings8:23 Jehorama thil tih dang zawng zawng chu Juda-te lal chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings8:24 Jehorama chu a thi a, Davida khawpuia lal thlânah an phûm a, a fapa Ahazia chu a aiah a lal a." 
2Kings8:25 Israel lal Ahaba fapa Jorama lal kum sawm pahnih kumah Jehorama fapa Ahazia chu Judai ram lal a lo ni a," 
2Kings8:26 kum sawmhnih leh pahnih a nihin a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum khat a lal a. A nu chu Ahaba fanu Athali, Israel lal Omria tunu a ni." 
2Kings8:27 Ahazia chuan Ahaba thlahte zînga mi fanu nupuia a neih avângin Ahaba chhûng dangte ang bawkin Lalpa hmuha thil sual an ti a. 
2Kings8:28 Lal Ahazia leh Israel lal Jorama chu Suria lal Hazaela bei tûrin an inthurual a. Gilead biala Ramot khuaah an sipaite chu an inbei a; Jorama chuan indonaah hliam a tuar a. 
2Kings8:29 Awm dam tûrin Jezreel khuaah a lo kal a, Ahazia chuan a va tlawh a." 
2Kings9:1 Chûng lai chuan zâwlnei Elisan zâwlnei la tlangvâl tak hi a ko va, “Insiam la, he hriak bûr hi keng la, Ramot-gilead-ah va kal rawh." 
2Kings9:2 I va thlen chuan Nimsia tupa, Jehosafata fapa Jehua zawng chhuak ang che. A awmna inah lût la, a ṭhiante zîng ata pindan chhûngrilah luhpui la." 
2Kings9:3 A lu-ah he oliv hriak hi i leih ang a, ‘ Lalpa chuan Israel-te lal atân hriak a thih ta a che,’ ti ang che. Kawngkhâr chu hawng la, chhuak vang vang la, muangchâng suh ang che,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:4 Zâwlnei tlangvâl chu Ramot-gilead-ah chuan a kal a. 
2Kings9:5 A va thlen chuan sipai hotute chu an lo ṭhu khâwm a. “I hnênah thu sawi tûr ka nei e, sipai hotu,” a ti a. Jehua chuan, “Kan zînga tu hi nge i biak duh?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Aw sipai hotu, nang kha a ni ka biak duh chu,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:6 A tho va, in chhûngah chuan a lût a, a lu-ah hriak chu a leih a, “Israel-te Pathian chuan, ‘ Lalpa mi, Israel-te chunga lal tûrin hriak ka thih ta a che,’ a ti e” a ti a." 
2Kings9:7 “I pu Ahaba chhûngte chu i that ang a, ka chhiahhlawhte thisen leh Lalpa chhiahhlawhte thisen Jezebeli chhuahte phuba chu ka la dâwn a ni." 
2Kings9:8 Ahaba thlahte chu an boral vek ang a; naupang pawh, upa pawh mipa zawng zawng chu ka tiboral vek dâwn a ni." 
2Kings9:9 Ahaba chhûngte chu Nebata fapa Jeroboama chhûngte leh Ahija fapa Baasa chhûngte ang khân ka sawisa ang. 
2Kings9:10 Jezebeli chu Jezreel-ah ui-in a sa an ei ang; tu mah phûmtu an awm lo vang,” a ti a. Kawngka chu a hawng a, a chhuak ta vang vang a." 
2Kings9:11 Jehua chu a pu hote zîngah chuan a lo chhuak a, pakhat chuan, “A ṭha lam em ni? Mi â-pa kha engah nge i hnêna a lo kal le?” a ti a. Jehua chuan, “A duh chu in hria alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:12 Anni chuan, “Hre suh e, han sawi teh,” an ti a. “ Lalpa chuan, ‘Israel lal atân hriak ka thih ta a che, a ti e,’ min ti alâwm,” Jehua chuan a ti a." 
2Kings9:13 A sipai hotupuite chuan an puan an hlîp sawk sawk a, kailâwn chungah Jehua din nân an phah a, tawtawrâwt an hâm a, “Jehua hi lal a ni ta,” an ti a." 
2Kings9:14 Nimsia tupa, Jehosafata fapa Jehua chuan Jorama chu a phiar a." 
2Kings9:15 Jorama chu Suria lal nên Ramot khuaa an inbeih lai khân an hliam a, Jezreel khuaah awm dam tûrin a kal a ni. Jehua chuan a ṭhiante hnênah, “Ka lama in ṭan phawt chuan Ramot khua aṭang hian Jezreel mite hnêna chanchin hrilh tûr tu mah chhuah suh ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:16 A tawlailîrah chuan a chuang a, Jezreel lam a pan ta vang vang a. Jorama chu a la dam chiang lo va, Juda lal Ahazia chuan a tlawh a; tah chuan a lo awm ve a." 
2Kings9:17 Jezreel in sânga râlvêngtu chuan Jehua leh a hote lo kal chu a hmu a, “Sakawr chunga chuang mi ṭhenkhat lo kal ka hmu e,” a ti a. Jorama chuan, “Hmêlma an ni nge ni lo hre tûrin sakawr chungchuang pakhat tîr teh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:18 An mi tirh chu Jehua-te hnên a va thleng a, “Lalin ṭhian ṭha anga lo kal i nih leh nih loh a hre duh e,” a ti a. Jehua chuan, “I hriat ve tûr a awm lo ve, hnung lamah khân kal rawh,” a ti a. Râlvêngtu chuan, “Mi lo kalte chu kan mi tirh chuan a va fin a, a lo kîr leh rih lo,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:19 Mi dang an tîr leh a, ani chuan Jehua chu thu ngai bawk a zâwt leh a, Jehua chuan, “I hriat tûr a awm lo ve, hnung lamah khân kal rawh,” a ti leh a." 
2Kings9:20 Râlvêngtu chuan an mi tirh chu, “Mi lo kalte chu kan mi tirh chuan a va fin a, a lo kîr bîk lo,” a ti a. “An hruaitu chuan a tawlailîr chu mi â ang maiin a khalh ka ti, Jehua ang maiin,” a ti bawk a." 
2Kings9:21 Lal Jorama chuan, “Ka tawlailîr buatsaih teh u,” a ti a. An siam zawh chuan Juda lal Ahazia nên mahni tawlailîr ve vea chuangin Jehua tâwk tûr chuan an chhuak dûn a. Nabota huanah an va tâwk a." 
2Kings9:22 Jorama chuan, “Jehu, ṭha lam thil em ni?” a ti a. Jehua chuan, “I nu Jezebeli chîn chhuah milem biak leh dawi heti taka a hluar chhûng chu engtin nge a ṭha lam a nih theih ang?” a ti a." 
2Kings9:23 Jorama chuan, “Ahazia, min thah an tum a ni e,” tiin a au va, a tawlailîr chu a kai her a, a tlânchhe ta a." 
2Kings9:24 Jehua chuan a thalngul chu theihtâwpin a kuai a, Jorama hnung lamah a kâp a, a thal chuan a lung a fuh a, tawlailîrah chuan a thi ta a." 
2Kings9:25 Jehua chuan a hnungzuitu Bidkara hnênah, “A ruang saw Nabota huanah paih ang che. Jorama pa Ahaba hnungzuia sakawra kan chuan laia Ahaba chungthu Lalpa sawi kha hre reng ang che." 
2Kings9:26 ‘Nabota leh a fate nimina an tualthih dân kha ka hmu ve reng a ni; hemi hmunah ngei hian ka hrem ve ang che,’ a tih kha. Jorama ruang chu la la, Nabota huan ngeiah, Lalpa sawi angin paih ang che,” tiin a hnungzuitu chu a hrilh a." 
2Kings9:27 Juda lal Ahazia chuan hêng thil hi a hmuhin a tawlailîr nên Beth-hagan lamah a tlân a, Jehua chuan a ûmzui a, a hote hnênah, “A tawlailîr chuang saw that rawh u,” a ti a. Ibleam khaw bul Gur chhova a tlân lai chuan an kâp hliam a, Megido-ah a kal a; tah chuan a thi ta a." 
2Kings9:28 A hote chuan tawlailîrin a ruang chu Jerusalem-ah an phur chho va, Davida khawpui, lal thlânah an phûm a." 
2Kings9:29 Ahaba fapa Jorama chu Israel rama kum sâwm leh pakhat a lal kumin Ahazia chu Judai ramah a lal ṭan a. 
2Kings9:30 Jehua chuan Jezreel a lo thleng tih Jezebeli chuan a hriatin a mit ko a hnawih dum a, a sam a chei danglam a, lal insâng tukverh aṭangin a lo dâk chhuak a." 
2Kings9:31 Kulh kawngkhâra Jehua a lo luh chuan, “Mahni pute thattu Zimri, a ṭha lam duha lo kal em i nih?” tiin a lo au va." 
2Kings9:32 Jehua chu a han dâk a, “Ka lamṭang in awm em?” a ti a. Hotu pahnih pathum tukverhah an lo dâk a." 
2Kings9:33 Jehua chuan an hnênah, “Han nam thla rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, Jezebeli chu an nam thla a, a thisen a per uai a, bangahte a kai a, sakawrte pawh chu a per berh a, a ruang chu an rap nawk nawk a." 
2Kings9:34 In chhûngah Jehua chu a lût a, a eiin a in tê tê a, “Kha hmeichhe sual ruang kha phûm rawh u, lal fanu a ni khanglâng si a,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:35 Phûm tûrin an va kal a, a luruh, a kut leh keruh chauh an va hmu tawh a." 
2Kings9:36 Jehua chu an rawn hrilh a, “ Lalpan a chhiahhlawh Tisbe mi Elija kâa a sawi, ‘Jezebeli chu Jezreel khuaah ui-in an ei ang a;" 
2Kings9:37 an ei bâng chu tu ruang nge tih hriat rual loh khawpin lei vaivutah a darh ang,’ a tih kha a lo thleng ta a nih chu,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:1 Samaria khuaah chuan Ahaba fapa sawmsarih an awm a. Samaria khaw upate, hotute leh Ahaba fa enkawltu te hnênah Jehua chuan lehkha a thawn a, hetiang hian a ziak a:" 
2Kings10:2 “Lal fate chu in kutah an awm a, tawlailîr te, sakawr te, râlthuam te, kulh nei khua te in thu thu-a hman tûr in nei a." 
2Kings10:3 Ka lehkha hi in hmuh veleh lal fate zînga fel ber thlang chhuakin lalah siam ula; in lal thar tân chuan do rawh u,” tiin." 
2Kings10:4 Samaria khaw hotute chuan an hlau êm êm a. “Lal pahnih pawhin an ngam lo va, keini tehlulin engtin nge kan ngam ang?” an ti a." 
2Kings10:5 Lal in enkawltu te, khaw hotute, upate leh lal fa enkawltute chuan an chhâng a, “I chhiahhlawh kan ni a, tih tûr i tih apiang ti tûrin kan inpeih reng e. Tu dang mah lala siam kan tum lo, ṭha i tih ang angin ti mai rawh,” an ti a." 
2Kings10:6 Jehua chuan lehkha dang a thawn leh a, “Ka lamṭang in niha, ka thu in awih dâwn chuan naktûk hetih hunah Jezreel khuaah hian lal fate lu kha han la rawh u,” tiin. Ahaba fa sawmsarihte chu Samaria khaw hotu, anmahni enkawl seiliantute kuta awm an ni a." 
2Kings10:7 Jehua lehkha an hmuh chuan Samaria khaw hotu te chuan Ahaba fa sawmsarihte chu an that vek a, an lu chu bâwmah an khung a, Jezreel-ah Jehua hnênah an thawn ta a." 
2Kings10:8 Ahaba fate lu chu an rawn la ta tih Jehua chu an hrilh a. Ani chuan, “Khawpui kulh kawngka bulah hmun hnihah tiang khâwm ula, naktûk thlengin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:9 A tûkah kulh kawngka bulah chuan a va kal a, chu laia lo awmte hnênah chuan, “Lal Jorama phiara thattu ka ni, chu mi mawh chu nangni phurh tûr a ni lo. Hêng mite hi tu thah nge?" 
2Kings10:10 Ahaba fate chungchânga Lalpa thu sawi kha a thlâwn lo va ni tih hre rawh u. Lalpa chuan a zâwlnei Elija hnêna a sawi zawng zawng kha a rawn ti ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:11 Jezreel-ah chuan Ahaba laichîn hnai te, sipai hotu te, a ṭhian bul te leh a puithiam te chu pakhat mah zuah hlek lovin a that fai vek a." 
2Kings10:12 Jehua chuan Jezreel a chhuahsan a, Samaria khuaah kal a tum a. Kawngah, ‘Berâmpu bûk,’ an tihah chuan," 
2Kings10:13 Juda lal Ahazia chhûngte a tâwk a, “Tute nge in nih?” a ti a. “Ahazia laichîn kan ni, lalnu Jezebeli fate leh lal chhûngte chibai bûk tûrin Jezreel khuaah kan kal dâwn a ni,” an ti a." 
2Kings10:14 Jehua chuan a hote hnênah, “A nung chungin man teh u,” a ti a. An man a, chumi kiang, Beth-eked khur bulah chuan a that ta a. An vaiin mi sawmli leh pahnih an ni, pakhat mah an zuah lo." 
2Kings10:15 Jehua chu a kal zêl a, Rekaba fapa Jehonadaba chuan a rawn tâwk a. Jehua chuan chibai a lo bûk a, “I chunga rilru ka put ang hian ka chungah rilru ṭha i pu ve em?” a ti a. Jehonadaba chuan, “Pu e,” a ti a. “Chuti chu i kutin mi han ban teh,” Jehua chuan a ti a. Kut an insuih a, Jehua chuan tawlailîrah a kai lût ta a." 
2Kings10:16 “Ka rualin kal ve la, Lalpa tâna ṭhahnem ka ngaihzia nangmah ngeiin hmu ang che,” a ti a. Samaria khuaah tawlailîr chuan an chuang lût ta a." 
2Kings10:17 An va thlen chuan Ahaba laichîn zawng zawng chu pakhat mah zuah lovin a that ta phiar a. Elija hnêna Lalpa sawi kha a lo thleng ta a ni. 
2Kings10:18 Jehua chuan Samaria mite chu a ko khâwm a, an hnênah, “Lal Ahaba khân nêp takin Baal rawng a bâwl ṭhîn a, Jehua erawh chuan a uar hle dâwn a ni." 
2Kings10:19 Baal zâwlnei te, a betu zawng zawng te leh a puithiam zawng zawng ko khâwm teh u; tu mah hmaih tûr a ni lo. Baal hnênah thilhlan ropui tak ka hlân dâwn, a lo tel ve lo chu tihhlum vek tûr an ni,” a ti a. Baal betute tihhlum vek a tum avângin chutiang chuan fin vervêk a chhuah a ni." 
2Kings10:20 “Baala biakna tûr ni ruat rawh u,” Jehua chuan a ti a. Ni an ruat ta a." 
2Kings10:21 Jehua chuan Israel rama mite chu a chah khâwm a; Baal betu zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, lo kal lo rêng an awm lo. Baal tempulah chuan an ṭhu khat hmur a." 
2Kings10:22 Puithiam kawr enkawltute hnênah, “Baal betu zawng zawng bah tûr puan han la teh,” a ti a. Puan bah tûr chu a rawn la a." 
2Kings10:23 Jehua leh Rekaba fapa Jehonadaba chu Baal tempulah chuan an lût ve a, “Baal betu ni lo, Lalpa betu hetah hian an awm ve nge awm ve lo zawng ngun teh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:24 Hâlral thilhlan leh thilhlan chi dang dang hlân tûrin Baala tempulah chuan an lût ve ta a ni. Jehua chuan mi sawmriat pâwnah a dah ru a, an hnênah, “Hêngho hi in thah vek tûra ka tih an ni; in chhuah vaih chuan a chhuahtu chu a chhuaha aiah thah ve tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:25 Hâlral thilhlan a hlan zawhin Jehua chuan a sipaite leh an hotute hnênah, “Lût ula, tu mah zuah lovin that vek rawh u,” a ti a. Baal tempulah chuan khandaih phawisa nên an lût a, an that ta vek a; an ruang chu an rawn hnûk chhuak a; Tempul chhûngrilah an lût a;" 
2Kings10:26 chutah Baal lim thingtum an phunte chu an la chhuak a, an hâl a." 
2Kings10:27 Baal lim lung phunte chu an titliak a, Tempul chu an ṭhiat a, tûn thlengin miin inthiarna takah an hmang ta a ni." 
2Kings10:28 Chutiang chuan Israel ramah Baal biakna chu tihchhiat a ni a. 
2Kings10:29 Nebata fapa Jeroboama suahsualna, Israel-te a hruai khawlohna sual chu Jehua chuan a thlah vek lo. Bethel-ah leh Dan khuaa rangkachak bâwngno limte kha an la be ta zêl a ni." 
2Kings10:30 Lalpa chuan Jehua hnênah, “Ka hmuha thil ṭha i tih a, ka duh angin Ahaba chhûngte i sawisak avângin i thlahte chhuan li thlengin Israel ramah an lal ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:31 Nimahsela, Jehua chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian dân chu tihtakzetin a zâwm duh lo va; Jeroboama sualna, Israel-te a hruai khawlohna sual kha a thlah phal lo." 
2Kings10:32 Chûng lai chuan Israel ram chu Lalpa chuan a tihzîmsak a. Suria lal Hazaela khân Israel ram a rawn rûn a. 
2Kings10:33 Jordan lui chhak lam ram, Gilead te, Gad-ho te, Reuben-ho te leh Manase-ho te awmna ram Arnon luiruama Aroer te, an khawpui Gilead leh Basan thlengin a la ta a." 
2Kings10:34 Jehua thiltih dang zawng zawng, a chakzia te, Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang vek a ni." 
2Kings10:35 Jehua chu a thi a, Samaria khuaah chuan an phûm ve ta a. A fapa Jehoahaza chu a aiah a lal a." 
2Kings10:36 Kum sawmhnih leh pariat chhûng Samaria khuaah chuan Jehua chu a lal a ni. 
2Kings11:1 Lal Ahazia thih thu a nu Athali chuan a hriat veleh lal chhûngte chu a thahtîr vek a. 
2Kings11:2 Ahazia fapa Joasa chiah a thah hmaih a. Lal Jehorama fanu Jehosebi, Ahazia farnu chuan a thukru a ni. A awmtu nên Tempul pindan pakhatah Athali hmuh loh tûrin a thukru a, thah a ni ve ta lo a ni." 
2Kings11:3 Athali lal chhûng kum ruk chu Jehosebi chuan tempulah a dah a, a rûkin a enkawl a." 
2Kings11:4 A kum sarih kum chuan puithiam lalber Jehoiada chuan lal vêngtu Keret sipai za rual hotute leh lal in vêngtu sipai hotute chu a ko va, a thil tih tum chu a hrilh a, Tempul chhûngah chhia chhamin an remtihpui a, lal Ahazia fapa Joasa chu a hmu a." 
2Kings11:5 Hetiang hian a hrilh a: “Sabat nia hna thawk tûra in lo kal hunah hmun thuma ṭhen hmun khat chuan lal in vêng ula," 
2Kings11:6 hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chuan Sur kawngkhâr vêng ula; a dang hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chuan vêngtuho hnung kawngkhâr vêng ang che u. 
2Kings11:7 Vêngtu pâwl hnih Sabat nia châwl tûrte chu lal vêng tûrin tempulah an awm tûr a ni. 
2Kings11:8 Lal Joasa hi khandaih phawi sa kengin in vêng tûr a ni, a kalna apiangah zui ang che u. Rawn hnaihtu chu lo that zêl ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Kings11:9 Sipai hotute chuan Jehoiada thu chu an zâwm a, an sipai sabat nia châwl tûrte leh thawk tûrte chu an rawn hruai a." 
2Kings11:10 Tempul chhûnga dah ṭhat lal Davida feite leh phâwte chu sipai hotute a pe a. 
2Kings11:11 Tempul hma lamah khandaih phawi sa kengin lal vêng tûrin a din tlartîr bawk a. 
2Kings11:12 Jehoiada chuan Joasa chu a hruai chhuak a, lallukhum chu a khumtîr a, lal awm dân tûr ziakna dân bu chu a pe a. Joasa chu hriak an thih a, lalah an puang ta a. Mipui chuan kut an beng dur dur a, “Lal chu dam reng rawh se,” an ti a." 
2Kings11:13 Lalnu Athali chuan vêngtuho sipaite leh mipui thâwm chu a hriatin mipui punkhâwmna Tempul lamah chuan hmanhmawh takin a kal a. 
2Kings11:14 Lal thar chu lal din ṭhinna tûra ruat Tempul luhna ban bulah chuan a lo ding a. Sipai hotute leh tawtawrâwtpute chuan an lo din hual a, mipuite chu hlim takin an au dur dur a, tawtawrâwtte an hâm a. Athali mangang chuan a puan a pawtthlêr a, “Min phiar ru a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings11:15 Jehoiada chuan Tempul hung chhûnga Athali thah chu a remti lo va, sipai hotute hnênah, “Sipai intlar kârah hruai chhuak ula, rawn chhan tum apiang lo that zêl ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Kings11:16 Athali chu an man a, lal in lamah an hruai a. Sakawr kawngkhâr an tihah chuan an that ta a." 
2Kings11:17 Puithiam Jehoiada chuan lal Joasa leh mipui chu Lalpa mi ni tûrin thu a tiamtîr a. Lal leh mipui inkârah pawh thuthlung a siam a. 
2Kings11:18 Mipuite chu Baal tempulah an kal a, an ṭhiat a, maichâmte chu an tichim a, milimte chu an vaw sawm vek a. Baal puithiam Matana chu a maichâm bulah chuan an that a. Puithiam Jehoiada chuan Tempul vêng tûr a dah a." 
2Kings11:19 Lal vêngtu Keret sipai za rual hotute, lal in vêngtu sipai hotute nên chuan Tempul aṭangin lal chu lal inah an hruai a, mipuiin an zui a. Vêngtu kawngkhârah Joasa chu a lût a, lalṭhutthlêngah chuan a ṭhu ta a." 
2Kings11:20 Mipui chu an hlim êm êm a, Athali chu lal ina an thah tâk avângin khuaah buaina eng mah a awm lo." 
2Kings11:21 Joasa chu kum sarih mi a nihin Juda lalah a ṭang. 
2Kings12:1 Israel rama Jehua kum sarih a lal kumin Joasa chu Judai ram lalah a ṭang a, Jerusalem khuaah kum sawmli a lal a. A nu chu Beer-seba mi Zibi a ni." 
2Kings12:2 Puithiam Jehoiada khân a kaihhruai ṭhin avângin a dam chhûngin Lalpa lawmzâwng a ti ṭhîn. 
2Kings12:3 Mahse, hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsângte chu a tibo lo va, chûngah chuan miten thilhlan an la hlân zêl a ni." 
2Kings12:4 Jehoiada chuan puithiamte chu a ko khâwm a, Tempula thilhlan rualin miten thilpêk an rawn keng ṭhîn, a ṭhen chu thilhlan zînga pêk tel ngei tûra tihte a ni a, a ṭhen erawh chu mahni duh thu-a thilpêk a ni; chûng chu dah ṭha zêl tûrin a hrilh a." 
2Kings12:5 An rawng an bâwlsakten chutianga pawisa an rawn ken chu rawngbâwltu puithiam chuan a lo dawng ang a, Tempul siam ṭhat nân hman tûr a ni." 
2Kings12:6 Kum sawmhnih leh pathum chhûng Joasa a lal tawh hnu pawh chuan Tempul chu siam ṭhat a la ni ta lo va. 
2Kings12:7 Jehoiada leh puithiam dangte chu a ko va, “Engtizia nge Tempul in la siam ṭhat loh? Tûn aṭang chuan in pawisa dawn chu kawl tawh suh u, in dah khâwm ngei tûr a ni; tichuan, Tempul chu siam ṭhat a ni thei ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings12:8 Puithiamte chuan pawisa kawl loh chu an remti a, Tempul tlabal la siam rih loh pawh ṭha an ti a." 
2Kings12:9 Puithiam lalber Jehoiada chuan bâwm a siam a, a chhîn a tiâwng a; maichâm bulah, Tempul luh dâwn ding lamah a dah a. Tempul luhna bula puithiam an dah chuan Pathian hnêna petute thilpêk an rawn ken chu an lo dawng a, bâwmah chuan an thlâk zêl a." 
2Kings12:10 Bâwma tangka a awm tam deuh veleh lal lehkhaziaktu leh puithiam Jehoiada chu an lo kal a, tangka chu an rawh tui a, a bûk zât an chhinchhiah zêl a." 
2Kings12:11 A zât chiah an chhinchhiah hnu chuan Tempul siam ṭhat hna enkawltute kutah an pe a, anni chuan hnathawktu mistirite hlawh an pe ṭhîn." 
2Kings12:12 Lungchher mite leh lungla mite chuan Tempul siam ṭhatna tûr thingte leh lungte an lei a, pawisa hman ṭûlna apiangah pawisa an pe chhuak a." 
2Kings12:13 Thawhlâwm pawisa chu tangkaraw no te, berhbu te, tawtawrâwt te, khâwnvâr enkawlna hmanrua te, tangkarua leh rangkachaka thil hrang hrang siam nân chuan an hmang hauh lo." 
2Kings12:14 Hnathawktute hlawhah leh hmanraw lei nân chauh hman a ni. 
2Kings12:15 Hnathawktute chu an rinawm êm êm a, an pawisa hman dân pawh enpui a ngai lo." 
2Kings12:16 Sual thawina leh bawhchhiat man thilhlan ruala an rawn pêkte erawh chu dah tel ve a ni lo, puithiamho chan a ni." 
2Kings12:17 Chutih hun lai chuan Suria lal Hazaela chuan Gath khua a bei a, a la a. Jerusalem beih zêl a rêl a." 
2Kings12:18 Juda lal Joasa chuan a hmaa lal Jehosafata te, Jehorama te leh Ahazia ten Lalpa tâna an thilpêk dah khâwmte chu a la a, amah ngeiin a pêk pawh chu a belhchhah a; Tempul leh lal in sum bâwma rangkachak zawng zawng chu a vaiin lal Hazaela chu thilpêk atân a pe a, a sipaite chu Jerusalem ata a hruai kîr leh ta a." 
2Kings12:19 Lal Joasa thil tih dang zawng zawng chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings12:20 Joasa chu a hote pahnihin an phiar a, Beth-milo an tih Silo chhuknaah an that a." 
2Kings12:21 A thattute chu Simeata fapa Jozakara leh Somera fapa Jehozabada an ni. A thi a, Davida khawpuiah lal thlânah an phûm a. A fapa Amazia chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings13:1 Ahazia fapa Joasa chu Judai rama kum sawmhnih leh pathum a lal kumin Jehua fapa Jehoahaza chu Israel ramah a lal ṭan a, Samaria khuaah kum sâwm leh pahnih a lal a." 
2Kings13:2 Lal Jeroboama, Nebata fapa ang bawkin Lalpa laka thil sual a ti a. Israel-te a hruai sual a, a thil ṭha lo tihte chu a sim duh lo." 
2Kings13:3 Chuvângin, Israel-te chungah Lalpa chu a thinur a, Suria lal Hazaela leh a fapa Ben-hadada chuan Israel chu an hneh leh ṭhin a phal a ni." 
2Kings13:4 Jehoahaza chu Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, Suria lalin Israel-te a tihhrehawmzia a hmuhin a ṭawngṭaina chu a rawn chhâng leh ṭhîn a." 
2Kings13:5 Lalpa chuan Israel-te hnênah chhantu a tîr ṭhîn a. Suria-ho lakah chuan a chhan chhuak a, tûn hma angin thlamuang takin an awm leh ṭhîn." 
2Kings13:6 Nebata fapa Lal Jeroboama chhûngten Israel-te an hruai khawlohna sual kha an la sim chuang lo va, an ti lui zêl a, Aseri lim chu Samaria khuaah chuan a la awm ta reng tho mai." 
2Kings13:7 Jehoahaza chuan sipai tihtham a nei tawh lo, sakawr chungchuang mi sawmnga, tawlailîr sâwm leh kea kal sipai sîngkhat chauh a nei a ni. Suria lalin a thahsak zo va, kea vaivut chîl ang maiin a chîl darhsak a ni." 
2Kings13:8 Jehoahaza thil tih dang zawng zawng, a huaisenzia te chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
2Kings13:9 A thi a, a fapa Joasa chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings13:10 Judai rama Joasa kum sawmthum leh pasarih a lal kumin Joasa chu Israel ramah a lal ṭan a. Samaria khuaah kum sâwm leh paruk a lal a. 
2Kings13:11 Ani pawhin Lalpa hmuha thil sual, Israel lal Nebata fapa Jeroboaman Israel-te a hruai khawlohna sual kha a bân bîk lo, a ti lui ve zêl a." 
2Kings13:12 Joasa thil tih dang, Juda lal Amazia nên an indova a huaisenzia thute chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
2Kings13:13 Joasa chu a thi a, Samaria khuaah lal thlânah an phûm a. A fapa Jeroboama pahnihna chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings13:14 Zâwlnei Elisa chu a thihpui tûr natna tuarin a mu a, a thih dâwn hnaih chuan lal Joasa chuan a va tlawh a; “Ka pa, ka pa, Israel-te chhantu ropui,” tiin a ṭah ta a." 
2Kings13:15 Elisa chuan a hnênah, “Thalngul leh thal ṭhenkhat han la teh,” a ti a. Thalngul leh thal ṭhenkhat chu a rawn la a." 
2Kings13:16 Israel lal hnênah chuan, “Thalngul kha chelh teh,” a ti a, a chelh hnu chuan Elisa chuan lal kut chungah a kut a nghat a, “Khawchhak lam tukverh kha hawng teh,” a ti a, a han hawng a." 
2Kings13:17 “Thal kha kâp teh,” a ti a. A han kâp a, zâwlnei Elisa chuan, “Suria hnehna tûr Lalpa thal i ni e, Suria-ho nên Afek-ah in inbei ang a, a hnehtu zâwk i ni ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings13:18 Elisa chuan lal hnênah, “Thal dang kha la leh teh,” a ti a, a han lâk chuan, “Lei kha chhun teh,” a ti a, vawi thum a han chhun a, a bâng ta a." 
2Kings13:19 Pathian mi chu a thinur a, “Vawi nga vawi ruk chhun la, Suria-ho chu an ral dêr thlengin i hneh tûr, vawi thum chauh in hneh dâwn a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings13:20 Elisa chu a thi a, an phûm ta a. Kum a lo thar apiangin Moab-hovin Israel ram an rawn rûn ṭhîn a." 
2Kings13:21 Mi pakhat hi a thi a, an phûm dâwn laiin Moab rual khat lo kal an hmu a, Elisa thlânah chuan an vawm lût rawk a, an tlân ta a. Chu mi ruang chuan Elisa ruh a deh veleh a lo nung leh a, a ding thei ta mai a." 
2Kings13:22 Jehoahaza dam chhûng chu Suria lal Hazaela chuan Israel-te chu a tirethei hle a. 
2Kings13:23 Mahse, Lalpa chuan a khawngaih a, an chhiat ṭhak a phal lo va, Abrahama te, Isaka te leh Jakoba te hnêna a thuthlung avângin a lainat a, a ngaihsak leh ṭhîn, tûn thlengin a la thlauhthla lo va." 
2Kings13:24 Suria lal Hazaela chu a thi a, a fapa Ben-hadada chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings13:25 Jehoahaza fapa Joasa chuan Hazaela fapa Ben-hadada kut ata, a pa Jehoahaza khua an lâksakte chu a la kîr leh a, an indonaah vawi thum a hneh a, Israel ram khuate chu a chhuhsak leh ta a ni." 
2Kings14:1 Jehoahaza fapa Joasa chu Israel lal a nih kum hnih kumin Joasa fapa Amazia chu," 
2Kings14:2 kum sawmhnih leh pangaa upa a nihin Judai ram lal a ni ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh pakua a lal a. A nu chu Jerusalem khaw mi Jehoadini a ni." 
2Kings14:3 Lalpa hmuha thil ṭha a ti a, a pu lal Davida erawh chu a tluk lo, a pa Joasa tih ang a ti ve zêl mai." 
2Kings14:4 Hnam dang pathian an biakna hmunsângte chu a tichhe lo, mipuite chuan chûngah chuan thilhlan an hlân a, rimtuite an la hâl ta cheu a ni." 
2Kings14:5 Amazia chuan, a lal ngheh veleh, a pa thattute chu a that ve a." 
2Kings14:6 An fate erawh chu a that lo; Mosia Dân bu-a Lalpa thupêk, ‘Fate chu an pate sual avânga tihhlum tûr an ni lo, pate pawh an fate sual avânga tihhlum tûr an ni lo; mi tin mahni sual avâng chauhva thi tûr an ni,’ a tih kha a zâwm a ni." 
2Kings14:7 Amazia chuan ‘Chi ruamah’ Edom mi singkhat a that a, Sela khua a bei a, a la a, a hmingah Joktheel a vuah a, tûn thlengin hmingah a la pu." 
2Kings14:8 Amazia chuan Jehoahaza fapa Joasa, Israel lal hnênah palai a tîr a, “Ti teh, pa leh pa i han inhmachhawn teh ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings14:9 Israel lal Joasa chuan Juda lal Amazia chu thu a thawn a, “Lebanon tlânga sidar thing hnênah Lebanon tlâng lênhlîng chuan, ‘I fanu ka fapa nupuiah min neihtîr rawh,’ a ti a. Ramsa tei mai mai hian lênhlîng chu a pal thlu ta mai a." 
2Kings14:10 ‘Edom-ho ka zu hneh e’ i ti a, i inchhuang ta vei hle a ni maw: lungawi takin inah tawm hle hle tawh mai rawh. Nang leh Judai ram chhiatna tûr buaina chawk chhuak teh suh,” a ti a." 
2Kings14:11 Amazia chuan a pawisa lo va, Israel lal Joasa chu a thawk chhuak a, Juda lal Amazia nên chuan Judai ram chhûng Beth-semes khuaah chuan ‘pa leh pa an inhmachhawn’ ta a." 
2Kings14:12 Juda-ho chan chu a chau ta zâwk a, mahni in lamah an tlân haw ta a." 
2Kings14:13 Israel lal Joasa chuan Juda lal Amazia chu Beth-semes-ah chuan a man a. Jerusalem-ah a chho va, kulh bang, Efraim kawngkhâr aṭanga kulh Kawina kawngkhâr thlengin, tawng zali zet chu a tichhia a." 
2Kings14:14 Lalpa Tempul chhûng leh lal sum in aṭanga tangka leh rangkachak leh bungbêl awm zawng zawng chu a la a, a sal mante nên chuan Samaria khuaah a haw leh ta a." 
2Kings14:15 Joasa thil tih dang, a ropuizia te, Juda lal Amazia nêna an indo thu te Israel-te lal chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
2Kings14:16 Joasa chu a thi a, Samaria khuaa lalho thlânah an phûm a. A fapa Jeroboama pahnihna chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings14:17 Israel lal Jehoahaza fapa Joasa thih hnuin Amazia chu kum sâwm leh panga a dam a. 
2Kings14:18 Amazia thil tih dangte chu Juda lal chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang a ni. 
2Kings14:19 Jerusalem-ah Amazia chu an phiar a, Lakis khuaah a tlân a; mahse, a hmêlmate chuan an ûm a, an that ta tho va." 
2Kings14:20 A ruang chu Jerusalem-ah sakawrin an phur haw a; Davida khawpuiah, lal thlânah an phûm a." 
2Kings14:21 Judai ram mite chuan a fapa kum sâwm leh paruka upa Uzia chu a pa Amazia aiah lalah an siam a. 
2Kings14:22 A pa thih hnu chuan Uzia chuan Elath khua chu Judai ramah a la kîr a, a din ṭha leh ta a." 
2Kings14:23 Joasa fapa Amazia chu Juda lal kum sâwm leh panga a nih kumin Joasa fapa Jeroboama pahnihna chu Israel lal a ni ṭan a, Samaria khuaah kum sawmli leh pakhat a lal a." 
2Kings14:24 Lalpa hmuha thil sual chu a ti a, an pu Nebata fapa Jeroboama thil sual tih, Israel-te a hruai khawlohna sual chu a bân chuang lo." 
2Kings14:25 Israel ram ni ṭhîn, Hamath kalkhân aṭanga Tuipui Thi inkâr ramte chu a la kîr a. Chu chu, a chhiahhlawh Gathhefer mi, Amitaia fapa zâwlnei kâa Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin a sawi kha a ni." 
2Kings14:26 Israel-te tuar hrehawmzia chu Lalpa chuan a hmu a, naupang pawh puitling pawh, tu mah tuar lo an awm lo va, ṭanpuitu rêng rêng an awm lo." 
2Kings14:27 Lalpa chuan Israel-te chu tihchhiat hlen dêr zawng a tum lo, chhantu atân Jeroboama pahnihna hi a rawn hmang a ni." 
2Kings14:28 Jeroboama thil tih dang zawng zawng, indonaa a huaizia te, Damaska leh Hamath kalkhân Israel rama a lâk kîr thu te, Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
2Kings14:29 Jeroboama chu a thi a, Samaria khuaa lalho thlânah chuan an phûm a, a fapa Zekaria chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings15:1 Jeroboama pahnihna chu Israel rama kum sawmhnih leh pasarih a lal kumin 
2Kings15:2 Amazia fapa Uzia chu kum sâwm leh paruk a ni a, Juda lalah a ṭang ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh pahnih a lal a. A nu chu Jerusalem mi Jekoli a ni." 
2Kings15:3 A pa Amazia angin Lalpa hmuha thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a. Hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsângte erawh chu a tibo lo va, chûngah chuan miten thil an la hlânin rimtui an la hâl cheu a ni." 
2Kings15:4 Chuvângin, lal chu Lalpa chuan a rawn khawih a, a dam chhûngin a phâr ta a, in hrangah a inkhung ta a." 
2Kings15:5 A fapa Jothama chuan lal chhûngkua chu a ho va, Judai ram chu a awpsak a." 
2Kings15:6 Uzia thiltih dangte chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings15:7 Uzia chu a thi a, Davida khawpuia lal thlânah an phûm ve a, a fapa Jothama chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings15:8 Uzia chu Judai rama kum sawmthum leh pariat a lal kumin Jeroboama fapa Zekaria chu Israel ramah a lal ṭan a. Samaria khuaah thla ruk a lal a. 
2Kings15:9 A hmaa lal dangte ang bawkin Lalpa hmuha thil sual chu a ti ve a, Nebata fapa Jeroboama thil sual tih, Israel-te a hruai khawlohna sual kha a bân chuang lo." 
2Kings15:10 Jabesa fapa Saluma chuan Zekaria chu a phiar a, Ibleam-ah a that a, a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:11 Zekaria thil tih dangte chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings15:12 Jehua hnêna Lalpa thu sawi, “I thlah chhuan li thlengin Israel lal in ni ang,” a tih ang kha a ni ta a ni." 
2Kings15:13 Uzia chu Juda lal kum sawmthum leh pakua a nih kumin Jabesa fapa Saluma chu Israel lal a ni ṭan a. Samaria khuaah thla khat a lal a. 
2Kings15:14 Gadia fapa Menahema chu Tirza aṭangin Samaria khuaah a lo kal a. Saluma chu a that a, a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings15:15 Saluma thil tih dang zawng zawng chu Israel-te lal chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings15:16 Tirza aṭanga Menahema a lo kal khân Tapua khua chu a hnêna an inpêk duh loh avângin a tichhe vek a, a chhûnga chêngte leh a vêl rama mite chu a that a, hmeichhe rai laite pawh an dul a pîrthlêrsak a." 
2Kings15:17 Uzia chu Juda lal kum sawmthum leh pakua a nih kumin Gadia fapa Menahema chu Israel ramah lal a ni ṭan a, Samaria khuaah kum sâwm a lal a." 
2Kings15:18 Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti a, Nebata fapa Jeroboama thil sual tih, Israel-te a hruai khawlohna sual kha a dam chhûng chuan a thlah lo." 
2Kings15:19 Lal Tiglat Pilesera chuan Israel ram a rawn rûn a, Menahema chuan tangkarua kg. sîngthum leh sângli a lo pe a, Israel rama nghet lehzuala lala ṭhu tûrin a puih duh a beisei a ni." 
2Kings15:20 Menahema chuan Israel mi hausate tangka tlang sawmnga zêl a lâksak a, chu chu a pe a ni. Tichuan, Tiglat Pilesera chu an ram lamah a haw leh ta a." 
2Kings15:21 Menahema thiltih dang zawng zawng chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings15:22 A thi a, an phûm a, a fapa Pekahia chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings15:23 Uzia chu Juda lal kum sawmnga a nih kumin Menahema fapa Pekahia chu Israel ramah lal a ni ṭan a, Samaria khuaah kum hnih a lal a." 
2Kings15:24 Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti a, Nebata fapa Jeroboama thil sual tih, Israel-te a hruai khawlohna sual kha a thlah chuang lo." 
2Kings15:25 A sipai hotu pakhat Remalia fapa Peka chuan Gilead khaw mi sawmnga nên an phiar a, Pekahia chu Samaria khaw kulhbîng Argob leh Aria bulah an that a, a aiah a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings15:26 Pekahia thil tih zawng zawng chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings15:27 Uzia chu Juda lal kum sawmnga leh pahnih a nih kumin Remalia fapa Peka chu Israel ramah lal a ni ṭan a, Samaria khuaah kum sawmhnih a lal a." 
2Kings15:28 Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti a, Nebata fapa Jeroboama thil sual tih, Israel-te a hruai khawlohna sual kha a thlah chuang lo." 
2Kings15:29 Peka lal lai hian Asuria lal Tiglat Pilesera chuan Ijon te, Abel-beth-maaka te, Janoa te, Kades te leh Hazor khua te chu a la a, Gilead ram te, Galili ram te, Naftali ram te a la bawk a, mite chu Asuria ramah salah a hâwn a." 
2Kings15:30 Uzia fapa Jothama chu Judai lal kum sawmhnih a nih kumin Ela fapa Hosea chuan Peka chu a phiar ru a, a bei a, a that a; a aiah a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings15:30 Uzia fapa Jothama chu Judai lal kum sawmhnih a nih kumin Ela fapa Hosea chuan Peka chu a phiar ru a, a bei a, a that a; a aiah a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings15:31 Peka thil tih dangte chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings15:32 Remalia fapa Peka chu Israel lal kum hnih a nih kumin Uzia fapa Jothama chu," 
2Kings15:33 kum sawmhnih leh panga a ni a, Juda lal a ni ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh paruk a lal a, a nu chu Zadoka fanu Jerusi a ni." 
2Kings15:34 A pa Uzia tih angin Lalpa hmuha thil ṭha a ti a. 
2Kings15:35 Hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsângte erawh chu a tiral lo; miten thil an hlân a, rimtui an hâl ta cheu a ni. Tempul hmâr lam kawngkhâr hi Jothama siam a ni." 
2Kings15:36 Jothama thil tih dangte chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings15:37 A lal lai hian Lalpa chuan Suria lal Rezina leh Israel lal Peka chu Judai ram bei tûrin a rawn tîr a ni. 
2Kings15:38 Jothama chu a thi a, Davida khawpui lalho thlânah an phûm a, a fapa Ahaza chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings16:1 Remalia fapa Peka chu Israel lal kum sâwm leh pasarih a nih kumin Jothama fapa Ahaza chu 
2Kings16:2 kum sawmhnih a nihin Judai ramah a lal ṭan a. Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh paruk a lal a. A pu Davida angin Lalpa hmuha thil ṭha a ti ve lo; Lalpa lâwm loh zâwng a ti thung a. 
2Kings16:3 Israel lalho tih dân ṭha lo a zâwm ve a ni. Ama fapa ngei pakhat pawh hâlral thilhlan atân a talh a, milem hmaah a hlân a; Israel-te hmaa Lalpa hnawh chhuah hnam danghote thiltih tenawm tak tak tih an chînte kha tih a chîng ve ta a ni." 
2Kings16:4 Tlâng tinrênga hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsângah te, thingbuk ṭha hlim apiangah te thilhlante a hlân a, rimtuite a hâl ṭhîn." 
2Kings16:5 Suria lal Rezina leh Israel lal Peka chuan Jerusalem an bei a; mahse, an la thei lo." 
2Kings16:6 Hetih lai hian Suria lal Rezina chuan Elath khua a la leh a, Juda-ho va awmte chu a hnawt chhuak a, Edom-ho chu Elath khuaah chuan tûn thlengin an awm ta a ni." 
2Kings16:7 Ahaza chuan Asuria lal Tiglat Pilesera hnênah palai a tîr a, “I chhiahhlawh, i fa ka nih hi, Suria lal leh Israel lalin min bei a, an kut ata min rawn chhan chhuak ta che,” a ti a." 
2Kings16:8 Ahaza chuan Lalpa Tempul leh lal sum dahna in ata tangka leh rangkachak awm chu Asuria lal biak tlawn nân a thawn a. 
2Kings16:9 Asuria lal chuan Ahaza ngen angin Damaska khua chu a sipaite nên a bei a, a la a, Rezina chu a that a, mite chu a khawpui Kir-ah salah a hâwn a." 
2Kings16:10 Asuria lal Tiglat Pilesera hmu tûrin Ahaza chu Damaska khuaah a kal a, Damaska khuaa maichâm chu a en a, puithiam Uria a ko va, maichâm an siam dân hmang chu chipchiar takin a entîr a." 
2Kings16:11 Uria chuan Damaska khuaa mi ang chiah maichâm a siam a, Ahaza lo kîr hmain a siam zo va." 
2Kings16:12 Damaska khua aṭanga a lo hâwn chuan Ahaza chuan maichâm siam zawh tawh chu a rawn hmu a. 
2Kings16:13 Lal chuan hâlral thilhlan te, buhbâl thilhlan te a hlân a, uain thilhlan te a bun a, remna thilhlan thisen te chu maichâmah chuan a theh a." 
2Kings16:14 Dâr maichâm, Lalpa hnêna hlan tawh chu maichâm thar leh Tempul inkâra awm a ni a, a la sawn a, maichâm thar hmâr lamah a dah sawn ta a." 
2Kings16:15 Uria hnênah, “Ka maichâm hi a lian zâwk a, zîng hâlral thilhlan leh tlai hâlral thilhlan hâl nân hmang la, lal leh mipui puala hâlral leh buhbâl thilhlante pawh hâl ṭhîn la, mipui uain thilhlante chu bun ṭhîn ang che. Hâl ral atân leh thil dang atâna ran hlan thisen chu he maichâmah hian theh ang che. Dâr maichâm erawh chu Pathian ka rawn biak nân khêk tlat ang che,” a ti a." 
2Kings16:16 Uria chuan lal thu ang chuan a ti a. 
2Kings16:17 Lal Ahaza chuan dâr nawrlirh chu a phelh darh a, tui bâwm chu a la thla a. Dâr tuizêm, bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih chunga inhûng pawh kha a sawn a, lungrem chungah a hûng a." 
2Kings16:18 Asuria lal tlawn lungawi nân Ahaza chuan Tempul aṭangin lalṭhutthlêng hûnna tûr dawhkân pawh chu a la sawn a, Tempula lal luhna tûr bîka siam kawngka pawh a hnawh ta a." 
2Kings16:19 Lal Ahaza thiltih dang zawng zawng chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings16:20 Ahaza chu a thi a, Davida khawpuia lal thlânah an phûm a, a fapa Hezekia chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings17:1 Ahaza chu Juda lal kum sâwm leh pahnih a nih kumin Ela fapa Hosea chu Israel lal a lo ni a, Samaria khuaah kum kua a lal a." 
2Kings17:1 Ahaza chu Juda lal kum sâwm leh pahnih a nih kumin Ela fapa Hosea chu Israel lal a lo ni a, Samaria khuaah kum kua a lal a." 
2Kings17:2 Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti a, a hmaa Israel lalte ang êm erawh chu a ni lo." 
2Kings17:3 Asuria lal Salmanesera chuan a rawn bei a, Hosea chu a lo inpe a, kum tin chhiah a chawi ta a." 
2Kings17:3 Asuria lal Salmanesera chuan a rawn bei a, Hosea chu a lo inpe a, kum tin chhiah a chawi ta a." 
2Kings17:4 Kum khat chu Hosea chuan Aigupta lal Soa hnênah palai a tîr a, ṭanpuiah a sâwm a; kum tin chhiah Asuria hnêna a pêk kha a pe duh ta lo va. Salmaneseran chu chu a hriatin Hosea chu a man a, tân inah a khung ta a." 
2Kings17:4 Kum khat chu Hosea chuan Aigupta lal Soa hnênah palai a tîr a, ṭanpuiah a sâwm a; kum tin chhiah Asuria hnêna a pêk kha a pe duh ta lo va. Salmaneseran chu chu a hriatin Hosea chu a man a, tân inah a khung ta a." 
2Kings17:5 Salmanesera chuan Israel ram chu a rûn ta a, Samaria khua chu a hual a. An hual kum thumna," 
2Kings17:6 Hosea kum kua a lal kumah Samaria khua chu Asuria lal chuan a la ta a; Israel-te chu salah a man a, Asuria ramah a hruai a. Ṭhenkhat chu Hala khuaah te a awmtîr a, ṭhenkhat chu Gozan bial Habor lui kamah te, Media ram khuaah te a awmtîr a." 
2Kings17:6 Hosea kum kua a lal kumah Samaria khua chu Asuria lal chuan a la ta a; Israel-te chu salah a man a, Asuria ramah a hruai a. Ṭhenkhat chu Hala khuaah te a awmtîr a, ṭhenkhat chu Gozan bial Habor lui kamah te, Media ram khuaah te a awmtîr a." 
2Kings17:7 Israel-ten an Pathian, Lalpa laka thil sual an tih avângin Samaria khua chu a chhe ta a ni. Aigupta lal kut ata a chhan chhuak a, Aigupta ram aṭang chuan a hruai chhuak a; mahse, Pathian dang an biaksan a," 
2Kings17:8 hnam dang, an hmaa a hnawh chhuahte awm dân kha an la a, Israel lalten thil ṭha lo tak an chîn chhuahte chu an chîng ve ta zêl a ni." 
2Kings17:9 An Pathian remtih loh zâwng Israel-te chuan an ti a; an khaw tê ber leh lian berah pawh hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsâng an siam zêl a; 
2Kings17:10 mual tinah mai, thingbuk ṭha deuh hlim apiangah lung milem leh pathiannu Aseri lem thing an phun thliah thluah a." 
2Kings17:11 Ram ata Lalpa hnawh chhuahte tih dân ṭhin angin hnam dang maichâmahte chuan rimtui an hâl a. An thil sual tihte chuan Lalpa chu an tithinur a. 
2Kings17:12 Lalpa thupêk, milem biak loh tûr a tih chu an awih duh lo." 
2Kings17:13 Lalpa chuan Israel-te leh Juda-te chu hrilh tûrin a tirhkoh leh zâwlneite a tîr ṭhîn a, “In khawsak dân tenawm tak hi bânsan ula, in thlahtute hnêna ka dân pêk ziakna bu-a chuang ka chhiahhlawh zâwlneite sawi, ka thupêkte leh ka thuruatte kha zâwm zâwk rawh u,” tiin." 
2Kings17:14 Mahse, an awih duh tlat lo, an pute angin luhlul an chhuah a, an Pathian, Lalpa chu an ring duh mawlh lo." 
2Kings17:15 A thuruatte chu an hnâwl a, an pate nêna a thuthlung chu an bawhchhia a, a zilhna pakhat mah an bengkhawn duh lo. An ho êm a, milem ho tak takte an be mai mai a, Lalpa chuan, ‘an awm dân la suh u’ a tih, an vêla hnam dangte awm dân chu an la a." 
2Kings17:16 Lalpa, an Pathian thupêk zawng zawng an hnâwl a, dârin bâwngno lem pahnih an chhûng a, chibai an bûk a. Pathiannu Aseri limte an siam a, arsite chibai an bûk a, Baal rawng an bâwl a." 
2Kings17:17 An fanu an fapate chu hnam dang pathian hnêna hâlral thilhlanah an hlân a, ramhuaizâwl leh mitthi thlûk thiamte an râwn a. Lalpa hmuha thil ṭha lo tinrêng ti tûrin an inpumpêk a ni; chuvângin, an tithinur ta a ni." 
2Kings17:18 Israel mite chungah Lalpa chu a thinur a, a hmuh phâk lohvah a hnawt bo va, Juda-ho chauh an la awm ta a ni." 
2Kings17:19 Juda-ho pawh chuan an Pathian, Lalpa thupêkte chu an zâwm chuang bîk lo, Israel-te tih dân kha an la ve zêl zâwk a." 
2Kings17:20 Lalpa chuan Israel zawng zawngte chu a hnâwl ta a, a hrem a, hmêlma râwng pui pui kutah a pe a, a hmuh phâk loh tûrah a tîr bo ta a ni." 
2Kings17:21 Lalpa chuan Israel-te kha Juda-ho laka a tihhran hnu khân Nebata fapa Jeroboama chu an lalah an siam a. Lalpa bânsan tûrin Israel-te chu a ti a, sual râpthlâk tak a tihtîr a nih kha." 
2Kings17:22 Jeroboama hnung chu an zui a, thil sual a tih ang apiang chu an ti ve ta a." 
2Kings17:23 A chhiahhlawh zâwlneite hmanga a sawi ang khân a hmuh phâk loh tûrah a hnawt bo ta nge nge a ni. Tichuan, Israel mite chu Asuria ramah tûn thlengin salah an la tang a ni." 
2Kings17:24 Asuria lal chuan Babulon te, Kutha te, Iva te, Hamath te leh Sefarvaim khuaa awm te chu a hruai a, Israel sala hruai tâkte aiah Samaria ramah chuan a awmtîr a; chûnga khuate chu an luah a, an chêng ta a." 
2Kings17:25 An lo awm tirh chuan Lalpa biak nachâng an hre lo va; sakeibakneite a tîr a, a seh ṭhîn a." 
2Kings17:26 Asuria lal chu, Samaria ram khuaa a mi dahte chuan chu ram pathian dân chu an hre lo va; chuvângin, chu pathian chuan seh tûrin sakeibakneite a tîr a ni tih an hrilh a." 
2Kings17:27 Lal chuan, “Sala kan man puithiam pakhat kha chhuah ula, an ram pathian dân zirtîra, an zînga awm ve tûrin kîrtîr teh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings17:28 Tichuan, Israel puithiam pakhat Samaria khua aṭanga sala an man chu a kal a, Bethel-ah a lo awm a; chuta ṭang chuan mite chu Lalpa biak dân tûr a zirtîr a." 
2Kings17:29 Samaria rama awm tate chuan anmahni milem an siam ta zêl a. Israel-hovin Pathian biakna hmun tûr an siamah chuan an dah a, pâwl hrang hrang khân mahni awmna khuaah milem an siam ṭheuh zêl a." 
2Kings17:30 Babulon aṭanga lo kalte chuan Sukot-benot lim an siam a, Kutha mite chuan Nergala lim an siam a, Hamath-ho chuan Asima lim," 
2Kings17:31 Iva mite chuan Nibhaza lim, leh Tartaka lim te, Sefarvaim-ho te chuan an pathian Andramelek leh Anamelek lim hmaah an fanu leh an fapate hâlral thilhlan atân an hlân." 
2Kings17:32 Hêng mite hian Lalpa chu an be ve tak a, an zînga mi tu pawh puithiamah an ṭantîr a, hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsângah te puithiam hna an thawhtîr a, an thilhlante an lo hlansak ṭhîn." 
2Kings17:33 Lalpa chu an bia a, an lo kalna ram tih dân angin anmahni pathiante chu an be tho va ni." 
2Kings17:34 Vawiin thlengin an tih dân hlui chu an la chîng a ni. Lalpa chu an be tak tak lo, a dân leh a thupêk, Jakoba thlah, Israel tih tâkte hnêna a pêk chu an zâwm hek lo." 
2Kings17:35 Israel mite nên Lalpa chuan thu a thlung a, “Pathian dang be suh u; chibai bûk suh ula, an rawng bâwl suh ula, an hnênah thilhlan hlân hek suh u." 
2Kings17:36 Zo tak leh thei taka Aigupta ram aṭanga lachhuaktu che u thu hi awih rawh u, chibai min bûk ang a, thilhlante ka hmaah in hlân tûr a ni." 
2Kings17:37 In tâna ka ziak, dânte leh thupêkte hi in zâwm fo tûr a ni, pathian dangte thu in awih tûr a ni lo." 
2Kings17:38 Thuthlung ka siamsak che u hi in theihnghilh tûr a ni hek lo. 
2Kings17:39 Kei in Lalpa, in Pathian thu hi in awih tûr a ni; tichuan, in hmêlmate lakah ka chhan chhuak ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Kings17:40 Amaherawhchu, chûng mite chuan an bengkhawn lo, an tih ṭhin chu an ti zêl mai a ni." 
2Kings17:41 Hêng mite hian Lalpa chu chibai zawng an bûk na a, an milemte chu an be tho mai, an thlahte pawhin tûn thlengin chutiang chuan an la ti zêl a ni." 
2Kings18:1 Ela fapa Hosea chu Israel lal kum thum a nih kumin Ahaza fapa Hezekia chu 
2Kings18:1 Ela fapa Hosea chu Israel lal kum thum a nih kumin Ahaza fapa Hezekia chu 
2Kings18:2 kum sawmhnih leh pangaa upa a nihin Juda lal a ni ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh pakua a lal a. A nu chu Zekaria fanu Abijai a ni." 
2Kings18:3 A pu Davida angin Lalpa hmuha thil ṭha a ti a. 
2Kings18:4 Hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsângte a tichhia a, lungphunte a tibung a, pathiannu Aseri lim thing phunte chu a kit a. Mosia dâr rûl siam Nehustan an tih chu a chhu chhia a. Chumi hun thleng chuan Israel-ten dâr rûl lem tân rimtui an hâl ṭhîn." 
2Kings18:5 Hezekia chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu a ring a, Juda lal, amah ang hi an awm ngai lo, an awm leh tawh hek lo vang." 
2Kings18:6 Lalpa chu a vuan tlat a, a thu a hnial ngai lo. Mosia hnêna Pathian thupêk kha ngun takin a zâwm ṭhîn." 
2Kings18:7 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan a awmpui a, a thiltih apiangah a hmuingîl zêl a ni. Asuria lakah a hel a, a thu a awih duh lo." 
2Kings18:8 Filistia mite a sawisa ṭhîn, an awmna apiang a rûn a; khaw tê ber pawh, khaw lian ber pawh Gaza leh a chhehvêl ramte pawh a hrût ṭhîn." 
2Kings18:9 Hezekia kum li a lal kum chuan Hosea chu Israel lal kum sarih a ni hman tawh a, Asuria lal Salmanesera chuan Israel ram a rawn rûn a; Samaria khua chu a hual a." 
2Kings18:9 Hezekia kum li a lal kum chuan Hosea chu Israel lal kum sarih a ni hman tawh a, Asuria lal Salmanesera chuan Israel ram a rawn rûn a; Samaria khua chu a hual a." 
2Kings18:10 An hual kum thum kum, Hezekia lal kum ruk kum chuan an la ta a, chu chu Hosea lal kum kuana a ni." 
2Kings18:10 An hual kum thum kum, Hezekia lal kum ruk kum chuan an la ta a, chu chu Hosea lal kum kuana a ni." 
2Kings18:11 Asuria lal chuan Israel-te chu salah a man a, Asuria ramah a hruai a, a ṭhen erawh chu Gozan bial Habor lui kamah te, Media khuaah te a awmtîr a." 
2Kings18:12 Israel-ten an Pathian Lalpa thu an awih loh avângin Samaria khua chu an la a ni, thuthlung a siamte kha an bawhchhia a, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia dân pakhat mah an zâwm duh hek lo. An ngaithla duh lo va, an pawm duh lo va." 
2Kings18:13 Hezekia kum sâwm leh pali a lal kumin Asuria lal Senakeriba chuan Judai rama kulh nei khuate chu a bei a, a la ta hlawm a." 
2Kings18:14 Lakis khuaa Senakeriba awm chu Hezekia chuan, “Thil ka lo tidik lo a ni; min kîrsan la, i phût ang ang ka pe ang che,” tiin thu a thawn a. Asuria lal chuan tangkarua kg. sîngkhat leh rangkachak kg. sângkhat a lo phût a." 
2Kings18:15 Tempul leh lal sum bâwma tangka awm zawng zawng chu a thawn a," 
2Kings18:16 Tempul kawngkhâra rangkachak belte chu a khawk a, amah ngeiin kawngka biang a tuamna rangkachak pawh chu a khawk a, Senakeriba chu a thawn a." 
2Kings18:17 Asuria lal chuan Lakis aṭangin Jerusalem-a Hezekia chu bei tûrin sipai tam tak a tîr a, a sipai hotu lian lian pathum-Tartana te, Rab-Saria te leh Rab-Sakea te chuan an ho va. Jerusalem an han thlen chuan dîl chhakta zâwk aṭanga tuikawng kam, puansutu hmun panna kawngah chuan an awm a." 
2Kings18:18 Lal chu an au va, lal in enkawltu Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkhaziaktu Sibna te, Asafa fapa, thil chhinchhiahtu Joa te chu an lo chhuak a." 
2Kings18:19 Rab-Sakea chuan an hnênah, “Hezekia hi han hrilh rawh u, lal ropui Asuria lal chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Tu nge maw rinchhan i neiha, heti taka i inchhutngên le!" 
2Kings18:20 Hmui themthiam ringawtin sipai chakna leh indo thiamna i ngam thei dâwn em ni? Asuria lal laka i hel vei hi tu nge rawn pui dâwn che? 
2Kings18:21 Aigupta-in a rawn pui ang che maw? Luang tiang hawl ang lek a ni asin, a tliak ang a, i kut a chhun mai ang. Aigupta lal Farawa chu amah rinchhantute tân chutiang lek chu a ni asin." 
2Kings18:22 “In Pathian Lalpa chu kan rinchhan a ni in ti elo? Juda mite leh Jerusalem mite chu ‘Jerusalem-ah chauh Lalpa chu biak tûr a ni’ in ti vei a, hmun danga Lalpa maichâm leh a biakna hmun tichhetu kha Hezekia hi a nih kha." 
2Kings18:23 Tichuan, ka pu, Asuria lal nên inremsiam mai rawh u; a chuang tûr mihring i hmuh zawh dâwn phei chuan sakawr sânghnih ka pe nghâl mai ang che." 
2Kings18:24 Asuria sipai hotu neu ber pawh in tluk si lo va, sakawr-tawlailîr te, sakawr chungchuang te Aigupta chuan a rawn thawn tehlul ang che maw?" 
2Kings18:25 In ram ka rawn bei a, ka rawn la hi Lalpa thu a ni lâwm ni? Amah Lalpa ngei chuan, ‘Han bei la, la vek rawh,’ min ti a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings18:26 Eliakima te, Sebna te leh Joa te chuan, “Suria ṭawngin thu sawi rawh, kan hre thei e; Juda ṭawng chu hmang suh, kulh banga ṭhute hian an ngaithla ṭhup a ni,” an ti a." 
2Kings18:27 Ani chuan, “Asuria lal hian nangni leh in lal Hezekia hnênah chauh thu sawi tûrin mi tîr em ni? Ni suh e; mipui, tûna kulh banga ṭhu, nangmahni ang bawka mahni zun leh êk eia in tûrte hnênah pawh thu ka sawi a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings18:28 Tin, Rab-Sakea chu a ding a, Juda ṭawngin a au va, “Lal ropui Asuria thu hi ngaithla teh u:" 
2Kings18:29 ‘Hezekia chuan bum che u suh se, ka lakah a hum thei chuang lo vang che u,’ lal chuan a ti e." 
2Kings18:30 ‘ Lalpa chuan min chhan dâwn alâwm, Asuria lal chuan he khua hi a la lo vang’ tiin Lalpa ring tûrin bum che u suh se." 
2Kings18:31 Hezekia thu ngaichâng duh suh u, Asuria lal chuan, ‘Inremsiam ang u, lo chhuak ula, ka lo kal leh hma chu mahni grep rah in ei ang a, mahni theipui rah in tlân ang a, mahni tuizêm tui in in ṭheuh dâwn nia,’ a ti a." 
2Kings18:32 Lal chuan in ram anga ram ṭhaah, grep huan ṭha tak tak, uain tamna ramah a la awmtîr ang che u a, chhangphut tûr buh ṭhat duhna ram, oliv kûng te, a hriak te, khawizu tamna ramah chuan a awmtîr ang che u. A thu in awih chuan nungdamin in chhuak ang, in thi lo vang. ‘ Lalpa chuan min chhan chhuak ngei dâwn e,’ tiin Hezekia chuan bum che u suh se," 
2Kings18:33 Hnam dang pathiante zingah Asuria lal laka chhanhim thei an awm em ni? 
2Kings18:34 Hamath leh Arpad pathiante kha khaw nge an awm tâk? Sefarvaim pathian te, Hena leh Iva pathiante kha khaw nge an awm tâk? Samaria khua chhan thei an awm em ni?" 
2Kings18:35 Hêng ram zawng zawng pathiante hian engtikah khân nge an ram chu an chhan ngai? Lalpa pawhin Jerusalem khua hi a chhan thei bîk dâwn em ni?” a ti a. 
2Kings18:36 Lalin, “Tu man chhâng suh u,” a tih avângin an ngawi ṭhuap a, kam khat mahin an chhâng lo." 
2Kings18:37 Lal chhûngkaw enkawltu Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, ziaktu Sebna te, thil chhinchhiahtu Asafa fapa Joa te chuan an puan an pawtthlêr a, an lo kal a, Rab-Sakea thu chu Hezekia an hrilh a." 
2Kings19:1 Lal Hezekia chuan chûng thu chu a hriatin a puan a pawtthlêr a, saiip puan a sin a, Lalpa Tempulah a lût ta a." 
2Kings19:2 Lal chhûngkaw enkawltu Eliakima te, ziaktu Sebna te leh puithiam zînga upate chu saiip puan sinin zâwlnei Isaia hnênah a tîr a." 
2Kings19:3 “Lal Hezekia chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Vawiin hian kan tân manganna ni a lo thleng ta; min hmuhsit a, min diriam tâk êm hi! Nau hrin hun tawh a nu chau lutuk tawh si ang mai kan nih hi." 
2Kings19:4 Pathian nung sâwt tûra Asuria lal mi tirh, Rab-Sakea thu sawi kha, Lalpa, i Pathian chuan a lo hre châwk ang a; Lalpa, i Pathian chuan hriain hrem teh se. Kan mi la dam chhunte tân nang ṭawngṭai rawh khai,’ a ti e,” an va ti a." 
2Kings19:5 Lal Hezekia mi tirhte chu Isaia hnên an va thleng a," 
2Kings19:6 Isaia chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Asuria lal chhiahhlawhten min diriam dân thu i hriat kha hlau suh." 
2Kings19:7 Ngai teh, a rilru ka tizâm ang a, thuthang ka hriattîr ang; a ramah a kîr ang a, a ram ngeiah khandaihin an sât hlum ang,’ tiin in pu hnênah sawi rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings19:8 Rab-Sakea chu a ṭîn a, Lakis aṭangin Asuria lal chu a insawn a, Libna khua a bei tih a hriatin chu lam chu a pan a, a va hmu a." 
2Kings19:9 Ethiopia lal Tirhaka chanchin Asuria lal chu an hrilh a; amah bei tûrin a lo thawk tih a hriatin Hezekia hnênah zualko a tîr a, lehkha a thawn a." 
2Kings19:10 Judai ram lal Hezekia hnênah, “I rinchhan in Pathian chuan, ‘Asuria lal kutah Jerusalem chu a pe lo vang,’ tiin bum che u suh se." 
2Kings19:11 Asuria lalten an ram luah dang zawng zawnga an thiltih, an ram an tihchhiat vek dânte i hria a. Nang tehlul hi i him bîk dâwn em ni?" 
2Kings19:12 ‘Ka paten an tihchhiat hnam Gozan te, Haran te, Rezep te leh Telasar-a awm Edom-ho te kha an pathianten an chhan thei em ni?" 
2Kings19:13 Khawiah nge Hamath lal te, Arpad lal te, Sefarvaim-a khaw awm lal te, Hena lal te, Iva lal te kha an awm tâk?’ va ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings19:14 Zualko lehkha rawn ken chu Hezekia chuan a hmuhin a han chhiar a, Lalpa Tempulah a chho va, Lalpa hmaah chuan a pharh a." 
2Kings19:15 Hezekia chu Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, Cherub chunga ṭhu, nang chauh hi Pathian chu i ni, ram luah zawng zawng rorêltu i ni a, lei leh vân pawh hi i siam a ni." 
2Kings19:16 Aw Lalpa, i beng lo chhi la, ngaithla teh. Aw Lalpa, meng la, han en teh; Pathian nung sâwt tûra Senakeriban thu a rawn sawi zawng zawng hi ngaithla teh." 
2Kings19:17 Aw Lalpa, Asuria lalte hian hnam tin an bei a, an ramte an tihchhiat tâk hi." 
2Kings19:18 An pathiante chu meiah an rawhsak a, chu chu Pathian an ni lo rêng a, mihring kuta siam thing leh lung mai mai an ni a, chhe ngei tûr phei zawng an ni." 
2Kings19:19 Aw Lalpa, tûnah a kut aṭang hian min chhan chhuak la; tichuan, khawvêl ram luah zawng zawnga miten nang chauh hi Pathian, Lalpa chu i ni tih an hre dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Kings19:20 Amoza fapa Isaia chuan Hezekia hnênah mi a tîr a: “A hnêna i ṭawngṭaina chungchâng leh Asuria lal Senakeriba chungchânga 
2Kings19:21 Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa thu sawi chu hei hi a ni: ‘Zion fanuin a hmusit che a, a nuihzat che. Jerusalem fanuin I tlânchhia chu lu a thinkhum che." 
2Kings19:22 Tu nge i nuihzata, i sâwt le? Tu lakah nge i râwl i rin? Tu lakah nge i hawi chapo hle le? Israel Mi Thianghlima lakah a ni." 
2Kings19:23 I chhiahhlawhte hmangin Lalpa i sâwt vei a, ‘Tawlailîr tam tak nên tlâng sâng sângah ka lâwn a, Lebanon tlâng kil tin ka fang; Sidar thing sâng ka kit a, Fâr thing ṭha ṭha ka kit asin. A tlâng sâng lai ngaw rilte pawh ka fang vek a." 
2Kings19:24 Tuite ka chhun chhuak a, ka in bawk a, Aigupta luite ka kephahin ka dai kang vek a ni,’ i ti vei a." 
2Kings19:25 Hmân aṭanga tih ka tum tawh a ni, I hre na nge? Tûna thil lo thleng hi hmâna ka rêl daih tawh a ni. Kulh nei khuate i tihchhiata," 
2Kings19:26 A chhûnga chêng an zâmzia te leh thlabâr taka an mualpho te, Phûl leh muala hlobet, In chung zâwla hnim ṭiak tîr te, Thli lum chhêm vuai tâk te, Ka rêl lâwk vek a ni." 
2Kings19:27 Ka chunga i ânhla te, I ṭhut, i luh leh chhuahte ka hria asin." 
2Kings19:28 Ka chungah hian i âng vei a, I chapozia ka beng a lo thleng ta, I hnârah chuan hnâr kawl ka vuah ang a, Lakam ka barh ang che a, I lo kalna lamah ka hnûk kîr leh ang che,” tiin." 
2Kings19:29 Lal Hezekia hnênah, “Hei hi i tân chhinchhiahna a ni ang. Kuminah buh hli in ring ang a, nakkumah pawh chumi hli chu in ring leh ang. A kum thumnaah chuan thlai chîng ula, a rah in seng dâwn nia. Grep phun ula, a rah in ei bawk ang," 
2Kings19:30 Judai rama la dam chhunte chu theikûng, thûk taka zung thlâk, rah tup ang hi an la ni ang." 
2Kings19:31 Jerusalem aṭangin dam chhuak tûr an awm a, Zion tlângah thi bâng an awm ngei dâwn a ni. Lalpa ṭhahnemngaihna chuan chu chu a ti ngei ang." 
2Kings19:32 Chuvângin, Asuria lal chungchâng chu Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘He khawpuiah hian a lût lo vang a, thal khat pawh a thlah lo vang, phaw nên a rawn bei lo vang a, lei kulh a lai hek lo vang." 
2Kings19:33 A lo kalna kawngah ngei a haw leh ang, khuaah a lo lût tawp lo vang.’" 
2Kings19:34 He khua hi keimah avâng leh ka chhiahhlawh Davida avângin ka vêng ang a, ka hum dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings19:35 Chumi zân chuan Lalpa tirhkoh chu Asuria-ho bûkah chuan a kal a, mi nuaikhat leh sîngriat leh sangnga a that a, zînga an han thawh chuan mitthi ruang hlîr a lo thal phung a." 
2Kings19:36 Asuria lal Senakeriba chu a ṭîn a, a haw a, Ninevi khuaah a awm ta a." 
2Kings19:37 Nisroka tempula a pathian biaa a kûn lai chu a fa Andrameleka leh Sarezera te chuan khandaihin an sât hlum a, Ararat ramah an tlân ta a. A fapa Esarhadona chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings20:1 Chûng lai chuan lal Hezekia chu thih ngamin a na a. Amoza fapa Isaian a rawn tlawh a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘I chhûngkaw thu rêl fel rawh, i thi dâwn si a, i dam chhuak dâwn lo ve,’ a ti,” a rawn ti a." 
2Kings20:2 Hezekia chuan bang lam a hawi a, a ṭawngṭai a," 
2Kings20:3 “Aw Lalpa, i hmaah dik takin ka awm ṭhîn a, thinlung thianghlim puin i mit hmuha thil ṭha ka tih ṭhin kha khawngaih takin hre reng ang che,” a ti a, a ṭap ta zawih zawih a." 
2Kings20:4 Isaia chu a haw a, lal in tual chu a pelh hmain Lalpa mite chunga rorêltu Hezekia hnênah chuan Lalpa chuan" 
2Kings20:5 a tîr kîr a, “‘Kei Lalpa, i pu Davida Pathian hian i ṭawngṭaina ka lo hria a, i mittui pawh ka hmu. Ka tidam ang che, a ni thum ni chuan Tempulah i kal thei ang." 
2Kings20:6 Kum sâwm leh pangain i dam chhûng hun ka pawtsei bawk ang. Asuria lal lakah nang leh he khua hi keimah avâng leh ka chhiahhlawh Davida avângin ka humhim dâwn a ni, a ti,’ va ti rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:7 Isaia chuan, “Theipui rah hmin hlâwm han la teh u,” a ti a. Theipui rah hlâwm chu a khawihliah chuan an belsak a, a lo dam ta a." 
2Kings20:8 Lal Hezekia chuan, “ Lalpa chuan min tidam ang a, ni thum ni chuan Tempulah ka kal thei ang tih engtin nge ka hriat ang?” a ti a." 
2Kings20:9 Isaian, “ Lalpa chuan a tidam dâwn che tih hriatna tûr chhinchhiahna a entîr ang che. I rahkaa hlim saw, rahka sâwm kîr nge i duh rahka sâwm kal belh se, i duh zâwk thlang rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:10 Hezekia chuan, “Rahka sâwm kaltîr chu a awl em mai, rahka sâwm kîr rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:11 Isaia chu a ṭawngṭai a, lal Ahaza rahka siama hlim chu Lalpa chuan rahka sâwm a tikîr a." 
2Kings20:12 Chumi lai chuan Babulon lal Baladana fapa Merodak-baladana chuan Hezekia chu a dam leh tih a hriatin thilpêk leh lehkha a rawn thawn a. 
2Kings20:13 Hezekia chuan anni chu a lo lâwm hle a, a sum dahna in te a entîr a, a tangkarua leh a rangkachak te, a mosola leh a thil rimtui te, a râlthuam dahkhâwmna in leh a ram chhûng hmun hrang hranga a ro dahte chu entîr loh rêng rêng a nei lo." 
2Kings20:14 Zâwlnei Isaia chu Hezekia hnênah a lo kal a, “Hêng mite hi khawi aṭanga lo kal nge an niha, eng nge an rawn sawi?” a ti a. Hezekia chuan, “Ram hla tak, Babulon aṭanga lo kal an nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:15 Isaia chuan, “Lal ina thil eng eng nge an hmuh?” a ti a. Lal chuan, “Engkim an hmu vek, thil dahnaa kan dah entîr loh rêng ka nei lo,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:16 Lal hnênah Isaia chuan, “ Lalpa thu hi ngaithla teh," 
2Kings20:17 ‘Ngai teh, i ina thil awm zawng zawng, i paten vawiin thlenga an dah khâwmte nên, Babulon-a an lâk vek hun a lo thleng lawk dâwn, eng mah hnutchhiah an nei lo vang,’ Lalpa chuan a ti e." 
2Kings20:18 Nangma hrin ngei, i fapate chu an man ang a, an til an rehsak ang a, Babulon lal rawng an bâwl ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:19 Lal Hezekia chuan a dam chhûng chu muang takin an awm ang a, an him dâwn tihna niin a ngai a, “ Lalpa thu i rawn thlen chu a ṭha alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:20 Lal Hezekia thil tih dang zawng zawng, a huaizia te, tui khuapin tui kawng a kera khuaa tui a lâk luh thu te, Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang vek a ni." 
2Kings20:21 Hezekia chu a thi a, a fapa Manasea chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings21:1 Kum sâwm leh pahnih a nihin Manasea chu Juda lalah a ṭang ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh panga a lal a. A nu chu Hefzibi a ni." 
2Kings21:2 A mite hmaa Lalpa hnawh chhuah hnamte tih dân tenawm tak tak chu Manasea chuan a ti ve a, Lalpa lakah thil sual a ti a." 
2Kings21:3 A pa Hezekia tihchhiat, hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsângte chu a din ṭha leh a, Baal tân maichâm a siam a, Israel lal Ahaba ang khân Aseri limte a phun a, vâna arsite pawh a bia a." 
2Kings21:4 ‘Jerusalem khua hi min biakna hmun tûr chu a ni,’ tiin Lalpa chuan a hmun hi a thlang a; chuta Lalpa Tempulah chuan maichâm chi tinrêng a dah a." 
2Kings21:5 Tempul chhûng pindan pahnihah chuan vâna arsi rual tân te maichâm a dah thluah a. 
2Kings21:6 A fapa pakhat chu hâlral thilhlanah a hlân a. Aien te, ṭhumvâwrte a chîng a, ramhuaizâwl leh mitthi thlûk thiamte a ruai ṭhîn. Lalpa hmuha thil sual nasa tak a ti a, a tithinur a ni." 
2Kings21:7 Davida leh a fapa Solomona hnênah Lalpa chuan, ‘He Jerusalem khuaa Tempul hmun hi Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnih ram zawng zawng zîngah min biakna hmun tûra ka thlan a ni,’ a tih, Tempul chhûngah khân Aseri lim thing a phun a." 
2Kings21:8 ‘Israel mite chuan ka thupêk zawng zawng an awiha, ka dân, Mosia hrilh kha an zawm vek chuan an thlahte hi ram ka pêk ata chu ka hnawt chhuak lo vang,’ a ti bawk a." 
2Kings21:9 Judai rama mite chuan Lalpa thu chu an awih lo va, an hmaa Lalpa hnawh chhuah hnamte tih ṭhin aia sual zâwk ti tûrin Manasea chuan a hruai a ni." 
2Kings21:10 Lalpa chuan a chhiahhlawh a zâwlneite hmangin hetiang hian a sawi: 
2Kings21:11 “Manasea chuan thil tenawm tak tak, he rama an awm hmaa awm Kanan mite tih aia tenawm zâwk a ti ṭhîn, a milem siam chawpin Juda-te chu a hruai sual a ni." 
2Kings21:12 Tichuan, Kei, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian hian, a hria apiangin mak an tih êm êm tûr Jerusalem leh Judai ramah chhiatna ka thlentîr ang." 
2Kings21:13 Samaria khua leh Israel lal Ahaba leh a thlahte ka sawisa ang khân Jerusalem pawh ka sawisa ang. Thlêng hrûk fai an khup ang hian Jerusalem pawh a chhûnga awmte chu ka hru fai ang. 
2Kings21:14 Ka mi, la thi bângte pawh chu ka hnâwl ang a, an hmêlmate kutah ka pe ang a, chûng chuan an duh duhin an rawk ang a, an sawisa ang." 
2Kings21:15 An thlahtute Aigupta ram aṭanga an lo chhuah aṭang tawh khân tûn thlengin, ‘hei chu thil sual a ni’ ka tih chu an ti ṭhîn a, min tihthinur avângin chutiang chuan ka mite chu ka sawisa dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings21:16 Manasea chuan pawi khawih lo a that tam khawp a, Jerusalem khaw laiah thisen a luang zuih ṭhîn; Juda mipuite chu milem biak a chîntîr a, Lalpa lakah thil sual an tih phah ta a." 
2Kings21:17 Manasea thil tih dang, thil sual a tihte chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
2Kings21:18 Manasea chu a thi a, lal huan, lal Uzia huanah an phûm a, a fapa Amona chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings21:19 Amona chu kum sawmhnih leh pahniha upa a nihin Juda lalah a ṭang ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum hnih a lal a. A nu chu Jotba khaw mi Haruza fanu Mesulemeti a ni." 
2Kings21:20 A pa Manasea angin Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti a. 
2Kings21:21 A pa tih dân a la a, a pa biak ṭhîn milemte kha a be ve zêl a." 
2Kings21:22 An thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chu a hnâwl a, Lalpa thupêkte chu a awih duh lo." 
2Kings21:23 A hote zînga miin an phiar ru a, lal in chhûngah an that a." 
2Kings21:24 Juda-ho chuan Amona fapa Josia chu lalah an siam a. 
2Kings21:25 Amona thil tih dangte chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings21:26 Amona chu Uzia huana thlânah chuan an phûm a, a fapa Josia chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings22:1 Josia chu kum riat a nihin Juda lal a ni ṭan a, Jerusalemah kum sawmthum leh pakhat a lal a. A nu chu Bozkat khaw mi Adaia fanu Jedidi a ni." 
2Kings22:2 Josia chuan Lalpa lawmzâwng a ti a, a pu lal Davida awm dân a la a, Pathian dânte chu uluk takin a zâwm thlap ṭhîn." 
2Kings22:3 Kum sâwm leh pariat a lal kumin Josia chuan ziaktu Safana, Azalia fapa, Mesulama tupa chu Lalpa Tempulah a tîr a," 
2Kings22:4 “Puithiam lalber Hilkia hnênah kal la, Tempul kawngkhâra mipui thawhlâwm puithiamhovin an dawn kha eng zât nge tling tawh va zâwt teh." 
2Kings22:5 Tempul siam ṭha tûra mi ruatte kutah pe sela, anni chuan," 
2Kings22:6 mistiri te, in satu te leh lung chher mi te pe rawh se; Tempul siam ṭhatna tûr thing te, lung te lei teh se." 
2Kings22:7 Hêng kan mi ruatte hi mi rinawm tak tak an ni, en zuipui an ngai lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Kings22:8 Puithiam lalber Hilkia chuan ziaktu Safana hnênah, “Tempulah dân bu ka chhar e, hei,” a ti a, a pe a. Safana chuan a han chhiar a," 
2Kings22:9 Lal hnênah a lo kîr leh a, “I chhiahhlawhte chuan in chhûnga tangka an hmuhte chu an phawrh a, Lalpa Tempul siam ṭha tûra mi ruatte kutah an pe tawh e,” a ti a." 
2Kings22:10 Lal hnênah chuan, “Puithiam Hilkia chuan hei lehkhabu hi mi lo pe asin,” a ti a, lal hriat tûr chuan Safana chuan a chhiar ta a." 
2Kings22:11 Lalin Dân lehkhabua thu chu a han hriat chuan a puan a pawtthlêr a. 
2Kings22:12 Puithiam Hilkia te, Safana fapa Ahikama te, Mikaia fapa Akbora te, ziaktu Safana te, lal in enkawltu Asaia te hnênah lal chuan," 
2Kings22:13 “Kal ta ula, mipui leh Judai ram mi zawng zawng tân he Dân bu chhara zirtîrna chungchâng hi Lalpa min va râwnsak teh u. Kan pute chuan heta thu chuangte hi an ngaihsak lo va, tih tûrte hi an tih loh avângin Lalpa chu a thinur a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings22:14 Puithiam Hilkia te, Ahikama te, Akbora te, Safana te, Asaia te chu zâwlneinu, Mika fapa Saluma nupui Huldaii hnênah an kal a. A pasal Saluma hi Tikva fapa a ni, lal thawmhnaw enkawltu a ni a, Harhasa tupa a ni, Jerusalem vêng thara awm an ni." 
2Kings22:15 An hnênah chuan, “Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chuan, ‘A rawn tîrtu che u chu hrilh rawh u." 
2Kings22:16 Juda lalin a chhiar lehkhabua thu chuang ang khân Jerusalem leh a chhûnga chêngte chu ka sawisa dâwn. 
2Kings22:17 Min hawisan a, pathian dang hnênah thilhlan an hlân a, an thiltihte chuan min tithinur a ni. Jerusalem chungah ka thinur a alh ang a, a mit mai mai lo vang,’ a ti." 
2Kings22:18 Lalpa râwn tûra rawn tîrtu che u lal hnênah chuan sawi rawh u, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chuan, ‘Lehkhabua thu chuang chu i ngaihven a," 
2Kings22:19 Jerusalem leh a chhûnga chêngte ka sawisak dân tûr i hriatin pawi i ti a, Lalpa hmaah i inphahhniam a, puan pawtthlêrin i ṭap a. Hmuh râpthlâk khawp leh ânchhia inlawhna hiala hman tûrin khawpui chu ka sawisa dâwn a ni; mahse, i ṭawngṭaina chu ka lo hria a." 
2Kings22:20 I thih hma chuan Jerusalem chu ka tichhe lo vang; nang zawng thlamuang takin i thi ang,’ a ti e,” a ti a. Chu thu chu lal hnênah an rawn thlen leh a." 
2Kings23:1 Lal chuan Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a upate chu a ko khâwm a. 
2Kings23:2 Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a awm puithiam leh zâwlnei te, mipui, mi rethei leh hausate nên, an za chuan tempulah an lo kal a, Tempula an chhar Thuthlung bu chu an hriatah lal chuan a chhiar a." 
2Kings23:3 Dinna tûra an siamah chuan lal chu a ding a, Lalpa hnung zuia a thupêkte zâwma, a thuruatte leh a thupêkte chu ti tûrin Lalpa hmaah thu a tiam a. Rilru tak tak leh tihtakzetin thuthlung thu lehkhabua chuangte chu pawm tlat a tiam a. Mipui zawng zawng pawh chuan dingin thuthlung chu pawm an tiam ve a." 
2Kings23:4 Lal chuan puithiam lalber Hilkia te, a dawttu puithiamte leh kawngkhâr vêngtute chu Lalpa Tempul chhûnga Baal te, Aseri te leh vân arsi an biakna thil hman zawng zawng chu a lâk chhuahtîr a, Jerusalem dai Kidron luiruamah chuan a hâl a, a vâp chu Bethel-ah a kentîr a." 
2Kings23:5 Judai khawpuiah te, Jerusalem kiang vêla hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsânga thil hlântu atâna Juda lalten puithiam an lo dah, Baal hnênah te, ni leh thla hnênah te, arsi leh vâna thil awm hnênah te thil hlân ṭhîntu zawng zawng chu a bân a." 
2Kings23:6 Lalpa Tempul chhûnga pathiannu Aseri lim an phunte chu a la chhuak a, Jerusalem daiah Kidron ruamah chuan a hâl a, a vâp chu a râwt sawm a, vântlâng thlânmualah chuan a theh darh a." 
2Kings23:7 Tempula nawhchizuarho awmna, Aseri biakna tûr, nu hovin puan an tahna hmun chu a ṭhiat bawk a." 
2Kings23:8 Judai ram khawpui hrang hranga Geba leh Beer-seba inkâra awm puithiamte chu a hruai khâwm a, hnam dang pathian hnêna thil an hlanna ṭhin hmunsângte chu a tihbawlhhlawhsak a. Khawpui luhna kawngkhâr vei lam, khawpui awptu Josua siam kawngkhâr bula maichâm, kêlhuai lim an biaknate chu a ṭhiat a." 
2Kings23:9 Chûnga puithiama ṭang ṭhînte chu Tempula rawng an bâwl an phal lo, an puithiamte puala dah chhang dawidim telh loh erawh chu an ei ve thei." 
2Kings23:10 Moleka hnênah hâlral thilhlana pêk atân an fanu te, an fapa te an hlan tawh loh nân Hinom ruama Tofet chu a sawisa nek a." 
2Kings23:11 Juda lalten ni hnêna hlan tûr sakawr an pêkte chu Tempul tual kawngka bul, sawrkâr milian tak Nathan-meleka chênna in aṭanga hnai têah an dah ṭhîn, chûng chu a dah bo va, ni pathian an hnuh ṭhinna tawlailîrte chu a hâl a." 
2Kings23:12 Lal inahte leh Ahaza in chung chhâwng zâwla an maichâm te, Tempul pindan pahnihna Manasean maichâm a siam belhte nên chuan a ṭhiat a, a chhu chhe vek a, Kidron ruamah a paih a." 
2Kings23:13 Jerusalem khawchhak lam Oliv tlâng chhim lama Sidon pathian tenawm Astarte lim te, Moab pathian tenawm Khemosa te, Amon-ho pathian ngeiawm tak Milkoma lim an biakna tûr hmunsâng, Israel lal Solomona siamte kha a tibawlhhlawh zo vek a." 
2Kings23:14 Josia chuan lungphunte chu a chhu sawm a, pathiannu Aseri lim, an thingtum phunte chu a kit a; chûng awmna hmunah chuan mihring ruh a dah phung a." 
2Kings23:15 Israel hruai khawlotu Nebata fapa Jeroboaman Bethel khuaa pathian biakna tûra maichâm a siamte pawh Josia chuan a ṭhiat a, a lungte chu a tikeh a, a chhu dip vek a. Aseri limte pawh chu a hâl a." 
2Kings23:16 Josia chu a han hawi vêl a, mualah chuan thlân a hmu a, a phawrh a, mihring ruhte chu maichâmah chuan a hâl a, a tibawrhbâng ta a. Chutiang a nih tûr thu chu tûn hma, kût an hman ṭuma lal Jeroboaman maichâma thil a hlan laia zâwlneiin a hrilh lâwk kha. Josian a han en vêl chuan chu thu lo hrilh lâwktu" 
2Kings23:17 zâwlnei thlân chu a hmu a. “Tu thlân nge?” a ti a. Bethel khaw mite chuan, “Judai ram aṭanga lo kal zâwlnei, hêng i thil tih tâk lo sawi lâwktu thlân a ni,” an ti a." 
2Kings23:18 Josia chuan, “Khawih ve suh u, a ruhte chu awm mai mai teh se,” a ti a. Tichuan, tu man a ruhte chu an khawih lo, Samaria khua aṭanga lo kal zâwlnei ruh pawh an khawih lo." 
2Kings23:19 Israel ram khaw tinah Israel lalhovin hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsâng an lo siamte chu a tichhia a, chûng lalte chuan Lalpa chu an tithinur a ni. Bethel khuaa a tih ang khân an hâl a." 
2Kings23:20 Chûnga rawngbâwltu puithiamte chu a that a, maichâmah chuan mihring ruhte a hâl a, Jerusalem-ah a lo kîr leh ta a." 
2Kings23:21 Thuthlung bu-a ziak angin an Pathian, Lalpa chawimawi nân mipuite chu Kalhlên kût hmang tûrin lal Josia chuan a ti a." 
2Kings23:22 Hemi ṭuma mi ang rêngin Israel lal pawh, Juda lal pawh, Kalhlên kût hmang ropui, rorêltuten ro an rêl lai ata tu mah an la awm lo." 
2Kings23:23 Chutiangin Josia lal kum sâwm leh pariat kum chuan Jerusalem-ah Kalhlên kût an hmang ta a ni. 
2Kings23:24 Puithiam lalber Hilkian Tempula Dân bu a chhara chuang Dânte chu an zawm theih nân Josia chuan Jerusalem khua leh Judai ram ata chu aienthiam te, mitthi thlûk chîngte a hnawt chhuak a, chhûngkaw pathian an biak te, milem te leh hnam dangin pathian an biak te pawh chu a paihtîr vek a." 
2Kings23:25 Rilru leh tihtakzetin theihtâwp chhuaha Lalpa rawngbâwl leh Mosia dâna mi ang zâwm hi tûn hmain tu mah lal an la awm ngai lo, tûn hnuah pawh an awm tawh lo vang." 
2Kings23:26 Lal Manasea thiltihte avâng khân Juda-ho chungah Lalpa thin a ur a, tûn thleng pawhin a thinur a la dai lo a ni." 
2Kings23:27 “Israel-te chunga ka tih ang kha Juda-ho chungah pawh ka ti ve ang, Juda-ho chu ka hmuh phâk loh tûrah ka hnawt chhuak ang. Ka hmun thlan, Jerusalem chu ka hnâwl ang a, min biak ṭhinna tûra ka ruat Tempul chu ka chhuahsan bawk ang,” a ti a ni." 
2Kings23:28 Josia thil tih dangte chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings23:29 Josia lal lai hian Aigupta lal Nekoa chuan a sipaite Eufretis luiah Asuria lal ṭanpui tûrin a hruai a. Lal Josia hian lo dan a tum a. Megido-a an inbeihnaah a thi ta a. 
2Kings23:30 A hote chuan a ruang chu tawlailîrah an dah a, an hâwn a, lal thlânah an phûm ta a. Juda-ho chuan Josia fapa Jehoahaza lalah an thlang a, hriak an thih a." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahaza chu kum sawmhnih leh pathum a nihin Juda lal a lo ni a, Jerusalem-ah thla thum a lal a. A nu chu Libna khaw mi Jeremia fanu Hamutali a ni." 
2Kings23:32 A pute ang bawkin Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti a. 
2Kings23:33 Aigupta lal Nekoan Hamath bial Ribla hmunah salah a man a, a lal a tâwp ta a. Aigupta lal chuan Juda-te chu tangkarua kg. sângnga leh rangkachak kg. sawmnga a chawitîr a." 
2Kings23:34 Lal Nekoa chuan Josia fapa pakhat Eliakima chu a pa aiawh tûrin lalah a dah a, a hming a thlâksak a, Jehoiakima a vuah a. Jehoahaza chu Aigupta ramah a hruai a, a thi ta a." 
2Kings23:35 Lal Jehoiakima chuan Aigupta lalin chhiah a phût pe tûrin mipui hnênah, an hausak leh hausak loh athuin a khawn ve thung a." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoiakima chu kum sawmhnih leh panga a nihin Juda lal a lo ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh pakhat a lal a. A nu chu Ruma khaw mi Pedaia fanu Zebidi a ni. 
2Kings23:37 A pute ang bawkin Jehoiakima chuan Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti a. 
2Kings24:1 Jehoiakima a lal lai hian Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chuan Judai ram a rûn a, a hnuaiah Jehoiakima chu kum thum chhûng a lal a, a hel ta a." 
2Kings24:2 Lalpa chuan Babulon sipai rual te, Moab te, Amon sipai rual te chu Jehoiakima beia, Judai ram tichhe tûrin a tîr a. Hetianga a tih tûr thu hi Lalpa chuan a zâwlneite hmangin a lo sawi lâwk tawh rêng a ni." 
2Kings24:3 Lal Manasea thil sual tih te, pawi khawih lo a thah ṭeuh avângte khân hmuh phâk lohva Juda-ho a hnawh chhuah daih theih nân chûng thil chu Lalpa thupêka lo thleng a ni; Lalpa chuan Manasea thil tih hi a ngaidam thei ngang lo a ni." 
2Kings24:4  
2Kings24:5 Jehoiakima thil tih dang zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Kings24:6 Jehoiakima chu a thi a, a fapa Jehoiakina chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Kings24:7 Eufretis lui leh Aigupta hmâr lam ramri inkâr zawng zawng hi Babulon lal thuhnuaia a awm tâk avângin, Aigupta lal leh a sipaite chu an lo thawk chhuak leh tawh lo." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoiakina chu kum sâwm leh pariat a nihin Juda lal a lo ni a, Jerusalem-ah thla thum a lal a. A nu chu Jerusalem mi Elnathana fanu Nehusti a ni." 
2Kings24:9 A pa ang bawkin Jehoiakina chuan Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti a. 
2Kings24:10 A lal lai hian lal Nebukadnezara sipaite chuan Jerusalem an rawn hual a. 
2Kings24:11 An hual lai chuan lal Nebukadnezara chu Jerusalem-ah a lo kal ve a. 
2Kings24:12 A nu te, a fa te, a sipai te leh lal ina milian te nên Jehoiakina chu Babulon lal kutah a inpe a. Nebukadnezara chuan a lal kum riat kum chuan Jehoiakina chu salah a man a." 
2Kings24:13 Tempul leh lal ina sum awm zawng zawng nên Babulon khuaah a hâwn a, Lalpa sawi lâwk angin lal Solomonan Tempula hman tûr rangkachak bungbêl a siam zawng zawng chu a tichhia a." 
2Kings24:14 Lal Nebukadnezara chuan Jerusalem khaw mi, lal chhûngkua zawng zawng, milian zawng zawng, mi sîngkhat salah a hruai a. Mi themthiam rual, thîrdêngte pawh a hruai vek a, Judai ramah chuan mi mâwl tê tê chauh a hnutchhiah a." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadnezara chuan Jehoiakina chu a nu te, a nupui te, a milian te leh Judai rama milian deuh deuh te nên Babulon-ah salah a hruai a." 
2Kings24:16 Nebukadnezara chuan sipaia ṭang tlâk zawng zawng chu Babulon-ah a hruai vek a ni; mi sângsarih leh mi themthiam rual, thîrdêng te nên sângkhat zet nên a hruai a ni. Chûng chu sipaia ṭang tlâk vek an ni." 
2Kings24:17 Nebukadnezara chuan Jehoiakina pa nau Matania chu Juda lalah a dah a, a hming a thlâksak a, Zedekia a sa a." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekia chu Kum sawmhnih leh pakhat a nihin Juda lal a lo ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh pakhat a lal a. A nu chu Libna khaw mi Jeremia fanu Hamutali a ni." 
2Kings24:19 Lal Jehoiakina angin Lalpa mit hmuha thil sual Zedekia chuan a ti a. 
2Kings24:20 Lalpa chu Jerusalem leh Judai ram mite chungah a thinur êm a, a hmuh phâk lohvah a hnawt chhuak ta a ni." 
2Kings25:1 Zedekia chu Babulon lal lakah a hel a. Tichuan, Zedekia kum kua a lal kum, thla sâwmna, ni sâwm niin Nebukadnezara chu a sipaite nên an lo kal a, Jerusalem chu an rawn bei a, khaw daiah chuan bûk an khuar a, bang an theu hual a." 
2Kings25:2 Zedekia lal kum sâwm leh pakhatna thlengin an hual a. 
2Kings25:3 Chumi kum, a thla lina, ni kua ni chuan khuaah ṭâm a nasa ta hle a, mite chuan ei tûr an nei ta lo va." 
2Kings25:4 Khaw kulh chu an tiâwng ta a. Babulon-ho chuan an hual tlat nâ a, a chhûnga sipai zawng zawng chu lal hovin zânah an chhuak ru vek a. Lal huan bulah an kal a, kulh bang pahnih inkâr kawngkhârah an chhuak a, Jordan lui lamah an tlân a." 
2Kings25:5 Babulon sipaite chuan lal Zedekia chu an ûm a, Jeriko bul phaiah an man a, a sipaite chuan an tlânsan ta vek a." 
2Kings25:6 Zedekia chu Ribla khuaa Nebukadnezara hnênah an hruai a, a chungah ro a lo rêl nghâl a." 
2Kings25:7 A hmuh lai ngeiin a fate chu Nebukadnezara chuan a thahsak a, Zedekia mitmu pawh a kherchhuahsak bawk a; kawl a buntîr a, Babulon-ah a hruai ta a." 
2Kings25:8 Babulon lal Nebukadnezara lal kum sâwm leh pakuana thla nga, ni sarih ni chuan Nebukadnezara vêngtu pâwl hotu Nebuzaradana chu Jerusalem khuaah a lût a." 
2Kings25:9 Tempul chu a hâl a, lal inte leh Jerusalem-a milianho zawng zawng inte pawh a hâl a." 
2Kings25:10 A sipaite chuan khaw kulh bang chu an ṭhiat a. 
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaradana chuan khawpuia mi la awmte chu Babulon-ah a hruai a, mi themthiam, Babulon-a la kal ve lote pawh salah a hruai." 
2Kings25:12 Mi berh tê tê chauh grep huante leh lote thlo atân Judai ramah chuan a hnutchhiah a ni. 
2Kings25:13 Kaldai-ho chuan Tempul dâr ban te, tawlailîrte leh dâr tuizêm te chu an chhuchhia a, a dâr tlangin Babulon-ah an hâwn a." 
2Kings25:14 Maichâma vutlawh leh vut dahna te, khâwnvâr chhitna hmanrua te, thilhlan thisen lo dawhna no te, rimtui hâlna bûr te, Tempul rawngbâwlnaa thil hman dâr chi rêng rêng chu an la vek a."
