2Kings25:15 Rangkachak leh tangkaruaa thil siam rêng rêng chu, berhbu tê tak tê tê, meilawh chenin an la a." 
2Kings25:16 Solomonan Tempul atân dâra a siam ban te, tawlailîr te, tuizêm te chu bûk hleih theih loh khawpa rit a ni." 
2Kings25:17 Ban pahnihte chu an inang chiah a, tawng sâwm leh pariata sâng an ni ve ve bawk." 
2Kings25:18 Sipai hotu ber Nebuzaradana chuan puithiam lalber Seraia te, a dawttu puithiam Zefania te leh Tempula hotu lian pathumte pawh Babulon-ah a hruai a." 
2Kings25:19 Khuaa hotu la awm te, sipai hotu dawttu sipai lam chanchin vawng ṭhatu te leh mi dang, mi pawimawh, mi sawmruk te chu" 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradana chuan Hamath bial Libna khua, Nebukadnezara awmna khuaah chuan a hruai a." 
2Kings25:21 Lal chuan a vua a, a lo tihlum hlawm a. Chutiang chuan an ram aṭangin sala hruai an ni ta a." 
2Kings25:22 Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chuan Ahikama fapa Gedalia, Safana tupa chu Judai ram awptuah a ruat a, Babulon-a hruai ve lohte kha a kutah a dah a." 
2Kings25:23 Juda sipai leh an hotu Babulon lal hnêna inpe ve duh loten an hriatin Mizpa khuaa Gedalia hnênah an kal a; chûng sipaite chu Nethania fapa Ismaela te, Karea fapa Johanana te, Netofa khaw mi Tanhumeta fapa Seraia te, Maaka khaw mi Jazania te, an mite nên an ni." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia chuan an hnênah leh an mite hnênah chuan, “Kaldai sawrkâr hnathawkho hi hlau suh u. Ramah hian awm ve mai ula, Babulon lal hnuaiah kûn ula in tân a ṭha ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings25:25 Chumi kum, a thla sarihnaah Nethania fapa Ismaela, Elisama tupa, lal thlah zînga mi chu mi sâwm nên Mizpa khuaah a kal a, Gedalia chu a bei a, a that ta mai a. A bula awm Israel leh Babulon mite pawh chu a that bawk a." 
2Kings25:26 Israel mi zawng zawng, rethei tak takte leh sipai hotu ni ṭhînte chu Babulon-ho an hlauh avângin Aigupta ramah an kal ta a." 
2Kings25:27 Evil-merodaka, Babulon lal a nih kumin, Judai lal Jehoiakina chu a khawngaih a, tân in ata a chhuah a, Jehoiakina chu kum sawmthum leh pasarihna, thla sâwm leh pahnihna, ni sawmhnih leh pasarih a tân hnu chuan a chhuak ta a." 
2Kings25:28 A be ṭha hle a, lalṭhutthlêng chu a tânpui lal dang lalṭhutthlêng aiin a tihsânsak a." 
2Kings25:29 A tân in kawrte chu a hlîp a, a dam chhûng chuan lal bulah chaw a kîl ve ta a." 
2Kings25:30 A dam chhûng chu a mamawh tûr ni tin bithliah neiin an pe ṭhîn a. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adama thlahte, a chhuan indawt zêlin: Setha, Enosa," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenana, Mahalalela, Jareda," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoka, Methusela, Lameka leh Nova," 
1Chronicles1:4 Nova, chuan fapa pathum Sema te, Hama te, Jafeta te a nei." 
1Chronicles1:5 Jafeta fate: Gomera, Magoga, Madaia, Javana, Tubala, Meseka, Tirasa," 
1Chronicles1:6 Gomera hi Askenaz-ho te, Difat-ho te, Togarma te thlahtu a ni." 
1Chronicles1:7 Javana hi Elisa-ho te, Tarsis-ho te, Kitim-ho te, Rode-ho te thlahtu a ni." 
1Chronicles1:8 Hama hi Kusa-ho te, Mizraim-ho te, Puta-ho te, Kanan-ho te thlahtu a ni." 
1Chronicles1:9 Hama fa Kusa hi Seba-ho te, Havil-ho te, Sabta-ho te, Raama-ho te, Sabteka-ho te thlahtu a ni. Raama hi Seba-ho leh Dedan-ho thlahtu a ni." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kusa hian fapa, khawvêla hnehtu ropui hmasa ber Nimroda a nei." 
1Chronicles1:11 Mizraima hi Aigupta mi Lud-ho te, Ana-ho te, Lehab-ho te, Naftu-ho te," 
1Chronicles1:12 Pathros-ho te, Kaslu-ho te thlahtu a ni. Filistia-ho leh Kaftor-ho hi Kaslau thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanana fapa upa ber Sidona leh Heta hi Sidon-ho leh Het-ho thlahtu an ni. 
1Chronicles1:14 Kanana hi Jebus-ho te, Amor-ho te, Girgas-ho te," 
1Chronicles1:15 Hiv-ho te, Arka-ho te, Sin-ho te," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arvad-ho te, Zemar-ho te, Hamat-ho te thlahtu a ni bawk." 
1Chronicles1:17 Sema thlahte chu: Elam-ho te, Asur-ho te, Arpaksad-ho te, Lud-ho te, Aram-ho te, Uzi-ho te, Hul-ho te, Gether-ho te, Mesek-ho te hi an ni." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpaksada chuan fapa Sela a nei a, Sela chuan Ebera," 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebera chuan fa pahnih a nei a, pakhat chu a dam laia mihringte an inṭhen darh avângin a hmingah Pelega an sa a, pakhat zâwk chu Joktana a ni." 
1Chronicles1:20 Joktana hi hêngho thlahtu hi a ni: Almodad te, Selef te, Hazarmavet te, Jera te," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoram te, Uzal te, Dikla te," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebal te, Abimael te, Seba te," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir te, Havil te, Jobab te." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir te, Havil te, Jobab te." 
1Chronicles1:24 Sema thlah chhâwng zêl Abrama thlengin hetiang hi a ni: Arpaksada, Sela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebera, Pelega, Reua," 
1Chronicles1:26 Seruga, Nahora, Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 Abrama, Abrahama tih hming pu ta kha." 
1Chronicles1:28 Ani chuan fapa Isaka leh Ismaela a nei a. 
1Chronicles1:29 Ismaelan fapa sâwm leh pahnih a nei a, a upa ber chu Nebaiota a ni. A fate hi hêngho thlahtute hi an ni: Nebaiot-ho te, Kedar-ho te, Adbeel-ho te, Mibsam-ho te," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misama-ho te, Duma-ho te, Masa-ho te, Hadad-ho te, Tema-ho te," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetur-ho te, Nafis-ho te, Kedem-ho te." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abrahama hmei Keturi hian fapa paruk a nei: Zimrana te, Joksana te, Medana te, Midiana te, Isbaka te, Sua te. Joksana chuan fapa Seba leh Dedana a nei a." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midiana hian fapa Efa te, Efera te, Hanoka te, Abida te, Elda te a nei a, chûng chu Keturi thlahte chu an ni." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahama fa Isaka chuan fa pahnih Esauva leh Jakoba a nei a. 
1Chronicles1:35 Esauva fate chu: Elifaza te, Reuela te, Jeusa te, Jalama te, Kora te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifaza hi Teman-ho te, Omar-ho te, Zefi-ho te, Gatam-ho te, Kenaz-ho te, Timna-ho te, Amalek-ho te thlahtu a ni." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuela hi Nahat-ho te, Zera-ho te, Sama-ho te, Miza-ho te thlahtu a ni." 
1Chronicles1:38 Edom rama lo awm hmasate chu Seira fate thlah an ni. Seira fate chu: Lotana te, Sobala te, Zibeona te, Ana te, Disona te Ezera te, Disana te." 
1Chronicles1:39 Lotana hi Hori-ho leh Homam-ho thlahtu a ni, a farnu chu Timnai a ni." 
1Chronicles1:40 Sobala chu Alian te, Manahat te, Ebal te, Sefi te leh Onam-ho thlahtu a ni. Zibeonan fa pahnih Aia leh Ana a nei a." 
1Chronicles1:41 Ana chuan fapa Disona a nei a, Disona chu hêngho thlahtu hi a ni: Hamran, Esban, Ithran, Keran-hote hi." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ezera chu Bilhan-ho te, Zavanho te, Jaakan-ho te thlahtu a ni. Disana chu Uz-ho te leh Aran-ho te thlahtu a ni." 
1Chronicles1:43 Israel rama lal an awm hmain hêngte hi Edom rama lal awm tawhte chu an ni: Beora fapa Bela chu Edom ram lalah a ṭang a, a khawpui chu Dinhaba a ni." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a thih hnu chuan Bozra khaw mi Zera fapa Jobaban a ai a awh a. 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a thih hnu chuan Bozra khaw mi Zera fapa Jobaban a ai a awh a. 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobaba thih hnuah Teman-ho ram mi Husaman a ai a awh a. 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobaba thih hnuah Teman-ho ram mi Husaman a ai a awh a. 
1Chronicles1:46 Husama a thih chuan Bedada fapa Hadada chuan a ai a awh a, ani hi Moab rama Midian-ho hnehtu kha a ni, a khawpui chu Avit a ni." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadada a thih chuan Masreka mi Samlaa chu a aiawhin a lal a. 
1Chronicles1:48 Samlaa a thih chuan Rehobot khaw awmna, ‘luipui’ an tih aṭanga lo kal Saula chu a aiawhin a lal a." 
1Chronicles1:49 Saula a thih chuan Akbora fapa Baal-hanan a ai a awh a. 
1Chronicles1:50 Baal-hanana a thih chuan Hadadan a ai a awh a, a khawpui hming chu Pai a ni. A nupui chu Mehetabeli a ni a, Matreda fanu a ni, a pu chu Mezahaba a ni." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadada chu a thi a. Edom-ho chi hrang hrang hetiang hi an awm: Timna te, Alva te, Jethet te," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama te, Ela te, Pinon te," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenaz te, Teman te, Mibzar te," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiel te, Iram te." 
1Chronicles2:1 Jakoban fapa Reubena te, Simeona te, Levia te, Juda te, Isakara te, Zebuluna te," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dana te, Josefa te, Benjamina te, Naftalia te, Gada te, Asera te a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:3 Juda hian fapa panga a nei: Kanan hmeichhia Batsuaii lakah fa pathum Era te, Onama te, Sela te a nei a. A fapa upa ber Era hi a sual êm avângin Lalpa chuan a tihlum a." 
1Chronicles2:4 A monu Tamari lakah fa pahnih Pereza leh Zera a nei leh bawk. 
1Chronicles2:5 Pereza hian fapa Hezrona leh Hamula a nei a. 
1Chronicles2:6 Zera hian fapa panga: Zimria te, Ethana te, Hemana te, Kalkola te, Dara te a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:7 Zera thlah zînga mi Karmia fapa Akana chuan Pathian tâna serh hran tlat tawh a lâk avângin Israel-hoten an tuar phah a nih kha. 
1Chronicles2:8 Ethana hian fapa Azaria a nei a. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezrona hian fa pathum Jerameela te, Rama te, Kelubaia te a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:10 Rama hian fapa Aminadaba a nei a, ani hian Juda hnam zînga mi ropui tak, fapa Nasona a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nasona hian fapa Salmona a nei a, ani chuan Boaza a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:12 Boaza fapa chu Obeda a ni, Jesaia pa chu." 
1Chronicles2:13 Jesaia hian fapa pasarih a nei: an upat dân indawtin: Eliaba, Abinadaba, Simea," 
1Chronicles2:14 Nethanela, Radaia," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozema, Davida." 
1Chronicles2:16 An farnute chu Zeruii leh Abigaili an ni. Zeruii hian fapa pathum Abisaia te, Joaba te, Asahela te a nei." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili hian fapa Amasa a nei a, a pasal chu Ismaela thlah Jethera a ni." 
1Chronicles2:18 Hezrona fapa Kaleba chuan Azubi nupuiah a nei a, fanu Jerioti a nei a, fapa pathum Jesera te, Sobaba te, Ardona te a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azubi thih hnuah Kaleba chuan Efrati nupuiah a nei a, fapa Hura an nei a." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hura chuan fapa Uria a nei a; ani chuan fapa Bezalela a nei a. 
1Chronicles2:21 Kum sawmruk a nihin Hezrona chuan Makira fanu, Gileada farnu, nupuiah a nei a, fapa Seguba a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:22 Seguba chuan Jaira a nei a, chu mi chu Gilead rama khaw sawmhnih leh pathum chunga lal a ni." 
1Chronicles2:23 Gesur-ho leh Aram-ho chuan chûng lai ram khaw sawmruk chu an la a, Jaira leh Kenat te khua leh an khawperte pawh an la tel a. Chûng khuaa chêngte chu Gileada pa Makira thlahte vek an ni." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hezrona chu a thi a, a fapa Kaleba chuan a pa nupui thihsan Efrati chu nupuiah a nei a, fapa Asura a nei a, ani hi Tekoa khaw zuan hmasatu a ni." 
1Chronicles2:25 Hezrona fapa upa ber Jerameela chuan fapa panga a nei; a upa ber chu Rama a ni, a dang chu Buna te, Orena te, Ozema te, Ahija te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:26 Rama hian fapa pathum, Maaza te, Jamina te, Ekera te a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:27 Jerameela hian nupui dang, Atari a nei a, fapa Onama a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:28 Onama hian fapa pahnih, Samaia leh Jada a nei a. Samaia pawh hian fapa pahnih, Nadaba leh Abisura a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abisura hian nupuiah Abihaili a nei a, fapa pahnih, Abana leh Molida a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:30 Abisura u Nadaba pawh hian fapa pahnih, Seleda leh Apaima a nei a, Seleda chu fa nei lovin a thi a," 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaima chuan fapa Isia a nei a, Isia chuan Sesana, Sesana chuan fapa Ahlaia a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:32 Samaia nau Jada chuan fapa pahnih, Jethera leh Jonathana a nei a. Jethera chu fa nei lovin a thi a." 
1Chronicles2:33 Jonathana chuan fapa pahnih, Peleta leh Zaza a nei a. Hêngho hi Jerameela thlahte chu an ni." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesana hian fapa a nei lo, fanu chauh a nei. Chhiahhlawh, Aigupta mi Jarha a nei a," 
1Chronicles2:35 ani hi a fanu a neihtîr a, fapa Ataia an nei a." 
1Chronicles2:36 Ataia hian fapa Nathana a nei a, ani chuan fapa Zabada a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabada hian fapa Eflala a nei a, ani chuan fapa Obeda a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obeda chuan fapa Jehua a nei a, Jehua chuan fapa Azaria a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaria chuan fapa Haleza a nei a, ani chuan fapa Eleasa a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa chuan fapa Sismaia a nei a, ani hian fapa Saluma a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:41 Saluma hian fapa Jekamia a nei a, ani hian fapa Elisama a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:42 Jerameela u, Kaleba fapa upa ber chu Mesa a ni, Zifa pa a ni a. Zifa chuan fapa Maresa a nei a, ani chuan fapa Hebrona a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebrona chuan fapa pali - Kora te, Tapua te, Rekema te, Sema te a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sema chu Rahama pa a ni, Rahama chuan fapa Jorkeama a nei a, Sema u Rekema chuan fapa Samaia a nei a," 
1Chronicles2:45 ani chuan fapa Maona a nei a, Maona chuan fapa Betzura a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kaleba chuan hmei, Efaii a nei a, ani nên chuan fa pathum Harana te, Moza te, Gazeza te an nei a. Harana pawh hian fapa Gazeza bawk a nei." 
1Chronicles2:47 Mi pakhat Jadaia chuan fapa paruk, Regema te, Jothama te, Gesana te, Peleta te, Efaa te, Saafa te a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kaleba chuan hmei dang Maaki a nei a; fapa pahnih, Sebera leh Tirhana a neihsak a." 
1Chronicles2:49 Nakin deuhvah fa pahnih, Saafa leh Seva a neihsak leh a. Saafa hi Madmana khaw dintu a ni a, Seva hi Makbena leh Gibea khaw zuan hmasatu a ni. Kaleba hian fanu Aksaii a nei bawk." 
1Chronicles2:50 Hêngho pawh hi Kaleba thlahte an ni: Kaleba leh a nupui Efrati fapa upa ber chu Hura a ni. Hura fapa Sobala chu Kiriat-jearim khaw dintu a ni. 
1Chronicles2:51 A fapa, an milai Salma chu Bethlehem khaw dintu a ni, a fa tlum Harefa chu Beth-gadar khaw dintu a ni." 
1Chronicles2:52 Kiriat-jearim dintu Sobala chu Haroe leh Menuhot-a awm zâtve thlahtu a ni. 
1Chronicles2:53 Kiriat-jearim-a awmho Ithra-ho te, Put-ho te, Sumat-ho te, Misra-ho te hi a thlahte an ni bawk. Zera leh Estaol khuaa awmte pawh hêng chi pêngte hi an ni." 
1Chronicles2:54 Bethlehem khaw dintu Salma chu Netofat te, Atrot-beth-Joab khuaa awmte thlahtu a ni. Manahat-a awm zâtve dâwn lai, Zor-ho thlahtu pawh a ni." 
1Chronicles2:55 Lehkha ziak mi, Jabes khuaa awm Tirat-ho te, Simeat-ho te, Sukat-ho te, Ken-ho te nên chi khat an ni. Rekab-ho nên an inneih pawlh." 
1Chronicles3:1 An upat dân indawtin hêng hi Davida fa, Hebrona a awm laia piangte chu an ni: Amnona, a nu chu Jezreel mi Ahinoami a ni; Daniela, a nu chu Karmel mi Abigaili a ni." 
1Chronicles3:1 An upat dân indawtin hêng hi Davida fa, Hebrona a awm laia piangte chu an ni: Amnona, a nu chu Jezreel mi Ahinoami a ni; Daniela, a nu chu Karmel mi Abigaili a ni." 
1Chronicles3:2 Absaloma, a nu chu Gesur lal Talmaia fanu Maaki a ni; Adonija, a nu chu Hagiti a ni;" 
1Chronicles3:3 Sefatia, a nu chu Abitali a ni; Ithreama, a nu chu Egli a ni." 
1Chronicles3:4 Hebron khuaa kum sarih leh a chanve a lal chhûngin Davida chuan fapa paruk a nei hman a. Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh pathum a lal a," 
1Chronicles3:5 fa pawh tam tak a nei. Amiela fanu Bathsebi lakah fapa pali, Simea te, Sobaba te, Nathana te, Solomona te a nei a." 
1Chronicles3:6 Fapa dang pakua, hêngte hi a nei bawk: Ibhara, Elisua, Elifeleta," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefega, Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama, Eliada, Elifeleta;" 
1Chronicles3:9 hêng bâkah hian a hmeiho lakah fapa a nei nual bawk. Fanu Tamari pawh a nei bawk. 
1Chronicles3:10 Lal Solomona thlah zêlte chu a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Rehoboama, Abija, Asa, Jehosafata," 
1Chronicles3:11 Jehorama, Ahazia, Joasa," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amazia, Uzia, Jothama," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahaja, Hezekia, Manasea," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amona, Josia," 
1Chronicles3:15 Josia hian fapa pali, Johanana te, Jehoiakima te, Zedekia te, Saluma te a nei a." 
1Chronicles3:16 Jehoiakima hian fapa pahnih Jehoiakina leh Zedekia a nei a. 
1Chronicles3:17 Babulon sala hruai lal Jehoiakina khân fapa pasarih, Sealtiela te," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkirama te, Pedaia te, Senazara te, Jekamia te, Hosama te, Nedabia te a nei a." 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaia hian fapa pahnih, Zerubabela leh Simeia a nei a. Zerubabela hian fapa pahnih Mesulama leh Hanania a nei a, fanu Selomithi a nei bawk." 
1Chronicles3:20 Fapa dang panga Hasuba te, Ohela te, Berekia te, Hasadia te, Jusab-heseda te a nei bawk." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hanania hian fapa pahnih Pelatia leh Jesaia a nei a; Jesaia hian fapa Refaia a nei a, chu mi chuan fapa Arnana a nei a; Arnana hian fapa Obadia a nei a, ani hian fapa Sekania a nei a." 
1Chronicles3:22 Sekania hian fapa pakhat Semaia a nei a, tu panga - Hatusa te, Igala te, Baria te, Nearia te, Safa te a nei a." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nearia hian fapa pathum, Elioenaia te, Hizkia te, Azrikama te a nei a." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elioenaia hian fapa pasarih, Hodavia te, Eleasiba te, Pelaia te, Akuba te, Johanana te, Delaia te, Anania te a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:1 Hêng hi Juda thlah ṭhenkhatte an ni: Pereza te, Hezrona te, Karmia te, Hura te, Sobala te." 
1Chronicles4:2 Sobala chuan fapa Reaia a nei a, ani chuan fapa Jahata a nei a. Jahata hian fapa Ahumaia leh Lahada, Zora khuaa awmte thlahtute chu a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:3 Kaleba leh Efrati fa hmasa chu Hura a ni, Bethlehem khaw dintu chu. Hura chuan fapa pathum Etama te, Penuela te, Ezera te a nei a. Etama chuan fapa pathum Jezreela te, Isma te, Idbasa te a nei a, fanu pakhat Hazelelponi a nei bawk." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penuela hi Gedor khaw dintu a ni a, Ezera hi Husa khaw dintu a ni." 
1Chronicles4:5 Tekoa khaw dintu Asuran nupui pahnih - Heli leh Naari a nei a," 
1Chronicles4:6 Naari nên fapa pali - Ahuzama te, Hefera te, Temenia te, Hahastaria te an nei a." 
1Chronicles4:7 Heli nên fapa pathum - Zereta te, Izara te, Ethnana te an nei a." 
1Chronicles4:8 Haruma fapa Aharhela thlahte neitu Koza chuan fapa Anuba leh Zobeba a nei bawk. 
1Chronicles4:9 An chhûng zînga zahawm fâl mi pakhat Jabeza a awm a, a nuin, “Na ti taka ka hrin a ni,” tiin a hmingah Jabeza a sa a ni." 
1Chronicles4:10 Israel-te Pathian hnênah Jabeza chu a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Pathian, mal min sâwm la, ram zau tak min pe teh, nâ ka tuar loh nân thil ṭha lo lakah min vêng la, min awmpui reng ang che,” a ti a. Pathian chuan a dîl angin a tihsak a." 
1Chronicles4:11 Suha unaupa Kaleba chuan fapa Mehira a nei a, Mehira chuan fapa Estona a nei a," 
1Chronicles4:12 ani chuan fapa pathum - Bethrafa te, Pasea te, Tehina te a nei a, Tehina hi Nahas khaw dintu a ni. Hêngho thlahte hi Reka-ah an awm." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenaza chuan fapa pahnih - Othniela leh Seraia a nei a. Othniela pawhin fapa pahnih, Hathata leh Meonothaia a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothaia hian fapa Ofra a nei a, Seraia hian fapa Joaba hi a nei a, Joaba hi ‘Themthiam Ruam’ an tiha awmte thlahtu a ni. Heta awmte hi mi themthiam tak tak hlîr an ni." 
1Chronicles4:15 Jefunea fapa Kaleba chuan fapa pathum Irua te, Ela te, Naama te a nei a. Ela chuan fapa Kenaza a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:16 Jehalelan fapa pali - Zifa te, Zifaia te, Tiria te, Asarela te a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezra chuan fa pali - Jethera te, Mereda te, Efera te, Jalona te a nei a. Mereda hian Aigupta lal fanu Bithiai nupuiah a nei a; fanu pakhat Miriami leh fapa pahnih - Samaia leh Isba an nei. Isba hi Estemo khaw dintu a ni." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ezra chuan fa pali - Jethera te, Mereda te, Efera te, Jalona te a nei a. Mereda hian Aigupta lal fanu Bithiai nupuiah a nei a; fanu pakhat Miriami leh fapa pahnih - Samaia leh Isba an nei. Isba hi Estemo khaw dintu a ni." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mereda chuan Juda hnam nupui a nei bawk a, fapa pathum - Jereda te, Hebera te, Jekuthiela te an nei a. Jereda hi Gedor khaw dintu a ni, Hebera hi Soko khaw dintu a ni; Jekuthiela hi Zano khaw dintu a ni." 
1Chronicles4:19 Hodia chuan Nahama farnu nupuiah a nei a; an fate chu Keila khuaa Garm-ho leh Estemoa khuaa awm Maaka-ho thlahtute an ni. 
1Chronicles4:20 Simona chuan fapa pali Amnona te, Rina te, Ben-hanana te, Tilona te a nei a. Isia hian fapa Zoheta leh Ben-zoheta a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:21 Juda fapa Sela thlahte chu hêngte hi an ni: Era, Leka khaw dintu; Laada, Maresa khaw dintu; a thlahte chu Beth Asbea khuaa awmte hi an ni, la dek mi an ni." 
1Chronicles4:22 Jokima, Kozeba khuaa awmte nên hian; Joasa leh Sarafa; anni hian Moab nula nupuiah an nei a. Bethlehem khuaah an awm ta a (an chanchin chhuina hi hmânlaia mi a ni)." 
1Chronicles4:23 Lal mi rawih, bêl vaw mi an ni, Netaim leh Gedera khuaah an awm." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simeonan fapa panga - Nemuela te, Jamina te, Jariba te, Zera te, Saula te a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:25 Saula hian fapa Saluma a nei a, ani chuan fapa Mibsama a nei a, Mibsama hian fapa Misma a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:26 Misma hian fapa Hamuela a nei a, ani chuan fapa Zakura a nei a, Zakura chuan fapa Simeia a nei a." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simeia chuan fapa sâwm leh paruk leh fanu paruk a nei a, a laichîn dangte erawh chuan fa an nei tam ve lo; Simeona thlahte chu Juda thlahte angin an hung ve lo." 
1Chronicles4:28 Davida hun thleng kha chuan Simeona thlahte hi Beer-seba-ah te, Molada-ah te, Hazar-sual-ah te," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilha-ah te, Ezem-ah te, Tolad-ah te," 
1Chronicles4:30 Bethuel-ah te, Horma-ah te, Ziklag-ah te," 
1Chronicles4:31 Beth-markabot-ah te, Hazar-susim-ah te, Beth-biri-ah te, Saaraim khuaah te an awm ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles4:32 Etam-ah te, Ain-ah te, Rimon-ah te, Token-ah te, Asan khuaah te leh" 
1Chronicles4:33 an chhehvêl khuaah te, Baalat khaw chhimthlang thlengin an awm bawk. An chhûngkaw chanchin leh an awm ṭhinna ziakna bu-ah chuan an hnam hruaitute chu hêngte hi an ni:" 
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobaba te, Jamleka te, Amazia fapa Josa te," 
1Chronicles4:35 Joela te, Jehua te (Jehua hi Josibia fa a ni, chu mi pa chu Asiela fapa Seraia a ni)." 
1Chronicles4:35 Joela te, Jehua te (Jehua hi Josibia fa a ni, chu mi pa chu Asiela fapa Seraia a ni)." 
1Chronicles4:36 Elioenaia te, Jaakoba te, Jesohaia te, Asaia te, Adiela te, Jesimiela te, Benaia te, Ziza te." 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziza hi Sifia fa a ni; chu mi chu Alona fa a ni. Alona hi Jedaia fa a ni, chu mi pa chu Semaia fa Simria a ni." 
1Chronicles4:38 Hêng chhûngkuate hi an pung chak hle a. 
1Chronicles4:39 Khawthlang lamah Gerar thlengin an inzâr darh a, chu khaw awmna ruam khawchhak lamahte an berâmte an zu tlattîr ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ram awl zau, hnim ṭhatna hmun, ram reh muanawm tak an hmu ṭeuh a ni. Hêng laiah hian Ham-ho an awm ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles4:41 Judai ram lal Hezekia hun lai khân khîngte khi Gerar-ah an kal a, chuta awmte puan in leh an bûkte chu an tihchhiatsak a. An berâm tlatna tûr hnim a ṭhat êm avângin chuta lo awmte chu an hnawt chhuak a, anmahni an awm hlen ta a ni." 
1Chronicles4:42 Isia fa Pelatia te, Nearia te, Refaia te leh Uziela te hovin Simeona thlahte zînga mi zanga chu khawchhak lam Edom ramah an kal a." 
1Chronicles4:43 Amalek-ho la awmte chu an that a, tûn thlengin an awm ta zêl a." 
1Chronicles5:1 Jakoba fapa upa ber Reubena thlahte chu hêngte hi an ni. (Reubena hian a pa hmei a mutpui avângin fa u ber nihna lâksak a ni a, Israela fa Josefa fate hnêna pêk a ni a; chuvângin, fa tîr chhiarnaah a hming a tel ta lo va ni)." 
1Chronicles5:2 Juda thlahte hian an unaute an khûm a, an zîng aṭangin lal a lo chhuak na a, fa tîr nihna chu Josefa chan a ni." 
1Chronicles5:3 Israela neih hmasak Reubena chuan fapa pali, Hanoka te, Palua te Hezrona te, Karmia te a nei a." 
1Chronicles5:4 Joela thlahte chu a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Semaia, Goga, Simeia," 
1Chronicles5:4 Joela thlahte chu a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Semaia, Goga, Simeia," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika, Reaia, Baala," 
1Chronicles5:6 Beera; Beera hi Reubena thlahte zînga hotu ber a ni. Asuria Lal Tilgat-pilnesera a man a, salah a hâwn a;" 
1Chronicles5:7 an chhûngkaw chanchin ziaknaah Reubena thlah chi hrang hruaitute hming hêng chauh hi a chuang: Jeiela, Zekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela hi Azaza fa a ni, a pu chu Sema, Joel chi a ni. Joel chite hi Aroer khuaah an awm. Hmâr lam ram Nebo leh Baal-meon thlengin an chan a ni." 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela hi Azaza fa a ni, a pu chu Sema, Joel chi a ni. Joel chite hi Aroer khuaah an awm. Hmâr lam ram Nebo leh Baal-meon thlengin an chan a ni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Gilead ramah hian berâm leh kêl an ngah hle a; chuvâng chuan, khawchhak lam thlalêr ram, Eufretis lui thlengin an luah a ni." 
1Chronicles5:10 Lal Saula hun lai khân Reuben-ho hian Hagar-ho an bei a, an that a, Gilead ram chhak lama an ram chu an neihsak ta a." 
1Chronicles5:11 Reuben-ho dawt Basan ramah Gada thlahte hi an awm, khawchhak lamah Saleka thlengin an inzâr a." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joela thlahte hi an tam ber a, Sefama thlahten an dawt a. Janaia leh Sefata thlahte hi Basan rama chi hlâwm dang awm vete chu an ni." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joela thlahte hi an tam ber a, Sefama thlahten an dawt a. Janaia leh Sefata thlahte hi Basan rama chi hlâwm dang awm vete chu an ni." 
1Chronicles5:13 Gad hnam zîngah hêng chi sarihte pawh hi chhiar tel an ni: Mikael, Mesulam, Seba, Jorai, Jakan, Zia, Eber." 
1Chronicles5:14 Hêngho hi Huria fapa Abihaila thlah an ni. Huria pa chu Jaroa a ni, chu mi pa chu Gileada a ni a, a pa chu Mikaela a ni. Mikaela pa chu, Jesisaia a ni, chu mi pa chu Jahdoa a ni, a pu chu Buza a ni." 
1Chronicles5:15 Hêng chite zînga hruaitu ber chu Abdiela fapa Ahia a ni, chu mi pa chu Gunia a ni." 
1Chronicles5:16 Gilead leh Basan rama khuaahte an awm a, Saron ram phûlah te an awm darh bawk." 
1Chronicles5:17 Juda lal Jothama leh Israel lal Jeroboama te hun laiin hêng inthlahchhâwng chanchin hi an chhui chhuak a ni. 
1Chronicles5:18 Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te leh khawchhak lama awm Manase hnam zâtve te chuan phaw te, khandaih te leh thal hman dân thiam sipai sîngli leh sângli leh zasarih leh sawmruk an nei a." 
1Chronicles5:19 Hagar hnam Jetur te, Nafis te, Nodab te nên an indo va." 
1Chronicles5:20 Pathian an ring a, ṭanpui an dîl a, Pathianin an ṭawngṭaina chu a chhâng a, Hagar-ho chu, an thurualpuite nên an hneh a." 
1Chronicles5:21 An hmêlmate sanghâwngsei sîngnga, berâm nuaihnih leh sîngnga, sabengtung sanghnih leh mi nuaikhat an man a." 
1Chronicles5:22 Pathian hminga indo an ni a, mi tam tak an that a ni. Sala an tân hma chu chûngho ramah chuan an awm ta a." 
1Chronicles5:23 Khawchhak lama Manasea thlah awmte chu Basan ramah leh a hmâr lam ramah Baal-hermon-ah te, Senir-ah te, Hermon tlâng thlengin an awm a, mi an pung chak hle." 
1Chronicles5:24 An zînga chi hrang hrang hruaitute chu Efera te, Isia te, Eliela te, Azriela te, Jeremia te, Hodavia te, Jadiela te an ni. Sipai huai tak tak an ni a, an chite zînga hotu challang tak vek an ni." 
1Chronicles5:25 Mite chuan an pate Pathian chu an hawisan a; chûng rama lo awm, Pathianin a hnawh chhuahte pathian chu an be ta a." 
1Chronicles5:26 Chuvângin, Pathianin Asuria lal Pula, Tilgatpilnesera an tih bawk chu, an ram a rawn rûntîr a, Reuben thlah te, Gad thlah te leh khawchhak lama awm Manase thlah te chu a kawi chhuak a, Hala-ah te, Habor-ah te, Hore-ah te leh Gozan lui kamah te chuan a awm hlentîr ta a." 
1Chronicles6:1 Levia chuan fa pathum - Gersona te, Kohata te, Meraria te a nei a." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kohata hian fa pali - Amrama te, Izara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te a nei a." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amrama chuan fapa pahnih - Arona leh Mosia a nei a, fanu Miriami a nei bawk. Arona hian fa pali - Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te a nei a." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazara thlahte chu a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Finehasa, Abisua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Bukia, Uzia," 
1Chronicles6:6 Zerahia, Meraiota," 
1Chronicles6:7 Amariah, Ahituba," 
1Chronicles6:8 Zadoka, Ahimaaza," 
1Chronicles6:9 Azaria, Johanana," 
1Chronicles6:10 Azaria (Jerusalem Tempul, Solomona saka rawngbâwltu kha)," 
1Chronicles6:11 Amaria, Ahituba," 
1Chronicles6:12 Zadoka, Saluma," 
1Chronicles6:13 Hilkia, Azaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Seraia, Jehozadaka." 
1Chronicles6:15 Jehozadaka hi lal Nebukadnezaran salah Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a mi dangte zîngah a hruai ve a, Lalpa chuan salah a tântîr a ni." 
1Chronicles6:16 Levia chuan fa pathum - Gersona te, Kohata te, Meraria te a nei a." 
1Chronicles6:17 Chûng chuan fapa an nei ṭheuh va. Gersona chuan Libna leh Simeia a nei a. 
1Chronicles6:18 Kohata chuan Amrama te, Izara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te a nei a." 
1Chronicles6:19 Meraria hian Mahlia leh Musia a nei a. 
1Chronicles6:20 Gersona thlahte, a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Libnia, Jahata, Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 Joa, Idoa, Zera, Jeatheraia." 
1Chronicles6:22 Kohata thlahte, a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Aminadaba, Kora, Asira," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elkana, Ebiasafa, Asira," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahata, Uriela, Uzia, Saula." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elkana chuan fapa Amasaia leh Ahimota a nei a. 
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimota thlah, a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Elkana, Zofaia, Nahata," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliaba, Jerohama, Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samuela fapa upa zâwk chu Joela a ni a, a naupang zâwk chu Abija a ni." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samuela fapa upa zâwk chu Joela a ni a, a naupang zâwk chu Abija a ni." 
1Chronicles6:29 Meraria thlah, a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Mahlia, Libnia, Simeia, Uza," 
1Chronicles6:30 Simea, Hagia, Asaia." 
1Chronicles6:31 Jerusalem khuaa Thuthlung bâwm an lâk luh hnu chuan lal Davidan hêng mite hi Pathian biak huna zaipâwl huaihawt tûrin a ruat. 
1Chronicles6:32 Lal Solomonan Tempul a sak hnu chuan hêng mite hi pâwla insiamin Inbiakna bûka hla sa tûrin an inkalchhâwk ṭhîn. 
1Chronicles6:33 Chûng mite inthlah chhâwn dân chu hetiang hi a ni: Kohata thlahte: Zaipâwl khat hotu chu Joela fapa Hemana a ni. Hemana thlahtute chu an chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Joela, Samuela," 
1Chronicles6:33 Chûng mite inthlah chhâwn dân chu hetiang hi a ni: Kohata thlahte: Zaipâwl khat hotu chu Joela fapa Hemana a ni. Hemana thlahtute chu an chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Joela, Samuela," 
1Chronicles6:34 Elkana, Jerohama, Eliela, Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 Zufa, Elkana, Mahata, Amasaia," 
1Chronicles6:36 Elkana, Joela, Azaria, Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:36 Elkana, Joela, Azaria, Zefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 Tahata, Asira, Ebiasafa, Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 Izara, Kohata, Levia, Jakoba." 
1Chronicles6:39 Asafa chu zaipâwl dang hotu a ni. Asafa thlahtute chu an chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Berekia, Simea," 
1Chronicles6:40 Mikaela, Baaseia, Malkija," 
1Chronicles6:41 Ethnia, Zera, Adaia" 
1Chronicles6:42 Ethana, Zima, Simeia," 
1Chronicles6:43 Jahata, Gersona, Levia." 
1Chronicles6:44 Meraria thlah Ethana chu zaipâwl dang hotu a ni. Ethana thlahtute chu an chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Kisia, Abdia, Maluka," 
1Chronicles6:45 Hasabia, Amazia, Hilkia," 
1Chronicles6:46 Amzia, Bania, Semera," 
1Chronicles6:47 Mahlia, Musia, Meraria, Levia." 
1Chronicles6:48 An chipui, Levia chi dangte chu, Pathian biakna hmuna tih tûr hrang hrang ti tûrin hna an ruatsak bawk a." 
1Chronicles6:49 Arona leh a thlahte hi maichâma rimtui hâl a, hâlral thilhlan hlântu an ni. Hmun Thianghlima Pathian biak hi an hova tih tûr a ni. Pathianin a mite sual a ngaihdam nân, thilhlan pawh anni hian an hlân tûr a ni. Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosia sawi ang chiah zêlin chûng chu an ti ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles6:50 Arona thlahte chu a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Eleazara, Finehasa, Abisua," 
1Chronicles6:51 Bukia, Uzia, Zerahia," 
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiota, Amaria, Ahituba," 
1Chronicles6:53 Zadoka, Ahimaaza." 
1Chronicles6:54 Arona thlah Kohat-ho awmna ram chu hei hi a ni: Levia chite awmna tûra an ruatsak hmasaah an awm a ni. 
1Chronicles6:55 Judai ramah chuan Hebron-ah an awmtîr a, a vêl ran tlatna pawh an chan a ni." 
1Chronicles6:56 He khaw huam chhûnga khawperte leh lo ramte chu Jefunea fapa Kaleba chan a ni. 
1Chronicles6:57 Arona thlahte awmna tûra an ruat chu hêng hi a ni: Hebron, inhumhimna khua a ni nghâl bawk; Libna, Jatir, Estamoa," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hilen, Debir" 
1Chronicles6:59 Asan, Beth-semes khaw dai, ran tlatnate nên." 
1Chronicles6:60 Benjamin-ho bialah hêng khuate leh an dai ran tlatnate hi an behtîr a: Geba, Alemet, Anathot. An chhûngkua zawng zawng awmna tûra an ruat chu khaw sâwm leh pathum a ni." 
1Chronicles6:61 Khawthlang lam Manasea thlahte bialah Kohata thlah mi dangte awmna tûr ṭhumvâwrin a chhûng chhûngin khaw sâwm an ruatsak a. 
1Chronicles6:62 Gersona thlahte, a chhûng chhûnga an awmna tûr, Isakara-ho ramah te, Aser-ho ramah te, Naftali-ho ramah te leh khawchhak lama Manasea thlahte awmna Basan ramah te khaw sâwm leh pathum an ruatsak a." 
1Chronicles6:63 Chutiang bawkin Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te leh Zebulun-ho awmna ramah khaw sâwm leh pahnih Meraria thlahte, a chhûng chhûnga an awmna tûr an ruatsak a." 
1Chronicles6:64 Chutiang bawkin Israel mite chuan Levia chite awmna tûr khua, a dai vêl ran tlatna tûrte nên an ruatsak a" 
1Chronicles6:65 (Juda-ho te, Simeon-ho te, Benjamin-ho te ram chhûng khua an ruatsak pawh kha ṭhum vâwra tih a ni)." 
1Chronicles6:66 Kohata thlah chhûng ṭhenkhat chu Efraim-ho awmna ramah khaw ṭhenkhat leh a dai vêl ran tlatnate an awmna atân an ruatsak a. 
1Chronicles6:67 Efraim tlângrama awm inhumhimna khua Sekem te, Gezer te," 
1Chronicles6:68 Jokmeam te, Beth-horon te," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aijalon te leh Gath-rimon te hi. 
1Chronicles6:70 Khawthlang lam Manase-ho ramah pawh Aner leh Bileam khuate chu a dai vêl ran tlatnate nên an chanah an ruatsak bawk. 
1Chronicles6:71 Gersona thlahte awm nân hêng khuate hi, a dai vêl ran tlatna nên an ruat bawk: Khawchhak lam Manase-ho awmna Basan bialah Golan leh Astarot khuate hi." 
1Chronicles6:72 Isakar-ho awmnaah: Kedes khua te, Daberat khua te," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramot khua te, Anem khua te hi." 
1Chronicles6:74 Aser-ho awmnaah: Masal khua te, Abdon khua te," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukok khua te, Rehob khua te hi." 
1Chronicles6:76 Naftali-ho awmnaah: Galili-a Kedes khua te, Hamon khua te, Kiriathaim khua te hi." 
1Chronicles6:77 Meraria thlah dangte chu, hêng khua leh a dai vêl ran tlatnate hi an ruatsak a: Zebulun-ho awmna Rimon leh Tabor khua te." 
1Chronicles6:78 Jordan chhak lam Jeriko zâwn Reuben-ho awmnaah: Tlâng zâwla Bezer khua te, Jahza khua te," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemot khua te, Mefaat khua te hi." 
1Chronicles6:80 Gad-ho awmnaah: Gilead biala Mahanaim khua te," 
1Chronicles6:81 Hesbon khua te, Jazer khua te hi." 
1Chronicles7:1 Isakara khân fapa pali - Tola te, Pua te, Jasuba te, Simrona te a nei a." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola hian fapa paruk, Uzia te, Refaia te, Jeriela te, Jamaia te, Ibsama te, Semuela te a nei a. Chûng chu Tola thlahte chhûngkaw hotu an ni a, mi huaisen hmingthang tak tak an ni; Davida hun laiin an thlahte chu mi sînghnih leh sânghnih leh zaruk an ni." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzia hian fapa pakhat Izrahia a nei a, Izrahia leh a fa pali Mikaela te, Obadia te, Juda te, Isahia te hi chhûngkaw hotu an ni ṭheuh va." 
1Chronicles7:4 Nupui an ngah a, fate pawh an nei tam a, indo mi sîngthum leh sângruk an awm." 
1Chronicles7:5 Isakara thlah chhûngkaw zîngah sipaia ṭang thei mi sîngriat leh sângsarih hming ziak a ni. 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjaminan fapa pathum - Bela te, Bekera te, Jediaela te a nei a." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela hian fa panga - Ezbona te, Uzia te, Uziela te, Jerimota te, Iria te a nei a, thlah khat zîngah hotu an ni ṭheuh, an thlahte chu mi sînghnih leh sânghnih leh sawmthum leh pali sipaia chhawr theih an awm." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekera hian fapa pakua, Zemira te, Joasa te, Eliezara te, Elioenaia te, Omria te, Jeremota te, Abija te, Anathota te, Alemeta te a nei a." 
1Chronicles7:9 Thlah tin chhiarnaah sipaia ṭang tlâk mi sînghnih leh zahnih hming ziak a ni. 
1Chronicles7:10 Jediaelan fapa pakhat, Bilhana a nei a. Bilhana hian fapa pasarih, Jeusa te, Benjamina te, Ehuda te, Kenaana te, Zethana te, Tarsisa te, Ahisahara te a nei a." 
1Chronicles7:11 Thlah khat lu ṭheuh an ni a, huaisenah an hming a thang. An thlahte zîngah sipai ṭang tlâk mi sîngkhat leh sângsarih leh zahnih an awm." 
1Chronicles7:12 Supim leh Hupim-ho pawh hêng chi zînga chhiar tel hi an ni. Husima chu mi dang thlah a ni. 
1Chronicles7:13 Naftali hian fapa pali - Jaziela te, Gunia te, Jezera te, Saluma te, a nei a (Bilhaii thlahte an ni)." 
1Chronicles7:14 A nupui Aram mi nên Manasean fa pahnih Asriela leh Makira a nei a. Makira hi Gileada pa a ni. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makira hian Hupima leh Supima tân nupui a zawnsak a. A farnu chu Maaki a ni. Makira fa pahnihna chu Zelofehada a ni, ani hian fa hmeichhia chauh a nei a." 
1Chronicles7:16 Makira nupui Maaki hian fapa pahnih - Peresa leh Seresa a nei a. Peresa hian fapa pahnih - Ulama leh Rekema a nei a. 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulama hian fa pakhat Bedana a nei a. Hêngho hi Gileada thlahte chu an ni. Gileada pa chu Makira a ni a, a pu chu Manasea a ni." 
1Chronicles7:18 Gileada farnu Hamoleketi chuan fapa pathum - Isoda te, Abiezera te, Malaa te a nei a" 
1Chronicles7:19 (Semida chuan fapa pali - Ahiana te, Sekema te, Likhia te, Aniama te a nei)." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efraima thlahte chu a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Suthela, Bereda, Tahata, Eleada, Tahata," 
1Chronicles7:21 Zabada, Suthela, Efraima hian fapa Ezera leh Eliada a nei bawk a; mahse, Gath khaw mite berâm an ru lai an lo that a." 
1Chronicles7:22 An pa Efraima chuan a sûn a, a unaute chuan an rawn lênpui a, an thlamuan a." 
1Chronicles7:23 A nupui chu a pâwl leh a, nau a pai a, fapa a hring a, an chunga buaina a thlen avângin a hmingah Beria an sa a." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efraima chuan fanu Seeri a nei bawk; Beth-horon chuanchung leh chuanhnuai khua leh Uzen-seer khuate hi a siam a ni. 
1Chronicles7:25 Efraima hian fapa dang Refaa a nei bawk a, chu mi thlahte chu a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Resefa, Tela, Tahana," 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladana, Amihuda, Elisama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuna, Josua." 
1Chronicles7:28 An ram lâk, an awm tâkna ram chuan Bethel leh a chhehvêl khua aṭangin chhak lamah Naaran khua a thleng a, thlang lamah Gezer leh a chhehvêl khua a thleng bawk. Sekem leh Aia khua, an chhehvêl khua te nên a huam bawk." 
1Chronicles7:29 Hêng khawpui Beth-sean te, Taanak te, Megido te, Dor te leh an chhehvêl khuate hi Manasea thlahte thuhnuaiah an awm, khîng hmunahte khian Jakoba fa Josefa thlahte chu an awm a ni." 
1Chronicles7:30 Hei hi Aser thlah chhuina a ni. Fapa pali - Imna te, Isva te, Isvia te Beria te a nei a; fanu Seri a nei bawk." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beria hian fapa Hebera leh Malkiela a nei a. Malkiela hian Birzait khua hi a din a ni. 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebera hian fapa pathum - Jafleta te, Somera te, Hothama te a nei a, fanu Suai a nei bawk." 
1Chronicles7:33 Jafleta hian fapa pathum - Pasaka te, Bimhala te, Asvata te a nei." 
1Chronicles7:34 A nau Somera pawh hian fapa pathum - Roga te, Jehuba te, Arama te a nei bawk." 
1Chronicles7:35 An tlum ber Hothama hian fapa pali - Zofa te, Imna te, Selesa te, Amala te a nei." 
1Chronicles7:36 Zofa thlahte chu a chhuan indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Sua, Harnefera, Suala, Beria, Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezera, Hoda, Sama, Silsa, Ithrana, Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Jethera thlahte chu Jefunea te, Pispa te, Ara te an ni." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ula thlahte chu Ara te, Haniela te, Rizia te an ni." 
1Chronicles7:40 Khîng khi Asera thlahte chu an ni. A chi hrang hotute chu indonaa hmingthang, hruaitu fel tak tak an ni. Asera thlahte zîngah sipaia ṭang tlâk mi sînghnih leh sângruk an awm." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjaminan fapa panga a nei a, an upat dân indawtin, hêngte hi a nei: Bela, Asbela, Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha, Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela chuan fapa hêngte hi a nei: Adara, Gera, Abihuda," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisua, Naamana, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Sefufana, Hurama." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ehuda thlahte chu Naamana te, Ahija te, Gera te hi an ni. Geba khuaa chi hrang hrang awmte hotu an ni; salah Manahat-ah an hruai a," 
1Chronicles8:7 chutah chuan an awm ta a, Uza leh Ahihuda pa Gera hovin an chhuak a ni." 
1Chronicles8:8 Saharaima chuan a nupui pahnih Husimi leh Baari chu a ṭhen a; chumi hnu chuan Moab ramah a awm a. 
1Chronicles8:9 Nupuiah Hodesi a nei a, fapa pasarih - Jobaba te, Zibia te, Mesa te, Malkama te," 
1Chronicles8:9 Nupuiah Hodesi a nei a, fapa pasarih - Jobaba te, Zibia te, Mesa te, Malkama te," 
1Chronicles8:10 Jeuza te, Sakia te, Mirma te a nei a. A fate chu an chi hruaitute an ni hlawm." 
1Chronicles8:11 Husimi nên khân fapa pahnih Abituba leh Elpaala an nei. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpaala hian fapa pathum - Ebera te, Misama te, Semeda te a nei a. Semeda hian Ono leh Lod hi an chhehvêl khuate nên a din a." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria leh Sema hi Aijalon khuaa awm tate chi hrang hrang hotute an ni, Gath khuaa awm ṭhînte chu an ûm chhuak a." 
1Chronicles8:14 Beria thlahte chu hêng hi an ni: Ahioa te, Sasaka te, Jeremota te," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadia te, Arada te, Edera te," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikael te, Ispa te, Joha te." 
1Chronicles8:17 Elpaala thlahte chu: Zebadia te, Mesulam te, Hizkia te, Hebera te," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismerai te, Izlia te, Jobaba te an ni." 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismerai te, Izlia te, Jobaba te an ni." 
1Chronicles8:19 Simeia thlahte chu: Jakim te, Zikri te, Zabdi te," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai te, Zilethai te, Eliel te," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaia te, Beraia te, Simrata te an ni." 
1Chronicles8:22 Sasaka thlahte chu: Ispan te, Eber te, Eliel te," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdon te, Zikri te, Hanan te," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania te, Elam te, Anthothiza te," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifdeia te, Penuela te an ni." 
1Chronicles8:26 Jerohama thlahte chu: Samseraia te, Seharia te, Athalia te," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaaresia te, Eliza te, Zikria te an ni." 
1Chronicles8:28 Chûng chu hêng hnam thlahtu bulte chu an ni, an thlahte hi Jerusalem khuaah an awm." 
1Chronicles8:29 Jeielan Gibeon khua hi a din a, a awm ta a. A nupui chu Maaki a ni." 
1Chronicles8:30 A fa upa ber chu Abdona a ni, a fa dangte chu Zura te, Kisa te, Baala te, Nera te, Nadaba te," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedora te, Ahioa te, Zekera te, Miklota te an ni." 
1Chronicles8:32 Miklota hi Simea pa a ni. Hêngho thlahte hi an chipuite bul, Jerusalem-ah an awm." 
1Chronicles8:33 Nera hian fapa Kisa a nei a, Kisa hian fapa lal Saula a nei a. Saula hian fapa pali - Jonathana te, Malkisua te, Abinadaba te, Esbaala te a nei a." 
1Chronicles8:34 Mika pa Merib-baala chu Jonathana fa a ni. 
1Chronicles8:35 Mika hian fapa pali - Pithona te, Meleka te, Tarea te, Ahaza te a nei a." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahaza chuan fapa Jehoada a nei a, ani chuan fapa pathum - Alemeta te, Azmaveta te, Zimria te a nei a. Zimria chuan fapa Moza a nei a." 
1Chronicles8:37 Ani chuan fapa Binea a nei a, Binea chuan fapa Rafa a nei a, ani chuan fapa Eleasa a nei a, Eleasa chuan fapa Azela a nei a." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azela hian fapa paruk: Azrikama te, Bokerua te, Ismaela te, Searia te, Obadia te, Hanana te a nei a." 
1Chronicles8:39 Azela nau Eseka chuan fapa pathum - Ulama te, Jeusa te, Elifeleta te a nei a." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ulama fate chu sipai huai tak tak an ni, thal kah an thiam êm êm. Tu leh fa za leh sawmnga a nei. Hêngho hi Benjamin hnam zînga mi vek an ni." 
1Chronicles9:1 Israel mi zawng zawng hming chu a chhûng chhûngin ziak vek a ni a. “Israel lalte Lehkhabu” tihah chuan ziak luh a ni. Judai rama mi zawng zawng chu an sual avânga hrem nân Babulon-ah sala hruai vek an ni. 
1Chronicles9:2 An in leh lo awmna khuaa lo kîr hmasate chu Israel mi narân te, puithiam te, Levia chi te, Tempul enkawltu te an ni." 
1Chronicles9:3 Juda hnam te, Benjamin hnam te, Efraim hnam te leh Manase hnam te chu Jerusalem khuaah awm tûrin an kal a." 
1Chronicles9:4 Juda fa, Pereza thlahte hruaitu chu Amihuda fapa Uthaia a ni, a pu chu Omria a ni. A thlahtute zîngah Imria leh Bania an tel." 
1Chronicles9:5 Juda fa Sela thlahte hruaitu chu Asaia a ni, an chhûngkaw hotu ber a ni." 
1Chronicles9:6 Juda fa Zera thlahte hruaitu chu Jeuela a ni, Juda thlah Jerusalem-a awmte chu mi zaruk leh sawmkua an ni." 
1Chronicles9:7 Benjamin hnam hrang hrang Jerusalem-a awmte chu hêngte hi an ni: Mesulama fa Salua te chhûng: Mesulama pa hi Hodavia a ni, a pu chu Hasenua a ni;" 
1Chronicles9:8 Jehorama fapa Ibneia te chhûng; Uzia fapa, Mikria tupa Ela te chhûng; Sefatia fapa Mesulama te chhûng: Sefatia hi Reuela fa Ibnija tupa a ni." 
1Chronicles9:9 He hnam hi Jerusalem-ah chhûngkaw zakua leh sawmnga leh paruk an awm. An hming sawite khi chhûngkaw hotu vek an ni. 
1Chronicles9:10 Hêng puithiamte hi Jerusalem-ah an awm: Jedaia te, Jehoiariba te, Jakina te, Hilkia fapa Azaria te, Ani hi Tempul hnaa hotupa ber a ni. A pute chu a chhuan indawtin:" 
1Chronicles9:11 Mesulama, Zadoka, Meraiota, Ahituba. Jerohama fapa Adaia te; ani hi a pute chu Pasura te, Malkija te an ni." 
1Chronicles9:12 Adiela fapa Maasaia te, a pute chu Jazera te, Mesulama te, Mesilemita te, Imera te an ni." 
1Chronicles9:13 Puithiam, chhûngkhat hotute chu mi sângkhat leh zasarih leh sawmruk an ni. Tempula tih tûr ti thiam vek an ni." 
1Chronicles9:14 Hêng Levia chite hi Jerusalem-ah an awm: Hasuba fapa Semaia: A pate chu Azrikama te, Hasabia te an ni, Meraria thlah an ni; Bakbakara te, Heresa te, Galala te." 
1Chronicles9:15 Mika fapa Matania te: A pute chu Zikria te, Asafa te an ni. Semaia fapa Obadia te, a pute chu Galala te, Jeduthuna te an ni;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Asa fapa Berekia te: a pu chu Elkana a ni, Netofa khaw ram chhûnga awm ṭhîn an ni." 
1Chronicles9:17 Hêng Tempul Pulis-te hi Jerusalem-ah an awm: Saluma te, Akuba te, Talmona te, Ahimana te; Saluma hi an hotu a ni." 
1Chronicles9:18 Hetih hun thleng hi chuan lal kawngkhâr an tih khawchhak lamah an awmtîr ṭhîn a. Tûn hnuah erawh hi chuan Levia chite awmna kawngkhâr an vêng ṭhîn. 
1Chronicles9:19 Korea fapa Saluma, Ebiasafa tupa chu Kora chite nên biakbûk kawngkhâr vêngtu an ni; an thlahte pawh Lalpa chênna bûk vêngtu an nih kha." 
1Chronicles9:20 Eleazara fapa Finehasa chu (Lalpa chuan awmpui teh se) an hotu a ni ṭhîn. 
1Chronicles9:21 Meselemia fapa Zekaria pawh Biakbûk kawngkhâr vêngtu a ni. 
1Chronicles9:22 Kawngkhâr vêngtuah mi zahnih leh sâwm leh pahnih an thlang chhuak a. An awmna khaw indawtin an hming an ziak a. Lal Davida leh zâwlnei Samuelan an hna hi an siamsak a ni. 
1Chronicles9:23 Anniho leh an thlahte hian Tempul kawngkhâr an vêng ta zêl a ni. 
1Chronicles9:24 Chhim lam te, hmâr lam te, chhak lam te, khawthlang lam hawi tein kawngkhâr a awm a, chûng vêngtute chuan hotu hran an nei ṭheuh a ni." 
1Chronicles9:25 Hêng kawngkhâr vêngtute hi an chhûngte, thingtlânga awmte pawhin an ṭanpui ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles9:26 Hêng hotu pali, thuneitu berte hi Levia chi an ni. Tempula pindan hrang hrang te, a chhûnga thil dah vên him te an mawhphurhna a ni." 
1Chronicles9:27 Tûk tin zîngah Tempul kawngka an hawng a, a vêngtu an nih nghâl bawk avângin Tempul bul hnaiah an awm ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles9:28 Levia chi ṭhenkhatte chu Tempula bungbêl hman enkawltu an ni. An hman dâwnin an lo chhinchhiah vek a, an hman zawha an rawn dah kîr lehin an lo chhinchhiah leh vek ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ṭhenkhat chu Tempul thil serh enkawltu an ni; chhangphut te, uain te, oliv hriak te, rimtui hâl tûr te, mosola te an kutah a awm." 
1Chronicles9:30 Rimtui hâl tûr mosola chawhpawlh erawh hi chu puithiam tih tûr a ni. 
1Chronicles9:31 Kora thlah Saluma fapa upa ber Matithia chu thilhlana telh tûr chhang kang hotu a ni. 
1Chronicles9:32 Kohata thlahte hi sabat apianga Tempula dah tûr chhang serh siamtu tûr an ni. 
1Chronicles9:33 Levia chi bawk, mi ṭhenkhat chu Tempula rimawi tumtu an ni. A chhûn a zânin, eng lai pawha koh theih an nih avângin an hotute chu Tempul pindan ṭhenkhatah an awm ṭhîn, hna dang an thawk lo." 
1Chronicles9:34 Hêng hi anmahni chhuan zawng zawnga hotu, Levia chhûngkaw hotute an ni. Jerusalem khuaah an awm a." 
1Chronicles9:35 Gibeona ho hruaitu Jeiela chu Gibeon khuaah a awm a, a nupui chu Maaki a ni." 
1Chronicles9:36 A fapa upa ber chu Abdona a ni. Chu mi naute chu Zura te, Kisa te, Baala te, Nera te, Nadaba te," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedora te, Ahioa te, Zekaria te, Miklota te an ni." 
1Chronicles9:38 Miklota hi Simea pa a ni a. Chûngho chu Jerusalem-ah an thlahte nên an chipui dangte awmna bulah an awm. 
1Chronicles9:39 Nera hian fapa Kisa a nei a, chu mi chu Saula pa a ni. Saula hian fapa pali Jonathana te, Malkisua te, Abinadaba te, Esbaala te a nei a." 
1Chronicles9:40 Jonathana hian fapa Merib-baala a nei a, ani chu Mika pa a ni." 
1Chronicles9:41 Mika hian fapa pali - Pithona te, Meleka te, Tarea te, Ahaza te a nei a." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahaza chuan fapa Jara a nei a, ani hian fapa pathum - Alemeta te, Asmaveta te, Zimria te a nei a. Zimria hian fapa Moza a nei a." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza fapa chu Binea a ni. Binea hian fapa Refaia a nei a, chu mi chuan fapa, Azela pa Eleasa a nei a." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azela hian fapa paruk - Azrikama te, Bokerua te, Ismaela te, Searia te, Obadia te, Hanana te a nei." 
1Chronicles10:1 Filistia leh Israel-te chu Gilboa tlângah an inbei a. Israel mi tam tak chu an that a, mi dang chu Saula leh a fate nên an tlânchhia a." 
1Chronicles10:2 Filistia-ho chuan an nangchîng a, Saula fa pathum - Jonathana te, Abinadaba te, Malkisua te chu an that a." 
1Chronicles10:3 Saula bulah chuan an inbei nasa hle a, hmêlmain thalin an kâp fuh a, a hliam na viau va." 
1Chronicles10:4 Tlangvâl, a râlthuam kengtu hnênah, “I khandaih phawi la, min that mai teh, Filistia serh tan lohho hian min uankhum dah ang e,” a ti a; mahse, râlthuam kengtu chuan a hlau êm a, a that thei lo. Chuvângin, Saula chuan ama khandaih chu a la a, a bawh ta a." 
1Chronicles10:5 Tlangvâl chuan Saula thi a hmuh chuan a khandaih ken chu a bawh a, a thi ve ta a." 
1Chronicles10:6 Saula leh a fate pathum chu an thi a, an lalna pawh chu a tâwp ta a." 
1Chronicles10:7 A sipaite chu an tlânchhia a, Saula leh a fate pawh an thi tih an hriatin Jezreel ruama awmte chuan an khua chu an tlânchhiatsan a, Filistia mite chu an lo kal a, an rawn luah ta a." 
1Chronicles10:8 A tûkah Filistia-ho chu an mi thahte râlthuam hlihsak tûrin an lo kal a, Gilboa tlângah chuan Saula leh a fate ruang chu an va hmu a." 
1Chronicles10:9 Saula lu chu an la a, an râlthuam chu an hlihsak a, Filistia ram tinah, he thil lâwmawm tak hi an milemte leh an mite hrilh tûrin mi an tlântîr a." 
1Chronicles10:10 Saula râlthuamte chu an pathian Tempulahte an dah a, a lu chu an pathian Dagon tempulah an târ a." 
1Chronicles10:11 Gilead rama Jabes khaw miten Filistia-hovin Saula an sawisak dân an han hriat chuan," 
1Chronicles10:12 an pasalṭhaho chu an thawk chhuak a, Saula leh a fate ruang chu an va hlâwm a, Jabes khuaah an rawn hâwn a, chutah chuan sasaw buk hnuaiah an phûm a, ni sarih chaw an nghei a." 
1Chronicles10:13 Lalpa laka a bawhchhiatna avângin Saula chu a thi ta a. Lalpa thu chu a awih lo va," 
1Chronicles10:14 Lalpa râwn lovin mitthi thlûk thiam a râwn; chuvângin, Lalpa chuan a tihlum ta a, a ram chu Jesaia fapa Davida hnênah a pe ta a ni." 
1Chronicles11:1 Hebron khuaa Davida hnênah Israel mi zawng zawng chu an kal a, “I thisen zawmpui kan ni a," 
1Chronicles11:2 Saula lal a nih lai pawh khân Israel mite chu indonaah i ho ṭhin kha. Lalpa i Pathian pawhin, ‘Ka mi Israel-te hi i kaihruaiin an rorêltu i ni ang,’ tiin a tiam che kha,” an ti a." 
1Chronicles11:3 Israel hotu zawng zawng chu Hebron-ah Davida hnênah an lo kal a, Davida chuan Lalpa hmaah anni nên chuan thu a thlung a, hriak an thih a, Samuela hmanga Lalpa tiam ang khân Israel-te lal a ni ta a." 
1Chronicles11:4 Lal Davida leh Israel-te chu an kal a, Jerusalem khua bei tûrin an han kal a; chutih lai chuan Jebus tih a ni ṭhîn. Jebus mi, a tîr aṭanga lo awmte an la awm reng a ni." 
1Chronicles11:5 Jebus-ho chuan, “Khuaah i lo lût thei hauh lo vang,” an lo ti a; mahse, Davida chuan Zion kulh chu a la ta a, chu kulh awmna mual chu ‘Davida khawpui’ tih a ni ta a." 
1Chronicles11:6 Davida khân, “Jebus mi that hmasa ber chu sipai hotu-ah ka dah ang,” a ti a. Zeruii fapa Joaba chuan khaw bei tûr chuan hma a hruai a, sipai hotu berah a ṭang ta a ni." 
1Chronicles11:7 Chumi kulhah chuan Davida a awm tâk avângin ‘Davida khawpui’ tih a ni ta a. 
1Chronicles11:8 Khaw kulh chu Milo an tih tlâng chhak lam ruama lei chhûn khahna lai aṭangin a siam ṭan a, a dang zawng chu Joaban a chhunzawm a." 
1Chronicles11:9 Lal Davida chu a chak tulh tulh a, Engkim Lalpa chuan a awmpui tlat a ni." 
1Chronicles11:10 Hêng hi Davida sipai hmingthangte chu an ni a; anni hian Israel mi zawng zawng nên lalah an siam a, Lalpa thu ang zêlin ram an dinpui a, a ram chu an tiropui hle a ni." 
1Chronicles11:11 ‘Pasalṭha pathum’ an tih zînga hotu deuh ber chu Hakmon mi Jasobeama a ni. Mi zathum feiin a bei a, ṭum khatah a that vek a ni." 
1Chronicles11:12 Pasalṭha pathum an tih zînga pakhat leh chu Aho chi, Dodoa fapa, Eleazara a ni. Pasdamim-ah Filistia-ho leh Davida-hote an inbei a," 
1Chronicles11:13 ani chu Davida lamṭang a ni; Barli hmuna an awm laiin Israel-te chu an tlânchhe ta mai a. 
1Chronicles11:14 A fate nên an lo ding a, Filistia-ho chu an that a, Lalpa chuan a hnehtîr ta a." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ni khat chu Davida awmna Adulam pûkah a pasalṭha sawmthum chu an awm ve a, Filistia rual khat chuan Refa-ho awmna phaiah bûk an khuar tlat a." 
1Chronicles11:16 Chu hmun hima Davida a awm lai chuan Filistia mite chu Bethlehem khuaah an inkulh a. 
1Chronicles11:17 Davida chuan a khua Bethlehem chu a ngai hle a, “Bethlehem kawngka bula tuikhur tui min va chawisaktu awm teh sela ka va ti em,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles11:18 Pasalṭha pathumte chuan Filistia sipaihote chu an tâwn tlang a, Bethlehem kulh kawngka bula tuikhur tui chu an va thâl a, Davida chu an rawn pe a; mahse, ani chuan a lo in duh lo. Lalpa hnênah a hlân a, a bun chhuak ta zâwk a." 
1Chronicles11:19 “He tui hi ka in thei lo, mi huaisen thih huamte thisen in ka ni ngawt dâwn alâwm, thih huama va chawi an ni si a,” a ti a. Chûng chu ‘Pasalṭha Pathum’ an tihte thil tih chu a ni." 
1Chronicles11:20 Joaba u Abisaia chu, ‘Pasalṭha sawmthum’ an tih zînga hotu ber a ni. Feiin mi zathum a bei a, a that vek a, a hming a ṭha ta hle a ni." 
1Chronicles11:21 ‘Pasalṭha sawmthum’ an tih zînga hmingthang ber a ni, an hotu berah a ṭang ta a. ‘Pasalṭha pathum’ an tih zîngah erawh chuan a tel pha lo." 
1Chronicles11:22 Kabzeel khaw pasalṭha, Jehoiada fapa Benaia pawhin thil mak tak tak a ti. Moab chhuan êm êm milian pahnih a that a, vûr tlâk laiin a pûka sakeibaknei tawm a that bawk." 
1Chronicles11:23 Aigupta mi pa lian tak, tawng ngaa sâng a that bawk a ni. He pa hian kechâwn tiat dâwn laia lian fei hi a hmang a, Benaia hian talhtum nên a bei a, a fei chu a chhuhsak a, chu fei chuan Aiguptapa chu a chhun hlum a ni." 
1Chronicles11:24 Pasalṭha sawmthum zînga mi Jehoiada fapa Benaia chuan hêng thil hi a ti a, ‘Pasalṭha sawmthum’ zîngah chuan a hming a ṭha hle a," 
1Chronicles11:25 ‘Pasalṭha pathum’ zîngah erawh chuan a tel pha lo. Davida chuan amah vêngtute hotu-ah a dah a. 
1Chronicles11:26 Pasalṭha dangte: Joaba nau Asahela te, Bethlehem mi Dodoa fapa Elhanana te," 
1Chronicles11:27 Haror mi Samota te, Pelon mi Heleza te," 
1Chronicles11:28 Tekoa mi Ikesa fapa Ira te, Anathot mi Abiezera te," 
1Chronicles11:29 Husa mi Sibekaia te, Aho mi Ilaia te," 
1Chronicles11:30 Netofa mi Maharaia te, Netofa mi Baana fa Heleda te," 
1Chronicles11:31 Benjamina thlah Gibea khaw mi Ribaia fa Itaia te, Pirathon mi Benaia te," 
1Chronicles11:32 Nahale-gaas mi Huraia te, Arbat mi Abiela te," 
1Chronicles11:33 Baharum mi Asmaveta te, Saalbon mi Eliaba te," 
1Chronicles11:34 Gizon mi Hasema te, Herar mi Sagea fapa Jonathana te," 
1Chronicles11:35 Harar mi Sakara fa Ahiama te, Ura fa Elifala te," 
1Chronicles11:36 Mekerat mi Hefera te, Pelon mi Ahija te," 
1Chronicles11:37 Karmel mi Hezroa te, Ezbaia fa Naaraia te," 
1Chronicles11:38 Nathana unaupa Joela te, Hagria fa Mibhara te," 
1Chronicles11:38 Nathana unaupa Joela te, Hagria fa Mibhara te," 
1Chronicles11:39 Amon mi Zeleka te, Berot mi Naharaia te: ani hi Zeruii fapa Joaba râlthuam kengtu a ni;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Jatir mi Ira leh Gareba te," 
1Chronicles11:41 Hit mi Uria te, Ahlaia fa Zabada te," 
1Chronicles11:42 Siza fa Adina te: ani hi Reubena thlahte zînga hotu a ni, a chipuite a ho, mi sawmthum nên;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Maaka fa Hanana te, Mithna mi Josafata te," 
1Chronicles11:44 Asterat mi Uzia te, Aroer mi Hothama fa Sama leh Jeiela te," 
1Chronicles11:45 Tiz mi Simria fapa Jediaela leh a unau Joha te, Mahava mi Eliela te," 
1Chronicles11:46 Elnaama fa Jeribaia leh Josavia te, Moab mi Ithma te," 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliela te, Obeda te, Mezobia mi Jaasiela te." 
1Chronicles12:1 Lal Saula hlauva Ziklag khuaa Davida a tlân lai khân, Saula chu an chipui Benjamin chi ni mah se, indo ṭhang sipai rinawm tak tak Benjamin chia miten an rawn pan a." 
1Chronicles12:2 Ding lam leh vei lam inang rengin thal kah nân an hmang thiam a, virvawmte an vawm thei a ni." 
1Chronicles12:3 Gibea mi Sama fa Ahiezera leh Joasa te chuan an ho va. Chûng sipaite chu hêngte hi an ni: Azmaveta fa Jeziela leh Peleta, Anathot khaw mi Beraka leh Jehua." 
1Chronicles12:4 ‘Pasalṭha sawmthum’ tih zînga tel sipai hmingthang Gibea mi Ismaela, Gedera mi Jeremia, Jahaziela, Johanana leh Jozabada," 
1Chronicles12:5 Harif mi Eluzaia, Jerimota, Bealia, Semaria, Sefatia." 
1Chronicles12:6 Kora thlah Elkana, Isia, Azarela, Joezera, Jasobeama." 
1Chronicles12:7 Gedor mi Jerohama fa Joela, Zebadia." 
1Chronicles12:7 Gedor mi Jerohama fa Joela, Zebadia." 
1Chronicles12:8 Thlalêra a bîkna hmuna a awm laiin Gada thlah zînga indo ṭhang sipai hmingthang tak tak hêng mite hian an rawn pan a, phaw leh fei an hmang thiam êm êm a, sakeibaknei hlauhawm hmêl an pu a, khâm saza anga chak an ni." 
1Chronicles12:9 An lal dân indawtin an hming chu: Ezera te, Obadia te, Eliaba te," 
1Chronicles12:10 Mismana te, Jeremia te," 
1Chronicles12:11 Ataia te, Eliela te," 
1Chronicles12:12 Johanana te, Elzabada te," 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremia te, Makbanaia te an ni." 
1Chronicles12:14 Gada thlah sipai ṭhenkhat chu sâng hotu an ni a, a thar deuhte erawh chu za hotute an ni." 
1Chronicles12:15 Kum tîr, thla hmasa ber, Jordan lui len laiin lui chu an rawn kai a, lui chhak leh thlang lama awmte chu an ûm darh a." 
1Chronicles12:16 Benjamin leh Juda thlah mi ṭhenkhat chu Davida awmna pûkah an kal a. 
1Chronicles12:17 Davida chuan a lo hmuak a, “Ka lamṭanga min pui tûra lo kal in nih chuan lâwm takin ka lo pawm ang che u; thil ṭha lo eng mah in chunga ka tih loh pawha ka hmêlmate kuta min pêk tum in nih chuan, kan pate Pathian chuan a hria a, a hrem ngei ang che u,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles12:18 An zînga hruaitu pakhat Amasaia chu Pathian thlarauvin a thuam a, hetiang hian thu a chham ta a: “I mi kan ni e, David, Jesaia fapa, I lamṭang kan ni. Thlamuanna i hnênah awm sela, I lamṭangte hnênah pawh awm sela, Pathianin ṭanpui che rawh se,” a ti a. Davida chuan a lo lâwm a, a sipai hotu-ah te a dah hlawm a." 
1Chronicles12:19 Filistia mite nên Lal Saula bei tûra Davida a thawh chhuah ve lai khân Manasea thlah zînga mi sipai ṭhenkhat chu Davida lamah an ṭang a. Filistia-ho hi a pui tak tak hman lo, an lal ṭhenkhatten an ringhlel a, a pu Saula lamah a ṭan thut an hlau va, Ziklag khuaah an tîr kîr a nih kha." 
1Chronicles12:20 Chutia a kîr lai chuan hêng Manasea thlah sipaite hian an rawn belh a ni: Adna te, Jozabada te, Jediaela te, Mikaela te, Jozabada te, Elihua te, Zilethaia te. Hêngho hi Manasea thlah zîngah sâng hotu ṭhalh an ni." 
1Chronicles12:21 Davida sipaiah an ṭang ta a, sipai hotu-ah te a lo dah a, sipai ṭha tak tak an ni." 
1Chronicles12:22 Ni tin deuhthaw mai Davida lama ṭang tûr mi an lo kal a, sipai tam tak a nei ta a." 
1Chronicles12:23 Lalpa thu anga Saula aia Davida chu lala siam tum, sipai râlthuam nêna Hebron khuaa Davida rawn pantu zât chu hetiang hi a ni:" 
1Chronicles12:24 Juda thlah aṭangin phaw leh fei keng mi sângruk leh zariat," 
1Chronicles12:25 Simeona thlah zînga indo thiam tak tak sipai sângsarih leh za. 
1Chronicles12:26 Levia chi aṭangin mi sângli leh zaruk. 
1Chronicles12:27 Arona thlah, Jehoiada ho, mi sângthum leh zasarih." 
1Chronicles12:28 Tlangvâl huai tak Zadoka leh a ṭhian sipai hotu mi sawmhnih leh pahnih. 
1Chronicles12:29 Saula chipui, Benjamina thlahte, mi sângthum (Benjamina thlah tam tak chu Saula lama ṭang an ni)," 
1Chronicles12:30 Efraim thlah zînga hmingthang tak tak mi sînghnih leh zariat. 
1Chronicles12:31 Jordan thlang lama awm Manasea thlah, Davida lala siam tûra thlan chhuah mi sîngkhat leh sângriat." 
1Chronicles12:32 Isakara thlah, hotu zahnih leh an hote. Hêng hotute hian Israel-te tih tûr leh an tih hun tûr an hre êm êm a ni." 
1Chronicles12:33 Zebulun thlah mi sîngnga, hriam chi tinrêng hmang thiam; mi rinawm, rilru nghet pu mi an ni hlawm." 
1Chronicles12:34 Naftalia thlah - hotu rual sângkhat leh an ho phaw leh fei keng ṭhalh mi sîngthum leh sângsarih. 
1Chronicles12:35 Dana thlah, indo thiam mi sînghnih leh sângriat leh zaruk." 
1Chronicles12:36 Asera thlah, indo tûra inpeih reng, mi sîngli." 
1Chronicles12:37 Jordan chhak lama awm Reuben te, Gad te leh Manasea thlah te, hriam chi tinrêng hmang thiam mi nuaikhat leh sînghnih." 
1Chronicles12:38 Hêng sipai rual, indo tûra inpeih rengte hi Davida chu Israel lala siam tum tlatin Hebron khuaah an lo kal a. Israel hnam dangte pawh Davida lala siam tûrin an lungrual hle a ni." 
1Chronicles12:39 Davida ho chuan ni thum chhûng an chipuite tân ruai an lo buatsaih chu an ei a, an in a." 
1Chronicles12:40 Hmâr lama awm Isakar-ho te, Zebulun-ho te, Naftali-ho te chuan chhangphut te, theipui te, grep pho ro te, uain te, oliv hriak te an rawn la a, sabengtung te, sanghâwngsei te, sakawr puakphur chi te, bâwng te an rawn phurhtîr zut zut a. Talh tûr berâm te, bâwng te an rawn khalh zut zut bawk a. Israel ram mite chu an lâwm êm êm a ni." 
1Chronicles13:1 Sipai sâng hotute, za hotute leh hruaitute chu Davida chuan a berâwn a." 
1Chronicles13:2 Israel pungkhâwmho hnênah chuan “ Lalpa, kan Pathian duhzâwng a niha, nangni pawhin ṭha in tih chuan kan mi zawng zawng, khaw tina puithiam te leh Levia chi awmte hnênah mi tîr ila, hetah hian lo kal khâwm teh se." 
1Chronicles13:3 Kan za-in kal ila. Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm kha i la ang u; Saula lal lai khân a ngaihsak si lo va,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles13:4 Mipui chuan ṭha an ti a, lâk chu an remti ta a." 
1Chronicles13:5 Chhim lam Aigupta ramri aṭangin hmâr lam ramri, Hamath kalkhân thlengin Kiriat-jearim aṭanga Jerusalem-a Thuthlung Bâwm la tûr chuan Israel mite chu an ko khâwm a." 
1Chronicles13:6 Davida leh mipuite chuan Judai rama Baala khua, Kiriat-jearim an tih bawkah chuan an kal a, cherub chunga ṭhu Lalpa hming chuanna Thuthlung Bâwm chu la tûrin an kal ta a." 
1Chronicles13:7 Abinadaba in aṭang chuan Thuthlung Bâwm chu an la chhuak a, bâwng-tawlailîr tharah an dah a, Uza leh Ahioa chuan bâwng chu an khalh a." 
1Chronicles13:8 Davida leh mipuite chu Pathian chawimawiin theihtâwp chhuahin an lâm a. An zai a, ṭingṭangte an tum a, khuangtê te an vua a, darbenthek te an bêng a, tawtawrâwt te an hâm a." 
1Chronicles13:9 Kidona hruih an thlen chuan bâwngte chu an inpal a, Uza chuan Thuthlung Bâwm chu a lo chelh a." 
1Chronicles13:10 Thuthlung Bâwm a khawih avâng chuan Uza chungah Lalpa chu a thinur a, a tihlum ta nghâl a. Pathian hmaah chuan a thi ta a, chu lai hmun chu ‘Perez-uza’ an ti ta a ni." 
1Chronicles13:11 Davida chu a thinur a, Uza chu Lalpa chuan thinura a hrem avângin." 
1Chronicles13:12 Davida chuan Pathian chu a hlau ta hle a, “Thuthlung Bâwm chu ka hâwn ngam dâwn em ni?” a ti a." 
1Chronicles13:13 Chuvângin, Davida chuan Thuthlung Bâwm chu Jerusalemah a hâwn ta lo va, Gath khaw mi ve rêng Obed-edoma inah a dah ṭha ta zâwk a." 
1Chronicles13:14 Chutah chuan thla thum a awm a, Obed-edoma te chhûngkua leh an thil neih zawng zawngte chu Lalpan mal a sâwm a." 
1Chronicles14:1 Insumdâwn tawn thuah Tura lal Hirama chuan Davida hnênah palai a tîr a. Lal in sak nân sidar thingtumte a pe a, lungchher thiam te leh thing dek thiam mistiri a ngaihtuahsak bawk a." 
1Chronicles14:2 Lalpa chuan Israel-te chunga a lalna chu a tinghetin a mi Israel-te avângin a ram pawh a chawimawi ta hle tih Davida chuan a hria a. 
1Chronicles14:3 Davida chuan Jerusalem-ah nupui tam tak a neih belh a, fanu fapa pawh a neih belh ṭeuh bawk." 
1Chronicles14:4 Jerusalem-a a fate chu hêngte hi an ni: Samua, Sobaba, Nathana, Solomona," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibhara, Elisua, Elpeleta," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefega, Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisama, Beeliada, Elifeleta." 
1Chronicles14:8 Filistia mite chuan Davida chu Israel ram pumah a lal ta tih an hriatin amah chu man tumin an sipaite an tîr a. Davida chuan a lo hriatin bei lêt tûrin a thawk chhuak a," 
1Chronicles14:9 Filistia sipaite chuan Refa-ho ruam an tih chu an lo thleng a, mite chu an rawk ta a." 
1Chronicles14:10 Davida chuan, “Filistia-ho hi ka bei ang em? Min hnehtîr ang em?” tiin Pathian a râwn a. Lalpa chuan, “Bei rawh, ka hnehtîr ang che,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles14:11 Davida chuan Baal-Perazim-ah a bei a, a hneh ta a. “Hmêlma sipaite chu tuilian hrût ang hrimin Pathianin min sawisaktîr hi,” a ti a. Chu hmun chu Baal-Perazim an vuah ta a." 
1Chronicles14:12 Filistia-ho chuan an pathian lemte chu an tlânchhiatsan a, Davida chuan a hâltîr vek a." 
1Chronicles14:13 Rei lo tê hnuah, chu hmunah bawk chuan Filistia-ho an lo kal leh a, chûng lai mite chu an rawk a." 
1Chronicles14:14 Davida chuan Pathian a râwn leh a, Ani chuan, “He lam aṭang hi chuan bei mai suh, râl lehlama thingtheihmu hmunah sâwn kal kual la, chuta ṭang chuan bei ang che," 
1Chronicles14:15 Thingtheihmu lêra kal thâwm ang ri ṭhup ṭhup i hriat veleh chê ang che. Filistia sipaite sawisa tûrin i hnênah ka lo kal dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles14:16 Pathian thupêk ang chuan Davida chuan a ti a, Gibeon aṭangin Gezer thleng rawkin Filistia-ho chu a ûm ta a." 
1Chronicles14:17 Davida hming chu ram tinah a thang ta a, Lalpa vângin hnam tinin an hlau a ni." 
1Chronicles15:1 Davida chuan ama chên nân “Davida khawpuiah” in a sa hlawm a. Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm dahna tûr hmun a buatsaih a, puan in a kaih bawk a." 
1Chronicles15:2 “Levia chi chauhvin Thuthlung Bâwm chu an zâwn tûr a ni, a zâwntu atân leh kumkhuaa a rawngbâwltu atân Lalpa chuan anni hi a thlang a ni,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles15:3 Davida chuan Israel mi zawng zawng chu Jerusalem-ah, Thuthlung Bâwm dahna tûr a buatsaihah chuan dah tûrin a pun khâwm a." 
1Chronicles15:4 Arona thlah leh Levia chite chu a ko khâwm a," 
1Chronicles15:5 Levia chi, Kohata thlahte chu mi za leh sawmhnih, Uriela hovin an lo kal a." 
1Chronicles15:6 Meraria thlah aṭangin mi zahnih leh sawmhnih, Asaia hovin an lo kal a." 
1Chronicles15:7 Gersona thlah aṭangin mi za leh sawmthum, Joela hovin an lo kal a;" 
1Chronicles15:7 Gersona thlah aṭangin mi za leh sawmthum, Joela hovin an lo kal a;" 
1Chronicles15:8 Elizafana thlah aṭangin mi zathum, Semaia hovin an lo kal a." 
1Chronicles15:9 Hebrona thlah aṭangin mi sawmriat, Eliela hovin an lo kal a." 
1Chronicles15:10 Uziela thlah aṭangin mi za leh sâwm leh pahnih, Aminadaba hovin an lo kal bawk a." 
1Chronicles15:11 Davida chuan puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara chu a ko va, Levia chi mi paruk, Uriela te, Asaia te, Joela te, Semaia te, Eliela te, Aminadaba te pawh chu a ko va," 
1Chronicles15:11 Davida chuan puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara chu a ko va, Levia chi mi paruk, Uriela te, Asaia te, Joela te, Semaia te, Eliela te, Aminadaba te pawh chu a ko va," 
1Chronicles15:12 an hnênah, “Levia chi hruaitute in ni a, inthian thianghlim ula, in Levia chipuite pawh thian thianghlim rawh u. Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm chu a dahna tûr ka buatsaihah in zâwn thleng tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles15:13 Lâk kan tum hmasak ṭum khân in tel ve lo va, Lalpa kan Pathian chu a tih dân tûr kan râwn lo va, min sawisa ta a nih kha,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles15:14 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian Thuthlung Bâwm la sawn tûr chuan puithiamte leh Levia chite chu an inthian thianghlim ta a." 
1Chronicles15:15 Mosia hnêna Lalpa sawi angin Levia chite chuan bâwm chu a zâwnfungin an zâwn ta a ni. 
1Chronicles15:16 Levia chite chu zaipâwl te, perhkhuang tuma dârbenthek bêng pâwl te insiam tûrin an hotute chu Davida chuan a hrilh a." 
1Chronicles15:17 Dârbenthek ring taka bêng tûrin hêng mite hi an ti a: 
1Chronicles15:18 Joela fapa Hemana te, a unau Berekia fapa Asafa te," 
1Chronicles15:18 Joela fapa Hemana te, a unau Berekia fapa Asafa te," 
1Chronicles15:19 an unau Meraria thlah zînga mi Kusaia fapa Ethana te. 
1Chronicles15:20 Anniho hi ṭanpuia perhkhuang fiak chi perh tûrin hêng Levia chite hi an ruai a: Zekaria, Aziela, Semiramota, Jehiela, Unia, Eliaba, Maaseia, Benaia." 
1Chronicles15:21 Perhkhuang ri thum perh tûrin Levia chi hêngte hi an thlang chhuak: Matithia, Elifelehua, Mikneia, Azazia, Tempul pulis Edoma leh Jeiela te nên." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenania chu thil tum thiam tak a ni a, Levia chi, rimawi tumtute chu an hotîr a." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia leh Elkana chu Obed-edoma leh Jehia nên Thuthlung Bâwm vêngtuah an ruat a. 
1Chronicles15:24 Puithiam Sebania te, Josafata te, Nethanela te, Amasaia te, Zekaria te, Benaia te, Eliezara te chu Thuthlung Bâwm hmaa kal a, tawtawrâwt hâmtuah an thlang a." 
1Chronicles15:25 Lal Davida te, Israel upa te leh Sipai sâng hotute chu Obed-edoma inah Thuthlung Bâwm la tûr chuan hlim takin an kal a." 
1Chronicles15:26 Lalpa chuan Levia chi, Thuthlung Bâwm zâwntu tûrte a ṭanpui duh nân a hnênah bâwngpa pasarih leh berâm pasarih an hlân a." 
1Chronicles15:27 Davida chuan puan zai sîn ṭha ber chi a sin a, hla satute pawh, an hotu Kenania leh Bâwm zâwntute nên chutiang chuan an inthuam a; Davida chuan puan zai sîn Efod a inbel bawk a." 
1Chronicles15:28 Israel mi zawng zawng chu hlim takin an au va, tawtawrâwt te, berâm kîte an hâm a, dârbenthek te an bêng a, perkhuang te perh chungin Thuthlung Bâwm chu Jerusalem-ah an chhawm chho ta a." 
1Chronicles15:29 Khuaa Bâwm an zâwn luh lai chuan Saula fanu Mikali chuan tukverhah a lo thlîr a, Lal Davida lâwma a lâm leh a zuang vêl chu a zu hmu a, a hmusit rilru hle a." 
1Chronicles16:1 Thuthlung Bâwm chu Davida buatsaih puan inah chuan an zâwn lût a, an dah ta a. Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan an hlân a." 
1Chronicles16:2 Davida chuan thilhlan a tih zawh chuan Lalpa hmingin mipui tân malsâwmna a sawi a; 
1Chronicles16:3 ei tûr a sem vek a, Israel rama mi zawng zawng, mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh, chhang tlang khat leh sa hem hmin hrang khat, grep pho ro tlêm nên a pe ṭheuh va." 
1Chronicles16:4 Thuthlung Bâwm hmaa Lalpa biakna hruaia, fakna hla sa tûrin Levia chi mi ṭhenkhat chu Davida chuan a ruat a." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafa chu an hotu ber a ni; Zekaria chu a dawttu a ni; Jeiela te, Semiramota te, Jehiela te, Matithia te, Eliaba te, Benaia te, Obed-edoma te, Jeiela te chu perhkhuang leh ṭingṭang tum tûr an ni a, Asafa chu dârbenthek ring taka bêngtu tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles16:6 Puithiam pahnih, Benaia leh Jahaziela chu Thuthlung Bâwm hmaa a khât tâwka tawtawrâwt hâm ṭhîn tûra ruat an ni." 
1Chronicles16:7 Asafa leh a Levia chipuite Lalpa fakna hla sak kaihruaitu atâna ruat hmasa bertu chu Davida hi a ni. 
1Chronicles16:8 Lalpa chu lâwmthu hrilh ula, A hming lam bawk rawh u. A thiltih hi hnam tinrêng hrilh rawh u." 
1Chronicles16:9 Amah fakin zai ula, Thil mak a tih zawng zawng hi hril rawh u." 
1Chronicles16:10 A hming thianghlim hi chhuang ula, Lalpa zawngtute chu hlim hle rawh se." 
1Chronicles16:11 Lalpa chu zawng ula, a chakna dîl rawh u. Ani chu pan fo rawh u." 
1Chronicles16:12 A thiltih ropui tak te, Thil mak a tih leh a rorêl dân te chu, Hre reng rawh u," 
1Chronicles16:13 Aw, a chhiahhlawh Israela thlahte leh A thlan Jakoba fate u, hre reng rawh u." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ani chu Lalpa kan Pathian a ni, Khawvêl pum puia rorêltu a ni." 
1Chronicles16:15 A thuthlung chu hre reng rawh u, Chhuan sâng tâna a thupêk chu." 
1Chronicles16:16 Abrahama hnêna a thuthlung leh Isaka hnêna a thutiam chu a hre reng a ni. 
1Chronicles16:17 Chûng chu Jakoba thlahte Dân atân a nemnghet a, Israel-te kumkhaw thuthlung atân." 
1Chronicles16:18 “Khai le, Kanan ram hi ka pe ang che u, Ro atân in nei thliah ang,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles16:19 Eng tham ni lo, mi tlêm tê, Mikhual mai an nih lai pawh khân," 
1Chronicles16:20 Hnam tinrêng zînga vâkvaiin, Khaw tin chhiarin an pêm ṭhîn a." 
1Chronicles16:21 Mahse, tu ma nêkchêp a phal lo va, Anmahni avângin lalte a zilh zâwk a." 
1Chronicles16:22 “Ka hriakthih hi khawih suh ula, Ka zâwlnei hi a pawi khawih hek suh u,” a ti." 
1Chronicles16:23 Khawvêla mi zawng zawngte u, Lalpa fakin hla sa ula, Min chhandam thu lâwmawm hi ni tin puang rawh u." 
1Chronicles16:24 A ropuizia hnam tin hnênah hril ula, Mi tin hnênah thil mak a tihte chu puang rawh u." 
1Chronicles16:25 Lalpa chu a ropui a, fak chiam tûr a ni, Pathian dang zawng zawng aiin zah tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles16:26 Hnam dang pathiante chu a lem mai an ni a, Lalpa hi zawng vân siamtu a ni." 
1Chronicles16:27 Ropuina leh chawimawina chuan a hual vêl a, A Hmun Thianghlim chu thiltihtheihna leh lâwmnain a khat." 
1Chronicles16:28 Khawvêla hnam tinrêngte u, Lalpa chu chawimawi ula, Lalpa ropuina leh chakna chu fak rawh u." 
1Chronicles16:29 Lalpa hming ropui chu fak fo ula, Thilpêk kengin a inah lo haw rawh u, Thianghlim leh mawia inthuamin Lalpa hmaah lo kûn rawh u." 
1Chronicles16:30 Lei mi zawng zawngte u, a hmaah khûr ula, Lei pawh hi a nghîn theih lohna tûrin tihngheh a ni si a." 
1Chronicles16:31 Vânte u, hlim ula, aw leilung, nang pawh lâwm rawh, Lalpa hi lal a nih hnam tin hrilh rawh u." 
1Chronicles16:32 Tuifinriat leh a chhûnga awmte chu au dur dur rawh se, Ram leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng hlim se," 
1Chronicles16:33 Ngawa thing zawng zawng pawh au hluah hluah rawh se, Leia rorêl tûra a lo kal hunah chuan." 
1Chronicles16:34 Lalpa chu a ṭhat êm avângin lâwmthu hrilh rawh u, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
1Chronicles16:35 Aw Lalpa, kan Pathian, min chhan chhuak la, Hnam dang zîng ata min hruai khâwm leh ang che. I hming thianghlim kan fak ang a, Ropui takin kan chawimawi ang che." 
1Chronicles16:36 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu fak ula, Chatuan chatuanin fak rawh u. Mi zawng zawng chuan, ‘Amen,’ an lo ti a. Lalpa chu an fak a." 
1Chronicles16:37 Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm an dahna hmuna Pathian biaknaa rawngbâwltuah Asafa leh a chipui Levia chite chu Davida chuan a dah nghet a, ni tin hnaah an neih ta a." 
1Chronicles16:38 Jeduthuna fapa leh a chipui mi sawmruk leh pahnih chuan an pui ṭhîn a ni. Hosia leh Obed-edoma chu kawngkhâr vêngtu an ni. 
1Chronicles16:39 Puithiam Zadoka leh a puithiampui dangte chu Lalpa an biakna hmun Gibeon khuaah chuan inkhâwmna hruaitu an ni. 
1Chronicles16:40 Israel-te hnêna Lalpa thupêk, Lalpa dân bu-a ziak angin tûk leh zân maichâmah hâlral thilhlan an hâl ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles16:41 Hemana leh Jeduthuna pawh, mi dang thlan chhuahte nên an awm ve a, a hmangaihna dai ngai lo avânga Lalpa fak hla sa tûr an ni." 
1Chronicles16:42 Fakna hla an sak lo rem tûr tawtawrâwt te, dârbenthek te leh rimawi tumtute hotu chu Hemana leh Jeduthuna te hi an ni. Jeduthuna chipuite chu kawngkhâr vêngtu an ni." 
1Chronicles16:43 Mi tin mahni in lamah an haw a, Davida pawh a chhûngte uap tûrin a hâwng a." 
1Chronicles17:1 Lal Davida chu inah a awm ta deuh reng a. Ni khat chu zâwlnei Nathana a ko va, a hnênah, “Sidar thinga sak inah ka awm a, Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm lah puan in mai maiah a awm si,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathana chuan, “I vei rilrûk ang chu ti ta che, Pathianin a awmpui zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles17:3 Nimahsela, chumi zân chuan Pathianin Nathana hnênah," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Kal ta la, ka chhiahhlawh Davida hnênah ka thu hi va hrilh rawh, ‘Nang zawng, ka chênna tûr Tempul satu tûr i ni lo ve." 
1Chronicles17:5 Israel mite Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah aṭanga tûn thleng hian tempulah ka la awm ngai lo. Puan in mai maiah hlîr ka awm a, hmun hrang hrangah ka insawn ka insawn ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles17:6 Israel mite ka kalpui ṭhin laite khân, hruaitua ka ruat tu mah, sidar thinga Tempul min siamsak tûrin ka phût ngai lo." 
1Chronicles17:7 “ ‘Chuvângin, ka chhiahhlawh Davida chu hrilh rawh; Kei, Engkim Lalpa hnênah, ‘phûla i berâm vêng lai ka la che a, ka mi Israel-te lalah ka siam ta che a ni." 
1Chronicles17:8 I kalna apiangah ka awmpui che a, i do, i hmêlma zawng zawngte chu ka hnehtîr zêl che a, khawvêla lal hmingthang berah ka siam dâwn che a ni." 
1Chronicles17:9 Tu man an tihduhdah tawh lohna tûr hmun, ka mi Israel-te tân ka thlang a, ka awmtîr tawh a, mi kawlh pui puiin an bei ṭhîn a; mahse, an bei tawh lo vang." 
1Chronicles17:10 Ka mi Israel-te tân chuan rorêltute ka ruatsak a. I hmêlma zawng zawng hnehpui che leh thlah tam tak pêk che ka tiam a. 
1Chronicles17:11 I thih hunah, i pate hnêna i kal hnu chuan i fate zînga pakhat chu lalah ka siam ang a, ka tilal êm êm ang." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ani chuan in mi saksak dâwn a ni, kumkhuaa lal tûrin ka dah nghet ang." 
1Chronicles17:13 A pa ka ni ang a, ka fapa a ni bawk ang. I lal hmaa lal ka hawisan ang khân ka hawisan lo vang." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ka mite leh ka ram chunga rorêltuah ka dah ang a, a thlahte ngeiin lalṭhutthlêng chu an chhawm zêl ang,’ ” a ti a." 
1Chronicles17:15 Pathianin thu a hrilh leh a sawi zawng zawng chu Nathana chuan Davida a hrilh a. 
1Chronicles17:16 Lal Davida chu Biakbûkah chuan a kal a, a ṭhu a, a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa Pathian, kei leh ka chhûngte tehlul hi engtizia nge heti taka min duat le?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Chu chu tâwk ti mai lovin ka thlahte pawh la tihṭhat zêl i tiam lehnghal a; a ni, aw Lalpa Pathian, mi ropui tak angin min cheibâwl hi." 
1Chronicles17:18 Eng nge ka ngen leh chuan ang? I chhiahhlawh hi i hre tlang vek a ni. 
1Chronicles17:19 Aw Lalpa, i chhiahhlawh hi ka ṭhatna tûrin, nangma thu ngeiin min chawimawi i tum a lo ni; ka thlahte pawh i chawimawi zêl dâwn tih min hrilh hi." 
1Chronicles17:20 Aw Lalpa, kan hriat phâkah chuan nang ang tu mah an awm lo va, nang chauh hi Pathian chu i ni." 
1Chronicles17:21 Israel mite ang pawh hi khawvêlah hnam dang an awm lo; bawih ata i tlan a, Aigupta ram ata i hruai chhuak a, thil ropui leh mak tak tak tiin khawvêl pumah i hming i chher tâk hi." 
1Chronicles17:22 Israel mite chu i mi ni kumkhua tûrin i ti ta a, Aw Lalpa, nang hi an Pathian chu i nih tâk ngei hi." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Khai le, aw Lalpa, kei leh ka thlahte chungthua i thutiam hi i duh ang angin han tipuitling teh le." 
1Chronicles17:24 I hming a lo ropui ang a, i mite chuan ‘Engkim Lalpa hi Israel-te tân zawng Pathian a lo nih ngei hi,’ an ti dâwn nia. Ka lalna pawh hi kumkhua atân i tinghet dâwn a." 
1Chronicles17:25 I chhiahhlawh chu hêng thil hi i hrilha, ka thlahte pawh an lal zêl dâwn tih i sawi avângin i hnênah hêng hi ka rawn sawi ngam a ni." 
1Chronicles17:26 Nang zawng, Aw Lalpa, Pathian i ni a, he thil ropui tak hi min tihsak i tiam ta si a." 
1Chronicles17:27 An chunga ngil i neih zêlna tlâk an nih theih nân ka thlahte hi malsâwm la. Aw Lalpa, nang chuan mal i sâwm tawh a, i malsâwmna chu an chungah awm reng rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles18:1 Nakin deuhvah chuan Filistia-ho chu Davida chuan a rûn a, a hneh a, Gath khawpui leh a vêl khuate chu a chhuhsak a." 
1Chronicles18:2 Moab-ho pawh a hneh a, a thuhnuaiah an awm a, a hnênah chhiah an chawi ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles18:3 Hamath dep, Zoba lal Hadadezera chuan Eufretis lui hmâr lam ram neih a tum a, a beih avâng hian Davida chuan a rûn a." 
1Chronicles18:4 Davida chuan a sakawr-tawlailîr sângsarih leh sakawr chuang mi sângsarih leh kea kal sipai sînghnih a mansak a. Tawlailîr za hnûk thei tûr sakawr chu a zuah a, a dang chu an tha a chhahsak a." 
1Chronicles18:5 Suria mi, Damaska lal chuan Hadadezera chu pui tûrin sipai a tîr a. Davida chuan a lo bei a, sipai sînghnih leh sânghnih a lo thahsak a." 
1Chronicles18:6 Suria ramah chuan sipai a dah a, Davida khualehtui an ni ta a, a hnênah chhiah an chawi a, Lalpa chuan Davida chu kil tinah a tichak zêl a." 
1Chronicles18:7 Hadadezera ho rangkachak phawte chu a lâksak a, Jerusalem-ah a hâwn a," 
1Chronicles18:8 Hadadezera khua Tibhat leh Kun khua aṭang pawhin dâr tam tak a la a, chûng chuan Solomonan Tempula tuizêm te, dâr ban te, leh bêl te a siam a." 
1Chronicles18:9 Hamath lal Toia chuan Hadadezera leh a sipaite chu Davidan a hneh tih a lo hria a. 
1Chronicles18:10 Toia leh Hadadezera hi an indo fo tawh ṭhîn a, Davida hian a hneh tâk avângin lo hmuak tûr leh lâwmpui tûrin a fapa Jorama chu Toia chuan a tîr a. Jorama chuan rangkachak te, tangkarua te leh dâra siam thil tam tak te a pe a." 
1Chronicles18:11 Davida chuan, Edom-ho te, Moab-ho te, Amon-ho te, Filistia-ho te leh Amalek-ho te a chhuhsak, rangkachak te, tangkarua te leh dâr te chu Tempul sak nân a pe vek a." 
1Chronicles18:12 Zeruii fapa Abisaia chuan Chikhur ruamah Edom-ho sîngkhat leh sângriat a that a. 
1Chronicles18:13 Edom ramah chuan sipai a dah thluah a, Davida khualehtui an ni ta a. Lalpa chuan Davida chu khawiah pawh a tichak ta zêl a ni." 
1Chronicles18:14 Davida chu Israel zawng zawng lal a ni ta a; tu mah hleih nei lovin ro a rêlsak ṭhîn. 
1Chronicles18:15 Zeruii fapa Joaba chu sipai hotu lal ber a ni a, Ahiluda fapa Jehosafata chu Ziaktu lian a ni." 
1Chronicles18:16 Ahituba fapa Zadoka leh Abiathara fapa Abimeleka chu puithiam hotu an ni; Seraia chu ziaktu a ni.
