1Chronicles18:17 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu Keret leh Pelet, lal vêngtute hotu a ni. Lal Davida fapate pawh ram chhûnga mi lian tak tak an ni." 
1Chronicles19:1 Tin, Amon-ho lal Nahasa chu a thi a, a fapa chuan a ai a awh a." 
1Chronicles19:2 Davida chuan, “Khawi nge, Nahasa khân min khawngaih a, a fapa Hanuna khawngaih hi ka ba ve a ni,” a ti a, a pa râl tûrin mi a tîr a. Hanuna râl tûr chuan Davida chhiahhlawhte chu an kal a, Amon-ho rama Hanuna in chu an va thleng a." 
1Chronicles19:3 Amon milianho chuan Hanuna hnênah, “Davida hian i pa hi sûn tak taka râl tûr chein mi a rawn tîr niin i ring em ni? Kan ram hi an lâk mai theih nân a chhiahhlawhte hi en thlithlai tûrin a rawn tîr a ni zâwk dâwn lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
1Chronicles19:4 Davida palaite chu Hanuna chuan a man a, an hmuihmul a ziahkâwnsak a, an kawrfual chu a kâwng chinah a tansak bawk a, a hâwntîr leh ta a." 
1Chronicles19:5 An lo sawisak dân chu Davida hrilh tûrin mi an tîr a, anmahni chu an zak lutuk a, lal hnênah chuan an kal hreh a ni. Davida chuan, “Jeriko khuaah awm ula, in hmuihmul a chawr buk leh deuh hunah in lo haw dâwn nia,” tiin mi a chah a." 
1Chronicles19:6 Lal Hanuna leh Amon mite chuan Davida thinurzia an hriat chuan Mesapotamia rama mi te, Suria rama Maaka leh Soba mite chu sakawr-tawlailîr leh sakawr chungchuang rawih nân tangka kg. sîngthum leh sângli an pe a. Tawlailîr sîngthum leh sânghnih an ruai a, chu nên chuan Maaka lal leh a sipaite chuan Medeba bulah bûk an rawn khuar a." 
1Chronicles19:7 Amon mite pawh khaw tin aṭangin indo tûrin an lo thawk chhuak a. 
1Chronicles19:8 Chu chu Davida chuan a lo hria a, a sipai hotu Joaba chu a ko va, a sipai huaisen rual pawh chu a ko khâwm a." 
1Chronicles19:9 Amon-ho chu an insiam a, an lal awmna khawpui Raba kulh pâwnah ṭanhmun an siam a; an lama ṭang tûr lalte leh sipai lo thawkte chuan ram palailêngah ṭanhmun an siam a." 
1Chronicles19:10 Joaba chuan hma lamah leh hnung lamah hmêlmaten an rawn bei dâwn tih a hriatin a sipai ṭha zualte chu a thlang chhuak a, Suria ram aṭanga lo kal sipaite bei tûrin a tlar a." 
1Chronicles19:11 Sipai dangte chu a u Abisaia a hotîr a, Amon-ho bei tûrin an intlar a." 
1Chronicles19:12 Joaba chuan, “Suria ram mite ka hneh loh chuan min rawn pui la, Amon-ho i hneh loh chuan ka rawn pui ang che." 
1Chronicles19:13 I tum tiruh la, kan mite leh kan Pathian mite awmna khuate i chhan teh ang; Lalpa chu ṭha a tih angin a lo che ang chu,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles19:14 Joaba leh a mite chuan Suria mite chu an bei a, an hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ta a." 
1Chronicles19:15 Amon miten Suria mite an tlânchhia an hmuh chuan Joaba u Abisaia hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ve a, an khaw kulh chhûngah chuan an tlân lût a, Joaba chuan Jerusalem-ah a hâwnsan ta a." 
1Chronicles19:16 Suria mite chuan Israel-te chu an ngam lo tih an hriatin Eufretis lui râla Suria mi dangte chu an pun a, Zoba lal Hadadezera sipai hotu Sofaka hovin an lo thawk a." 
1Chronicles19:17 Chu thu chu Davida an hrilh a, Israel mite chu a khâwm a, Jordan a kân a, an awmna chu a va thleng a. Suria mite nên chuan an inbei a." 
1Chronicles19:18 Suria mite chu Israel-te hmaah chuan an tlânchhia a, Davida chuan tawlailîr khalhtu sângsarih a that a, kea kal sipai sîngli nên; an hotu Sofaka pawh chu a that a." 
1Chronicles19:19 Hadadezera hote chuan Israel-te chu an ngam lo a ni tih an hriat chuan Davida nên an inberem a, a khua leh tuiah an awm ta a; Amon-ho pawh an pui duh tawh lo." 
1Chronicles20:1 Kum a lo thar a, nipui a lo thaw dâwn a, lalhote rammut ṭhin hun chu a lo thleng a. Joaba chuan sipai a hruai a, Amon-ho ram chu a va rûn a. Lal Davida erawh chu Jerusalem-ah a awm rih a. Raba khua chu an hual a, an bei a, an tichhe ta a." 
1Chronicles20:2 An pathian lim Milkoma lukhum chu rangkachak kg. sawmthum leh pali laia rit a ni a, chutah chuan lunghlu pawh an phûm nual a; chûng chu Davida chuan a lallukhumah chuan a phûm a; khua aṭang chuan thil tam tak, râllâk sumah a la a." 
1Chronicles20:3 Khuaa mite chu a kawi a, thingzaiah te, leiletah te leh hreia thing tanah te a chhawr a. Amon khaw danga mite pawh chutiang bawk chuan a chhawr a. A hote nên Jerusalem-ah Davida chu a kîr leh ta a." 
1Chronicles20:4 Nakin deuhvah chuan Filistia mite nên Gezer-ah an indo leh a, Hamath mi Sibekaia chuan Filistia mi zînga milian thlah Sifaia a that a, Filistia-ho chu an tlâwm ta a." 
1Chronicles20:5 Filistia mite nên an inbei leh a, Jaira fapa Elhanana chuan Goliatha nau Lahmia, Gath khaw mi chu a that a; chu mi fei chu kechâwn tiat dâwn laia hrawl a ni." 
1Chronicles20:6 Gath khuaah hian an inbei leh a. Milian pakhat, kutzungṭang paruk leh kezungṭang paruk ve ve nei a awm a, hmânlai miliante thlah a ni." 
1Chronicles20:7 Israel-te chu a cho vei a, Davida u Sama fapa Jonathanan a that a." 
1Chronicles20:8 Davida leh a hote thah miliante hi Gath khuaa awm milian thlah an ni. 
1Chronicles21:1 Setana chuan Israel-te sawisak a duh a, Davida chu Israel-te chhiarpui a neihtîr a." 
1Chronicles21:2 Joaba leh hotu dangte hnênah, “Israel ram hi a kil tâwp Beer-seba aṭanga Dan thlengin fang chhuak ula, Israel mi eng zât nge awm ka hre duh a ni,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:3 Joaba chuan, “ Lalpa hian tûna awm lêt za aia tam Israel-te chu awmtîr teh se. Ka pu, i mite vek an ni a, engtizia nge hetiang thil tih hi i duh a, hnam pumin thiam loh kan chan ang?” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:4 Nimahsela, lal thu chu a tlang ta zâwk a. Joaba chuan Israel ram chu a fang chhuak a, Jerusalem-ah a lo haw leh a." 
1Chronicles21:5 Joaba chuan Israel mi zât chu a hrilh a, “Sipaia ṭang thei mi maktaduaikhat leh nuaikhat Israel ramah an awm a, Judai ramah mi nuai li leh sîngsarih an awm,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:6 Lal thu chu ṭha a tih loh avângin Joaba chuan Levia chite leh Benjamin chite a chhiar tel ve lo. 
1Chronicles21:7 An thiltih avâng chuan Pathian chu a lâwm lo va, Israel mite chu a hrem a." 
1Chronicles21:8 Davida chuan Pathian hnênah, “Thil ka tisual nasa a, a âtthlâk hle a ni, min ngaidam rawh,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:9 Lalpa chuan Davida zâwlnei Gada hnênah," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Kal la, ‘Kawng thum, a eng ber emaw a thlan tûr ka ruatsak a ni; a thlan ber chu ka tihsak dâwn’ tih Davida chu va hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:11 Gada chu Davida hnênah a kal a, Lalpa thu sawi chu a hrilh a, “A eng nge i duh ber thlang rawh le," 
1Chronicles21:12 kum thum ṭâm tuar nge, thla thum hmêlma ûm nge, ni thum Lalpa Vantirhkohvin Israel ram pum khandaiha a sawisaka, hri-a a hrem? Mi tîrtu Lalpa chu engtin nge ka chhân dâwn?” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:13 Davida chuan Gada chu a chhâng a, “A ngaihna ka va hre lo ve! Mihring kut tuar zawng ka duh lo, Lalpa kut tuar ka thlang zâwk e, ani chuan ngil a nei si ṭhîn a,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:14 Tichuan, Israel-te zîngah hri a rawn lêntîr a; mi sîngsarih an thi a." 
1Chronicles21:15 Lalpa chuan Jerusalem tichhe tûrin Vântirhkoh a rawn tîr bawk a; mahse, a duh leh ta lo va, Vântirhkoh hnênah chuan, “A tâwk e, ti tawh suh,” a ti a. Jebus mi Arauna hruihah chuan Vântirhkoh chu a ding a." 
1Chronicles21:16 Davida chuan a han en a, Jerusalem tichhe tûr Vântirhkoh khandaih keng, lei leh vân inkâra ding chu a hmu a, Davida leh mipui hruaitute chuan saiip puan an sin vek a, hmaia lei siin an kûn a." 
1Chronicles21:17 Davida chu a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Pathian, thil sual titu chu kei hi ka ni; chhiarpui kha keima tihtîr a ni; hêng mipui, eng mah ti ve lote hian tihsual an nei hlei nêm. Kei leh ka chhûngte hi min hrem mai ta che, I mite hi chu zuah rawh,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:18 Lalpa Vântirhkoh chuan Gada hnênah, “Davida chu Jebus mi Arauna hruihah maichâm siam tûrin hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:19 Davida chuan Lalpa thu chu a zâwm a, Gada sawi ang chuan a kal ta a." 
1Chronicles21:20 Hruihah chuan Arauna leh a fapa pali chuan huit an lo vua a, Vântirhkoh an hmuh chuan a fate chu an biru a." 
1Chronicles21:21 Araunan Davida lo kal a hmuh chuan hruih ata chu a lo kal a, bawkkhupin chibai a lo bûk a." 
1Chronicles21:22 Davida chuan, “Hri hi a reh theih nân i hruihah hian maichâm ka siam ang e, min leitîr rawh, a man tûr chu ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:23 Arauna chuan, “Ka pu, nei mai rawh, ṭha i tih ang angin ti rawh. Maichâma thilhlan tûr hei bâwngpa a awm a, a hâlna tûr thing pawh buh vuakna hmanrua a awm a; chhangphut thilhlan tûr huit pawh hi ka pe a che, engkim ka tum vek ang e,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:24 Lal Davida chuan a chhâng a, “Ni lo ve, a man dik tak ka pe ang che, Lalpa hnêna thilhlan atân i ta eng mah a thlâwnin ka la lo vang; a man pe lovin hâlral thilhlan tûr pawh ka hlân lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:25 Davida chuan Arauna chu a hruih manah rangkachak tangka zaruk a pe ta a. 
1Chronicles21:26 Chumi hmunah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a, hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan a hlân a. A ṭawngṭai a, Lalpa chuan a rawn chhâng a, maichâma hâlral thilhlan chu vân aṭanga meiin a rawn kâng ral ta a." 
1Chronicles21:27 Lalpa chuan Vântirhkoh chu a khandaih dah bo tûrin a hrilh a, a thu ang chuan a ti a." 
1Chronicles21:28 Lalpa chuan a ṭawngṭaina a rawn chhâng a ni tih Davida chuan a hria a, Arauna hruiha maichâmah chuan thilhlan a hlân ṭhîn ta a." 
1Chronicles21:29 Chutih lai chuan Biakbûk leh thilhlanna maichâm Mosia siam chu Gibeon-ah a la awm a; 
1Chronicles21:30 mahse, Lalpa khandaih tuar a hlauh avângin Pathian be tûrin chutah chuan Davida chu a kal ngam lo va ni." 
1Chronicles22:1 Davida chuan, “He laiah hian Lalpa, Pathian Tempul chu a awm tûr a ni. He lai maichâm hi a ni Israel-ten hâlral thilhlan an hlan ṭhinna tûr chu,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles22:2 A ram chhûnga hnam dang awm zawng zawng chu Davida chuan a ko khâwm a, hnathawkah a chhawr a. Ṭhenkhat chuan Tempul sakna tûr lung an chher a." 
1Chronicles22:3 A kawngkhâra hman tûr thîrkilhna te, kawpza te, thîr tam tak leh dâr tam tak, bûk chhuah sên loh a chhertîr a." 
1Chronicles22:4 Tura leh Sidon mite chu sidar thing tam tak rawn tawlh tûrin a ti a. 
1Chronicles22:5 Davida chuan, “Ka fapa Solomona sak tûr Tempul chu ropui tak, khawvêla hmingthang tham a ni tûr a ni. A la naupang a, chinchâng a la hre tâwk lo va, a châk ka lo chhuahsak tûr a ni,” a ti rilru a. Tichuan, a thih hmain Tempul sakna tûr châk tam tak Davida chuan a lo chhêk khâwm hman a ni." 
1Chronicles22:6 A fapa Solomona chu a ko va, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian tân Tempul saksak tûrin a hrilh a." 
1Chronicles22:7 Davida chuan, “Kei pawhin ka Pathian, Lalpa hminga in sak chu ka châk êm êm a;" 
1Chronicles22:8 amaherawhchu, Lalpa chuan ‘Thisen i chhuah nasa êm a, indo lah i uar si. Nangmah avângin leia thisen luang ka hmu tam êm mai; nang chuan ka in chu i sa lo vang." 
1Chronicles22:9 Inrem ngaina tak fapa Solomona i nei a, a hming hi ‘muanna’ tih a nih ang ngei hian a vêla a hmêlmate lakah thlamuang takin ka awmtîr ang a, a lal chhûngin Israel ram a râlmuang ang a, thlamuang takin an awm ang." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ani chuan ka in tûr chu a sa ang a, ka tân fapa a ni ang a, a tân pa ka ni bawk ang; Israel-te chunga a lalṭhutthlêng chu kumkhua atân ka tinghet ang,’ tiin mi hrilh a ni." 
1Chronicles22:11 “Chuvângin, ka fapa, Lalpa chu i hnênah awm sela, malsâwm che sela, a tih ang ngei chuan Lalpa i Pathian in tûr chu sa rawh le;" 
1Chronicles22:12 Finna leh hmang hriatna pe phawt mai che sela, Israel mite chu Lalpa, i Pathian dân hmangin ro i rêlsak thei ang a;" 
1Chronicles22:13 Israel-te tâna Lalpa thuruatte leh a Dân, Mosia a hrilhte kha zâwm la, kawng engkimah i hlawhtling ang. Huai takin ṭan la sauh sauh rawh; hlauthâwng suh la, beidawng mai hek suh." 
1Chronicles22:14 Lalpa in sak nân rangkachak quintal nuaithum leh sângli, tangkarua quintal nuaithum leh sîngli ka lo khâwl hrâm hrâm tawh a, dâr leh thîr phei chu bûk sên a ni lo; thing leh lung pawh ka la ṭeuh tawh, lâk belh erawh chu a la ngai ang." 
1Chronicles22:15 Hnathawk tûr mi tam tak an awm a; lungchher mi te, thing dek mi te," 
1Chronicles22:16 rangkachak te, tangkarua te, thîr leh dâr chher thiam tak takte pawh an tam mai. Hma la ṭan rawh le, Lalpa chuan malsâwm che rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles22:17 Davida chuan Solomona pui tûrin Israel hruaitute chu a hrilh a," 
1Chronicles22:18 “ Lalpa, in Pathian chuan a awmpui che u a, kil tin kil tangah râlmuang takin a awmtîr che u hi. He rama lo awm ṭhînte chu Lalpa chuan min tukdawltîr a, ram hi in thuhnuaia awm a nih tâk hi." 
1Chronicles22:19 In rilru zawng zawngin Lalpa, in Pathian rawng chu tihtakzetin bâwl rawh u. Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm leh Pathian bungbêl thianghlim dahna in tûr sa rawh u le,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles23:1 Davida chu a upain a tar ta hle a. Solomona chu Israel-te lalah a dah ta a. 
1Chronicles23:2 Israel hruaitute, puithiamte leh Levia chi zawng zawngte chu Davida chuan a ko khâwm a." 
1Chronicles23:3 Levia chi, kum sawmthum chin chung lam chu a chhiar a, mi sîngthum leh sângriat an tling." 
1Chronicles23:4 Mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Tempul sak hna enkawltuah a dah a; mi sângruk chu thil ziak fela thubuaite rem tûrin a ti a. 
1Chronicles23:5 Mi sângli chu pulis hna thawk tûrin a ti a; mi sângli dang chu lalin a pêk thil tum rîk theihte tuma Lalpa fak hla sa ṭhîn tûrin a ti a. 
1Chronicles23:6 Davida chuan Levia chite chu an thlahtu athuin pâwl thumah a ṭhen a, Gerson te, Kohat te, Merari pâwlte an ni." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gersona khân fapa - pahnih Ladana leh Simeia a nei a. 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladana chuan fapa pathum - Jehiela te, Zethama te, Joela te a nei a." 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladana chuan fapa pathum - Jehiela te, Zethama te, Joela te a nei a." 
1Chronicles23:9 Hêngho hi Ladana thlah chi hrang hrang hruaitute an ni ta a (Simeia chuan fapa pathum - Selemota te, Haziela te, Harana te a nei a)." 
1Chronicles23:10 Simeia thlahte chu a upat dân indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Jahata, Zina, Jeusa, Beria." 
1Chronicles23:11 Hêng mi palite hi Simeia fate chu an ni a. Jahata chu hotu ber a ni a, Ziza chu a dawttu a ni; Jeusa leh Beria hian fa an ngah lo va, thlah khat anga chhiar an ni." 
1Chronicles23:12 Kohata hian fapa pali - Amrama te, Izara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te a nei." 
1Chronicles23:13 Amrama hi Arona leh Mosia pa a ni. Arona hi a thlahte nên, Lalpa biaknaa rimtui hâltu, thilhlante hlâna bungraw thianghlim enkawltu leh Lalpa hminga mipuite tân malsâwmna sawi thîntu atân serh hran an ni." 
1Chronicles23:14 Pathian mi Mosia thlahte erawh chu Levia chite zînga chhiar tel an ni. 
1Chronicles23:15 Mosia chuan fapa pahnih - Gersoma leh Eliezara a nei a. 
1Chronicles23:16 Gersoma thlahte zînga mi lâr chu Sebuela a ni. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliezara hian fapa pakhat chauh Rehabia a nei a. Rehabia erawh hi chuan fa a ngah hle. 
1Chronicles23:18 Kohata fa upa dawttu Izara chuan fapa Selomita a nei a; ani chu an chi hotu a ni. 
1Chronicles23:19 Kohata fa dawt leh Hebrona chuan fapa pali - Jeria te, Amari te, Jahaziela te, Jekameama te a nei a." 
1Chronicles23:20 Kohata fa tlum Uziela chuan fapa pahnih Mika leh Isia a nei. 
1Chronicles23:21 Meraria chuan fapa pahnih - Mahlia leh Musia a nei a. Mahlia hian fapa pahnih Eleazara leh Kisa a nei a. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazara hian fanu chauh a nei, fapa nei lovin a thi a. A fanute hian pasalah Kisa fate an nei a." 
1Chronicles23:23 Meraria fapa Musia zâwk chuan fapa pathum - Mahlia te, Edera te, Jeremota te a nei a." 
1Chronicles23:24 Hêngho hi a chi chi leh a chhûng chhûnga an hming ziak vek, Levia thlahte chu an ni; kum sawmhnih chin chung lam tawh phawt chuan Lalpa inah thawh an nei a ni." 
1Chronicles23:25 Davida chuan, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan a mite chu râlmuang takin a awmtîr ta a; Jerusalem-ah a awm reng dâwn tawh a." 
1Chronicles23:26 Levia chite tân chuan Lalpa chênna bâwkte leh bungraw dangte chu zâwn fo a ngai dâwn tawh lo,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles23:27 Davida thu ang chuan Levia chi rêng rêng chu kum sawmhnih an tlinin rawngbâwla koh theih tûrin an hming ziak vek a ni. 
1Chronicles23:28 Hêng hnate hi an thawh tûr chu a ni: Arona thlah puithiamho Pathian biaknaa ṭanpui te, Tempul tualzâwl leh pindan chhûnga bungraw thianghlim vawn thianghlim te," 
1Chronicles23:29 Pathian tâna chhang serh hlan tûr siam te; dawidim telh loh chhang kan te, chhangphut oliv hriak nêna hmeh te, Tempula thilpêk lo lâka teh fel te," 
1Chronicles23:30 a chhûn a zâna Lalpa ropuina faka zai te hi a ni. 
1Chronicles23:31 Sabat ni te, thla thar ni te leh kût nikhuaa hâlral thilhlan an hlan laia fak hla lo sa tûr mi eng emaw zât inchhâwk tûr an ruat thliah a, chûng chuan fak hla an sa reng tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles23:32 Hmun Thianghlima biakbûk chu an enkawl ang a, Puithiam Arona thlah, an unaute rawng pawh an bâwlsak tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles24:1 Hêngho hi Arona thlah chi hrang hrangte chu an ni: Arona chuan fapa pali - Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te a nei a." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadaba leh Abihua hi an pa thih hmain fa nei lovin an thi a, Eleazara leh Ithamara chu puithiam an ni ta a." 
1Chronicles24:3 Lal Davida chuan puithiamho chu an tih tûr azirin pâwl hrang hrangah a ṭhen a. Eleazara thlah Zadoka leh Ithamara thlah Ahimelekan Davida chu an tihpui a. 
1Chronicles24:4 Eleazara thlahah hian hruaitu tûr mipa an tam zâwk avângin pâwl sawmparuk an ṭhen a, Ithamara thlahte erawh chu pâwl riatah an ṭhen a." 
1Chronicles24:5 Tempula hotute leh Pathian rawngbâwl hnaa hotute an nih avângin rawngbâwltu tûr ṭhumvâwrin Eleazara leh Ithamara thlahte chu a indawtin an ruat a. 
1Chronicles24:6 Eleazara thlahte leh Ithamara thlahte chu ṭhumvâwrin hna an inchhâwk kual ṭhîn a ni. Nethanela, Levia chia mi, ziaktu chuan, lal te, a ṭhuihruai hotu lian te, puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara fapa Ahimeleka hriatah a chhinchhiah a, puithiam zînga hotu te, Levia chi zînga hotute pawhin an hre ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles24:7 Pâwl sawmhnih leh pali chuan hetianga indawtin hna an thawk diat diat tûr a ni: Jehoiariba pâwl, Jedaia pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:8 Harima pâwl, Seorima pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:9 Malkisa pâwl, Mijamina pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:10 Hakosa pâwl, Abija pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:11 Jesua pâwl, Sekania pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:12 Eliasiba pâwl, Jakima pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:13 Hupa pâwl, Jesebeaba pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:14 Bilga pâwl, Imera pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:15 Hezira pâwl, Hapizeza pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:16 Pethahia pâwl, Jehezkela pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:17 Jakina pâwl, Gamula pâwl," 
1Chronicles24:18 Delaia pâwl, Maazia pâwl." 
1Chronicles24:19 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian thupêk anga an thlahtu Aronan tih tûr a lo ruat chu Tempula an kal hunah hian an rawn ti ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles24:20 Levia thlah chhûngkaw dang hotute chu hêng hi an ni: Amrama thlah zînga mi Subaela thlah Jedeia te," 
1Chronicles24:21 Rehabia thlah Isia te," 
1Chronicles24:22 Izara thlah zînga mi Selomota thlah Jahata te; 
1Chronicles24:23 Hebrona fa, a upat dân indawtin - Jeria te, Amaria te, Jahaziela te, Jakameama te;" 
1Chronicles24:24 Uziela thlah zînga mi Mika thlah Samira te," 
1Chronicles24:25 Uziela thlah zînga mi Mika unau Isia thlah Zekaria te. 
1Chronicles24:26 Meraria thlah Mahlia te, Musia te, Jaazia te;" 
1Chronicles24:27 Jaazia hian fapa pathum - Sohama te, Zakura te, Ibria te a nei a." 
1Chronicles24:28 Mahlia hian fapa pahnih - Eleazara leh Kisa a nei a. 
1Chronicles24:29 Eleazara hian fapa a nei lo va; Kisa hian fapa pakhat Jerameela a nei. 
1Chronicles24:30 Musia hian fapa pathum - Mahlia te, Edera te, Jeremota te a nei. Hêng zawng hi Levia thlahte chu an ni." 
1Chronicles24:31 An unau Arona thlahte tih dân ang khân an chhûngkaw hotu ber leh a naute zînga pakhat chuan Levia chite zînga rawngbâwltu tûr hriat nân ṭhum an vâwr ṭhîn; Lal Davida te, Zadoka te, Abimeleka te, puithiam zînga hotu te leh Levia chi zînga hotu te pawh an hriattîr ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles25:1 Lal Davida leh Levia chi zînga hotute chuan hêngho hi Pathian biak kaihruaitu atân an ruat; Asafa te, Hemana te, Jeduthuna te; ṭingṭang leh perhkhuang an tum bawk ang a, dârbenthek an bêng bawk ang; Pathian thuchah an puang ṭhîn ang. Pathian biak kaihhruainaa an tih tûr bîk ruat dân chu hetiang hi a ni:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Asafa chuan a fapa pali - Zakura te, Josefa te, Nethania te, Asarela te chu a kaihruai ang a. Lalin Pathian thu puang tûra a tih apiangin thu an sawi tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles25:3 Jeduthuna chuan a fapa paruk Gedalia te, Zeria te, Jesaia te, Simeia te, Hasabia te, Matithia te a ho vang a, perhkhuang tumin Pathian thu an puang ang a, fak hla leh lâwmthu sawi hla an sa ṭhîn ang." 
1Chronicles25:4 Hemana hian fapa sâwm leh pali - Bukia te, Matania te, Uziela te, Sebuela te, Jerimota te, Hanania te, Hanana te, Eliatha te, Gidaltia te, Romamti-ezera te, Josbekasa te, Malothia te, Hothira te, Mahaziota te a nei a." 
1Chronicles25:5 Hemana hi lal zâwlnei a ni a, tihropui a tiam avângin Pathianin fapa sâwm leh pali leh fanu pathum a pe a ni." 
1Chronicles25:6 A fa zawng zawngte hian an pa hovin ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te leh dârbenthek tein Tempula zai an rem thiam vek a. Asafa te, Jeduthuna te, Hemana te hi lal ruat an ni." 
1Chronicles25:7 Hêng mi sawmhnih leh palite hi thil tum thiam vek an ni. An chipui Levia chi dang, hla sa thiamte nên, an vaiin mipa zahnih leh sawmriat leh pariat an ni." 
1Chronicles25:8 An thawh tûr hriat nân la naupang deuh emaw, upa tawh deuh emaw, zirtîrtu emaw, zirtu emaw, an zaa tân ṭhum an vâwr ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles25:9 Hei hi pâwl tin hotu, an fate leh an unaute nên mi sâwm leh pahnih zêl thawh hun ruat indawt dân chu a ni: Asafa fa Josefa ho, Gedalia ho," 
1Chronicles25:10 Zakura ho," 
1Chronicles25:11 Isria ho," 
1Chronicles25:12 Nethania ho," 
1Chronicles25:13 Bukia ho," 
1Chronicles25:14 Jesarela ho," 
1Chronicles25:15 Jesaia ho," 
1Chronicles25:16 Matania ho," 
1Chronicles25:17 Simeia ho," 
1Chronicles25:18 Azarela ho," 
1Chronicles25:19 Hasabia ho," 
1Chronicles25:20 Subaela ho," 
1Chronicles25:21 Matithia ho," 
1Chronicles25:22 Jeremota ho," 
1Chronicles25:23 Hanania ho," 
1Chronicles25:24 Josbekasa ho," 
1Chronicles25:25 Hanana ho," 
1Chronicles25:26 Malothia ho," 
1Chronicles25:27 Eliatha ho," 
1Chronicles25:28 Hothira ho," 
1Chronicles25:29 Gidaltia ho," 
1Chronicles25:30 Mahaziota ho," 
1Chronicles25:31 Romamti-ezera ho. 
1Chronicles26:1 Levia chi, Tempul pulis-a chhawr mi hrang hrang hetiang hi an ni: Kora thlahte zînga mi Korea fapa; Asafa chhûngte zînga mi Meselemia chuan" 
1Chronicles26:2 fapa pasarih a nei a, an upat dân indawtin hêngte hi an ni: Zekaria, Jediaela, Zebadia, Jathniela" 
1Chronicles26:3 Elama, Jehohanana, Eliehoenaia." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obed-edoma pawh Pathianin mal a sâwm a, fapa pariat a nei a. Chûngte chu a upat dân indawtin: Semaia te, Jehozabada te, Joa te, Sakara te, Nethanela te," 
1Chronicles26:5 Amiela te, Isakara te, Peulethaia te an ni." 
1Chronicles26:6 Obed-edoma fapa upa Semaia hian fapa paruk Othnia te, Refaela te, Obeda te, Elzabada te, Elihua te, Semaia te a nei a." 
1Chronicles26:7 An chite zîngah chuan mi âwmkhauh, mi chhuanawm tak tak an ni: a naupang pahnihte phei hi chu huai tak an ni." 
1Chronicles26:8 Obed-edoma thlahte aṭang hian an hna atâna mi fel tak tak mi sawmruk leh pahnih an awm. 
1Chronicles26:9 Meselemia thlah zîngah mi tling tak tak mi sâwm leh pariat an awm. 
1Chronicles26:10 Meraria thlah Hosa chuan fapa pali - Simria te (a fa u ber a ni lo nâ a, a pain chhûngkaw hotu-ah a ruat a ni)," 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilkia te, Tebalia te, Zekaria te. Hosa thlah zîngah Tempul pulis sâwm leh pathum an awm." 
1Chronicles26:12 Tempul pulis-te chu an thlahtu azirin pâwl hrang hrangah an inṭhen a, Levia chi dangte ang bawkin Tempula hna thawh hun an ruatsak a." 
1Chronicles26:13 Thla tinin, an tam emaw, an tlêm emaw khawii kawngkhâr nge an vên dâwn tih hriat nân ṭhum an vâwr ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles26:14 Selemia-ho chuan khawchhak kawngka an chang a, a fapa Zekaria chuan hmâr lam kawngka a chang a; Zekaria hi rorêl pâwla pa fing tak a ni." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obed-edoma hovin chhim lam kawngka an chang a, a fate chuan Tempul kudâm an chang a." 
1Chronicles26:16 Supima leh Hosa chuan khawthlang lam kawngka an chang a, kawng chunga Saleket kawngka an chang bawk. Hna chu a indawtin an inthawh chhâwk ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles26:17 Khawchhak lam kawngkaah chuan ni tin mi paruk an ding ṭhîn a, hmâr lam kawngkaah mi pali, chhim lam kawngkaah mi pali bawk an ding a, kudâm vêng tûr ni tin mi pali; kudâm pakhat hi mi pahnihin an vêng ṭhîn a ni." 
1Chronicles26:18 Khawthlang lam pindante kawng bulah mi pali, pindan chhûngah vêngtu pahnih an dah bawk." 
1Chronicles26:19 Chûng chu Kora leh Meraria thlahte vên tûr chu a ni. 
1Chronicles26:20 Levia chi, mi ṭhenkhat chu Tempul thawhlâwm bâwm leh thilpêk dahkhâwmna pindan enkawltu an ni." 
1Chronicles26:21 Gersona fapa pakhat Ladana chu ama fa Jehielia thlahte telin Gerson-ho lu ber a ni. 
1Chronicles26:22 A fapa pahnih Zethana leh Joela chuan Tempul thawhlâwm bâwm leh thilpêk dahkhâwmna an enkawl a. 
1Chronicles26:22 A fapa pahnih Zethana leh Joela chuan Tempul thawhlâwm bâwm leh thilpêk dahkhâwmna an enkawl a. 
1Chronicles26:23 Amrama thlah te, Izara thlah te, Hebrona thlah te leh Uziela thlah te tân pawh thawh tûr an tuk a." 
1Chronicles26:24 Gersoma fapa Sebuela, Mosia tupa chu Tempul sum enkawltu lu ber a ni." 
1Chronicles26:25 Gersoma unaupa Eleazara vângin Selomit-ho nên an inchhûngkhat hnai hle. Eliezara chuan fapa Rehabia a nei a, ani chuan fapa Jesaia a nei a; Jesaia hian fapa Jorama a nei a, ani chuan fapa Zikria a nei a, Zikria hian fapa Selomita hi a nei a ni." 
1Chronicles26:26 Selomita leh a fate chuan lal Davida te, chhûngkaw hotute, chi hrang hrang hotute leh mipui hotuten Pathian tâna thilpêk an pêk khâwmte chu an lo enkawl fel a, Tempul sak nân indonaa an râllâk sumte kha an rawn pe ṭhîn a ni." 
1Chronicles26:27 Selomita leh a fate hian Tempula hman tûr miin an rawn pêk rêng rêng chu an lo enkawl a ni. 
1Chronicles26:28 Zâwlnei Samuela rawn pêk te, lal Saula pêk te, lal Davida pêk te, Nera fapa Abnera pêk te, Zeruii fapa Joaba pêkte pawh an enkawl a ni." 
1Chronicles26:29 Izara thlah zînga mi Kenania leh a fate chu khawpui pâwn ram awp hna an thawhtîr a; chanchin vawn ṭhat te, Israel mite thubuaite an remsak tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles26:30 Hebrona thlahte zînga mi Hasabia leh a chhûngte mi sângkhat leh zasarih chu Jordan thlang lam ram awptuah an dah a, sakhaw lam thu leh vântlâng thil ngaihtuah ṭhîntu tûr an ni." 
1Chronicles26:31 Hebrona thlah hotu ber chu Jeria a ni. Davida lal kum sawmlinaah Hebrona thlahte chanchin hi an chhui a. He mi thlah zîngah sipai huai tak tak Gilead bial Jazer khuaah an lo awm hlawm a. 
1Chronicles26:32 Jeria laichînte zîng aṭangin lal Davida chuan mi sânghnih leh zasarih, hotu fel tak tak a thlang chhuak a, Jordan lui chhak lam bial zawng zawng, Reubena thlah te, Gada thlah te leh khawchhak lam Manasea thlah te awmna bial sakhaw thil leh khawvêl thil lama ramawptuah a dah a." 
1Chronicles27:1 Israel mi zât - chhûngkaw hrang hotu te, sâng pâwl hotu te, za pâwl hotu te leh lehkha ziaktu te, lal bula sawrkâr hna thawktu pâwl khat mi sînghnih leh sângli zêl an ni; kum tluanin thla tin hotu hrang neiin an inthlâk kual ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles27:2 Thla khatnaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Zabdiela fapa Jesobeaman a ho va." 
1Chronicles27:3 Ani hi Juda fa Pereza thlaha mi a ni. 
1Chronicles27:4 Thla hnihnaa thawk pâwl mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Aho mi Dodaian a ho va. He pâwl hotu ber dawttu chu Miklota a ni. 
1Chronicles27:5 Thla thumnaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Puithiam Jehoiada fapa Benaian a ho va." 
1Chronicles27:6 “Pasalṭha sawmthum’ tih zînga tel kha a ni. A fapa Amizabada chuan he pâwl hi a ho chhâwk ṭhîn. 
1Chronicles27:7 Thla linaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Joaba nau Asahelan a ho va. A fapa Zebadia chuan he pâwl hi a ho ve bawk ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles27:8 Thla nganaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Izra mi Samhutan a ho va." 
1Chronicles27:9 Thla ruknaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Tekoa khaw mi Ikesa fapa Ira-an a ho va." 
1Chronicles27:10 Thla sarihnaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Pelon mi Efraima thlah Helezan a ho va." 
1Chronicles27:11 Thla riatnaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Hosa mi Sibekaian a ho va. Ani hi Juda thlah zînga Zera thlaha mi a ni." 
1Chronicles27:12 Thla kuanaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Benjamin bial Anathot khaw mi Abiezeran a ho va." 
1Chronicles27:13 Thla sâwmnaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Netofa khaw mi Maharaian a ho va. Ani hi Zera thlah zînga tel ve a ni." 
1Chronicles27:14 Thla sâwm leh pakhatnaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Efraim bial Pirathon mi Benaian a ho va." 
1Chronicles27:15 Thla sâwm leh pahnihnaa thawk pâwl, mi sînghnih leh sângli chu Netofa khaw mi Othniela thlah Heldaian a ho va." 
1Chronicles27:16 Reuben thlah hotu chu Zikria fapa Eliezara a ni. Simeon thlah hotu chu Maaka fapa Sefatia a ni. 
1Chronicles27:17 Levia thlah hotu chu Kemuela fapa Hasabia a ni. Arona thlah hotu chu Zadoka a ni. 
1Chronicles27:18 Juda thlah hotu chu Davida u Elihua a ni. Isakara thlah hotu chu Mikaela fapa Omria a ni. 
1Chronicles27:19 Zebulun thlah hotu chu Obadia fapa Ismaia a ni. Naftalia thlah hotu chu Azriela fapa Jeremota a ni. 
1Chronicles27:20 Efraim thlah hotu chu Azazia fapa Hosea a ni. Khawthlang lama awm Manasea thlah hotu chu Pedaia fapa Joela a ni. 
1Chronicles27:20 Efraim thlah hotu chu Azazia fapa Hosea a ni. Khawthlang lama awm Manasea thlah hotu chu Pedaia fapa Joela a ni. 
1Chronicles27:20 Efraim thlah hotu chu Azazia fapa Hosea a ni. Khawthlang lama awm Manasea thlah hotu chu Pedaia fapa Joela a ni. 
1Chronicles27:21 Khawchhak lam, Gilead-a awm, Manasea thlah hotu chu Zekaria fapa Idoa a ni. Benjamin thlah hotu chu Abnera fapa Jaasiela a ni." 
1Chronicles27:22 Dana thlah hotu chu Jerohama fapa Azarela a ni. Chûng chu Israel hnam hrang hrang hotute chu an ni. 
1Chronicles27:23 Chhiarpuiah khân lal Davida chuan kum sawmhnih hnuai lam mi chu a chhiar tel ve lo; mite chu vâna arsi angin an tam ang tih Lalpa chuan a tiam tlat avângin. 
1Chronicles27:24 Zeruii fapa Joaban chhiarpui chu a ho va; mahse, a zo hman lo; chhiarpui avâng hian Pathianin Israel-te chu a sawisa a, mi eng zât chiah nge awm tih lal Davida chanchin ziaknaah pawh ziak a ni lo." 
1Chronicles27:25 Lal kudâm chu Adiela fapa Azmavetan a enkawl a, khaw hrang hranga lal pual dahna inte chu Uzia fapa Jonathanan a enkawl a." 
1Chronicles27:26 Lal lova hnathawktute chu Keluba fapa Ezrian a enkawl a. 
1Chronicles27:27 Lal grep enkawltu chu Rama mi Simeia a ni. Uain dah khâwm enkawltu chu Sefam mi Zabdia a ni. 
1Chronicles27:28 Khawthlang lam tlâng bulṭhuta lal Oliv leh theipui huante chu Geder mi Baal-hananan a enkawl a. Oliv hriak enkawltu chu Joasa a ni. 
1Chronicles27:29 Saron phaia lal ran tlattîrtute chu Saron mi Sitraian a enkawl a. Phai dang danga ran tlattîrtute chu Adlaia fapa Safatan a enkawl a. 
1Chronicles27:30 Sanghâwngsei enkawltu chu Ismael mi Obila a ni. Sabengtung enkawltu chu Meronota mi Jehdeia a ni. 
1Chronicles27:31 Berâm leh kêl rual chu Hagri mi Jaziza enkawl a ni. Hêng mite hi Davida mi, a sum leh pai enkawltute chu an ni." 
1Chronicles27:32 Davida pami, Jonathana, mi fing tak, lehkha thiam tak chu thurâwntu a ni. Hakmona fapa Jehiela nên lal fate zirtîrtu an ni." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofela chu lal thurâwntu a ni a, Ark mi Husaia chu lal ṭhian a ni." 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitofela thih hnuah Benaia fapa Jehoiada leh Abiathara chu lal thurâwntute an ni; Joaba chu lal sipai hotu a ni. 
1Chronicles28:1 Davida chuan Israel upate, hnam hrang hrang hruaitute, lal bula lal hna thawka thla tina inthlâk kual pâwl, sâng chunga thuneitute, za chunga thuneitute, an hotute, lal sum leh pai leh ran enkawltute, ama fate nên, sawrkâr hna thawk zawng zawng leh pasalṭha rualte chu Jerusalem-ah a ko khâwm a." 
1Chronicles28:2 Davida chu an hmaah a ding a, an hnênah, “Ka unau, ka mite u, ka thu hi ngaithla teh u. Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm dahna, a ke nghahna tûr in sak ka châk êm êm a, châkte pawh ka la tawh a;" 
1Chronicles28:3 amaherawhchu, sipai ka ni a, thisen ka chhuah tam êm avângin Pathian chuan ka sak a phal lo va." 
1Chronicles28:4 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan, ka unaute zîngah ka dam chhûnga lal tûrin min thlang chhuak a, hnam hruaituah Juda thlahte hi a ruat a ni. Juda-ho zîngah kan chhûng hi min thlang a, kan chhûng zîngah kei hi min duhsak a, Israel-te lalah min siam a ni." 
1Chronicles28:5 Fapa ṭhahnem tâwk tak min neihtîr a, chûng zînga mi Solomona hi Lalpa rama Israel-ho chunga lal atân a thlang a ni." 
1Chronicles28:6 “ Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, ‘I fapa Solomona hian ka Tempul chu a sa ang, ka fapa atân ka thlang a, a pa ka ni ang a." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ka thuruatte, ka thupêkte a zawm tlat chuan a lalna chu kumkhua atân ka tinghet ang,’ a ti a." 
1Chronicles28:8 Chuvângin, Israel zawng zawng, Lalpa mi pung khâwm leh kan Pathian thupêkte chu ngaihvenin fîmkhur takin awm rawh u; tichuan, he ram ṭha tak hi in nei ang a, in fate pawhin an rochung kumkhua thei dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles28:9 Solomona hnênah chuan, “Nang, ka fapa Solomona, i pa Pathian hi pawm la, châk tak leh tihtakzetin a rawng bâwl ang che, kan ngaihtuah leh kan tumte hi a hre vek a ni. Ani chu i zawn phawt chuan i hmu ngei ang a, i ngaihsak loh erawh chuan a paihthla hlen ang che." 
1Chronicles28:10 A Hmun Thianghlima in sa tûrin Lalpa chuan a thlang che tih hre rawh, ṭan la la, thawk ṭan rawh,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles28:11 Davida chuan a fapa Solomona hnênah Tempul sak dân tûr ruahmanna: kudâm tûr te, pindan chi hrang hrang te, Hmun Thianghlim Ber te, sual ngaihdamna hmun rem dân tûrte chu a pe a." 
1Chronicles28:12 Tual hungchhûng chei dân tûr te, a vêla in sak dân tûr te, Tempula hman bungbêl dah ṭhatna tûr te, Lalpa hnêna thilpêk dah ṭhatna sak dân tûr a lo ruahman dânte a hrilh vek a." 
1Chronicles28:13 Puithiamho leh Levia chiten an hna an thawha, Tempul chhûnga rawng an bâwl dân tûr te, Tempula bungbêl awm enkawl dân tûra a ruahman dânte a hrilh bawk a." 
1Chronicles28:14 Bungbêl siam nân tangkarua leh rangkachak eng zât nge hman tûr tih te," 
1Chronicles28:15 khâwnvâr leh a dahna siamna tûr zât te," 
1Chronicles28:16 tangkaraw dawhkân te, Pathian tâna chhang serh dahna tûr dawhkâna tangkaraw hman zât tûrte a hrilh bawk a." 
1Chronicles28:17 Thîrkut te, maihûnte leh uain thâwl siam nân rangkachak hlîr hlak hman zât tûr te, thlêng siam nân tangkarua leh rangkachak hman zât tûrte a hrilh vek a." 
1Chronicles28:18 Rimtui hâlna dawhkân siam nâna rangkachak hlîr hman tûr zât te, Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm chunga Cherub thla zâr tawlailîr siam nâna rangkachak hlîr hlak hman tûr zât te pawh a hrilh a." 
1Chronicles28:19 Lal Davida chuan, “ Lalpa min hrilh ang ngeia tih tûr ruahman ziaknaah chûng chu ziak vek a ni,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles28:20 Lal Davida chuan a fapa Solomona hnênah, “I tum tiruh la, ṭan la rawh, hna chu thawk ṭan rawh, tu man tikhawtlai che suh se. Ka Pathian, a rawng ka bâwl ṭhîn, Lalpa Pathian chuan a awmpui ang che, Lalpa chuan a Tempul i sak zawh hma chu a thlah lo vang che a, a hawisan hek lo vang che." 
1Chronicles28:21 Tempula puithiamte leh Levia chite thawh tûr ruat fel a ni tawh a. Mi themthiam, thawk châk tak tak an tam a, mite leh an hruaitute chu i thu nghâkin an awm ṭhuap a ni,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles29:1 Lal Davida chuan pungkhâwmho hnênah, “Ka fapa Solomona hi Pathian mi thlan chu a ni; mahse, a la naupang hle a, chinchâng a la hre tâwk lo. Hna thawh tûr hi a tam hle a ni, a sak tûr hi mihring in tûr a ni lo, Lalpa, Pathian in tûr a ni." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ka theih chin chin chu châk ka lo chhuah tawh a, rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te, thîr te, thing te, lunghlu te, lungmantam te, lungmawi te leh sailungvâr te ka la khâwm tawh." 
1Chronicles29:3 Hêng bâkah hian keima sum aṭangin tangkarua leh rangkachak ka pe bawk a ni. Pathian Tempul tûr hi ka vei êm avângin. 
1Chronicles29:4 Ofir rangkachak ṭha chi kg. nuaikhat, rawh thianghlim tangkarua kg. nuaihnih leh sîngli dâwn lai Tempul chhûng lam bang chei nân te," 
1Chronicles29:5 themthiamhovin an duh anga an cheimawi nânte ka pe a ni. Lalpa tân tu nge thilpêk ṭhahnem tâwk pe ve phal le?” a ti a. 
1Chronicles29:6 Hnam tin hotu te, chi tin hruaitu te, sâng hotu te, za hotu te leh sawrkâr hna thawkho chuan phal takin thilpêk an pe ve ta a." 
1Chronicles29:7 Tempul sak nân chuan rangkachak kg. nuaikhat leh sîngsarih, tangkarua kg. nuai zathum leh sawmli, dâr kg. nuai zaruk leh sawmhnih, thîr kg. nuai sângthum leh zali aia tam mah an pe a." 
1Chronicles29:8 Lungmantam neite pawhin Lalpa Tempul atân an pe a, Gersona thlah Jehielan a enkawl a." 
1Chronicles29:9 Mipui chu an hlim hle mai, phal taka mahni thu ngeia Lalpa tâna pe an nih avângin an lâwm a ni, lal Davida pawh namên lovin a lâwm a." 
1Chronicles29:10 Chuvângin, Davida chuan Israel pungkhâwmho hmaah Lalpa chu a fak a, “Aw Lalpa, kan pu Israela Pathian, kumkhuaa chawimawi tlâk i ni." 
1Chronicles29:11 I ropui a, thil i ti thei a, i chungnung a, i mawi a, lei leh vâna thil zawng zawng hi i ta a ni a, Aw Pathian, i lalber a, engkim chunga thuneitu i ni." 
1Chronicles29:12 Hausakna leh chawimawina zawng zawng hi i hnên aṭanga lo kal a ni a, chakna leh thiltihtheihna i kawl a, mi i siam lian a, i tichak ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles29:13 Chuvângin, kan Pathian, lâwmthu kan hrilh a che, i hming ropui tak chu kan fak a ni." 
1Chronicles29:14 Kei leh ka mite tehlul hian hetiang khawpa tam i hnêna thilhlan kan pe thei che hi kan theih avânga pe che kan ni lo ve; engkim hi i ta a ni a, i ta chu kan rawn pe mai che a nih hi." 
1Chronicles29:15 Aw Pathian, i hmaah chuan kan pi leh pute ang khân keini pawh mikhual, rei lo tê châm ang lek kan ni a, kan dam chhûng nite chu hlimthla ang lek a ni a, a ral mai ṭhîn." 
1Chronicles29:16 Aw Lalpa, kan Pathian, i hming chawimawi tûra i in sak nân châk kan lo chhuahte pawh hi i hnên aṭanga lo kal, i ta vek a ni." 
1Chronicles29:17 Mi thinlung chhûngril i fiah ṭhîn a, mi nun ngîlte chu i lâwm ṭhîn. Kei chuan hêng thilte hi phal tak leh rilru ṭha tak puin i hnênah ka rawn hlân a ni; i mi, lo pungkhâwmte pawhin thilhlan rawn pêk che an châkzia ka hmu a ni." 
1Chronicles29:18 Aw Pathian, min thlahtu Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te Pathian, hetiang rilru hi i mite puttîr reng la, i laka an rinawm reng theih nân vêng ang che." 
1Chronicles29:19 Ka fapa Solomona hi i thupêk châk taka zâwm zêl thei tûrin vêng la, i Tempul, a châkte ka lâk ṭeuh tawh chu sa puitling tûrin ṭanpui ang che,” a ti a." 
1Chronicles29:20 Davida chuan mipuite chu, “In Pathian Lalpa hi fak rawh u,” a ti a. Pungkhâwmho chuan an thlahtu Pathian Lalpa chu an fak a, an kûn a, Lalpa chu an chawimawi a, lal pawh an chawimawi a." 
1Chronicles29:21 A tûkah chuan ran an talh a, Lalpa hnênah thilhlan an hlân a, mipui pawh an eitîr a. Bâwngpa sâng, berâmchal sâng, berâmno sâng an talh a, maichâma hâlral thilhlan pawh an rawn hlân a. Uain thilhlan pawh an rawn hlân a." 
1Chronicles29:22 Chumi ni chuan Lalpa hmaah hlim takin an eiin an in ta a. Solomona chu lalah an puang nawn leh a, Lalpa hmingin rorêltuah hriak an thih a, Zadoka pawh puithiamah hriak an thih a." 
1Chronicles29:23 Tichuan, Solomonan a pa lalṭhutthlêng, Lalpa dinsak chu a luah ta a, lal tling tak a ni, Israel mi zawng zawngin a thu an awih a ni." 
1Chronicles29:24 Sawrkâr milian, sipaite leh Davida fa dangte pawhin Solomona chu an lala pawm tûrin thu an tiam a." 
1Chronicles29:25 Solomona chu Lalpa chuan hnam pum pui a ngaihsântîr a, Israel chunga rorêltu zawng zawng aiin Solomona chu a chawimawi a ni." 
1Chronicles29:26 Jesaia fa Davida chu Israel zawng zawng chungah," 
1Chronicles29:27 kum sawmli a lal a, Hebron-ah kum sarih, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh pathum." 
1Chronicles29:28 Tarkûna damin a thi ta a; a hausa êm êm a, mi zah a kai a, a fapa Solomona chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles29:29 Davida chanchin, a tîr aṭanga a tâwp thlengin zâwlnei pathum Samuela, Nathana leh Gada te lehkhabu-ah ziak vek a ni." 
1Chronicles29:30 A ro rêl dân te, thil a tih theihzia te, a chunga thil thleng te, Israel leh an chhehvêl ram chunga thil thlengte an ziak vek a ni." 
2Chronicles1:1 Lal Davida fapa Solomona chuan Israel ram chu a chang nghet ta hle a. Lalpa, a Pathian chuan mal a sâwm a, a lo chak ta êm êm a." 
2Chronicles1:2 Mi sâng hotu te, za hotu te, sawrkâr hnathawk te, hnam tin hruaitu te, Israel chhûng tin lu leh Israel-ho te chu" 
2Chronicles1:3 Gibeon khuaa kal vek tûrin a hrilh a; chutah chuan Lalpa nêna Inbiakna Bûk, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian thlalêra a siam kha a la awm ta reng a ni." 
2Chronicles1:4 Thuthlung Bâwm erawh chu Davida khân Kiriat-jearim aṭangin a la a, Jerusalem khuaa puan in a kaihsakah khân a dah a nih kha." 
2Chronicles1:5 Uria fapa, Bezalela, Hura tupa siam dâr maichâm pawh kha Gibeon-ah hian Biakbûk kawtah a la awm a ni. Bûk kawtah chuan Solomona leh mipuite chuan Lalpa chibai an bûk a." 
2Chronicles1:6 Lal chuan Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlanah ran sângkhat a hlân a, bûk kawta dâr maichâmah a hâl ral a." 
2Chronicles1:7 Chumi zân chuan Solomona hnênah Pathian a inlâr a, “Eng nge pe che ila i duh?” a rawn ti a." 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomona chuan a chhâng a, “Ka pa Davida chu i ngaina êm êm ṭhîn a; tûnah, a ai awhah min dah ta a." 
2Chronicles1:9 Aw Lalpa Pathian, ka pa hnêna i thutiam kha tihlawhtling teh. Leia vaivut zât ngawta tam chungah lalah min siam a;" 
2Chronicles1:10 chuvângin, an chunga ro ka rêl thiamna tûrin finna leh hmangchâng hriatna min pe ang che. Chutilo chu, engtin nge i mi heti zozai hi ro ka rêlsak theih ang?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles1:11 Pathian chuan Solomona chu a chhâng a, “Hausakna te, neihnunna te, hmingthanna te, i hmêlma tihhlumsak te, dam reina te dîl lovin an chunga lala ka siamna che ka mite chunga ro i rêlsak thiam nân finna leh hmangchâng hriatna dîl nachâng i hria a." 
2Chronicles1:12 Finna leh hmangchâng hriatna chu ka pe ngei ang che; i hmaa lo lal tawhte pawhin an neih phâk loh hausakna te, neihnunna te leh hmingthanna te pawh ka pêk belh ang che,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles1:13 Solomona chuan Gibeon khuaa hmunsâng, Lalpa nêna Inbiakna Bûk awmna chu a chhuahsan a, Jerusalem-ah a hâwng a, Israel-te chungah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles1:14 Sakawr-tawlailîr sângkhat leh zali leh indo sakawr sîngkhat leh sânghnih a nei a, a ṭhen chu Jerusalem-ah a kawl a, khawpui hrang hrangah a dang chu a dah darh a." 
2Chronicles1:15 A lal chhûng hian Jerusalem-ah chuan rangkachak leh tangkarua chu lungte tlukin a tam a, sidar thing pawh khawthlang lam tlâng ṭhuta theipui kûng zât zetin a tam a." 
2Chronicles1:16 Solomona sakawrte chu Aigupta leh Kilikia aṭanga tawlh khâwm a ni. 
2Chronicles1:17 Lal aiawha sumdâwngte chuan sakawr-tawlailîr tangka zaruk zêlin an lei a, sakawr pawh tangka za leh sawmngain an lei khâwm a; Hit mite leh Suria mite hnênah an hralh chhâwng ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles2:1 Lal Solomona chuan Lalpa an biakna tûr Tempul leh ama awmna tûr lal in sak a tum ta a. 
2Chronicles2:2 Thil thiar khâwm tûrin mi sîngsarih a chhawr a, lung la tûrin mi sîngriat a chhawr bawk a. Hnathawkho vêngtu tûr mi sângthum leh zaruk a ruat bawk a." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomona chuan Tura lal Hirama hnênah palai a tîr a, “Ka pa Davida tân sidar thing i tawlhsak ang khân kei pawh min tawlhsak teh khai." 
2Chronicles2:4 Ka Pathian chawimawi nân Tempul ka sa dâwn a, kei leh ka mite tân hmun serh a ni ang a, chutah chuan rimtuite hâlin kan Pathian chu kan be ṭhîn dâwn a ni; chhang serhte pawh kan dah reng ang a, zîng leh tlaiah te, sabat ni-ah te, thla thar kûtah te leh kût ni dangah te hâlral thilhlan, Lalpa kan Pathian hnêna kan hlanna tûr ka sa dâwn a ni; chutianga amah chawimawi tûrin Israel-te chu kan Pathian hian thu a pe a ni." 
2Chronicles2:5 Tempul ropui tak sak ka tum a, kan Pathian hi pathian dang zawng aiin a ropui si a." 
2Chronicles2:6 Dik tak chuan Pathian tân tu man in han sak rual a ni lo va, vânah pawh khian a leng lo a ni si a; Pathian tâna rimtui hâlna hmun tih mai loh chu kei tehlul hi a in han sa rual ka ni hlei nêm." 
2Chronicles2:7 “Thil ker thiam, rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr leh thîr chher thiam te, la dumpâwl te, la senduk te leh la senlâr te siam thiam han tîr la, ka pa Davida khân Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a mi themthiam a lo thlan chhuahte nên khân hna an thawk ho dâwn nia." 
2Chronicles2:8 Mi themthiam tak tak i ngah hle tih ka hria a ni, Lebanon tlânga sidar thing te, far thing te, algum thing te min han thawn bawk ang che. I mite pui tûrin mi pawh ka rawn tîr mai ang." 
2Chronicles2:9 Tempul sak ka tum hi a lianin a ropui dâwn êm a, thingzai kan mamawh ṭeuh dâwn a ni." 
2Chronicles2:10 I mi chhawrte tân huit fai ṭin nuaili, barli ṭin nuaili, uain ṭin sîngli, oliv hriak ṭin sîngli ka rawn tum ang e,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles2:11 Lal Hirama chuan Solomona chu lehkha a thawn a, “ Lalpa chuan a mite a hmangaih avângin an lalah a siam che a." 
2Chronicles2:12 Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa, lei leh vân siamtu chu fakin awm rawh se. Lal Davida chu fapa fing tak leh remhre tak a pe a, ani chuan Lalpa Tempul leh ama awmna tûr in sak a tum a ni." 
2Chronicles2:13 Mi fing, kut themthiam tak, Hurama ka rawn tîr a." 
2Chronicles2:14 A nu chu Dana thlah a ni a, a pa erawh chu Tura khaw mi hlun a ni. Rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te, thîr te, lung te, thing te a dek thiam êm êm a; la zai sîn vâr te, dumpâwl te, senduk leh senlâr te pawh a dek thiam êm êm a ni. Thil ker mawite a thiam a, sawi ang apiang a thiam zêl a ni. I mistiri themthiam rualte leh i pa Davida mi rawihte nên thawk rawh se." 
2Chronicles2:15 Huit te, barli te, uain te leh oliv hriak pêk i tiam chu han thawn ta che." 
2Chronicles2:16 Lebanon tlâng aṭangin i duh zât zât sidar thing kan kit ang a, kan ṭâwn khâwm ang a, Jopa thlengin tuifinriatah kan rawn tawlh ang. Chuta ṭang chuan nangin Jerusalem-ah i la chho dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles2:17 Lal Solomona chuan a pa tih ang khân Israel rama hnam dang awm zawng zawng a chhiar a, in leh lo nei mi nuaikhat leh sîngnga leh sângthum zaruk an lo awm a." 
2Chronicles2:18 Mi sîngsarih chu thil a thiartîr a, mi sîngriat chuan tlânga lung an la a, hnathawk viltu tûr mi sângthum leh zaruk a dah bawk." 
2Chronicles3:1 Solomona pa, Lal Davida khân, Jerusalem khaw chhûng Moria tlânga Jebus mi Ornana hruihzâwlah Tempul sakna tûr hmun a lo buatsaih diam tawh a, chutah chuan Solomonan" 
2Chronicles3:2 a lal kum lina thla hnihnaah Tempul chu a sa ṭan ta a. 
2Chronicles3:3 Solomonan Pathian tâna Tempul a rel chu a dung tawng sawmruk, a vang tawng sawmhnih a ni." 
2Chronicles3:4 A pindan hmasa chu tawng sawmhnih bial a ni; a chung chu tawng za leh sawmhniha sâng a ni, a chhûng lam chu rangkachaka chei a ni." 
2Chronicles3:5 A pindan laita chu Sidar thinga thuah vek a ni; tûm thing leh khaidiat lem, rangkachak ṭha chia siam a bel chhuak vek a, chutah chuan tûm thing leh khaidiat lem a chuantîr a." 
2Chronicles3:6 Lal chuan lungmantam mawi tak tak leh Parvaim ram rangkachakin Tempul chu a chei a. 
2Chronicles3:7 A bang te, a khanchhuk te, a pindan hmasa leh a kawngkhâr te chu rangkachakin a luan a, bangahte chuan themthiamho chuan Cherub lemte an ker bawk," 
2Chronicles3:8 Pindan chhûngril, Hmun Thianghlim Ber an tih chu tawng sawmhnih bial a ni, Tempul vâng lam tiat a nih chu. He Hmun Thianghlim Ber bang thuah nân hian rangkachak kg. sânghnih an hmang a," 
2Chronicles3:9 rangkachak thîrkilhna zanga leh sawmsarih an hmang a, pindan chhûng lam pawh rangkachaka tuam chhuah vek a ni." 
2Chronicles3:10 Lalin themthiamho chu dârin Cherub pahnih lem a siamtîr a, rangkachakin an tuam a, Hmun Thianghlim Berah chuan a dahtîr a." 
2Chronicles3:11 Pindan luhna lam hnungchhawnin a dahtîr a, thla pahnih an nei a, pakhat thla zâr chu tawng sâwm a ni." 
2Chronicles3:12 Pakhat dang thla zâr pawh chu tawng sâwm a ni a, an thla hmawr chu a inkhawih a, a hmawr lehlam chuan bang a khawih ve ve a." 
2Chronicles3:13 Tichuan, Cherub thla zâr chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a luhna lam hnungchhawnin an ding a." 
2Chronicles3:14 Hmun Thianghlim Ber luhna puanzâr chu puan zai sîn a ni a, a dumpâwl te, a senduk te leh a senlâr tea tah a ni; Cherub lem an zep thluah bawk a." 
2Chronicles3:15 Lal chuan dâr ban mûm pahnih, tawng sawmthum leh pangaa sâng, hma lamah a phun a, a ban lu bâwk chu tawng nga hawlh tlanga lian a ni." 
2Chronicles3:16 A ban lu bâwk chu khaidiat anga chei kual a ni, khaidiat lem chhûngah chuan theibuhfai lem a chuang a, a vaiin za a awm." 
2Chronicles3:17 Bante chu Tempul luhna bula phun a ni a, chhim lama ban chu Jakina ban an ti a, hmâr lama mi chu Boaza ban an ti a." 
2Chronicles4:1 Solomona chuan dâr maichâm tawng sawmhnih bial, tawng sâwma sâng a siam a." 
2Chronicles4:2 Tuizêm, teh kuala tawng sawmthum, tawng sâwm hawlh tlang, tawng ngaa sâng, dârin a siam a." 
2Chronicles4:3 Tuizêm bang pâwn lam chu tlar hnihin an cheimawi a, an cheina chu bâwngchal lem a ni a, zêm chhûn ruala chhûn tel nghâl a ni." 
2Chronicles4:4 Tuizêm chu bâwngchal lem sâwm leh pahnih chungah a innghat a, pathumin chhim lam an hawi a, chutiang pathum zêl chuan hmâr lam te, chhak lam te, thlang lam te an hawi a, an hnung lam chu a insi a." 
2Chronicles4:5 Tuizêm bang chu kutphah bawka chhah a ni, a tlâng chu no tlâng arh, lilipâr ang hian a arh a." 
2Chronicles4:6 Dâr chawhtawlh sâwm a siam bawk a, panga chu Tempul hmâr lama dah tûr a ni, panga dang chu chhim lamah; an kût nia thilhlan sil faina tûr tui dah nân a ni; dâr tuizêma tui chu puithiamho insilna tûr a ni." 
2Chronicles4:7 A siam dân pangngaia siam khâwnvâr dahna sâwm rangkachakin a siam a; 
2Chronicles4:8 a hûnna tûr dawhkân sâwm a siam bawk a. Pindan laitaah khân a dah a, a sîr tuakah panga ve vein a hûng a, rangkachak chawhtawlh za a siam bawk." 
2Chronicles4:9 Puithiamho awmna tûr pindan te leh tualzâwl te a siam a. Pindan kawngkhârte a siam a, dârin a tuam a." 
2Chronicles4:10 Tuizêm chu Tempul chhimchhak kilah an hûng a. 
2Chronicles4:11 Hurama chuan bêl te, vutlawh te, chawhtawlh te a siam a. Pathian Tempula hman tûr ṭûl zawng zawng chu Solomona a siamsak ta a. Hêng hi a thil siamte chu a ni:" 
2Chronicles4:12 Dâr ban pahnih, ban lu bâwk nei, no bial anga kûm, khaidiat lem a kuala tlar hniha awm;" 
2Chronicles4:13 ban lu bâwkah chuan theibuhfai lem zali, khaidiat kual chhûng zêlah tlar hnih a awm;" 
2Chronicles4:14 chawhtawlh sâwm leh a nawrsawnna tawlailîr sâwm; 
2Chronicles4:15 tuizêm lian, a hûnna bâwngchal lem sâwm leh pahnih nên;" 
2Chronicles4:16 bêl te, vutlawh te, dâr thîrkut te a siam a ni. Chûng thil chu Huraman dârin Lalpa ina hman atân Solomona chu a siamsak a." 
2Chronicles4:17 Sukot leh Zereda inkâr, Jordan lui phaizâwl bellei khurah chûng chu lal chuan themthiamho chu a chhûntîr a ni." 
2Chronicles4:18 Hêng bungbêl hi a tam êm a, a bûk zât hriat sên a ni lo va;" 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomona chuan Pathian Tempul chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng chu a siam a, rangkachak maichâm, chhang serh dahna tûr te," 
2Chronicles4:20 Hmun Thianghlima chhit reng tûrin khâwnvâr leh a dahnate rangkachak hlîr hlakin a siam a; 
2Chronicles4:21 pangpâr lem te, chaicheh te," 
2Chronicles4:22 khâwnvâr huh hlumna te, rimtui hâlna berhbu te, meilawh te, rangkachak vekin a siam a. Tempul luhna kawngkhâr leh Hmun Thianghlim Ber luhna kawngkhâr pawh chu rangkachakin a siam a." 
2Chronicles5:1 Lalpa Tempul hna zawng zawng chu Solomona chuan a thawk zo ta a. A pa Davidan thil a lo serh hran tawh, tangkarua te, rangkachak te leh bungbêl te chu Solomona chuan Tempul sum dahnaah chuan a dah ta a." 
2Chronicles5:2 Solomona chuan Israel upa te, hnam hruaitu te, chhûng tin puipa te chu Davida khawpui Zion aṭanga Lalpa Thuthlung Bâwm laa, Tempul chhûnga dah tûrin a ko khâwm a." 
2Chronicles5:3 Thla sarihna, Bâwkte kûtah chuan, Israel mi zawng zawng chu an lo kal khâwm a." 
2Chronicles5:4 Israel upate an lo thlen chuan Levia chite chuan Thuthlung Bâwm chu an zâwn a," 
2Chronicles5:5 Tempul an zâwn thleng a, Puithiamte leh Levia chite chuan Biakbûk leh a hmanrua zawng zawng chu tempul-ah an la lût a." 
2Chronicles5:6 Israel mi zawng zawng chu lal Solomona hovin Thuthlung Bâwm hmaah chuan an lo kal khâwm a, berâm leh bâwng chhiar sên loh thilhlanah an talh a." 
2Chronicles5:7 Puithiamho chuan Thuthlung Bâwm chu Tempul chhûngah an zâwn lût a, Hmun Thianghlim Bera Cherub thla zâr hnuaiah chuan an dah a." 
2Chronicles5:8 An thla zâr chuan bâwm leh a zâwnna chu a khuh a ni. 
2Chronicles5:9 A zâwnfung hmâwr chu Hmun Thianghlim Ber kawngka zâwn taka din chuan a lang thei, hmun dang aṭang chuan a lang thei lo. A zâwnfung chu tûn thlengin a la invuah a ni." 
2Chronicles5:10 Bâwm chhûngah chuan eng mah dang a awm lo, Aigupta ram aṭanga an lo chhuah laia Lalpa thuthlung, Horeb tlânga ziakna lungphêk pahnih Mosia dah chauh kha a awm." 
2Chronicles5:11 Eng pâwla tel ṭhîn pawh ni se puithiamho chu an inthian thianghlim sa vek a. Hmun Thianghlim Ber aṭang chuan an lo chhuak a. 
2Chronicles5:12 Levia chi, zaipâwla tel - Asafa te, Kenana te, Jeduthuna te chu an hote nên puan zai sîn vâr silhfên inbelin dârbenthek te, ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te an rawn keng a, maichâm bul khawchhak lamah an ding a, tawtawrâwt tum tûr puithiam za leh sawmhnih an tel bawk." 
2Chronicles5:13 Tawtawrâwt pute leh zaipâwlte chu Lalpa fakna hla saa, a hnêna lâwmthu sawina hla sa tûr an ni. Tawtawrâwt te, dârbenthek te leh thil ri thei dangte nên zaipâwl chuan Lalpa fakna hla, ‘ Lalpa chu fak rawh u, a ṭha si a. Kumkhuain min lainat reng a ni’ tih an sa ta tuar tuar a. Lalpa in Tempul chhûngah chuan, chhûm a khat ta a." 
2Chronicles5:14 Lalpa ropuina chhûm chu Tempul chhûnga a khah tlat avângin puithiamte chuan rawng an bâwl thei lo. 
2Chronicles6:1 Solomona chu a ṭawngṭai a, “Chhûm thim zînga awm i duh a," 
2Chronicles6:2 tûnah zawng, Tempul ṭha tak ka siamsak tâk che hi, kumkhuaa i awmna tûr chu,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles6:3 Israel mi zawng zawng chu chutah chuan an ding a, Solomona chuan an lam a hawi a, Pathian malsâwmna a dilsak a." 
2Chronicles6:4 An hnênah chuan, “Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Ani chuan ka pa Davida hnêna a thutiam a rawn tihpuitlin tâk hi." 
2Chronicles6:5 “ Lalpa chuan, ‘ka mite Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah aṭanga tûn thlengin Israel khawpui khawiah mah min biakna tûr Tempul sakna hmun ka la thlang lo. Chumi ti tûr chuan ka mi Israel tu mah ka la thlang hek lo." 
2Chronicles6:6 Tûnah zawng, min biakna hmun atân Jerusalem hi ka thlang ta a, nang David, ka mite chunga lal atân ka ruat a che,’ a ti a." 
2Chronicles6:7 “Ka pa, Davida khân Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa biakna tûr Tempul sak a tum a;" 
2Chronicles6:8 mahse, Lalpa chuan ka Pa Davida hnênah, ‘Ka chênna tûr in min siamsak i tum hi i ti ṭha e." 
2Chronicles6:9 Mahse, nang chuan i sa lo vang, i fapa, i hrin ngeiin a ni Tempul chu sa dâwn ni,’ a ti a." 
2Chronicles6:10 “ Lalpa chuan a thutiam chu a tipuitling ta a, a tiam angin ka pa Davida aiah lal ka lo ni a, a lalṭhutthlêng mi luahtîr a; he in hi Israel Pathian, Lalpa hming awmna atân ka sa zo ta a ni." 
2Chronicles6:11 Israel mite nêna thuthlung a siam dahna bâwm pawh a chhûngah ka dah fel ta,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles6:12 Mipui hmaah Solomona chu maichâm bulah a kal a, bân pharin a ṭawngṭai a." 
2Chronicles6:13 Solomona khân dâr dawhkân, tawng nga bial, tawng thuma sâng a siam a, Tempul tuallaiah chuan a dah a. Dawhkân chungah chuan a lâwn a, vân lam hawia bân a phar chu mi tinin an hmu thei a ni." 
2Chronicles6:14 A ṭawngṭai a: “Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, lei leh vânah nang ang rêng Pathian an awm lo. I mite nêna i thuthlung chu i vawng ṭhîn a, i thu an awih phawt chuan i hmangaihzia i lantîr ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles6:15 Ka pa, Davida hnêna i thutiam chu i hlen a, vawiin hian i tipuitling ta a ni." 
2Chronicles6:16 Khai le, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, ka pa Davidan i dânte a pawisaka, a thlahten an pawisak ve phawt chuan ‘a thlah pakhat tal chu Israel lalah an ṭang reng ang,’ tih i tiam pawh kha han hlen teh le." 
2Chronicles6:17 I chhiahhlawh Davida hnêna i tiam zawng zawng kha, aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, han tihlawhtling teh le." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Pathian meuh chu lei mihringte zîngah hian i chêng duh ngût dâwn em ni? Vânah pawh i leng si lo va, ka Tempul sakah hian leng rual em i nih?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Aw Lalpa, ka Pathian, i chhiahhlawhin ka dîl hi lo ngaithla la, ka ngen hi min phalsak ang che." 
2Chronicles6:20 I hming awmna tûra i thlan, he in hi a chhûn a zânin vêng la, i lam hawia ka ṭawngṭai hi lo ngaithla ang che." 
2Chronicles6:21 Ka ṭawngṭaina hi ngaithla la, i mi Israel-te, he Tempul hawia an ṭawngṭai chuan ngaithla la. I in vân sâng aṭang chuan lo hria la, kan sual ngaidam ang che." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Tu pawh, thil sual tia puh, i maichâm hmaa lo kala, tihsual a neih lohzia hriat nân chhia a rawn chham chuan," 
2Chronicles6:23 Aw Lalpa, i vân sâng aṭangin lo ngaithla la, i chhiahhlawh chungthu chu dik takin rêlsak la, mi sual chu hrem la, pawi khawih lo chu chhuah ang che." 
2Chronicles6:24 “An sual avânga i mi Israel-te chu an hmêlmaten an sawisaka, i lam an lo hawia, i Tempul hawia ngaihdam an rawn dîl chuan," 
2Chronicles6:25 I vân sâng aṭangin lo ngaithla la, i mite sual chu ngaidam la, an hnêna i pêk, an thlahtute i pêk ramah chuan hruai kîr leh ang che." 
2Chronicles6:26 “I mite sual avângin khua i khêntîr a, an sual sima Tempul hawia an rawn ṭawngṭai chuan," 
2Chronicles6:27 aw Lalpa, an thu chu ngaihthlâksak la, i chhiahhlawh Israel-te sual chu ngaidam la; thil dik tih zirtîr ang che. Tin, aw Lalpa, i mite neih hlen tûra i pêk i ramah chuan ruah sûrtîr ang che." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Ṭam tlâk te, hri lên te, thli lumin thlai a chhêm chhiata, khau te a puana, râl an lo lente leh i mite an dam loh hritlân hunah te," 
2Chronicles6:29 an ṭawngṭaina chu ngaithla ang che. I mi Israel tu pawh sim takzeta i Tempul lam hawia a ṭawngṭai chuan," 
2Chronicles6:30 a dîl chu lo hria la, i vân sâng aṭangin ngaithla la, ngaidam ang che. Nangmah chauh hian mihring thinlung chhûngril chu i hmu thei a," 
2Chronicles6:31 min thlahtute i pêk rama an awm chhûng chu nang hi an ṭih che a, i thu an awih theih nân an phu tâwk zêlin an chungah ti ang che." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Hnam dang, Israel mi ni lo, ram hla taka awmte pawhin i ropuizia leh i thiltihtheihzia chu an hriata, i ṭanpui peih reng tih hriaa lo kalin he in lam hawia an ṭawngṭai chuan," 
2Chronicles6:33 an dîl chu ngaithla la, i chênna vân sâng aṭang chuan lo ngaithla la, an ngen chu tihsak ang che; khawvêla mi zawng zawngin i mi Israel-te angin an hre dâwn che nia. He ka Tempul sakah hian chibai an rawn bûk che a ni tih an hria ang." 
2Chronicles6:34 “An hmêlmate do tûra i mite an chhuaha, khawi aṭang pawhin i thlan he khua emaw, i tâna ka Tempul sak lam emaw hawia an ṭawngṭai chuan" 
2Chronicles6:35 lo ngaithla la, vân aṭangin lo hria la, an hmêlmate chu hnehpui ngei ang che." 
2Chronicles6:36 “I miten i laka thil sual an tiha, thil sual ti lo an awm si lo, i thin an tih-ura, an hmêlmate kuta i pêka, sala an hruaiin, an hruaina ram chu hla hle mah se," 
2Chronicles6:37 i mite ṭawngṭai chu ngaithla ang che, chu ramah chuan an sual an sima, an sualna leh an khawlohnaah thupha an chawi chuan, aw Lalpa, an ṭawngṭaina chu ngaithla ang che." 
2Chronicles6:38 Chûng rama an awm hnuin an sual an sim takzeta, inchhîra an thlahtute hnêna i pêk ram lam te, i tâna i khawpui thlan lam te, i tâna ka sak he Tempul lam hawi tea an ṭawngṭai chuan," 
2Chronicles6:39 lo ngaithla la, i vân sâng aṭang chuan lo hria ang che; an chungah ngilnei la, i mite sualna zawng zawng chu ngaidam ang che." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Aw ka Pathian, min rawn thlîr la, he hmuna kan ṭawngṭai hi ngaithla ang che." 
2Chronicles6:41 Aw Lalpa Pathian, lo thawk chhuak la, I chênna tûrah hian lo kal teh, I ropuizia lanna bâwm nên lo lût rawh, Aw Lalpa Pathian, i puithiamte chu an thiltih apiangah malsâwm la, I mi thianghlimte chu i thil ṭha tihsakah lâwm rawh se." 
2Chronicles6:42 Aw Lalpa Pathian, I hriakthiha hi hawisan suh la, I chhiahhlawh Davida thil ṭha tihte hre reng ang che,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles7:1 Lal Solomona a ṭawngṭai zawh chuan vân aṭangin mei a lo tla a, thilhlante chu a rawn kâng ral ta a; Tempul chhûng chu Lalpa ropuina chuan a khat ta tlat a." 
2Chronicles7:2 Lalpa in chhûng chu a ropuinaa a khah tlat avâng chuan puithiamte chu Lalpa Tempulah chuan an lût thei lo. 
2Chronicles7:3 Vân aṭanga mei lo tla leh in chhûng Lalpa ropuinaa a khat chu, Israel miten an han hmuh chuan tualah an bawkkhup a, Pathian chibai an bûk a, a ṭhatna avâng leh ngil a neih kumkhua ṭhîn avângin an fak a," 
2Chronicles7:4 Solomona leh mite chuan Lalpa hnênah thilhlan an hlân a. 
2Chronicles7:5 Remna thilhlan atân bâwng sînghnih leh sânghnih, berâm nuaikhat leh sînghnih an hlân a. Chutianga tiin Solomona leh a mite chuan Tempul chu an hawng ta a." 
2Chronicles7:6 Puithiamho chu an dinna hmun tûra ruatah chuan an ding a, Levia chite chuan Davida pêk thil tum rîk theihte nên Lalpa fak hla, ‘Kumkhuaa min hmangaihtu a ni,’ tih hla, Davidan sa tûra a tih ang ngeiin an sa ta tuar tuar a, Puithiamte pawhin mipui ding hmaah tawtawrâwt an hâm ruai ruai a." 
2Chronicles7:7 A hung chhûng kawtlai pawh chu Solomona chuan a hawng a, hâlral thilhlan te, buhbâl thilhlan te, remna thilhlan ran thau te chu a hâl a, dâr maichâm a siam kha hêng zawng zawng hlan nân a tê lutuk a, a leng lo chu tualah chuan an hâl mai a ni." 
2Chronicles7:8 Lal Solomona leh mi dangte chuan Bâwkte kût, ni sarih chhûng an hmang zui a, Israel ram hmâr tâwp lam Hamath kalkhân leh chhim lam Aigupta lui inkâra mi zawng zawng chu an lo kal khâwm a, mi an tam hle mai." 
2Chronicles7:9 Maichâm lawmin ni sarih a awh a, Bâwkte kût hian ni sarih dang a awh leh a, kût ni hnuhnûng berah chuan kût khârna inkhâwm ropui tak an nei a." 
2Chronicles7:10 A tûk leh thla sarihna, ni sawmhnih leh pathum ni chuan Solomona chuan mipuite chu a ṭintîr ta a. Lalpa chuan a mi Israel-te mal a sâwm a, Davida te, Solomona te mal a sâwm avâng chuan mipui chu an hlim êm êm a." 
2Chronicles7:11 Ruat a nih ang ngeia lal Solomonan Tempul leh lal in a sak zawh fel vek hnu chuan," 
2Chronicles7:12 zânah Lalpa chu a hnênah a rawn inlâr a, “I ṭawngṭaina ka lo hria a, Tempul hi ka hnêna thilhlan in rawn hlanna hmun atân ka thlang ta e." 
2Chronicles7:13 Khua ka tikhêng emaw, thlai ei chhe tûr khau ka tipuang emaw, hri ka lêntîr hunah emaw," 
2Chronicles7:14 ka hming putu ka mite hian thuhnuairawlh taka ka hnêna an rawn ṭawngṭaia, min rawn pana, an sualna ata an lo hawi kîr chuan vân aṭangin ka lo hria ang a, an sualte chu ka ngaidam ang a, an ramte pawh ka tungding leh ang." 
2Chronicles7:15 Tempul hi ka vil ang a, heta an ṭawngṭai chuan ka beng ka lo chhi ang." 
2Chronicles7:16 Kumkhuaa min biakna hmun atân ka thlang a, ka tihthianghlim tawh avângin ka vil ang a, ka vêng tlat ang." 
2Chronicles7:17 Nang pawh, i pa Davida tih anga i tiha, ka thupêkte i awiha, ka thuruatte i zawma, awm dân tûr ka tih anga i awm chuan," 
2Chronicles7:18 I pa Davida hnêna ka thutiam kha ka hlen ang; a thlahte chu Israel-te lalah an ṭang reng ang tih ka tiam a nih kha. 
2Chronicles7:19 In tâna ka thupêk te, ka thuruat te in ngaihsak lohva, in zâwm duh lohva, pathian dangte in biaka, an rawng in bâwl vaih chuan," 
2Chronicles7:20 ka pêk che u ram ata hi ka paih chhuak ang che u a, min biak ṭhinna tûra ka Tempul ka tihthianghlim tawh pawh hi ka rauhsan ang a, mi tinin an nuihzat ang a, an hmusit bawk ang." 
2Chronicles7:21 “Tûnah chuan he in hi mi tinin an ngaisâng a, chutih hunah chuan a kianga kal apiangin mak an ti ang a, ‘Engtizia nge Lalpa hian he ram leh he Tempul hi heti taka a sawisak le!’ an ti ang." 
2Chronicles7:22 Mi ṭhenkhatin, ‘An thlahtute Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu Lalpa, an Pathian chu an kalsan atin alâwm maw le; pathian dangte an vuan a, an rawngte an bâwlsan avângin Lalpa chuan a sawisa a nih hi,’ tiin an chhâng ang,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles8:1 Lalpa Tempul leh ama in a sak chhûng kum sawmhnih a lo vei chuan Solomonan," 
2Chronicles8:2 Hirama pêk khawpuite chu a din ṭha a, Judai rama mite a luahtîr a." 
2Chronicles8:3 Solomona chuan Hamath-zoba a bei a, a la a." 
2Chronicles8:4 Thlalêra Tadmor kulh chu a siam ṭha a, Hamath biala khuate chu kudâm awm nân a siam ṭha bawk a." 
2Chronicles8:5 Solomona chuan Beth-horon chuanchung leh chuanhnuai kulh bangte chu a rem ṭha a, kawngkhârte pawh a kalhnate nên a siam a." 
2Chronicles8:6 Baalat khawpui te leh kudâm a dahna khawpui te, a sakawrte leh a tawlailîr a dahna khawpui te pawh a siam ṭha leh vek a. Jerusalem-ah te, Lebanon-ah te leh a ram chhûng rêng rêngah in sak a tum tawh phawt chu a sa vek a." 
2Chronicles8:7 Israel mi ni lo, Hit mi te, Amor mi te, Periz mi te, Hiv mi te, Jebus mi te, Kanan rama lo awm, Israel-ten Kanan ram an luaha," 
2Chronicles8:8 an thah bângte thlahte kha Solomona chuan bawih anga chhawr tûrin hnathawk pâwl a din a, chûng chu tûn thlengin an la awm." 
2Chronicles8:9 Israel mite erawh chu hnathawk tûra phût luih an ni lo; sipaiah te, hotu-ah te, tawlailîr khalhtuah te leh sakawr chungchuang mi atân te an ṭang thung a." 
2Chronicles8:10 In sak hna enkawltu mi zahnih leh sawmnga an awm. 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomona chuan a nupui, Aigupta lal fanu tân in a sa a, Davida khawpui aṭang chuan a la chhuak a, a in sakah chuan a awmtîr ta a. “Ka nupui hi Israel lal Davida inah a awm tûr a ni lo. Thuthlung Bâwm awmna apiang hi Hmun Thianghlim a ni si a,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles8:12 Tempul kawta maichâm a siamah Solomona chuan hâlral thilhlan a hlân a. 
2Chronicles8:13 Mosia dân bu-a chuang angin ni tina hlan tûr te, sabat nia hlan tûr te, thla thara hlan tûr te leh kum khat chhûnga kût vawi thum chhang dawidim telh loh kût te, Pentikos kût te, Bâwkte kûttea hlan tûr bi tukte chu a hlân a." 
2Chronicles8:14 A pa Davida ruat tawh angin puithiamte ni tin tih tûr a tihfelpui a, puithiamho zaia lo pui tûr Levia chite thawh tûr pawh a tihfelsak a. Tempul pulis-ho ni tin hna tûr te, kawngkhâr an vên tûr te, Pathian mi Davida sawi ang khân a ruat vek a." 
2Chronicles8:15 Kudâm leh thil dang chungchâng puithiamte leh Levia chite hnêna Davida thupêk zawng zawng kha engkim a ti vek a. 
2Chronicles8:16 Lalpa Tempul an sakna tûr lung an phûm ni aṭanga an peih fel thlenga Solomonan tih tûr a ruahman zawng zawng chu an ti ta vek a, Lalpa Tempul chu an puitlin ta a." 
2Chronicles8:17 Agaba litengsâwl, Edom rama Ezion-geber leh Eloth khuaah Solomona chu a kal a." 
2Chronicles8:18 Lal Hirama chuan lawng leh lawngpu thiam tak tak a rawn thawn a, Solomona mite nên Ofir ramah an kal a, rangkachak kg. sîngkhat leh sângnga aia tam mah an rawn hâwn a, lal Solomona hnênah an rawn thlen a." 
2Chronicles9:1 Seba lalnuin Solomona hmingthanzia a hriat chuan thu har tak tak zâwta fiah tûrin Jerusalem-ah a kal a. Ṭhuihruai tam tak a nei a, mosola phur sanghâwngsei tam tak a hruai a, mosola te, lungmantam te, rangkachak te a keng ṭeuh bawk a. Solomona nên an inhmuh chuan zawh tûr a neih zawng zawng chu a zâwt ta vek a." 
2Chronicles9:2 A zawh zawng zawng chu Solomona chuan a chhâng thei vek a, chhan harsa tih rêng a nei lo." 
2Chronicles9:3 Seba lalnu chuan Solomona finzia chu a hria a, a in sak ropuizia te chu a hmu a," 
2Chronicles9:4 Solomona ei tûr an rawn hlui te, a chhiahhlawh awmna in te, lal ina thawktu hna insem dân te, an thawmhnaw hâk mawizia te; chawhlui kîlpuitute leh a viltute inchei mawizia te, Tempula hâlral thilhlan a hlan hnemzia te a han hmuh chuan mak a ti a, awm ngaihna rêng a hre ta lo va." 
2Chronicles9:5 Lalnu chuan, “I thil tihte leh i finziate kan rama ka hriat kha a lo dik ngei a nih hi." 
2Chronicles9:6 Ka lo kal a, ka rawn hmuh hma chuan an sawi chu ka awih lo va; mahse, i finziate hi a zâtve pawh an sawi hlei nem, an sawi ai daihin a ropui hi." 
2Chronicles9:7 I nupuite chu an va nihlawh êm! I chhiahhlawh, ni tina i bula awma, i finzia ngaithla ṭhîntute pawh hi an va nihlawh êm!" 
2Chronicles9:8 I Pathian, Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se, ani chu i chungah a lâwm a, a aia rorêltu, lalah a ruat che a ni. I Pathian chuan Israel-te hi a hmangaih a, an chungah dik taka rorêltu lalah a dah che a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles9:9 Thilpêk tûr a rawn ken rangkachak kg. sângli chuang leh mosola tam tak, lungmantam ṭhahnem tâwk tak nên Solomona chu a pe a. Seba lalnuin Solomona a pêk mosola anga ṭha rêng rêng hi a awm lo." 
2Chronicles9:10 Lal Hirama hote leh Solomona hote chuan Ofir rangkachak an rawn hâwn a, algum thing leh lungmantam pawh an rawn hâwn a." 
2Chronicles9:11 Algum thing chuan Tempul pindan chung leh ama in kailâwn a siam a, thing chu perhkhuang leh ṭingṭang siam nân a hmang bawk a, Judai ramah hetiang thing hi an la hmu ngai rêng rêng lo." 
2Chronicles9:12 Lal Solomona chuan Seba lalnu chu a duh leh a dîl apiang chu a pe a; chu bâkah thilpêk a rawn kensak lo do lêtna a pe tel bawk a; an ram lamah a ṭhuihruaite nên an haw leh ta a. 
2Chronicles9:13 Solomona chuan kum tin rangkachak kg. sînghnih leh sângthum dâwn lai a dawng ṭhîn a. 
2Chronicles9:14 Sumdâwngte leh dâwrkaiten chhiah an pêk bâkah Arabia lalte leh Israel-te rama bial tin awptute chuan Solomona chu rangkachak leh tangka an rawn pe ṭhîn. 
2Chronicles9:15 Phaw lian pui pui, rangkachak den phêk zahnih a siam a, phaw pakhatah rangkachak kg. sarih vêl zêl a hmang a ni." 
2Chronicles9:16 Phaw tê deuh rangkachak den phêk kg. thuma rita tuam a siam bawk a, ‘Lebanon ngaw in’ an tih pindanah chuan a dah a." 
2Chronicles9:17 Lal chuan saingho lalṭhutthlêng ropui tak a siam a, rangkachak hlîr hlakin a tuam a." 
2Chronicles9:18 Lalṭhutthlêng lâwn chhohna tûr rangkachak rahka paruk, rah chhan tûr nên a siam a. Ṭhutthlêng chuan bân a nei a, a bân sîr tawnah sakeibaknei lem a dintîr a." 
2Chronicles9:19 Sakeibaknei lem sâwm leh pahnih, rahka sîr tawnah chuan a bawhtîr bawk a, chutiang khawpa ropui chu khawi ramah mah a awm lo." 
2Chronicles9:20 Solomona no chu rangkachak vek a ni, ‘Lebanon ngaw in’ an tih pindana an thil eina bungbêlte pawh chu rangkachak hlîr hlaka siam a ni. Solomona hun lai chuan tangkaruate hi chu engah mah an ngai lo." 
2Chronicles9:21 Lawngrual a nei bawk a, lal Hirama lawng rualte nên an inkawp a, Tarsis-ah te kalin kum thum danah an lo haw a, rangkachak te, tangkarua te, saingho te, zâwng te, ârâwn te an rawn hâwn ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles9:22 Lal Solomona chu khawvêl lal dang zawng zawng aiin a hausa a, a fing zâwk bawk a." 
2Chronicles9:23 Solomona hnêna Pathianin finna a pêk chu hre duhin an rawn pan huai huai a. 
2Chronicles9:24 Tangkarua leh rangkachaka thil siam te, puan te, râlthuam te, mosola te, sakawr te, sakawr puakphur chi te an rawn pe zut zut a, kum tin hetianga rawn ti hi an awm zêl a ni." 
2Chronicles9:25 Lal Solomona chuan sakawr vulhna hmun sângli a nei a, chûngah chuan a sakawr tawlailîr leh a sakawrte chu a dah a, indo sakawr pawh sîngkhat leh sânghnih a nei a, a ṭhen chu Jerusalem-ah a kawl a, a dang chu khaw hrang hrangah a dah a." 
2Chronicles9:26 Eufretis luipui leh Filistia ram inkâr, Aigupta lui thleng ram chhûnga lal ber a ni a," 
2Chronicles9:27 Solomona lal laiin Jerusalem khuaah chuan tangkarua chu lungtê ang lek a ni a, sidar thing lah tlâng bulṭhut khawthlang phaia theipui thing ang maiin a tam a ni." 
2Chronicles9:28 Solomona chuan Aigupta ram leh hmun hrang hrang aṭangin sakawr a tawlh ṭhîn. 
2Chronicles9:29 A bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin Solomona chanchin hi zâwlnei Nathana lehkhabu-ah te, Silo mi Ahiza thu sawi ziakna bu-ah te, Nebata fapa Israel lal Jeroboama chungchânga zâwlnei Idoa inlârna ziakna bu-ah te a chuang." 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomona chu Jerusalem-ah Israel zawng zawng chungah kum sawmli a lal a," 
2Chronicles9:31 a thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a, a fapa Rehoboama chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehoboama chu Sekem khuaah a kal a, chutah chuan lala siam tûrin Israel-ho, hmâr lama awmte chu, an lo pung khâwm a." 
2Chronicles10:2 Nebata fapa Jeroboama, Solomona hlauva tlân bo chu, Solomona thih hnu chuan a lo hâwng leh a." 
2Chronicles10:3 Hmâr lama Israel-te chuan an va pun a, Rehoboama hnênah chuan an kal ho ta a, a hnênah," 
2Chronicles10:4 “I pa khân min chhawr nasa a, kan phur a tirit êm êm a; nangin min chhawr nêpin kan phur min tihzânsak deuh la, i khua leh tuiah kan awm ang e,” an ti a." 
2Chronicles10:5 An hnênah chuan, “Ni thum hnuah lo kal leh ang che u,” a ti a, mite chu an chhuak ta a." 
2Chronicles10:6 Lal Rehoboama chuan a pa Solomona dam laia a bula awm ṭhîn upate chu a râwn a, “Hêng mite hi engtin nge chhâng ila min tih?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles10:7 Anni chuan, “Hêng mite chungah hian ngilnei la, ṭha takin bia ang che, I mi an ni kumkhua ang,” tiin an chhâng a." 
2Chronicles10:8 Upaho thurâwn chu a ngaithla duh lo va, tlangvâl, ama rualpui, a kawm ṭhînte chu a râwn a," 
2Chronicles10:9 “ ‘I pa khân kan phur a tirit êm êm mai, min tihzânsak rawh,’ rawn titute hi engtin nge ka lo chhân ang?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles10:10 A rualpui tlangvâlte chuan, “Hêngho, ‘i pain kan phur a tirit êm a, min tihzânsak rawh,’ titute hi heti hian chhâng mai rawh, ‘Ka kutzungtê pawh hi ka pa kâwng ai chuan a khauh ang;" 
2Chronicles10:11 ka pain in phur a tirit hle a nih chuan kei chuan ka belhchhah ang; vuakna hruia a hrem ṭhinnaah che u kei chuan khawmualkaikuang ka ruai ang,’ ti ang che,” an ti a." 
2Chronicles10:12 Ni thum hnuah chuan Jeroboama leh Israel-te chu Rehoboama hnênah, a sawi ang khân an lo kal a." 
2Chronicles10:13 Lal chuan upaho thurâwn kha zâwm duh lovin mite chu ram takin a bia a. 
2Chronicles10:14 Tlangvâlho thurâwn ang khân Rehoboama chuan mite hnênah, “Ka pa chuan in phur a tirit hle maw? Kei chuan ka belhchhah ang. Vuakna hruiin a hrem ṭhîn che u a, kei chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hrem ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles10:15 Lal chuan mipui thu chu a ngaihthlâksak duh ta lo va, Silo mi zâwlnei Ahija hnêna Nebata fapa Jeroboama chungchâng Pathianin a sawi kha Lalpa chuan a tihhlawhtlin theih nân Pathianin a tihtîr a ni." 
2Chronicles10:16 Israel mite chuan lalin an thu a ngaihsak duh lo tih an hriatin lal chu an chhâng a: “Davida ramah chan eng nge kan neih ve le? Jesaia thlahte zîngah chanvo eng nge kan neih? Davida thlahte chu an awm awmin awm rawh se,” an ti a. Israel mi zawng zawng chu in lamah an haw ta a." 
2Chronicles10:17 Judai rama awm Israel mite chungah chauh chuan Rehoboama chu a lal ta a. 
2Chronicles10:18 Lal Rehoboama chuan Hadorama, hnathawka phût luih pâwl hotu chu Israel-ho ko tûrin a tîr a, anni chuan lungin an lo dêng hlum a. Chumi avâng chuan Rehoboama chu a tawlailîrah a chuang sawk sawk a, Jerusalem-ah a tlân ta a." 
2Chronicles10:19 Chuta chin chu Israel mite chu Davida thlahte lakah tûn thlengin an hel ta a ni. 
2Chronicles11:1 Lal Rehoboaman Jerusalem a thlen chuan Benjamin mi leh Juda sipai ṭha ṭha nuaikhat leh sîngriat a khâwm a, hmâr lama awm Israel-te chu a thuhnuaia dah leh tûrin beih a tum a ni." 
2Chronicles11:2 Mahse, Pathian mi, Semaia hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a:" 
2Chronicles11:3 Lal Rehoboama te, Juda leh Benjamin mite hnênah chuan heti hian a hrilhtîr a:" 
2Chronicles11:4 “In unau Israel-te chu bei suh u, haw rawh u. An thil tih chu ka thu-a ti an ni,” tiin. Lalpa thupêk chu an awih a, Jeroboama chu an bei ta lo va." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehoboama chu Jerusalem-ah a awm a, Judai ram leh Benjamin-ho ram chhûnga hêng khuate hi kulhin a hung a:" 
2Chronicles11:6 Bethlehem te, Etam te, Tekoa te," 
2Chronicles11:7 Beth-zur te, Soko te, Adulam te," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gath te, Maresa te, Zif te," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraim te, Lakis te, Azeka te," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zora te, Aijalon te, Hebron te." 
2Chronicles11:11 Hêng khaw kulhte hi rinawm takin a siam a, khaw tin tân hotu a ruat a, khaw tinah buh te, oliv hriak te, uain te a chhêk bawk a." 
2Chronicles11:12 Fei te, phaw te a dah bawk a; chutiang chuan Judai ram leh Benjamin ram mite chu a thuhnuaiah a dah thei a ni." 
2Chronicles11:13 Israel-ho rama bial tina awm puithiamte leh Levia chite chuan chhim lam an pan a, Judai ramah an lût a." 
2Chronicles11:14 Levia chite chuan an ran tlatna leh an ram chante chu an kalsan a, Judai ramah te, Jerusalem-ah te an lo kal a. Jeroboama leh a aiawhtute khân Lalpa puithiamah an hmang duh lo va." 
2Chronicles11:15 Jeroboama khân hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsânga rawngbâwl tûr, bâwngpa lem a siam chawpte leh ramhuai biakna hmuna thawk tûr ama puithiam a ruat a ni." 
2Chronicles11:16 Israel hnam zînga Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian be tak tak duhtute chuan Jerusalem-ah Levia chite chu an rawn zui a, an thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa hnênah thilhlan an hlan theih nân an lo kal ve a ni." 
2Chronicles11:17 Hemi avâng hian Judai ram chu Solomona fapa Rehoboama lamah chuan an ṭang a, lal Davida leh Solomona lal lai ang mai khân an khawsa a ni." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboama chuan Davida fa, Jeremota fanu Mahalati nupuiah a nei a, a nu chu Eliaba fanu, Jesaia tunu Abihaili a ni." 
2Chronicles11:19 Fapa pathum - Jeusa te, Semaria te, Zahana te an nei a." 
2Chronicles11:20 Nakin deuhvah chuan Absaloma fanu Maaki a nei leh a, fapa pali - Abija te, Ataia te, Ziza te, Selomita te an nei a." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehoboama hian nupui sâwm leh pariat leh hmei sawmruk a nei a, fapa sawmhnih leh pariat leh fanu sawmruk a nei a. A nupui leh a hmei zawng zawng zîngah Maaki hi a duh ber a." 
2Chronicles11:22 Abija hi a fa zawng zawng zîngah a duat ber a, a aiawha lal atân a thlang a ni." 
2Chronicles11:23 Rehoboaman a fate chhawr dân a thiam hle, Judai leh Benjamin ram chhûng khawpui kulh nei zawng zawngah hotu-ah a dah darh a. An lakah a thilphal hle a, nupuite pawh a neihsak thluah hlawm a." 
2Chronicles12:1 Rehoboama chuan a lo lal ngheh tâk veleh a mite nên Lalpa dân chu an ngaihthah ta a. 
2Chronicles12:2 Rehoboama kum nga a lal kum chuan Lalpa an thlahthlam avângin hrem an tuar ta a, Aigupta lal Sisaka chuan," 
2Chronicles12:3 sakawr-tawlailîr sângkhat leh zahnih, sakawr chungchuang mi sîngruk leh sipai chhiar sên loh, Lub te, Suki te leh Sudan sipai rual te nên Jerusalem chu a rawn bei a." 
2Chronicles12:4 Judai ram khaw kulh neite chu a la tawh a, Jerusalem pawh a lo thleng a." 
2Chronicles12:5 Lal Rehoboama leh Judai ram hruaitu, Sisaka hlauva Jerusalem-a lo tlânte hnênah chuan zâwlnei Semaia chu a kal a, an hnênah, “Hei hi Lalpa thu chu a ni. Min kalsan a, kei pawhin Sisaka kuta awm tûrin ka kalsan ta che u a ni,” a rawn ti a." 
2Chronicles12:6 Lal leh hotute chuan, “Thil sual kan ti a ni, Lalpa hian a tidik e,” an ti a." 
2Chronicles12:7 An thiltih chu a hriatin Lalpa thu chu Semaia hnênah a lo thleng leh a, a hnênah, “ ‘Thil sual kan ti’ an tih tâk avângin ka tiboral lo vang. Sisakan Jerusalem a rawn beih hunah, ka thinurna chu Sisaka hmangin an chungah ka leihbaw vek lo vang a, a ṭhen chu an dam khawchhuah ka phal dâwn a ni." 
2Chronicles12:8 Sisaka chuan khua chu a la ang a, lei lal rawngbâwl leh ka rawngbâwl inan lohzia an hria ang,” tiin." 
2Chronicles12:9 Sisaka chuan Jerusalem chu a rawn bei a, a Tempul leh lal ina thil hlu awmte chu a la vek a. Lal Solomonan rangkachak phaw a siamte nên, engkim a la vek a." 
2Chronicles12:10 Chûng aiah chuan Rehoboama chuan dâr phawte a siam a, lal in kawngkhâr vêngtute kutah a hlân a." 
2Chronicles12:11 Lal chu Tempula a kal apiangin vêngtute chuan phawte chu an keng a, an zui a; vênbûkah an dah kîr leh ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles12:12 Lalpa hnêna tlâwm taka a intukluh tâk avângin, Lalpa thinur chuan a sawisa hrep ta lo. Judai ram mite pawh an khawsa nuam viau va." 
2Chronicles12:13 Rehoboama chu Jerusalem-ah a lal a, a intinghet ta hle. Lal a nihin kum sawmli leh pakhat a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh pasarih ro a rêl a. Israel ram zawng zawngah chu khua chu amah chibai bûkna hmun atân Lalpa chuan a thlang a ni. Rehoboama nu chu Amon mi, Naamaii a ni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Lalpa duhzâwng a ngaihtuah lo va, thil sual a ti a." 
2Chronicles12:15 A bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin Rehoboama thiltih leh a chhûngte chanchin chu ‘Zâwlnei Semaia chanchin’ ziakna lehkhabu-ah a chuang. Rehoboama leh Jeroboama chu an indo reng a ni. 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehoboama chu a thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a, a fapa Abija chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Chronicles13:1 Israel lal Jeroboama kum sâwm leh pariat a lal kumin Abija chu Judai ram lal a ni ṭan a," 
2Chronicles13:2 Jerusalem-ah kum thum a lal a, a nu chu Gibea khaw mi Uriela fanu Mikaii a ni. Abija leh Jeroboama chu an indo ta a." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abija chu sipai huai thlan ṭhalh nuai li nên a thawk a, Jeroboama chuan sipai huai ṭhalh bawk nuai riat nên a rawn bei a," 
2Chronicles13:4 Efraim tlângram Zemaraim tlângchhîpah Abija chu a ding a, Jeroboama leh Israel-te chu a au va, “Ka thu hi lo ngaithla teh u,"
