2Chronicles13:5 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan, Davida leh a thlahte hnênah Israel mite chunga lal nihna chu thu thlung meuhvin a pe tawh a ni tih in hre na nge?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Davida fapa, Solomona chhiahhlawh Nebata fapa Jeroboama chu a pu lakah a hel ta mai a, mi lawilo pui puiin an ṭawiawm a." 
2Chronicles13:7 Solomona fapa Rehoboama chu an pawisa lo va; ani lah a la naupangin chûngho ngam tûrin a rilru a la puitling si lo va. 
2Chronicles13:8 Davida thlahte hnêna lal thuneihna Lalpa pêk dodâlin in sipai ngah leh Jeroboama bâwng lem, in pathian atâna a siam chhuangin in lo thawk a." 
2Chronicles13:9 Lalpa puithiamte leh Levia chite chu in hnawt chhuak a, hnam dang tih dân angin puithiam tûr in ruat chawp a. Bâwngpa rawn kai nazawng leh berâm pasarih emaw rawn khalh apiang chu, ‘kan puithiam’ in tih atân puithiamah in lo serh hrang duh zêl mai bawk si." 
2Chronicles13:10 “Keini zawngin kan Pathian Lalpa rawng a ni kan la bâwl, kan la hawisan lo, Arona thlah puithiam ngeiin an tih tûr an ti a, Levia chi ngatin an pui a ni." 
2Chronicles13:11 Tûk tin leh tlai tin Lalpa tân rimtui an hâl a, hâlral thilhlante pawh an hlân ṭhîn a ni. Chhang serh chu dawhkân thianghlimah an dah ziah a, tlaiah rangkachak khâwnvâr pawh an la hâl ziah a ni. Keini chuan Lalpa thupêk kan la zâwm zêl a, nangni erawh chuan ani chu in thlah ta a ni." 
2Chronicles13:12 Pathian chu min hruaitu a ni a, a puithiamte pawh inbeihna tawtawrâwt hâm tûrin an inpeih reng a ni. Aw Israel-te u, in thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa hi do lul suh u, in ngam lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles13:13 Chutih chhûng chuan Jeroboama chuan a sipai ṭhenkhat chu Juda sipaite ep tûrin a dah a, a ṭhen chu an hnung lama châng ru tûrin a kaltîr bawk a." 
2Chronicles13:14 Juda-ho chuan an han thlîr vêl a, an hmêlmate chuan an lo hual vek tawh a, Lalpa chu an au va, puithiamte chuan tawtawrâwt an hâm a." 
2Chronicles13:15 Juda-te chu an au chiam a, Abija chuan hma a hruai a, an bei a, Pathian chuan Jeroboama leh Israel-te chu a hneh ta a." 
2Chronicles13:16 Israel-te chu Juda-te hmaah chuan an tlânchhia a, Pathian chuan Juda-te chu a tichak ta zâwk a ni." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abija leh a sipaite chuan Israel sipaite chu an titlâwm dêr mai a. Israel sipai ṭha ṭha nuainga zet chu an that a ni. 
2Chronicles13:18 Juda-te chuan an thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chu an rinchhan avângin Israel-te chu an hneh ta a ni." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abija chuan Jeroboama sipaite chu a ûm a, an khawpui ṭhenkhat Bethel te, Jesana te, Efron te chu an chhehvêl khuate nên a chhuhsak a." 
2Chronicles13:20 Abija dam chhûngin Jeroboama chu a ding chhuak leh hman lo, Lalpa chuan a tihlum ta nge nge a ni." 
2Chronicles13:21 Abija erawh chu a chak tial tial a, nupui sâwm leh pali a nei a, fapa sawmhnih leh pahnih leh fanu sâwm leh paruk a nei a." 
2Chronicles13:22 Abija chanchin dang, a thu sawi leh a thil tihte chu zâwlnei Idoa chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
2Chronicles14:1 Lal Abija chu a thi a, Davida khawpuia lal thlânah an phûm a. A fapa Asa chu a lo lal a. Asa lal kum sâwm chhûng chu râlmuang takin an awm a," 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa chuan thil dik leh thil ṭha, a Pathian, Lalpa hmuhah chuan a ti ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles14:3 Hnam dang maichâmte leh an pathian biakna hmunsângte chu a tibo va, an lung milemte chu a tibung a, Aseri lim an phunte chu a kit a." 
2Chronicles14:4 Judai ram mite chu an thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa duhzâwng ti tûr leh a dânte leh a thupêkte zâwm tûrin a hrilh a." 
2Chronicles14:5 Judai ram khaw tina hnam dang Pathian biakna hmunsângte leh an rimtui hâlna maichâmte chu a tibo va, a lal lai chuan râlmuang takin an awm a ni." 
2Chronicles14:6 Lalpa chuan râl a tihmuansak a, indona a awm loh chhûng hian Judai ramah kulhte a siam a." 
2Chronicles14:7 Judai ram mite hnênah, “Ti rawh u, kan khuate hi din ṭha ila, lung kulh siam hnan ila, râlvênbûk in sângte, kawngkhâr leh a kalhna te i siam ang u. Lalpa, kan Pathian chu bulpuia kan neih avângin he ramah hian thu kan la nei a ni; amah chu kan pawm avângin kil tinah râlmuang takin min awmtîr a nih hi,” a ti a. Kulhte chu an siam a, ṭha takin an zo ta a." 
2Chronicles14:8 Lal Asa chuan phaw leh fei keng, Judai ram aṭangin sipai nuaithum leh Benjamin ram aṭangin indo thiam, awmphaw ha leh thal keng sipai nuaihnih leh sîngriat a nei a; mi huai indo thiam tak vek an ni." 
2Chronicles14:9 Ethiopia mi Zera chuan sipai maktaduai khat leh sakawr-tawlailîr zathum hruaiin Judai ram a rawn rûn a, Maresa a lo thleng hial tawh a." 
2Chronicles14:10 Lo do tûrin lal Asa chu a thawk chhuak a, Maresa bul, Zefata ruamah chuan an inep ta a." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa chu a Pathian, Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, sipai chak lo zâwk a chak zâwk aia tichak theitu, nang ang an awm lo. Aw Lalpa kan Pathian, min rawn ṭanpui teh, nangmahah kan innghat a, i hming chhâlin hêng mite hi bei tûrin kan lo thawk a ni. Aw Lalpa, kan Pathian i nih hi, mihringin ngam che suh se,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles14:12 Lalpa chuan Ethiopia mite chu Asa leh Juda sipaiho hmaah chuan a hneh a, an tlânchhe ta chum chum a." 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa leh a hote chuan Gerar thleng rawkin an ûm a, Ethiopia mite chu an that hnem khawp a, lo ṭang tham pawh an awm tawh lo. Lalpa leh a sipaite chu an ngam hlawl lo va ni, sipaiho chuan râllâk sum tam tak an la a." 
2Chronicles14:14 Gerar leh a chhehvêl khawpuia awmte chuan Lalpa chu an hlauh tâk êm avângin chûng khuate chu an tichhe thei ta vek a. Khuate chu an rawk a, râllâk sum tam tak an la a." 
2Chronicles14:15 Berâmpu bûkte pawh an hâl a, berâm tam tak an man a, sanghâwngsei te an man a, Jerusalem-ah an haw leh ta a." 
2Chronicles15:1 Obeda fapa Azaria chungah Pathian Thlarau a lo thleng a. 
2Chronicles15:2 Lal Asa hmu tûrin a kal a, a au va, “Lal Asa, nangni Judai leh Benjamin mite u, ka thu hi ngaithla teh u. A lama in ṭan chhûng chuan Lalpa pawh in lamah a ṭang ang; in zawn chuan in hmu ang a, in hawisan chuan a hawisan ang che u." 
2Chronicles15:3 Israel-te chu Pathian tak be lovin rei tak an awm a, zirtîrtu tûr puithiam an nei lo va, dân an hre hek lo." 
2Chronicles15:4 Mahse, manganna an tawhin Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian lam chu an hawi a, Amah chu an zawng a, an hmu ṭhîn a nih kha." 
2Chronicles15:5 Chûng lai chuan ram chu a buai a, a mumal loh êm avângin vâk chhuak ṭha ngam pawh an awm ngai lo." 
2Chronicles15:6 Hnam khatin hnam dang an tirethei a, khaw khatin khaw dang an tirethei bawk a. Pathian chuan buaina leh manganna an chungah a thlentîr a ni." 
2Chronicles15:7 Nangni erawh chuan zâm lovin ṭan la rawh u. In thil tih rah chu in hmu ngei ang,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles15:8 Lal Asa chuan Obeda fapa zâwlnei Azaria thu a han hriat chuan a huai phah sawt a, Judai leh Benjamin rama milem awm zawng zawng chu a tibo vek a, a pain tlângram khua a lâk zawng zawnga mi pawh a tibo vek a. Tempul tuala Lalpa maichâm pawh a siam ṭha a." 
2Chronicles15:9 Lalpa chuan a awmpui tih an hriatin Efraim ram aṭang te, Samaria-ho ram aṭangte chuan a lamṭang mi tam takin Asa chu an rawn bêl a. Asa chuan chûngho chu Judai ram leh Benjamin rama mite nên a ko khâwm a." 
2Chronicles15:10 Asa lal kum sâwm leh panga kum, a thla thumnaah chuan Jerusalem-ah an pung khâwm a." 
2Chronicles15:11 Chumi ni chuan an râllâk bâwng zasarih leh berâm sângsarih Lalpa hnênah an hlân a. 
2Chronicles15:12 An thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chu rilru tak leh tihtakzeta be tûrin thu an thlung a." 
2Chronicles15:13 ‘Puitling pawh, naupang pawh, mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa be duh lo chu tihhlum tûr,’ an ti a." 
2Chronicles15:14 Aw ring taka auvin Lalpa hming chhâlin chhia an chham a; an thu thlun chu vawn tlat an tiam a, an au va, tawtawrâwt an hâm bawk a." 
2Chronicles15:15 Tihtakzeta thu an thlun tlân tâk avângin Judai ram mite chu an lâwm êm êm a. Lalpa rawngbâwl chu nuam an ti a, ani chuan a lo pawm a, kil tinah rem a lêntîr a." 
2Chronicles15:16 Lal Asa chuan, a pi lalnu Maakin Aseri lim tenawm tak chu a phun avângin lalnu a nihna a hlihsak a. Aseri lim chu a kit a, a ek a, Kidron lui ruamah a hâl vek a." 
2Chronicles15:17 Ram chhûnga hmunsâng, pathian dang an biakna zawng zawng chu Lal Asa chuan tibo vek lo mah se a dam chhûng chuan Lalpa chauh a vuan a ni." 
2Chronicles15:18 A pa Abijan Pathian hnêna a thilpêk zawng zawng chu Asa chuan Tempulah a dah a; amah ngeiin rangkachak leh tangkarua a hlante pawh chu a dah tel a. 
2Chronicles15:19 Asa chuan kum sawmthum leh panga ro a rêl chhûng chuan indona a awm leh ta lo. 
2Chronicles16:1 Judai rama Asa kum sawmthum leh paruk a lal kumin Israel lal Baasa chuan Juda lal Asa ram aṭanga tu mah an lo chhuah loh nân leh tu mah an luh theih loh nân Rama-ah kulh a siam a. 
2Chronicles16:2 Asa chuan Tempul sum bâwm ata tangkarua leh rangkachak a la chhuak a, Damaska khuaa awm Suria lal Ben-hadada hnênah a thawn a, a hnênah," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Ka pa leh i pa an ṭangrual ang khân keini pawh i ṭangrual teh ang. En teh, tangkarua leh rangkachak ka rawn thawn a che, Israel lal Baasa nên in inṭhianna titâwp la, ka ram ata a sipaite hnuk kîr teh se,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles16:4 Ben-hadada chuan Asa thu rawt chu ṭha a ti a, sipai hotu a ko va, Israel ram chu an rûn ta a; Ijon te, Dan te, Abel-maim te leh Naftali-ho biala kudâm awmna khua zawng zawng chu a la a." 
2Chronicles16:5 Chûng thil chu lal Baasan a hriatin Rama khaw kulh a siam chu a chawlhsan ta a. 
2Chronicles16:6 Rama kulh siamna tûr lung leh thingte chu la lutin Juda ram mi zawng zawng chu Asa chuan a pun a, Geba leh Mizpa kulh siam nân a hmang ta a." 
2Chronicles16:7 Chutih lai chuan zâwlnei Hanania chu lal Asa hnênah a lo kal a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa i Pathian rinchhan lovin Suria lal i rinchhan vei a; chuvângin, Israel lal sipaite chu i chhuah ta a ni." 
2Chronicles16:8 Ethiopia leh Libua mite khân sipai leh sakawr-tawlailîr tam tak leh sakawr chungchuang mi tam tak an nei a ni lâwm ni kha? Mahse, Lalpa chu i rinchhan a, a hnehtîr che a nih kha." 
2Chronicles16:9 Lalpa chuan amah ring tlattute chu ṭanpui tûrin khawvêl pum puiah a mit a lên ruai ruai ṭhîn a ni. Tûn aṭang chuan do tûr i nei reng ang. Âtthlâk takin thil i ti a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles16:10 Zâwlnei chungah chuan Asa chu a thinur ta hle a, kawl a buntîr a, ripah a khung a, chuta chinah chuan mi dang chungah pawh râwng taka kut thlâk a chîng ta a." 
2Chronicles16:11 Asa lal ṭan tirh aṭanga a tâwp thleng chanchin chu ‘Juda leh Israel lalte chanchin’ ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Chronicles16:12 Asa chu kum sawmthum leh pakua a lal hnuin a ke a pân a, a ke a lo bai ta a. Mahse, Lalpa pan lovin daktor a pan zâwk a." 
2Chronicles16:13 Kum hnih hnu chuan a thi ta a. 
2Chronicles16:14 Davida khawpuiah, a thlân atâna a kerah chuan an phûm ta a. Phûm hmain mosola te, tel rimtuite an hnawih a, amah sûn nân meipui an chhêm hluah hluah a." 
2Chronicles17:1 Jehosafata chu a pa Asa hnuah a lo lal a, Israel-te do thei tûrin a intichak a." 
2Chronicles17:2 Judai ram kulh awmna khuaahte sipai a dah a, Judai ram thingtlâng leh Efraim rama khawpui, a pa Asan a lo hneh tawh khuaahte pawh sipai hmunpui a dah bawk a." 
2Chronicles17:3 A pain a lal tirh laia a tih ang khân Jehosafata pawhin a ti a, Baal a be duh lo va. Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan mal a sâwm a." 
2Chronicles17:4 A pate Pathian rawng a bâwl a, Pathian thupêk a zâwm a, Israel lalte angin a khawsa ve hek lo." 
2Chronicles17:5 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan Jehosafata chu Judai ramah a lal nghehtîr ta hle a, mite chuan chhiah an rawn pe zut zut a, a hausa ta viau va, mite pawhin an ngaisâng hle." 
2Chronicles17:6 Lalpa rawngbâwl chu a châkzâwng a ni a, Judai rama an milem pathian biakna hmunsângte, Aseri limte chu a tibo vek a." 
2Chronicles17:7 Kum thum a lal hnu chuan Ben-haila te, Obadia te, Zekaria te, Nethanela te, Mikaia te chu Judai ram khawpuiah zirtîrtuah a tîr chhuak a." 
2Chronicles17:8 Levia chi mi pakua leh puithiam pahnih an kal ve a, Levia chite chu Semaia te, Nethania te, Zebadia te, Asahela te, Semiramota te, Jehonathana te, Adonija te, Tobija te, Tobadonija te an ni a, puithiamte chu Elisama leh Jehorama an ni." 
2Chronicles17:9 Lalpa dân lehkhabu chu kengin Judai ram khua chu an fang chhuak a, mite chu an zirtîr a." 
2Chronicles17:10 An vêl ram zawng zawng chu Jehosafata do ngam lo tûrin Lalpa chuan a tidawih a. 
2Chronicles17:11 Filistia mi ṭhenkhat chuan chhiahah tangkarua leh thilpêk tam tak Jehosafata chu an rawn kensak a. Arab mi ṭhenkhat pawhin berâm sângsarih leh zasarih leh kêl sângsarih leh zasarih an rawn pe bawk a. 
2Chronicles17:12 Tichuan, Jehosafata chu a lal tulh tulh a, Judai ram dung leh vângah kulhte a siam a, khawpuite a din a." 
2Chronicles17:13 Chûngah chuan ei tûr a chhêk ṭeuh bawk a. Jerusalem khuaah a sipai hotu lian huaisen tak tak chu a dah a. 
2Chronicles17:14 A chi chiin mahni chi hotu an nei a, Juda thlah sipai hotu ber chu Adna a ni, sipai nuaithum a ho va." 
2Chronicles17:15 A dawttu chu Jehohanana a ni, sipai nuaihnih leh sing riat a ho va." 
2Chronicles17:16 A pathumna chu Zikria fapa Amasia a ni, sipai nuaihnih a ho va (Amasa hi hetianga Lalpa rawngbâwl tûra inpe a ni)." 
2Chronicles17:17 Benjamin thlah sipai hotu ber chu, sipai chhuanawm tak Eliada a ni, sipai nuaihnih, âwmphaw leh thal keng a ho va." 
2Chronicles17:18 A dawttu chu Jehozabada a ni, indo inpeih reng sipai nuaikhat leh sîngriat a ho va." 
2Chronicles17:19 Judai rama kulh nei khuatea sipai a dah bâkah hêng hi Jerusalem-a a sipai awmte chu an ni. 
2Chronicles18:1 Juda lal Jehosafata chuan a lo hausaka, a hmingthan tâk hle hnu chuan Israel lal Ahaba nên inkawp zai an rêl a, an fate an inneihtîr a." 
2Chronicles18:2 Kum eng emaw zât hnuah Jehosafata chu Samaria khuaah Ahaba tlawh tûrin a chhuk a. Jehosafata leh a ṭhiante lawm nân Ahaba chuan berâm leh bâwng tam tak a talh a, ruai a ṭheh a. Gilead biala Ramot khua bei tûrin a sâwm a." 
2Chronicles18:3 “Ramot khua chu bei tûrin i kal ve thei ang em?” a ti a. Jehosafata chuan, “I inpeih hun hunah kei leh ka sipaite chu kal kan inpeih e, kan pui ang che,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:4 “ Lalpa i râwn hmasa zet ang,” a ti bawk a." 
2Chronicles18:5 Ahaba chuan zâwlnei zali dâwn lai rual chu, “Ramot khua ka bei ang nge bei lo vang?” tiin a zâwt a. Anni chuan, “Bei rawh, Pathian chuan a awmpui ang che,” an ti a." 
2Chronicles18:6 Jehosafata chuan, “Zâwlnei dang Lalpa min râwnsak thei tûr an awm lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:7 Ahaba chuan, “Mi pakhat, Imla fapa Mikaia chu a la awm a. Mahse, thil ṭha eng mah min hrilh lâwksak ngai lo va, ka haw hle a ni. Thil ṭha lo tak tak hrilh lâwk a chîng a,” a ti a. Jehosafata chuan, “Lal meuhvin chuti êma tih tûr emaw ni le?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:8 Lal chuan hotu pakhat a ko va, Mikaia hruai tûrin a tîr a." 
2Chronicles18:9 Lal pahnih chu Samaria khawpui kawngka pâwn hruihah, lalṭhutthlêng an chhawpah chuan an ṭhu a; zâwlnei rual chuan an kal hual a, thu an sawi bual bual a." 
2Chronicles18:10 An zînga pakhat, Kenaana fapa Zedekia chuan thîr, seki lem a siam a, Ahaba hnênah, “Suria-ho chu hêng nên hian i bei ang a, i tudawl dêr ang,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:11 Zâwlnei dangte pawh chuan chutiang bawk chuan an ti a. “Kal la, Ramot khua chu han bei rawh, i la ngei ang. Lalpa chuan a hnehtîr ang che,” an ti a." 
2Chronicles18:12 Mikaia hruaitu tûra an tirh chuan a hnênah, “Zâwlnei dang zawng zawngin a ṭha lamin lal hnênah thu an sawi a, nang pawhin chutiang chuan sawi ve mai ta che,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:13 Mikaia chuan, “ Lalpa, mi nung hming chhâlin ka sawi e, ka Pathianin sawi tûra min hrilh chu ka sawi ang” tiin a chhâng a." 
2Chronicles18:14 Lal Ahaba hma a va thlen chuan lal chuan, “Mikai, lal Jehosafata nên Ramot khua kan han bei ang nge bei lo vang?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:15 Mikaia chuan, “Han bei teh rêng u, in hneh mawlh ang, Lalpa chuan hnehtîr che u ang hmiang,” a ti a. Ahaba chuan, “ Lalpa hminga ka hnêna thu i sawiin thu dik chauh mi hrilh tûrin vawi eng zât nge ka hrilh dâwn che?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:16 Mikaia chuan, “Vêngtu nei lo berâm rual angin tlânga Israel-ho an darh ka hmu a ni. ‘Hêngho hian hruaitu an nei lo; mahni in lamah dam têin haw dial mai rawh se,’ Lalpa chuan a ti e,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:17 Ahaba chuan Jehosafata hnênah, “Kha maw, ka tâna thil ṭha tûr eng mah a sawi ngai lo ka tih rêng kha. Thil ṭha lo lam hlîr a ni a sawi ṭhin,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaia chuan, “ Lalpa thu hi lo ngaithla teh. Lalpa chu vâna a lalṭhuthlêngah a ṭhu ka hmu a, vântirhkohte chuan an din hual a." 
2Chronicles18:19 ‘Tu nge Ahaba chu Ramot beia thi tûrin zu bum ang?’ Lalpa chuan a ti a. Vântirhkoh ṭhenkhat chuan thu khat an sawi a, a dang chuan thu dang an sawi a." 
2Chronicles18:20 Thlarau pakhat hi a lo kal a, Lalpa hmaah a va ding a, ‘Ka zu bum ang e’ a ti a. Lalpa chuan, ‘Engtin nge i bum ang?’ a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:21 Thlarau chuan, ‘Ahaba zâwlneite chu dâwt ka zu sawitîr ang,’ a ti a. Lalpa chuan, ‘Kal la, chutiang chuan zu ti rawh, i bum ngei ang,’ a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:22 Chutiang chuan a ni Lalpa chuan hêng zâwlneiho hi i hnêna dâwt a sawitîr ni. Lalpa ngeiin i chhiatna tûr a ruat tawh a ni e,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:23 Zâwlnei Zedekia chuan Mikaia chu a va pan a, a bêng a, “Engtik lai khân nge Lalpa thlarauvin min kalsana i hnêna a awm tâk le?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaia chuan a chhâng a, “Pindan chhûngrila i bihrûk hunah i hre mai ang,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:25 Ahaba chuan hotu pakhat hnênah, “Mikaia kha man la, khaw awptu Amona hnênah hruai la, lal fapa Joasa pawh hmuhtîr ang che." 
2Chronicles18:26 Dam taka ka lo kîr leh hma chu ripah khung sela, chhang leh tui chauh pe rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaia chuan, “Dam taka i lo kîr leh hrim chuan Lalpa hian min be lo a ni ang; ka sawi hi mi tinin hre rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:28 Lal Ahaba leh lal Jehosafata chu Gilead biala Ramot khua bei tûr chuan an kal ta a. 
2Chronicles18:29 Ahaba chuan Jehosafata hnênah, “Kan inbeih hunah ka inchei danglam ang a, nang chu lal incheiin inchei zêl ang che,” a ti a. Lal Ahaba chu a inchei danglam a, an inbeihnaah chuan a tel ve ta a." 
2Chronicles18:30 Suria lal chuan tawlailîr khalhtu hotu chu, “Israel lal chauh lo chu tu mah bei suh ang che,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:31 Chûngho chuan Jehosafata an hmuh chuan Israel lal emaw an ti a, an rawn bei ta a. Jehosafata chu a au chiam a, Lalpa Pathian chuan a rawn chhâng a, a rawn beitute chu a tihkîrsak a." 
2Chronicles18:32 Tawlailîr khalh hotute chuan Israel lal a ni lo tih an hriat chuan an ûm duh ta lo va. 
2Chronicles18:33 Suria sipai thal kâp mai mai hian lal Ahaba chu a râlthuam inkârah a kâp fuh palh a. A tawlailîr khalhtu hnênah chuan, “Hliam ka tuar e, lêt la, inbeihna hmun ata tlân chhuak rawh,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles18:34 An inbeih mup mup chhûng chuan Ahaba chu a tawlailîrah chuan Suria mite lam hawiin a ṭhu a, ni a tlâk chuan a thi ta a." 
2Chronicles19:1 Jerusalem-a a inah Jehosafata chu dam takin a haw a. 
2Chronicles19:2 Zâwlnei pakhat, Hanana fapa, Jehua chuan lal chu a hmu a, a hnênah, “Mi sual ṭanpuia Lalpa hawtute lama ṭan hi dik i ti em ni? I thiltih hian Lalpa thin a tiur hle a ni." 
2Chronicles19:3 Chuti chung pawhin ṭhat vena zawng i nei e; miin an biak Aseri lim zawng zawng i ti bo va, Pathian duhzâwng zawn i tum hi,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles19:4 Jehosafata chu Jerusalem-ah a awm a, a taima hle a; chhim tâwp Beer-seba aṭanga hmâr lam Efraim tlâng tâwp thlengin a khuate chu an thlahtute Lalpa Pathian lama hawi kîrtîr tumin a tlawh ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles19:5 Judai rama kulh nei khuaah tawh phawt chuan rorêltute a dah a, hetiang hian a hrilh zêl a:" 
2Chronicles19:6 “Thu pawtchat mai mai suh ang che u, in hna hi mihring thu-a thawk in ni lo va, Lalpa thu-a rêl in ni a, in thu rêl chu Lalpa rêl a ni tih hria ang che u." 
2Chronicles19:7 Lalpa chu ṭih ula, fîmkhur takin engkim ti ang che u, Lalpa, kan Pathian chuan hlêprûk te, hleih neih te, thamna lâk te a hua a ni,” a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Chronicles19:8 Jerusalem khuaah chuan Levia chite, Puithiamte leh khaw hotu deuh ṭhenkhat chu rorêltu atân a ruat a; Lalpa dân bawhchhiat thu te, vântlâng zînga thubuai ngaihtuahtu tûr an ni." 
2Chronicles19:9 Heti hian a ti a, “ Lalpa ṭih chungin in hna hi in thawk tûr a ni; in tih apiang rinawm takin ti zêl ang che u." 
2Chronicles19:10 Khawii khua aṭang pawhin in chipuiten mihring thah thu emaw, dân leh thupêk bawhchhiat thu emaw an rawn thlen chuan, an thu ngaihtuah chhûnga an awm dân tûr ngun takin hrilh ṭhîn ang che u; tichuan, Lalpa lakah thil sual in ti dâwn lo nia." 
2Chronicles19:11 Sakhaw lam thilah chuan puithiam lalber Amaria thu a lalber ang a, khawtlâng thilah chuan Judai ram awptu thu a lal ber a ni. Levia chite hian hêng rorêltute thu hi an kengkawh tûr a ni. Huai takin hêng hi zâwm sela, Lalpa chu mi dik lamah a ṭang ṭhîn a ni,” tiin." 
2Chronicles20:1 Nakin deuhvah chuan Moab leh Amon-ho chuan an kawppui Meun-ho nên Jehosafata ram chu rûn tûrin an lo thawk a. 
2Chronicles20:2 Mi ṭhenkhat an lo kal a, Jehosafata hnênah, “Tuipui Thi râla, Edom ram aṭangin sipai tam takin an rawn bei dâwn a che, Hazazon-tamar khua pawh an la dêr tawh,” an ti a (Chu khua chu Engedi tih a ni bawk)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Jehosafata chu a thlaphâng hle a, thil tih dân tûrah Lalpa chu a râwn a. Ram pumah chaw nghei tûr a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:4 Judai ram khaw tin aṭangin Lalpa râwn tûrin Jerusalem-ah mi an lo kal zut zut a. 
2Chronicles20:5 Chûngho leh Jerusalem-a mite chu Tempul tual siam tharah chuan an pung khâwm a, lal Jehosafata chu an hmaah a va ding a." 
2Chronicles20:6 Ring takin a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, min thlahtute Pathian, thiltithei tak i ni, tu ma chelh rual i ni lo." 
2Chronicles20:7 He rama lo awm ṭhînte kha i mi Israel-te hmaah i hnawt chhuak a, i ṭhian, Abrahama thlahte neih kumkhua atân i pe a ni lâwm ni kha, aw kan Pathian?" 
2Chronicles20:8 He ramah hian an awm ta a, nangmah biakna tûr Hmun Thianghlim an sa a." 
2Chronicles20:9 Min hrem nân indona te, hri te, ṭâm te, thil ṭha lo tinrêng te lo thleng mah se, nangmah biakna tûra i ruat he in kawtah hian kan ding ang a, kan mangannaah chuan kan au vang che a, nangin min ngaihthlâksakin min chhanhim ang,’ an ti a." 
2Chronicles20:10 Min thlahtute Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah pawh khân Amon-ho te, Moab-ho te, Edom-ho te kha rûn i phal lo va, an rama kal i phalsak lo va. Kan pute chuan an ram chu an kal hual a, an tichhe lo a nih kha." 
2Chronicles20:11 Ngai teh, tûnah hian ro atâna ram min pêk ata min hnawh chhuah tumin an lo thawh tâk thung hi." 
2Chronicles20:12 Aw kan Pathian, an chungah ro han rêl teh; min bei tûr sipaite hi an tam êm a, kan chêt theih tâk hlek lah hi. Tihngaihna rêng kan hre ta lo va, i hmaah kan rawn thlen ngawt mai a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:13 Judai ram mi zawng zawng chu an nupui fanaute nên Tempul kawtah chuan an ding a. 
2Chronicles20:14 Chuta awm ve Levia chi mi pakhat, Zekaria fapa Jahaziela chungah Lalpa thlarau a lo thleng a. Ani chu Asafa thlaha mi a ni a, Zekaria chu Benaia fa a ni a. Benaia chu Jeiela fa a ni a, Jeiela chu Matania fa a ni." 
2Chronicles20:15 Jahaziela chuan, “Judai ram mi zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a chêngte leh nang, Jehosafat, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, ‘Sipai an tam avângin zâm suh ula, huphurh hek suh u. Indona chu Pathian kuta awm a ni, in kuta awm a ni lo." 
2Chronicles20:16 Naktûkah Zif kalkhâna an lo chho chu lo bei ang che u. Phaizâwl thlen hmaa Jeruel bul, ram chhengchhe laiah lo châng ang che u." 
2Chronicles20:17 In beih a ṭûl lo vang. In awmna tûrah chuan lo châng ringawt mai rawh u. Lalpa chuan a hnehsak dâwn che u a ni. Judai ram leh Jerusalem mite u, zâm suh ula, huphurh hek suh u, bei tûrin thawk chhuak rawh u, Lalpa chu in lamah a ṭang e,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:18 Lal Jehosafata chu a bawkkhup a, mipui pawh an kûn a; Lalpa chibai an bûk a." 
2Chronicles20:19 Levia chi, Kohata leh Kora pâwlte chu an ding a, Israel-te Pathian Lalpa chu fakin ring takin an zai a." 
2Chronicles20:20 A tûkah chuan zîng takah an tho va, Tekoa khaw bul ram chhengchhe lam an pan a. Chutia an kal chhuah dâwn lai chuan Jehosafatan an hnênah, “Juda leh Jerusalem tlangvâlte u, Lalpa, in Pathian chu rinchhan ula, in dingchang ang. A zâwlnei thu sawi kha ring ula, in hlawhtling ang,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:21 Lal chuan mite chu a berâwn a, Levia chi zaipâwlte chu hun serha an hâk tûr thawmhnawte inbela sipaiho hma hruai tûrin a ti a; ‘ Lalpa chu fak rawh u, kumkhuain ngil a nei si a,’ ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles20:22 Chutia Pathian faka hla an han sak lai chuan Juda-te bei tûra lo thawk Amon-ho te, Moab-ho te, Edom-ho te châng ru tûrin Lalpan a dah a; tichuan, an hmaah chuan an hmelmate chu an tlâwm ta a." 
2Chronicles20:23 Amon-ho leh Moab-ho chuan Edom-ho chu an bei a, an that phiar a; anmahni leh anmahni pawh chu intiboral tûrin an inbei ve leh ta chiam a." 
2Chronicles20:24 Judai ram sipaiten thlalêr in sâng an va thlen chuan, an hmêlmate lam chu an han thlîr a. An za chuan leiah an tlu thal phung a, an lo thi vek mai a, pakhat mah tlân chhuak an awm lo va ni." 
2Chronicles20:25 Jehosafata leh a hote chu râllâk sum la tûrin an kal a. Chûng zîngah chuan bâwng tam tak te, ei tûr te, thawmhnaw te leh thil hlu tak tak an hmu ṭeuh va. Râllâk sum lâk tûr a tam khawp a, ni thum chhûng ngawt an la khâwm a, an phurh sên loh khawp an la a ni." 
2Chronicles20:26 A ni li ni chuan ‘Beraka’ ruamah an pung khâwm a, an tâna a thiltih zawng zawng avângin Lalpa chu an fak a; chuvâng chuan chu hmun chu ‘Beraka’’ an ti ta a ni." 
2Chronicles20:27 Lalpa chuan an hmêlmate a hnehsak tâk avâng chuan Jehosafata leh a hote chu hlim takin Jerusalem-ah an haw ta a. 
2Chronicles20:28 Jerusalem an thlen dâwn chuan ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te leh tawtawrâwt ri te nên Tempul an pan a." 
2Chronicles20:29 Lalpa Pathianin Israel-te chu an hmêlmate a dosak tih an chhehvêl hnamte chuan an lo hriatin Pathian chu an hlau ta a. 
2Chronicles20:30 Jehosafata chu râlmuang takin a lal a, Lalpa chuan kil tinah a vêng tlat a ni." 
2Chronicles20:31 Kum sawmthum leh panga a nihin Jehosafata chu Judai ramah a lo lal a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh panga a lal a. A nu chu Azubai, Silhia fanu a ni." 
2Chronicles20:32 A pa Asa ang bawk khân Lalpa hmaah thil ṭha a ti a. 
2Chronicles20:33 Amaherawhchu, hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsâng a tichhe vek lo va, mipuite pawhin an thlahtute Pathian biak an la uar tehchiam hek lo." 
2Chronicles20:34 Jehosafata thil tih dang zawng zawng, a lal tirh aṭanga a thih thleng thu chu Hanania fapa ‘Jehua chanchin’ tih bu-ah ziak vek a ni. Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu zîngah a tel." 
2Chronicles20:35 Chumi hnuah chuan Judai ram lal Jehosafata leh Israel lal Ahazia, thil dik lo ti ṭhîntu chu ṭhianah an insiam a." 
2Chronicles20:36 Ezion-geberah Tarsis khuaa kal tûr lawng rual an tuk a. 
2Chronicles20:37 Maresa khaw mi, Dodavahua fapa Eliezara chuan Jehosafata hnênah, “Israel lal Ahazia te i thurualpui avângin Lalpa chuan i thil tih a tichhia ang,” a ti a. An lawng rual chu a keh zo va, Tarsis khuaa kal tûr awzâwng a awm ta lo va." 
2Chronicles21:1 Jehosafata chu a thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a, a fapa Jehorama chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Chronicles21:2 Judai ram lal Jehosafata fapa Jehorama chuan nau paruk - Azaria te, Jehiela te, Zekaria te, Azaria te, Mikaela te, Sefatia te a nei a." 
2Chronicles21:3 An pa chuan rangkachakte leh ro hlu tam tâwk tak a pe ṭheuh va, Judai ram khawpui kulh nei, an enkawl tûr a ruatsak vek bawk a. Jehorama chu a fapa upa ber a nih avângin Jehosafata chuan a aiah a laltîr a." 
2Chronicles21:4 Jehorama chu a han lal ngheh chuan, a naute chu a thahtîr vek a. Israel zînga hotu ṭhenkhat pawh a thahtîr bawk a." 
2Chronicles21:5 Kum sawmthum leh pahnih a nihin Jehorama chu a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum riat a lal a." 
2Chronicles21:6 Israel lal Ahaba leh lal dang sual tak tak angin a awm ve a, Ahaba fanu pawh nupuiah a nei a ni. Lalpa chungah thil sual a ti a." 
2Chronicles21:7 Mahse, Lalpa chuan Davida hnêna a thuthlung avâng leh a thlahte chu laltîr reng a tiam tlat avângin Davida thlahte chu a tiral mai hreh a ni." 
2Chronicles21:8 Jehorama lal laiin Juda-ho lakah Edom-ho chu an hel a, lal an nei hrang ta a." 
2Chronicles21:9 Jehorama leh a hote chuan sakawr-tawlailîr nên Edom chu an va rûn a. Edom sipaite chuan an lo hual a; mahse, zân khaw thimah an pût ru thei hrâm a." 
2Chronicles21:10 Chuta chin chu Edom chuan Juda-ho hnuaia awm lovin tûn thlengin lal hran an nei ta reng a ni. Jehorama chuan, Lalpa, a thlahtute Pathian chu a ngaihsak loh avângin chutih hun lai vêl bawk chuan Libna khua chu an hel a." 
2Chronicles21:11 Judai ram tlângramah pathian dang biakna hmunsâng a siam thluah nghe nghe a. Judai ram leh Jerusalem mite chu Lalpa laka hela, thil sual ti tûrin a kaihruai a." 
2Chronicles21:12 Zâwlnei Eliza chuan lehkha a thawn a, “I thlahtu Davida Pathian, Lalpa chuan i pa Jehosafata leh i pu Juda lal Asa te awm dân ang khân i awm ve loh avângin a thiam lo che a ni." 
2Chronicles21:13 Israel lalte khawsak dân angin i khawsa zâwk hlauh va, Ahaban Israel mite pathian dang hnêna a uirepui ang khân nang pawhin Judai ram mi leh Jerusalem mite chu i uirepui a. Nang aia ṭha ṭha, i naute lah i that vek bawk a." 
2Chronicles21:14 Hemi avâng hian Lalpa chuan i mite, i fa te, i nupui te hripuiin a hrem dâwn, i neih zawng zawng a tihchhiatsak ang che." 
2Chronicles21:15 Nangmah ngei pawhin rîl natna benvawn na tak i tuar ang a, ni tin a zual tulh tulh ang,” tiin." 
2Chronicles21:16 Filistia mi leh Arab mi ṭhenkhat, tuipui kama Ethiopia mi lo awmte bulah an awm a. Lalpa chuan chûngho chu Jehorama bei tûrin a chawk tho va." 
2Chronicles21:17 Judai ram chu an han rûn ta a. Lal inte chu an rawk a, lal nupuite leh a fapate chu salah an man vek a. A fa tlum Ahazia erawh chu an man ve lo." 
2Chronicles21:18 Chumi hnu chuan Lalpa chuan an lal pum chu a tina chiam a," 
2Chronicles21:19 kum hnih dâwn lai chu a ni têlin a na tulh tulh a, a rîl a tla ta a, na tak tuarin lal chu a thi ta a. A pute thiha an tih angin a thih chuan a mite chuan amah sûn nân meipui an chhep ve lo." 
2Chronicles21:20 Jehorama chu kum sawmthum leh pahnih a nihin a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum riat a lal a, a thihin pawi an ti lo. Davida khawpuiah chuan an phûm a, lal thlânah erawh chuan an phûm lo." 
2Chronicles22:1 Arab mi ṭhenkhatin Jehorama chu an rûn a, a fa tlum Ahazia tih loh a fapa dang zawng zawng chu an thahsak avângin Jerusalem mite chuan a pa aiawh tûrin Ahazia chu lalah an siam a." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahazia chu kum sawmhnih leh pahnih mi a nihin a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum khat a lal a. A nu chu Athali, Israel lal Ahaba fanu, Omria tunu a ni." 
2Chronicles22:3 Ani pawh a nu thurâwn ṭha lo tak a zawm ṭhîn avângin Ahaba chhûngte khawsak angin a khawsa ve ṭhîn a ni. 
2Chronicles22:4 Lalpa hmuha thil sual a ti ṭhîn. A pa thih hnu chuan Ahaba chhûngte zînga mi ṭhenkhat chu a thu lâkna ber an ni ta a, a chhiat phah ta nghe nghe a ni." 
2Chronicles22:5 An thurâwn angin Suria lal Hazaela do tûrin Israel lal Ahaba fapa Jorama a thurualpui a, Gilead biala Ramot khua an beih a, an inbeihnaah lal Jorama chu an hliam a." 
2Chronicles22:6 Ramoth-gilead-a Suria lal Hazaela a va beihnaa a hliam enkawl dam tûrin Jezreel-ah chuan a lo kîr a. Tichuan, Juda lal Jehorama fapa Ahazia chu Ahaba fapa Jorama dam lo tlawh tûrin Jezreel-ah a zu kal a." 
2Chronicles22:7 Jorama a va tlawh chu Pathianin Ahazia chhiatna tûra a thil ruat a ni. An awm dun lai chuan mi pakhat Nimsia fapa Jehua a lo kal a; ani hi Ahaba chi timang tûra Lalpa mi tirh a ni. 
2Chronicles22:8 Jehua chuan Ahaba thlahte chunga kut a thlâk lai chuan Jorama dam lo en tûr Ahazia ho - Juda hotute leh Ahazia laichînte chu Jehua chuan a hmu a, a that ve ta vek a." 
2Chronicles22:9 Ahazia chu a han zawng a, Samaria khuaah a lo biru a, Jehua hnênah an hruai a, a lo that ta a. Theihtâwp chhuaha Lalpa zawng ṭhîntu a pu Jehosafata chu an zah avângin a ruang chu ṭha takin an phûm a. Ahazia chhûng zînga mi lal tûr rêng an awm ta lo." 
2Chronicles22:10 A nu Athali chuan Ahazia tualthih thu a hriat veleh Judai lal chhûngte zawng zawng a thahtîr a. 
2Chronicles22:11 Ahazia khân farnu Jehosebi a nei a, puithiam Jehoiada chu pasalah a nei a. Ahazia fapa pakhat, Joasa chu, a rûkin a hum a, lal fa dang, tualthi mai tûrte zîng ata chu a la chhuak a, Tempula mutna pindan pakhatah a thukru a, a enkawl ta a. A thuhrûk tlat avângin Athali chuan a that ve lo." 
2Chronicles22:12 Chutah chuan kum ruk a thukru a, Athali chu lalah a ṭang ta a." 
2Chronicles23:1 A kum sarihnaah chuan puithiam Jehoiada leh sipai za hotu pangate chu an inrâwn ngam ta a. Chûng mite chu Jehorama fapa Azaria te, Jehohanana fapa Ismaela te, Obeda fapa Azaria te, Adaia fapa Maaseia te, Zikria fapa Elisafata te an ni." 
2Chronicles23:2 Judai ram an fang kual a, Levia chite leh hnam hruaitute chu Jerusalem-ah an hruai khâwm a." 
2Chronicles23:3 Tempulah chuan an kal khâwm a, Joasa, lal fapa nên chuan thu an intiam a. Jehoiada chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan Davida thlahte chu lal tûrin a ruat a, hei hi lal thi ta-a fapa, lal tûra chu a ni." 
2Chronicles23:4 Hetiang hian thil kan ti ang: Sabat nia lo kal ṭhîn puithiamte leh Levia chi hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chuan Tempul kawngkhârte an vêng ang a. 
2Chronicles23:5 Hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chuan lal in an vêng ang a, a dang zawng zawng chu ‘Lungphûm’ kawngkhâr bulah an awm tûr a ni. Mipui chu Tempul tualah an lo kal khâwm tûr a ni." 
2Chronicles23:6 Tempul chhûngah puithiam leh Levia chi, rawngbâwl lai tih loh chu, tu mah an lût tûr a ni lo. Anni chu serh hran an ni a, an lût thei ang; mi dang erawh chu Lalpa thu awihin an lût tûr a ni lo." 
2Chronicles23:7 Levia chite chuan lal hi an din hual ang a, khandaih phawi sa kengin an vêng tûr a ni, lal kalna apiangah an zui zêl tûr a ni. Tempula luh tum tawh phawt chu thah tûr an ni,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles23:8 Jehoiada chuan châwl tûrte chu a la chawlhtîr loh avângin, Sabat nia rawngbâwl tûrte leh châwl tûrte pawh chu an rawn hruai vek a," 
2Chronicles23:9 Davidan Tempula a dah, fei leh phawte chu Jehoiada chuan sipai hotute hnênah a sem a." 
2Chronicles23:10 Tempul kawtah khandaih phawi sa kengin mi a din kualtîr a, lal chu a vêntîr tlat a." 
2Chronicles23:11 Jehoiada chuan Joasa chu a hruai chhuak a, lal tih tûr dân bu chu a pe a, lalah an siam ta a. Puithiam Jehoiada leh a hote chuan Joasa chu hriak an thih a, “Lal hi dam reng rawh se,” tiin an au va." 
2Chronicles23:12 Athali chuan lal an chawimawi thâwm chu a han hriat chuan mipui punkhâwmna Tempul lam chu a pan a. 
2Chronicles23:13 Lal thar chu lal dinna tûra an ruat Tempul chhûng luhna kiang ban bula a ding chu a han hmu a, sipai hotute leh tawtawrâwtpute chuan an din hual a. Mipui chu hlim takin an au dual dual a, tawtawrâwt an hâm a, Tempul zaipâwlte chuan an thil tum rîkte nên zai an hruai a. Chûng chu a han hmuhin mangangin a puan a pawtthlêr a, “Min phiarru a lo nih hi,” tiin a au va." 
2Chronicles23:14 Jehoiada chuan Tempula thah a duh lo va, sipai hotute chu a ko va, “Vêngtu sipai kârah rawn hruai chhuak ula, chhan tum apiang chu lo that zêl ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles23:15 Athali chu an man a, lal in lamah an hruai a, Sakawr kawngkhâr an tih bulah chuan an that ta a." 
2Chronicles23:16 Lalpa mi ni ngei tûrin puithiam Jehoiada chuan lal Joasa leh mipui chu thu a thlunpui a. 
2Chronicles23:17 Baal an biakna hmunah chuan an za-in an kal a, an ṭhiat ta a. Maichâm chu an tichim a, milemte chu an chhu keh a, Baal puithiam Matana chu maichâm bulah an that a." 
2Chronicles23:18 Jehoiada chuan puithiamte leh Levia chite chu Tempula an hna tûr a thawhtîr a, lal Davida remruat angin tih tûr an semsak a, Mosia dân bu-a ziak angin Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlante an hlân a. Rimawi tum te, zai te leh zai hruai te pawh an tih tûr a ni." 
2Chronicles23:19 Jehoiada chuan Tempul kawngkhârte pawh a vêntîr a, mi bawlhhlawh tu mah an luhtîr tûr a ni lo." 
2Chronicles23:20 Sipai hotute, ram hruaitute leh mipuite chuan Jehoiada hovin kawng an zawh a. Lal chu Tempul aṭangin lal inah an hruai a, kawngkapuiah an luhpui a, lalṭhutthlêngah chuan lal chu a ṭhu ta a." 
2Chronicles23:21 Mi zawng zawng chu an hlim hle a ni. Athali chu khandaiha an thah tâk avângin khuaah chuan buaina a reh ta a. 
2Chronicles24:1 Joasa chu kum sarih a nihin Judai ramah a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmli a lal a, a nu chu Zibi, Beer-seba mi a ni," 
2Chronicles24:2 Puithiam Jehoiada dam chhûng chuan Joasa chuan Lalpa lawmzâwng hlîr a ti ṭhîn. 
2Chronicles24:3 Jehoiada chuan lal Joasa chu nupui pahnih a neihsak a, fanu leh fapa an hrinsak ṭeuh va." 
2Chronicles24:4 Chûng hnuah chuan Joasa chuan Tempul chei ṭhat zai a rêl ta a. 
2Chronicles24:5 Puithiam leh Levia chite chu Judai ram khawpuite a fantîr a, kum tina Tempul chei ṭhatna daih tûr thawhlâwm a khawntîr a. Hmanhmawh tûrin a ti a; mahse, Levia chite chu an vuaicha hle a." 
2Chronicles24:6 Tichuan, Jehoiada chu a ko va, “Levia chite hian Judai ram leh Jerusalem mite hnên aṭangin ‘Biakbûk’ enkawlna tûr Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia tuk kha an khawn ṭhat leh ṭhat loh engati nge i enpui loh?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles24:7 Mi sualnu Athali zuitute kha Tempulah an lût lui a, thil thianghlim tam tak Baal biaknaa hmanah an la chhuak a ni." 
2Chronicles24:8 Lal chuan Levia chite chu thawhlâwm bâwm siama, Tempul luhna kawngkhâr bula dah tûrin a ti a." 
2Chronicles24:9 Jerusalem leh Judai ram zawng zawngah Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosian thlalêra mipui thawh tûr bi a ruat ang kha rawn keng zêl tûrin thu an than a. 
2Chronicles24:10 Mipuite leh an hruaitute chuan lâwm takin thawh tûr bituk zât chu an rawn keng a, bâwm chu an thlâk khat ta hial a." 
2Chronicles24:11 Levia chite chuan bâwm chu ni tin, a enkawltu tûra lalin a ruat hnênah chuan an rawn dah ṭhîn a; bâwm chu a khah veleh puithiam lalber Jehoiada aiawhtu leh lal mi ruat ziaktu chuan an lo la chhuak a, bâwm chu a dahnaah an dah kîr leh ṭhîn. Tangka tam tâwk tak an thawh khâwm ta a." 
2Chronicles24:12 Lal leh Jehoiada chuan Tempul chei ṭhat hna enkawltute hnênah pawisa chu an pe chhuak ṭhîn a; annin lung chher mi te, thing dek thiam te, thîrdêng te Tempul chei ṭha tûr chuan an ruai a." 
2Chronicles24:13 Ngawrh takin mistiri te chuan hna an thawk a, Tempul chu a tîra mi anga nghet khân an chei ṭha leh ta a." 
2Chronicles24:14 Hna thawh tûr an tih zawh chuan rangkachak leh tangkarua an hman bâng chu lal Joasa leh puithiam lalber Jehoiada an pe a; anni chuan Tempula rawngbâwl nân leh hâlral thil hlanna atân bungbêl te, rimtui hâlna thlêng te, rangkachak leh tangkarua a siam bungbêl te siam nân an lo hmang a. Jehoiada dam chhûng chu ni tin Tempulah chuan thilhlan an hlân ziah ṭhîn a." 
2Chronicles24:15 Tarkûnin a dam a, kum za leh sawmthum a tlinin a thi ta a." 
2Chronicles24:16 Israel mite zîngah Pathian tân leh Tempul tân thil a tih ṭhat êm avângin Davida khawpuia lal thlânah an phûm ve ta a. 
2Chronicles24:17 Jehoiada a thih tâk hnu chuan Judai ram mipui hruaitute chuan an thu ngaithla zâwk tûrin lal chu an hmin ta a. 
2Chronicles24:18 Mipui chuan an thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chu Tempulah chuan an be duh ta lo va, milem te, pathiannu Aseri lemte an be ta zâwk a. An sualna avângin Judai ram mite leh Jerusalem mite chungah Lalpa chu a thinur ta hle a." 
2Chronicles24:19 Lalpa chuan anni chu hruai kîr tûrin zâwlneite a tîr a; mahse, mite chuan an thu an lo ngaithla duh lo." 
2Chronicles24:20 Puithiam lalber Jehoiada fapa Zekaria hnênah Pathian thlarau a lo thleng a, mipuiin an hmuh theihna tûrah chuan a ding a, ring takin a au va, “ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Engtizia nge ka thupêkte zâwm duh lovin mahni chungah chhiatna in thlentîr dâwn le? Lalpa chu in kalsan avângin ani pawhin a kalsan che u a ni,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles24:21 Zekaria chu an er hle a, lal thupêkin Tempul tualah chuan lungin an dêng hlum ta a." 
2Chronicles24:22 Lal chuan Zekaria pa Jehoiada kha a tân a ṭangkaizia kha a theihnghilh a, Zekaria chu a tihhlumtîr ta mai a ni. Zekaria thi tûr chuan, “I thil tih hi Lalpa chuan hmu sela, phuba la teh se,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles24:23 Kum a lo thar chuan Suria sipaite chuan Judai ram leh Jerusalem an rawn rûn a, hotu tam tak an that a, râllâk sum tam tak Damaska khuaah an hâwn a." 
2Chronicles24:24 Suria sipaite chu an tlêm hle nâ a, an aia tam daih Juda sipaite chu an hneh a ni. An thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chu an kalsan avângin an chak lo va, Lal Joasa pawhin a tuar phah ta a ni." 
2Chronicles24:25 Joasa chuan hliam na tak a tuar a, hmêlmate chuan an kalsan ta a, a hote pahnih an inthurual a, puithiam lalber Jehoiada fapate a thah phuba chu an la a, khuma a mu chu an that a; lal thlânah ni lo, Davida khawpuiah an phûm ta a." 
2Chronicles24:26 Inthuruala thattute kha Amon mi Simeata fapa Zabada leh Moab mi Simriti fapa Jehozabada te an ni. 
2Chronicles24:27 Lalte lehkhabu hrilhfiahna bu-ah Joasa chanchin te, a chungchânga zâwlnei thu hril lâwk te, Tempul a chei ṭhat thu te a chuang. A fapa Amazia chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Chronicles25:1 Kum sawmhnih leh panga a nihin Amazia chu a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh pakua a lal a, a nu chu Jerusalem chhuak Jehoadini a ni." 
2Chronicles25:2 Lalpa duhzâwng a ti ṭhîn; mahse, hreh tak chungin a ni a tih ṭhin ni." 
2Chronicles25:3 Lala a ṭhut ngheh veleh a pa thattute kha a that ve a. 
2Chronicles25:4 An fate erawh chu a khawih lo, Mosia Dân bu-a Lalpa thu, ‘Nu leh pate chu an fate sualna avânga tihhlum tûr an ni lo; fate pawh an pate sualna avânga tihhlum tûr an ni lo; anmahni sualna avâng chauhvin mi tihhlum tûr an ni,’ tih kha a zâwm a ni." 
2Chronicles25:5 Lal Amazia chuan Juda mite leh Benjamin mite chu a chi chiin sipai pâwl hrang hrangah a siam a; sâng rual te, za rual te hotu tûr a ruat thliah bawk a. Mipa kum sawmhnih chin chung lam chu an tel vek a ni, an vaiin nuaithum an tling." 
2Chronicles25:6 Hêngho bâkah hmâr lam Israel-ho, mi nuai khat, tangkarua kg. sângthum leh zali bûk laiin a ruai bawk a." 
2Chronicles25:7 Nimahsela, lal hnênah chuan zâwlnei pakhat a lo kal a, “Israel sipaite hi hruai ve suh. Hêng Hmâr lam ram mite lamah hian Lalpa chu a ṭang lo ve." 
2Chronicles25:8 Indonaah i chak phah i inbeisei a ni ang e. Indonaa chak leh chak loh hi Pathian thu thu a ni asin; hmêlmaten an hneh phah zâwk ang che,” a rawn ti a." 
2Chronicles25:9 Amazia chuan zâwlnei hnênah, “Tangka ka pêk tawh zozai kha engtin nge ni ta ang?” a ti a. Zâwlnei chuan, “ Lalpa chuan a aia tam zâwk a pe leh thei che alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles25:10 Amazia chuan a sipai rawih, Efraim ram aṭanga lo kalte chu a bân a, a hawtîr ta a; Juda-ho chunga thinrim engphiarin an haw ta a." 
2Chronicles25:11 Amazia chuan huphurh lo deuhvin a sipaite chu Chi Ruamah a kalpui a. Edom sipaite nên chuan an inbei a, mi sîngkhat an that a." 
2Chronicles25:12 Mi sîngkhat an man bawk a; Sela khaw khâm kovah chuan an hruai a, an nam thla a, an tlahlum ta vek a." 
2Chronicles25:13 Amazian indonaa kal ve a phal loh sipai a tirh hâwnte khân Samaria leh Beth-horon inkâra Juda khawpuite chu an bei a, mi sângthum zet an that a, râllâk sum tam tak an la a." 
2Chronicles25:14 Amazian Edom-ho a hneh a, a lo haw chuan, an milemte a rawn hâwn a, a dahna a siam a, chibai a bûk a, an hmaah rimtui a hâl ta a." 
2Chronicles25:15 Hei vâng hian Lalpa chu a thinur a, Amazia hnênah zâwlnei a tîr a. Zâwlnei chuan, “I laka an mite pawh chhan thei hlei lo hnam dang pathiante chu engtizia nge i biak tâk mai?” a ti a." 
2Chronicles25:16 Lal chuan, “Engtik lai khân nge lal thurâwntu atân ka ruat che le? Ngawi mai rawh, ka that mai tûr che a nia,” a ti a. Zâwlnei chuan, “Ka thurâwn ngaithla lova hêng hi i tih avângin Pathianin tihboral che a tum tih ka hre ta,” a ti a, a ngawihsan ta a." 
2Chronicles25:17 Judai lal Amazia leh a upate chuan Israel beih an rawt a, Jehua fapa, Jehoahaza fa Israel lal Jehoasa hnênah, “Pa leh pa, i han inbei teh ang,” tia cho tûrin mi a tîr a." 
2Chronicles25:18 Jehoasa chuan hetiang hian a chhâng a, “ ‘Vawi khat chu Lebanon tlânga lenhlîng hian Lebanon sidar thing hnênah, ‘ka fapa nupuiah i fanu min pe rawh,’ a ti a. Ramsa veivâkin lenhlîng chu a pal thlu ta mai a.’" 
2Chronicles25:19 Amazia, Edom mite i zu hneh hi i chhuang a nih vei hi; inah tawm hle hle mai rawh. Nang leh i mite tâna pawi tûr thil chawkchhuak mah ta che,” a lo ti a." 
2Chronicles25:20 Amazia chuan a thu chu a pawisa lo va, Edom mite pathian lem a biak avângin Pathianin Israel-ho kuta pêk a lo tum a ni." 
2Chronicles25:21 Israel lal Jehoasa leh Juda lal Amazia chu inbei tûrin an thawkchhuak a; Judai ram Beth-semes khaw bulah an inbei ta a. 
2Chronicles25:22 Juda sipaite chu an chak lo ta zâwk a, mahni in lam panin an tlânchhia a." 
2Chronicles25:23 Israel lal Jehoasa chuan Juda lal Amazia, Joasa fapa, Ahazia tupa chu a man a, Jerusalem-ah a hruai a; khawpui kulh bang chu ‘Efraim kawngkhâr aṭanga bangkil kawngkhâr’ an tih thlengin kulh bang tawng zali chu a ṭhiat a." 
2Chronicles25:24 Râllâk sumah Tempula rangkachak leh tangkaruate, Obed-edoma thlahten an vên ṭhin Tempul bungbêl leh lal ina sum dah ṭhatte chu a hâwn a, dahkhama hrên tûr mi a hruai hâwng bawk a." 
2Chronicles25:25 Juda lal Amazia chu Israel lal Jehoasa ai chuan kum sâwm leh pangain a dam rei zâwk a. 
2Chronicles25:26 A lal tirh aṭanga a lal tâwp thlenga Amazia thil tihte chu ‘Israel leh Juda lalte chanchin’ tih ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Chronicles25:27 Lalpa laka a hel chinah kha chuan amah thah tum Jerusalem khaw mi an awm zeuh zeuh reng a ni. A tâwpah phei chuan Lakis khuaah a tlân a; mahse, a hmêlmate chuan an ûmzui a, an va that ta tho va." 
2Chronicles25:28 A ruang chu sakawr an phurhtîr a, Davida khawpuiah lal thlânah an phûm ta a." 
2Chronicles26:1 Judai ram mi zawng zawng chuan kum sâwm leh paruka upa Amazia fapa Uzia chu a pa aiawha lal tûrin an thlang a. 
2Chronicles26:2 Amazia thih hnuin Uzia hian Elat khua hi a la lêt leh a, Judai ram a belhin a din ṭha a ni." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uzia chu kum sâwm leh paruk a nihin a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh pahnih a lal a. A nu chu Jerusalem mi Jekoli a ni." 
2Chronicles26:4 Amazia angin Lalpa lawmzâwng a ti ṭhîn. 
2Chronicles26:5 Pathian thu lama kaihruaitu Zekaria dam chhûng chuan Lalpa chu a pawm tlat a, Pathian pawhin a tihmuingîl a." 
2Chronicles26:6 Uzia chuan Filistia-ho chu a rûn a, Gath khaw kulh bang te, Jabne leh Asdod kulh bang te pawh a tichhia a; Askelon bulah leh Filistia ram hmun hrang hrangah kulh a siam a." 
2Chronicles26:7 Pathian chuan Filistia mi te, Gurbaal-a awm Arab-ho te leh Meun-ho te chu a hnehpui a," 
2Chronicles26:8 Amon-ho pawhin Uzia hnênah chhiah an chawi a; a lo ropui a, Aigupta ram thlengin a hming a thang ta a." 
2Chronicles26:9 Jerusalem kulh bang chu a thuam thar bawk a; ‘Bangkil kawngkhâr’ an tihah te, ‘Ruam kawngkhâr’ an tihah te, kulh kawina lai kawngkhârah te in sâng a sa a." 
2Chronicles26:10 Ram palailêngah te pawh kulh nei khua a din a; tui a lai chhuak thluah bawk a ni; khawthlang lam, tlang ṭhut phairuamah bâwng a vulh ṭeuh bawk a. Lo neih lamah a tui hle a, tlângramah pawh grepte a phuntîr a, phai ram ṭhate chu leiletah a neihtîr a." 
2Chronicles26:11 Sipai tam tak, indo thei mai a nei reng a. An chanchin ziakna chu ziaktu Jeiela leh Maaseian, lal milian Hanania hovin an vawng a." 
2Chronicles26:12 Hotu sânghnih leh zarukin a sipaite chu an ho va. 
2Chronicles26:13 An hnuaiah chuan sipai chak tak, râl bei mai thei nuaithum leh sângsarih leh zanga a nei bawk a." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uzia chuan a sipaite chu phaw te, fei te, thîrlukhum te, thîrkawr te, thal te, virvawma hman tûr lungte mûm te a pe bawk a." 
2Chronicles26:15 Jerusalem-ah chuan a mi themthiamte siam thal kahna khâwl te, lung lian pui pui vawmna tûr khâwl te, in sângah te leh kulh kilah te a bun a. A hming pawh a thang thui ta hle a. Pathianin a ṭanpui avânga chuti taka ropui chu a ni." 
2Chronicles26:16 Lal Uzia chu a ropui tâk hle hnu chuan a lo chapo ta deuh va, chu chu a chhiat phah ta a ni.A Pathian, Lalpa thu pawisa lovin rimtui hâlna dawhkâna rimtui hâl tûrin Tempulah a lût a." 
2Chronicles26:17 Puithiam chak leh huaisen tak tak sawmriatin 
2Chronicles26:18 khap tumin an zui a, “Uzia, Lalpa hnêna rimtui i hâl a thiang lo. Puithiam atâna serh hran Arona thlahte chauhvin hetiang thil hi an ti tûr a ni. He Hmun Thianghlim hi chhuahsan rawh, Lalpa chu i tithinur a, a duhsakna i dawng tawh chuang lo vang,” an ti a." 
2Chronicles26:19 Uzia chu Tempul chhûng rimtui hâlna dawhkân bulah chuan a ding a, rimtui hâlna bûr chu a keng a, puithiamho chungah chuan a thinur hle a; mahse, an hmaah ngei, Lalpa in chhûnga rimtui hâlna dawhkân bulah chuan a chalah pânchhia a kai ta thut a." 
2Chronicles26:20 Azaria leh puithiamte chuan lal chal an en chuan an phâwk ta hru vek a, Tempul chhûng ata chu an hnawt chhuak ta a. Lalpa chuan a hrem tâk avângin hmanhmawh takin a chhuak ta a." 
2Chronicles26:21 A natna avâng chuan lal Uzia chu a dam chhûng chuan a bawlhhlawh ta a, Tempula a luh thian tak loh avângin ama inah a awm ta reng a, a hna a thawk tawh lo, a fapa Jothaman ram a awp ta zâwk a." 
2Chronicles26:22 A lal chhûnga Uzia thiltih zawng zawng chu zâwlnei Isaian a ziak a. 
2Chronicles26:23 Uzia chu a thi a, lalho thlânmualah an phûm a, a pân vei avâng chuan lalho thlânah an dah duh lo. A fapa Jothama chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jothama chu kum sawmhnih leh panga a nihin a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh paruk a lal a. A nu chu Zadoka fanu Jerusaii a ni." 
2Chronicles27:2 A pa ang bawkin Lalpa lawmzâwng a ti ṭhîn; a pain Tempul chhûnga rimtui a hâl ang kha chuan a ti ve lo. Mipuite erawh chu an sual ngaiin an sual reng mai a. 
2Chronicles27:3 Tempul hmâr lam kawngka hi Jothama siam a ni, khaw kulh bang pawh a siam ṭha tam khawp mai; ‘Ofel’ an tih hmun phei chu a chei nasa hle a ni." 
2Chronicles27:4 Judai ram chhûngah khuate a siam a, ngawah te kulh leh râlvênbûk te a siam thluah bawk a." 
2Chronicles27:5 Amon lal nên an inbei a; a tudawl a, tangkarua kg. sângthum leh zali, huit quintal sîngkhat, barli quintal sîngkhat, kum thum chhûng kum tin chhiah a chawitîr a." 
2Chronicles27:6 Jothama chuan Lalpa, a Pathian thu a awih avângin a ropui ta hle a." 
2Chronicles27:7 Jothama lal laia thil thleng chanchin - an indo thute leh a thiltih dangte chu, ‘Israel leh Juda lalte chanchin’ ziakna bu-ah a chuang vek a ni." 
2Chronicles27:8 Jothama chu kum sawmhnih leh panga a nihin a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh paruk a lal a." 
2Chronicles27:9 A thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a, a fapa Ahaza chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahaza chu kum sawmhnih a nihin a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh paruk a lal a. A pu Davida tih dân ang zâwm duh lovin Lalpa duh loh zâwng a ti a." 
2Chronicles28:2 Israel lalte tih dân a la a, Baal lim a chhûntîr a." 
2Chronicles28:3 Hinom ruamah rimtui a hâl a, Israel mite hmaa Lalpa hnawh chhuah hnam dang tih dân tenawm tak takte chu a chîng ve a, a fapate ngei pawh milem hmaah hâlral thilhlan atân a hlân a." 
2Chronicles28:4 Tlânga hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsângah te, thingbuk ṭha deuh hlim hnuaiah te Ahaza chu a inthawi ṭhîn a, rimtuite a hâl ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles28:5 Ahaza chuan thil sual a tih avângin Suria lal kutah Lalpa, Pathian chuan a pe a; Damaska khuaah Juda mi tam tak Suria lal chuan a hâwn a." 
2Chronicles28:6 Israel lal Remalia fapa Peka pawhin Ahaza chu a bei a, a hneh a, Juda sipai huai ṭha ṭha mi nuaikhat leh sînghnih a that a. Judai ram mite chuan an thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chu an kalsan avângin Lalpa chuan chûng thil chu an chungah a thlentîr a ni." 
2Chronicles28:7 Israel sipai Efraim pasalṭha Zikria chuan Ahaza fapa Maaseia chu a that a, lal in enkawltu Azrikama a that bawk a; lal dawttu Elkana pawh a that a." 
2Chronicles28:8 Juda-te chu an unaute an ni na a, Israel sipaite chuan hmeichhia leh naupang nuaihnih salah an man a. Samaria khuaah an khalh khâwm a, râllâk sum tam tak an hâwn bawk a." 
2Chronicles28:9 Samaria khuaah chuan Lalpa zâwlnei pakhat Odeda a awm a, Israel sipai ruala Judai rama an sal mante Samaria khua an lût tûr chu a lo hmu a, an hnênah, “In thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chu Juda-ho chungah a thinur a, a hnehtîr ta che u a ni; mahse, in that a, an chunga in nun a râwn lutukzia a hmu reng asin." 
2Chronicles28:10 Jerusalem leh Judai rama awm mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh bawiha siam in tum leh zêl a nih hi. Nangni pawhin Lalpa, in Pathian lakah thil sual in ti tih in hre na nge?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Ka thu hi ngaithla teh u, hêng in sal mante hi in unau, in farnute an ni asin; chhuah vek rawh u, chutilo chu Lalpa a thinur ang a, a sawisa ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles28:12 Hmâr lam lalrama hotu lian, Jehohanana fapa Azaria te, Mesilemota fapa Berekia te, Saluma fapa Zehiskia te, Hadlaia fapa Amasa te pawhin sipaiho thiltih chu ṭha an ti lo va." 
2Chronicles28:13 An hnênah, “In sal mante hetah han hruai suh u, Lalpa lakah thil sual kan ti dêr tawh a, min hrem duh hial khawpin kan tithinur a ni. Kan thil sual tih tawh bâkah la tih belh leh zêl in tum em ni?” an ti a." 
2Chronicles28:14 Tichuan, sipaite chuan an sal man leh râllâk sum an hawnte chu mipui leh an hotute kutah an hlân ta a." 
2Chronicles28:15 Chûng hming sawi tâkte chu an râllâk sum aṭanga sal an mante hnêna thawmhnaw pe tûrin an ruat a. Silhfên te, pheikhawk bun tûr te an pe a; an hliam chulh tûr oliv hriak an sem bawk a. Mahni kea kal thei lo khawpa chaute chu sabengtung chungah an chuantîr a; an sal man zawng zawng chu Judai ram Jeriko, tûm khua an tihah chuan an hruai kîr leh ta vek a. Tin, Israel-ho chu Samaria lamah an haw ta a." 
2Chronicles28:16 Chûng lai chuan lal Ahaza chuan amah ṭanpui tûrin Asuria lalte a ko va," 
2Chronicles28:17 Edom-hovin Judai ram an rawn rûn a, an hneh a, mi tam tak an man a ni." 
2Chronicles28:18 Filistia-ho lahin thlang lam tlâng ṭhut phai khua te leh Judai ram Negeb te an rawn bei bawk a. Anni phei chuan Beth-semes te, Aijalon te, Gederot te, Soko leh a chhehvêl khua te, Timna leh a chhehvêl khua te, Gimzo leh a chhehvêl khua te an la a, an luah ta tlat a." 
2Chronicles28:19 Juda lal Ahaza chuan a mite ṭhatna tûr a ngaihtuah miah lo va, Lalpa chu a pawisak dêr loh avângin Juda-ho chu a titlâwm a ni." 
2Chronicles28:20 Asuria lal Tiglat-Pilesera chuan Ahaza chu puih ahnêkin harsatna a siamsak ta zâwk a. 
2Chronicles28:21 Ahaza chuan Tempula rangkachak te, lal ina mite leh mi hausa deuh ina mi te chu a la a, Asuria lal chu a pe a; mahse, a sâwt lo." 
2Chronicles28:22 A mangan vânglai tak pawh chuan Ahaza chu Lalpa lakah a sual sauh va. 
2Chronicles28:23 Amah hnehtu Suria-ho pathiante chu chibai a bûk ve ta mai a, ‘Suria pathiante hian Suria lal an ṭanpui a; chuvângin, an hnênah thilhlan hlân ila min pui ve ngei ang,’ a ti a ni. Chu chu a mite nên chuan chhiat zual phah sauhna a ni." 
2Chronicles28:24 Chûng bâkah, Tempula hmanrua a la chhuak a, a tichhia a. Tempul chu a khâr a; Jerusalem khuaah maichâm a siam thliah thluah a;" 
2Chronicles28:25 Judai ram khawpuiah leh khuaahte chuan hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsâng, rimtui hâlna tûr a siam fer fur a. Hetiang hian a thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chu a tithinur a ni." 
2Chronicles28:26 A rorêl chhûng chanchin dangte chu a bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin ‘Juda leh Israel lalte chanchin’ ziakna bu-ah a chuang. 
2Chronicles28:27 Ahaza chu a thi a, lal thlânah ni lo, Jerusalem-ah an phûm a, a fapa Hezekia chu a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekia chu kum sawmhnih leh panga a nihin Judai ramah a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh pakua a lal a. A nu chu Zekaria fanu Abijai a ni." 
2Chronicles29:2 A pu Davida angin Lalpa lâwmzâwng a ti ṭhîn. 
2Chronicles29:3 A lal tirh kum, thla hmasa berah Hezekia chuan Tempul kawngkhârte chu a hawng leh a, a chhiate chu a siam ṭhattîr a." 
2Chronicles29:4 Tempul khawchhak lam tualah chuan puithiamte leh Levia chite chu a ko khâwm a," 
2Chronicles29:5 an hnênah, “Nangni Levia chite u, inthian thianghlim ula, in pate Pathian, Lalpa in hi thian thianghlim rawh u; Tempul aṭang hian thil bawlhhlawh zawng zawng paih chhuak vek rawh u." 
2Chronicles29:6 Kan pate chu Lalpa, kan Pathian lakah an rinawm lo va, a duh loh zâwng an ti a. An helsan a, a awmna in chu hawisanin an hnuchhawn ta a." 
2Chronicles29:7 Tempul kawngkhâr chu an kalh a, khâwnvâr an timit a, rimtui an hâl lo va, Hmun Thianghlimah Israel-te Pathian tân hâlral thilhlan an hlân hek lo." 
2Chronicles29:8 Hei vâng hian Lalpa chu Juda leh Jerusalem mite chungah a thinur a, mi tin mak tih leh chekkhum hial khawpin a sawisa ta a ni; chu chu nangni pawhin in hmu reng a." 
2Chronicles29:9 Kan pate chu khandaiha sah hlum an ni a, kan fanu kan fapa, kan nupuite nên salah an man kha." 
2Chronicles29:10 Kan chunga a thinur hi a tihkian beiseiin Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa nên thu thlun ka tum ta a ni." 
2Chronicles29:11 Ka fate u, awm mai mai teh suh u, Lalpa chuan a hmaa dinga, a rawngbâwl atân a thlang che u a; chuvângin, a rawng bâwl ula, thilhlante hlân rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles29:12 Chûng zîngah chuan Levia chi hêngte hi an tel: Kohata thlahte zînga mi Amasaia fapa Mahata leh Azaria fapa Joela. Meraria thlah zînga mi Abdia fapa Kisa leh Jahalelela fapa Azaria; Gersona thlahte zînga mi Zima fapa Joa leh Joa fapa Edena. 
2Chronicles29:12 Chûng zîngah chuan Levia chi hêngte hi an tel: Kohata thlahte zînga mi Amasaia fapa Mahata leh Azaria fapa Joela. Meraria thlah zînga mi Abdia fapa Kisa leh Jahalelela fapa Azaria; Gersona thlahte zînga mi Zima fapa Joa leh Joa fapa Edena. 
2Chronicles29:13 Elizafana thlah zînga mi Simria leh Jeuela; Asafa thlah zînga mi Zekaria leh Matania; 
2Chronicles29:14 Hemana thlah zînga mi Jehuela leh Simeia; Jeduthuna thlah zînga mi Semaia leh Uziela. 
2Chronicles29:15 Hêng mite hian an chipui Levia chite chu an pun khâwm a, an inthian thianghlim a; lal thupêk ang chuan Tempul chu an thian a. Lalpa Dân bu-a sawi angin an thian fai ta a." 
2Chronicles29:16 Lalpa Tempul chhûngah puithiamho chu an lût a, thil bawlhhlawh an hmuh rêng rêng chu Lalpa in tualah chuan an rawn dah chhuak a; Levia chite chuan chûng chu Kidron luiah an paih a." 
2Chronicles29:17 Thla khatna, ni hmasa berah Tempul chu an thian ṭan a, ni riat ni chuan Tempul pindan hmasa thlengin an thian zo va. Ni riat dang, ni sâwm leh paruk thlengin Tempul chhûng chu Pathian biakna tlâk tûrin an thian leh a, an tithianghlim ta a." 
2Chronicles29:18 Levia chite chu lal Hezekia hnênah an kal a, “Tempul chhûng chu kan thian thianghlim ta. Hâlral thilhlan hâlna maichâm te, chhang serh dahna dawhkân te leh hmanrua zawng zawng pawh kan tithianghlim ta." 
2Chronicles29:19 Ahazan Lalpa laka suahsual a bâwl laia Tempul bungbêl a lâk chhuahte kha kan dah kîr a, kan tithianghlim vek tawh a, Lalpa maichâm bulah engkim dah fel a ni tawh,” an rawn ti a." 
2Chronicles29:20 Lal Hezekia chuan Jerusalem-a hotu deuh deuh chu a ko khâwm rum rum a, Lalpa Tempulah chuan an kal a." 
2Chronicles29:21 Bâwngpa pasarih, berâmchal pasarih, berâmno pasarih leh sual thawina thilhlanah kêlpa pasarih an rawn dah a; Arona thlah puithiamte chu Lalpa maichâma hlân tûrin a ti a." 
2Chronicles29:22 Bâwngte chu an talh a, an thisen chu maichâmah an theh a, berâmte pawh chu an talh a, an thisen chu maichâmah an theh bawk a." 
2Chronicles29:23 Lal leh pungkhâwmho hmaah chuan sual thawina thilhlan atân kêlpate chu an rawn kai a, an lu-ah an kut an nghat a;" 
2Chronicles29:24 Puithiamte chuan an talh a, an thisen chu sual thawi nân an hlân a, Israel mi zawng zawng sual thawi nân an hlân a ni. Lal thu angin hâlral thilhlan leh sual thawina thilhlan chu Israel mi zawng zawng tân an hlân a ni." 
2Chronicles29:25 Lal zâwlnei Gada leh zâwlnei Nathana hmanga Davida hnêna Lalpa sawi ang khân Levia chite chu perhkhuang te, dârbenthek leh ṭingṭang te nên Tempulah chuan a dah a." 
2Chronicles29:26 Davida tum ṭhin ang thiltum chite an keng bawk a. Puithiamte pawh tawtawrâwt kengin an ding a," 
2Chronicles29:27 Lal Hezekia chuan hâlral thilhlan chu hlân tawh tûrin a hrilh a; an han hlan chuan mipuiin Lalpa fak hla an sa a, tawtawrâwt te an hâm a, tum rîk chi dangte pawh chu an tum ta a." 
2Chronicles29:28 Chuta awm apiang chuan Pathian chibai an bûk a, hla an sa a, an thilhlan a kan zawh hma chu rimawi an tum zui zêl a." 
2Chronicles29:29 Lal Hezekia leh mipuite chu an ṭhingṭhi a, Pathian chibai an bûk a." 
2Chronicles29:30 Lal leh hotute chuan Davida leh zâwlnei Asafa hla phuah, Lalpa fakna hla kha, Levia chite chu an saktîr a. Ṭhingṭhia Pathian chibai bûkin an za chuan hlim takin an awm zui ta a." 
2Chronicles29:31 Hezekia chuan mipui hnênah, “ Lalpa tân in inthian thianghlim ta bawk a; thilhlan te, lâwmthu sawina te Lalpa Tempulah han la rawh u le,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles29:32 Pungkhâwmho chuan thilhlan te, lâwmthu sawina te an rawn hlân a, a duh apiangin hâlral thilhlan tûr te an rawn keng bawk a. Pungkhâwmhovin hâlral thilhlan tûr an rawn lâkte chu bâwngpa sawmsarih, berâmno zahnih leh berâm za a ni." 
2Chronicles29:33 Bâwng zaruk leh berâm sângthum pawh thilhlan chi dangah an hlân a. 
2Chronicles29:34 A talhtu tûr puithiam an indaih loh avângin an talh zawh hma chu Levia chiten an pui a. A tâwp lamah chuan puithiam tam zâwk pawh an inthian thianghlim hman a; Levia chite hi puithiamho ai chuan an lo invawng thianghlim thei zâwk a lo ni. 
2Chronicles29:35 Mipui thilhlan hâl hi puithiam tih tûr a ni a. An ran talh mipui ei thaute pawh an hâl tûr a ni; hâlral thilhlan ruala uain an rawn hlante pawh puithiamin an bun chhuak tûr a ni. Tichuan, Tempul rawngbâwlna chu an ṭan leh ta a." 
2Chronicles29:36 Lal Hezekia leh mipuite chu Pathianin hetianga ti leh thei mai tûra a ṭanpui avângin an hlim ta êm êm a. 
2Chronicles30:1 Puithiam tam tak an inthian thianghlim hman lo va, mipui lah Jerusalem-ah an pung khâwm hman hek lo; chuvângin, Kalhlên Kût chu a hun takah an hmang thei ta lo va." 
2Chronicles30:2 Lal Hezekia leh a hote leh Jerusalem mite chu an inrâwn khâwm a, Kalhlên Kût chu a thla hnihnaah hman an rêl ta a. Lal chuan Israel ram leh Judai ramah thu a thawn darh ta chiam a." 
2Chronicles30:3 Efraim leh Manase-ho te phei chu Jerusalem Tempula lo kala, Lalpa chawimawia Kalhlên kût hmang tûrin lehkhain a sâwm nghe nghe a." 
2Chronicles30:4 Lal leh mipuite chuan an thil rawt chu tifuh an inti hle a. 
2Chronicles30:5 Hmâr lam, Dan aṭanga chhim lam Beer-seba inkâra Israel mi zawng zawng chu Jerusalem-ah a tam thei ang ber lo kala, Kalhlên kût rawn hmang tûrin an sâwm a." 
2Chronicles30:6 Lal leh a hote chuan Judai ram leh Israel ramah lamkal an tlântîr a, ngenna lehkha hetiang hi an thawn darh a: “Israel mite u, Abrahama te, Isaka te, Jakoba te Pathian, Lalpa lam hi hawi teh u; keini, Asuria kut tuar lova, nungdama la awmte lam hi a lo hawi ve dâwn nia." 
2Chronicles30:7 In pate leh in unau te, in thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa laka an che khawlo ang khân che ve suh u, in hmuh angin a hrem nat êm kha." 
2Chronicles30:8 Anni angin luhlul suh u, Lalpa thu chu zâwm zâwk rawh u. In Pathian Lalpa tihthianghlim tawh Jerusalem-a a Tempulah hian lo kal ula; hetah hian amah chu chibai han bûk rawh u, in laka a thinur a reh dâwn nia." 
2Chronicles30:9 Lalpa lam in lo hawi phawt chuan in hmêlmaten sala an man in lainate kha an lo khawngaih ang a, an rawn hâwntîr ngei ang. Lalpa, in Pathian hi Pathian ngilnei a ni asin, a lam in lo hawi chuan a hawisan tawp lo vang che u,” tiin an ziak a." 
2Chronicles30:10 An mi tirhte chu Efraim leh Manasea thlahte awmna ram khaw tinah an kal a, Zebulun ram pawh an thleng a; mahse, mite chuan an lo nuihsawh a." 
2Chronicles30:11 Chuti chung pawh chuan Aser-ho te, Manase-ho te, Zebulun-ho te Jerusalem-a lo kal duh an awm nual a." 
2Chronicles30:12 Judai ramah pawh Pathian chuan hna a thawk a, lal leh a hote thu angin lungrual taka Pathian duhzâwng tih an châk ta hle hlawm a." 
2Chronicles30:13 Thla hnihnaah chuan chhang dawidim telh loh kût hmang tûrin Jerusalem khuaah chuan mi tam tak an lo kal khâwm a. 
2Chronicles30:14 Jerusalem-a pathian dang biakna maichâm awm zawng zawng, rimtui an hâlna maichâmte nên an la a, Kidron luiah an paih a." 
2Chronicles30:15 Ni sâwm leh pali ni chuan Kalhlên kûta thilhlan berâmno chu an talh a. Puithiam leh Levia chi te pawh kha, an zah êm êm avângin Lalpa tân an lo inthian thianghlim fel vek tawh a, hâlral thilhlan pawh Tempulah an hlân ve thei tawh a ni." 
2Chronicles30:16 Pathian mi Mosia Dân bu-a sawi ang khân an awmna tûr hmun ruatah an awm ṭhap a. Levia chite chuan thilhlan thisen chu puithiamho an pe a, anni chuan maichâmah an lo theh a." 
2Chronicles30:17 Mi tam tak chu an bawlhhlawh avângin Kalhlên kût berâmno an talh a thiang lo va, Levia chite khân an talhsak a, Lalpa hnênah an hlân a." 
2Chronicles30:18 Efraim-ho te, Manase-ho te, Isakar-ho te, Zebulun-ho te zînga mi tam tak phei chu an inthen thianghlim loh avângin dân ang lovin Kalhlên kût chu an hmang a ni." 
2Chronicles30:19 Lal Hezekia chu chûngho tân chuan a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, min thlahtute Pathian, bawlhhlawh kai an ni chung pawhin thinlung taka chibai bûktu che chu i ṭhat avângin ngaidam ang che,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles30:20 Lalpa chuan Hezekia ṭawngṭai chu a ngaithla a, mite chu a ngaidam a, engtin mah a khawih lo." 
2Chronicles30:21 Hlim takin ni sarih chhûng chu Jerusalem-a lo kalte chuan chhang dawidim telh loh kût chu an hmang a, ni tin mai Levia chite leh puithiamte chuan awrâwl tâwp chhuahin Lalpa fak hla an sa a." 
2Chronicles30:22 Lalpa biaknaa an tumrîk neihte nên inkhâwm kaihhruai an thiam êm avâng chuan Levia chite chu lal Hezekia chuan a fak a. An thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa chu an fak a, remna thilhlante hlânin ni sarih kût ruai an ṭheh a." 
2Chronicles30:23 Tin, mipui chuan ni sarih dang kût nawn an rawt a; tichuan, hlim takin ni sarih an kût leh ta a." 
2Chronicles30:24 Lal Hezekia chuan bâwngpa sângkhat leh berâm sângsarih, mipui thilhlana ruai ṭheh nân a thawh a, an hotute chuan bâwngpa sângkhat leh berâm sîngkhat an thawh bawk a. Puithiam tam tak an lo inthian thianghlim tawh a." 
2Chronicles30:25 Judai rama mi lo pung khâwm te, Levia chi te, puithiam te, Israel ram aṭanga lo kal te, Judai ram leh Israel rama hnam dang chêng lo kal vete nên an vaiin an hlim êm êm a." 
2Chronicles30:26 Jerusalem khuaah chuan mi tin an lâwm a, Davida fapa Solomona thih hnuah chutiang khawpa hlimna a la awm lo." 
2Chronicles30:27 Levia chite leh puithiamte chuan mipui tân malsâwmna an sawi a, Lalpa chuan a lo ngaithla a, an ṭawngṭaina chuan Hmun Thianghlim vân a thleng a ni." 
2Chronicles31:1 Kût an ṭiak chuan Israel mi zawng zawng chu Judai ram khaw tinah an kal darh a, an lungphun te, an pathiannu Aseri lim an phun te chu an nam tlu a, maichâmte leh hmunsâng, hnam dang pathian an biakna hmunte chu an tichim a. Judai ram bâkah Benjamin te, Efraim te leh Manase biala mi te pawh an tichhia a, mahni in lamah an haw leh ta hlawm a." 
2Chronicles31:2 Lal Hezekia chuan puithiam te leh Levia chi te chu hna an insem thliah ṭhîn ang khân an thawh dân tûr a remfelsak leh a. An hna tûr chu hâlral thilhlan hlan te, remna thilhlan hlan te, Tempula Pathian biak hruai te, Tempul kawngkhâr bula Lalpa fak hla saa lâwmthu sawi te a ni." 
2Chronicles31:3 Hezekia chuan ama bâwng leh berâm rual aṭangin tûk tin zan tin hâlral thilhlan tûr te, sabat ni te, thla thar ni te leh kût huna hâlral thilhlan Lalpa dân bu-a hlan tûr tih te chu a tum vek a." 
2Chronicles31:4 Lalpa Dânin a phût ang chuan, an hun zawng zawng an hman theih nân, puithiamte leh Levia chite chanvo thilhlan chu pe ṭhîn tûrin Jerusalem mite chu Hezekia chuan a hrilh a." 
2Chronicles31:5 Chutianga thu a pêk veleh Israel mite chuan an thilpêk chhangphut ṭha chi te, uain te, oliv hriak te, khawizu te leh an thil thar te leh an neih apiang an sâwma pakhat nên an rawn la a." 
2Chronicles31:6 Judai ram khawpuia awm zawng zawng chuan an ran sâwma pakhat te, an Pathian, Lalpa hnênah thil tam tak an pêkte chu an rawn keng a." 
2Chronicles31:7 A thla thumna aṭangin an rawn pe ṭan a, thla sarihna thlengin an rawn pêk chu a vûm thûr mai a ni." 
2Chronicles31:8 Lal Hezekia leh hruaituten thilpêk tling khâwm tamzia an hmuh chuan Lalpa an chawimawi a. Israel mipuite pawh an fak a. 
2Chronicles31:9 Lal chuan puithiamte leh Levia chite hnênah thilpêk tling khâwm chu an khawpkham leh kham loh a zâwt a. 
2Chronicles31:10 Zadoka thlaha puithiam lalber Azaria chuan, “Miten an thilpêkte Tempula an rawn ken tâk hnu hi chuan ei tûr kan nei ta a, ei sên loh tam tak a bâng bawk a ni. Lalpa chuan a mite mal a sâwm a, hetiang hi kan nei thei ta a ni,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles31:11 Lal thupêk angin Tempul ram chhûngah chuan kudâm an sa a. 
2Chronicles31:12 An thilpêk leh sâwma pakhat chu a bothlau loh nân an dah ṭha a. A enkawl tûrin Levia chi Konania an ruat a, a nau Simeian a ṭanpui a." 
2Chronicles31:13 An kaihhruaia thawk tûrin Levia chi Jehiela te, Azazia te, Nahata te, Asahela te, Jerimota te, Jozabada te, Eliela te, Ismakia te, Mahata te, Benaia te chu lal Hezekia leh puithiam lalber Azaria chuan an ruat a." 
2Chronicles31:14 Imna fapa Korea, Tempul khawchhak lam kawngka vêngtu hotu chu Lalpa hnênah anmahni duh thua thilhlan leh thil serh hran bîkte dawnga sem ṭhîn tûrin an ruat a." 
2Chronicles31:15 Khaw dang, puithiam awmnaah chuan hêng Levia chi Edena te, Miniamina te, Jesua te, Semaia te, Amaria te, Sekania te chuan ei tûr chu ṭha takin an sempui a, an Levia chipuite pawh, a pawimawh leh pawimawh lo deuh sawi lovin an sem thliah thliah ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles31:16 Mipa, kum sawmthum chung lam, Tempula rawngbâwl theite chuan an dinhmun azirin an dawng a." 
2Chronicles31:17 Puithiamho chu a chi chia inchhâwk tûr hna an sem a; Levia chi kum sawmhnih chung lamte erawh chu a pâwl pâwlin hna thawk tûrin an ruat ṭhîn a ni. 
2Chronicles31:18 An hming chu an nupui te, an fate leh an awmpui nghette nên an ziak vek a, eng lai pawha an hna thawk tûrin koh mai theih an ni." 
2Chronicles31:19 Arona thlahte awmna tûr, thingtlâng khua leh a chhehvêl ran tlatna ram ruata awm puithiamte hnêna ei leh bar tûr semtu tûr an ruat bawk a, Levia chi chhiarnaa hming chuangte pawh an pe ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles31:20 Judai ram pumah lal Hezekia chuan a Pathian, Lalpa hmuha ṭha leh dik chu rinawm takin a ti ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles31:21 Tihtakzetin a Pathian rawng a bâwl a, Tempul a ngaihsaka, dânte a zawm êm avângin, kawng engkimah a hmuingîl a ni." 
2Chronicles32:1 Hezekia chuan Lalpa rawng ṭha takin a bâwl tâk hnu chuan Asuria lal Senakeriba chuan Judai ram a rawn rûn a. Kulh nei khuate chu a sipaite chuan an hual a, kulh bangte chu a tihchhiattîr a." 
2Chronicles32:2 Hezekia chuan Jerusalem pawh rawn beih zêl a tum tih a hriat chuan," 
2Chronicles32:3 a hote nên an inrâwn tlâng a, Asuria-hovin Jerusalem an rawn hnaih hnua tui in tûr an neih loh nân khaw pâwn hnaia tuikhur zawng zawng chu hnawh zai an rêl a." 
2Chronicles32:4 Hotute chuan mi tam tak an hruai a, tuikhur zawng zawng chu luang chhuak tûr awm lovin an hnawh ta vek a." 
2Chronicles32:5 Lal chuan khaw kulh bang derdêp laite chu a thuam ṭha a, in sângte a sak belh a, Jerusalem khaw hlui Milo an tih, lei an chhûn khahna lai kulh bangte pawh chu a siam ṭha a. Fei leh phaw tam tak a siamtîr bawk a." 
2Chronicles32:6 Khaw mite chu sipai hotuten an ho va, khawpui luhna kawngkhâr tualzâwl zau laiah chuan mite chu an rawn hruai khâwm a, a lo fuih a." 
2Chronicles32:7 An hnênah chuan, “Huai takin awm ula, ṭan la sauh sauh rawh u: Asuria leh a sipai zozaite hi hlau suh ula, zâm hek suh u, an aia ropui kan zîngah a awm a ni;" 
2Chronicles32:8 ani zawng mihring chaknaah a innghat a, keini zawng Lalpa, kan Pathianin min pui dâwn a, râl chu min dosak dâwn a ni,” a ti a. Mipui chu Juda lal Hezekia thu avâng chuan an thlamuang ta hle a." 
2Chronicles32:9 Senakeriba leh a sipaite Lakis khuaa an awm hnu chuan Hezekia leh Judai ram mi, Jerusalem-a awm zawng zawngte hnênah chuan palai a rawn tîr a," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Asuria lal Senakeriba chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Eng nge maw in beiseia, Jerusalem hual in tuar dâwn le? Lalpa, kan Pathian chuan Asuria lal kut ata min chhan dâwn’ tiin." 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekia hian tuihâl leh rilṭâma thi tûrin a bum che u elo maw? 
2Chronicles32:12 In Pathian biakna hmunsângte leh maichâmte ṭhiatin Jerusalem leh Judai ram mite chu, ‘maichâm pakhatah Pathian chu chibai in bûk ang a, chutah chuan thil in hlân tûr a ni,’ titu kha he Hezekia hi a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Kei leh ka pate chuan ram tina hnam tinrêng kan sawisak ṭhin dân kha in hria em? Chûngho pathiante chuan an mite chu kan kut aṭangin an chhan thei ngai em ni? 
2Chronicles32:14 Ka pa chuan chûngho pathiante chu a titlâwm vek a, Pathian pawh hian a kut ata a chhan che uin in ring elo?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Chuvângin, Hezekia hian bum che u suh se, bual â che u hek suh sela, a thu ring suh u. Asuria lal laka a betute chhan theitu hnam pathian pakhat mah an awm lo. In Pathian pawh hian a va chhan rua lo che u êm!” a ti a." 
2Chronicles32:16 Asuria sipai hotu chuan Lalpa, Pathian leh a chhiahhlawh Hezekia chu a sâwt lehzual a." 
2Chronicles32:17 Asuria lal chuan a lehkhaah chuan Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chu thamlo takin, “Hnam dang pathiante pawh ka kut ata an mite chhan thei rêng an awm lo, Hezekia Pathian pawhin a mite chu ka lakah a chhan thei bîk dâwn em ni?” tiin a ziak bawk a." 
2Chronicles32:18 Khaw lâk a awlsam zâwk beiseiin Jerusalem kulh bula awmte tihzâm a tum a, Hebrai ṭawngin thu a sawi a ni." 
2Chronicles32:19 Jerusalem Pathian chu hnam dang pathian, mihring siam ang lekin a sawi a ni." 
2Chronicles32:20 Lal Hezekia leh Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia chu an ṭawngṭai a, Pathian an au va." 
2Chronicles32:21 Lalpa chuan Vântirhkoh a rawn tîr a, Asuria sipaite leh an hotute chu an riahhmunah chuan a rawn tihlum a. Asuria lal chu mualpho takin an khaw lamah a haw ta a. Ni khat chu an pathian biak ina a awm laiin a fate zînga mi ngeiin khandaihin an sât hlum a." 
2Chronicles32:22 Lal Hezekia leh Jerusalem mite chu chutiang chuan Asuria lal Senakeriba leh an hmêlmate kut ata Lalpa chuan a chhan chhuak a. An chhehvêl ramte nên inrem ṭha takin a awmtîr a. 
2Chronicles32:23 Lalpa hnêna thilhlan hlân tûrin Jerusalem-ah mi tam tak an lo kal a. Hezekia hnênah pawh thilpêk an rawn pe zut zut a, hnam tinin Hezekia chu an ngaisâng hle a ni." 
2Chronicles32:24 Hetih hun lai vêl hian Hezekia chu thih ngamin a na a. A ṭawngṭai a, a dam leh tûr thu chhinchhiahna Lalpa chuan a siamsak a." 
2Chronicles32:25 Lalpa thiltihsak avâng chuan lâwm nachâng a hre lo va, a chapo avâng chuan Judai ram leh Jerusalem chuan an tuar ta a." 
2Chronicles32:26 A tâwpah erawh zawng Hezekia leh Jerusalem mite chu an inchhîr a, an inngaitlâwm a, Hezekia dam chhûng chuan Lalpa thinurna chu an chungah a thleng ta lo." 
2Chronicles32:27 Lal Hezekia chu a hausa ta hle a, tu pawhin an ngaisâng a, a rangkachak te, tangkarua te, lungmantam te, thil rimtui te, phaw te leh thil dang hlu tak tak te dahna tûr in te a sa a." 
2Chronicles32:28 A buh te, uain te, oliv hriak te dahna tûr chhêk in a saktîr a; bâwng in te, berâm huangte a siam bawk a." 
2Chronicles32:29 Hêng bâkah hian Pathianin berâm te, sum leh pai chi tinrêng a pe a, khua te a siam thluah a." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekia hian Gihon tuiluanna chhakta zâwk chu a tiping a, tui kawng a siam a, Jerusalem khaw chhûng thlang lam pangah a luan luhtîr a ni. Hezekia chu a thil tih engkimah a hmuingîl zêl a." 
2Chronicles32:31 A chunga thil mak thleng zâwt fiah tûrin Babulon lalin palai a rawn tirh lai kha chuan mi eng ang nge a nih fiah nân Pathianin a thlahfâl a nih kha. 
2Chronicles32:32 Lal Hezekia thil tih dang te, a thil tih ṭhat te chu, Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia lehkhabu-ah leh Israel leh Judai lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekia chu a thi a, lal thlânmual chuanchungah an phûm a. A thih chuan Judai ram leh Jerusalem-in an chawimawi nasa hle a. A fapa Manasea chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Chronicles33:1 Kum sâwm leh pahnih a nihin Manasea chu Judai ramah a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh panga a lal a." 
2Chronicles33:2 Israela thlahte hmaa Lalpan a hnawh chhuah hnamte thil tenawm tak an tih ang chu a ti ve ṭhîn a. 
2Chronicles33:3 A pain a tihchhiat, hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsângte kha a siam ṭha leh a. Baal hnêna inthawina hlanna tûr maichâmte a siam a, pathiannu Aseri lim te a siam a, arsi te chibai a bûk a." 
2Chronicles33:4 Kumkhuaa Lalpa biakna tûr Tempul a ruatah chuan hnam dang pathian maichâm a siam a. 
2Chronicles33:5 Tempul pindan pahnihah chuan arsi biakna tûr maichâm te a siam a. 
2Chronicles33:6 Hinom ruamah hâlral thilhlanah a fapa te a hlân a; aien te, kutze en te, arsi biak te a chîng a, mitthi thlûk thiam te, aisân chîng te a râwn ṭhîn a. Lalpa ṭha tih loh zâwng a ti a, a tithinur ta a ni." 
2Chronicles33:7 A milem chhûn chu tempulah a dah a, Pathianin Davida leh Solomona hnênah, “Israel hnam zawng zawng ram zîngah Jerusalem leh he in hi ka hming lamna hmun tûra ka thlan a ni." 
2Chronicles33:8 Kumkhuaa ka thupêk zawng zawng an zawma, ka thuruatte leh ka dânte, ka chhiahhlawh Mosian a hrilhte kha an zawm chuan Israel-ho hi engtikah mah an pate hnêna ka pêk tawh ram aṭang hian ka hnawt chhuak lo vang,” a ti si a." 
2Chronicles33:9 Manasea chuan Judai ram leh Jerusalem mite chu thil dik lo a tihtîr a, Israel-te hmaa a hnawh chhuah hnamte tih ṭhin aia sual nasa zâwk an ti ta a ni." 
2Chronicles33:10 Lalpa chuan Manasea leh a mite hnênah chuan thu a sawi ṭhîn a, an ngaithla duh si lo va. Chuvâng chuan Asuria sipai hotute chu Lalpa chuan Judai ram chu a rûntîr a." 
2Chronicles33:11 Manasea chu an man a, khaidiatin an hlîng a, a hnârah thîr kawm an vuah a, Babulon-ah an hruai ta a." 
2Chronicles33:12 A mangan êm avâng chuan Lalpa a Pathian hmaah chuan nasa takin a intitlâwm a, ṭanpui a dîl ta a." 
2Chronicles33:13 Manasea ṭawngṭai chu a lo ngaihthlâksak ta a, a dîlna chu chhângin Jerusalem-ah a hâwntîr leh ta a. Manasea chuan Lalpa chu Pathian a lo ni ngei tih a hre chiang ta a." 
2Chronicles33:14 Chumi hnu chuan Davida khawpui, khawchhak lam panga kulh bang pâwn zâwk chu Manasea chuan a zawm sâng a, Gihon tui awmna ruam hmâr lam Sangha Kawngkhâr bul ‘Ofel’ an tih hmun thlengin a siam a. Judai rama kulh nei khaw tinah sipai pâwl khat, hotu pakhat nên a dah vek a." 
2Chronicles33:15 Hnam dang pathian lem leh milim chhûn amahin Tempula a dahte chu a paih bo va. Tempul mual leh Jerusalem khuaa hnam dang pathian biakna maichâm awmte pawh chu a la a, khawpui ata a paih chhuak a." 
2Chronicles33:16 Lalpa biakna maichâm chu a siam ṭha a, remna thilhlan te, lâwmthu sawina thilhlan te a hlân a, Judai ram mi zawng zawng chu Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa a biaktîr a." 
2Chronicles33:17 Mipuite chu an inthawina hmun pangngaiah la inthawi reng mah se, Lalpa hnênah chauh an inthawi ta a ni." 
2Chronicles33:18 Manasea thil tih dang zawng zawng, Pathian hnêna a ṭawngṭaina te, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hminga zâwlneiten a hnêna thu an sawi te chu Israel lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang." 
2Chronicles33:19 Lal Manasea ṭawngṭaina leh Pathian chhânna te, a sim hmaa thil sual a tih chanchin te, hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsâng te siama, Aseri lim siama, a milem chhûn a biak thu te, zâwlneiho chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang vek bawk a ni." 
2Chronicles33:20 Manasea chu a thi a, lal inah an phûm a, a fapa Amona chu a lo lal ta a." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amona chu kum sawmhnih leh pahnih a nihin Judai ramah a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum hnih a lal a." 
2Chronicles33:22 A pa Manasea ang bawkin Lalpa chungah thil sual a ti a, a pa milem chhûnte chu chibai a bûk ta mai a." 
2Chronicles33:23 A pa ang khân a inngaitlâwm ve duh lo va, Lalpa lam a hawi duh hek lo, a pa ai mah khân a sual a ni." 
2Chronicles33:24 A hoten an phiar a, a inah an that a," 
2Chronicles33:25 Judai ram mite chuan Amona thattute chu an that ve a, a fapa Josia chu lalah an siam a." 
2Chronicles34:1 Kum riat a nihin Josia chu Judai ramah a lal ṭan a, kum sawmthum leh pakhat Jerusalem-ah a lal a." 
2Chronicles34:2 Lalpa lawmzâwng a ti ṭhîn a, a thlahtu Davida awm dân angin a awm a. Pathian dânte chu uluk takin a zâwm a." 
2Chronicles34:3 Josia chuan kum riat a lal kumin, la naupang hle mah se, a thlahtu Davida Pathian chu a be ve ṭan ta a; kum li hnuah phei chuan hnam dang pathian biakna hmunsâng te, Aseri lim te leh milim dang te chu a tichhe vek a." 
2Chronicles34:4 A thuin a hote chuan Baal biakna maichâmte chu an chhu chhia a, a bula rimtui hâlna maichâmte pawh an tichhia a; Aseri limte leh milim dangte chu an chhu dip vek a, chûng betute thlânah chuan an phul a."
