2Chronicles34:5 Hnam dang puithiamho ruhte chu an pathian biakna maichâmah chuan an hâl a. Tichuan, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-ah khua chu an thian thianghlim ta a." 
2Chronicles34:6 Chutiang bawkin Manase leh Efraim te, Simeon leh hmâr lama Naftali ram thlengin an khawpuia mi leh an khaw ram tawh hnua mite chu a thian fai a." 
2Chronicles34:7 Hmâr lam bial Israel chhûnga maichâmte leh Aseri limte a tichhia a, milimte chu a chhu dip a, rimtui an hâlna maichâmte pawh chu a tichhe vek a, Jerusalem-ah a haw leh ta a." 
2Chronicles34:8 Hnam dang pathian biak a tihtâwpa, ram leh Tempul a tihthianghlim hnu kum sâwm leh pariat a lal kum chuan Josia chuan Tempul chhûng siam ṭha tûrin mi pathum, Azalia fapa Safana te, Jerusalem khaw awptu Maaseia te, Joahaza fapa hotu lal tak Joa te a tîr a." 
2Chronicles34:9 Levia chi, kawngka vêngtuten Tempul sum tûr an khawn ṭhin kha puithiam lalber Hilkia hnênah an hlân zêl a. Efraim mi te, Manase mi te leh Israel hmâr lam ram mite hnên aṭang leh Judai ram te, Benjamin ram te leh Jerusalem mite hnên aṭangin an khawn ṭhîn a ni." 
2Chronicles34:10 He tangka hi, he mite pathum kutah hian an pe a, anni chuan" 
2Chronicles34:11 mistirite leh in sa mite kutah lung leh thing lei nân te, thil lo tlabal tawh, Juda lalten an lo ngaihsak loh, bangrel te, khanchhuk te siam ṭhat nân an pe a." 
2Chronicles34:12 Hnathawktute chuan uluk takin hna an thawk a, Levia chi, mi pali Meraria thlah Jahata leh Obadia te, Kohata thlah Zekaria leh Mesulama te chuan an ho va. Hêng Levia chite hi thil tum thiam tak vek an ni." 
2Chronicles34:13 Levia chia mi ṭhenkhat chuan thil thiartute an vêng a, hna hrang hrang thawktu an ho va. Ṭhenkhatin senso lam an lo chhinchhiah fel a, ṭhenkhatin vên hna an thawk a." 
2Chronicles34:14 Sum dahkhâwmna ata tangka an lâk chhuah chuan Lalpa dân bu, Mosia hnêna Pathian pêk kha, Hilkia chuan a chhar a." 
2Chronicles34:15 Safana hnênah, “Hei Tempul chhûngah, Dân bu ka chhar e,” a ti a, a pe a." 
2Chronicles34:16 Safana chuan lal hnênah a kalpui a, “I sawi ang zawng zawng chu kan ti zo ta." 
2Chronicles34:17 Tempula kawl ṭhat tangka chu kan la a, hnathawktute leh a enkawltute hlawhah kan pe tawh a." 
2Chronicles34:18 Hei Hilkia mi pêk, lehkhabu ka rawn keng e,” a ti a. Lal hriat tûr chuan a chhiar ta a." 
2Chronicles34:19 Lalin Dân thu an chhiar a han ngaihthlâk chuan a puan a pawtthlêr a," 
2Chronicles34:20 Hilkia te, Safana fapa Ahikama te, Mika fapa Abdona te, lehkha ziaktu Safana te, lal enkawltu Asaia te chu a ko va." 
2Chronicles34:21 “He Dân bu chungchâng thu-ah hian ka tân te, Israel leh Judai rama la dam chhun tân te Lalpa chu min va râwnsak teh u, min thlahtute chuan Lalpa thu an zâwm duh lo va, he lehkhabua tih tûr sawite chu an tih duh loh avângin kan chungah Lalpa a thinur a ni,” tiin a tîr a." 
2Chronicles34:22 Hilkia leh lal mi tirh dangte chu Tokhata fapa Saluma nupui zâwlnei Huldaii hnênah chuan an kal a, Tokhata hi Hasra fapa a ni, Saluma hi Tempula puithiam thawmhnaw enkawltu Jerusalem vêng thara awm a ni a, thil awm dân chu Huldaii an hrilh a." 
2Chronicles34:23 Ani chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti. Ka hnêna nangmahni rawn tîrtu chu hrilh rawh u." 
2Chronicles34:24 Lalpa chuan, ‘Lal hriata an chhiar chhuah lehkhabu ziala ânchhia zawng zawng kha Jerusalem leh a chhûnga chêngte chungah ka tlâktîr dâwn." 
2Chronicles34:25 Min hnâwl a, pathian dang hnênah thilhlante an hlân a, an thiltih chuan min tithinur ta a ni. Jerusalem chungah ka thin a ur êm êm a, a dai mai lo vang." 
2Chronicles34:26 Lal chungchâng erawh chu, kei, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian hian heti hian ka ti a ni: Lehkhabu thu ziak chu i ngaithla a," 
2Chronicles34:27 i sim a, i inphahhniam ta a. Jerusalem leh a chhûnga mi ka hrem dâwn ka tih khân pawi tiin i puan i pawtthlêr a, i ṭap a." 
2Chronicles34:28 Jerusalem chu i thih hnuah chauh a ni ka hrem dâwn ni, thlamuang takin ka thihtîr ang che a, he hmun leh a chhûnga awmte chunga ka rawn thlentîr tûr thil ṭha lo zawng zawngte chu i hmu lo vang,’ a ti,” a lo ti a. Chu thu keng chuan mite chu lal hnênah an lo kîr leh a." 
2Chronicles34:29 Lal Josia chuan Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a upate chu a ko khâwm a. 
2Chronicles34:30 Puithiamte leh Levia chite nên Tempulah an kal a, mi rethei leh mi hausate pawhin an zui a. Lal chuan Tempul chhûnga Thuthlung bu an chhar chu mipui hmaah chuan a chhiar chhuak a." 
2Chronicles34:31 Lal dinna tûra ruat ban bulah chuan a ding a, LALPA hnênah thu a thlung a, a thu awiha, rilru taka tihtakzetin a dânte leh a thupêkte chu zawm a tiam a, lehkhabua thu chuang zawng zawng pawisak vek a tiam a ni." 
2Chronicles34:32 Benjamin-ho leh Jerusalem-a awm tawh phawt chu thuthlung zâwm tûrin thu a tiamtîr a. An pute Pathian nêna thuthlung lo siam tawha tih tûr awmte chu Jerusalem mite chuan an ti a. 
2Chronicles34:33 Lal Josia chuan Israel mite ram chhûnga milem tenawm tak tak chu a tichhe vek a, a dam chhûng chuan mite chu an thlahtute Pathian, Lalpa rawng a bâwltîr a. Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian an zui chu a pênsan lo." 
2Chronicles35:1 Lal Josia chuan Lalpa hmingin Jerusalem-ah Kalhlên kût a hmang a. Thla khatna, ni sâwm leh pali ni chuan kûtna tûr ran a talh a." 
2Chronicles35:2 Puithiamho chu Tempula an thawh tûr hna a sem a, ṭha taka thawk tûrin a fuih a," 
2Chronicles35:3 Lalpa tâna serh hran, Dân zirtîrtu Levia chite pawh hetiang hian a hrilh a: “Davida fapa Solomona in sak chhûngah Thuthlung Bâwm hi dah rawh u, zâwn sawn chhên a ngai tawh lo. In Pathian, Lalpa leh a mi Israel-te rawng in bâwl tûr a ni." 
2Chronicles35:4 A chi chi-in Tempula in awmna tûrah awm ula, in tih tûr lal Davida leh a fapa Solomonan an ruat ang kha ti ang che u." 
2Chronicles35:5 Hna in insem hunah Israel chhûngkawho ṭanpuitu tûr Levia mite ruat ṭhîn ang che u. 
2Chronicles35:6 Kalhlên Kût sa tûr berâm leh kêl in talh tûr a ni. Tûnah inthian thianghlim rawh u, an thilhlan tûrte hlanpui ula, Mosia hnêna Lalpa thupêk ang kha in unau Israel-te chuan an zawm theih nân,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles35:7 Kalhlên Kûta mipui hman atân Josia chuan ama ran rual zînga mi ngei berâm te, berâmno te leh keltê sîngthum, bâwngpa sângthum a thawh a." 
2Chronicles35:8 A miliante pawh chuan mipui te, puithiam te leh Levia chi te ei tûr an thawh bawk a. Tempul hotu puithiam lalber Hilkia te, Zekaria te leh Jehiela te chuan berâmno leh keltê sanghnih leh zaruk leh bâwngpa zathum, kût chhûnga thilhlana an hlan tûrin puithiamte chu an pe a." 
2Chronicles35:9 Levia chi hotu Konania te, Semaia te leh a unau Nethanela te, Hasabia te, Jeiela te, Jozabada te chuan berâmno leh keltê sângnga leh bâwngpa zanga, Levia chiten thilhlana an hman tûr an thawh bawk a." 
2Chronicles35:10 Kalhlên Kût hmanna tûr engkim an tihfel hnu chuan lal thu angin puithiamte leh Levia chite chu an hmun ṭheuh tûrah an awm a. 
2Chronicles35:11 Kêl leh berâm an talh zawh chuan Levia chite chuan a vun an lip a, puithiamten a thisen chu maichâmah an theh a." 
2Chronicles35:12 Hâlral thilhlana hman tûr chu chhûng tin tân Mosia Dân bu-a ziak anga an hlan tûrin an sem a. 
2Chronicles35:13 Levia chite chuan Dân angin Kalhlên kût sa chu an hem hmin a, sa thianghlim ṭhenkhat chu bêlah te, thîrbêlah te, bêlpuiah te an chhûm a, a sa chu mipui an sem a." 
2Chronicles35:14 Chumi hnu chuan anmahni leh Arona thlah puithiamte ei tûr sa an siam leh a, puithiamho khân hâlral thilhlan leh an thilhlan thau hâlna mei chu an vil zânkhua si a." 
2Chronicles35:15 Lal Davida thupêk angin Asafa te, Hemana te leh lal zâwlnei Jeduthuna te chuan thil tum mi Asafa thlahte chu an awmna hmun tûrah an awmtîr a. Tempul vêngtute tân pawh kal sawn a ngai lo, an ṭhian Levia chi, mi dangte khân Kalhlên Kût sa chu an lo buatsaihsak a ni." 
2Chronicles35:16 Lal Josia thu ang chuan Lalpa chu an bia a, tih tûr zawng zawng, Kalhlên Kût hman te, maichâma hâlral thilhlan hlan te chu an ti a." 
2Chronicles35:17 Ni ruk chhûng, Kalhlên Kût leh chhang dawidim telh loh kût chu Israel mi zawng zawngin an hmang a." 
2Chronicles35:18 Zâwlnei Samuela thih hnu kha chuan heti taka ropui hian Kalhlên Kût an hmang ngai lo. Lal Josia te, puithiam te, Levia chi te, Juda leh Israel rama awmte leh Jerusalem-a awmten Kalhlên Kût an hman ang hian an la hmang ngai lo." 
2Chronicles35:19 Lal Josia kum sâwm leh pariat a lal kum khân an hmang a ni. 
2Chronicles35:20 Lal Josian heti taka Tempul a chei hnu hian Aigupta lal Nekoa chuan Eufretis lui kamah, Karkhemis-ah, indo tûrin a sipaite a hruai a. Josia chuan lo dan a tum a." 
2Chronicles35:21 Nekoa chuan, “Nang Juda lal, he thilah hian i lo inrawlhna tûr a awm lo. Nang bei tûr chein ka lo kal lo, ka hmêlma bei tûra lo kal ka ni. Pathian chuan hmanhmawh tûrin min ti a ni, ka lamṭang a ni a, mi lo dan tum teh suh, a tichhe palh ang che,” tiin palai a rawn tîr a." 
2Chronicles35:22 Josia chuan lo beih chu a tum ta tlat a, Nekoa hmanga Pathian thu sawi chu a awih duh lo va, a inchei danglam a, Megido phaia an inbeihnaah chuan a kal ve ta a." 
2Chronicles35:23 An inbeih lai chuan Aigupta sipai thal chuan Josia chu a fuh ta a. A tawlailîr khalhtu hnênah, “Min hliam na hle mai, indona hmun ata hi min chhuahpui rawh,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles35:24 Ama tawlailîr ata chu an zâwn chhuak a, tawlailîr dang a hruaiah chuan an dah a; Jerusalem-ah an hâwn ta a. A thi a, lal thlânah an phûm a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem mite chuan an ui a, an sûn a." 
2Chronicles35:25 Zâwlnei Jeremia chuan Josia sûnna hla a phuah a, Israel zîngah chuan hla sa mi, mipa leh hmeichhiaten lal sûn hlaah an sa ṭhîn. Sûnna hla ziak khâwmna bu-ah chu hla chu a chuang." 
2Chronicles35:26 Josia thil tih zawng zawng, Lalpa a ngainatzia te, Dân thu a awihzia te," 
2Chronicles35:27 a bul aṭanga a tâwp thleng chanchin chu Israel leh Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang vek a ni. 
2Chronicles36:1 Judai ram mite chuan Josia fapa Jehoahaza chu lalah an thlang a, Jerusalem-ah hriak an thih a." 
2Chronicles36:2 Jehoahaza chu kum sawmhnih leh pathum a nihin Judai ramah a lal ṭan a, thla thum a lal hman a." 
2Chronicles36:3 Aigupta lal Nekoa chuan salah a man a, Judai ram chu, chhiah, tangkarua kg. sângthum leh zali leh rangkachak kg. sawmthum leh pali a chawitîr a." 
2Chronicles36:4 Nekoa chuan Jehoahaza u Eliakima chu Judai ram lalah a dah a, a hmingah Jehoiakima a sak tharsak a, Jehoahaza chu Aigupta ramah a hruai a." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakima chu kum sawmhnih leh panga a nihin Judai ramah a lal ṭan a. Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh pakhat a lal a. Lalpa, a Pathian mit hmuhah thil sual a ti ṭhîn." 
2Chronicles36:6 Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chuan Judai ram a rûn a, Jehoiakima chu a man a, khaidiata phuar chungin Babulon-ah a hâwn a." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadnezara chuan Tempula thil hlu ṭhenkhat chu a hâwn bawk a, Babulon khuaa a inah a dah a." 
2Chronicles36:8 Jehoiakima thil tih zawng zawng, thil tenawm tak tak a tih te leh thil sual a tihte chu Israel leh Juda lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah a chuang vek a ni; a aiah a fapa Jehoiakina chu a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiakina chu kum sâwm leh pariat a nihin Judai ramah a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah thla thum leh ni sâwm a lal hman a. Ani pawh Lalpa lakah thil sual a ti a." 
2Chronicles36:10 Nipui a thâwk dâwn lai vêl chuan lal Nebukadnezara a lo kal a, Babulon-ah salah a hruai a; Tempula thil hlu zawng zawng pawh a hâwn vek a. Nebukadnezara chuan Jehoiakina nau Zedekia chu Judai ram leh Jerusalem lalah a dah a." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekia chu kum sâwm leh pariat a nihin Judai ramah a lal a. Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh pakhat chhûng a lal a. 
2Chronicles36:12 Lalpa lakah thil sual a ti a; Lalpa thu thlentu zâwlnei Jeremia thu lah ngaihthlâk thamah a ngai hek lo. 
2Chronicles36:13 Zedekia chu Nebukadnezara lakah a hel ta mai a. Pathian hminga thu a tiamtîr, lalah a dah a ni si a. Luhlul a chhuah a, a sim duh lo va, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa lam a hawi duh hek lo." 
2Chronicles36:14 Juda upa te, puithiam te leh mipui te lah chuan an vêla hnam sualho tih dân an la a, Lalpa tihthianghlim tawh Tempul chu milem biain an tibawrhbâng a." 
2Chronicles36:15 Lalpa an thlahtute Pathian chuan Tempul leh a mite chu chhan a duh avângin mipui zilh tûrin zâwlneite a tîr fo va ni. 
2Chronicles36:16 Mahse, Pathian tirhte chu an lo deusawh a, an thute lah engah mah an ngai hek lo. Zâwlneite chu an nuihzatbûr a, a tâwp a tâwpah chuan Lalpa chu pumpelh rual lohvin a thinur ta a." 
2Chronicles36:17 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan anmahni sawisa tûrin Babulon lal chu a rawn tîr a, lal chuan Judai ram tlangvâlte chu Tempul chhûngah meuh pawh a that ta zêl a. Naupang te, tar te, a hmei a pa, hrisêl leh hrisêl lo pawh tu mah lainat a nei lo. Pathianin a kutah a pe vek a ni." 
2Chronicles36:18 Babulon lal chuan Tempul chu a rawk a, thil hlu dah khâwmte chu a la a, lal in leh milian ina thil awm zawng zawng chu Babulon-ah a hâwn vek a." 
2Chronicles36:19 Tempul leh khuaa inte chu a hâl a, khawpui kulh bangte chu a ṭhiat a." 
2Chronicles36:20 Thi bâng zawng zawng chu Babulon-ah a hruai haw a, Persia-ho an lo len thleng khân amah leh a hote bawihah an awm a." 
2Chronicles36:21 Jeremia kâa Lalpa thu sawi lâwk, ‘kum sawmsarih chhûng in ram chu a châwl dêr dâwn a ni,’ a tih kha a lo thleng ta a ni." 
2Chronicles36:22 Persia rama lal Kura a lal ṭan tirh kumin, Lalpa chuan Jeremia kâa a thu sawi kha a rawn tipuitling ta a. Lal Kura chu a thunun a, hetiang hian thu a pêktîr a, a ram chhûng hmun tina chhiar theih tûrin ziakin thu chu a thawn chhuak a:" 
2Chronicles36:23 “Hei hi Persia lal Kura thupêk a ni. Lalpa, vân Pathian chuan khawvêl puma rorêltuah mi siam a. Judai ram Jerusalem-ah a tân Tempul sa tûrin min ti bawk a ni. Chuvângin, Pathian mite u, in za-in tah chuan kal rawh u, in Pathian, Lalpa chuan awmpui che u rawh se,” tiin." 
Ezra1:1 Persia lal Kura lal ṭan tirh kumin zâwlnei Jeremia kâa Lalpa thu lo sawi tawh chu a thlen kim theih nân; Lalpa chuan Persia lal Kura rilru chu a tiharh a, a ram pum puiah ziakin thu puan a chhuah a, hetiangin:" 
Ezra1:2 “Persia lal Kura chuan heti hian a ti: Vân Pathian, Lalpa chuan khawvêl ram pum pui hi min pe ta a. Judai ram Jerusalem khuaah a tân in sa tûrin min ti a ni." 
Ezra1:3 Nangni, a mi zawng zawngte hnênah Pathian chu awm rawh se. Judai ram Jerusalem khuaah chuan haw chho ula, Israel-te Pathian, Jerusalem khuaa in biak ṭhin Lalpa Tempul chu han sa ṭha rawh u le." 
Ezra1:4 A mi, saltâng tu pawh ṭanpui ngai chu an ṭhenawmten tangka te, rangkachak te leh sabengtung tein ṭanpui rawh se; Jerusalem khuaa Pathian Tempula thilhlan tûr pawh pe rawh se,” tiin." 
Ezra1:5 Juda leh Benjamin hnam hruaitu te, puithiam leh Levia chi te leh mi dang, Pathianin an rilru a tihphûrsak te chu, Jerusalem-a Lalpa in sa tûr chuan an insiam ta a." 
Ezra1:6 An vêla awmte chuan tangkaraw bungbêl te, rangkachak te, thawmhnaw te, sabengtung te an pe a, chûng bâkah Tempul sak nâna an thawhlâwmte pawh an pe bawk a." 
Ezra1:7 Nebukadnezaran Lalpa in aṭanga bungbêl a lâk zawng zawng kha an pathian inah a dah a; chûngte chu lal Kura chuan," 
Ezra1:8 lal sum enkawltu Mithredata chu a lâk chhuahtîr a, an ziak chhuak a, Juda-ho zînga hotu ber Sesbazara a pe a," 
Ezra1:9 chûngte chu: rangkachak maihûn sawmthum, tangkaraw maihûn sângkhat; chem sawmhnih leh pakua." 
Ezra1:10 Rangkachak no sawmthum; tangkaraw no zali leh sâwm; bungbêl chi dang sângkhat. 
Ezra1:11 A vaiin rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam no leh thil dang chi hrang chu kg. sângnga leh zali a ni a; Sesbazara leh saltâng dangte chuan chûng chu Babulon aṭangin Jerusalem-ah an chhohpui a. 
Ezra2:1 Saltâng tam tak chuan Babulon chu an chhuahsan a, Jerusalem-ah leh Judai ramah, mahni awm ṭhinna ṭheuhvah an haw a. Lal Nebukadnezaran a man aṭang khân Babulon-ah an chhûngin salah an awm a ni." 
Ezra2:2 An zînga hruaitu deuh deuhte chu: Jerubabela te, Jesua te, Nehemia te, Seraia te, Reelaia te, Mordekaia te, Bilsana te, Mispara te, Bigvaia te, Rehuma te, Baasa te an ni. Israel mi, chi hrang hrang lo kîr zât chu hetiang hi a ni:" 
Ezra2:3 Parosa chi mi sânghnih leh za leh sawmsarih leh pahnih; 
Ezra2:4 Sefatia chi mi zathum leh sawmsarih leh pahnih; 
Ezra2:5 Ara chi mi zasarih leh sawmsarih leh panga; 
Ezra2:6 Pahat-Moab chi, Jesua leh Joaba thlah mi sânghnih leh zariat leh sâwm leh pahnih;" 
Ezra2:7 Elama chi mi sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmnga leh pali; 
Ezra2:8 Zatu chi mi zakua leh sawmli leh panga; 
Ezra2:9 Zakai chi mi zasarih leh sawmruk; 
Ezra2:10 Bania chi mi zaruk leh sawmli leh pahnih; 
Ezra2:11 Bebai chi mi zaruk leh sawmhnih leh pathum; 
Ezra2:12 Azgad chi mi sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmhnih leh pahnih; 
Ezra2:13 Adonikam chi mi zaruk leh sawmruk leh paruk; 
Ezra2:14 Bigvai chi mi sânghnih leh sawmnga leh paruk; 
Ezra2:15 Adin chi mi zali leh sawmnga leh pali; 
Ezra2:16 Ater chi, Hezekia thlahte mi sawmkua leh pariat;" 
Ezra2:17 Bezai chi mi zathum leh sawmhnih leh pathum; 
Ezra2:18 Jora chi mi za leh sâwm leh pahnih; 
Ezra2:19 Hasum chi mi zahnih leh sawmhnih leh pathum; 
Ezra2:20 Gibar chi mi sawmkua leh panga. 
Ezra2:21 Bethlehem khaw chhuak mi za leh sawmhnih leh pathum; 
Ezra2:22 Netofa khaw chhuak mi sawmnga leh paruk; 
Ezra2:23 Anathot khaw chhuak mi za leh sawmhnih leh pariat; 
Ezra2:24 Azmavet khaw chhuak mi sawmli leh pahnih; 
Ezra2:25 Keriat-jearim te, Kafira te leh Beerot khaw chhuak mi zasarih leh sawmli leh pathum;" 
Ezra2:26 Rama leh Geba khaw chhuak mi zaruk leh sawmhnih leh pakhat; 
Ezra2:27 Mikmas khaw chhuak mi za leh sawmhnih leh pahnih; 
Ezra2:28 Bethel leh Ai khaw chhuak mi zahnih leh sawmhnih leh pathum; 
Ezra2:29 Nebo khaw chhuak mi sawmnga leh pahnih; 
Ezra2:30 Magbis khaw chhuak mi za leh sawmnga leh paruk; 
Ezra2:31 Elam khaw dang chhuak mi sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmnga leh pali; 
Ezra2:32 Harim khaw chhuak mi zathum leh sawmhnih; 
Ezra2:33 Lod te, Hadid te, Ono khua te mi zasarih leh sawmhnih leh panga;" 
Ezra2:34 Jeriko khaw chhuak mi zathum leh sawmli leh panga; 
Ezra2:35 Sena khaw chhuak mi sângthum leh zaruk leh sawmthum. 
Ezra2:36 Puithiamho, lo kîr vete chu heti hi an ni: Jesua chhûng, Jedaia thlah mi zakua leh sawmsarih leh pathum;" 
Ezra2:37 Imera thlah mi sangkhat leh sawmnga leh pahnih; 
Ezra2:38 Pasura thlah mi sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmli leh pasarih; 
Ezra2:39 Harima thlah mi sângkhat leh sâwm leh pasarih. 
Ezra2:40 Levia chi: Jesua leh Kadmiela fa, Hodavia thlah mi sawmsarih leh pali;" 
Ezra2:41 Asafa thlah, hla sa mi, za leh sawmhnih leh pariat;" 
Ezra2:42 Tempul pulis: Saluma thlah te, Atera thlah te, Talmona thlah te, Akuba thlah te, Hatita thlah te, Sobaia thlah te mi za leh sawmthum leh pakua." 
Ezra2:43 Tempul enkawltu Netin-ho lo hâw vete chu: Ziha fa te, Hasufa fa te, Tabaota fa te," 
Ezra2:44 Kerosa fa te, Siaha fa te, Padona fa te," 
Ezra2:45 Lebana fa te, Hagaba fa te, Akuba fa te," 
Ezra2:46 Hagaba fa te, Samlaia fa te, Hanana fa te," 
Ezra2:47 Gidela fa te, Gahara fa te, Reaia fa te," 
Ezra2:48 Rezina fa te, Nekoda fa te, Gazama fa te," 
Ezra2:49 Uza fa te, Pasea fa te, Besaia fa te," 
Ezra2:50 Asna fa te, Meunima fa te, Nefisima fa te," 
Ezra2:51 Bakbuka fa te, Hakufa fa te, Harhura fa te," 
Ezra2:52 Bazluta fa te, Mehida fa te, Harsaa fa te," 
Ezra2:53 Barkosa fa te, Sisera fa te, Tema fa te," 
Ezra2:54 Nezia fa te, Hatifa fa te." 
Ezra2:55 Solomona chhiahhlawh thlah te: Sotaia fa te, Hasofereta fa te, Peruda fa te," 
Ezra2:56 Jaala fa te, Darkona fa te, Gidela fa te," 
Ezra2:57 Sefatia fa te, Hatila fa te, Pokeret-hazebaima fa te, Amia fa te;" 
Ezra2:58 Netin-ho leh Solomona chhiahhlawh thlahte chu mi zathum leh sawmkua leh pahnih an ni. 
Ezra2:59 Telmela khua te, Tel-harsa khua te, Kerub khua te, Adam khua leh Imer khua te aṭanga chho vete chu heti hi an ni: Hêngho hian Israel thlah an nihna chiah, an chi leh kuang an chhui thei lo;" 
Ezra2:60 Delaia thlah te, Tobia thlah te, Nekoda thlahte mi zaruk leh sawmnga leh pahnih an ni." 
Ezra2:61 Hêng puithiamho hian an thlahtu tak an chhui chhuak thei lo: Habaia fa te, Hakoza fa te, Barzilaia fa te. Puithiam Barzilai-ho thlahtu Barzilaia hian Gilead mi Barzilai hmeichhia nupuiah a nei a, a puzawn chhûng hming chu an pu zâwk ta a ni." 
Ezra2:62 An thlahtu tak an chhui chhuah theih loh avângin puithiamah pawm an ni ta lo va. 
Ezra2:63 Juda zînga hotu ber ramawptu chuan, “Puithiam, Urim leh Thumim kawltu a awm hma chu Pathian hnêna thilhlan hi ei ve suh u,” a ti a." 
Ezra2:64 An zavai chuan mi sîngli leh sânghnih leh zathum leh sawmruk an ni. 
Ezra2:65 An chhiahhlawh, mipa leh hmeichhia mi sângsarih leh zathum leh sawmthum leh pasarih; Hla sa mi mipa leh hmeichhia zahnih;" 
Ezra2:66 Sakawr zasarih leh sawmthum leh paruk, sakawr puakphur zahnih leh sawmli leh panga;" 
Ezra2:67 Sanghâwngsei zali leh sawmthum leh panga, Sabengtung sângruk leh zasarih leh sawmhnih." 
Ezra2:68 Saltânghovin Jerusalem-a Lalpa Tempul hmun an lo thlen chuan an hnam hotu ṭhenkhat chuan phal takin a hmun ngaia Tempul sak ṭhat lehna tûr thilpêk an pe a. 
Ezra2:69 An neih ang ang chu an pe a, a vaiin rangkachak kg. zanga, tangkarua kg. sânghnih leh zariat leh puithiam hâk tûr puan za a ni." 
Ezra2:70 Puithiamho te, Levia chite leh mi ṭhenkhat chu Jerusalem leh a chhehvêl hnaiah hmun an bêngbel a; hla sa mi te, Tempul pulis te, Tempul enkawltu te chu khawpui hnaiah hmun an bêngbel a; Israel-ho mi dangte chuan an thlahtute awm ṭhinna khua an pan a." 
Ezra3:1 Thla sarih chhûngin Israel-te chu mahni awmna tûr ṭheuhvah an awm fel hman a, Jerusalem-ah an kal khâwm ta vek a." 
Ezra3:2 Jozadaka fapa Jesua leh a puithiam nihpui Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh an unaute chu an tho va; Israel-te Pathian maichâm, Pathian mi Mosia Dân bu-a ziak anga hâlral thilhlan an hlanna tûr an siam a." 
Ezra3:3 Chu rama mi lo awmte chu saltâng chhuakte chuan hlau bawk mah se, maichâm chu a awm ṭhinnaah khân an din leh ta a; zîngah leh tlaiah hâlral thilhlan an hâl leh ta a." 
Ezra3:4 Bâwkte kût an hmang a, kût chhûng chuan ni tin thilhlan tûr tuk zât, dân bu-a ziak ang chu an hlân a." 
Ezra3:5 Ni tina hâlral thilhlan an hlan bâkah thla thar apianga an thilhlan ṭhin te, Lalpa hminga inkhâwmpui urhsûn an neih ṭuma an thilhlan te, an mahni duh thu-a thilhlan te chu an hlân ṭan leh ta a." 
Ezra3:6 Thla sarihna, ni khat ni aṭang chuan Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlan an hâl leh ṭan a, Lalpa Tempul erawh chu a lung pawh an la phûm lo." 
Ezra3:7 Mite chuan an thawhlâwm a, lung chher mi te, thing mistiri te hlawh neiin an ruai a. Lebanon tlânga sidar thing, tuifinriata tawlha, Joppa khua rawn thlen tûrin Sidon leh Tura mite chu buh te, uain te, oliv hriak te an pe bawk a. Chûng chu Persia lal Kura phalna veka tih a ni." 
Ezra3:8 Jerusalem khuaa Lalpa in awmna ṭhin an lo thlen kum hnihna, thla hnihnaah chuan Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jozadaka fapa Jesua chuan Tempul sak leh hna chu an ṭan a; an unau dangte - puithiam te leh Levia chi te, saltâng chhuak zawng zawngte pawh chu Jerusalem-ah an lo kal khâwm a, Levia chi kum sawmhnih chin chung lam chu Tempul sak enkawltuah an ruat a." 
Ezra3:9 Levia chi Jesua chu a fate leh an laichînte nên, Kadmiela leh a fate nên, Hadavia thlahte nên chuan Lalpa in satu hotu-ah an ruat a. Levia chi, Henadada leh a fate leh an unaute pawh chuan, an ṭanpui bawk ṭhîn." 
Ezra3:10 Lalpa Tempul tân lung an phûm dâwn ni chuan, puithiamho chuan an puithiam kawr an inbel a, tawtawrâwt an keng a, Israel lal Davida remruat angin Asafa thlah Levia chite chu Lalpa fak hla sa tûrin dârbenthekte nên an lo thawk bawk a." 
Ezra3:11 Lalpa chu an fak a, lâwmthu an hrilh a, hla sa-in an inchhâwn a; “Ani chu a ṭha si a, Israel-te chungah ngîl a nei kumkhua dâwn a ni,” an ti a. Lalpa in sakna tûr lung an han phûm chuan Lalpa fakin mipui zawng zawng chu an au dur dur a." 
Ezra3:12 Upaho, puithiamte leh Levia chi tam tak leh hnam hruaitute, Tempul a din lai hmu phate erawh chuan Tempul sakna tûr lung an phûm an han hmuh chuan ring takin an ṭap a, mi tam tak erawh chu lâwmin an au va." 
Ezra3:13 Lâwma au thâwm leh lungchhiaa ṭap thâwm chu hriat hran hleih theih pawh a ni lo, an au ring êm a, hla tak aṭang pawhin an thâwm chu a hriat theih a ni." 
Ezra4:1 Juda leh Benjamin thlah ertute chuan, saltâng kîr lehten Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa tân Tempul an sa ṭha tih an hriat chuan" 
Ezra4:2 Zerubabelâ leh hnam hruaitute hnênah an lo kal a, “Tempul saknaah hian kan tel ve ang e; in biak Pathian bawk hi kan bia a, Asuria lal Esar-hadonan hêng laia awm tûra min hâwntîr hnuah phei chuan a hnênah hlîr inthawina pawh kan hlân ṭhîn a ni,” an rawn ti a." 
Ezra4:3 Zerubabela te, Jesua te leh hnam hruaitu te chuan, “Kan Pathian, Lalpa Tempul hi min sakpui a ngai lo ve; keimahniin kan sa mai ang. Babulon lal Kuran thu min pêk angin,” tiin an chhâng a." 
Ezra4:4 Chûng lai rama mi lo awmte chuan Juda-te in sa chu an tibuai ta a. 
Ezra4:5 Persia sawrkâr mite chu an hna tibahlah tûrin an tham a. Chutiang chuan Kura lal chhûng zawng Daria a lo lal thleng khân an tibuai a ni. 
Ezra4:6 Ahasuera a lo lal phei kha chuan an hmêlma, Jerusalem leh Judai rama awmte chuan ziak meuhvin an hêk a." 
Ezra4:7 Artazerzia kha Persia rama Babulon lal a lo nih khân Bislama te, Mithredata te leh Tabeela te chuan lal hnênah ziakin an hêk bawk a, an hêkna lehkha chu Aramaik ṭawngin, Aramaik hawrawpa ziak a ni." 
Ezra4:8 Ramawptu Rehuma leh chu ram ziaktu Simsaia pawhin lal Artazerzia chu Jerusalem mite chungchâng hetiangin lehkha an thawn bawk: 
Ezra4:9 Ramawptu Rehuma te, Ziaktu Simsaia te, an hna thawhpui, rorêltute leh sawrkâr hna thawk dang - Babulon bial Erek leh, Elam bial Susa khaw mite leh," 
Ezra4:10 Asurbanipal ropuia leh thiltitheian an in leh lo aṭanga Samaria khua leh Eufretis lui khawthlang lama a awmtîrte hminga an lehkha ziak chu hetiang hi a ni: 
Ezra4:11 “Lal Artazerzia chu, a chhiahhlawh Eufretis lui khawthlang lama awmte chuan chibai kan bûk a che." 
Ezra4:12 Juda-ho, i ram hmun hrang hrang aṭanga lo kal, Jerusalem-a awm tâte chuan khaw luhlul tak leh hel hmang tak chu an din leh dâwn a; a kulh bang an rem tawh a, an sa zo mai dâwn tih i hriat kan duh a ni." 
Ezra4:13 Ka pu, he khua hi din leh a niha, a kulh bangte an rem zawh chuan mite chuan chhiah an pe duh lo vang che a, leiman leh thil dang an chawi duh lo vang a, lal sum tûr a kiam hle ang tih lal chuan hre teh se." 
Ezra4:14 Lal zârzotute kan ni a, chutianga lal tâna thil ṭha lo chu thleng lo se tiin lal chu hetianga ti tûrin kan ngên a che." 
Ezra4:15 I pate thil hlui chhinchhiahna chu zawn chhuahtîr mah teh, he khawpuia mite hi mi tihmawh tak an ni a, hmânlai aṭang tawhin lal leh ramawptute tân awp an khirh êm êm ṭhîn a ni; chuvângin alâwm khua an chhut chhiat vek ni." 
Ezra4:16 He khua hi an sak ṭhat leha, a kulh bangte an rem zawh chuan Eufretis khawthlang lam ram hi lal chuan a thunun thei lo mai ang tih kan ring tlat a ni,” tiin." 
Ezra4:17 Lal chuan hetiang hian a chhâng a: “Ramawptu Rehuma te, Ziaktu Simsaia te, an thawhpui Samaria-a awm leh Eufretis lui thlang lama awmte hnênah:" 
Ezra4:18 Lehkha in rawn thawn chu fiah takin kan hriatah an chhiar a. 
Ezra4:19 Chanchin ziaknate chu chhui tûrin ka han ti a; hmânlai aṭang tawhin Jerusalem khua chu an lalte lakah hel an chîng a; khuaah chuan hel chîng, buaina chawk chhuak peih tak tak an awm ṭeuh a ni." 
Ezra4:20 Lal chak tak takte chuan Eufretis khawthlang lam ramahte chuan ro an rêl a, chhiah te, leiman te an chawitîr ṭhîn." 
Ezra4:21 Thu leh awm hma chu hêng mite hi khaw din hna titâwp tûrin thu pe rawh u. 
Ezra4:22 Muangchâng lovin khap vat rawh u, lal tâna thil ṭha lo zual a thlen loh nân.”" 
Ezra4:23 Rehuma te, Simsaia te leh an thawhpui te hriata lal Artazerzia lehkha an chhiar zawh chuan an kal nghâl a, Juda-ten khaw din an tum chu an han titâwp ta a." 
Ezra4:24 Persia lal Daria a lo lal kum hnihna thlengin Tempul sak pawh an chawlhsan a. 
Ezra5:1 Chutih hun lai chuan zâwlnei pahnih Hagaia leh Ido-a fapa Zakaria chuan Israel-te Pathian hmingin Jerusalem leh Judai rama awm Juda-ho hnênah thu an sawi a. 
Ezra5:2 Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jozadaka fapa Jesua chuan Jerusalem-a Pathian in chu an sa ṭan leh ta a; zâwlnei pahnihte pawh chuan an ṭanpui a. 
Ezra5:3 Eufretis khawthlang lam ram awptu Tatenaia te, Sethar-bozenaia te leh an thawhpuite chu Jerusalem-ah an lo kal vat a. “Tu nge Tempul saa chei tûrin phalna pe che u?” an rawn ti a." 
Ezra5:4 Tempul satute hming pawh an zâwt a. 
Ezra5:5 Pathian chuan Juda hotute chu a vêng a; sawrkâr hotute chuan lal Daria hnêna lehkha thawna, a chhânna an hmuh hma chu engtia tih mah an tum lo." 
Ezra5:6 Hetiang hian lehkha chu an thawn a: 
Ezra5:7 “Lal Daria chuan thlamuang takin ro rêl reng rawh se. 
Ezra5:8 Lal chuan hei hi hria se kan ti a ni. Judai ramah kan han kal a; Pathian ropui tak Tempul chu lung lian pui pui hmangin an lo sa ṭha leh mêk a; thing tlâwn khanchhukte bangah an kham a, an sa uluk hle, hna pawh an thawk chak viau a ni." 
Ezra5:9 An hruaitute chu, tu nge Tempul sak ṭhata, chei leh phalna petu tih kan zâwt a." 
Ezra5:10 An hruaitute hming pawh i hriat ve atân kan zâwt bawk a. 
Ezra5:11 Anni chuan, ‘Lei leh vân Pathian chhiahhlawh kan ni a, Israel lal ropui takin tûn hma rei tak tawha a saka, a chei Tempul chu kan sa ṭha leh a ni." 
Ezra5:12 Kan pate chuan vân Pathian chu an tithinur a, Babulon lal, Kaldai mi, Nebukadnezara kutah a pe a, ani chuan he in hi a tichhia a, mite chu Babulon-ah a hruai a." 
Ezra5:13 Babulon-ah lal Kura a lal ṭan tirh khân he Pathian in hi sak leh tûr thu a pe a ni. 
Ezra5:14 Jerusalem Tempul aṭanga Nebukadnezaran a lâk, Babulon ram Tempula a dah tâk rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam bungbêlte chu lal Kura chuan Babulon Tempul aṭang chuan a la chhuak a, ramawptu atâna a ruat Sesbazara kutah a hlân a," 
Ezra5:15 a hnênah, ‘Hêng bungbêlte hi la la, Jerusalem Tempulah chuan han dah rawh, Pathian in chu a hmun ngaiah han sa rawh u,’ a ti a." 
Ezra5:16 Sesbazara chu a lo kal a, Jerusalem-a Pathian in dinna tûr lung chu a phûm a, a in sak chu chhunzawm zêl a ni a, kan la zo lo a nih hi,’ tiin min chhâng a." 
Ezra5:17 Chuvângin lalin ṭha a tihzâwng a nih chuan Babulon khuaa lal thil hlui chhinchhiah dahna hmunah hetiang thupêk, Jerusalem khuaa Pathian in sa ṭha tûr hian lal Kura chuan thu a lo pe rêng em ni, zawn chhuah ni teh se. Tin, he thila lal duhzâwng chu min rawn hrilh teh se,” tiin." 
Ezra6:1 Lal Daria chuan thu a pe a, Babulon khuaa lal thil hlui dahna chu a zawntîr a." 
Ezra6:2 Media biala Ekbatan khuaah zâwk chuan he thu chuanna hi an hmu chhuak a: 
Ezra6:3 “Lal Kura chuan a lal ṭan tirh kumin Jerusalem Tempul chu inthawina leh hâlral thilhlan hâlna hmun atân sak ṭhat tûr thu a pe a ni. Tempul chu tawng sawmruka sâng ni sela, tawng sawmruka zau ni bawk rawh se." 
Ezra6:4 Lung lian pui pui thuah thumin rem ni se, thingphel thara thuah tûr a ni; a senso hi lal sum aṭanga pêk ni rawh se." 
Ezra6:5 Jerusalem Tempul aṭanga rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbêl zawng zawng, lal Nabukadnezaran Babulon-a a rawn hawnte kha tûn hmaa a awmna ṭhîn Jerusalem Tempulah dah kîr leh tûr,” tiin lal thupêk chu an lo ziak a." 
Ezra6:6 Lal Daria chuan hetiang hian a chhâng a: “Eufretis khawthlang lam ram awptu Tatenaia te, Sethar-bozenaia te leh an thawhpui Eufretis thlang lama awm te u: Tempul chu han hnaih suh u," 
Ezra6:7 an sa ṭha lai chu tibuai hek suh u. Judai ram awptu leh Juda hruaitute chuan Pathian Tempul chu a awmna ngaiah sa ṭha leh rawh se. 
Ezra6:8 Juda hotuten Pathian in an sa ṭha chu nangni pawhin ṭanpui rawh u; an hna hi a bahlah loh nân Eufretis khawthlang lama chhiah lâk, lal chanpual tûr aṭangin an senso tûr lo pe zat zat ang che u." 
Ezra6:9 Ni tina an mamawh bâwngtuai te, berâmchal te, berâmno te vân Pathian tâna hâlral thilhlana an hlan tûr chhangphut te, chi te, uain te, oliv hriakte nên Jerusalem puithiamte sawi apiang chu pe zêl ang che u." 
Ezra6:10 Tichuan, an Pathian lâwmzâwng thilhlan an hlân thei ang a, kei leh ka fate tân malsâwmna min dîlsak dâwn nia." 
Ezra6:11 He thupêk hi awih duh lo an awm chuan a in chung inchhun chu pawh dawha, a hmâwr lehlam zuma, chu chuan a taksa chu chhun tlang tûr a ni; a in chu ṭhiata, bawlhhlawh dah khâwma chantîr tûr thu ka pe nghâl a ni." 
Ezra6:12 He thupêk hi awih lova Tempul chu tihchhiat tum hnamte leh lalte chu, amah chibai bûkna hmuna Jerusalem khua thlangtu chuan paihthla rawh se. Kei Daria hian thu ka pêk tawh hi, zâwm thlap rawh u,” tiin." 
Ezra6:13 Ramawptu Tatenaia te, Sethar-bozenaia te leh an thawhpui te chuan lal thupêk ang thlap chuan engkim an ti a." 
Ezra6:14 Zâwlnei Hagaia leh Zakaria chuan an fuih bawk a. Juda hruaitute Tempul sa chu an chak hle mai. Pathianin thu a pêk ang leh Persia lal Kura te, Daria te, Artazerzia te pawhin thu an pêk angin Tempul chu an sa zo ta a." 
Ezra6:15 Lal Daria lal kum rukna Adar thla, ni thum niin an sa zo ta a." 
Ezra6:16 Israel mi, puithiam te, Levia chi te, saltâng lo kîr leh zawng zawng chuan Tempul chu hlim takin an hawng a." 
Ezra6:17 A hawn ni chuan bâwngchal za, berâmchal zahnih, berâmno zali hâlral thilhlanah an hlân a. Israel hnam hming kimin sual thawina kêlpa sâwm leh pahnih an hlân bawk a." 
Ezra6:18 Mosia dân bu-a ziak angin puithiamte leh Levia chite chu Tempula an hna tûr an sem felsak bawk a. 
Ezra6:19 A kum leh thla tîr, ni sâwm leh pali ni chuan saltâng lo haw lehte chuan Kalhlên kût an hmang a." 
Ezra6:20 Puithiamte leh Levia chite chu an inthian thianghlim tlâng tawh a, an za chuan an thiang a ni. Saltângte chu Kalhlên kût berâmno an talhsak a, a ṭhen chuan puithiam leh Levia chi dangte chu berâmno an talhsak bawk a." 
Ezra6:21 Saltâng lo haw Israel-te leh chu rama hnam dang bawlhhlawhna ata inthiarfihlîma, Lalpa Israel-te Pathian pawmtute chuan an ei ta a." 
Ezra6:22 Chhang dawidim telh loh kût ni sarih chu hlim takin an hmang a. Lalpa chuan a tilâwm a ni; Asuria lal thinlung pawh a tihmensak a, Israel-te Pathian, an Pathian in sakna pawh nasa takin a pui a ni." 
Ezra7:1 Kum tam fe hnuah Artazerzia chu Persia ram lal a lo nih khân, mi pakhat Seraia fapa, Ezra pawh Jerusalem-ah a lo chho va. Ezra chu Seraia fa, Azaria fa, Hilkia fa," 
Ezra7:2 Saluma fa, Zadoka fa, Ahituba fa," 
Ezra7:3 Amaria fa, Azaria fa, Meraiota fa," 
Ezra7:4 Zerahia fa, Uzia fa, Bukia fa," 
Ezra7:5 Abisua fa, Finehasa fa, Eleazara fa, Puithiam lalber Arona fa a ni." 
Ezra7:6 He mi, Ezra hi, Babulon aṭangin Jerusalem-ah a lo chho ve a, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa pêk Mosia Dân hre tak a ni." 
Ezra7:7 Lalpa, a Pathian chuan a awmpui avângin a duh apiang lal chuan a phalsak a." 
Ezra7:8 Artazerzia lal kum sarih kum thla khatnaah chuan Israel mi puithiam te, Levia chi te, Tempul pulis te leh Tempul enkawltu Netin-ho te leh mi ṭhenkhat te nên Jerusalem-ah an chho va." 
Ezra7:9 Artazerzia lal kum sarihna, thla khatna ni khat ni-in Babulon an chhuahsan a, Pathianin a awmpui a; thla ngana ni khat ni chuan Jerusalem an thleng a." 
Ezra7:10 Ezra chuan Pathian dân chu a dam chhûnga zir tûrin a inpe a, a tiha tihin thuruatte leh awm dân tûrte chu Israel mite zirtîr a châk hle a ni." 
Ezra7:11 Lal Artazerzia chuan Ezra chu he lehkha hi a kentîr a; Ezra chu lehkha thiam, Israel-te hnêna Lalpa thupêkte leh Israel-te tâna a thuruatte hre tak a ni." 
Ezra7:12 “Lalte lal Artazerzia chuan puithiam Ezra, Vân Pathian Dân hretu hnênah:" 
Ezra7:13 Ka ram chhûnga Israel mi, puithiamte leh Levia chite nên, a duh apiang Jerusalem khuaa an chhoh ka phal e." 
Ezra7:14 Kei leh thu min râwntu pasarihte chuan Jerusalem leh Judai rama thil awm dân en thlithlai tûrin kan tîr che a ni, Pathian Dân i kuta kawltîr chu an zâwm ṭha meuh em tih te i en dâwn nia." 
Ezra7:15 Kei leh thu min râwntuten, Israel-te Pathian, Jerusalem-a Tempul neitu tân tangka leh rangkachak kan pêkte hi i keng dâwn nia." 
Ezra7:16 Babulon biala tangka leh rangkachak thawhlâwm khawn zawng zawng te, Israel mite leh an puithiamten Jerusalem khuaa an Pathian Tempul sak nâna an thilpêk te pawh i keng dâwn nia." 
Ezra7:17 “Tangka chu uluk takin hmang la, bâwngpa te, berâmchal te, berâmno te, chhangphut te, uain te leh oliv hriak te lei la, Jerusalem Tempula awm maichâmah chuan hlân ang che." 
Ezra7:18 Tangka leh rangkachak in hman bâng chu, nang leh i chipuite chuan in Pathian duhzâwng anga ṭûl in tihna apiangah hmang ang che u." 
Ezra7:19 Tempula hman tûr bungbêl ka pêk zawng zawng che u kha Jerusalem-a in Pathian hnênah chuan hlân ang che. 
Ezra7:20 Tempula hman tûr thil dang in mamawh chuan a leina tûr chu lal sum aṭangin la mai ṭhîn ang che u. 
Ezra7:21 “Kei, Artazerzia hian, thu ka pe a che u: Eufretis lui thlang lam ram biala lal tangka vawngtu chuan puithiam Ezra, vân Pathian Dân chungchânga mi thiam hi, a dîl apiang lo pe nghâl vat ang che u." 
Ezra7:22 Tangkarua kg. sângthum leh zali chin, chhangphut kg. sîngkhat chin, uain litar sânghnih chin, oliv hriak litar sânghnih chin leh chi a ṭûl zât zât in lo pe zêl tûr a ni." 
Ezra7:23 Vân Pathianin a Tempul atân a phût ang chiah chu in pe zêl tûr a ni, kan ram leh kan fate chungah a thinur tûr a ni lo." 
Ezra7:24 Puithiam te, Levia chi te, hla sa mi te, Tempul pulis te, Tempul enkawltu te, Tempula cheho rêng rêng lakah chhiah eng mah la suh u." 
Ezra7:25 “Tin, nang Ezra, i Pathianin finna a pêk che chu hmang la, Eufretis lui khawthlang lam biala awm, in Pathian dân zâwm duhtute tân rorêltute siam la, anmahni awptu tûr mi ruat ang che, a la hre lo apiangte chu in Pathian Dân chu zirtîr la," 
Ezra7:26 in Pathian Dân zâwm duh lotu emaw, ram dân zâwm duh lotu emaw tawh phawt chu hrem nat hle zêl tûr a ni; tihhlum emaw, ram ata hnawh chhuah emaw, a thil neih chhuhsak emaw, lung ina khungin emaw hrem tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Ezra7:27 Ezra chuan, “ Lalpa, mi thlah lotu chu fak rawh u, Jerusalem-a awm Lalpa in chei ropui nân lal thinlung heti tak hian a tithilphal a." 
Ezra7:28 Lal leh a thurâwntute chu ka chungah ngîl a neihtîr a, hotu lian dangte pawhin min duhsak a; Lalpa, ka Pathian chuan min tihuai a, Israel hnam hruaitu tam tak ka ruala haw tûrin ka thlêmthlu thei a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezra8:1 Hêng hi Israel hnam, Babulon sala tâng, lal Artazerzia lal laia Ezra ruala Jerusalem-a hawte chu an ni:" 
Ezra8:2 Finehasa thlahte zînga mi Gersoma te; Ithamara thlahte zînga mi Daniela te, Davida thlahte zînga mi Sekania fa Hatusa te." 
Ezra8:2 Finehasa thlahte zînga mi Gersoma te; Ithamara thlahte zînga mi Daniela te, Davida thlahte zînga mi Sekania fa Hatusa te." 
Ezra8:3 Parosa thlahte zînga mi Zakaria, mi za leh sawmnga nên (an thlah chanchin ziakna bu a awm)." 
Ezra8:4 Pahat-moaba thlahte zînga mi Zerahia fa Eliehoenaia, mi zahnih nên." 
Ezra8:5 Zatua thlahte zînga mi Jahaziela fa Sekania, mi zathum nên." 
Ezra8:6 Adina thlahte zînga mi Jonathana fa Ebeda, mi sawmnga nên." 
Ezra8:7 Elama thlahte zînga mi Athalia fapa Jesaia, mi sawmsarih nên." 
Ezra8:8 Sefatia thlahte zînga mi Mikaela fa Zebadia, mi sawmriat nên." 
Ezra8:9 Joaba thlahte zînga mi Zehiela fa Obadia, mi zahnih leh sâwm leh pariat nên." 
Ezra8:10 Bania thlahte zînga mi Josifia fa Selomita, mi za leh sawmruk nên." 
Ezra8:11 Bebaia thlahte zînga mi Bebaia fa Zekaria, mi sawmhnih leh pariat nên." 
Ezra8:12 Azgada thlahte zînga mi Hakatana fa Johanana, mi za leh sâwm nên." 
Ezra8:13 Adonikama thlahte zînga mi: Elifeleta te, Jeuela te, Semaia te, mi sawmruk nên (anniho hi a hnu deuhva lo haw ve an ni)." 
Ezra8:14 Bigvaia thlahte zînga mi Uthaia leh Zakura, mi sawmsarih nên." 
Ezra8:15 Ahava khaw bula tuikawng kamah chuan saltâng lo chhuakte chu ka ko khâwm a, ni thum chhûng kan châm a. Saltâng chhuakho zîngah chuan puithiam chu an lo awm a, Levia chi erawh chu an awm lo." 
Ezra8:16 An hotu pakua, Eleazara te, Ariela te, Semaia te, Elnathana te, Jariba te, Elnathana te, Nathana te, Zekaria te, Mesulama te chu ka ko va, zirtîrtu Joiariba leh Elnathana pawh ka ko va." 
Ezra8:17 Kasifia hmuna an hotu ber Ido-a leh Tempula a thawhpuite hnênah Pathian rawngbâwl tûr, Tempula che thei tûr mi rawn zawng tûrin chûng mite chu ka tîr a." 
Ezra8:18 Pathianin min khawngaih a, mi fel tak Serebia, Levia chi, Mahlia thlah an rawn tîr a; a fate leh a unaute mi sâwm leh pariat an lo kal tel ve a." 
Ezra8:19 Meraria thlah Hasabia leh Jesaia pawh an chhûngte mi sawmhnih nên an rawn tîr bawk a. 
Ezra8:20 Chûng mite bâkah chuan Tempul enkawltu Netin-ho mi zahnih leh sawmhnih an rawn tîr tel bawk a; chûngho thlahtute chu lal Davida leh a hote khân Levia-ho ṭanpuituah an dah a nih kha, an hming ziakna bu pawh a la awm vek a ni." 
Ezra8:21 Ahava khaw bula tuikawng kamah chuan kan zaa tân chaw nghei tûr thu ka puang a; kan Pathian hmaa inphahhniamin kalkawnga min hruaia, kan thil neih leh kan fate nên min vêng tûrin kan ṭawngṭai a." 
Ezra8:22 ‘Kan Pathian chuan amah ringtu apiangte chu mal a sâwm ṭhîn a, amah hawisantute erawh chu a lâwm lo va, a hrem ṭhîn’ tiin lal chu ka lo hrilh ṭhin avângin kalkawnga râl laka min vêngtu tûr sakawr chungchuang sipai rual ka dîl zak a ni." 
Ezra8:23 Tichuan, chaw kan nghei a, min vêng tûrin Pathian hnênah kan ṭawngṭai a, kan ṭawngṭaina chu a rawn chhâng ta rêng a." 
Ezra8:24 Puithiam zînga hotu deuh deuh Serebia te, Hasabia te leh mi dang sâwm ka thlang chhuak a;" 
Ezra8:25 lal leh a thurâwntute, a miliante leh Israel miten Tempula hman tûr tangkarua te, rangkachak te leh bungbêl an pêkte chu ka bûk chhuak a, puithiamte hnênah chuan ka sem a:" 
Ezra8:26 Tangkarua chu kg. sînghnih leh sânghnih a ni, tangkaraw bungbêl za, kg. sawmsarih bûk, rangkachak chu kg. sângthum leh zali," 
Ezra8:27 rangkachak maihûn sawmhnih, kg. riat leh tlem a rit; dâr chawhtawlh mawi tak pahnih, rangkachak maihûn tluka hlu a ni." 
Ezra8:28 An hnênah, “ Lalpa tâna serh hran in ni, hêng bungbêlte pawh hi bungbêl thianghlim an ni; hêng thil thlâwn pêk tangkarua te, rangkachak te hi Lalpa, in Pathian tâna pêk a ni." 
Ezra8:29 Vêng ula, kawl ṭha rawh u; Jerusalem-a Lalpa in pindan pakhata puithiam leh Levia chi hotute leh Israel hnam hotute hnêna in hlan hunah in bûk leh tûr a ni,” ka ti a." 
Ezra8:30 Tichuan, puithiamte leh Levia chite chuan tangkarua te, rangkachak te leh bungbêl te chu Jerusalem Tempula ken tûr chuan an la ta a." 
Ezra8:31 Thla hmasa ber ni sawmhnih ni chuan Ahava tuikawng chu Jerusalem pan tûrin kan chhuahsan a. Kan kalnaah chuan hmêlma min rawn bei tûr lakah te, min châng rutute lakah te kan Pathian chuan min vêng zêl a." 
Ezra8:32 Jerusalem kan thlen chuan ni thum kan hahchâwl a. 
Ezra8:33 A ni li ni chuan Tempulah kan kal a, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, leh bungbêl kan ken te chu kan bûk chhuak a, Uria fapa puithiam Meremota kutah kan hlân a. Finehasa fapa Eleazara leh Levia chi mi pahnih, Jesua fapa Jozabada leh Binuia fapa Noadia pawh an awm ve a." 
Ezra8:34 Engkim kan chhiar a, kan bûk vek a, kan chhinchhiah vek a ni." 
Ezra8:35 Saltâng lo haw zawng zawng chuan Israel Pathian hnênah hâlral thilhlan an hlân ṭheuh va, Israel hnam hming kimin bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih, berâmchal sawmkua leh paruk leh berâmno sawmsarih leh pasarih; sual thawi nan kelpa sawm leh pahnih an hlân a. Chûng sa zawng zawng chu Lalpa tân hâlral vek a ni." 
Ezra8:36 Lalin lehkha a kentîr pawh chu Eufretis lui khawthlang bial ram awptu leh mi lian dangte chu an entîr a; anniho chuan Tempul sakna leh Pathian biaknaah mipuite an ṭanpui ta zêl a. 
Ezra9:1 Chûng thil chu kan tih zawh chuan Israel hotute chu an lo kal a, “Israel mite hian, puithiam leh Levia chite pawhin an chhehvêl hnam Amon te, Moab te, Aigupta mi te, Kanan mi te, Hit mi te, Periz mi te, Jebus mi te, Amor mite lak aṭanga inthiarfihlîm lovin thil tenawm an tih ṭhin chu an ti ve zêl mai." 
Ezra9:2 Anmahni leh an fate pawhin, hnam dang an nei a, chi thianghlim chu an tidal ta a. Hnam hruaitute leh hotute hi a ti hmasa sa an ni lehnghâl a,” an rawn ti a." 
Ezra9:3 Chu thu chu ka han hriat chuan pawi ka ti êm êm a, ka silhfênte ka pawtthlêr a, ka sam leh khabehmul ka tikawlh a, hrilhhai deuhvin ka ṭhu ta reng a." 
Ezra9:4 Lungngai takin tlai hâlral thilhlan an hâl thlengin ka ṭhu a, saltâng kîr lehte khawsak pawlawh êm avânga Israel-te Pathian thu sawi hlau apiang chuan min rawn pan khâwm a." 
Ezra9:5 Tlai lam hâlral thilhlan an hlan lai chuan chaw ngheia ka ṭhu chu ka tho va, ka silhfên thlêrte chu ka la inbel zêl a, ṭawngṭaiin ka ṭhingṭhi a, Lalpa, ka Pathian lamah chuan ka bân ka phar a." 
Ezra9:6 “Aw ka Pathian, i lam lo hawi hi ka zak a, ka hmai pawh a sen ṭâwn ṭâwn a ni. Kan sualna intiang khâwm chuan kan lu a khûm a, vân a tawng tâk hial hi." 
Ezra9:7 Kan pate hun aṭanga tûn thlengin i mite hi kan demawm hle a ni. Kan sual avângin kan lalte leh kan puithiamte nên hnam dang lalte kutah min pe a, an duh leh min talh a, an duh leh min rawk a, salahte min man a, vawiin thlengin kan mualpho let dêr a nih hi." 
Ezra9:8 “Aw Lalpa kan Pathian, nangin min lainat a, heta awm chhunte hi bawih ata kan chhuah i phal a, rei lo tê chhûng chu i Hmun Thianghlimah hian min awmtîr a, mi tihlimin sala kan awm nun ngui chu mi tihharhsak hi." 
Ezra9:9 Bawih kan ni a; mahse, kan Pathian hian bawiha kan awm reng zawng a phal lo va ni. A zârah Persia lal chuan min khawngaih a, kan Pathian in sa tûrin min tiphûr a, a chhe tawh chu din leh min phalsak a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-ah him takin min awmtîr ta a ni si a." 
Ezra9:10 “Aw Pathian, heti hi a ni si a, eng nge kan sawi tâk ang le? I thupêkte kan zâwm duh lo va," 
Ezra9:11 i chhiahhlawh zâwlneiten, ‘In ram neih tûr chu a rama awmte bawlhhlawhna avâng leh thil tenawm tak tak an tih ṭhin avângin, a kil tâwp aṭanga a lehlam tâwp thlengin a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Ezra9:12 Chuvângin, hêng mite nên hian inneih pawlh suh u, in fate pawh nupui pasalah innei suh se; inbe rem suh ula, an ṭhatna tûr eng lai mahin tihsak suh ang che u; tichuan, in chak ang a, rama thil ṭha haw chu in tlân ang a, in thlahten an rochung zêl thei ang’ tiin min hrilh min hrilh a ni." 
Ezra9:13 “Kan sualna avâng leh kan bawhchhiatna avânga hrem kan tuar tawh hnu pawh hian kan phu anga nasain, nang kan Pathian hian, min hrem lo tih kan hria, a ṭhen chu min la zuah a nih hi." 
Ezra9:14 I thupêk chu engtin nge kan ngaihthah theih tawh anga, hêng thil tenawm tiho nên hian kan inneih pawlh theih ang? Pakhat mah thi bâng awm lova min tichhe khawpin i thinur hial dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Ezra9:15 Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, nang chu i dik a; mahse, tlêm zawng min la zuah hrâm hi. Ngai teh, kan sual thupha kan chawi a nih hi, tu mah i hmaa ding tlâk kan awm lo,” ka ti a." 
Ezra10:1 Chutia Ezra chu sual thupha chawia ṭap chunga Pathian hmaa bawkkhupa a ṭawngṭai laiin Israel mi tam tak, nu te, pa te leh naupang te a bulah chuan an lo pung khâwm a, an ṭap ve ta tlawk tlawk a." 
Ezra10:2 Elam chi zînga mi Jehiela fapa Sekania chuan Ezra hnênah, “Kan Pathian hawisanin hnam dang, he rama mi, nupuiah te kan lo nei ngei tak a; mahse, Israel-te zîngah chuan kan la insiam ṭha leh thei alâwm." 
Ezra10:3 Kan Pathian hmaah hêng kan nupuite leh kan fate hi hnawh chhuah i tiam tlat ang u. Nang leh kan Pathian thupêk awihho thu ang zêlin kan ti ang a, Pathian thu chu kan zâwm ang e." 
Ezra10:4 Tho teh, i kutah engkim kan dah e, i lamah kan ṭang zêl ang, intipaukhauh la, tih tûr tûr chu tifel mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezra10:5 Ezra chu a tho va, puithiamte, Levia chite leh Israel hotute chu chutianga ti ngei tûr chuan thu a tiamtîr a, an tiam ta a." 
Ezra10:6 Ezra chu Pathian in ata chu a chhuak a, Eliasiba fapa Jehohanana awmna pindanah chuan a kal a, saltâng chhuakho sualna avânga pawi tiin zânkhuain chaw a ei duh lo va, tui pawh a in duh lo." 
Ezra10:7 Hnam hruaitute chuan Jerusalem leh Judai rama awm, saltâng chhuak zawng zawng chu, Jerusalem-ah lo kal tûrin an chah khâwm a." 
Ezra10:8 “Ni thum chhûnga lo kal lo chu a neih zawng zawng chhuhsak a ni ang a, Israel mite zînga a tel ve phal a ni lo vang,” an ti a." 
Ezra10:9 Ni thum chhûng chuan an lo kal khâwm a, thla kuana ni sawmhnih ni chuan Juda leh Benjamina thlah rama awm zawng zawng chu Jerusalem-ah an lo kal a, Tempul tualah chuan an lo pung khâwm a. Ruah a sûr chiam a, an inkhâwmna chu a pawimawh si a, khaw vâwt avângin an khûr an khûr hlawm a." 
Ezra10:10 Puithiam Ezra chu a ding chhuak a, an hnênah, “In uire a, Israel-te suahsualna belhchhahin nupuiah hnam dang in nei a." 
Ezra10:11 Lalpa, in pate Pathian hnênah in sual thupha chawi ula, a duhzâwng ti rawh u; he rama mite lakah hian inthiarfihlîm ula, hnam dang mi in nupuite chu hnawt chhuak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Ezra10:12 Pungkhâwmho zawng zawng chuan ring takin an chhâng a, “I sawi ang chuan kan ti ang a." 
Ezra10:13 Hei, mi kan tam a, ruah lah a tam si, pâwnah kan ding reng hlei thei ta lo; thil tisual kan tam hle si a, ni hnih khat thila tihfel mai chi a ni chuang lo vang." 
Ezra10:14 Kan hotu ṭheuhte hi Jerusalem khuaah châmbâng sela, hnam dang nupui neite chu hun ruatah Jerusalem-ah lo kal sela; helaiah rorêltute leh hotute nên an chungchâng lo rêl rawh se; tichuan, he thil chungchânga kan chunga Pathian thinurna chu a reh dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
Ezra10:15 Chu thu chu Asahela fapa Jonathana te, Tikva fapa Jahzeia te chauhvin an hnial a. Levia chi Mesulama leh Sabethaia te pawhin an remti lo." 
Ezra10:16 Saltâng hawte chuan an thu rawt chu ṭha an ti a, puithiam Ezra chuan chi tin hotute zîng aṭangin mi a ruat a, an hmingte a ziak vek a." 
Ezra10:17 Thla sâwmna, ni khat ni chuan an thawk ṭan a, thla thum chhûngin hnam dang nupui nei zawng zawng chungchâng an chhût fel hman a." 
Ezra10:18 Puithiamho zînga hnam dang nupui lo neite chu hêngte hi an ni: Maaseia te, Eliazara te, Jariba te, Gedalia te hi; anniho hi Jehozadaka fa Jesua leh a unaute fa an ni." 
Ezra10:19 An nupuite chu mâk ngei an tiam a, an sual man thilhlanah berâmchal an hlân a." 
Ezra10:20 Imera fate: Hanania te leh Zebadia. 
Ezra10:21 Harima fate: Maaseia te, Elija te, Semaia te, Jehiela te leh Uzia." 
Ezra10:22 Pasura fate: Elioenaia te, Maaseia te, Ismaela te, Nathanela te, Jozabada te leh Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Levia thlah zînga hnam dang nupuia neite chu: Jozabada te, Simeia te, Kelaia te (Kelita an ti bawk), Pethahia te, Juda te leh Eleazara te an ni." 
Ezra10:24 Hla satute zînga hnam dang nupuia neite chu: Eliasiba; Tempul pulis zîngah Saluma te, Telema te leh Uria." 
Ezra10:25 Israel mi dang, hnam dang nupuia neite chu: Parosa thlahte zînga mi: Ramia te, Izia te, Malkija te, Mijamina te, Eleazara te, Malkija te leh Benaia." 
Ezra10:26 Elama thlahte zînga mi: Matania te, Zekaria te, Jehiela te, Abdia te, Jeremota te leh Elija." 
Ezra10:27 Zatua thlahte zînga mi: Elioenaia te, Eliasiba te, Matania te, Jeremota te, Zabada te leh Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 Bebaia thlahte zînga mi: Jehohanana te, Hanania te, Zabaia te leh Athlaia." 
Ezra10:29 Bania thlahte zînga mi: Mesulama te, Maluka te, Adaia te, Jasuba te, Seala te leh Jeremota." 
Ezra10:30 Pahat-moaba thlahte zînga mi: Adna te, Kelala te, Benaia te, Maaseia te, Matania te, Bezalela te, Binuia te leh Manasea." 
Ezra10:31 Harima thlah zînga mi: Eliezara te, Isija te, Malkija te, Semaia te leh Simeona." 
Ezra10:32 Benjamina te Maluka te leh Semaria. 
Ezra10:33 Hasuma thlahte zînga mi: Matenaia te, Matata te, Zabada te, Elifeleta te, Jeremaia te, Manasea te leh Simeia." 
Ezra10:34 Bania thlahte zînga mi: Maadaia te, Amrama te, Uela te," 
Ezra10:35 Benaia te, Bedeia te, Keluhia te," 
Ezra10:36 Vania te, Meremota te, Eliasiba te." 
Ezra10:37 Matania te, Matenaia te, Jaasua te," 
Ezra10:38 Bania te, Binuia te, Simeia te," 
Ezra10:39 Selemia te, Nathana te, Adaia te," 
Ezra10:40 Maknadebaia te, Sasaia te, Saraia te," 
Ezra10:41 Azarela te, Selemia te, Semaria te," 
Ezra10:42 Saluma te, Amaria te leh Josefa." 
Ezra10:43 Neboa thlahte zînga mi: Jeiela te, Matithia te, Zabada te, Zebina te, Jadaia te, Joela te leh Benaia." 
Ezra10:43 Neboa thlahte zînga mi: Jeiela te, Matithia te, Zabada te, Zebina te, Jadaia te, Joela te leh Benaia." 
Ezra10:44 Hêngho zawng hian nupuiah hnam dang an lo nei a, fapate pawh an lo nei hman tawh a ni." 
Nehemiah1:1 Hei hi Nehemia thiltih chanchin ziakna bu a ni. Lal Artazerzia lal kum sawmhnihna, Kislev thla chuan lal khawpui Susa khuaah ka awm a." 
Nehemiah1:2 Ka unau zînga mi Hanania leh mi dang ṭhenkhat Jerusalem aṭangin an lo kal a, Juda saltâng, Babulon aṭanga hâwng chanchin leh Jerusalem khaw chanchin ka lo zâwt a." 
Nehemiah1:3 “Judai rama haw, saltâng chhuakho chu an rethei hle mai; an vêla awm hnam dangte chuan an hmusit êm êm a ni. Jerusalem kulh bang pawh a chim chhe vek a, a kawngkhârte pawh a kâng zo,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah1:4 An thu ka hriat chuan ka ṭhu a, ka ṭap a, lungngai takin ni tam fe chu ka awm a, chaw ngheiin vân Pathian hnênah ka ṭawngṭai a." 
Nehemiah1:5 “Aw Lalpa, Pathian ropui leh hlauhawm, nangmah hmangaihtu leh i thupêk zâwmtute tân i thuthlung chu i vuan tlat ṭhîn." 
Nehemiah1:6 Min rawn en la, ka lamah i beng han chhi teh; i chhiahhlawh, i mi Israel-te tân a chhun a zân i hnênah ka rawn ṭawngṭai hi. Keini Israel-te hian i lakah thil kan tisual a ni. Kei leh min thlahtute hi kan sual a ni." 
Nehemiah1:7 I lakah khawlo takin kan khawsa a, Mosia hnêna i hrilh, i thupêk te, i thuruatte, awm dân tûr i tih te kan zâwm duh lo va." 
Nehemiah1:8 I chhiahhlawh Mosia hetiang thu i hrilh kha hre reng ang che, ‘Khawlo taka in awm chuan hnam tinrêng zîngah ka tidarh ang che u." 
Nehemiah1:9 Ka hnêna in lo kîr duha, ka thupêkte in pawma in zawm chuan vân tâwp daihah pawh kal darh ula, chuta ṭang chuan ka hruai ang che u a, ka hming awmna tûra ka thlan ramah chuan ka hruai khâwm leh ang che u,’ i tih kha." 
Nehemiah1:10 Hêng i chhiahhlawhte hi i mite chu an ni, ropui taka i bân tha chaka i tlanchhuahte an nih kha." 
Nehemiah1:11 Aw Lalpa, i chhiahhlawh ṭawngṭaina hi lo ngaithla teh, nangmah ṭihtu i chhiahhlawhte dîlna hi lo ngaihven ang che. Vawiinah pawh hian lal chuan min lo khawngaih teh se,” ka ti a. Chûng lai chuan lal no petu ka ni." 
Nehemiah2:1 Ni khat chu lal Artazerzia chuan a lal kum sawmhnihna, Nisan thlaah chaw a ei a, uain chu ka pe a, lungngai hmêl ka put a la hmu ngai lo." 
Nehemiah2:2 Chuvângin, “Engtizia nge i hmêl a va ngui ve? Lungngaih rûkna i nei em ni? I dam lo pawh a ni si lo,” tiin min zâwt a. Ka phu zawk a." 
Nehemiah2:3 Lal hnênah chuan, “Lal chu dam reng rawh se; ka pa thlân awmna khawpui chu tihram a ni a, a kulh kawngkhârte a kâng zo vek si a, ngui lo thei em ka nih?” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:4 Lal chuan, “Eng nge i tih duh?” min ti a. Vâna Pathian hnênah chuan ka ṭawngṭai ta a." 
Nehemiah2:5 Lal hnênah chuan, “Lal remtih zâwng a niha, min duhsak takmeuh chuan Judai ramah min kaltîr la, ka pa thlân awmna khuaah ka han kal ang a, ka han siam ṭha ang e,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:6 Lalnu pawh a bulah a ṭhu a, lal chuan, “Eng chen nge i thang ang a, engtikah nge i lo kîr leh ang?” min ti a. Ka hâwn leh hun tûr ka hrilh a, lal chuan ka kal a phal ta a." 
Nehemiah2:7 Lal hnênah chuan heti hian ka ti bawk: “Lalin rem a tih chuan Eufretis lui khawthlang lam bial awptute chu Judai ram ka thlen thlenga an biala ka kal phal tûrin hrilh ni sela. 
Nehemiah2:8 Lal ngawpui vêngtu Asafa hnênah pawh Tempul luhna kawngkhâr tûr te, khawpui bangah te leh ka awmna tûr in sak nân thing min pe tûrin hrilh ni teh se,” ka ti a. Pathianin min awmpui avângin lal chuan ka dîl apiang chu rem a ti zêl a." 
Nehemiah2:9 Lal chuan sakawr chungchuang mi sipai rual khat leh an hotute ka ruala kal tûrin a tîr a; Eufretis lui thlang lam ram bialah chuan kan kal ta a, ramawptute hnênah lehkha chu ka pe zêl a." 
Nehemiah2:10 Beth-horon khaw mi Sanbalata leh Amon biala sawrkâr milian pakhat chuan an lo hriatin Israel mite ṭhatna tûra thawktu tûr lo kal chu an duh lo hle a ni. 
Nehemiah2:11 Jerusalem khua chu ka han thleng a, ni thum ka châwl a." 
Nehemiah2:12 Pathianin Jerusalem khaw tâna thil tih tûr min pêk chu tu mah ka hrilh lo. Zanlaiah ka tho va, ka ṭhian ṭhenkhatte nên kan chhuak a, ka chuanna sabengtung tih chauh lo chu chuanna tûr sakawr pakhat mah kan keng lo." 
Nehemiah2:13 Zânah chuan khawthlang lam ruam panin kawngkaah khua kan chhuahsan a, chhim lam panin Dragon Tuikhur lamah kan kal a. Bawlhhlawh paihna Kawngka kan thleng a, kal pah chuan kulh bang chim chu ngun takin ka en zêl a; kawngkhâr kâng chhiate pawh chu ka en a." 
Nehemiah2:14 Khawpui chhak lamah, hmâr lam panin kan kal zêl a; Tuikhur Kawngka leh lal tuikhuah kan va thleng a, ka chuanna sabengtung chu lung chim rem rum zîngah chuan a kal tlang thei lo va." 
Nehemiah2:15 Chuvâng chuan, Kidron lui ruam lamah kan kal a, kulh bang chu ka thlîr zui zêl a. Ka kalna hnuah khân ka kîr leh a, Ruam luhna kawngkhârah khân khuaah chuan ka lût leh ta a." 
Nehemiah2:16 Khuaa sawrkâr mi tu mahin khawiah nge ka kala, eng nge ka tih an hre lo. Ka Juda-pui, puithiam te, hruaitu te, sawrkâr mi te leh kan hna thawh tûr hmabâk thawktu tûrte hnênah pawh eng mah ka la sawi lo va ni." 
Nehemiah2:17 An hnênah chuan heti hian ka han ti ta a: “Jerusalem kulh chu a chhe vek a, kawngkhârte lah a kâng zo va, thil ṭha lo tinrêngin min tlâkbuak ta a nih hi. Khawpui kulh hi i siam ṭha ang u khai. Heti taka nuihzatbûr hi kan ni dâwn lo nia,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:18 Pathianin min awmpui a, min ṭanpui dân te, leh lalin thu min pêkte chu ka hrilh ta a. Anni chuan, “Kulh bang chim i siam ṭha tak ang u hmiang,” tiin min chhâng a. Hna thawk ṭan tûr chuan an insiam ta a." 
Nehemiah2:19 Beth-horon mi Sanbalata te, Amon mi Tobia te leh Arab mi pakhat Gesema ten kan thiltih tum chu an lo hriat chuan min nuihzatbûr a, hmusit takin, “Eng nge tih in tum vei le? Lal lakah hel in tum elo maw?” an ti a." 
Nehemiah2:20 Kei chuan, “Vân Pathianin min ṭanpui dâwn alâwm. A chhiahhlawhte kan ni a, kulh bang hi kan siam ṭha dâwn a ni. Jerusalem khaw chhûngah hian neih eng mah in nei lo va, Jerusalem mi nihna lah in nei ve hek lo,” tiin ka chhâng a." 
Nehemiah3:1 Hetiang hian Jerusalem khaw kulh bang chim chu siam leh a ni: Puithiam lalber Eliasiba leh a puitu puithiamte tum chu Berâm Kawngkhâr siam ṭhat a ni. An siam a, an hlân a, an vuah a, kulh bang pawh Hamea in sâng leh Hananela in sâng thleng ve vein an siam ṭha a, an hlân a." 
Nehemiah3:2 A dawt siam ṭhat chu Jeriko mite tum a ni. Chumi dawt chu Imria fa Zakura ho tum a ni. 
Nehemiah3:3 Hasena thlahten Sangha Kawngkhâr chu an siam a; a kawngka biangte an vuah a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate an siam a." 
Nehemiah3:4 A dawt chu Uria fa, Hakoza tupa Meremota hovin an siam a. Chumi dawt leh chu Berekia fa, Mesezebela tupa Mesulama hovin an siam a, a dawt chu Baana fapa Zadoka hovin an siam a." 
Nehemiah3:5 A dawt leh chu Tekoa khaw mite tum a ni; khaw milianho chuan hotute tuk ang chuan an thawk ve duh lo. 
Nehemiah3:6 Pasea fapa Joiada leh Besodeia fapa Mesulama hovin Jesana Kawngkhâr an siam a. A kawngkabiang te, a kawngkhâr te, a kalhna te leh a bahna te an vuah vek a." 
Nehemiah3:7 Gibeona mi Melatia te, Meronot mi Jadona te chuan Gibeon leh Mizpa khaw mite nên a dawt, Eufretis thlang lam ramawptu awmna zâwn thlengin an siam a." 
Nehemiah3:8 Rangkachak chher mi Harhaia fapa Uziela hovin a dawt leh chu an siam a. Chumi dawt chu bang chhah lai thlengin rimtui siam mi Hanania hovin an siam a. 
Nehemiah3:9 Jerusalem khua leh a chhehvêl ram zâtve hotu Hura fapa Refaia hovin a dawt chu an siam ṭha a. 
Nehemiah3:10 Chumi dawt leh chu Harumafa fapa Jedaia hovin ama in bul chu an siam a. A dawt leh chu Hasabneia fapa Hatusa hovin an siam a. 
Nehemiah3:11 Harima fapa Malkija leh Pahat-moaba fapa Hasuba te chuan a dawt chu Meichhehna In sâng an tih nên chuan an siam a. 
Nehemiah3:12 Jerusalem leh a chhehvêl ram zâtve hotu Halohesa fapa Saluma hovin a dawt leh chu an siam a, a fanute pawhin an thawk ve." 
Nehemiah3:13 Ruam kalna kawngkhâr chu Hanuna leh Zanoa khaw miten an siam a. A kawngka te, a biang te, a kalhna te, a bahna te an vuah vek a; kulh bang pawh Bawlhhlawh Kawngkhâr thlengin tawng sângkhata sei an siam bawk." 
Nehemiah3:14 Rekaba fapa Malkija, Hakerem bial hotu chuan Bawlhhlawh Kawngkhâr chu a siam a. Kawngkhâr chu a vuah a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate pawh a siam vek a." 
Nehemiah3:15 Kolhozea fapa Saluma, Mizpa bial hotu chuan Tuikhur Kawngka chu a siam a. Kawngka luchung bang pawh a rem a, a kawngkhâr chu a kalhnate leh a bahnate nên a vuah a, Lal huan bula Sela dîl zâwn bang chu Davida khaw panna kailâwn awmna thlengin a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:16 Azbuka fapa Nehemia, Beth-zur bial zâtve awptu chuan a dawt leh chu Davida thlân te, tuikhuah te leh sipai bûk thleng chuan a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:17 Hêng Levia chite hian a dawt, ṭhen tam fe chu an siam a ni. Bania fapa Rehuma hovin a dawt chu an siam a. Hasabia, Keila bial zâtve awptu chuan a bial hmingin a dawt chu a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:18 Henadada fapa Bavaia, Keila bial zâtve awptu chuan a dawt chu a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:19 Jesua fapa Ezera, Mizpa bial hotu chuan râlthuam dahna zâwn chu kulh bang kawi ṭanna thlengin a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:20 Zabaia fapa Baruka hovin phûr takin a dawt chu Puithiam lalber Eliasiba awmna thlengin an siam a. 
Nehemiah3:21 Uria fa, Hakoza tupa Meremota hovin a dawt chu Puithiam lalber Eliasiba in tâwp zâwn thlengin an siam a." 
Nehemiah3:22 Hêng puithiamho hian a dawt leh, ṭhen tam fe chu an siam ṭha a ni. Jerusalem khaw chhehvêla puithiam awmho chuan a dawt chu an siam a." 
Nehemiah3:23 Benjamina leh Hasuba chuan a dawt bang, an in zâwn chu an siam a. Maaseia fapa, Amazia tupa Azaria chuan a dawt, ama in zâwn chu a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:24 Henadada fapa, Binuia hovin a dawt, Azaria in zâwn aṭanga kulh bang kawina thlengin an siam a." 
Nehemiah3:25 Uzia fapa Palala hovin bang kawina aṭang chuan vêngtuho awmna, lal in chungnung zâwk bul thlengin an siam a." 
Nehemiah3:26 Parosa fapa Pedaia hovin a dawt khawchhak lam chu Tuikhur Kawngka, Tempul bula in sâng awmna thlengin an siam a. He lai vêl hi Tempul enkawltu Netin-ho awmna a ni, a hmingah ‘ofel’ an vuah." 
Nehemiah3:27 Tekoa khaw mite chuan an chan hnihna, a dawt chu an siam a; Tempul bula In sâng leh Ofel mual tâwp inkâr chu an siam a ni." 
Nehemiah3:28 Mi ṭhenkhat, kulh bang bula in neite chuan, a dawt leh, anmahni in zâwn ṭheuh, Sakawr Kawngka aṭanga hmâr lam chu an siam a." 
Nehemiah3:29 Imera fapa Zadoka chuan a dawt, a in zâwn chu a siam a. Chumi dawt chu Sekania fapa Semaia, khawchhak kawngka vêngtu chuan a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:30 Selemia fapa Hanania leh Zalafa fapa parukna Hanuna te chuan a dawt, an chan hnihna chu an siam a. Berekia fapa Mesulama chuan a dawt, ama in zâwn chu a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:31 Rangkachak chher mi Malkija chuan, a dawt leh chu Tempul enkawltute leh sumdâwngho riahna in, Hamifkad an tih kawngka bul, hmârchhak bang kil thlengin a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:32 A kil aṭanga Berâm Kawngka thleng chuan rangkachak chhertu leh sumdâwngte chuan an siam a. 
Nehemiah4:1 Sanbalatan kulh siam kan tum a hriat chuan a thin a rim nasa mai a, Juda-te chu min sâwt ta a." 
Nehemiah4:2 A thawhpuite leh Samaria khuaa sipaite hnênah, “Hêng Juda-ho, pa pawr tak tak hian eng nge maw an hriata Jerusalem khawpui din leh an tum le? Inthawina hlânin ni khat thil thu-ah siam zawh mai an tum em ni? A chim chhe vûm, kâng nek tawh lungte chu siam ṭhat leh theih an inbeisei em ni le!” a ti a." 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobia chu a bulah a ding a, “Eng ang kulh bang nge an din theih ang? Sihal pawh lâwn se a chim mai ang!” a lo ti ve a." 
Nehemiah4:4 Kei chu ka ṭawngṭai ta a, “Aw Pathian, hêng mite min deusawhzia hi lo ngaithla teh, min hmuhsitna chu an chungah lêt teh se. An neih zawng zawng miin rawk sela; ram dang daihah sal atân man ni rawh se." 
Nehemiah4:5 An thil sual tih hi theihnghilh suh la, an sualna pawh hai suh ang che; kulh bang siamṭhatute hmaah an chêksawlh hle che kha,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah4:6 Kulh bang siam ṭhat hna chu ngawrh takin kan thawk a, a zâtve dâwn laia sâng chu kan zo ta mai a." 
Nehemiah4:7 Sanbalata te, Tobia te, Arabia mi te, Amon mi te leh Asdod mi te chuan Jerusalem kulh chu kan siam ṭha sâwt hle a, a bal chhe laite chu kan thawm leh vek tawh tih an hriat chuan an thinur hle a." 
Nehemiah4:8 Jerusalem-a lo kala, min rawn beiha, min tihbuai tumin an thurual a." 
Nehemiah4:9 Pathian hnênah kan ṭawngṭai a, a chhûn a zâna vêngtu tûr kan insiam a." 
Nehemiah4:10 Judai rama mite chuan hla an phuah a, “Rit tak tak kan phur a, kan hah zo ta, A chhe nawi paih tûr a tam êm a, Bang pawh kan rem hman lo!” tiin." 
Nehemiah4:11 Kan hmêlmate lah chuan min zuam hle a, “Kan han beiha kan thaha, an hna kan tihtâwpsak hma chu eng mah an hre lo vang, hmuh pawh min hmu lo vang,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah4:12 Nimahsela, an zînga Juda awm vete chuan an thil tum chu a rûkin min rawn hrilh zêl a." 
Nehemiah4:13 Chuvângin, mipuite chu khandaih te, fei te, thal te ka pe a; a chi chiin, bang la rem zawh loh bulah vêngtu atân ka sem darh a." 
Nehemiah4:14 Mipuite chu an thlaphâng hle tih ka hriat chuan an hruaitute leh an hotute nên an hnênah, “Anniho hi hlau suh u; Lalpa ropuizia leh a hlauhawmzia hre reng rawh u. In unaute hi vêng ula, in nupui fanau leh in in leh lo tân ṭang rawh u,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah4:15 Kan hmêlmate chuan an thil tih tum chu kan lo hria tih an hriat chuan Pathianin an thiltum chu a tibahlah a ni tih an hria a; keini chuan kan za-in kulh bang siam chu kan chhunzawm leh ta sauh sauh va. 
Nehemiah4:16 Chuta chin chu ka mite zâtve chuan an thawk a, a zâtve chuan fei te, phaw te, thal te an keng a; awmphaw te an ha a. Hnam hruaitute chuan kulh bang siamtute chu theihtâwp chhuahin an pui zêl bawk a." 
Nehemiah4:17 Hnathawktute pawh chuan khingkhatin hna an thawk a, khingkhatin hriam an keng a." 
Nehemiah4:18 Tu pawhin, khandaih a kawm nên an pai ṭheuh va. Tawtawrâwtpu, râlkhêl hâmtu tûr chu ka bulah a awm a." 
Nehemiah4:19 Mipuite chu an hruaitute leh hotute nên, “Kan hna thawh hi hmun hrang hranga thawk kan ni a, kan thawhna lai bang a inhlat hle hlawm a." 
Nehemiah4:20 Chuvângin, tawtawrâwt ri in hriat chuan ka awmnaah lo tlân khâwm ang che u, kan Pathian chuan râl chu min dopui dâwn a ni,” tiin ka hrilh a." 
Nehemiah4:21 Ni tin, khâwvâr aṭanga arsi lan thlengin a zâtve chuan hna kan thawk a, a zâtve chuan fei nên min vêng a." 
Nehemiah4:22 Hnathawk hotute hnênah chuan, “Nangni leh in chhiahhlawhte chu Jerusalem khaw chhûngah riak ve mai ula a ṭha ang,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah4:23 Ka ṭhian te, ka ṭhuihruai te, ka chhiahhlawh te, kei ngei pawhin, zânah pawh kawr kan hlîp lo va, râlthuam kan dah hek lo." 
Nehemiah5:1 Rei fe hnuah chuan mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh, an Juda-puite chungah an vui ta a." 
Nehemiah5:2 “Kan chhûng kan rual a, rilṭâma kan thih loh nân ei tûr kan duh a ni,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah5:3 A ṭhen chuan, “Kan lo te, kan grep huan te, kan in te, rilṭâma thih ai chuan kan lo ineiba tawh a ni,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah5:4 A ṭhen chuan, “Kan lo te, grep huan te dahkhamin lal chhiah pêk tûr tangka kan pûk a," 
Nehemiah5:5 Juda mi ve bawk kan ni si a, kan fate pawh Juda dang fate ang bawk an ni lâwm ni? Nimahsela, hei kan fate chu bawihah kan tântîr a, kan fanute phei chu bawihah kan hralh dêr tawh a ni. Kan lote leh grep huante min neihsak zo tawh a, kan che hlei thei ta hauh lo mai,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah5:6 An vui thu ka hriatin ka thinur hle a," 
Nehemiah5:7 Ka rilru ka siam a, mipui hruaitute leh an hotute chu ka khak ta a, “In unaute ngei in lo tiduhdah hle a lo nih hi,” ka ti a. Chumi chungchâng chu ngaihtuah tûrin vântlâng ka ko khâwm a." 
Nehemiah5:8 “Kan theih ang angin kan Juda-pui, hnam dang hnêna inhralh hialte chu tlan chhuah kan tum hrâm ṭhîn a. In unaute hi anmahni Juda-puite hnênah in inhralhtîr ta hial a nih hi,” ka ti a. Hruaitute chuan min chhâng thei lo va, an ngawi ta reng a." 
Nehemiah5:9 “In thil tih hi a dik hauh lo, Pathian ṭih ula, thil dik ti rawh u. Tichuan, kan hmêlma, Jentail-ho hian min hmusit lo vang." 
Nehemiah5:10 Kei pawhin mite chu pawisa leh buhte ka lo pûktîr tawh ṭhîn a; chutiangin ka ṭhuihruaite pawhin an ti ṭhîn. Kan leibate chu i ngaidam teh ang u. 
Nehemiah5:11 An ba zawng zawng, tangka te, buh te, uain te, oliv hriak te ngaidam vek ila, an lo te, an grep huante leh an oliv hmunte chu pe kîr leh vek rawh u,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah5:12 Hruaitute chuan, “I sawi ang chuan kan ti ang e, an thil chu kan pe kîr ang a, an ba chu kan ngaidam ang,” an ti a. Puithiamho chu ka ko va, an hmaah chuan hruaitute chu an sawi ang chuan thu ka tiamtîr a." 
Nehemiah5:13 Ka puan ven chu ka thing thla a. “In thutiam anga ti duh lo chu Pathianin a thing ang a, a inte leh a neih zawng zawng a thin thlâksak ve ang a, eng mah a nei lo vang,” ka ti a. Chuta awm ve zawng zawng chuan, “Amen” an ti a. Lalpa an fak a, hruaitute chuan an tiam ang chuan an ti ta a." 
Nehemiah5:14 Lal Artazerzia lal kum sawmhnihna aṭanga kum sawmthum leh pahnihna, Judai ram awptua kum sâwm leh kum hnih ka ṭan chhûng chuan ka chhûngte nên Ramawptu ei tûr ang kan ei lo." 
Nehemiah5:15 Ka hmaa Ramawptute chu mipui tân an rit hle a, ni tin, tangka sawmli man chaw leh uain an phût ṭhîn a; an chhiahhlawhte pawh rit tham tak an ni. Pathian ka zah avângin chutiang chu ka ti ve lo." 
Nehemiah5:16 Kulh bang chu theihtâwp chhuahin kan siam zêl a, ram lei ve zai pawh ka rêl hman lo. Ka hnuaia thawktute pawhin kulh bang siam ngawt an ngaihtuah a ni." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kan vêla mi, kan mikhual ṭhînte bâkah, Juda hruaitute leh mi dang mi za leh sawmnga vêl chu chaw ka eipui ziah ṭhîn." 
Nehemiah5:18 Ni tin bâwngpa pakhat leh berâm thlan chhuah paruk kan talh a ngai a, ârte pawh min talhsak ṭhîn; ni sâwm danah uain chi tinrêng kan chhawp bawk ṭhîn; mipui tân a rih êm avângin Ramawptu phût theih chin chu ka phût ve ngai lo." 
Nehemiah5:19 “Aw ka Pathian, he mite tâna ka thiltih zawng zawng hi ka chan ṭhat nân hre reng ang che,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah6:1 Sanbalata te, Tobia te, Arab mi Gesema te leh kan hmêlma te chuan Jerusalem kulh bang chu kan siam ṭha a, a kawngkhârte la vuah lo mah ila a chim chhe laite chu kan thawm zo vek tih an lo hriat chuan" 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanbalata leh Gesema chuan thu an rawn thawn a, “Lo kal la, Ono phaia khaw pakhatah i inbe teh ang,” an rawn ti a, min khawih theih nân min bum an tum a ni." 
Nehemiah6:3 Lamkal ka tîr a, “Hna pawimawh tak ka thawk a, ka lo kal chhuk thei lo. Nangni be tûrin ka lo chhuak hman lo, ka hna ka tibahlah thei lo,” ka tihtîr a." 
Nehemiah6:4 Vawi li, thu ngai hlîr an rawn sawi a, a ngai hlîrin ka lo chhâng a." 
Nehemiah6:5 Sanbalata chuan a chhiahhlawh pakhat lehkha kengin, a vawi nganaah chuan a rawn tîr a, a lehkha chu châr loh a ni." 
Nehemiah6:6 Hetiang hian a ziak: “Gesema chuan, nang leh Juda-ho hian lal lakah hel in tum a; chuvângin, Jerusalem khaw kulh pawh in siam ṭha leh a ni, tih" 
Nehemiah6:7 kan chhehvêl hnamho zîngah hian thu a thang huai huai a ni. Nang lahin lal i tum a, Jerusalem khuaah Judai ram lala puang tûr che zâwlnei pawh i nei reng tawh a ni, tih min hrilh a. Lal ropuia chuan a lo hre ve ngei ang a; chuvângin, he thil hi chîk takin i lo sawi dûn teh ang,” tiin." 
Nehemiah6:8 Hetiang hian ka chhâng a, “I sawi hi dâwt vek a ni, i phuahchawp a ni ta ve ang,” tiin." 
Nehemiah6:9 Ka hna tihtâwp tumin min vau a ni, ka ṭawngṭai a, “Khai le, aw ka Pathian, min tichak teh,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah6:10 Delaia fa, Mehetabela tupa, Semaia inah ka kal a, a in aṭangin a lo chhuak thei lo va ni. Ani chuan Hmun Thianghlimah kan pahnihin kan biru ang a, kawngkhâr kan inkalh hnan tûr a ni; thah tum chein an lo kal dâwn, eng zânah pawh an lo kal mai thei a ni,” a ti a." 
Nehemiah6:11 “Chutianga tlânchhiaa biru mai âwm mi ka ni lo ve, inhumhim nân Tempul chhûnga biru duhin min ring em ni? Ka biru hauh lo vang,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah6:12 Ka han inngaihtuah chiang a, Semaia chu Pathianin a be awzâwng lo tih ka hre ta a. Tobia leh Sanbalatan chutianga min tihṭhaih tûr chuan an tham a lo ni." 
Nehemiah6:13 Thil sual ti tûra min tihṭhaih tûrin an ruai a lo ni a; ka hming tihchhiata, min tihmualpho an tum a ni." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ka ṭawngṭai a, “Aw ka Pathian, Tobia leh Sanbalata thil tih dân hi hre reng la, tuartîr ang che, Zâwlneinu Noadii leh zâwlnei dang min tihzâm tumtute pawh hi hre reng ang che,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah6:15 Ni sawmnga leh pahnih hna kan thawh hnu, Elul thla, ni sawmhnih leh panga ni chuan kulh bang chu kan siam ṭha ta vek a." 
Nehemiah6:16 Kan hmêlmate leh kan vêla awm hnamte chuan an lo hriatin an hlau hle a, kan Pathian hna thawh a ni tih an hriatin an meng hnuai ta hle a." 
Nehemiah6:17 Hêng hun lai hian Tobia leh Juda hruaitute chu lehkha an inthawn fo ṭhîn a lo ni a. 
Nehemiah6:18 Judai rama mi tam tak chu a puzawn Sekania, Ara fapa avângin a lamṭang an ni. Tobia fapa Johanana chuan Berekia fapa Mesulama fanu nupuiah a nei nghe nghe a." 
Nehemiah6:19 Mi tam takin ka hriat ngei tûrah Tobia ṭhatzia sawi nuam an ti hle a; ka sawi apiang pawh an lo hrilh zêl bawk ṭhîn. Mi tihṭhaih tumin lehkha pawh min rawn thawn fo va ni. 
Nehemiah7:1 Kulh bang chu an siam zo va, kulh kawngkhârte pawh chu an vuah fel vek a, Tempul pulis te, zaipâwl te leh Levia chi te chu an tih tûr an ruat fel vek a." 
Nehemiah7:2 Jerusalem khaw awptu tûr mi pahnih ka ruat a, pakhat chu ka nau Hanania a ni a, pakhat chu sipai pâwl hotu Hananaia, tu ma tluk loh, mi rin tlâk tak, Pathian ṭih mi a ni." 
Nehemiah7:3 Jerusalem kulh kawngkhârte chu zîngah, ni chhuah hnu chauhva hawng tûrin ka ti a; tlaiah pawh ni tlâk, vêngtuho ṭina khâr tûrin ka ti a. Jerusalem khuaa mi ṭhenkhat pawh kawngkhâr vên bîk nei tûr leh khawlai vênga fang ṭhîntu ruat tûrin ka ti bawk a." 
Nehemiah7:4 Jerusalem hi khaw zau tak a ni a, mi an tam lo va, in pawh an la sa ṭan leh lo." 
Nehemiah7:5 Mipui chu an hruaitute leh an hotute nên ka khâwm a, an chhûngkaw chanchin ziakna chhui feltîr tûrin Pathianin min ti a. Saltâng chhuak hmasate hming ziakna ka zawng chhuak a, hei hi ka hmuh dân chu a ni." 
Nehemiah7:6 Saltâng tam tak chu Babulon bial aṭangin Jerusalem leh Judai ramah mahni awmna ṭhin khuaah an haw a. An chhûngkuain lal Nebukadnezaran sala a man aṭang khân Babulon-ah an tâng reng a ni. 
Nehemiah7:7 An hruaitute chu Zerubabela te, Jesua te, Nehemia te, Azaria te, Raamia te, Nahamania te, Mordekaia te, Bilsana te, Mispereta te, Bigvaia te, Nehuma te leh Baana te an ni. Israel mi, chi hrang hrang lo kîr zât chu hetiang hi a ni:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Paros chi aṭangin mi sânghnih leh za leh sawmsarih leh pahnih. 
Nehemiah7:9 Sefatia chi aṭangin mi zathum leh sawmsarih leh pahnih. 
Nehemiah7:10 Ara chi aṭangin mi zaruk leh sawmnga leh pahnih," 
Nehemiah7:11 Pahat-moab chi, Jesua leh Joaba thlah aṭangin mi sânghnih leh zariat leh sâwm leh pariat." 
Nehemiah7:12 Elam chi aṭangin mi sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmnga leh pali. 
Nehemiah7:13 Zatu chi aṭangin mi zariat leh sawmli leh panga. 
Nehemiah7:14 Zakai chi aṭangin mi zasarih leh sawmruk. 
Nehemiah7:15 Binui chi aṭangin mi zaruk leh sawmli leh pariat. 
Nehemiah7:16 Bebai chi aṭangin mi zaruk leh sawmhnih leh pariat. 
Nehemiah7:17 Azgad chi aṭangin mi sânghnih leh zathum leh sawmhnih leh pahnih. 
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikam chi aṭangin mi zaruk leh sawmruk leh pasarih. 
Nehemiah7:19 Bigvai chi aṭangin mi sânghnih leh sawmruk leh pasarih. 
Nehemiah7:20 Adin chi aṭangin mi zaruk leh sawmnga leh panga. 
Nehemiah7:21 Ater (Hezekia an ti bawk) chi aṭangin mi sawmkua leh pariat. 
Nehemiah7:22 Hasum chi aṭangin mi zathum leh sawmhnih leh pariat. 
Nehemiah7:23 Bezai chi aṭangin mi zathum leh sawmhnih leh pali. 
Nehemiah7:24 Harif chi aṭangin mi za leh sâwm leh pahnih. 
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeon chi aṭangin mi sawmkua leh panga. 
Nehemiah7:26 Bethlehem leh Netofa khaw chhuak mi za leh sawmriat leh pariat. 
Nehemiah7:27 Anathot khaw chhuak mi za leh sawmhnih leh pariat. 
Nehemiah7:28 Beth-azmavet khaw chhuak mi sawmli leh pahnih. 
Nehemiah7:29 Kiriat-jearim te, Kafira te leh Beerot khaw chhuak mi zasarih leh sawmli leh pathum." 
Nehemiah7:30 Rama leh Geba khaw chhuak mi zaruk leh sawmhnih leh pakhat. 
Nehemiah7:31 Mikmas khaw chhuak mi za leh sawmhnih leh pahnih. 
Nehemiah7:32 Bethel leh Ai khaw chhuak mi za leh sawmhnih leh pathum. 
Nehemiah7:33 Nebo khaw dang chhuak mi sawmnga leh pahnih. 
Nehemiah7:34 Elam khaw dang chhuak mi sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmnga leh pali. 
Nehemiah7:35 Harim khaw chhuak mi zathum leh sawmhnih. 
Nehemiah7:36 Jeriko khaw chhuak mi zathum leh sawmli leh panga. 
Nehemiah7:37 Lod te, Hadid te leh Ono khaw chhuak mi zasarih leh sawmhnih leh pakhat." 
Nehemiah7:38 Sena khaw chhuak mi sângthum leh zakua leh sawmthum. 
Nehemiah7:39 Puithiamho lo kîr vete chu heti hi an ni: Jesua chhûng, Jedaia thlah mi zakua leh sawmsarih leh pathum." 
Nehemiah7:40 Imera thlahte mi sângkhat leh sawmnga leh pahnih. 
Nehemiah7:41 Pasura thlahte mi sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmli leh pasarih. 
Nehemiah7:42 Harima thlahte mi sângkhat leh sâwm leh pasarih. 
Nehemiah7:43 Levia chi saltâng lo kîrte chu heti hi an ni Jesua te, Kadmiela te, Hodavia thlahte, mi sawmsarih leh pali." 
Nehemiah7:44 Tempula hla sa mi: Asafa thlahte mi za leh sawmli leh pariat. 
Nehemiah7:45 Tempul pulis: Saluma te, Atera te, Talmona te, Akuba te, Hatita te leh Sobaia te thlah mi za leh sawmthum leh pariat." 
Nehemiah7:46 Tempul enkawltute: Ziha te, Hasufa te, Tabaota te," 
Nehemiah7:47 Kerosa te, Sia te, Padona te," 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana te, Hagaba te, Salmaia te," 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanana te, Gidela te, Gahara te," 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaia te, Rezina te, Nekoda te," 
Nehemiah7:51 Gazama te, Uza te, Pasea te," 
Nehemiah7:52 Besaia te, Meunima te, Nefusesima te," 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuka te, Hakufa te, Harhura te," 
Nehemiah7:54 Bazlita te, Mehida te, Harsa te," 
Nehemiah7:55 Barkosa te, Sisera te, Tema te," 
Nehemiah7:56 Nezia te leh Hatifa te hi an ni. 
Nehemiah7:57 Solomona chhiahhlawh thlahte: Sotaia te, Sofereta te, Perida te," 
Nehemiah7:58 Jaala te, Darkona te, Gidela te," 
Nehemiah7:59 Sefatia te, Hatila te, Pokeret-hazebaima te, Amona te hi an ni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Tempul enkawltu leh Solomona chhiahhlawh, saltâng haw zawng zawng mi zathum leh sawmkua leh pahnih an ni." 
Nehemiah7:61 Tel-mela khua aṭang te, Tel-harsa khua aṭang te, Kerub khua aṭang te, Adoa khua aṭang te, Imer khua aṭang tea lo kal chho vete chu heti hi an ni. Hêngho hian Israel thlah an nihna chiang leh an chi leh kuang an chhui thei lo:" 
Nehemiah7:62 Chûng chu Delaia thlah te, Tobia thlah te, Nekoda thlah te, an vaiin mi zaruk leh sawmli leh pahnih." 
Nehemiah7:63 Hêng puithiamho hian an thlahtu tak an chhui thei lo: Hobaia fate, Hakosa fate, Barzilaia fate. Puithiam Barzilaia fate thlahtu Barzilaia hian Gilead mi Barzilai hmeichhia a nei a, a puzawn chhûng hnam hming chu an pu zawm ta a ni." 
Nehemiah7:64 An thlahtu tak an chhui chhuah theih loh avângin puithiamah pawm an ni ta lo va. 
Nehemiah7:65 Juda zînga an hotu ber, Tirsatha chuan, “Urim leh Thumim kawltu puithiam a awm hma chu Pathian hnêna thilhlan hi lo ei ve suh u,” a ti a." 
Nehemiah7:66 Saltâng haw chu an vaiin mi sîngli leh sânghnih leh zathum leh sawmruk an ni. 
Nehemiah7:67 An chhiahhlawh, mipa leh hmeichhia sângsarih leh zathum leh sawmthum leh pasarih. Hla sa mi, mipa leh hmeichhia zahnih leh sawmli leh panga;" 
Nehemiah7:68 Sakawr zasarih leh sawmthum leh paruk; sakawr puakphur zahnih leh sawmli leh panga; 
Nehemiah7:69 sanghâwngsei zali leh sawmthum leh panga, sabengtung sângruk leh zasarih leh sawmhnih an rawn hruai bawk." 
Nehemiah7:70 Hnam tin hruaitute chuan Tempul sakna thawhlâwm an pe ṭheuh va. An Tirsatha chuan rangkachak kg. riat, maihûn sawmnga, puithiam kawr tûr puan zanga leh sawmthum a pe a." 
Nehemiah7:71 Israel hnam hruaitute chuan rangkachak kg. za leh sawmruk leh pariat, tangkarua kg. Sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmnga an pe a." 
Nehemiah7:72 Mipuite chuan: Rangkachak kg. za leh sawmruk leh pariat, tangkarua kg. za leh sawmli, puithiam kawr tûr puan sawmruk leh pasarih an pe bawk." 
Nehemiah7:73 Puithiam te, Levia chi te, Tempul pulis te, hla sa mite leh mi dang leh Tempul enkawltute - Israel mi zawng zawng chuan Judai ram khuaahte chuan awmhmun an bêngbel ta a." 
Nehemiah8:1 Thla sarihnaah chuan Israel mite chu an awmna tûr khuaah an awm fel hman a; Jerusalem khaw Tuikhur Kawngkhâr bul tualzâwl laiah chuan, chumi thla, ni khat ni chuan an lo pung khâwm a; Israel te zawm tûr, Lalpa dân, Mosia hnêna pêk chu hre tak puithiam Ezra chu an ngên a, Dân bu chu an lâktîr a." 
Nehemiah8:1 Thla sarihnaah chuan Israel mite chu an awmna tûr khuaah an awm fel hman a; Jerusalem khaw Tuikhur Kawngkhâr bul tualzâwl laiah chuan, chumi thla, ni khat ni chuan an lo pung khâwm a; Israel te zawm tûr, Lalpa dân, Mosia hnêna pêk chu hre tak puithiam Ezra chu an ngên a, Dân bu chu an lâktîr a." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ezra chuan mipui punkhâwmnaah, mipa leh hmeichhia, naupangte pawh, a hrethiam pha âwm chin hmaah chuan Dân bu chu a rawn keng a." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ezra chuan mipui punkhâwmnaah, mipa leh hmeichhia, naupangte pawh, a hrethiam pha âwm chin hmaah chuan Dân bu chu a rawn keng a."
