Nehemiah8:3 Kawngkhâr bul tualzâwl zau laiah chuan khawvâr aṭangin chhûn lai thlengin, Dân bu chu a chhiar a, ngun takin an ngaithla ṭhuap a." 
Nehemiah8:4 An thingphel dawhkân siamah chuan Dânhremi Ezra chu a ding a, a ding lamah Matithia te, Sema te, Anaia te, Uria te, Hilkia te, Maaseia te an ding a; a vei lamah Pedaia te, Misaela te, Malkija te, Hasuma te, Hasbadana te, Zekaria te, Mesulama te an ding a." 
Nehemiah8:4 An thingphel dawhkân siamah chuan Dânhremi Ezra chu a ding a, a ding lamah Matithia te, Sema te, Anaia te, Uria te, Hilkia te, Maaseia te an ding a; a vei lamah Pedaia te, Misaela te, Malkija te, Hasuma te, Hasbadana te, Zekaria te, Mesulama te an ding a." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezra dinna chu a sâng bîk a, mi zawng zawngin an hmu thei a. Dân bu chu a han phelh chuan mipui chu an ding vek a." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezra dinna chu a sâng bîk a, mi zawng zawngin an hmu thei a. Dân bu chu a han phelh chuan mipui chu an ding vek a." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezra chuan Lalpa, Pathian ropui chu a fak a, mipui chuan, “Amen, Amen,” tiin an lo chhâwn a, an kûn a, Lalpa hmaah chuan an bawkkhup a." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezra chuan Lalpa, Pathian ropui chu a fak a, mipui chuan, “Amen, Amen,” tiin an lo chhâwn a, an kûn a, Lalpa hmaah chuan an bawkkhup a." 
Nehemiah8:7 An tho va, mahni hmun ṭheuhvah an ding a, Levia chi Jesua te, Bania te, Serebia te, Jamina te, Akuba te, Sebethaia te, Hodia te, Maaseia te, Kelita te, Azaria te, Jozabada te, Hanana te, Pelaia te chuan an lo sawi fiah zêl a." 
Nehemiah8:8 Dân bu thu chu an tualṭawngin an let chawp a, mipui hriat theih tûrin an sawi fiah a." 
Nehemiah8:9 An tih tûra Dân bu-in a phût chu mipuiin an han hriat chuan an rilru a khawih hle a, an ṭap ta hlawm a. Tichuan, an Tirsatha Nehemia te, puithiam leh Dânhremi Ezra te, Dân thu sawifiahtu Levia chite chuan mite hnênah, “Vawiin hi Lalpa, in Pathianni thianghlim a ni, in ṭap tûr a ni lo va, in ngui tûr a ni hek lo." 
Nehemiah8:9 An tih tûra Dân bu-in a phût chu mipuiin an han hriat chuan an rilru a khawih hle a, an ṭap ta hlawm a. Tichuan, an Tirsatha Nehemia te, puithiam leh Dânhremi Ezra te, Dân thu sawifiahtu Levia chite chuan mite hnênah, “Vawiin hi Lalpa, in Pathianni thianghlim a ni, in ṭap tûr a ni lo va, in ngui tûr a ni hek lo." 
Nehemiah8:10 Haw ula, ruai ṭheh rawh u. In uain leh chaw chu a nei ve lote eipui ang che u. Vawiin hi kan Lalpa tân ni serh a ni a, ngui suh u, Lalpa -a in lâwmna chu in chakna a ni si a,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah8:11 Levia chite chuan mipui chu, “Vawiin ni thianghlim angah hian ṭap teh suh u, a ngui pawh ngui hek suh u,” tiin mipui ṭap chu an thlêm a." 
Nehemiah8:12 Mite chu an in lamah an haw a, hlim takin an eiin an in a, mi dangte pawh an neih ang chu an pe a, an hnêna Dân thu an chhiar kha an hriat avângin an lâwm a ni." 
Nehemiah8:13 A tûkah chuan hnam tin hruaitu te, puithiam te leh Levia chi te chu Dânhremi Ezra hnênah Dân thu zir tûrin an kal a." 
Nehemiah8:13 A tûkah chuan hnam tin hruaitu te, puithiam te leh Levia chi te chu Dânhremi Ezra hnênah Dân thu zir tûrin an kal a." 
Nehemiah8:14 Lalpa chuan Mosia hmangin Israel-te zawm tûr Dân a pe a, chu Dân bu-ah chuan Bâwkte kût chhûng chhâwlbûkah an awm ṭhîn tûr a ni tih an hmu chhuak a." 
Nehemiah8:15 Chuvâng chuan, Jerusalem leh khaw dang zawng zawngah hetiang hian thu an pe a; “Tlângahte kal ula, oliv zâr te, umkhal zâr te, lenhmui zâr te, tumkau te leh thingbuk chhah te sât ula, dân bu-a chuang angin chhâwlbûk siam rawh u,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah8:16 Mite chuan chhâwl chu an sât a, an in chung zâwlah te, an tualah te, Tempul tualah te, khawlai zau laiah Tuikhur Kawngkhâr leh Efraim Kawngkhâr bulah te chuan chhâwlbûk an sa ta a." 
Nehemiah8:17 Saltâng lo haw zawng zawng chuan bûk an sa a, tah chuan an riak a, Nuna fapa Josua thih hnu kha chuan hetianga an tih hmasak ber ṭum a ni a; an tha a thovin an phûr hle a." 
Nehemiah8:18 Kût ṭan tirh ni aṭanga a tâwp ni thlengin ni tin Dân bu-a mi an chhiar ziah a ni. Ni sarih chhûng chu kût an hmang a, a ni riat ni chuan inkhâwm urhsûn tak neiin kût chu an ṭiak ṭhîn." 
Nehemiah9:1 Chumi thla, ni sawmhnih leh pali ni chuan Israel mite chu an kal khâwm a, saiip puan sinin chaw an nghei a, an lu-ah lei an phul a," 
Nehemiah9:2 Israel mite chu hnam dang lakah an inthiarfihlîm tawh a, an ding a, anmahni sualna leh an thlahtute khawlohna avângin thupha an chawi a." 
Nehemiah9:3 Lalpa, an Pathian Dân chu dârkâr thum vêl an chhiar a, dârkâr thum dang an sual thupha chawi nân an hmang a, Lalpa an Pathian chu chibai an bûk a." 
Nehemiah9:4 Levia chite tâna an dawhkân siamah chuan Jesua te Bania te Kadmiela te Sebania te Bunia te Serebia te Bania te Kenania te pawh an ding ve a. Lalpa, an Pathian hnênah ring takin an au va." 
Nehemiah9:5 Levia chi Jesua te, Kadmiela te, Bania te, Hasabneia te, Serebia te, Hodia te, Sebania te, Pethahia te chuan mipui chu Pathian be tûrin an sâwm a: “Ding ula, Lalpa, in Pathian chu kumkhuain fak rawh u. Fak sên rual ni lo mah se, a hming ropui chu mi tinin fak rawh se,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah9:6 Israel mite chu hetiang hian an ṭawngṭai a: “Aw Lalpa, nang chauh hi Lalpa chu i ni, Vânte leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte, Lei leh tuifinriatte leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng te hi i siam vek a ni; An za-in i vawng ṭha ṭhîn a. Vâna awmhote chuan chibai an bûk ṭhîn che a." 
Nehemiah9:7 Aw Lalpa, nang Pathian chuan Abrama i ko va, Kaldai ram Ur khua ata i hruai chhuak a, A hmingah Abrahama i sa ta a." 
Nehemiah9:8 A zui tlat che avângin thuthlung i siamsak ta a, Kanan ram chu pêk i tiam a, Hit mi leh Amor mite awmna ram Periz-ho te, Jebus-ho te, Girgas-ho te awmna ram chu, A thlahte awm nân i pêk kha. I rinawm a, i thutiam i hlen ta a." 
Nehemiah9:9 Min thlahtute Aigupta rama an retheihzia i hria a, Tuipui Senah an mangang au i ngaihthlâk kha." 
Nehemiah9:10 An lal leh hotute chungah, an ram chungah nên Thil mak tak tak i ti ṭeuh va, I mite an tihduhdahzia i hria a ni, Tûn thlengin i hmingthan phah ta a ni." 
Nehemiah9:11 I mite tân tuipui laiah kawng i siam a, Leichârah i hruai kai kha. Ûmtute chu tui thûkah an pil a, Tuipui fâwn vêla lungtum pil ang vang vang an ni." 
Nehemiah9:12 Chhûnah chhûm dingin i hruai a, Zânah mei êngin." 
Nehemiah9:13 Vân ata i lo chhuk a, Sinai tlângah khân, I mite chu i rawn bia a, Awm dân tûr thuruat ṭha te, Thupêk leh Dân nghet te i pe." 
Nehemiah9:14 Sabat ni chu serh ṭha tûrin i ti a, I chhiahhlawh Mosia hmangin i dân chu i hrilh." 
Nehemiah9:15 An rilṭâm khân vân chaw i pe a, An tuihâl khân lungpui ata in tûr i pe. An hnêna pêk i tiam ram chu nei tûrin thu i pêk kha." 
Nehemiah9:16 Min thlahtute chu an inchhuang a, an luhlul hle, I thupêkte chu an awih duh ta lo va." 
Nehemiah9:17 I thu an awih lo va, thil mak i tihsakte an hre duh lo, Luhlul an chhuah a, an hel ta a. Aigupta bawiha hruai lût leh tûr hotu an thlang. Lainatnaa khat thinnel i ni a, I ngaidam peih zêl a, i thlahthlam lo." 
Nehemiah9:18 Milem, bâwngno lem an siam a, “Hei hi Aigupta ram ata min hruaichhuaktu, Thil mak tam tak min tihsaktu kha a ni,” an ti. Aw Lalpa, an va tinawmnah che êm!" 
Nehemiah9:19 Ngil i neih êm avângin Thlalêrah khân i thlahthlam lo. Chhûn leh zâna hruai ṭhîntu chhûm ding leh mei chu i la bo lo. 
Nehemiah9:20 Dawhthei takin i zirtîr hrâm hrâm a, Mana-in i châwm a, in tûr i pe bawk a." 
Nehemiah9:21 Kum sawmli chhûng thlalêrah khân An mamawh zawng zawng i tumsak a, An silhfênte lah a chul thei lo, An keruh pawh a na ngai lo." 
Nehemiah9:22 Hnamte i hnehtîr a, an ram te i pe a, Hesbon lal Sihona ram an neihsak a, Basan lal Oga ram pawh an nei." 
Nehemiah9:23 Vâna arsi zâtin an fate i tipung a, An pate hnêna pêk i tiam ram chu An la a, an awm ta a." 
Nehemiah9:24 Kanan ram chu an la a, Chûnga awmte chu i tihtlâwmsak a, Kanan mi leh an lalte chu An duh tâwkin i sawisaktîr ta a." 
Nehemiah9:25 I mite chuan kulh nei khuate an la a, Ram ṭha ṭha chu an nei ta a, In nuam tak takte chu an luah zêl a. Tuizêm siam sa an ring a, Thei tinrêng, oliv leh grep rah sa an tlân. An duh tâwk tâwk an ei, an sa a mâm thul mai. I thilpêk, thil ṭhate chu an tlân a ni." 
Nehemiah9:26 I mite chuan i thu an awih duh ta lo va, An hel a, i Dân an pawisa lo. I lam hawi tûra fuihtu zâwlneite chu An that zêl a, an thamlo hle reng che." 
Nehemiah9:27 Chuvâng chuan, an hmêlmate kutah i pe a, An lo timangang êm êm a, An rawn au che a, vân aṭangin i lo chhâng ṭhîn, I khawngaih a, hruaitute i pe a, Hmêlma lakah an vêng him ṭhîn." 
Nehemiah9:28 Râlmuanga an awm chuan thil sual an ti leh mai ṭhîn a, An hmêlmate kutah i pe leh ṭhîn. An sima ṭanpui an dîl che chuan I lo khawngaih a, vân aṭangin i lo ngaithla a, I chhan chhuak leh mai ṭhîn." 
Nehemiah9:29 I Dânte chu zâwm tûrin i hrilh ṭhîn a, An inchhuan êm avângin I thupêkte an zâwm duh lo. Mihring nun theih nâna awm dân tûr i ruatte chu An tihmawh leh luhlul avângin an zâwm duh lo." 
Nehemiah9:30 A kum a têlin i zilh fo va, I zâwlneite thu i sawitîr ṭhîn, I mite chuan an beng an chhungawng a, An hmêlmate kutah i pe leh ṭhîn." 
Nehemiah9:31 I lainat êm avângin i thlahthlam lo va, I tiboral mai hek lo. Pathian ngilnei tak leh Mi khawngaih thei tak zawng i lo nih hi." 
Nehemiah9:32 Nang zawng kan Pathian, Pathian ropui, Thil i titheiin i va hlauhawm êm!” I thuthlung chu i chelh tlat a, Asuria lalten min rawn lâk ata Tûn thlengin kan va rethei tak êm! Kan lal te, hruaitu te, puithiam te, zâwlnei te, Min thlahtute nên kan tuar tlâng a, Kan retheihzia hi ngainêp teh suh." 
Nehemiah9:33 Nang chuan dik takin thil i ti a, Min hrem pawh hi i tidik e, Kan sual a ni." 
Nehemiah9:34 Min thlahtu te, kan lal te, Puithiam te leh hruaitu te chuan I Dân chu an zâwm duh lo. I thupêkte leh i thuruatte an pawisa lo." 
Nehemiah9:35 I pêk ram zau tak leh ṭha takah chuan an awm a, I duhsak a, lalte i pe a, Mahse, an sual an sim duh lo, I rawng an bâwl duh bawk hek lo." 
Nehemiah9:36 Tûnah pawh hian i ram min pêkah chuan bawih kan ni a, He ram ṭha tak, ei tûr tamna ramah hian." 
Nehemiah9:37 Kan sual vânga kan chunga lal i dahte chuan Rama thil haw apiang an hui a, An duh duhin min sawisak hi, kan rante nên; Kan mangang êm êm mai.”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Kan chunga thil lo thlengte avâng chuan min hruaitu te, Levia chi te, Puithiam te leh keini Israel mi te hian thu nghet takin kan tiam a, hming kan ziak a ni." 
Nehemiah10:1 Ramawptu Nehemia, Hakalia fapa chuan an thutiamah chuan hming a ziak hmasa ber a, Zedekian a ziak leh a. Hming ziaktu dangte chu hêngte hi an ni:" 
Nehemiah10:2 Puithiamho zînga mi: Seraia, Azaria, Jeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pasura, Amaria, Malkija," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatusa, Sebania, Maluka," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harima, Meremota, Obadia," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniela, Ginethona, Baruka," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniela, Ginethona, Baruka," 
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulama, Abija, Mijamina," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maazia, Bilgaia leh Semaia." 
Nehemiah10:9 Levia chi zînga hêngho hian hming an ziak bawk: Azania fapa Jesua, Henadada fate zîngah Binuia leh Kadmiela," 
Nehemiah10:10 An unau Sebania, Hodia, Kelita, Pelaia, Hanana," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Rehoba, Hasabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zakura, Serebia, Sebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia, Bania leh Beninua." 
Nehemiah10:14 Mipui hruaitu, hming ziak vete chu hêngte hi an ni: Parosa, Pahat-Moaba, Elama, Zatua, Bania," 
Nehemiah10:15 Bunia, Azgada, Bebaia," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonija, Bigvaia, Adina," 
Nehemiah10:17 Atera, Hezekia, Azura," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodia, Hasuma, Bezaia," 
Nehemiah10:19 Harifa, Anathota, Nebaia," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magpiasa, Mesulama, Hezira," 
Nehemiah10:21 Mesezabela, Zadoka, Jadua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia, Hanana, Anaia," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea, Hanania, Hasuba," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea, Hanania, Hasuba," 
Nehemiah10:24 Halohesa, Pilha, Sobeka," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehuma, Hasabna, Maaseia," 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahia, Hanana, Anana," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluka, Harima leh Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Israel mi, puithiam te, Levia chi te, Tempul pulis te, zaipâwl te, Tempul enkawltu te leh mi dang, keiniho, Pathian Dân zâwm duhtute hian kan vêla awm hnam dangte laka inthiarfihlîma, chinchâng hre pha chin, kan nupui fanaute leh" 
Nehemiah10:29 min hruaitute nên hian Pathian Dân, a chhiahhlawh hmanga min pêk chu, zâwm tûrin chhia kan chham ta a ni. Lalpa kan lal thupêk zawng zawngte chu kan awih ang a, a thuruatte kan ti ang a, awm dân tûr a tih ang ngeia awm kan tiam ta a ni." 
Nehemiah10:30 Kan rama hnam dang awm vete nên kan inneih pawlh lo vang. Hnam dangin sabat ni-ah leh ni serh dangah buh emaw, thil dang emaw min rawn zawrh pawhin kan lei lo vang." 
Nehemiah10:31 Kum sarih kumin lo kan nei lo vang a, miin kan thil an bat zawng zawng kan ngaidam ang." 
Nehemiah10:32 Kum tin, Tempula senso tûr tangkarua gram nga ṭheuh pêk kan tiam e." 
Nehemiah10:33 Tempula rawngbâwlna tûr hêng pawh hi kan tum ang: Chhang serh, ni tina hâlral thilhlan tûr chhangphut, ni tina hâl ral tûr ran; sabat ni te, thla thar ni te, kût ni tea hâl ral tûr rante, Israel hnam pum sual thawina tûr ran te leh thil ṭûl apiang kan tum ang." 
Nehemiah10:34 Dân bu-a sawi angin keini mipui te, puithiam te, Levia chi te hian Lalpa, kan Pathian hnêna thilhlan hâlna tûr thing tumtu kum tin ṭhumvâwrin kan thlang ṭhîn ang." 
Nehemiah10:35 Kum tin, kan buh seng hmasak ber leh kan theirah lawh hmasak berte chu Tempulah kan rawn hlân ṭhîn ang." 
Nehemiah10:36 Fapa kan neih hmasak ber chu Tempula puithiam hnêna hruaiin, Dânin a phût angin Pathian tân kan hlân ang. Kan bâwngno hmasa ber te, kan berâm leh kêl no hrin hmasak ber te pawh Lalpa hnênah kan hlân ang." 
Nehemiah10:37 Tempula puithiam hnênah buh thar aṭanga kan chhang siam hmasak ber chu kum tin kan keng ang a, kan uain te, oliv hriak te leh thei dang rahte kan hlân bawk ang. Kan lova sâwma pakhat chu a chang tûra ruat Levia chite kan pe ang a," 
Nehemiah10:38 sâwma pakhat lâk hunah Arona thlah puithiamte pawh pêk tûr an ni. Tempula dah tûrin Levia chite chuan an dawn apiang sâwma pakhat chu an pe ve ṭhîn tûr a ni. 
Nehemiah10:39 Israel mite leh Levia chite chuan buh te, uain te, oliv hriak an pêkte chu Jerusalem Tempulah, bungbêl dahnaah an dah ṭhîn tûr a ni; Tempula rawngbâwl tûr puithiam te, Tempul pulis te leh Tempul zaipâwl te awm ṭhinnaah chuan. Pathian in chu kan thlahthlam hauh lo vang." 
Nehemiah11:1 Hnam hruaitute chu Jerusalem khuaah an awm a, chhûng sâwm zêla chhûng khat chu Jerusalem khaw thianghlima awm tûrin ṭhumvâwrin an thlang a; mi dang erawh chu khaw danga awm tûrin thingtlâng khuaahte an kal a." 
Nehemiah11:2 Jerusalem khuaa awm tûra inpe peihte chu an ngaisâng hle a. 
Nehemiah11:3 Israel rama khawpui deuhvah leh khaw tê deuhva awm puithiam te, Levia chi te, Tempul enkawltute leh Solomona chhiahhlawh thlahte chu an awmna khuaah mahni in ngeiah an awm a ni. Judai rama mi, mi lâr deuh deuh Jerusalem khuaa awmte chu hêng hi an ni:" 
Nehemiah11:4 Juda thlahte zînga mi: Zekaria tupa, Uzia fa Athaia; ani hi Juda fapa Pereza thlah a ni, a pute chu Amaria te, Sefatia te, Mahalalela te an ni." 
Nehemiah11:5 Kolhozea tupa, Baruka fapa Maaseia; ani hi Juda fa Sela thlah zînga mi a ni. A pute chu Hazaia te, Adaia te, Joiariba te leh Zekaria te an ni." 
Nehemiah11:6 Pereza thlah mi zali leh sawmruk leh pariatin Jerusalem khuaah in leh lo an nei. 
Nehemiah11:7 Benjamina thlahte zînga mi: Joeda tupa Mesulama fa Salua; a pute chu Pedaia te, Kolaia te, Maaseia te, Ithiela te leh Jesaia te an ni." 
Nehemiah11:8 Salua laichîn hnai Gabaia leh Salaia pawh Jerusalem-ah an awm. Benjamina thlah Jerusalem-a awm zawng zawng mi zakua leh sawmhnih leh pariat an ni. 
Nehemiah11:9 Zikria fapa Joela chu an hotu ber a ni a, Hasenua fapa Juda chu hotu ber dawttu a ni." 
Nehemiah11:9 Zikria fapa Joela chu an hotu ber a ni a, Hasenua fapa Juda chu hotu ber dawttu a ni." 
Nehemiah11:10 Hêng puithiamte hi Jerusalem-ah an awm bawk: Joiariba fapa Jedaia leh Jakina. 
Nehemiah11:11 Mesulama tupa Hilkia fa Seraia. Ani hi a pute chu Zadoka te, Meraiota te leh Puithiam lalber Ahituba te an ni." 
Nehemiah11:12 He mite chi zariat leh sawmhnih leh pahnihin Tempulah rawng an bâwl ṭhîn. Pelaia tupa Jerohama fapa Adaia. Ani hi a pute chu Amazia te, Zekaria te, Pasura te leh Malkija te an ni." 
Nehemiah11:13 An vaiin he chite hi an chhûngkaw hotute nên mi zahnih leh sawmli leh pahnih a ni. Ahzaia tupa, Azarela fa Amasaia. Ani hi a pute chu Mesilemota te leh Imera te an ni." 
Nehemiah11:14 He chi hi mi za leh sawmhnih leh pariat an awm, sipai huai tak tak an ni. An hotu chu chhûngkaw hung tak zînga mi Zabdiela a ni." 
Nehemiah11:15 Levia chi Jerusalem-a awmte: Azrikama tupa, Hasuba fa Semaia. Ani hi a pute chu Hasabia te leh Bunia te an ni." 
Nehemiah11:16 Sabethaia leh Jozabada. Anni hi Levia chi, mi lâr tak, Tempul pâwn lam hna enkawltu an ni." 
Nehemiah11:17 Asafa thlah, Zabdia tupa, Mika fapa Matania. Ani hi Tempul zaipâwl lâwm hla sak hruaitu a ni. Bakbukia: ani hi Matania puitu a ni. Galala tupa, Samua fa, Abda: ani hi Jeduthuna thlaha mi a ni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Jerusalem khaw thianghlima Levia chi awm zawng zawng chu mi zahnih leh sawmriat leh pali an ni. 
Nehemiah11:19 Tempul pulis Jerusalem-a awmte: Akuba te, Talmona te leh an chhûngte nên; an vaiin mi za leh sawmsarih leh pahnih an ni." 
Nehemiah11:20 Israel mi dang chu puithiamte leh Levia chi dangte nên Judai ram khawpui deuhvah te leh khaw tê deuhvah te mahni inah an awm a. 
Nehemiah11:21 Tempul enkawltute chu Jerusalem khaw chhûng ‘ofel’ an tih laiah chuan a bingin an awm a ni: Ziha leh Gispa hovin hna an thawk ṭhîn. 
Nehemiah11:22 Levia chite zînga an hotu ber Jerusalem-a awm chu Hasabia tupa, Bania fa Uzia a ni. A pute chu Matania te leh Mika te an ni. Asafa thlahte zînga mi a ni a, Tempula thil ri thei tumtu an ni." 
Nehemiah11:23 Ni tina an inthlâk kual dân tûr lal thupêk chu ziakin an dah ṭha a. 
Nehemiah11:24 Juda hnama mi, Zera thlah Mesezabela fa Pethahia chu Persia sawrkâra Israel mite aiawhtu a ni." 
Nehemiah11:25 Mi tam tak chu an huan ramah an awm thlih thliah a. Juda thlahte chu Judai ram khawpui Kiriat-arba-ah te, Dibon-ah te, Jekabzeel leh an khawperah te an awm ber a." 
Nehemiah11:26 Jesua khuaah te, Molada khuaah te leh Beth-pelet khuaah te," 
Nehemiah11:27 Hazar-sual khawpuiah te leh Beer-seba-ah leh a chhehvêl khuaah te an awm a," 
Nehemiah11:28 Ziklag leh Mekona khua leh a chhehvêl khuaah te. 
Nehemiah11:29 En-rimon-ah te, Zora-ah te, Jarmut-ah te," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanoa-ah te, Adulam-ah te leh an chhehvêl khuaah te pawh an awm a. Lakis-ah leh a chhehvêl huanah te, Azeka leh a khawperah te an awm bawk a. Juda thlahte chu chhim lamah Beer-seba, hmâr lamah Hinom ruam inkâr ramah an awm ber a ni." 
Nehemiah11:31 Benjamina thlahte chu Geba-ah te, Mikmas-ah te, Ai-ah te, Bethel-ah te leh an vêl khawperah te an awm a." 
Nehemiah11:32 Anathot-ah te, Nob-ah te, Anania-ah te," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazor-ah te, Rama-ah te, Zeboim-ah te, Nebalat-ah te," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadid-ah te, Zeboim-ah te, Nebalat-ah te," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod-ah te, Ono-ah te, themthiamho ruamah te an awm a." 
Nehemiah11:36 Judai rama awm ṭhîn Levia chi mi ṭhenkhat chu Benjamin-ho zîngah an awmtîr a. 
Nehemiah12:1 Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh puithiam lalber Jesua ruala saltâng haw vete chu hêng hi an ni: Puithiamho: Seraia, Jeremia, Ezra," 
Nehemiah12:1 Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh puithiam lalber Jesua ruala saltâng haw vete chu hêng hi an ni: Puithiamho: Seraia, Jeremia, Ezra," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Maluka, Hatusa," 
Nehemiah12:3 Sekania, Rehuma, Meremota," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido-a, Ginethoia, Abija," 
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamina, Maadia, Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Semaia, Joiariba, Jedaia," 
Nehemiah12:7 Salua, Amoka, Hilkia leh Jedaia. Hêngho hi Jesua hun laia puithiam thlah hrang hotute chu an ni." 
Nehemiah12:8 Levia chite: Tempula inkhâwmnaah lâwmthu sawina hla hruaitu Levia chite chu hêng hi an ni: Jesua, Binuia, Kadmiela, Serebia, Juda leh Matania te hi." 
Nehemiah12:9 Hêngho hi zaipâwl hla sak lo chhâwn ṭhîntute chu an ni: Bakbukia te leh Unoa te leh an Levia chipui te. 
Nehemiah12:10 Jesua fa chu Joiakima a ni, chu mi fa chu Eliasiba a ni, ani chu Joiada pa a ni." 
Nehemiah12:11 Joiada fa chu Jonathana, Jadua pa a ni." 
Nehemiah12:12 Joiakima hun laia puithiam thlah hrang hrang hotute chu hêng hi an ni: Seraia thlah zînga hotu chu Meraria a ni a, Jeremia thlah zînga hotu chu Hanania a ni." 
Nehemiah12:13 Ezra thlah zînga hotu chu Mesulama a ni a, Amaria thlah zînga hotu chu Johanana a ni." 
Nehemiah12:13 Ezra thlah zînga hotu chu Mesulama a ni a, Amaria thlah zînga hotu chu Johanana a ni." 
Nehemiah12:14 Maluka thlah zînga hotu chu Jonathana a ni a, Sebania thlah zînga hotu chu Josefa a ni." 
Nehemiah12:15 Harima thlah zînga hotu chu Adna a ni a, Meraiota thlah zînga hotu chu Helkaia a ni." 
Nehemiah12:16 Ido-a thlah zînga hotu chu Zekaria a ni a, Ginethona thlah zînga hotu chu Mesulama a ni." 
Nehemiah12:17 Abija thlah zînga hotu chu Zikria a ni a, Miniamina thlah zînga hotu chu Moadia thlah zînga hotu chu Piltaia a ni." 
Nehemiah12:18 Bilga thlah zînga hotu chu Samua a ni a, Semaia thlah zînga hotu chu Jehonathana a ni." 
Nehemiah12:19 Joiariba thlah zînga hotu chu Matenaia a ni a, Jedaia thlah zînga hotu chu Uzia a ni." 
Nehemiah12:20 Salaia thlah zînga hotu chu Kalaia a ni a, Amoka thlah zînga hotu chu Ebera a ni." 
Nehemiah12:21 Hilkia thlah zînga hotu chu Hasabia a ni a, Jedaia thlah zînga hotu chu Nethanela a ni." 
Nehemiah12:22 Hêng puithiam lalber Eliasiba te, Joiada te, Johanana te, Jadua te hun lai hian Levia chite leh puithiamhote chu an thlahtute chhui chhuaha, chhinchhiah fel a ni. Daria kha Persia lal a lo nih kha chuan ziak chhuah fel a ni tawh." 
Nehemiah12:23 Eliasiba tupa Johanana hun aṭang chauhvin Levia chite chu an chhûngkaw hotu hming chhui chhuaha ziak fel a ni. 
Nehemiah12:24 Hasabia te, Serebia te, Jesua te, Binuia te leh Kadmiela te kaihhruaiin Levia chite hi a pâwl pâwlin an inṭhen a, ṭum khatah pâwl hnihin Pathian fak hla an sa ṭhîn, pâwl khatin an sa phawt a, pâwl dangin an lo chhâwn ṭhîn. Lal Davida remruat ang khân an la ti zêl a ni." 
Nehemiah12:25 Hêngho hi Tempul pulis hotu, Tempul kudâm leh kawngkhâr vêngtute chu an ni: Matania te, Bakbukia te, Obadia te, Mesulama te, Talmona leh Akuba te." 
Nehemiah12:26 Jesua fapa Joiakima, Jozadaka tupa te, Ramawptu Nehemia te, puithiam leh lehkhathiam Ezra te hun laiin hêng mite hian hna an thawk ṭan a ni." 
Nehemiah12:26 Jesua fapa Joiakima, Jozadaka tupa te, Ramawptu Nehemia te, puithiam leh lehkhathiam Ezra te hun laiin hêng mite hian hna an thawk ṭan a ni." 
Nehemiah12:27 Jerusalem khaw kulh bang siam zawh an lawm dâwn chuan dârbenthek te, perhkhuang te nêna lâwm hla sa tûrin Levia chite chu khawia awm pawh an chah khâwm a." 
Nehemiah12:28 Levia chi, hla sa mi, Jerusalem leh a chhehvêla awmte leh Netofa khawpui leh a chhehvêla awmte chu an lo pung khâwm a." 
Nehemiah12:29 Beth-gilgal aṭang te, Geba aṭang te, Asmavet khua aṭang te pawhin an lo kal a." 
Nehemiah12:30 Puithiamte leh Levia chite chu an inthian thianghlim a, mipui te leh kulh bang te pawh an thian thianghlim a." 
Nehemiah12:31 Judai rama hotute chu kulh bang chung zâwlah chuan ka hruai a, pâwl hnihah an inṭhen a. Khawpui kulh bang chung zâwlah chuan Pathian fak chungin an kal kual a. Pâwl khat chu bang chung zâwla kalin Bawlhhlawh Kawngkhâr lam, ding lam panin an kal a." 
Nehemiah12:32 Zaipâwlin hma an hruai a, Hosaia hovin Judai ram hotu zâtve chuan an zui a." 
Nehemiah12:33 Hêng puithiam - Azaria te, Ezra te, Mesulama te," 
Nehemiah12:33 Hêng puithiam - Azaria te, Ezra te, Mesulama te," 
Nehemiah12:34 Juda te, Benjamina te, Semaia te leh Jeremia te hian an zui a." 
Nehemiah12:35 Tawtawrâwt nên hêng puithiam fapate hian an zui: Jonathana fapa Zekaria, Semaia tupa (Ani hi a pute chu Matania te, Mikaia te leh Zakura te. Asafa thlah an ni) chuan hma a hruai a," 
Nehemiah12:36 a chipui Semaia te, Azarela te, Milalaia te, Gilalaia te, Maaia te, Nethanela te, Juda te, Hanania te chuan an zui a. Pathian mi, lal Davida tum ṭhin ang perhkhuang te kha an keng bawk a, lehkhathiam Ezra chuan hma a hruai bawk a." 
Nehemiah12:36 a chipui Semaia te, Azarela te, Milalaia te, Gilalaia te, Maaia te, Nethanela te, Juda te, Hanania te chuan an zui a. Pathian mi, lal Davida tum ṭhin ang perhkhuang te kha an keng bawk a, lehkhathiam Ezra chuan hma a hruai bawk a." 
Nehemiah12:37 Tuikhur Kawngkhâr an thlen chuan Davida khaw chhohna kailâwnah an chho va, Davida in an kal pêl a, khawpui chhak lam dep Meipui Kawngka bulah chuan an lo kal kual a." 
Nehemiah12:38 Pâwl dang, lâwm hla saho chu kulh bang chung zâwlah chuan vei lam panin an kal a. Mipui pung khâwm zâtve dangte nên chuan kan zui a. Meichhehna In sâng kan kal pêl a, kulh bang chhah kan thleng a," 
Nehemiah12:39 Efraim Kawngkhâr te, Jesina Kawngkhâr te, Sangha Kawngkhâr te, Hananela in sâng te, Hamea in sâng te, Berâm Kawngkhâr te kan kal pêl a, Tempul bul kawngkhâr kan thleng a." 
Nehemiah12:40 Tichuan, Pathian faka kalhote chu Tempul tualah kan intâwk khâwm ta a. Ka bula kal hruaitute bâkah" 
Nehemiah12:41 hêng mite hi ka ruala kal vete chu an ni: puithiam rual tawtawrâwt hâmtute chu Eliakima, Maaseia, Miniamina, Mikaia, Elioenaia, Zekaria leh Hanania." 
Nehemiah12:42 Hêng mite hian an rawn dawt a: Maaseia, Semaia, Eleazara, Uzia, Jehohanana, Malkija, Elama leh Ezera. Zaipâwl Jezrahia ho chuan an râwl tâwpin hla an sa a." 
Nehemiah12:43 Chumi ni chuan thil tam tak kan hlân a, Pathianin min tihlim a, mipui chu an lâwm êm êm a ni. Hmeichhia leh naupangte pawh a lawmnaah hian an tel a, an thâwm chu hla tak aṭang pawhin a hriat a ni." 
Nehemiah12:44 Tempul thawhlâwm te, buh leh thei hmin hmasa sâwma pakhat te dah khâwma enkawltu tûrte kan ruat bawk a. Dânin a phût ang, puithiamte leh Levia chite hlawh tûr khaw tina lo leh huan aṭanga khawntu atân chûng mite chu ruat an ni nghâl a. Judai rama mite chu puithiam leh Levia chite chungah an lâwm hle a ni," 
Nehemiah12:45 inthen thianghlim hnate leh Pathian thupêk anga tih tûr dang taima taka an tih ṭhîn avângin. Tempul zaipâwl te leh Tempul pulis te pawhin lal Davida leh a fapa Solomona dân siam ang khân engkim an ti thlap zêl a. 
Nehemiah12:46 Hmânlai ata lal Davida leh thil tum thiam Asafa hun aṭang tawh khân thil tum thiam mite hian Tempula lâwmthu sawina leh fakna hla sakte hi an hruai ṭhîn a ni. 
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubabela leh Nehemia hun aṭangin mipuiin Tempul zaipâwl leh Tempul pulis te hlawh tûr ni tin thawhlâwm an pe ṭhîn, Levia chite tân pawh thilhlan an pe ṭhîn; Levia chite chuan puithiamte chu thilhlan an sem ve ṭhîn." 
Nehemiah13:1 Mosia dân bu an han chhiar chuan Amon mite leh Moab mite chu Israel-ho zînga telh ve ngai loh tûr an nih thu a lo chuang reng mai a. 
Nehemiah13:2 Amon mite leh Moab mite hian, Israel-te Aigupta ram aṭanga an lo chhuah khân chaw leh tui in tûr takngial pawh an lo pe duh lovin" 
Nehemiah13:3 Israel-te ânchhe lawh tûrin Balaama an ruai zâwk a nih kha; mahse, Pathianin ânchhia chu malsâwmnaah a chantîr ta hlauh zâwk pawh a ni. He dân hi Israel miten an hriat chuan an zîng aṭangin hnam dangte chu an thlauhthla ta a." 
Nehemiah13:4 Puithiam Eliasiba, Tempul kudâm enkawltu leh Tobia hi rei tak an lo inkâwmngeih tawh a." 
Nehemiah13:5 Pindan zau tâwk tak pakhat, buh leh rimtui te, Tempula bungbêl hman tûr te, puithiamte tâna thilpêk te, buh te, uain te leh oliv hriak, sâwma pakhat, Levia chiten Tempul zaipâwl te leh Tempul pulis te tâna an pêk dahkhâwmna tûrah chuan Tobia chu a thlentîr ṭhîn a." 
Nehemiah13:6 Chutianga a thlentîr ṭhin lai chuan kei chu Jerusalem-ah ka awm lo; Babulon-ah lal Artazerzia lal kum sawmthum leh pahnih kum chuan chanchin hrilh tûrin ka hâwng a ni. Nakin deuhvah chuan kîr leh min phalsak a. 
Nehemiah13:7 Jerusalem-ah chuan ka haw leh ta a. Eliasiban Tempul pindan pakhata Tobia a lo awmtîr ka hmuh chuan mak ka ti êm êm a. 
Nehemiah13:8 Ka thin a ur hle a, Tobia thawmhnaw zawng zawng chu ka theh chhuak a." 
Nehemiah13:9 Pindan chu thian thianghlim tûrin thu ka pe a, Tempul bungbêl te, buhbâl thilpêk te, rimtui hâl tûrte dah kîr leh tûrin thu ka pe bawk a." 
Nehemiah13:10 Mipuiin ei tûr tâwk an pêk ṭhat loh avângin Tempul zaipâwl te leh Levia chi te chu an awmna ṭhin an in leh lovah an lo haw deuh vek tawh tih ka hre bawk a. 
Nehemiah13:11 Tempul an ngaihsak loh avângin hotute chu ka hau va, Levia chite leh zaipâwlte chu Tempulah ka ko kîr a; an hna an thawk ṭan leh ta a." 
Nehemiah13:12 Israel mi zawng zawng chuan an buh te, an uain te, an oliv hriak sâwma pakhat te chu tempulah an rawn keng leh ta bawk a." 
Nehemiah13:13 Tempul kudâm enkawl tûr chuan hêng mite hi ka dah a: Puithiam Selemia te, Dân thiam Zadoka te, Levia chi Pedaia te hi. Anni puituah Zakura fapa Hanana, Matania tupa chu ka dah bawk a. Anni hi an thawhpuite hnênah dik taka thil sem tûra ka rinte an ni." 
Nehemiah13:14 Aw ka Pathian, i Tempul rawngbâwlna atâna ka thiltihte hi hre reng ang che." 
Nehemiah13:15 Chûng lai chuan Judai ramah mi ṭhenkhat chuan sabat niin grep an rap sâwr a, ṭhenkhatin sabengtungte chu Jerusalem-a zawrh tûrin buh te, uain te, oliv hriak te, sabat niah an phurhtîr a. Chuvângin, sabat nia thil hralh chu kan khap ta a." 
Nehemiah13:16 Tura khaw mi, Jerusalem-a awmte chuan, sanghate leh thil dang chi hrang hrang Jerusalem khuaah sabat nia hralh tûr an rawn la ṭhîn a." 
Nehemiah13:17 Juda hruaitute chu ka hau va, “Thil sual tak in ti alâwm, sabat ni in bawhchhiat hi!" 
Nehemiah13:18 In thlahtuten hetianga sabat an bawhchhiat avângin alâwm a hrem che ua, khua hi a rawn tihchhiat kha! Sabat ni bawhchhiain Israel-te chungah Pathian thinurna tihthlen belh in tum tlat a nih hi!” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah13:19 Chuvângin, sabat ni a inṭan aṭangin khawpui kulh kawngkhâr chu ka khârtîr a, sabat ni a ral hma chu kawng hawng lo tûrin thu ka pe bawk a. Sabat niin khawpuiah tu man eng mah an lâk luh theih loh nân kawngkhâr zawng zawng chu keima mite ngei ka vêntîr a." 
Nehemiah13:20 Ṭum hnih khat chu thil tinrêng rawn zuar ṭhînte chu khawpui kulh pâwnah Zirtâwpni zân chu an riak a. 
Nehemiah13:21 “Khatah riak tawh suh u, a sâwt lo, khatianga in tih leh chuan in chungah kut ka rawn thlâk tawh ang,” ka ti a. Chuta chin chu sabat niin an lo kal leh tawh ngai lo." 
Nehemiah13:22 Levia chite chu inthian thianghlim tûrin ka hrilh a, sabat ni chu serh ngei a nih theih nân kawngkhârahte chuan ka chântîr a. Aw ka Pathian, hei vâng pawh hian min hre reng la, khawngaih takin min zuah ang che." 
Nehemiah13:23 Chutih lai chuan Juda pa tam tak chuan Asdod nula te, Amon nula te, Moab nula te nupuiah an nei tih ka hmu chhuak bawk a." 
Nehemiah13:24 An fa zâtve dâwn lai chuan Asdod-ho ṭawng emaw, ṭawng dang emaw an hmang a, kan ṭawngin an ṭawng hlei thei lo." 
Nehemiah13:25 Chûng mite chu ka hau va, ânchhia ka lawh a, a ṭhen phei chu ka vua a, an samte pawh ka pawhsak a. Hnam dangte nên, an fate chen pawhin, inneih pawlh loh tûrin Pathian hming chhâlin chhia ka chhamtîr a." 
Nehemiah13:26 “Hnam dang hmeichhiaten alâwm lal Solomona pawh kha thil sual tihtîr. Hnam dang lal zawng zawng aia ropui a ni a, Pathian pawhin a hmangaih a, Israel zawng zawng lalah a siam a; mahse, he thil sual hi a tih tâk kha." 
Nehemiah13:27 Pathian thu awih lovin hnam dang hmeichhia nangni angin kan nei ve mai dâwn em ni ang?” tiin ka chhâl a. 
Nehemiah13:28 Puithiam lalber Eliasiba fapa Joiada chuan Sanbalata fanu nupuiah a nei a, ani chu Beth-horon mi a ni. Jerusalem khua ata Joiada chu ka hnawt chhuak a." 
Nehemiah13:29 Aw ka Pathian, hêng mite hian puithiam hming an tichhia a, puithiamte leh Levia chite nêna in thuthlung an bawhchhiat dân hi hre reng ang che." 
Nehemiah13:30 Hnam dangte nêna inhnamhnawihna zawng zawng ata mipui chu ka thian thianghlim a, puithiam leh Levia chite chu mahni tih tûr an hriat ṭheuh theih nân dân ka siamsak thlap a." 
Nehemiah13:31 Hâlral thilhlan hâlna tûr thingte chu a hun taka rawn keuh ziah tûrin hna ka sem a, mipui pawh buh thar hmasa leh thei hmin hmasa rawn ken hun tûr ka hrilh bawk a. Aw ka Pathian, hêng zawng zawng hi hre reng la, ka thiltih ṭhatah min pawmsak ang che." 
Esther1:1 Lal Ahasuera India aṭanga Sudan thlenga ram bial za leh sawmhnih leh pasarih chunga rorêltu hun laiin hêng thil hi a lo thleng a ni. 
Esther1:2 Hetih lai hian lal chu Susa khawpuiah a awm a," 
Esther1:3 a lal kum thum kum chuan a ram milian te, a ṭhuihruai te, Persia leh Media sipai hotu te, bial tina Ramawptu te leh bial tina milian te tân ruai a ṭheh a." 
Esther1:4 Thla ruk chhûng ngawt a ram ropui tak hausakzia te, a lalzia leh a neihnunzia te a entîr a." 
Esther1:5 Chûng hnu chuan a chênna khawpui Susa khuaa lo kal, milian leh mitê te tân lal in hual chhûngah ni sarih ruai a ṭheh leh a." 
Esther1:6 Chutah chuan la zai sîn puan vâr chi te, a dumpâwl chi te, a senduk chite an zâr a, a zârna hruihrual chu sailungvâr bana tangkaraw khângah chuan an thlung a. Rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam ṭhutthlêng dûp an hûng thluah a; a tualzâwlah chuan sailungvâr te, lungmawi chi hrang hrang - a sen te, a hring te, a dumpâwl te an phah bawk a." 
Esther1:7 An zu semna no chu rangkachak no a ni a, inang pakhat mah a awm lo; lal chuan uain chu a ren lo hle." 
Esther1:8 In tâwk chin tuk a awm lo; tu pawh, an duh zât zât intîr tûrin lal chuan a chhiahhlawhte chu a hrilh diam a ni." 
Esther1:9 Lalnu Vasti pawhin lal Ahasuera in pakhatah a hrangin nuho tân ruai a ṭheh ve bawk a. 
Esther1:10 A ni sarih ni chuan lal chu a rui lungpuam ta deuh va, mi tilreh pasarih - Mehumana te, Biztha te, Harbona te, Bigtha te, Abagtha te, Zethara te, Karkasa te leh ama chhiahhlawh bîkte chu a ko va." 
Esther1:11 Lalnu Vasti chu a lallukhum khum chunga rawn hruai tûrin a tîr a. Lalnu chu nu hmêlṭha tak a ni a, lal chuan a chhuang êm êm a, a miliante leh a ruai chhimtute chu a hmêl ṭhatzia entîr a duh a ni." 
Esther1:12 Lal thupêk an han hrilh chuan lalnu Vasti chu a kal duh ta lo va. Lal chu a thinur êm êm a. 
Esther1:13 Lalte hian dân leh a kenkawh dân tûr chungchângah dânhremite an râwn ziah ṭhîn a. Lal Ahasuera pawh chuan dânhremite chu a ko va. 
Esther1:14 Chûngte chu Karsena te, Sethara te, Admatha te, Tarsisa te, Meresa te, Marsena te, Memukana te, Persia leh Media rama milian, lal bula awm ṭhîn te an ni." 
Esther1:15 Lal chuan, “Lal Ahasueran a chhiahhlawhte lalnu Vasti a kohtîr a, a thu a lo awih duh lo va. Hetiang chungchânga kan ram dân eng nge ni, engtia tih tûr nge ni ang?” tiin anni chu a zâwt a." 
Esther1:16 Memukana chuan lal leh milian dang hmaah, “Lalnu Vasti hian lal hi a thamlo mai ni lovin a rama miliante leh ram pum chhûnga paho hi a lo thamlo hle tihna a ni." 
Esther1:17 Lalnu thil tih dân hi nuhovin an hriat hunah an pasalte chu an pawisa lo vang a, ‘Lal Ahasueran lalnu Vasti a koh pawhin a kal duh bîk hlei nêm,’ an ti ang." 
Esther1:18 Ni tlâk hmain Persia leh Media ram milian nupuite pawhin lalnu thiltih dân an hriatin an pasalte thu an awih duh bîk lo vang a, paho chu an thin a rim ṭeuh mai ang." 
Esther1:19 Lalin rem a tihzâwng a nih chuan lalnu Vasti hian, ‘lal hmêl a hmu leh tawh lo tûr a ni,’ tiin thupêk chhuah rawh. Sût leh mai mai chi loh Persia leh Media dân bu-ah ziak ni rawh se. Lalnu atân mi dang tha zâwk i nei leh mai dâwn nia." 
Esther1:20 Chu thupêk chu i ram zau taka puan a nih hnu chuan nuho chuan an pasalte chu an rethei emaw, an hausa emaw an pawisa ang,” a ti a." 
Esther1:21 Lal leh miliante chuan chu chu ṭha an tih zâwng tak a ni a. Memukana rawt angin lal chuan a ti ta a. 
Esther1:22 A ram bial tinah, a bial ṭawng leh hawrawp ṭheuh hmangin thu a thawn darh ta a; “Chhûng tinah pa a lal ber ang a, a thu chu awih vek tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Esther2:1 A thinur a daih hnu pawhin lal chuan Vasti thil tih dân leh a chungchânga thupêk chu a ngaihtuah neuh neuh ṭhîn a. 
Esther2:2 Lal thurâwntute chuan a hnênah, “Lal tân nula hnahkhat, hmêlṭha tak zawn ni teh se." 
Esther2:3 Bial tinah hotu ruat la, chûng chuan an bial nula hmêlṭha zawng chhuak sela, i khawpui Susa khuaah lal inah rawn hruai khâwm teh se, lal ina hmeichhe pindan enkawltu mi tilreh Hegaia hnênah rawn hruai sela, inchei zirtîr rawh se." 
Esther2:4 I nula duh ber i thlang ang a, Vasti aiah lalnu-ah i dah dâwn nia,” an ti a. Lal chuan ṭha a ti a, chutiang chuan an ti ta a." 
Esther2:5 Susa khuaah chuan Juda pakhat, Zaira fapa Mordekaia a awm a, Benjamin hnam Kisa fa Simeia thlah a ni." 
Esther2:6 Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran Jerusalem aṭanga Judai ram lal Jekonia leh a mi mante sala a hruai ṭum khân Mordekaia pawh hi a tel ve a ni. 
Esther2:7 A pamite nupa chu an thih tawh avângin an fanu Estheri, Hebrai ṭawnga Hadasi an tih chu, a enkawl seilian a, ama fanu ang chiahin a en a ni, nula hmêlṭha tak a ni." 
Esther2:8 Lal thupêk an puan chhuah hnu chuan Susa khawpuiah Hegaia lo enkawl tûrin nula an rawn hruai zut zut a. Estheri pawh chu lal inah hmeichhe pindan vêngtu Hegaia hnênah chuan an rawn hruai ve a. 
Esther2:9 Hmêlṭha a lo ti êm êm a, a lo duhsak ta hle a. A incheina tûrte chu a pe zung zung a, ei tûr tuihnai hnai a pe a, a chhiahhlawhah, amah cheitu atân lal ina nula pasarih a ruatsak bawk a. Lal ina hmeichhe awmna pindan nuam berah a chhiahhlawhte nên chuan a awmtîr ta a." 
Esther2:10 Estheri chuan eng hnam nge a niha, tute nge a chhûngte tih a sawi lo; Mordekaia khân sawi a khap tlat a ni." 
Esther2:11 Estheri chuan eng nge a tiha, engtin nge a awm zêl tih hre tûrin ni tin lal ina hmeichheho awmna pindan kawtah chuan Mordekaia chu a kal ziah ṭhîn." 
Esther2:12 Lal nupui tûr an chei chhûng hian kum khat a awh ṭhîn. Thla ruk chhûng chu Mura hriak an chulh a; chumi zawhah thla ruk chhûng bawk rimtui chi dang an chulh leh ṭhîn a ni. Chutia an chei hnu chauh chuan lal hnênah an kal ṭhîn a ni. 
Esther2:13 Lal hnêna an kal dâwn chuan chhiahhlawh nula, an duh ber pakhat, an hruai thei ṭhîn." 
Esther2:14 Zân lamah lal hnênah chuan an hruai a, zîngah chuan lal nupuiho awmnaah mi tilreh Saazgasa kutah an dah ṭhîn a; lalin a lo duh hlea, a hming lam meuhva a koh loh chuan an kal leh tawh ngai lo." 
Esther2:15 Estheri chu lal hnêna a kal hun a lo thleng ta a, Estheri hi Mordekaia pami fanu a ni a, fanu anga a neih tâk a ni a. Estheri chuan lal hnêna a kal dâwn chuan hmeichhe pindan enkawltu Hegaian tâwk a tih ang chiahin a inchei a, a hmu apiangin hmêlṭha an ti êm êm vek a." 
Esther2:16 Lal Ahasuera lal kum sarihna, thla sâwmna, Tebet thla chuan Estheri chu lal hnênah chuan an hruai a." 
Esther2:17 Lal chuan nula dang zawng zawng ai chuan Estheri chu a lo duh a, a lo duhsakin a ngaina bîk ta hle a; lallukhum a khumtîr a, Vasti aiah lalnu-ah a dah ta a." 
Esther2:18 Estheri lawm nân lal chuan ruai ropui tak a ṭheh a, milian leh lal ṭhuihruai zawng zawng an awm a, chumi ni chu a ram puma chawlhni-ah a puang a. A hausa bawk a, pêk âwm tak tak thilpêk a sem ur ur bawk a." 
Esther2:19 Lal chuan Mordekaia chu hna lian tak a thawhtîr tawh a. 
Esther2:20 Estheri pawh chuan Juda mi a nih tu mah a hrilh lo, Mordekaian tu mah hrilh loh tûr a tih kha, a naupan têt aṭanga a thu a zâwm ṭhîn ang khân a zâwm zêl a ni." 
Esther2:21 Mordekaia chu lal ina hna lian tak lalin a thawhtîr avâng chuan lal in kawngka vêngtu mi tilreh pahnih Bigthana leh Teresa chu lal Ahasuera chungah chuan an thinur a, lal chu thah tumin an phiar ta a." 
Esther2:22 Chu thil chu Mordekaia chuan a lo hre ru a, Estheri chu a hrilh a." 
Esther2:23 Thil awm dân an han chhui chiang a, a lo dik ngei a, an pahnih chuan an khai hlum ta a. Chu thu chu lal thiltih chhinchhiahna bu-ah an ziak lût a." 
Esther3:1 Chumi hnu chuan Agag mi Hamedata fapa Hamana chu lal Ahasuera chuan a kaisântîr a, hotu dang zawng zawng chungah a dah a." 
Esther3:2 Lal thupêk angin lal ina thawk zawng zawng chuan Hamana chu a lo kalin ṭhingṭhiin chibai an bûk ṭhîn tûr a ni. Mordekaia erawh chuan a ti ve duh lo. 
Esther3:3 Lal ina thawktute chuan Mordekaia hnênah, “Lal thupêk engtizia nge i zawm duh loh le?” an ti a." 
Esther3:4 Lal thu chu zâwm ve mai tûrin an hrilh ṭhîn a; mahse, Mordekaia chuan, “Juda ka ni a, Hamana hmaah ka kûn thei lo,” a ti a. Tichuan, Mordekaia awm dân chu a ngaithei dâwn nge dâwn lo hriat nân Hamana chu an hrilh ta a." 
Esther3:5 Mordekaia chu a hmaah a kûn duh lo va, chibai pawh a bûk duh lo tih a han hriat chuan a thinur hle a." 
Esther3:6 Tin, Mordekaia chu Juda mi a ni tih a han hriat chuan Mordekaia mai sawisa lovin Persia rama Juda awm zawng zawng chu tihmang vek a tum ta a." 
Esther3:7 Ahasuera lal kum sâwm leh pahnihna, thla hmasa ber, Nisan thla chuan a thiltum tihhlawhtlin nân eng ni leh eng thla nge ṭha ber ang tih hriat nân ai a entîr a; chu aien ni chu ‘Purim’ an ti ta a ni. Thla sâwm leh pahnih, ni sâwm leh pathum ni chu ni remchâng berah an ngai ta a." 
Esther3:8 Hamana chuan lal hnênah, “I ram pum hmun hrang hranga awm zîngah hian hnam pakhat inzep an awm a, bial tinah an awm darh a ni. Hnam dang dân ang ni lo, anmahni dân bîk an nei a, ram dân pawh an zâwm ve duh lo. Hetianga i awmtîr zêl chuan i tân a ṭha lo hle ang." 
Esther3:9 Lalin rem a tih chuan tihhlumtîr vek mai teh. Chutianga i tih chuan ram awp nân lal sumah tangkarua kg. nuaithum leh sîngli ka rawn chhûng thei ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Esther3:10 Thupuan nemnghehna zungbun chu lal chuan a phawi a, Juda-ho hmêlmapa Agag mi Hamedata fapa Hamana chu a pe a." 
Esther3:11 “Mipuite leh an tangka chu i kutah ka pe a che, i duh duhin ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Esther3:12 Thla hmasa ber ni sâwm leh pathum ni chuan lal lehkhaziaktute chu Hamana chuan a ko va, lal thupuan chu a ziaktîr a, ram chhûnga ṭawng chi hrang hrang leh an hawrawp hmangin a ziaktîr nghâl a. Lal aiawhtu te, ramawptu te leh rorêltu te hnênah lal zungbuna nem chu thawn chhuah tûrin a buatsaih ta a." 
Esther3:13 Ram puma bial tinah, lal thupêk chu an tlânpui a. Chûng thupêk chu ni thuhmun, thla sâwm leh pahnih, Adar thla, ni sâwm leh pali niin hman tûr a ni - Juda zawng zawng, ṭhalai leh tar te, naupang leh hmeichhiate lam pawh thah vek tûr thu a ni; an thil neihte pawh râllâk sum anga neihsak vek tûr a ni." 
Esther3:14 Bial tinah chu thupêk chu an chhiar chhuak tûr a ni, a hun takah, thupêk angin mi an chêt theih nân." 
Esther3:15 Susa khawpuiah pawh thupêk chu lal chuan a puantîr a; bial hrang hrangah erawh chuan lehkha chu an tlânpui a. Lal leh Hamana te chuan zu an in veng veng lai chuan Susa khuaa mite chu an mangangin an chiai hle a. 
Esther4:1 An thil tih tâk zawng zawng chu Mordekaian a lo hriat chuan a puan a pawtthlêr a, saiip puan a sin a, a lu-ah vaivut a phul a, lungngai takin a ṭap tlawk tlawk a; chuti chung chuan khua chu a fang a," 
Esther4:2 Lal in tual luhna kawngka chu a va thleng a; saiip sin tu mah an luhtîr phal loh avângin lal in hung chhûngah chuan a lût lo. 
Esther4:3 Ram bial tina lal thupêk an puanna apiangah, Juda-ho chu an ṭap chuah chuah mai; chaw an nghei a, mi tam tak chu saiip puan sinin vaivutah an ṭhu a." 
Esther4:4 Mordekaia awm dân chu chhiahhlawh nulate leh mitilrehte chuan Estheri chu an rawn hrilh a, lalnu chu a mangang hle a, Mordekaia chu saiip puan hlîpa a sin tûrin puan a pêktîr a; a lo duh lo." 
Esther4:5 Amah enkawltu tûra lalin mi tilreh pakhat a ruatsak Hathaka chu a ko va, chinchâng zâwt chiang tûrin Mordekaia hnênah chuan a tîr a." 
Esther4:6 Hathaka chu lal in luhna kawngka tualzâwlah chuan a va chhuak a. 
Esther4:7 Mordekaia chuan thil awm dân zawng zawng a lo hrilh a, Juda-ho tihchimih an nih phawt chuan lal sum bâwma Hamanan tangka chhûn luh a tum zâtte pawh chu a lo hrilh a." 
Esther4:8 Juda-te râwt tûr thupêk Susa khawpuia an puan kawpi pawh Hathaka chu a pe a. Mordekaia chuan lehkha chu Estheri pe tûrin a ngên a, thil awm dân zawng zawng chu a hrilhtîr a." 
Esther4:9 Hathaka chuan thu chu a va thlen a. 
Esther4:10 Estheri chuan hetiang thu hi Mordekaia hrilh tûrin a tîr leh a. 
Esther4:11 “Ram chhûng mi tu pawhin, mipa pawh, hmeichhia pawh, koh lohva lal in chhûngrila lûta, lal va hmu chu, a ṭhuihruaite ngei pawh, tihhlum tûr tih mi zawng zawngin an hria, lalin a rangkachak laltiang a lo lekchhuahsakte chauh chuan chu dân chu an pumpelh thei a ni. Ni sawmthum zet chu min la ko leh ta lo a ni,” tiin Mordekaia chu a hrilhtîr a." 
Esther4:12 Estheri thu chu Mordekaia an hrilh a. 
Esther4:13 Mordekaia chuan hetianga hrilh tûrin Estheri hnênah chuan a tîr leh a, “Lal in chhûnga i awm avângin nangmah chauh hi him bîk tûrah inngai suh." 
Esther4:14 Tûn hun anga i ngawih mai mai chuan hmun danga Juda awmte chu engtin tin emaw chhan chhuah an nih hlauh pawhin; nang leh i pa chhûngte chu kan thi vek dâwn a ni. Hetiang hun atân ngei hian lalnu-ah i lo ṭang a ni dâwn lâwm ni?” tiin. 
Esther4:15 Estheri chuan Mordekaia hnênah a tîr leh a," 
Esther4:16 “Kal la, Susa khuaa Juda awm zawng zawng ko khâwm la, ka tân a chhûn a zânin chaw ngheiin ni thum chhûng ṭawngṭai teh u. Ka chhiahhlawh nulaho nên keini pawhin chutiangin kan ṭawngṭai ang. Chumi hnuah chuan dân ni lo mah se lal hnênah chuan thih leh thih ka kal ang,” a ti a." 
Esther4:17 Mordekaia chu a hâwng a, Estheri tih ang chuan a ti ta vek a." 
Esther5:1 Ni thum chaw a nghei ni chuan Estheri chuan lal thuam a inbel a, lal pindan hual chhûng tual, lalṭhutthlêng awmna kawtah chuan a kal a. Kawngka hawi zâwngin lalṭhutthlêngah chuan lal chu a lo ṭhu a." 
Esther5:2 Lalin pâwna lalnu Estheri ding chu a hmu a, a lo khawngaih a, a rangkachak laltiang chu a lekchhuahsak a, Estheri chuan a va pan a, a tiang hmâwr chu a va khawih a," 
Esther5:3 “Lalnu Esther, eng nge ni i duh min hrilh teh, ka ram chanve pawh ni se ka pe ang che,” a lo ti a." 
Esther5:4 Estheri chuan a chhâng a, “Lalin rem i tih chuan zâninah Hamana nên ka ruai siamsak che rawn ei teh u,” a ti a." 
Esther5:5 Lal chuan Hamana chu lalnu ruai kîl tûra lo kal vat tûrin a chah a, Lal leh Hamana chu lalnu ruai kîl tûr chuan an kal ta a." 
Esther5:6 Uain an in laiin lal chuan, “Eng nge i duh, ka ram chanve hial pawh ni se ka pe ang che,” a ti leh a." 
Esther5:7 Estheri chuan," 
Esther5:8 “Lalin min khawngaiha, ka thil dîl tûr chu i phal dâwn chuan naktûk zânah ruai ka lo buatsaih leh ang a, Hamana nên rawn ei leh ula ka lo hrilh ang che,” a ti a." 
Esther5:9 Hamana ruai ṭheh zo chu rilru hlim tak leh lâwm takin a haw a; mahse, Mordekaia chu lal in hual chhûng kawngka bulah a hmu a, zah derna lantîr tûrin din pawh a lo ding duh lo va; chu chu a han hmuh chuan Hamana chu a thinur ta hle a." 
Esther5:10 A insûm hrâm hrâm a, a haw ta a. A ṭhiante leh a nupui Zeresi a kohtîr a." 
Esther5:11 A hausakzia te, fapa a ngahzia te, lalin a kaisântîr thu te, lalin milian dang zawng zawng aia a ngaihsânzia te sawiin a ina lêng tûra a sâwm a ṭhiante chu a uankhum a." 
Esther5:12 “Lalnu meuh pawhin lal leh kei chauh a ruai chhim tûrin min sâwm a ni, naktûk zân atân pawh min sâwm dêr tawh." 
Esther5:13 Amaherawhchu, lal in luhna kawngkaa Mordekaia ṭhu ka hmuh chhûng chu hêng zawng zawng hi engah mah ka ngai lo,” a ti a." 
Esther5:14 A nupui leh a ṭhiante chuan, “Tawng sawmngaa sâng, khaihlumna tûr ban phuntîr la, naktûk zîngah lal hnênah Mordekaia chu khai hlum dîl la, hlim takin ruai chu i kîl thei mai ang chu,” an ti a. Hamana chuan ṭha a ti hle a, inkhai hlumna tûr chu a siamtîr ta a." 
Esther6:1 Chumi zân vêk chuan lal chu a muhîl thei lo va, thil hlui chhinchhiahnate chu a lâk chhuahtîr a, an chhiar chu a ngaithla a." 
Esther6:2 Lal ina mi tilreh Bigthana leh Teresa te pahnihin lal thah tuma an phiar thute kha an chhiar kher a. 
Esther6:3 Lal chuan, “Hemi avâng hian Mordekaia hi chawimawiin lâwmman kan pe em?” a ti a. A chhiahhlawhte chuan, “Eng mah kan tihsak lo,” an ti a." 
Esther6:4 Lal chuan, “Tu nge lal in tuala awm saw?” a ti a. Hamana chuan Mordekaia khaihlumna tûr ban a siamtîr a, khai hlum dîl tûrin lal in hual chhûngah a lo kal a ni." 
Esther6:5 Lal chhiahhlawhte chuan, “Biak tum chein Hamana a lo kal a ni,” an ti a. “Lo lût rawh se,” a ti a." 
Esther6:6 Hamana a lo luh chuan, “Mi pakhat chawimawi ka duh a, engtin nge ka tih ang?” lal chuan a lo ti a. ‘Lal chuan kei lo chu tu dang nge chawimawi a duh ang le,’ a ti rilru a." 
Esther6:7 Lal hnênah chuan, “Lalin chawimawi a duha tân chuan," 
Esther6:8 lal hâk ṭhin kawr han la chhuak sela, a chuanna ṭhin sakawr rawn kai sela, a chawimawina lukhum khumtîr ni rawh se." 
Esther6:9 I miliante zînga ropui ber ko la, ani chuan lal kawrte chu hâktîr sela, sakawrah chuantîr bawk sela, khua fanpui rawh se. An kal pah chuan, ‘Lalin chawimawi a duha chu hetiang hian a chawimawi a ni,’ ti zêl rawh se,” a ti a." 
Esther6:10 Lal chuan Hamana hnênah, “Hmanhmawh la, lal kawrte leh sakawrte chu la la, Juda mi Mordekaia hi i sawi ang chuan chawimawi rawh. I sawi ang zawng zawng khân ti ang che, lal tual luhna kawngka bulah a awm saw,” a ti a." 
Esther6:11 Hamana chuan lal kawrte chu a la a, Mordekaia chu a hâktîr a; Mordekaia chu sakawrah chuan a chuang a; khawpui kawtthlêrah chuan Hamanan sakawr chu a kaihsak a, an kal pah chuan mipui hnênah, “Lalin chawimawi a duha chu hetiang hian a chawimawi a ni,” tiin a au luah luah zêl a." 
Esther6:12 Mordekaia chu lal tual luhna bulah chuan a kal leh a; Hamana erawh chu zaka hmai khuhin inah a hâwng a. 
Esther6:13 A nupui leh a ṭhiante chu a chunga thil thleng zawng zawng chu a hrilh vek a. A nupui leh a ṭhian fing tak takte chuan, “Mordekaia hi i chelh lo ṭan ta a nih hi. Juda a ni a, i ngam lo vang; i tlâwm zâwk ngei ang maw le,” an ti a." 
Esther6:14 Chûng thu an sawi lai chuan Hamana chu lal ina Estheri ruai chhim tûra hruai nghâl tûrin mi tilrehte an lo kal a. 
Esther7:1 Lal leh Hamana chu Estheri ruai buatsaih ei tûr chuan an kal a. 
Esther7:2 Uain an in lai vêkin lal chuan, “Lalnu Esther, eng nge i duh min hrilh tawh teh le, ka ram chanve hial pawh ni se, min hrilh la, ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Esther7:3 Lalnu chuan a chhâng a, “Aw Lalpa, lalin min khawngaiha ṭha i tih zâwng a nih chuan ka nunna zuah tûrin ka dîl a che; ka mite nunna pawh zuah tûrin ka ngên a che." 
Esther7:4 Tihhluma tihboral vek tûrin kei leh ka mite chu tih kan ni tawh. A hmei a pain bawihah min hralh ni lek sela chu ka ngawi thei ang a, ka tibuai lo vang che; tûnah zawng, kan hmêlmate hian min that chimit vek dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Esther7:5 Lal Ahasuera chuan Estheri hnênah, “Chutianga lo ti ngam ta mai chu tu nge a nih a, khawia awm nge a nih?” a ti a." 
Esther7:6 Estheri chuan, “Kan hmêlma leh min ertu chu he misualpa Hamana hi a ni alâwm,” a ti a. Hamana chu lalnu hmaah chuan a khûr chhe ta mai a." 
Esther7:7 Uain an in lai chuan lal thinur chu a tho va, lal huanah chuan a kal chhuak a, Hamana erawh chu lalnu hnêna a nunna zuah ngên tûrin in chhûngah chuan a awm a, lal hmêl a hmuhin a tân a hlauhawm tih a hria a ni." 
Esther7:8 Lal chu huan aṭang chuan uain an inna pindanah chuan a lo lût leh a, Estheri ṭhutnaa Hamana lo bawk chu a hmu a, “Ka inah, ka mit hmuh ngeiah pawh lalnu hi sual a tum vei a ni maw?” a ti a. Lal a han ṭawng chhuah chuan Hamana hmai chu an khuhsak a." 
Esther7:9 Lal bula awm ṭhînte zînga mi tilreh pakhat Harbona chuan, “Lal tâna thil ṭha titu Mordekaia khai hlum nân tawng sawmngaa sâng Hamana hian a in bulah ban a phun asin,” a ti a." 
Esther7:10 Lal chuan, “Chutah chuan va khai hlum rawh u,” a ti a. Mordekaia khai hlumna tûra a siamah chuan Hamana chu an khai hlum a, lal thinur chu a dai ta a." 
Esther8:1 Chumi ni chuan Juda-te hmêlma Hamana in leh lo chu lal Ahasuera chuan lalnu Estheri chu a pe a. Estheri chuan lal hnênah Mordekaia nêna an inchhûngkhat dânte a hrilh a. Chuta chin chu lal hnênah duh duhin Mordekaia chu a kal thei ta a. 
Esther8:2 Lal zungbun Hamana bun kha lal chuan a la a, Mordekaia chu a buntîr a. Estheri chuan Hamana in leh lo chu Mordekaia kutah a dah a." 
Esther8:3 Estheri chuan lal hnênah sawi tûr a la nei cheu va. A ke bulah a bawkkhup a, Hamana thil tihpawi, Juda-te tihmang a tum chu, sût tûrin mittui nên a ngên a." 
Esther8:4 Lal chuan Estheri chu a tiang a lekchhuahsak a; tichuan, Estheri chu a tho va, lal hmaah chuan a ding ta a." 
Esther8:5 “Lalin ṭha a tiha, min khawngaih takzet chuan, lal ram bial tinah Juda awmte that tûra Agag mi Hamadata fapa Hamanan lehkha a thawn kha sût lehna ziak ni teh se." 
Esther8:6 Ka mite chunga hetiang thil ṭha lo thleng tûr hi ka ngai ngam lo, ka laichîn ngeite an that tûr hi hmuh pawh ka ngam lo vang,” a ti a." 
Esther8:7 Lal chuan lalnu Estheri leh Juda mi Mordekaia hnênah, “Hamana chu Juda-te chunga kut thlâk a tum avângin ka khai hlum a, a in leh lo pawh lalnu Estheri ka pe bawk a." 
Esther8:8 Lal thu-a ziak, zungbuna nem hnan tawh chu sût leh mi a ni hlei nêm. In duh ang angin Juda mite hnênah ka hmingin ziak ula, zungbunin nem rawh u,” a ti a." 
Esther8:9 Thla thumna Sivan thla ni sawmhnih leh pathum ni chuan lal lehkha ziaktute chu a ko va, Juda-te chungchânga a duh ang chu a ziaktîr a. India ram aṭanga Sudan ram thleng, lalram bial za leh sawmhnih leh pasariha lal aiawhtu te, ramawptu te leh bial hotu te chu anmahni ṭawng leh an hawrawpa ziakin a thawn nghâl a." 
Esther8:10 Lal Ahasuera hmingin lehkha chu an ziak a, a zungbun chuan an nem a. Sakawr tlân chak chi, lalin thu thawn darh nâna a vulh chunga chuangte kutah an pe a, an tlânpui ta a." 
Esther8:11 Chu lal lehkhaah chuan: Juda-te chu an awmna khua apiangah lo inpun khâwma anmahni leh an nupui fanaute rawn beih tumtute an lo beih lêt ve lal chuan a phalsak a. An awmna bial tina anmahni rawn beitute chu an bei lêtin an that thei ang a, an thahte in leh lo pawh râllâk sum angin an nei thei ang." 
Esther8:12 Thla sâwm leh pahnihna Adar thla, ni sâwm leh pathum ni chuan lal Ahasuera ram chhûnga bial zawng zawngah, Juda-ho thah tûr tih ni-ah, he thupêk thar hi Juda-te chuan an hmang thei ang." 
Esther8:13 He thu hi dân ngheta hman tûr leh Juda-te pawh an hmêlmate chungah phuba la tûra an inrâlrin theih nân bial tina mite hnênah puan tûr a ni,” tiin an ziak a." 
Esther8:14 Lal thupêkin sakawr chungchuang mite chu lal sakawr chakah an chuang a, an tlân ta zut zut a. Chu thupêk chu Susa khawpuiah pawh an puang a." 
Esther8:15 Mordekaia chuan puan zai sîn senduk kawrfual a ha a, lal puan bah dumpâwl leh vâr chu a bât a, chawimawina rangkachak lukhum a khum a; lal in ata chu a lo chhuak a, Susa khawpui kawtthlêrah mi tin lâwmin an lo au dur dur a." 
Esther8:16 Juda-te chu an hlim hle a, an ngaih a ṭhain an thla a muang bawk a." 
Esther8:17 Lal thupêk an chhiarna bial leh khua apiangah Juda-te chu an lâwm a, hlim takin ruaite an ṭheh a. Juda-te chu an hlauh ve thung tâk avângin mi tam tak chu Juda-ah an inleh phah ta nghe nghe a." 
Esther9:1 Lal thupêk hman ni tûr Adar thla ni sâwm leh pathum ni chu a lo thleng a. Chumi ni chuan an hmêlmate chuan Juda-te chu tihchimih an tum a nih kha; mahse, Juda-te chan chu a ṭha ta zâwk a." 
Esther9:2 Lal Ahasuera ram chhûngkaw tina Juda-te vêngah chuan Juda-te chu an pung khâwm a, anmahni rawn beih tumtu bei lêt tûrin an lo inrâlring a. Tu hnam pawhin Juda-ho chu an hlau va, an khawih ngam ta lo va." 
Esther9:3 Bial hotu - lal aiawh te, ramawptu te leh sawrkâr hnathawk dang te chuan Mordekaia an hlauh avângin Juda-te chu an pui ta zâwk a." 
Esther9:4 Lal inah Mordekaia chuan ngaih ropui a hlawh ta hle mai tih ram pumah a lo thang ta a, thil a tithei ta deuh deuh va." 
Esther9:5 Chuvângin, Juda-te chuan an hmêlmate chu duh duhin an sawisa thei a, khandaih nên an bei a, an hmêlma zawng zawng an that ta a." 
Esther9:6 Susa khawpuiah pawh Juda-te chuan mi zanga lai an that a. 
Esther9:7 Hêng Parsandata te, Dalfona te, Aspata te," 
Esther9:8 Porata te, Adalia te, Aridata te," 
Esther9:9 Parmasta te, Arisaia te, Aridaia te, Vaizata te," 
Esther9:10 Juda hmêlma Hamedata fapa Hamana fa sâwmte pawh hi Juda-te chuan an that a; amaherawhchu, tu mah an rawk lo." 
Esther9:11 Chumi ni chuan lal khawpui Susa khuaa mi an thah zât chu lal an hrilh a. 
Esther9:12 Lal chuan lalnu Estheri hnênah, “Lal khawpui Susa-ah pawh Juda-te chuan mi zanga, Hamana fa sâwmte nên an that a, ram chhûng bial dangah eng ang takin che ang maw! Duh dang i la nei em? Min hrilh teh, ka tihsak zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
Esther9:13 Estheri chuan, “Lalin rem a tih chuan vawiina an tih angin Susa khuaa Juda-te chuan naktûkah pawh ti leh sela, Hamana fa sâwmte chu thinga khai ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Esther9:14 Chutianga ti tûr chuan lal chuan thu a pe a, Susa khuaah chuan an puang a. Hamana fa sâwmte pawh chu thingah an khai a." 
Esther9:15 Susa khuaa Juda awmte chu Adar thla ni sâwm leh pali ni chuan an pung khâwm leh a, Susa khuaah mi zathum an that leh a; mahse, tu mah an rawk lo." 
Esther9:16 Ram chhûng bial tina Juda-te pawh chu mahni invênghim tûrin an pung khâwm a. Anmahni hawtu, an hmêlma, mi sîngsarih leh sângnga an that a; amaherawhchu, tu mah an rawk lo." 
Esther9:17 Chutiang chuan Adar thla ni sâwm leh pathum ni chuan an ti a. A tûk ni sâwm leh pali ni chuan tu mah an that tawh lo, hlim taka ruai ṭheh ni-ah an hmang a ni." 
Esther9:18 Susa khuaa Juda-te erawh chuan ni sâwm leh panga ni chuan awmni an kham a, ni sâwm leh pathum leh ni sâwm leh pali ni-ah an hmêlmate an that a, ni sâwm leh panga ni chuan an tâwp chauh a ni." 
Esther9:19 Chumi avâng chuan thingtlâng khaw lama Juda-te chuan Adar thla, ni sâwm leh pali ni hian awmni an kham a, hlim takin ruaite an ṭheh a, thilpêkte an inpe tawn ṭhîn." 
Esther9:20 Mordekaia chuan hêng thute hi lehkhabu-ah a ziaktîr vek a, Persia ram chhûnga Juda awm zawng zawng, a kilkhâwr bera awmte chenin lehkha a thawn a." 
Esther9:21 Adar thla ni sâwm leh pali ni leh ni sâwm leh panga ni, kum tin awmni khama, kût tûr a ni." 
Esther9:22 Hêng ni-ahte hian a ni Juda-ten an hmêlmate laka an intihfihlîma, lungngaihna leh manganna thla chu hlimna leh lâwmna thlaa an chantîr ni. Ruaite ṭheha, hlim taka hmangin ei tûr thilte inpe tawn tûrin a hrilh a; mi retheite pawh ei tûr pe ve tûrin a hrilh bawk a." 
Esther9:23 Juda-te chuan Mordekaia thupêk chu an zâwm a, kum tin kûtah an neih ta a." 
Esther9:24 Agag mi Hamadata fapa Hamana, Juda-te hmêlma khân Juda-te râwt nân eng ni nge ṭha ber ang tih hriat nân ai a entîr a. Juda-te chu tihchimih a tum a ni." 
Esther9:25 Nimahsela, Estheri chu lal hnênah a kal a, lal chuan thupêk a chhuah ta a. Chu thupêk avâng chuan Juda-te tuar tûra a buatsaih chu Hamana chuan a fate nên an tuar ta a, thingah an khai ta a." 
Esther9:26 An chunga thil thlengte avâng leh Mordekaia lehkha avâng chuan chu kût chu Purim ‘Aien’ Kût an vuah ta a ni. 
Esther9:27 Juda-te chuan an thlah zêlte tân pawh, a hun takah, Mordekaia sawi angin hêng ni hnihahte hian kum tin awmni an kham ziah tûr a ni tih dân an siam ta a." 
Esther9:28 Juda chhûngkua tu pawhin, ṭhang lo thar zêlte chuan bial tinah leh khaw tinah Purim kût ni te hi kumkhuain an hmang ṭhîn tûr a ni tih thu an titlu a." 
Esther9:29 Lalnu Estheri, Abdaia fanu chuan, Purim kût chungchânga Mordekaia lehkha chu a nemnghet a ni tih thu chu Mordekaia lehkhaah chuan an thawn chhuak tel a." 
Esther9:30 Lehkha chu Juda zawng zawng hnêna thawn a ni; Persia ram bial za leh sawmhnih leh pasarih hnênah a kawpi an pe bawk a; Juda-te chu thlamuang tak leh râlmuang taka awm tûrin an chah a. 
Esther9:31 Juda-te chu, a hun takah, an thlah zêlte nên, chaw nghei leh lusûn tih dân an neih ṭhin angin Purim ni te chu hmang ṭhîn tûrin an chah bawk a." 
Esther9:32 Chu chu Mordekaia leh lalnu Estheri thu a ni; Lalnu Estherin Purim kût chungchâng a nemnghehna thu chu lehkhabu-ah ziak a ni. 
Esther10:1 Lal Ahasuera chuan a ram kilkhâwr bera awmte leh tuipui kama awmte chu chhiah a chawitîr vek a. 
Esther10:2 A thiltih ropui leh mak tak tak te, sawrkâr milian bera Mordekaia a siam thu te chu Persia leh Media lalte chanchin ziakna bu-ah ziak a ni." 
Esther10:3 Mordekaia chu lalber Ahasuera dawttu a ni. A Juda-puite pawhin an ngaina a, an ngaisâng êm êm a ni. A mite ṭhatna tûrin hna a thawk a, an thlahte pawh him taka an awm theih nân kawng a zawng zêl ṭhîn." 
Job1:1 Uz ramah mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Joba a ni. Chu mi chu sawisêlbo, Pathian ngaihsak tak, thil ṭha lo laka insûm thei mi a ni." 
Job1:2 Fapa pasarih leh fanu pathum a nei a. 
Job1:3 A hausak dân chu hetiang hi a ni: berâm sângsarih, sanghâwngsei sângthum, bâwng tuak zanga, sabengtungpui zanga leh chhiahhlawh tam tak a nei a. Khawchhak mite zîngah chuan mi hausa ber a ni." 
Job1:4 A fapate chuan mahni in ṭheuhvah ruai an inṭheh chhâwk ṭhîn a, an farnu pathumte chu an hnêna ei leh in tûrin an sâwm ṭhîn." 
Job1:5 Chutia an ruaiṭhehte an zawh chuan Joba chuan anni chu a ko va, a thian ṭhîn. Zîng takah a tho va, an hming kimin hâlral thilhlan a hlân ṭhîn. Joba chuan, “Ka fate hian thil sual tiin Pathian an lo sawichhiat tâk dahah,” a ti a ni. Joba chuan hetiang hian a ti ziah ṭhîn." 
Job1:6 Tin, vântirhkohte Lalpa hmaa an inlan ni a lo thleng a. Setana pawh chu an zîngah a lo tel ve a." 
Job1:7 Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah, “Khawi aṭangin nge i lo kal?” a ti a. Setana chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a, “A chhuk a chhova lei ka fan kual vêlna aṭangin,” a ti a." 
Job1:8 Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah, “Ka chhiahhlawh Joba hi i hre chiang em? Lei chungah hian amah anga sawisêlbo, mi dik, Pathian ṭih mi, thil ṭha lo laka insûm thei an awm lo asin,” a ti a." 
Job1:9 Setana chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a, “Joba chuan a chhan awm lovin a ngaihsak che em ni?" 
Job1:10 “Amah chu a in nên, a neih zawng zawng nên kil tinah i hual vêl tlat a ni lâwm ni? A kut hnathawh mal i sâwm a; tichuan, a ran rualte chu ram pumah an khat ta a ni." 
Job1:11 Tûnah, i kut lek la, a neih zawng zawng han lâksak teh mah, i hmaichhanah a sawichhe ngei ang che,” a ti a." 
Job1:12 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah, “Aw le, tûnah a neih zawng zawng chu i kutah a awm e, amah tak erawh chu khawih suh ang che,” a ti a. Setana chu Lalpa hma aṭang chuan a chhuak ta a." 
Job1:13 Ni khat chu a fanu leh fapaten an u ber ina chaw an eia uain an in lai chuan," 
Job1:14 Joba hnênah zualko a lo tlân a, “Bâwngpaten lei an leha, sabengtungte kan kianga an tlat laiin," 
Job1:15 Seba miten min rawn bei thut a, chhiahhlawhte chu khandaihin an that a, rante chu min chhuhsak a, keimah chauh hi a hrilh tûr chein ka lo chhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Job1:16 A la sawi lai mêkin mi dang a lo tlân leh a, “Vân aṭangin Pathian mei a lo tla a, berâmte leh chhiahhlawhte a kâng ral vek a, keimah chauh hi a hrilh tûr chein ka lo chhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Job1:17 A la sawi lai mêkin mi dang a lo tlân leh a, “Kaldai-ho pâwl thuma insiamin sanghâwngseite chu an rawn bei a, an la vek a, chhiahhlawhte pawh khandaihin an that a, keimah chauh hi a hrilh tûr chein ka lo chhuak thei a ni,” a ti a." 
Job1:18 A la sawi lai mêkin mi dang a lo tlân leh a, “I fanu leh I fapaten an u ber ina chaw an eia uain an in laiin," 
Job1:19 ngai teh, thlalêr aṭangin thlipui a lo tleh a, in chu kil li-ah a rawn nam a, nula leh tlangvâlte chu a delh a, an thi ta vek mai. Kei chauh hi hrilh tûr chein ka lo chhuak thei a ni,” a ti a." 
Job1:20 Tichuan, Joba chu a tho va, a kawrfual a pawtthlêr a, a lu a ziat kawlh a, lei si-a bawkkhupin Pathian a bia a:" 
Job1:21 “Ka nu pum ata saruakin ka lo piang a, Saruak vêkin ka kîr leh dâwn a nih hi. Lalpa chuan a pe a, Lalpa chuan a la leh ta a nih hi, Lalpa hming chu fakin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Job1:22 Hêng zawng zawngah hian Joba chu a sual lo, Pathian a sawichhe hek lo." 
Job2:1 Vântirhkohte Lalpa hmaa inlan hun a lo awm leh a, Setana pawh Lalpa hmaa inlan tûrin an zîngah a lo tel ve a." 
Job2:2 Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah, “Khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a. Setana chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a, “A chhuk a chhova lei ka fan kual vêlna aṭangin,” a ti a." 
Job2:3 Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah chuan, “Ka chhiahhlawh Joba hi i hmu chiang em? Leiah hian amah anga sawisêlbo, mi dik, Pathian ṭih, thil ṭha lo laka insûm thei an awm lo asin. Chhan awm lova amah i tihchhiat ka phal hnu pawhin a la rinawm tlat a ni,” a ti a." 
Job2:4 Setana chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a, “Sa him nân meuh chuan min eng pawh an huam ang chu." 
Job2:5 Tûnah, i kut thawhin a ruh leh a tisa ngei han khawih teh, i hmaichhanah a sawichhe ngei ang che,” a ti a." 
Job2:6 Tichuan, Setana hnênah, “Aw le, amah chu i kutah a awm a, a nunna erawh chu zuah ang che,” a ti a." 
Job2:7 Tichuan, Setana chu Lalpa hma aṭang chuan a chhuak a, Joba chu a kephah aṭanga a chhîp thlengin pânchhia a veitîr a," 
Job2:8 Joba chu a chhuak a, inhiah nân bêl keh them a la a, vut zîngah a ṭhu a." 
Job2:9 A nupui chuan a hnênah “I rilru ngai i pu reng dâwn em ni? Pathian sawichhia la, thi la a ni mai,” a ti a." 
Job2:10 Joba chuan a hnênah, “Nang hian hmeichhe â tak angin thu i sawi a nih hi. Pathian hnên aṭangin thil ṭha kan dawng a, thil ṭha lo pawh kan dawng lo vang em ni?” a ti a. Hêng zawng zawngah hian Joba chuan thu sual a sawi lo." 
Job2:11 Joba ṭhian pathumte chuan a chunga thil ṭha lo thleng chu an lo hria a, amah en tûrin mahni hmun ṭheuh aṭangin an lo kal a. Chûng mite chu Elifaza, Teman mi te, Bildada, Sua mi te, Zofara, Naama mi te an ni. Amah tuarpui leh thlamuan tûrin a hnêna kal hun an ruat angin an lo kal a." 
Job2:12 Hla tak aṭangin an rawn thlîr a, an hre lo va, an râwl chhuahin an ṭap a; an puan an pawtthler a, an lu chungah vaivut an vânvawrh a." 
Job2:13 Chutichuan, leiah ni sarih leh zân sarih an ṭhutpui a; tu mahin a hnênah thu kamkhat pawh an sawi lo. A tuar chu na êmin an hria a ni." 
Job3:1 Chumi hnu chuan Joba chu a lo ṭawng chhuak a, a pian ni chu ânchhia a lawh a." 
Job3:2 Hetiangin Joba chuan thu a sawi a ni: 
Job3:3 Ka pian ni chu boral rawh se, ‘Fapa a nei e,’ an tih zân nên." 
Job3:4 Chumi ni chu thimah lo chang se, Chung lam aṭangin Pathianin ngaihsak lo se, êng pawh a chungah êng suh se." 
Job3:5 Lungngaihna leh thim chhah mup chuan An pualah hauh sela, Chhûmin khuh reng sela, Chhûn tithimtu chuan tithlabâr rawh se." 
Job3:6 Chu zân chu thim chhah mupin tuam tlat se, Chumi kuma nite zîngah tel ve lo se, Thla chhiarnaah pawh tel ve suh se." 
Job3:7 Chu zân chu zân khawhar lo ni se, Tah chuan hlimna au thâwm awm suh se." 
Job3:8 Ânchhe lawh thiamte chuan Chu ni chu ânchhia lawh sela, Leviathan thunun thiamte chuan." 
Job3:9 Thim hlim arsite lo thim sela, Êng zawng mah se, hmu suh se, Zîng khawvâr pawh hmu suh se." 
Job3:10 Chu zân chuan ka nu chhûl kawngka a lo khâr loh avâng leh Buaina min pumpelhtîr loh avângin. 
Job3:11 Engati nge chhûlah khân ka lo thih mai lohva, Ka pian chhuah hlima ka thaw a tâwp mai loh?" 
Job3:12 Engati nge malchunga min chawia, Ka hnêk tûr hnutein min lo hmuah?" 
Job3:13 Tichuan, ka mu ang a, ka reh riai ang a, Ka muhîl ang a, ka châwl hmiah tawh tûr;" 
Job3:14 Lei lalte leh rorêltute, Mahni tâna in ram dintute nên chuan." 
Job3:15 Rangkachak tam tak nei lal fapate leh, An in tangkaruaa tikhattute nên chuan." 
Job3:16 Engati nge thi saa piang nau anga phûm bo ka lo nih loh, Nausên, êng hmu ta lo ang hian?" 
Job3:17 Chutah chuan mi sualten an chawk buai pha tawh lo va, Chaute an châwl tawh ang." 
Job3:18 Mi tângte an châwl hahdam tawh ang a, Vêngtu vîn aw an hre tawh lo vang." 
Job3:19 Tah chuan milian leh mitê an inang tlâng a, Chhiahhlawh pawh a pu lakah a fihlîm tawh a ni." 
Job3:20 Engati nge hrehawm tuarten hrehawm an hmuh renga, Mi lungngaite an dam reng le?" 
Job3:21 Thih châk êm êm thi thei si lo, Ro phûm zawn aia nasa zâwka thih zawngtute," 
Job3:22 Thi se hlim leh lâwm êm êm tûrte," 
Job3:23 Kawng tinrênga Pathian dan beh tlat, Awm ngaihna hre tawh lote an dam reng le?" 
Job3:24 Chaw ka ei leh ka thaw a pik a, Ka rûm thâwm chu lui luang ri ang hi a ni." 
Job3:25 Ka hlauhzâwng tak ka tawng a, Râpthlâk ka tih zâwng takin mi nangchîng ta." 
Job3:26 Ka thla a muang lo va, ka awm hle hle thei lo, Ka hah a dam lo va, ka buai deuh deuh ta zâwk a ni." 
Job4:1 Elifaza, Teman mi chuan heti hian a han sawi a;" 
Job4:2 “I hnênah thu kam khat sawi ila i hua ang em? Ngawih mai theih a ni bîk si lo va le! 
Job4:3 Ngaihtuah teh, mi tam tak i lo zirtîr a, Kut chak lote i lo tichak tawh a." 
Job4:4 I thu chuan tlute a tungding a, Khûp zâwite a tichak ṭhîn." 
Job4:5 Harsatna i chungah a lo thleng ve ta a, I chau ta dêr a, A han tlâkbuak che a, I buai chhe ta a." 
Job4:6 Sakhaw mi i nihna hian a thlamuan lo che em ni? I nun ngîl avângin i ngaih a ṭha chuang na nge? 
Job4:7 Ngaihtuah vang vang teh, Pawi khawih si lo tu nge chhiatna tâwka, Khawiah nge mi ṭha ngaihthah an nih i hriat?" 
Job4:8 Ka lo hmuh ve dân chuan, Tu pawh, khawlohna, lei anga leta, Buaina chi theh chuan a ngai vêk an seng leh ṭhîn." 
Job4:9 Pathianin a thâwk khum a, an boral ṭhîn a, A thinurna thli chuan a chhêm bo ṭhîn." 
Job4:10 Sakeibaknei rûm te, sakeibaknei kawlh hâhum te a titâwp a, Sakeibakneituai hâte a tibal a." 
Job4:11 Sakeibaknei tar chu ei tûr tlachhamin a boral a, A pui no hruaite chu an tidarh ta." 
Job4:12 A rûk têin ka hnênah thu a lo thleng a, Ka beng bulah a rawn phun ser ser a," 
Job4:13 Chu chu mut ngheh hun lai takin Ka lo mangphan a. 
Job4:14 Hlauvin ka khûr ta zawih zawih a, Ka tirilah min man a." 
Job4:15 Thlâ-in ka hmai a rawn thawi a, Ka hmulthi a ding sung sung a," 
Job4:16 A han ding a; mahse, a hmêl ka hmu fiah thei lo, A riruang chu ka hmu a, A ngawi reng a, aw ka hre ta a." 
Job4:17 Mihring hi Pathian hmuhin a fel tâwk em ni? A siamtu hmaah a thianghlim tâwk a maw? 
Job4:18 A chhiahhlawhte pawh a ring zo lo va, A tirhkohte fel lohna pawh hmu ṭhîntu chuan" 
Job4:19 Leia chêngte chu a va ring lo lehzual dâwn êm! Vaivuta siam mai an ni si a, Phêngphehlep anga râwp ral mai tûr an ni," 
Job4:20 Ni khat thil thuah an boral mai a, Tu khaw ngaihsak lohvin an ral hlen ṭhîn." 
Job4:21 An neih zawng pawh a ral a, Fing chuang lovin an thi a ni lâwm ni?" 
Job5:1 Han ko teh rêng, chhângtu tûr che an awm meuh vem? Mi thianghlim tu ber nge i pan dâwn teh rêng?" 
Job5:2 Mi â chu vui reng chungin a thi a, Mi mâwl chu îtsîk nei reng chungin a boral ṭhîn." 
Job5:3 Mi â, inti ngêlnghet tak ka hmu a, Mahse, a chênna chu ânchhia ka lawh ta nghâl a." 
Job5:4 A fate chu an him hauh lo vang a, An tiduhdah ang a, Rorêlnaah chuan an chhan lo vang." 
Job5:5 Rilṭâmten a buhbâl an eisak ang a, Hlînga a hungte pawh. A hausakna chu mi duhâmten an ît ang." 
Job5:6 Tuarna hi vaivut aṭanga lo piang a ni lo va, Buaina pawh hi lei aṭanga chawr chhuak a ni lo." 
Job5:7 Meisî chung lama a chho zêl ang hian, Mihring hi buai tûr rênga lo piang a ni." 
Job5:8 Kei zawngin Pathian ka zawng ang a, Pathian hnênah ka chungthu ka thlen ang." 
Job5:9 Ani chu thil ropui tak, hriat phâk rual loh te, Thil mak chhiar sên rual loh te titu a ni." 
Job5:10 Lei chungah ruah sûrtîrin Lote chu tuiin a châwm ṭhîn. 
Job5:11 Chutiangin mi tlâwmte chu a chawisâng a, Lungngaite chu a hnêm ṭhîn." 
Job5:12 Bum hmangte thil ruahman a tihlawhchham a, An thiltih a puitling lo vang." 
Job5:13 Mi fingte chu an fin vervêkna ngeiah an âwk a, Mi fing vervêk thil ruahmante chu engmahlovah a chantîr." 
Job5:14 An tân chhûn êngah khua a thim a, Chhûn laiah pawh zân ang maiin an dap dun dun." 
Job5:15 An kâa khandaih lakah retheite chu a hum a, Mi chak kut ata a chhan chhuak ṭhîn." 
Job5:16 Tichuan, retheite chu beiseina a neihtîr leh a, Mi sualte erawh chu an kâ a huhsak." 
Job5:17 Pathianin mi a thunun chu a nihlawh e, Chuvângin, Engkimtitheia thupêk chu ngainêp suh." 
Job5:18 Ani chuan a hliam a, a tuam leh ṭhîn. A kutin a tina a, a tidam leh ṭhîn a ni." 
Job5:19 Vawi ruk vawi sarih pawh buaina tâwk la, A chhan chhuak ang che a, Thil ṭha lo chuan a khawih lo vang che." 
Job5:20 Ṭâmpui mitthiah a chhanhim ang che a, Indonaah pawh khandaih lakah a hum ang che." 
Job5:21 Ṭawng na tak lakah a vêng ang che a, Chhiatna lo thleng pawh i hlau lo vang." 
Job5:22 Chhiatna lo thleng leh ṭâm tla chu i nuihsan mai ang a, Ram sakawlhte pawh i hlau lo vang." 
Job5:23 Lovah lung a awm tawh lo vang a, Ram sakawlhte pawhin an rawn khawih lo vang che." 
Job5:24 I puan inah râlmuang takin i awm ang a, I berâm huang i tlawh pawhin kim lo a awm lo vang." 
Job5:25 I thlah tam tak i hmu phâk ang a, I rîla rahte chu ram hnim angin an tlim hmur ang." 
Job5:26 A hun taka buhphal an seng angin Tarkûna damin thlânah i liam ve ang. 
Job5:27 Ngaihtuah chiang teh, han chhût ngun la, Chutiang ngei chu a lo ni. Ngai ngun la, i ṭhat phah mahna." 
Job6:1 Tin, Joba chuan a chhâng a:" 
Job6:2 Ka manganna leh vanduaina hi teh theih ni se," 
Job6:3 Tuipui ṭiau aiin a rit zâwk ang, Chuvâng chuan, ka thu a bung a ni." 
Job6:4 Engkimtitheia thal chuan min chhun a, A tûr chuan mi fan chhuak a, Pathian hlauhnain ka khat ta." 
Job6:5 Ram sabengtung chu hlobet a peh laiin A hrâm ngai em ni? Bâwngpa pawh buhpâwl a ei Laiin a bû em ni? 
Job6:6 Hânna nei lo chu chi tel lovin a ei tlâk em ni? Artui pâwn vâr a hâng em ni? 
Job6:7 Chutiang chaw chu châkna rêng ka nei lo, Mi ngei hluah hluah a ni." 
Job6:8 Aw, ka dîl chu hmu thei teh ila, Pathianin ka duhzâwng chu min pe teh se." 
Job6:9 Pathianin mi râwtsawm vek duhin A kut thawhin min tan chhûm hmawk mah se," 
Job6:10 Chuti chung pawhin ka thla a la muang cheu vang, Mi zuah lovin na tuar nek mah ila, Ka lâwm zêl ang, Mi Thianghlima thu chu ka pênsan si lo va." 
Job6:11 Thlâkhlelh tlâk chakna eng nge ka neih? Beisei leh chuan tûr nei si lovin engah nge ka dam reng? 
Job6:12 Lung anga sak em ka nih? Ka tisa pawh ngên ang em ni? 
Job6:13 Mahni inchhan thei rual ka ni ta lo, Ka thiltihtheihna a bo zo ta." 
Job6:14 Engkimtitheia hawisan mah se, Mangan tâwpah miin ṭhian ṭha an mamawh ṭhîn." 
Job6:15 Ka unaute erawh zawng, Kawrte rum anga bumhmang, Ṭhâla kangchat mai ṭhîn ang hi an ni." 
Job6:16 Luipui, vûr tuia dum kûk, Vûr tlang inphûm rûkna," 
Job6:17 Khua a lo luma tuirala, Nipuia kangchat ta ṭhîn ang hi an ni." 
Job6:18 Khualzinte chu tui zawngin an vâk kual an vâk kual a, Thlalêrah chuan vâkin an boral ṭhîn." 
Job6:19 Teman sumdâwng rualte pawhin an zawng a, Seba khualzinte phei chuan hmuh ngei an beisei ṭhîn." 
Job6:20 Beisei taka an zawn chu an hlawhchham a, Hrilhhai takin an kal ta ṭhîn." 
Job6:21 Ka chungah chutiang chu in ni, Ka hrehawm tuar min hmu a, in hlau." 
Job6:22 Thilpêk dîl che uin, ‘In sum leh pai a thlâwnin min pe teh u’ ka ti em ni?" 
Job6:23 Hmêlma kut ata min chhan chhuak tûrin emaw Ka ngên che u em ni? 
Job6:24 Min zirtîr ula, ka lo ngaithla ang e, Ka dik lohna min hrilh teh u." 
Job6:25 Thu dik hian mi a hneh ṭhîn, Mahse, min hnialna hi hnialhrât thu mai a ni lâwm ni?" 
Job6:26 Hnial hrât hrim hrima min ngaiin, Mangang taka ka thu sawi hi sawi mai maiah min ngai em ni?" 
Job6:27 Fahrahte chu in lilâm duh a, In ṭhian bulte meuh pawh in hralh duh ṭhîn." 
Job6:28 Tûnah mi han en teh u, In hmaichhanah ka daw lo vang." 
Job6:29 Lamlêt ula, thil dik lo ti suh u, Ka thu ngaihtuah ṭha rawh u, ka thu hi a dik a ni." 
Job6:30 Ka sawiah hian eng nge dik lo awm? Thil ṭha lo chu ka thliar hrang thei lo vem ni? 
Job7:1 Leiah mihring hi hna hahthlâk tak thawk tûr a ni lo vem ni? A damchhûng chu inhlawhfa ang maia thawk tûr a ni lâwm ni? 
Job7:2 Chhiahhlawh, tlai ni nêm nghâkhlel tak ang, Inhlawhfa, a hlawh tûr thlîr reng ang hi a ni." 
Job7:3 A thla têlin ka bei a dawng tial tial a, Zan tinin ka hah hluah hluah a ni." 
Job7:4 Ka han mu a, engtikah harh leh tak ang i maw ka ti a, Mahse, zankhuain ka let ka let a, Khawvâr hlân ka nghâkhlel êm êm." 
Job7:5 Ka taksa a pumin a pân lung nuai nuai a, A khir luai a, a khawk a, a hnai ṭuam ṭuam." 
Job7:6 Ka dam chhûng nite chu puantahtu khawhthei aiin a liam rang a, Beisei tûr nei lovin a liam mai ṭhîn." 
Job7:7 Ka nunna hi thli ang lek a nih hre reng la, Ka mit hian thil ṭha a hmu lo mai dâwn si." 
Job7:8 Tûna mi hmutu hian mi hmu tawh dâwn lo va, Min hmuh tum mah se hmuh tûr ka awm lo vang." 
Job7:9 Chhûm a kiang a, a ral ṭhîn ang hian, Thlâna lût tawh chu an kîr leh ngai lo ve." 
Job7:10 In lamah a lo hâwng tawh lo vang a, Tu man an hre reng tawh hek lo vang." 
Job7:11 Chuvângin, insûmkâr lovin ka ṭawng ang a, Lungchhe takin ka sawi dâwn e, Rilru na takin ka phun dâwn a ni." 
Job7:12 Tuipui nge maw ka niha tuipui sakawlh? Min vêng tlat tûr i ruat tâk hi? 
Job7:13 Khumah ka mu hahdam ang a, muhîl ila, Ka na a nuam deuh mahna ka tih leh" 
Job7:14 Nangin mang hlauhawm pui pui min neihtîr a, Thil râpthlâk tak tak min hmuhtîr si." 
Job7:15 Hetia na tuara dam reng ai chuan Reh hlum hial ka thlang zâwk e. 
Job7:16 Nun hi ka ning takzet a, Dam rei ka duh tawh lo, Min kalsan rawh u, mûmal ka nei tawh lo ve." 
Job7:17 Mihring hi eng nge maw a niha, i ngaihmawha, I ngaihsak hle le?" 
Job7:18 Tûk tin i kana, Eng lai pawhin i fiah ṭhîn hi?" 
Job7:19 Khaw dang hawi lo lêkin, chil lem chhûng takngial pawh Min en lovin i awm ngai em ni?" 
Job7:20 Nang, mihringte vêngtu, Ka sual a nih pawhin eng nge ka tihsuala, Ninawm khawpa min en bîk le?" 
Job7:21 Engah nge ka bawhchhiatna i ngaihdam lohva, Ka khawlohna i lâk bo mai loh le? Kei zawng ka thi thuai dâwn a, Min zawng mah la, ka awm lo mai dâwn a ni." 
Job8:1 Tichuan, Bildada, Sua mi chuan heti hian a sawi ve a:" 
Job8:2 Eng chen nge hêng hi i sawi dâwn? I va han ṭawng rum ve? 
Job8:3 Pathianin a rêl tawh chu a tidanglam ngai em ni? Engkimtitheia chuan a dik chu a sawhsawn dâwn em ni? 
Job8:4 I fate a chungah an sual a nih chuan An sual man a tuartîr ang a. 
Job8:5 Tihtakzeta Pathian i zawna, Tihtakmeuhva Engkimtitheia i dîl chuan, Anin a rawn ngaihsak ngei ang che a, Mal a sâwm ngei ang che." 
Job8:6 Thianghlim leh dik taka i nun phawt chuan, A rawn ngaihsak ngei ang che a, Mal a sâwm bawk ang che." 
Job8:7 I bul ṭanna tê hle mah se, I hun hnuhnûngah tihropui i ni ngei ang." 
Job8:8 Hmânlai nite kha han dâwn kîr la, An pi pute thil hriatte kha chhui chiang teh," 
Job8:9 Nimina mi ang lek kan ni a, eng mah kan lo hre lo, Kan lei nun hi a tawi hle si a." 
Job8:10 Chûng mite chuan an lo zirtîr ang che a, An thil hriatte chu an lo hrilh ang che." 
Job8:11 Chirhdûp lovah pumphîr a ṭo ngai em ni? Tui awm lohnaah phairuang a ṭo thei em ni? 
Job8:12 Sah tliah lohvin duah hle pawh ni se, Thlai dangte aiin a vuai hma ṭhîn." 
Job8:13 Pathian pawisa lote chu chutiang chuan an awm ang a, Pathian ngaihsak lote chu an beidawng ang." 
Job8:14 An innghahna chu a derdêp êm êm a, Maimawm rîl ang lek a ni." 
Job8:15 Chu chu nghêng sela a sâwt dâwn em ni? Vuan sela a tuar dâwn em ni? 
Job8:16 Mi sual chu, thlai, ni êng hmu ṭha, duah hluah hluah Pêng ṭuam ṭuam ang hi a ni." 
Job8:17 Lung keh kârah zung a thlâk a, Lungah chuan zung a kaih tlat a." 
Job8:18 Mahse, an pawh phawn hnu chuan Tu man a awmna rêng an hre tawh lo." 
Job8:19 Ngai teh, hei hi mi sual hlimna awm chhun chu a ni mai; Mi dangin a hmun an rawn luah dâwn a ni." 
Job8:20 Ngai teh, Pathianin mi ṭha a paihthla lo vang a, Thil sual titute a tungding hek lo vang." 
Job8:21 Hlim takin a nuihtîr leh ang che a, Lâwm takin i awm leh ang." 
Job8:22 I hmêlmate chu zakin an kun reng ang a, Mi suaksualte chênna in pawh a awm tawh lo vang." 
Job9:1 Joba chuan heti hian a chhâng a: 
Job9:2 I sawite chu a dik tih ka hria. Mahse, Pathian mit hmuhin mihring hi a dik tâwk thei em ni?" 
Job9:3 Pathian chu hnial dâwn ta sela, Vawi sângah vawi khat pawh a hnial hneh lo vang." 
Job9:4 Ani chu finnaa khat, engkim tithei a ni, Amah dodâl ṭhîn tu mah hmuingîl an awm ngai lo." 
Job9:5 An hriat loh hlânin tlângte a sawn a, A thinur chângin a tichhe ṭhîn." 
Job9:6 Lei chu a awmna hmunah a sâwi nghîng a, A nghahchhan bante chu a nghîng dur dur a," 
Job9:7 Ni chu thu a pe a, a chhuahtîr lo va, Arsite pawh a khuh vek a." 
Job9:8 Mahni chauhvin vân khi a kaipharh a, Tuifâwnte pawh a rap bet a." 
Job9:9 Zângkhua te, chhohreivûng te, siruk te, Chhim lam arsi bâwr te khi a siam an ni." 
Job9:10 Thil ropui chhui chhuah rual loh te, Thil mak chhui sên lohte titu a ni." 
Job9:11 Ngai teh, ka bulah a lo kal a, ka hmu si lo, Min kal pêl a, ka hre si lo." 
Job9:12 A ni, a duh apiang a lâk pawhin tu nge dâl thei? ‘Eng nge i tih’ a hnênah tu nge ti ngam?" 
Job9:13 Pathianin a thinur a sût lo vang, Rahab puitu, a hmêlmate chu a rapbet ang." 
Job9:14 Engtin nge kei tehlul hian ani chu ka chhân anga, Ka hnial thiam tehlul ang?" 
Job9:15 Dik mah ila, ani chu ka chhâng lo vang, Ka chunga thuneitu chu khawngaih ka dîl zâwk ang." 
Job9:16 Ka au va, anin a lo hria a nih pawhin Ka thu a dawnsawn ka ring chuang lo." 
Job9:17 Thlipui hmangin min nuai nek a, Chhan awm lovin min hliam belhchhah a." 
Job9:18 Thaw la hman lêk lovin min siam a, Hrehawmna hlîrin ka khat ta." 
Job9:19 Chak zâwngah chuan tu nge tluk ang? Inkhing dâwn ila, tu nge do pha ang?" 
Job9:20 Sual inti lo mah ila, ka ṭawngkamin thiam loh mi chantîr a, Demawm lo ni mah ila, ka dik lohna a hmu tho vang." 
Job9:21 Sawisêlbo pawh ni ila, ka inngaisâng chuang lo, Ka nun hi ka ngainêp a ni." 
Job9:22 Chuvâng alâwm, mi ṭha leh mi sual pawh Thuhmun vekin a tiboral dâwn ka tih hi."
