Job9:23 Thil ṭha lovin thihna a thlentîr thut a, Mi dik mangang chu Pathianin a nuih ṭhîn." 
Job9:24 Khawvêl hi mi sual kuta pêk a ni a, Rorêltute mit pawh tihdel a ni; A tih ni lo se, tu tih nge ni ang?" 
Job9:25 Ka damchhûng nite hi a liam thuai a, Thil ṭha tawng lovin a ral mai ṭhîn." 
Job9:26 Lawng chak tak angin a kal liam a, Mupui sa hmu bir ang hian." 
Job9:27 “Ka vuina hi ka theihnghilh ang a, Ka lungngaihna hlîpin ka intihlim teh ang, ka tih pawhin," 
Job9:28 Ka tuarna zawng zawng avâng hian ka thla a phâng a ni, Nangnin mi sualah mi ngai si a." 
Job9:29 Mi suala chhiar ka nih ahnu, Engah nge ṭûl lovah ka intihhah ang le?" 
Job9:30 Sahbawnin inbual fai mah ila, Ka kutte chingalin sil fai mah ila," 
Job9:31 Nangnin bawlhhlawh khurah min paih ang a, Ka silhfênte pawhin mi ten dâwn si." 
Job9:32 Rorêlna hmaah han khing rual em ka nih? Ani zawng, kei anga mihring mai a ni ve si lo." 
Job9:33 Kan pahniha chunga thu rawn neia, Kan inkâr thu pawtchat thei tu mah an awm si lo," 
Job9:34 Min vuakna tiang chu la sawn sela, A ṭihbaiawmna chuan mi tihlau tawh suh se." 
Job9:35 Tichuan, amah hlau lovin thu ka sawi ang a, Mahse, chutiang chuan ka awm thei si lo." 
Job10:1 Nun hi ka ning tawh a, ka phun ka phun mai dâwn a nih hi, Rilru na tak chungin thu ka sawi dâwn a ni." 
Job10:2 Pathian hnênah, “Mi dem mai lo la, Engti-ah nge min puh, min hrilh teh,” ka ti ang." 
Job10:3 I kut chhuakte hmusita tiduhdahin, Mi suaksualte remruat i lâwmpui hi Ṭha i ti em ni?" 
Job10:4 Mihring mit ang maiin, Mihring angin i hmu ve em ni?" 
Job10:5 Mihring anga damchhûng ni leh kumte Nei ang ziazânga," 
Job10:6 Ka khawlohna i chhui chiama, Ka sualnate i zawn tehchiam le?" 
Job10:7 Mi sual ka ni lo tih i hria a, I kut ata mi chhan thei tu mah an awm loh pawh i hria." 
Job10:8 I kutin min din a, nangma siam ngei ka ni, Nangmah bawkin min tiboral leh dâwn em ni?" 
Job10:9 Nangin hlumin min siam tih hre reng la, Vaivutah mi chantîr leh mai dâwn em ni?" 
Job10:10 Nangin hnutetui angin mi bun a, Hnute khal angin mi hlâwm a ni lâwm ni?" 
Job10:11 Vun leh tisain mi tuam a, Ruh leh thain mi phuar khâwm a." 
Job10:12 Nunna mi pe a, mi duat êm êm a, Min enkawl a, min hualhim zêl a ni." 
Job10:13 Chuti chung chuan hêng thil hi I lo tum ru rêng a ni tih ka hre chhuak ta. 
Job10:14 Thil sual ti ila, nangin i chhinchhiah ang a, Ka khawlohna avângin mi zuah lo vang." 
Job10:15 Mi suaksual ni ila ka chan a va chau dâwn êm! Mi dik pawh ni ila, ka inchhuang thei chuang lo, Mualpho takin ka awm a, ka tuar tlawk tlawk a nih hi." 
Job10:16 Lo chapo ila, nangin sakeibaknei an pêl angin mi pêl ang a, Min tina tûrin thil mak tak tak i ti." 
Job10:17 Min bei min bei a, ka chungah i thinur i tipung a, Min beih dân tûr kawng thar i dap zêl a." 
Job10:18 Eng vângin nge chhûl ata mi lâk chhuah? Tu ma hmuh lohvin lo thi daih ila a ṭha tûr. 
Job10:19 Lo piang lo law law ila, chhûl aṭangin Thlân pan nghâl ila a ṭha zâwk tûr." 
Job10:20 Ka damchhûng nite hi a ral ṭêp lo vem ni? Min kiansan hrâm teh, rei lo tê tal ka han hahchâwl hlek teh ang." 
Job10:21 Kîr tawh lohna ram thim, Thim chhah mup rama ka kal hma hian." 
Job10:22 Thim chhah mup ram, lungngaihna zân thim, Manganna hmun chu, êng pawh thima a channa hmunah chuan." 
Job11:1 Zofara, Naama mi chuan heti hian a han sawi ve a:" 
Job11:2 Hetiang thu zozai chhân loh theih em ni? Ṭawng tam avângin miin thiam a chang ang maw? 
Job11:3 I ṭawng tam avângin miin an ngawihsan chein Mi dang thamlo taka i ṭawng hian Timualpho tûr che an awm lo vang maw? 
Job11:4 I ṭanna hi dik berah i ngai a, Pathian hmuhah, ‘Ka thianghlim e’ i ti a." 
Job11:5 Mahse, Pathian chu han ṭawng sela, I chungthu han sawi ve se ka va ti êm!" 
Job11:6 Tichuan, finna thurûk a hriattîr ang che a, Finna dik, mihring hriat phâk rual loh chu. Hre ta che, i khawlohnain a phu aia nêpin a hrem che hi." 
Job11:7 Pathian ropuizia i hre chhuak zo vem ni? Engkimtitheia chu i hre theia maw? 
Job11:8 Vân aia sâng a ni, i hriat phâk rual em ni? Leilâwt aia thûk a ni, i hmuh phâk rual em ni?" 
Job11:9 A zauzia chu khawmual leh tuifinriat aiin A zau zâwk a. 
Job11:10 Pathian chu lo kalin man che sela, I chungthu rêl ta mai se, tu nge dâl thei ang?" 
Job11:11 Tute hi nge mi sualte chu a hria, An sualna a hmu vek a, a ngaihtuah dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Job11:12 Ram sabengtungno sâwi hmin mai theih a ni lo ang hian, Mi mâwl pawh a fing mai thei lo." 
Job11:13 I rilru put dân a dika, A lama i kut i phar chuan," 
Job11:14 I kuta khawlohna awm a nih chuan paih bo la, I ina sualna a awm i phal loh chuan." 
Job11:15 Ngaihngam takin i lêng vêl thei ang a, I dinhmun a nghet ang a, hlauh tûr i nei lo vang." 
Job11:16 I hrehawmna i theihnghilh ang a, Tui luang angin i hre zui tawh lo vang." 
Job11:17 I nun chu chhûn êng aiin a êng ang a, A thim lai pawh zîng êng aiin." 
Job11:18 Beiseiawm a awm avângin i thla a muang ang a, I hawi vêl ang a, ngaihngam takin i châwl ang." 
Job11:19 I muzâl ang a, tu man an tibuai ngam lo vang che, Mi tam tak biaktlawn i hlawh bawk ang." 
Job11:20 Mi sualte erawh chu an hawihai ang a, Tlân chhuahna kawng rêng an hmu lo vang. An nghah ber chu thih a ni mai." 
Job12:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan heti hian a sawi leh a:" 
Job12:2 Ni e, mi fing zawng in lo nih hi, Thi ta hlauh ula, mi fing an awm dâwn tawh hlei nêm!" 
Job12:3 Mahse, nangni angin hriatna ka nei ve a, In aiin ka nêp hlei nêm, Tu nge hêng thilte hi hre lo bîk le?" 
Job12:4 Pathian ka au va, min chhâng ṭhîn a, Mahse, ka ṭhianten min nuihzat a, Mi dik leh demawm lo hi nuihzatbûr ka nih tâk hi." 
Job12:5 Mi nuamsate chuan mi vânduai an hmusit a, Rahbi tleute an chhuih zui ṭhîn." 
Job12:6 Suamhmangte bûk a hnianghnâr a, Pathian tithinurtute an nuamsa. Mahni chakna pathiana neihtute chu." 
Job12:7 Ram sate zâwt teh, an zirtîr ang che, Chunglêng savate pawh zâwt la, an hrilh ang che." 
Job12:8 Leilung pawh bia la, a zirtîr ang che, Tuipui sanghate pawhin hei hi an hrilh ang che." 
Job12:9 Hêng zawng zawng zîngah hei hi Lalpa tih a nih hre lo tu nge awm? 
Job12:10 Thil nung tinrêng nunna leh mihringte thlarau hi A kuta awm a ni. 
Job12:11 Kâ hian thil tui a hria angin Beng hian thu chhia leh ṭha a chian ṭhîn lo vem ni? 
Job12:12 Upate an fing nge nge a, Dam reiten thil hriat an ngah." 
Job12:13 Pathian erawh chu a fingin a chak a, Remruat a thiam a, engkim a hria." 
Job12:14 A ṭhiat tawh chu tundin leh theih a ni lo. Mihring a khâr hnan chu tu man an chhuah thei lo. 
Job12:15 Ruah sûr a khap chuan khua a khêng a, A sûrtîr leh ram a chîm chhe ṭhîn." 
Job12:16 Ani chu a chak a, a chhan ṭhîn a, Bumtu pawh, bum tuar pawh, a kuta awm an ni." 
Job12:17 Remruattute remhriatna a la bo va, Rorêltute mi â angin a awmtîr." 
Job12:18 Lalte thuneihna a chhuhsak a, An kâwngah hruiin a hlîng." 
Job12:19 Puithiamte saruakin a kaltîr a, Mi hlunte a paihthla." 
Job12:20 Mi râwnte chu a hnâwl a, Upate finna a chhuhsak ṭhîn." 
Job12:21 Mi liante a hmusit a, Mi chakte a titlâwm a." 
Job12:22 Thima thil thûkte a hailang a, Thim chhah mup pawh a tiêng ṭhîn." 
Job12:23 Hnamte a tilian a, a tichhe leh a, Hnamte a tipung a, a tidarh leh ṭhîn." 
Job12:24 Ram hruaitute ngaihtuahna a tibo va, Thlalêr kawng awm lohnaah a vahvaihtîr a." 
Job12:25 Thimthamah an dap dun dun a, Zu rui angin an pai an pai." 
Job13:1 Chûng zawng zawng chu ni tin ka hmu a, Bengin ka hria a, ka hrethiam ta." 
Job13:2 In hriat chu ka hre ve bawk a, In aiin ka neu bîk lo." 
Job13:3 Mahse, El Sadaia hnênah ngei sawi ka duh, Ka chungchâng hi Pathian nên sawi dun ka châk a ni." 
Job13:4 Nangni hi dâwta insawimawi ṭhîn, Tidam thei lo daktor ang hi in ni." 
Job13:5 Ngawi hmiah ula, In tân a finthlâk zâwk ang." 
Job13:6 Ka ṭanna hi hre chiang ula, Ka thu hi ngaihtuah chiang ve teh u." 
Job13:7 Pathian hminga dâwt sawiin Thu dik lo in sawitîr dâwn em ni? 
Job13:8 Amah ṭanin hleih in nei ang maw? Pathian tân in pâwng ṭan dâwn em ni? 
Job13:9 Hmu chiang che u sela, In tân a ṭha ang em?" 
Job13:10 A rûka duhsak bîk in neih chuan A hrem ngei ang che u. 
Job13:11 A ropuina chu râpthlâk in ti êm êm ang a, A ṭihbaiawmna chuan a fan lo vang che u maw?" 
Job13:12 In upate thufing chu meivâp ang lek a ni a, In ṭan chhante pawh hlumbêl ang lek a ni." 
Job13:13 Lo ngawi ula, ṭawng hun mi kian teh u, A nih nih ni rawh se." 
Job13:14 Eng vângin maw? Ka awm awmin ka awm mai ang. 
Job13:15 Mi tihlum dâwn mah se, ani chu ka ring tho vang. A hmaah ka awm dân ka ṭan zêl dâwn." 
Job13:16 Pathian hmaah mi sual an lang ngam si lo va, Kei zawng, ka ngampatna avâng hian ka him hlauh mai thei asin!" 
Job13:17 Ka thute hi ngun takin ngaithla ula, Ka thu sawite hi ngaihtuah ngun rawh u." 
Job13:18 Ngai teh, thiamthu sawi tûrin ka inpeih tawh reng a ni, Thiam ka chang dâwn tih ka hre si." 
Job13:19 Tu nge ka sualna rawn phawrh thei awm? Phawrh a nih chuan ngawi rengin ka thi mai ang. 
Job13:20 Thil pahnih chauh mi tihsak la, I hmêl êngah chuan ka hmai ka thup dâwn lo nia." 
Job13:21 Ka chunga i kutthlâk hi bâng la, I ṭihbaiawmna hian mi thlah rawh se." 
Job13:22 Mi ko la; tichuan, ka chhâng ang che. A nih loh leh, kei ṭawng ila, Nangin mi chhâng ang che." 
Job13:23 Ka khawlohna leh ka sualna eng zâta tam nge? Ka bawhchhiatna leh ka sualnate mi hrilh ang che. 
Job13:24 Engtizia nge mi hawisana, I hmêlma anga mi ngaih?" 
Job13:25 Hnahthel thlâwk i chhaihin, Buhsi lêng i ûm dâwn em ni?" 
Job13:26 Ka chungchâng ṭha lo tak takin i ziak a, Ka tleirâwl ât lai sual mawh mi phurhtîr hi;" 
Job13:27 Ka ke-ah kawl mi buntîr a, Ka awm dân tinrêng i enthla a, Ka hniak lam pawh i chhinchhiah hi;" 
Job13:28 Thil ṭawih ral mai tûr leh Silhfên thîm ei ang lek ka ni chung hian. 
Job14:1 Hmeichhe hrin mihring hi Sual rêng rênga thi thuai mai tûr a ni. 
Job14:2 Pangpâr angin a lo pâr chhuak a, a vuai leh ṭhîn, Hlimthla angin a ral mai a, a awm hlen lo." 
Job14:3 Chutiang mi chu ngaihmawha Rorêlnaah khing tûr chea hruai tham em ni? 
Job14:4 Tu nge bawlhhlawh aṭangin thil thianghlim la chhuak ngai? Tu mahin. 
Job14:5 A dam chhûng nite chu i ruatsak a, A thlahte lamin i kuta awm an ni. A pelh theih loh ramri i khamsak bawk." 
Job14:6 Hawisan la, hahchâw teh se, Hlawhfa angin a damchhûng nite a tlingtlâk theih nân." 
Job14:7 Thing chuan beisei tûr a la nei, Kit mah se a lo chawr leh a, Zîk thar chhuah a bâng chuang lo." 
Job14:8 A zung lo tar mah se, A bul lei seh chinah thi mah se," 
Job14:9 A lei hnâwn avângin a lo chawr leh ang a, Thingphun angin a lo buk ang." 
Job14:10 Mahse, mihring chu a thi a, A ni, a thaw a tâwp a, khawiah nge a awm tâk le?" 
Job14:11 Tuipui kang, tui awm ta lo leh Luipui kang chat, ro châr ta ang hian," 
Job14:12 Mihring chu a mu a, a tho leh lo. Vân a boral hma chuan a harh lo vang, A muhîl chu kaihthawh a ni lo vang." 
Job14:13 Aw, Seol-ah mi thukru la ka va ti êm! I thinur reh hma chu mi thukru la, Amaherawhchu, min hriat chhuah leh hun nei ngei ang che." 
Job14:14 Mi a thih hian a nung leh dâwn em ni? Ka chhuah hun a thlen hma hian Rawng ka bâwl fan fan ang. 
Job14:15 Min ko la, ka chhâng ang che, I kut chhuakte i ngaina hle si ṭhîn." 
Job14:16 Tichuan, ka pên i vêng ang a, Ka sual i chhui zui duh lo vang." 
Job14:17 Ka bawhchhiatna i phûm bo va, Ka sualte i ngaidam bawk a." 
Job14:18 Tlângte a min a, Lungpuite a minpui a," 
Job14:19 Luite chuan lungte chu a hrual a, Tui lian chuan lei a hrût hêk ṭhîn; Chutiangin mihringte beisei i tibo ṭhîn." 
Job14:20 Ani chu kumkhua atân i titlâwm a, I hnawt bo ta a ni." 
Job14:21 A fate chawimawi an nih pawhin a hre lo va, Chhiat an tawh lahin a ngaihsak tawh hek lo." 
Job14:22 Ama taksa na chauh kha a hria a, Amah a inkhawngaih ṭhîn a ni." 
Job15:1 Tin, Elifaza, Teman mi chuan heti hian a chhâng a:" 
Job15:2 Mi fing an ṭawng ve mai mai ngai em ni? Thu lawilo mai maiin an khat hlei nêm! 
Job15:3 Mumal nei lovin an ṭawng ang em ni? Thil sâwt lo tûr an sawi peih dâwn em ni? 
Job15:4 A ni, Pathian ṭihna rêng i nei lo va, A hnênah i inhlân duh hlei nêm!" 
Job15:5 I sualzia i thu sawiah a lang a, Thuveivîr i thlang a nih hi." 
Job15:6 Kei ni lovin, i ṭawngka ngeiin a thiam lo che a, I hmui ngeiin a hêk che a nih hi." 
Job15:7 Piang hmasa ber em i nih? Tlâng awm hmain i awm tawh a maw? 
Job15:8 Pathian remruat i hre pha em ni? Finna hi i ta bîk em ni? 
Job15:9 Kan hriat loh eng nge i hriat? Kan hmuh loh eng nge i hmuh bîk? 
Job15:10 Kan zîngah luṭuak vâr tawh leh tar te, I pa aia upate pawh an awm asin!" 
Job15:11 Pathianin a thlamuan che leh Dimdawi taka a enkawlna che hi i ngainêp em ni? 
Job15:12 Engah nge i thin a thawh thuta, I men rum tâk hle le?" 
Job15:13 I nunin Pathian i dodâl a, I kâin i sawichhia a ni lâwm ni?" 
Job15:14 Mihring hi a thianghlim tâwk thei em ni? Hmeichhe hrin hi Pathian hmaah a ṭha tâwk thei em ni? 
Job15:15 Pathian chuan a mi thianghlimte pawh a ring zo lo va, A mit hmuhah vânte pawh a thianghlim tâwk lo." 
Job15:16 Mihring, sual leh bawlhhlawha khat, Tui in anga sual intu chu a va ring dâwn lo êm!" 
Job15:17 Mi ngaithla la, ka hrilh ang che, Ka hmuh chu ka sawi dâwn e." 
Job15:18 Mi fingten an pi pute hnêna an dawn, Zêp nei lova min hrilh chhâwn chu." 
Job15:19 Ram dang mite awm ve lovin Chu ramah chuan, mahni chauhvin an awm tûr a ni, tih thu chu." 
Job15:20 Mi sual chuan a damchhûng zawng hrehawm a tuar ang, Mi nunrâwng chuan a tuar kumkhua ang." 
Job15:21 Hlauhawm thâwm chu a hria a, Mahse, hima a inhriat laiin Suamhmangin a rawn bei ang." 
Job15:22 Thim ata chhuah a inring lo, Khandaihin a hmuak reng si a." 
Job15:23 Ei tûr zawngin a vâk vêl a, ‘Khawiah nge?” tiin; A tân khua a vâr lo tih a hria." 
Job15:24 Hrehawm leh lungngaihna chuan a rawn bawh a, Lalin a râl do a bei ang hian." 
Job15:25 Pathian dova kut a lek avângin, El Sadaia a pawisak loh avângin." 
Job15:26 Luhlul takin Pathian chu a dodâl a, A phaw chhah tak leh khauh tak chu a chhuang a ni." 
Job15:27 A hmai a mawm a, a dulah thau a tla." 
Job15:28 Mahse, khawpui ṭiau hnuahte a chêng ang a, Tu ma luah loh inahte chuan. Chûngte pawh chu tlusawp leh tho tûr a ni." 
Job15:29 A hausa lo vang a, a sum leh pai a awm hlen lo vang, Zâr zo tum a nei tawh hek lo vang." 
Job15:30 Thim ata a chhuak lo vang a, A zârte chu a kâng ro vang a, A pârte chu thliin a lên bo vang." 
Job15:31 Mahni inbumin, engmahlovah innghat suh se, Eng mah a hmu dâwn chuang si lo." 
Job15:32 A hun lovah a ro vang a, A ṭangte pawh a chawr leh tawh lo vang." 
Job15:33 Grep rah hlamtla ang a ni ang a, Oliv pâr ṭil ang a ni ang." 
Job15:34 Pathian ngaihsak lo mite chu an zuihral ang a, Thamna hmanga in an sakte pawh a kâng ral ang." 
Job15:35 Pawi khawih tûr an dap a, thil an tisual nge nge a, An thinlung chu bumnaa khat a ni." 
Job16:1 Joba chuan heti hian a chhâng a: 
Job16:2 Chutiangte chu ka hre ve vek alâwm, In vai hian mi thlamuan thiam lo tak in ni." 
Job16:3 Thu puarpawlêng mai mai i sawi i sawi dâwn em ni? Engin nge tiphûr che, i ṭawng i ṭawng le?" 
Job16:4 Ka chan ang hi chang ve ula, In sawi ang hi ka sawi ve ṭeuh thei ang. Lu ka thinkhum ang che u a, Ka ânkhum zêk ang che u." 
Job16:5 Mahse, ka tithatho zâwk ang che u a, Ka ṭawng thlamuan bawk ang che u." 
Job16:6 Sawi sawi mah ila ka na a dam chuang lo, Ka ngawih reng pawhin a nêp chuang bawk hek lo." 
Job16:7 Aw Pathian, nangin min nghaisa a, Kan chhûngin min timang ta." 
Job16:8 Ka vun zûr hian mi sawisak dân a tilang a, Ka chêrzia hian ka natzia a tilang bawk." 
Job16:9 Nangin thinurin min pawtthlêr a, min hua a, Hachang mi ṭhial khum a, Mi dotuten rum takin min melh." 
Job16:10 Miten min chhiatkhum a, Diriam takin biangah min bêng a, Mi bei tûrin an inhâwr khâwm a," 
Job16:11 Amah ngaihsak lote hnênah Pathianin min hlân a, Mi sualte kutah min pe ta." 
Job16:12 Thlamuang taka ka awm der der lai Min rawn ṭhuai nawk nawk a, Ka ringah min rêk a, mi nawr nek a. A chhia zawng zawng min bûrbun ta." 
Job16:13 A thal kâptuten mi hual tlat a, Dîm lêk lovin ka kalah min kâp a, Ka mît chu leiah an leihbaw ta." 
Job16:14 Mi nghaisa mi nghaisa a, Râwng takin min chîl nek a." 
Job16:15 Saiip puan ka sîn a, Mualpho takin vaivutah ka ṭhu a." 
Job16:16 Ka ṭahna lamah ka meng sen rûm a. Ka mitte pawh a vûng bûr mai. 
Job16:17 Mahse, ka kutte hian thil sual a khawih lo va, Tihtakzetin ka ṭawngṭai ṭhîn." 
Job16:18 Aw leilung, ka thisen an chhuah hi ngawihpui mai suh la, Ka mangang au thâwm hi tâwp mai suh se." 
Job16:19 Tûnah ka thuhretu vânah a awm a, Min sawisaktu chu chung lama mi a ni." 
Job16:20 Ka ṭhianten min nuihsan mah se, Mittui nên Pathian lam ka hawi zâwk ang." 
Job16:21 Miin a ṭhian tân a ngaihsak ang hian, Pathian hnêna min sawisaktu awm teh sela aw!" 
Job16:22 Ka kumte chu a ral ṭêp a, Kîr tawh lohna kawng chu ka zawh mai dâwn si a." 
Job17:1 Ka thaw hleithei ta lo, ka dam rei tawh lo vang, Thlân lo chu hmabâk ka nei ta lo." 
Job17:2 A ni, hmusittuten mi hual vêl a, Min diriamna chu ka hmu reng mai." 
Job17:3 Nangmah ngei ka lamah ṭang teh, Nang lo chu belh tûr ka neih loh hi." 
Job17:4 Nangin an thinlung i tidel a, An inchhuan phal suh ang che." 
Job17:5 Hlâwkna ûma ṭhiante fakdertu chu A fapa mit tideltu a ni. 
Job17:6 Miten kamchhe tleuh nân min hmang a, Ka hmaiah chil min chhâk." 
Job17:7 Lungngaih avângin ka mit a thim zo va, Ka kutke pawh ruhkawl mai a ni ta." 
Job17:8 Mi nun ngîlte chuan hei hi mak an ti a, Pawi khawih lote pawhin mi sualte chu an dem." 
Job17:9 Mi ṭha chuan a awm dân chu a thlah lo vang, Kut faite chu an nghet tial tial bawk ang." 
Job17:10 In vaiin lo hawiin lo kal mah ula, In zîngah mi fing rêng ka hmu lo vang." 
Job17:11 Ka hun a ral dâwn ta, ka thil tumte a hlawhchham a, Ka duhsâm a thlâwn ta." 
Job17:12 Zân chu chhûn an vuah a, Thim chu êng hmahruaitu an ti." 
Job17:13 Seol chu ka hmabâk a ni ta, Thima ka mutna hmun tûr chu." 
Job17:14 Thlân chu, ‘Ka pa’ ka ti ang a, Ka taksa lungte chu, ‘Ka nu, ka farnu’ ka ti ang." 
Job17:15 Chu mai lo chu beisei tûr dang eng nge ka neih? Beisei tûr dang a awm em ni? 
Job17:16 Mitthi khuaa ka chhuk hun chuan, Beiseina nên vaivutah chuan kan chêng dûn ang." 
Job18:1 Tichuan, Bildada, Sua mi chuan heti hian a sawi ve a:" 
Job18:2 Eng chen nge sawi tûr i dap i dap dâwn? Ngaithla ve la, ka han sawi ve ang e." 
Job18:3 Eng vângin nge ramsa ang leka min ngaiha, Mi mâwl tê tê ang chauhva min hmuh?" 
Job18:4 I thinur avângin mahni i intihrehawm a, Nangmah avângin lei hi hnuchhawn a ni ang maw?" 
Job18:5 A ni, mi sual êng chu a chuai a, A meidê pawh a mit zo ta." 
Job18:6 A puan ina êng chu a thim ang a, A meichher pawh a thi bawk ang." 
Job18:7 Ngal tha chak chu a dul zo va, Ama remruat chu a chhiat phah ta." 
Job18:8 Lên chhûngah a pên lût a, Thangah chuan a âwk a," 
Job18:9 Thang chuan a kerêkah a âwk ang a, A hrui chuan a hlîng tlat ang." 
Job18:10 A tlâk nân hum an lai a, A awh nân thang an kam." 
Job18:11 Kil tin aṭangin hlauhawmin a ûm a, A kalna apiangah a zui." 
Job18:12 Rilṭâmin a chau ta a, Chhiatna chuan a hual tlat a ni." 
Job18:13 Natna hlauhawm takin a bâwm a, A kutke chu a ṭawih zo ta." 
Job18:14 A himna puan in aṭangin an hnûk chhuak a, Hlauhawm Lal hnênah an hruai lût." 
Job18:15 A puan inah mi dang an chêng ang a, A then fai nân kât an theh ang." 
Job18:16 A zungte chu a mawih ang a, A zârte pawh a ro zo vang." 
Job18:17 Leiah tu man an hre reng tawh lo vang a, Kawtthlêrah a hming rêng a lang tawh lo vang." 
Job18:18 Ani chu êng aṭangin thimah an paih lût a, Khawvêl ata an paih chhuak ta." 
Job18:19 A mite zîngah tu leh fa a nei lo vang a, A chênna in rochungtu pawh a nei lo vang." 
Job18:20 A chan chu khawthlang lam mite chuan râpthlâk an ti a, Khawchhak lam mite pawhin hlauhawm an ti." 
Job18:21 A ni, chu chu mi sualte chan tûr chu a ni, Chu ngei chu Pathian hre lote awm dân tûr chu a ni." 
Job19:1 Joba chuan heti hian a chhâng a: 
Job19:2 Eng chen nge na taka min ṭawng khum anga, Min tihhrehawm dâwn le?" 
Job19:3 Vawi sâwm ngawt min hau ta a, Zah nachâng hre lêk lovin min ânkhum." 
Job19:4 Ka lo dik lo ngei a nih chuan Ka sual man chu ka têl ang chu. 
Job19:5 Kei aia ṭha zâwka in inruata, Ka sual vânga mualpho nia min ngaih tlat chuan." 
Job19:6 Hre ta che u, Pathian chuan mi hnâwl a, A lênin min khuh ta." 
Job19:7 “Min sawisa,” tia ka au pawhin tu man min chhâng si lo va, Ka au chiam pawhin ngaihsaktu rêng ka nei lo ve." 
Job19:8 Ka kawng mi pinsak avângin ka kal tlang thei lo, Ka kawngte chu a tithim zo ta." 
Job19:9 Ka ropuina mi hlihsak a, Ka lallukhum mi lâksak ta." 
Job19:10 Kil tinah min tichhia a, eng mah ka ni ta lo, Thing angin ka beiseina a phawng." 
Job19:11 Ka chungah a thinur êm êm a, A hmêlmate zîngah min chhiar ta e." 
Job19:12 A sipai rual an lo kal a, Ṭan hmun an rawn khuar a, Ka puan in vêlah bûk an sa." 
Job19:13 Ka unaute min tihhlatsak a, Ka ṭhiante pawh mi hrang an chang zo ta." 
Job19:14 Ka laichînten min kal bosan a, Ka ṭhian bulten min theihnghilh ta." 
Job19:15 Ka mikhualte leh ka chhiahhlawh nulaten Mikhualah min ngai a, An hmêlhriat loh, ram dang miah min ngai." 
Job19:16 Ka chhiahhlawh pawh ka au ei zo ta lo, Ṭawngkam thlum thawh a ngai ta e." 
Job19:17 Ka nupuiin ka kâ rimchhia a ti a, Ka unau pianpuite tân tenawm mai ka lo ni ta." 
Job19:18 Naupangchhia lamin min hmusit a, Ka han tho te hi min lo eu va," 
Job19:19 Ka ṭhian ṭha zawng zawngten min ten a, Ka hmangaih berte pawhin min hawisan ta." 
Job19:20 Ruhkawl leh vun mai ka ni ta, Ka nung chang chang a ni." 
Job19:21 Mi khawngaih rawh u, ka ṭhiante u, mi khawngaih rawh u, Pathianin min khawih ta a nih hi." 
Job19:22 Pathian ang ziazângin nangnin engati nge min tihduhdah ve le? Ka tuarna hi tâwk in la ti na nge? 
Job19:23 Aw, ka thute hi ziak ni sela, Lehkhabu-ah chuang ve teh sela aw!" 
Job19:24 Ziakna thîrkhen leh suanin Kumkhua atân lungpuiah ker ni teh se. 
Job19:25 Mi tlantu chu a nung tih ka hria, Nakinah chuan vaivutah hian a lo ding ang." 
Job19:26 Ka vunte hi a chhiat hnuin Ka tisain Pathian ka la hmu ang. 
Job19:27 Kei ngei hian ka la hmu ang a, Ka mit ngei hian amah tak chu a la hmu ang. Ka thinlung a chau ta," 
Job19:28 “Engtin nge amah chu kan tihduhdah ang, Buaina bul chu amah hi a ni,” in tih avângin." 
Job19:29 Khandaih chu hlau rawh u, Khandaiha hremna hi Pathian thinur lanna a ni, Tichuan, rorêltu a awm tih in hria ang." 
Job20:1 Tichuan, Zofara, Naama mi chuan a chhâng a:" 
Job20:2 Ngun taka ka ngaihtuahin chhân ka châk a, Chhân hlân pawh ka nghâkhlel a nih hi." 
Job20:3 Min zilh dân chuan min va tai ve, Chhân dân tûr che ka hre reng asin." 
Job20:4 Hmasâng leia mihring awm chin ata tûn thlengin He thu hi i hre ngai lo vem ni? 
Job20:5 Mi sual chu rei a hlim lo va, Pathian hre lo mi lâwmna chu mitkhapkâr chauh a nih hi." 
Job20:6 A inngaih ropuina chuan vân tawng mah se, A lu pawh chuan chhûm thleng mah se," 
Job20:7 Ama êk angin a ral vang vang ang, Amah hmu ṭhînte chuan “Khawiah nge a awm tâk?” an ti ang." 
Job20:8 Mumang angin a ral ang a, an hmu leh tawh lo vang, Zân inlârna angin a bo thuai ang." 
Job20:9 Mit ngeia hmu ṭhînte khân an hmu leh tawh lo vang a, A awmna ṭhîn hmunah an hmu leh tawh lo vang." 
Job20:10 Retheite a rûksak a, A faten chûng mite chu tihlâwm an tum ang a, A sum lâk chu an pe kîr ang." 
Job20:11 A tleirâwl thazatna nên Vaivutah an la chang ang. 
Job20:12 Sual hi a kâin tui ti hlein A lei hnuaiah thukru tlat mah se," 
Job20:13 Lem phal lovin hmuam tlat mah se," 
Job20:14 A thil ei chuan a pum a tilumlet ang a, A kawchhûngah rûl tûr a chang ta e." 
Job20:15 Hausakna a dawlhte chu a luak chhuak a, Pathianin a pum aṭangin a luak chhuahtîr a ni." 
Job20:16 Rûl tûr a fâwp a, Tûr chuan ani chu a tihlum ta." 
Job20:17 Lui tui luang chu a hmu ve tawh lo vang. khawizu leh hnutetuia luang chu. 
Job20:18 A thawhrim rah chu ei lovin a chân ang a, A khâwl khâwm pawh a chên chuang lo vang." 
Job20:19 Retheite a tiduhdah a, a hnuchhawn a, Mahni in sa lovin mi sak sa a chhuhsak a." 
Job20:20 A duhâmna chuan chin lêm a nei lo ve, Mahse, a ro chuan a chhan thei dâwn si lo." 
Job20:21 Ei lohva hleih a nei lo va, A sum leh pai chuan a daih lo vang." 
Job20:22 A hausak vânglai takin a tlachhe thut ang a, Vânduaina chuan a hual vêl ang." 
Job20:23 In ei thau hle mah se, Pathian thinurna nasa tak chu a chungah a tla ang, A kawchhûnga khat khawpin a sûr ang." 
Job20:24 Thîr-fei hlauvin tlânchhe mah se, Dâr thal chuan a chhun tlang a," 
Job20:25 A phawi a, a hnung lamah a chhuak a, A hmâwr tlê-ah thisen a kai, Hliampui a tuar ta a ni." 
Job20:26 Thim nasa takin a hmuak ang a, A rote chu mihring chhêm ni lo meiin a kâng ang a, A puan ina la awmte pawh a kâng ral vek bawk ang." 
Job20:27 Vânte chuan a khawlohna a puang ang a, Lei pawhin thiam loh a chantîr ang." 
Job20:28 Tui lianin a in a lên bo vang a, Pathian thinur ni-ah a neih zawng zawng a ral vek ang." 
Job20:29 Chûng chu mi sual chan tûr Pathian ruatsak chu a ni, An ro chan tûra Pathian ruat chu a ni." 
Job21:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan, a chhâng a:" 
Job21:2 Ka thu sawi ngun takin ngaithla ula, Chu chu min thlamuanna ni rawh se." 
Job21:3 Min ngaithla ula, ka han sawi ang e, Ka sawi zawhah in duh leh min nuih dâwn nia." 
Job21:4 Mihring chungah em phunnawi ka nih? Han dawhthei rual ka ni lo asin. 
Job21:5 Min en ula, mak in ti hle ang, In kâ in hup ang." 
Job21:6 Ka chunga thil thleng hi ka ngaihtuahin ka mangang a, Hlauhnain ka thauvah a man ṭhîn." 
Job21:7 Engtizia nge mi sualte an nun renga, Tarkûna damin an hmuingîl hle le?" 
Job21:8 An tu leh fate hlawhtling takin an dampui a. 
Job21:9 An in leh lo hlauhawm lakah a him a, Pathian lahin a hrem hek lo." 
Job21:10 An bâwngpate chî a ṭha a, An bâwngpuiten no an chhiat ngai lo." 
Job21:11 Ran rual angin an fate an chhuahtîr dem dem a, Hlim takin an tualchai a," 
Job21:12 Dârbenchhek leh ṭingṭang remin an zai a, An phênglâwng nên hlim takin an ri bûng bûng." 
Job21:13 An damchhûngin nuam takin an khawsa a, Thlamuang takin mual an liam ṭhîn." 
Job21:14 Pathian hnênah, “Mi kalsan rawh, I kawngte hriat kan duh lo ve," 
Job21:15 Engkimtitheia chu tu nge maw a niha, A rawng kan bâwlna tûr chu? A hnêna kan ṭawngṭaiin hlâwkna eng nge kan hmuh ang,” an ti a." 
Job21:16 An sum leh pai chu an thawh chhuah a ni lo va, Mi sualte remruatnaah chuan ka tel ve lo a ni." 
Job21:17 Mi sual khâwnvâr chu a mit fo va, Vânduaina an chungah a thleng fo bawk a, Pathian thinurna chuan chhiatna a thlentîr a ni lâwm ni?" 
Job21:18 Thli chhêm lên buhpâwl ang an ni a, Thlipuiin buhsi a len bo ang hi an ni." 
Job21:19 A sualna avângin a fate a hrem in ti a, Amah ngei chuan tuar ang hmiang, a inhriat chhuah theih nân." 
Job21:20 A mit ngeiin a chunga chhiatna lo thleng chu hmu sela, Engkimtitheia thinurna chu tuar rawh se." 
Job21:21 A damchhûng nite a liam tawh hnuah chuan, A kalsan tâk a chhûngte a ngaihtuah ngai em ni?" 
Job21:22 Chung lam vâna thil awmte chunga rorêltu Pathian chu Tu nge hriatna zirtîr thei? 
Job21:23 Mi ṭhenkhat chu hlim tak leh nuam takin an khawsa a, an thau mûm tûl a, an mawm hmuk mai a, An thi an vânglaiin." 
Job21:24  
Job21:25 Ṭhenkhat erawh chu thil ṭha chên lovin Hrehawm takin an awm a, An thi a." 
Job21:26 Vaivutah an mu tlâng a, A lungin a bâwm ṭhîn." 
Job21:27 I ngaihtuahte ka hria asin, Mi diriamzia pawh ka hria." 
Job21:28 “Khawiah nge mi ropui in chu a awm tâk? Mi sualte chênna puan in pawh khawiah nge,” in ti a." 
Job21:29 Zin vêl mite in zâwt ngai lo vem ni? An sawite chu in awih na nge? 
Job21:30 Mi sual chu vânduai ni atân khêk a ni a, Thinur ni-ah hruai chhuah a ni,’ tih hi." 
Job21:31 Tu nge a hmaichhanah a sualna chachhuah anga, A thil lo tih tu nge thungrûl ngam ang?" 
Job21:32 Thlânah phûm a ni a, Ngun takin an vêng a," 
Job21:33 Ruama lei chuan ṭha takin a khuh a, A hmaah mi tam tak an kal tawh angin Mi tam takin a hnung an zui." 
Job21:34 Engtin tehlulin nge nangnin dâwtin min thlamuan theih ang? In sawite chu engmahlo mai a ni si a. 
Job22:1 Tichuan, Elifaza, Teman mi chuan heti hian a chhâng a:" 
Job22:2 Mihring hian Pathian tân ṭangkaina a nei em? Mi fing ber pawh a hlâwkpui dâwn em ni? 
Job22:3 A dikna chu Engkimtitheian a ṭangkaipui em? Sawisêlbova i nun avângin hlâwkna eng nge a neih? 
Job22:4 Pathian i ṭih avânga hrem i ni lo va, Rorêlnaa hruai i ni hek lo." 
Job22:5 I sualna a nasat êm avâng a ni, I sualnain tâwpintai a nei si lo." 
Job22:6 Eng mah tham lovah i unaute lakah dahkham i phût a, An silhfên hlihsakin saruakin i awmtîr a." 
Job22:7 Chaute chu in tûr tui i pe lo va, Rilṭâmte tân chaw i ui a." 
Job22:8 I thiltihtheihnain mi ram i lâksak a, I duhsakzâwngte i pe a." 
Job22:9 Hmeithaite chu kutruakin i kal botîr a, Fahrahte pawh i rapbet a." 
Job22:10 Chuvâng alâwm i vêlin thangin a hual che a, Chhiatna nasa tak leh hlauhawmin a hual che ni." 
Job22:11 Khua a thim a, i hmu thei lo va, Tui lian chuan a khuh ta che a nih hi." 
Job22:12 “Pathian chu vânsângahte hian a awm lo vem ni? Arsite khi sâng hle mah se, a rawn chhuk en a," 
Job22:13 Eng nge Pathianin a rawn hriat ang le? Chhûmin a hliah tlat a, engtin nge min rêlsak theih?" 
Job22:14 “Min hmuh theih loh nân chhûm chhah takin a khuh a, Vânlaizâwlah a lêng vêl a,” i ti a." 
Job22:15 Mi sualten an zawh ṭhin kawng hlun chu I zawh ve dâwn em ni? 
Job22:16 A hun lovah sawn bo an ni a, An innghahna pawh tui lianin a lên bo ta." 
Job22:17 Pathian hnênah, “Min kalsan rawh, Engkimtitheia chuan eng nge min tih theih?” an ti a." 
Job22:18 Chuti chungin an inte thil ṭhain a tihkhahsak a, Chuvângin, mi sualte remruat chu ka hrethiam thei lo." 
Job22:19 Mi dikte chuan an hmuhin an lâwm a, Pawi khawih lote pawhin an nuihsan a;" 
Job22:20 “Kan hmêlmate chu tihchhiat an ni ta, Mei chuan an hausakna a kâng ral ta,” tiin." 
Job22:21 Pathian hnênah inhlân la, amah nên inrem rawh, Tichuan, i hmuingîl ang." 
Job22:22 A kamchhuak zirtîrna chu pawm la, I thinlungah vawng tlat ang che." 
Job22:23 Engkimtitheia hmaa inngaitlâwma i kîra, I in ata thil sual i dah bo daih chuan A tungding ngei ang che." 
Job22:24 I rangkachak chu vaivut ang leka i ngaiha, I rangkachak ṭha chi pawh, Luikawr lungte ang maia i ngaih chuan," 
Job22:25 Engkimtitheia chu i rangkachak leh tangkaraw tlang, I tâna hlu tak chu a ni ang." 
Job22:26 A ni, Engkimtitheia chu i ring tlat ang a, Amah chu i lâwmna ber a ni ang." 
Job22:27 A hnênah i ṭawngṭai ang a, anin a ngaithla ang che, Tichuan, i thutiamte lâwm takin i hlen ang." 
Job22:28 I thil ruahman chu a hlawhtling ang a, I kawngte pawh a tiêng ang." 
Job22:29 Pathianin mi chapote a hnûkhniam a, Inngaitlâwmte a chhanhim ṭhîn." 
Job22:30 Mi pawi khawih lo chu a chhan chhuak ang a, I kut a thianghlim chuan Nang pawh a chhan chhuak bawk ang che." 
Job23:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhâng a:" 
Job23:2 Ka manganna vawiin thlengin ni tin a zual zêl a, Ka rûm hian ka natzia pawh a hril zo lo." 
Job23:3 Aw, amah ka hmuh theihna tûr lam chu hria ila, A thut hmunah chuan ka kal tûr a." 
Job23:4 Ka chungthu a hnênah chuan ka thlen ang a, Ka tanfung zawng zawng hi ka sawi chhuak vek ang." 
Job23:5 Mi chhân dân ka hre duh a, A sawi tûr chu hriat ka châk a ni." 
Job23:6 A thiltihtheihna nasa tak nên min bei dâwn em ni? Dâwn lo, ka lamah beng a chhi zâwk ang." 
Job23:7 Kei mi nun ngîl hian a hmaah thu ka thlen ang a, Thiam changin ka chhuak hlen tawh ang." 
Job23:8 Khawchhak lamah ka kal a, ani chu a awm si lo, Khawthlang lam ka zawn leh ka hmu si lo." 
Job23:9 Hmâr lama a chêt laiin ka hmu lo va, Chhim lam a pan pawhin ka hmu thei chuang lo." 
Job23:10 Ka kawng zawh chu a hria. Mi fiah hnuah rangkachak angin ka chhuak dâwn si a. 
Job23:11 Ka kete hian a hniakhnung a zui zêl a, Pêngbo lovin a kawng ka zawh zêl a." 
Job23:12 A kam chhuak thupêk chu ka pênsan lo va, A thu chhuakte chu chaw aiin ka ngaihlu zâwk." 
Job23:13 Mi rilru nghet a ni, tu nge khawih her thei ang? A duhzâwng chu a ti mai a ni." 
Job23:14 Ka chan tâwka a rêl chu a hlen ang a, Chutiang chu a la nei teuh a ni." 
Job23:15 Chuvângin, a hmaah hlauvin ka khûr a, Ka ngaihtuah chângin ka hlau zual thîn." 
Job23:16 Pathianin ka thinlung a tichau va, Thim chhah angin min khuh mah sela, Ka hlau chuang lo, Engkimtitheia chu a ni mi tizâmtu chu." 
Job23:17  
Job24:1 Engkimtitheia chuan engati nge rorêl hun a ruat loh? Engah nge amah hretuten chu ni chu an hmuh loh? 
Job24:2 Mi ṭhenkhat chuan ramri lung an sawn a, Mi ran rual an chhuh chu anmahni ta angin an vulh a," 
Job24:3 Fahrahte sabengtung an lâksak a, Dahkham atân hmeithai bâwngpa an hrêng." 
Job24:4 Retheite awm ngaihna hre lovin an siam a, Ram chhûnga tlachhamte chu biru tûrin an tlânchhia," 
Job24:5 Thlalêr ram sabengtung angin Ṭhahnemngai takin chaw an zawng ṭâwk ṭâwk a, Thlalêrah chuan an fate tân chaw an hmu hrâm ṭhîn." 
Job24:6 Mi lova buh sengin an inhlawh a, Mi sualte pawhin an grep lo tûrin an chhawr." 
Job24:7 Puan sin lovin saruakin zankhuain an mu a, Khawvâwta intuam lumna eng mah an nei lo." 
Job24:8 Tlânga ruahpui sûrin a nan huh a, Phen tûr zawngin lungpui an bêl." 
Job24:9 Pa nei lo hnute hne laite chu an pawtthla a, Mi retheite chu an leiba aiah an fate an lâksak." 
Job24:10 Silhfên an tlachham a, saruakin an vâkvai a, Rilṭâm chungin an buhphalte an pu." 
Job24:11 Oliv huanah hriak an her a, Uain khurah grep an rap sâwr a, Tuihâl dangchârin hna an thawk." 
Job24:12 Khawvêla mi tam tak thichhâwnga rûm te, Ṭanpui dîla hliam tuar au te, Pathian lahin a ngaihsak lo." 
Job24:13 Mi ṭhenkhat chuan êng an hua a, êngah an kal duh lo. Khaw êngah pawh an awm duh lo." 
Job24:14 Varṭianah tualthattu chu a tho va, Rethei leh chanhaite a that a, Zânah pawh rûkru angin a che vêl ṭhîn." 
Job24:15 Uire chuan khaw thim a thlîr a, “Tu man min hmu tawh lo vang,” tiin. A hmai a khuh a." 
Job24:16 Chûng mite chu zânah in rek pawpin an lût ru a, Chhûnah an inkalhkhung a, Êngah an awm duh lo." 
Job24:17 Thim chhah mup chu an tân zîng a ni a, Thim hnuaia hlauhawmte nên an innêl êm a ni." 
Job24:18 Tui lian chuan chak takin a lên bo va, A ram chan chu ânchhe dawng a ni a, A grep huana thawk tûrin tu mah an kal lo." 
Job24:19 Khawkhêng ni saah vûr a tuiral angin Mi sualte pawh thlânah an ṭawih ral ang. 
Job24:20 A nu chuan a theihnghilh tawh ang a, A lung tân chaw tui tak a ni ang. Mi sualte chu hriat reng an ni tawh lo vang a, Thing anga tihtliah an ni ang." 
Job24:21 Ching, fa hring thei lote chu rethei takin a chhawr a, Hmeithaite a khawngaih ngai lo." 
Job24:22 Pathianin a thiltihtheihnain mi chakte a hnawt kiang a, An tho chhuak nain dam rêng an beisei lo." 
Job24:23 Him tak leh thlamuang âwm takin a chawlhtîr a, Mahse, an kawng chu a mitin a en reng si." 
Job24:24 Rei lo tê atân chawisân an ni a, An ral leh ṭhîn, tihhniamin an awm a, Mi dangte angin mual an liam a, Buhvui anga ah chhum an ni." 
Job24:25 Chu chu a dik lo a nih pawhin Tu nge, “I daw’” min ti thei ang? “I thute hi eng mah a ni lo,” tu nge ti thei ang?" 
Job25:1 Bildada, Sua mi chuan heti hian a chhâng a:" 
Job25:2 Pathian chu a lalin a va zahawm êm, Vân sângte khi muanawm takin a vêng." 
Job25:3 A sipai rualte chu chhiar sên rual an ni lo, A ênga a chhun loh tu nge awm?" 
Job25:4 Engtin nge Pathian hmaah miin thiam a chan theih ang? Engtin nge hmeichhe hrin a thianghlim theih ang? 
Job25:5 A mit hmuhah chuan thla meuh pawh khi a êng lo va, Arsite pawh an thianghlim lo." 
Job25:6 Mihring lek phei chu thil lung mai a ni, Mihring fapa pawh changpât mai a ni." 
Job26:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhâng a:" 
Job26:2 Mi chak lo i han ṭanpui dân leh Bân tha chak lo i han chhân dân chu le! 
Job26:3 Mi mâwl i han zilh fing a, Thu ril tak tak i va han sawi tam ve!" 
Job26:4 Tu thlarau nge i chana Tu nge maw i han hrilh vei le? 
Job26:5 Mitthi thlaraute chu lei hnuaiah an khûr a, Chuta chêngte nên chuan." 
Job26:6 Mitthi khua chu Pathianin a hmu vek a, Chhiatna hmun chuan hliahtu a nei lo." 
Job26:7 Hmâr lamah vân a pharh a, Engmahlovah lei chu a khai kâng a." 
Job26:8 A chhûm chhah tak chuan ruahtuite a fûn khâwm a, A tui paite avângin chhûmte chu a ṭet chuang lo." 
Job26:9 A lalṭhutthlêng chu chhûmin a khuh a. A vêlin a zîng mup mai. 
Job26:10 Thim leh êng inrina atân Tui chungah kâwlkil a siam a. 
Job26:11 Vân dona bante chu a nghîng dur dur a, A zilhhauna chu mak an ti a." 
Job26:12 A thiltihtheihnain tuifinriat a thunun a, Thiam takin Rahab a tan chhum a." 
Job26:13 A thawin vân chu a tithiang a, A kutin rûlpui tlânchhia a that." 
Job26:14 Ngai teh, hêng hi a thiltih hmatheh mai a la ni, A chanchin kan hriat hi a va beitham êm, A thiltihtheihna thâwm ri chu tu nge hre zo thei ang?" 
Job27:1 Joba chuan heti hian a chhâng a: 
Job27:2 Ka dikna ngainêpa, ka nun tilungngaitu, Engkimtitheia, Pathian nung chhâlin ka sawi e," 
Job27:3 Ka damchhûnga Pathian thaw Ka hnâra a awm chhûng chu," 
Job27:4 Ka hmuiin thu lawilo a sawi lo vang a, Ka leiin dâwt a sawi hek lo vang." 
Job27:5 Ka thiam dâwn teuh lo mai che u, Ka thih thlengin ka dik tih ka ṭan tlat dâwn." 
Job27:6 Ka dikzia ka ṭan tlat ang a, Ka thu ka zûk lo vang. Ka dam chhûng zawng inthiam lohna ka nei lo vang." 
Job27:7 Ka hmêlma chu mi sual angin, Mi dotu chu mi dik lo angin hrem ni teh se." 
Job27:8 Pathian ngaihsak lo tân beisei tûr eng nge awm? Pathianin a hnâwla, a nun a lâksak bawk si chuan." 
Job27:9 Buainain a chîm laiin Pathianin an au thâwm a ngaithla dâwn em ni? 
Job27:10 Engkimtitheia chungah a lâwm ang em? Pathian chu eng lai pawhin a ko vang em? 
Job27:11 Pathian thianghlimzia chu ka zirtîr ang che u, Engkimtitheia remruat chu ka zêp lo vang." 
Job27:12 Nangmahni ngeiin hêng hi in hmu vek si a, Engtizia nge mumal nei lo taka in ṭawng mai le?" 
Job27:13 Pathianin mi sualte chan tûra a ruat leh, Engkimtitheian hnehchhiahte chan tûra a ruat chu hei hi a ni:" 
Job27:14 Fa tam tak nei mah se, khandaih tuar tûr mai an ni, A rîla rahten chaw kham khawp an nei lo vang." 
Job27:15 A thlah la dam chhunte pawh hriin an thi ang. An nupuite pawhin sûnna hun an nei lo vang. 
Job27:16 Vaivut anga tam tangkarua khâwlin, Silhfên pawh hlum angin tiang khâwm mah se," 
Job27:17 A tian khâwm chu mi dikten an la inbel ang a, A tangka pawh pawi khawih loten an la insem ang." 
Job27:18 A in sak chu maimawm rîl zam ang lek a ni, Vêngtuin chhâwlbûk a sak ang lek hi." 
Job27:19 Hausa takin a mu a, a mut hlânin a sum a ral zo va, A han harh chuan eng mah a nei tawh lo." 
Job27:20 Tui lian angin hlauhawmin a nangchîng ang a, Zâna thlipui lo tlehin a la bo vang." 
Job27:21 Khawchhak thliin a lên bo vang a, a awm tawh lo vang, A hmun ata a nuai bo dâwn si a." 
Job27:22 Zahngai lovin a nuai chiam ang a, A thiltihtheihna hmaah chuan a tlânchhe rawk rawk ang." 
Job27:23 Miten an kut an ben khum ang a, Chek khumin a hmun aṭangin an ûm chhuak ang." 
Job28:1 Tangkaraw laihchhuahna hmun a awm a, Rangkachak tihthianghlimna hmun pawh a awm." 
Job28:2 Thîr chu lei aṭanga lâk chhuah a ni a, Dâr sen chu lung aṭanga rawhtui a ni." 
Job28:3 Miten thimah êng an chhi zêl a, Khur thûk tak takah an lût a, Thim chhah mupa lung awmte chu lai chhuak tûrin." 
Job28:4 Mite chên lohnaah khur an lai a, A chunga kalte pawhin an hre lo. Mi hriatpui lohvah an inkhai a, an inthên vêl ṭhîn." 
Job28:5 Lei pâwnlâng hi buh tân a ni a, A chhûngril erawh chu mei kan ang a ni." 
Job28:6 Lei chhûnga lungah te chuan safir lunghlu a awm a, A dipahte rangkachak a tel bawk." 
Job28:7 Chumi kalna chu mulukawlh pawhin a hre lo, Mu pawhin a hmu ngai hek lo." 
Job28:8 Ramsa kawlhte pawhin an tlawh lo va, Sakeibakneite pawh an kal ngai lo." 
Job28:9 Mite chuan lung changte chu an la a, Tlângte chu a bulṭhutah an hai let a." 
Job28:10 Lungpuite pawh an verh tlang a, Thil hlu tak tak an hmu chhuak a." 
Job28:11 Luite chu pût hauh lovin an khuap a, Thil lang lote chu an tilang a." 
Job28:12 Mahse, finna chu khawiah nge an hmuh ang a, Hriatna chu khawiah nge a awm ang?" 
Job28:13 Mihringin a hlutzia an hre lo va, Mi nung ramah hian an hmu hek lo." 
Job28:14 Tuithûkpui chuan, “Ka hnênah a awm lo,” a ti a. Tuifinriat chuan, “Ka hnênah a awm lo,” a ti bawk a." 
Job28:15 Rangkachaka lei theih a ni lo va, A man atân tangkarua bûk chhuah chi a ni hek lo." 
Job28:16 Ofir rangkachakin a tluk thei lo va, Onix leh safir lunghlute pawhin an tluk thei lo." 
Job28:17 Rangkachak leh lung fîmin a hen lo va, Rangkachak nomawia thleng theih a ni hek lo." 
Job28:18 Berul leh Krustal lunghlute nên tehkhin rual a ni lo. A ni, finna man chu lunghlu man aiin a tam zâwk." 
Job28:19 Ethiopia ram lunghlu topaz pawhin a khan lo va, Rangkachak thianghlim ai pawhin a hlu zâwk." 
Job28:20 A nih, finna chu khawi aṭanga lo kal nge? Hriatna chu khawiah nge a awm?" 
Job28:21 Thil nung pakhat mahin an hmuh theih loh tûra thup a ni a, Chunglêng savate lakah thuhrûk tlat a ni." 
Job28:22 Boralna leh thihna chuan “A thâwm zawng kan bengin kan hria,” an ti a." 
Job28:23 Pathian chauhvin a kawng chu a hria a. Amah chauh a ni a awmna hmun pawh hria. 
Job28:24 Lei tâwp thlengin a thlîr a, Vân hnuaia thil tinrêng hi a hmu." 
Job28:25 Thli chak dân a teh lai leh Tuite a teh lai khân 
Job28:26 Ruahtui tlâk dân tûr a ruahman lai leh, Khawpui ri leh kawlphe kawng a siam lai khân." 
Job28:27 Tichuan, finna chu a hmu a, a puangzâr a, A tinghet a, a chhui chhuak a." 
Job28:28 Mihring hnênah chuan, “Ngai rawh, Lalpa ṭih hi finna a ni, Thil ṭha lo kalsan hi hriatthiamna chu a ni,” a ti a." 
Job29:1 Joba chuan a thu sawi chhunzawmin heti hian a ti a: 
Job29:2 Tûn hma thla ral ta, Pathianin min vênhim laite ang khân awm ka va châk êm!" 
Job29:3 A khâwnvâr chu ka lu chungah a êng a, A êng ringin thim chu ka kaltlang ṭhîn." 
Job29:4 Ka vânglai ni-ah te Pathianin ka puan ina min pâwl laite khân. 
Job29:5 Engkimtitheian min châmchilh a, Ka fate ka kianga an awm lai khân." 
Job29:6 Ka kawngahte hnutetui a luan dûl dûl lai leh, Lungpuia hriak kan sâwr tluk tluk laite khân." 
Job29:7 Khawpui kawngka pana ka kal chhuaha, Kawtthlêra rorêlna ṭhuthmun ka rem laite khân." 
Job29:8 Tlangvâlten min hmu a, an bibo va, Upate an tho va, an ding a." 
Job29:9 Hotute ṭawng lai pawh an châwl a, An kutin an kâ an hup a." 
Job29:10 Miliante pawh an ngawi ṭhuap a, An lei chu an dangah a bet a," 
Job29:11 Ka thu sawi hriaten min fak a, Min hmututen min chawimawi a," 
Job29:12 Mi rethei ṭanpui ngai, ṭapte ka chhan chhuak a, Ṭanpuitu nei lo fahrahte pawh." 
Job29:13 Thi dâwn ṭêpin an duhsakna min hlân a, Hmeithaite pawh hlim takin ka zaitîr." 
Job29:14 Diknain ka inthuam a, Rorêlna dik chu ka kawrfual leh lallukhum a ni." 
Job29:15 Mitdel tân mit ka ni a, Kebai tân ke ka ni." 
Job29:16 Tlachham tân pa ka ni a, Ka hmêlhriat lohte thubuai pawh ka ngaihtuahsak ṭhîn." 
Job29:17 Mi sualte ngho chu ka tihtliahsak a, An thil seh chu ka pawh chhuahsak bawk." 
Job29:18 A rei thei ang ber dam ka tum a, “Keima in ngeiah ka thi ang,” ka ti a." 
Job29:19 Ka zungte chu hmun hnâwngah a zâm lût ang a, Ka zârah chuan zânkhuain dai a châm tawh ang." 
Job29:20 Ka ropui deuh deuh vang a, Ka chak telh telh bawk ang." 
Job29:21 Miten beisei takin ka lamah beng an dawh a, Ka thurâwn nghâkin an ngawi ṭhuap a." 
Job29:22 Ka han sawi zawh chuan eng mah an sawi tawh lo, Ka thu sawi chu an ei a ni." 
Job29:23 Ruahtui tla tîr miin an nghâkhlel angin min nghâk a, Ruah hnuhnûng duh angin ka thu an hre duh a," 
Job29:24 An beidawn laiin ka tihlim a, Ka hlim hmêl chuan anni chu a tiharh;" 
Job29:25 An kawng zawh tûr ka thlansak a, An hotu-ah ka ṭhu a. Sipai rual zînga lal angin ka awm a, An tân lusûnte hnêmtu ang ka ni." 
Job30:1 Tûnah zawng ka aia naupangten min nuihzat a, An pate pawh ka ran rual vêngtu, Ui zînga telah pawh ka duh lohte an ni." 
Job30:2 Chûng thaṭhum tawhte bân tha chu Ka la ṭangkaipui dâwn em ni? 
Job30:3 Tlachham leh rilṭâmin thing zung an khel a, Thim hnuaiah thlalêr hnuchhawn ramah an vâk vêl ṭhîn." 
Job30:4 Thlalêr builukham an pawt a, Juniper zungte an chaw a ni." 
Job30:5 Mi zîng aṭangin hnawh chhuah an ni a, Rûkru angin an au zui a." 
Job30:6 Ruam kumkârahte an awm a, Khuarkhurum leh lungpui phênah te chuan." 
Job30:7 Hnimbuk hnuaiahte mangangin an râk chûl a, Kangṭhai buk hnuaiahte an tawm khâwm." 
Job30:8 Mi tlâktlailo leh bengtlalo, Mihringa chhiar tlâk loh an ni." 
Job30:9 Tûnah zawng hlaah min phuah el a, An kamchhe tleuhna ka ni ta." 
Job30:10 Min ten a, ka lakah an inthiarfihlîm a, Ka hmaia chil chhâk tak an nâp a." 
Job30:11 Tûnah Pathianin ka chakna min lâksak a, Chuvângin, ka thu engah mah an ngai ta lo." 
Job30:12 Ka ding lamah mipui an lo thawk a, Ka ke-ah min kalh thlu a, Ka chhiatna tûr an belhchhah a." 
Job30:13 Ka tlân chhuahna tûr an tichhia a, Ka vânduaina an tizual a. Tu man an khap si lo." 
Job30:14 Kulh bang chim zau laiah an lo lût a, A chimte chuan mi delh bet a." 
Job30:15 Thil râpthlâk takin mi nangchîng a, Ka zahawmna thli angin a liam a. Ka hamṭhatna pawh chhûm angin a kiang zo ta." 
Job30:16 Tûnah ka thi dâwn ta a nih hi, Tuarna chuan min thlah si lo." 
Job30:17 Zankhuain ka ruhte a na ngut ngut a, Mi kher ngur ngur hi a châwl lo." 
Job30:18 Ka na hian nghâwnga reh angin min rêk a, Ka tâl ka tâl a, Ka silhfênte pawh ka tâl chuar zo vek a ni." 
Job30:19 Pathianin chirhdûpah min paih lût a, Vaivut leh vut ang chauh ka ni ta." 
Job30:20 Nang ka ko che a, mi chhâng lo va, Ka din pawhin mi hawi si lo." 
Job30:21 Ka lakah i nun a râwng ta a, Dîm lo tawpin min khawih." 
Job30:22 Nangin thli mi lentîr a, sâng takah min vawrh a, Thlipuiin mi lên mi lên." 
Job30:23 Nangin min tihlum dâwn a, Mi nung zawng zawng tâna hmun ruatah chuan Min hruai dâwn tih ka hria." 
Job30:24 Chhiat tâwk chungah engah nge kut i thawha, Eng mah ti thei lo, khawngaih dîltu chungah hian?" 
Job30:25 Buaina tâwkte tân ka ṭap ṭhîn lâwm ni? Tlachhamte ka khawngaih ṭhîn lo maw? 
Job30:26 Thil ṭha ka beisei laiin thil ṭha lo a lo thleng a, Êng ka nghâk a, thim a lo thleng a." 
Job30:27 Ka thin a phu hlawp hlawp a, a reh thei si lo, Hrehawm tuarna hun chuan mi rawn nang ta." 
Job30:28 Ni em vâng ni lovin ka hmêl a thu a, Pungkhâwmho zînga dingin ṭanpui ka dîl a." 
Job30:29 Sihalte unaupa ka ni, Ostrich-te tân ṭhian ṭha ka ni." 
Job30:30 Ka vunte a lo dum a, a khawk a, Ka taksa pawh a lum vung vung mai." 
Job30:31 Ka ṭingṭang a ri kuai ruai a, Ka phênglâwng ri pawh ṭah hlaah a chang." 
Job31:1 Nula ngaihmelh lo tûrin thu ka tiam a," 
Job31:2 Chung Pathian hnêna mihring chan tûr leh Sadaia, vân sânga awm hnêna rochan tûr eng ang nge ni?" 
Job31:3 Mi sualte tân chhiatna leh Thil sual titute tân vânduaina a ni dâwn lo vem ni? 
Job31:4 Ka kawngte a hmu vekin Ka kepênte a chhiar lo vem ni? 
Job31:5 Dâwt sawi ka chîna, Mi bum tuma hmanhlel ṭhîn ka nih chuan," 
Job31:6 Bûkna dik takin min teh sela, Ka dikzia hi Pathian chuan a hre mai ang." 
Job31:7 Tin, kawng dik aṭanga ka pêna, Ka mitin suala min hruaia, Ka kutin thil sual a khawih chuan," 
Job31:8 Ka thawh rah chu mi dangin ei sela, Ka thlai chînte chu pawt vek rawh se." 
Job31:9 Ka ṭhenawmpa nupui ka îta. A kawngka bula ka chân rûk chuan," 
Job31:10 Ka nupui chuan mi dang chaw chhûm sela, Mi dangin mutpui rawh se." 
Job31:11 Chu chu bawhchhiatna sual lian tak, Rorêltuten an hrem ngei tûr chu a ni." 
Job31:12 Chutiang sual chu, kâng ral vek thei mei a ni a, Ka sum zawng zawng pawh a kâng ral ang." 
Job31:13 Ka chhiahhlawhnu leh chhiahlawhpate chu Ka laka an vuivaina thu Dik taka ka ngaihtuahsak duh loh chuan," 
Job31:14 Pathian a lo thawh hunah engtin nge ka tih tâk ang? A rawn zawh fiah hunah, engtin nge ka chhân tâk ang le?" 
Job31:15 Pum chhûnga mi siamtu khân anni pawh a siam lo vem ni? Mi pakhat kutchhuak kan ni lo vem ni? 
Job31:16 Tlachhamte mamawh hrênsakin Hmeithaite ka tibeidawng ngai lo. 
Job31:17 Ka chaw keimah maia ei lovin Fahrahte ka eitîr ve ṭhîn. 
Job31:18 Anni chu an tleirâwl lai ata pa angin ka enkawl a, An sên têt ata ka kaihruai zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
Job31:19 Tu pawh silhfên nei lova vâkvai emaw, Hâk tûr nei lo rethei ka hmuh chuan" 
Job31:20 Ka berâm hmul ngeia siamin ka tuam lum ang a, Tichuan, anin min fak takzet ang." 
Job31:21 Rorêlnaah ṭantu ka neih dâwn avânga, Fahrahte chunga kut ka thlâk chuan," 
Job31:22 Ka koki hi ka dâr saiphêng nên phawk hlawk sela, Ka bân hi a bulah tliak hmawk rawh se." 
Job31:23 Pathian hrem ka hlauh êm avâng leh A ropui êm si avângin chûng thilte chu ka ti ngam lo va ni. 
Job31:24 Rangkachak chu rinchhan bera ka hmana, Rangkachak thianghlim hnênah, “Ka himna i ni,” ka tih chuan," 
Job31:25 Ka hausak êm avâng leh hna thawh tam avânga lâwm ka nih chuan 
Job31:26 Ni khi a ên êm avâng leh Thla pawh a ropui êm avânga ngaisânga," 
Job31:27 A rûka ka rilru an lo hîp beha, Anmahni zaha ka kut ka phar chuan," 
Job31:28 Chu pawh chu rorêltu hrem ngei chi, sual a ni, Chung Pathian phatsantu ka nih dâwn avângin." 
Job31:29 Mi hawtu chhiatnaa lâwm ka nih emaw, Thil ṭha lovin a tlâkbuak laia ka hlim viau emaw chuan." 
Job31:30 “Thi se,” tia ânchhe lawh nân Ka kâ ka phal lo." 
Job31:31 “I chaw ei lo tu nge awm le?” Ka awmpuiten an tih loh chuan. 
Job31:32 Mikhualte kawtthlêrah an riak ngai lo, Khualzinte tân ka kawng ka hawng reng ṭhîn." 
Job31:33 Mi anga sualna zêp chîng ka ni lo, Sualna ka pai ru ve ngai lo." 
Job31:34 Mipui zah avâng leh chipuite hau hlauh vânga Ngawi renga awma lêng chhuak ngam lovin ka awm ngai lo. 
Job31:35 Ka thu ngaithlatu tûr an awm na nge aw, Ka sawi apiang a dik asin. Engkimtitheian mi chhâng teh se, Ka chhiar atân min hêkna hi ziak chhuah ni se ka va ti êm!" 
Job31:36 Chhuang takin ka kokiah ka târ ang a, Lallukhum angin ka khum ang." 
Job31:37 Ka tih apiang Pathian ka hrilh ang a, Ngampa takin amah ka pan ang." 
Job31:38 Ka lo neih lai hi ka rûk a niha, A neitu dik tak chhuhsak ka nih chuan." 
Job31:39 Man pe lova a rah chauh ei ka lo niha, A thlotute dangchâra ka siam chuan," 
Job31:40 Huit aiah hlîng ṭo zâwk sela, Barli aiah hlohar ṭo zâwk rawh se. Joba thu chu a tâwp ta." 
Job32:1 Tichuan, Joba chu ṭha a intih êm avângin a ṭhian pathumte chuan an chhâng mai ta lo va." 
Job32:2 Elihua, Barakela fapa, Buz mi, Rama thlahte zînga mi chu Joba chungah a thinur ta êm êm a, Pathian aia ṭhaah a inngaih avângin." 
Job32:3 Joba ṭhian pathumte chungah pawh a thinur bawk, Joba chu thiam lo ti chunga chhân ngaihna an hriat loh avângin." 
Job32:4 Anni chu aia upa an nih avângin Elihua chuan Joba hnêna thu sawi ve hun chu a lo nghâk reng a ni. 
Job32:5 Tichuan, hêng mi pathumte hian chhân ngaihna rêng an hre lo tih a hriatin Elihua chu a thinrim ta hle a." 
Job32:6 Barakela fapa, Elihua, Buz mi chuan heti hian a chhâng ve ta a: “Ka naupang a, nangni in upa a, chuvâng chuan ka zak a, Ka hriat pawh in kiangah ka sawi ve ngam lo va." 
Job32:7 Upate ṭawng sela, Rual ûten thu sawi teh se,” ka ti a." 
Job32:8 A ni, mihringa thlarau awm, Engkimtitheia thaw chu finna petu a lo ni." 
Job32:9 Kum tam apiang an fing chuang lo, Upa apiangin an hre fuh chuang hek lo." 
Job32:10 Chuvângin, mi ngaithla ula Ka ngaih dân ka han sawi ve ang e." 
Job32:11 Ngai teh u, in thu ka nghâk reng a, Sawi tûr in dap chhûng khân In ṭan dânah beng ka lo chhi reng asin." 
Job32:12 Ngun takin in thu ka ngaithla a, in zînga tu mahin Joba dik lohna in lailang thei lo va, Tu man a thu in letthla thei hek lo." 
Job32:13 “Mihring hneh theih loh, Pathian chauh hneh theih Mi fing kan tawng ta,” in ti reu reu ang e." 
Job32:14 Kan la intawng lo va, Nangni ang mai chuan ka chhâng ve dâwn lo." 
Job32:15 An dang reng a, chhân ngaihna an hre tawh lo va, Kam khat mah sawi tûr an nei ta lo." 
Job32:16 Tûnah an ngawi reng a, sawi tûr dang rêng an hre lo va, An din reng avângin ka nghâk reng mai dâwn em ni le?" 
Job32:17 Keimah ngeiin ka han chhâng ve ang a, Ka ngaih dân ka han sawi ve teh ang." 
Job32:18 Sawi tûrin ka khat tlat a, Ka chhûngrilah mi tur ut ut a." 
Job32:19 Uain hu chhuahna nei lo ang ka ni, Uain thar peng angin ka puak keh ṭêp a ni." 
Job32:20 Ka sawi ve phawt loh chuan ka hah a dam lo vang, Ka kâ ka âng a, ka han chhâng ve teh ang." 
Job32:21 Ṭan bîk neih ka tum lo va, tu mah fak der ka tum hek lo." 
Job32:22 Fak der ka thiam lo va, chutiang chu ti ila, Mi siamtuin min la bo thuai mai ang." 
Job33:1 Tûnah, Joba, ka thu hi ngaithla la, Ka sawi zawng zawng hi ngun takin ngaithla rawh." 
Job33:2 Ngai teh, ka kâ ka âng a, Ka han sawi ve dâwn e." 
Job33:3 Rilru ngîl tak pua sawi ka ni, Ka thil hriat chu dik takin ka sawi dâwn." 
Job33:4 Pathian Thlarau chuan mi siam a, Engkimtitheia thaw chuan nunna min pe." 
Job33:5 I theih chuan mi han chhâng la, Ṭanfung siam la, mi hmachhawn teh." 
Job33:6 Pathian mit hmuhin nangmah ang bawk ka ni, Kei pawh hluma siam ve mai ka ni." 
Job33:7 Ngai teh, nanghi mi hlau tûr i ni lo ve, Ka nawr lutuk lo vang che." 
Job33:8 I sawi kha ka hria a, I thute pawh ka hre reng asin." 
Job33:9 “Sualna rêng nei lovin ka thianghlim a, Sawisêlbo ka ni a, khawlohna lakah ka fihlîm a ni." 
Job33:10 Ngai teh, ka lakah chhuanlam a zawng a, A hmêlmaah mi chhiar ta a," 
Job33:11 Ke kawl min buntîr a, Ka awm dân tinrêng mi enthla reng,” i ti a." 
Job33:12 Ngai teh, ka hrilh a che, he thilah hian i tidik lo, Pathian chu mihring aiin a ropui zâwk a ni." 
Job33:13 Kam khat maha a chhân loh che avângin Engah nge ani chu i hau le. 
Job33:14 Pathianin kawng hrang hrangin thu a sawi a, Mahse, mihringin an hrethiam lo." 
Job33:15 Tui taka mi an muthilha, Khumlaizâwla an mut laiin Mumangah te, inlârnaah te an hnênah thu a sawi ṭhîn." 
Job33:16 An beng chu a tihawng a, A zilhhauna avângin an thlaphâng a." 
Job33:17 Mihring chu a thiltih a ṭhulhtîr a, Chapona lakah a vêng him a." 
Job33:18 Ani chu thlâna liam lo tûr leh, A nunna pawh khandaiha thi lo tûrin a vêng." 
Job33:19 Ani chu natna khumah thunun a ni a, A ruh na pawh a reh thei lo." 
Job33:20 Chaw châkna rêng a nei lo va, Sa tuihnai takte pawh a châk hek lo." 
Job33:21 A chêr êm êm a, Ruh hlîr ruh hlîr a ni." 
Job33:22 Ani chuan mitthi khua a hnaih ta hle a, A nunna chu an lâksak ṭêp a ni." 
Job33:23 A lamṭang tûr Vântirhkoh sâng zînga pakhat tal, Mihring tih tûr dik tak hrilhtu awm teh sela!" 
Job33:24 Amah duhsak takin, “Mitthi khuaah kaltîr teh suh, A tlanna man ka hmu ta e,” ti se." 
Job33:25 A tisa chu lo tuai thar leh sela, A vânglai nite chu lo inher kîr leh rawh se." 
Job33:26 Pathian hnênah a ṭawngṭai ang a, a lo duhsak ang a, Pathian hmêl chu hlim takin a hmu ang a, Chhan chhuah a nih thu chu mite hnênah a puang darh ang." 
Job33:27 “Thil dik ti lovin thil sual ka lo ti ta a, Mahse, ka phu angin ka tuar si lo,” Tiin vântlâng zîngah hla a sa ang." 
Job33:28 Tichuan, mitthi khuaa liam mai tûr a chhanhim a, A nunin khaw êng a hmu leh ta." 
Job33:29 Pathianin hêng thil zawng zawng hi Mihring tân vawi hnih vawi thum a ti ṭhîn. 
Job33:30 Thlân kotlâng aṭangin a nunnate a hruai kîr a, Nun hlimnate a neihtîr ṭhîn." 
Job33:31 E, Joba, ngun takin mi ngaithla teh, Ngawi la, ka han sawi zêl ang e." 
Job33:32 Sawi tûr i nei ve a nih leh mi chhâng la, Eng mah zêp suh, i dikzia hriat ka châk a ni." 
Job33:33 Sawi tûr i nei lo a nih leh mi ngaithla la, Lo ngawi la, finna ka zirtîr ang che." 
Job34:1 Tichuan, Elihua chuan a sawi zêl a," 
Job34:2 Nangni mi fingte u, ka thu ngaithla ula, Nangni mi thiamte u, in beng lo dawh rawh u." 
Job34:3 Kâin tui a hria a, Bengin thu ṭha leh ṭha lo a hria" 
Job34:4 A dik chu thlang ila, Kan tâna ṭha ṭha chu i thlang. tlâng ang u." 
Job34:5 Joba chuan, “Mi ṭha ka ni a, Mahse, Pathianin ka dikna mi hnâwlsak a." 
Job34:6 Ka dik reng chu dawtheiah min puh a, Bawhchhe lo pui tihdam rual lohvin min hliam hi,” a ti a." 
Job34:7 Joba anga mi hmusit chîng Tu nge awm ang le? 
Job34:8 Thil sual titute nên inkâwma, Mi sualte nêna lêng ho ṭhîn chu tu nge?" 
Job34:9 “Pathian tihlâwm tum hi mihring tân Hlâwkna eng mah a awm lo,” a ti vei a." 
Job34:10 Chuvângin, nangni mi fingte u, Pathian chuan thil sual tiin Engkimtitheia chuan thil dik lo a ti teuh lo vang." 
Job34:11 An thiltih ang zêlin mite a thungrûl a, An phu tâwk ang zêlin mi tin a rêlsak dâwn si a." 
Job34:12 Pathianin thil sual a ti hauh lo vang, Engkimtitheia chuan dik lo takin a rêl hek lo vang." 
Job34:13 Tu nge leilungah hian thu neihtîra, Khawvêl pum pui hi kawltîrtu chu?" 
Job34:14 A thlarau chu a lâk kîra, A thaw chu a lâksak chuan," 
Job34:15 Mi zawng zawng hi an boral ang a, Mihring chu vaivutah a kîr leh ang." 
Job34:16 Hriatthiamna i neih chuan hei hi ngaithla la, Ka sawi hi ngaihtuah ngun ang che." 
Job34:17 Thu dik hawtu chuan ro a rêl ang maw? Mi dik leh thiltitheia chu i thiam lo dâwn em ni? 
Job34:18 Ani chuan lal chu, “Tlâktlailopa” a ti a, Mi ropui pawh, “Mi sualpa,” a ti ngam bawk asin." 
Job34:19 Hotute pawh a duhsak bîk lo va, Mi hausa pawh rethei aiin a ngaihsak chuang lo va, A kutchhuak vek an ni." 
Job34:20 Zânlaiah an thi thut a, Pathianin a sawisa a, An boral a, Mi chakte pawh mihring kut hmang lova lâk bo an ni." 
Job34:21 Mihringte awm dân a hmu vek a, An thiltihte a en reng ṭhîn." 
Job34:22 Thilsualtitute bihrûkna tûr Thim chhah tâwk a awm lo. 
Job34:23 Mihring chunga a rorêl hun tûr Pathianin tu mah a ruatsak lo. 
Job34:24 Mi ropuite a titlâwm a, an aiah mi dang a dah a, A tân an chanchin chhui lâwk a ṭûl lo." 
Job34:25 An thiltihte chu a hriat reng avângin Zânah anni chu a paihthla a, a nuai bo." 
Job34:26 An sual avângin Mite mit hmuhah anni chu a hrem a," 
Job34:27 An pên bosan avâng leh A dânte an pawisak loh avângin. 
Job34:28 Pathian hriat khawpin retheite an rûmtîr a, Hnehchhiahte au thâwm chu a lo hre ta." 
Job34:29 A ngawih reng pawhin tu nge dem thei ang? A hmêl a thup laiin tu nge hmu thei? 
Job34:30 Mi mal chungah pawh, hnam chungah pawh, Thuhmun rengin a che. Pathian hre lo mi chuan ro a rêl lohna tûr leh, Mipui an bum lohna tûrin." 
Job34:31 Miin Pathian hnênah hetiangin sawi sela, “Thununna ka tuar a, ka sual zui tawh lo vang," 
Job34:32 Ka hmuh theih loh chu mi zirtîr la, Ka lo tihsual chu ka ti leh tawh ngai lo vang,” ti sela," 
Job34:33 Pathian thiltih i do si a, I duh angin tihtîr i tum em ni? Ka hrilh ang che ni lovin, Nangmah ngeiin thu titlu rawh. I rin dân tak chu han sawi teh." 
Job34:34 Hriatna neite leh mi fingte chuan Ka thu sawi hi an hriatin mi pawmpui ang a," 
Job34:35 “Joba hi eng mah hre lovin a ṭawng mai mai a, A thu-ah hian finna a awm lo,” min tihpui ang." 
Job34:36 Joba thu sawi hi ngaihtuah ngun teh u, Mi sual angin thu a sawi mai mai a ni tih in hre thei ang." 
Job34:37 A sual belhchhahin a hel a, Kan hmuhah hmusit takin Pathian kut a ben khum a, A âng chiam a nih hi." 
Job35:1 Elihua chuan a sawi zêl a," 
Job35:2 “Pathian hmaah mi dik ka ni,” i ti hi A âwm i ti em?" 
Job35:3 “Thil sual ka ti emaw, ti lo emaw I tân eng nge pawi ang a, Ka tân eng nge hlâwkna awm ang?” i ti elo?" 
Job35:4 Ka han chhâng teh ang che, Nang leh i ṭhiante nên." 
Job35:5 Vân lam khi en teh, chhûmte khi thlîr la, Nang aia a sân zâwk khi." 
Job35:6 Thil i tihsual pawhin i tân eng nge pawi? I bawhchhiatna a tam pawhin eng nge a pawina? 
Job35:7 I dik pawhin eng nge i tân a ṭangkaina? I kut aṭangin eng nge a dawn? 
Job35:8 I sualna chuan mihring chauh a ni a khawih, I ṭhatna pawh mihring tân mai a ni." 
Job35:9 Tihduhdahna a nasat chuan mi an rûm a, Mi thiltitheite laka chhan chhuah an ngên." 
Job35:10 Mahse, tu man, “Min siamtu Pathian chu khawiah nge, Zâna hla min saktîrtu chu," 
Job35:11 Leia ramsate aia hriatna thûk zâwk min petu, Chunglêng savate aia finga min siamtu chu?” an ti ngai lo." 
Job35:12 Chuvâng alâwm, miten Pathian chu au mah se a chhân loh, Mi sualte chapona avâng chuan," 
Job35:13 “Pathianin dîlna a chhâng lo, Engkimtitheian a ngaihsak hek lo,” Tih hi a va ho tak êm!" 
Job35:14 “Ani chu ka hmu thei lo,” i ti na a, Nghâk fan fan rawh, I chungthu chu ngaihtuah tûrin a hmaah a awm e." 
Job35:15 Tûnah, thinrimin a rawn hrem mai loh avâng leh, Sualna a rawn ngaimawh mai loh avângin" 
Job35:16 Joba hian a kâ a âng mai mai a, Eng mah hre lovin a ṭawng mai mai a nih hi." 
Job36:1 Elihua chuan a sawi zêl a: 
Job36:2 Rei lo tê tal min ngaithla la, ka han hrilh ang che. Pathian hmingin sawi tûr ka la nei cheu a ni." 
Job36:3 Ka hriatna ka han fawmkhâwm vek teh ang, Mi siamtu dikzia chu ka târlang dâwn e." 
Job36:4 Ka thu sawi hi dâwt a ni lo tih hre rawh, Hriatna kawnga mi puitling i kiangah a awm reng hi." 
Job36:5 Pathian chu a chak a, tu mah a hmusit lo, Engkim a hre vek a ni." 
Job36:6 Mi suaksualte a zuah lo va, Hnehchhiahte dik takin ro a rêlsak ṭhîn." 
Job36:7 Lalṭhutthlêngah lal angin a ṭhuttîr a. 
Job36:8 Mahse, miten kawl an bun a, Hnehchhiahna hruia phuar an lo nih chuan" 
Job36:9 An thil tih leh an bawhchhiatna a hriattîr a, An lo chapo ṭhinzia te nên." 
Job36:10 A zilhna ngaithla tûrin a hrilh a, An sual sim tûrin thu a pe." 
Job36:11 Thu awih taka a rawng an bâwl chuan, An damchhûng chu hmuingîl takin an awm ang a, Nuamsa takin an awm bawk ang." 
Job36:12 An ngaihthlâk loh erawh chuan khandaiha thah an ni ang. Tu ma hriat hlawh lovin an thi ang. 
Job36:13 Pathian zah lote chu an thinur ṭeuh reng a, A hrem lai pawhin ṭanpui dîlin an au duh lo." 
Job36:14 An vânglai takin an thi ang a, Mualpho takin an boral ang." 
Job36:15 Tuarna hmangin Pathianin mi a zirtîr a, Harsatnain an beng a tihvârsak ṭhîn." 
Job36:16 Ani chuan manganna hmun ata a hruai chhuak che a, Hmun thâwl takah thawveng takin a awmtîr che, Thil tui tinrêng a hlui ta che a ni." 
Job36:17 Mahse, nang chuan i sual man i tuar ta a, Dik taka rorêlsak i nih tâk hi." 
Job36:18 Hausak châknain hruai bo che suh se, Thamna tam tak avângin bumin awm suh." 
Job36:19 I hausakna leh i chakna zawng zawng chu I mangan loh phah dâwn em ni? 
Job36:20 Zân chu nghâkhlel suh, mite an awmna hmuna an boral hun a ni." 
Job36:21 Sual lam âwn lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh, Thil sual i tih loh nân a ni hrehawm i tuar hi." 
Job36:22 Ngai teh, Pathian chu thiltithei chungchuang a ni, Zirtîrtu ropui ber a ni." 
Job36:23 Tu nge a thil tih dân tûr ruahmansaka, “I ti dik lo a ni,” ti thei le?" 
Job36:24 A thiltih ropui tak hi hre reng la, Miten fakna hlain an chawimawi ṭhîn a ni." 
Job36:25 Mi tinin chu chu an en a, Hla tak aṭang chauhvin an thlîr ta ṭhîn." 
Job36:26 Pathian ropuizia hi kan hre sêng lo a ni, Engtia upa nge a nih chhui chhuah rual a ni lo." 
Job36:27 Tui mal far tê tê chu a hîp chho va, Tui hu chu ruahtui thiangah a chantîr a." 
Job36:28 Vân aṭangin a sûrtîr a, Mihring tân a sûrtîr buan buan ṭhîn." 
Job36:29 Chhûm insemdarh dânte hi mihringin a hre thei em? A awmna hmun ata khawpui a rîktîr dur dur dânte hi? 
Job36:30 Ngai teh, chung lamah khian kâwl a phettîr zawr zawr a, Tuifinriat mawngte chu a thim tlat si." 
Job36:31 Hêng hi hnamte rem a ruatsak dân a ni. Tichuan, ei tûr tam tak a pe a ni." 
Job36:32 Ṭêk chu a hûm reng a, A tum tak fuh tûrin a tlâktîr ṭhîn." 
Job36:33 Khawpui ri hum hum chuan thlipui lo thleng tûr a entîr a, Ran rualte pawhin a lo hnaih tawhzia an hria." 
Job37:1 Hei vâng hian ka khûr a, Ka thin a phu hlawp hlawp a ni." 
Job37:2 Ngun takin ngaithla teh, a awrâwl ri hum hum te, A ka aṭanga thâwm nasa tak lo chhuakte chu," 
Job37:3 Vân hnuai hmun tinah kâwl a phêttîr a, Leilung hmun tin a fang chhuak a." 
Job37:4 A hnuah chuan a awrâwl a chhuah a, A aw ropui tak chu a ri hum hum a. Kâwl a phe zawr zawr reng bawk a." 
Job37:5 Pathian chuan mak takin khawpui a tiri a, Thil ropui tak, kan hriatthiam phâk loh a ti a ni." 
Job37:6 Vûr hnênah, “Leiah tla rawh,” a ti a, Chutiangin ruahpuivânâwn hnênah, “Sûr buan buan rawh,” a ti a." 
Job37:7 Mi tinrêng kut a chelhsak a, Ama tih a ni tih mi zawng zawngin an hriat nân." 
Job37:8 Tichuan, ramsaten bihrûkna an zawng a, An chênna pûkah te an tawm reng mai." 
Job37:9 Chhim lam aṭangin thlipui a lo thawk a, Hmâr lam aṭangin thli vâwt a lo tleh a." 
Job37:10 Pathian thaw chuan vûr tlang a siam a, Tuipui zau tak tak pawh a tikhang ṭhîn." 
Job37:11 Chhûm chhahpui chu tui a paitîr a, Chhûm zîngah chuan kâwl a phêttîr a," 
Job37:12 A thupêk angin an de zawr zawr a, Khawvêl pum puiah a thu angin thil an ti zêl a ni." 
Job37:13 Mihring hrem nân emaw, leilung tihṭhat nân emaw A duhsakna lantîr nân emaw chûng chu a hmang fo ṭhîn." 
Job37:14 Joba, hei hi lo ngaithla teh, Beng sikin Pathian thil tih makte chu ngaihtuah teh," 
Job37:15 Pathianin chhûm a thunun dân leh kâwl a phêttîr dân hi i hria em ni? 
Job37:16 Khua a dur dân te, Hriatna famkim neitu thil tih makte hi i hre pha em?" 
Job37:17 Chhim thli lum a lo tleh a, I kawrte chu i thlanin a huh zo ṭhîn." 
Job37:18 Ani angin vân i kaipharh thei em ni? Ngên tlang anga khauh chu? 
Job37:19 A hmaa kan sawi tûr chu min hrilh rawh le, Thimin min tuam a, sawi tûr ahleih kan hriat loh hi." 
Job37:20 Kei chuan a hnêna thu sawi ka ngam lo vang, Min tihchhiat theihna kawng ka siam dâwn lo." 
Job37:21 Tûnah vâna êng khi a tle sur a, A ên êm avângin kan en ngam lo. Thliin vân chu a chhêm veng ta si a." 
Job37:22 Hmâr lamah mawi takin a lo êng a, Pathian chu ropui râpthlâk takin a lo kal." 
Job37:23 Engkimtitheia, hriat phâk lohva chu a ropui êm êm a, Dik takin ro a rêl a, hleih a nei lo. Tu mah a hnehchhiah lo." 
Job37:24 Chuvângin, miten amah an ṭih a, Intifingte erawh chu tu mah a pawisa lo." 
Job38:1 Tin, Lalpa chuan thlipui aṭangin Joba chu heti hian a chhâng a:" 
Job38:2 Eng mah hre si lovin engtizia nge ka remruat i sawi nawi? 
Job38:3 Mipa takin i puan ven sawi chhîng la, Thu ka zâwt ang che a, mi chhâng ang che." 
Job38:4 Leilung nghahchhan ka phûm lai khân khawiah nge i awm? I hriat takmeuh chuan han sawi teh. 
Job38:5 A len dân tûrte tu nge ruahman i hre meuh maw? A nih leh, a zauzâwng tu nge ruat?" 
Job38:6 Eng chungah nge a innghaha, Tu nge a kil lung phûmtu chu?" 
Job38:7 Zîng lam arsite an kal dual dual a, Pathian fate hlim taka an au kha." 
Job38:8 Tuipui chu a awmna ata A lo len dûl dûl lai chuan tu nge lo dang chat? 
Job38:9 A silhfên atân chhûm ka siam a, Thim chhah takin ka tuam a." 
Job38:10 A chîm chin tûrte ka ruat a, A danna leh khârna tûrte nên." 
Job38:11 “Heti thleng chauh hi lo kal la, pêl hauh suh, Hetah hian i fâwn vêl tâwp rawh se,” ka ti a." 
Job38:12 I pian chinah khua vâr tûrin thu i pe ngai em? A vâr ṭanna hmun tûr i hrilh ngai em? 
Job38:13 Lei chungah khua vârtîrin An bihrûkna ata mi sualte chu i lailang ngai em? 
Job38:14 Khaw êngah chuan leia tlâng leh ruamte a lang fiah a, Puan angin a ze chân buai mai." 
Job38:15 Mi sualte tân khaw lo êng chu a êng lutuk a, Pawi rêng an khawih ngam lo." 
Job38:16 Tuipui lo irh chhuahna hnâr i tlawh tawh em? Li mawng thûk laite i dai tawh em? 
Job38:17 Mitthi khaw luhna leh thim mup luhna kawngka chu I hmu tawh ngai em ni? 
Job38:18 Lei zauziate hi i hre phâk em? I hriat chuan han sawi teh," 
Job38:19 Êng awmna in kawng chu khawiah nge? Khawiah nge thim chu a awm ṭhin? 
Job38:20 An kalna tûr thlenga hruaiin An in lamah i hruai hâwng leh thei em? 
Job38:21 I hria ang chu! Chûngah chuan i piang tawh a, I upat tawh êm hi!" 
Job38:22 Vûr dahkhâwmna i tlawh tawh em? Rial kal khâwmna in pawh i hmu tawh em ni? 
Job38:23 Buai hun atânte leh indo leh inbeih nia hman atân Chûng chu ka khêk a ni lâwm ni? 
Job38:24 Êng hi engtizia nge a ṭaidarha, Khawchhak thli pawh lei chunga a insem darh le?" 
Job38:25 Tu nge tuihâwk luanna kawrte sial a, ṭêk kalkawng siam le?" 
Job38:26 Mihring chên lohna ram leh thlalêr, Mi awm lohna hmunah tu nge ruah sûrtîra," 
Job38:27 Ram ro leh pilril tihnâwnga, Hnimhringte tu nge ṭotîr?" 
Job38:28 Ruahin pa a nei em ni? Daifîm hi tu hrin nge? 
Job38:29 Tu chhûl aṭangin nge vûr a lo chhuah? Vân aṭanga vûr lo tla ṭhîn hi tu hrin nge? 
Job38:30 Tui khalte chu lung ang maiin a sak a, Tuithûkpui chungte pawh a khal a." 
Job38:31 Siruk hi i phuar khâwm theiin Chhohreivûng khi i phelh darh thei em ni? 
Job38:32 Arsite khi a hun takah i chhuahtîr theiin Zângkhua leh a bâwmtute khi i hruai thei em? 
Job38:33 Chung lam vân awm dânte khi i hria em? Leiah hian an dânte chu i chhawr thei em? 
Job38:34 Nan tûr chein, ruahpuivânâwn, Chhûm aṭangin i ko thla thei em?" 
Job38:35 Kâwlphete chu i hnêna lo kal tûra thu pein “Heta hi ka awm,” an rawn ti dâwn em ni?" 
Job38:36 Tuivalawngin engtin nge lui lian tûr a hriat? Arpa pawhin khaw chêng tûr engtin nge a hriat? 
Job38:37 Tu nge chhûmte fawm khâwm thiama, Vân tuizêmte leihbaw thei?" 
Job38:38 Vaivutte a inhlâwm khâwma, Lei tlangte a inbelhbawm hi?" 
Job38:39 Sakeibakneipui chaw i zawnsakin A no hruaite kham khawp chaw i pe thei em ni? 
Job38:40 An pûkahte an bawk a, Seh tûr châng laite chu?" 
Job38:41 Choak chaw zawng vâk vêl te, An noten chaw dîla Pathian hnêna an hrâmte hian Tu nge ei tûr pe?" 
Job39:1 Sathâr no neih hun i hria em? Sazuk no nei lai i hmu em ni? 
Job39:2 An pai chhûng thla zât chhiarin an hrin hunte i hria em? 
Job39:3 An bawk a, nau an vei a, An hring mai ṭhîn." 
Job39:4 An note chu an pian a tlang a, Ramhnuaia ṭhang lianin an tla hrang a, An puite hnênah an kîr leh tawh lo." 
Job39:5 Ram sabengtung chu tu nge sezâwl chhuah? A duh duhin tu nge tlattîr? 
Job39:6 An awm nân thlalêr ka ruatsak a, Chên nân chi tamna ram." 
Job39:7 Khawpui hulûm engah mah a ngai lo va, Tu man an khawi ngamin an chhawr ngai lo." 
Job39:8 A tlatna chu tlângpui dung a ni a, Hnimhring peh tûr a zawng zêl ṭhîn." 
Job39:9 Sele-pa chu i chhawr thei dâwn em ni? I ran inah a riak duh meuh ang maw? 
Job39:10 Lei let tûrin hrui i bahtîr thei ang em? I hnungah a ruam lai a rawn hrût rual ang maw? 
Job39:11 A chak êm avângin a tha chu rinpuiah i hmangin I hna hahthlâk a kovah i nghat thei dâwn em ni? 
Job39:12 I buh i sengtîr thei dâwn em ni? I hruiha buh a khungsak ang che maw? 
Job39:13 Ostrich chuan nasa takin a thla a zâp thei a, Mahse, kânghlai angin a thlâwk thei lo." 
Job39:14 Leiah a tui a phûm a, Vaivut chuan a khuh lum a." 
Job39:15 Miin an rap keh thei a, Ramsaten an chîl keh thei tih a dâwn pha lo." 
Job39:16 A no ni lo ang hrimin a ngaihsak lo va, A hahpuina chu thlâwn mah se pawi a ti lo." 
Job39:17 Pathianin finna a pe lo va, Hriatthiamna a pêk hek loh avângin." 
Job39:18 Tlân tûra a han intihpuk meuh chuan, Sakawr leh a chungchuangte pawh a thamlo." 
Job39:19 Sakawr hi i tihchak em ni? A tuang hi i siamsak a ni a maw? 
Job39:20 Khau anga kat tûrin i siam em ni? A hnâr tum dur durte hi a hlauhawm a nia. 
Job39:21 Ruamah a ke phiatin a inhrosa a, Indona hmunah a tlân lût ṭhîn." 
Job39:22 Hlauh rêng a nei lo va, a zâm ngai lo, Khandaih lakah a tîm ngai bawk hek lo." 
Job39:23 A chungah thal bâwm a ri rawk rawk a, Fei leh thal a tle zawr zawr mai." 
Job39:24 Thatho takin a lîm puat puat a, Tawtawrâwt thâwmah a zauthau va, A awm hle hle thei lo." 
Job39:25 Tawtawrâwt a rîk phawt chuan a hnâr a tum a, Indo thâwm chu hla tak aṭangin a hre thei, Hotute au leh an haw haw chu." 
Job39:26 Vân sânga mu thlâwkte khi i zirtîr em ni? Chhim lam hawia an thla an zârte hi? 
Job39:27 I thupêkin em ni muvânlai a invânvawrha, Sâng taka bu a chheh?" 
Job39:28 Khâmahte a chêng a, Lungpui kehkâr hmun himahte a riak ṭhîn." 
Job39:29 Chuta ṭang chuan ei tûr a mitmei a, hla tak tak a hmu phâk a ni." 
Job39:30 A notê pawhin thisen an dâwt a, Saruang awmnaah an awm khâwm ṭhîn." 
Job40:1 Lalpa chuan Joba hnênah," 
Job40:2 “Sawisêltu, Engkimtitheia chu i hnial ang maw? Pathian hnialtu, i chhâng zêl dâwn em ni?” a ti a." 
Job40:3 Tichuan, Joba chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a:" 
Job40:4 “Kei mi tlâktlailo tak hian Engtin nge ka chhân theih ang che? Ka kâ ka hup mai a ni. 
Job40:5 Vawi khat ka sawi tawh a, ka chhâng tawh lo vang che, A ni, ka sawi nawn dâwn tawh lo.”" 
Job40:6 Lalpa chuan thlipui aṭangin Joba chu a chhâng a: 
Job40:7 Mipa takin i puanven sawi chhîng la, Thu ka zâwt ang che a, mi chhâng ang che." 
Job40:8 Ti dik lovah min puh dâwn em ni? Thiam i chan theih nân Thiam loh min chantîr dâwn em ni? 
Job40:9 Pathian angin i chak em ni? A aw anga ring aw i nei em ni? 
Job40:10 Chuti a nih chuan intiropuiin intizahawm la, Mawi tak leh ropui takin inthuam rawh." 
Job40:11 Mi chapote chu en la, An chungah i thinur nasa tak chu leih rawh." 
Job40:12 Mi chapote chu en bîkin titlâwm la, Mi sualte chu an awmhmunah rap hrep ang che." 
Job40:13 An vaiin leiah phûm khâwm la, Thlânah an hmaite tuam ang che." 
Job40:14 Tichuan, i kut ding lamin mahni i inchhan thei tih Kei pawh hian ka hria ang." 
Job40:15 En teh, Behemot hi, nangmah ang bawka Ka kutchhuak a nih hi. Bâwng angin hnimhnah a ei ṭhîn." 
Job40:16 A chakna chu a kâwngah a awm a, A thahrui chu a dul thuarah." 
Job40:17 A mei chu sidar thing angin a tikhauh va, A malpui thate pawh a phiar tlat mai." 
Job40:18 A ruhte chu ngên kawrawng anga khauh a ni a, A kête pawh thîr tlâwn ang mai a ni." 
Job40:19 Pathian thil siam zîngah a pui ber a, A siamtu chauhvin khandaihin a vau bet thei." 
Job40:20 Tlângah te a peh tûr hnim a ṭo va, Tah chuan, ram sakawlhte an tualchai ṭhîn." 
Job40:21 Lotus hlîngnei buk hnuaiah a bawk a, Phairuang dûm zîngahte a biru ṭhîn." 
Job40:22 Lotus buk chuan a hliah a, Lui kam tuipuisuthlah chuan a zâr hlim." 
Job40:23 Tui lian so bulh bulh chu a hlau lo va, A ka chîm khawpin Jordan lian mah se a pawisa lo." 
Job40:24 A mit tuamin tu nge man thei ang? A hnârah tu nge thil tlang thei ang? 
Job41:1 Nghakuaiin Leviathan i âwk thei em ni? Hruihrualin a lei i phuar thei em? 
Job41:2 A hnârah hrui i thil tlang thei em? Thîr kawmin a khabe-ah i thil thei em? 
Job41:3 Khawngaih a dîl dâwn che em ni? Hawihhâwm takin a bia ang che maw? 
Job41:4 Dam chhûnga i chhiahhlawha awm tûrin Thu a thlunpui ang che maw? 
Job41:5 Sava angin i khawi ngam thei ang em? I fanute chaih atân i hlîng thei ang em? 
Job41:6 Sangha mantuten indâwr nân an hmang em ni? Sumdâwngtuten lei atân an chan darh dâwn em ni? 
Job41:7 A vunah feikibâr te, a lu-ah nghafei te I riah thei em ni?" 
Job41:8 A chungah kut han thlâk teh rêng, A hlauhawmzia i hria ang a, I ti leh tawh ngai lo vang." 
Job41:9 Ani tihtlâwm tum chu beidawnthlâk tak a ni, A hmêl mai pawh a râpthlâk êm a ni." 
Job41:10 Amah cho tho tûrin tu mah huai tâwk an awm lo, Chuti a nih si chuan tu nge min do ngam ang?" 
Job41:11 Tu nge ka rulh leh tûra thil min pe hmasa? Vân hnuaia thil engkim hi ka ta asin. 
Job41:12 Leviathan fuke chu ka han sawi zêl teh ang, A chakzia leh a pian thiamzia te nên." 
Job41:13 Tu nge a vun pâwnlâng pawt hîk thei ang? Tu nge a vunpui tipawp thei ang? 
Job41:14 Tu nge a kâ keu ânga, A ha kual kulh hlauhawm tak chu keu lang ngam ang?" 
Job41:15 A phuhlip inthuah tup chu a chhuan ber a ni, A insi phui tlat a, lung ang maia sak a ni." 
Job41:16 A insîk phui tlat avângin A kârah boruak pawh a lût thei lo. 
Job41:17 A inzawm a, a inchâr tlat a, Kaih ṭhen theih a ni lo." 
Job41:18 A hahchhiau chuan êng a phuh chhuak a, A mitte chu khawfîngchat ang rû a ni." 
Job41:19 A kâ aṭangin mei alh a chhuak a, Meisîte a ṭêk ur ur a." 
Job41:20 A hnâr aṭang chuan meikhu a lo chhuak a, Sa so bêl nghawr leh phairuang mût ang vut vut a ni." 
Job41:21 Meihawl a chhêm vâm a, A kâ aṭangin meialh a lo chhuak a." 
Job41:22 A nghâwng tha chu a chak êm a, A tawk apiang hlauvin an khûr." 
Job41:23 A vunah nêm lai rêng a awm lo va, Thîr anga sak a ni, vih pawh rual a ni lo." 
Job41:24 A thinlung chu thîr anga sak a ni, Râwtsawmna lung hnuai zâwk anga chang hi." 
Job41:25 A lo thawh meuh chuan mi chakte pawh an khûr a, An hlau va, an thla a bâr zo va." 
Job41:26 Khandaihin sât mah se, pem pawh a pem lo vang, fei te, thal te, feiṭam te chuan a chhun thei lo." 
Job41:27 Thîrte chu buhpâwl ang lekah a ngai a, Ngênte pawh thing mawih angah." 
Job41:28 Thal hlauvin a tlânchhe ngai lo va, Sairawkherha perh pawh favaia theh ang a ni." 
Job41:29 Talhtum chu buhpâwl ang lekin a ngai a, Thal ri rawk rawk pawh a thamlo." 
Job41:30 A dul phuhlip chu lampei anga hriam a ni a, Mawiin lei a hrût angin chirhdiak zîngah a tâl vêl a." 
Job41:31 Tui thûk tak chu bêl angin a tiso buah buah a, Tuipui chu bêlte angin a tiphûl." 
Job41:32 A kalna chu a vâr ruah a, Tuipui phuan vâr emaw an ti." 
Job41:33 Leiah hian amah ang rêng an awm lo va, Eng mah hlauh nei lova siam a ni." 
Job41:34 Ramsa ngêng tak takte chu a thamlo va, Inluling tak takte chungah a lêng a ni." 
Job42:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a:" 
Job42:2 “Engkim i tithei tih ka hria, I tum chu dâl rual a ni lo." 
Job42:3 Eng mah hre si lo hian engtizia nge I remruat hi ka lo sawisêl mai le! Ka hriatthiam lohte chu ka lo sawi a ni, Ka hriat phâk loh, ka tâna mak lutukte chu." 
Job42:4 I sawi ngaithla tûr leh I zawhna chhâng tûrin min ti a," 
Job42:5 Mi sawi aṭang chauhvin ka lo hria che a, Mahse, tûnah zawng ka mit ngeiin ka hmu ta che a ni." 
Job42:6 Chuvâng tak chuan ka inten a, Vut leh vaivuta ṭhuin ka sim ta e,” a ti a." 
Job42:7 Tin, Lalpa chuan Joba hnêna hêng thu hi a sawi zawhin, Elifaza, Teman mi hnênah, “I chungah leh i ṭhian pahnihte chungah ka thin a ur hle a ni. Ka chhiahhlawh Joba angin ka chungchâng thu dik takin in sawi si lo." 
Job42:8 Tichuan, bâwngpa pasarih leh berâmpa pasarih keng ula, ka chhiahhlawh Joba hnênah va kal ula, in tân hâlral thilhlan va hlân rawh u. Tin, ka chhiahhlawh Joba chuan a ṭawngṭaisak ang che u a, a dîl angin ka lo pawmsak ang a, in âtzia ang zêl chuan ka thungrûl lo vang che u, ka chhiahhlawh Joba angin ka chungchâng thu dik takin in sawi si lo va,” a ti a." 
Job42:9 Tichuan, Elifaza, Teman mi te, Bildada, Sua mi te, Zofara, Naama mi te chu an va kal a, Lalpa thupêk ang zêl chuan an ti a. Tin, Lalpa chuan Joba dîlna chu a ngaithla a." 
Job42:10 Joban a ṭhiante a ṭawngṭaisak hnuin Lalpa chuan Joba chu a tiṭha a, a hmaa a neih lêt hnih a pe leh ta a." 
Job42:11 Tin, a unaute leh a farnu zawng zawngte, tûn hmaa a hmêlhriat zawng zawngte chu a hnênah an lo kal a; a inah chawhlui an kîl ho va. Lalpa chuan a chunga thil ṭha lo a thlentîr avângte chuan pawi an tihzia an hrilh a, an thlamuan a. Mite chuan tangkaraw tlang te, rangkachak zungbunte an pe ṭheuh va." 
Job42:12 Lalpa chuan Joba hun hnuhnûng chu a hun hmasa aiin nasa takin mal a sâwm a. Berâm sîngkhat leh sângli, sanghâwngsei sângruk, bâwng tuak sângkhat, sabengtungpui sângkhat a nei a." 
Job42:13 Fapa pasarih leh fanu pathum a nei bawk a. 
Job42:14 A fanu upa ber hmingah Jemimai a sa a, a dawttu hmingah Keziaii, a pathumna hmingah Keren-hapuki a sa ta bawk a." 
Job42:15 Ram zawng zawngah pawh Joba fanute anga nula hmêlṭha an awm lo. An pa chuan anni chu an nuṭate nên ro chan tûr a siamsak ṭheuh va. 
Job42:16 Hemi hnu hian Joba chu a dam zêl a, kum za leh sawmli a dam a ni. A fapa te, a tupa te, chhuan li thlengin a hmu phâk a," 
Job42:17 Joba chu upa tak, tarkûna damin a thi ta a." 
Psalms1:1 Mi suaksual thurâwnna lam ngaithla duh lo va, Mi sualte tih dân pawh la duh lo va, Lalpa hmusittute zînga tel duh ngai lo mi chu a nihlawh e." 
Psalms1:2 A lâwmzâwng chu Lalpa dân zawm a ni a, A dân thu chu a chhûn a zânin a ngaihtuah ṭhîn." 
Psalms1:3 Ani chu lui kama thing phun, A hun taka rah ṭhîn, A hnah vuai ngai lo ang hi a ni a, A thiltih apiangah a hmuingîl zêl ang." 
Psalms1:4 Mi suaksualte erawh chu chutiang an ni lo va, Thliin a len bo buhsi ang hi an ni." 
Psalms1:5 Chuvângin, mi suaksualte chu rorêlnaah chuan an ding zo lo vang a, Mi dikte zîngah chuan mi sualte chu an tel thei hek lo vang." 
Psalms1:6 Lalpa chuan mi dikte chu a hum ṭhîn a. Mi suaksualte erawh chu an boral ang. 
Psalms2:1 Engati nge hnamte chu an pun khâwm chiama, Miten thil sâwt lo chu a rûka an ngaihtuah ṭhin?" 
Psalms2:2 Lalpa leh a hriakthiha dovin Lei lalte chu an inhâwrkhâwma, Thuneitute pawh an inrâwn khâwm a?" 
Psalms2:3 “Min phuarna hrui hi i tichat ang u khai, An hruihrual kan bah hi i paih daih ang u,” tiin." 
Psalms2:4 Vâna ṭhu-a chuan a nuihsan a, Lalpa chuan anni chu a nuihzatbûr a." 
Psalms2:5 Chutichuan, thinurin an hnênah thu a sawi a, A thinrimna chuan a tihlau va." 
Psalms2:6 “Keimah ngeiin ka tlâng thianghlim Zion-ah chuan, Ka lal thlan chu ka ṭhuttîr ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Psalms2:7 Lalpa thupêk chu ka puang teh ang, “Ka Fapa i ni e, Vawiinah hian Fa-ah ka nei ta che." 
Psalms2:8 I duh apiang dîl la, ka pe ang che, Hnamte pawh hi i rochan an ni ang a, Lei pum pui hi i ta tûr a ni bawk ang." 
Psalms2:9 Lei lalte chu thîrtiangin i vaw darh ang a, Hlumbêl angin i sawh keh sawm bawk ang,” a ti a." 
Psalms2:10 Lei lalte u, fîmkhur rawh u, Rorêltute u, zilhna pawisa rawh u." 
Psalms2:11 Ṭih chungin Lalpa rawng bâwl ula, Khûr chungin a hmaah kûn rawh u." 
Psalms2:12 Fapa hi lâwm ula, chutilo chuan a thinur ang a, A tiboral hlauh dah ang che u, Amaha himna zawngte chu an nihlawh e." 
Psalms3:1 Aw Lalpa, ka hmêlmate an pung chakin, Min eptute chu an va tam ta êm!" 
Psalms3:2 “Pathianin a chhan hauh lo vang,” Min titu an va tam êm!" 
Psalms3:3 Lalpa, nang chu kumkhuain ka phaw i ni a, Ka lu hi i chawisâng ṭhîn a, Min tiropuitu chu i ni." 
Psalms3:4 Awrâwl chhuaha Lalpa ka han auh chuan, A tlâng thianghlim aṭangin min lo chhâng ṭhîn." 
Psalms3:5 Ka han mu a, ka muhîl a, Ka han harh leh a, Lalpa chuan min lo chelh reng ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms3:6 Min hmusittute tam hle mah se, Ka hlau hlek lo vang."
