Psalms55:2 Mi ngaihven la, min chhâng ang che, Manganga vân ruaiin ka rûm ka rûm a ni:" 
Psalms55:3 Ka hmêlmate thâwm avâng leh Mi suaksualte min nêkchêpna avângin. Min tibuai ta si a, An thinur a, min hua a ni." 
Psalms55:4 Ka thin a phu dêp dêp a, Thih ka hlau reng a ni." 
Psalms55:5 Ka thauvah min man a, ka khûr zawih zawih ta a, Ka chechâng thei ta lo." 
Psalms55:6 “Ṭhuro angin thla nei ila, Hahchawlhna tûr zawngin ka thlâwk daih ang." 
Psalms55:7 Ram hla takah ka thlâwk ang a, Thlalêr hmunah ka awm daih ang." 
Psalms55:8 Thlipui ruahpui laka himna panin ka kal sawk sawk tûr,” ka ti." 
Psalms55:9 Lalpa, an ṭawng tihbuaisak rawh, Khawpuiah hian khawlohna leh innghirnghona, Ka hmu ṭeuh si." 
Psalms55:10 Chhûn zân zawmin an vâk vêl a, Kulh vêngtute zîngah bawhchhiatna leh buaina a khat." 
Psalms55:11 Khawpui chhûngah suahsualna a tam a, Kawtthlêr zau laiah lah inpâwngnêkna leh Inbumnate a reh hek lo." 
Psalms55:12 Ka hmêlmaten min nuihzat chu ni se, Ka tuar thiam ang. Min hawtute ka chunga inlek chu ni se, Ka bihrûksan thei ang." 
Psalms55:13 Mahse, nangmah i lo ni reng si a, Keimah ang maia ka ngaih, ka ṭhian ka kawmngeih tak," 
Psalms55:14 Tui taka ka titipui ṭhin, Mipui ruala Pathian ina ka lawipui ṭhin kha." 
Psalms55:15 Hmêlmate chu a hun hmain thi se, A nung chungin Seol-ah chhuk rawh se. An inah leh an zîngah chuan sualna a châm tlat si." 
Psalms55:16 Kei erawh chuan Pathian ka au vang a, Lalpan min chhandam ang." 
Psalms55:17 Tûk tin, tlai tin, chhûn laiah pawh, Ka chau rûm thâwm a thleng chho va, Ka aw a hre ngei ang." 
Psalms55:18 Min beitute lakah min chhanhim a, An tam hle chungin." 
Psalms55:19 Hmasâng ata rorêltu Pathian chuan, A hria ang a, a titlâwm ang, An lamlêt duh lo va, Pathian an ṭih hek lo." 
Psalms55:20 Inrem taka a awmpui chungah chuan A kut a thawh ṭhîn a, An thuthlun chu a bawhchhe ṭhîn." 
Psalms55:21 Hnutetui ang maiin a kam chhuak chu a thlum a, Insual peih reng thinlung a pu si, A thuchhuak chu hriak ang maiin a tlawr a, Khandaih hriam tak ang a ni si." 
Psalms55:22 Lalpa chungah i phurrit chu nghat la, Anin a chhâwk ang che, Mi dikte chu an nghîn a phal lo vang." 
Psalms55:23 Aw Pathian, khuarkhurum thûkah chuan chhuktîr ang che, Thisen chhuah chîngte leh dâwt hehte chu, An dam tûr chanve pawh an dam lo vang, Kei erawh chu, nangmahah chuan ka innghat ang." 
Psalms56:1 Aw Pathian, min khawngaih rawh, Miten min veh min veh mai a, Min dotuten min zim reng hi!" 
Psalms56:2 Min beituten min veh nilêng ṭhîn a, Aw Chungnungber, an va tam êm!" 
Psalms56:3 Ka thla a phân laiin Kei chuan ka ring ṭhîn che. 
Psalms56:4 Pathian thu chu ka chhuang ang a, Pathian chu ka ring a, ka hlau lo vang, Mihringte chuan eng nge min tih theih ang?" 
Psalms56:5 Ka chungthu-ah an inrawlh châmchi a, Ka chhiatna tûr an ngaihtuah ṭhîn." 
Psalms56:6 Hmun kilkhâwrah an inhâwr khâwm ṭhîn a, Ka hnu an chhui ru a, min thah an tum." 
Psalms56:7 An khawlohna avângin chhan chhuah an ni ang maw? Aw Pathian, chûng mite chu thinurin tudawl ang che." 
Psalms56:8 Ka vahvaih zinzia hi i hre vek a, Ka mittui luangte pawh i chhinchhiah a, I lehkhabu-ah chuan ziak vek a ni lâwm ni?" 
Psalms56:9 Ka koh hun che chuan ka hmêlmate an tlânchhia ang, Pathian chu ka lama ṭang a nih ka hre si a." 
Psalms56:10 Pathian thu chu ka chhuang ang a, Lalpa thu chu ka chhuang bawk ang." 
Psalms56:11 Pathian chu ka ring a, ka hlau lo vang, Mihring maiin eng nge min tih theih ang?" 
Psalms56:12 Aw Pathian, i hnêna ka thutiam chu ka hlen ang a, Lâwmthu sawi inthawina ka hlân ang che." 
Psalms56:13 Thihna lakah min chhan chhuak a, Ka kête lung chhuih bah palh lakah min vêng, Tichuan, Pathian hmaah ka lêng thei a, Mi nungte êngah chuan." 
Psalms57:1 Aw Pathian, min khawngaih rawh, min khawngaih rawh, I hnên ka rawn pan a, I thla hnuai hlimah chuan ka lo bi ang, Thil ṭha lo hi a kian hma chu." 
Psalms57:2 Pathian Chungnungbera chu ka au. Engkim min tihsak ṭhîntu Pathian chu. 
Psalms57:3 Vân aṭangin min chhâng ang a, min chhandam ang, Min vehtute hmuhsitna ata chu, Pathianin a rinawmna leh ngilneihna A rawn lantîr ngei ang." 
Psalms57:4 Sakei zînga awm ang ka ni, Ka chunga thinrimte zînga ka chên hi, An hâte chu fei leh thal anga hriam a ni, An leite lah khandaih hriam tak ang hi a ni." 
Psalms57:5 Vânahte khian i ropuizia han tilang la, Aw Pathian, lei pumah hian tilang ang che." 
Psalms57:6 Ka awh nân lên an zâr duai a, Ka mangang êm êm mai, Ka kalkhânah hum an lai a, Anmahni ngei an tla ta zâwk." 
Psalms57:7 Ka ring tlat che a ni, aw Pathian, ka ring tlat che, Hla ka sa ang, a ni, i fak hla ka sa ang." 
Psalms57:8 Ka nunna hi ṭhangharh sela, Ṭingṭang leh khuang te u, inpeih rawh u, Khua i han au vâr teh ang." 
Psalms57:9 Lalpa, i mite zîngah chuan ka fak ang che, Mipui zîngah i fak hla ka sa ang." 
Psalms57:10 I ngilneihna chuan vân a tawng a, I thutak chuan vân khi a thleng si a." 
Psalms57:11 Vânahte khian i ropuizia han tilang la, Aw Pathian, leiah pawh hian tilang ang che." 
Psalms58:1 Hotute u, thu dik in sawimeuh maw? Mite chungah dik takin ro in rêl em?" 
Psalms58:2 Thil ṭha lo tih tûr ngawt in ngaihtuah thung si a, Ka ram hi pâwngnêknain in tikhat." 
Psalms58:3 Pum chhûng aṭang rêngin mi sualte chu an hel sa a, An pian tirh aṭangin dâwt lamah an thle daih tawh a ni." 
Psalms58:4 Rûl angin tûr an nei ṭeuh va, Chawngkawr bengngawng ang hi an ni," 
Psalms58:5 Rûl thlêm thiamte aw hre duh lo, Dawithiam dawi hla ngaithla duh lo ang hi." 
Psalms58:6 Aw Pathian, an hâte chu chhut balsak la, Lalpa, sakeibaknei kawlhho ngho hi tihtliahsak rawh." 
Psalms58:7 Tui anga pûtin luang ral sela, Thal fang nei lo ang hi ni hlawm rawh se." 
Psalms58:8 Chêngkawl thi angin râwp ral sela, Hlamzuih, êng hmu hman lo ang hi ni hlawm rawh se." 
Psalms58:9 An hriat loh hlânin hlobet anga ah chhum an ni, A thi leh dam, Pathian thinurnain a lên bo vang," 
Psalms58:10 Mi sual chunga phuba lo thleng chu an hmuhin, Mi dikte chu an hlim ang a, Mi sualte thisen chu an dai ang." 
Psalms58:11 “Mi dikte chuan lâwmman an la hmu ngei dâwn e, Pathian pawhin khawvêl a lo enkawl ngei hi,” Miten an la ti ang." 
Psalms59:1 Aw ka Pathian, hmêlma lakah min chhanhim la, Min beitute lakah min hum tlat rawh." 
Psalms59:2 Thil sual titute lakah chuan min chhan chhuak la, Thisen chhuah chîngte kut ata min chhandam rawh." 
Psalms59:3 Ngai teh, min thah tumin min châng reng a, Mi nunrâwng pui puite an pung khâwm e; Ka bawhchhiat leh ka sual vâng a ni lo, Lalpa." 
Psalms59:4 Thil ṭha lo ka tih vâng a ni hek lo, An tlân khâwm a, min hual tâk hi, Min pui tûrin lo tho harh la, en teh." 
Psalms59:5 Lalpa, Engkim Pathian, Israel-te Pathian i ni; Hnam dangte hi hrem tûrin lo thawk la, Vervêk taka che ṭhîn mi sualho hi khawngaih hauh suh ang che." 
Psalms59:6 Tlaiah an lo pung khâwm leh ṭhîn, Ui ang maiin min ngur min ngur, Khawpui chhûngah an vâk vêl ṭhîn." 
Psalms59:7 Min vau nasatzia hi ngai teh, An hmuite chu khandaih hriam tak ang hi a ni, “Tu nge hria ang?” an ti." 
Psalms59:8 Lalpa, nang chuan i nuihzat ang; Hnam tinrêng hi i nuihzatbûr bawk ang." 
Psalms59:9 Min tichaktu, ka thlîr reng che, Min hum ṭhîntu Pathian i ni si a." 
Psalms59:10 Ka chunga ngilnei ṭhîn Pathianin min lo hmuak ang a, Min dotute chau hmêl min entîr ang." 
Psalms59:11 Aw Pathian, hêngho hi thah zawng that suh la, Ka mite hian an theihnghilh dah ang e, Vahvaihtîr la, i chaknain titlâwm dêr rawh, Lalpa, kan phaw i ni." 
Psalms59:12 An ka chu sualin a khat a, An thu sawi pawh sual hlîr a ni. An chapona chhiat phah rawh se, ânchhe lawha dâwt sawi an chîng êm mai." 
Psalms59:13 Thinrimin tiboral la, ral vek rawh se, Jakoba chungah chuan Pathianin ro a rêl tih Kâwlkil thlengin hre vek rawh se." 
Psalms59:14 Tlaiah an lo pung khâwm leh ṭhîn, Ui ang maiin min ngur min ngur, Khawpui chhûngah an vâk vêl ṭhîn." 
Psalms59:15 Ei tûr zawngin an vâk ruai a, Kham tâwk an ei hma chu an vâk zankhua ta ṭhîn." 
Psalms59:16 Kei chuan i chakzia ka hril ang a, Zîng tak takah i ngilneihzia ka hril bawk ang, Ka tân mangan nia kulhpui i ni." 
Psalms59:17 Min tichaktu, zaiin ka fak ang che, Mi khawngaihtu chung Pathian hi Ka tân kulhbîng sâng chu a ni." 
Psalms60:1 Aw Pathian, min thlauthlâka, Min tihdarh zawh tâk hi; I thinur hle na a, kan lam lo hawi leh teh." 
Psalms60:2 Ram chu i sâwi nghîng a, a phel tâk hi, A chhe laite chu thawm la, A tlu mai dâwn alâwm." 
Psalms60:3 I mite hi thil khirh tak i tuartîr a, Pai pai khawpin uain min intîr hi." 
Psalms60:4 Nangmah ṭihtute chu an inhâwr khâwm theih nân, Thal kâptute lakah flag pe ang che." 
Psalms60:5 I chaknain min rawn chhan la, Kan dîlna hi lo ngaithla teh, I mi duh takte hi an him theih nân." 
Psalms60:6 A hmun thianghlim aṭangin Pathianin thu a sawi: “Sekem khua chu ka sem darh lêng ang a, Sukot ruam chu ka ṭhen darh vek bawk ang." 
Psalms60:7 Gilead leh Manase ram chu ka ta a ni, Efraim ram pawh ka inhumna lukhum a ni a, Judai ram lah ka laltiang a ni si." 
Psalms60:8 Moab ram chu ka insilna chawhtawlh a ni a, Ka ta a nih hriat nân, Edom ram chu ka ta a ni tih hriat nân, Ka pheikhawkin ka vawm ang, tiin. Ka chungah hian Filistia mite chu lâwmin an au ang maw?”" 
Psalms60:9 Tu nge kulh nei khuaah mi hruai anga, Edom ramah min kalpui ang?" 
Psalms60:10 Aw Pathian, min thlauthla ta em ni? Kan sipaite zîngah, aw Pathian, i tel ve tâk loh hi?" 
Psalms60:11 Hmêlma lakah min ṭanpui teh, Mihring ṭanpuina zawng engmahlo mai a ni." 
Psalms60:12 Pathian zârah huai takin kan che ang, Kan hmêlmate a chîl hrep ang." 
Psalms61:1 Aw Pathian, ka au thâwmhi ngaithla la, Ka ṭawngṭaina ngaihven ang che." 
Psalms61:2 Hla tak aṭangin mangang takin ka auh che hi, Ka kai phâk loh lungpuiah chuan min hlâng ang che." 
Psalms61:3 Nang chu ka tân himna i ni, Hmêlma laka kulhbîng sâng nghet tak chu." 
Psalms61:4 I puan inah ka awm kumkhua ang a, I thlazâr hnuaiah chuan ka tlulût ang." 
Psalms61:5 Aw Pathian, ka thutiamte i ngaithla a, I hming ṭihtute chan tûr chu min pe." 
Psalms61:6 Lal dam chhûng hi tihseisak la, Tu mawng bêngin dam bawk rawh se." 
Psalms61:7 Aw Pathian, i hmaah chuan lal reng sela, I ngilneih leh i rinawmnain vêng ṭhîn ang che." 
Psalms61:8 Tichuan, i hming ka fak kumkhua ang a, Ka thutiamte ni tin ka hlen bawk ang." 
Psalms62:1 Pathian chu ka nghâk fanfan ṭhîn a, Amah chauh hi min chhandamtu a ni." 
Psalms62:2 Amah chauh hi ka tân himna lungpui a ni, Min hum ṭhîntu a nih avângin ka nghîng mai mai lo vang." 
Psalms62:3 Bang âwn leh pal tlu ṭêp ang lek hi, Nangni hian tihchim tumin eng chen nge min beih dâwn?" 
Psalms62:4 A dinhmun sâng ata hnuh thlâk zai in rêl a, Dâwt sawi in lâwmzâwng tak a ni. In ṭawng chhuak chu a thlum hle a, In rilruin ânchhia in lawh si." 
Psalms62:5 Pathian chu ka nghâk fan fan ṭhîn a, Amah chauh hi ka innghahna a ni." 
Psalms62:6 Amah chauh hi ka tân himna lungpui a ni, Min hum ṭhîntu a nih avângin ka nghîng mai mai lo vang." 
Psalms62:7 Pathian chu min chhantu leh min tiropuitu a ni, Ka lungpui nghet tak, ka belh Pathian a ni." 
Psalms62:8 A mite u, eng lai pawhin ani chu ring ula, Engkim hrilh ṭhîn rawh u, Kan belh Pathian a ni si a." 
Psalms62:9 Mihringte hi thaw ang lek an ni a, Milian, mitê, engmahlo mai an ni; Han bûk mah la, an zâng heih a, Boruak ang leka zâng an ni." 
Psalms62:10 Chuhhelh taka thil neih innghah nân hmang suh la, Mi thil chhuhsaka hausak tum hek suh. Hausa thûr thûr mah la, Rilru innghah nân chuan hmang suh." 
Psalms62:11 Vawi hnih vawi thum Pathianin a sawi ka hre tawh, Thiltihtheihna hi zawng Pathian ta chauh a ni." 
Psalms62:12 Lalpa, ngilneihna hi nangma ta chauh a ni, An thiltih ang zêla mite rûltu i ni." 
Psalms63:1 Aw Pathian, ka Pathian i ni a, Ṭhahnemngai takin ka zawng ka zawng che a, Ram ro, tâmlak, tui vânna hmunah hian Nangmah châkin ka tuihâl a, Ka taksa hian a ngai êm êm a che." 
Psalms63:2 I hmun thianghlimah chuan hmu che ila, I chakzia leh i ropuizia han hmu teh ila aw!" 
Psalms63:3 I ngilneihna hi zawng nunna aiin a hlu, Ka hmuite hian a fak ang che." 
Psalms63:4 Ka dam chhûng zawngin ka fak ang che a, I hming lamin ka bân ka rawn phar ang." 
Psalms63:5 A sa tui tui tlân ang maiin ka tlai ang a, Hlim takin i fak hla ka sa ang." 
Psalms63:6 Khumlaizâwlah ka dâwn ṭhîn che a, Zânkhua khuain ka lam ṭhîn che." 
Psalms63:7 “Min ṭanpuitu nang hi ni la, I thla hnuai hlimah chuan zaiin," 
Psalms63:8 Nangmahah chuan bei tlat ila, I kut ding lamin min chelh tlat la,” ka ti fo ṭhîn." 
Psalms63:9 Min thah tuma mi zawngtute, Leilâwtah an tla ang a," 
Psalms63:10 Khandaiha sah hlum an ni ang a, Sihalte chuan an sa an tlân bawk ang." 
Psalms63:11 Lal chu, Pathianah chuan a hlim ang a, A hming chhâltute chuan Ani chu an chawimawi ang, Dâwt sawi chîngte ka erawh chu huhsak a ni ang." 
Psalms64:1 Ka mangang au hi, aw Pathian lo ngaithla la, Hmêlma hlauhawm lakah ka nun hi hum ang che." 
Psalms64:2 Mi sual pung khâwm lakah min thukru la, Thil dik lo titute kal khâwmho lakah chuan." 
Psalms64:3 Khandaih angin an lei an tât hriam a, Thu huatthlala tak chuan thal angin min tin." 
Psalms64:4 Mi pawi sawi lo kah hlum tumin an châng ru a, An kâp thut ṭhîn, hlauh rêng an nei lo ve." 
Psalms64:5 Thil sual ti tûrin an intêl ruh a, Thang kam rûk zai an rêl. “Tu nge hmu ang?” an ti." 
Psalms64:6 Thil sual an rawt chhuak a, “Hmuh chhuah rual loh kan rawt tâk hi,” an ti. An ngaihtuahna chu a thûk a ni." 
Psalms64:7 Pathianin a kâp ve thung ang a, An tlu nghâl phung ang." 
Psalms64:8 An thu sawi ngei chu an chhiat phah ang a, A hmu apiangte chuan an lu an thin khum ang." 
Psalms64:9 Mi tinin an hlau vang a, “Pathian tih a ni,” an ti ang a, A hna thawhte an hrethiam ang." 
Psalms64:10 Mi dikte chu Lalpa -ah chuan an lâwm ang a, Amahah chuan an tlulût ang, Mi ngîlte chuan amah an chhuang bawk ang." 
Psalms65:1 Aw Pathian, Zion-ah chuan fak tûr i ni, Thutiamte pawh i tân hlen tûr a ni." 
Psalms65:2 Ṭawngṭai ngaithlatu i ni a, Mi tinrêng i hnênah an lo kal ang." 
Psalms65:3 Kan sualna chu sawi sên a ni lo va, Nang chuan kan bawhchhiatnate i ngaidam ṭhîn." 
Psalms65:4 I chênnaa awm ve tûra i thlan, I kianga awm tûra i tihte chu an nihlawh e. I ina thil ṭhate chênin kan tlai ang a, I tempul thianghlima i malsâwmnate chuan." 
Psalms65:5 Min chhandamtu Pathian, Dik tak leh mak taka thil tiin min chhâng a, Khawvêl pum puia mi leh tuifinriat râl hla taka Awmte pawh hian, an ring ta che." 
Psalms65:6 I chaknain tlângte i hûng mup a, I thiltihtheihzia i lantîr hi." 
Psalms65:7 Tuipui rûm hum hum te, Tuifâwn ri hlup hlup te, Mipui sa mur mur te i tidai a," 
Psalms65:8 Hmun hla taka awmte pawhin I thil tih makte chu mak an ti a, Zîng leh tlai lo thleng chuan lâwmna a rawn thlen ṭhîn." 
Psalms65:9 Lei hi i ngaihsak a, ruahtuiin i châwm a, Nasa takin i titui a, Luikawrte chu tuiin i tikhat a, Tichuan, buh hmun atân lei chu i buatsaih ṭhîn." 
Psalms65:10 Lei rih thlûr chu tui i leih a, A pâwng laite a tla muk a, Ruahtuiin a tinêm a, Thlai thar i chawrtîr ṭhîn." 
Psalms65:11 Kum a lo vei chuan a tawntawin thlai i thartîr a, I kalna apiangah chuan a awm rei rui ṭhîn." 
Psalms65:12 Thlalêr ram rovahte hnim a duah hluah hluah a, Mualte pawh chu a hring dup mai." 
Psalms65:13 Phûlahte chuan ran an tla noh noh va, Ruamahte chuan buh hlîr a tlim hmur mai, Hlima auvin hla an sa." 
Psalms66:1 Khawvêl pum puia chêng zawng zawngte u, Pathian chu fak chiam rawh u." 
Psalms66:2 A hming ropui tak hi fak ula, Ropui takin chawimawi rawh u." 
Psalms66:3 “I thiltihte a va mak êm! I chak êm avângin hmêlmate chu an kimki a," 
Psalms66:4 Mi zawng zawngin chibai an bûk a che. I fakna hla sa-in I hming an fak,” Pathian hnênah ti rawh u." 
Psalms66:5 Lo kal ula, Pathian thiltihte hi han en teh u, Mihring zînga a thil tih mak râpthlâk tak hi." 
Psalms66:6 Tuipui thûk chu leichâr a chantîr a, Lui chu kêin an kal kai ta. A thiltih avângin, tah chuan kan hlim êm êm a ni." 
Psalms66:7 A chaknain ro a rêl reng a, Hnamte a enthla reng a ni. Luhlulte chu lo induh mai suh se." 
Psalms66:8 Mi zawng zawngte u, kan Pathian hi fak rawh u, Hriat thamin in awte chhuah rawh u." 
Psalms66:9 Dam takin min awmtîr a, Kan tlûkchhiat lah a phal hek lo." 
Psalms66:10 Aw Pathian, nang chuan min enfiah a, Tangkarua meia an fiah angin Nang chuan min fiah a ni." 
Psalms66:11 Thangah min awhtîr a, Manganna chuan min delh ta a." 
Psalms66:12 Kan lu chungah mi an chuang a, Mei leh tui lian kan pal tlang bawk, Mahse, hmun chênghnâwngah min dah tâk hi." 
Psalms66:13 I inah chuan hâlral thilhlan ka rawn keng ang a, Ka thutiam pawh ka hlen ngei ang." 
Psalms66:14 Ka sawi tawh kha ka rawn ti ang, Mangan laia ka sawi ang khân." 
Psalms66:15 Ran châwm thau hâlral ka rawn hlân ang che a, Berâm hâl rimtui khute nên, Bâwngpa leh kêlchalte ka hlân bawk ang." 
Psalms66:16 Pathian ṭihtute u, lo kal ula, ngaithla teh u, A thil min tihsak chu ka hril dâwn e." 
Psalms66:17 Ani chu ka au va, Ka leiah hian fak hla a khat." 
Psalms66:18 Ka thinlunga sualna khawi ka nih chuan Lalpan ka thu a ngaithla lo vang. 
Psalms66:19 Pathian chuan ka thu a ngaithla ngei asin, Ka dîlna chu a lo ngaihven tak tak a ni." 
Psalms66:20 Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se, Ani chuan ka ṭawngṭaina a hlawhchhamtîr lo va, Ka tân a ngilneihna a dai hek lo." 
Psalms67:1 Pathian chu kan chungah ngilneiin Mal min sâwm sela, A hmêl pawh chu kan chungah lo êng rawh se." 
Psalms67:2 I duhzâwng chu khawvêlin a hriata, Hnam tinrêngin i chhandamna an hmuh theih nân." 
Psalms67:3 Aw Pathian, miten fak che sela, Mi tinrêngin fak che rawh se." 
Psalms67:4 Hnam tin hlima lâwmin au se, Hnam tinrêng chungthu chu dik taka rêlsakin, Mi tin i kaihruai si ṭhîn a." 
Psalms67:5 Aw Pathian, mi tinin fak che rawh se, Mi tinrêngin fak che rawh se." 
Psalms67:6 Leiah hian thlai lo tharin, Pathian, kan Pathian chuan mal min sâwm rawh se." 
Psalms67:7 Pathian chuan mal min sâwm sela, khawvêl pum puia mite hian, Pathian chu ṭih rawh se." 
Psalms68:1 Pathian lo thawk sela, hmêlmate darh rawh se, A hmaah chuan amah hawtute chu tlânchhe rawh se." 
Psalms68:2 Meikhu a zâm darh ang hian lên darh ang che, Mei lum bula khawihnûn a tui ang hian, Pathian hmaah mi sualte chu tui ral rawh se." 
Psalms68:3 Mi dikte erawh chu Pathian hmaah hlimin an lâwm ṭhîn a, Hlim takin an au chêl chûl ṭhîn." 
Psalms68:4 Pathian hnênah hla sa ula, A hming fakin zai ula, Chhûm chunga chuanga tân kawng buatsaih rawh u; A hming chu Lalpa a ni, Amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms68:5 Hmun thianghlima chêng kan Pathian chu, Fahrahte tân Pa a ni a, Hmeithaite ngaihtuahtu a ni." 
Psalms68:6 Mi tlahlangte chu chhûngkua a dinsak a, Tângte a hruai chhuak a, an hamṭha ta, Luhlulte erawh chu ram rovah a awmtîr ta." 
Psalms68:7 Aw Pathian, i mite hma hruaia, Thlalêr rama i kal lai khân," 
Psalms68:8 Sinai tlâng Pathian hmaah, Lei a nghîng a, vân aṭangin ruah a lo sûr a," 
Psalms68:9 Ruahte i sûrtîr tlâwrh tlâwrh a, I ro, ram châr tawh chu i tiduah leh ta a." 
Psalms68:10 I mite chuan awmhmun an khuar ta a, Aw Pathian, i ṭhat avângin retheite i buatsaihsak a ni." 
Psalms68:11 Lalpan thu a pe a, Hmeichhe tam takin chanchin ṭha chu an puang a," 
Psalms68:12 “Lalte leh an sipai rualte chu An tlânchhe zêl mai e,” tiin. In nghâk hmeichhiate chuan râllâk sum an insem a," 
Psalms68:13 Mei vil mai maite pawhin, Ṭhuro lim, a thla tangkaruaa siam, A thla hmâwr rangkachaka tuam chu an chang." 
Psalms68:14 Engkimtitheian lalte a tihdarh khân Zalmon tlângah vûr a tlâktîr. 
Psalms68:15 Basan tlâng hi tlâng ropui tak a ni a, Chhîp sâng pui a nei thluah mai." 
Psalms68:16 I tlângchhîp aṭangte chuan A chên nâna Pathian duhthlan tlâng hi, Engtizia nge i er mai le? Kumkhuaa Lalpa chênna tûr asin." 
Psalms68:17 Pathian tawlailîr sâng tam tak nên, Sinai tlâng aṭangin a hmun thianghlimah chuan Lalpa chu a lo kal e." 
Psalms68:18 A tlâng sângah a lâwn chho va, Sal man a hruai duah duah bawk a, Mihringte thilpêk a lo dawng a, Hel hmangte pawhin an rawn hlân ve; Tah chuan Lalpa Pathian a chêng tawh ang." 
Psalms68:19 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Min chhandamtu kan Pathian hian, Ni tin kan phurritte min chhâwk ṭhin hi." 
Psalms68:20 Kan Pathian hi chhandam ṭhîntu Pathian a ni a, Kan Lalpa hi Lalpa, thihna ata min humtu a ni e." 
Psalms68:21 Pathian chuan hmêlmate lu a vaw keh ang, Suahsual chîng lu chhîp bukte chu." 
Psalms68:22 “Basan ram aṭangin in hmêlmate ka rawn hruai ang a, Tuifinriat mawng ata ka rawn khâwm ang." 
Psalms68:23 An thisen chu in dai ang a, In uite chuan an duh tâwk an liak ang,” Lalpan a ti." 
Psalms68:24 Aw Pathian, i lo kal kha mi tinin an hmu che, A hmun thianghlim pana ka lal, Ka Pathian kal chu." 
Psalms68:25 Hla sa pâwlten hma an hruai a, A hnung lamah ṭingṭang tum miten an zui a, A laiah chuan nula rualin benchhek an bêng." 
Psalms68:26 “Pungkhâwm zîngah Pathian chu fak ula, Jakoba thlahte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u,” an ti." 
Psalms68:27 A hnam tlêm ber Benjamin chu hmahruaitu an ni a, Juda hnam puipaten an dawt a, Zebulun leh Naftali hruaituten an zui leh a." 
Psalms68:28 Aw Pathian, kan tân thil mak min tihsak ṭhinna, I thiltihtheihna kha han tilang teh." 
Psalms68:29 Jerusalem khuaa i tempul aṭangin, Lalten thilpêk an rawn pêkna hmun aṭang khân." 
Psalms68:30 Phairuang hmuna awm ṭhîn sa hrâng Aigupta khu zilh la, Khu hnam, bâwng kawlh leh an note awm khâwm khuan, Tangka duhin mi an chîl a. Indo châkho khu ûm darh rawh." 
Psalms68:31 Aigupta ram aṭangte chuan palai an lo kal ang, Kus mite pawh Pathian hmaah an kut an rawn phar ang." 
Psalms68:32 Khawvêla lalramte u, Pathian hnênah hla sa ula, Lalpa fakna hla sa rawh u." 
Psalms68:33 Hmasânga awm, Vân chunga chuanga chu, Ring takin a au ve, ngaithla rawh u." 
Psalms68:34 Pathian thiltihtheihzia puang chhuak ula, A ropuina, Israel-te chungah a awm ṭhîn a. A chakna chu vânah a awm a ni." 
Psalms68:35 A hmun thianghlima awm Israel-te Pathian chu ṭih tûr a ni, A mite chu chakna leh thiltihtheihna a pe a, Pathian chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms69:1 Aw Pathian, min chhan chhuak rawh, Tuite chuan min chîm pil lek lek a;" 
Psalms69:2 Chirhdûpah chuan ka tâng ta a, Rah chhan tûr rêng a awm si lo. Tui thûkah chuan ka awm ta a, A fâwnah chuan ka pil dâwn hi." 
Psalms69:3 Ṭanpui dîla ka auna lamah chuan ka chau ta a, Ka dangte pawh a ro zo va, Pathian thlîrin ka mit a vai zo ta." 
Psalms69:4 Chhan awm lova min hawtute chu Ka sam aiin an tam tâk hi. Mi chak pui puite chuan mi nuai bo an tum a, Dâwta min bei ṭhîntute chuan Ka rûk loh pawh min pêk kîrtîr a ni." 
Psalms69:5 Aw ka Pathian, ka âtzia hi i hre vek a, Ka thiam lohnate i lakah thup a ni hek lo." 
Psalms69:6 Lalpa, Engkim Lalpa, Keimah avângin nangmah nghâktute chu zak suh sela, Israel-te Pathian, Keimah avângin nangmah zawngtute chu mualpho suh se." 
Psalms69:7 Nangmah avângin hau ka tuar a, Men ngaihna pawh ka hre ta lo." 
Psalms69:8 Ka unaute tân mikhual ang ka ni a, Ka pianpuite tân pawh ram dang mi ang ka ni." 
Psalms69:9 I in tâna ka ṭhahnemngaihna chuan Mi luah tlat a, An chêksawlhna che chu Ka phur zêl ṭhîn." 
Psalms69:10 Ṭapa chaw ka nghei leh miten min hmusit zui a," 
Psalms69:11 Saiip puan ka sin leh min nuihzat a. 
Psalms69:12 Kulh kawngkhâra ṭhuten min rêl zui a, Zu ruite chuan hlaah min chham." 
Psalms69:13 Kei zawng, Lalpa, i hnênah chuan ka ṭawngṭai ang, Ṭha i tih hunah mi chhâng ang che. Aw Pathian, i ngilneihna nasa tak leh I chhandamna rin tlâk tak chuan min chhâng ang che." 
Psalms69:14 Chirhdûp ata min chhan chhuak la, Ka pil mai chu phal suh ang che. Min hawtute leh tui thûk tak ata chu Min chhan chhuak bawk ang che." 
Psalms69:15 Tui lian chu min len botîr suh la, Tui thûkah ka tlâk phal lo la, Thlân kotlângah min liamtîr suh ang che." 
Psalms69:16 Lalpa, i ngilneihna a ṭha si a, min chhâng ang che, I lainatna nasa tak chu ka chungah lantîr ang che." 
Psalms69:17 I chhiahhlawh lakah hian i hmêl thup suh, Ka mangang êm a ni, min chhâng thuai rawh." 
Psalms69:18 Lo kal hnai la, min tlan ang che, Hmêlma lakah min chhan chhuak rawh." 
Psalms69:19 Min chêksawlh dânte hi nangin i hre reng a, Ka zahzia te, ka mualpho dânte pawh Ka hmêlmate i hmu vek bawk." 
Psalms69:20 Min hmuhsitna chuan ka lung a tichhia a, Na ka ti êm êm a ni. Khawngaih ka beisei a, tu man min khawngaih lo, Thlamuantu tûr tu mah ka hmu zo lo." 
Psalms69:21 Ka ei tûrah tûr an pawlh a, Ka tuihâl chu zu ṭâwng min pe." 
Psalms69:22 An ruai ṭheh chu chhiat phah sela, An inremna ruai pawh chu an tân fal chang rawh se." 
Psalms69:23 An mitte chu tihdelsak la, Eng mah hmu thei suh se, An kâwngte chu khûr zawih zawih bawk rawh se." 
Psalms69:24 I thinurna chu an chungah leih la, I thinrimna chuan nangchîng rawh se." 
Psalms69:25 An chênna chu ram sela, An puan inah tu mah chêng hek suh se." 
Psalms69:26 Nangin vuak i tuartîrte chu an sawisa a, Hliam i tuartîrte natzia chu sawi nuam an ti." 
Psalms69:27 I hremna tûr chu tihpunsak la, I chhandamna chu chang ve suh se." 
Psalms69:28 Nunna bu ata chu an hming thai chhia la, Mi dikte zîngah chuan an hming ziak suh." 
Psalms69:29 Kei zawng na tuarin ka rûm hi, Aw Pathian, min chhan la, Hmun râlmuangah min hlâng ang che." 
Psalms69:30 Pathian hming chu fakin ka zai ang a, Lâwmthu hrilin ka chawimawi ang." 
Psalms69:31 Lalpa tân chuan ran hlan aiin chu chu a ṭha, Bâwngchal, ki leh tin sei tak nei hlan ai pawhin." 
Psalms69:32 Tihretheihten an hmuh hun chuan an lâwm ang a, Pathian zawngtu thinlung chu a nung thar ang." 
Psalms69:33 Retheite thu Lalpan a ngaithla a, A ni, saltângte chu a zahpui lo." 
Psalms69:34 Lei leh vânten amah fak rawh u, Tuifinriat leh a chhûnga chêngte chuan fak rawh u." 
Psalms69:35 Pathian chuan Zion khua chu a hum ang a, Judai ram khuate chu a din leh ang. A mite chuan an luah ang a, Ram chu an nei tawh ang." 
Psalms69:36 A chhiahhlawh thlahte chuan an rochung ang a, A hming ngainatute chu tah chuan an chêng bawk ang." 
Psalms70:1 Aw Pathian, min chhan chhuak thuai la, Lalpa, min rawn ṭanpui ang che." 
Psalms70:2 Min thah tumtute chu mualphovin mangang sela, Ka chhiatna chunga lâwmte chu Zak takin tlânchhe rawh se." 
Psalms70:3 “Chei! Chei!” min tihkhumtute chu Zak tak maiin tlânchhe rawh se. 
Psalms70:4 Nangmah zawngtu zawng zawngte chu Hlimin au dur dur rawh se. I chhandamna ngaitute chuan “Pathian chawimawi rawh u,” ti fo rawh se." 
Psalms70:5 Kei pachhia leh rethei tak hi, Aw Pathian, min rawn pan thuai ang che. Min puitu leh chhandamtu i ni, Lalpa, muangchâng lul suh ang che." 
Psalms71:1 Lalpa, i hnênah chuan ka lo tlulût ta a, Engtikah mah mualpho takin min awmtîr suh ang che." 
Psalms71:2 Mi fel i ni a, min chhan chhuak la, min hum ang che, I beng chhi la, min chhandam rawh." 
Psalms71:3 Ka awm nân lungpui nghet ni la, I thu angin lo kal ngei rawh." 
Psalms71:4 Aw ka Pathian, mi sual kut ata min chhan chhuak la, Mi suaksual leh mi nunrâwng kut ata chu." 
Psalms71:5 Lalpa, nang chu ka thlîr ber i ni ṭhîn a, Lalpa, ka tleirâwl chhuah ata ka ring che a ni." 
Psalms71:6 Ka pian tirh aṭangin ka rinchhan ber i ni a, Ka nu pum chhûng ata min lachhuaktu i ni. Ka fak kumkhua ang che." 
Psalms71:7 Mi tam tak thlîr rawn ka ni a, Mahse, ka tân tlûkluhna nghet tak i ni." 
Psalms71:8 Eng lai pawhin ka fak fo ṭhîn che a, Ni tin ka chawimawi ṭhîn che a ni." 
Psalms71:9 Ka lo tar ta a, min hnâwl suh la, Ka lo chak lo ta a, min thlahthlam suh." 
Psalms71:10 Ka hmêlmaten ka chungthu an sawi a, Min vehtute an inrâwn khâwm." 
Psalms71:11 “Pathian pawhin a kalsan ta, I ûm ang u, kan man dâwn nia, Chhantu tûr rêng a nei lo ve,” an ti." 
Psalms71:12 Aw Pathian, min hlat lul suh, Aw ka Pathian, min rawn ṭanpui thuai rawh." 
Psalms71:13 Min beitute chu chauvin mualphovin mangang sela, Ka chhiatna tûr zawngtute chu Zakin mangang hle rawh se." 
Psalms71:14 Kei chuan nangmah chauh hi ka beisei i ni a, Ka fak deuh deuh vang che." 
Psalms71:15 I dikzia hi mi tin hnênah ka sawi ang a, Ka hril sêng lo nâng a, I chhandamna thu chu ka puang bawk ang." 
Psalms71:16 Lalpa, i ropuizia ka puang ang a, Lalpa, i dikzia chauh hi ka hril ang." 
Psalms71:17 Aw Pathian, ka tleirâwl chhuah ata min zirtîr a, Tûn thleng pawhin i thil mak tih ka hril zêl ṭhîn." 
Psalms71:18 Ka lo tarin ka lu a ṭuak ta a, Aw Pathian, min kalsan suh. I ropuizia leh i thiltihte hi, Ṭhangthar lo awm tûrte Ka hrilh hma chu min awmpui rawh." 
Psalms71:19 Aw Pathian, i dikna chuan vân khi a tawng, Thil ropui tak i tih ṭhin hi, Nangmah ang hi tu mah rêng an awm lo." 
Psalms71:20 Manganna leh thil ṭha lo tam tak min tuartîr a, Mahse, nangin min tiharh leh ṭhîn a, Khur thûk ata min la chhuak ta." 
Psalms71:21 Min chawisâng lehzual sauh ang a, Min thlamuan leh dâwn e." 
Psalms71:22 Perhkhuang tumin ka fak ang che a, I rinawmzia, aw ka Pathian, ka fak bawk ang. Israel Mi Thianghlima chu, ṭingṭang nên ka fak ang." 
Psalms71:23 Min chhandam avângin Ṭingṭang tuma lâwmin ka au chiam ang. 
Psalms71:24 I dikzia chu nilêngin ka sawi ang a, Mi tihchhiat tumtute an mualpho ta si a." 
Psalms72:1 Aw Pathian, i rorêl thiamna chu lal hi pe la, I dikna pawh pe bawk ang che." 
Psalms72:2 I mite chungthu hi fel taka a rêl theiha, Mi retheite ro pawh dik taka a rêl theih nân." 
Psalms72:3 Tlângten malsâwmna thlen sela, Mualten dikna thlen bawk rawh se." 
Psalms72:4 Mi retheite ro chu dik takin rêl sela, Pachhiate pawh chhan ṭhîn sela, Hnehchhiahtute erawh chu sawisa hrep rawh se." 
Psalms72:5 Ni leh thla khi a ên chhûng chu, Chhuan tam tak thlengin ṭih che rawh se." 
Psalms72:6 Hnim chunga ruahsûr ang ni se, Lei ro chunga ruahpuivânâwn a sûr ang hi." 
Psalms72:7 A dam chhûngin dikna hi lal sela, Thla khi a ên chhûng chu malsâwmna pung rawh se." 
Psalms72:8 A ram chuan tuifinriat râl kai sela, Khawchhak luipui aṭang khian kâwlkil khu thleng rawh se." 
Psalms72:9 Thlalêra chêngte chuan chibai rawn bûk sela, A hmêlmate a hmaah chuan bawkkhup rawh se." 
Psalms72:10 Tarsis lal leh thliarkâra lalte chuan, Lâwmman rawn hlân sela, Arab lal leh Seba lalte pawhin Thilpêk rawn keng rawh se." 
Psalms72:11 Lal zawng zawngte a hmaah kûn sela, Hnam tinrêngin a rawng rawn bâwl rawh se." 
Psalms72:12 Manganga aute chu a chhan ang a, Chhantu nei lo retheite pawh." 
Psalms72:13 Retheite leh pachhiate chu a khawngaih ang a, Mangangte nunna chu a humhim ang." 
Psalms72:14 Nêkchêpte leh râwng taka sawisakte a hum ang a, An nunna chu a tân a hlu a ni." 
Psalms72:15 Lal chu dam reng sela, Seba ram rangkachak rawn pe rawh se. Ṭawngṭaisak fo sela, Malsâwmna pawh dawng reng rawh se." 
Psalms72:16 Ram pum puiah a tawntawin buh hâwng sela, Lebanon tlânga thei a rah tup ṭhîn angin Tlâng chhîpahte rah tiar tuar bawk rawh se. Ram ṭhaa hnim a bit angin, Khuaahte chuan mi khat rawh se." 
Psalms72:17 Kumkhua pawhin a hming a dai lo vang, Ni khi a ên chhûng chu a hming thang zêl rawh se. Hnam tinrêngin a zâr zo se, Duhsak rawh se." 
Psalms72:18 Lalpa Pathian, Israel-te Pathian chu fak ula, Ani chauh hian a ni, hêng thil mak hi ti ṭhîn ni." 
Psalms72:19 A hming ropui tak chu chawimawi kumkhua ula, Lei pum pui hi a ropuina chuan khat rawh se. Amen, Amen." 
Psalms72:20 Jesaia fapa Davida ṭawngṭaina chu a tâwp ta. 
Psalms73:1 Israel-te chungah hian Pathian a lo ṭha ngei mai e, Thinlunga thianghlimte chungah chuan." 
Psalms73:2 Kei chuan ka ringhlel lek lek ṭhîn a, Ka tlu ṭhelh ṭhelh fo mai." 
Psalms73:3 Mi sualte vânneihzia ka han hmuh hian, Chapote chu ka awt hle ṭhîn." 
Psalms73:4 An thih pawhin na an tuar lo va, An thau mûm kûng bawk si." 
Psalms73:5 Mite angin an thawk rim ve lo va, Mi dang tuar ang hrehawm an tuar hek lo." 
Psalms73:6 An chapo êm êm a, An nun a râwng êm êm bawk." 
Psalms73:7 An thau avângin an mit a pâwng a, An duhsâm chuan chin lêm a nei hek lo." 
Psalms73:8 Mi dang an nuihzat a, thil sual an sawi ṭhîn a, Chapo takin mi dang an vau bet a." 
Psalms73:9 Vâna Pathian tlukin an insawi a, An thuin mihringte an hneh zêl a." 
Psalms73:10 Pathian mite meuh pawhin an lam an hawi a, An sawi apiang an awih zêl a." 
Psalms73:11 “Pathianin a hre lo vang, Chungnungberan a hmu hek lo vang,” an ti." 
Psalms73:12 Hei hi mi sualte awm dân chu a ni: An awm der der a, an hausa tulh tulh si." 
Psalms73:13 Ka lo invawng thianghlim thlâwn mai em ni? Thil sual eng mah ka khawih lo chung hian," 
Psalms73:14 Nilêngin ka tuar ṭhîn a, Tûk tina min zilh ṭhin hi?" 
Psalms73:15 “An tih angin ka ti ve ang,” ti ila chuan, I fa, tûnlai mite hi ka bum a ni dâwn si." 
Psalms73:16 Hêng hi hriatthiam ka han tum ṭhîn a, Harsa ka ti ngei mai." 
Psalms73:17 Mahse, Pathian hmun thianghlima ka han luh chuan, An tâwp dân tûr ka hmu chiang ta." 
Psalms73:18 Hmun nâl takah i dah reng a lo ni a, Chhiatnaah chuan an tlulût ngei ngei dâwn." 
Psalms73:19 Mit khap kâr lek chhûngin an ral ang a, Râpthlâk takin an chhe vek ang." 
Psalms73:20 Zînga mumang ral ta ang hi an ni, Lalpa, nang meuh i lo thawh chuan, I tân hlimthla ang lek an ni." 
Psalms73:21 Ka lung a chhiat hlea, Ka thin a nat êm êm lai chuan," 
Psalms73:22 Ka rilru a buai a, ka hrethiam thei lo, I hmaah chuan ramsa ang mai ka ni." 
Psalms73:23 Mahse, i bulah chuan awm ka chuh tlat a, Ka kut ding lam hi min lo chelhsak ṭhîn." 
Psalms73:24 Nangin min fuihin, min kaihruai a, Nakinah chuan ropui takin min lo lâwm ang." 
Psalms73:25 Nang lo chu vânah khian tu nge ka neih? Leiah pawh hian nang lo chu tu mah duh ka nei lo ve. 
Psalms73:26 Ka taksa leh ka rilru hi a lo chau ṭhîn a, Mahse, Pathian chu ka tân lungpui nghet tak a ni, Ani chu eng lai pawhin ka awmna tûr a ni." 
Psalms73:27 Nangmah hlattute erawh chu an ral ang a, Nangmah tlânsantute chu i tiboral ang." 
Psalms73:28 Keia tân zawng Pathian hnaih hi a ṭha a ni, Lalpa Pathian chu tlûkluh nân ka hmang a, A thil mak tih zawng zawng hi ka hril zêl ang." 
Psalms74:1 Aw Pathian, engtizia nge min kalsan tâk daih a, I rama mite ngei chungah i thinur reng dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms74:2 Hmasâng ata i mi tûra i neihho, I rochan, i tlan hnamte hi, I chênna ṭhîn Zion tlâng nên han hre reng ang che." 
Psalms74:3 A chhe rem rum tawh chu han tlawh la, Hmêlmate chuan i hmun thianghlim an tihchhiat zawh tâk hi." 
Psalms74:4 I mite punkhâwmnaah hmêlmate chu an haw haw dur dur a, An puanzârte chu an târ thluah mai." 
Psalms74:5 Ngawpui ṭhiat tûr ang maiin, An hreikawl chu an lek tâk hi." 
Psalms74:6 Thing suih mawi zawng zawngte, Hrei leh tubohvin an chhu chhe ta." 
Psalms74:7 I hmun thianghlim an hâl chim a, I chênna hmun chu an tibawrhbâng zo ta." 
Psalms74:8 Min tihdarh vek an rilrûk a, Kan ram chhûnga Pathian biakna hmun apiang chu, An hâl zêl mai." 
Psalms74:9 Kan hnam puanzâr târ hmuh tûr a awm lo va, Zâwlneite lah an awm tawh lo, Engtia rei nge hetia kan awm dâwn Hria pawh kan awm ta lo." 
Psalms74:10 Aw Pathian, hmêlmate hian eng chen nge an deu ang che? I hming an hmusit reng dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms74:11 Engtizia nge i kut i lâk kîra, I kuangkuah tâk tlat le? Tiboral hlawm rawh." 
Psalms74:12 Aw Pathian, hmasâng ata kan Lal i ni, Leia i mite chhandam ṭhîntu i ni." 
Psalms74:13 Tuifinriat chu i chaknain i tiṭhen a, Tuipui chhûnga rûlpui lu chu i tikeh ta," 
Psalms74:14 Leviathan lu i chhu keh bawk. Thlalêra chêngte ei atân a sa i pe. 
Psalms74:15 Tuihna i chhun chhuak a, a luankawr i siam a, Luipui luang laite chu i tikang bawk." 
Psalms74:16 Chhûn leh zân hi i ta a ni a, Êntu leh ni te khi i dah a ni." 
Psalms74:17 Leilung ramri i kham chhuak a, Nipui leh thlasik hi i siam a ni." 
Psalms74:18 Lalpa, hmêlmate deuna hi hre reng ang che, Hnam â-te chuan i hming an sawichhiat hi." 
Psalms74:19 Sakawlhho kutah chuan i mite hi pe suh ang che, I mi, retheite hi theihnghilh reng suh." 
Psalms74:20 I thuthlung kha ngai pawimawh la, Ram chhûnga hmun thim laite chu Nunrâwnnain a khah tâk hi." 
Psalms74:21 Hnehchhiahte chu mualpho takin awmtîr suh la, Pachhiate leh retheite chuan i hming hi fak rawh se." 
Psalms74:22 Aw Pathian, lo thawk chhuak la, I thu han kengkawh teh, Mi â-te chuan ni tin an deu che hi hre reng ang che." 
Psalms74:23 I hmêlmate thâwm hi theihnghilh suh la, Nangmah beitute au thâwm chu a rîk hluah hluah reng hi." 
Psalms75:1 Aw Pathian, lâwmthu kanhrilh a che, I lo hnaih avângin lâwmthu kan hrilh a che. I thiltih ropui takte chu kan hril ṭhîn e." 
Psalms75:2 “A hun ka ruatah chuan Dik takin ro ka rawn rêl ang," 
Psalms75:3 Lei leh a chhûnga awmte sîksawi mah se, Kei hian a innghahna ka phûm a ni,” Lalpan a ti." 
Psalms75:4 “Chapote u, inchhuang suh u, Mi sualte u, inluling sú." 
Psalms75:5 Vâna awma lakah indahsâng lo ula, Dâk âwr chungin ṭawng thâwr thâwr hek suh u,” ka ti." 
Psalms75:6 Chhak leh thlang aṭangin emaw, Chhim leh hmâr aṭangin emaw, Rorêlna hi a lo thleng si lo va." 
Psalms75:7 Rorêltu chu Pathian a ni: Ṭhenkhat a titlâwm a, ṭhenkhat a chawimawi ṭhîn." 
Psalms75:8 Lalpan a thinurna no chu a keng reng a, Uain chi tinrêng chawhpawlha khat a ni, a phûl pâwng thûr mai, Chu chu a bun chhuak a, Mi sualte chuan an in ta a, A mawngnawi lam an lem zo vang." 
Psalms75:9 Kei chuan chatuanin ka chawimawi ang a, Jakoba Pathian chu fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms75:10 Mi sual thiltihtheihna a tichhia ang a, Mi dik thiltihtheihna erawh chu a pung zêl ang." 
Psalms76:1 Judai ram chuan Pathian an hria a, Israel-te chuan a hming an chawimawi ṭhîn." 
Psalms76:2 Jerusalem-ah chuan a awm a, Zion-ah chuan a chêng a ni." 
Psalms76:3 Tah chuan hmêlma thalte leh, An phaw leh khandaihte, An râlthuamte a tihchhiatsak a." 
Psalms76:4 Aw Pathian, i ropui e, Hmêlma i hnehna tlâng ata i lo haw chu i ropui ngei mai e." 
Psalms76:5 An mi huaite râlthuam an hlihsak vek a, An thal ta rem rum mai! Mi chak tu mah kut lek thei an awm ta lo." 
Psalms76:6 Jakoba Pathian, nangin i han hau chuan, Sakawr leh a chungchuangte chu an thal dêr mai." 
Psalms76:7 Nang zawng, i lo hlauhawm ngei mai, I thinurin i hmaah chuan tu nge ding ngam awm ang?" 
Psalms76:8 Vân aṭanga i thu rêl chu i rawn puan chuan, Lei chu hlauvin a ngawi reng a;" 
Psalms76:9 Khawvêla mi retheite chhan tûra, Rorêla i lo thawh chhuah lai khân." 
Psalms76:10 Mi kawlhsente chuan an la fak ngei ang che a, I thinurna pumpelhte chuan an bêl ang che," 
Psalms76:11 Lalpa, in Pathian hnêna in thutiam chu hlen ula, A vêla awmte chuan Hlauhtûra hi An thilpêkte rawn hlân rawh se." 
Psalms76:12 Hruaitute chapona a tihtâwpsak a, Lei lalte tân hlauhawm tak a ni." 
Psalms77:1 Aw chhuah meuhvin, Pathian chu ka ngên ang a, Ka au vang a, ka aw a lo hria ang." 
Psalms77:2 Mangan laiin Lalpa chu ka zawng a, Bân phar chungin ka ṭawngṭai zânkhua ṭhîn, Mahse, ka thla a muang thei lo." 
Psalms77:3 Pathian ka ngaihtuahin ka rûm ṭhîn a, Ka suangtuahin ka chau hnêp ṭhîn." 
Psalms77:4 Mi timuhîl thei lo va, Ka vei ka vei ṭhîn a, sawi tûr rêng ka nei lo." 
Psalms77:5 Hmânlai ka ngaihtuah a, Hun liam ta zawng zawng ka hre chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms77:6 Zânah ka ngaihtuah neuh neuh va, Ka dâwn vêl a, ka inkhâpthlu dêr ṭhîn." 
Psalms77:7 Lalpan min thlauhthla reng dâwn em ni le? Ka chungah hian a lâwm dâwn tawh lo em ni aw! 
Psalms77:8 Mi khawngaih tawh lovin, A thutiam kha a titâwp hlen dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms77:9 Pathianin min lainatna kha a theihnghilhin, Thinur vângin a ngilneihna a titâwp dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms77:10 Chungnungbera kut chuan ngai a ang ta lo hi, Ka thin tinatu ber chu a ni." 
Psalms77:11 Lalpa thiltihte chu ka hre reng ang a, Hmasânga thil mak tak tak a tihte pawh ka hre reng ang." 
Psalms77:12 I thiltih ṭhinte chu ka ngaihtuah fo vang a, Thil ropui tak i tihte pawh ka chhui bawk ang." 
Psalms77:13 Aw Pathian, i kawng chu a thianghlim a, Nangmah ang rênga ropui hi pathian an awm lo." 
Psalms77:14 Nang zawng thil mak ti ṭhîn Pathian i ni a, I chakzia hi hnam tin i hriattîr ṭhîn." 
Psalms77:15 I bân chak chuan i mite chu i tlan a, Jakoba leh Josefa thlahte chu." 
Psalms77:16 Aw Pathian, tuite chuan an hmuh che chuan, An hlau va, tui thûkte pawh an khûr." 
Psalms77:17 Chhûmin ruah a sûrtîr ṭhîn a, Vân aṭangin khawpui a ri dur dur bawk a, Kâwlphete chu a de zawr zawr a ni." 
Psalms77:18 Ṭhâwngaleivirah chuan khawpui chu a ri a, Khawvêl hi kâwlphe chuan a ên chhuak a, Lei chu a nghîng dawt dawt a ni." 
Psalms77:19 Tuipuiah chuan i kal ṭhîn a, Tuifinriat pawh i fang chhuak a, Mahse, i hniak hmuh tûr a awm si lo." 
Psalms77:20 Mosia leh Arona kut hmangin I mite chu berâm angin i kaihruai ṭhîn. 
Psalms78:1 Ka mite u, ka zirtîrna hi ngaithla ula, Ka thute hi lo ngaihven rawh u." 
Psalms78:2 Tehkhin thu ka sawi ang a, Hmasâng thu rilte chu ka phuh chhuak dâwn." 
Psalms78:3 Kan ngaihthlâk ṭhin, kan thu hriat te, Kan pi puten min hrilh ṭhin kha," 
Psalms78:4 An fate hnênah chuan kan zêp lo vang, Lalpa ropuina leh a chakna te, Thil mak a tih ṭhin thute kha kan hril zêl ang." 
Psalms78:5 Jakob-ho chu hriat tûr a siamsak a, Israel-ho tân dân chu a pe; An thlahte hrilh chhâwng zêl tûrin, kan pute chu thu a pe bawk;" 
Psalms78:6 Ṭhang lo thar zêlte chuan an zir theiha, La piang tûrte pawhin an fa leh te An zirtîr chhâwn tûrin." 
Psalms78:7 Pathian chu an rina, a thiltihte theihnghilh lova, A thupêkte an zawm theih nân." 
Psalms78:8 An pi pute anga awm tûr an ni lo va, Luhlul chhuaha hel chîng, Thinlung nghet lo, Pathian laka Rinawm lo an nih ve loh nân." 
Psalms78:9 Efraim-ho chu thal nên an inthuam a, Inbeih ni chuan an tlânchhiat kha." 
Psalms78:10 Pathian thuthlung an zâwm lo va, A Dân angin an awm duh lo." 
Psalms78:11 A thiltihte an theihnghilh a, Thil mak a hmuhtîrte an hre reng lo." 
Psalms78:12 Aigupta ram Zoan phaiah An pute hmuh atân thil mak tak tak a ti. 
Psalms78:13 Tuipui a tiṭhen a, a kal kaitîr ta a, Tui chu bang ang maiin a dintîr kha." 
Psalms78:14 Chhûnah chhûmin a hruai ṭhîn a, Meialh êngin a hruai zankhua bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms78:15 Thlalêrah khân lungpui a vaw khi a, Luipui tui anga tam tui a pe a." 
Psalms78:16 Lungpui ata tui a luan chhuahtîr chu Luipui angin a luang ta dur dur a. 
Psalms78:17 Chuti pawhin a lakah chuan an sual lui a, Thlalêrah khân Chungnungbera lakah an hel." 
Psalms78:18 Pathian an fiah ta ngat mai a, An ei châkzâwng an dîl." 
Psalms78:19 Pathian an sawi hnâwm a, “Thlalêr rovah Pathianin ruai a ṭheh thei dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms78:20 Lungpui vuain tui a luan chhuahtîr ngei a, Chaw meuh min pe thei dâwn em ni? A mite hi sa a pe thei ang emaw chu!” an ti." 
Psalms78:21 Lalpan a han hriat chuan a thinur a, Jakoba chungah chuan mei a thawh a, Israela chungah chuan a thinur chu a na ta hle a ni." 
Psalms78:22 Pathian an ring lo va, A chhan theiin an ring hek lo." 
Psalms78:23 Mahse, chung lam vân khi thu a pe a, Vân kawngkhârte a hawng a," 
Psalms78:24 An ei atân mana a sûrtîr a, Vân chaw a pe ta a." 
Psalms78:25 Mihring mai chuan vântirhkohte chaw an ei ta a, Hnianghnar taka ei tûr a pe a ni." 
Psalms78:26 Khawchhak ata vâna thli a tlehtîr a, A thiltihtheihnain chhim thli a hâwntîr bawk." 
Psalms78:27 Vaivut angin sa a sûrtîr a, Tuifinriat ṭiau anga tam sava a pe." 
Psalms78:28 An bûk tualah a lo tla a, An chênna bûk bul maiah chuan." 
Psalms78:29 Duh tâwkin an ei a, an tlai hle a, An châk ngei chu a pe a ni." 
Psalms78:30 Sa ṭhial ṭawn ṭawn chungin Phunnawi an bâng chuang lo. 
Psalms78:31 Pathian an chungah chuan a thinur a, An ṭhalaite a thahsak a, Israel tlangvâl chhuanvâwrte chu an thi zo ta." 
Psalms78:32 Chuti pawhin an sual lui zêl a, A thil mak tih an hmu na a, amah an ring duh chuang lo." 
Psalms78:33 An dam chhûng nite chu ho takin a tiral a, An dam chhûng kumte pawh râpthlâk takin a liam." 
Psalms78:34 A thah hnu chuan amah an zawng ṭan leh ta a, Sima ṭhahnemngaiin Pathian lam an hawi ta." 
Psalms78:35 An himna lungpui chu Pathian a nih an hre chhuak a, Anmahni tlantu chu Chungnungbera a ni." 
Psalms78:36 Mahse, an hmuiin an bum a, An leiin dâwt an hrilh bawk si." 
Psalms78:37 An thinlung chu a nghet lo va. A thuthlungah an rinawm bawk hek lo. 
Psalms78:38 Ani lah chuan a khawngaih a, An bawhchhiatna a ngaidam a, a tiboral lo, A thinur chu a insûm fo ṭhîn a, A thin thawk chu a che duh mai ngai lo." 
Psalms78:39 Mihring chak lo an nih a hre reng a, Thli tleh liam ang lek hi an ni si a." 
Psalms78:40 Thlalêrah khân an hel fo va, Ram rovah khân a thin an va tina zing em!" 
Psalms78:41 Pathian an fiah an fiah mai a, Israel-te Mi Thianghlima chu an timangang." 
Psalms78:42 A thiltihtheihzia kha an hre reng duh lo va, An hmêlmate laka a chhan laite kha an hre duh bawk hek lo." 
Psalms78:43 Aigupta ram Zoan phaia A thil mak tih ropui tak kha an hre reng lo. 
Psalms78:44 An luite chu thisenah a chantîr a, Lui tui tu man an in thei lo." 
Psalms78:45 Thosi a puantîr a, a seh nek a, Chungu a tipung a, an ramah chuan a khat." 
Psalms78:46 An thlaite chu khau rual a eitîr a, An hnathawh rah a ngêt zo bawk." 
Psalms78:47 An grep hruite rialin a chhu chat a, An theipui kûngte chu vûrin a hmet hlum bawk." 
Psalms78:48 An rante chu rialin a chhu hlum a, An ran rualte ṭêkin a dêng hlum bawk." 
Psalms78:49 An chungah chuan a thinurna râpthlâk tak chu A leihbua a, a sawisa ta nek a, Chûng chu an chhiatna thlen tûra a tirh an ni." 
Psalms78:50 A thinur hrîkthlâk nân an nun a zuah lo va, Hripui a lêntîr kha." 
Psalms78:51 Aigupta mite fa tîr chu a that vek a, An in chhûnga sei lian an vânglai fate chu." 
Psalms78:52 A mite chu berâm angin a hruai chhuak a, Thlalêrah chuan a kalpui ta." 
Psalms78:53 A hualhim a, hlauh rêng an nei lo va, An hmêlmate erawh chu tuiin a chîm pil ta." 
Psalms78:54 A ram thianghlimah chuan a hruai thleng a, He tlângram, a kut ngeia a lâkah hian." 
Psalms78:55 An hmaah chuan hnam dangte chu a hnawt chhuak a, Israel-te neih atân an ram chu a sem a, An inte chu an luah ta a." 
Psalms78:56 Pathian, Chungnungbera an fiah leh a, an hel ta a, A thu hriattîr an zâwm duh lo." 
Psalms78:57 An hawi kîr a, an pute ang bawkin vervêk takin an khawsa a, Thalngul kawi ang an ni, rin tlâk an ni ta lo." 
Psalms78:58 Hmunsâng an siamte chuan an tithinur ta a, An milem chherte chuan a thin an titâwt." 
Psalms78:59 Chûng chu a han hmuhin Pathian a thinur a, Israel-te chu a ten ta êm êm a." 
Psalms78:60 Silo hmuna a chênna ṭhin chu a rauhsan ta a, Mihring zînga a chênna in ṭhîn chu." 
Psalms78:61 A chakna leh a ropuizia lanna Thuthlung Bâwm chu, Hmêlmate a mantîr a." 
Psalms78:62 A mite chu khandaihin a sâmtîr a, A rochante chungah a thinur a ni." 
Psalms78:63 Tlangvâlte chu an kâng hlum zo va, Nulate chuan pasal tûr an nei lo." 
Psalms78:64 Puithiamte pawh khandaihin an that a, An nupuiten an ṭah ngam lo." 
Psalms78:65 Mi chak, zu rui muhîl anga, Ngawi renga a awm chu a lo harh a." 
Psalms78:66 Hmêlmate chu a ûm lêt a, A timualpho ta vek a ni." 
Psalms78:67 Josefa thlahte chu a hnâwl ta a, Efraim hnamte chu a thlang ta lo," 
Psalms78:68 Juda hnam chu a thlang ta a, A ngaihnat tak Zion tlâng nên." 
Psalms78:69 Vâna a chênna ang hmun thianghlim chu a sa ta a, Nghet taka leia hûn angin Kumkhuaa awm tûrin a hûng nghet ta." 
Psalms78:70 A chhiahhlawh Davida chu a thlang ta a, Ran rual vêng lai a la chhuak a." 
Psalms78:71 Berâm no hruai a enkawl lai chu, A rochan Israel-te leh Jakob-ho châwmtu atân a ruat ta a." 
Psalms78:72 Theihtâwp chhuahin a enkawl a, Thiam takin a kaihruai ta a ni." 
Psalms79:1 Aw Pathian, hnam dangini ram ro an rûn a, I tempul thianghlim pawh an tihbawrhbân tâk hi. Jerusalem khua chu a chim rem rum ta mai!" 
Psalms79:2 I chhiahhlawhte ruang chu Mulukawlhte eiah an hnutchhiah a, I tâna inserhte sa pawh ramsate tlan atân." 
Psalms79:3 I mite thisen chu tui ang maiin an luantîr a, Jerusalem khawlaiah chuan a luang zuih a, Phûmtu tu mah an awm lo ve." 
Psalms79:4 Kan bula awmte chuan min diriam hle a, Kan vêla awmte chuan min nuihzatin min hmusit a." 
Psalms79:5 Lalpa, eng chen nge maw i thinur anga, I thinrim chu mei anga sa a nih reng dâwn?" 
Psalms79:6 I thinur chu nangmah hre lo hnamte chungah, I hming lam lohna ramahte chuan leih rawh." 
Psalms79:7 Jakoba chhûngte chu an that zo va, An khuate chu an tiram zo ta." 
Psalms79:8 Kan pute sual mawh min phurhtîr suh la, I ngilneihzia han lantîr thuai ang che. Kan chan a chauh tak êm hi le." 
Psalms79:9 Min chhandamtu Pathian, min rawn pui la, I hming ropui avângin min chhandam la, I hming avângin min ngaidam rawh." 
Psalms79:10 Hnam dangte chuan engtizia nge “I Pathian chu khawiah nge?” min tih chhên le? I chhiahhlawhte thisen chhuahtu hnam chungah chuan, Kan hmuh ngeiah phuba han la ang che." 
Psalms79:11 Lung in tângte rûm chu i hnên lo thleng sela, I chakna ropui chuan, thi tûra tihte chu chhan chhuak ang che." 
Psalms79:12 Lalpa, kan chhehvêla chêngten an chêksawlhna che chu, A lêt sarih ngawtin rûl rawh." 
Psalms79:13 Keini hi zawng i ta kan ni, i rama tla i berâm rualte chu, Lâwmthu kan hrilh kumkhua ang che, Eng lai pawhin kan fak ang che." 
Psalms80:1 Israel-te vêngtu, i beng lo chhi ang che, Berâm anga Josefa hruai ṭhîntu, lo ngaithla teh, Cherub-ho chunga ṭhu i hmêl êng chu:" 
Psalms80:2 Efraim te, Benjamin te, Manase hnamte chungah chuan han tilang la, I chakzia chu han lantîr rawh." 
Psalms80:3 Aw Pathian, min din leh la, I hmêl êng chu min hmuhtîr rawh. Tichuan, kan him dâwn nia." 
Psalms80:4 Engkim Lalpa, Pathian, eng chen nge I mite ṭawngṭaina hi i thinursan dâwn le?" 
Psalms80:5 Chaw atân mittui i rintîr a, No lian puiin i intîr hi." 
Psalms80:6 Kan vêla awmte chuan neih tumin min chuh a, Kan hmêlmaten min nuihzat hi." 
Psalms80:7 Engkim Pathian, min din leh la, I hmêl êng chu min hmuhtîr rawh, Tichuan, kan him dâwn nia." 
Psalms80:8 Aigupta rama mi grep hrui bul i pawt chhuak a, Hnam dangte ûm chhuakin i phun ta a;" 
Psalms80:9 A vêlte chu i thian fai a, Nghet takin zung a thlâk ta a, Ram pum a awh ta e." 
Psalms80:10 Tlângte a tihlim duai a, Sidar lian pui puiah a zâm lûk a," 
Psalms80:11 Khawthlang tuipui a zâm kai a, Khawchhak luipui thlengin a zâm ta a." 
Psalms80:12 Engtizia nge a hungna pal i ṭhiah tâka, Veivâkte chuan a rah an lawh theih tâk hi le?" 
Psalms80:13 Sanghalte chuan an nawr chhum a, Ramsate chuan an tlân." 
Psalms80:14 Engkim Pathian, kan lam lo hawi leh la, Vân aṭanga rawn thlîrin min han en la, I grep hrui hi han ngaihven teh." 
Psalms80:15 I kut ngeia i phun, I tân i chawrtîr hluah hluah kha a ni si a." 
Psalms80:16 Hmêlmaten min hâl a, min tan chhum a, I hmêl dur chuan tiboral rawh." 
Psalms80:17 I mi duhsaka chungah chuan i kut nghat la, Mihring fapa, nangin i tihchaka chungah ngei chuan." 
Psalms80:18 Tichuan, kan hawikîrsan lo vang che, Min tiharh la, i hming kan lam dâwn nia." 
Psalms80:19 Lalpa, Engkim Lalpa, min din leh la, I hmêl êng chu min hmuhtîr rawh. Tichuan, kan him dâwn nia." 
Psalms81:1 Min tichaktu Pathian fakin in aw chhuah rawh u, Jakoba Pathian chu fakin zai rawh u." 
Psalms81:2 Hla sa ula, benchhek kha khâwng rawh u, Perhkhuang leh ṭingṭang rimawite rem bawk rawh u." 
Psalms81:3 Thla tharah chuan tawtawrâwt hâm ula, Kût ni, thlahleinga zânah chuan." 
Psalms81:4 Hei hi Israel ramah chuan tih ṭhin tûr a ni, Jakoba Pathian thupêk a ni." 
Psalms81:5 Josefa thlahte tih tûra ruat a ni. Aigupta ram a fan lai khân, “Ka la hriat ngai lohte aw ka ngaithla a," 
Psalms81:6 An rit phurhte ka lâk kiansak a, An thil chawina kho pawh ka paihsak kha." 
Psalms81:7 Mangangin min au va, ka chhâng ta a, Khawpui rîkna, ka bihrûkna hmun aṭang ngei chuan. Meriba tui bula ka fiah che u kha," 
Psalms81:8 Ka mite u, ka zilhna hi ngaithla ula, Aw Israel, ka thu hi ngai ula ka va ti êm:" 
Psalms81:9 Ram dang pathian be suh ula, Hnam dang pathian hmaah kûn hek suh u." 
Psalms81:10 Kei hi Lalpa, in Pathian chu ka ni, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u ka ni. In kâ kha âng rawh u, ka châwm dâwn a che u." 
Psalms81:11 Nimahsela, ka mite chuan ka aw an hre duh lo, Israel chuan engah mah min ngai ta lo." 
Psalms81:12 An luhlul êm êm a, An thu thuin ka awmtîr ta." 
Psalms81:13 Ka mite chuan ka thu hi ngaithlain Israel-te chuan ka kawng hi zawh teh sela aw! 
Psalms81:14 An dote chu ka han titlâwm ang a, An hmêlmate chungah ka kut ka thlâk thuai tûr." 
Psalms81:15 A hmaah chuan an dawl ang a, Lalpa hawtute chu An chan a chau hlen ang." 
Psalms81:16 Buh tui berin ka châwm ang a, Lungpuia khawizu-in ka titlai tûr che u a ni.”" 
Psalms82:1 Pathian chu pathianho zîngah a ṭhu a, An zîngah chuan ro a han rêl a." 
Psalms82:2 ‘Dik lo takin eng chen nge ro in rêl anga, Mi sualte chu in duhsak zêl dâwn le?" 
Psalms82:3 Retheite leh fahrahte chu chhan ṭhîn ula, Pachhiate leh baihvaite chungah pawh ṭhat chhuah rawh u." 
Psalms82:4 Pachhiate leh vâkvaite chu hum ṭhîn ula, Mi sualte kut ata chhan chhuak rawh u.’" 
Psalms82:5 Eng mah an hre lo va, eng mah an ngaihtuah bawk hek lo, Thimah an tei mai mai a, khawvêl innghahna ber dikna a bo zo ta e." 
Psalms82:6 Chungnungbera fate niin Pathian fate in ni emaw ka ti a," 
Psalms82:7 Mihring zînga milian, mitê ang lek Thi tûra ruat in ni si a.’" 
Psalms82:8 Aw Pathian, lo thawk chhuak la, Lei chungah hian ro han rêl rawh, Hnam zawng zawng hi i ta an ni." 
Psalms83:1 Aw Pathian, ngawi reng teh suh, Reh reng lo la; aw Pathian, awm hle hle suh." 
Psalms83:2 I hmêlmate an inhrosa a ni, Nangmah hawtute chu an dâk hrâw hrâw ta mai." 
Psalms83:3 I mite chu vervêk taka beih dân tûr te, I duhsakte chungchâng phiarin an inrâwn a," 
Psalms83:4 ‘Hawh u, he hnam hi i nuai bo vang, Israel hming hi bo hlen rawh se,’ an ti." 
Psalms83:5 An inthurual ta a, Nangmah bei tûr chein thu an thlung ta," 
Psalms83:6 Edom mi te, Ismael mi te, Moab leh Hagar mi te," 
Psalms83:7 Gebal leh Amon mi te, Amalek leh Filistia-ho, Tura khaw mi te nên an inthurual." 
Psalms83:8 Asuria pawh an zîngah chuan a tel ve, Lota thlahte ṭanpui tûrin." 
Psalms83:9 Midian chunga i tih ang khân, Kison luia Sisera leh Jabina ang khân ti la," 
Psalms83:10 Endor khuaa i tihhlumte ang khân, An ruang chu lei chungah ṭawih hlawm rawh se." 
Psalms83:11 An mi liante Oreba leh Zeeba angin siam la, An lalte chu Zeba leh Zalmuna angin." 
Psalms83:12 ‘Pathian ram duh lai chu I luahlân ang u,’ an ti vei a." 
Psalms83:13 Aw ka Pathian, ṭhâwngaleivir lâktîr ang che, Thliin buhpâwl a len ang hi ni hlawm rawh se." 
Psalms83:14 Ramhnuai a kâng ang leh Tlâng hnim a kâng hluah hluah ang hian," 
Psalms83:15 Thlipuiin nuai nek la, I thli hrâng chuan tichiai rawh." 
Psalms83:16 An hmêlte chu sen awp awp khawpin tizak ang che, Lalpa, i hming an lam theih nân." 
Psalms83:17 Mualpho leh beidawngin awm kumkhua sela, Zak takin boral rawh se." 
Psalms83:18 I hming chu Lalpa a ni a, Nang chauh hi khawvêl pum puia Chungnungbera i nih hre rawh se." 
Psalms84:1 Engkim Lalpa, i chênna chu a va duhawm em!" 
Psalms84:2 Lalpa, i tualzâwl hi ka ngai ṭhîn a, A ni, ka lung a lêng hle ṭhîn. Ka nun pum hi Pathian nung Fakin hlim takin a au va ni." 
Psalms84:3 I maichâm bulahte chuan chawngzawng pawhin bu chhehna tûr a hmu a, Vamûrte chuan an note dahna tûr bu an chhep bawk. Engkim Lalpa, ka lal leh ka Pathian." 
Psalms84:4 I ina chêngte chu an nihlawh e, An fak fo thei ṭhîn che a ni." 
Psalms84:5 I hnên ata chakna dawng ṭhînte chu an nihlawh e, Zion lamlian zawh châk ṭhînte chu." 
Psalms84:6 Baka ruam ro an kalna chu kal tlang mah se, Tui hna awmnaah a chantîr a, Ruah hmasa chu a tling lung ṭhîn." 
Psalms84:7 An kal chu an tha a zâng tawlh tawlh a, Zion-a Pathian hnên an thleng ngei ang." 
Psalms84:8 Lalpa, Engkim Pathian, ka dilna hi lo ngaithla la, Aw Jakoba Pathian, i beng lo chhi ang che." 
Psalms84:9 Aw Pathian, kan phaw, en teh, I hriakthiha hi duhsak ang che." 
Psalms84:10 I biak in tuala ni khat awm chu Hmun danga ni sângkhat awm aiin a ṭha zâwk. Kan Pathian in kawngkhâr vêngtu nih chu, Mi sual puan ina awm ai chuan ka thlang zâwk." 
Psalms84:11 Ka tân Lalpa hi ni leh phaw a ni, Aw Pathian, min khawngaih la, min chawimawi rawh. Lalpan a ṭhatna chu a ui lo vang, Dik taka ti ṭhînte lakah chuan." 
Psalms84:12 Engkim Lalpa, nangmah ringtute chu an nihlawh e." 
Psalms85:1 Lalpa, i ram i duhsak a, Jakoba chu i tihmuingîlleh ta a," 
Psalms85:2 I mite bawhchhiatna i hlîp a, An sual zawng zawng i ngaidam bawk." 
Psalms85:3 I thinurna i hnûk kîr a, I thinrim nasa tak chu i la kîr ta." 
Psalms85:4 Min chhandamtu Pathian, kan lam lo hawi leh la, Kan chunga i lungnihlohna chu tidai ang che." 
Psalms85:5 Kan chungah hian i thin a ur rengin, Rei tak i thin a rim zêl dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms85:6 I mite hi i chungah kan hlim theih nân, Min tiharh leh tawh dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Psalms85:7 Lalpa, i ngilneihna chu lantîr leh la, Min rawn chhandam ang che." 
Psalms85:8 Lalpa, Pathian chuan eng nge a sawi ka ngaithla teh ang, A mi, amah ngaihsaktute tân remthu a sawi a, A mi rinawm, thinlung taka amah pantute hnênah chuan." 
Psalms85:9 Amah ṭihtute chu a chhandam duh ngei ang, kan ramah hian a ropuina a chêng bawk ang." 
Psalms85:10 Ngilneihna leh rinawmna chu an awm dûn ang a, Dikna leh remna pawh an inkuah ang." 
Psalms85:11 Lei aṭangin rinawmna chu a chawr ang a, Vân aṭangin dikna a lo zâm thla bawk ang." 
Psalms85:12 Lalpa pawhin thil ṭha a pe ang a, Kan ramah hian buh leh thlaite a thar ṭeuh vang." 
Psalms85:13 Diknain a hma a hruai ang a, A kalna tûr kawng chu a buatsaih ang." 
Psalms86:1 Lalpa, i beng chhi la, min chhâng ang che, Rethei leh pachhe tak ka ni si a." 
Psalms86:2 I tân ka inpe a, min vêng ang che, I chhiahhlawh hi chhanhim la, ka rin Pathian i ni." 
Psalms86:3 Lalpa, min khawngaih rawh, Nilêngin ka auh che hi." 
Psalms86:4 I chhiahhlawh hi min tihlim la, Lalpa, i lamah ngawt ka lo hawi hi." 
Psalms86:5 Lalpa, nang chu i ṭha a, ngaihdam i peih reng a, I hming lamtu chungah chuan ngil i nei êm êm a ni." 
Psalms86:6 Lalpa, ka ṭawngṭaina i lo ngaithla ṭhîn a, Khawngaih dîla ka au i bengkhawn ṭhîn." 
Psalms86:7 Mangan laiin ka au che a, Min lo chhâng ṭhîn." 
Psalms86:8 Lalpa, nang ang Pathian an awm lo va, I thil tih ang tu man an ti thei lo." 
Psalms86:9 I siam hnam tinrêngte an lo kal dâwn, i hmaah an kûn ang, Lalpa, i hming an chawimawi ang." 
Psalms86:10 Nang hi i ropui a, thil mak tam tak i ti, Nangmah chauh hi Pathian i ni." 
Psalms86:11 Lalpa, i duhzâwng min zirtîr la, Rinawm takin ka awm dâwn nia, I hming ṭih reng tûrin thinlung thianghlim min pe ang che." 
Psalms86:12 Lalpa, ka Pathian, Ka theihtâwpin ka fak ang che, I hming ka chawimawi kumkhua ang." 
Psalms86:13 Min lainatna a nasa a, Seol-a chhuk tûr min chhan chhuah hi." 
Psalms86:14 Aw Pathian, mi chapoten min rawn bei a, Mi râwng pui pui, nangmah pawisa lote chuan Min thah an tum." 
Psalms86:15 Lalpa, nang chu Pathian ngilnei tak leh zahngai thei tak i ni, Thinnel, khawngaihna leh rinawmna ngah i ni." 
Psalms86:16 Ka lam hi lo hawi la, min khawngaih rawh. I chhiahhlawh hi i chakna pe ve la, I chhiahhlawhnu fapa hi chhandam ang che." 
Psalms86:17 Ka chungah i ṭhatzia han tilang la, Min hawtuten hmu se, zak hle rawh se, Min ṭanpuia min thlamuan ṭhîntu chu Lalpa, nang hi i ni." 
Psalms87:1 A tlâng thianghlimah chuan Lalpan khua a din a," 
Psalms87:2 Lalpan Jerusalem khawpui hi, Jakoba thlahte khua zawng zawng aiin a ngaina zâwk." 
Psalms87:3 Aw Pathian khawpui, i chanchin An sawi ropui hle a ni." 
Psalms87:4 ‘Min pawmtute zîngah Aigupta leh Babulon chu, Ka chhiar tel ang. Filistia leh Tura, Kus mite nên, Jerusalem-a piang zîngah ka chhiar tel ang.’" 
Psalms87:5 Zion hnênah chuan, ‘He mi pawh hi, saw mi pawh saw - heta piang a ni e,’ an ti ang a, Chungnungberan chu chu a nemnghet ang." 
Psalms87:6 Lalpa hming ziakna bu-ah chuan, ‘Hei pawh heta piang hi a ni,’ tiin a ziak lût ang." 
Psalms87:7 ‘Zion aṭang vek hian a ni Malsâwmna kan dawn ṭhin,’ tiin An zai ang a, an lâm bawk ang." 
Psalms88:1 Aw Lalpa, min chhandamtu Pathian, Chhûnah ka au che a, zânah ka rawn pan che." 
Psalms88:2 Ka ṭawngṭaina i hnên lo thleng sela, Ka mangang au lo bengkhawn teh." 
Psalms88:3 Thil ṭha lo hi ka ning ta e, Ka thi ṭhelh ṭhelh a ni." 
Psalms88:4 Thlân khura liam tûrte anga ngaih ka ni a, Chhan tlâk ni tawh lo ang ka ni." 
Psalms88:5 Mitthi zînga chhiar tel, thlâna zalh tawh, Mitthi ang mai ka ni. Chûng mite chu i hre tawh lo va, Ṭanpui phâk pawh an ni tawh lo." 
Psalms88:6 Khur thûk tak mawngah chuan min dah ta a, Hmun thim thûk takah chuan." 
Psalms88:7 I thinurna chuan min delh tlat a, Min vaw na êm êm a ni." 
Psalms88:8 Ka ṭhiante min lâk sawnsak daih a, An tân tenawm ka ni ta a, Min khuahkhirh tlat a, ka vâk chhuak thei lo." 
Psalms88:9 Ka tuar a na êm a, ka mit a vai zo va, Lalpa, ni tinin ka au che a, I lamah ka kut ka phar fo ṭhîn." 
Psalms88:10 Mitthite tân thil mak i tihsak ngai em ni? An lo thovin an fak dâwn che em ni? 
Psalms88:11 Thlâna zalh tawhte chuan i ngilneihzia an hril theiin, Chhiatna tâwk tawhte chuan i rinawmzia an puang thei dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms88:12 Hmun thimah chuan i thiltih mak hmuh theih em ni? Hriat reng tawh lohte ramah chuan I dikzia hi hriat phâk em ni? 
Psalms88:13 Aw Lalpa, kei chuan ka au che a, Tûk tin ka ṭawngṭai ṭhîn." 
Psalms88:14 Lalpa, engati nge min thlauhthlâka, Ka lakah hian i hmêl i thup tâk hi?" 
Psalms88:15 Ka tleirâwl chhuah ata hrehawm ka tuar reng a, Ka thi lek lek ṭhîn a, I ṭihbaiawmna chuan ka thauvah hian min man a." 
Psalms88:16 I thinur chuan min nuai ṭhîn a, Nangmah hlauvin ka chau chhe ta." 
Psalms88:17 Tui lian angin ni tin min chîm reng a, Min hual vêl tlat ṭhîn a." 
Psalms88:18 Ka ṭhian bul leh ka lainate min lâk sawnsak daih a, Thim hi ka ṭhian ber a ni ta." 
Psalms89:1 Lalpa, i ngilneihzia zaiin ka chawi ang a, I rinawmzia ka hril kumkhua bawk ang." 
Psalms89:2 I ngilneihna a hlun dâwn tih ka hria, I rinawmzia lah vân anga nghet a ni." 
Psalms89:3 ‘Ka mi thlan hnênah thu ka thlung a, Ka chhiahhlawh Davida hnênah thu ka tiam kha." 
Psalms89:4 A thlahte chu lal an ni zêl ang a, An thlah zêlte pawh chuan i lalṭhutthlêng an luah zêl ang.’" 
Psalms89:5 Lalpa, vânten i thil mak tih an aupui a, Mi thianghlimte pung khâwm zîngah i rinawmzia an fak." 
Psalms89:6 Lalpa, vânah nangmah tluk hi tu mah an awm lo va, Lalpa ang hi vân mite zîngah tu nge awm?" 
Psalms89:7 Mi thianghlimte awm khâwm zîngah Pathian hlauhawm tak i ni, I bula awmte tân Pathian ṭihbaiawm tak i ni." 
Psalms89:8 Lalpa, Engkim Pathian, nang anga thiltithei tu nge awma, Lalpa, rinawmnaa khat tu dang nge awm?" 
Psalms89:9 Tuifinriat so bulh bulh chungah ro i rêl a, A fâwnte chu i hau reh ṭhîn." 
Psalms89:10 Rahab chu i vua a, a thi dêr mai, I bân chakin hmêlmate chu i vai darh ta." 
Psalms89:11 Vân khi i ta a ni a, lei pawh hi i ta a ni, Lei leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng hi i siam a ni." 
Psalms89:12 Chhim leh hmâr i siam a, Tabor leh Hermon tlâng i hming fakin an au." 
Psalms89:13 I bân tha chu a va chak êm! I vei lam pawh chak tak a ni, I ding lam chu a chak lehzual." 
Psalms89:14 Dik taka tih leh rorêlna fel hi I lalṭhutthlêng nghahchhan a ni. Ngilneihna leh rinawmnain hma i la ṭhîn. 
Psalms89:15 Lalpa, nangmah faka zai nachâng hriate chu an nihlawh e, I hmêl ênga lêng ṭhînte chu." 
Psalms89:16 Nilêngin i hming vângin an lâwm ṭhîn a, I dik êm avângin an hlim takmeuh ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms89:17 Ropui taka hnehtîrtu i ni a, I duhsakna avângin an chak zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms89:18 Kan phaw hi Lalpa ta a ni, Kan lal pawh hi Israel Mi Thianghlima ta a ni." 
Psalms89:19 Nangmah ngaihsaktu hnênah zêlin thu i sawi a, “Pasalṭha tân ṭanpuitu ka siamsak a, Mipui zînga ka duha chu ka chawisâng ta." 
Psalms89:20 Ka chhiahhlawh Davida ka chhar ta a, Hriak thianghlim chu ka thih ta e." 
Psalms89:21 Ka chaknain ka thuam ang a, Ka thiltihtheihna chuan a tichak ang." 
Psalms89:22 Hmêlmate chu a chungah an inlek ngam lo vang, Mi sualte chuan an timangang hek lo vang." 
Psalms89:23 A hmêlmate chu ka vaw nek ang a, A hawtute ka vuak chauhsak bawk ang." 
Psalms89:24 Ka ngilneihna leh rinawmna a chungah ka tilang ang a, Ka hming avângin hnehtu ka nihtîr ang." 
Psalms89:25 Tuifinriatah khuan thu a nei ang a, Luipui thleng khian a lal bawk ang." 
Psalms89:26 Ani chuan, ‘Ka Pa, ka Pathian i ni a, min humtu lungpui, Min chhandamtu i ni,’ min la ti ang." 
Psalms89:27 Keiin fa tîrah ka neih ang a, Khawvêla lal ropui berah ka siam bawk ang." 
Psalms89:28 A chungah ngil ka nei kumkhua ang a, Ka thuthlung pawh ka vawng tlat ang." 
Psalms89:29 A thlahte chu ka laltîr zêl ang a, A ram chu vân awm chhûng chuan a kin lo vang." 
Psalms89:30 A fate chuan ka Dân hi an pawisak lohva, Ka duh anga ro an rêl duh lohva," 
Psalms89:31 Ka thutak an ngaihnêpa, Ka thupêkte an awih loh chuan," 
Psalms89:32 An sual avângin tiangin ka vua ang a, An bawhchhiatna avângin ka sawisa ang." 
Psalms89:33 Mahse, ka ngilneihna a dai hlen chuang lo vang a, Ka rinawmzia a nêp chuang hek lo vang." 
Psalms89:34 Ka thuthlung chu ka bawhchhe lo vang a, Ka sawi tawh chu ka tidanglam hek lo vang." 
Psalms89:35 Ka hming chhâla ka tiam tawh ang khân, Davida chu ka thlahthlam ngai lo vang." 
Psalms89:36 A thlahte chu eng lai mahin an mang lo vang a, Ni khi a awm chhûng chu a ram ka tungding ang." 
Psalms89:37 Vâna thla a awm chhûng chu A ram a kin lo vang,” tiin." 
Psalms89:38 I hriakthiha chungah nang chu i thinur a, I hawisan a, i thlauhthla a." 
Psalms89:39 I chhiahhlawh hnêna i thuthlung chu i palzût a, A lallukhum leiah i paihsak ta." 
Psalms89:40 A khaw kulh bangte chu i ṭhiahsak a, A kulhbîng chu a chim ta a." 
Psalms89:41 A fang apiangte chuan an duh duh an la a, Khaw ṭhenawmte nuihzat a ni ta e." 
Psalms89:42 Amah dotute chu i tichak a, A hmêlma zawng zawng i tihlim ta." 
Psalms89:43 A khandaih chu i tibil a, Inbeihnaah a chak i phal hek lo." 
Psalms89:44 A ropuina i lâksak a, A lalṭhutthlêng leiah i paih thla dêr." 
Psalms89:45 A tlangvâl chhûng i tihtawisak lehnghal a, Zakin a kun tlawk tlawk a ni." 
Psalms89:46 Lalpa, eng chen nge i bihrûk reng dâwna, I thinur chu mei anga a alh dâwn le?" 
Psalms89:47 Ka dam chhûng tawizia hi hre reng ang che, Mihringte hi thi mai theiin i siam si a." 
Psalms89:48 Mihring piang tawh tu nge thi lo tûr awm? Tu nge Seol pumpelh thei ang? 
Psalms89:49 Lalpa, tûn hma lama i ngilneihnate leh Davida hnêna rinawm i tiamte kha khaw nge ni ta?" 
Psalms89:50 Lalpa, i chhiahhlawh an thamlohzia hi hre reng ang che. Mi tam takin min sawichhiat hi theihnghilh lul suh." 
Psalms89:51 Lalpa, i hmêlmaten i hriakthih hi an hmusit a, A kalna apiangah an nuihzat zui." 
Psalms89:52 Lalpa chu fak kumkhua rawh u; Amen, Amen." 
Psalms90:1 Hmasâng ata, Lalpa, Nang chu kan chênna in i ni." 
Psalms90:2 Tlângte a din chhuah hma, Lei leh khawvêl a pian hma daih tawh khân, Nang chu chatuan chatuana awm Pathian i ni." 
Psalms90:3 ‘Hringfate u, kîr tawh rawh u,’ i han tih chuan, Leiah an kîr mai ṭhîn." 
Psalms90:4 I ngaihah chuan kum sâng pawh hi Nimin ral ta ang chauh kha a ni a, Zân vên khat ang lek hi a ni." 
Psalms90:5 Tui lian angin i hnâwl liam a, Ṭhangkhat mu ang lek hi a ni. Zînga hnim chawr ang hi a ni." 
Psalms90:6 Zîngah a lo chawr a, a lo pâr a, An han sâm a, tlaiah a vuai mai ṭhîn." 
Psalms90:7 I thinurna chuan min tichau dêr a, I thin a rim avângin kan mangang chhe ṭhîn." 
Psalms90:8 Kan bawhchhiatnate chu i hmu vek a, Kan sual tih rûkte pawh i hmu thei reng a ni." 
Psalms90:9 Kan dam lai nite chu i thinurna avângin a tla thuai a, Kan dam chhûng kumte chu a thâmral ṭhîn." 
Psalms90:10 Kan dam chhûng chu kum sawmsarih emaw a ni a, A chak deuh chu kum sawmriat pawh an dam. Mahse, kan dam rei leh a hahthlâk thlâwn mai a, A ral thuai a, kan bo ta vang vang ṭhîn." 
Psalms90:11 I thinur natzia hi tu nge hre phâk? Nangmah ṭih tûr anga hlau che tu nge awm? 
Psalms90:12 Kan dam chhûng ni tlêmzia min zirtîr la, Kan lo fin zâwk theih nân." 
Psalms90:13 Lalpa, engtikah nge i lo lamlêt ang? I chhiahhlawh hi rawn hnêm ta che:" 
Psalms90:14 I ngilneihna nasa tak chuan zîngah min titlai la, Kan dam chhûngin hlim takin kan zai tawh ang." 
Psalms90:15 Hrehawm leh thil ṭha lo min tuartîr chenin Min tihlim leh ang che. 
Psalms90:16 I chhiahhlawhten i thiltihte hmu sela, An fate chuan i ropuizia hmu bawk rawh se." 
Psalms90:17 Lalpa, kan Pathian mawizia hi kan chungah lang sela, Kan kut hnathawhte hi tinghet la, Kan kut hnathawhte hi malsâwm ang che." 
Psalms91:1 Chungnungbera thla hnuaia chênga, Engkimtitheia hlima awm chuan," 
Psalms91:2 “ Lalpa, ka tlûkluhna, ka himna kulhpui, Ka Pathian, ka rin chhan ber i ni,” a ti ngei ang." 
Psalms91:3 Thang ata chu a chhan chhuak ang che a, Hripui hlauhawm lakah a hum ang che." 
Psalms91:4 I chungah chuan thla a zâr ang a, A thla hnuaiah i tlulût ang, Rinawm takin a vêng ang che a, a hum ang che." 
Psalms91:5 Zâna thil hlauhawmte, Chhûna thal lêng ṭhînte i hlau lo vang." 
Psalms91:6 Thima hri lêng ṭhîn leh Chhûna lêng ṭhîn chhiatna i hlau hek lo vang. 
Psalms91:7 Sâng têl i sîrah an tluin I vêlah chuan sîng têl thal phung mah se, A khawih ve hauh lo vang che." 
Psalms91:8 I mit zawngin i hmu ngei ang, Mi sual chunga phuba lâk chu a hmuhin i hmu chauh vang." 
Psalms91:9 I tlûkluhna chu Lalpa a ni a, Chungnungbera bula chêng i nih hi." 
Psalms91:10 Thil ṭha lo chuan a nang lo vang che a, I awmnaah hri chhia a lo hnai lo vang." 
Psalms91:11 I kalna apianga vêng tûr chein Vântirhkohte chu a tîr ang a; 
Psalms91:12 An kutin an dâwm ang che a, Lungah i ke i chhuih lo vang." 
Psalms91:13 Sakeibaknei leh rûl i rap ang a, Sakeibaknei vânglai leh rûlngân i chîl bawk ang." 
Psalms91:14 Min ngainat êm avângin ka chhan ang che, Ka hming a pawm tâk avângin ka chawisâng ang." 
Psalms91:15 Min au vang a, ka lo chhâng ang, A mangan leh ka awmpui ang a, Ka chhan chhuak ang a, ka chawimawi ang." 
Psalms91:16 A duh chen chen a dam ka phal ang a, Ka chhandamna ka hmuhtîr ang." 
Psalms92:1 Lalpa hnêna lâwmthu hrilhi a va ṭha em! Aw Chungnungber, i hming faka zai te," 
Psalms92:2 Tûk tin i ngilneihzia hril te, Zâna i rinawmzia puan te," 
Psalms92:3 Ṭingṭang hrui sâwm nei leh perhkhuangte leh, Bengbung rimawite nêna fak che hi a va nuam êm!" 
Psalms92:4 Lalpa, i thiltihin min tihlim a, I kut hnathawh lâwmin ka au." 
Psalms92:5 I thiltih chu, Lalpa, a va ropui tak êm! I ngaihtuahte chu a va thûk êm!" 
Psalms92:6 Hêng hi mi nazawngin an man pha lo, Mi â-te hriat rual lah a ni hek lo." 
Psalms92:7 Mi suaksualte chu hnim angin an chawr hluah hluah a, Thil sual titute pawh an vul hle si ṭhin hi; Mahse, boral vang vang tûr an ni si." 
Psalms92:8 Nang erawh chu, Lalpa, Kumkhuaa chungnung ber i ni." 
Psalms92:9 Ngai teh, Lalpa, i hmêlmate, Nangmah dotute chu an boral ang; Thil sual titute pawh an darh vek ang." 
Psalms92:10 Sele pachal angin mi tichak a, Hriak thar min thih bawk a;" 
Psalms92:11 Min châng rutute lah ka hmu thei zêl a, Mi sual, min beitute thâwm pawh ka hre thuai ṭhîn." 
Psalms92:12 Mi dikte chu tûmthing angin an duah ang a, Lebanon tlâng sidar angin an ṭhangduang ang." 
Psalms92:13 Lalpa ina phun, kan Pathian in tuala awm tate chu an chawr hluah hluah ang a," 
Psalms92:14 Upa hle mah sela, an rah thliah thluah ang a, An tuaiin an hring hluah ang." 
Psalms92:15 Min humtu Lalpa chu mi ngîl a ni a, Sualna rêng rêng a nei lo tih an hril ṭhîn ang." 
Psalms93:1 Lalpa chu Lalber a ni a, Ropuina leh chaknain ainthuam a, Khawvêl hi nghîng lo tûrin a hûng tlat bawk a ni." 
Psalms93:2 Hmasâng ata i lalṭhutthlêng chu a ding nghet êm êm a, Nang chu chatuana awm i ni." 
Psalms93:3 Lalpa, tuifinriat chu a lo fâwn a, A fâwnte chu a ri hlup hlup mai a, A inchhawk ulh ulh mai." 
Psalms93:4 Tuifâwn ri hum hum te, Tuifinriat fâwn inchhawk ulh ulhte ai hi chuan, Vân sânga awm Lalpa chu a ropui zâwk daih e." 
Psalms93:5 I thu hriattîrte chu a rin tlâk êm êm a, Aw Lalpa, kumkhua atân, I chênna leh thianghlimna hi a inmawi hle a ni." 
Psalms94:1 Lalpa, phuba latu Pathiani ni, Phuba latu Pathian, lo lang tawh rawh." 
Psalms94:2 Lei chungah hian ro han rêl la, Chapote chu an phu tâwkin han thungrûl rawh." 
Psalms94:3 Lalpa, mi sualte hi Eng chen nge an inchhuan dâwn le?" 
Psalms94:4 Chapo takin an ṭawng thâwr thâwr ṭhîn a, Thil sual titu zawng zawngte chu an uang hle ṭhîn." 
Psalms94:5 Lalpa, i mite hi an sawisa nek a, I rochante an tiduhdah." 
Psalms94:6 Hmeithaite leh kan zînga hnam dangte, Fahrahte pawh an that zêl mai." 
Psalms94:7 “ Lalpan a hmu lo vang, Jakoba Pathian chuan a ngaihsak lo vang,” an ti." 
Psalms94:8 Mi mâwlte u, ngaihtuah ngun hle ula, Mi â-te u, engtikah nge in fin ang aw?" 
Psalms94:9 Beng siamtu chuan a hre thei dâwn lo vem ni le? Mit siamtu chuan a hmu thei lo vang maw? 
Psalms94:10 Hnam tin thununtu chuan a hrem thei lo vang maw? Mihring zirtîrtu chuan hriatna a nei lo vang maw? 
Psalms94:11 Lalpan an ngaihtuahte chu a hre vek a, Engmahlo mai a nih a hria." 
Psalms94:12 Lalpan mi a thununte leh A Dân a zirtîrte chu an nihlawh e. 
Psalms94:13 Hmêlma lakah rilru hahchawlhna a pe ṭhîn, mi sualte tlâkna tûr hum laih a nih laiin." 
Psalms94:14 Lalpan a mite chu a kalsan ngai lo va, A rochante chu a thlahthlam ngai hek lo." 
Psalms94:15 Mi felte tân rorêlna dik a awm leh ang a, Thinlung ngîlte pawhin an ṭâwmpui ang." 
Psalms94:16 Mi sual laka min chhan tûrin tu nge lo ding chhuak ang? Thil sual titu lakah tu nge min rawn ṭan ang? 
Psalms94:17 Min ṭanpuitu chu Lalpa ni suh sela chuan, Ngawih vang vangna ramah ka kal daih tawh âwm e." 
Psalms94:18 Ka tlu dâwn emaw ka tih laiin Lalpa ngilneihna chuan min chelh ṭhîn. 
Psalms94:19 Ka mangan êm êm laite chuan Min thlamuan a, min tihlim ṭhîn." 
Psalms94:20 Rorêlna dik lo chu i ngaithei lo, Dik lo taka rêl hi tih dân tûra neih ṭhîntu nên," 
Psalms94:21 Mi dikte nun lâk tuma beia, Pawi khawih lo a rûka thiam loh chantîrtu chu." 
Psalms94:22 Lalpa chu min humtu a ni, Ka Pathian chu ka tlûkluhna lungpui a ni." 
Psalms94:23 An suahsualna avângin a nuai bo vang; Lalpa, kan Pathian chuan a tiboral vek ang." 
Psalms95:1 Hawh u, Lalpa fakin hlimtakin i zai ang u, Min humhimtu Pathian fakin i au chiam ang." 
Psalms95:2 Lâwmthu sawiin a hmaah kal ila, Hlim takin a fak hla i sa ang u." 
Psalms95:3 Lalpa hi zawng Pathian ropui tak a ni a, Hnam dang pathiante chunga Lalber a ni." 
Psalms95:4 Lei chhûngril thûk takte a kuta awm a ni, Tlâng sângte pawh a ta a ni." 
Psalms95:5 Tuifinriat hi a ta a ni, a siam a ni si a, Khawmual pawh hi a kutchhuak a ni e." 
Psalms95:6 Lo kal ula, chibai bûkin a hmaah chuan i kûn ang u, Lalpa min siamtu hmaah chuan i ṭhingṭhi ang." 
Psalms95:7 Ani chu kan Pathian a ni a, Keini pawh hi a rama tla, a kuta awm berâmte chu kan ni. Vawiin ngei hian a thu hi ngaithla teh ula aw!" 
Psalms95:8 “Meriba-a an tih ang khân in thinlung chu tikhauh suh u, Masa thalêra an tih ang khân." 
Psalms95:9 In pute khân tah chuan min chian a, Ka thiltihte an hmu chungin min fiah lui a." 
Psalms95:10 Anni chu kum sawmli chhûng khân ka kham hle a, Mi luhlul tak an ni. ‘Ka duhzâwng pawh an hre thei lo,’ ka ti ṭhîn a." 
Psalms95:11 Ka thinur a, thu ka tiam ta tlat a, ‘Ka pêk tûr, hahchawlhna ram chu, an thleng lo vang,’ ” tiin." 
Psalms96:1 Lalpa fakin hla sa ula, hlathar sa rawh u, Leia mi tinrêngin Lalpa fakin hla sa rawh se." 
Psalms96:2 Lalpa chawimawia hla sa-in, a hming fak ula; Min chhandamna thu lâwmawm hi ni tin puang rawh u." 
Psalms96:3 Hnam tin hnênah hril darh ula, Mi tin hnênah a thil mak tih chu puang rawh u." 
Psalms96:4 Lalpa chu a ropui a, fak chiam tûr a ni, Pathian dang zawng aiin ṭih tûr a ni." 
Psalms96:5 Hnam dang pathiante chu a lem mai an ni a, Lalpa hi zawng vân siamtu a ni e." 
Psalms96:6 Ropuina leh chawimawina chuan a hual vêl a, Thiltihtheihna leh mawina chu a Hmun Thianghlimah a awm." 
Psalms96:7 Khawvêl hnam tinrêngte u, Lalpa chawimawi ula, Lalpa ropuina leh chakna chu fak rawh u" 
Psalms96:8 Lalpa hming ropui chu fak fo ula, Thilpêk kengin a inah lo haw rawh u." 
Psalms96:9 Thianghlim leh mawi taka inthuamin,. Lalpa hmaah lo kûn rawh u, Leia chêng zawng zawng pawh hlauvin khûr rawh se." 
Psalms96:10 Hnam tin hnênah, “ Lalpan ro a rêl e,” ti rawh u, Nghîng lo tûrin lei hi a hûng tlat a, Mi tin chungah dik takin ro a rêl dâwn." 
Psalms96:11 Vânte u, hlim ula, lei pawh hi lâwm rawh se, Tuifinriat leh a chhûnga awmte chu au dur dur rawh se." 
Psalms96:12 Lalpa hmaah chuan Lo leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng hi Lâwm takin awm sela, Ngaw thing zawng zawngte chu Hlimin au hluah hluah bawk rawh se." 
Psalms96:13 Lalpa chu lei chungah rorêl tûrin a lo kal e, Khawvêl chungah dik takin ro a rêl ang a, Rinawm takin mi tinrêng thu a rêlsak dâwn si a." 
Psalms97:1 Lalpan ro a rêl e, lei hi lâwm se, Thliarkârte u, hlim bawk rawh u." 
Psalms97:2 Chhûm leh thim mup a vêlah chuan a awm a, Dik taka tih leh tluang taka rorêl hi A lalṭhutthlêng nghahchhan a ni." 
Psalms97:3 A hmaah mei a alh reng a, Amah hualtu hmêlmate chu a kâng ral ṭhîn." 
Psalms97:4 A kawlphe chuan khawvêl a ên zawr zawr a, Leiin a han hmuh chuan a khûr." 
Psalms97:5 Lalpa hmaah khawihnûn angin tlângte an tui a, Khawvêl pum pui hi Lalpa hmaah chuan." 
Psalms97:6 Vânte khian a dikzia an tlângaupui ṭhîn a, Mi zawng zawngin a ropuizia an hmu." 
Psalms97:7 Milem betute chu an zak ang a, Milem chhuangtu zawng zawngte leh Pathian dang zawng zawng pawh a hmaah an kûn ang." 
Psalms97:8 Zion tlâng chuan a lo hria a, a lâwm hle a, Judai ram mite chu hlim takin an au va, Lalpan a chhan chhuah tâk avângin." 
Psalms97:9 Lalpa, nang chu khawvêl pum puia chungnung ber i ni, Pathian dang zawng aiin i chungnung zâwk." 
Psalms97:10 Lalpan sual hawtute chu a hmangaih a, Inserhte chu a vêng reng a, Mi sual kut ata chu a chhan chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms97:11 Mi dik tân khua a lo êng a, Mi ngîlte tân hlimna a lo thleng bawk." 
Psalms97:12 Mi dikte u, Lalpa -ah lâwm ula, A hming thianghlim chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms98:1 A thil mak tih ropui tak avângin, Lalpa chu fakin hla thar sa rawh u, A kut ding lam leh a bân thianghlim ngei chuan Chhandamna a rawn thlen ta." 
Psalms98:2 Lalpan a hnehna chu a rawn lantîr a, Hnam tin hmaah thil a tihdikzia a tilang ta." 
Psalms98:3 Israel chhûngte chunga a ngilneihzia leh a rinawmzia a hre reng a, Pathian chhandamna chu khawvêl pum hian an hmu ta e." 
Psalms98:4 Khawvêla mi zawng zawng hian Lalpa chu fak ula, Hlima auvin hla sa rawh u." 
Psalms98:5 Ṭingṭangte nên Lalpa fakna hla sa ula, Perhkhuang ri mawi tum bawk rawh u." 
Psalms98:6 Tawtawrâwt leh seki tumin Kan Lalber, Lalpa hi fak chiam rawh u." 
Psalms98:7 Tuifinriat leh a chhûnga awmte chu au dur dur se, Lei leh a chhûnga chêngte pawh." 
Psalms98:8 Luipuite chuan a hmaah an kut bêng sela, Tlângte pawh hi hlimin au rual rawh se." 
Psalms98:9 Khawvêl rorêl tûrin Lalpa a lo kal e, Mi tin dik tak leh fel takin a rêlsak ang." 
Psalms99:1 Lalpan ro a rêl a, mi tin an khûr, Cherub chungah ṭhuin ro a rêl a, Leilung hi a nghîng dur dur mai." 
Psalms99:2 Zion-a Lalpa chu a ropui êm a, Mi zawng zawng aia chungnung daih a ni." 
Psalms99:3 A hming ropui leh hlauhawm tak chu mi tinin fak rawh se, Mithianghlima a ni." 
Psalms99:4 Aw, Lal chak ber, dikna i ngaina a, Thu dik i kengkawh ṭhîn, Jakoba chhûngte zîngah rorêlna ṭha leh dik I rawn awmtîr ta a." 
Psalms99:5 Lalpa, kan Pathian hi chawimawi ula, A ke bulah ṭhingṭhi rawh u. Mi Thianghlima a ni." 
Psalms99:6 Mosia leh Arona chu a puithiam an ni a, A hming lamtu Samuela a ni. Lalpa an au va, a lo chhâng ṭhîn." 
Psalms99:7 Chhûm ding aṭangin Pathianin a sawi a, A thu hrilh leh a thupêk chu an zâwm." 
Psalms99:8 Lalpa, kan Pathian, anni chu i chhâng a, An thil sual tih phuba latu i ni na a, Ngaidam ṭhîntu i nih pawh i hriattîr ṭhîn." 
Psalms99:9 Lalpa, kan Pathian hi chawimawi ula, A tlâng thianghlimah hian chibai rawn bûk rawh u. Lalpa, kan Pathian hi a thianghlim e." 
Psalms100:1 Ram zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chawimawiin au chiam rawh u;" 
Psalms100:2 Hlim takin a rawng bâwl ula, Lâwma zaiin a hmaah lo kal rawh u." 
Psalms100:3 Lalpa hi Pathian chu a ni tih hria ula, Min siamtu chu amah ngei hi a ni. A rama tla ṭhîn a berâmte kan ni." 
Psalms100:4 Lâwmthu sawi chungin a kawngkhârah lo lût ula, A tualzâwlah fak hla rawn sa rawh u, Lâwmthu hrilh ula, a hming chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms100:5 Lalpa chu a ṭha si a, A ngilneihna a ngai reng a, A rinawmzia pawh kumkhuain a pangngai reng a ni." 
Psalms101:1 Ngilneihna leh rorêl dik thu, hlain ka sa dâwn e, Aw Lalpa, i hnênah ka hril dâwn a ni." 
Psalms101:2 Fîmkhur takin kawng dik chu ka zawh ṭhîn a, Engtikah nge i lo lên ang? Thinlung dik tak puin ka khawsa ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms101:3 Ka inah chuan thil sual ka ngaithei lo va, Hnungtawlh chîngte chu ka huatzâwng tak an ni, Mi kawp thei bawk hek lo." 
Psalms101:4 Mi rilru kawite chuan min hlat ṭhîn a, Thil sual eng mah ka ti duh lo." 
Psalms101:5 A rûka ṭhiante rêl chîng chu ka ngawihsan a, Chapo leh inngaisângte ka ngaithei lo." 
Psalms101:6 Ram chhûnga mi rinawmte ka duhsak a, Ka bulah chuan ka awmtîr a, Rinawm taka thil ti ṭhînte chu ka rawngbâwltuah ka hmang." 
Psalms101:7 Bum chîngte ka in chhûnga an awm ka phal lo va, Dâwt sawi chîng pawh ka hmuh phâka an awm ka phal hek lo." 
Psalms101:8 Tûk tinin mi sualte chu kan ram ata ka ûm bo va, Lalpa khua ata hi thil sual tih chîngte pawh ka hnawt chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms102:1 Lalpa, ka ṭawngṭai ngaithla la, Ka au thâwm hian i hnên lo thleng rawh se;" 
Psalms102:2 Mangan laiin ka lakah hian i hmêl thup suh, I beng chhi la, ka au veleh min lo chhâng var ang che."
