Psalms102:3 Ka dam chhûng nite chu meikhu angin a zâm ral a, Thuk sa angin ka sa huai huai a ni." 
Psalms102:4 Hnim ah chhum vuai angin ka awm ta a, Chaw pawh ka ei thei lo." 
Psalms102:5 Mangang taka ka rûm ka rûm avângin Ruh hlîr ruh hlîr ka ni ta e. 
Psalms102:6 Thlalêra tuivalawng ang ka ni ta a, Khaw ram chhimbuk ang mai ka ni." 
Psalms102:7 In chung chhîpa chawngzawng fu fâl angin Ka hawi ka hawi a ni. 
Psalms102:8 Ka hmêlmaten min deu ni tin mai a, Min hualtute chuan an kamchhe tleuh nân tak min hmang." 
Psalms102:9 Chawa ka rin ber chu vut a ni a, Ka thil in pawh chu ka mittuiin a pawlh." 
Psalms102:10 Ka chungah hian i thinur chu a so nasa ta êm êm a, Min la lawk a, min paih sawn ta a ni." 
Psalms102:11 Ka nunna chu tlaia hlim ral lam ang mai hi a ni, Hlobet angin ka vuai zo ta." 
Psalms102:12 Lalpa, nang chuan chatuanin ro i rêl ang a, Ṭhangthar zêlten an hre reng bawk ang che." 
Psalms102:13 Tho la, Zion hi khawngaih ang che, Khawngaih a hun ta e, Hun tiam a lo thleng ta si a." 
Psalms102:14 I chhiahhlawhten a lungbangte an ngaina a, A chim rem rumte hi an lainat bawk a ni." 
Psalms102:15 Hnam dangte chuan Lalpa hming hi an hlau vang a, Leia lal zawng zawngin i ropuina an ṭih bawk ang." 
Psalms102:16 Lalpan Zion chu a din ṭha leh ang a, Ropui takin a lo lang ang." 
Psalms102:17 Lalpan pachhiate ṭawngṭaina a ngaihsak ang a, An dîlna chu a hmusit lo vang." 
Psalms102:18 Hei hi ṭhang lo thar zêlte tân ziak la, La piang tûrten Lalpa an fak theih nân." 
Psalms102:19 A hmun thianghlim sâng tak aṭang khian Lalpan a han thlîr a, Vân aṭangin lei hi a en a," 
Psalms102:20 Lung in tângte rûm chu a han hria a, Thi tûra tihte chu a rawn chhan ta." 
Psalms102:21 Zion-ah Lalpa hming hi hril ula, Jerusalem-ah pawh a fakna hla sa bawk rawh u." 
Psalms102:22 Tichuan, mipui an lo pung khâwm ang a, Hnam tinrêngin Lalpa rawng an bâwl ang." 
Psalms102:23 Ka vânglai hun a titawi a, Ka nite chu a titlêm ta," 
Psalms102:24 ‘Aw ka Pathian, ka vânglaiin min la bo suh, Nang zawng kumkhuaa awm i ni si a,’ ka han ti a." 
Psalms102:25 Nangin lei hi hmâna i siam a ni, Vân pawh i kutchhuak a ni e." 
Psalms102:26 Mahse, an boral ang, nang erawh chu i awm kumkhua dâwn a, I hmaah chuan silhfên angin an chul ang a, Puan ang maiin i hluihlâwn ang a, An ral vek ang." 
Psalms102:27 Nang erawh chu a ngai reng i ni a, I kumte chuan kin ni a nei lo vang." 
Psalms102:28 Kan fate chu nangin i vêng ang a, An thlahte pawh him takin an awm ang." 
Psalms103:1 Aw ka thlarau, Lalpa chu fak la, Ka chhûnga awm zawng zawng hian a hming thianghlim chu fak rawh se." 
Psalms103:2 Aw ka thlarau, Lalpa chu fak rawh, A ṭhatna zozai hi theihnghilh suh ang che." 
Psalms103:3 I bawhchhiatna tinrêng a ngaidam a, I natna zawng zawng pawh a tidam a," 
Psalms103:4 I nunna chu khur thûk ata a tlan chhuak a, Ngilneihna leh lainatnain min hual vêl ṭhîn." 
Psalms103:5 Thil ṭha tinrêng ka duh tâwk min pe a, Mupui angin kei pawh ka tuai thar ṭhîn." 
Psalms103:6 Lalpan dik takin thil a ti a, Hnehchhiahte ro a rêlsak ta." 
Psalms103:7 Mosia hnênah a duhzâwng a hrilh a, A thiltihtheihzia Israel-te a entîr kha." 
Psalms103:8 Lalpa chu mi lainat ṭhîn, khawngaih thei tak a ni, Thinnel, ngilneihna ngah a ni." 
Psalms103:9 Mi sawisêl chîng tak a ni ngai lo va, A thinur lah a pai reng ngai hek lo." 
Psalms103:10 Kan sual angin kan chungah a ti lo va, Kan bawhchhiatna angin min thungrûl duh hek lo." 
Psalms103:11 Lei aiin vân a sâng ang hian, Amah ṭihtute chungah chuan a ngilneihna a sâng a ni." 
Psalms103:12 Khawchhak leh khawthlang a inhlat ang hian, Kan khawlohna min dah sawnsak ta daih a ni." 
Psalms103:13 Pain a fate a lainat ṭhîn ang hian, Lalpan amah ṭihtute chu a lainat ṭhîn." 
Psalms103:14 Kan derthâwnzia a hre chiang a, Vaivut mai kan nih a hre reng a ni." 
Psalms103:15 Mihring nun hi zawng hlobet ang chauh a ni, Ram hnim pâr a lo vul ve a," 
Psalms103:16 Thliin a han chhêm a, A bo ta daih mai a, Hmuh tûr a awm tawh lo ang hi a ni." 
Psalms103:17 Lalpa ṭihtute tân a ngilneihna a ngai reng a, A ṭhatna lah an tuchhuan thleng pawhin a ngai reng ṭhîn," 
Psalms103:18 A thuthlung vawng rengtute leh A thupêk zâwm ṭhînte tân. 
Psalms103:19 Lalpan vânah a lalṭhutthlêng a han rem a, Engkim chungah ro a rêl ta." 
Psalms103:20 A thupêkte zâwma, a thute ngaithla ṭhîn, Vântirhkoh chak takte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms103:21 A rawngbâwla, a duhzâwng ti ṭhîn Vâna mite u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms103:22 A thuhnuaia awm zawng zawng leh A thilsiamten Lalpa chu fak rawh se, Aw ka thlarau, Lalpa chu fak rawh." 
Psalms104:1 Aw ka thlarau, Lalpa chu fak rawh, Aw Lalpa, ka Pathian, i va ropui tak em! Ropuina leh chawimawinain i inthuam hi." 
Psalms104:2 Puan angin êng i sin a, Vân khi puan in angin i kai pharh a," 
Psalms104:3 I in chu chung lam tuiah khian i sa a, chhûm chu tawlailîrah i hmang a, Thli chungahte chuan i chuang bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:4 Thli hi i tirhkoh a ni a, Kâwlphe de zawr zawr hi i chhiahhlawh a ni bawk." 
Psalms104:5 Nghîng lo tawp tûrin Lei hi i nghat tlat a. 
Psalms104:6 Puana tuam angin tui thûk takin a tuam vêl a, Tlâng chhîpte chu tuiin a chîm vek bawk." 
Psalms104:7 I han hau va, tui chu a tlânchhia a, I râwl i han chhuah chuan a liam zo ta vek a." 
Psalms104:8 Tlângahte a luang liam a, Kawrahte chuan a luang thla a, A awmna tûr i ruatah chuan." 
Psalms104:9 A pelh loh tûr ramri i khamsak a, Lei hi a chîm pil leh loh nân." 
Psalms104:10 Tuihna leh lui i tichhuak a, Tlâng kârahte an luang ta a." 
Psalms104:11 Ramsa tinrêngte chuan an lo tlân a, Ram sabengtung tuihâlte chuan an dâwt." 
Psalms104:12 A kamah chuan chunglêng savaten bu an chhep a, Hnimbuk zîngahte chuan an hrâm bawk a." 
Psalms104:13 I chênna hmunsâng aṭangin Tlângah ruahpui i sûrtîr a, Lei chu malsâwmnain i tikhat ta." 
Psalms104:14 Ran peh atân hnim a lo chawr a, Mihring tân thlaite a lo ṭiak a, Leiah ei tûr buh a lo awm ta." 
Psalms104:15 A intihhlimna tûr uain a thar bawk a, Hriak pawh a sa timâm tûrin, A rin tûr chaw a nei ta a." 
Psalms104:16 Lalpan a phun Lebanon tlâng sidar thing chuan A duhtâwk tui a hmu. 
Psalms104:17 A zârah savaten bu an chhep a, Vachate chuan fâr lêrah bu an nei." 
Psalms104:18 Sathârte chu khâm sângah an chêng a, Khâm pûkah chuan sangawite an biru." 
Psalms104:19 Thla chu a hun bi-ah a de ṭhîn a, Ni pawh a hun takah a tla bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:20 Khua a thim a, zân a lo ni a, Ramsa tinrêng an tla chhuak a." 
Psalms104:21 Sakeibaknei vânglai sa seh tûr chu a hâhum a, Pathian hnênah ei tûr a ngên." 
Psalms104:22 Ni a lo chhuak a, an ṭîn dial a, An awmna ṭheuhvah chuan an bawk leh ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:23 Hna thawk tûrin mihring a lo chhuak a, Tlai thlengin hna a thawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:24 Lalpa, i thil siam hi a va tamin I va siam thiam tak em! Lei hi i thilsiamin a khat a ni." 
Psalms104:25 Tuifinriat saw a ropuiin a va zau tak êm! Thil nung chhiar sên lohte an awm a, Lian tak tak te, tê tak takte an ni." 
Psalms104:26 Tah chuan lawngte an lêng noh noh bawk a, I siam Leviathan chu a lêng zuai zuai bawk a." 
Psalms104:27 An vaiin i mitmei an en a, A hun takah ei tûr i pe ziah ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:28 An chaw tûr i pe a, an ei a, Thil ṭha tinrêng i kut ata an duhtâwk an dawng ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:29 I hmêl i han thup chuan an mangang a, An thaw i tihtâwp chuan an thi mai a, Vaivutah bawk an kîr leh ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:30 Nangin i han thâwkkhum a, an nung ta mai a, Ram pawh hi i titui ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:31 Lalpa chu chatuanin ropui sela, Lalpa chu a thilsiamah hlim bawk rawh se." 
Psalms104:32 Lei hi a han melh chuan a khûr ṭhîn a, A han khawih chuan tlângte a tuiral ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:33 Ka dam chhûngin Lalpa fakin ka zai ang a, Pathian chu, ka nun chhûng zawng ka fak bawk ang." 
Psalms104:34 Ka ngaihtuahte hi a lâwmzâwng ni sela, Lalpa -ah chuan ka lâwm si a." 
Psalms104:35 Mi sualte chu lei aṭang hian boral sela, Mi suaksualte awm tawh suh se, Aw ka thlarau, Lalpa fak rawh. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms105:1 Lalpa chu lâwmthu hrilh ula, A hming lam rawh u, A thiltih hi hnam tinrêng hrilh rawh u." 
Psalms105:2 Amah fakin zai ula, Thil mak a tih zawng zawng hi hril rawh u." 
Psalms105:3 A hming thianghlim hi chhuang ula, Lalpa zawngtute chu hlim hle rawh se." 
Psalms105:4 Lalpa chu zawng ula, a chakna dîl rawh u, Ani chu pan fo rawh u." 
Psalms105:5 A thiltih ropui tak te, A thil mak tih leh a rorêl dân te," 
Psalms105:6 Aw, a chhiahhlawh Abrahama thlahte u, A thlan Jakoba fate u, hre reng rawh u." 
Psalms105:7 Ani chu Lalpa kan Pathian a ni a, Khawvêl pum puia rorêltu a ni." 
Psalms105:8 A thuthlung chu a hre reng a, Chhuan sâng thlengin a thupêk pawh a hre reng bawk." 
Psalms105:9 Abrahama hnêna a thuthlun leh Isaka hnêna a thutiam chu a hre reng a ni. 
Psalms105:10 Chûng chu Jakoba thlahte tân dânah a nemnghet a, Israel-te kumkhaw thuthlung atân." 
Psalms105:11 “Khai le, Kanan ram hi ka pe ang che u, Ro atân in nei thliah ang,” a ti a." 
Psalms105:12 Eng tham ni lo, mi tlêm tê Mikhual mai an la nih lai pawh khân." 
Psalms105:13 Hnam tinrêng zîngah vâkvaiin Ram tinah an pêm lâwr a," 
Psalms105:14 Mahse, tu ma nêkchêp a phal lo va, Anmahni avângin lalte a zilh zâwk a." 
Psalms105:15 ‘Ka hriakthiha khawih suh ula, Ka zâwlnei hi a pawi khawih hek suh u,’ a ti." 
Psalms105:16 Ram pum puiah ṭâmpui mitthi a thlentîr a, An buh zawng zawng a tihchhiatsak vek kha." 
Psalms105:17 An hmaa kal tûrin mi a tîr a, Bawiha an hralh Josefa kha." 
Psalms105:18 A ke-ah chuan kawl an buntîr a, A nghâwng thîr khaidiatin an hrêng." 
Psalms105:19 A sawi lâwk ang ngei khân a thleng ta a, Lalpa thu chu a dikzia a lang ta." 
Psalms105:20 Aigupta lalber chuan a chhuahtîr ta a, Chu hnam hotu ngei chuan a chhuahtîr ta." 
Psalms105:21 A ram hotu-ah a siam a, A neih zawng zawng chunga thuneituah a dah ta a." 
Psalms105:22 A mi liante a duh duha thunun tûr leh An upate finna zirtîr tûrin. 
Psalms105:23 Israela chu Aigupta ramah a chhuk ve a, Chumi ram chuan Jakoba chu a lo mikhual." 
Psalms105:24 Lalpa mite chu an pung chak ta hle a, Anmahni ertute ai chuan an chak ta a." 
Psalms105:25 Chûng mite rilru chu a inthlâk a, A mite chu an haw ta a, A chhiahhlawhte chu vervêk takin an chawk nawmnah ta a." 
Psalms105:26 A chhiahhlawh Mosia chu a tîr thla a, A mi thlan Arona nên." 
Psalms105:27 Pathian thil mak tih chu an entîr a, Aigupta ramah thil mak tak tak an ti." 
Psalms105:28 Khua a tithim a, ai mit thlawn ang mai a ni ta. An thiltihte an hmu thei ta lo va." 
Psalms105:29 An luite thisena chantîrin An sanghate a tihlum zo ta a. 
Psalms105:30 An ramah chuan chungu a puantîr a, Lal in chhûngahte pawh an awm noh noh." 
Psalms105:31 Thu a pe a, thosi a puang a, An ram chhûngah thophurh a khat ta a." 
Psalms105:32 Ruah aiah rial a tlâktîr a, An ram pumah ṭêk a tla bawk." 
Psalms105:33 An grep leh theipui chu a chhu chhia a, An ram chhûnga thingte a dêng tliak zo." 
Psalms105:34 Thu a pe a, khau a puang a, Chhiar sên loh khauphâr rual an kat noh noh." 
Psalms105:35 An ram chhûnga hnimhnah an ei zo va, An thlai chînte an ei kawlh vek." 
Psalms105:36 Ram pum puiah an fa tîrte a tihhlumsak vek a, An vânglai fate chu." 
Psalms105:37 Tangka leh rangkachak nên a hruai chhuak a, An zînga mi tu mah sil an awm lo." 
Psalms105:38 Aigupta mite chuan an hlau va, An chhuak ta chu an lâwm hle a." 
Psalms105:39 A hliap tûrin chhûm a zîntîr a, Zâna ên tûrin mei a chhi." 
Psalms105:40 An ngen angin vahmîm rual a lo ṭum a, An tlai tâwkin vân chaw a pe." 
Psalms105:41 Lungpui a tikhi a, Tui a lo luang chhuak ta a, Ram rovah chuan lui a luang ta." 
Psalms105:42 A chhiahhlawh Abrahama hnêna, A thutiam thianghlim chu a la hre reng a ni." 
Psalms105:43 Tichuan, a mite chu a hruai chhuak a, Hlim leh lâwmin an au va." 
Psalms105:44 Hnam dangte lo awmna ram chu a pe a, Chûng mite thawh rah chu an rochung ta:" 
Psalms105:45 A thupêkte an zâwma, A Dânte chu an zawm theih nân. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms106:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Lalpa chu a ṭhat êm avângin lâwmthu hrilh rawh u, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms106:2 Tu nge Lalpa thiltih ropuizia hi sawi thei anga, A fakawmzia hril sêng ang le?" 
Psalms106:3 Eng lai pawha dik taka awma, Thil ṭha ti ṭhînte chu an nihlawh e." 
Psalms106:4 Lalpa, i mite chunga ṭhat i chhuah hunah min hre reng la, I chhan chhuah hunah chuan min telh ve ngei ang che;" 
Psalms106:5 I thlante nihlawhna hmua, I hnam thlante lâwma ka hlimpui theih nân leh, I rochanten an chhuan che anga Ka chhuan ve theih nân che." 
Psalms106:6 Kan pute ang bawkin thil kan tisual a, Kan khawlo va, kan sual a ni." 
Psalms106:7 Aigupta ramah khân kan pute chuan, I thil mak tih an hrethiam duh lo va, I ngilneih nasatzia pawh an hre duh lo, Tuipui Sen kamah khân an hel tâk kha." 
Psalms106:8 Mahse, i hming avângin i chawimawi a, I thiltihtheihziate i hriattîr tho a ni." 
Psalms106:9 Tuipui Sen chu thu a pe a, a chat ta a, A mite chu leichârah chuan a kal tlangtîr ta a." 
Psalms106:10 Anmahni hawtute kut ata chu a chhan chhuak a, An hmêlmate kut ata ngei chu." 
Psalms106:11 Tui chuan an hmêlmate a chîm pil a, Pakhat tê mah dam chhuak an awm loh kha." 
Psalms106:12 A mite chuan a thu an ring ta a, A fak nân hla an sa." 
Psalms106:13 Mahse, a thiltihte an theihnghilh leh ta thuai a, A remruat chu an ngaichâng duh leh ta lo." 
Psalms106:14 Thlalêrah an râwp ta êm êm a, Ram rovah chuan Pathian an fiah ta a." 
Psalms106:15 An dîl ngei chu a han pe a, An râwp a tihrehsak ta a." 
Psalms106:16 Mahse, Mosia leh mi thianghlim Arona chu, An riahna hmunah chuan an îtsîk ta a." 
Psalms106:17 Lei a khi chat phuk a. Dathana chu a tla ta a, Abirama pawh, a hote nên, an pil zo ta." 
Psalms106:18 An zîngah chuan mei a lo chhuak a, Mi sualte chu an kâng hlum ta vek a." 
Psalms106:19 Horeb tlângah pawh khân bâwngno lem an din a, An thil chhûn chu an be ta a." 
Psalms106:20 An ropuina Pathian chu Hnim pet, bâwng ang lekah an chan ta a." 
Psalms106:21 Aigupta rama thil ropui tak tak titu, An chhandamtu Pathian an theihnghilh ta." 
Psalms106:22 Aigupta ram chhûnga a thil mak tih te leh, Tuipui Sena thil râpthlâk tak a tihte pawh." 
Psalms106:23 A mi thlan Mosia chuan, A thinur tireh tûrin An kâra bân pharin ngensak lo se chu Tihboral vek a tum tâk kha." 
Psalms106:24 A thutiam chu an rin tâwk loh avângin, Ram duhawm tak chu an ngainêp a." 
Psalms106:25 An puan inah chuan an phunnawi a, Lalpa aw chu an ngaithla duh ta lo." 
Psalms106:26 Bân phar meuhvin thu a tiam a, “Thlalêrah in tlu hlum ang a," 
Psalms106:27 Ram dang daihah ka tidarh ang che u a, Hnam dang zîngah in thlahte an thi ang,” A ti ta hial a ni." 
Psalms106:28 Peor-ah khân Baal an bia a, Milem pathian hnêna inthawina sa an ei ve ta." 
Psalms106:29 An thil tih chuan ani chu a tithinur a, An zîngah chuan hripui a lêng ta a." 
Psalms106:30 Finehasa chu a tho va, ngaihdam a dîlsak a, Hri chu a reh thei ta." 
Psalms106:31 Chu chu a thil tih ṭhaa ngaih a ni ta a, Kumkhuaa ṭhangtharten an hriat zêl tûrin." 
Psalms106:32 Meriba tuiah Lalpa an tithinur leh a, Anmahni avângin Mosia meuh pawh a buai ta a." 
Psalms106:33 Ani chu an tithinur a, Thu hnu dâwn lovin a ṭawng ta a." 
Psalms106:34 Lalpan tihlum tûra thu a pêk angin Chûng rama awmte chu an tihlum duh lo. 
Psalms106:35 Chûngho nên chuan an inneih pawlh ta a. An tih dânte chu an zir ve ta zâwk a ni. 
Psalms106:36 An milemte an be ve ta a, Thangah an âwk ta a ni." 
Psalms106:37 An fanu te, an fapa te, Ramhuai hnêna inthawi nân an hmang ta a." 
Psalms106:38 Pawi khawih lo thisen chhuah an chîng a, Kanan mite milem hnênah thisen an hlân a, An fanu te, an fapa te thisen chuan Ram chu an tibawrhbâng zo ta." 
Psalms106:39 An thiltih avâng chuan an bawlhhlawh zo ta a, An thil chîn avâng chuan an uire zo ta a ni." 
Psalms106:40 A mite chungah Lalpa thin a thawk a, A rochante chu a ten ta êm êm a." 
Psalms106:41 Hnam dang hnênah a pe a, Anmahni hawtuten an chungah ro an rêl ta a," 
Psalms106:42 Hnam dangten an rap bet a, An thuhnuaiah an kûn ta a ni." 
Psalms106:43 Vawi tam tak chu a chhan chhuak a, Mahse, an hel lui zêl a, An sualnaah chuan an pil ta a ni." 
Psalms106:44 Mahse, an han mangan meuh chuan a ngaihsak a, An au thâwm chu a lo ngaithla ṭhîn." 
Psalms106:45 Anmahni avângin a thuthlung a hre reng a, Ngil a neih êm avângin pawi a ti ṭhîn." 
Psalms106:46 Sala mantu zawng zawngte chu Anmahni a khawngaihtîr fo ṭhîn. 
Psalms106:47 Aw Lalpa, kan Pathian, min chhan chhuak la, Hnam dang zîng ata hi min hruai khâwm leh ang che. I hming thianghlim kan fak ang a, Ropui takin kan chawimawi bawk ang che." 
Psalms106:48 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu fak rawh u, Chatuan chatuanin fak ula, Mi zawng zawngin, ‘Amen,’ ti rawh se. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms107:1 “ Lalpa chu a ṭhat êm avângin lâwmthu hrilh rawh u, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a,”" 
Psalms107:2 Lalpa tlanten ti fo rawh se. Hmêlma kut ata chu a tlan chhuak ta si a; 
Psalms107:3 Ram tina mi a hruai khâwm a, Chhak leh thlang, Chhim leh hmâr aṭangte chuan." 
Psalms107:4 Thlalêr ram rovah te an vâk an vâk a, An chênna tûr khua chu an hmu zo lo." 
Psalms107:5 Rilṭâm leh tuihâlin An beidawng êm êm ṭhîn. 
Psalms107:6 Harsatna an tawhin Lalpa an au ṭhîn a, An manganna ata a chhan chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:7 Kawng dik takah a hruai ta a, An chênna tûr khua chu an thleng thei ta." 
Psalms107:8 Lalpa chu a ngilneih êm avângin fak rawh u, Mihringte tân thil mak a tih ṭhin avângin." 
Psalms107:9 Tuihâlte chu an duh tâwkin a intîr a, Rilṭâmte pawh ei tûr tui tak takin a hrai puar ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:10 Ṭhenkhatte chu thim zîngah ngui takin an awm a, Hrehawm tuarin thîr kawl an bun." 
Psalms107:11 Pathian thu awih lova, Chungnungbera remruat an hmuhsit avângin." 
Psalms107:12 Rim takin a thawhtîr a, a tudawl ta a, An tlûk pawhin ṭanpuitu an nei lo." 
Psalms107:13 Harsatnate an tawhin Lalpa an au ṭhîn a, An manganna ata a chhan chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:14 Thim zînga ngui taka an awm chu a hruai chhuak a, An khaidiat bunte chu a tihchahsak bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:15 Lalpa chu a ngilneih êm avângin fak rawh u, Mihringte tân thil mak a tih ṭhin avângin." 
Psalms107:16 Dâr kawngkhârte a chhu chhia a, A kalhna thîr tlâwnte a tibung bawk." 
Psalms107:17 Ṭhenkhatte chu an â hle a, An sual avâng leh an bawhchhiatna avânga tuar an ni." 
Psalms107:18 Ei tûr tinrêngin a ngei a, Thlân kotlângah an dâk." 
Psalms107:19 Harsatna an tawhin Lalpa an au ṭhîn a, An manganna ata a chhandam ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:20 Thu a pe a, a tidam a, Thlân ata chu a chhan chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:21 Lalpa chu a ngilneih êm avângin fak rawh u, Mihringte tân thil mak a tih vângin." 
Psalms107:22 A hnênah lâwmthu sawi inthawina hlân ula, A thiltihte hlain hril vêl rawh u." 
Psalms107:23 Ṭhenkhatte chu tuifinriatah lawnga chuangin, Tuipui zauvah ei an zawng a." 
Psalms107:24 Lalpa thiltihte chu an han thlîr a, Tui thûk taka a thil mak tihte chu." 
Psalms107:25 Thu a pe a, thlipui a tleh ta a, Tuifinriat chu nasa takin a tifâwn a." 
Psalms107:26 Lawng chu sâng tak takah a vawrh chho va, A chhuk leh vung vung ṭhîn, A hlauhawm êm avângin an thlabâr ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:27 Zu rui pai pai, thle thle ang hi an ni, A tihngaihna rêng an hre ṭhîn lo." 
Psalms107:28 Harsatna an tawhin Lalpa an au ṭhîn a, An manganna ata a chhan chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:29 Thlipui tleh chu a tibâng a, Tuifâwnte chu a reh ta a." 
Psalms107:30 A reh tâk avângin an hlim ta êm êm a, An thlen châk hmun nuamah chuan a hruai thleng ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:31 Lalpa chu a ngilneih êm avângin fak rawh u, Mihring tân thil mak a tih avângin." 
Psalms107:32 A mite pung khâwm zîngah chawimawi ula, Upa rual ṭhu khâwm zîngah amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms107:33 Lalpan luite chu thlalêrah a chantîr a, Tuihna awmna pawh ram rovah a chantîr bawk." 
Psalms107:34 Ram ṭha tak chu a mi chêngte sual avângin, Ram chhiaah a chantîr a." 
Psalms107:35 Thlalêr chu dîlah a chantîr a, Ram ro chu tuihna awmnaah a chantîr bawk." 
Psalms107:36 Tah chuan mi ṭâmte chu awmhmun a khuartîr a, An chênna tûr khawpui an din." 
Psalms107:37 Thlai an chîng a, grep an phun a, A rah ta tiar tuar mai a ni." 
Psalms107:38 Mal a sâwm a, an pung chak êm êm a, An rante pawh a riral ve ngai lo." 
Psalms107:39 Hnehchhiahna nasa tak leh tihduhdahna avângin An ral tial tial a, an kun ta tlawk tlawk a ni." 
Psalms107:40 Mahse, miliante hmusita, Kawng awm lova vahvaihtîrtu chuan," 
Psalms107:41 An tihretheih mangangte chu a chawi kâng a, An chhûngkuate a tipung leh ta a." 
Psalms107:42 Mi dikte chuan an han hmuhin an hlim ta êm êm a. Mi sualte erawh chu an ngawi hmak mai. 
Psalms107:43 Mi â lo chuan hêng hi chhût ngun sela, Lalpa ngilneihzia hi hre chiang teh se." 
Psalms108:1 Aw Pathian, ka ring tlat che a ni: Hla ka sa ang, a ni, i fak hla ka sa ang; Thinlung takin ka fak ang che." 
Psalms108:2 Ṭingṭang leh perhkhuangte u, inpeih ula, Khua i han au vâr teh ang." 
Psalms108:3 Lalpa, i mite zîngah chuan ka fak ang che, Mipui zîngah i fak hla ka sa ang." 
Psalms108:4 I ngilneihna chuan vân a khûm daih a, I thutak chuan vân khi a thleng si a." 
Psalms108:5 Vânahte khian i ropuizia han tilang la, Aw Pathian, leiah pawh hian tilang ang che." 
Psalms108:6 I chaknain min rawn chhan la, Ka dîlna hi lo ngaithla teh, I mi duh takte hi an him theih nân." 
Psalms108:7 A hmun thianghlim aṭangin Pathianin thu a sawi, ‘Sekem khua chu ka sem darh vek ang a, Sukot ruam chu ka ṭhen vek bawk ang." 
Psalms108:8 Gilead leh Manase ram chu ka ta a ni a, Efraim ram pawh ka inhumna lukhum a ni, Judai ram pawh ka laltiang a ni." 
Psalms108:9 Moab ram chu ka insilna chawhtawlh a ni, Ka ta a nih hriat nân Edom ramah ka pheikhawk ka vawm e, Filistia-ho chu ka aukhum." 
Psalms108:10 Tu nge kulh nei khuaah min hruai ang a, Edom ramah min kalpui ang?" 
Psalms108:11 Aw Pathian, min thlauhthla ta em ni? Kan sipaite zîngah, aw Pathian, i tel ve tâk loh hi?" 
Psalms108:12 Hmêlma lakah min ṭanpui teh, Mihring ṭanpuina zawng engmahlo mai a ni." 
Psalms108:13 Pathian zârah huai takin kan che ang, Kan hmêlmate a chîl hrep ang." 
Psalms109:1 Aw, ka fak Pathian, ngawi reng teh suh," 
Psalms109:2 Mi sual leh bum hmangten min bei luai luai a, Dâwtin min hêk min hêk si a." 
Psalms109:3 Thu huatthlala pui pui min sawi khum a, Chhan awm lovin min bei." 
Psalms109:4 Keiin ka hmangaih a, annin min do, An tân ka ṭawngṭai ṭhîn." 
Psalms109:5 Thil ṭha chu sualin min thungrûl a, Ka hmangaih a, annin min haw thung a." 
Psalms109:6 Ani chungah chuan rorêltu tûr mi sual ruat la, A ding lamah Setana ding rawh se." 
Psalms109:7 A chungthu rêl sela, thiam loh chang ngei rawh se, A ṭawngṭaina chenin suala ngaih ni rawh se." 
Psalms109:8 A dam chhûng nite chu tihtawi ni se, A hotu nihna chu mi dangin chang rawh se." 
Psalms109:9 A fate chu fahrahin awm sela, A nupui chu hmeithai rawh se." 
Psalms109:10 A fate chu vâkvaiin kutdawh sela, An in ram aṭangin hnawh chhuah ni rawh se." 
Psalms109:11 A neih zawng zawng a ba aiah pûktîrtuten la vek sela, A thawhrim rah pawh ram dang miten rawk bawk rawh se." 
Psalms109:12 Lainattu rêng tu mah nei lo sela, A fa, pa nei ta lote chu tu man khawngaih suh se." 
Psalms109:13 A thlahte pawh mang vek sela, Ṭhangthar lo awm tûr zîngah a hming dai hlen daih se." 
Psalms109:14 A pa bawhchhiatna chu Lalpan hre reng sela, A nu suahsualna pawh thai bo ni hek suh se." 
Psalms109:15 An sualna chu Lalpan chhinchhiah sela, Khawvêlah hian anmahni hriatrengna eng mah awm hauh suh se." 
Psalms109:16 Ngilneih nachâng rêng a hre lo va, Rethei, pachhia leh mangang te, An thih thlengin a ûm zui ṭhîn." 
Psalms109:17 Ânchhe lawh chîng tak a ni, ama chungah tla zâwk rawh se. Mi dang a duhsak ngai lo va, duhsakna dawng suh se." 
Psalms109:18 Ânchhia chu kawr angin a ha a, Tui ang maiin a taksa a fan chhuak a, Hriak ang maiin a ruhte pawh a fan chhuak a." 
Psalms109:19 Puana tuam ang maiin ani chu tuam sela, Kâwnghrên angin a taiah hrêng rawh se." 
Psalms109:20 Hêng hi min hêktute, Lalpan a thungrulhna chu ni sela, Min sawichhetute chan chu ni rawh se." 
Psalms109:21 Aw Lalpa, nang chu ka Lalpa i ni a, I hming avângin min ṭanpui la, Ngil i neiin i ṭha si a, min chhan chhuak ang che." 
Psalms109:22 Kei zawng rethei tak leh tlachham tak ka ni, Ka thinlung hi a na êm êm ṭhîn." 
Psalms109:23 Tlai lam hlim angin ka ral tial tial a, Khau anga len bovin ka awm a, Ka vânglai a liam a, ka lo tar ta." 
Psalms109:24 Chaw nghei vângin ka tha a khûr ta a, Thau viau ṭhîn kha ka chêr zo ta." 
Psalms109:25 Mi nuihzatbûr ka ni a, Min han hmuhin an lu min thin khum ṭhîn." 
Psalms109:26 Aw Lalpa, ka Pathian, min ṭanpuitu i ni, I ngilneih êm avângin min chhandam rawh." 
Psalms109:27 Chu chu i tih a nih hriattîr hlawm la, Lalpa, nangma tih ngei a ni." 
Psalms109:28 Annin ânchhia min lawh mah se, Nangin mal min sâwm a, Min bei mah se an mualpho vang a, I chhiahhlawh hi ka hlim thung ang." 
Psalms109:29 Mi khingtuten mualphona kawr ha se, Zahna puanin inkhuh rawh se." 
Psalms109:30 Lalpa chu lâwmthu ka hrilh mawlh mawlh ang a, Mipui zîngah ka fak bawk ang." 
Psalms109:31 Lalpan pachhia chu a ṭan a, Ani chu thiam loh chantîrtute lakah a chhan chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms110:1 Lalpa thuchhuak chuan ka Lalpa hnênah, ‘Ka ding lamah lo ṭhu rawh, I hmêlmate i ke nghahchhanah ka han siam ang e,’ a ti." 
Psalms110:2 I laltiang chu Lalpan Zion aṭangin a tîr chhuak a, I hmêlmate chungah ro rêl rawh le." 
Psalms110:3 Hmêlma i beih ni chuan I tlangvâlte an rawn inpe tup tup ang, I tlâng thianghlimah chuan Zîngah dai tla angin an lo kal khâwm bawk ang." 
Psalms110:4 Lalpan thu a tiam ta, a sût lo vang, ‘Chatuan Puithiam i ni, Melkisedeka ang chi kha.’" 
Psalms110:5 Lalpa chu i ding lamah a awm a, A thin a ur hunah lalte a titlâwm ang." 
Psalms110:6 Hnam tinrêng chungah ro a rêl ang a, An ruangte chu a vûm thûr ang." 
Psalms110:7 Kalkawng lui tui chu a in ang a, a lo harh thar leh ang." 
Psalms111:1 Lalpa, chu fak rawh u. Mi dikte pung khâwm zîngah chuan, Theihtâwp chhuahin Lalpa chu lâwmthu ka hrilh dâwn e." 
Psalms111:2 Lalpa thiltihte chu a ropui êm êm a, A lâwmtute chuan hriat nuam an ti." 
Psalms111:3 A thiltih chu a makin a zahawm a, A dikzia pawh a pangngai reng a ni." 
Psalms111:4 A thil mak tih kan theihnghilh mai a phal lo va, Lalpa chu khawngaihna leh lainatnaa khat a ni." 
Psalms111:5 Amah ṭihtute chu ei tûr a pe ṭhîn a, A thuthlung chu eng lai mahin a theihnghilh lo." 
Psalms111:6 A thiltihtheihzia chu a mite hnênah a lantîr a, Hnam dangte ram chu an hnênah a pe." 
Psalms111:7 A thiltih chu a rinawmin a dik a, A thupêk pawh a rin tlâk zêl a ni." 
Psalms111:8 Chûng chu kumkhua atâna ruat a ni a, Rinawm tak leh ṭha taka zawm tûr a ni." 
Psalms111:9 A mite chu a rawn chhandam ta a, A thuthlung chu kumkhuaa zawm tûrin thu a pe. A hming chu a thianghlimin a hlauhawm e." 
Psalms111:10 Lalpa ṭih hi finna bulpui a lo ni, A thu zâwmtute chu Hriatthiamna ṭha tak a pe. Amah chu kumkhuaa fak tûr a ni." 
Psalms112:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Lalpa ṭihtute chu an nihlawh e, A thupêk ngaisâng êm êmtute chu." 
Psalms112:2 An fate chu leiah hian mi ropui an ni ang, Mi nun ngîl thlahte chu malsâwmin an awm ang." 
Psalms112:3 An chhûngkuain an hausa hle ang a, Mi dik tak chhûng an ni reng ang." 
Psalms112:4 Mi nun ngîlte tân thimah khua a vâr ang, Khawngaihna leh ngilneihna nei, mi dik takte tân chuan." 
Psalms112:5 Mi ṭha chu a ngilnei a, phal takin a pûktîr ṭhîn a, Engkim dik takin a ti ṭhîn." 
Psalms112:6 Mi ṭha chu eng lai mahin a nghîng lo vang a, Hriat reng a ni bawk ang." 
Psalms112:7 Chanchin ṭha lo hre mah sela, a hlau lo vang. Lalpa a ring a, a nghet tlat mai." 
Psalms112:8 A rilru a nghet a, a zâm lo va, A hmêlmate tlâwm chu a la hmu ang." 
Psalms112:9 A sem darh a, tlachhamte a pe a, A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a pangngai reng a ni, Ropui taka chawimawi a ni bawk ang." 
Psalms112:10 Mi sualten an hmuh chuan an thinur ang, An ha an ṭhial ang a, an boral ang, Mi sualte tân beisei a bo hlauh vang." 
Psalms113:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Aw Lalpa chhiahhlawhte u, fak ula, Lalpa hming chu chawimawi rawh u," 
Psalms113:2 Lalpa hming chu fakin awm rawh se, Tûn aṭanga chatuan thlengin." 
Psalms113:3 Ni chhuahna aṭanga a tlâkna thlengin, Lalpa hming chu chawimawi ni zêl rawh se." 
Psalms113:4 Lalpa chu hnam tinrêngte aia chungnung daih a ni, A ropuina chu vân chungah khian a awm." 
Psalms113:5 Hmunsâng taka awm, Lalpa kan Pathian ang hi tu nge awm?" 
Psalms113:6 Lei leh vân en tûrin a intihniam a," 
Psalms113:7 Vaivut ata retheite chu a kai tho va, Vut zînga ṭhu pachhiate chu a tungding ṭhîn." 
Psalms113:8 Miliante zîngah chuan a ṭhuttîr a, A ni, miliante zîngah chuan," 
Psalms113:9 Nu chingte chu chhûngkua a dinsak a, Fate neihtîrin a tihlim ṭhîn. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms114:1 Israel-ten Aigupta ram an kalsana, Jakoba faten awze mite ram chu an chhuahsan khân," 
Psalms114:2 Judai ram chu a hmun thianghlim a ni ta a, Israel ram chu a lalna ram a ni." 
Psalms114:3 Tuipuiin a han hmuh chuan a tlânchhia a, Jordan lui pawh a luang kîr a." 
Psalms114:4 Berâm angin tlângte an zuang ṭum a, Berâm notê angin mualte an tualchai bawk." 
Psalms114:5 Engati nge, tuipui, i tlânchhiata, Nang Jordan lui, i luan lêt le?" 
Psalms114:6 Engtizia nge tlângte berâm anga an zuana, Berâm notê angin mualte in tualchai tak?" 
Psalms114:7 Nang, leilung, Lalpa hmaah khûr rawh, Jakoba Pathian hmaah chuan." 
Psalms114:8 Lungpui chu dîlah a chantîr a, Meilung chu tuihnaah a chantîr bawk." 
Psalms115:1 Lalpa, keini ni lovin, keimahni ni hek lovin, I hming chauh hi chawimawi ang che. I ngilneih leh i rinawm êm avâng hian." 
Psalms115:2 Engati nge hnam dangte chuan, ‘An Pathian chu khaw nge a awm?’ an tih vei ni." 
Psalms115:3 Kan Pathian chu vânah a awm, A duh apiang a ti mai ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms115:4 Milemte chu tangka leh rangkachaka siam an ni a, Mihring kutchhuak mai an ni e." 
Psalms115:5 Kâ an nei a, an ṭawng thei si lo va, Mit an nei a, an hmu thei bawk hek lo." 
Psalms115:6 Beng an nei a, an hre thei miah lo va, Hnâr an nei a, thil rim an hre thei lo." 
Psalms115:7 Kut an nei a, an khawih thei si lo va, Ke an nei a, an kal thei bawk hek lo, Aw pawh an chhuah thei lo." 
Psalms115:8 Milem siamtute chu milem ang lek an ni a, Milem ringtute pawh milem ang chauh an ni." 
Psalms115:9 Aw Israel-te u, Lalpa hi ring rawh u, Ṭanpuitu leh phaw a ni e." 
Psalms115:10 Arona thlahte u, Lalpa hi ring rawh u, Nangmahni ṭanpuitu leh in phaw a ni." 
Psalms115:11 Lalpa ṭihtute u, Lalpa hi ring rawh u, ṭanpuitu leh phaw a ni e." 
Psalms115:12 Lalpan min hre reng a, mal min sâwm ang, Israela thlahte mal a sâwm ang a, Arona chhûngte pawh a sâwm bawk ang;" 
Psalms115:13 Lalpan amah ṭihtute chu, a lian a têin, Mal a sâwm ang." 
Psalms115:14 Lalpan nasa takin tifing che u rawh se, Nangmahni leh in fate nên." 
Psalms115:15 Lei leh vân siamtu Lalpa chuan Malsâwm che u rawh se. 
Psalms115:16 Vân khi Lalpa vân a ni a, Lei hi mihringte tân a pêk a ni." 
Psalms115:17 Mitthite chuan Lalpa an fak thei lo, Ngawih rengna rama chhuk tâte chuan." 
Psalms115:18 Keini zawngin Lalpa kan fak ang a, Tûn aṭanga chatuan thlengin, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms116:1 Khawngaih ka dîlna aw a ngaihthlâk avângin Lalpa chu ka ngaina a ni. 
Psalms116:2 Ka koh apiangin a lo ngaithla ṭhîn. 
Psalms116:3 Thih hlauhna chuan min rawn chîm a, Seol hlauhawmna chuan mi rawn tuam a, Mangang leh lungngai takin ka awm." 
Psalms116:4 Tichuan, Lalpa hming chu ka han lam a, Aw ‘ Lalpa, min chhan chhuak teh,’ tiin." 
Psalms116:5 Lalpa chuan ngil a nei a, a ṭha a ni, Pathian hi zawng, mi lainat thei tak a ni." 
Psalms116:6 Lalpan ṭanpui ngaite a pui ṭhîn a, Ka chan a chauh laiin min rawn chhan chhuak." 
Psalms116:7 Aw ka nunna, thlamuang takin awm leh tawh rawh, Lalpa chu ka chungah a ṭha êm êm si a." 
Psalms116:8 Ka nunna hi thihna lakah, Ka mitte hi mittui lakah, Ka kete hi tlûkna lakah I chhan chhuak ta si a." 
Psalms116:9 Tichuan, Lalpa hmaah ka lêng thei ta, Mi nungte ramah chuan." 
Psalms116:10 ‘Ka va rethei tak êm!’ ka tih lai pawhin, Amah ka ring tlat a." 
Psalms116:11 ‘Tu mah rin tlâk an awm lo ve,’ Thlaphâng taka ka tih laite pawh khân." 
Psalms116:12 Ka tân a ṭhat êm avang hian Lalpa chu eng nge ka pêk ve ang? 
Psalms116:13 Chhandamna no ka keng ang a, Lalpa hming chu ka lam ang." 
Psalms116:14 Lalpa hnêna ka thutiam chu ka hlen ngei ang, A mite zawng zawng hmaah chuan." 
Psalms116:15 Amah ngaihsaktute thihna chu, Lalpa ngaihin hlu tak a ni." 
Psalms116:16 Aw Lalpa, kei zawng, i bawih, i chhiahhlawh ka ni a, I bawihnu fapa ka ni, Min phuarnate i rawn phelh ta." 
Psalms116:17 Lâwmthu sawi inthawina ka hlân ang che a, Lalpa, i hming ka lam bawk ang." 
Psalms116:18 Lalpa hnêna ka thutiam chu ka hlen ngei ang, A mite zawng zawng hmaah chuan." 
Psalms116:19 Lalpa biak in tualzâwl, Jerusalem laiah ka hlen ngei ang. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms117:1 Hnam zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chu fak ula, Mi tinrêngte u, amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms117:2 Kan chungah hian ngil a nei êm êm a, Lalpa rinawmna chu kumkhuain a pangngai reng a ni. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms118:1 Lalpa chu a ṭhat êm avângin fak rawh u, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms118:2 Israel mite chuan, ‘Ngil a nei kumkhua si a,’ ti ngei rawh se." 
Psalms118:3 Arona thlahte chuan, ‘Ngil a nei kumkhua si a’ ti hlawm rawh se." 
Psalms118:4 Lalpa ṭihtute chuan, ‘Ngil a nei kumkhua si a,’ ti bawk rawh se." 
Psalms118:5 Ka mangang a, Lalpa chu ka han au va, Lalpa chuan min lo chhâng a, min tizalên ta a." 
Psalms118:6 Lalpa chu ka lamṭang a ni a, ka hlau lo vang, Mihringin eng nge min tih theih ang?" 
Psalms118:7 Lalpa chu ka lama ṭang, min ṭanpuitu a ni, Min hawtute diriam takin ka la en ang." 
Psalms118:8 Mihring rinchhan ai chuan Lalpa hnêna tlûkluh a ṭha zâwk a," 
Psalms118:9 Milian rinchhan ai chuan Lalpa hnênah tlûkluh a ṭha zâwk. 
Psalms118:10 Hnam dangte chuan min rawn hual a, Mahse, Lalpa hmingin ka titlâwm ta." 
Psalms118:11 Min rawn hual tuau tuau va, Mahse, Lalpa hmingin ka titlâwm ta." 
Psalms118:12 Khuai rual angin min rawn bawh a, Mahse, Lalpa hmingin ka titlâwm ta." 
Psalms118:13 Min rawn nawr sawk sawk a, Ka tlu ṭhelh a; mahse, Lalpan min ṭanpui ta." 
Psalms118:14 Lalpa chu ka chakna leh ka hla, Min chhandamtu a ni." 
Psalms118:15 An bûka Pathian mite hnehna lâwma au thâwm chu ngai rawh u, ‘ Lalpa kut ding lam chuan a hneh ta a," 
Psalms118:16 Lalpa kut ding lam chawimawi a ni a, Lalpa kut ding lam chuan thil ropui tak a tih tâk hi,’ an ti." 
Psalms118:17 Ka thi lo vang, ka dam ang a, Lalpa thil tih ka hril ngei ang." 
Psalms118:18 Lalpan min thunun na hle a, Mahse, ka thih êm zawng a phal lo ve." 
Psalms118:19 Tempul kawngkhâr chu mi hawn rawh u, Ka lût ang a, Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu ka sawi dâwn a ni." 
Psalms118:20 Hei hi Lalpa kawngkhâr chu a ni, Mi dikte chu an lût thei ang." 
Psalms118:21 Min chhan avângin ka fak a che, Min chhanchhuaktu i ni." 
Psalms118:22 Insatute lung hnâwl tâk kha, A kil lung pawimawh ber a lo ni si." 
Psalms118:23 Chu chu Lalpa tih a ni e, kan hmuhin a mak kan ti." 
Psalms118:24 Vawiin hi Lalpa ni ruat chu a ni, Hlimin i lâwm ang u." 
Psalms118:25 Aw Lalpa, min chhandam teh, Aw Lalpa, min hlawhtlintîr ang che." 
Psalms118:26 Lalpa hminga lo kal chu an nihlawh e, Lalpa in aṭang hian mal kan sâwm a che u," 
Psalms118:27 Lalpa chu Pathian a ni a, kan chungah a lo êng ta! Chhâwl keng ila, maichâm thlengin kawng i zawh ang." 
Psalms118:28 Ka Pathian i ni a, lâwmthu ka hrilh ang che, Aw ka Pathian, ka chawimawi chiam ang che." 
Psalms118:29 Lalpa chu a ṭhat avângin fak rawh u, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms119:1 Sawisêlbote chu an nihlawh e, Lalpa Dân zâwmtute chu." 
Psalms119:2 A thupêk zâwmtute chu an nihlawh e, Tihtakmeuhva zawngtute chu." 
Psalms119:3 Anni chuan thil sual an ti ngai lo va, A kawngah an kal ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:4 I thuruatte chu min pe a, Zâwm ngei tûrin min ti." 
Psalms119:5 I dânte chu Rinawm taka zâwmtu ni thei teh ila aw! 
Psalms119:6 I thupêk zawng zawng zâwm ila, Ka mualpho tawp lo vang." 
Psalms119:7 I rorêl dikzia ka hriat hunah Thinlung dik takin ka fak ang che. 
Psalms119:8 I dân chu ka zâwm ang a, Min kalsan suh ang che." 
Psalms119:9 Tleirâwlten engtin nge an awm dân an vawn thianghlim ang? I thute zâwmin. 
Psalms119:10 Theihtâwp chhuahin ka zawng che a, I thute ka pênsan phal lul suh." 
Psalms119:11 I chungah thil sual ka tih loh nân, I thu ka thinlungah ka vawng tlat a." 
Psalms119:12 Lalpa, fak tlâk i ni, I dânte min zirtîr rawh." 
Psalms119:13 I kâa thu chhuakte chu Ka sawi ka sawi dâwn e. 
Psalms119:14 I thu târlante zawm hi ka hlimna a ni a, Sum tam tak neiha ka hlim ang maiin." 
Psalms119:15 I thuruatte ka ngaihtuah a, I kawngte chu ka chhui bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:16 I thutak chu ka lawmzâwng a ni a, I thute chu ka theihnghilh ngai lo vang." 
Psalms119:17 I chhiahhlawh chungah hian ṭha takin ti la, I thu zâwma ka nun theih nân." 
Psalms119:18 Ka mit mi tihvârsak ang che, I Dân makzia ka hmuh chian theih nân." 
Psalms119:19 Leiah hian khualzin mai ka ni a, I thupêk chu ka lakah hian zêp suh ang che." 
Psalms119:20 I rorêl hriat châkin Eng lai pawhin ka vân ruai ṭhîn. 
Psalms119:21 Mi chapo, ânchhe dawngte chu i zilhhau va, I thupêk pawisa lotute chu." 
Psalms119:22 Hmusit taka min sawichhiatna hi la bo vang che, I thu hriattîr ka zâwm si a." 
Psalms119:23 Miliante chuan ṭhu khâwmin min phiar a, Kei, i chhiahhlawh hi chuan i Dânte ka ngaihtuah ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:24 I thu hriattîr chu ka lâwmzâwng a ni a, Rem min ruatsak ṭhîntu a ni." 
Psalms119:25 Vaivutah ka tlu reng mai a, I tiam angin min tiharh rawh." 
Psalms119:26 Ka awm dânte i hnênah ka puang a, nangin min lo chhâng a, I dânte chu min zirtîr ang che." 
Psalms119:27 I thuruatte chu min hriatthiamtîr la, I thil mak tihte chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms119:28 Lungngaiin ka chau dêr a, I tiam angin min tichak rawh." 
Psalms119:29 Kawng dik lo chu ka zawh phal suh ang che, Khawngaih takin i dân min zirtîr rawh." 
Psalms119:30 Kawng dik tak chu ka thlang ta a, I rorêlte ka zâwm bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:31 I thu hriattîrte chu ka zâwm tlat a, Aw Lalpa, min timualpho lul suh." 
Psalms119:32 I thupêk chu châk takin ka zâwm a, Ka rilru hi a tizau ta." 
Psalms119:33 Lalpa, i dân thute min zirtîr rawh, A kip a kawiin ka zâwm dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:34 I Dân ka zawm theih nân hriatthiamna min pe la, Ka theih tâwkin ka zâwm ang e." 
Psalms119:35 I thupêkte min zawmtîr la, Chu chu ka lâwmzâwng tak a ni si a." 
Psalms119:36 I thu hriattîr lamah min hawitîr la, Awhna lamah ni lovin." 
Psalms119:37 Thil lawilo en lo tûrin ka mit min lâktîr ang che, I kawnga kal tûrin min tiharh rawh." 
Psalms119:38 I chhiahhlawh hnêna i thutiam chu hlen la, Nangmah ṭihtute hnêna i tiam chu." 
Psalms119:39 Ka hlauh êm êm, min sawichhiatna hi la bo vang che, I rorêl chu a va ṭha êm!" 
Psalms119:40 I thuruatte chu ka ngaina takzet a ni. I ṭhatnain min tiharh rawh. 
Psalms119:41 Lalpa, i ngilneihzia ka chungah a lang, I tiam angin min chhandam rawh." 
Psalms119:42 Min sawichhetute ka chhân theih nân, I thu ka ring si a." 
Psalms119:43 Eng lai pawhin thu dik min sawitîr rawh, I rorêl chu ka innghahna a ni si a." 
Psalms119:44 I Dânte chu ka zâwm fo vang, Chatuan chatuanin." 
Psalms119:45 Engthâwl takin ka lêng teh ang, I thuruat chu ka zawn ber a ni si." 
Psalms119:46 Lalho hmaah i thu hriattîrte chu ka hril ang a, Ka zak lo vang." 
Psalms119:47 I thupêkte zawm nuam ka ti a, Ka châkzâwng tak a nih avângin." 
Psalms119:48 I thupêkte ka ngainain ka ngaisâng a, I dânte chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms119:49 I chhiahhlawh hnêna i thutiam hre reng ang che, Chu chuan beiseina min neihtîr a ni." 
Psalms119:50 Chu chu ka tuar laia min thlamuantu a ni, I thu chuan min tiharh ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:51 Chapote chuan min hmusit êm êm a, Mahse, i Dân ka pên bosan ngai lo." 
Psalms119:52 Lalpa, hmasânga i rorêl chu ka hre reng a, Min tithlamuang a ni." 
Psalms119:53 Mi sualten i Dân an pawisa lo tih ka hmuhin, Ka thin a ur êm êm a ni." 
Psalms119:54 Ka dam chhûng rei lo tê-ah hian I dânte chu zaiin ka chawi ang. 
Psalms119:55 Lalpa, zânah i hming ka hre reng a, I Dânte chu ka ngaihtuah ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:56 I dân zawm hi, Ka lâwmna chu a ni." 
Psalms119:57 Lalpa, ka chanvo i ni a, I thu zawm ka tiam ta e." 
Psalms119:58 Theihtâwpin i duhsakna ka zawng a, I tiam angin min khawngaih rawh." 
Psalms119:59 Ka awm dânte ka ngaihtuah a, I thu hriattîrte zâwm tûrin ka ke ka pên ta e." 
Psalms119:60 I thupêkte chu muangchâng lovin Ka zâwm ta vat a ni. 
Psalms119:61 Mi sual rualin min hual vêl a, Mahse, i Dânte chu ka theihnghilh lo." 
Psalms119:62 Zânlaiah te fak tûr chein ka tho ṭhîn a, I rorêlte a dik avângin." 
Psalms119:63 Nangmah ṭihtute zawng zawng ṭhian ka ni, I dân zâwmtute chu." 
Psalms119:64 Lalpa, lei hi i ngilneihnain a khat a, I dânte chu min zirtîr rawh." 
Psalms119:65 I chhiahhlawh chungah hian, Lalpa, I thu angin thil ṭha i ti ṭhîn a." 
Psalms119:66 Finna leh hriatna ṭha min zirtîr rawh, I thupêk hi ka ring si a." 
Psalms119:67 Ka tuar hma khân ka vâk bo ṭhîn, Mahse, tûnah i thu ka zawm tâk hi." 
Psalms119:68 Nang zawng i ṭha a, thil ṭha titu i ni, I dânte chu min zirtîr rawh." 
Psalms119:69 Chapote chuan min hêk ṭhîn a, Kei chuan theihtâwp chhuahin i dân ka zâwm a ni." 
Psalms119:70 An thinlung a sak a, Kei zawng i Dân ka lâwmna a ni ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:71 Min tuartîr kha ka tân a lo ṭha e, I dânte chu ka zir phah ta." 
Psalms119:72 I Dân min pêkte hi, Tangka leh rangkachak sâng tam tak aiin a hlu zâwk a ni." 
Psalms119:73 I kutin min siam a, min din nghet a, Hriatthiamna min pe la, i thupêkte ka zir ang e." 
Psalms119:74 Nangmah ṭihtuten min hmu ang a, an lâwm ang, I thu ka rin tlat avângin." 
Psalms119:75 Lalpa, i rorêl chu a dik tih ka hria, Dik takin min zirtîr ṭhîn a lo ni e." 
Psalms119:76 I chhiahhlawh hnêna i tiam ang khân, Aw, i ngilneihna chuan min tithlamuang teh se:" 
Psalms119:77 Min khawngaih la; tichuan, ka nung ang a, I Dân hi ka lâwm si a." 
Psalms119:78 Chapote chu mualpho rawh se, dâwta min hêk avângin, Kei chuan i thuruatte ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms119:79 Nangmah ṭihtute chu ka lam lo hawi rawh se, I thu hriattîr hretute chu." 
Psalms119:80 I dânte chu zâwm vek ila, Ka mualpho ngai lo vang." 
Psalms119:81 Min chhanchhuahna nghâkin ka chau ta e, I thu ka ring si a." 
Psalms119:82 I thutiam thlîr nân ka mit a vai zo va, ‘Engtikah nge min thlamuan ang?’ tiin." 
Psalms119:83 Ip hluihlâwn ung tawh ang ka ni; Mahse, i dânte chu ka theihnghilh lo." 
Psalms119:84 I chhiahhlawh hi eng chen nge ka la dam ang? Engtikah nge min tiduhdahtute chungah ro i rêl dâwn? 
Psalms119:85 Mi chapo, i Dân zâwm duh lote chuan, Ka tlâk nân khur an lai a." 
Psalms119:86 I thupêkte a rin tlâk êm êm a, Dâwtin min bei a ni - min ṭanpui rawh." 
Psalms119:87 Lei ata hi min tiboral ṭhelh ṭhelh a ni; Mahse, i thuruatte chu ka thlahthlam chuang lo ve." 
Psalms119:88 Ngil i neih êm avângin min tiharh la, I thu hriattîr ka zâwm dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:89 Aw Lalpa, vânahte khian I thu chu a awm kumkhua ang." 
Psalms119:90 I rinawmna chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a pangngai reng a, Lei i din nghet a, a awm ta reng a ni." 
Psalms119:91 I rorêl angin tûn thleng hian engkim an awm a, An za vaiin i chhiahhlawh vek an ni." 
Psalms119:92 I Dân hi ka lâwmzâwng tak ni suh sela chuan, Hrehawm tuarin ka boral daih tawh ang." 
Psalms119:93 I thuruatte ka theihnghilh ngai lo va, Nangin chûng chuan min tiharh ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:94 I ta ka ni, min chhandam rawh, I thuruat zawngtu ka ni si a." 
Psalms119:95 Mi sualte chuan min thah tumin min châng mah se, I thu hriattîrte chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms119:96 Engkim mai hian tâwp chin a nei tih ka hre ta a, I thupêk erawh chu zau tak a ni." 
Psalms119:97 Aw, I dân chu ka va ngaina êm, Ni tin ka ngaihtuah ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms119:98 I thupêk chuan ka hmêlmate aiin mi tifing a, Kumkhuaa min chênchilh reng avângin." 
Psalms119:99 Min zirtîrtu zawng zawng aiin ka fing zâwk e, I thu hriattîr ka ngaihtuah fo avângin." 
Psalms119:100 Tarte aiin ka hre zau va, I thuruatte ka vawn ṭhin avângin." 
Psalms119:101 Kawng sual rêng rêng ka dai ngai lo, I thu ka zawm theih nân." 
Psalms119:102 I rorêl chu ka pênsan ngai lo va, Nangmah ngeiin min zirtîr avângin." 
Psalms119:103 I thute chu ka kâah hian a va tui êm! Khawizu aiin a thlum zâwk e. 
Psalms119:104 I thuruat chuan min tifing a, Awm dân dik lo tinrêng ka hua a ni." 
Psalms119:105 I thu hi ka ke atân khâwnvâr a ni a, Ka kawng atân êng a ni bawk." 
Psalms119:106 I rorêl dik tak chu Zawm ka tiam a, ka nemnghet e." 
Psalms119:107 Ka tuar nasa êm mai, Lalpa, I thu angin min tiharh rawh." 
Psalms119:108 Lalpa, khawngaih takin ka fakna hi lo lâwm la, I rorêl chu min zirtîr rawh." 
Psalms119:109 Ka nunna hi i kuta awm a ni a, I Dân ka theihnghilh ngai lo ve." 
Psalms119:110 Mi sualte chuan ka awh nân thang an kam a; Mahse, i thuruat chu ka pênsan lo." 
Psalms119:111 I thu hriattîrte chu ka kumkhaw rochan a ni a, Ka thinlung pawh a tihlim êm êm ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:112 Kumkhuaa i dân zâwm tûrin Ka rilru ka siam fel ta. 
Psalms119:113 Mumal nei lote chu ka hua a, I Dânte erawh chu ka ngaina e." 
Psalms119:114 Nang chu ka bihrûkna, ka phaw i ni, I thu ka ring tlat e." 
Psalms119:115 Thil sual titute u, min kalsan rawh u; Pathian thupêk ka zâwm dâwn a ni." 
Psalms119:116 I tiam angin min dawm ding la, ka nung dâwn nia, Ka beisei hi tithlâwn lul suh ang che." 
Psalms119:117 Mi chelh tlat la, ka him ngei ang, I dânte chu ka zâwm fo vang." 
Psalms119:118 I dân pênsantute chu i duh lo va, Mi bum an tumna chu engmahlo mai a ni." 
Psalms119:119 Leia mi sualte chu a êkchhia ang maiin i hnâwl zêl a, Chuvângin, i thu hriattîr ka ngaina ta a ni." 
Psalms119:120 Ka hlauh che avângin ka tisa a khûr a, I rorêlte hlauvin ka khat." 
Psalms119:121 Dik tak leh fel takin thil ka ti ṭhîn, Min tiduhdahtute kutah min pe lul suh." 
Psalms119:122 I chhiahhlawh hi ṭanpui tiam la, Mi chapoten min nêkchêp hi phal suh." 
Psalms119:123 I chhandamna thlîr nân ka mit a vai zo va, Chhandam i tiam kha hmuh tumin." 
Psalms119:124 I chhiahhlawh chungah hian ngilnei takin ti la, I dânte chu min zirtîr bawk ang che." 
Psalms119:125 I chhiahhlawh ka ni a, hriatthiam theihna min pe ang che, I thu hriattîrte chu ka hriat theih nân." 
Psalms119:126 Lalpa, i chêt a hun ta e, I Dân an bawhchhiat hi." 
Psalms119:127 Chuvângin, i thupêkte chu rangkachak aiin ka ngaina a, A ni, rangkachak thianghlim ber ai pawhin." 
Psalms119:128 Tichuan, i thuruat zawng zawngte chu a zavaiin ka zâwm a, Awm dân dik lo tinrêng ka hua a ni." 
Psalms119:129 I thu hriattîrte chu a va mak êm! Chuvâng chuan, ka zâwm ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:130 I thu hrilhfiahna chuan mite a tiêng a, Mi mâwlte pawh a tifing ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:131 I thupêkte hriat châk takin, Ka âng meuhvin ka thaw huam huam a ni." 
Psalms119:132 Ka lamah lo hawi la, min khawngaih rawh, I hming ngainatute chunga i tih fo ṭhin ang khân." 
Psalms119:133 I tiam angin ka ke pênte hi tinghet ang che, Sualin ka chunga thu a neih phal suh ang che." 
Psalms119:134 Min nêkchêptute kut ata hi min chhan chhuak la, I thuruatte ka zâwm dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:135 I chhiahhlawh chungah hian i hmêl lo êng sela, I dânte chu min zirtîr bawk ang che." 
Psalms119:136 I dânte chu an zawm duh loh avângin, Lui tui angin ka mittui hi a luang fo ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:137 Lalpa, nang chu mi dik i ni a, I rorêl pawh a dik a ni." 
Psalms119:138 I thu hriattîrte chu a dik a, A rin tlâk êm êm bawk." 
Psalms119:139 Ka ṭhahnemngaihna chuan mi ei zo va, Ka hmêlmaten i thu an theihnghilh tâk avângin." 
Psalms119:140 I thute chu finfiah vek tawh a ni, I chhiahhlawh hian a ngaina êm êm e." 
Psalms119:141 Eng mah tham lo, hmuhsitawm tak ka ni; Mahse, i thuruatte ka theihnghilh ngai si lo." 
Psalms119:142 I dikna hi a awm kumkhua ang a, I Dân pawh hi a ṭha reng ang." 
Psalms119:143 Manganna leh buainain min rawn nang a; Mahse, i thupêk hian min tilâwm ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:144 I thu hriattîrte chu a dik kumkhua dâwn a, Hriatthiamna min pe la, ka nung dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:145 Theihtâwp chhuahin ka au che a, Lalpa, min chhâng ang che, I dânte chu ka zâwm dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:146 Ka koh che hi, min chhandam rawh, I thu hriattîrte chu ka awih dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:147 Khawvâr hmain ṭanpui dîlin ka au ṭhîn che, I thu ka beisei ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms119:148 Ka meng tlaivâr ṭhîn e, I thu ngaihtuahin." 
Psalms119:149 I ngilneihna avângin ka aw lo ngaithla la, Lalpa, i tih fo ṭhin ang khân min khawngaih rawh." 
Psalms119:150 Thil sual tih chîngte chuan min rawn hnaih hi, I thu zâwm duh ngai lote chuan." 
Psalms119:151 Lalpa, nang ka kiangah i awm a, I thupêk zawng zawngte a rin tlâk si." 
Psalms119:152 I thu hriattîrte chu kumkhua atân i tinghet tih Hmân aṭangin ka lo hre tawh a ni. 
Psalms119:153 Ka tuarna hi en la, min chhan chhuak teh, I Dân ka theihnghilh ngai si lo." 
Psalms119:154 Mi sawipui la, min tlan ang che, I tiam angin min tiharh rawh." 
Psalms119:155 Mi sualte tân chhandamna chu hla tak a ni, I dânte chu an zir duh si lo va." 
Psalms119:156 Lalpa, ngil i nei êm êm a, I tih fo ṭhin angin min tiharh rawh." 
Psalms119:157 Hmêlma, min ûmtute an tam hle a; Mahse, i thu hriattîr ka pênsan ngai lo ve." 
Psalms119:158 Phattute ka hmuhin ka ten êm êm, I thu an awih duh loh avângin." 
Psalms119:159 I thuruatte ka ngaihnatzia hi, min han en teh, Lalpa, i ngilneihna avângin min tiharh rawh." 
Psalms119:160 I thu laipui chu thutak hi a ni, I rorêl zawng zawng chu a dik kumkhua a ni." 
Psalms119:161 Hotute chuan chhan awm lovin min tiduhdah a, Mahse, i thu ka ngaisâng e." 
Psalms119:162 I thu vângin ka hlim êm êm ṭhîn a, Sum tam tak chhartu ang maiin." 
Psalms119:163 Dâwt ka hua a, ka ten a ni, I Dân erawh hi chu ka ngaina e." 
Psalms119:164 Ni khatah vawi sarih ka fak ṭhîn che, I rorêl chu a dik êm avângin." 
Psalms119:165 I Dân ngaihtuahtute an thlamuang êm êm ṭhîn, Eng mahin a titlu thei si lo." 
Psalms119:166 Lalpa, i chhandamna ka nghâk reng a, I Dânte chu ka zâwm zêl a." 
Psalms119:167 I thu hriattîrte chu ka zâwm ziah a, Ka ngaina êm êm ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:168 I thuruat leh i thu hriattîrte chu ka zâwm zêl ṭhîn, Ka awm dân zawng zawngte i hre vek bawk." 
Psalms119:169 Lalpa, ka au aw hi i hnên lo thleng sela, I tiam angin hriatthiamna min pe ang che." 
Psalms119:170 Khawngaih ka dîlna hi i hnên lo thleng sela, I tiam angin min chhandam rawh." 
Psalms119:171 Nangmah fakin ka zai ang a, I dânte chu min zirtîr ta si a." 
Psalms119:172 Ka lei hi i thu fakin zai rawh se, I thupêk zawng zawng chu a dik a ni." 
Psalms119:173 Min ṭanpui tûrin inpeih reng la, I thuruatte ka thlang ta si." 
Psalms119:174 Aw Lalpa, i chhandamna ka nghâkhlel a, I dânte chu ka lâwmzâwng tak a ni." 
Psalms119:175 Min tinung la, ka fak ang che, I rorêl chuan min pui rawh se." 
Psalms119:176 Berâm angin ka vâk bo va, i chhiahhlawh hi min rawn zawng teh, I thupêkte ka theihnghilh ngai si lo." 
Psalms120:1 Ka manganin Lalpa chu ka au va, Min lo chhâng ṭhîn." 
Psalms120:2 Dâwt sawi chîng leh bum hmangte lakah chuan, Lalpa, min hum ang che." 
Psalms120:3 Bum hmangte u, engtianga nasain nge A sawisak ang che u?" 
Psalms120:4 In dopuite thal zum tak leh Thing chang lingin a hrem dâwn a che u. 
Psalms120:5 Mesek-ho zînga awm ang leh Kedar-ho zînga chêng ang ka ni, A va vânduaithlâk êm!" 
Psalms120:6 Remna duh lote zîngah hian Ka chêng rei lutuk ta. 
Psalms120:7 Kei chuan inremna thu ka sawi ṭhîn a; Mahse, indo an thlang zâwk ṭhin." 
Psalms121:1 Tlâng lamahte khian ka mit ka lên chho vang, Khawi aṭangin nge ṭanpuina ka hmuh ang?" 
Psalms121:2 Min ṭanpuina chu Lalpa, Lei leh vân Siamtu hnên aṭangin a lo thleng ang." 
Psalms121:3 Ani chuan i tlûk a phal lo vang a, Nangmah vêngtu chu a muhîl ngai lo ve." 
Psalms121:4 Ngai teh, Israel-ho vêngtu chu, A muhîl ngai lo va, a muthlu ngai hek lo." 
Psalms121:5 Lalpan a vêng che a, Lalpan a hliahkhuh zêl ang che." 
Psalms121:6 Chhûnah ni sa i tuar lo vang a, Zânah thlain a em â hek lo vang che." 
Psalms121:7 Thil ṭha lo tinrêng lakah Lalpan a vêng ang che a, A hum tlat dâwn a che." 
Psalms121:8 Lalpa chuan i chhuak leh lût a vêng ang che, Tûn aṭanga kumkhuain." 
Psalms122:1 ‘ Lalpa inah i kal ang u,’ Ti-a min sâwm lai khân ka lâwm hle a." 
Psalms122:2 Aw Jerusalem, i kulh chhûngah Kan kête chu a din tâk hi." 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem, khawpui din thar, Fel taka remah chuan." 
Psalms122:4 Tah chuan a ni, hnamte an chhoh ṭhin ni, Lalpa hnamte chu, Israel-te thu a pêk anga a hming han fak tûrin." 
Psalms122:5 Tah chuan a ni, Davida thlahten, Rorêlna lalṭhutthlêng an hûn ṭhin ni." 
Psalms122:6 Jerusalem khaw tân thlamuanna dîl ula, Nang ngainatute chu hmuingîl rawh se." 
Psalms122:7 I kulh chhûngah râlmuanna awm sela, I lal inahte pawh thawvenna awm rawh se." 
Psalms122:8 Ka unaute leh ka ṭhiante avângin, ‘I chungah thlamuanna awm rawh se,’ ka ti a ni." 
Psalms122:9 Lalpa, kan Pathian in avângin, I ṭhatna tûr ka zawng zêl ang." 
Psalms123:1 Aw nang, vân aṭanga rorêl ṭhîntu, I lam ka rawn thlîr e." 
Psalms123:2 Chhiahhlawhten an pu an ngaichâng ang leh, Bawihnuten an pite an nghâk ang hian, Min khawngaih hma loh chu, Kan mit pawhin Lalpa kan Pathian chu a thlîr reng dâwn a ni." 
Psalms123:3 Min khawngaih rawh, Lalpa, min khawngaih rawh, Mi min hmuhsitna kan ning ta e." 
Psalms123:4 Mi nuamsaten min hmuhsitna leh Chapote min diriamna kan ning lutuk ta e. 
Psalms124:1 “ Lalpa chu kan lama ṭang ni suh sela chuan," 
Psalms124:2 Miten min beih lai khân Kan lama ṭang chu Lalpa ni suh sela," 
Psalms124:3 Kan chunga an thinur a sosân laite khân, A nung chungin min dawlh tawh ang." 
Psalms124:4 Tui lianin min lain Lui lian chuan min chîm pil tawh ang," 
Psalms124:5 Tui lian so bulh bulh chuan Min vûr pil tawh ngei ang,” Israel-te chuan ti ngei rawh se." 
Psalms124:6 Lalpa i fak ang u, Hmêlmaten min sehsawm a phal lo va," 
Psalms124:7 Thangkamtu thang ata sava angin min chhuah ta, Thang chu a tichhia a, keini kan chhuak ta a ni." 
Psalms124:8 Lei leh vân Siamtu Lalpa chuan, A hming avângin min rawn pui ta." 
Psalms125:1 Lalpa ringtute chu, Zion tlâng tihnghîn rual loh, Kumkhuaa awm rêng tûr ang hi an ni." 
Psalms125:2 Jerusalem khua chu tlângin a hual ang hian, A mite chu Lalpan a kal hual ṭhîn." 
Psalms125:3 Mi sualte chu mi dikte ramah chuan An lal reng dâwn si lo, Mi dikte chuan thil sual an tih ve loh nân." 
Psalms125:4 Aw Lalpa, mi ṭhate leh thinlung ngîlte chungah chuan, Thil ṭha ti ve ang che." 
Psalms125:5 Sual kawng zawhtute Lalpan a hruai bo hunah chuan, Thil sual titute chu a hruai tel ang. Israel-te hnênah rem lêng rawh se." 
Psalms126:1 Lalpan Zion-a min hruai kîr leh lai khân, mumang emaw kan ti." 
Psalms126:2 Kan nui hawm hawm a, Hlimin kan au chêl chûl bawk a. ‘ Lalpan an tân thil ropui tak a tihsak a nih hi,’ Hnam dangte chuan an ti." 
Psalms126:3 Lalpan thil ropui tak min tihsak a, Kan hlim êm êm a ni." 
Psalms126:4 Lalpan sala kan tâng min hruai kîr leh ta a, Thlalêra lui tui a luang leh ta ang hian." 
Psalms126:5 Mittui tla chunga tuhtute chuan Hlim takin an seng a," 
Psalms126:6 Ṭap chungin buh chi feh chhuahpui mah sela, An buhphalte kengin hlim takin an lo haw leh ang." 
Psalms127:1 Lalpan in a sak loh chuan, A satute an hah thlâwn mai a ni. Lalpan khawpui a vên loh chuan, A vêngtute an meng thlâwn mai a ni." 
Psalms127:2 Ei tûr zawnga zîng tak taka thawha, Tlai tak taka mut hi a hahthlâk thlâwn a ni. Lalpan a hmangaihte chu Malsâwmna a pe mai ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms127:3 Fanaute hi Lalpa hnên ata kan rochan an ni a, Rîla rahte hi kan lâwmman dawn a ni." 
Psalms127:4 Kan vânglai fate chu indo mite thal ang hi an ni. 
Psalms127:5 Thal bâwm chutianga khat nei chu an nihlawh e, Kulh kawngkaa hmêlma an tawn hunah An mualpho hauh lo vang." 
Psalms128:1 Lalpa ṭihtu zawng zawngte chu an nihlawh e, A kawng zawh ṭhînte chu." 
Psalms128:2 Thawhrim rah i ei ang a, I hlimin i hmuingîl ang." 
Psalms128:3 I nupui chu i in chhûngrilah, Grep rah duh tak ang hi a ni ang a, I fate pawh oliv tuai ang, Chawhlui kîla ṭhu kual pup tham an ni bawk ang." 
Psalms128:4 Hetiang hian Lalpa ṭihtute chuan, Malsâwmna an dawng ngei ang." 
Psalms128:5 Zion aṭangin Lalpan mal a sâwm ang che a, I dam chhûng zawng Jerusalem hmuingîlna chu i chang ve ang." 
Psalms128:6 I tute hmêl hmuin i dam bawk ang. Israel-te hnênah rem lêng rawh se. 
Psalms129:1 ‘Ka naupan lai ata miten min va tiduhdah ṭhîn tak êm!’ Israel-hovin ti rawh se. 
Psalms129:2 ‘Ka naupan lai ata miten min va tiduhdah ṭhîn tak êm! Mahse, tu man min titlâwm thei si lo." 
Psalms129:3 Leilettuin lei a rîn thlûr angin, Ka hnungzâng hi an rîn thlûr seng sung mai." 
Psalms129:4 Lalpa chu a dik a, Mi sualte hruihrual chu mi zai chahsak ta e,’ Israel-ten ti ngei rawh se." 
Psalms129:5 Zion hawtu zawng zawngte chu Mualphovin, tlânchhe haw daih rawh se." 
Psalms129:6 A ṭhan sân hmaa vuai mai ṭhîn, In chung zâwla hlobet ang hi ni vek rawh se." 
Psalms129:7 Tu man chu chu an la khâwm ngai lo va, Seng tûr pawhin an têl hek lo." 
Psalms129:8 A bul hnaia kalte pawhin, ‘ Lalpan malsâwm che u rawh se, Lalpa hmingin mal kan sâwm a che u,’ An ti ngai bawk hek lo." 
Psalms130:1 Manganna khur thûk tak aṭangin, Lalpa, ka au va che, Lalpa, ka aw hi ngaithla teh." 
Psalms130:2 Khawngaih ka dîlna hi, Min ngaihthlâksak ang che." 
Psalms130:3 Lalpa, sualnate i chhinchhiah zêl chuan, Lalpa, tu nge thiam chang zo vang?" 
Psalms130:4 Nang chuan sual i ngaidam ṭhîn a; Tichuan, miten an zah ṭhîn che a ni." 
Psalms130:5 Lalpa chu ka nghâk ṭhîn, A ni, ka nghâk reng ṭhîn a ni. A thu pawh ka ring a ni." 
Psalms130:6 Râlvêngtuten khawvâr an nghahhlelh aia nasain, A ni, râlvêngtuten khawvâr an nghahhlelh aia nasa mahin, Nghâkhlel takin Lalpa ka thlîr a ni." 
Psalms130:7 Israel-te u, Lalpa hi ring rawh u, Lalpa chu ngilnei tak a ni a, Chhandam a peih reng bawk." 
Psalms130:8 An bawhchhiatna zawng zawng ata, Israel-te a chhan chhuak ang." 
Psalms131:1 Lalpa, ka rilru a chapo ta lo va, Ka inngaihlu hek lo. Thil lian thamah ka intelh duh lo va, Ka phu loh thilahte chuan." 
Psalms131:2 Ka lung a awi ta a, Ka hah a dam ta e. Nausên hnute hne lai a nuin a pawm hle hle ang hian, Kei pawh thlamuang takin ka awm ta e." 
Psalms131:3 Israel-te u, Lalpa chu ring rawh u, Tûn aṭanga kumkhuain." 
Psalms132:1 Lalpa, Davida hi a hrehawm tuarna zawng zawng Hriatpui ang che." 
Psalms132:2 Lalpa hnênah thu a tiam a, Jakoba Mi Chaka hnêna a intiamkam kha Hriatpui ang che." 
Psalms132:3 ‘Ka in chhûngah ka lût lo vang a, Ka khumah pawh ka kai hek lo vang;" 
Psalms132:4 Ka muhîl lo vang a, Ka maimitchhîng hek lo vang," 
Psalms132:5 Lalpa tân hmun ka hmuh hma leh, Jakoba Mi Chaka chênna tûr hmun ka neih hma chu,’ A tih kha." 
Psalms132:6 Ngai teh u, Efrata-ah a awm tih kan hria a, Jaar phûlah kan va hmu ta." 
Psalms132:7 A awmnaah kal ila, A ke bulah i kûn ang u." 
Psalms132:8 Lalpa, tho la, i chawlhna tûr hmunah kal rawh. I chakzia lanna Bâwm nên chuan." 
Psalms132:9 I puithiamte chu diknain inthuam se, Nangmah ngaihsaktute chu lâwmin au chiam rawh se." 
Psalms132:10 I chhiahhlawh Davida hnênah thu i tiam tawh si a, I hriakthiha hi tilunghnûr suh ang che." 
Psalms132:11 Lalpan Davida hnênah thu a tiam tlat tawh chu, A rinawm a, a sût lo vang." 
Psalms132:12 ‘I fate chuan ka thuthlung an pawma, Ka thu zirtîrte an zawm bawk chuan, An fate pawh i lalṭhutthlêngah chuan An ṭhu zêl ang,’ a tih kha." 
Psalms132:13 Lalpan Zion tlâng hi a thlang ta a, A chênna hmun atân a duh a ni." 
Psalms132:14 ‘Hei hi ka kumkhaw chawlhna tûr a ni, Ka awm reng nân ka duhzâwng tak a ni." 
Psalms132:15 Ei leh bâr kawngah mal ka sâwm ngei ang che a, A mi, retheite pawh ka hrai tlai ang." 
Psalms132:16 A puithiamte chhandamnain ka thuam ang a, A mi thianghlimte pawh hlim takin an au vang." 
Psalms132:17 Tah chuan, Davida thlah lal ropui tak ka ṭhuttîr ang, Ka hriakthiha tân chuan khâwnvâr ka chhi ta e." 
Psalms132:18 A hmêlmate ka timualpho vang a, A lallukhum ka tihtlêtsak bawk ang.’" 
Psalms133:1 Ngai teh, unau inngeihdial diala awm khâwm hi A va ṭhain, a va nuam êm!" 
Psalms133:2 Hriak rimtui, lu-a thih, Khabehmula luang thla ang hi a ni. Arona khabehmula luang thla, A kawrfual nghâwng thlenga luang thla ang kha." 
Psalms133:3 Hermon dai fîm, Zion tlânga tla ṭhîn ang hi a ni. Chutah chuan a ni Lalpan malsâwmna a thlen ṭhin ni, Kumkhuaa nunna tûr chu." 
Psalms134:1 Hawh u, Lalpa chhiahhlawh zawng zawng, Zâna Lalpa ina rawngbâwl ṭhînte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms134:2 Hmun Thianghlimah in bânte phar ula, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms134:3 Lei leh vân siamtu Lalpa chuan, Zion aṭangin malsâwm che u rawh se." 
Psalms135:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u; Lalpa hming chu fak ula, Lalpa chhiahhlawhte u, fak rawh u." 
Psalms135:2 Lalpa ina rawngbâwla, Kan Pathian in hung chhûnga che ṭhînte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms135:3 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, ani chu a ṭha si a. A hming fakin zai rawh u, a nuam si a." 
Psalms135:4 Lalpan Jakoba chu a thlang ta a, Israela chu a ta bîk atân a nei ta e." 
Psalms135:5 Lalpa ropuizia hi ka hre ta e, Kan Lalpa hi Pathian dang zawng zawng aia ropui zâwk a ni." 
Psalms135:6 Lei leh vânah te, tuipuiah leh tuifinriatah te, Lalpan a duh apiang a ti ṭhîn." 
Psalms135:7 Kâwlkil aṭangin chhûm a chhohtîr a, Ruah sûr nân kâwl a phêttîr a, A bâwm ata thli a rawn chhuah." 
Psalms135:8 Aigupta rama mihringte leh rante chu, An fa tîr a tihhlumsak a." 
Psalms135:9 Aigupta ramah, Farawa leh a chhiahhlawhte hrem nân, Chhinchhiahna leh thil mak tak tak a tih kha." 
Psalms135:10 Ani chuan hnam tam tak a tichhia a, Lal ropui tak takte a that bawk." 
Psalms135:11 Amor lal Sihona te, Basan lal Oga te, Kanan ram lal zawng zawngte nên." 
Psalms135:12 An ramte chu a mite a pe a, A ni, Israel-te rochan atân a pe." 
Psalms135:13 Lalpa, i hming chu kumkhuain a dai lo vang, Chhuan zawng zawngin, Lalpa, an hria ang che." 
Psalms135:14 Lalpa chuan a mite chu thiam a chantîr a, A chhiahhlawhte chungah khawngaihna a lantîr ta," 
Psalms135:15 Hnam dangte pathian chu mihring kutchhuak, Rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam an ni e." 
Psalms135:16 Ka an nei a, an ṭawng thei si lo va, Mit an nei a, an hmu thei bawk si lo." 
Psalms135:17 Beng an nei a, eng mah an hre thei lo va. Thâwk pawh an thaw thei hek lo." 
Psalms135:18 Chûng ringtu leh siamtu zawng zawngte chu, Chûng milem ang lek chu ni hlawm rawh se." 
Psalms135:19 Aw, Israel chhûngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Aw, Arona chhûngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u," 
Psalms135:20 Aw, Levia chhûngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Lalpa ṭihtute u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms135:21 Zion-ah chuan Lalpa chu fak ula, Jerusalem-a chêng Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms136:1 A ṭhat avângin Lalpa chu lâwmthu hrilh rawh u, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:2 Pathiante Pathian chu lâwmthu hrilh rawh u, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:3 Lalte lal chu lâwmthu hrilh rawh u, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:4 Mahni chauhva thil mak ropui tak titu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:5 A finnaa vân siamtu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:6 Tui chunga lei dah duaitu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:7 Êng lian pui puite siamtu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:8 Ni khi chhûna êng tûra siamtu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:9 Thla leh arsite zâna êng tûra siamtu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:10 Aigupta mite fa tîr thattu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:11 Chuta ṭanga Israel fate hruai chhuaktu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:12 Bân phar meuhva a kut lektu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:13 Tuipui Sen pawh tiṭhentu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:14 Israel-te hruaikaitu chuan, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:15 Tuipui Sena Farawa leh a sipaite tihlumtu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:16 A mite thlalêra hruaitu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:17 Lal tam tak thattu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:18 Lal hmingthang tak takte thattu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:19 Amor lal Sihona thattu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:20 Basan lal Oga thattu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:21 An ram, a mite petu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:22 A chhiahhlawh Israel-te hnêna rochana petu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:23 Kan baihvai laia min hruaitu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:24 Kan hmêlmate laka min chhantu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:25 Thil nung tinrêng hnêna ei tûr pe ṭhîntu khân, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms136:26 Vâna Pathian chu lâwmthu hrilh rawh u, Ngil a nei kumkhua si a." 
Psalms137:1 Babulon lui kamahte kan ṭhu a, Zion ngaiin kan ṭap ṭhîn." 
Psalms137:2 A kam tuipuisuthlahahte chuan Kan ṭingṭangte kan bâng ṭhîn a. 
Psalms137:3 Tah chuan sala min mantuten Hla sa tûrin min phût a, Min tiretheituten hlima hla sa tûrin min ti, ‘Zion hla min saksak ta che u,’ tiin." 
Psalms137:4 Engtin nge mi ramahte chuan Lalpa tân hla kan sak theih ang? 
Psalms137:5 Aw Jerusalem, ka theihnghilh che chuan, Ka kut ding lam hian a thil thiamte theihnghilh rawh se." 
Psalms137:6 Aw Jerusalem, ka hriat reng loh che-a, Ka hlimna ber aia ka thlan zâwk loh che chuan, Ka lei pawh hi ka dangah hian bet tlat rawh se." 
Psalms137:7 Jerusalem a chhiat nia, Edom miten, ‘Tichim rawh u, tichim rawh u, A lungphûm chenin tichhe rawh u,’ an tih kha, Aw Lalpa, a chhe lamin hre reng ang che." 
Psalms137:8 Aw nang Babulon, mi dang tichhe ṭhîntu, Ka chunga i tih ang taka thungrûltu che chu A va hlim dâwn êm!" 
Psalms137:9 I fa sênte chhuhsaka, lungpui vuak nâna hmangtu chu A va hlim dâwn êm!" 
Psalms138:1 Ka thinlung zawng zawngin Lalpa, lâwmthu ka hrilh a che, Hnam dang pathian hmaah nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms138:2 I Tempul thianghlim lam hawiin chibai ka rawn bûk a che, I ngilneihna leh i rinawmna avângin I hming ka fak a ni. I thu leh i hming chu, I chawisâng ta ber a." 
Psalms138:3 Ka koh che khân min lo chhâng a, Min tihuaiin min tichak ta." 
Psalms138:4 Lalpa, lei lal zawng zawngte hian an fak a che, I thu an hriat tâk avângin." 
Psalms138:5 Lalpa thil tihte fakin hla sa rawh u, Lalpa ropuina hi a nasa êm si a." 
Psalms138:6 Lalpa chu ropui hle mah se, Mi tlâwmte chu a ngaihsak a, Chapote erawh chu hla tak aṭang pawhin a hmu a ni." 
Psalms138:7 Buainaten min chîm vêl mah sela, Ka nun i humhim ṭhîn. Ka hmêlmate thinur lo thawk chu i dang kîr a, I kut ding lamin min chhan ṭhîn." 
Psalms138:8 Lalpa, ngil i nei kumkhua a, Lalpa, i kut hnathawh bânsan lo la, Ka tân i thiltih tum hlen zâwk ang che." 
Psalms139:1 Lalpa, nangmah ngeiinngun takin mi en fiah a. Min hre chhuak vek a ni." 
Psalms139:2 Ka ṭhut leh ka din i hre vek a, Hla tak aṭang pawhin ka ngaihtuahte i hria." 
Psalms139:3 Ka kalna te, ka chawlhna te i hre chiang a, Ka awm dân zawng zawng hi i hre fai vek a ni." 
Psalms139:4 Ngai teh, Lalpa, ka sawi hma pawhin ka sawi tûr zawng zawng chu i hre vek si." 
Psalms139:5 Ka hma hruaiin ka hnu i dâl a, I kutphahin min hûm tlat ṭhîn." 
Psalms139:6 Min hriatzia hi a mak lutuk a, Ka tân hriat phâk rual a ni lo." 
Psalms139:7 I hnên ata khaw nge ka kal anga, I hmuh lohvah khaw nge ka tlân bo vang?" 
Psalms139:8 Vânah han lâwn ila, i lo awm a, Seol-ah mutna zu siam ila, i lo awm reng bawk si." 
Psalms139:9 Chhaktiangah khian thlâwk chho ila, Tuifinriat râl daihah pawh zu awm ila," 
Psalms139:10 I kut chuan min lo vuan ang a, I kut ding lam chuan min lo chelh dâwn si." 
Psalms139:11 ‘Thimin min khuh tlat se, Ka vêl êng hi zânah chang se,’ ti mah ila," 
Psalms139:12 Thim hi i tân a thim ve si lo, Zân pawh chhûn angin a êng a, Thim leh êng hi i tân thuhmun reng a ni." 
Psalms139:13 A ni, ka taksa pêng tin hi i siam a ni, Ka nu pum chhûngah min rem khâwm a." 
Psalms139:14 Aw Chungnungber, ka fak a che, Hlauhawm tak i ni si a, Mak taka siam ka ni; I thiltih hi a mak êm êm a, Ka hre chiang hle a ni." 
Psalms139:15 Ka ruhrel hi i lakah thup a ni lo, A rûka siam ka nih lai leh Lei chhûngrila min rem khâwm lai pawh khân." 
Psalms139:16 Kutke ka neih hma pawhin mi hmu vek a, Ka dam chhûng ni tûrte a inṭan hma daihin, I lehkhabu-ah chuan ziak vek a ni." 
Psalms139:17 Aw Pathian, i mi ngaihtuahnate chu ka tân a va hlu êm! Chhiar sên rual a ni lo." 
Psalms139:18 Chhiar dâwn ila, ṭiauvaivut aia tam a ni a, Ka han harh chuan i kiangah ka lo awm reng si." 
Psalms139:19 Aw Pathian, mi sualte hi that mai teh, Thisen chhuah mite u, min kalsan daih rawh u." 
Psalms139:20 Chûng chuan an sawichhe ṭhîn che a, Nangmah dotute chuan an tinawmnah ṭhîn che." 
Psalms139:21 Aw Lalpa, nangmah hawtute chu ka va haw êm! I chunga helte chu ka va ten êm!" 
Psalms139:22 Huat tak têin ka hua a, Ka hmêlmaah te ka chhiar hlawm a." 
Psalms139:23 Aw Pathian, mi en fiah la, Ka rilru hi hre tlang ang che. Mi en ngun la, ka ngaihtuahte hi hre vek ang che." 
Psalms139:24 Keimahah hian dik lohna rêng a awm emaw en la, Chatuan kawngah min hruai ang che." 
Psalms140:1 Lalpa, mi sual lakah mi chhan chhuak la, Mi nunrâwng lakah mi humhim ang che." 
Psalms140:2 Thil sual tih an rilrûk reng a, Ni tin buaina an chawk chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms140:3 An lei chu rûl tûr ang hian a hlauhawm a, An thu chu rûlrial tûr ang hi a ni." 
Psalms140:4 Lalpa, mi sual lakah min vêng la, Tihtlûk tuma min bei ṭhîntu Mi nunrâwngte lakah min hum ang che." 
Psalms140:5 Chapote chuan ka awh nân hruihrualin thang an kam a, Ka kalkhânah lên an zâr a, Kawng tluanin thang an kam a ni." 
Psalms140:6 Lalpa hnênah, ‘ka Pathian i ni e, Lalpa, khawngaih ka dîlna hi lo ngaithla teh,’ ka ti a." 
Psalms140:7 Aw Lalpa, ka Lalpa, chhandamtu chak, Indo nia min humhimtu i ni." 
Psalms140:8 Lalpa, mi sualte duhthusâm chu hlawhtlintîr suh la, An thiltum chu puitlin suh se." 
Psalms140:9 Min hualtute lu chungah chuan, Min vauna chu tla zâwk rawh se." 
Psalms140:10 An chungah meiling sûr se, Leilâwtah tla sela, Lo chhuak leh tawh suh se." 
Psalms140:11 Dâwta mi hêk chîngte chu hlawhtling suh se, Nunrâwngte chu thil ṭha lovin nangchîng sela, Nuai nek hlawm rawh se." 
Psalms140:12 Lalpa, retheite chu i ṭan ṭhîn tih ka hria, Pachhiate tân dik takin ro i rêl ṭhîn." 
Psalms140:13 Mi dikte chuan i hming an fak ang a, Mi nun ngîlte chu i bulah an chêng reng ang." 
Psalms141:1 Lalpa, ka koh che hi, lohmanhmawh la, Ka auh che hi, i beng lo chhi ang che." 
Psalms141:2 Ka ṭawngṭaina hi rimtui hâl angin lo chho sela, Ka kut phar hi tlai lam thilhlan angin lo pawm ang che." 
Psalms141:3 Lalpa, ka kâ vêngtu tûr ruat la, Ka hmui vêng tûr min pe ang che." 
Psalms141:4 Ṭhil ṭha lo tih châkna lakah min vêngin, Mi sualte zînga thil sual ka tih ve phal suh la, Thil sual tih chîngte ruai ṭheh ka kîl ve phal hek suh." 
Psalms141:5 Mi dik chuan min khawngaih avângin Min vua-in, min zilh rawh se, Chu chu hriak ṭha ber a ni, Ka lu hian hnar suh se. Mi sualte thiltih do erawh chuan ka ṭawngṭai reng a ni." 
Psalms141:6 An rorêltute chu khâma nam thlâk an nih hunah, Ka thu chu pawm nuam an ti ang." 
Psalms141:7 Leilettuin lei a tisawm nuai ang hian Ka ruhte pawh thlân kotlângah a darh tâk hi. 
Psalms141:8 Aw Lalpa, ka Lalpa, kei chuan ka thlîr rêng che a ni, Ka rawn bêl che a, saruakin min kalsan suh." 
Psalms141:9 Thil sual titute thang lakah te, Ka awh nâna lên an zâr lakah te chuan min hum ang che." 
Psalms141:10 Mi sualte chu anmahni thang kamah chuan âwk sela, Kei chu him thên ila ka va ti êm!" 
Psalms142:1 Râwl chhuah meuhvin Lalpa chu ka au va, Lalpa hnênah khawngaih dîlin ka au va ni." 
Psalms142:2 Ka manganna a hnênah ka thlen a, Ka rilru buaina pawh ka hrilh vek bawk." 
Psalms142:3 Ka beidawn êm êm lai pawhin Nang chuan ka awm dân tûr i hria, Ka kalna tûrah chuan, Ka hmêlmaten thang an kam ru." 
Psalms142:4 Ka vêl hi han thlîr la, Tu mah mi ngaihsak rêng an awm lo ve, Belh tûr ka hmu lo va, Tu mah mi ngaihven an awm lo." 
Psalms142:5 Lalpa, ṭanpui dîlin ka au che a, ‘Nang chauh hi ka himna, Ka dam chhûnga ka duh ber chu i ni,’ tiin." 
Psalms142:6 Ka au thâwm chu ngaithla ang che, Ka chau êm êm a ni, Mi ûmtute lakah min chhanhim rawh, Kei aiin an chak zâwk si a." 
Psalms142:7 Tân in ata min hruai chhuak la, I hming ka chawimawi ang. Ka chunga i ṭhat êm avângin Mi dikte chuan min din hual ang." 
Psalms143:1 Lalpa, ka ṭawngṭaina hi lo ngaithla la, I rinawm êm avângin khawngaih ka dîlnaah I beng lo chhi ang che. I dik êm avângin min chhâng ang che." 
Psalms143:2 I chhiahhlawh chungah hian rorêl mai suh, I hmaah tu mah thiam chang thei an awm lo." 
Psalms143:3 Ka hmêlmaten min ûm ṭhîn a, Thi chhâwngin leiah min theh thlu a, Hmânlaia thi tawhte angin Hmun thimah chuan min awmtîr hi." 
Psalms143:4 Ka bei a dawng êm êm a, Ka mangang tâwp a ni." 
Psalms143:5 Hun kal tate ka thlîr kîr a, I thil tih zawng zawngte ka ngaihtuah a, I hna thawhte ka chhûtin" 
Psalms143:6 I lam hawiin ka bân ka phar tâk hi, Lei ro, tui châk angin ka ngai a che." 
Psalms143:7 Lalpa, min chhâng thuai teh, Ka chau chhe mai dâwn e; Ka lakah hian i hmêl thukru suh la, Leilâwta tlate ang ka ni hlauh dah ang e." 
Psalms143:8 I ngilneihzia tûk tin min hmuhtîr ṭhîn la, Ka rinchhan ber nang i ni si a, I hnênah ka rawn ṭawngṭai hi, Ka kalna tûr min kawhhmuh rawh." 
Psalms143:9 Lalpa, ka hmêlmate kut ata hi min chhan chhuak la, Him nân ka rawn pan che." 
Psalms143:10 I duhzâwng tih min zirtîr rawh, Ka Pathian i ni si. Dawh thei takin kawng dikah chuan i Thlarauvin min hruai ang che," 
Psalms143:11 I hming avângin, Lalpa, min chhandam la, I ṭhatna avângin ka manganna ata min chhan chhuak ang che." 
Psalms143:12 Ka chunga i ngilneihna avângin ka hmêlmate tiboral la, Min beitu zawng zawngte tichhia ang che, I chhiahhlawh ka ni si a." 
Psalms144:1 Ka lungpui, Lalpa hi fak rawh u, Râl kah min zirtîr a, Indo dân tûr min thiamtîr bawk a." 
Psalms144:2 Ka tân kulhpui rinawm, Ka himna tûra kulhbîng sâng a ni. Ka phaw ka inhumhimna chu a ni, Ka mite ka hnuaia kûntîrtu a ni." 
Psalms144:3 Lalpa, mihringte hi eng nge maw an niha, i hriata, Hringfate hi eng nge maw an niha i ngaihtuah ṭhin?" 
Psalms144:4 Thli thaw ang lek an ni a, An dam chhûng nite chu hlim ral mai ṭhîn ang hi a ni." 
Psalms144:5 Aw Lalpa, i vânte chu rawn tihniam la, Lo chhuk ta che. Tlângte khawih la, khu luih luih bawk rawh se." 
Psalms144:6 Kâwl phêttîr la, hmêlmate chu darh vek sela, Thalin kâp la, tlânchhe rawh se." 
Psalms144:7 Vân sâng aṭangin i kutin rawn ban la, Tui thûk tak ata min chhan chhuakin, Hnam dang kut ata hi min chhanhim teh." 
Psalms144:8 Chûng mite chuan dâwt an heh a, Dâwtin chhia an chham ṭhîn." 
Psalms144:9 Aw Pathian, i tân hla thar ka sa ang a, Perhkhuang hrui sâwm neiin ka fak ang che." 
Psalms144:10 Lalte hnênah hnehna i pe a, I chhiahhlawh Davida chu khandaih hriam lakah I chhanhim ta si a." 
Psalms144:11 Hnam dang kut ata hi min chhan chhuakin, Min humhim ang che. Chûng mite chuan dâwt an heh a, Dâwtin chhia an chham ṭhîn." 
Psalms144:12 Kan fate chu an vânglai hian, Thing ṭhang duang tak ang hi ni se, Kan fanute pawh chu Lal ina a kil bang cheimawi ang hi lo ni rawh se." 
Psalms144:13 Kan buhzêmte chu thlai tinrêngin khat thûr thûr se, Kan ram chhûnga kan berâm vulh te pawh, A sâng têl te, a sîng têl tein pung bawk rawh se." 
Psalms144:14 Kan ran rualte chuan no chhiat lovin hring sup sup sela, Riral bawk hek suh se. Kan kawtthlêrahte pawh mangang au thâwm awm hek suh se." 
Psalms144:15 Chutiang taka malsâwmna dawng hnam chu an nihlawh e. Pathian, Lalpa neitu hnam chu a nihlawh e." 
Psalms145:1 Aw Lalber, ka Pathian, ka chawimawi ang che a, I hming ka fak kumkhua dâwn e." 
Psalms145:2 Ni tin ka fak ang che a, I hming ka chawimawi kumkhua ang." 
Psalms145:3 Lalpa chu a ropui a, chawimawi chiam tûr a ni; A ropuizia chu chhui chhuah rual a ni lo." 
Psalms145:4 I thil tihte chu chhuan zawng zawngin an fak ang a, I hna thawhte an hril zêl ang." 
Psalms145:5 I ropui nasatzia an hril ang a, I thiltih makzia hi ka chhût bawk ang." 
Psalms145:6 Miten i thiltihtheihzia hi nasa takin an sawi ang a, I ropuizia ka hril bawk ang." 
Psalms145:7 I ṭhatzia hi an sawi bawrh bawrh ang a, I dikzia hi hlim takin an aupui ang." 
Psalms145:8 Lalpa chuan lainatna a ngah a, mi a khawngaih ṭhîn, Thinnel tak a ni a, ngil a nei êm êm ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:9 Lalpa chu mi tin chungah a ṭha a, A thil siam zawng zawng chu a lainat ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:10 Aw Lalpa, i thil siamten an chawimawi chia, Nangmah ngaihsaktute chuan an fak a che." 
Psalms145:11 I ram ropuizia chu an sawi ang a, I thiltihtheihzia pawh an hril bawk ang." 
Psalms145:12 I thiltih ropuizia mihringte hnêna hriattîr tûr leh I ram mawi ropuizia tilang tûrin. 
Psalms145:13 I ram chu ram hlun tûr a ni a, Kumkhuain thu i nei dawn si. Lalpa chu a thutiamah a rinawm a, A thiltih apiangah ngil a nei ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:14 Lalpa chuan tlute a tungding a, Lungngaia kûnte pawh a tiharh ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:15 Nangmah nghâktute mit chu i chungah a fu a, A hun takah ei tûr i pe ziah ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:16 I kut i han phar a, Thil nung tinrêng an chaw duhzâwngin i hrai ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:17 Lalpa chu a thil tih zawng zawngah a dik a, A thiltih apiangah ngil a nei ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:18 Amah kotute chu Lalpan a hnaih ṭhîn a, Tihtakzeta amah autu zawng zawngte chu." 
Psalms145:19 Amah ṭihtute duhzâwng chu a tihsak a, An au thâwm a hria a, a chhanhim ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:20 Lalpa chuan amah hmangaihtute a vêng ṭhîn a, Mi sualte erawh chu a tiboral ang." 
Psalms145:21 Ka kâ hian Lalpa fakna thu a hril ang a, Thilsiam zawng zawngin a hming thianghlim chu Kumkhuain fak rawh se." 
Psalms146:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Aw ka nunna, Lalpa chu fak rawh." 
Psalms146:2 Ka dam chhûngin Lalpa ka fak ang a, Ka nun chhûng zawng Pathian fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms146:3 Mihring zînga miliante chu ring duh suh u, Tu mah an chhandam thei si lo." 
Psalms146:4 An thi a, leiah an kîr ta a, Chumi ni chuan an thiltum zawng zawng pawh a ral nghâl ṭhîn." 
Psalms146:5 Jakoba Pathian, ṭanpuitua neihte chu an nihlawh e, Lalpa Pathiana beiseina nghattute chu." 
Psalms146:6 Ani chuan lei leh vân a siam a, Tuifinriat leh a chhûnga awmte nên; A thutiam pawh a hlen zêl ṭhîn." 
Psalms146:7 Hnehchhiahte chu dik takin ro a rêlsak a, Rilṭâmte chu chaw a pe a, Lalpa chuan mi tângte a chhuah bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms146:8 Lalpan mitdelte mit a tivâr a, Lalpa chuan lungngaia kûnte pawh a tiharh ṭhîn." 
Psalms146:9 Lalpa chuan mi dikte a hmangaih a, Lalpa chuan mikhualte pawh a vêng bawk ṭhîn. Fahrahte leh hmeithaite chu a chhawmdâwl ṭhîn a, Mi sualte erawh chu a tiboral ang." 
Psalms146:10 Lalpa chu kumkhuain a lal ang a, Aw Zion, i Pathian chu a lal reng ang. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms147:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Kan Pathian faka zai hi a ṭha si a; Amah fak hi a nuam a ni." 
Psalms147:2 Lalpa chuan Jerusalem a din leh a, Israel mi, an hnawh darhte chu a hruai khâwm leh ta." 
Psalms147:3 Lungchhiate chu a thlamuan a, An hliamte pawh a tuamsak bawk." 
Psalms147:4 Arsite khi a chhiar vek a, An hming pawh a sa ṭheuh a ni." 
Psalms147:5 Kan Lalpa hi a ropui a, chak tak a ni, A finna pawh sawi sên rual a ni lo." 
Psalms147:6 Lalpa chuan inngaitlâwmte a chawisâng a, Mi sualte erawh chu leiah a paih thlu ṭhîn." 
Psalms147:7 Lâwm hla sa-in Lalpa chu fak ula, Ṭingṭang nên kan Pathian fakin zai rawh u." 
Psalms147:8 Vân khi chhûm a hliahtîr a, Leiah ruah a sûrtîr ṭhîn a, Tlângahte chuan hnim a ṭotîr ṭhîn, Mihring ei tûr thlai hringte nên." 
Psalms147:9 Ramsate chu chaw a pe a, Choak no rilṭâmte a châwm bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms147:10 Sakawr chakna a ngaihlu lo va, Mihring chakna pawh a ngaisâng hek lo." 
Psalms147:11 Amah ṭihtute hi a ni Lalpa lâwmzâwngte chu, A ngilneihnaa innghat tlatte chu." 
Psalms147:12 Aw Jerusalem, Lalpa -ah hian lâwm la, Aw Zion, i Pathian hi fak rawh." 
Psalms147:13 I kulh kawngkhâr kalhnate chu a tinghet a, I chhûnga awm i fate chu mal a sâwm ta." 
Psalms147:14 In ramrite chu a tirâlmuang a, Buh tui chi in duh tâwkin a pe che u." 
Psalms147:15 A thupêk chu lei chungah a puang a, A sawi ang chuan tih nghâl a ni." 
Psalms147:16 Puan vâr phah ang maiin vûr a tlâktîr a, Meivâp lêng angin a tlâktîr chem chem ṭhîn." 
Psalms147:17 Lung tê angin rial a tlâktîr a, A vawhzia chu tu nge tuar zo vang?" 
Psalms147:18 Thu a pe a, vûr chu a tui ta a, Thli a tlehtîr a, tui chu a luang ta a." 
Psalms147:19 Jakoba hnênah thu a puang a, A Dân leh a thurêl chu Israela a hriattîr a;" 
Psalms147:20 Chûng chu hnam dang tân a ti ngai rêng rêng lo va, A thurêlte pawh an hre ve ngai hek lo." 
Psalms148:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Vân aṭangin Lalpa chu fak ula, Chung lamahte khian amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:2 Vântirhkohte u, amah chu fak ula, A ṭhuihruai zawng zawngte u, amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:3 Ni leh thlate u, amah chu fak ula, Arsi êng zawng zawngte u, amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:4 Vân sângte u, amah chu fak ula, Vân chunga tuite u, amah chu fak rawh u."
