Psalms148:5 Chûngho chuan Lalpa hming chu fak rawh se, Ani chuan thu a pe a, siam an lo ni ta si a." 
Psalms148:6 Thu a pêk ang ngeiin An awmna tûr ṭheuhvah an awm ta reng a, Kumkhua pawhin an insawn lo vang." 
Psalms148:7 Tuifinriat leh a chhûnga chêng sa lian hlauhawmte u, Lei aṭang hian Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:8 Mei leh rial te, vûr leh chhûm te, Thlipui na tak, a thu awihtu te leh" 
Psalms148:9 Tlâng leh mual te, Thei kûng leh sidar thing zawng zawng te," 
Psalms148:10 Ramsa te leh ran zawng zawng te, Rannung te leh chunglêng sava te," 
Psalms148:11 Lei lal te leh mi tinrêng te, Milian te leh leia rorêltu zawng zawng te," 
Psalms148:12 Nula leh tlangvâl te, Naupang leh tar te nên," 
Psalms148:13 Lalpa hming hi fak ṭheuh rawh se, Hming dang zawng aiin a hming chu a ropui zâwk a, A ropuina chu lei leh vân aiin a sâng zâwk daih a ni." 
Psalms148:14 A mite chu thiltihtheihnain a thuam a, A ni, amah ngaihsaktute chu chawimawina a khumtîr a, A duh tak Israel mite chu. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms149:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Lalpa chawimawiin hla thar sa ula, A ni, amah ngaihsaktute pung khâwm zîngah fak hla sa rawh u." 
Psalms149:2 Anmahni Siamtu chungah Israel-te lâwm sela. Zion tlâng chu an Lalber chungah hlim rawh se. 
Psalms149:3 Lâmin a hming chu fak ula, Khuangtê leh ṭingṭang nên amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms149:4 A mite chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng tak an ni a, Mi tlâwmte chu a chhanhim a, a chawimawi ta." 
Psalms149:5 Amah ngaihsaktute chu an ropuinaah lâwm sela, An khumlaizâwlah chuan hlim takin zai rawh se." 
Psalms149:6 Khandaih hriam tawn keng sela, Pathian fakin ring takin au rawh se." 
Psalms149:7 Hnam dang chungah phuba a la a, Mite a hrem ta a." 
Psalms149:8 An lalte chu khaidiatin a hlîng a, An hotute chu thîr kawl a buntîr bawk." 
Psalms149:9 An chungchâng thu rêl tawh angin a thlentîr a, Chu chu a ni amah ngaihsaktute ropuina chu. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms150:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Pathian chu a Hmun Thianghlimah fak ula, A thiltihtheihzia lanna vân sâng takah khian, Amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms150:2 A thiltih ropui takte avângin amah chu fak ula, A ropui êm avângin amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms150:3 Tawtawrâwt hâmin amah chu fak ula, Perhkhuang leh ṭingṭang nên amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms150:4 Khuangtê bênga lâmin amah chu fak ula, Phênglâwng leh phaiphulêngin amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms150:5 Darbenthek têin amah chu fak ula, Darbenthek lianin amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms150:6 Engkim, thaw thei tawh phawt chuan Lalpa chu fak rawh se. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Proverbs1:1 Israel lal Davida fapa Solomona thufing hi: 
Proverbs1:2 Miten finna leh kaihhruaina dik an hriata, Thu rilte an hriat fuh theih nân a ni." 
Proverbs1:3 Hmangchâng hriaa, thil dik tih leh rorêl thiamna neiin Tluang taka nung tûrin a kaihruai ang." 
Proverbs1:4 Mi mâwlte chu a tifingvâr ang a, Tleirâwlte pawhin fîmkhur dân an hria ang." 
Proverbs1:5 Mi fingten ngaithla se an fing sawt ang, Hre zaute chuan chinchâng an hriat belh ang." 
Proverbs1:6 Thufing inthupte hrethiamin, Mi fing thu ril leh thu khirh an hre thei ang." 
Proverbs1:7 Lalpa ṭih hi hriatna thûk ber a lo ni, Mi â-te chuan finna an hmusit a, Kaihhruai theih an ni lo." 
Proverbs1:8 Ka fapa, i pa kaihhruaina ngaithla la, I nu thu zirtîr che pênsan hauh suh." 
Proverbs1:9 Diar mawi tak khima, Ṭhi mawi tak awrh angin I nun a timawi ang." 
Proverbs1:10 Ka fapa, mi sualten an thlêm hunah che An thu zâwm suh ang che." 
Proverbs1:11 ‘Ti rawh, thah tûr i zawng ru ang, Pawi sawi lo pawh ni se a rûkin bei mai ila," 
Proverbs1:12 A nung chunga phûm ang mai leh Seol-a chhuk tate angin i awmtîr ang," 
Proverbs1:13 Thil hlu tak kan lâksak ṭeuh vang a, Kan thil lâk chu inah kan chhêk dâwn nia," 
Proverbs1:14 Kan zîngah tel ve la Kan inṭawm vek dâwn nia,’ an tih che chuan," 
Proverbs1:15 Ka fapa, an zîngah chuan tel ve hauh suh, An kawngah chuan pên lût hek suh." 
Proverbs1:16 Thil sual ti tûr chuan an tlân chak hle a, Thisen chhuah pawh an nghâkhlel êm êm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs1:17 Savaten an hmuh reng laia, An awhna tûr lên zâr a sâwt lo," 
Proverbs1:18 Hêng mite erawh hi chu mahni awh nâna thang kam an ni, An awh hlum nâna kam ru an ni." 
Proverbs1:19 Chutiang chu suamhmangte awm dân tûr chu a ni, An nun an chân ngei ang." 
Proverbs1:20 Kawtthlêrahte leh tual zau laiahte, Finna chu a au va," 
Proverbs1:21 Mipui lunna laiahte pawh a au bawk a, Kulh kawngkhâr bulahte thu a sawi ṭhîn." 
Proverbs1:22 ‘Mi mâwlte u, mâwl reng in duh em ni, Eng chen nge finna hi in hmuhsit anga, Mi â pawhin hriatna hi a hmuhsit ang?" 
Proverbs1:23 Ka zilhna hi rawn ngaihven ṭha ula, Tihtakzetin thu ka hrilh ang che u. Ka thu ka hriatthiamtîr dâwn a che u." 
Proverbs1:24 Ka ko che u a, in chhâng duh lo, Bân ka phar a, in pawisa lo." 
Proverbs1:25 Ka remruat apiang in ngaihsak duh lo va, Ka zilhna chu in pawm duh bawk hek lo." 
Proverbs1:26 In vânduaiin kei chu ka nui ang a, In râlkhêl hunah chuan ka nuihzat ang che u." 
Proverbs1:27 Thlipui anga hlauhawm a lo thawhin, Ṭhâwngaleivir anga vânduainain a nuai che uin, Manganna leh hrehawmna in tuar hun chuan," 
Proverbs1:28 Min au vang a, ka chhâng lo vang che u, Min zawng min zawng ang a, min hmu lo vang." 
Proverbs1:29 Hriatna in hua a, Lalpa ṭih in tum si lo." 
Proverbs1:30 Ka remruat chu in pawisa duh lo va, Ka zilhna apiang chu in hmusit a," 
Proverbs1:31 In awm dân rah chu in seng ngei dâwn, In remruat chu in kham hlui ang." 
Proverbs1:32 Mi mâwlte chu an lêlohna avângin an thi ang a, Mi â-te chu an ngaihsam avângin an chhe bawk ang." 
Proverbs1:33 Ka thu ngaithlatute erawh chu him takin an awm ang a, Thil ṭha lo hlau lovin thlamuang takin an awm ang." 
Proverbs2:1 Ka fapa, ka thu hi ngun takin ngaithla la, Ka thupêkte hi pawm tlat rawh." 
Proverbs2:2 Thufing chu ngaihven la, Hriatthiam tum tlat ang che." 
Proverbs2:3 A ni, hriatthiam ngên la, Hriat fuh châkin au rawh." 
Proverbs2:4 Tangka angin zawng la, Ro phûm zawng ang maiin hai rawh." 
Proverbs2:5 Tichuan, Lalpa ṭih dân i hria ang a, Pathian hriatna i chhar chhuak ang." 
Proverbs2:6 Finna petu Lalpa a ni, Hriatna leh hmuh fuhna a hnên aṭanga chhuak a ni." 
Proverbs2:7 Mi ngîlte tân hlawhtlinna a chhêk khâwm a, Dik taka awmte tân phaw a ni bawk." 
Proverbs2:8 Dik taka rorêl ṭhînte chu a vêng tlat a, Amah ngaihsaktute chu an awm dân tûr a enzui ṭhîn." 
Proverbs2:9 Tichuan, a fel leh dik i hria ang a, Ngîl taka chet dân kawng ṭha chu i hre thei ang." 
Proverbs2:10 Finna chuan a rawn luhchilh ang che a, Hriatna neih chu i tân a nuam hle ang." 
Proverbs2:11 Hmangchâng hriatna chuan a hualhim ang che a, Hriat fuhna chuan a vêng ang che." 
Proverbs2:12 Sual kawng ata a chhan chhuak ang che a, Thu veivir chîng te," 
Proverbs2:13 Kawng ṭha ata pênga, Thim zînga kal tate," 
Proverbs2:14 Thil sual tih lâwm viauva, Mi bum châkte," 
Proverbs2:15 Kawhmawh bâwl ṭhîn, Rin tlâk hauh lohte lakah a hum ang che." 
Proverbs2:16 Kam thlum taka thlêm ṭhîntu che Hmeichhe sual lakah chuan a vêng ang che. 
Proverbs2:17 A tleirâwl chhuah pasal tlânsana, Pathian hmaa thutiam theihnghilhtu a ni e." 
Proverbs2:18 A in pan chu thihna a ni, A kawng chuan mitthi khua a chhun." 
Proverbs2:19 A hnêna kal tawh chu an kîr leh ngai lo va, Nunna kawngah an lo kal tawh ngai lo." 
Proverbs2:20 Mi ṭhate awm dân angin awm la, Mi dikte kawng chu zawh ang che." 
Proverbs2:21 Mi ngîlte chu he ramah hian an awm ang a, Mi felte chu an chêng reng ang." 
Proverbs2:22 Mi sualte erawh chu he ram ata hnawh chhuah an ni ang a, Bum hmangte chu hnuh chhuah vek an ni ang." 
Proverbs3:1 Ka fapa, ka zirtîrna theihnghilh suh la, Ka thupêkte vawng tlat ang che." 
Proverbs3:2 Tichuan, rei tak i dam ang a, I hmuingîl zêl bawk ang." 
Proverbs3:3 Ngilneihna leh rinawmna hi thlah hlek suh la, I nghâwngah chuan zem tlat langin, I thinlung phêkah chuan ziak lût ang che." 
Proverbs3:4 Pathian leh mihring hnên ata Khawngaihna te, duhsakna te i dawng dâwn nia." 
Proverbs3:5 I thinlung zawng zawngin Lalpa ring la, Nangma hriatnaah innghat hauh suh," 
Proverbs3:6 I thiltih apiangah Lalpa hre reng ṭhîn la, I kawng a tihtluansak ang che." 
Proverbs3:7 Mahni fing inti hle suh la, Lalpa ṭih la, sual kalsan rawh." 
Proverbs3:8 I taksa tân hrisêlna a ni ang a, I na atân damna a ni bawk ang." 
Proverbs3:9 I sumin Lalpa chawimawi ṭhîn la, I neih pung hmasate nên chuan." 
Proverbs3:10 Tichuan, i buh inte a khat ang a, I uain sâwrkhur a liam bawk ang." 
Proverbs3:11 Ka fapa, Lalpa kaihhruaina hmusit suh la, A zilhna pawh ngainêp hek suh." 
Proverbs3:12 Pain a fa duh tak a thunun angin, Lalpan a hmangaihte a thunun ṭhîn asin." 
Proverbs3:13 Finna hmu chhuaka, Hriatna neitu chu a nihlawh e;" 
Proverbs3:14 Tangka neih aiin hlâwkna a tam zâwk a, Rangkachak hlu tak aiin a duhawm zâwk." 
Proverbs3:15 Lunghlu aiin a hlu zâwk a, A tluka hlu duhthu sâm tûr a awm lo ve." 
Proverbs3:16 Dam reinate a ding lamah a awm a, A vei lamah hausakna leh ropuinate a awm." 
Proverbs3:17 A kawng chu a nuam a, A kalkawng chu hahdam tak a ni." 
Proverbs3:18 Amah vuantute tân nunna thing a ni a, Amah zuitute chu an nihlawh e." 
Proverbs3:19 Lalpan finna hmangin lei a siam a, Hriatna hmangin vân khi a din." 
Proverbs3:20 A finna chuan tuithûkpuite a tiṭhen a, Chhûm chuan ruah a tlâktîr." 
Proverbs3:21 Ka fapa, finna leh hriat fuh theihna hi kawl tlat ang che, I hmuh phâk lohvah kal sawn suh se." 
Proverbs3:22 I tân nunna a ni ang a, I nghâwng atân mawina." 
Proverbs3:23 Thlamuang takin i kal ang a, Eng mah i chhuih lo vang." 
Proverbs3:24 I mut hunah hlauh rêng i nei lo vang, I mu ang a, tui takin i muhîl ang." 
Proverbs3:25 Mi sualte chunga thleng ṭhîn chhiatna ang hi, Hlauhawm a thlen thut hlau suh la," 
Proverbs3:26 Lalpan a vêng him tlat ang che, I ke thanga awh a phal lo vang." 
Proverbs3:27 I theih phawt chuan mamawhte tân i thil ṭhate ui suh," 
Proverbs3:28 Nei reng siin i ṭhenawm hnênah chuan, ‘Kal ta rih la, naktûk lamah lo kal leh rawh, Ka lo pe tawh ang che,’ ti suh." 
Proverbs3:29 Ngaihngam taka i bula awm I ṭhian chungah thil sual phiar suh. 
Proverbs3:30 I pawi khawih lo chu chhan awm lovin khing suh. 
Proverbs3:31 Mi nunrâwng chu awt suh ang che, A awm dân pawh zui suh." 
Proverbs3:32 Kawhmawhbâwlte chu Lalpan a ten a, Nun ngîlte erawh chu a rinzâwng tak an ni." 
Proverbs3:33 Mi sual chhûngkua chu Lalpan ânchhia a lawh ṭhîn a, Mi dik chhûngkua erawh chu mal a sâwm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs3:34 Chapote chu a hmusit a, Pachhiate erawh chu a duhsak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs3:35 Mi fingte chuan chawimawi an hlawh ang a, Mi â-te chan tûr erawh chu mualphona mai a ni." 
Proverbs4:1 Fate u, pa kaihhruaina ngaithla rawh u, Ngaihven ula, hriatthiam theihna in nei dâwn nia." 
Proverbs4:2 Zir tûr ṭha chu ka hrilh che u a, Ka zirtîrna hi ngaihthah suh u." 
Proverbs4:3 Ka pa fapa neihchhun ka ni a, Ka nu’n min duat hle ṭhîn." 
Proverbs4:4 Ka pa chuan hetiang hian min zirtîr ṭhîn: ‘Ka thu hi vawng tlat la, Ka thupêkte zâwm la, i nung dâwn nia." 
Proverbs4:5 Finna leh hriatthiamna neih tum la, Ka thu hrilh che hi theihnghilh suh la, Ngaihthah bawk hek suh." 
Proverbs4:6 Tlânsan suh la, a vêng ang che, Pawm tlat la, a hum ang che." 
Proverbs4:7 Finna neih hi thil pawimawh ber a ni, Thil dang zawng aiin hriatthiamna neih tum rawh." 
Proverbs4:8 Ngaisâng la, a chawisâng ang che, Pawm tlat la, a chawimawi ngei ang che." 
Proverbs4:9 I tân diar mawi tak a ni ang a, Lallukhum ropui tak a ni bawk ang,’ tiin." 
Proverbs4:10 Ka fapa, ka thu hi ngaithla la, Ka thu sawi hi pawm rawh, Tichuan, i dam rei ang." 
Proverbs4:11 Finna kawng ka zirtîr che a, Kawng ngîlah chuan ka hruai ṭhîn che." 
Proverbs4:12 Tah chuan kal la, dîptu eng mah i tawng lo vang, Tlân vak mah la, i tlu lo vang." 
Proverbs4:13 Kaihhruaina hi pawm tlat la, inthlahdah suh, Zawng reng rawh aw, i nunna tûr a ni." 
Proverbs4:14 Mi sualte kawngah chuan kal ve suh la, Mi suaksualte awm dân zui suh." 
Proverbs4:15 Hawisan daih la, inhnamhnawih suh, Pênsan daih la, kalsan vang vang ang che." 
Proverbs4:16 Pawi an khawih phawt loh chuan an mu thei lo, Tu emaw tal an tihbuai zet loh chuan an mut a chhuak thei lo." 
Proverbs4:17 Suahsual hi an chaw a ni a, Nunrâwn hi an uain a ni." 
Proverbs4:18 Mi dikte awm dân erawh chu zîng êng ang hi a ni, A lo êng tial tial a, ni a lo chhuak ta ang hi." 
Proverbs4:19 Mi sualte kawng chu zân thim ang hi a ni, An inchhuih tlûkna tûr pawh an hre thei lo." 
Proverbs4:20 Ka fapa, ka thu hi ngaihven la, Ka thu sawi hi bengkhawn rawh." 
Proverbs4:21 A bosan che phal suh la, I thinlungah vawng tlat ang che." 
Proverbs4:22 A hmutute tân nunna a ni a, An taksa tân damna a ni." 
Proverbs4:23 I thil ngaihtuah dânah fîmkhur hle la, I ngaihtuah chuan i nun a kaihruai ṭhîn a ni." 
Proverbs4:24 Chaltlai taka ṭawng chîng suh la, Bum chîng hek suh." 
Proverbs4:25 I hma lam thlîr ngun la, Dîng takin en tlat rawh." 
Proverbs4:26 I kalna tûr en ngun la, I tih tawh chu a hlawhtling ang." 
Proverbs4:27 Ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw pêng suh, Sual lakah i ke vêng ṭha rawh." 
Proverbs5:1 Ka fapa, ka finna hi ngaihven ṭha la, Ka hriatna hi bengkhawn ṭha rawh." 
Proverbs5:2 Tichuan, awm dân ṭha chu i hria ang a, I thu-ah chuan hriatna i neih a lang bawk ang." 
Proverbs5:3 Hmeichhe sual chu a ṭawng a thlum êm êm a, Sahriak aiin a dang a nâl a ni." 
Proverbs5:4 A hnuah chuan a ṭawng a bak ang a, Khandaih hriam tawn angin a hriam bawk ang." 
Proverbs5:5 Thihna panin a ni a kal, A kalkawng chuan Seol a chhun." 
Proverbs5:6 Nunna kawng rêng zawh a tum lo, Kawng dik lo a zawh a, Amah lah chuan a hre si lo." 
Proverbs5:7 Chuvângin, ka fapate u, ngaithla ula, Ka thu sawi hi pênsan suh u." 
Proverbs5:8 A lak aṭang chuan inthiarfihlîm ula, A kawngka pawh hnaih suh u." 
Proverbs5:9 Mi dangin i zahawmna an chang ang a, Nunrâwng kutah i thi mai dah ang e." 
Proverbs5:10 Mi dang daihin i hausakna an chên ang a, I thawhrim rah hnam dangin an nei ang." 
Proverbs5:11 I thi tûr chu i rûm ang a, I chêrin i chak lo hle bawk ang." 
Proverbs5:12 ‘Kaihhruai ka hreh ṭhînzia tak kha aw, Zilhna ka hmusit êm êm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs5:13 Mi kaihruaitute aw ka hre duh lo vei a, Min zirtîrtute thu ka ngaihsak ngai hek lo." 
Proverbs5:14 Pung khâwm zîngah ka mualpho ṭêp tawh a lo ni,’ i la ti ang." 
Proverbs5:15 Nangma tuizêma tui ngei in la, I tuikhuah ata lo chhuak chu." 
Proverbs5:16 I tuihna chu engah nge a chik darh anga, Kawtlaiahte a luan ral mai mai ang?" 
Proverbs5:17 Nangma tân chauh ni se, Mi dang tân ni suh se," 
Proverbs5:18 I tuihna chuan malsâwmna dawng sela, I tawn tirh nupui chu hlim nân hmang rawh." 
Proverbs5:19 Zukla nalh tak, saza tuai ang a ni, A ṭang nêmah tlei la, A hmangaihna chuan zial che rawh se." 
Proverbs5:20 Ka fapa, mi dang nupui zûnah engah nge i uai ang, Hmeichhe dang ṭâng engah nge i vawn ang?" 
Proverbs5:21 Lalpan i thiltih zawng zawng a hmu vek a, I nun zawng zawng a enfiah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs5:22 Mi sualte chu an sualna ngeiin a âwk a, An sualna chuan a phuar tlat ṭhîn." 
Proverbs5:23 An insûm theih loh avângin an thi ang a, An ât em avângin an bo daih ang." 
Proverbs6:1 I ṭhenawm aia tuar i intiama, Hmêlhriat loh leiba rûl" 
Proverbs6:2 tûra i insawi awh tawha, I thutiama i inhlin bawk si chuan;" 
Proverbs6:3 Ka fapa, i ṭhenawmpa kutah chuan i âwk ta a ni. Ti hian intihchhuah tum ang che, A hnênah kal thuai la, ngaihdam dîl rawh, I thu i sût a phal theih nân ngên chiam ang che," 
Proverbs6:4 Mutsan hauh suh ang che, Chawlh hahdamsan hek suh." 
Proverbs6:5 Sakhi âwk chhuak a tlân ang leh, Sava âwk chhuak a thlâwk daih ang mai hian, A thang ata chhuak vang vang rawh." 
Proverbs6:6 Nang, thatchhepa, fanghmîr hnênah kal la, An awm dân hi en rawh, I fin phah mial mahna." 
Proverbs6:7 Lal an nei lo, hotu leh hruaitu pawh an nei lo." 
Proverbs6:8 Nipui lai chuan chaw an zawng a, Buhseng hunah ei tûr an khâwl khâwm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs6:9 Thatchhepa, eng chen nge i mut dâwn? Engtikah nge i ṭhanharh ang?" 
Proverbs6:10 ‘Mu leh hlek ang, chhîng hlek ila, Kut kuangkuahin zâl hlek teh ang,’ i tih chhûngin" 
Proverbs6:11 Retheihna chu mikhual angin a lo thleng thut ang a, Tlâkchhamnain râl ang maiin a rawn nang thut ang che." 
Proverbs6:12 Mi bengtlalo, mi chimawm chu, Thu veivirin a hmanhlel a," 
Proverbs6:13 A mit siaiin a ke a phût a, A kut a lek vêl ṭhîn." 
Proverbs6:14 A rilru kawi tak chuan thil sual a ruahman ṭhîn, Innghirnghona a tichhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs6:15 Chuvângin, manganna chuan a nang thut ang a, Siam ṭhat rual loh chhiatna a tâwk ngei ang." 
Proverbs6:16 Thil paruk-pasarih Lalpa huatzâwng, A ten êm êm a awm:" 
Proverbs6:17 Mit chapo te, dâwt sawi chîng te, Pawi khawih lo thattu te," 
Proverbs6:18 Thil sual ngaihtuah chhuah chîng ṭhîn te, Sual ti tûra ngal chak hle te," 
Proverbs6:19 Thuhretu der, dâwt phuh chhuak te, Unau innghirnghotîrtu te." 
Proverbs6:20 Ka fapa, i pa thupêkte vawng tlat la, I nu zirtîrna pawh hawisan hek suh." 
Proverbs6:21 I thinlungah châm rêng sela, I nghâwngah zem tlat rawh." 
Proverbs6:22 I kalna apiangah a hruai ang che a, I mut hunah a vêng ang che, I thawh hunah kawng ṭha a hrilh ang che." 
Proverbs6:23 An thupêkte chu khâwnvâr a ni a, An zirtîrna chu êng a ni, An hruaina chuan nun dân ṭha chu a kawhhmuh ang che." 
Proverbs6:24 Hmeichhe sual lakah a vêng ang che, Mi dang nupui kam thlum tak lakah nên." 
Proverbs6:25 A tîtuai ṭha ît suh ang che, A mitmei chuan man che suh se." 
Proverbs6:26 Chhang tlang khatin nawhchizuar a lei theih a, Uirenu erawh chuan i nun hlu tak a veh a ni." 
Proverbs6:27 Kawr kâng lovin mei hi a pawm theih em ni? 
Proverbs6:28 Ke kâng lovin meiling a dai theih em ni? 
Proverbs6:29 Ṭhenawmpate nupui chhaih chu chutiang bawk chu a ni; Khawihsak phei chuan an tuar ngei ang. 
Proverbs6:30 Rilṭâm avânga thil rutu chu Miten an hmusit lem lo. 
Proverbs6:31 An man hlauh erawh chuan A lêt sarih a chawi ang a, A neih zawng zawng a chân mai ang." 
Proverbs6:32 Mi nu uiretu chu a â hle a ni, Ama nun a tichhia a ni." 
Proverbs6:33 An hêm hrep ang a, a mualpho hle ang, A hming a chhe kumkhua bawk ang." 
Proverbs6:34 Thîkthu avânga thinrim hi a tluka na a awm thei lo, Dîm lêk lovin phuba a la ngei ang." 
Proverbs6:35 Thlêm lungawina eng mah a duh lo vang a, Thamna pe ṭeuh la, a lungawi chuang lo vang." 
Proverbs7:1 Ka fapa, ka thu hi awih la, Ka thupêkte hi vawng tlat ang che." 
Proverbs7:2 Ka thupêk hi zâwm la, i nung dâwn nia, Ka zirtîrna hi i mitnaute angin hum rawh." 
Proverbs7:3 I zungṭangah bun la, I thinlung phêkah chuan ziak rawh." 
Proverbs7:4 Finna chu, ‘Ka farnu,’ ti la, Hriatthiamna chu, ‘Ka laichînnu,’ ti rawh." 
Proverbs7:5 Mi dang nupui, hmeichhe kam thlum tak lakah A vêng dâwn che nia." 
Proverbs7:6 Kan tukverh âwng kârah ka han bih a. 
Proverbs7:7 Tlangvâl mâwl tak tak mai ka hmu hlawm a, An zînga â fâl pakhat ka en zui a," 
Proverbs7:8 Nu pakhat awmna vêng hnaiah a kal ta a, A in lam chu a pan." 
Proverbs7:9 Tlai lam ni tlâk hnuah khua a thim ta maw tihah," 
Proverbs7:10 Nawhchizuar anga inchei hlar, Mi lêm thiam takin a lo ko va." 
Proverbs7:11 Zah bosal tawh, ti hawm hawm mai, Awm hle hle thei tawh lo." 
Proverbs7:12 Kawtthlêrah te, tuallaiah te, Kil tin kil tanga tlangvâl châng ṭhîn chuan," 
Proverbs7:13 A lo pawm a, a han fâwp a, Tlângnêl takin ti hian a han ti a:" 
Proverbs7:14 ‘Remna thilhlan hlân tûr ka ni a, Vawiin chiah hian ka thutiam chu ka hlen ta a," 
Proverbs7:15 Nangmah zawng tûr chein ka lo chhuak a ni e, Ka melh ka melh che a, ka hmu ta che a ni." 
Proverbs7:16 Aigupta ram puan ṭial mawi Ka khumah ka phah diam tawh a ni. 
Proverbs7:17 Mura te, Aloe te, thakthing te chuan Khum chu ka tirimtui tawh a." 
Proverbs7:18 Tirawh, khawvâr hma chu nui dûn ila, Hmangaihna chu i chên dûn ang." 
Proverbs7:19 Ka pasal lah ina a awm loh lai tak a ni, Ram hla takah a zin daih a." 
Proverbs7:20 Tangka ip a keng a, Thla vânglaiin a lo hâwng leh chauh vang,’ a ti a." 
Proverbs7:21 A ṭawnghmang thiamin a lêm thlu a, A kam thlum tak chuan a zial â ta." 
Proverbs7:22 Bâwngpain an talhna tûr hmun a pan ang leh Thalin a thin a rawn chhun zawk hma chu, Kar hmaa sakhi a ter et et ang leh Thang lam pana sava a thlâwk ang hian, A zui lût ta a, A nun a chân phah dâwn tih rêng a hre hauh lo." 
Proverbs7:23  
Proverbs7:24 Khai le, fate u, ka thu ngaithla ula, Ka thu sawi hi ngaihven rawh u." 
Proverbs7:25 Nangni chuan chutiang hmeichhe lam chu hawi suh u, A kawngah chuan pêng hek suh u." 
Proverbs7:26 Mi tam tak chu a tichhe tawh a, Mi tam tak chuan an thih phah tawh a ni." 
Proverbs7:27 A in i pan vaih chuan Seol i thleng ang a, Mitthi khaw kawng pumpelh tawi ber a ni." 
Proverbs8:1 Finna chu a au a ni lâwm ni? Hriatna pawh chuan aw achhuah e. 
Proverbs8:2 Kawng sîr hmun sângahte leh Kawng pêng ṭhuam laiahte chuan a ding. 
Proverbs8:3 Khawpui tawntirh kulh kawngkaa, Khaw luhnaahte chuan a au chiam ṭhîn." 
Proverbs8:4 Nangni mihringte u, in hnênah thu ka sawi a ni, Hringfate u, in hriat atân ka au a ni." 
Proverbs8:5 Mi mâwlte u, fîmkhur zir ula, Mi â-te u, fin zir rawh u." 
Proverbs8:6 Thu tak tak ka sawi dâwn a, ngaithla ula, Ka thu hi zawng a dik a ni." 
Proverbs8:7 Thu dik ka chhâk chhuak a, Suahsualna hi ka ten a ni." 
Proverbs8:8 Ka sawi apiang thu dik tak zêl a ni, Thu veivir leh thu kawi a awm lo ve." 
Proverbs8:9 Hriatthiamna nei tân chuan a tluangtlam a, Hre zau tân pawh a chiang hle ang." 
Proverbs8:10 Tangka aiin ka kaihhruaina thlang rawh u, Rangkachak thlan chhuah ai pawhin hriatna hi duh rawh u." 
Proverbs8:11 Lunghlu aiin finna a hlu zâwk a, Duhthusâm ber pawh hian a hen zo lo." 
Proverbs8:12 Kei, finna hian fîmkhur ka thiam a, Hriatna neiin rem ka hre hle a ni." 
Proverbs8:13 Lalpa ṭih dân chu sual huat hi a ni, Chapo leh intihvei, awm khawloh leh verther, Ka huatzâwng tak a ni." 
Proverbs8:14 Rem ka ruat a, ka tihlawhtling bawk ṭhîn, Ka hrethiam a, thiltithei tak ka ni." 
Proverbs8:15 Keimah avângin lalte an lal a, Rorêltuten dân ṭha an zam a." 
Proverbs8:16 Rorêltuten ro an rêl a, Mi liante leh thuremtute pawhin." 
Proverbs8:17 Min ngainate ka ngaina a, Ngun taka min zawngtuten min hmu." 
Proverbs8:18 Hausakna leh zahawmna hi ka ta a ni, Hlawhtlinna leh hmuingîlna nên." 
Proverbs8:19 Ka hnên aṭanga dawn tûr chu Rangkachak ṭha mi aiin a ṭha. Tangkaraw thianghlim ber ai pawhin a hlu. 
Proverbs8:20 Kawng dik takah ka kal ṭhîn a, Dik takin ro ka rêl ṭhîn." 
Proverbs8:21 Mi ngainate hnênah hausakna ka pe a, An ro bâwmte ka chhûn khahsak bawk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs8:22 Lalpan min siam hmasa ber a, Thil siam a ṭan hmaa," 
Proverbs8:23 A tîr bera a siam ka ni, Khawvêl siam hma daih khân." 
Proverbs8:24 Tuithûkpui awm hma khân ka piang tawh a, Tuihna rêng rêng a awm hma khân." 
Proverbs8:25 Tlângte a din ṭan hma daih khân; Mualte a pian hma khân ka piang tawh a. 
Proverbs8:26 Lei leh khawmual siam hma Vaivut vei khat pawh a awm hma khân," 
Proverbs8:27 Vân khi a dah hmain ka awm tawh a, Tuithûkpui hual tûra kâwlkil a rin kual hma te khân." 
Proverbs8:28 Chung lam vân dum khi a dah ngheha, Tuithûkpui hna a siam hma khân," 
Proverbs8:29 Tuiin a thupêkte a pelh loh nân Tuipui chîm chin tûrte a ruat hmaa, Lei nghahna tûr a ruahman hma khân ka awm tawh a ni." 
Proverbs8:30 A bula awm, themthiam tak chu ka ni. Ni tin tilâwm ṭhîntu ka ni a, Kei pawh a hmaah ka hlim ṭhîn." 
Proverbs8:31 A lei siam, a chênna tûrah Hlim takin ka lêng a, Mihringte chu ka hlimpui ṭhîn" 
Proverbs8:32 Khai le, fate u, ka thu hi ngaithla teh u, Ka thu zâwmtute chu an nihlawh e." 
Proverbs8:33 Kaihhruaina zâwm ula, Fin phah rawh u, thlahthlam suh u." 
Proverbs8:34 Ni tin, ka kawngkhâr bula min nghâktu, Kawngka sîra min châng ṭhîna, Ka thu ngaithlatu chu a nihlawh e." 
Proverbs8:35 Min hmutu chu a nung ang a, Lalpa duhsakna a dawng ang." 
Proverbs8:36 Mi hêltute chu mahni pawi khawih an ni. Min huate chuan thih an thlang tihna a ni. 
Proverbs9:1 Finna chuan in a sa a, Lung chher ban pasarih a phun." 
Proverbs9:2 A lawmna tûr ran a talh a, Uain pawh a bun chhuak a, Ruai chu a peih tawh e." 
Proverbs9:3 Khaw chhûng hmunsâng berahte au tûr, A chhiahhlawh nulate a tîr a." 
Proverbs9:4 ‘Mi mâwlte chu lo haw rawh se,’ tiin." 
Proverbs9:5 ‘Ti teh u, ka chaw hi ei ula, Ka uain pawh hi in teh u," 
Proverbs9:6 Mâwlna kalsan ula, nung rawh u, Hriatna kawngah kal tawh rawh u,’ a ti." 
Proverbs9:7 Mi induhte i zilh chuan hau i tuar ang, Mi sual i zilhhau chuan kut i tuar ang." 
Proverbs9:8 Induhte chu zilh suh, an hua ang che, Mi fing zilh la, a ngaina hle ang che." 
Proverbs9:9 Mi fing hnêna i sawi chu a fin phah ang, Mi dik zirtîr la, a hriatna a pung ang." 
Proverbs9:10 Lalpa ṭih hi finna ṭobul a ni a, Mi Thianghlima hriat hi finvârna chu a ni" 
Proverbs9:11 Chu chuan a tidamrei ang che a, I dam chhûng kum a tipung ang." 
Proverbs9:12 Chu finna chu nei la, i tâna fing i ni ang a, I duh loh chuan nangman i tuar ngei ang." 
Proverbs9:13 Hmeichhe â chu a intârlang a, Dâwn a nei lo, zah rêng a hre hek lo." 
Proverbs9:14 A in kawngkaah chuan a ṭhu chhuak a, Khawpui hmun langsâr laiahte ṭhuthmun a rem a," 
Proverbs9:15 Kawnga lo kal apiang a lo ko va, Veivâk apiang a lo au ṭhîn." 
Proverbs9:16 ‘Mi mâwlte u, lo kal teh u,’ a ti. Mi â-te hnênah chuan," 
Proverbs9:17 “A rûka tui in chu a tui bîk a, A rûka chhang ei pawh a tui bîk ṭhîn,” a ti a." 
Proverbs9:18 Tah chuan thihna a awm tih an hre lo, A koh luh tâkte chu Seol khurah an awm a ni." 
Proverbs10:1 Fapa fingin a pa a tilâwm a, Fapa â erawh chuan a nu a tirethei." 
Proverbs10:2 Dik lo taka sum lâk luh chu a hlâwk chuang lo, Dik taka thil tih chuan nun a hum ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:3 Lalpa chuan mi dikte ṭâm a phal lo va, Mi sualte duhthusâm chu a tithlâwn ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:4 Mi thatchhia chu a rethei ang a, Mi taima chu a hausa ang." 
Proverbs10:5 Fapa fing chuan a hun takah buh a seng ṭhîn a, Buh seng huna mut chîngte chu zahpuiawm tak an ni." 
Proverbs10:6 Mi dik chuan malsâwmna a dawng ang a, Mi sual thu chuan inpâwngnêkna a keng ru ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:7 Mi dikte hriat reng hi anmahni chawimawina a ni a, Mi sualte hming erawh chu hriat reng a ni lo vang." 
Proverbs10:8 Thinlung fing chuan thupêk a pawisa ang, Â taka ṭawng ṭhînte chu an tluchhia ang." 
Proverbs10:9 Dik taka awmte chu an thlamuang ṭhîn. Mi rinawm lote chu man chhuah an la ni ang. 
Proverbs10:10 Thu dik sawi tlang ngam lo chuan buaina a tichhuak a, Huai taka sawisêltu chuan remna a thlen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:11 Mi dik tak thu chu nunna hnâr a ni, Mi sual thu chuan inpâwngnêkna a keng ru ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:12 Inhuatna hian innghirhona a thlentîr a, Hmangaihna erawh chuan bawhchhiatna a haider ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:13 Mi vengvâten thu fing an sawi ṭhîn a, Finna tlachhamte chuan vuak an tuar ang." 
Proverbs10:14 Mi fingte chuan hriatna an khâwl khâwm a, Mi â an ṭawng ve chuan chhiatna a lo hnai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:15 Hausate chu an hausaknain a hum ṭhîn a, Retheite chuan an pachhiat avângin an tuar ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:16 Thil ṭha tih rah chu nunna a ni a, Sual chuan sual a hrin belh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:17 Kaihhruaina dik zâwmtu chu a nung ang a, Zilhna pawisa lotu erawh chu thil tisual a ni." 
Proverbs10:18 Huatna zêptu chu mi dawthei a ni a, Mi rêl chîng chu mi â a ni." 
Proverbs10:19 Ṭawng tam poh leh tihsual a tam a, Mi fing erawh chu a insûm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:20 Mi dik ṭawng chu tangkaraw ṭha mi anga hlu a ni a, Mi sual rilru erawh chu nêp tak a ni." 
Proverbs10:21 Mi dik thu chuan mi tam tak a titlai ṭhîn a, Mi â erawh chu finna tlachhamin a thi ang." 
Proverbs10:22 Lalpa malsâwmna chuan mi a tihausa a, Lungngaihna a tel lo." 
Proverbs10:23 Thil sual tih hlimpui hi mi â awm dân a ni a, Mi fingte erawh chuan finna an ngaisâng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:24 Mi sualte chuan an hlauh ang ngei an tawng ang a, Mi dikte erawh chuan thil an duh chu an hmu ang." 
Proverbs10:25 Thlipui a lo tleh a, mi sualte chu a nuai bo va, Mi dikte erawh chu an nghet tlat ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:26 Thatchhe tirh chu Thil thûrin hâ a tihṭima, Meikhuin mit a tithîp ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs10:27 Lalpa ṭih hi dam reina a ni a, Mi sualte damchhûng erawh chu a tawi." 
Proverbs10:28 Mi dikte thil nghah chu lâwmna a ni a, Mi sualte hmabâk erawh chu boralna a ni." 
Proverbs10:29 Mi ngîlte chu Lalpan a hum ṭhîn a, Thil sual titute erawh chu a tiboral ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:30 Mi dikte chu an nghîng ngai lo vang a, Mi sualte erawh chu he ramah hian an awm ve reng lo vang." 
Proverbs10:31 Mi dikte chuan thufing an sawi chhuak a, Thu sual sawina lei erawh chu hleh a ni ang." 
Proverbs10:32 Mi dikte kam chhuak chu a duhawm ṭhîn a, Mi sualte thu sawi erawh chuan mi a khêng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:1 Bûkna dik lo chu Lalpa tenzâwng tak a ni a, Bûklung dik erawh chu a lawmzâwng tak a ni." 
Proverbs11:2 Chapote chu an mualpho thuai dâwn a, Inngaihtlâwm hi a fing zâwk e." 
Proverbs11:3 Mi ngîlte chu rinawmnain a kaihruai a, Bum hmangte erawh chu an sualnain a tichhia ang." 
Proverbs11:4 Hausak hi thinurna ni-ah chuan a ṭangkai lo va, Dikna erawh chuan thihna ata a chhan chhuak ang che." 
Proverbs11:5 Mi ṭhate chu an dik avângin an kawng a tluang a, Mi sualte erawh chu an sualnain a tichhe ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:6 Mi ngîlte chu an diknain a chhan ṭhîn a, Bum hmangte erawh chu an châknain a man tlat ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:7 Mi sualte an thihin beisei tûr a awm tawh lo, Hausaknaa innghah hi sâwtna a awm lo ve." 
Proverbs11:8 Mi dikte chu manganna ata chhan chhuah an ni a, Mi sualte chungah a thleng thung ang." 
Proverbs11:9 Serh leh sâng nei lote thu sawi chuan an ṭhiante a tichhe ṭhîn a, Mi fingte chu an finnain a chhan chhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:10 Mi dikte an tluan chuan khua an lâwm a, Mi sualte an tlâwm chuan lâwmin an au chiam ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:11 Mi ngîl zârah khua a mawi a, Mi sual ṭawngin a tihmingchhia." 
Proverbs11:12 Mi dang hmuhsit hi a âtthlâk a, Mi fing erawh chu a ngawi mai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:13 Mi kamtam chuan thurûk a zêp thei lo va, Rin tlâkte erawh chuan thu an zêp thei ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:14 Kaihruaitu ṭha an awm loh chuan mite an tlu ṭhîn a, Remruat thiam an tam chuan an him ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:15 Hriat chian loh tâna dahkhama ṭan chu inchhîrawm tak a ni, Ṭan loh law law a hahdamthlâk zâwk." 
Proverbs11:16 Nu ngilnei chuan chawimawi a hlawh a, Hmeichhe sual chu zahpuiawm tak a ni. Mi thatchhia chu a hausa ngai lo vang a, Mi hrât tak erawh chu a hausa ang." 
Proverbs11:17 Mi ngilnei chuan a ngilneihna a hlâwkpui a, Mi nunrâwng chu amah a intichhe ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:18 Mi sual thiltihah hlâwkna rêng a awm lo va, Mi dik thil tih erawh chu a hlâwk ngei ang." 
Proverbs11:19 Thil dik tih tum tlatte chu an nung ang a, Thil sual ûmtute chu an tlu ngei ang." 
Proverbs11:20 Lalpan rilru kawi a ten a, Rilru ngîlte erawh chu a ngaina." 
Proverbs11:21 Mi sual chuan hrem a pumpelh hauh lo vang a, Mi dikte erawh chuan an pumpelh ngei ang." 
Proverbs11:22 Nula hmêlṭha fîmkhur nachâng hre lo chu Vawk hnâra rangkachak khâng vuah ang hi a ni. 
Proverbs11:23 Mi dikte duhthusâm chu thil ṭha hlîr a ni a, Mi sualte hmabâk chu Pathian thinurna tuar a ni." 
Proverbs11:24 Sem darh chîn chu ngah lehzualna a ni, Mi kawm tak nih chu tlâkchham ngahna a ni." 
Proverbs11:25 Thilphal hle la, i hausa ang, Mi ṭanpui la, an ṭanpui ve ang che." 
Proverbs11:26 A to nghâka buh chheprelhtu chu ânchhia an lawh ang a, Phal taka hralh zêltu chu miin an fak ang." 
Proverbs11:27 Thil ṭha i duh tlat chuan duhsakna i dawng ang. Thil sual i zawn chuan i tawng ngei ang. 
Proverbs11:28 Hausakna rinchhante chu hnah angin an ṭîl ang a, Mi dikte erawh chu an duah hluah ang." 
Proverbs11:29 Mahni chhûngkaw tibuaitu chuan eng mah a nei lo vang, Mi â-te chu mi fing chhiahhlawh an ni ang." 
Proverbs11:30 Dikna rah chu nunna a ni a, Nunrâwn chu thihna a ni." 
Proverbs11:31 Khawvêlah mah mi dikten lâwmman an dawn chuan Thil sual titute leh mi sualte chuan hrem an tuar ngei ang. 
Proverbs12:1 Kaihhruaina ngaina chuan hriatna a ngaina a, Thununna hawtu chu a â hle a ni." 
Proverbs12:2 Mi ṭhate chu Lalpan a duhsak a, Sual tih chîngte thiam loh a chantîr ang." 
Proverbs12:3 Sual avângin tu mah an dingchang lo vang a, Mi dikte erawh chu an nghîng lo vang." 
Proverbs12:4 Nu ṭha chu a pasal tân lallukhum a ni a, Pasal timualphotu chu ngalngêt ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs12:5 Mi dikte chuan thil dik an ngaihtuah a, Mi sualte remruat chu bumna hlîr a ni." 
Proverbs12:6 Mi sualte kam chhuak chu tual thah thu a ni a, Mi ngîlte thu chuan mi a chhanhim ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:7 Mi sualte chu an tluchhia a, an boral a, Mi dik chhûngkua chu an dingchang ang." 
Proverbs12:8 Mi an fin leh fak an hlawh ṭhîn a, An ât leh an hmusit ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:9 Intihmilena ei tûr tlâkchham ai chuan, Mahni hna thawka mi narân nih a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs12:10 Mi dikte chuan an rante lam an khawngaih a, Mi sualte erawh chu an nun a râwng a ni." 
Proverbs12:11 Mahni lo enkawltu chuan ei tûr a ngah ṭhîn a, Eng mah ni hlei lo ûm ruak ruak hi a âtthlâk e." 
Proverbs12:12 Mi sualte kulh chu a chhe ṭhîn a, Mi dikte erawh chuan nghet takin zung an kaih ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:13 Mi sual chu amah a inṭawngâwk ṭhîn a, Mi dik erawh chuan buaina a pumpelh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:14 Ṭawnghmang thiam miin a thiam man a tlai phah ang a, A thil tih rah a seng bawk ang." 
Proverbs12:15 Mi â chuan dik a inti hle ṭhîn a, Mi fingte erawh chuan thurâwn an ngaichâng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:16 Mi â lungni lo chu a lang nghâl ṭhîn a, Mi fing chuan chêksawlhna a ngaihthah ṭhîn," 
Proverbs12:17 Mi rinawm chuan thu dik a sawi ṭhîn a, Thuhretu der chuan dâwt a sawi ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:18 Ṭawng thlahdah hian ngûnhnâm angin mi a chhun na thei a, Mi fing thu erawh chuan mi a thawi dam ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:19 Thu fing chuan a daih rei a, Dâwt erawh chuan rei lo tê chauh a daih." 
Proverbs12:20 Thil ṭha lo tih tumtuten mahni an inbum a, Remna zawngtuten hlimna an chang." 
Proverbs12:21 Mi dikte chu thil ṭha lovin a tlâkbuak lo, Mi sualte erawh chuan manganna an tâwk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:22 Lalpan dâwt hmang a ten a, Rinawm taka thil ti ṭhîn erawh chu a ngaina." 
Proverbs12:23 Mi fîmkhur chuan a hriatzia a thup a, Mi chhawihte erawh chuan an âtzia an târlang." 
Proverbs12:24 Taima apiangin thu an nei ang a, Thatchhiate erawh chu chhiahhlawh an ni mai ang." 
Proverbs12:25 Lungkham neih avângin mi an ngui a, Thu ṭha erawh chuan mi a tihlim ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:26 Mi dik chu a ṭhiante kaihruaitu a ni a, Mi sualte kawng erawh chu bona a ni." 
Proverbs12:27 Mi thatchhia chuan a duhzâwng a nei ngai lo vang a, Taima erawh chu a pung thûr thûr ang." 
Proverbs12:28 Dikna hi nunna kawng a ni a, Chumi kawngah chuan thihna a awm lo." 
Proverbs13:1 Fapa fing chuan a pa kaihhruaina a zâwm a, Pawisak nei lo chuan zilhna a ngaithla duh ṭhîn lo." 
Proverbs13:2 Mi ṭha chuan a ṭhat man a chên ang a, Bum hmang chuan râwng taka chêt hi a nuam tihzâwng a ni." 
Proverbs13:3 Ṭawng fîmkhur hi mahni invênna a ni a, Mi ṭawng tlahawlh chuan ama chhiatna a thlen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:4 Mi thatchhiain eng mah a nei lo; Mahse, a vîr êm êm, Mi taima erawh chuan a nei le lu ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:5 Mi dik chuan dâwt thu a hua a, Mi sual thu erawh chu a tenawm a, a zahpuiawm." 
Proverbs13:6 Dikna chuan pawi sawi lote a vêng tlat a, Suahsualna erawh chuan mi sualte chhiatna a thlen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:7 Hausa hlea inngai eng mah nei lo an awm a, Pachhiaa inngai hausa hle an awm bawk." 
Proverbs13:8 Hausa chuan intlanna tûr sum a nei a, Pachhia erawh chuan vau a tâwk ve lo." 
Proverbs13:9 Mi dikte chu mei êng tak ang an ni a, Mi sualte chu khâwnvâr tihmih ang an ni." 
Proverbs13:10 Chapona chuan inhauna a tichhuak ṭhîn a, Mi râwn ṭhin hi a finthlâk zâwk a ni." 
Proverbs13:11 Awlsam taka sum neih chu a ral thuai a, Harsa taka thawh chhuah chu a pung zêl ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:12 Beisei a bo chuan thin a na a, Duh anga kan hlawhtlin chuan kan hlim ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:13 Thurâwn hmusittu chuan a chhiat phah ang a, Thupêk zâwmtu chu a him ang." 
Proverbs13:14 Mi fing zirtîrna chu nunna hnâr a ni a, Thihna thang pumpelhna a ni." 
Proverbs13:15 Finna ṭha chuan mi a timawi a, Rinawm lohna erawh chu boralna a ni." 
Proverbs13:16 Mi fing chuan fîmkhur takin engkim a ti a, Mi mâwl erawh chuan a âtzia a târlang ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:17 Mi tirh rinawm loten buaina an tichhuak a, Palai rinawmten remna an thlen." 
Proverbs13:18 Kaihhruai duh lotu chu a pachhiain a mualpho vang a. Zilhna zâwmtu chu chawimawi a ni ang. 
Proverbs13:19 Duhthusâm hlawhtlin hi nuam tak a ni, Mi sualte chuan thil sual an hawisan duh tlat lo." 
Proverbs13:20 Mi fing kâwm la, i fing ve ang; Mi mâwl i kawmngeih chuan i tuar ngei ang." 
Proverbs13:21 Mi sualte chu mangannain a tlâkbuak ṭhîn a, Mi dikte erawh chuan thil ṭha an dawng ngei ang." 
Proverbs13:22 Mi ṭha chuan a tute thlenga rochun tûr sum a hnutchhiah a, Mi sual sum khâwl erawh chu mi dikten an nei ang." 
Proverbs13:23 Mi retheite tân buh thar ṭeuhna tûr ram a awm diai duai a, Mahse, mi dik loten an neih an phal si lo." 
Proverbs13:24 Talhfiak hmang lo chuan a fa a hua a ni, A hmangaih chuan tuk tin zilh rawh se." 
Proverbs13:25 Mi dikte chuan kham tâwk ei tûr an nei ang a, Mi sualte chu an ril a ṭâm fo vang." 
Proverbs14:1 Hmeichhe fing chuan chhûngkua an din a, A â-te chuan an kut ngeiin an ṭhiat." 
Proverbs14:2 Ngîl taka nung chuan Lalpa a ṭih a ni; Kawi taka awm chuan a hmusit a ni. 
Proverbs14:3 Mi â chu chapo takin a ṭawng ṭhîn a, Mi fing chu a thuin a hum ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:4 Bâwng chhawr tûr a awm loh chuan buh in a ruak a, Bâwng tha chhawr avângin buh a hlâwk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:5 Thuhretu rinawm chuan dâwt a sawi ngai lo va, A rinawm loh erawh chuan dâwt a phuahchawp ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:6 Mi inchhuangte chu an fing ngai lo vang a, Mi rilru nei rên râwnte chuan thil an hre thuai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:7 Mi â chu kalsan vat rawh, Eng mah hrilh tûr che a nei lo." 
Proverbs14:8 Mahni nihna hriat hi mi fing finna chu a ni a, Mi â âtna chu finga a inhriatna hi a ni." 
Proverbs14:9 Pathianin mi â-te a hmusit a, Mi ngilneite erawh chu a duhsak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:10 Kan lungngaihna chu mahni chauhvin kan hria, Kan lâwmna pawh mi dangin min ṭâwmpui thei lo." 
Proverbs14:11 Mi sual chhûngkua an tlûkchhiat pawhin, Mi ṭha chhûngkua chu an dingchang ang." 
Proverbs14:12 Kawng dik nia i hriat chu Thihna a la ni mai thei. 
Proverbs14:13 Nuih lai pawhin thinlung a na ṭhîn a, Lâwmna chu lungngaihnain a zui fo ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:14 Mi sualte chuan an sual man an hmu ang a, Mi ṭhate chuan an thiltih lâwmman an dawng bawk ang." 
Proverbs14:15 Mi sualte chuan eng pawh an ring mai a, Mi fîmkhur chuan a kalna tûr a thlîr ngun ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:16 Mi fingte chu an fîmkhur a, Thil ṭha lo an hawisan a, Mi sualte erawh chuan ngampa takin thil an ti buan buan ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:17 Thinchhiate chuan â takin thil an ti rum rum ṭhîn a, Mi fîmkhurte chu an hua." 
Proverbs14:18 Mi mâwlte chuan an mâwl man an hmu a, Mi fingte chuan hriatna an dawn belh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:19 Mi sualte chu mi ṭha hmaah an kûn ang a, Mi dikte hmaah chuan an ṭhingṭhi ang." 
Proverbs14:20 Pachhiate chu an ṭhenawmte pawhin an hua a, Hausate erawh chuan ṭhian an ngah hle." 
Proverbs14:21 Ṭhenawmte hmusittu chu mi sual a ni a, Retheite lainattu chu mi nihlawh a ni." 
Proverbs14:22 Thil ṭha lo ngaihtuahtu chuan thil sual a ti a ni; Thil ṭha tih tumtute chu miin an ring ang a, an lainat ang." 
Proverbs14:23 Thawhrim chuan rah a nei ṭhîn a, A sawia sawi ringawt chuan tlâkchhamna a thlen." 
Proverbs14:24 Mi fingte chu hausakna vûr an ni a, Mi sualte âtzia chu chhah tak a ni." 
Proverbs14:25 Thuhretu dik chuan mi nun a chhan ṭhîn a, Dâwt a sawi chuan mi a phat ṭhîn a ni." 
Proverbs14:26 Lalpa ṭih hi him taka awmna a ni a, Fate tân pawh belh tlâk a ni." 
Proverbs14:27 Lalpa ṭih hi nunna hnâr a ni a, Thihna thang pumpelhna a ni." 
Proverbs14:28 Lalin khualehtui a ngah chuan a ropui a, Mi a neih loh chuan a chan a chau ta ṭhîn a ni." 
Proverbs14:29 Mi thinnel chuan thil a hrethiam ṭhîn a, Mi thinram chuan a âtzia a tilang ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:30 Thlamuanna hian taksa a tihrisêl a, Îtsîkna hi ngalngêt ang a ni." 
Proverbs14:31 Retheite nêkchêp hi siamtu hmuhsitna a ni; Pachhiate lainattu chuan a chawimawi a ni. 
Proverbs14:32 Mi sualin a thil sual tih a chhiat phah a, Mi dik chu a diknain a hum zâwk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:33 Mi rilru nei rên râwn chu an fing ṭhîn a, Mi sualte erawh chuan thufing an hre thei lo." 
Proverbs14:34 Dikna chuan hnam a tiropui a, Sual hi hnam tin tân mualphona a ni." 
Proverbs14:35 Chhiahhlawh fing chu lalin a duhsak ṭhîn a, A mit tlung lo chungah a thinur ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:1 Chhânna nêmin thinrim a tireh a, Aw vînin thinur a titho." 
Proverbs15:2 Mi fing thu sawi chuan hriatna a tiduhawm a, Mi mâwlten thu â an phuh chhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:3 Lalpan hmun tin a hmu a, Mi sual leh mi ṭha a thlîr kim vek a ni." 
Proverbs15:4 Aw dam chuan mi a tiharh a, Thu veivir chuan mi a tingui." 
Proverbs15:5 Mi â chuan a pa kaihhruaina a hmusit a, Mi fing chuan a pa zirtîrna a pawisa ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:6 Mi dik inah sum leh pai a tling khâwm a, Buaina a lo thlenin mi sualte an chhe mai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:7 Hriatna hi mi fingten an tidarh a, Mi mâwlte erawh chuan an ti ve lo." 
Proverbs15:8 Lalpan mi sualte inthawina chu a ten a, Mi ngîlte ṭawngṭaina chu a lawmzâwng tak a ni." 
Proverbs15:9 Lalpan mi sualte awm dân chu a ten a, Dik taka thiltite chu a ngaina ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:10 Kawng dik pênsantu chu na taka hrem a ni ang a, Zirtîrna hawtu chu a thi ngei ang." 
Proverbs15:11 Seol leh boralna hmun chu Lalpan a hmu tlang vek a, Mihring thinlung phei chu a va hmu chiang dâwn êm!" 
Proverbs15:12 Chapote chuan kaihhruai an duh lo va, Mi fing an pan duh bawk hek lo." 
Proverbs15:13 Thinlung hlim chu hmêlah a lang a, Thinlung ngui chuan rilru a tichau." 
Proverbs15:14 Mi fingte chuan hriat belh an duh a, Mi mâwlte chuan mâwl renga awm an duh tâwk." 
Proverbs15:15 Rethei nun chu hahthlâk tak a ni, Mi hlim thei chuan nuam an ti ang." 
Proverbs15:16 Buai phîlîa neih ṭeuh ai chuan, Tlêm tê chauh pawh neiha Lalpa ṭih hi a ṭha." 
Proverbs15:17 Inhaw chunga sa tui tak tak ei ai chuan, Hmangaihte nên anhnah mai mai ei pawh a nuam." 
Proverbs15:18 Mi thinramin buaina an chawk chhuak a, Mi thinnelin buaina an tidai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:19 Thatchhe kawng chu hlîngin a khat a, Mi ngîlte kawng chu a fai hliau ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:20 Fapa fing chuan a pa a tilâwm a, A â erawh chuan a nu a hmusit ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:21 Mi mâwlte chuan an ât an hlimpui a, Mi fingte erawh chu kawng ngîlah an kal ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:22 Remruat lâwk a nih loh chuan thiltum a tlawlh ṭhîn a, Remhria an tam erawh chuan a hlawhtling ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:23 A hun taka chhânna dik hriat hi, A hlimawmin a va ṭha êm!" 
Proverbs15:24 Mi fingte chuan nunna kawng chu an zawh chho va, Seol chhukna kawngah an kal duh lo." 
Proverbs15:25 Lalpan chapote in a ṭhiatsak a, Hmeithaite ramri chu a humsak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:26 Lalpan mi sualte ngaihtuahna chu a ten a, Mi thianghlimte thu chu a lâwm." 
Proverbs15:27 Dik lo taka hlêp ṭeuh tum chu chhûngkaw buaina a ni a, Thamna lâk duh loh hi nun hlimna a ni." 
Proverbs15:28 Mi dikte chuan an chhân hmain an ngaihtuah ngun ṭhîn a, Mi sualte chuan thu ṭha lo an phuh chhuak pheng phung ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:29 Lalpa chuan mi sualte a hlat a, Mi dikte ṭawngṭai a ngaithla ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:30 Hlim hmêlin mi a tilâwm a, Thu lâwmawmin mi a tiharh." 
Proverbs15:31 Zilhna pawisak hi mi fing zînga telvena a ni. 
Proverbs15:32 Kaihhruaina pawisa lo chu mahni intichhia a ni a, Zilhna pawisak hi finna a ni." 
Proverbs15:33 Lalpa ṭih hi fin zirna a ni a, Chawimawina hlawh hmain tlâwm a ṭûl ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:1 Mihringin rem a ruat a, A hlawhtlinna chu Lalpa thu thu a ni." 
Proverbs16:2 Kan awm dân apiang ṭha hlein kan ngai ṭhîn a, Mahse, Lalpan kan thiltum a ni a thlîr ber." 
Proverbs16:3 Lalpa -a innghatin thil ti la, I thiltum chu a tihlawhtling ngei ang." 
Proverbs16:4 Tum bîk neiin Lalpan engkim a ti a, Mi sualte pawh chhiat tâwk tûra a siam an ni." 
Proverbs16:5 Chapote chu Lalpa tenzâwng tak an ni a, Hrem an pumpelh hauh lo vang." 
Proverbs16:6 Mi rinawmte chu khawngaihnain an bawhchhiatna ngaihdam a ni a, Lalpa ṭih hi thil ṭha lo hawisanna a ni." 
Proverbs16:7 Lalpa lawmzâwnga mi a awm chuan, A hmêlmate nên pawh an inrem ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:8 Dik lo taka neih ṭeuh ai chuan Dik taka tlêm tê neih a ṭha. 
Proverbs16:9 Mihringin a awm dân tûr a ruahman a, Mahse, amah kaihruaitu chu Lalpa a ni." 
Proverbs16:10 Pathian kaihhruaiin lalin thu a sawi a, A thu rêl chu a sual ngai lo." 
Proverbs16:11 Bûkna dik leh a lung dik chu Lalpa lâwmzâwng a ni, Bâwma bûklung zawng zawng hi a siam a ni." 
Proverbs16:12 Suahsualna hi lalten an ngaithei lo va, Dikna avâng chauhvin an lalna hi a nghet a ni." 
Proverbs16:13 Lalten thu dik sawi an lâwm a, Thu dik sawi ṭhînte chu an ngaina ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:14 Lal a thinur chuan mi a that mai thei a, Mahse, mi fing chuan a thlêm dai thei." 
Proverbs16:15 Lal hmêl a hlim chuan nun a nuam a, A duhsakna chu ṭhâl chhûm ruah pai ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs16:16 Finna hi rangkachak aiin a hlu a, Hriatna pawh hi tangkarua aiin a thlanawm zâwk." 
Proverbs16:17 Mi ngîlte chuan sual pumpelhna lamlian an zawh a, Fîmkhur taka kal chuan a nun a humhim ang." 
Proverbs16:18 Chapona chuan boralna a thlen a, Inchhuanna chuan chhiatna a thlen." 
Proverbs16:19 Retheite nên tlâwm taka awm hi, Chapote nêna râllâk sum insem aiin a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs16:20 Remhre taka thil titu chu a hlawhtling ṭhîn a, Mahse, Lalpa -a innghah chu a hlu zâwk." 
Proverbs16:21 Mi fing chu thil hrethiam an ti ang a, Ṭawngkam thlum chu awih a nahawm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:22 Finna neih hi nunna hnâr a ni a, Mi sual zirtîr tum chu a âtthlâk e." 
Proverbs16:23 Ngun taka ngaihtuahin mi fing chuan thu a sawi a, A sawi chu a awihawm bîk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:24 Ṭawngkam thlum chu a thlâra khawizu ang hi a ni, Mi a tilâwmin a tihahdam ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:25 Kawng dik nia i hriat chu, Thihna kawng a la ni mai thei." 
Proverbs16:26 Mi an ṭâm chuan hna an thawk nasa a, An ril a ṭâm loh nâna thawk an ni." 
Proverbs16:27 Mi sual chuan thil ṭha lo a ngaihtuah chhuak a, A thu chhâk chhuah pawh mei sa ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs16:28 Mi kawi chuan innghirnghona a tichhuak a, Se sea thu lâk chîng chuan ṭhian ṭha a tiṭhen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:29 Mi nunrâwngten an ṭhiante an bum a, Kawng dik lovah an hruai daih ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:30 Mit siaitu chuan thil ṭha lo a ngaihtuah a, Heh pettu chuan thil ṭha lo a ti dâwn a ni." 
Proverbs16:31 Lu ṭuak hi lallukhum mawi tak ang a ni. Mi dikte chuan an nei ngei ang. 
Proverbs16:32 Mi thinnel chu pasalṭha aiin a duhawm a, Khawpui hnehtu nih ai chuan mahni inhneh a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs16:33 Chinchâng hriat nân ṭhum an vâwr ṭhîn a. Mahse, thu titâwptu chu Lalpa a ni." 
Proverbs17:1 Buh leh sa neih rei ruia chhûngkaw inngeih si loh ai chuan, Inngeih taka chaw ṭhing ei a hlu zâwk." 
Proverbs17:2 Chhiahhlawh fing chu fapa tlâktlailo ai chuan a lal zâwk ang, Unau zînga mi ang maiin pa ro a chang ve ang." 
Proverbs17:3 Tangka leh rangkachak thukah an rawh thianghlim angin, Lalpan mihring thinlungte a fiah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:4 Mi sualte chuan thil sual an ngaihven a, Dawtheite chuan dâwt thu an ngaithla ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:5 Rethei nuihzattu chuan Siamtu a hmusit a ni; Chhiat a tawha diriamtu chuan hrem a pumpelh lo vang. 
Proverbs17:6 Tu leh fate hi pate tiropuitu an ni a, Fate timawitu chu pate hi an ni bawk." 
Proverbs17:7 Mi chhawih tân mawi taka ṭawng a âwm lo va, Milian tân dâwt sawi a mawi hek lo." 
Proverbs17:8 Thamna hi dawi anga thiltithei nia ngai an awm a, An lekna lam apiangah hlawhtlingin an hria." 
Proverbs17:9 Sual ngaihdam hi ngainat hlawhna a ni, Kam tam erawh chu ṭhian ṭhenna a ni." 
Proverbs17:10 Mi â vawi za ben ai chuan, Mi fing vawi khat zilh a sâwt zâwk." 
Proverbs17:11 Mi sual chuan vuivaina ngawt a zawng a, Mi nunrâwng a hnênah an tîr ang." 
Proverbs17:12 Mi â-in thil â tak a tih lai va tawn ai chuan, Savawm no ngai tawhchilh a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs17:13 Thil ṭha suala thungrûltu chu, Thil ṭha lovin an chhûngkua a chhuahsan lo vang." 
Proverbs17:14 Inhnial hi tuikhuah sah tûr khi ṭan ang hi a ni a, A zual hmain titâwp ang che." 
Proverbs17:15 Mi sual thiam chantîra, Mi ṭha thiam loh chantîr chu Lalpan a haw ve ve." 
Proverbs17:16 Mi â kuta tangka awm chu eng nge a ṭangkaina? Rilru nei si lo chuan finna a lei thei dâwn em ni? 
Proverbs17:17 Ṭhian chuan eng lai pawhin min hmangaih a, Unaute hi mangan hun atâna lo piang an ni." 
Proverbs17:18 Mi leiba mawhphurhsaka, Ṭhenawmte tân dahkhama ṭang chu A â hle a ni." 
Proverbs17:19 Thil sual lâwmtu chuan buai a duh a ni; Mi uangthuang chuan chhiatna a tâwk ngei ang. 
Proverbs17:20 Mi kawi chuan thil ṭha a tawng lo vang a, Mi ṭawngtlahawlh chuan chhiatna a tâwk ngei ang." 
Proverbs17:21 Fa â tak neitute chu an lungngai ṭhîn, Chutiang pa chu an hlim ngai lo." 
Proverbs17:22 Hlim hi hrisêlna a ni a, Ngui renga awm hi chauhna a ni." 
Proverbs17:23 Mi sual chuan puan hnuaiah thamna a dawng a, Dik takin ro a rêl thei lo." 
Proverbs17:24 Mi fing chuan thil fing a ti ṭhîn a, Mi â erawh chuan kil tin a hâwl dûm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:25 Fa â chuan a pa a timangang a, A nu tân pawh inchhîrawm tak a ni." 
Proverbs17:26 Mi dik lei chawitîr hi a dik lo va, Dik lohna nei si lo milian vuak lah a dik hek lo." 
Proverbs17:27 Thil hre tam chu a ṭawng mai mai lo va, Thil hrethiam tawh rilru chu a nghet a ni." 
Proverbs17:28 Mi â chu a ṭawng loh chuan finga ngaih a ni a, I hmui chîp la, fin i hlawh ang." 
Proverbs18:1 Mal tlat chîng chuan amaduhzâwng chauh a ngaihtuah a, Mi dang a thurualpui thei lo." 
Proverbs18:2 Mi â chuan hriatna a ngaina lo va, A ngaih dân chauh sawi a duh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:3 Sual chu mualphonain a rawn zui a, Hmingchhiate chu hmuhsit zui an ni bawk." 
Proverbs18:4 Kan thuchhuak chu lui luang ang hi a ni a, Finna tuikhur erawh chu thûk tak a ni." 
Proverbs18:5 Mi dik chan tûr lâksaka, Mi sual duhsak a ṭha lo ve." 
Proverbs18:6 Mi â ṭawng chuan inhnialna a tichhuak a, A thu chuan invuak a chawh a ni." 
Proverbs18:7 Mi â chuan a thu a chhiat phah a, A inṭawngâwk tlat ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:8 Mi rêl ser ser hi thil tui tak ang a ni, Tui kan va ti ṭhîn êm!" 
Proverbs18:9 Mahni hnaa dâwngdah chîng chu Tichhetua unaupa a ni. 
Proverbs18:10 Lalpa hming chu kulhpui ang a ni a, Mi dikte an tlân lût a, an him ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:11 Mi hausa tân a hausakna chu kulhpui ang a ni a, Lung bang sâng tak angin a ngai." 
Proverbs18:12 Chapona chu chhiatnain a zui a, Ropui hmain tlâwm a ṭûl ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:13 Ngaihthlâk hmaa chhân chu, A âtthlâkin a zahthlâk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:14 Dam loh pawhin dam duhna hian beisei min neihtîr a, Dam duhna a bo tawh chuan tu nge dam thei ang?" 
Proverbs18:15 Rilru nei rên râwnten hriatna an neih belh a, Mi fingte chuan hriatna an ngaihven ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:16 Thilpêkin kawng a tikaw thei a, Milian hmaah pawh awlsam taka luh theihna a ni." 
Proverbs18:17 Thubuai sawi hmasatu chu thiam hlein a lang ṭhîn, A rawn chhâl lêt an awm hma chu." 
Proverbs18:18 Milian an inkhin chuan ṭhum vâwr ila, Ṭhen theih an ni." 
Proverbs18:19 I unau ṭanpui la, kulhpui angin a hum ang che, In inhau erawh chuan kawng a kalh hnan ang che." 
Proverbs18:20 I thu sawi avângin i puar ang a, I thu azirin i tlai ang." 
Proverbs18:21 Nunna emaw, thihna emaw a hring thei a, I thu sawi mawh chu i phur ngei ang." 
Proverbs18:22 Nupui zawng hmu chuan thil ṭha tak a hmu a ni, Lalpa duhsakna a dawng ang." 
Proverbs18:23 Mi rethei chuan khawngaih thla la takin thu a sawi ṭhîn a, Mi hausa erawh chu a ṭawng chaltlai hle ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:24 Ṭhian ṭha ni âwm taka lang an awm a, Unau aia ṭhian nghet an awm bawk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs19:1 Mi â dawthei tak nih ai chuan, Mi rethei, ngîl taka nung nih a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs19:2 Hriatna nei si lova phûr viau hi a ṭha lo ve, Hmanhmawh chuan a dai sual ṭhîn." 
Proverbs19:3 Mi ṭhenkhatin an ât an chhiat phah a, Lalpa an dem leh si." 
Proverbs19:4 Hausak hi ṭhian ngahna a ni a, Retheihna hian ṭhian a tiṭhen." 
Proverbs19:5 Thuhretu der chu hrem a ni ang a, Dâwt sawi chuan hrem a pumpelh lo vang." 
Proverbs19:6 Milian tlawntu an tam hle a, Mi thilphalten ṭhian an ngah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs19:7 Mi rethei chu a unau zawng zawng pawhin an nin chuan, Ṭhian a nei zo lo pawh a mak lo ve. Neih tum chiam mah se, a hmu zo lo vang." 
Proverbs19:8 Finna neih tum hi mahni induhsakna a ni a, Hriatna ngaihlu chuan a ṭhatpui ang." 
Proverbs19:9 Thuhretu der chu hrem a ni ang a, Mi dawthei chu a boral ngei ngei ang." 
Proverbs19:10 Sâng taka khawsak hi mi â tân a mawi lo va, Chhiahhlawh tân milian chunga thuneih a âwm hek lo." 
Proverbs19:11 Mi fing chu a thinur duh lo va, Chêksawlhna a haider hi amah tiropuitu a ni." 
Proverbs19:12 Lal thinrim chu sakeibaknei rûm ang hi a ni a, A duhsakna erawh chu hnim chunga dai tla ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs19:13 Fapa â chu a pa tân chhiatna a ni a, Nupui âncheh chu in chung far reng ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs19:14 In leh lote hi pate ta kan rochun a ni a, Nupui fing erawh chu Lalpa min pêk a ni." 
Proverbs19:15 Mi thatchhia chuan mut an duh a, Mi dâwngdah chu a ṭâm ngei ang." 
Proverbs19:16 Thupêk zawm hi mahni inhumhimna a ni a, Thu awih lo chu a thi ngei ang." 
Proverbs19:17 Rethei khawngaih hi Lalpa hnêna thil pûktîr ang a ni, I thiltih ang chu a rûl leh ngei ang che." 
Proverbs19:18 Beiseiawm a la nih laiin i fa chu thunun rawh, Chutilo chu, a chhiat i duh tihna a ni." 
Proverbs19:19 Mi thinchhia chuan a thinchhiat rah a seng ang a, Chhan ṭhîn mah la, chhan leh ṭhin a ṭûl ang." 
Proverbs19:20 Thurâwn ngaithla la, kaihhruaina zâwm rawh. Engtikah emaw chuan i la fing ang." 
Proverbs19:21 Mihringin thil tam tak an ruahman a; Mahse, Lalpa remruat chauh a dingchang ang." 
Proverbs19:22 Mihring hi rinawm taka awm tûr a ni, Dâwttheih ai chuan retheih a ṭha." 
Proverbs19:23 Lalpa ṭih hi nunna a ni a, A lungawithlâk a, Thil ṭha lovin a tlâkbuak lo vang." 
Proverbs19:24 Mi thatchhia chuan thlêng zen chu a peih a, Mahse, a bâr peih lo." 
Proverbs19:25 Pawisak nei lo chu vua la, mi mâwlin a fin phah ang. Mi fing zilh la, hriatna a ngah sawt ang." 
Proverbs19:26 Pate rawka nute hnawtchhuaktu chu, Fa zahpuiawm, mualphona tâwpkhâwk thlentu a ni." 
Proverbs19:27 Ka fapa, thununna i zir zawm loh chuan, I hriat sa pawh i theihnghilh mai ang." 
Proverbs19:28 Thuhretu sual chuan dik taka rorêl a ngainêp a, Mi sualte chuan dik lohna hi an duhzâwng tak a ni." 
Proverbs19:29 Pawisak nei lote chu thiam loh chang sa an ni a, Mi â-te chu an hnungzânga vuak tûr an ni." 
Proverbs20:1 Zuin mi a tiuang a, Rakzuin buaina a tichhuak. Zu rui mi fing an awm ngai lo." 
Proverbs20:2 Lal thinur chu sakeibaknei rûm ang a ni a, Tithinurtu chuan a nun a chân ang." 
Proverbs20:3 Intihbuainaa tel loh hi pa zahawm nihna a ni a, Mi â-te chu an inrawlh zen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs20:4 Mi thatchhia chuan a hunah lei a rît peih lo va, Buh seng tûr zawng mah se a nei lo vang." 
Proverbs20:5 Mihring ngaihtuahna hi li thûk tak ang a ni a, Mahse, mi fing chuan a dâwp chhuak thei." 
Proverbs20:6 Rinawm tak nia insawi an tam hle a, Rinawm tak tak tu nge hre chhuak thei ang?" 
Proverbs20:7 Dik tak leh ngîl taka nung ṭhîn Fate chu an nihlawh e. 
Proverbs20:8 Rorêl tûra lal a ṭhutin Thil dik lo chu a hmu nghâl ṭhîn. 
Proverbs20:9 ‘Ka thinlung a thianghlim a, sual lakah ka fihlîm,’ Tu nge ti thei?" 
Proverbs20:10 Bûklung rit hlei te, Tehna no lian hlei te Lalpa tenzâwng a ni." 
Proverbs20:11 Naupang pawh a thiltihah a zia a lang, Mi ṭha a ni emaw, mi dik a ni emaw a hriat theih ṭhîn." 
Proverbs20:12 Beng thil hre thei, mit thil hmu theite hi Lalpa siam an ni e." 
Proverbs20:13 Mut heh hle suh, i rethei dah ang e, I mit meng la, ei tûr i nei ṭeuh vang." 
Proverbs20:14 ‘A to mang e,’ thil leitu chuan a ti ṭhîn a, Mual an liam a, an lei tlâwmzia an uanpui ṭhîn." 
Proverbs20:15 Rangkachak leh lunghlu chu a tam hle a, Thu fing tak chu lungmawi vâng tak ang a ni." 
Proverbs20:16 Hmêlhriat loh leiba rulhsak tiamtu kawr chu Dahkham atân lâksak mai rawh. 
Proverbs20:17 Thil ei rûk chu a tui hle a, Mahse, kâa ṭiaulung khat ṭûn ang hi a la ni ang." 
Proverbs20:18 Thil ruahman laiin ngun taka ngaihtuah tûr a ni, Remruat diam hnuah chuan indo ṭan tûr a ni." 
Proverbs20:19 Mi ṭawng duh, lên heh chuan thurûk a puang ṭhîn a, Mi kamtam chu kâwm suh." 
Proverbs20:20 Nu leh pa ânchhe lawhtu chu Thima khâwnvâr mit ang hi a la ni ang. 
Proverbs20:21 Awlsam taka sum leh pai neih mai theihte hi A tâwpah chuan a hlâwk lem lo. 
Proverbs20:22 ‘Thil sual ka thungrûl ang,’ ti mai teh suh, Lalpa chu ngaichâng la, a rawn chhan ang che." 
Proverbs20:23 Bûklung inang lo hi Lalpan a ten a, Bûkna dik lo a ṭha hek lo." 
Proverbs20:24 Kan ke pênte hi Lalpa ruat a ni, Tu nge kan kalna tûr hre thei ang?" 
Proverbs20:25 Ngaihtuah chiang lovin thilhlan Pathian hnêna pêk tiam suh, I tiam hnuah i la inchhîr leh dah ang e." 
Proverbs20:26 Lal fing chuan mi sual a hmu thuai a, Tawlailîr a la chîltîr ang." 
Proverbs20:27 Lalpan mihring chhûngah khâwnvâr a dah a, Thinlung chhûngril a chhun chhuak vek a ni." 
Proverbs20:28 Ngilneihna leh zahawmna hi lal humhimtu a ni a, Dikna avângin a lalṭhutthlêng a nghet a ni." 
Proverbs20:29 Tlangvâl ropuina chu an chakna hi a ni a, Upa mawina pawh an lu vâr hi a ni." 
Proverbs20:30 Na taka vuakna hian sual simna a thlen a, Vuak nek hian chhûng lam a tithianghlim thei." 
Proverbs21:1 Lal rilru hi Lalpa thu-a awm a ni a, Lui tui a duh duha a luantîr ang hian a tidanglam ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:2 Mahni awm dân hi ṭha hlein kan hria a, Mahse, Lalpa chhui chu thinlung hi a ni." 
Proverbs21:3 Thil dik tih leh dik taka rorêl hi, Inthawina aiin Lalpan a duh zâwk." 
Proverbs21:4 Induhna te, chaponate hi mi sual kaihruaitu a ni a, Chu chu thil sual a ni." 
Proverbs21:5 Mi taima thiltum chu a hlawhtling ṭhîn a, Thil ti rum rum mi chu a hlawhchham ang." 
Proverbs21:6 Dâwta intihhausak chu chhûm Ral mai ang hi a ni, thih a chawh bawk." 
Proverbs21:7 Mi sual nunrâwnna chu an chungah a tla ang, Thil dik an tih duh loh avângin." 
Proverbs21:8 Thiam loh changte rilru chu a kawi a, Mi ṭhate chuan thil dik an ti ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:9 Nupui âncheh tak nêna in khata chên ai chuan, In chung zâwl kila awm a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs21:10 Mi sualte chuan thil sual an duh reng a. Lainatna an neih rêng an ṭhenawmte pawhin an hmu lo. 
Proverbs21:11 Mi hmusittuten hrem an tuarin, mi mâwlten an fin phah a, Zirtîrna dawngtu mi fing chuan a hriat belh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:12 Mi Dika chuan mi sual chhûngkua a hmu reng a, Mi sualte chungah chhiatna a thlentîr ang." 
Proverbs21:13 Mi rethei thu ngaithla duh lotu chu, A mangang au an ngaithla bîk lo vang." 
Proverbs21:14 Thilpêkin thinrim a thawi dam a, Thinur viau pawh a rûka thamnain a beng dai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:15 Dik taka rorêl a nihin mi ṭha an lâwm a, Mi sualte tân chuan hnâra khawn ang a ni." 
Proverbs21:16 Pianpui finna hmang duh lotu chu Mitthi zîngah a awm thuai ang. 
Proverbs21:17 Nawmchen thlahlel chu a pachhia ang a, Zu leh sa ngaina chu a hausa lo vang." 
Proverbs21:18 Mi sual chu mi dik tlan nân an hmang ang a, Mi bum hmang pawh mi nun ngîl tlan nân." 
Proverbs21:19 Nupui âncheh leh thinchhe tak bula awm ai chuan, Thlalêra awm a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs21:20 Mi fing inah chuan sum leh pai hlu tak tak a awm ṭeuh va, Mi â-te erawh chuan an ei zo zêl." 
Proverbs21:21 Mi ngilnei, dik taka thil ti ṭhîn chu, A dam rei ang a, a hmuingîlin miin an zah ang." 
Proverbs21:22 Hotu fing chuan mi huaisente kulh a la mai thei a, Inhumhim nâna an hman chu a chhu chhe ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:23 I hmui leh i lei vêng la, Buaina i pumpelh ang." 
Proverbs21:24 Mi chapo leh mi inchhuang chu ‘Hmusittua,’ an ti, Chapo takin a inluling ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:25 Mi thatchhia chuan eng mah a thawk peih lo va, Rualawt rêng rêngin a thi ang." 
Proverbs21:26 Nilêngin mi thil a awt ngawih ngawih reng a, Mi ṭha erawh chuan ui nei lovin thil a pe ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:27 Mi sual inthawina chu a tenawm a, A inthawi chhan a sual phei chuan a tenawm lehzual ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:28 Thuhretu der chu hnâwl a ni ang a, Chîk taka ngaihtuah mi thu chu pawm a ni fo vang." 
Proverbs21:29 Mi sual chu a meng rum ṭhîn a, Mi dik erawh chu a nghet chat ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:30 Finna te, thiamna te, remruatna te, Lalpa kalh zawng chu eng mah a ni lo vang." 
Proverbs21:31 Sakawr chu indona atân buatsaih a ni a, Mahse, hnehna chu Lalpa thu a ni." 
Proverbs22:1 Hausak viau ai chuan hmingṭhat duh zâwk tûr a ni. Tangka leh rangkachak aiin mi ngaihsân nih a ṭha zâwk. 
Proverbs22:2 Hausak leh retheih inanna chu, Pathian kutchhuak an ni ve ve." 
Proverbs22:3 Mi fing chuan hlauhawm a hmuhin a biru a, Mi mâwl erawh chuan a tâwn mai a, a tuar phah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs22:4 Inngaitlâwm la, Lalpa ṭih rawh, Hausakna te, ropuina te, nunna te i nei ang." 
Proverbs22:5 Mi kawite kawng chu hlîng leh thangin a khat a, Invêng ngun la, hawisan daih rawh." 
Proverbs22:6 Naupang chu awm dân ṭha zirtîr la, A upat hnuah pawh a thlah lo vang." 
Proverbs22:7 Hausaten retheite chungah thu an nei a, Pûktu chu pûktîrtu chhiahhlawh a ni mai." 
Proverbs22:8 Hleih neih chîng chuan buaina a tâwk ang a, Thinura mi chunga tiang lek ṭhîn chu a tliak ang." 
Proverbs22:9 Mi ngilnei, retheite ei tûr pe ṭhîn chuan Malsâwmna a dawng a." 
Proverbs22:10 Mi chimawm chu hnawt bo la, Inhnialna te, buaina te, inhauna te a reh mai ang." 
Proverbs22:11 Lalpan thinlung thianghlim a ngaina a, Hawihhâwm taka ṭawng ṭhin hi lal ṭhian nihna a ni." 
Proverbs22:12 Lalpan hriatna dik nei mi chu a hum tlat a, Dawtheite thu erawh chu a paihthla ṭhîn." 
Proverbs22:13 Thatchhia chuan, ‘Pâwnah sakeibaknei a awm, Ka chhuah chuan min seh mai ang,’ a ti ṭhîn." 
Proverbs22:14 Hmeichhe sual thu chu hum thûk tak ang a ni a, Lalpa huatzâwngte chu an tla lût ang." 
Proverbs22:15 Naupangte hi â hle mah se, Tianga vuak reh hlauh theih a ni." 
Proverbs22:16 Hausak duh vânga mi rethei tiduhdaha, Mi hausa tlawn chu tlâkranna a ni." 
Proverbs22:17 Mi fingte thu sawi hi bengsikin ngaithla la, Ka zirtîr ang che." 
Proverbs22:18 I hriat reng chuan i lâwm hle ang a, A ṭûl hunah i sawi chhâwng thei ang." 
Proverbs22:19 Lalpa rin tlat theih nân, Vawiinah hêng hi ka hrilh che a ni." 
Proverbs22:20 Hêng zilhna thu leh hriat tûr sawmthum hi Ka ziak chhuahsak che a, Hetah hian remruat dân ṭha a chuang a ni." 
Proverbs22:21 Thu dik hi eng nge a nih tih a zirtîr ang che; Thu dik hmu chhuak tûra an tirh hunah che, A chhânna tûr dik tak i hre thei ang." 
Proverbs22:22 Mi rethei chu an pachhiat avângin an thil chhuhsak suh, Rorêlnaa ṭanpuitu tûr nei lo chu rapbet suh." 
Proverbs22:23 Lalpan a rawn ṭan ang a, Rapbettu chu a rawn rapbet ve ang." 
Proverbs22:24 Mi thinchhia kâwm suh la, Mi thinram ṭhian hek suh." 
Proverbs22:25 Chutilo chu, an awm dân i la ang a, I inâwk buai mai ang." 
Proverbs22:26 Mi leiba rulhsak tiam suh la, Dahkhamah ṭang hek suh." 
Proverbs22:27 Pêk tûr i neih loh hlauh chuan, I mutna khum chenin an lâksak ang che." 
Proverbs22:28 Hmânlaia in puten ramri an kham chu sawn suh. 
Proverbs22:29 Mi themthiam chu lalin a ruai ang a, Mi narânin an chhawr phâk ve lo vang." 
Proverbs23:1 Milian nên chaw in kîl dâwnin, I hmaa ṭhu chu en ngun rawh," 
Proverbs23:2 I ril a ṭâm hle pawhin insûm deuh la," 
Proverbs23:3 Ei tûr tuihnai a hlui che chu, A bum tumna che a ni mai thei." 
Proverbs23:4 Hausak tumin inhmang zo suh, Inkhêk deuh la, a fing zâwk ang." 
Proverbs23:5 Hausakna chu i hmuh veleh a bo mai ang, Thla a nei ta emaw tih tûr a ni ang a, Mupui angin vân lamah khian a thlâwk bo vang." 
Proverbs23:6 Khawhringneite chawhlui kîl suh la, Ei tûr tuihnai a neih chu ît hek suh." 
Proverbs23:7 ‘Ei la, in teh,’ a ti ang che a, Duhsak tak tak si lo chein, Tum nei ru râna thil ti a ni." 
Proverbs23:8 I thil ei chu i luak chhuak leh ang a, Amah i fakna chu a thlâwn mai a ni ang." 
Proverbs23:9 Mi â zilh suh, i thu fing chu Engah mah a ngai lo vang." 
Proverbs23:10 Ramri awm sa chu sawn suh la, Fahrahte ram chhuhsak hek suh." 
Proverbs23:11 An tlantu chu ropui tak a ni a, Anni chu a ṭan ang a, a khing ang che." 
Proverbs23:12 An zirtîrna che chu ngai ngun la, Thil hriat tûr chu ngaihven rawh." 
Proverbs23:13 Naupang chu thunun lohvin zuah suh, I vuak avângin a thi lo vang." 
Proverbs23:14 Tiang i lek ṭhin chuan, A nunna chu Seol aṭangin i chhan chhuak dâwn a ni." 
Proverbs23:15 Ka fapa, i fin chuan kei hi mi lâwm ang." 
Proverbs23:16 Thufing i phuh chhuah leh ka lâwm êm êm ang. 
Proverbs23:17 Mi sualte chu awt rilru suh, Ni tin Lalpa ṭih i chîn chuan" 
Proverbs23:18 I tân a la ṭha ang a, I beisei chu a thlâwn lo vang." 
Proverbs23:19 Ka fapa, ngaithla teh, fing la, I awm dân hi ngaihtuah ngun teh." 
Proverbs23:20 Zu heh mi zîngah awm suh la, Sa heh mi kâwm hek suh." 
Proverbs23:21 Zu heh leh sa heh mi chu an pachhia ang a, Ruih chîng chuan kawr ṭet a ha ang." 
Proverbs23:22 A hringtu che i pa thu chu awih la, I nu a tar hnuin hmusit hek suh." 
Proverbs23:23 Thu dik te, finna te, kaihhruaina te, hriatna te lei rawh, Hralh leh tawh suh." 
Proverbs23:24 Mi dikte pa chu a hlim ang a, Fapa fing neitu chu a lâwm hle ang." 
Proverbs23:25 I nu leh pain chhuang hle che sela, A paitu che tihlim ṭhin rawh." 
Proverbs23:26 Ka fapa, ka thu hi awih la, Ka nun dân hi entawn ang che." 
Proverbs23:27 Mi hur leh nawhchizuarte hi Thang hlauhawm tak an ni. 
Proverbs23:28 Suamhmang angin mi an châng a, Mihring zîngah mi rinawm lo an pun phah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs23:29 Tute nge ninawm tak, che pawr hle ṭhîn, Buaipuiawm tak, vui reng mai si, A ṭûl lova pem pheng phunga, Meng sen rêm rûm ṭhîn le?" 
Proverbs23:30 Zu in reng mai, Zu chi hrang hrang chawhpawlh hrâtte hi an ni." 
Proverbs23:31 Zu sen lang mai, îtawm taka nova tling, Lem nuam âwm tak ni mah se, Melh duh hauh suh ang che." 
Proverbs23:32 A tûkah chuan rûl tûr neiin A chu ta che emaw i ti ang a," 
Proverbs23:33 Thil mak pui pui i hmu ang a, I rilru a buai ang a, i riat nuah nuah ang." 
Proverbs23:34 Lawng ngul lêra awm, inthên inthên, Lawng rui angin i inhria ang." 
Proverbs23:35 ‘Min tithal dêr mah se, pawi ka ti lo, Leiah let dêr mah ila a pawi hlei nêm, Ka ṭhanharh hunah chuan, Ka in leh bawk ṭhîn ang,’ i ti ang." 
Proverbs24:1 Mi sualte awt suh la, An zînga tel châk bawk hek suh." 
Proverbs24:2 Buaina tihchhuah dân an ngaihtuah ber a ni, Pawi khawih dân tûr tui takin an sep ṭhîn." 
Proverbs24:3 Finna leh inhriatthiam tawnnaah Chhûngkua chu a indin nghet a," 
Proverbs24:4 Hriatna avângin thil hlu leh mawi tak tak, Pindan chhûngah a khat vek ṭhîn." 
Proverbs24:5 Fin hi chak ai chuan a ṭha, Hriatna hi âwmkhauh aiin a ṭha bawk." 
Proverbs24:6 Indo hmain ngun taka râlrêl a ṭûl a, Remhria an tam chuan hmêlma an hneh nge nge ṭhîn." 
Proverbs24:7 Mi chhawih tân thufing a ril lutuk a, Thupui vainaah sawi tûr a nei phâk lo." 
Proverbs24:8 Thil ṭha lo hlîr suangtuahtute chu, ‘Pawi khawih hmang’ an ti ang." 
Proverbs24:9 Mi â remruat apiang thil sual a ni zêl a, Mi dang hmusittu chu mi tenawm a ni." 
Proverbs24:10 Mangan nia i chauh mai chuan, Chakna rêng i lo nei lo a ni." 
Proverbs24:11 Dik lo taka tihhlum tûrte chu chhan la, Thah mai tûra an hruai hlawk hlawkte chu ensan mai suh." 
Proverbs24:12 ‘Ka hriat ve chi a ni lo ve,’ ti suh, Thinlung entu chuan a hria a ni lâwm ni? Vêngtu che chuan a hre vek a, Mi tin an thil tihsual ang zêlin a thungrûl ang." 
Proverbs24:13 Ka fapa, khawizu in rawh, a ṭha a ni, A thlâra luang a thlum bîk ang hian," 
Proverbs24:14 I tân finna pawh a thlum ang, Finna nei la, i tân a la ṭha ang, I beisei pawh a thlâwn lo vang." 
Proverbs24:15 Mi sualte angin mi dikte in suam tum suh la, An chênna in tihchhiatsak bawk hek suh." 
Proverbs24:16 Mi dik zawng vawi sarih tlu mah se a tho leh ang, Mi sualte erawh chu thil ṭha lovin a titlu hlen vang vang ang." 
Proverbs24:17 I hmêlmate an tlûkin lâwm suh la, An petekin hlim bawk hek suh," 
Proverbs24:18 Lalpan a hmu hlauh dah ang che a, a lâwm lo vang e, An chunga a thinurna a hnûk kîr ang." 
Proverbs24:19 Mi sualten i rilru tibuai suh se, An sualna chu awt hek suh." 
Proverbs24:20 Mi sualte chuan ṭhat ni an nei lo vang a, An khâwnvâr chu tihmihsak a ni ang." 
Proverbs24:21 Ka fapa, Lalpa ṭih la, lal zah thiam rawh, An laka hel duhte kawp suh," 
Proverbs24:22 An chungah chhiatna a lo thleng thut mai ang, Chhiatna thlen theitu an ni ve ve si a." 
Proverbs24:23 Hêng pawh hi mi fing thu sawi a ni, Rorêlnaa mi zahzâwng neih hi a ṭha lo ve," 
Proverbs24:24 ‘I ti dik e,’ mi sual hnêna titu chu Ânchhia an lawh ang a, mi tinin an hua ang." 
Proverbs24:25 Mi sual kamkhattu chu miin an lâwm ang a, Malsâwmna a dawng ang a, a hming a ṭha bawk ang." 
Proverbs24:26 Thu dik taka min chhâng ṭhîntu chu Ṭhian ṭha a ni. 
Proverbs24:27 Pâwn lama i hna tifelin i lo lam te tifel hmasa la, Tichuan, i in tûr chu sa rawh." 
Proverbs24:28 I ṭhenawmte dâwtin hêk suh la, Ngaih kawih theihin an chungthu sawi hek suh." 
Proverbs24:29 ‘Min tih angin a chungah ka ti ve ang, A sualna chu ka thungrûl dâwn,’ ti bawk hek suh." 
Proverbs24:30 Mi thatchhe lovah ka va kal a, Mi tlawktlaw grep huan chu ka va fang a," 
Proverbs24:31 Ngai teh, hlîng a lo khat vek a, Kângṭhaiin a khuh lûk a, A lung palte a lo chim rem rum mai." 
Proverbs24:32 Chûng chu ka han en chuan ka ngaihtuah a, Zir tûr ka chhar ta a." 
Proverbs24:33 I duh chuan han mu hlek ta che, Han châwl hahdam hlekin Kut hûmin zâl teh rêng:" 
Proverbs24:34 Retheihna chu rûkru angin a lo kal thuai ang a, Pachhiatna chuan sipai angin a rawn nang vat ang che." 
Proverbs25:1 Hêng pawh hi Solomona thufing, Judai ram lal Hezekia hoten an ziak chhâwn a ni." 
Proverbs25:2 Thil thup hi Pathian ropuina a ni a, Thil hmuh chhuah hi lal ropuina a ni." 
Proverbs25:3 Vân sânzia te, tuifinriat thûkzia te angin, Lal rilru pawh hriat chhuah rual a ni lo." 
Proverbs25:4 Tangkaraw êkchhia paih la, Thil chhertuin thil mawi tak a chher thei tawh ang." 
Proverbs25:5 Lal kiang aṭangin mi sual hnawt bo la, A ramah dik taka rorêl a ni ang." 
Proverbs25:6 Lal hmaah intivei suh la, Milian zîngah tel chîng hek suh." 
Proverbs25:7 Aia milian ṭhutna kian tûra tih nih ai chuan, Ṭhutna ṭha zâwka ṭhu tûra sâwm nih a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs25:8 I thil hmuh thubuaiah thlen mai suh, Thu hre chiang zâwkten an rawn sawi leh si chuan, Engtin nge i tih tâk ang?" 
Proverbs25:9 Ṭhenawmte nên inhnial inhnial mah ula, Mi dang thurûk chu puangzâr suh," 
Proverbs25:10 Chutilo chu, a lo hriaten an dem ang che a, I hmingchhiat a reh lo vang." 
Proverbs25:11 A hun taka thu sawi chu, Rangkachak mûm tangkaruaa phûm ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:12 Mi fing zilhna chu ngaithla duhtu tân chuan, Rangkachak ṭha ber zungbun leh ṭhi aiin a ṭha." 
Proverbs25:13 A tîrtu tân palai rinawm tak chu, Ni sen sat laia vûr tui ang hi a ni. A tîrtu chu a tiharh sawng sawng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs25:14 Pêk tiam si-a pe si lotu chu, Ruah pai lo chhûm, thli chhêm lên ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs25:15 Zai dawh taka thlêm heuh heuhvin lalte an tilungawi a, Khauh hle mah se, thu nêmin a hneh thei." 
Proverbs25:16 Khawizu i tawn chuan a tâwk chauh in rawh, Chutilo chu, a ngei ang che a, i luak mai ang." 
Proverbs25:17 Ṭhenawm inah lêng lutuk suh, A ning ang che a, a haw hlauh dah ang che." 
Proverbs25:18 Mahni ṭhenawm dâwta hêktu chu Tuboh leh khandaih ang a ni, thal zum tak nên." 
Proverbs25:19 Mangan nia mi bum chîng chunga innghah chu, Ha nghînga thil ṭhial leh ke na chunga kal ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:20 Mi lungngai bula hla sak chu, Khaw vawh nia kawr hâk phelh leh chingala pem sil ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:21 I hmêlma a rilṭâm chuan ei tûr pe la, A tuihâl chuan in tûr pe rawh." 
Proverbs25:22 Tichuan, sen awp awp khawpin i tizak ang a, Lalpan a rûl ang che." 
Proverbs25:23 Hmâr thliin ruah a rawn thlen ang hian, Inrêl rûk hian thinrim a tichhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs25:24 Nupui phunchiar tak nêna in zau taka awm aiin, In chung zâwl kila awm a ṭha." 
Proverbs25:25 Ram hla tak aṭanga thu lâwmawm hriat chu, Mi chau tân tuisik ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:26 Mi sual hmaa mi dik tlâwm chu, Tuihna nu leh tuikhur bawlhhlawh ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs25:27 Khawizu in tam lutuk a ṭha lo ve, Fak hlawh tum luattuk pawh a ṭha hek lo." 
Proverbs25:28 Mahni inthunun thei lo chu, Khaw kulh bang chim ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs26:1 Nipuia vûr tla leh buh seng laia ruah sûr a inhmeh lo angin, Mi âten chawimawi an inhmeh lo." 
Proverbs26:2 Sava thlâwk leh vamûr lêng lai an fu lo ang hian, A chhan awm lovin ânchhia pawh i dawng lo vang." 
Proverbs26:3 Sakawr chu vuak a ngai a, Sabengtung lakam barh a ngai a, Mi â hnungzâng pawh vuak a ṭûl a ni." 
Proverbs26:4 Zawhna â tak tak i chhân zêl chuan, Nang pawh a zâwttu ang bawka â i ni ang." 
Proverbs26:5 Mi â chu a ât dân ang lekin chhâng la, Chutilo chu, fing hlein a inngai ang." 
Proverbs26:6 Mi â zualkova tîrtu chu, Mahni ke tan ang mai a ni, a tuar ngei ang." 
Proverbs26:7 Mi â tân chuan thufing hi, Ke zeng, thên mai mai ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs26:8 Mi â chawimawi chu a sâwt lo, Sairawkherha saihlum ṭâwn beh ang a ni." 
Proverbs26:9 Mi â tân thufing phuh chhuah chu, Zu ruiin a kuta hlîng khei a tum ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs26:10 Mi â veivâk nazawng leh zu rui ruaitu chu, A hmuh apiang thala kâp hliamtu ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs26:11 Mi â-in thil â tak a tih nawn chuan, Ui-in a luak a ei leh ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs26:12 Fing si lova fing hlea inhria ai chuan, Mi â tak chan a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs26:13 Thatchhia chuan, ‘Kawngah sakei a awm, Tualah sakeibaknei a awm,’ tiin a pâwnchhuak ngam lo." 
Proverbs26:14 Kawngkhâr kawpzaa a her ang hian, Thatchhia chu khumah a her vêl ṭhîn." 
Proverbs26:15 Thatchhia chuan chawthlêng a zen a, A bâr leh peih si lo." 
Proverbs26:16 Thil chhût thiam mi pasarih aiin thatchhia chuan fingin a inhre ṭhîn. 
Proverbs26:17 Tel ve lohna tûra lo inrawlh chu, Ui tual lêng benga man tum ang a ni." 
Proverbs26:18 Mi â-in meichher te, thal te, hriam te A khawih a khawih chuan thih theihna mai a ni." 
Proverbs26:19 Mahni ṭhenawmte buma, ‘Ka fiamthu a nih kha,’ titu ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs26:20 Thing a awm loh chuan mei a thi a, Se se-a thu lâk chîng an awm loh chuan buaina a reh." 
Proverbs26:21 Meihawl a tam leh a ling a nasa a, Thing a tam leh a alh ṭha ṭhîn, Mi phunchiar tamnaah buaina a punlun ṭhîn." 
Proverbs26:22 Mi rêl hi thil tuihnai tak ang hi a ni, Tui kan va ti ṭhîn em!" 
Proverbs26:23 Kam ṭha êm êm thinlung sual si chu, Hlumbêl an hnawih tlêt ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs26:24 Mi vervêkin a huatzâwng chu, Ṭawng ṭhain a khuh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs26:25 A ṭawngkam a tihthlum hle chuan ring suh, A thinlungah tenawm pasarih a awm a ni." 
Proverbs26:26 A rilru chhia chu thup mawi mah se, A sualzia chu pung khâwm zîngah a la lang ang." 
Proverbs26:27 A hum laihah chuan amah a tla ang a, A lung lum chuan amah a la delh ang." 
Proverbs26:28 Mi dawthei chuan a bumte a lo haw hle ṭhîn a ni, Fak der chîng chuan chhiatna a thlen." 
Proverbs27:1 Naktûka i awm dân tûr uanpui lâwk suh, Eng nge lo thleng dâwn i hre si lo." 
Proverbs27:2 Mi dangin fak che rawh se, Nangmah zawng infak suh." 
Proverbs27:3 Lung leh ṭiauvut hi a rit hle a, Mi â thinur chu a tawrhhlelhawm zâwk." 
Proverbs27:4 Thinurna tuar hi a hrehawmin a rit a, Îtsîkna erawh hi chu tu nge tuar zo vang?" 
Proverbs27:5 A langa inzilhhau hi A rûka hmangaih ai chuan a ṭha zâwk. 
Proverbs27:6 Hmangaihtu ben chu ṭhatna tûr a ni a, Hmêlmaten min lawm hûrh chuan fîmkhur a ṭha." 
Proverbs27:7 Puar hle lai chuan khawizu pawhin min ngei a, Rilṭâm tân chuan thil kha tak pawh a thlum." 
Proverbs27:8 Mahni bu awplum lo sava leh Mahni in leh lo ngaihsak lo chu an inang. 
Proverbs27:9 Hriak leh têl rimtuiin mi a tilâwm a, Ṭhian ṭha thurâwn fing pawh a lâwmawm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs27:10 I pa ṭhian leh nangma ṭhian chu thlauhthla suh, Buaina a lo thlenin unaute kher pan suh, Unau hla taka awm aiin ṭhenawm hnai an ṭangkai zâwk." 
Proverbs27:11 Ka fapa, fing la, kei ka lâwm ang, Min deutute ka chhâng let ve thei dâwn nia." 
Proverbs27:12 Mi fing chuan hlauhawm a hmu lâwk a, Mi â erawh chuan a tâwn mai a, a tuar phah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs27:13 Hmêlhriat loh ba rulhsak tiamtu kawr chu, Dahkham atân lâksak mai rawh." 
Proverbs27:14 Zîng taka mi kaithova, Ring taka chibai bûk chîng chu, Ânchhia anga ngaih a ni ang." 
Proverbs27:15 Nupui âncheh tak chu, Khawchhiat ni-a in far reng ang hi a ni a," 
Proverbs27:16 Tihreh tum chu thli tleh lo dan tum leh Sahriak hûm tum ang hi a ni. 
Proverbs27:17 Thîrin thîr a tihriam a, Mihring pawhin mi dang hnên aṭangin a zir ṭhîn." 
Proverbs27:18 Theipui kûng chu enkawl ṭha la, a rah i ei ang, Chhiahhlawh, a pu thu awih chu, chawimawi a ni ang." 
Proverbs27:19 Tuiah thla kan hmu ṭhîn angin, Mihring thinlung pawh a nunah a lang." 
Proverbs27:20 Seol leh Abadon chuan tâwk tih lêm an nei lo angin, Mihring mit pawhin tâwk tih a nei lo." 
Proverbs27:21 Thukah tangka leh rangkachak an rawh thianghlim angin, Mihring hmingṭhatna pawh fiah a ngai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs27:22 Mi â âtna chu sumah buh nên dêng nek mah la, A âtna chu a kiang chuang lo vang." 
Proverbs27:23 I berâm rual chu fîmkhur takin enkawl la, I ran rual chu ngaihven ṭha rawh." 
Proverbs27:24 Hausakna hian a daih kumkhua lo va, Lalna pawh hian chhuan tam a daih lo asin." 
Proverbs27:25 Buhpâwl ât la, a chawr leh hma ang a, Tlâng hnimte zai bawk ang che." 
Proverbs27:26 Tichuan, i berâm hmulte i sin ang a, I kêl man chuan ramte i lei thei ang." 
Proverbs27:27 I kêl hnutete chu a tam ang a, i tlân ang a, I chhûngte leh i awmpui nulate ei khawp a tling bawk ang." 
Proverbs28:1 Mi sual chu ûm lohvin a tlânchhia a, Mi dikte erawh chu sakeibaknei angin an ngam." 
Proverbs28:2 Ramin thil a tihsual chuan hruaitu an inthlâk zut a, Hruaitu fing leh remhriate avângin hnam a ding chhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs28:3 Lal sual, rethei tiduhdahtu chu, Ruahpuivânâwn, buh nan chhetu ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs28:4 Dân pawisa lotu chuan mi sual a ṭan a, Pawisatu erawh chuan a kalh a ni." 
Proverbs28:5 Mi sual chuan dik taka rêl dân a hre lo va, Lalpa zawngte erawh chuan engkim an thliar thiam ṭhîn." 
Proverbs28:6 Rethei mah ila ngîl taka nun hi, Hausa hlea kawi taka nun ai chuan a ṭha." 
Proverbs28:7 Fapa fing chuan Dân a zâwm a, Mi vîr kâwmtu chuan a pa a tizak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs28:8 A pung ûma hlêp ṭeuh ṭeuhva intihausate chuan, Rethei khawngaih ṭhîntute tân an khâwlsak mai a ni." 
Proverbs28:9 Dân thu ngaithla duh lotu chu, A ṭawngṭaina pawh tenawm a ni." 
Proverbs28:10 Mi ngîl thil sual tihtîrtu chu, Ama hum laihah chuan a tla ang a, Mi ṭha erawh chuan thil ṭha a dawng ngei ang." 
Proverbs28:11 Mi hausa chuan fing a inti hle a, Rethei fing chuan a hmu tlang ṭhîn." 
Proverbs28:12 Mi dik an lal chuan mi an hlim êm êm ṭhîn a, Mi sual an lal chuan an bibo dial ṭhîn." 
Proverbs28:13 A bawhchhiatna zêptu chu a hmuingîl lo vang a, Inpuanga sim erawh chuan zahngaihna a hmu ang." 
Proverbs28:14 Lalpa ṭih fotu chu a nihlawh e, Mi luhlul erawh chu a vânduai ang." 
Proverbs28:15 Rorêltu sual chu mi rethei tân, Sakeibaknei rûm leh savawm vâk ruai ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs28:16 Hruaitu hriatna tlachham chu a râwng hle ṭhîn, Duhâmna hawtu chu a dam rei ang." 
Proverbs28:17 Tualthattu chu a tualtlân vat ṭhîn, Tu man lo hum suh se." 
Proverbs28:18 Mi rinawm chu a him ang a, Mi rinawm lo chu a tluchhe thuai ang." 
Proverbs28:19 Mahni lo thlo taima chuan buh a ngah ang a, Awm mai mai chu an pachhe ngei ngei ang." 
Proverbs28:20 Mi rinawmte chuan malsâwmna an dawng ṭeuh vang a, Hausak thut tumte erawh chuan an tuar ngei ang." 
Proverbs28:21 Duhsak bîk neih hi a dik lo va, Mahse, thamna chhetê vânga thil dik lo tih duh an awm." 
Proverbs28:22 Mi huamhap chuan hausak thuai an tum ṭhîn a, Tlâkchham hun tûr a awm thei tih an dâwn pha lo." 
Proverbs28:23 Mi fak der ai chuan zilh la, A la lâwm zâwk ang." 
Proverbs28:24 Nu leh pate thil rûksaka, pawiti si lo chu, Suamhmang ṭhian a ni." 
Proverbs28:25 Mi duhâm chuan innghirnghona a tichhuak a, Lalpa ringtu chu a hmuingîl ṭhîn." 
Proverbs28:26 Mahni inrin viau hi a âtthlâk hle, Mi fing thu zâwmtu erawh chu a him ang." 
Proverbs28:27 Rethei ṭanpui la, tlâkchham i nei ngai lo vang, Pachhia maimitchhînsantu chu ânchhia an lawh huai huai ang." 
Proverbs28:28 Mi sual an dinchan chuan mi an ṭi dêk a, An chhiat erawh chuan mi dik chan a ṭha ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:1 Zilh fo tawh pawha luhlullui zêl chu, Dan rual lohva tihchhiat rup a ni ang." 
Proverbs29:2 Mi dik an lalin mi an hlim a, Mi sualin ro an rêlin mi an rûm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:3 Finna ngaina chuan an pate an tilâwm a, Nawhchizuar kawptu chu an intlakral ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:4 Dik taka lalin ro a rêl chuan ram a ding chhuak a, Thamna ngawt a ngaihtuah chuan ram chu a tluchhe ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:5 Ṭhenawm fak der chîng chuan, Mahni awhna tûr thang a kam a ni." 
Proverbs29:6 Mi sual chu a sualnain a âwk ṭhîn a, Mi dik erawh chu hlim takin a zai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:7 Mi dik chuan rethei ngaihsak nachâng a hria a, Mi sual erawh chuan a hre ve lo."
