Jeremiah20:4 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai teh, i tân leh i ṭhiante zawng zawng tân hlauhawmah ka siam ang che. I mit hmuhah anni chu i hmêlmaten khandaihin an that ang a, Juda mi zawng zawng Babulon lal kutah ka pe ang. Ani chuan Babulon-ah salah a hruai ang a, khandaihin a that ang." 
Jeremiah20:5 Tin, he khawpui hausakna zawng zawng te, a deh chhuah ro hlu zawng zawng te, Juda lal sum leh pai zawng zawngte pawh an hmêlmate kutah ka hlân ang. Anni chuan an rawk ang a, an lâksak ang a, Babulon-ah an phur hâwng ang.’" 
Jeremiah20:6 Nang pawh, Pasur, i ina awm zawng zawng nên salah an man ang che a, Babulon-ah i kal ve ang. Chutah chuan i thi ang a, an phûm ang che; nang leh i ṭhian dâwt thu i lo hrilhte nên khân,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah20:7 Aw Lalpa, nangin min bum a, bum ka nih tâk hi, Nang chu kei aiin i chak a, min titlâwm ta, Nilêngin min deusawh a, mi tin nuihzatbûr ka ni." 
Jeremiah20:8 Thu ka sawi apiangin Inpâwngnêkna leh intihchhiatna nasatzia ka aupui ṭhîn, Lalpa thu ka hnêna lo thleng avâng chuan Nilênga hmuhsit ka ni ta." 
Jeremiah20:9 ‘Ani chu ka hre reng lo vang a, A hmingin thu ka sawi tawh hek lo vang,’ ka tih pawhin Ruh chhûnga mei sa awm ang maiin Ka thinlungah mi tûr ut ut a. Ka pai hle hle thei ngang lo va ni." 
Jeremiah20:10 Mi tam tak phun ru ka hria, Kil tinah hlauhawmin min hual, ‘Hêk rawh u, keini pawhin kan hêk ang,’ an ti. Ka ṭhenrual zawng zawng, ka tlûk hun châng rengte chuan ‘Thlêm thlûk a nih hunah kan ngam ang a, A chungah phuba kan la ang,’ an ti." 
Jeremiah20:11 Mahse, Lalpa, mi chak, mi huaisen chu ka hnênah a awm a. Mi tiduhdahtute chu an tlu ang a, min hneh lo vang; An mualpho hle dâwn, an hlawhtling dâwn si lo, An hmingchhiatna chu kumkhuain theihnghilh a ni lo vang." 
Jeremiah20:12 Rilru leh thinlung hmu vektu, An chunga i phuba lâk lai mi hmuhtîr la, Kei erawh chu i kutah ka inkawltîr tawh si." 
Jeremiah20:13 Lalpa fak ula, Lalpa chu chawimawi rawh u, Mi sualte kut ata chanhaite a chhanhim si a." 
Jeremiah20:14 Ka pian ni chu ânchhedawngin awm se, Ka nuin min hrin ni chu chawimawi ni suh se." 
Jeremiah20:15 Ka pa hnêna, ‘Fapa i nei ta,’ tih thu hrilha, Tilâwmtu pawh chu ânchhedawngin awm rawh se." 
Jeremiah20:16 Lainat hauh lova Lalpan khawpui a tihchhiat angin Chu mi chu awm sela, Zîngah ṭap thâwm, chhûnah râlkhêl thâwm hre rawh se." 
Jeremiah20:17 Chhûlah khân min lo tihlum se, Ka nu chhûl chu ka thlan a ni mai tûr, A chhûlah chuan ka awm reng mai ang." 
Jeremiah20:18 Engah kher nge chhûl ata ka lo chhuah, Thawkrim leh lungngaia awm mai tûr leh Mualpho rêng rênga ka dam chhûng hmang ral tûr hian?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Lal Zedekian Malkia fapa Pasura leh Maaseia fapa puithiam Zefania te chu Jeremia hnênah a kaltîr a, chutih laia Lalpa thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah21:2 “ Lalpa chu thu min zawhsak teh, Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chuan min bei ta si a. Lalpa chuan kan tân thil mak tiin a hnawtkîr dâwn em?” an va ti a." 
Jeremiah21:3 Jeremia chuan an hnênah, “Zedekia chu heti hian va hrilh rawh u." 
Jeremiah21:4 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai teh, Babulon lal leh in kulh hualtu Kaldai-ho i dona hriamhrei hman lai chu ka chelhbehsak ang che a. Khawpui chhûngah chuan hmêlmate ka hruai lût ang." 
Jeremiah21:5 Keimah ngeiin ka bân chak tak pharin thinrim tâwpkhâwk leh diriam tak chungin ka bei ang che u. 
Jeremiah21:6 He khawpuia chêng, mihring leh ran zawng zawng ka nghaisa ang a, hripuiin an thi ang." 
Jeremiah21:7 Chumi hnuah chuan, he khawpuia chêng Juda lal Zedekia leh a chhiahhlawhte hripui leh khandaihte leh ṭâm tuartea thi bâng zawng zawng chu Babulon lal Nabukadnezara kutah te, anmahni thah tumtu, an hmêlmate kutahte ka pe ang. Anni chuan khandaih hriamin an that ang a, an khawngaih lo vang a, an lainat hek lo vang,’ Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah21:8 “Hêng mite hnênah heti hian va sawi rawh: Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai teh u, thihna kawng emaw, nunna kawng emaw, in duh zâwk thlan tûr ka siam a che u." 
Jeremiah21:9 He khawpuia awm reng duh chu ṭâm te, khandaih te, hripui te tuarin an thi ang. Amaherawhchu, kal chhuaka, nangmahni hualtu Kaldai-ho hnêna inpete chu râlin an man ang; mahse, an nun chu a him ang." 
Jeremiah21:10 He khawpui hi a ṭhat nân ni lovin a chhiat nân ka hawisan tawh,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Babulon lal kutah ka pe ang a, anin meiin a hâl chhe vek ang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah21:11 “Juda lal chhûngte chuan hei hi hre rawh se; 
Jeremiah21:12 Davida chhûngte u, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Tûk tin dik takin ro rêl ula, Rawk tuar chu a tiduhdahtu kut ata chhan rawh u; Chutilo zawng, in thil sual tihte avângin Ka thinrim mei angin a alh dah ang e, Tu ma tihmih theih a ni lo vang." 
Jeremiah21:13 Nangni tlângchhîp zâwl, lungpui chunga chêngte u, ‘Tu nge min bei tûr lo kal anga, Kulh chhûngah lo lût ang?’ tite u, Ka ngei hle che u a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah21:14 “In thil tih ang zêlin ka hrem ang che u,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “An ram ngaw chu ka hâl ang a, A chhehvêl ram zawng zawng a kâng chhia ang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah22:1 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Juda lal inah zu kal la; tah chuan he thu hi sawi ang che. 
Jeremiah22:2 ‘Aw nang, Juda lal, Davida ṭhutthlêng luahtu, i ṭhuihruai, he kawngkhâra lût ṭhînte leh i mite nên Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Jeremiah22:3 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Dik tak leh fel takin ro rêl ula, rawk tuarte chu tiduhdahtu kut ata chhan rawh u. Mikhual te, fahrah te, hmeithai te chungah dik lo taka tiin tharum thawh suh u, he hmunah hian pawi sawi lo thisen in chhuah tûr a ni lo." 
Jeremiah22:4 Hêng thute hi ṭha taka in zawm chuan Davida lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu lalte chu an chhiahhlawhte leh an mite nên sakawr-tawlailîrah te, sakawr chungahte chuangin he in kawngkhârah hian an vei tlang ang." 
Jeremiah22:5 Amaherawhchu, hêng thute hi in zawm loh chuan he in hi a ram vek ang, tiin mahni hming chhâlin ka tiam a ni,’ ” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah22:6 Lalpa chuan Juda lal chhûngkaw chungchâng heti hian a sawi: “Nang chu ka tân Gilead ang, Lebanon tlângchhîp ang i ni; Mahse, thlalêrah ka siam ang che a; Luahtu awm lo khawpui ram ang mai i ni ang." 
Jeremiah22:7 Nangmah tichhetu tûr hriamhrei keng ka rawn tîr ang, I sidar thing chhuante an kit ang a, Meiah an paih lût ang." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Hnam dang miten he khawpui hi an paltlang ang a, ‘Engati nge he khawpui ropui tak chungah he thil hi Lalpa chuan a tih le?’ an ti ang a." 
Jeremiah22:9 ‘ Lalpa, an Pathian thuthlung an hawisan a, pathian dangte biain an rawng an bâwl vang a ni,’ tiin an chhâng ang.”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Thi ta chu ṭah suh ula, sûn hek suh u, Kal bo ta tân erawh chuan lungchhe takin ṭap ula, a lo kîr leh dâwn tawh lo. A pianna ram a hmu leh dâwn tawh si lo." 
Jeremiah22:11 Juda lal, Saluma, a pa Josia aiawha rorêltu, he hmun ata kal bo ta chungchâng thu chu Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “A lo kîr leh tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah22:12 Sala an hruaina hmunah a thi ang a, he ram hi a hmu leh tawh lo vang,” tiin." 
Jeremiah22:13 Dik lo taka thil tia in satu, Thil ṭha lo tia in chhâwng siamtu, Mite chhawra, an thawhhlawh pe duh lotu chu A chung a pik e." 
Jeremiah22:14 ‘In ropui tak, chhâwng zau tak nei ka tân ka sa ang a, Tukverh zau tak tak ka hawng ang a, Sidar thingin ka thuah chhuak ang a, Rawng sen ka hnawih vek ang,’ a ti a." 
Jeremiah22:15 Sidar thinga in i sak theih avângin Lal ṭha zâwk i ni em ni? Sidar thing i ngah avâng khân Lal ta viauvah i inngai maw? I pa kha chuan dik tak leh fel takin thil a ti a, A duh tinrêng a eiin a in a, Tichuan, a lo hmuingîl ta hle a ni lâwm ni?" 
Jeremiah22:16 Rethei leh chanhaite a ngaihsak a; Tichuan, a lo hmuingîl ta a ni. Chutiang chu nang pawhin min hriat dân tûr a ni lâwm ni? Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah22:17 Mahse, dik lo taka hlêp tumin i mit i lên a, Pawi sawi lote thisen i chhuah a, Mi dang i hnehchhiah a, thil i phût ṭeuh ṭeuh va." 
Jeremiah22:18 Chuvângin, Juda lal, Josia fapa, Jehoiakima chungthua Lalpa thu chhuak chu hei hi a ni. ‘Aw ka pu, aw ka nuṭapa,’ tiin ani chu an ṭah lo vang. ‘Aw ka pu, chhuanawm ber,’ an ti hek lo vang." 
Jeremiah22:19 An hnûk ang a, Jerusalem kulh pâwnah an theh chhuak ang a, sabengtung ang lekin an phûm ang." 
Jeremiah22:20 Lebanon-ah chho la, Basan-ah hriat khawpin au chiam rawh, Abarim aṭangin ṭap chiam rawh, Lainattu che an chhe ta si a." 
Jeremiah22:21 I hmuingîl laiin i hnênah thu ka sawi a, Mahse, ‘Ka ngaithla lo vang,’ i ti a. Hei hi i tleirâwl lai ata i awm dân a ni, Ka thu i awih loh hi." 
Jeremiah22:22 In hotute thliin a lên bo vang a, lainattu che pawh salah an tâng ang a, I sualna avângin mualpho leh mangang takin i awm ang." 
Jeremiah22:23 Nang, Lebanon-a chêng, sidar ina khawsa, Nauvei nâ ang natna i chunga a lo thlen hun chuan I va rûm nasa dâwn êm!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Lalpa thuchhuak chuan heti hian a ti: “Mi nung ka nih hi. Nang Juda lal Konia, Jehoiakima fapa, lal atân ka kut ding lamin lo chhinchhiah tawh che mah ila, chuta ta chu ka pawt chhuak ang che." 
Jeremiah22:25 Nangmah thah tumtu, i hlauh êm êm Babulon lal Nebukadnezara kutah leh Kaldai-ho kutah ka pe ang che." 
Jeremiah22:26 Hringtu che i nu nên i pianna ram ni lo, ram dangah ka theh chhuak ang che u; tah chuan in pahnihin in thi ang." 
Jeremiah22:27 Kîr leh an châkna ramah chuan an kîr leh tawh lo vang.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Kei chuan, “He Konia hi bêl keh, hmusitawm tak a ni lo vem ni? Tu man an ngaihsak loh hi. Engati nge amah leh a fate an paih chhuaha, An hriat loh rama theh chhuah an nih le?” ka ti a." 
Jeremiah22:29 Aw ram, aw ram, aw ram, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh." 
Jeremiah22:30 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “ ‘He mi hi fa nei lo tûr, dam chhûnga hlawhtling lo tûr a ni. A thlahte tu mah an hmuingîl lo vang a, Davida lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr leh Judai rama rorêltu tûr an awm leh tawh lo vang,’ tiin ziak rawh,” min ti a." 
Jeremiah23:1 “Ka ran tlatna hmuna berâmte tidarha tiboraltu berâmpute chung chu a pik e,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:2 Chuvângin, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan ka mite enkawltu, berâmpute chungthu chu hetiangin a sawi: “Ka ran rual in ngaihsak lo va, in tidarh a, in ûm bo zo ta. Ngai teh u, in thil sual tih avâng hian ka hrem dâwn che u a ni!” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:3 “Ka ran rual la dam chhunte chu ka hnawh darhna ram tin aṭangin keiin ka hruai khâwm ang a, an huangah ka khalh khâwm ang a, fa an ngah ang a, an chak hle ang." 
Jeremiah23:4 Anmahni enkawltu tûr berâmpu ka dah ang a, hlau leh mangangin an awm tawh lo vang a, pakhat mah an bo tawh lo vang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:5 “Ngai teh, nite a lo thleng mêk e,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Davida thlah aṭangin lal dik tak a lo chawr chhuak ang a, Chu lal chuan fing takin ro a rêl ang. Ram pumah dik tak leh fel takin thil a ti ang." 
Jeremiah23:6 A lal chhûng chuan Juda chu a him ang a, Israel pawh thlamuang takin a awm ang. A hmingah, ‘ Lalpa, kan dikna’ tih a ni ang." 
Jeremiah23:7 “Tichuan, ngai teh, nite a lo thleng mêk e,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Mite chuan, ‘Aigupta ram ata Israel fate hruaichhuaktu Lalpa chu a nung alâwm,’ an ti tawh lo vang a," 
Jeremiah23:8 ‘Israela thlahte hmâr lam ram ata leh a ûm darhna ram tin aṭanga hruai chhuaka hruai hâwngtu Lalpa chu a nung alâwm,’ an ti tawh zâwk ang. Tin, anmahni ram ngeiah an chêng ang." 
Jeremiah23:9 Zâwlneiho chung thu chu: Ka rilru a va na êm; Tirilah ka khûr, Lalpa leh a thu thianghlim avâng hian Zu rui ang mai ka ni, rui hnêp ang mai hi." 
Jeremiah23:10 Ram chu uirenain a khat a, Ânchhia avângin a ngui zo ta. Kawng dik lo an zawh a, Dik lo takin an thiltihtheihna an hmang." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Zâwlneite leh puithiamte chuan serh leh sâng an nei lo va, Ka in chhûngah ngei pawh an sualna ka hmu,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:12 “Chuvângin, an kawng chu zân thim kawng nâl ang a ni ang a, Tah chuan an tlânchhia ang a, an tlu ang a. Anmahni ka tlawh hunah An chhûngah thil ṭha lo ka thlentîr ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:13 Samari khaw zâwlneite zîngah thil tenawm tak ka hmu, Baal hmingin thu an puang a, Ka mi Israel-te an hruai bo ta." 
Jeremiah23:14 Jerusalem-a zâwlneite zîngah pawh thil râpthlâk tak ka hmu, An uire a, dâwt an sawi a, thil sual titute an thlâwp a, Tu man an sual sim an tum loh phah a, A chhûnga chêngte chu ka tân Sodom khua leh Gomora khaw mite ang maia sual an ni." 
Jeremiah23:15 Chuvângin, zâwlneite chungchângah Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, anni chu thil kha ka eitîr ang a, Tui kha ka intîr bawk ang. Jerusalem-a zâwlneite avângin ram pumah serh leh sâng pawisak lohna a punlun ta si a.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Lalpa Engkimtitheia chuan heti hian a ti: “In hnêna thupuangtu zâwlneite thu chu ngaithla suh u. Engmahlo mai mai an hrilh che u a, Lalpa thu sawi ni lo, an thu phuahchawp an sawi ṭhîn." 
Jeremiah23:17 Lalpa thu ngainêptute hnênah chuan, ‘In ti ṭha e,’ an ti châmchi a; mahni thuduhte hnênah pawh ‘In chungah thil ṭha lo a thleng chuang lo vang,’ an ti.”" 
Jeremiah23:18 Lalpa remruatnaah tute nge tela, A thu hre tûra ngaithla le? Tu nge a thu hriatthiam tuma ngaichâng?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Ngai teh, Lalpa thinur thli chu a tleh dâwn, Thli na tak chuan mi sualte lu chu a nuai ang." 
Jeremiah23:20 Lalpa thinur chu a reh dâwn lo, A thiltumte a hlena a tih zawh hma chu, Nakin hnuah hei hi in la hria ang." 
Jeremiah23:21 “Ka tirh ni lo zâwlneite chu an vâk vêl a, Eng mah ka hrilh lo va, ka hrilh ni âwm takin an puang si a." 
Jeremiah23:22 Ka remruatnaah tel ve ni sela, Ka mite hnênah ka thu an puang tûr; Tichuan, an awm dân sualte an bânsan ang a, An thil tihsualte an sim ngei ang." 
Jeremiah23:23 Hla taka awm Pathian ni lovin hnai têa awm Pathian ka ni lâwm ni?” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. 
Jeremiah23:24 “Ka hmuh loh tûra hmun rilah tu nge biru thei?” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Lei leh vân ka awh khat lo vem ni?” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. 
Jeremiah23:25 “Ka hming chhâla dâwt sawi zâwlneite chuan, ‘Mumangah kan mang a, mumangah min hrilh a ni,’ an tih chu ka hria." 
Jeremiah23:26 Hêng zâwlnei dawthei, mahni phuahchawpa mi bum ṭhînte hian eng chen nge an bum zêl dâwn?" 
Jeremiah23:27 An paten Baal an bia a, ka hming an theihnghilh ta ang khân, ka hming an theihnghilh thei mahna tiin mite chu an mumangte an hrilh ṭhîn." 
Jeremiah23:28 Mang nei zâwlnei chuan a mumang a ni tih sawi sela, chutiang bawkin ka thuchah dawngtu pawhin dik takin sawi rawh se. Buhpâwl leh buhfang an inang em ni?” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:29 “Ka thu chu mei ang a ni a, lung chhutkehna tuboh ang hi a ni lo vem ni?” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:30 “Chuvângin, ngai teh, zâwlnei, ka thu anga an ṭhiante thu sawi chhâwngte chu ka hua a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:31 “Ngai teh, zâwlnei, mahni phuahchawp sawia, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti’ titute chu ka hua a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:32 “Ngai teh, an mumang, dâwt thu puangtu chu ka hua a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Eng mah pawisa lovin dâwt an sawi an sawi a, ka mite an hruai bo ta. Anni chu ka tirh an ni lo va, ka ruat an ni hek lo. Hêng mite tân hian ṭangkaina rêng rêng an nei lo,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Hêng mite hian emaw, zâwlneiin emaw, puithiamin emaw, ‘ Lalpa phurrit chu eng nge ni?’ tia an zawh che chuan, ‘Nangni hi phurrit chu in ni, ka paih bo dâwn che u,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni, tiin hrilh rawh," 
Jeremiah23:34 Zâwlnei emaw, puithiam emaw, tu pawhin, ‘Hei hi Lalpa phurrit a ni,’ an tih chuan chu mi leh a chhûngte chu ka hrem ang." 
Jeremiah23:35 Mi tinin mahni ṭhenawmte leh unaute hnênah, ‘ Lalpa chuan eng nge a hrilh che? Lalpa chuan eng nge a lo sawi?’ tiin an zâwt ang." 
Jeremiah23:36 ‘ Lalpa phurrit chu,’ in ti tûr a ni lo, in tih chuan ka thu chu in tân phurrit a ni takmeuh vang. Pathian nung, Engkim Lalpa, kan Pathian thu chu in kailek zo ta si a." 
Jeremiah23:37 Zâwlnei hnênah chuan, ‘Eng nge Lalpa chuan a hrilh che? Lalpa chuan eng nge a sawi?’ ti ang che." 
Jeremiah23:38 ‘Hei hi Lalpa phurrit chu a ni,’ in tih chuan hetiangin Lalpa chuan a ti, ‘Hei hi Lalpa phurrit chu a ni, ti lo tûra ka hrilh che u pawhin, hei hi Lalpa phurrit chu a ni,’ in la tih cheu avângin" 
Jeremiah23:39 ngai teh u, ka pawt chhuak ang che u a, ka hnên ata ka paih chhuak dâwn che u a ni, he khawpui, in pate leh in tâna ka lo pêk tawh nên hian." 
Jeremiah23:40 Tichuan, kumkhuaa zahna leh mualphona, theihnghilh rual loh in chungah ka thlentîr ang.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Juda lal Jehoiakima fapa Jekonia leh Juda hotute, mi themthiamte, thîrdêngte Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran Jerusalem aṭanga Babulon-a sala a hruai hnu khân Lalpa chuan theipui bâwm pahnih, Lalpa in kawta inhûng chu mi entîr a." 
Jeremiah24:2 Bâwm pakhatah chuan theipui hmin ṭha tak tak, a rah hmasa chi ang hi a awm a, pakhat zâwkah chuan theipui rah chhe tak, ei tlâk loh khawpa chhia a awm bawk a." 
Jeremiah24:3 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, “Jeremia, eng nge i hmuh?” a ti a. Kei chuan, “Theipui rah ka hmu, a ṭhate chu an ṭha hle a, a chhiate erawh chu chhe tak, ei tlâk loh khawpa chhia an ni,” ka ti a." 
Jeremiah24:4 Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a. 
Jeremiah24:5 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Juda saltâng, Kaldai rama ka tirhte chu hêng theipui rah ṭha ang hi an ni." 
Jeremiah24:6 An tâna ṭha tûrin an chungah ka mit a fu ang a, he ramah hian ka hruai kîr leh ang. Anni chu ka tungding ang a, ka ṭhiat tawh lo vang. Ka phun ang a, ka pawt tawh hek lo vang." 
Jeremiah24:7 Lalpa ka ni tih an hriat theihna tûr thinlung ka pe ang. Ka mite an ni ang a, kei an Pathian ka ni ang, an thinlung zawng zawng nên ka hnênah an lo kîr dâwn si a.”" 
Jeremiah24:8 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Juda lal Zedekia te, a upa te, Jerusalem-a awm te, he rama la chêngte leh Aigupta rama awmte chu theipui rah ei tlâk loh khawpa chhia ang hi an ni ang." 
Jeremiah24:9 Anni chu ram tina lalte tân ṭihkhaiah ka siam ang. Ka hnawhdarhna hmuna mite chuan hmusitin an nuihzat ang a, deusawh takin hmun tinah an hming chu ânchhe inlawh nân an hmang ang." 
Jeremiah24:10 An pate leh an hnêna ka pêk ramah chuan an boral vek hma chu an chungah khandaih te, ṭâm te, hri te ka lêntîr ang.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Juda lal Jehoiakima, Josia fapa a lal kum linaa Juda mi zawng zawng chungchâng thu-a Jeremia hnêna thu lo thleng chu: he hun hi Babulon lal Nebukadnezara lal kum khatna a ni." 
Jeremiah25:2 Zâwlnei Jeremia chuan Juda mi zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a awm zawng zawng hnênah heti hian a ti: 
Jeremiah25:3 “Kum sawmhnih leh pathum chhûng, Amona fapa Josia, Judai rama a lal kum sâwm leh pathumna aṭanga vawiin thlengin Lalpa thu ka hnêna lo thleng ṭhîn chu zîng taka thovin ka hrilh ka hrilh che u a; mahse, in ngaithla duh si lo." 
Jeremiah25:4 Lalpa chuan a rawngbâwltu zâwlneite chu zîng tak takah a tîr fo va, in pawisa lo va, hriat tumin in beng in dawh hek lo." 
Jeremiah25:5 Mi tinin in awm dân sual te, in thil chin ṭha lote bânsan ula; tichuan, in pate leh in hnêna Lalpa pêk ramah hian kumkhuain in awm thei ang." 
Jeremiah25:6 Pathian dangte rawngbâwl tûr leh chibai bûk tûrin kal suh u. In kuta in thil siam chuan min tithinur lo ula; tichuan, ka hrem lo vang che u, tiin." 
Jeremiah25:7 Mahse, mi ngaithla lo va, in kuta in thil siamte chuan min tithinur a, nangmahni in intichhe ta zâwk a ni, tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah25:8 Tichuan, Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ka thu in ngaihthlâk duh loh avângin" 
Jeremiah25:9 hmâr lama hnamte chu ka ko dâwn,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Babulon lal Nebukadnezara, ka chhiahhlawh chu, he rama chêngte leh a chhehvêl rama awm zawng zawng bei tûrin ka rawn hruai ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Anni chu ka tichhe vek ang a, miin mak an ti ang a, râpthlâk an ti hle ang, an chhe hlen hlauh dâwn a ni." 
Jeremiah25:10 An hlim thâwm te, an lâm ri te, moneitu aw leh mo aw te, buh dêng thâwm te, khâwnvâr êngte ka titâwp ang." 
Jeremiah25:11 He ram hi a pumin a ram ang a, a chhe vek ang a; hêng hnamte hian kum sawmsarih chhûng Babulon lal rawng an bâwl ang." 
Jeremiah25:12 “Kum sawmsarih hu a ral hnuah Babulon lal chu a mite nên an sual avângin ka hrem ang a, Kaldai ram chu ka tichhe hlen ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah25:13 “Anmahni dema thu ka sawi zawng zawng, he lehkhabua chuang zawng zawng, Jeremian hnam zawng zawng kalha thu a lo puan tawhte chu he ram chungah hian ka thlentîr ang." 
Jeremiah25:14 Hnam tam tak leh ram ropui tak takte chuan anni chu salah an siam ang a, an thil lo tih tawh leh an kut hnathawh ang zêlin ka thungrûl ang.”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan ka hnênah heti hian a ti: “He uain no, ka thinurnaa khat hi, ka kut ata la la, ka tirhna che hnam zawng zawng intîr ang che." 
Jeremiah25:16 An in ang a, an pai an pai ang a, an â zo vang; an hnênah khandaih ka lêntîr dâwn avângin,” tiin." 
Jeremiah25:17 Tichuan, Lalpa kuta no chu ka la a, Lalpa mi tirhna hnam zawng zawng chu ka intîr a." 
Jeremiah25:18 Tûna a awm ang hian Jerusalem leh Judai ram khawpuite chu a ram vek ang a, an lalte leh hruaitute chu hmuhsit leh nuihzat an ni ang a, ânchhia an dawng ang." 
Jeremiah25:19 Aigupta lal Farawa leh a chhiahhlawh te, a rorêltute leh a mi zawng zawngte leh hnam dang awmte;" 
Jeremiah25:20 Uz rama lal zawng zawng te, Filistia rama lal, Askelon lal te, Gaza lal te, Ekron-a lal te leh Asdod-a hnutchhiaha awm lal te;" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom mi te, Moab mi te, Amon mi te;" 
Jeremiah25:22 Tura leh Sidon lal te, tuifinriat kama awm zawng zawng lal te;" 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan te, Tema te, Buz-a chêngte leh lumêt zawng zawng te;" 
Jeremiah25:24 Arabia lal zawng zawng te, thlalêra chêng hnam inpawlh lal te;" 
Jeremiah25:25 Zimri lal zawng zawng te, Elam lal zawng zawng te; Media lal zawng zawng te;" 
Jeremiah25:26 Hmâr lam lal, hmun hla leh hnaia awm zawng zawng te leh lei lalram tinrêng te pawh chuan a indawt zêlin an in ang. Chumi zawhah chuan Babulon lal pawhin a in bawk ang." 
Jeremiah25:27 Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan in hnênah heti hian sawi rawh min ti: ‘In ula, luak ula, tho thei lo khawpin tlu rawh u. In zîngah khandaih ka lentîr dâwn si a,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah25:28 I kut ata no chu an lâk duh loh chuan heti hian hrilh ang che: Engkim Lalpa chuan, ‘In in ngei tûr a ni, a ti,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah25:29 “En teh u, ka hming chuanna khawpuiah chhiatna ka thlentîr ṭan ta a, nangni pawh hrem in tuar lo vang em ni? In pumpelh bîk hauh lo vang. Leia awm zawng zawng chungah khandaih ka lek dâwn si a,” tih hi Engkim Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah25:30 Tûnah, anni hi hetiang hian au khum rawh: “Vân sâng aṭangin Lalpa chuan aw a chhuah ang a, A chênna Hmun Thianghlim aṭangin awrâwl a chhuah ang. A ram demin aw a chhuah ang a, Grep sâwrtute angin a au vang, Leia mi zawng zawng an khûr ang." 
Jeremiah25:31 A thâwm chuan kâwlkil a thleng ang, Hnamte chungah Lalpa a thinur a ni. Mi zawng zawng ro a rêlsak ang, Mi suaksual chu khandaih a tuartîr ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah25:32 Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “En teh u, hnam tin chungah chhiatna a thleng ta, “Kâwlkil ata thlipui na tak a lo thawk dâwn,” tiin." 
Jeremiah25:33 Chutih hunah chuan Lalpa mi thahte chu Kâwlkil aṭanga a lehlam thlengin Tu man an ṭah lo vang a, an ruang te pawh an hlâwm hek lo vang, An phûm lo vang a, leia bawlhhlawh tling khâwm ang lek an ni ang." 
Jeremiah25:34 Berâmpute u, ṭap ula, chiau vawng vawng rawh u, Nangni ran rual vêngtute u, Vaivutah let tawp tawp rawh u, An thah hun che u a thleng dâwn ta, In tlu ang a, hlumbêl ṭha tak keh ang maiin in keh darh vek ang." 
Jeremiah25:35 Berâmpute chuan tlânchhiatna tûr rêng an hre lo, Ranrual vêngtute tân pawh pumpelh theih a ni hek lo." 
Jeremiah25:36 Berâmpute ṭap thâwm leh ranrual vêngtute rûm thâwm chu, Ngaithla rawh u, Lalpa chuan an ran tlatna hmun a tichhe tawh si a." 
Jeremiah25:37 Lalpa thinurna nasa tak avâng chuan, Thlamuang taka an awm ṭhinna ram chu a ṭhing ta ṭhuap mai." 
Jeremiah25:38 Hnehchhiahtu ngûnhnâm avâng leh Pathian thinurna nasa tak avâng chuan An chênna ram chu an chhuahsan ta, Sakeibakneiin a pûk a rauhsan ang maiin." 
Jeremiah26:1 Juda lal Josia fapa, Jehoiakima a lal ṭan tirh kumin he thu hi Lalpa hnên aṭangin a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah26:2 Hetiangin: “ Lalpa chuan a ti, ‘ Lalpa in kawtzâwlah ding la, Juda khawpui zawng zawng aṭanga Pathian be tûra Lalpa ina lo kalte hnênah thu sawi rawh. Thu ka pêk zawng zawng chu hmaih lovin puang ang che." 
Jeremiah26:3 Mite chuan an awm dân sual bânsanin an ngaithla mial mahna. Tichuan, an thil sual tihte avânga an chunga chhiatna thlentîr ka tum pawh ka sût leh ang." 
Jeremiah26:4 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni,’ tiin anni chu hrilh rawh: In hnêna ka pêk, ka thu in pawisa lo va, ka dân in zâwm hek lo." 
Jeremiah26:5 In hnêna ka tirh fo ṭhin ka chhiahhlawh zâwlneite thu in pawisak loh avângin 
Jeremiah26:6 he in hi Silo angin ka tichhia ang a, he khawpui hi leia hnam tinrêng ânchhe dawngtu atân ka siam ang,” tiin." 
Jeremiah26:7 Tichuan, puithiam te, zâwlnei te, mipui zawng zawngte chuan hêng thu, Lalpa ina Jeremia sawi chu an hria a." 
Jeremiah26:8 Mipui hrilh tûra Lalpa thupêk zawng zawng a sawi zawh veleh puithiam te, zâwlnei te, mipui te chuan Jeremia chu an man a, “I thi ngei tûr a ni." 
Jeremiah26:9 Engati nge Lalpa hming chhâla, ‘He in hi Silo ang a ni ang a, he khawpui pawh hi luahtu awm lovin a ram ang,’ tia i sawi?” an ti a. Lalpa inah chuan mipui zawng zawngin Jeremia chu an bâwr ta huai huai a." 
Jeremiah26:10 Hêng thu hi Juda rorêltuten an hriat chuan lal in aṭangin Lalpa inah an chho va, Lalpa in kawngka thar luhnaah chuan an ṭhu a." 
Jeremiah26:11 Puithiamte leh zâwlneite chuan rorêltute leh mipuite hnênah, “He mi hi thi tlâk a ni, in hriat angin ‘he khawpui hi a chhe dâwn’ tiin a sawi a ni,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah26:12 Jeremia chuan rorêltute leh mipui zawng zawng hnênah chuan heti hian a ti a: “In ngaihthlâk tâk ang khân he khawpui leh he in chhiat tûr thu hi sawi tûrin Lalpa chuan mi tîr a ni. 
Jeremiah26:13 In awm dân te, in chetzia te siam ṭha ula, in Pathian, Lalpa thu chu zâwm rawh u. Tichuan, in chunga chhiatna lo thleng tûr a lo puan tawh chu Lalpa chuan a sût dâwn nia." 
Jeremiah26:14 Kei chu, hei, in kutah ka awm a, dik leh ṭha nia in hriat angin ka chungah ti mai rawh u." 
Jeremiah26:15 Min thah chuan he khawpui leh a chhûnga chêngte hian pawi sawi lo thisen mawh in phur ang tih hi hria ang che u. Hêng thu hi in beng hriata sawi tûrin Lalpa chuan min tîr a ni e,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah26:16 Rorêltute leh mipuite chuan puithiamte leh zâwlneite hnênah chuan, “He mi hi tihhlum tûr a ni lo; Lalpa, kan Pathian hmingin kan hnênah thu a sawi si a,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah26:17 Chumi rama upa tute emaw an lo ding chhuak a, mipui pung khâwm hnênah chuan," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Moreset mi, Mika chuan Juda lal Hezekia hun lai khân thu a hril a, Juda mi zawng zawng hnênah: ‘Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Zion chu lo anga leh phut vek a ni ang a, Jerusalem pawh thil chhe vawm khâwm mai a ni ang, Lalpa in tlângte chu a ngaw khung ang,’ a ti a." 
Jeremiah26:19 “Ani chu Juda lal Hezekia emaw, Juda mi dangten emaw an that em? Hezekia chuan Lalpa a ṭih a, a tilâwm a. Tichuan, Lalpa chuan an chunga thil ṭha lo tih a tum chu a sût ta a ni lâwm ni kha? Keini zawng keimahni chungah thil ṭha lo tak kan thlentîr dâwn ta a nih hi le!” an ti a." 
Jeremiah26:20 (Mi dang, Semaia fapa Uria, Keriat-jearim mi chuan Lalpa hmingin thu a puang a." 
Jeremiah26:21 Lal Jehoiakima leh a milian te, rorêltute chuan a thu sawi an hria a, lal chuan thah a tum ta a. Uria chuan a hriatin a hlau va, Aigupta ramah a tlân ta a." 
Jeremiah26:22 Lal Jehoiakima chuan Akbora fapa Elnathana chu mi dangte nên Aigupta ramah a tîr a. 
Jeremiah26:23 Uria chu Aigupta ram aṭangin an rawn hruai a, lal Jehoiakima hnênah an rawn thlen a. Ani chuan khandaihin a sât hlum a, a ruang chu vântlâng thlânmualah an phûm ta a ni.)" 
Jeremiah26:24 Amaherawhchu, Safana fapa Ahikama chuan Jeremia chu a ṭan tlat a, tihhlum tûrin mipui hnênah an pe ta lo va." 
Jeremiah27:1 Juda lal Josia fapa, Zedekia lal ṭan tirhin Lalpa thu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah27:2 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah heti hian a ti: “Nghâwngkawl tuk la, a hrui vuahin i nghâwngah bât rawh." 
Jeremiah27:3 Edom lal te, Moab lal te, Amona thlah lal te, Tura lalte leh Sidon lal ten Juda lal Zedekia hmu tûra Jerusalem-a an mi rawn tirhte chu thu chah rawh:" 
Jeremiah27:4 Hêng thu hi an pute hnênah sawi rawh se: ‘Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: in pute chu heti hian hrilh rawh u:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Ka thiltihtheihna ropui tak nên bân phar meuhvin leite, mihringte leh leia rannung zawng zawngte hi ka siam a; chûng chu pêk âwm ka tihte hnênah ka pe bawk a." 
Jeremiah27:6 Tûnah pawh hêng ram zawng zawng hi ka chhiahhlawh Nebukadnezara, Babulon lal kutah ka pe tawh a ni. Ramsate pawh ama rawngbâwl tûrin ka pe a ni." 
Jeremiah27:7 Ama ram a chhiat hun a thlen hma chuan hnam tinrêngin amah leh a fate leh a tute rawng an bâwl ang a; chumi hnuah erawh chuan hnam tam takte leh lal ropuite bawihah a awm ang. 
Jeremiah27:8 ‘Babulon lal Nebukadnezara rawngbâwl duh lo leh a thuhnuaia kûn duh lo tawh phawt hnam leh lalram chu khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui tein ka hrem ang, ka kut chak tak hmangin anni chu ka tiboral vek dâwn a ni,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah27:9 ‘Babulon lal rawng in bâwl lo vang,’ tia hrilhtu che u in zâwlnei te, in aienthiam te, mumang hrilhfiahtu te, hrilhlâwktu te, thil chhui thiamte thu chu ngaithla suh u." 
Jeremiah27:10 In ram ata hla taka hruai bo in nih theih nân leh ka hnawh darhna che u a in boral theih nân in hnênah dâwt thu an puang ṭhîn a ni. 
Jeremiah27:11 Amaherawhchu, Babulon thuhnuaia kûna, a rawngbâwltu hnam chu anmahni ram ngeiah ka awmtîr leh ang a, leite an let ang a, chutah chuan an chêng ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah27:12 Juda lal Zedekia hnênah pawh hetiang hian ka sawi bawk a: “Babulon lal thuhnuaiah kûn la, amah leh a mite rawng bâwl ang che; tichuan, i him ang." 
Jeremiah27:13 Babulon lal rawngbâwl duh lo hnam chungchâng Lalpa sawi tawh ang kha engah nge khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui te tuarin nang leh i mite chu in thih ang le?" 
Jeremiah27:14 ‘Babulon lal rawng bâwl suh u,’ in hnêna titu zâwlneite thu chu ngaithla suh u, in hnênah dâwt thu an sawi mai mai a ni si a." 
Jeremiah27:15 ‘Anni chu ka tirh an ni lo, ka hmingin dâwt thu an hril zâwk ṭhîn a ni,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Chuvângin, ka hnawt chhuak ang che u a, in hnêna thusawitu zâwlneite nên in boral ang.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 “Puithiamte leh hêng mite hnênah hian hei hi ka sawi a ni: Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘ Lalpa ina bungbêl chu Babulon aṭangin lâk kîr a ni thuai dâwn,’ titu zâwlneite thu sawi chu ngaithla suh u. Dâwt thu an hrilh che u a ni." 
Jeremiah27:17 An thu chu awih suh u. Babulon lal rawngbâwl zâwk ula; tichuan, in him ang. Engah nge he khawpui hi a chhiat ang le?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Zâwlnei an niha Lalpa thu an dawng tak meuh a nih chuan Lalpa ina bungbêl la awm, Juda lal ina awmte leh Jerusalem khuaa awmte hi Babulon-a lâk a nih loh nân Engkim Lalpa hnênah ngên ang hmiang.”" 
Jeremiah27:19 Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran Juda lal Jehoiakima fapa Jekonia leh Juda ram leh Jerusalem-a mi ṭha zawng zawng Babulon-a a hruai ṭuma a lâk bângte chu - dâr ban sâng te, dâr tuizêm te, a nghahchhan te leh Lalpa ina bungbêl ṭhenkhat te a ni." 
Jeremiah27:20  
Jeremiah27:21 A ni, Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan - Lalpa ina bungbêl te, Judai ram lal ina thil hnutchhiah te leh Jerusalem khua a thil hnutchhiah te chungchâng hetiangin a sawi:" 
Jeremiah27:22 “Babulon-ah lâk an ni ang; tin, ka hruai kîr leh ang a, he hmunah hian ka din thar leh ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah28:1 Chumi kum vêk, Judai ram lal Zedekia lal tirh lam, a kum lina, thla nganaah chuan zâwlnei Hanania, Azura fapa, Gibeon mi chuan puithiamte leh mipui zawng zawng hriatin Lalpa inah chuan ka hnênah hetiangin thu a sawi a." 
Jeremiah28:2 “Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Babulon lal thuneihna chu ka tichhe ta." 
Jeremiah28:3 Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran hemi hmun aṭanga Lalpa ina bungbêl a lâk, Babulon-a a phurh hâwn zawng zawng kha kum hnih chhûng ngeiin he hmunah hian ka rawn thlen leh vek dâwn." 
Jeremiah28:4 Juda lal Jekonia, Jehoiakima fapa leh Juda saltâng, Babulon-a kal zawng zawngte pawh he hmunah hian ka hruai kîr leh vek ang, Babulon lal thuneihna chu ka tichhia ang,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah28:5 Zâwlnei Jeremia chuan puithiamte leh Lalpa ina ding mipui zawng zawng hmaah chuan zâwlnei Hanania hnênah hetiangin a sawi a: 
Jeremiah28:6 “Amen, Lalpa chuan chutiang tak chuan ti rawh se, Lalpa chuan thu i puan ang chuan thlentîr sela, Babulon-a bungbêlte leh saltâng zawng zawng he mi hmunah hian rawn thlen leh ngei rawh se." 
Jeremiah28:7 Amaherawhchu, nang leh mipui zawng zawngin in hnêna ka thu sawi hi lo hre teh u;" 
Jeremiah28:8 Hmâsâng ata, nang leh kei kan pian hma aṭangin zâwlneiten, ‘indona te, ṭâm te, hripui te ram tam tak leh lalram ropui tak tak chungah a thleng dâwn,’ an ti ṭhîn a." 
Jeremiah28:9 ‘Muanna a lo thleng dâwn,’ tih puangtu zâwlnei thu sawi chu a lo thlen hunah chu zâwlnei chu Lalpa tirh a nih leh nih loh a hriat mai ang chu,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah28:10 Tichuan, zâwlnei Hanania chuan zâwlnei Jeremia nghâwngkawl bah lai chu a la a, a titliak ta a." 
Jeremiah28:11 Hanania chuan mi zawng zawng hriatah heti hian a ti a: “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Hetiang tak hian Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran hnam zawng zawng a awpbehna thuneihna chu kum hnih chhûngin ka tichhe dâwn a ni,” tiin. Zâwlnei Jeremia chuan a kalsan ta a." 
Jeremiah28:12 Zâwlnei Hananian zâwlnei Jeremia nghâwngkawl bah a tihtliah hnuah Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a 
Jeremiah28:13 “Kal la, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, tiin Hanania chu va hrilh rawh: thing nghâwngkawl i titliak a, a aiah thîr nghâwngkawl i siamsak zâwk a nih hi," 
Jeremiah28:14 Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Babulon lal Nebukadnezara rawngbâwl tûrin hêng hnam zawng zawng hi thîr nghâwngkawl ka bahtîr ta a ni. Tichuan, a rawng an bâwl ang a. Ramsa hlauhawm pui puite pawh a hnênah ka pe bawk a ni,” tiin." 
Jeremiah28:15 Zâwlnei Jeremia chuan zâwlnei Hanania hnênah, “Hanani, hre rawh, Lalpa chuan a tîr lo che; hêng mite hi dâwt i rintîr mai mai a nih hi." 
Jeremiah28:16 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai teh, lei ata ka la bo daih dâwn che, Lalpa laka hel thu i puan avângin kuminah ngei i thi ang,’ a ti,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah28:17 Chumi kum, thla sarihnaah chuan zâwlnei Hanania chu a thi ta a." 
Jeremiah29:1 Nebukadnezaran Jerusalem aṭanga Babulon-a a hruai, saltâng zînga hruaitu te, puithiam te, zâwlnei te leh mi zawng zawng hnêna zâwlnei Jeremia thu thawn chu hei hi a ni:" 
Jeremiah29:2 Chu chu lal Jekonia leh a nu te, mi tilreh te, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a hotu te, themthiam te leh thîrdêng ten Jerusalem an chhuahsan hnu khân a ni." 
Jeremiah29:3 Juda lal Zedekian Babulon lal Nebukadnezara hnêna a mi tirh, Safana fapa Elasa leh Hilkia fapa Gemaria te kutah chu lehkha chu a thawn a ni. Heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah29:4 “Israel-te Pathian, Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Saltâng zawng zawng, Jerusalem aṭanga Babulon-a ka kaltîr tâkte u," 
Jeremiah29:5 in te sa ula; tah chuan chêng ang che u; huante siam ula, in thlai tharte chu ei ang che u." 
Jeremiah29:6 Nupui nei ula, fanu fapate nei ang che u. In fapate nupui neihsak ula, in fanute pawh pasal neihtîr ang che u. Tichuan, fanu fapa neiin in lo pung ang a, kiam lam pan suh u." 
Jeremiah29:7 Sala ka tirhna che u khawpui ṭhatna zawnsak ula, Lalpa hnênah dîlsak rawh u. Chu ram hmuingîlna zâr chu nangni pawhin in zo ve dâwn si a.’" 
Jeremiah29:8 Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘In zînga zâwlnei te, aienthiam te chuan bum che u suh se. An mumangte pawh ngaithla suh u." 
Jeremiah29:9 Ka hmingin dâwt an hrilh che u a, anni chu ka tirh an ni hauh si lo,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah29:10 “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Kum sawmsarih a tlin hunah Babulon ramah chuan ka rawn tlawh ang che u a, in hnêna ka thutiam nghet tak chu ka hlen ang a, he hmunah hian ka hruai kîr leh ang che u." 
Jeremiah29:11 In tâna ka remruat chu keimah chauhvin ka hria,’ tih hi Lalpa thu chhuak a ni. ‘Chhiatna ni lo, thil ṭha in beisei chu in chan theih nân ka ruahman a ni." 
Jeremiah29:12 Min lam ang a, ka hnênah in rawn ṭawngṭai ang a, ka lo ngaithla ang che u." 
Jeremiah29:13 Min zawng ang a, tihtakzeta min zawn hunah min hmu ang." 
Jeremiah29:14 In hmuh tûrin ka awm ang,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Sal ata ka chhuah ang che u a, ka hnawhdarhna ram hnam zawng zawng leh hmun tinrêng aṭangin ka hruai khâwm leh ang che u,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah29:15 “ ‘ Lalpa chuan Babulon-ah pawh zâwlneite min siamsak a,’ in ti vei a." 
Jeremiah29:16 Lalpa chuan Davida lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr lal chungchâng te, he khawpuia chêng mipui chungchâng te, in unau, in hnêna sala tâng ve lote chungchâng thu heti hian a sawi:" 
Jeremiah29:17 ‘Ngai teh, an chungah khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui te ka lêntîr dâwn e. Anni chu theipui ṭawih, ei tlâk loh khawpa chhia ang hian ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah29:18 Anni chu khandaih te, tâm te, hripui te nên ka ûmzui ang. Ka hnawhdarhna hnam tin zîngah leia lalram zawng zawngten thil râpthlâk leh ânchhia, mak an tiha an chek khum tlawk tlawkah leh an nuihzat huai huaiah ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah29:19 In hnêna zing tak taka ka tirh, ka chhiahhlawh zâwlneite thu in pawisa lo va, in ngaithla duh si lo,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah29:20 Nangni, saltâng zawng zawng, Jerusalem aṭanga Babulon-a ka hruaite u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Jeremiah29:21 Israel-te Pathian, Engkim Lalpa chuan Kolaia fapa Ahaba leh Maaseia fapa Zedekia, ka hminga dâwt thu puang ṭhînte chungchâng heti hian a sawi: ‘Ngai teh, anni chu Babulon lal Nebukadnezara ka mantîr ang a, in hmuh lai ngeiin a that ang." 
Jeremiah29:22 Judai ram aṭanga Babulon-a saltâng zawng zawngte chuan, ‘Babulon lalin Zedekia leh Ahaba meia a rawh ang khân, Lalpa chuan i chungah ti ve rawh se,’ tiin chûng mite hming chuan ânchhia an inlawh ang." 
Jeremiah29:23 Israel ramah â takin thil an ti a, an ṭhenawmte nupui an uiresak a, ka hmingin dawt an sawi a, an hnênah thu ka pe si lo. Kei hi hrechiangtu thuhretu ka ni,’ Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti,” tiin." 
Jeremiah29:24 Nehelam mi, Semaia hnênah heti hian thu sawi rawh:" 
Jeremiah29:25 “Israel-te Pathian, Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, Jerusalem mipui zawng zawng hnênah te, Maaseia fapa Zefania, puithiam hnênah te, puithiam dang zawng zawng hnênah te nangma hmingin lehkha i thawn a, hetiangin i ti a:" 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Nang Zefania, Lalpa chuan puithiam Jehoiada aiawhtu atân a ruat che a, Lalpa ina â taka thu puang ṭhînte chu kawl te, thîrkawl te buntîrtu atân ruat i ni a." 
Jeremiah29:27 Tûnah, Jeremia, Anathot khaw mi, in hnêna thu puangtu hi engtizia nge i zilh loh?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Babulon-a awmte chu, ‘Saltân chhûng a rei dâwn a, in leh lote bêngbel ula, huante pawh siam ula, in thlaite ei rawh u,’ tiin thu a thawn hi,” tiin." 
Jeremiah29:29 Puithiam Zefania chuan he lehkha hi zâwlnei Jeremia hriatah a chhiar a. 
Jeremiah29:30 Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah hetiangin a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah29:31 “Hêng hi saltâng zawng zawng hrilh rawh: Lalpa chuan Nehelam mi Zefania chungchâng heti hian a sawi: Semaia hian in hnênah thu a hril a, ani chu ka tirh a ni lo, dâwt a rintîr che u a ni." 
Jeremiah29:32 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Nehelam mi Semaia leh a thlahte chu ka hrem dâwn. In zîngah thlah pakhat mah a nei lo vang a, ka mite tâna thil ṭha ka tih tûr pawh a chang ve hek lo vang, Lalpa laka hel thu a puan avângin, tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah30:1 Jeremia hnêna Lalpa thu lo thleng chu: 
Jeremiah30:2 “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: I hnêna ka thu sawi zawng zawng kha lehkhabu-ah ziak rawh." 
Jeremiah30:3 Ngai teh, nite a lo thleng mêk e,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Ka mi Israel-te leh Juda-te chu an saltânna ata ka chhuah ang a, an pute hnêna ka pêk ramah chuan ka hruai hâwng leh ang a; tichuan, ram chu an luah ang,” tiin." 
Jeremiah30:4 Hêng hi Juda leh Israel chungchânga Lalpa thu sawi chu a ni. 
Jeremiah30:5 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Hlau leh mangang thâwm ka hria, Muanna rêng a awm lo." 
Jeremiah30:6 Hawiin zâwt vêl teh rêng u, Mipain nau an vei ngai em ni? Engtizia nge hmeichhe nau vei anga, Pachangin a pum a dawma, A hmêl a lo dân tâk?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Chu ni chu a va han râpthlâk dâwn êm! A ang rêng a awm lo vang, Jakoba mangan hun tûr a ni, Mahse, chhan chhuah a ni ang." 
Jeremiah30:8 Chumi ni chuan a nghâwngkawl bah ka titliak ang a, An phuarna hrui ka phelhsak ang a, Ram dang mite chhiahhlawh an ni tawh lo vang," 
Jeremiah30:9 An Pathian, Lalpa leh an lal atâna ka tun din tûr, Davida thlah zînga mi rawng chu an bâwl tawh zâwk ang." 
Jeremiah30:10 Aw ka chhiahhlawh Jakob, hlau suh, Aw Israel, zâm hek suh,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “I thlah, ram hla taka saltângte chu ka chhan chhuak dâwn si a, Jakoba chu thlamuang tak leh him takin a awm ang, Tu man an tirâlṭi tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah30:11 Chhan chhuak tûr chein i hnênah ka awm reng e,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Ka hnawhdarhna che rama hnam zawng zawng chu, Ka tichimit vek ang a, Nang erawh chu ka tichimit lo vang che. A tâwk lekin ka thunun ang che a, Hrem loh zawngin i chhuak bîk lo vang.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “I hliam chu tihdam rual a ni lo, I tuar hi a na êm a ni." 
Jeremiah30:13 I pân tidama i na tidam tûrin Enkawltu rêng i nei lo. 
Jeremiah30:14 I lamṭang zawng zawngten an theihnghilh tawh che a, An ngaihsak tawh lo che. Hmêlma angin ka hliam ta che a, Dim lo takin ka hrem che a ni, I sualna leh i bawhchhiatna a nasat êm avângin." 
Jeremiah30:15 I hliam vângin engah nge i phunnawi? I na hi tihdam rual a ni lo; I khawlohna a nasa a, thil tam tak i tihsual avângin Hêng thil hi i chungah ka ti a nih hi." 
Jeremiah30:16 Eiraltu zawng zawng che chu eiral an ni ang a, I hmêlma zawng zawng salah an hruai ang. Rawktu zawng zawng che u an rawk ang a, Tiramtu zawng zawng che pawh ka tiram ve ang." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ka tidam leh ang che, I hliam tuar pawh ka tidam ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. ‘Hnuchhawn, tu ma ngaihsak loh Zion,’ An tih che avângin." 
Jeremiah30:18 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, Jakob-ho ram chu ka din thar leh ang a, A chênna hmun chu ka lainat ang. Khawpui ram hnu chu ka siam ṭha ang a, Lal inte pawh a hmun ngaiah a ding leh ang." 
Jeremiah30:19 Chûng hmun aṭang chuan lâwmthu sawina leh Hlim thâwm a lo chhuak ang a, Anni chu ka tipung ang a, an kiam leh tawh lo vang, Ka tiropui ang a, an tenau hauh lo vang." 
Jeremiah30:20 An fate chu tûn hma ang khân an awm leh ang a, Ka hmaah ngêlnghet takin an awm ang. Anmahni hnehchhiahtute chu ka hrem zêl ang." 
Jeremiah30:21 Anmahni mi ngei hruaituah an nei ang a, An zîng aṭangin rorêltu an lo chhuak ang, Anni chu min rawn hnaih tûrin ka sâwm ang a; Tichuan, min rawn hnaih ang. Sâwm lohvin tu nge mi rawn hnaih ngam ang?” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah30:22 Ka mite in ni ang a, in Pathian ka ni ang." 
Jeremiah30:23 Ngai teh, Lalpa thinurna thlipui chu na takin a tleh ta, Mi suaksualte lu chu a nuai nek ang." 
Jeremiah30:24 A thiltumte a hlena a tih zawh hma loh chuan Lalpa thinurna nasa tak chu a reh lo vang, Ni hnuhnûngah hei hi in la hrethiam ang." 
Jeremiah31:1 “Chumi hnuah chuan kei hi Israel chhûngkua zawng zawng Pathian ka ni ang a, Anni pawh ka mite an ni ang,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah31:2 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Khandaiha thah bângte chuan thlalêrah khawngaih an hlawh ang.” Israel-ten chawlhna ram an pan lai khân," 
Jeremiah31:3 Hmâna ka hnêna lo lang Lalpa chuan, “Hmangaih tâwp lovin ka hmangaih che a, Ngilnei takin ka hruai zêl ang che,” a ti." 
Jeremiah31:4 Aw nula Israel, ka din thar leh dâwn che, Din ngheh i lo ni ang. Benchhekte kengin hlim taka lâm tûrin i chhuak leh ang." 
Jeremiah31:5 Samaria tlâng tluanin grep huan i siam leh ang a, Phuntute chuan a rah chu an ei ang." 
Jeremiah31:6 Râlvêngtuten Efraim tlângah mi an auh ni a thleng dâwn, ‘Tho teh u, Lalpa kan Pathian hnênah, Zion-ah i chho vang u,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah31:7 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Jakoba tân hlim takin zai ula, Hnam azawnga ropui ber tân au chiam rawh u, Hril vêl ula, chawimawi rawh u, ‘Aw Lalpa, Israel la damte chu humhim ang che,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah31:8 Ngai teh, anni chu hmâr lam aṭangin ka hruai dâwn, Lei hmun kil tin aṭangin ka hruai khâwm ang a, Mitdelte leh kebaite pawh an tel ve ang, Nau paite leh vei laite nên, Hnam ropui tak chu he hmunah hian an lo kîr leh ang." 
Jeremiah31:9 Ṭap chungin lo kîr mah se, Ka thlamuan ang a, ka hruai hâwng ang. Lui kamah te, kawng tluang an tlûk lohna tûrah te chuan ka hruai ang. Israel-te tân pa ka ni ang, Efraim chu ka fa tîr a ni si a.”" 
Jeremiah31:10 Aw hnamte u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla ula, Tuifinriat kam ram hla takahte hril rawh u. ‘Israel tidarhtu chuan a hruai khâwm leh ang a, Berâmpu angin anni chu a enkawl dâwn,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah31:11 Lalpa chuan Jakoba chu a tlan chhuak ang a, A aia chakte kut ata a chhan chhuak ang." 
Jeremiah31:12 Hlim taka auvin Zion tlângchhîpah an lo lâwn ang a, Lalpa ṭhatna avâng chuan an hmêl a hlim êm êm ang. Buh te, uain te, hriak te, berâm leh ran rual note avâng chuan an lâwm ang, Anni chu hneh taka tuia châwm huan ang an ni ang a, An lungngai tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah31:13 “Nulate chu hlim takin an lâm ang a, Tlangvâl leh tarte pawh an lâwm ang. An lungngaih lâwmah ka chantîr ang a, An lungchhia chu ka thlamuan ang." 
Jeremiah31:14 Puithiamte chu chaw tui takin ka hrai ang a, Ka mite chu ka ṭhatnain an tlai bawk ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:15 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Rama khuaah thâwm an hria, Lungchhe taka ṭap tlawk tlawk thâwm chu; Rakili chuan a fate a ṭah a, An awm tawh loh avângin hnem theih a ni lo." 
Jeremiah31:16 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Insûm la, ṭap tawh suh, i mittui pawh hul rawh se, I thawh rah i seng dâwn e,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Râl ram aṭangin an lo hâwng dâwn." 
Jeremiah31:17 Nakinah chuan i chan a la ṭha hle ang, Mahni ram ngeiah i fate chu an lo kîr dâwn,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:18 “Efraim rûm thâwm chu ka hre reng a, ‘Nangin bâwngtuai la sâwi loh angin mi sâwi a, Min thunun tâk hi. Min hawi kîrtîr la, ka lo kîr ang, Min hruai la, Ka Pathian, Lalpa chu i ni si a." 
Jeremiah31:19 Min hawi kîrtîr hnuin ka inchhîr a, Ka hriatthiam hnuin ka sim ta. Ka tleirâwl lai hmingchhiat phurin, Mualpho leh zak takin ka awm a ni.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 Efraim chu ka fapa duh tak, Ka duat êm êm chu a ni lâwm ni? Han khak ṭhîn mah ila ka thinlungah a châm reng a, Ani chu ka hre reng a, ka lainat takzet a ni,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:21 Kawng chhinchhiahna siam la, Kawng chin hriatna tûr ban phun rawh, I kawngpui zawh chu chhinchhiah ngun rawh. Nula Israel, lo kîr la, I khawpuiah hian lo kîr leh rawh." 
Jeremiah31:22 Aw nang, fanu lepchiah, Eng chen nge i vah rawlai dâwn le? Lalpa chuan leiah thil a siam thar ta em ni? Hmeichhiain mipa a rîm tâk hi!" 
Jeremiah31:23 Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “An saltânna ata ka hruai kîr leh hun chuan Judai ram leh a khawpuiahte chuan hetiang ṭawngkam hi an hmang leh ang: ‘Aw, mi dikte chênna hmun, Aw, tlâng thianghlim, Lalpa chuan malsâwm che rawh se,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah31:24 Judai ram leh a khawpuiahte chuan loneitute leh berâm vêngtute an chêng ho vang. 
Jeremiah31:25 Mi chaute chu ka tiharh ang a, ṭâmchhâwlte chu ka hrai tlai ang.”" 
Jeremiah31:26 Ka mu chu ka han ṭhanharh chuan ka han hawi vêl a, ka lo mutui hle a lo ni a." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Ngai teh, nite a lo thleng dâwn e, Israel chhûngte zîngah leh Juda chhûngte zîngah mihring leh ran ka tipung ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:28 Anmahni pawtchhuaka tichhe tûr te, tithlua tiboral tûr te leh timangang tûr tein ka châng reng ṭhîn a; mahse, tungding leh tinghet tûrin ka ngaihven ta reng zâwk a ni, tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:29 Chûng ni-ahte chuan miten ‘Paten grep thûr an ei a, An fate hâ a ṭim e,’ An ti tawh ngai lo vang." 
Jeremiah31:30 Mi tinin mahni sualna an thihpui ang a, Tu pawh grep thûr ei apiang an hâ a ṭim ang." 
Jeremiah31:31 “Ngai teh, nite a lo thleng dâwn e,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Israel chhûngte leh Juda chhûngte nên thuthlung thar ka siam ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:32 “An thlahtute Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuak tûra an kut ngeia ka chelh laia ka thuthlung ang kha a ni lo vang. An tân hotu ka ni chungin ka thuthlung chu an bawhchhe si a,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:33 “Chûng ni hnua Israel chhûngte nêna ka thu thlun tûr chu hei hi a ni: An rilruah ka Dân ka dah ang a, an thinlungah ka ziak bawk ang. Kei hi an Pathian ka ni ang a, anni chu ka mite an ni ang." 
Jeremiah31:34 ‘ Lalpa chu hre rawh u,’ tiin tu mahin an ṭhenawmte leh an unaute an zirtîr tawh lo vang. A tê ber aṭanga a lian ber thlengin min hre dâwn si a,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Tichuan, an bawhchhiatnate ka ngaidam ang a, an sualnate ka hre reng tawh lo vang.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Chhûn tiêngtu atâna ni daha, zân tiêngtu atâna thla leh arsite ruattu, ri hum hum tûra tuifinriat tichetu chu a hming Engkim Lalpa a ni." 
Jeremiah31:36 Hêng thil awmphung ruatte hi ka tihtâwp hma loh chu Israel hnamte pawh an ral lo vang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:37 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Chung lam vân khi in tehchhuah theiha, hnuai lama lei nghahchhante in zawn chhuah theih hunah, Israel thlahte chu an thil lo tih zawng zawng avângin ka paih ve ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:38 Ngai teh, nite a lo thleng mêk e, Hananela in sâng aṭanga kulh kil kawngka bul thlengin khawpui chu Lalpa tân din thar a ni ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:39 A ramri chu Gareb tlâng thlengin ngîl takin a kal ang a, Goa lamah a kawi ang." 
Jeremiah31:40 Mitthi phûmna leh bawlhhlawh paihna ruam pum pui leh a vêl ram zawng zawng, Kidron lui thlengin, chhak lam panga sakawr kawngka kil thleng chu Lalpa tân tihhran a ni. Chu chu engtikah mah tihdarh leh tihchhiat a ni tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah32:1 Juda lal Zedekia lal kum sâwmnaah Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a; chu chu Nebukadnezara lal kum sâwm leh kum riatna a ni. 
Jeremiah32:2 Chutih lai chuan Babulon lal sipaite chuan Jerusalem an hual a, zâwlnei Jeremia pawh Juda lal in vêngtute chênna hmunah an tântîr a." 
Jeremiah32:3 Juda lal Zedekia chuan chutah chuan a tântîr a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan, ‘Ngai teh, he khawpui hi Babulon lal kutah ka pe ang a, a la ang." 
Jeremiah32:4 Juda lal Zedekia pawh Kaldai mite kut ata a chhuak lo vang, Babulon lal ka pe ang. Inhmatawnin an inbia ang a, chiang takin an inen ang." 
Jeremiah32:5 Zedekia chu Babulon-ah a hruai ang a, amah ka tlawh hma chu chutah chuan a awm reng ang. Kaldai-ho chu do mahsela a hlawhtling chuang lo vang, Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti,’ tiin engati nge i sawi?” a ti a." 
Jeremiah32:6 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah32:7 “Ngai teh, i pami, Saluma fapa Hananela chu i hnênah a lo kal dâwn a, ‘Nang chhûngkhat laina hnai i ni bawk a, Anathot-a ka lo hi lei rawh’ a rawn ti ang che,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah32:8 Tichuan, Lalpa thu ang chuan ka pami fapa Hananela chu vêngtu hung chhûngah ka hnênah a lo kal a, ‘Benjamin bial chhûnga Anathot khuaa ka lo chu lei ta che, rokhâwm thei i ni a, i chan tûr a ni, i tân lei mai rawh,’ mi rawn ti ta a. Hei hi Lalpa thu kha a ni tih ka hre ta a." 
Jeremiah32:9 Anathot khuaa ka pami fapa Hananela lo chu ka lei a, a man atân tangka ka han bûk a, tangkarua sekel sâwm leh pasarih lai a ni." 
Jeremiah32:10 Kan thiltih chu lehkhaah kan ziak fel a, kan châr a, hretute kan ko va, tangka chu kan bûk chhuak a." 
Jeremiah32:11 Ram leina, inlei dân ziakna chu châr leh châr loh ka siam a." 
Jeremiah32:12 Ka pami fapa Hananela mit hmuhah leh hretu, ram leina lehkhaa hming ziaktute leh hung chhûnga vêngtu, Juda ṭhuhote mit hmuhah Neria fapa Baruka, Maaseia tupa chu ka pe a." 
Jeremiah32:13 An beng hriatah Baruka chu hetiangin thu ka pe a: 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Israel-te Pathian, Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Hêng lehkha, ram inlei dân chhinchhiahna châr leh châr lohte hi la la, a chhiat theih loh nân hlumbelah dah ṭha rawh." 
Jeremiah32:15 Israel-te Pathian, Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: He ramah hian in te, lo te, grep huante an la lei dâwn,’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah32:16 Neria fapa Baruka hnêna ram leina lehkha ka pêk hnu chuan heti hian ka ṭawngṭai a," 
Jeremiah32:17 “Aw Lalpa P athian , i thiltihtheihna nasa tak hmanga bân phar meuhva lei leh vân siamtu, i tân thil tih harsa lutuk eng mah a awm si lo." 
Jeremiah32:18 Nang zawng sâng tam tak chunga khawngaihna lantîra, pate sualna fate thlenga thungrûltu, aw Pathian ropui leh thiltithei, i hming chu Engkim Lalpa a ni." 
Jeremiah32:19 Nang, remruattu ropui leh thil tithei tak, mihringte khawsak dân tinrêng i hre reng ṭhîn. Mi tin an awm dân leh an thiltih ang zêla rûltu," 
Jeremiah32:20 Aigupta rama thil mak leh chhinchhiahnate tia, vawiin thlenga Israel ramah leh hnam dang zînga ti zêltu, tûn thlengin i hming i chher a ni." 
Jeremiah32:21 Thil makte leh chhinchhiahnate, kut chak tak leh bân phar meuhva thil râpthlâk takte tiin i mi Israel-te Aigupta ram ata i hruai chhuak a." 
Jeremiah32:22 He ram, khawizu leh hnutetuia luang ram hi an thlahtute hnêna pêk i lo tiam tawh angin i pe ta a." 
Jeremiah32:23 An lo kal a, an luah a; nimahsela, i thu an awih lo va, i Dân an zâwm hek lo. Tih tûra i thupêk rêng rêng eng mah an ti lo va. Chuvângin, hêng thil ṭha lo hi an chungah i thlentîr ta a ni." 
Jeremiah32:24 En teh, khawpui lâk nân lei an chhûn pâwn tâk hi. Khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui te an tuar avângin khawpui pawh a rawn rûntu Kaldai-hovin an la ta a ni. I hmuh ang hian i lo hrilh lâwk kha a lo thleng ta a nih hi." 
Jeremiah32:25 Aw Lalpa P athian , nang lahin ka hnênah, ‘Lo chu tangkain lei la, thuhretute ko vang che; khawpui erawh zawng Kaldai-ho kutah pêk a ni ta,’ i ti si a,” tiin." 
Jeremiah32:26 Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah heti hian a lo thleng a. 
Jeremiah32:27 ‘Ngai teh, kei Lalpa hi mi zawng zawng Pathian ka ni a, ka tâna tih harsa lutuk eng nge awm?’ tiin." 
Jeremiah32:28 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, he khawpui hi Kaldai-ho leh Babulon lal kutah ka pe ang a, an la ang." 
Jeremiah32:29 He khawpui beitu Kaldai-ho chu an lo lût ang a, khua hi an hâl vek ang. Min tithinur tûra an in chunga Baal hnêna rimtui an hlanna te, pathian dang hnêna in tûr thilhlan an leih buakna zawng zawngte chu a kâng vek ang." 
Jeremiah32:30 An tleirâwl chhuah ata Israel fate leh Juda mite chuan ka mit hmuhah thil ṭha lo hlîr an ti si a. Israel fate chuan an thilsiamte chuan min tithinur a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah32:31 He khawpui hi, an din tirh ni aṭanga tûn thlengin min tithinurtu leh min tihlim lotu a ni reng a, ka hmuh loh tûrin ka sawn bo dâwn a ni." 
Jeremiah32:32 Israel mite leh Juda mite chuan thil ṭha lo an tih avângin min tithinur a, an lal te, hruaitu te, puithiam te, zâwlnei te leh Jerusalem-a chêng zawng zawngte nên min tithinur a ni." 
Jeremiah32:33 Ka lam hawi lovin tukkhum chhah min chhawn a, ṭhahnemngai taka ka zirtîr chungin an ngaithla duh lo va, ka zilhna an pawm duh hek lo." 
Jeremiah32:34 An milem tenawm chu ka in thianghlimah an dintîr a, an tibawlhhlawh ta." 
Jeremiah32:35 Baal biak nân Ben-Hinom ruamah hmunsâng, an fanu te, an fapate, Moleka hnêna an hlanna tûr chu an siam a. Juda-ho hruai sual tûra he thil tenawm an tih hi ka thupêk a ni lo va, an tih duh pawh ka rin ngai loh a ni." 
Jeremiah32:36 Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “He khawpui hi Babulon lal kutah pêk a ni ang a; ‘ṭâm te, khandaih te, hripui te a tuar ang,’ tih a lo ni tawh a." 
Jeremiah32:37 Mahse, ngai teh, thinur takin lungnilo leh thinrim chungin anni chu ka hnawt darh a; mahse, ka hnawh chhuahna ram zawng zawng ata ka hruai khâwm leh ngei dâwn. He hmunah hian ka rawn thlen ang a, thlamuang takin ka awmtîr ang." 
Jeremiah32:38 Ka ta an ni ang a, kei hi an Pathian ka ni ang." 
Jeremiah32:39 Thinlung hmun khat puin ka awm hotîr ang a, kumkhuain min ṭih ang a, chu chu an tân leh an thlah zêlte tân a ṭha ang." 
Jeremiah32:40 Kumkhaw thuthlung ka siampui ang a, an tân thil ṭha tih ka bâng lo vang; min ṭih nachâng ka hriattîr ang a, min pên bosan tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah32:41 An tâna thil ṭha tih chu ka lawmzâwng tak a ni ang a, he ramah hian ngêlnghet taka awmtîr ka tum tlat ang.”" 
Jeremiah32:42 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Hêng mite chungah chhiatna nasa tak ka thlentîr ang khân an tâna thil ṭha pêk ka lo tiam tawh chu ka thlentîr ang," 
Jeremiah32:43 ‘ram ruak, mihring leh ran awm lohna, Kaldai-hovin an lâksak tawh hnu’ tia miten an sawi ṭhin he ramah hian lote in lei ang." 
Jeremiah32:44 Benjamin bialah te, Jerusalem chhehvêl khuaah te, Judai ram khuaah te, tlângram khuaah te, thlang lam tuipui kamah te, chhim lamah te, tangkain lote in lei ang; an ziak fel ang a, an chhinchhiah tlat ang. Anni chu ka tungding leh dâwn a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah33:1 Jeremia chu vêngtu hung chhûnga a la tân laiin a hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng leh a: 
Jeremiah33:2 “Leilung siamtu Lalpa, dintu leh tinghettu Lalpa, a hming Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Min ko la, ka chhâng ang che, i hriat ngai loh thil ropui leh ril tak ka hrilh ang che.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:4 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan he khaw chhûnga ṭanhmun siam nân in te, Juda lal inte an ṭhiat tâk chungchâng heti hian a sawi:" 
Jeremiah33:5 “Ka thinur nasa tak avângin anni chu ka hrem a, Kaldai-hote an beihlêt avângin an ruangte chuan khawpui hi ka tikhat ang. An sualna nasa tak avângin he khawpui hi ka hawisan tawh si a." 
Jeremiah33:6 Nimahsela, damna leh hrisêlna ka pe leh thuai ang a, ka mite chu ka tidam ang a, thlamuang tak leh him takin ka awmtîr ang." 
Jeremiah33:7 Juda leh Israel chu an saltânna ata ka hruai kîr leh ang a, tûnhmaa an awm dân ang khân ka awmtîr leh ang." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ka laka an sualna leh khawlohna zawng zawng ka sil fai ang a, ka laka an helna te, an sualna leh khawlohna zawng zawngte ka ngaidam vek ang." 
Jeremiah33:9 He khawpui hi thil ṭha ka tihsak tih hretu khawvêl hnam tinrêng mit hmuhah mi tihlimtu, mi tilâwmtu leh mi chawimawitu a ni ang a, thil ṭha tam tak leh hausakna nasa taka ka vûr avângin chûngho chuan anni chu an hlau vang a, an khûr ang.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “He hmun ram tawh, mihring leh ran awm tawh lohna tia an sawi ṭhin leh Judai ram khawpui te, Jerusalem kawtthlêr ram tawh, mihring leh ran awm lohna an tihahte chuan," 
Jeremiah33:11 hlim leh lâwm ri te, mo leh moneitu thâwm te, Lalpa ina lâwmna inthawina rite hriat a ni ang, hetiangin: ‘Engkim Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu hril ula, Lalpa chu a ṭha a, Kumkhuain ngil a nei dâwn si a,’ tiin. “Tûnhma ang khân ram chu ka dinthar leh dâwn,” Lalpa chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah33:12 Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “He hmun leh khawpui ram tawh zawng zawng, mihring leh ran awm tawh lohnaah hian berâmpute chu an berâm rual nên an awm leh ang." 
Jeremiah33:13 Tlângram khawpuiah te, thlang lam tuipui kam khawpuiah te, chhim lam khawpuiah te, Benjamin bialah te, Jerusalem vêlah te, Judai ram khawpuiah te berâmputen an berâm an chhiar leh mawlh mawlh tawh ang,” Lalpa chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah33:14 “Ngai teh, nite a lo thleng mêk e,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Juda chhûngte leh Israel chhûngte hnêna thu ka tiam tawh chu ka hlen ang." 
Jeremiah33:15 Chûng hunahte chuan Davida thlah aṭangin lal ṭha tak ka chawr chhuahtîr ang a, ani chuan ram pumah dik tak leh fel takin ro a rêl ang." 
Jeremiah33:16 Chûng hunah chuan Juda chu a him ang a, Jerusalem pawh thlamuang takin a awm ang. Chu lal chu a hming atân, ‘ Lalpa chu kan dikna,’ tih a ni ang.”" 
Jeremiah33:17 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Davida chuan Israel chhûngte zîngah a lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr mi a tlachham lo vang. 
Jeremiah33:18 Levia chi, puithiamte pawhin ka hnêna hâlral thilhlan inthawina tûr an tlachham hek lo vang." 
Jeremiah33:19 Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah hetiangin a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah33:20 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Chhûn leh zân awm tûrin thu ka thlung a, An hun bi vawng tlat tûrin thu ka thlung a, Chu thuthlung chu in tihdanglam theih chuan," 
Jeremiah33:21 Ka chhiahhlawh Davida hnêna ka thuthlung, ‘A thlahte an lal zêl tûr thu’ leh ‘Levia chi puithiamten ka rawng an bâwl zêl ang,’ Ti-a thu ka thlun pawh a thlâwn a ni ang." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ka chhiahhlawh Davida thlahte leh ka rawng min bâwlsaktu Levia chite chu vâna arsi chhiar sên rual loh leh Tuipui kama ṭiau chhiar sên rual loh zâtin ka tipung ang.” 
Jeremiah33:23 Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah hetiang hian a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah33:24 ‘Chhûngkaw hnih, Lalpa thlante chu paihthlâk an ni ta’ tia hêng miten an sawi chu," 
Jeremiah33:25 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Chhûn leh zân awm tûra ka thu thlung hi a ngheh lohva, lei leh vân awm dân tûr ka ruat hi a nghet lo a nih chuan," 
Jeremiah33:26 Jakoba thlahte leh ka chhiahhlawh Davida chu ka paihthla ang a, an fate chu Abrahama thlahte, Isaka thlahte, Jakoba thlahte chunga rorêltu atân ka thlang lo vang. Anni chu ka tungding leh ang a, ka khawngaih dâwn si a,” tiin." 
Jeremiah34:1 Babulon lal Nebukadnezara leh a sipai rual zawng zawngte leh a ṭhuihruaia awm, lalram chhûnga hnam tin chi tinten Jerusalem leh a vêl khawpuite an beih laiin Lalpa thu Jeremia hnênah hetiang hian a lo thleng a:" 
Jeremiah34:2 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti, “Kal la, Juda lal Zedekia chu heti hian va hrilh rawh: Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh, he khawpui hi Babulon lal hnênah ka pe ta, ani chuan meiin a hâl ang." 
Jeremiah34:3 An man ang che a, a hnênah an pe ang che, a kut ata chu i chhuak lo vang. Babulon lal nên hmaichhanah in inbia ang, Babulon-ah a hruai ang che." 
Jeremiah34:4 Aw Juda lal Zedekia, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla teh: I chungthuah chuan Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Khandaihin i thi lo vang." 
Jeremiah34:5 Thih ṭhatin i thi ang a, in thlahtu, tûnhma lalte rimtui an hâlsak ṭhin angin nang pawh an hâlsak ang che. ‘A va pawi êm, ka pu!’ tiin an ṭah ang che.’ He ka thu sawi hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Hêng thu zawng zawng hi Jeremian Jerusalem-a Juda lal Zedekia a hrilh a. 
Jeremiah34:7 Babulon lal sipaiten Jerusalem leh Judai ram khawpui zawng zawng an beih lai chuan Judai rama khaw kulh nei awm chhun chu Lakis leh Azeka khua chauh hi an ni. 
Jeremiah34:8 Lal Zedekia leh Jerusalem mi zawng zawngin bawih chhuah thu an puan hnuin Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a. 
Jeremiah34:9 Mi tinin an Hebrai bawih, mipa pawh hmeichhia pawh an chhuah tûr a ni. Tu man a Juda-pui bawihah a nei tûr a ni lo." 
Jeremiah34:10 Tichuan, hotute leh mipui, thuthlung pawmtu zawng zawng chuan an bawihnu te, an bawihpate chu chhuaha hrên reng loh an remti tlâng a; an chhuah ta a." 
Jeremiah34:11 Mahse, a hnu lâwkah an lamlêt a, an bawihnu leh bawihpa an chhuah tawhte chu la kîrin bawihah an siam leh ta a." 
Jeremiah34:12 Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng leh a. 
Jeremiah34:13 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “In saltânna, Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah lai che u khân in thlahtute nên thu kan thlung a." 
Jeremiah34:14 Tu pawhin, kum sarih dan zêlah, a Hebrai-pui bawiha a lei chu a chhuah tûr a ni. Kum ruk rawng a lo bâwl tawh chuan chhuah ngei ngei tûr a ni; in pate khân ka thu an ngaithla lo va, min pawisa hek lo." 
Jeremiah34:15 Tûn hnai mai khân in inchhîr a, ka mit hmuha thil dik in ti a, mi tinin mahni chipuite in chhuah tâk thu in puang a. Ka hming chuanna inah, ka hmaah thu in thlung a." 
Jeremiah34:16 Mahse, in lamlêt leh a, ka hming in tichhia a, mi tinin in bawihnu leh bawihpate in chhuah chauh va, in bawiha awm leh tûrin in la lui leh ta a ni.”" 
Jeremiah34:17 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ka thu in zâwm lo va, in chipuite tân zalênna thu in puang lo va, kei erawh chuan in tân zalênna thu ka puang ta: khandaih te, hripui te, ṭâm tea in thihna tûr zalênna chu. Khawvêl ram tin tân ṭihkhaiah ka siam ang che u." 
Jeremiah34:18 Ka thuthlung bawhchhiaa ka hmaa thuthlung an siam bawhchhiaa, thuthlung zâwm lo chu bâwngno zai bun, a kâra an kal tlang ṭhinna angin ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah34:19 Juda hruaitute, Jerusalem-a hruaitute, rorêltute, puithiamte, ram chhûng mipui, bâwngno tan bun kâra kalte chu," 
Jeremiah34:20 an hmêlma, thah tumtute kutah ka pe ang. An ruang chu chunglêng savate leh ramsate chaw a ni ang." 
Jeremiah34:21 Juda lal Zedekia leh a upate chu an hmêlma, anmahni thah tumtute leh Babulon lal sipai, anmahni ṭinsantute kutah ka pe ang." 
Jeremiah34:22 He khawpuia lo lût leh tûrin thu ka pe ang. An rawn bei leh ang a, an la ang a, an hâl chhe vek ang. Juda khawpuite chu luahtu awm lovin ka tiram ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah35:1 Juda lal Josia fapa Jehoiakima lal laiin Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah hetiangin a lo thleng a. 
Jeremiah35:2 “Rekaba chhûngte hnênah kal la, Lalpa in pindan chhûngah hruai la, anni chu uain in tûr pe rawh,” tiin." 
Jeremiah35:3 Tichuan, Habazinia fapa, Jeremia fa, Jaazania leh a unaute, a fa zawng zawngte leh Rekaba chhûngte zawng zawng chu ka hruai a." 
Jeremiah35:4 Lalpa inah chuan anni chu ka hruai a, Pathian mi Igdalia fapa Hanana fate pindanah ka luhpui a, chu chu hotute pindan kiang, kawngkhâr vêngtu Saluma fapa Maaseia pindan chunga awm a ni." 
Jeremiah35:5 Tin, Rekaba chhûngte hmaah chuan chawhtawlh khat uain leh no ka dah a. “Uain hi in rawh u,” ka ti a." 
Jeremiah35:6 Anni chuan, “Uain kan in ngai lo, kan pa Rekaba fapa Jonadaba chuan, ‘Nangni leh in fate hian kumkhuain uain in reng reng suh u,’ tiin thu min chah a ni,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah35:7 “ ‘In pawh in sa tûr a ni lo, thlai in chîng tûr a ni lo va, grep huan pawh in siam tûr a ni hek lo. He in mikhualna ramah hian in dam rei theihna tûrin in dam chhûng nite chu puan inahte hmang zâwk ang che u,’ tiin thu min pe a ni." 
Jeremiah35:8 Tichuan, kan thlahtupa Rekaba fapa Jonadaba thu min pêk zawng zawng chu kan zâwm a, keini leh kan nupuite, kan fapate leh fanute chenin tu man uain kan in ngai lo." 
Jeremiah35:9 Kan awmna tûr in kan sa lo va, grep huan kan siam lo va, lo leh thlai kan nei hek lo." 
Jeremiah35:10 Puan inahte kan chêng a, min thlahtu Jonadaba thu min pêk chu a kip a kawiin kan zâwm a," 
Jeremiah35:11 Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran he ram a rûn khân keini chuan, ‘Hawh u, Babulon sipai leh Suria sipai laka kan him nân Jerusalem-ah i chho vang u,’ kan ti a; tichuan, Jerusalem-ah hian kan awm ta a ni,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah35:12 Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a. 
Jeremiah35:13 Israel-te Pathian, Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Juda mite leh Jerusalem-a chêngte hnênah kal la, hêng thu hi sawi rawh, ‘Ka thute ngaithla lovin ka zirtîrnate in pawm lo vang maw?’ Lalpa chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah35:14 Rekaba fapa Jonadaba fate chuan an thlahtuten uain in lo tûra thu an pêk chu zâwmin tûn thlengin an in ta lo va. Kei erawh chuan in hnêna thu ka sawi ka sawi pawhin in ngaithla duh lo va. 
Jeremiah35:15 Ka rawngbâwltu, zâwlnei zawng zawngte in hnêna zing tak taka ka tirhten, ‘Mi tinin in awm dân sual hawisanin in thiltihte siam ṭha ula, pathian dangte rawng bâwl suh u; tichuan, nangni leh in thlahtute ka pêk ram hi in luah dâwn nia,’ an ti a. Mahse, min ngaihsak lo va, ka thu in ngaithla duh si lo." 
Jeremiah35:16 Rekaba fa, Jonadaba thlahte chuan an thlahtu thupêk an zâwm a, nangni erawh chuan ka thu in zâwm lo." 
Jeremiah35:17 Chuvângin, Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a chêng zawng zawng chunga chhiatna lo thleng tûr ka sawite kha ka thlentîr dâwn e. An hnênah thu ka sawi a, an ngaithla si lo, ka ko va, min chhâng duh hek lo,” tiin." 
Jeremiah35:18 Jeremia chuan Rekaba chhûngte hnênah, “Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: In thlahtu Jonadaba thupêk leh a thu zirtîr zawng zawng in pawm a, a thupêk zawng zawng chu in zâwm a;" 
Jeremiah35:19 chuvângin, Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Rekaba fapa Jonadaba thlahte chu kumkhuain ka hmaa ding tûr an awm reng ang.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Juda lal Josia fapa, Jehoiakima lal kum linaah Lalpa thu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah36:2 “Lehkhabu zial la la, Israel-te chungchâng te, Juda leh hnam dang chungchâng te i hnêna ka sawi zawng zawng chu ziak rawh. Josia lal laia i hnêna thu ka sawi ṭan ni aṭanga vawiin thlenga ka sawite kha ziak vek rawh." 
Jeremiah36:3 Juda mite chuan an chunga chhiatna thlentîr ka tumte chu hriain an awm dân sualte an sim mial mahna; an sim chuan an khawlohna leh an sualna chu ka lo ngaidam ang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah36:4 Tichuan, Jeremia chuan Neria fapa Baruka chu a ko va, a hnêna Lalpa thu sawi zawng zawng chu Jeremia chuan a sawi chhuak a, chu chu lehkhabu-ah Baruka chuan a lo ziak zêl a." 
Jeremiah36:5 Jeremia chuan Baruka hnênah, “ Lalpa ina kal thei lovin min khuahkhirh tlat si a;" 
Jeremiah36:6 chuvângin, nang, chaw nghei ni-ah Lalpa inah kal la, Lalpa thu, lehkhabu ziala ka ziaktîr che kha, Lalpa ina awmte hnênah chhiar chhuak rawh, Juda mi, an khua aṭanga lo kal zawng zawng hriatah pawh chhiar ang che." 
Jeremiah36:7 Mite chuan an awm dân sualte hawisanin Lalpa hnênah ngaihdam an dil mial mahna. Lalpa thupuan, a mite laka a thinur nasa tak hi a râpthlâk si a,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah36:8 Tichuan, Neria fapa Baruka chuan zâwlnei Jeremia hrilh ang zêl chuan Lalpa thu chu Lalpa inah chuan a chhiar chhuak ta a." 
Jeremiah36:9 Juda lal Josia fapa, Jehoiakima lal kum ngana, thla kuanaah chuan Jerusalem-a mi zawng zawng leh Judai ram khawpui aṭanga Jerusalem-a lo kal zawng zawngte chuan Lalpa hmaa chaw nghei thu an puang a." 
Jeremiah36:10 Baruka chuan lehkhabu ziala Jeremia thute chu ziaktu Safana fapa Gemaria pindan, Lalpa inah chuan mi zawng zawng hriatah a chhiar a. Chu hmun chu Lalpa in chuanchung luhna kawngka thar bula awm a ni." 
Jeremiah36:11 Safana fapa, Gemaria fapa Mikaia chuan lehkhabu ziala Lalpa thu zawng zawng chu a lo hriatin," 
Jeremiah36:12 lal inah a chhuk a, ziaktu pindanah chuan a lût a; tah chuan hotu zawng zawng an lo ṭhu a. Chûng mite chu Elisama te, Semaia fapa Delaia te, Akbora fapa Elnathana te, Safana fapa Gemaria te, Hanania fapa Zedekia te leh hotu dang zawng zawngte an ni." 
Jeremiah36:13 Barukan mipui hnêna lehkhabu zial a chhiar aṭanga a thil hriat zawng zawng chu Mikaia chuan anni chu a hrilh a. 
Jeremiah36:14 Hotute chuan Nethania fapa Jehudia, Selemia tupa, Kusia tupa chu Baruka hnênah an tîr a, a hnênah, “Mite hmaa i chhiar chhuah lehkhabu zial chu rawn keng la, lo kal rawh,” an ti a. Neria fapa Baruka chu lehkhabu zial kengin an hnênah a lo kal a." 
Jeremiah36:15 A hnênah, “Ṭhu la, kan hriatah chhiar ve teh le,” an ti a. Tin, Baruka chuan an hnênah a chhiar a," 
Jeremiah36:16 Chûng thu chu an hriatin an inen a, Baruka hnênah chuan, “Hêng thu hi lal hnênah kan hrilh ngei ang,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah36:17 Baruka hnênah chuan, “Hêng thute hi engtin nge i ziak, Jeremia thuchhuak ngei a ni maw?” an ti a." 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruka chuan, “Hêng thute hi ka hnênah a sawi a, keiin lehkhabu zialah ka lo ziak chhâwng mai a ni,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah36:19 Tichuan, hotute chuan Baruka hnênah, “Chhuak la, Jeremia nên biru rawh u, tu man in awmna hre suh se,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah36:20 Tin, lal in hung chhûngah an lût a, lehkhabu zial chu ziaktu Elisama pindanah an hnutchhiah a, lal hnênah an thu hriat zawng zawng chu an hrilh a." 
Jeremiah36:21 Lal chuan Jehudia chu lehkhabu zial la tûrin a tîr a, ziaktu Elisama pindan ata chu a va la chhuak a. Jehudia chuan lal leh a vêla hotu ding zawng zawng hriatah a chhiar a." 
Jeremiah36:22 Thla kuana a ni a, lal chu a thlasik ina awm a ni a, meihawl thuk vâm huam chu a ai a." 
Jeremiah36:23 Jehudia chuan lehkhabu zial thlûr thum emaw, thlûr li emaw a chhiar hnu chuan lal chuan chemtêin a zaibung a, thukah a paih lût a, lehkhabu zial chu a kâng ral ta a." 
Jeremiah36:24 Lal leh a ṭhuihruaiho, hêng thu zawng zawng hretute chuan hlau hmêl an pu lo va, an puante an pawtthlêr hek lo." 
Jeremiah36:25 Elnathana te, Delaia te, Gemaria ten lehkhabu zial hâl lo tûra lal chu an ngen chiam pawhin a sâwt chuang lo va ni." 
Jeremiah36:26 Lal chuan, ziaktu Baruka leh zâwlnei Jeremia chu man tûrin lal fapa Jerameela te, Azriela fapa Seraia te, Abdeela fapa Selamia te chu thu a pe ta a; mahse, Lalpa chuan anni chu a thukru a." 
Jeremiah36:27 Lehkhabu zial, Jeremia sawi chhuah Barukan a ziak zawng zawng chu lalin a hâl ral hnu chuan Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah hetiang hian a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah36:28 “Lehkhabu zial dang la la, lehkhabu zial hmasaa thu zawng zawng, Juda lal Jehoiakiman a hâl ral tâkte kha, ziak leh vek rawh." 
Jeremiah36:29 Juda lal Jehoiakima chungchâng thu-ah heti hian ti ang che: ‘Babulon lal a lo kal ang a, he ram hi a tichhia ang a, mihring leh rante a tiboral vek ang, tiin engati nge i ziak?’ tiin lehkhabu zial chu i hâl vei a." 
Jeremiah36:30 Chuvângin, Juda lal Jehoiakima chungthuah Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Davida lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr mi a nei lo vang, a ruang chu chhûn ni sa leh zân khaw vâwt tuar tûrin theh chhuah a ni ang." 
Jeremiah36:31 An sual avângin amah leh a thlahte leh a rawngbâwltute chu ka hrem ang. An chunga chhiatna lo thleng tûr ka sawi te, Jerusalem leh Judai ram mi tin chunga lo thleng tûr ka sawi te hi an pawisak loh avângin,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah36:32 Tichuan, Jeremian lehkhabu zial dang a la a, Neria fapa Baruka, ziaktu hnênah a pe a, ani chuan Jeremia ṭawngka chhuak, lehkhabua ziak tawh zawng zawng, Jehoiakiman a hâl ral tâk thute leh a anpui thu dangte nên a ziak a." 
Jeremiah37:1 Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran Judai ram lal atâna a dah Josia fapa Zedekia chu Jehoiakima fapa Konia aiah a lo lal ta a. 
Jeremiah37:2 Mahse, amah leh a ṭhuihruaite leh a rama mite chuan Lalpa thu zâwlnei Jeremia sawi chu an pawisa lo va." 
Jeremiah37:3 Lal Zedekia chuan Selemia fapa Jehukala leh Maaseia fapa puithiam Zefania chu zâwlnei Jeremia hnênah, ‘khawngaih takin Lalpa, kan Pathian hnênah min ṭawngṭaisak rawh,’ ti tûrin a tîr a." 
Jeremiah37:4 Jeremia chu vântlâng zîngah zalên takin a la vâk vêl thei a, tân inah an la khung lo va ni." 
Jeremiah37:5 Farawa sipaite chu Aigupta aṭangin an lo chhuak chho va. An thâwm chu Jerusalem hualtu, Kaldai-hoten an hriatin Jerusalem chu an ṭinsan a." 
Jeremiah37:6 Lalpa thu chu zâwlnei Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah37:7 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Juda lal, min râwn tûra rawn tîrtu che u hnênah chuan heti hian sawi rawh u: ‘Ngai teh, Farawa sipai, nangmah pui tûra lo chhuakte chu, an ram Aigupta-ah an kîr leh ta." 
Jeremiah37:8 Kaldai-ho chu an lo lêt leh ang a, he khawpui hi an bei ang a, an la ang a, an hâl chhe vek ang,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah37:9 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Kaldai-ho chuan min kalsan ngei ang tiin mahni inbum suh u. An kal bo hlen dâwn si lo. 
Jeremiah37:10 Nangmahni rawn beitu Kaldai sipai rual hi hneh vek mah ula, an zînga hliam tuar, an puan ina mute pawh chu, an lo tho leh ang a, he khawpui hi an hâl chhe vek ang, tiin hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah37:11 Farawa sipai rual an lo hnaih avânga Kaldai sipaite Jerusalem aṭanga an tawlh kîr lai khân," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremia chuan a chipuite zînga a ro chanpual la tûrin Jerusalem chhuahsanin Benjamin bialah a kal dâwn a," 
Jeremiah37:13 Benjamin kawngka chu a thlen chuan vêngtu zînga hotu, a hming Iriza, Selemia fapa, Hanania tupa ni bawk chuan zâwlnei Jeremia chu, “Kaldai-ho hnêna inpêk i tum a nih hi,” tiin a lo man a." 
Jeremiah37:14 Jeremia chuan “Tum lo ve, Kaldai-ho hnênah inpêk ka tum awzâwng lo,” a tih pawhin Iriza chuan a thu sawi chu a ngaithla duh lo va, Jeremia chu a man a, hotute hnênah a hruai ta a." 
Jeremiah37:15 Hotute chu Jeremia chungah chuan an thinur hle a, an vua a, ziaktu Jonathana inah an tântîr a, chu chu tân in atân an hmang a ni." 
Jeremiah37:16 Jeremia chu khur thim takah ni rei tak a awm a. 
Jeremiah37:17 Lal Zedekia chuan a ko chhuak a, ani chu an rawn hruai a. Lal chuan a rûk têin a inah chuan thu a zâwt a, “ Lalpa hnên ata thu eng emaw tal a awm em?” a ti a. Jeremia chuan, “Awm e, Babulon lal kutah i inpe tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah37:18 Jeremia chuan lal Zedekia hnênah chuan, “I lakah emaw, i ṭhuihruaite lakah emaw, mipui lakah emaw, eng nge ka tihsual, eng vângin nge tân ina min dah?” a ti a." 
Jeremiah37:19 “ ‘Babulon lal chu nangmah leh he ram do tûrin a lo kal lo vang’ tia thu puangtu i zâwlneite kha khawiah nge an awm tâk? 
Jeremiah37:20 Tûnah, ka pu Lalber, khawngaih takin ngaithla teh, ka dîl che hi min phalsak hrâm rawh. Ziaktu Jonathana inah chuan min kîrtîr lul suh ang che, chumi hmunah zawng ka thi mai ang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah37:21 Lal Zedekia chuan thu a pe a, Jeremia chu vêngtu hung chhûngah chuan a tântîr a, chhang siamtute hnên aṭangin ni tin chhang tlang khat khawpuia chhang a awm chhûng chu a pe a. Chutiang chuan Jeremia chu vêngtu hung chhûngah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Jeremiah38:1 Matana fapa Sefatia te, Pasura fapa Gedalia te, Selemia fapa Jukala te, Malakia fapa Pasura te chuan mi hnêna hetianga Jeremia thu sawi chu an hria a." 
Jeremiah38:2 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, ‘He khawpuia awmte chu khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripuite tuarin an thi ang a, Kaldai-ho hnêna inpete erawh chu an him ang; an man ang a, an nung ang.’" 
Jeremiah38:3 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, ‘He khawpui hi Babulon lal sipaite kutah pêk a ni ngei ang a; tichuan, an la ang’ tiin." 
Jeremiah38:4 Tin, hotute chuan lal hnênah, “He mi hi tihhlum tûr a ni, he khawpuia sipai la awmte leh mipuite hi hêng thu a sawi avângte hian an zâm zo ta si a. He mi hian mipui ṭhatna zawng lovin an chhiatna tûr a zawng zâwk a ni,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah38:5 Lal Zedekia chuan, “Ngai teh u, ani chu in kuta awm alâwm, lal hi in duh loh zâwng ti thei a ni hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:6 Tichuan, Jeremia chu an hruai a, vêngtu hung chhûnga lal fapa Malkia tuichhunchhuah chhûngah an thlâk a; Jeremia chu hruizênin an thlâk a ni, a chhûngah chuan chirhdiak chauh lo chu tui rêng a tling lo va, chirhdiakah chuan Jeremia chu a tla ta a." 
Jeremiah38:7 Ethiopia mi, mi tilreh, lal ina awm ṭhîn Ebedmeleka chuan Jeremia chu tuichhunchhuah mawngah an thlâk tih a lo hria a. Chutih lai chuan lal chu Benjamin kawngkaah ro a rêl a." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedmeleka chu lal in ata a chhuak a, lal hnênah chuan," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Ka pu, lalber, hêng mite hian zâwlnei Jeremia chungah thil sual nasa tak an ti a ni. Tuichhunchhuah chhûngah an thlâk a, rilṭâmin chutah chuan a thi mai ang, khawpuiah chaw a awm tawh si lo,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:10 Lal chuan Ethiopia mi Ebedmeleka chu thu a pe a, “Heta ṭangin mi sawmthum hruai la, zâwlnei Jeremia chu a thih hmain tuichhunchhuah ata chu la chhuak rawh u,” tiin." 
Jeremiah38:11 Ebedmeleka chuan mite chu a hruai a, lal tangka in hnuai, thawmhnaw hlui dahnaah chuan an lût a, chuta kawr leh puan chhiate chu an la a, tuichhunchhuah chhûnga Jeremia hnênah chuan hruizênin an thlâkthla a." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ethiopia mi, Ebedmeleka chuan Jeremia hnênah, “Hêng kawr hlui leh puan chhiate hi i zak damah hrên hnan rawh,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:13 Tichuan, Jeremia chu tuichhunchhuah ata chu hruizênin an khai chhuak a, vêngtu hung chhûngah chuan a awm ta a." 
Jeremiah38:14 Lal Zedekia chuan Jeremia chu a ko va, Lalpa in luhna kawngkhâr pathumnaah an rawn hruai a. Lal chuan Jeremia hnênah, “Thil ka zâwt ang che a, ka hnênah eng mah sawi hreh suh ang che,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremia chuan Zedekia hnênah, “Ka hrilh vek che chuan min tihlum mai lo vang maw? Thu râwn che mah ila min ngaithla awm si lo va,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:16 Lal Zedekia chuan Jeremia hnênah: “ Lalpa, ka nunna siamtu hmingin ka tihlum tawp lo vang che, hêng tihhlum tumtu che hnênah pawh hian ka pe tawp lo vang che,” tiin a rûk têin thu a tiam a." 
Jeremiah38:17 Jeremia chuan Zedekia hnênah, “Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Babulon lal sipai kuta in inpêk chuan in him ang a, he khawpui hi hâl chhiat a ni lo vang a, nang leh i chhûngte pawh zuah in ni ang."
