Jeremiah38:18 Babulon lal sipai kuta in inpêk loh erawh chuan he khawpui hi Babulon mite kutah pêk a ni ang, an hâl chhe vek ang a, nang pawh an kut ata i chhuak lo vang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:19 Lal Zedekia chuan Jeremia hnênah, “Babulon mite hnêna inpe Juda-hote hi ka hlau a ni. An kutah min pe ang a, min sawisa hrep mai ang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremia chuan, “An pe hauh lo vang che, Lalpa thu ka hrilh che hi awih mai rawh; chu chu i tân a ṭha ang, i nun pawh zuah a ni ang." 
Jeremiah38:21 I inpêk duh loh erawh chuan hei hi Lalpa thu min hriattîr chu a ni. 
Jeremiah38:22 Juda lal ina hmeichhe la awm zawng zawng chu Babulon lal hotute hnênah an hruai ang a, chûng hmeichhiate chuan i hnênah heti hian an sawi ang: ‘I ṭhian ṭhaten an bum che a, an thuhnuaiah an dah ta che, chirhdiaka i ke a tân laiin an hawisan ta che,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah38:23 “I nupui leh i fate chu Babulon-ah an hruai vek ang. Nang pawh an kut ata i chhuak lo vang; Babulon lalin a man ang che a, he khawpui hi a kâng chhe vek ang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:24 Zedekia chuan Jeremia hnênah: “Hêng thute hi tu man hre suh se; tichuan, i thi lo vang." 
Jeremiah38:25 Hotuten ka bia che tih an hriat chuan i hnênah an lo kal ang a, ‘Lal hnênah eng nge i sawia, lalin i hnênah eng nge a sawi, min hrilh rawh, eng mah zêp suh, kan tihlum lo vang che,’ an tih chuan" 
Jeremiah38:26 nangin an hnênah, ‘Lal chu Jonathana ina min tîr kîr lo tûrin ka ngên a ni, i ti dâwn nia,’ a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:27 An vaiin hotute chu Jeremia hnênah an lo kal a, an zâwt ta ngei a, lalin sawi tûra a tih angin anni chu a lo hrilh a. Tichuan, a hnênah eng mah an sawi zêl ta lo va, lal nêna an inbiakna thu pawh tu man an hre hek lo." 
Jeremiah38:28 Jeremia chu Jerusalem an lâk ni thlengin vêngtu hung chhûngah chuan a awm ta reng a. 
Jeremiah39:1 Judai lal Zedekia lal kum kuana, a thla sâwmnaah Babulon lal Nebukadnezara leh a sipai rualte chuan Jerusalem an rûn a, an hual tlat a." 
Jeremiah39:2 Zedekia lal kum sâwm leh kum khatna, thla lina, ni kua ni chuan kulh chu tihchim a ni ta a." 
Jeremiah39:3 Babulon lal milianhote chu an lo lût a, kawngka laita bulah chuan awmhmun an rem a. Chûng mite chu: Nergal-serezera te, Samgarneboa te, Sarsekima te, Rab-saria te, Nergal-sarezera te, Rabmaga te leh Babulon lal milian leh hotu dang te an ni." 
Jeremiah39:4 Juda lal Zedekia leh a sipai zawng zawngte chuan anni chu an hmuhin an tlânchhe ta a. Zânah lal huan kawng, kulh bang pahnih inkâr kawngah an relhru a, Arabah lam panna kawngah an tlân ta a." 
Jeremiah39:5 Babulon sipaite chuan anni chu an ûm a, Jordan phaiah Zedekia chu an ûm pha a, an man a, Babulon lal Nebukadnezara hnênah, Hamat rama Ribla khuaah an hruai a; chutah chuan a chungthu an rêl a." 
Jeremiah39:6 Babulon lal chuan Ribla hmunah Juda mi ṭha zawng zawng leh a fate chu Zedekia hmuh lai ngeiin a that a. 
Jeremiah39:7 Zedekia mitmu a kher chhuak a, thîr kawl a buntîr a, Babulon-ah a hruai ta a." 
Jeremiah39:8 Kaldai-ho chuan lal in leh in dang zawng zawng chu an hâl a, Jerusalem kulh bangte an tichim a." 
Jeremiah39:9 Lal vêngtu hotu, Nebuzaradana chuan khawpuia mipui la awmte, a hnêna inpete nên, an za vaiin Babulon-ah salah a hruai a." 
Jeremiah39:10 Lal vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradana chuan mi rethei, eng mah nei lote chu Judai ramah chuan a hnutchhiah a, grep huan leh lote a pe nghâl a." 
Jeremiah39:11 Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chuan lal vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradana hnênah hetiangin thu a pe a: 
Jeremiah39:12 “Ani hi chu hruai la, ṭha takin enkawl rawh, tina rêng rêng suh, a ngen apiang tihsak zâwk ang che,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah39:13 Tichuan, lal vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradana te, sipai lal ber Nebusazbana te, aienthiam hotupa Nergel-Sarezara te leh Babulon hotu lian zawng zawngte chuan Jeremia chu vêngtu hung chhûng ata an hruai chhuak a," 
Jeremiah39:14 Safana fa, Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnênah, a ina hruai tûrin an hlân a; tichuan, mi dang zîngah a khawsa ve ta a." 
Jeremiah39:15 Vêngtu hung chhûnga Jeremia a awm lai chuan Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a. 
Jeremiah39:16 “Kal la Ebedmeleka hrilh rawh, ‘Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti: He khawpui ṭhatna tûr ni lovin a chhiatna tûr zâwkin ka thute ka hlen dâwn. Chutih hunah chuan, i mit hmuh ngeiah chung thil chu a lo thleng ang." 
Jeremiah39:17 Chumi hunah chuan, nang erawh chu ka hum ang che,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. I hlauhte kutah chuan pêk i ni lo vang." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ka chhan ang che a, khandaihah i thi lo vang a, i him zâwk ang, mi rin tlat avângin,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah40:1 Lal vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradana chuan Rama khua aṭanga Jeremia a chhuahtîr hnuin a hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a. Jeremia chu Judai ram leh Jerusalem aṭanga sal man, khaidiat bun chunga Babulon lama an hruai chhohte zîngah a tel ve a ni." 
Jeremiah40:2 Lal vêngtu hotu chuan Jeremia chu a hruai hrang a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa, i Pathian chuan he hmuna chhiatna lo thleng tûr hi a lo puang tawh a." 
Jeremiah40:3 Tûnah, a sawi ang ngeiin a thlentîr ta a nih hi. Lalpa chungah thil in tisual a, a thu in awih loh avângin hêng hi a lo thleng ta a nih hi." 
Jeremiah40:4 Mahse, nang zawng, vawiin aṭangin i khaidiat bun hi ka phelhsak a che. I duh chuan ka hnênah Babulon-ah kal la, ka enkawl ang che. I duh loh leh lo kal lo mai la, i duh duhnaah i kal thei e,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah40:5 Jeremian a chhân hmain “Babulon lalin Juda khuate awp tûra a ruat, Safana fa, Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnênah kîr leh la, a hnênah awm ang che, a nih leh i duh duhnaah i kal dâwn nia,” a ti leh a. Tichuan, lal vêngtu hotu chuan ei tûr leh thilpêk a pe a, a kaltîr ta a." 
Jeremiah40:6 Jeremia chu Ahikama fa Gedalia hnênah Mizpa khuaah a kal a, an rama la châmbângte zîngah a awm ve ta a." 
Jeremiah40:7 Sipai hotute leh mi dang, ramhnuaia awm zawng zawng chuan Babulon lalin Ahikama fapa Gedalia chu ram awptu, ram chhûnga mi retheite leh hmeichhia te, naupang te, Babulon-a sala hruai ve loh te enkawltu atân a ruat tih an lo hria a." 
Jeremiah40:8 Mizpa khuaah Gedalia hmu tûrin hêng mi, Nethania fapa Ismaela te, Korea fapa Johanana te, Tanhumeta fapa Seraia te, Netofa mi Efaia fapa, Makath mi Jezania leh mi dang te an lo kal a." 
Jeremiah40:9 Safana fa Ahikama fapa Gedalia chuan an hnênah leh a mite hnênah chuan, “Kaldai-ho rawngbâwl chu hlau reng reng suh u, ram hi luah ula, Babulon lal rawng hi bâwl ula, in tân a ṭha ang." 
Jeremiah40:10 Kei pawh in aiawha Babulon mite hmaa ding tûrin Mizpa khuaah ka awm ang a, nangnin uain te, nipui thei te, hriak te la khâwm ula, in bêlahte khung ṭha ang che u; in khaw luahahte chuan chêng reng ang che u,” tiin an hnênah thu a chah a." 
Jeremiah40:11 Chutiang bawkin, Moab rama Juda awm zawng zawng te, Edom rama awmte leh ram danga Juda awm zawng zawngte chuan Babulon lalin mi tlêm tê Judai rama a hnutchhiah thu leh Safana fa, Ahikama fapa Gedalia chu chûngho awptu atân a ruat tih an lo hria a." 
Jeremiah40:12 Tichuan, an darhna ram hrang hrang ata Juda-te chu Judai ramah an lo kîr a, Mizpa khuaa awm Gedalia hnênah an lo thleng a, uain leh nipui thei tam tak an kensak a." 
Jeremiah40:13 Korea fapa Johanana leh sipai hotu ramhnuaia la awmte pawh chu Mizpa khuaa Gedalia hnênah an lo kal a. 
Jeremiah40:14 A hnênah, “Amon mite lal Baalisa chuan Nethania fapa Ismaela chu nangmah that tûrin a tîr tih i hre na nge?” an ti a. Ahikama fapa Gedalia erawh chuan a ring lo va." 
Jeremiah40:15 Korea fapa Johanana chuan a rûk têin Mizpa khuaa awm Gedalia hnênah chuan “Nethania fapa Ismaela that tûr chuan min kaltîr mai teh, eng vângin nge i nunna a lâk ang? Nangmah bêla Juda mi awm zawng zawng leh Judai rama la châmbângte chu an darhin an boral vek dâwn asin,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah40:16 Ahikama fapa Gedalia erawh chuan Korea fapa Johanana hnênah chuan, “Chu thil chu ti suh, Ismaela chungchâng i sawi hi dâwt a ni,” a tihsan a." 
Jeremiah41:1 Thla sarihnaah chuan Elisama fa, Nethania fapa Ismaela, lal chi, lal khâwnbâwl zînga mi chu mi sâwm hruaiin Mizpa khuaah Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnênah a lo kal a, Mizpa khuaah chuan chaw an ei ho va." 
Jeremiah41:2 Nethania fapa Ismaela chu a mi hruai sâwmte nên chuan an tho thut a, Safana fapa Ahikama fa Gedalia, Babulon lalin ramawptua a dah chu, khandaihin an that a." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ismaela chuan Mizpa khuaa Gedalia hnêna Juda awm zawng zawng leh Babulon sipai, chumi hmuna awmte chu a that bawk a." 
Jeremiah41:4 Gedalia an thah tûkah, tu mahin an hriat hmain," 
Jeremiah41:5 Sekem aṭang te, Silo aṭang te, Samaria aṭang tein mi sawmriat an lo thleng a. An khabehmul an mêt a, an kawrte an tiṭet a, an inzai kak a, Lalpa ina chhang leh rimtui hlân tûra lo kal an ni." 
Jeremiah41:6 Nethania fapa Ismaela chu Mizpa aṭangin anmahni lo hmuak tûrin a chhuak a, kawng tluanin a ṭap a. Anni chu a han hmuh chuan an hnênah, “Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnênah lo kal rawh u,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah41:7 Khawpui chhûng an lo luh chuan Nethania fapa Ismaela leh a ṭhuihruaite chuan an lo that a, khuarkhurumah an paih a." 
Jeremiah41:8 Chûng zînga mi sâwmte erawh chuan Ismaela hnênah, “Min that suh, buh te, barli te, hriak te, khawizu te lovah kan thukru ṭeuh a nia,” an ti a. Tichuan, anni chu a zuah a, an ṭhiante zîngah chuan an that ve ta lo va." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ismaelan a mi thahte ruang a paihna khuarkhurum chu lal Asa-an Israel lal Baasa laka invên nâna a laih a ni. Nethania fapa Ismaela chuan Gedalia leh a hote a thah ruangin a tikhat tlat a. 
Jeremiah41:10 Ismaela chuan Mizpah-a mi la awm zawng zawng, lal fanu te, lal vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradanan Gedalia enkawl tûra Mizpa khuaa a dah zawng zawngte chu salah a man a, Nethania fapa Ismaela chuan Amon ramah a hruai ta a." 
Jeremiah41:11 Korea fapa Johanana leh sipai hotu, a hnêna awm zawng zawngte chuan Nethania fapa Ismaelan thil sual a tihte chu an hria a." 
Jeremiah41:12 Nethania fapa Ismaela bei tûrin an mite an khâwm a, an kal ta a. Gibeon khaw kianga dîl lian tak bulah chuan an va ûmphâk a." 
Jeremiah41:13 Ismaela hnêna mipui awm zawng zawngte chuan Korea fapa Johanana leh a hnêna sipai hotu awm zawng zawng chu an hmuhin an lâwm ta êm êm a. 
Jeremiah41:14 Ismaelan Mizpa aṭanga sala a hruai zawng zawng chu an lo kîr a, Korea fapa Johanana hnênah an pakai ta vek a." 
Jeremiah41:15 Nethania fapa Ismaela leh a hote pariat chu Johanana lak aṭangin an him hrâm a, Amon mite hnênah an tlânchhia a." 
Jeremiah41:16 Korea fapa Johanana leh a hnêna sipai hotu awmte chuan Nethania fapa Ismaelan Ahikama fapa Gedalia a thah hnua Mizpa aṭanga sala a man zawng zawng indo mi te, hmeichhia te, naupang te, mi tilreh te chu Gibeon aṭangin an hruai haw ta vek a." 
Jeremiah41:17 Tichuan, Aigupta rama kal tumin an kal zêl a, Bethlehem kiang Gerut chhim lam hmunah chuan an châwl a." 
Jeremiah41:18 Babulon lalin ram awptu atâna a dah Ahikama fapa Gedalia chu Nethania fapa Ismaelan a thah avângin Kaldai-ho chu an hlau hle a ni. 
Jeremiah42:1 Korea fapa Johanana te, Hosaia fapa Jezania te, sipai hotu zawng zawng leh mipui, a tê ber aṭanga a lian ber thlengin an lo kal a," 
Jeremiah42:2 Zâwlnei Jeremia hnênah chuan, “Kan dîl hi min ngaihthlâksak la, Lalpa kan Pathian hnênah mi la dam zawng zawng tân ṭawngṭai rawh. Min hmuh ang hian tam tak ni ṭhîn kha, tlêm tê chauh hnutchhiah kan ni ta si a." 
Jeremiah42:3 Lalpa, i Pathianin kan kawng zawh tûr te, kan tih tûr te min kawhhmuh rawh se,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah42:4 Zâwlnei Jeremia chuan anni chu a chhâng a, “In thu chu ka hria e, tûnah, Lalpa, in Pathian hnênah in ngen angin ka dîlsak ang che u, Lalpa chuan in hnêna a sawi apiang ka hrilh ang che u a, in lakah eng mah ka zêp lo vang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah42:5 Anni chuan Jeremia hnênah, “ Lalpa i Pathianin kan tâna thu a hrilh che anga kan tih loh chuan Lalpa chu kan lakah hretu rinawm leh dik tak ni rawh se." 
Jeremiah42:6 Kan tirhna che Lalpa thu chu a chhia a ṭha kan zâwm ang. Lalpa, kan Pathian thu kan awih zêl chuan kan tân a ṭha dâwn si a,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah42:7 Ni sâwm hnuah Jeremia hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a. 
Jeremiah42:8 Korea fapa Johanana leh a hnêna sipai hotu awm zawng zawng te, mipui, a tê ber aṭanga a lian ber thlengin a ko khâwm a." 
Jeremiah42:9 An hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, a hnêna ṭawngṭai tûra min tirhna khân heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘He rama in awm reng chuan ka tungding ang che u a, ka tidarh lo vang che u. Ka phun ang che u a, ka pawt chhuak lo vang che u. In chungah thil ṭha lo ka thlentîr avângin ka rilru a na a ni." 
Jeremiah42:11 In hlauh Babulon lal hi hlau tawh suh u, ani chu hlau suh u,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Chhan tûr che u leh a kut ata chhan chhuak tûr che uin kei in hnênah ka awm si a." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ka khawngaih ang che u a, ani pawhin a khawngaih ang che u; tichuan, in ramah hian in awm reng ang." 
Jeremiah42:13 “Amaherawhchu, Lalpa in Pathian thu zâwm lova, ‘He ramah hian kan awm lo vang a," 
Jeremiah42:14 Aigupta ramah kan kal zâwk ang; tah chuan, indo thâwm te, tawtawrâwt ri te, ṭâm te hre lovin kan awm ang,’ in tih chuan" 
Jeremiah42:15 Juda mi la dam chhunte u, Lalpa thu hi hre rawh u; Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Aigupta rama lûta awm in tum tlat chuan" 
Jeremiah42:16 khandaih in hlauh ngei khân Aigupta ramah a nangchîng ang che u, in hlauh ṭhin ṭâmin Aigupta ramah a ûmzui ang che u a; tah chuan, in thi ang." 
Jeremiah42:17 A ni, Aigupta rama kala awm tum lui apiangte chu khandaih te, ṭâm te, hrite tuarin an thi ang. Thil ṭha lo an chunga ka thlentîr tûr lak ata tu mah himin an chhuak lo vang.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ka thinurna nasa tak Jerusalem-a ka leihbua ang khân Aigupta-a kalte chungah pawh ka leihbua ang. Ânchhia te, hmusit te, sawichhiat te leh hau te in tuar ang a, he ram hi in hmu leh tawh lo vang.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 Juda mi la dam chhunte u, Lalpa chuan a hrilh che u hi, Aigupta-ah chuan lût suh u. Vawiina ka thu hrilh che u hi ngai pawimawh teh u." 
Jeremiah42:20 Thihpui hial khawp thil sual lian tak in ti a ni. Lalpa, in Pathian hnênah min tîr a, ‘ Lalpa, kan Pathian hnênah min ṭawngṭaisak la, a sawi apiang kan ti ang,’ in ti a." 
Jeremiah42:21 Tûnah, in hnêna ka puan, Lalpa, in Pathianin min hrilh chu in zâwm leh si lo." 
Jeremiah42:22 Tûnah, hre rawh u, in awm duhna hmun ngeiah chuan khandaih te, ṭâm te, hri te tuarin in thi ang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah43:1 Lalpa an Pathianin mi tin hnêna sawi tûra a tirh ang taka Lalpa, an Pathian thu chu, mi zawng zawng hnêna Jeremian a sawi hnu chuan" 
Jeremiah43:2 Hosaia fapa Azaria leh Korea fapa Johanana leh mi chapohote chuan, “Dâwt i sawi a ni, Lalpa kan Pathianin, ‘Aigupta rama awm tûrin kal suh u,’ tia sawi tûrin a tîr lo che." 
Jeremiah43:3 Kaldai miten min mana min thah emaw, Babulon-a sala min hruai theihna tûrin emaw Neria fapa Baruka chuan a fuihpawrh che a nih zâwk hi,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah43:4 Tichuan, Korea fapa Johanana te, sipai hotute leh mipui zawng zawng chuan, ‘Judai rama awm tûr,’ tia Lalpa thupêk chu an zâwm ta lo va." 
Jeremiah43:5 Korea fapa Johanana leh sipai hotu zawng zawng chuan Juda mi la dam chhun, hnam tin zînga an hnawhdarhna ata Judai rama awm tûra lo kîrte chu an hruai a." 
Jeremiah43:6 Chûngte chu mipa te, hmeichhia te, naupang te, lal fanu te, lal vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradanan Safana fa, Ahikama fapa Gedalia hova awm tûra a hnutchhiah te, zâwlnei Jeremia te, Neria fapa Baruka te an ni." 
Jeremiah43:7 Tichuan, Lalpa thu zâwm lovin Aigupta ramah chuan an lût a, Tahfanes khua an thleng ta a." 
Jeremiah43:8 Tahfanes-ah chuan Lalpa thu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Juda mite hmuh lai ngeiin lung lian pui pui la la, Tahfanes hmuna Farawa in panna kawng rem sirah hlum chawhdiakah phûm rawh." 
Jeremiah43:10 An hnênah heti hian ti ang che, ‘Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ka chhiahhlawh Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chu ka rawn tîr ang a, hêng lung; he laia ka phûmtîr che chungahte hian a lalṭhutthlêng a hûng ang a, a puan in a kaih bawk ang." 
Jeremiah43:11 Ani chu a lo kal ang a, Aigupta ram chu a rawn la dâwn a ni. Thi tûra an ruat chu an thi ang a, sala hruai tûra a tihte salah a hruai ang a, khandaiha thah tûr a tihte chu a that ang." 
Jeremiah43:12 Aigupta mite pathian inte chu a hâl chhe vek ang a, an pathian chu a la bo vek bawk ang. Berâmpuin a kawr ata hrik a enfai angin Aigupta ram chu a thian fai vek ang a, ngaihngam takin a hâwnsan ang." 
Jeremiah43:13 Aigupta rama ni pathian an biakna in ban lung an cheite chu a titliak ang a, Aigupta mite pathian biak inte chu a hâl chhe vek ang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah44:1 Aigupta rama Juda awm zawng zawng, Migdol khuaa awm te, Tahfanes khuaa awm te, Nof khuaa awm te, Pathros rama awmte chungchânga Lalpa thu Jeremia hnêna lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah44:2 Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Jerusalem leh Judai ram khawpui zawng zawng ka tihchhiat in hmu a, tûnah hian a ram vek a, tu mah an awm ta lo." 
Jeremiah44:3 Thil sual tiin min tithinur a, anni leh in thlahtute pawhin in hriat ngai loh pathiante biaa rimtui in hâl avângin," 
Jeremiah44:4 Ka chhiahhlawh zâwlneite in hnênah ka rawn tîr fo va, hêng thil tenawm, ka huatzâwng hi ti lo tûrin an hrilh ṭhîn che u a." 
Jeremiah44:5 Mahse, in ngaithla lo va, in pawisa hek lo." 
Jeremiah44:6 Chuvângin, ka thinur nasa tak chu ka leihbua a, Juda khawpuite leh Jerusalem kawtthlêrte chu a kâng ta a ni. Vawiina a awm ang hian nasa takin a chhe ta a ni.”" 
Jeremiah44:7 Lalpa, Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan tûnah thu a sawi e: “Engati nge in zînga mipa leh hmeichhia, naupang leh nausên, Juda-te zînga tu mah zuah lova lâk bo vekna khawp hetiang thil ṭha lo in tih?" 
Jeremiah44:8 In khawsakna Aigupta ram pathiante hnênah rimtui in hâl a, in siamchawp milemte ngei chuan min tithinur ta a nih hi. Khawvêl hnam tin sawichhiat leh ânchhe dawng atân in insiam a, in intichhe ta a ni." 
Jeremiah44:9 Judai ram leh Jerusalem kawtthlêra in thlahtute suahsualna te, Juda lalte leh an nupuite thil sual tihte leh in nupuite nêna in bawhchhiatnate chu in theihnghilh ta em ni?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Vawiin thlengin in la sim lo va, min ṭih chuang hek lo. Nangni leh in thlahtute tâna ka dân leh ka thupêk in zâwm lo.”" 
Jeremiah44:11 Chuvângin, Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, in tâna thil ṭha lo, Juda zawng zawng boral vekna tûr ka thlentîr dâwn." 
Jeremiah44:12 Juda mi la dam chhun, Aigupta rama pêm tumte chu ka la bo vang. Aigupta ramah chuan khandaih an tuar ang a, ṭhenkhat rilṭâmin an thi ang a, an boral vek ang. A tê ber aṭanga a lian ber thlengin khandaih leh ṭâm tuarin an thi ang. Mi ânchhia an dawng ang a, hlauh te, sawichhiat te, hau te an tuar ang." 
Jeremiah44:13 Jerusalem-a awmte ka hrem ang bawkin Aigupta-a awmte chu khandaih te, ṭâm te, hri tein ka hrem ang." 
Jeremiah44:14 Aigupta rama Juda mi la dam chhunte chuan kîr an châk êm êm ang a; mahse, tu mah Judai ramah nungdamin an kîr lo vang; mi tlêm tê, tlânchhuakte chauh lo chu.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Aigupta rama Pathros hmuna Juda awm zawng zawng, an nupuiten pathian dang hnênahte rimtui an hlân ṭhîn tih hre reng pahote leh an zînga hmeichhe tel ve zawng zawng, mipui nasa tak pung khâwm chuan Jeremia chu an chhâng a," 
Jeremiah44:16 “ Lalpa hminga kan hnêna thu i sawite kha kan ngaithla lo vang. 
Jeremiah44:17 Thu kan lo tiam tawh angin kan awm zâwk ang a, vân lalnu hnênah rimtui kan hâl ang a, in tûr thilhlante a tân kan bun chhuak ang. Keini leh min thlahtute, kan lalte leh kan hotuten Judai ram khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem kawtthlêra an tih ṭhin ang khân kan ti ve ang. Chûng lai chuan ei tûr kan ngah a, kan hmuingîl a, chhiat pawh kan tâwk hek lo." 
Jeremiah44:18 Vân lalnu hnêna rimtui hâl leh a tâna in tûr thilhlan bun chhuah kan bânsan chinah erawh chuan eng mah kan nei ta lo va, khandaih leh ṭâm tuarin kan boral ta a nih hi,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah44:19 Hmeichhiate chuan, “Vân lalnu hnêna rimtui hâla, in tûr thilhlan kan bun chhuah te, a lim anga chhang kan ur te, a tâna in tûr thilhlan kan bun chhuah te kha kan pasalte hriatpuia ti kan ni lo vem ni?” an ti bawk a." 
Jeremiah44:20 Jeremia chuan hetianga amah chhângtu, a hmei a pa, mi zawng zawng hnênah chuan," 
Jeremiah44:21 “ Lalpa chuan Judai ram khawpuiah te, Jerusalem kawtthlêrah te nangni leh in lalte, in hotute, in thlahtute ram chhûng mi zawng zawngin rimtui in hâl ṭhîn tih a hre reng a, a theihnghilh lo tih in hre na nge?" 
Jeremiah44:22 In thil sual tihte Lalpa chuan a tuar thei ta lo va, thil tenawm tak in tih avângin ram chu a chhe zo va, ânchhe dawng, tu ma luah lohvin tûnah a lo awm ta a nih hi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Tûna in chan chhiatna hi pathian dangte hnênah in inthawi a, Lalpa thupêk te, a dân te leh a thu hriattîr te zâwm lovin in sualsan vâng a ni,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah44:24 Jeremia chuan mipuite leh hmeichhiate hnênah chuan, “Nangni Juda mi, Aigupta rama awm zawng zawngte u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Jeremiah44:25 Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Vân lalnu hnêna rimtui hâl leh in tûr thilhlan bun chhuah, kan nupuite nên kan lo tiam tawh chu kan hlen ngei ang,’ tiin in ṭawng a, in thiltihin in tilang bawk a. In sawi ang chuan ti ula, in thutiam chu hlen mai rawh u." 
Jeremiah44:26 Amaherawhchu, nangni Aigupta rama Juda mi zawng zawngte u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla teh u: ‘Ngai teh u, ka hming ropui tak chhâlin thu ka tiam ta,’ Lalpa chuan a ti. Aigupta rama Juda awmten, ‘Engkim Lalpa chu mi nung alâwm,’ tiin ka hming an chhâl tawh ngai lo vang." 
Jeremiah44:27 Ngai teh u, an ṭhatna tûr ni lovin an chhiatna tûr zâwkin anni chu ka châng reng a ni. An boral vek hma chu Aigupta rama Juda zawng zawng chuan khandaih te, ṭâm te an tuar ang." 
Jeremiah44:28 Khandaih pumpelha Aigupta ram aṭanga Judai rama kîr lehte chu tlêm tê chauh an ni ang. Aigupta rama awm tum, la dam chhunte chuan ka thu nge dik an thu an hria ang." 
Jeremiah44:29 He hmunah hian ka hrem dâwn che u a ni; tichuan, ka thute hi in chhiatna tûr a lo ni ngei tih in hria ang, tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah44:30 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Hre rawh u, Aigupta lal Hofra Farawa chu amah thah tumtu, a hmêlmate kutah ka pe ang, Judai lal Zedekia, amah thah tumtu, Babulon lal Nabukadnezara kuta ka pe ang khân,’ ” a ti a." 
Jeremiah45:1 Josia fapa Jehoiakima, Judai rama a lal kum linaah, Beria fapa Barukan zâwlnei Jeremia hnêna thu lo thleng chu lehkhabu-ah a ziak chhuak a, chutih lai chuan Jeremian a hnênah heti hian a ti a:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “Nang Baruk, Israel-te Pathian chuan i chungchâng heti hian a sawi;" 
Jeremiah45:3 nang chuan, ‘Mang a va ang êm! Lalpa chuan ka thil tuara chungah lungngaihna min rawn belhchhah ta si a; mangangin ka rûm a, hahchawlhna rêng ka hmu ta lo a nih hi,’ i ti a." 
Jeremiah45:4 Lalpa chuan, ‘Ngai teh, ram pumah ka lo sak tawh chu ka ṭhiat ang a, ka lo phun tawh pawh ka pawt leh ang." 
Jeremiah45:5 I tân chauhva thil ṭha i zawng em ni? Zawng tawh suh. Ngai teh, mi tin chungah thil ṭha lo ka thlentîr dâwn,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Mahse, khawiah pawh kal la, i nun zawng ka zuahsak ang che, tiin a hnênah sawi rawh min ti,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah46:1 Hnam dangte chungchânga zâwlnei Jeremia hnêna Lalpa thu lo thleng chu: 
Jeremiah46:2 Aigupta chungthu: Juda lal Josia fapa, Jehoiakima lal kum lina Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran Eufretis lui kam Karkhemis hmuna a hneh tâk, Aigupta lal Neko Farawa sipai rual chungchâng chu." 
Jeremiah46:3 “Phaw lian leh phaw tê peih diamin Indo tûrin kal chhuak rawh u. 
Jeremiah46:4 Sakawrte thuam ula, a chungah chuang rawh u, Thîr lukhum khumin intlar ula, Feite tât hriam ula, thîr kawr ha rawh u." 
Jeremiah46:5 Engtizia nge ni le, an zâma an tawlhkîr tâk? An mi huaisente an tlu a, Hmanhmawh takin an tlânchhe zo ta, Hnung lam hawi lêk lovin baklêngin an tlân a, Ram tinah râl a ṭi,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah46:6 “Mi ṭuanṭha an tlânchhe hman lo va, Mi chak an him hek lo. Saw hmâr Eufretis lui kamah sâwn an pai a, an tlu zo ta." 
Jeremiah46:7 Nail lui anga lo lian ta hi tu nge ni? Luipui so bulh bulh ang hi? 
Jeremiah46:8 Aigupta chu Nail lui angin a lo lian a, Luipui tui so bulh bulh ang hian, Ka lian ang a, lei chung dâpin khawpuite chu a chhûnga chêngte nên ka tichhia ang,” a ti." 
Jeremiah46:9 Sakawrte u, tâwn ru, tawlailîrte u, tlân chiam rawh u, Nangni sipai huaisen, Ethiopia mite, Put mi, phaw kengtu te, Ludia mi, thal kâp thiamte u, tâwn zêl rawh u." 
Jeremiah46:10 Chu ni chu, Engkim Lalpa, Pathian ta a ni. Phuba lâk ni, a hmêlmate chunga phuba a lâk ni chu; Khandaih chuan duh tâwkin a ei ang a, An thisen pawh tlai khawpin a in ang. Saw hmâr Eufretis lui kamah sâwn, Engkim Lalpa, Pathian chuan Inthawi nân mi tam tak a hlân ta." 
Jeremiah46:11 Aw Aigupta fanu, nula thianghlim, Gilead-ah chho la, thinghnai damdawi han la rawh," 
Jeremiah46:12 Hnamten i mualphona an hria a, ‘Mi hrâng leh mi hrâng an insu a, an tlu dûn reng mai,’ Ti-a i ṭap thâwm chu lei pum puiah a thang." 
Jeremiah46:13 Babulon lal Nebukadnezara a lo kal a, Aigupta ram a rawn nghaisak tûr thu zâwlnei Jeremian Lalpa thu a sawi chu:" 
Jeremiah46:14 Aigupta-ah puang ula, Migdol-ah hril rawh u, Nof-ah leh Tahfanes-ah puang ula, ‘Inring ula, invêng ṭha rawh u, Kan vêla mite chu khandaihin a eizo ta,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah46:15 Engati nge i mi chak chu a tlûk tâk? A ding thei ta lo, Lalpa nam thlûk a ni," 
Jeremiah46:16 An tlu khâwm a, an indelh a, tichuan, an inrâwn ta, ‘Hmêlma khandaiha kan thih loh nân kan ram, Kan chhûngte hnênah i tlân haw ang u,’ an ti." 
Jeremiah46:17 ‘Aigupta lal Farawa hi thâwm chang lian mai, A hun ṭha a hloh ta a nih hi’ ti ang che." 
Jeremiah46:18 ‘Kei hi mi nung ka nih hi, Lalber,’ a hming Engkim Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti; ‘Tlâng zînga Tabor a lawr ang leh Tuipui kama Karmel tlâng a awm luah angin A lo kal dâwn e." 
Jeremiah46:19 Nangni Aigupta mite u, saltâng tûrin in thawmhnaw têl rawh u, Nof khua chu a ṭiau vang a, a chhe vek ang. Luahtu rêng an awm lo vang." 
Jeremiah46:20 Aigupta chu bâwngla nalh tak ang a ni, Mahse, hmâr lam ata tlip lo thlâwkin a rawn bâwm ang." 
Jeremiah46:21 An sipai rawihte pawh bâwng châwm thau ang an ni, A ni, an hnungtawlh a, an tlânchhia; ding lovin. An chhiatna ni chuan a rawn nang ta, hrem an tuarna ni chu." 
Jeremiah46:22 An tlânchhe thâwm chu rûlpui tlânchhe ri ang a ni, An hmêlmate an lo hnai zêl, thingkittu angin Hreipui nên an lo thawk e." 
Jeremiah46:23 A ngawpui chu an rawn ṭhiat ang, Kal tlang theih loh khawpa pik chu,’ Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti. ‘Anni chu khau puang aiin an tam zâwk, Chhiar sên rual an ni lo." 
Jeremiah46:24 Aigupta mite chu an mualpho ta, Hmâr lam mite kutah pêk an ni tawh si a.’" 
Jeremiah46:25 Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh u, Thebes khaw pathian Amon te, Farawa te, Aigupta leh a pathian te, an lalte leh Farawa rinchhantu zawng zawngte chu ka hrem dâwn." 
Jeremiah46:26 Anmahni thah tumtu Babulon lal Nebukadnezara leh a ṭhuihruaite kutah ka pe ang. Chumi hunah chuan Aigupta ramah, hmânlai ang khân an awm leh ang,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah46:27 “Ka chhiahhlawh Jakob, nang zawngin hlau suh, Aw Israel, zâm hek suh, Ram hla tak ata ka chhan chhuak ang che a, I thlahte pawh an saltânna ata ka hruai chhuak ang, Jakoba chu a lo hâwng ang a, Him tak leh thlamuang takin a awm ang; Tu man an tithlabâr tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah46:28 Aw Jakob, ka chhiahhlawh, hlau suh, I hnênah ka awm hi,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti. Ka hnawhchhuahna che hnam zawng zawng ka tiboral ang a, Nangni zawng ka tiboral vek lo vang che u, Dik takin ka hrem ang che u, Hrem loh erawh chuan ka chhuah lo vang che u." 
Jeremiah47:1 Faraw-an Gaza a beih hmaa Filistia mite chungchânga zâwlnei Jeremia hnêna Lalpa thu lo thleng chu. 
Jeremiah47:2 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh, hmâr lam aṭangin tui a lo lian a, A kuang a khat ang a, a luang liam ang a, Ram pum a chîm vek ang. Mangangin mi an au vang a, ram chhûnga mi tin an rûm ang." 
Jeremiah47:3 A sakawr per ri ṭuk ṭukah te, a tawlailîr tlan ri dur durahte leh A ke inkhak bur bur thâwmahte chuan Pate kut a zawi zo vang a, an fate pawh an ngaihsak thei lo vang." 
Jeremiah47:4 Ni chu a lo thleng ta, Filistia mi zawng zawng chhiatna ni chu, Tura leh Sidon ata ṭanpuitu an awm ta lo; Tuipuia thliarkâr, Kapthora Filistia mi la dam chhunte chu, Lalpa chuan a tiboral dâwn si a." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza tân lu ziah kawlh a hun ta, Askelon a chhe zo va, Phaizâwla la dam chhunte u, eng chen nge in sûn dâwn le?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Aw Lalpa khandaih, eng hunah nge i chawlh dâwn? I paiah inkhung la, châwl la, awm hle hle rawh." 
Jeremiah47:7 Lalpan tih tûr a tuk si chuan, Engtin nge a chawlh theih ang? Askelon leh tuipui kama chêngte bei tûrin thu a pe miau si a." 
Jeremiah48:1 Moab chungthu: Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Nebo chung a pik e, a chhe zo ta si a, Kiriathaim chu a mualpho va, an hneh ta si a, kulhte a chhe rem rum a, a luahtute an mualpho zo ta." 
Jeremiah48:2 Moab hmingthanna a nêp ta, Babulon-ah a chhiatna tûr an rêl. “Hawh u, hnama chhiar tlâk loh khawpin i siam ang u,” an ti. Nangni Madmen khaw mite u, in reh ṭhiap ang, Khandaihin a ûmzui ang che u." 
Jeremiah48:3 Horonaim aṭanga au thâwm, Chhiatna nasa tak thâwm chu ngaithla rawh u." 
Jeremiah48:4 Moab a chhia a, a fate an ṭap chuah chuah mai." 
Jeremiah48:5 Luhit-ah ṭap chungin an chho va, Horonaim chhukah mangang au thâwm an hria." 
Jeremiah48:6 In him theih nân tlânchhe rawh u, Thlalêra ram sabengtung ang maia chakin." 
Jeremiah48:7 In kutkawih, in sum leh pai in rinchhan avângin, Nangni pawh an man ang che u; Khemosa chu a puithiamte leh a hotute nên Sala hruai an ni ang." 
Jeremiah48:8 Khawpui tinah tichhetu a lo thleng ang a, Khaw khat mahin an pumpelh lo vang. Phaizâwl chu a chhia ang a, Hmun zâwl zaute pawh a chhe vek ang, Lalpa sawi tawh ang khân." 
Jeremiah48:9 A thlawh bo nân Moab chu thla pe ula, A khawpuite a chhe vek ang a, Tu mah an chêng tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah48:10 Dâwngdah taka Lalpa hna thawk chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se; Thisen chhuah nâna khandaih hmang duh lo chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh e. 
Jeremiah48:11 Moab chu a tleirâwl lai ata Nuamsa takin a awm ṭhîn a. Uain bun chhuah loh, a mawng nawi nêna inchiah, Bun chhuah ngai loh angin a awm a, Sala hruai a ni ngai lo. A thlum dân a pangngai reng a, A rim a chhe chuang lo." 
Jeremiah48:12 Chuvângin, ni chu a lo thleng ta, Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. A hnênah bun chhuaktu ka tîr ang a, A bêl ata a bun chhuak ang. A bêl chu a bun ruak ang a, a tikeh sawm vek ang." 
Jeremiah48:13 Israel chhûngten an innghahna Bethel an zahpui angin, Moab pawhin Khemosa an zahpui ang." 
Jeremiah48:14 ‘Pasalṭha, râl laka huaisen kan nei,’ Engtin nge in tih theih le?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moab tichhetute chu, khawpuiah an chho va, An tlangvâl chhuanvâwrte thah tûrin an hruai chhuak ang. Tih hi, a hming Engkim Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:16 Moab chhiatna tûr chu a lo thleng ṭêp, A tuar tûr chuan a rawn hnaih ta." 
Jeremiah48:17 A chhehvêla awm zawng zawngten ani chu ṭah rawh se, A hming hretu zawng zawngten, ‘Engtizia nge, tiang khauh leh tiang mawi chu a tliah tâk mai le!’ ti rawh se." 
Jeremiah48:18 Aw nangni, Dibon mite u, in khaw ropui tak ata lo chhuak ula, Ram rovah hian ṭhu rawh u. Bei tûr chein Moab tichhetu a lo thleng ta. I kulhte pawh a tichhe vek ang." 
Jeremiah48:19 Aroer mite u, kawngahte ding ula, Paho tlânchhia leh nuho relhrute chu lo châng ula, ‘Engtizia nge ni ta?’ lo ti rawh u." 
Jeremiah48:20 Moab chu a mualpho va, a chhe zo ta, Lungchhe takin ṭap chiam rawh u. Arnon luiah, ‘Moab a chhe ta,’ tiin puang r’u." 
Jeremiah48:21 Tlâng chung zâwla khawpui, Holon te, Jahza te, Mefaat te," 
Jeremiah48:22 Dibon te, Nebo te, Beth-diblataim te," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriathaim te, Beth-gamul te, Beth-meon te," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriot te, Bozra te, Moab rama khua zawng zawng, kilkhâwr taka awm chenin an chungthu rêl a ni ta." 
Jeremiah48:25 Moab ki chu râwtchhum a ni a, a bân pawh tihtliah a ni ta, tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:26 Moab chu hrai rui rawh, Lalpa aia lian zâwkah a inngai a, mahse, Moab chu ama luakah a tâl ang a, nuihzatbûr a ni ang." 
Jeremiah48:27 Israel chu i nuihzat ṭhîn a ni lâwm ni? Rûkru zînga tel em a niha, a chungchâng i sawi apianga i lu i thin ṭhin le?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Moab-a chêngte u, khawpui chhuahsan ula, Lungpui kârah tawm rawh u. Pûk kawngka sîra bu chhep ṭhîn ṭhuro angin awm rawh u." 
Jeremiah48:29 Moab chapozia kan hria, chapo tak an ni, An induhzia te, mahni thu an duhzia te, An chaltlaizia te, an intihveizia te, An inlulinzia te ka hria, Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah48:30 Mahse, eng mah a sâwt lo, A uang thlâwn mai a ni." 
Jeremiah48:31 Chuvângin, Moab ka tuarpui ang, Moab mi zawng zawng tân ka ṭap ang. Kir-heres mite pawh ka sûn bawk ang." 
Jeremiah48:32 Aw Sibmah grep kûng, Jazer mite ṭap aia nasain ka ṭah ang che, I zârte chuan tuipui a thleng a, Jezer a thlen hial ṭhin kha. Ei chhetuin i thei leh grep rahte a ei chhe ta." 
Jeremiah48:33 Moab ram ṭha tak aṭangin Hlimna leh lâwmna a reh zo ta, Uain sâwr tûr ka titâwp a, Tu man hlim takin an sâwr tawh lo vang. An au thâwm pawh hlim thâwm a ni tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah48:34 Hesbon leh Elealeh-a an au thâwm chu Jahaz aṭangin a hriat a, Zoar mite pawhin an lo hria a, Horonaim leh Eglath-selisia thlengin an hre phâk. Nimrim tuikhurte pawh a kang zo ta." 
Jeremiah48:35 ‘Moab rama an hmunsâng te, an pathian hnêna rimtui an hâl ṭhinnate chu ka tichhe vek ang,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:36 ‘Lusûnte tâna phênglâwng tum rîk angin Moab avângin ka lungngai a, Kir-heres mite tân pawh ka ngui zo ta. An sum leh pai chhêkkhâwl a ral zo ta si a." 
Jeremiah48:37 An lu an mêt kawlh vek a, an khabehmul pawh an ziat kawlh vek a ni. An kutte an zai a, saiip puan an veng ṭheuh." 
Jeremiah48:38 Moab-ho in chung zâwl zawng zawngah leh an khawlaiahte chuan an ṭap chuah chuah a, bêl chhe paih angin Moab chu a keh sawm ta,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:39 A va han chhe hneh êm! An ṭap tlawk tlawk mai. Moab chu a mualpho va, Moab chu miten an nuihzat a, a vêla mi zawng zawngin râpthlâk an ti." 
Jeremiah48:40 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, mupui angin a lo thlâwk ang, Moab chungah a lo bir ang." 
Jeremiah48:41 Keriot chu lâk a ni a, a kulhte pawh lâk vek a ni, Chumi ni-ah chuan Moab Pasalṭhate an zâm ang a, Hmeichhe nau vei thlaphâng ang mai an ni ang." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moab a boral ta, hnama chhiar tlâk a ni ta lo, Lalpa lakah a inluling êm a ni." 
Jeremiah48:43 Hlauhawm te, khuarkhurum te, thang te chuan A châng reng che u a ni, Moab mite u,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:44 “Hlauhawm tlânsantu chu khuarkhurumah a tla ang a, Khuarkhurum ata chhuak chu thangah a âwk ang. Moab ka hrem hun chu ka thlentîr dâwn,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Hesbon phênah râltlânho chau takin an ding. Mahse, Hesbon aṭangin mei a lo chhuak a, Lal Sihona in aṭangin meipui a chhuak. Moab mite baksam a kâng a, Indo chak mite chhîpsam chu." 
Jeremiah48:46 Moab mite u, in va khawngaihthlâk tak êm, Khemosa mite an ral zo ta, I fapate salah an hruai a, I fanute an man zo ta." 
Jeremiah48:47 Ni hnuhnûngahte erawh chuan Moab dinhmun ka siam ṭha leh ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Hei zawng hi Moab hremna tûr thu chu a ni." 
Jeremiah49:1 Lalpa chuan Amon mite chungchâng heti hian a sawi: “Israelan fate a nei lo vem ni? Rokhâwmtu a nei na nge? Engati nge Gad-ho ram chu Milkoman a luaha, a mite pawh an khawpuiah an chên tâk le?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Chuvângin, ngai teh, nite a lo thleng e,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Indo thâwm ri ka hriattîr ang, Amon mite khua Raba an bei thâwm chu! Bawlhhlawh vawm khâwm mai an ni ang a, A chhehvêl khuate pawh meiin a kâng ang. Israel-te chuan anmahni hnawt chhuaktute chu an hnawt chhuak ve thung ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:3 Aw Hesbon, chiau vak vak rawh, Ai khua chu a chhe zo ta si a. Raba mite u, ṭap chiam ula, saiip puan sin rawh u, Hung chhûngah chuan tlân kual rawh u, Milkoma chu a puithiamte leh a miliante nên Salah an hruai dâwn si a." 
Jeremiah49:4 Fa rinawm lote u, engtizia nge in phai ram ṭha in chhuan le? In sum leh paia innghatin, ‘Tu nge mi bei ang?’ i ti maw?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ngai teh, kil tin aṭangin I chungah hlauhawm ka rawn thlentîr dâwn, Tih hi Engkim Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Mi tin an tlân darh chum chum ang a, Tu man tlândarhte chu an ko khâwm lo vang." 
Jeremiah49:6 Chûng hnuah chuan Amon mite chu ka tungding leh ang, Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:7 Edom chungchâng: Engkim Lalpa thu chu hei hi a ni: Teman-ah finna a awm ta na nge? In zîngah remhria an awm ta lo vem ni? An finna a bo zo ta em ni? 
Jeremiah49:8 Dedan mite u, lêt ula, tlânchhe rawh u, Khuarkhurumahte biru rawh u. Esauva chungah chhiatna ka thlentîr dâwn, Anmahni ka hrem hun a thleng ta si a." 
Jeremiah49:9 Grep rah sengtu i rawihte chuan A rah tlêm tal an zuah ṭhîn a. Zâna rûkrute pawhin An duhzâwng chauh an la ṭhîn a ni lâwm ni? 
Jeremiah49:10 Esauva erawh chu a neih zawng zawng ka lâksak ang a, A thil thuhrûkna hmun chu ka haihawng vek ang, Tichuan, a thukru thei tawh lo vang a, A fa te, a laichîn te, a ṭhenawm te nên an boral ang a, Tu mah ka zuah lo vang." 
Jeremiah49:11 In zînga fahrah awmte chu ka hnênah hnutchhiah rawh u, Keiman ka enkawl ang. In hmeithaite pawhin mi ring rawh se." 
Jeremiah49:12 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “In lo tûrte pawhin no chu an in si chuan, Nang hi hrem lohvin i chhuak ang maw? Hrem lohvin i chhuak hauh lo vang. I in ngei tûr a ni." 
Jeremiah49:13 Keimah ngeiin thu ka tiam ta,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Bozra chu mite hlauh, mak tih huai huai, Sawichhiat leh ânchhe dawng a ni ang, An khua zawng zawng pawh a ram hlen hlauh vang." 
Jeremiah49:14 Lalpa hnên ata thu ka dawng a, ‘Pung khâwm ula, anni chu bei tûrin lo kal ula, Indo tûrin lo thawk rawh u,’ tiin. Hnamte hnênah palai an tîr a." 
Jeremiah49:15 Ngai teh, mite hmuhsit atân, Hnamte zîngah ka titê ta che a ni." 
Jeremiah49:16 I vaupûm leh i chapona chuan a bum ta che a ni, Nang, lungpui keh kâra awm ṭhîn, Tlângchhîp sânga awmhmun khuar, Mupui angin sâng takah bu chhep mah la, Chuta ṭang chuan ka hnûk thla ang che, Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:17 Edom chan chu miten râpthlâk an ti ang a, mi veivâk apiangin an hlau vang, a chhiat nasat êm avângin an chek tlawk tlawk ang." 
Jeremiah49:18 Sodom leh Gomora leh a kianga khaw tihchhiatte ang khân, ‘Tu mah an chêng tawh lo vang a, tu man an luah tawh hek lo vang,’ Lalpa chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah49:19 Ngai teh, Jordan ngawa sakeibakneiin phûla berâm tla a ṭhâwng thut angin vawilehkhatah anni chu an ram ata ka ûm chhuak ang a; tichuan, an chungah thu nei tûr ka duh duh ka dah ang. Kei ang hi tu nge awma, tu nge mi cho ngam le? Mi khing ngam berâmpu tu nge awm ang?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Chutichuan, Lalpa thiltum, Edom chunga tih a tum leh Teman mite chunga hlen a tum hi ngaithla rawh u: ran notête chu a hnûk bo vang a, an tlatna hmunte chu a ṭiau vek ang." 
Jeremiah49:21 An tlu thâwmah lei a nghîng ang a, an ṭap thâwm pawh Tuipui Sen thlengin an hria ang." 
Jeremiah49:22 En teh u, Bozra chungah a thlâwk a, mupui angin a lo bir dâwn. Chumi ni chuan Edom mi huaisente thinlung chu hmeichhe nau vei angin a zâm ang." 
Jeremiah49:23 Damaska chungchâng: Hamat leh Arpat an mualpho ta, Chanchin lâwmawm lo an hria a, an zâm zo ta. Tuipui fâwn awm hle hle thei lo ang hian an buai zo ta si a." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damaska a chau va, tlânchhiat tumin a lehhawi, Buainain a nangchîng a, lungngaihnain a tlâkbuak ta, Hmeichhe nau vei na tuar ang mai a ni." 
Jeremiah49:25 Khawpui hmingthang, Mi tilâwmtu chu a chhe zo ta." 
Jeremiah49:26 Chuta tlangvâlte chu kawtthlêrah an tlu ang a, Chumi ni chuan sipaite pawh an boral vek ang, Tih hi Engkim Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:27 Damaska kulh bang ka hâl ang a, An lal Ben-hadada inte a kâng vek ang." 
Jeremiah49:28 Kedar leh Hazor ram, Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran a rûn thu: Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Tho la, Kedar mite bei la, Khawchhak mite tiboral vek rawh." 
Jeremiah49:29 An puan in te, an ran rual te lâksak la, An puanzâr te, an bungrua te, An sanghâwngsei te nên la bo vek rawh. ‘Kil tinah râl a ṭi,’ tiin mite chu an au vang." 
Jeremiah49:30 Hazor mite u, tlân sawk sawk ula, pûkahte tawm rawh u,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran a phiar che u a, Tihchhiat che u a tum a ni." 
Jeremiah49:31 Tho ula, râlmuang tak leh him taka awm ṭhîn, kulh kawngkhâr leh a kalhna pawh nei lo, Awm hle hle ṭhîn hnamte chu Bei rawh u,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah49:32 “An sanghâwngseite râlin an man ang a, An ranrual pawh an kawisak ang a, Lumêthote chu kil tinah ka tidarh ang. Kil tin aṭangin an chhiatna tûr ka thlentîr dâwn,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hazor chu sihalte tualchaina hmun a ni ang a, A ram kumkhua ang. Tah chuan tu mah an chêng tawh lo vang a, Tu mah an awm leh tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah49:34 Judai rama Zedekia a lal ṭan tirha Elam chungchânga Lalpa thu, zâwlnei Jeremia hnêna lo thleng chu." 
Jeremiah49:35 Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, Elam thalngul, an chakna thahrui ngei chu, ka titliak dâwn." 
Jeremiah49:36 Kâwlkil li ata thli pali, Elam bei tûrin ka rawn tîr ang. Kil tinah ka tidarh ang a, Elam mi darhte chu an kal lohna ram rêng a awm lo vang." 
Jeremiah49:37 An hmêlma, anmahni thah tumtute hmaah chuan Elam mite chu ka tizâm ang a, thinur takin an chungah thil ṭha lo ka thlentîr ang,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti. “Ka tihral vek hma chu khandaihin ka ûm zêl ang." 
Jeremiah49:38 An lalte leh hotute ka tiboral ang a, Elam-ah chuan ka lalṭhutthlêng ka hûng ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Mahse, ni hnuhnûngahte chuan Elam chu ka din thar leh ang a, ka siam ṭha leh ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:1 Babulon chungchâng leh Kaldai mite chungchâng, Zâwlnei Jeremia hmanga Lalpa sawi chu:" 
Jeremiah50:2 Hnamte hnênah hril ula, puang rawh u, Puanzâr târ ula, puang rawh u, eng mah zêp suh u, ‘Babulon chu a tlâwm ta, An pathian Bela chu a mualpho va, Marduka chu a zâm a, An pathian limte a mualpho, An milemte a chhe zo ta,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah50:3 Ani chu hmâr lama hnam Pakhatin a rawn bei ang a, A ram chu a rawn tichhe vek ang. Tu mah an chêng tawh lo vang a, Mihring leh ramsa an tlân bo vek ang." 
Jeremiah50:4 A hun leh ni a lo thlen chuan Israel mite leh Juda mite chu an lo kal ho vang a, ṭap chungin Lalpa an Pathian an rawn zawng ang." 
Jeremiah50:5 Zion kawng an zâwt ang a, a lam an pan ang. ‘Hawh u, kumkhaw thuthlung, theihnghilh tawh loh tûr chu Lalpa nên i thlung ang u,’ an ti ang." 
Jeremiah50:6 Ka mite chu berâm bo ang an ni, an vêngtuten an hruai bo va, tlângahte an vâkvai a, tlâng leh mual dungte zawhin an huang pawh an hre tawh lo." 
Jeremiah50:7 A hmu apiangin an ei zêl a, an hmêlmate chuan, ‘Thil kan tisual hlei nêm, Lalpa, anmahni vêngtu dik tak, an thlahtute innghahna Lalpa lakah chuan thil an tisual a ni zâwk,’ an ti a." 
Jeremiah50:8 “Babulon khua tlânchhuahsan ula, Kaldai ram chu chhuahsan rawh u. A rual zînga kêlchal angin hma hruai rawh u." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ngai teh u, Babulon rawn bei tûrin hmâr lam ata hnam ropui tak pung khâwm chu ka chawktho vang a, amah chu do tûrin an insingsa ang. Chûng mite chuan an rawn hneh ang a, an thalte chu, râltuk thiam tak hlawhchham ngai lo ang a ni ang." 
Jeremiah50:10 Tichuan, Kaldai-ho chu an rawk ang a, a rawktute chu an hlawhtling hle ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:11 Nang ka hnam thlan rawktu, i hlimin i lâwm hle na a, Bâwngla, hnimno zînga tla melh melh ang leh, Sakawrpa hrâm nghur nghur ang hi ni mah la," 
Jeremiah50:12 I nu chu a zak hle ang a, Hringtu che chu a kun tlawk tlawk ang. Ngai teh, hnamte zîngah a tê ber ang a, Thlalêr ramro ang a ni ang." 
Jeremiah50:13 Lalpa thinurna avângin tu mah an awm lo vang a, A ram vek ang, Babulon-a kal tlang apiangin mak an ti ang a, A chhiat nasat avângin an chek tlawk tlawk ang." 
Jeremiah50:14 Thal kâp mi zawng zawngte u, Babulon hual rawh u, Kâp ula, in thalte ren suh u, Lalpa lakah an sual si a." 
Jeremiah50:15 Kil tin aṭangin au khum ula: a inpe ta! A kulhte a chim a, a bangte a sawp ta, Lalpa chuan phuba a la a ni. Nangni pawhin phuba la ula, A tih angin a chungah ti ve rawh u," 
Jeremiah50:16 Buh chi thehtu chu Babulon ata la bo ula, Buh seng laia favah kengtu nên chuan, Mi nunrâwng khandaih hlauvin Mi tinin mahni mite pan sela, Mahni ramah tlân ṭheuh rawh se." 
Jeremiah50:17 Israel chu berâm rual, sakeibaknei ûm darh ang hi a ni. Asuria lalin a han ei phawt a, Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran a ruh a ṭhei sawm a." 
Jeremiah50:18 Chuvângin, Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai teh, Asuria ram ka hrem angin Babulon lal leh a ram chu ka hrem dâwn." 
Jeremiah50:19 Israel chu a chênna ramah ka hruai kîr ang a, Karmel leh Basan-ah an tân ei tûr a tam ang a, Efraim tlâng leh Gilead thlaite chu duh tâwkin an tlân ang." 
Jeremiah50:20 A hun leh ni a lo thlen chuan Israel-te bawhchhiatna hmuh tumin an zawng ang a, an hmu lo vang; Juda-te sualna pawh hmuh tûr a awm tawh lo vang. Ka mi zuah, la dam chhunte chu, ka ngaidam dâwn si a,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Merathaim ram leh Pekod mite chu bei rawh u, That ula, tiboral vek rawh u. Thu ka pêk che u ang zêlin ti ang che u,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:22 Chu ramah chuan indo thâwm a awm, Chhiatna nasa tak thâwm chu." 
Jeremiah50:23 Khawvêl pum pui tidarhtu tuboh chu, a phel a, a kehdarh ta, Babulon chan chu hnamte chuan râpthlâk an ti." 
Jeremiah50:24 Aw Babulon, i awh nân thang ka kam a, i âwk ta a, Chu chu i hre si lo, Lalpa i dodâl hi an hre chhuak che a, An man ta che a nih hi." 
Jeremiah50:25 Lalpa chuan a râlthuam bâwm a hawng a, A thinurna hriamhrei a la chhuak ta. Lalpa, Engkim Lalpa chuan Kaldai ramah Thil tih tûr a nei a ni." 
Jeremiah50:26 Kil tin aṭanga bei tûrin lo kal rawh u, A thil dah khâwmna hawng ula, Buhpâwl angin tiang khâwm ula, tichhe vek rawh u, Eng mah rêng zuah suh u." 
Jeremiah50:27 A sipaite chu tihlum vek rawh u, An chung a va pik êm! An ni a thleng ta si, Hrem an tuar hun chu." 
Jeremiah50:28 Chu! Babulon ram aṭanga Tempul tichhetute chungah kan Pathian, Lalpa chuan phuba a lâk tâk thu Zion-ah an puan tâk chu!" 
Jeremiah50:29 ‘Babulon bei tûrin thal kâp mi, thal kâp thiam zawng zawng ko khâwm ula, tu mah chhuak thei lo tûrin hual tlat rawh u. A thil lo tih tawh ang zêlin thungrûl ula, a tih ang chiahin a chungah ti ang che u, Lalpa, Israel Mi Thianghlima chu an pawisak loh avângin." 
Jeremiah50:30 Chuvângin, an tlangvâlte chu kawtthlêrah an tlu ang a, an sipaite pawh chumi ni chuan an boral vek ang,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:31 ‘Ngai teh, chapopa, ka ngaithei lo che a ni,’ Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. I ni a lo thleng ta, hrem i tuar hun chu," 
Jeremiah50:32 Mi chapo chu a pai ang a, a tlu ang, Tu man an kaitho lo vang, A khawpuite ka hâl ang a, A vêla awm zawng zawng a kâng vek ang." 
Jeremiah50:33 Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Israel-te leh Juda-te chu hnehchhiahin an awm a, mantuten an chelh tlat a, an thlah duh lo." 
Jeremiah50:34 An tlantu erawh chu mi chak tak, a hming Engkim Lalpa a ni. Ani chuan a ṭan tlat ang a, leiah remna a lêntîr ang a, Babulon mite chungah erawh chuan buaina a thlentîr ang." 
Jeremiah50:35 ‘Kaldai mite chungah khandaih a lêng e, Babulon mite, an hruaitu te, an mi fing te chungah nên,’ Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:36 Zâwlnei derte chungah khandaih a lêng e, An lo va â tak êm! A sipaite chungah khandaih a thleng a, An va han hlau tak êm!" 
Jeremiah50:37 An sakawr leh tawlailîrte chungah pawh khandaih a lêng, Hnam dang sipai an rawihte chungah pawh Hmeichhia ang mai an ni ta, An sum leh pai chungah pawh khandaih a thleng, Rawk an tâwk dâwn a ni." 
Jeremiah50:38 Khua a khêng a, tuite a kang zo ta, Milim tamna ram, milem âtchilhtute an ni si a." 
Jeremiah50:39 Chuvângin, thlalêr sanghar leh chinghniate chutah chuan an chêng ang a, vanghâwngseite pawh an awm ang a, tu man an luah lo vang a, tu mah rêng an awm tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah50:40 Pathianin Sodom te, Gomora te leh a chhehvêl khua te a tiram ang khân, chutah chuan tu mah an awm lo vang a, mi tu mah an chêng tawh hek lo vang." 
Jeremiah50:41 Ngai teh, hmâr lam aṭangin mi an lo kal, Hnam chak tak leh lal tam tak, kâwlkil ata lo thawkte chu!" 
Jeremiah50:42 Thal leh fei an keng a, nunrâwng tak, lainatna nei lo an ni, An thâwm chu tuipui ri hum hum ang a ni, An sakawr chungahte an rawn chuang. Mite chu inrâlring sa vekin an lo kal, Aw Babulon mite u, an bei dâwn a che u." 
Jeremiah50:43 Babulon lalin an chanchin a lo hriatin A kut a zâwi a, hmeichhe nau vei angin Natna leh manganna chuan a man ta." 
Jeremiah50:44 Ngai teh, Jordan ngawa sakeibakneiin phûla berâm tla a ṭhâwng thut angin vawilehkhatah anni chu an ram ata ka ûm chhuak ang a; tichuan, an chunga thunei tûr ka duh duh ka dah ang. Kei ang hi tu nge awma, tu nge mi cho ngam le? Mi khing ngam berâmpu tu nge awm ang?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Chutichuan, Lalpa thiltum, Babulon mite chunga a tih tum leh Kaldai mite chunga hlen a tum chu ngaithla rawh u; ran notête chu a hnûk bo vang a, anmahni angin an tlatna hmunte chu a ṭiau vek ang." 
Jeremiah50:46 Babulon an lâk thâwmah lei hi a nghîng ang a, an ṭap thâwm chu hnamte chuan an hria ang." 
Jeremiah51:1 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Babulon chungah leh Kaldai mite chungah thlichhia ka tlehtîr dâwn. 
Jeremiah51:2 Anmahni zâp bova, an ram tiruak vek tûr hnam dangte Babulon-ah chuan ka tîr ang. Chhiatniah chuan kil tin aṭangin an rawn bei ang," 
Jeremiah51:3 Thal kâptuin a thalngul kuai hman lovin A thir kawr pawh ha hman hek suh se. Tlangvâlte zuah sú, sipaite pawh tiboral vek rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:4 An ramah ngei Kaldai mite chu an that phung ang a, Kawtthlêrahte pawh râpthlâk takin an vit hlum ang." 
Jeremiah51:5 An ram chu Israel Mi Thianghlima hmaah lo sual hle ṭhîn mah se, An Pathian, Engkim Lalpa chuan Israel leh Juda-te chu a thlahthlam ngai lo." 
Jeremiah51:6 Babulon tlân chhuahsan rú, in him theih nân tlân rawh u, An suahsualna avângin boral ve suh u. Lalpa phuba lâk hun a thleng ta a, An phu tâwkin a thungrûl dâwn si a." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babulon chu Lalpa kuta rangkachak no a ni, Lei pum pui a tirui a, Hnamten a uain an in a, an â zo ta." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babulon chu a tlu thut ang a, a kehsawm vek ang, Ṭah vak vak rawh u, A hliamah thinghnai damdawi hnawih ula, A lo dam mial mahna." 
Jeremiah51:9 Babulon chu tihdam ka tum a, a dam thei si lo, Ani chu hnuchhawn ila, mahni ram ṭheuh i pan ang u, A thiam lohnain vân a tawng a, chhûm anga sâng a ni." 
Jeremiah51:10 Lalpa chuan kan dikzia a târlang ta a, ‘Lo kal ula, kan Pathian Lalpa thiltih hi, Zion-ah i hril ang u!" 
Jeremiah51:11 Thalte tât hriam ula, phawte chuh rawh u, Lalpa chuan Media lalte a chawk tho va, Babulon tihchhiat a tum ta a ni. Lalpa chuan phuba a la dâwn, a Tempul phuba chu." 
Jeremiah51:12 Babulon kulh bang epah puanzâr zâr rawh u, Vêngtu pawh chah belh ula, enthlatu dah ula, Chân rûkna siam rawh u. Lalpa chuan a thiltum a hlen dâwn, Babulon mite chunga a lo sawi tawh chu." 
Jeremiah51:13 Nang, tui tam tak hmuna cheng, sum leh pai ngah êm êm, I tâwpna a lo thleng ta, i hun a liam ta e.”" 
Jeremiah51:14 Engkim Lalpa chuan a hming chhâlin heti hian a ti: “Khau rual anga tam mipui ka rawn hruai lût ang a, Hnehna hla an sak khum ang che.”" 
Jeremiah51:15 A thiltihtheihnain lei a siam a, A finnain khawvêl a din, A hriatnain vân a kai pharh ta." 
Jeremiah51:16 Thu a pe a, tuite chu a ri hum hum a, Kâwlkil aṭangin chhûm a chhohtîr a, Ruah leh kâwlphe a siam a, A hmun aṭangin thli a tlehtîr ṭhîn." 
Jeremiah51:17 Mi tin an mâwl a, hriatna reng an nei lo, Rangkachak chhertuten an milem an zahpui ang a, An milem chhûnte chu a lem, nunna nei lo an ni si a." 
Jeremiah51:18 Hlutna nei lo, hmuhsitawm mai an ni, Hrem an nih hun chuan an boral vek ang." 
Jeremiah51:19 Jakoba Pathian chu hêng ang hi a ni ve lo, Ani zawng engkim siamtu a ni, Israel pawh a rochan hnam an ni, a hming chu Engkim Lalpa a ni." 
Jeremiah51:20 “Nang hi ka hreipui, indona hriamhrei i ni, Nangmah hmangin hnamte ka tidarh ang a, Nangmah hmangin lalramte ka tichhia ang." 
Jeremiah51:21 Nangmah hmangin sakawr leh a chungchuang ka tidarh ang a, Nangmah hmangin tawlailîr leh a chungchuang ka tichhia ang." 
Jeremiah51:22 Nangmah hmangin mipa leh hmeichhia ka that ang a, Nangmah hmangin putarte leh ṭhalaite ka tihlum ang a, Nangmah hmangin nula leh tlangval ka that ang." 
Jeremiah51:23 Nangmah hmangin berâmte leh a pute ka that ang a, Nangmah hmangin loneitu leh an bâwng chhawrte ka tihlum ang a, Nangmah hmangin ramawptute leh hotute ka tiboral ang." 
Jeremiah51:24 Zion chunga an thil tihsual tâkte chu, in hmuh ngeiah Babulon leh a chhûnga Kaldai mite chungah Ka thungrûl dâwn,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Nang, khawvêl tichhetu tlâng lian, ka ngaithei lo che a ni,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Bei tûr chein i chungah ka kut ka lek ta, Khâmah ka nam lum ang chia, Tlâng kâng ût kawlh angin ka siam ang che." 
Jeremiah51:26 I hnên ata a kil lung tûr leh a lungphum tûr, Lâk a ni lo vang, Kumkhuain i ram hlen tawh ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:27 Chu ramah chuan puanzâr zâr ula, Hnamte hriat tûrin tawtawrâwt hâm rawh u, Anni chu do tûrin hnamte chu inbuatsaihtîr ula, Bei tûrin Ararat te, Mini te, Askana ram te ko ula, An hotu tûr ruat bawk ula, Khau puang anga tam sakawr man khâwm rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:28 Babulon bei tûrin hnamte chu inbuatsaihtîr rawh u, Media lalte, ramawptute, an hruaitute, An ram awp zawng zawng te nên." 
Jeremiah51:29 Chu ram chu na tuarin a khûr hlawk hlawk a, Babulon ram tichhiaa, luahtu awm lova siam hi Babulon chunga Lalpa thiltum, a hlen mêk chu a ni." 
Jeremiah51:30 Babulon mi huaisente an râlbâng ta, kulh chhûngah an tawm tlat a, An dawih zo ta, hmeichhia ang mai an ni. An in te a kâng zo va, Kulh kawngkhâr kalhnate a bung zo ta," 
Jeremiah51:31 ‘Babulon khawpui chu kil tin aṭangin an la ta,’ Tih thu hrilh tûrin lal hnênah Zualko an tlân zut zut mai." 
Jeremiah51:32 Luikaite an la a, lui kam phairuangte an hâl fai, Sipaite chu an zâm zo ta." 
Jeremiah51:33 Engkim Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Babulon mite chu hruihzâwla buh chîl ang hi an ni ang, Rei lo têah chîl hrep an ni dâwn." 
Jeremiah51:34 Babulon lal Nebukadnezaran mi ei zo ta, Bêl ruak ang mai ka ni. Rûlpui angin min dawlh a, ka sa tui tui eiin a intipuar a, Tichuan, mi chhâk chhuak leh ta a ni." 
Jeremiah51:35 Zion-a awmte chuan, ‘Min sawisak angin Babulon chu sawisak nek ni rawh se,’ ti sela, Jerusalem-a awmte pawhin, ‘Kan thisen mawh chu, Kaldai-hovin phur rawh se,’ ti teh se.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh, i lamah ka ṭang ang a, phuba ka laksak ang che Luipui chu ka ti kang ang a, a tuikhurte chu ka tikang vek ang." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babulon chu thil chhe vawm khâwm, sihalte tualchaina, Mite hmuhsit leh endawng, Mi rêng rêng awm tawh lohnaah ka chantîr ang" 
Jeremiah51:38 A mite chu sakeibaknei vânglai angin an rûm ang a, Sakeibaknei note angin an hrâm bawk ang." 
Jeremiah51:39 An râwp lai takin ruai ka buatsaihsak ang a, Ka hrai rui hnêp ang. An sa bual bual ang a, an muhîl hlen ang a, An harh leh tawh lo vang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:40 “Ran talhna hmuna berâmpa leh kêlpa talh tûr angin Anni chu ka hruai chhuak ang. 
Jeremiah51:41 Sesak chu man a ni ta, Lei pum pui chawimawi ṭhin chu a tlâwm ta. Hnam tinin Babulon chan chu rapthlâk an ti." 
Jeremiah51:42 Babulon chu tuipuiin a chîm ang a, A fâwn nasa tak chuan a khuh vek ang." 
Jeremiah51:43 A khawpuite chu a ram vek ang a, Thlalêr, mihring rêng awm lohna, Tu ma tlawh loh ram a ni ang." 
Jeremiah51:44 Babulon pathian Bela chu ka hrem dâwn, A dawlh tawh chu ka luak chhuahtîr ang a, Hnamte chuan an bêl tawh lo vang a, Babulon kulh bangte pawh a chim ang." 
Jeremiah51:45 Ka mite u, a chhûng ata lo chhuak rawh u, Lalpa thinur nasa tak laka in him nân tlân chhuak rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:46 Ram chhûnga thuthang in hriat hunah Zâm suh ula, hlau hek suh u, Kuminah thuthang pakhat a awm a, Kum lehah a dang. Ram chhûngah inpâwngnêkna thu a thang vêl, Rorêltu leh rorêltu insual thâwm chu." 
Jeremiah51:47 Ngai teh, nite a lo thleng ngei dâwn, Babulon milem ka hrem ni leh a ram pum pui mualpho ni chu, Mi ṭhate chu an tlu phung ang." 
Jeremiah51:48 Hmâr lam aṭangin tichhetuin Babulon chu a rawn tihchhiat hunah, Lei leh vân leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng lâwmin an au vang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:49 Israel-te a thah chiam avângin Babulon chu a tlu ngei ang, Khawvel pum puia mi tam tak thihna thlentu a ni si a." 
Jeremiah51:50 Nangni khandaih pumpelhtute u, kal ula, ding suh u, Hla takah pawh Lalpa hre reng ula, Jerusalem theihnghilh suh u." 
Jeremiah51:51 Kan mualpho ta, min hmuhsitzia kan hriatin zahthlâk kan ti, Lalpa ina hmun thianghlimahte hnam dang an luh tâk hi." 
Jeremiah51:52 “Ngai teh, nite a lo thleng e,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “An milemte ka sawisa ang a, ram pum puiah Hliam tuar an rûm chuah chuah ang." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babulon chu vân tawngin sâng mah se, a kulhte pawh sâng hle mah sela, Tichhetu tûr a hnênah ka tîr ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:54 Babulon aṭanga ṭap thâwm leh Kaldai ram aṭanga chhiatna nasa tak thâwm chu Ngaithla rawh u. 
Jeremiah51:55 Lalpa chuan Babulon a tiboral dâwn, An thâwm ri mur mur chu a tireh ang a. An thâwm chu tuifâwn ri hum hum ang hi a ni, An au chu a khâwk rum rum mai." 
Jeremiah51:56 Tichhetu chu Babulon-ah a lo kal ang a, An mi huaisente chu a man ang, An thalngulte chu a titliak vek ang a, Lalpa chu thungrûl ṭhîntu Pathian a ni. A thungrûl ngei ngei ang." 
Jeremiah51:57 “An hotute leh mi fing te, a ramawptu te chu, An hruaitute leh mi huaisente nên Ka hrai rui vek ang a, An muhîl hlen ang a, an harh leh tawh lo vang,” A hming Engkim Lalpa chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah51:58 Engkim Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Babulon lal kulh bang chhah tak chu a chim vek ang a, A kawngka sâng takte pawh a kâng ral vek ang. Mipui thawhrimna chu a thlâwn a, Hnamte pawh kâng ral leh mai tûr atân an buai." 
Jeremiah51:59 Juda lal Zedekia lal kum linaa Babulon-a a kal laiin a hnêna kal ve, Seraia, Neria fapa, Maaseia tupa hnêna zâwlnei Jeremia thupêk chu: Seraia chu lal chhungkaw enkawltu a ni." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremia chuan Babulon chunga chhiatna lo thleng tûr zawng zawng leh Babulon chungchâng lehkhabu-ah a ziak a. 
Jeremiah51:61 Jeremia chuan Seraia hnenah, “Babulon i thlen hunah hêng thu zawng zawng hi chhiar chhuak ang che." 
Jeremiah51:62 Hetiangin sawi ang che, ‘Aw Lalpa, he hnam hi tihchhiat i tum thu i lo sawi tawh a; chuvângin, tu mah, mihring leh ramsa pawh, a chhûngah an chêng tawh lo vang a, kumkhuain a ram dêr tawh ang,’ ti ang che." 
Jeremiah51:63 He lehkhabu hi i chhiar chhuah zawhah, lungtum nên ṭâwn belhbawm la, Eufretis luiah paih ang che." 
Jeremiah51:64 ‘Babulon chu hetiang hian a pil ang a, a tho leh tawh lo vang. A chunga chhiatna ka thlentîr avângin a tlu dêr ang,’ tiin sawi rawh,” a ti a. Hei zawng hi Jeremia thute chu a ni." 
Jeremiah52:1 Kum sawmhnih leh pakhat a nihin Zedekia chu a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh pakhat ro a rêl a. A nu hming chu Hamutali a ni, Libna khaw mi Jeremia fanu a ni." 
Jeremiah52:2 Jehoiakima angin Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual a ti a. 
Jeremiah52:3 Lalpa a thinur avângin hêng thilte hi Jerusalem leh Judai ram chungah a lo thleng ta a, a hma ata anni chu a paih chhuak ta nge nge a ni. Tichuan, Zedekia chu Babulon lal chungah a hel ta a," 
Jeremiah52:4 Zedekia lal kum kuana, a thla sâwmna, ni sâwm ni chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chu, a sipai zawng zawng nên Jerusalem bei tûrin a lo thawk a. Khawpui chu an hual a, a vêlah ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
Jeremiah52:5 Zedekia lal kum sâwm leh pakhatna thlengin khawpui chu an hual a. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ṭâm chu a na ta hle a; thla lina, ni kua ni chuan ei tûr an nei ta lo va." 
Jeremiah52:7 Khawpui hungna bang chu an tipawp a, sipai pâwlho chu an tlânchhe ta a. Kaldai miten khawpui chu an hual chungin lal huan kiang bang pahnih inkâr kawngah an kal a." 
Jeremiah52:8 Mahse, Kaldai sipaite chuan an ûm a, Zedekia chu Jeriko phaiah an ûm phâk a, a sipai zawng zawng chuan an tlânsan a." 
Jeremiah52:9 Tichuan, ani chu an man a, Hamath rama Ribla khuaah Babulon lal hnênah an hruai a, ani chuan a chungthu a lo rêl a." 
Jeremiah52:10 Ribla khuaah chuan Babulon lal chuan a fate chu Zedekia hmuh lai ngeiin a thahsak a. 
Jeremiah52:11 Zedekia pawh a mitmu a kher chhuahsak a, thîr kawl a buntîr a, Babulon-ah a hruai chho va, a thih ni thlengin lung inah a tântîr a." 
Jeremiah52:12 Babulon lal Nebukadnezara a lal kum sâwm leh pakuana, thla ngana, ni sâwm ni chuan lal vêngtu pâwl hotu Nebuzaradana, Babulon lal kianga ding ṭhîn chu Jerusalem-ah a lo lût a." 
Jeremiah52:13 Lalpa in leh lal in a hâl a, Jerusalem-a in zawng zawng, in pawimawh dang zawng zawng nên a hâl chhe vek a." 
Jeremiah52:14 Kaldai sipai rual, lal vêngtu pâwl hotu hnuaia mite chuan Jerusalem hungna kulhte chu an tichhe vek a." 
Jeremiah52:15 Lal vêngtu pâwl hotu, Nebuzaradana chuan mipui rethei tak tak, khawpuia hnutchhiah te, Babulon lal kuta inpeho te, kut themthiam la awm zawng zawngte nên salah a hruai a." 
Jeremiah52:16 Lal vêngtu pâwl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan ram chhûng mi retheiho ṭhenkhat chu grep huan leh lo lama hnathawk atân a hnutchhiah a. 
Jeremiah52:17 Kaldai mite chuan Lalpa ina dâr ban te, a nghahchhan te, Lalpa ina dâr tuizêm te an tikeh vek a. Dâr zawng zawng chu Babulon-ah an phur chho va." 
Jeremiah52:18 Bêl te, vutlawh te, khâwnvâr tihmihna te, maihûn te, rimtui hâlna berhbute leh dâr bungrua zawng zawng chu an la vek a." 
Jeremiah52:19 Lal in vêngtu hotu chuan maihûn te, berhbu te, thlêng te, bêl te, khâwnvâr dahna te, thîrfian te, in tûr thilhlan dahna te, rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam te chu a la vek a." 
Jeremiah52:20 Lalpa in atâna Lal Solomona siam - dâr ban pahnih, tuizêm pakhat leh a hûnna dâra siam, bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih leh bungbêl dang dâra siam zawng zawng chu bûk sên rual a ni lo." 
Jeremiah52:21 Bante chu tawng sâwm leh pariata sâng a ni, a len lam tawng sâwm leh pahnih bial a ni. A lai a kawrawng a, a chhah lam chu zungza bêng a ni." 
Jeremiah52:22 A ban hmawrah chuan lu bâwk tawng ngaa sâng a awm, a vêl chuan dâr leh theibuhfaia chei mawi vek a ni. Ban pahnihna pawh chu theibuhfaia chei bawk a ni." 
Jeremiah52:23 A pangah chuan theibuhfai sawmkua leh pahnih lai a awm a. A vêla chei mawina theibuhfai zawng zawng chu za zet a ni. 
Jeremiah52:24 Lal vêngtu pâwl hotu chuan puithiam lal ber Seraia te, a puitu puithiam Zefania te leh kawngkhâr vêngtu pathum chu a man a." 
Jeremiah52:25 Indo mite, hotute leh lal khâwnbâwl ṭhîn mi pasarih, khawpuia la awm a hmuhte chu a man a; ram chhûnga sipai latu hotu lal ber leh chumi rama mi sawmruk, khawpuia awmte chu a hruai bawk a." 
Jeremiah52:26 Vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradana chuan an vaiin a man a, Ribla khuaa Babulon lal hnênah a rawn hruai a." 
Jeremiah52:27 Babulon lal chuan Hamat ram Ribla khuaah chuan anni chu a sawisa a, a tihlum a. Tichuan, Juda mite chu an ram ata sala hruai an ni ta a." 
Jeremiah52:28 Nebukadnezaran sala a hruai mipui zât chu hei hi a ni: kum sarihnaah Juda mi sângthum leh sawmhnih leh pathum a hruai a. 
Jeremiah52:29 Nebukadnezara lal kum sâwm leh pariatnaah Jerusalem aṭangin mi zariat leh sawmthum leh pahnih a hruai leh a. 
Jeremiah52:30 Kum sawmhnih leh pathumnaah vêngtu pâwl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan Juda mi zasarih leh sawmli leh panga a hruai leh a, an vaiin sângli leh zaruk an ni." 
Jeremiah52:31 Juda lal Jehoiakina chu kum sâwm thum leh pasarih sala a tân hnuin Evil-merodaka chu Babulon-ah a lo lal a. Chumi kum thla sâwm leh pahnihna, ni sawmhnih leh panga ni chuan Juda lal Jehoiakina chu lung in ata a chhuah a, zalên takin a awmtîr ta a." 
Jeremiah52:32 Ani chu a tiṭha hle a, Babulon-a a hnêna awm ve lal dangte aia dinhmun ṭha zâwkin a siam a." 
Jeremiah52:33 Tichuan, tân in kawrte chu a hlîp a, a dam chhûng zawng lal hnênah a eiin a in ṭhîn." 
Jeremiah52:34 A ni tin mamawh chu Babulon lal chuan a pe a, chutiangin a dam chhûng zawng, a thih thlengin, ṭha takin a enkawl a." 
Lamentations1:1 E khai! Khaw lûn tak ni ṭhîn chu A va chul ta teh ruai êm! Hnam tin ngaihsân ni ṭhîn chu Hmeithai ang a ni ta. Khaw ropui tak ni ṭhîn chu Chhiah khua a chang ta e. 
Lamentations1:2 Zânahte pawh a ṭap tlawk tlawk a, A biangah mittui a luang nguah nguah, Amah ngaina ṭhîntu, thlamuantu rêng a nei lo ve, A ṭhiante chuan an bum, Hmêlma an chang zo ta." 
Lamentations1:3 Judai ram mite chu hrehawm tuarin salah an tâng, Hnam dang zîngah an awm darh a, Hahchawlhna rêng an hmu zo lo. Ûmtute chuan an nangchîng a, an chêp ta hle a ni." 
Lamentations1:4 Zion panna kawng chu a ṭhing ṭhuap a, Kût hmang tûr pawh an awm ta lo. Kawngkhârte chu a chhe zo va, A hlui ṭhuap mai a ni. Zai thiam nulate chu an chau zo va, Puithiamte pawh an rûm an rûm mai e." 
Lamentations1:5 Hmêlmate chu hotu-ah an chang a, An thaw a veng kher mai. An sual êm vângin Lalpan a hrem a ni, Hmêlmate chuan an fanaute salah an kawisak ta." 
Lamentations1:6 Zion ropuina chu a chuai zo ta, An hotute pawh chu sazuk ûm nek Ṭâmchhâwl chau hnêp ang mai an ni." 
Lamentations1:7 Jerusalem chuan hrehawm mangan a tuar hnuin, A hmânlai ropuina a hre chhuak a, Hmêlmaten an rawn lâk lai khân, Puitu rêng a nei lo. A chan chhe ta êm chu hmêlmaten an diriam e." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalem chuan thil sual a ti nasa êm a, A bawlhhlawh ta a ni. Ngaisâng ṭhîntute chuan an hmusit a, A saruak an hmuhsak avângin Zakin a rûm a, lehlam a hawi." 
Lamentations1:9 A bawlhhlawhna, a pawnfêna kai chu Thup tumna pawh a nei thei lo. A chhiat dân chu a râpthlâk êm êm a, Thlamuantu rêng an awm lo ve. “En teh, Lalpa, kan chan chhiatzia hi, Hmêlmate an dinchan tâk hi,”" 
Lamentations1:10 A thil ṭha neih hmêlmaten an suam a, Hnam dang kal phal lohna Hmun Thianghlima an lût a thlîr reng mai." 
Lamentations1:11 Ei tûr zawngin mite chu an rûm a, Intunnun nân an thil ṭha neihte chuan ei tûr an lei. “ Lalpa, kan nêpzia hi, en teh,” an ti." 
Lamentations1:12 Veivâkte hnênah chuan, “En teh u, Ka tuar anga tuar nasa hi awm ve maw, Lalpa thinurna ni a thleng a, ka tuar a nih hi." 
Lamentations1:13 Vânsâng aṭangin mei a rawn thlâk a, Min kâng ta a, min titlâwm ta a ni. Ka awh nân thang a kam a, A letlingin min khai, Awm ngaihna hre lovin ka chau nilêng." 
Lamentations1:14 Ka sual a ṭâwn khâwm a, amah ngeiin min awrhtîr a, A nghâwngkawl chu min bahtîr a, a rit êm a, ka chau zo ta. Lalpan hmêlma kutah min hlân ta a ni, Ka tluk lohte kutah chuan." 
Lamentations1:15 Kan zînga mi huaite Lalpan a thamlo hle, Min bei tûrin sipai tam tak a ko khâwm a, Kan tlangvâlte tihlum tûr leh Sâwrkhura grep rah sâwr anga, Kan nulate rap sâwr tûrin." 
Lamentations1:16 Chuvâng alâwm ka ṭah chiama, Ka mittui pawh a luan zung zung, Min thlamuan tûr an darh zo va, Min tiharh tûr an awm hek lo. Hmêlmate chu an chak tâk avângin ka fate chu an hawihai ta." 
Lamentations1:17 Zion chuan bân a phar vêl a, Thlamuantu rêng a hmu zo lo, Jakoba chu Lalpan a vêla mite a huattîr a, Jerusalem chu bawlhhlawh angin an ten a ni." 
Lamentations1:18 Lalpa zawng a dik a, a thu ka awih lo zâwk a ni, Mi tinrêngin ka thu hi ngaithla teh u, Ka tuar nasatzia en teh mah u, Kan nula leh tlangvâlte chu salah an tân tâk hi." 
Lamentations1:19 Min hmangaih ṭhîntute ka han au va, Min lo bum reng alâwm, Intihharh nân ei tûr an zawng lai chu, Puithiamte leh kan upate tualah an tlu hlum e." 
Lamentations1:20 Lalpa, ka tuar dân hi en teh, Ka sa huai huai a, lung lêm ka nei thei lo. Ka sual vâng a ni e, pawi ka va han ti êm! Khandaih avângin tualah lusûn an pung. In chhûngah hripui a lêng." 
Lamentations1:21 Ka rûm thâwm hi ngaithla teh u, Thlamuantu rêng ka nei lo ve, Min tuartîr a ni tih ka hmêlmaten An han hriat chuan an lâwm êm êm, I hun tiam chu han thlentîr la, Keimah ang hian tuar ve rawh se." 
Lamentations1:22 An thil sual tihte chu hmu ve tawh la, Ka sual vânga min hrem ang hian hrem ve ang che, Hrehawm tuarin ka chauh hnêp hi.”" 
Lamentations2:1 E khai! Lalpa thinurin Zion khua chu thimin a khuh tâk hi. Israel ropuina chu vân aṭangin leiah a paih thla a, A thinur ni-ah chuan a ke nghahchhan A theihnghilh ta a ni." 
Lamentations2:2 Lalpa chuan dîm lo tawpin Judai ram khuate chu a tichhia a, A thinur a, an kulhte chu a tichim bawk. An ram leh an hotute a titlâwm ta." 
Lamentations2:3 A thinur so sâin Israel chakna chu a tichhia a, Hmêlma an lo kalin a pui duh lo, A vêl kâng fai vek ṭhîn meialh angin Jakoba chungah chuan a thinur chu a alh tâk hi." 
Lamentations2:4 Hmêlma angin a thal chuan a kâp a, An enchim loh fanaute chu a thah zawhsak. Zion khuaa inahte chuan a thinur mei a leih tâk hi." 
Lamentations2:5 Lalpa chu hmêlma ang mai a ni, Israel-te a lem zo va, An kulhte leh an in ropuite a tichhia a, Judai ram chhûngah lusûn rûnpui a thlentîr ta." 
Lamentations2:6 Huana bûk ram angin inkhâwmna inte chu a tiram zo ta a, Zion-ah chuan inkhâwmpui te, sabat serh te, An titâwp ta vek a, A thinur avângin lal leh puithiamte chu a hnâwl." 
Lamentations2:7 A maichâm chu Lalpan a rauhsan a, A Hmun Thianghlim a hawisan ta. A bangte chu hmêlma a ṭhiattîr a, Hlim taka kûtpui an hman ṭhinnaah khân, Hmêlma an haw haw dur dur mai." 
Lamentations2:8 Lalpan Zion kulh chu tihchhiat a tum tlat a, A chhe tûr chin a rîn fel a, A kut thlâk chu a na ngei mai, In sângte leh kulh bangte chu a chim rem rum." 
Lamentations2:9 A kawngkhârte thil chhe hnawkin a chhilh zo va, A kalhna thîr tlâwnte a bung rum mai. Lal leh miliante chu salah an tâng, Dân lah an inzirtîr tawh lo, Zâwlneite pawhin Lalpa inlârna rêng an dawng hek lo." 
Lamentations2:10 Zion khaw upate chu leiah ngawi rengin an ṭhu a, An lu vaivut phulin saiip an sin a, Jerusalem nulate chu leiah an kûn." 
Lamentations2:11 Ka mittui avângin ka meng phe ruai a ni, Ka mite chan chau chu ka lainat êm êm a, ka lung a chhia a ni. Naupangte leh nausênte chu Tual zau laiah an thidang e." 
Lamentations2:12 Rilṭâm leh tuihâlin an nute hmaah an ṭap a, Khawlaiah chuan hliam tuar angin an tlu, An nute malchungah an thi." 
Lamentations2:13 Aw Jerusalem, eng nge ka sawi tâk ang? Nang ang hi tu nge awm? Aw Zion nula, engtin nge ka thlamuan tâk ang che? A hliam tuar chu tuifinriat anga zau a ni a, Tu nge tidam thei ang?" 
Lamentations2:14 Zâwlneite chuan thil ho leh dâwt an hmuhsak che a, I sim theih nân i sualte an tilang ngai lo, Inlârna an hmuhte chu Thil lawilo leh inbumna mai a ni." 
Lamentations2:15 Aw Jerusalem, i bula kalte chuan Kut bêngin an chek khum che; Lu an thing a, ‘Hei hi maw khaw mawi ber, Khawvêl chhuan chu!’ an ti." 
Lamentations2:16 I hmêlmaten an nuihzat che a, An faifûk a, an ha an ṭhial khum che, ‘Kan lem zo ta, kan duhthusâm thlen ni Kan hmuh tâk hi,’ an ti." 
Lamentations2:17 Lalpan a thiltum chu a ti ta a, Hmâna a sawi lâwk daih tawh chu a hlen ta a ni; Dîm hlek lovin a tichhia a, Hmêlmate chuan lâwmin in chungah bawp an khai." 
Lamentations2:18 Aw Jerusalem, i bangte chuan Lalpa au se, A chhûn a zân i mittui chu luipui ang luang rawh se, Bâng lêk lovin ṭap ṭap mai rawh." 
Lamentations2:19 Tho la, zankhuain Lalpa au rawh, Lalpa hmaah i thinlung chu tui angin leihbua la, Kawtthlêr tina rilṭâma chau i fate nun nân, Bân phar chungin dîl rawh." 
Lamentations2:20 Lalpa, heti taka i sawisak tâkte hi, en teh, An fa pawmlaite sa an nuten an ei ang maw? Puithiam leh zâwlneite, Lalpa Hmun Thianghlimah an tualthi tûr em ni?" 
Lamentations2:21 Kawtthlêrahte naupang leh tar an thi phung mai, Nula leh tlangvâl rual khandaihin an thi, I sâm buan e, lainat lovin." 
Lamentations2:22 Khâwmpui urhsûna kal khâwm angin, I thinur ni-ah chuan, Kil tin ata kan hmêlmate i ko khâwm a, Lalpa thinurna ni pumpelha him rêng kan awm lo, Kan fa pawm lai, kan chawi tleite, Hmêlmaten an that zo." 
Lamentations3:1 A thinur tianga vuak tuartu ka ni," 
Lamentations3:2 Ênga kal lovin thimah min hruai. 
Lamentations3:3 Ni tin a kut ka tuar reng mai. 
Lamentations3:4 Min tichêr a, ka vuai then mai, Ka ruhte pawh min tihtliahsak." 
Lamentations3:5 Rilru na leh hrehawmin min tuam a," 
Lamentations3:6 Thi tawhte angin thimah min awmtîr hi. 
Lamentations3:7 Khaidiatin min phuar tlat a, Chhuak thei lovin min khung." 
Lamentations3:8 Ṭanpui dîla ka au a hre duh lo. 
Lamentations3:9 Ka kalkawngan lung bang a rem tlat a, a tiping zo ta e." 
Lamentations3:10 Savawm angin min châng ru a, Sakeibaknei biru ang hian." 
Lamentations3:11 Ka kawngte chu hlîngin a hnawh khat a, Min chhun pem pheng phung mai." 
Lamentations3:12 A thalngul a kuai a, min tin reng hi." 
Lamentations3:13 A bâwma thal ka thinhnûnah a bûr," 
Lamentations3:14 Mi zawng zawngin mi nuihzat a, Ni tinin hla min sak el ṭhîn." 
Lamentations3:15 Ning hlui khawpin thil khâ min intîr a, Thil hrehawm tak min tuartîr hi." 
Lamentations3:16 Ṭiau lung min ṭhialtîr a, Vaivutah min tâltîr hrep a ni." 
Lamentations3:17 Lungmuanga awm ka nei lo va, Nuam ka hre tawh hek lo." 
Lamentations3:18 Ka tuar ta ngang lo ve, Lalpa lakah ka beisei a bo ta." 
Lamentations3:19 Ka tuarna leh ka vahvaihna Hriat chhuah hi hrehawm tak a ni. 
Lamentations3:20 Ka chhui ka chhuiin ka chau hnêp ṭhîn. 
Lamentations3:21 Hei hi ka hriat chhuahin ka bei a sei leh ṭhîn: 
Lamentations3:22 Lalpa ngilneihna leh a lainatna chu A chuai ngai lo. 
Lamentations3:23 A thar zêl ṭhîn tûk tinin; A va rinawm tak êm! 
Lamentations3:24 Lalpa hi ka neih chhun a ni a, Amahah chuan ka innghat ang." 
Lamentations3:25 Amah nghâka zawngtute tân Lalpa hi zawng a ṭha a ni. 
Lamentations3:26 Lalpan min chhandam hun tûr chu Nghah mai a ṭha. 
Lamentations3:27 Naupan lai ngeia chhel zir a ṭha," 
Lamentations3:28 Hrehawm hle mah se, ngawi renga Tuar ngat ngat tûr a ni." 
Lamentations3:29 Kûna dawh mai tûr a ni a, Beidawn tûr a ni lo." 
Lamentations3:30 Biangah min bêngin min diriam ṭhîn mah se, Dawh mai tûr a ni e." 
Lamentations3:31 Lalpa chuan min hnâwl hlen dâwn si lo. 
Lamentations3:32 Min tilungngai na a, ngil a nei êm mai a, Min lainat ṭhîn." 
Lamentations3:33 Mihring tihlungngaih leh tihnat hi A duhzâwng a ni lo. 
Lamentations3:34 Saltâng nghaisak chîngte," 
Lamentations3:35 Chungnungbera hmuha hleih neih te leh 
Lamentations3:36 Mi chan ai chhuhsak te hi Lalpa huatzâwng tak a ni e. 
Lamentations3:37 Lalpan thu a pêk loh chuan tu thu nge hlawhtling ang? 
Lamentations3:38 Chungnungbera kâ aṭang chuan Thu chhia thu ṭha a chhuak dâwn lâwm ni? 
Lamentations3:39 Kan dam chhûng hian kan sual vânga kan tuarin Phunnawi tûr em kan nih? 
Lamentations3:40 Kan awm dân hi chhûtin i fiah ang u khai, Lalpa lam i hawi ang u." 
Lamentations3:41 Vâna Pathian lamah thinlung hawngin I ṭawngṭai zâwk ang u. 
Lamentations3:42 “Thil sual tiin kan hawisan che a, Nangin min ngaidam lo va ni." 
Lamentations3:43 Thinur takin min ûm zâwk a, Dîm hlek lovin min tihhlum hi." 
Lamentations3:44 Chhûm chhah takin i inkhuh a, Kan ṭawngṭaina i hnên a thleng thei lo va ni." 
Lamentations3:45 Hnam tin zîngah bawlhhlawh vawm khâwma min siam hi. 
Lamentations3:46 Kan hmêlmaten diriam takin min au khum a," 
Lamentations3:47 Thil râpthlâk leh hrehawm kan tuar," 
Lamentations3:48 Chhiatpui kan tawh avângin Ka mittui hi a luang zawih zawih a ni. 
Lamentations3:49 Bâng lovin ka ṭap ka ṭap mai dâwn," 
Lamentations3:50 Vân aṭangin Lalpan min rawn bih, min hmuh hma chu," 
Lamentations3:51 Khawpuia kan fanute tuar ka hmuh chuan Min tilungchhia a ni. 
Lamentations3:52 Hmêlmate chuan a chhan awm hauh lovin Sava ang ziazângin min veh. 
Lamentations3:53 A nung chungin khurah min thlâk a, lungin min dêng," 
Lamentations3:54 Tuiin ka lu a rawn chîm chuan Ka thi dâwn ta emaw ka ti. 
Lamentations3:55 Khur mawng aṭangin, Lalpa, ka rawn au che a," 
Lamentations3:56 Ka au thâwm chu I ngaithla a, beng hup lovin ka rûm i lo hria a," 
Lamentations3:57 Ka han auh tâk che chuan mi rawn hnaih a, ‘Hlau suh,’ mi ti." 
Lamentations3:58 Lalpa, min rawn chhan a, ka nun i humhim ta." 
Lamentations3:59 Lalpa, ka tuarna i hmu ta a, ka chungthu hi han rêl fel rawh." 
Lamentations3:60 Phuba lâk tuma an inrâwn khâwm hi, I hmu reng ṭhîn a ni." 
Lamentations3:61 Lalpa, min diriam dân hi i hre reng a, Min phiar dânte lamin." 
Lamentations3:62 Min beitute chu nilêngin Ka chungchâng thu sawiin an phun sur sur," 
Lamentations3:63 En teh, an ṭhut pawhin an din pawhin Hla min sak el." 
Lamentations3:64 Lalpa, an thiltih ang zêlin thungrûl ang che." 
Lamentations3:65 Ânchhia lawh la, beidawng rawh se," 
Lamentations3:66 Thinrimin ûm nek teh, Lalpa, Vân hnuai ata tiboral rawh.”" 
Lamentations4:1 E Khai, rangkachak chu a thîm ta tlul mai a! Rangkachak ṭha chi chu a va danglam ta êm! Hmun Thianghlim sakna lungte chu Kawtthlêr pêng ṭhuamahte an paih darh ta." 
Lamentations4:2 Zion tlangvâlte chu Rangkachak ṭha chi ang an ni ṭhîn a, Bêlvawtu hlumbêl ang lek an nih tâk hi!" 
Lamentations4:3 Chinghnia pawhin a no hnute a pe ṭhîn a, Ka mite erawh chu thlalêr vanghâwngsei Nun râwng tak ang hi an ni ta e." 
Lamentations4:4 An pawm laite tuihâl dangchârin an awm a, An faten ei tûr an ngên a, an pe duh lo." 
Lamentations4:5 Thil tui tui ei ṭhînte chu tualah an ṭâmchhâwl a, Puan senduk sin ṭhînten bawlhhlawh paih khâwm an hai." 
Lamentations4:6 Tu ma khawih lohvin Sodom khua a chhe thut a, A mite tuar aiin ka mite tuar a nasa daih a ni." 
Lamentations4:7 Kan hotute chu vûr aia vâr, Hnutetui anga pâwl phêt, An taksa chu Rubi anga sâr, Safir lung nawh mâm ang ni ṭhîn kha," 
Lamentations4:8 An hmêlte chu meihawl aiin a dum ta a, Tuala an awm hriat hran rual an ni ta lo, An chêr ṭhiak a, an ro rem a, Thing ro ang mai an ni." 
Lamentations4:9 Ei tûr hmu lo, châk ngawih ngawih si, Rilṭâma thi tate ai chuan khandaiha thahte chan a ṭha zâwk e." 
Lamentations4:10 Ka miten chhiatpui an tawh meuh chuan, Nu ngilnei tak takte pawhin An fate hial an chhûm a, an ei ta mai!" 
Lamentations4:11 Lalpan a thinur chu a hrithla ta a ni, Zion-ah chuan a thinur mei a chhuah a, A lungphûm lamin a tichhe zo ta." 
Lamentations4:12 Lei lalte leh khawvêla mi zawng zawngten Beitu hmêlma Jerusalem khuaah An luh theih rêng an ring ngai lo. 
Lamentations4:13 Zâwlneite sual vâng leh puithiamte khawloh vâng a ni, Khaw chhûngah chuan mi dik thisen an chhuah si ṭhîn." 
Lamentations4:14 Mitdel angin tualah an vâk dun dun a, An kawrahte thisen a kai hnuang a, Tu man an khawih thiang lo." 
Lamentations4:15 Miten, ‘In bawlhhlawh e, kal daih rawh u, Kal bo daih rawh u, min khawih ang e,’ an ti. Hnam tin zîngah an vâkvai a, ‘Hetah an awm kan phal hlei nêm,’ an lo ti zêl." 
Lamentations4:16 Lalpa a thinur a, a tidarh ta a ni, A ngaihsak tawh hauh lo, Puithiam a duhsak chuang lo va, Kan upate a khawngaih bawk hek lo." 
Lamentations4:17 Min pui thei lo puih beiseiin Mit tla dâwnin kan thlîr. Min chhan thei lo hnam chu Kan nghâk thlâwn mai a ni. 
Lamentations4:18 Hmêlmate chuan kan hnu an chhui zêl a, Kawtthlêrah pawh kan lêng ngam lo, Kan ral dâwn ta a ni, Kan ni a liam ta a, kan thi mai dâwn." 
Lamentations4:19 Vânsâng ata mupui lo bir aiin min ûmtute an chak zâwk a, Tlângahte pawh min ûmzui a, Thlalêrahte min lo tlân khalh." 
Lamentations4:20 Lalpa hriakthih, kan belh ber chu, An thangah chuan a âwk ta si. ‘Ama hovin hnam dang kârahte pawh, Kan awm ang chu,’ kan lo ti ṭhîn." 
Lamentations4:21 Uz rama chêngte leh Edom mi leh sate u, In theih lai hian hlim ula, lâwm rawh u, In chungah pawh chhiatna no chu a lo thleng dâwn, In rui ang a, saruakin in awm ang." 
Lamentations4:22 Zion fanaute chuan in tuar tûr chu in tlâk ta a, Salah in tâng tawh lo vang. Nangni Edom mite erawh chuan in tuar dâwn e, In sualzia hi a thai lang dâwn." 
Lamentations5:1 Lalpa, kan chunga thil thleng hi hre reng ta che, Min rawn thlîr la, kan mualpho tâkzia hi en teh." 
Lamentations5:2 Kan rochan ramte chu hnam dangin an nei a, Kan inte pawh ram dang miten an luah." 
Lamentations5:3 Pa nei lovin kan fahrah a, Kan nute pawh an hmeithai ta." 
Lamentations5:4 Kan tui ngei chu kan in dâwnin lei a ngai ta a, Kan thing ngei pawh a man kan pe." 
Lamentations5:5 Bâwng nghâwngkawl min bahtîr a, min khalh nek a, Kan rim hle a, chawlh pawh kan châwl thei lo." 
Lamentations5:6 Ei tûr kan neih hrâm nân Aigupta leh Asuria kan be tlawn ruai. 
Lamentations5:7 Kan pate chuan thil sual an ti, an thi tawh a, An sual mawh chu keinin kan phur." 
Lamentations5:8 Bawihten kan chungah ro an rêl a, An kut ata min chhan chhuak tûr tu mah rêng an awm lo."
