Ezekiel22:30 Thinura ram chu ka tihchhiat vek loh nân a bang chim rem ṭha tûr, a chhe laia lo ṭang tûr mi, an zîngah ka zawng a, ka hmu zo hauh lo." 
Ezekiel22:31 Chuvângin, ka thinurna an chungah ka leih ang a, ka thinrimna mei chuan a tihlum ang; an thiltih mawh chu an chungah ka nghat dâwn a ni,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel23:1 Lalpa chuan heti hian a sawi a: 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mihring fapa, nu pakhatin fanu pahnih a nei a." 
Ezekiel23:3 An tleirâwl chhuah aṭangin Aigupta ramah mi hurah an ṭang a, an hnute te an dehsak a, an nulâtna an hloh ta a." 
Ezekiel23:4 A upa zâwk hming chu Oholai a ni a, Samari entîrna a ni; a naupang zâwk chu Oholabai a ni a, Jerusalem entîrna a ni. Nupuiah ka nei a, fanu fapa min hrinsak a." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ka nupui ni chungin Oholai chuan min hursan a, a ngaihzâwng, râlhrâtho, Asuria chu a hak hiam a." 
Ezekiel23:6 Chûng chu kawr sena inthuam, milian leh hotu lal, tlangvâl hmêlṭha thlan, sakawr chungchuang mi an ni." 
Ezekiel23:7 Chûng Asuria mi chhuante nula chu a ni ta a; an milemte ngaisângin a be ve a, a intibawrhbâng ta a." 
Ezekiel23:8 Aigupta rama a hurna kha a la sim lo va ni, a tleirâwl chhuah aṭang rêngin mipain an mutpui ṭhîn a, an nula angin an chei ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel23:9 Chuvângin, a ngaihzâwng, a hak hiam ṭhin Asuria mite kutah ka pe ta a ni." 
Ezekiel23:10 Anni chuan a silhfên an hlihsak vek a, a fanu fapate chu an kawisak a, amah chu khandaihin an that a; a thil tuar chu hmeichheho sawiṭhaihna ber a ni ta a." 
Ezekiel23:11 “A nau Oholibai chuan chûng chu a hmuh pawhin a u ai chuan mi dang a hak hiam dân leh a hur dân chu a nasa zâwk ta daih a. 
Ezekiel23:12 Asuria milian leh hotu lal, râlhrât, kawr senlâr ha, sakawr chungchuang, tlangvâl rual hmêlṭha thlante chu a hak ve ta hiam a." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ani pawh chu a intibawrhbâng ta tih ka hmu a, a u siar a u siar a ni." 
Ezekiel23:14 A hurna chu a zual tulh tulh a; Kaldai hotu lian thlâ, banga an ziak, senlâr vûta rawng an hnawih," 
Ezekiel23:15 kâwnghrên mawi tak hrênga, diar fêm buk tak khim, han en pawha hotu ni âwm hliah hliah, Babulon mi, Kaldai rama piangte lem chu a han hmu a," 
Ezekiel23:16 a ngaizâwng ta a, Kaldai mite hnênah chuan puarak te a tîr ta a." 
Ezekiel23:17 Babulon mite chu an lo kal a, an rawn mutpui a, an tibawrhbâng ta a. Duh tâwka an chêt hnu chuan a ngei ta hle a." 
Ezekiel23:18 Chutia a lang a pauva a hur a, inhlîm a hreh loh avâng chuan a u ang bawkin ka ngei ve ta a." 
Ezekiel23:19 Aigupta rama a tleirâwl hurna kha a la reh lo, a hur tulh tulh a ni." 
Ezekiel23:20 Sabengtung leh sakawr anga lian mi hur pui pui mutpui tûr a melh riai mai. 
Ezekiel23:21 Aigupta rama i hnute an dehsak che a, i nulâtna i hloh tâk china i tleirâwl hurna chu i la chhunzawm zêl a nih hi." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Chuvângin, Oholiba, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh, i ngaihzâwngte chu i chungah ka ṭuantîr dâwn. I ngaihzâwng, i ngei tâkte kha, kil tin aṭangin ka rawn hualtîr dâwn a che." 
Ezekiel23:23 Babulon mi te, Kaldai mi te, Pekod mi te, Shoa leh Koa mite leh Asuria-ho te chu ka rawn hruai ang. Babulon mi, Kaldai tlangvâl hmêlṭha thlan ṭhiau, milian leh hotu lal, râlhrât rual leh sakawr chungchuang hotute chu ka rawn khâwm dâwn." 
Ezekiel23:24 Hmâr lam aṭangin an lo kal ang a, sipai tam tak, sakawrtawlailîr hmang leh thil phur tawlailîr nên, phaw keng leh awmphaw ha-in, invenna lukhum nên an rawn hual ang che a, an duh duha an tih tûrin an kutah ka dah tawh che." 
Ezekiel23:25 I chungah ka thinur a, anni pawh thinur taka sawisa tûr chein ka ti a ni; i hnâr te, i beng te an hlep ang a, in zînga la dam chu khandaihin an that ang. I fanu fapate chu an man ang a, an man bâng chu an kâng hlum ang." 
Ezekiel23:26 I thawmhnawte an hlihsak vek ang chia, i ṭhi mawite chu an lâksak ang che." 
Ezekiel23:27 I hurna leh i nawhchi zawrh, Aigupta ram aṭanga i chhawm chu, ka titâwp ang. Aigupta chu thlîr kîrin i ngaihtuah tawh lo vang.”" 
Ezekiel23:28 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, i huatzâwng leh i mi ngeite kutah ka hlân dâwn che." 
Ezekiel23:29 An huat êm che avângin an sawisa nek ang che; i thawh chhuah zawng zawng an lâksak ang che a, saruakin, a lâwng maiin an lum reng ang che. I hur avâng leh nawhchi i zawrh avângin" 
Ezekiel23:30 hêng hi i chungah i tithleng a ni, hnam dang dang ûmin i hur bo va, an milemte chuan i intibawrhbâng a," 
Ezekiel23:31 i u awm dâna i awm ve zêl avângin i tuar tûr no chu ka pe a che.” 
Ezekiel23:32 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “No lian pui, dawng hlâwk tak, i u no chu in rawh, Mi tinin an hmusit ang chia, An nuihzat ang che. A dawng hlâwk êm a nia." 
Ezekiel23:33 I rui ang a, i mangang hle ang, Hlauhna leh chhiatnaa khat no a ni. I u Samaria no chu," 
Ezekiel23:34 I in ang a, i tlâk vek tûr a ni, A keh them lam in tel la, I hnute te chu pawt fân rawh.” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan, “Kei hi a siamtu che ka ni,” a ti." 
Ezekiel23:35 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Min theihnghilh a, min hawisan tâk avângin i hurna leh i nawhchi zawrh mawh chu i phur ang.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Lalpa chuan heti hian a sawi a: “Mihring fapa, Oholai leh Oholabai te hi chachhuah tûrin i inpeih em? An tenawmzia hrilh teh." 
Ezekiel23:37 An uire a, an kutah thisen a kai hnuang mai; milem biain an uire a, fapa min hrinsakte chu an that a, milem hnênah an hlân." 
Ezekiel23:38 Ka chungah hei chauh hi an ti nêm! Ka Hmun Thianghlim an tibawrhbâng a, ka sabat ni an bawhchhe bawk." 
Ezekiel23:39 An fate, milem hmaa an thah ni la lain, chumi ni ngei chuan, ka Hmun Thianghlimah an lo kal a, ka in chu an rawn tibawrhbâng ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel23:40 Ram hla taka mi sâwm tûrin puarakte an tîr chhên a, chûng mite chu an lo kal a. Anni chu an lo inbual fai a, an mit an hnawih dûr a, ṭhi man tamte an lo awrh a." 
Ezekiel23:41 Khum nuam takah an ṭhu a, ei tûr tui tui dah khâwmna dawhkân an chhawp a, ka pêk thil rimtui leh hriakte chu an dah bawk a." 
Ezekiel23:42 Engthâwl taka nuam chênin an ri bûng bûng a; thlalêr aṭanga sâwm khâwm ṭeuh te chuan ngûn an buntîr a, lukhim mawi tak an khimtîr a." 
Ezekiel23:43 Uire chau tawh chu nawhchizuar angin an chei a nih hi,’ ka ti a." 
Ezekiel23:44 Nawhchizuar, miin an pan ṭhin angin mi hur Oholai leh Oholabai chu an la pan ta chhên a." 
Ezekiel23:45 Uire leh tualthatah mi dikte chuan an puh ang a, thiam loh an chantîr ngei ang; uire an chîng a, an kutah thisen a kai hnuang si a.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Tihthlabâr tûr leh rawk tûrin mipui khâwm rawh u. 
Ezekiel23:47 Mipui chuan lungin dêng sela, khandaihin tan sela, an fanu fapate chu that rawh se, an inte pawh hâl rawh se." 
Ezekiel23:48 Ram pumah an hurna chu ka tibo dâwn, hmeichhe dangte pawhin anni anga hur an chîn ve loh nân." 
Ezekiel23:49 Nangni unau hian in hur man in tuar ang a, milema in in-tihbawrhbân mawh chu in phur ang. Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa P athian chu ka nih in hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Kum kuana thla sâwm, ni sâwm ni chuan Lalpan heti hian mi hrilh a." 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mihring fapa, ziakna la la, vawiin tahrik ni hi ziak teh, vawiin hi Babulon lalin Jerusalem a hual ṭan ni a ni." 
Ezekiel24:3 Hel hmang chhûng tân he tehkhin thu hi sawi rawh; ‘Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti,’ ti rawh: Chhuang rú, bêl chu chhuang rú, Tui pawh leih khat rawh u." 
Ezekiel24:4 Sa ti ṭha ṭha, a bawp leh dâr, A irno ruhte nên la khâwm ula, Tikhat rawh u." 
Ezekiel24:5 Berâm tuihnai hnai talh ula, Thukah thing rawlh ṭeuh ṭeuh rawh u. So bawrh bawrh sela, A ruh filhin hmin teh se." 
Ezekiel24:6 “Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Tualthahna khawpui chu a chung a pik e. Tihfai ngai loh khirkhâwng hlîr a ni. Sa hrang chu thlang chuang lovin thur vek rawh u. 
Ezekiel24:7 Khaw chhûngah mi an that a, an thisen chu lungpui châr chungah a luang, leiah luang se vaivutin a chhilh tûr." 
Ezekiel24:8 Chhilh a nih loh nân lungpui châr chungah ka luantîr a ni: mi tihthinrima phuba ka lâk theih nân. 
Ezekiel24:9 “Tichuan, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Tualthahna khawpui, i chung a pik e! Kei ngei hian thingfâk chu ka rawlh ṭeuh dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel24:10 Thing fawm belh ula, chhêm hluah hluah rawh u; sa chu hmin kawi sela, chhuang kang rêt ula, a ruhte chu rawh ral rawh u." 
Ezekiel24:11 Dâr bêl ruak chu meiling chungah chhuang reng ula, ling vur rawh se." 
Ezekiel24:12 A khirkhâwng bawlhhlawh chu a kan ral hnuah bêl chu a thianghlim leh ang. A khirkhâwng chuti zozai chu hah hnêp khawpin tihfai tum mah la, i tifai thei lo vang, mei chauhvin a tifai thei a ni." 
Ezekiel24:13 In hurna chuan a tibawlhhlawh che u a, tihfai ka tum che u a, in fai thei si lo; ka thinur mei in tuar hma chu in fai dâwn lo va nih hi." 
Ezekiel24:14 Kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh a, ka hun a lo thleng ang a, ka ti ngei ang. Ka ngaizam mai lo vang, ka lainat lo vang a, pawi ka ti hek lo vang. In awm dân leh in thil tih dân ang chiahin in chungah ro ka rêl ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel24:15 Lalpa chuan heti hian mi hrilh a: 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mihring fapa, i duh lai tak ka tina thut ang a, ka lâksak dâwn a che. I ṭap ri tûr a ni lo va, i mittui a tla tûr a ni hek lo." 
Ezekiel24:17 Ngawi rengin inhnîp la, lusûn angin awm suh, diar khim la, pheikhawk bun rawh, i hmai tuam suh la, lusûn ei ang ei hek suh,” tiin." 
Ezekiel24:18 Chumi tûk chuan mipui hnênah thu ka sawi a, tlaiah chuan ka nupui chu a thi ta mai a. Thu min pêk ang khân a tûk zîngah chuan ka ti ta a." 
Ezekiel24:19 Mite chuan, “Engtizia nge hetia i tih, min hrilh teh,” an ti a." 
Ezekiel24:20 Anni chu ka bia a; Lalpa thu ka hnênah hetiang hian a lo thleng a ni: 
Ezekiel24:21 “Israel chhûngte hnênah sawi rawh. Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, ka Hmun Thianghlim, rinawm in tih êm êm, in chhuan, hmuh in kham theih loh, in lainat êm êm chu ka tibawrhbâng dâwn a ni. In fanu fapa Jerusalem-a la awmte chu khandaihin an sât hlum ang." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ka tih ang hian in ti ve dâwn a ni: in hmui in khuh lo vang a, lusûn ei ang in ei hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel24:23 Diar in khim tûr a ni, pheikhawk in bun ang a, in ṭap ri tûr a ni lo. In bawhchhiatna avângin in chau vang a, in inrûm chhâwk ang." 
Ezekiel24:24 Ezekiela hi in tân chhinchhiahna a ni ang, a tih ang zêl hian in ti dâwn a ni; chumi hnuah chuan kei hi Lalpa P athian chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel24:25 “Nang, Mihring fapa, an hlimpui leh an chhuan, hmun rinawm tak, hmuh an kham theih loh, an lainat êm êm chu ka chhuhsak ang a, an fanu fapate chu ka la bo vang." 
Ezekiel24:26 A tlân chhuak awm chhun chu i hnênah a lo kal ang a, i beng ngeiin a thu i ngaithla ang." 
Ezekiel24:27 Chumi ni chuan i ṭawng thei leh tawh ang a, lo tlân chhuak chhun chu i be thei ang. Tichuan, an tân chhinchhiahna i ni ang a, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel25:1 Lalpa chuan heti hian mi hrilh a: 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mihring fapa, Amon ram lam hawi la, thû puan khum rawh." 
Ezekiel25:3 Amon mite hnênah, ‘Lalpa P athian thu hi ngaithla rawh u,’ ti rawh. Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Ka Hmun Thianghlim an tihbawrhbâna, Israel ram an tihchhiata, Judai ram mite sala an hruai khân i lâwm vei hle a." 
Ezekiel25:4 Chuvângin, ngai teh, khawchhak mite kutah ka pe ang che u. In ramah bûk an rawn tlar ang a, hmun an khuar ang. In thei rahte leh in ran hnutetuite chu an tlân ang." 
Ezekiel25:5 Raba khawpui chu sanghâwngsei tlatna hmunah ka siam ang a, Amon ram pum chu ran tlatna hmun a ni ang; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel25:6 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Israel ram chu a chhiat avângin hmusit êm êmin hlim takin kut i bêng a, i ke i per vei a;" 
Ezekiel25:7 chuvângin, ngai teh, i chungah ka kut ka lek dâwn a ni. Hnam dang kutah ka pe ang chia, an rallâk sum i ni ang. Hnama chhiar tlâk lohvah ka siam ang che a, ka tichhe vek ang chia, ram nei lovin ka siam ang che. Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih i hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Moab leh Seir chuan Judai ram pawh ram dang ang bawk a lo nih lek hi,’ an ti vei a." 
Ezekiel25:9 Chuvângin, ngai teh, Moab ramri humtu khawpuite chu ka tudarh dâwn, ram mawi taka khawpui Beth-jesimot te, Baal-meon te, Kiriathaim khua te chu." 
Ezekiel25:10 Khawchhak mite chu Amon chungah nên an che ang a, an neih atân an ram chu ka pe ang. Amon mite chu hnama chhiar an ni tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel25:11 Moab chungthu chu ka rêl ang a; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel25:12 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Edom chuan Judai ram chungah phuba a la nghek a, hetia phuba an la mai hi an thiam lo tak zet a ni." 
Ezekiel25:13 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Edom chungah ka kut ka lek dâwn; mihring pawh, ran pawh ka tihlum ang. Teman khua aṭanga Dedan khaw thlengin ka tichhia ang a, khandaihin mite chu ka sât hlum ang." 
Ezekiel25:14 Edom chunga ka phuba chu la tûrin ka mi Israel-te chu thu ka pe ta; ka lungnihlohzia leh ka thinurzia an tilang ang. Phuba ka la a ni tih an hria ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel25:15 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Filistia-ho chuan an kumkhaw hmêlma chungah râwng takin phuba an la a, hmusit takin an tichhe vei a." 
Ezekiel25:16 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Filistia chungah ka kut ka lek dâwn; Keret mite chu ka tihlum ang a, tuipui kama la awmte pawh chu ka tihlum ang." 
Ezekiel25:17 Thinur takin an chungah phuba ka la ang a; tichuan, kei Lalpa hian an chungah phuba ka la a ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Kum sâwm leh pakhatna, thla ni hmasa berah chuan Lalpan heti hian a sawi a," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mihring fapa, Tura mite chuan Jerusalem chungchângah hlim takin, ‘Chei! Hnam tin kawtchhuah, Jerusalem chu a chhe ta vek mai! A chhiat tâk avângin keini kan changtlung hlauh vang,’ an ti vei a." 
Ezekiel26:3 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Aw Tura, ngai teh, i chungah ka ṭuan dâwn, tuifinriat fâwn angin hnam tam tak rawn bei tûr chein ka rawn tîr dâwn." 
Ezekiel26:4 Tura kulh bang chu an tichhia ang a, an insângte an tichim ang, a chung lei chu ka phiat fai hliau vang a, lung pialtlêp ngawt a ni ang." 
Ezekiel26:5 Tuifinriata lên dêngho lên phona a ni ang. Kei hian ka sawi tawh hi,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti: “Hnam dang tân râllâk sum an ni ang." 
Ezekiel26:6 An mi, lova awmte chu, khandaiha sah hlum an ni ang; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel26:7 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, Babulon lal, Nebukadnezara, lal ropui ber chu Tura bei tûrin hmâr lam aṭangin sakawr te, tawlailîr te, sakawr chungchuang mi te, sipai te, ṭhuihruai tam tak nên ka rawn hruai dâwn." 
Ezekiel26:8 I mi, lova awmte chu khandaihin a that ang a, khua chu hual bang a siam hnan ang a, lei a chhûng pâwng ang a, phaw nên a hual ang che." 
Ezekiel26:9 Bang chhut chhiatna a hmang ang a, i in sângte chu hreiin a chêk chhia ang." 
Ezekiel26:10 An sakawr pal khûk vaivutin a bawh tlat ang che. Sakawr te, tawlailîr te leh sakawr chungchuang mi te thâwmah chuan kulh bangte chu a nghîng dawt dawt ang a, bang chim laiah an lût tup tup ang hian i kulh kawngkaah an lût ang." 
Ezekiel26:11 I kawtthlêr chu sakawrin a chîl phut dup ang a, mite chu khandaihin an sât hlum ang; in lungphun nghet tak takte chu an titlu ang." 
Ezekiel26:12 I rote leh in dâwr sum te chu duh duhin an la ang a, in kulh bang chu an tichim vek ang. In nuam, in chhuan êm êmte chu an tichim bawk ang a, lung te, thing te, thil chim hnawk te chu tuifinriatah an paih ang," 
Ezekiel26:13 In zai dur dur ṭhîn chu ka titâwp ang a, in ṭingṭang ri pawh a dai dak ang." 
Ezekiel26:14 Lung pialtlêpah ka siam ang chia, lên phona mai i ni ang; an din leh tawh lo vang che. Kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh hi,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel26:15 Tura hnênah Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “I chhiat hunah, mi an thah chiam, hliam tuarte thâwm avângin tuipui kama awmte chu hlauvin an khûr ve ang." 
Ezekiel26:16 Tuifinriat kama lalte chu an lalṭhutthlêng ata an chhuak ang a, an puante chu an dah ang a, an thawmhnaw mawi tak takte chu an hlîp ang a, an khûr zawih zawih ang. Leiah an ṭhu ang a, i chhiatna chuan a râp êm avângin an khûr tâwp thei lo vang." 
Ezekiel26:17 He hla hian an ṭah ang che: ‘Tuifinriata lêngte chênna khua Khaw hmingthang chu i va han chhe hneh êm! I chhûnga chêngte chu tuifinriata lal an ni a, Khawvêla mite hlauh i nih ṭhin vei nên." 
Ezekiel26:18 I chhiat ni chuan thliarkârte an khûr a, I bo ni chuan tuipuia thliarkârte an va hrilhhai em!’" 
Ezekiel26:19 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Tu ma awm lohna, khaw ram angin ka tiram ang che, tuithûkpuiah ka tipil ang chia, tuifinriat chuan a chîm pil daih ang che." 
Ezekiel26:20 Hmânlai mite chhukna khurah ka thlâk ang chia, lei hnuai pûk, kumkhaw chhiatnaah, mitthite chhukna khuaah chuan ka awmtîr ve ang che. Tichuan, tu mah an lo awm thei tawh lo vang a, mi nung ramah i awm ve dâwn tawh si lo." 
Ezekiel26:21 I boral ang a, boral ve hi mi tinin an hlau vang. Zawng zawng che mah se, an hmu lo vang che,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel27:1 Lalpa chuan heti hian mi hrilh a: 
Ezekiel27:2 “Nang, Mihring fapa, Tura sûnna hla phuah rawh. Tuifinriat kawtchhuaha awm, tuipui kama awm zawng zawng nêna sumdâwng ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel27:3 Tura khaw hnênah chuan heti hian ti rawh. Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Aw Tura, ka mawi ber e, i inti a," 
Ezekiel27:4 Tuipui bula awm i ni a, A dintute chuan an rem mawi kher mai che." 
Ezekiel27:5 Hermon tlâng fâr thing an zai a, I lawng ngulah Lebanon sidar an hmang." 
Ezekiel27:6 Lawng kar nân Basan sasua, Chhuatah Kitim tufâr thingphel, Saingho phûm chu an hmang." 
Ezekiel27:7 Aigupta puan ṭial mawi chu Lawng thli puan zârah i hmang a, Puanzâr dang a ngai lo ve, Elim thliarkâr puan dum leh sen, Chung zârah i hmang." 
Ezekiel27:8 Sidon leh Arvad mite chu Lawng kartuah i chhawr a, Aw Tura, nangma mi thiamte ngei I lawng khalhtu an ni." 
Ezekiel27:9 Gebal themthiam mite chu Lawng pawp thawmtu an ni. Tuifinriata kal lawng zawng zawng chu I tân sumdâwngtu vek an ni.’ 
Ezekiel27:10 “Persia mi te, Lud mi te leh Put mite chu i sipaiah an ṭang a, phaw leh dâr lukhum an târ tuar a, an tiropui ngei che." 
Ezekiel27:11 Arvad leh Melek mite chuan i kulh an vên hual a, Gamad mite chuan i kulh bangah râl an vêng a, an phaw leh dâr lukhum chu bangah an târ tuar a, an tiropui ngei mai che." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Tarsis nên in indâwr a, tangkarua te, thîr te, ṭîn te, suan tein i bungrua an rawn lei a." 
Ezekiel27:13 Javan te, Tubal te leh Mesek te nên in indâwr a, sal leh dâr bêltein i dâwr sum an rawn lei." 
Ezekiel27:14 I bungrua chuan Beth-togarma aṭangin sakawr chhawr chi te, sakawr chungchuanna chi te leh sabengtung te i chaw a." 
Ezekiel27:15 Dedan nên in indâwr a, tuipui kama awm thliah thluahte chuan saingho hrawl pui pui leh thing ril dum mi an rawn lâk che a." 
Ezekiel27:16 Edom mite chuan i dâwr sum leh i thil siamte an rawn lei a, i dâwr sum lei nân lungmantam te, puan senduk te, puan cheimawi te, puan zai sîn te, tuikep te, rubi lung te an rawn keng a." 
Ezekiel27:17 Judai leh Israel ram aṭangin Minnit huit te, theipui te, khawizu te, oliv hriak te thinghnai damdawi tein an rawn dâwr che a." 
Ezekiel27:18 Damaska mite chuan i dâwr sum leh i thil siamte chu an rawn la zung zung a, Helbon uain leh Sahar sahmulin an rawn dâwr che." 
Ezekiel27:19 Uzal vêla Vedan leh Javan mite chuan an rawn dâwr che a, thîr hlûm te, mosola te, thakthîng te, thing rimtui te an rawn keng." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dedan mite chuan sakawr thawmhnawin i dâwr sum an rawn lei a. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arab mite leh Kedar lalte chuan berâmno te, a chal te, kêlpatein i dâwr sum an rawn lei." 
Ezekiel27:22 Seba leh Rama sumdâwngtute chuan mosola ṭha ber chi leh lungmawi tinrêng leh rangkachakin i dâwr sum an rawn lei a. 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran te, Kana te leh Eden khaw mite chu, Seba sumdâwngtute leh Asur leh Kilmad khaw mite nên dâwrtu che an ni." 
Ezekiel27:24 Puan ropui te, intuam puan te, puan senduk te, puan cheimawi te, chhuat phah ṭial buai te, la phiar mawi tak tak tein an rawn dâwr che." 
Ezekiel27:25 Tarsis lawng rualte chuan i dâwr bungrua an phur thûr thûr mai - Tuifinriat lawng ang i ni, bungraw tam tak phur khat thûr chu." 
Ezekiel27:26 “Lawng kartuten tuifinriat zau laiah, An kar chhuak che. Khawchhak thliin a lên chhe ta che a, Khawmual hlat takah chuan." 
Ezekiel27:27 I hausakna, dâwr sum leh bungrua te, I lawngpu zawng zawng te, Lawng khalhtu leh lawng pût thawm thiam te, Dâwr sum hralhtu leh vêngtu sipai te, Lawnga chuang zawng zawng te chu I chhiatpui a, tuiah an tla." 
Ezekiel27:28 Lawng khalhtute mangang au chuan Vaukam a khâwk. 
Ezekiel27:29 Lawng kartute an chhuak vek a, Lawngpute leh a khalhtu zawng zawng nên, Vaukamah chuan an ding ta a, Nangmah avângin an chiau vawng vawng." 
Ezekiel27:30 Vaivut an inphul a, leiah an tâl." 
Ezekiel27:31 An chhîp an ziat kawlh a, saiip an fêng, Lungchhe takin an ṭah che a, Lungngai takin an rûm." 
Ezekiel27:32 I tân ṭah hla an chham ang a, ‘Tura ang hi tu nge awm ang? Tui hnuaia pil ta vang vang hi!’ tiin." 
Ezekiel27:33 I sumdâwngte chuan tuifinriatah I sum, dâwr bungruate an tawlh chhuak ṭeuh ṭeuh va, Hnam tin an tilungawi hle ṭhîn. I sum avângin lalte an hausa bawk." 
Ezekiel27:34 Tuifinriatah i keh ta a, A thûk laiah i pil ta a, I bungrua leh i mi chhawr te, Tuifinriatah i pilpui ta." 
Ezekiel27:35 Tuipui kama chêng zawng zawng te, Nangmah vângin an hrilhhai hle, An lalte pawh an hmulthi a ding a, Zâm hmêl an pu." 
Ezekiel27:36 Ram tina sumdâwngte pawh an chek tlawk tlawk mai, Mi tin ṭihkhaiah i lo chang ta, I boral hlen dâwn si a.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Lalpa chuan a sawi leh a," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mihring fapa, Tura lal hnênah heti hian ti rawh: Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “I chapo va, ‘P athian ka ni, tuifinriatah P athian lalṭhutthlêngah ka ṭhut hi,’ i ti vei a, Pathianah inngai mah la, mihring mai i nih hi," 
Ezekiel28:3 Daniela aia fing zâwk, a lakah thuhrûk eng mah awm thei lo niin i inngai a." 
Ezekiel28:3 Daniela aia fing zâwk, a lakah thuhrûk eng mah awm thei lo niin i inngai a." 
Ezekiel28:4 Sumdâwn i thiam hle a, i fin avângin i hausa a, rangkachak leh tangka i khâwl ṭeuh mai." 
Ezekiel28:5 I sumdâwnna a hmuingîl a, i hausak tâk êm avângin i rilru a lo chapo ta a ni." 
Ezekiel28:6 “Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Pathian anga fing i inti vei a;" 
Ezekiel28:7 Ngai teh, i hmêlhriat loh, hnam azawnga hnam hlauhawm ber, nangmah bei tûr, ka rawn hruai dâwn: an khandaih chu an lek ang a, i fin avânga i mawina leh i ropuina chu an rawn tichhe vek ang." 
Ezekiel28:8 Lei vâwtah an chhuktîr ang chia, tuitla thihin i thi ang." 
Ezekiel28:9 Nangmah thattu tûr hnênah, ‘Pathian ka ni,’ i ti thei dâwn em ni? Thattu tûr che kutah chuan mihring mai i ni si a, Pathian awzâwng i ni lo ve." 
Ezekiel28:10 Serh tan loh thihin, Pathian hre loho kutah i thi ang. Ka ṭawng tawh hi,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel28:11 Lalpa chuan mi hrilh leh a," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mihring fapa, Tura lal sûnna tûr hla phuah rawh: Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Finnaa khat leh mawi chungchuang, Khaw ṭha famkim chu i ni." 
Ezekiel28:13 Pathian huan Eden-ah i chêng a, Lungmantam chi tinrêng i inbel a, Lunghlu te, topaz te, berul te, karnelian te, jasper te, safir te, emeral te leh garnet te chuan. Themthiam kutchhuak, rangkachaka phûm I pian ni aṭang khân i ni." 
Ezekiel28:14 Vêng tûr chein cherub thlan ka dah a, P athian tlâng thianghlimah i awm, Lunghlu tle zîngah i lêng." 
Ezekiel28:15 Thil sual i tih hma kha chuan Sawisêlbo i ni ṭhîn. 
Ezekiel28:16 I sumdâwnna a lo zau va, Sum hrâwm i tina a, thil sual i ti ta a, Pathian tlâng lunghlu tle zînga i lênna aṭangin, Vêngtu cherub ka ûm chhuahtîr ta che." 
Ezekiel28:17 I ropuina chuan a tichapo che a, I mawina chapopuiin i finna i tichhe zo ta, Lalte ennawmah leiah ka paih thal ta dêr che a ni." 
Ezekiel28:18 I suahsualna zozai leh Dik lo taka sum hrâwm i chîn avângin I hmun thianghlim i tibawlhhlawh a, In zîngah mei ka chhuahtîr ang a, A kâng ral ang chia, Thlîrtu hmuhah lei vaivutah ka chantîr ang che." 
Ezekiel28:19 I hmêlhriat zawng zawngte chu Nangmah vângin an thlabâr ang, Mi tân ṭihkhai i lo chang ta, I bo hlen dâwn ta si a.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Lalpa chuan," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mihring fapa, Sidon lam hawi la, thu sawi khum rawh." 
Ezekiel28:22 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Aw Sidon, i chungah ka ṭuan dâwn. In zîngah chawimawi ka ni ang a, In chungthu ka rêl ang a, Ka thianghlimzia ka tilang ang. Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel28:23 Hripui ka rawn lêntîr ang a, Kawtthlêrah thisen a luang ang, Kil tinah khandaihin an bei ang chia, I mite chu an tihlum ang.’ Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel28:24 “Israel-te tân, an vêla awm, anmahni hmusittute chu, hnimhlîngnei leh hlîng anga chhun ṭhîntu an ni tawh lo vang a, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ka thawn darhna mite zîng ata Israel chhûngte chu ka hruai khâwm hunah ka thianghlimzia hnam tin zîngah a lang ang a, ka chhiahhlawh Jakoba hnêna ram ka pêkah chuan an awm tawh ang." 
Ezekiel28:26 Thlamuang takin an luah ang a, in te sa-in grep huan te an siam ang. An vêla awm, anmahni hmusittute chu ka hrem hunah him takin an awm ang. Tichuan, kei Lalpa hi an Pathian chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Kum sâwmna, thla sâwm, tahrik ni sâwm leh pahnihah Lalpa chuan ka hnênah," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Farawa lam hawi la, amah leh Aigupta ram pum chu thu sawi khum rawh." 
Ezekiel29:3 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh, Aigupta lal, Awle lian, Nail luia chêng Faraw, i chungah ka ṭuan dâwn. ‘Nail lui hi ka ta a ni a, ka tân ka siam a ni,’ i ti vei maw?" 
Ezekiel29:4 I khabe-ah nghakuai ka riah ang a, i phuhlipah lui sanghate chu ka behtîr ang; Nail lui aṭang chuan lui sangha, i phuhlipa bet zawng zawng nên ka hnûk chhuak ang che." 
Ezekiel29:5 Thlalêrah ka paih ang chia, nang leh Nail luia sanghate chu leichârah in thal reng ang. Tu man in ruang an hlâwm lo vang a, chunglêng sava leh ramsa tlanah ka pe ang che." 
Ezekiel29:6 Tichuan, Aigupta mi zawng zawngin kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang. Israel chhûngte tân luang tiang ang lek an ni si a." 
Ezekiel29:7 An han hawl dâwn a, a tliak a; an dâr an herh phah a; an han rinchhan dâwn a, a bung ta a, an kâwng an herh ta a.”" 
Ezekiel29:8 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, i chungah khandaih ka lek ang a, mihring leh ran ka that vek ang." 
Ezekiel29:9 Aigupta ram chu a chhiain a ram vek ang; ‘lui chu ka ta a ni a, ka tâna ka siam a ni,’ a tih avângin." 
Ezekiel29:10 Aigupta ram leh Nail lui chungah ka ṭuan dâwn a ni: Migdol aṭanga Suene, Ethiopia ram ri thlengin ka tichhe vek ang a, a ruak hlauh vang." 
Ezekiel29:11 Kum sawmli chhûng chu ramsa pawh, mihring pawh an kal lo vang a, awm an awm hauh lo vang." 
Ezekiel29:12 Kum sawmli chhûng chu ram azawnga ram chhe ber leh khua azawnga khaw chhe nasa berah ka siam ang a, Aigupta mite chu hnam dang zîngah ka hnawt darh ang a, ram tinah an darh ang.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Kum sawmli a ral hnu chuan an darhna ram mite zîng ata Aigupta mite chu ka hruai khâwm leh ang. 
Ezekiel29:14 Sala an tâng chu ka hruai kîr ang a, an pianna ram Pathros-ah an kîr ang a, hnam nêm tak an ni ang." 
Ezekiel29:15 Hnam dang zawng zawng aiin an nêp ang a, hnam dang chungah an inlek tawh lo vang a, hnam dang chungah thu an nei tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel29:16 Israel chhûngte chuan rinchhanah an hmang tawh lo vang a, ṭanpui atân an sâwm kha an tihdik lohzia an hre chhuak ang a, kei hi Lalpa P athian chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Kum sawmhnih leh pasarihna thla hmasa ber, tahrik ni khatah Lalpa chuan ka hnênah:" 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mihring fapa, Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chuan Tura bei tûrin sipai a ruai chiam a, an phur a rih êm avângin an chhîp a kawlh râwt a, an koki a pilh phung mai; mahse, Tura aṭang chuan Lal leh sipaite chuan an hah man eng mah an hmu lo.”" 
Ezekiel29:19 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, Babulon lal Nebukadnezara hnênah Aigupta ram ka pe dâwn. Aigupta ram thil neih tam êm êm chu a rawk ang a, a suam ang a, a sipaite hlawh atân a lâksak ang." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ka rawng an bâwl avângin Aigupta ram hi ka pe a ni,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Chutih hunah chuan Israel chhûngte chu ka tichak ang a, nang hi an zîngah thu ka sawitîr ang che; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mihring fapa, thu puang la, heti hian ti rawh: Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Ṭap ula, chiau vawng vawng rawh u, Ni chu a lo thleng dâwn." 
Ezekiel30:3 Ni a lo hnai ta, Lalpa ni a lo hnai e, Hnam tin tâna chhûm zîn ni chu." 
Ezekiel30:4 Aigupta ramah indona a chhuak ang a, Kus ramah lungngaih manganna, Aigupta mi tam tak an thi ang a, An hausakna lâk bo a ni ang a, An innghahna tihchhiat vek a ni ang." 
Ezekiel30:5 Kus mi te, Put mi te, Lud mi te, Arab-ho te, Kub te leh an thurualpuite chu indonaah an thi ang.”" 
Ezekiel30:6 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Aigupta ram tungdingtute chu an thi ang a, An chhuan, kulh rinawmte pawh, a tlâwm ang. Migdol aṭanga Suene thlengin Indonaah mi an thi ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel30:7 “Aigupta chu ram chhe hneh ber a ni ang a, a khuate chu khaw ram zînga chhe nasa ber a ni ang." 
Ezekiel30:8 Aigupta rama mei ka tihchhuaha, ṭanpuitute ka tihboral hunah Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel30:9 Aigupta chhiat ni a lo thlen chuan Ethiopia, ngaihngam taka awm tizâm tûrin lawngin lamkal ka tîr ang a, Aigupta angin an thla a bâr ang. Chumi ni chu a lo thleng ṭêp a ni.”" 
Ezekiel30:10 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Lal Nebukadnezara kut hmangin Aigupta hausakna ka titâwp dâwn. 
Ezekiel30:11 Amah leh a hote, hnam râwng pui pui chu, ram tiṭiau tûrin an lo kal ang a, Aigupta mite chungah khandaih an phawi ang a, ram pumah ruang a thal pheng phung ang." 
Ezekiel30:12 Nail lui chu ka tikang ang a, mi sual pui pui kutah ka pe ang. Hnam dang mite chuan ram chu, a chhûnga awmte nên an tichhe vek ang. Kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh hi.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Nof khaw milemte chu ka tichhia ang a, thil tlâktlailo an biakte chu ka titâwp bawk ang. Aigupta ramah rorêl tûr tu mah an awm lo vang a, Aigupta mite chu an zâm ang." 
Ezekiel30:14 Pathros khua chu ka tiram ang a, Zoan khua pawh ka hâl ang a, No khua chu ka hrem ang." 
Ezekiel30:15 Sin khua, Aigupta kulh ropui chhûngah chuan ka thinurna ka leih ang a, No khaw mite ka râwt vek ang." 
Ezekiel30:16 Aigupta ramah mei ka chhuah ang a, Sin khua chu an chiai ang a, No khua chu an darh ang a, a kulhte chu a chim ang." 
Ezekiel30:17 Aven leh Pi-beset khaw tlangvâlte chu khandaihin an sât hlum ang a, mi dangte chu salah an hruai ang." 
Ezekiel30:18 Aigupta chakna ka tihchhiata, an kulh chhuan, rinawm chu, ka tihchim hunah chuan Tahfanes khuaah chuan ni a thim ang a, chhûm thimin a khuh ang a, a chhûnga mite chu salah an hruai ang." 
Ezekiel30:19 Aigupta ka hrem hun chuan Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.” 
Ezekiel30:20 Kum sâwm leh pakhatna, thla khat, tahrik ni sarih ni-ah Lalpan ka hnênah," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Farawa bân chu ka tihtliahsak a, a dam theih nân an tuam lo va, khandaih a lek leh theih nân ṭhem an dawhsak hek lo." 
Ezekiel30:22 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Aigupta lal Farawa bân ṭha lam, a tliak lo zâwk pawh chu ka tihtliahsak ang a, khandaih a chelh thei tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel30:23 Aigupta mite chu hnam tin zîngah ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka thawn darh ang." 
Ezekiel30:24 Babulon lal kut chu ka tichak ang a, a kutah ka khandaih ka dah ang a, Farawa bân chu ka tihtliahsak ang; a hmaah chuan a hliam tuar avâng chuan a rûm dur dur ang." 
Ezekiel30:25 Babulon lal kut ka tihchaka, Farawa a tlâwm hunah chuan kei Lalpa hian Babulon lal kutah ka khandaih ka pe a, Aigupta ramah a lek ta a ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel30:26 Aigupta mite chu hnam tin zîngah ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka thawn darh ang; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Kum sâwm leh pakhatna, thla thum, tahrik ni khatah Lalpa chuan ka hnênah a sawi a:" 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Farawa leh ka mite hnênah heti hian ti rawh: I ropuizia eng nên nge ka teh ang le?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Lebanon tlâng Sidar a ni, Ṭawi luai, hlim nuam tak mai, A zîk sângin chhûm han tawng chu." 
Ezekiel31:4 Tlan tûr tui a tam a, Lei hnuai tui chuan a châwm lian a, A ṭona chu a tihnâwng a, Ngawa thing tinrêng châwm nân a luang." 
Ezekiel31:5 Tui tlan a ṭhat êm avângin Thing dang aiin a ṭhang chak a, A buk a lianin a zârte pawh a sei." 
Ezekiel31:6 Chunglêng savate chuan a bukah bu an chhep a, Ramsate chuan a buk hnuaiah no an nei, A hlimah chuan hnam tam tak an chêng bawk." 
Ezekiel31:7 A buk chu a mawiin a zâr duai a, A zung chuan hnianghnârin tui a hmu." 
Ezekiel31:8 Pathian huana sidar zîngah a tluk rêng an awm lo, Fârthingte lah a tluka buk an awm lo va, Thingse zârte pawhin a tluk hek lo." 
Ezekiel31:9 Buk mawi takin ka siam a ni, Pathian huan, Eden-a thing zawng zawngin an awt.”" 
Ezekiel31:10 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “A ṭhang chakin a buk lian a, a zîkte chuan chhûmte a tawng tâk avângin a chapo ta a;" 
Ezekiel31:11 Chuvângin, ka hnâwl ta a ni; hnam dang lal hnênah ka pe ang a, thil sual a tih ang chu a chungah a rawn ti ve ang." 
Ezekiel31:12 Hnam râwng tak tak chuan an rawn kit ang a, tlângah leh kawrahte a zâr leh a ṭang tliak chu a awm nêlh nûlh ang. A hlima chêng ṭhîn hnamte chu an darh ang a, an kal bo vang." 
Ezekiel31:13 A thingluang chungah chuan savate an ṭum ang a, a zârte chu ramsaten an chîl ang." 
Ezekiel31:14 Tichuan, tui ṭhatna hmuna thing rêng rêng, a tluka ṭhang chak leh sâng, chhûm tawnga ding luah, a awm leh tawh ngai lo vang. Mihringte anga thi mai tûr leh leilâwta chhuk vek tûrin ka ti tawh a ni.”" 
Ezekiel31:15 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Seol-a a chhuk ni chuan lei hnuai tui chu amah sûn nân ka chawlhtîr ang a, lui luang chu ka titâwp ang a, tuihna luang chhuak a awm lo vang; Lebanon tlâng chu ka tingui ruai ang a, thingte chu an vuai zo vang." 
Ezekiel31:16 Seol-a ka nam thlâk ni chuan a tla thâwmah hnamte chu an khûr ang a, Eden huan thing zawng zawng leh Lebanon thing ṭha ṭha, tui tamnaa ṭo, leilâwta tla tawhte chu, leilâwta a tlâk ve tâk avângin an lâwm ang." 
Ezekiel31:17 Khandaiha an sah hlumte zînga awm tûrin mitthi khuaah an chhuk dial ang. A hlima awm ṭhînte chu hnam tin zîngah an darh ang. 
Ezekiel31:18 “Eden huanah, nang anga lian leh ropui a awm em ni? Eden huana thingte ang bawkin mitthi khuaah i chhuk ang a, khandaiha sah hlum, serh tan lohho zîngah chuan i awm ve ang. Chûng chu Farawa leh a hote an ni,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel32:1 Kum sâwm leh pahnihna, thla sâwm leh pahnih, ni khatah chuan Lalpan mi bia a:" 
Ezekiel32:2 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta leh Farawa sûnna tûr hla heti hian phuah rawh: Hnam tin zîngah sakeibaknei vânglai ang i ni a, Tuipuia awle, luia chêng chu i ni, I chhek bûrh bûrh a, i tinu zo ta." 
Ezekiel32:3 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Hnam tam tak an lo pun khâwm hunah, Ka lên ka zâr ang a, Lêna i âwk chu an hnûk chhuak ang che." 
Ezekiel32:4 Khawmualah ka dah ang chia, Leichârah ka paih ang che. Chunglêng savate ka tlantîr ang chia, Ramsa zawng zawng ka titlai ang." 
Ezekiel32:5 I ruang ṭawih tawh chu Tlângah leh ruamah te ka tidarh ang. 
Ezekiel32:6 Tlângah te i thisen ka leihbua ang a, I chênna lui te chu thisenin a khat ang." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ka tihboral hun che chuan vân ka khuh ang a, Arsi ka tithim ang. Ni chu chhûmin a hliah ang a, Thla pawh a êng hek lâwng." 
Ezekiel32:8 Vâna êng awm zawng zawng ka tihthimsak ang chia, I ram chu a thim tlat ang, Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel32:9 I chhiat thu ka hriat hun chuan Hnam tam tak an thlabâr ang a, I hriat loh rama awmte pawh an chiai ang." 
Ezekiel32:10 A ni, mi tam tak an chiai ang a, An lalte pawh hlauvin an khûr ang. An hmaa khandaih ka vilik hunah i chhiat ni a lo thlen hun chuan Mi tin, thih ve hlauvin an khûr ang.”" 
Ezekiel32:11 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Babulon lal khandaih chu i tuar dâwn," 
Ezekiel32:12 I mite chu hnam râwng takte khandaihin ka thahtîr ang. Aigupta thil chhuanvâwrte chu An tichhia ang a, an tiboral vek ang." 
Ezekiel32:13 Tui tamna hmuna ran tlate chu ka tihlum vek ang. Tu mah an kal tawh lo vang a, Rante pawhin an dai nu tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel32:14 A tuite chu ka tlin fîmtîr ang a, Luite chu ka luantîr dem dem ang, Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel32:15 Aigupta ram chu ka tiram ang a, A chhûnga awm zawng zawng pawh an thah hunah Kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel32:16 Hei hi amah an sûnna hla a la ni ang: Hnam tinrêng hmeichhiate chuan Aigupta leh a mite chu He hla hian an ṭah ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel32:17 Kum sâwm leh pahnihna, thla khatna, ni sâwm leh panga ni chuan Lalpan min bia a:" 
Ezekiel32:18 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta mite tân ṭap rawh; hnam dang chak tak tak, mitthi khuaa chhuk tawhte hnênah chhuktîr la, heti hian ti ang che:" 
Ezekiel32:19 Tu aiin nge i mawi zâwk le? Serh tan lohho nêna awm tûrin chhuk rawh. 
Ezekiel32:20 Aigupta mite chu indonaa thite zîngah an thi ve ang, That vek tûrin khandaih a inpeih ta." 
Ezekiel32:21 Seol-a kal tawh, an pasalṭhate chuan Farawa an lo lâwm a, ‘Amah ṭanpuitu, serh tan lohho, indonaa thite chu An lo chhuk ve ta a, an thal dêr mai,’ tiin." 
Ezekiel32:22 Tah chuan Asuria pawh, a mite nên an awm ve a, khandaiha thite thlân chuan A thlân an hual tuau mai." 
Ezekiel32:23 An thlânte chu lei hnuai thûkah chuan a awm a, A mite chu khandaiha thi an ni, A thlân vêlah an awm tuau mai, Mi nung ram tiralṭi ṭhîntute an ni." 
Ezekiel32:24 Tah chuan Elam pawh a awm a, A mite chuan a thlân an hual tuau mai. An za chuan khandaiha thi an ni. Lei hnuai khurah an chhuk thla ta, serh tan lohhote chu. Mi nung ram tirâlṭi ṭhîntute an ni. Khur thûkah chuan mualpho takin an chhuk." 
Ezekiel32:25 Elam chu khandaiha thahte zîngah a zâl ve a, A ni, serh tan loh, khandaiha thite chuan A thlân an hual. Mi nung ram tirâlṭi ṭhîntute an ni, Thi tawh zîngah an awm ve ta." 
Ezekiel32:26 Tah chuan Mesek leh Tubal thlân pawh An mite thlânin a hual tuau mai. Serh tan loh vek an ni, thah vek an ni, Mi nung ram tirâlṭi ṭhîntute an ni." 
Ezekiel32:27 Hmânlai pasalṭhate angin phûm an hlawh lo, Seol-ah râlthuam nên an chhuak, An khandaih an lukham a, An phaw inkhuh nân an hmang. Hêng mi huaite hi mi nung ram tirâlṭi ṭhîntute an ni." 
Ezekiel32:28 Aigupta pawh a chhiat hnu chuan Serh tan lohho zîngah khandaiha thahte zîngah a zâl ve ang. 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edom lal pawh, an miliante nên, ropui hle ṭhîn mah se, mitthi khuaah chuan an chhuk a; serh tan loh, khandaiha thahte nên an mu dul mai." 
Ezekiel32:30 Hmâr lama mi lian zawng zawng leh Sidon mi zawng zawng pawh tah chuan an awm. An chak avângin miin an hlau ṭhîn chu an inzahpui ang a, serh tan lohho, khandaiha thahte nên, mualpho takin mitthi khuaah an chhuk ve ang." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Chûng mite chu Farawa leh a sipai, khandaiha thite chuan an lo hmuhin an thin a dam tawh ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel32:32 “Farawa leh a mi, mi nung ram tirâlṭi ṭhîntute chu serh tan lohho, khandaiha thahte zîngah an mu ve ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel33:1 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Mihring fapa, mite hnênah heti hian sawi rawh: Ram chhûnga indona ka thlentîr dâwnin an zînga mi pakhat râlvêngtuah ruat sela," 
Ezekiel33:3 chu mi chuan ral lo kal a hmuh chuan mi dang an inrâlrin nân tawtawrâwt a hâm tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel33:4 Tu-in emaw tawtawrâwt ri chu hriain ngaihsak lo sela; hriattîrna chu a pawisak loh avângin râl chuan rawn that mah se, ama thiam loh a ni." 
Ezekiel33:5 Tawtawrâwt ri chu a hria a, a inring duh lo va, a thihna chu ama mawh a ni ang; inring sela chuan thih a pumpelh thei ang." 
Ezekiel33:6 Râlvêngtu chuan râl lo kal hmuin tawtawrâwt hâm lo sela, mi an inrâlring lo vang a, râl chuan mi tu pawh rawn that sela, suala thi a ni a; mahse, a thisen phuba chu râlvêngtu chungah ka la ang." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Tichuan, nang mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte vêngtuah ka ruat a che. Ka thu i hriat ang ang chu an inrâlrinna tûrin hrilh rawh." 
Ezekiel33:8 Mi sual chu a thi ang ka tiha, a nun hum tûra a lamlêt theih nân i hrilh lâwk si loh chuan a sualna avângin a thi ngei ang; a thihna mawh erawh chu i chungah ka nghat ang." 
Ezekiel33:9 Mi sual chu i hrilh lâwka, a sual luih zêl erawh chuan a sualna avâng chuan a thi ang, nang erawh chu i fihlîm ang.”" 
Ezekiel33:10 “Nang, Mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte hrilh rawh: ‘Kan bawhchhiatna leh kan sualnate chuan min delh a, chûng avâng chuan kan chau zo va, engtin nge kan nun theih ang?’ an ti ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel33:11 Heti hian hrilh rawh: ‘Mi nung ka ni, Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti.’ Mi sualte thih hi ka lawmzâwng em ni? An lamlêta an nun asin ka duh. Mi sualte u, lamlêt ula, lo hawi kîr teh u, Israel chhûngte u, engah nge in thih mai ang?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Nang, mihring fapa, i mite hrilh rawh: Mi ṭhain thil sual a tih chuan a ṭhatna chuan a chhanhim thei lo vang. Mi sualin thil sual tih a sim chuan a sualna chu a chhiat phah lo vang. Mi ṭha pawhin thil sual a tih chuan a nung thei chuang lo vang." 
Ezekiel33:13 Mi ṭha chu a nung ngei ang ti mah ila, a ṭhatna chu tâwka a ngaiha, thil sual a tih chuan, a ṭhatna chu hriat reng a ni lo vang a, thil sual a tih avâng chuan a thi ang." 
Ezekiel33:14 “Mi sual chu a thi ngei ang ti mah ila, a sual chu a sima," 
Ezekiel33:15 dahkhamte a kîr ṭhina, a thil rûkte a pêk kîra, thil sual ti lova nun theihna tûr ka Dân a zawm chuan a thi lo vang, a nung ngei ang." 
Ezekiel33:16 Thil dik leh ṭha a tih avângin a thil sual tih ṭhin kha ka hre reng lo vang a, a nung ngei ang." 
Ezekiel33:17 “I mite chuan ‘ Lalpa awm dân hi a mumal lo,’ an ti a, an awm dân a mumal lo zâwk a ni." 
Ezekiel33:18 Mi ṭha chuan a ṭhatna a bansâna, thil sual a tih chuan a sual avâng chuan a thi ang." 
Ezekiel33:19 Mi sual chuan a sima, thil ṭha leh dik a tih chuan chumi avâng chuan a nung ang." 
Ezekiel33:20 Mahse, nangni chuan, ‘ Lalpa awm dân hi a mumal lo,’ in ti ṭhîn. Israel chhûngte u, in thil tih ang zêlin in chungah ro ka rêlsak dâwn che u,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel33:21 Kan saltân kum sâwm leh pahnihna, thla sâwm, ni nga ni chuan Jerusalem aṭanga tlân chhuak a lo thleng a, khawpui chu râlin an la ta tih min rawn hrilh a." 
Ezekiel33:22 Chu mi lo thlen dâwn zân chuan Lalpan mi rawn khawih a, a lo thleng zînga be thei tûrin min ṭawng theihtîr a, ṭawng thei lovin ka awm ta lo va." 
Ezekiel33:23 Lalpa chuan," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Mihring fapa, Israel ram khawpui chhiaa awmte chuan, ‘Abrahama, mi pakhat mai mah, ram hi a puma pêk a nih chuan, keini chu tam tak kan la ni a, ram pum hi kan ta tûr a ni ang chu,’ an ti." 
Ezekiel33:25 Tichuan, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti ti rawh: Sa chu a thisen nên in ei a, milem in bia a, thisen in chhuah bawk a, ram hi in chang ang maw?" 
Ezekiel33:26 In khandaih in ring a, thil tenawm in ti a, mahni ṭhenawm nupui in tibawrhbâng a, ram hi in chang ang maw?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Hrilh rawh, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Mi nung ka nih hi,’ Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti. Khaw rama awmte chu khandaiha sah hlum an ni ang a, tâmlaka awmte chu sa-in a seh ang a, ramhnuai leh pûka birute chu hripuiin an thi ang." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ram chu namên lovin ka tichhia ang a, an chakna an chhuan êm êm ṭhinte chu ka titâwp ang. Israel rama tlângte chu a ram vek ang a, tu mah an kal ngam lo vang." 
Ezekiel33:29 Thil tenawm an tih avânga ram chu ka tihchhiat vek hunah kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang.” 
Ezekiel33:30 “Nang, Mihring fapa, i mite chuan kulh bang bulah te, kawngkhâr bulah te an intawhna apiangah i chungchâng an sawi noh noh mai. Heti hian an ti: ‘Ti rawh u, Lalpa thu a hril chu i va ngaithla teh ang,’ an ti." 
Ezekiel33:31 Ka mite ni âwm rêngin i thu ngaithla tûrin an lo kal khâwm a, an ṭhu a. Thu chu an ngaithla a, an zâwm duh si lo. An kam chauh a ṭha a, hma an sial êm êm si." 
Ezekiel33:32 Hla lênglâwng sak thiam tak leh ṭingṭang tum thiam tak ang lekah an ngai che a ni. I thu chu an hria a; mahse, an zâwm duh si lo;" 
Ezekiel33:33 I thu lo thleng ngei tûr a lo thlen hunah an zîngah zâwlnei a lo awm takmeuh mai tih an hria ang.” 
Ezekiel34:1 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Mihring fapa, Israel-te vêngtu, berâmpuho demin thu sawi la, thu puang rawh. Berâmpuho hnênah chuan heti hian ti ang che: Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Israel berâmpuho, mahni inhrai tlaite tak hi chu aw! Berâmpu chuan a berâmte a châwm tûr a ni lâwm ni?" 
Ezekiel34:3 In ran thau in ei a, an hmul in sin a, a chum chum in talh a, berâm rual in châwm duh si lo." 
Ezekiel34:4 A sawngnawi in enkawl lo va, an nate intidam lo va, an hliam in tuam lo va, an tlânchhe darh in hruai khâwm lo va, a bo in zawng hek lo, an chungah râwng takin thil in ti zâwk si." 
Ezekiel34:5 Pu an neih loh avângin berâmte chu an darh a, ram sakawlh tinrêngin a darhte chu an seh a ni." 
Ezekiel34:6 Ka berâmte chu tlâng sângah te, mual lian takah te an bo va, tâmlakah te an darh a, tu man an zawng lo va, an lam lo." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Chuvângin, berâmpute u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla teh u, ‘Mi nung ka nih hi,’ Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel34:8 Vêngtu an neih loh avângin ka berâmte chu seh mai theihin an awm a, ram sakawlh tinrêngin an ei a, berâmpute chuan an berâmte an zawng khâwm duh lo va, berâm châwm lovin anmahni chauh an inchâwm a ni.”" 
Ezekiel34:9 Chuvângin, berâmpute u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla teh u." 
Ezekiel34:10 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Berâmpute u, ka va haw tak che u êm! Ka berâmte chu ka chhuhsak ang che u a, in enkawl leh tawh lo vang. In kut aṭangin ka berâmte chu ka chhan chhuak ang a, mahni chauh inchâwmin an sa in ei leh tawh lo vang.”" 
Ezekiel34:11 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Kei ngei hian ka berâmte chu ka zawng ang a, ka lam khâwm ang." 
Ezekiel34:12 Berâm darhte berâmpuin a lam khâwm ang hian kei pawhin ka berâmte chu, khaw dur ni leh thim tak an tawh laia an darhna ram tin ata ka lam khâwm ang." 
Ezekiel34:13 Hnam dang mite ram ata ka la khâwm ang a, ram tin ata ka khâwm ang a, an ramah ka hruai ang; Israel tlângramah te, lui kamah te, hmun nuamah te ka tlattîr ang." 
Ezekiel34:14 Hnim ṭhatna phûlah ka tlattîr ang a, Israel tlângram ṭhaah an awm ang, tah chuan huang an nei ang. Huangah chuan an bawk ang a, tlânga hnim ṭha ṭha chu an tlân ang." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ka berâmte chu keimah ngeiin ka châwm ang a, bawhna tûr ka siamsak ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel34:16 “A bo chu ka zawng ang a, a tlânchhe darh chu ka khalh khâwm ang a, an hliamte chu ka tuam ang a, a sawngnawite chu duat takin ka enkawl ang. A thau leh chakte chu ka vêng ang a, a tâwk têin chaw ka pe ang." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Nangni ka berâmte u, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Berâm leh berâm inkâr thu te, berâm leh kêl inkâr thute ka rêl fel dâwn." 
Ezekiel34:18 Hnim ṭha ṭha in pet a, in peh sên loh in chîl chhia hi thil na mai em ni? Tui in in lahin a fîm in in a, in in sên loh in dai nu a." 
Ezekiel34:19 Ka berâm dangte chuan in chîl chhiat hnu an pet a, in dai nut hnu chauh in tûr an hmu.”" 
Ezekiel34:20 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan an hnênah heti hian a ti: “Berâm chak leh chak lo inkâr thu ka rêl dâwn." 
Ezekiel34:21 A chak lo chu in nêk per a, in nawr kiang a, a rual zîng ata in phîn darh ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel34:22 Chuvângin, ka berâmte chu ka chhan dâwn a ni; seh mai theiha an awm ka phal lo vang. Ka berâmte chungthu, a mal malin, ka rêlsak ang a, a ṭha leh ṭha lo ka thliar ang." 
Ezekiel34:23 Vêngtu pakhat ka ruatsak ang a, ka chhiahhlawh Davida ang an lalah ka pe ang a, ani chu an vêngtu a ni ang." 
Ezekiel34:24 Kei Lalpa hi an Pathian ka ni ang a, ka chhiahhlawh Davida ang chu an hruaitu a ni ang; kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh hi." 
Ezekiel34:25 Thlamuang taka an awm theih nân remna thu ka thlunpui ang a, ram sakawlh zawng zawng ka hnawt bo vang a, ram rehah te thlamuang takin an awm ang a, ngaw hnuaiah pawh an mu chiah chiah thei ang." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Mal ka sâwm ang a, ka tlâng vêlah ka awmtîr ang. A hun takah an tân malsâwm ruah ka surtîr bawk ang." 
Ezekiel34:27 Thei kûngte chu ka tirah ang a, lovah thlai a ṭha ang a, mahni ram ṭheuhvah thlamuang takin an awm ang. An nghâwngkawl ka tihtliahsaka, chhiahhlawha neitute kut ata ka chhan chhuah hunah kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel34:28 Hnam dangte man mai mai tûr an ni tawh lo vang a, ramsate pawhin an seh tawh lo vang. Thlamuang takin an awm ang a, an thlaphâng tawh ngai lo vang." 
Ezekiel34:29 An buh leh thlai ka tihhlâwksak ang a, ṭâm an hre tawh lo vang a, hnam dangin an hmusit tawh hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel34:30 Israel chhûngte hi ka mite an ni a, kei Lalpa hi an Pathian ka ni tih tu pawhin an hria ang." 
Ezekiel34:31 “Nangni berâm rual, ka berâm châwmte u, ka mite in ni a, kei hi in P athian ka nih hi,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel35:1 Lalpa chuan a sawi a," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Mihring fapa, Seir tlâng lam hawi la, thu puan khum rawh:" 
Ezekiel35:3 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Seir tlâng, ka hua a che, I chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, Ka tiram vek ang che." 
Ezekiel35:4 I khuate chu a chim chhe vek ang a, A ram hlauh vang. Tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih i hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:5 “Israel fate kumkhaw hmêlma i ni a, an mangan lai tak, an sual tâwpa hrem an nih lai khân thah râl vek tûrin i hawisan vei a." 
Ezekiel35:6 ‘Mi nung ka nih hi,’ Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti; chuvângin, i thisen a chhuak dâwn, i thisen zawmpuite i hua a, thisenin a ûm dâwn a che, i thi ngei ang." 
Ezekiel35:7 Seir tlângte chu ka tichim vek dâwn, a chunga veivâk apiang ka tihlum vek ang." 
Ezekiel35:8 Tlâng leh mualte chu ruangin ka tikhat ang a, ruamahte chuan khandaiha thi an lum phung ang." 
Ezekiel35:9 Chhe hlen hlauh tûr i ni, i khawpuite pawh tu man an luah lo vang; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih i hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:10 Kei Lalpa hi ka awm chhûngin, ‘Hêng hnam pahnih leh an ramte hi ka ta a ni, ka nei dâwn,’ i ti vei a," 
Ezekiel35:11 Mi nung ka nih hi,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti. “Chuvângin, anmahni i huata, an chunga i thinura, i îtsîk ang hian i chungah ka che ve ang. An chunga i thiltih avângin ka hrem dâwn che a ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:12 “ ‘Israel tlângte chu a chim ta a, kan duh duha sawisak theih a ni ta,’ tia i hmuhsit êm êmzia kha ka lo hria tih i hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:13 Ka chunga chapo taka i ṭawng thâwng thâwng kha ka hria asin.” 
Ezekiel35:14 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ka tiram hneh khawp ang chia, i chhiat avângin khawvêl an lâwm ang." 
Ezekiel35:15 Ka mi, Israel ṭiau i hmuh laia i lâwm ang khân i chungah ka che ve ang. Seir tlâng chu, Edom ram pum pui nên, a ram vek dâwn. Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel36:1 “Nang, Mihring fapa, Israel tlâng chungthu puang la, heti hian ti rawh: Israel ram tlângte u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla teh u." 
Ezekiel36:2 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Hmêlmate chuan, ‘Chei! Hmunsâng, hmun hlunte chu kan ta a ni ta,’ an ti vei a." 
Ezekiel36:3 Chuvângin, thu sawi khum rawh: Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: In vêla hnamte chuan in ram chu an neih theih nân an sawisa che u a, an tiram che u a, an chêksawlh che u a ni." 
Ezekiel36:4 Chuvângin, Israel tlângte u, Lalpa P athian thu hi ngaithla teh u: tlâng te, mual te, kawr te, hmun ṭiau leh ram te, rauhsan leh rawk tâwk khawpui te, an vêla hnam dangten an chêksawlhte hnênah Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Ezekiel36:5 Lalpa P athian chuan, Ka ṭhahnemngai thinrimin an vêla awm hnam dangte demin thu ka sawi a ni. Edom phei chu ka dem zual a ni. Hlim takin ka ram chu an nuihzat a, neih tumin an insem a, ran tlatna chu an nei ta a." 
Ezekiel36:6 “Chuvângin, Israel ram chungthu puang la, tlâng te, mual te, lui te, kawr hnênah te heti hian sawi ang che: Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Hnam dangin an tihmualpho che u avângin ka ṭhahnemngai thinrimin thu ka sawi a ni:" 
Ezekiel36:7 Chuvângin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: In vêla awm hnam dangte chungah ka kut ka lek ta, an mualpho dâwn." 
Ezekiel36:8 Israel tlângah te erawh chuan thingte chu a duah hluah hluah ang a, ka mi Israel-te tân a rah tiar tuar ang; an lo kîr leh hun chu a hnai tawh a ni." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ngai teh, in lamṭang ka nih hi, in lam ka hawi ang a, in lote chu in let ang a, thlai in chîng ang." 
Ezekiel36:10 Israel chhûngte chu ka tipung ang a, khaw ram tawhte chu in luah leh ang a, in chei hnûm ang." 
Ezekiel36:11 In zîngah mihring leh ran an pung ang a, fa in ngahin in pung chak hle ang. Tûn hmaa in awm dân angin in awm leh ang a, ka tihmuingîl lehzual ang che u; tichuan, Lalpa ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ka mi, Israel-te chu ka hruai kîr ang a, ram chu an luah ang a, an nei leh ang, a ram tawh ngai lo vang." 
Ezekiel36:13 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘He ram hi mihring heh ram a ni, an fate an sûn zêl mai,’ an ti ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel36:14 Mahse, ‘Mihring heh ram, fate sûnna ram,’ an ti tawh lo vang, Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel36:15 Hnam dang hmuhsitna ri an hre tawh lo vang a, an rawn timualpho hek lo vang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel36:16 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte hian an rama an awm chhûngin an khawsak dân leh an thil tih dânin ram chu an tibawrhbâng a, hmeichhe fel loh lai angin ka hmaah an bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ram chhûnga thisen an chhuah ṭhin avâng leh milema an intihbawrhbân ṭhin avângin an chungah ka thinur ka leih bua a ni. 
Ezekiel36:19 Hnam dang zîngah ka thawn darh a, ram tinah ka tidarh a, an awm dân leh thiltih dân angin ka hrem a ni." 
Ezekiel36:20 Mahse, an kalna ram apiangah ka hming thianghlim an tichhe zêl si a. ‘Hêng mite hi Lalpa mite an ni a; mahse, an awmna ram ata hnawh chhuah an ni,’ an lo ti zêl si a." 
Ezekiel36:21 Israel chhûngte kalna ram apianga ka hming a chhiat zui zêl avângin ka hming thianghlim chu ka lainat ta a. 
Ezekiel36:22 Tichuan, Israel chhûngte chu hrilh rawh: Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Ka thil tih tum hi Israel chhûngte ka khawngaih vânga tih tum ka ni lo; ka hming thianghlim vânga tih tum ka ni, an kalna ram apiangah ka hming a chhe zui zêl si a." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ka hming thianghlim ropuizia hi hnam tin zîngah ka tilang dâwn; nangmahni avângin an zîngah ka hming a chhe ta si a; chûng mite chuan kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hre tûr a ni: Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti; ka thianghlimzia an hmu ang. 
Ezekiel36:24 Hnam dang zîng ata ka la chhuak ang a, ram tin ata ka hruai khâwm ang a, an ram ka thlen ang." 
Ezekiel36:25 “Tui thianghlim an chungah ka leih ang a, an bawlhhlawhna ka tifai ang a, an milemte lakah ka tifihlîm ang." 
Ezekiel36:26 Thinlung thar leh rilru thar ka pe ang a, an thinlung, lung anga sak chu ka la bo vang a, thinlung nêm, tisa anga nêm chu ka pe ang." 
Ezekiel36:27 An kawchhûngah ka Thlarau ka dah ang a, ka dânte an zâwm ang a, ka thupêkte awihin an ti ang." 
Ezekiel36:28 An pate ka pêk ramah chuan an chêng ang a, ka mite an ni ang a, kei hi an P athian ka ni ang." 
Ezekiel36:29 An bawhchhiatna ata ka chhan chhuak ang a, an buh leh bâl ka tihhlâwksak ang a, ṭâm an tuar tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel36:30 An thei kûngte ka tirah ang a, an lova thlaite ka ti ṭha ang, ṭâm avângin hnam dangten an hmusit tawh hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel36:31 An awm dân ṭhat lohzia an hre chhuak ang a, an sualna avâng leh thil tenawm an tih ṭhin avângin anmahni an inten ang." 
Ezekiel36:32 Nangmahni avânga hêng hi ti ka ni lo ve, Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti. Aw Israel chhûngte u, in awm dân avânga zak leh mualpho in ni tih in hriat ka duh a ni.”" 
Ezekiel36:33 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “In bawlhhlawhna ka tihfai hunah in khuaah te ka awmtîr leh ang che u a, a chim chhiate chu in din thar leh dâwn nia." 
Ezekiel36:34 A kal apiang hmuha hnim ber bur tawh, in lote chu in let leh ang." 
Ezekiel36:35 ‘He huan, ram daih tawh hi Eden huan ang zu ni leh ta a! Khaw chhe tawh, chim rem rum, an rauhsan tawh kha kulha inhungin an luah leh tâk hi!’ an ti ang." 
Ezekiel36:36 A vêla hnam la awmte chuan kei Lalpa hian khaw chhe chim tawhte leh ram tawhte chu ka din thar leh a ni tih an hria ang; kei Lalpa hian ka sawi angin ka ti a ni.” 
Ezekiel36:37 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Israel chhûngte tân ka inhawng tawh ang a, berâm rual angin ka tipung ang." 
Ezekiel36:38 Kût nikhuaa an berâm hlan tûr Jerusalem khuaa a khat angin khaw chhe tawhahte mihring an khat ang; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Lalpa chuan a kutin min vuan a, Lalpa Thlarau chuan min hruai a, ruamah min dah a. Ruam chu ruhin a khat a." 
Ezekiel37:2 Ruamah chuan min hruai kual a, a ruam dâpin ruh chu a awm a, ruh ro tak tak hlîr a ni." 
Ezekiel37:3 “Mihring fapa, hêng ruhte hi an lo nung leh thei ang em?” min ti a. Kei chuan, “Lalpa P athian , nangin i hria alâwm,” ka ti a." 
Ezekiel37:4 Ani chuan, “Hêng ruh chungchâng thu hi puang la, ruh ro hnênah heti hian sawi rawh: ‘ Lalpa thu ngaithla teh u," 
Ezekiel37:5 hêng ruh rote hnênah hian Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, ka rawn chhêm ang che u a; tichuan, in nung leh ang." 
Ezekiel37:6 Thahrui ka pe ang che u a, vunin a khuh ang che u. Ka thâwk khum ang che u a; tichuan, in nung leh ang; kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang,’ ” a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:7 Thu min pêk ang chuan ka ti a; thu ka puan lai chuan thâwm ri rawk rawk ka hria a, ruhte chu an zawmpuite nên chuan an inchuktuah ta a." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ka en reng a, thahrui a lo awm a, tisain a tuam a, vunin a khuh ta ṭheuh va, mahse an la thaw thei lo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Ka hnênah chuan, “Mihring fapa, thli hnênah thu puang la, heti hian thli chu hrilh rawh: kâwlkil li-a thlite u, lo kal ula, hêng mi thah ruangte hi han chhêm ula, lo nung rawh se,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:10 Thu min pêk ang chuan ka puang a, thli chuan a rawn chhêm a, an nung a, an ding ta a, sipai rual tam zet an ni." 
Ezekiel37:11 Heti hian mi ti a: “Mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte hi hêng ruh ro ang hi an ni, ‘Kan ruhte a ro zo ta, beisei a bo va, tihduhdah kan nih hi,’ an ti." 
Ezekiel37:12 Chuvângin, an hnênah heti hian puang rawh: Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: An thlânte chu ka hawng ang a, thlân aṭangin ka mite chu ka la chhuak ang a, Israel ramah ka hruai ang." 
Ezekiel37:13 An thlân ka hawna, ka lâk chhuah hunah chuan kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel37:14 Anmahniah ka Thlarau ka dah ang a, an nung ang a, an ramah ka hruai ang. Kei Lalpa hian ka sawi ang ngeiin ka ti tih an hria ang,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel37:15 Lalpa chuan," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Nang, Mihring fapa, tiang pakhat la la, tah chuan, ‘Juda leh a thurualpui Israel fate,’ tih ziak rawh. Tiang dang pakhat la leh la, tah chuan, ‘Efraim tiang - Josefa leh a thurualpui Israel chhûngte tân,’ tih ziak bawk ang che." 
Ezekiel37:17 Tiang pakhat ni âwm takin a hmâwr pahnih chu hum zawm rawh. 
Ezekiel37:18 I mite chuan, ‘Hei hi eng tihna nge, min hrilh teh,’ an tih che chuan heti hian ti ang che:" 
Ezekiel37:19 ‘Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, Josefa tiang, Efraim kuta awm, a thurualpui Israel chite chu Juda tiang nên ka hum kawp ang a, tiang pakhatah ka siam ang." 
Ezekiel37:20 An hmuh atân tiang i ziak pahnihte chu hum kawp ang che. 
Ezekiel37:21 An hnênah, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti, ti rawh: Ngai teh u, kei ngei hian Israel fate chu an kalna ram hnam dang zîng ata ka la khâwm dâwn; kil tin aṭangin ka hruai chhuak ang a, an ramah ka thlen ang." 
Ezekiel37:22 An ram, Israel tlângahte chuan hnam khatah ka siam ang a, rorêl tûr lal pakhat an nei ang a, hnam hnih leh ram hnih ni ṭhîn chu an inṭhen tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel37:23 Milemte leh thil tenawm an tihte leh an bawhchhiatnate chuan an intibawrhbâng tawh lo vang a, an sual ṭhinna hmun ata chu ka chhan chhuak ang a, ka tifai ang; tichuan, ka mite an ni ang a, kei pawh an tân Pathian ka ni ang." 
Ezekiel37:24 Ka chhiahhlawh Davida ang lal an nei ang a, rorêltu pakhat hnuaiah an awm ang. Dik taka rorêlin ka Dân an awihin an zâwm ang a, an ti bawk ang.’" 
Ezekiel37:25 “Ka chhiahhlawh Jakoba hnêna ka pêk ram, an pate awmna ramah chuan an awm ang. Tah chuan an chêng reng ang, an fa te, an tu te, an tuchhuan te thlengin an awm kumkhua tawh ang." 
Ezekiel37:26 Thlamuang taka an awm theih nân kumkhaw remna thu ka thlunpui ang. Ka tinghet ang a, anni chu ka tipung ang a, ka hmun thianghlim chu an zîngah ka awmtîr kumkhua ang." 
Ezekiel37:27 An zîngah ka chêng ang a, an tân Pathian ka ni ang a, ka mite an ni ang." 
Ezekiel37:28 An zînga kumkhuaa awm tûr, ka hmun thianghlim, an zînga ka dah hunah chuan hnam dangte pawhin kei Lalpa hian Israel-te hi ka mi atân ka thlang tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Lalpa chuan mi bia a: 
Ezekiel38:2 “Mihring fapa, Magog rama Mesek leh Tubal hruaitu lian ber, Goga lam hawi la, thu sawi khum rawh:" 
Ezekiel38:3 Heti hian ti ang che: Lalpa P athian chuan Mesek leh Tubal hruaitu lian ber Goga hnênah heti hian a ti: 
Ezekiel38:4 Ka hua che a ni, ka tuai vir ang chia, i khabe-ah nghakuaiin ka kuai ang chia, i sipai rual te, sakawr leh sakawr chungchuang nalh tak taka inchei te, mi tam tak, awmphaw ha leh phaw keng, khandaih keng te nên ka hnûk chhuak ang che." 
Ezekiel38:5 I hote chu Persia mi te, Kus mi te leh Put mi te an ni; phaw leh dâr lukhum an za-in an nei." 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomer leh hmâr tâwpa awm Beth-togarma rama indo thiamte chuan an zui che, hnam dang zînga sipai rual tam tak pawh an tel." 
Ezekiel38:7 In peih la, i hote pawh inrâlring sela, vêng ngun rawh." 
Ezekiel38:8 “Ni eng emaw zât hnuah ka chhawr dâwn che a ni. Kum tam fe a ral hnuah hnam tam tak zînga darh ka hruai khâwmte thlamuang taka an awm tawhna, khandaih laka chhan ram, Israel tlângram chhe tawh leh ram tawh, thlamuang taka an awm leh tawhna ram chu, i rûn tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel38:9 Thlipui thawk buan buan angin sipai leh i ṭhuihruaite nên in bei ang a, ram chu chhûm ang maiin in tuam dâwn nia." 
Ezekiel38:10 “Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Chumi hnuah chuan thil ṭha lo tak tih i rilrûk ang a," 
Ezekiel38:11 ‘Kulh pawh nei hlei lo ramah chuan ka kal teh ang, kulh nei lo, a khârna leh kalhna pawh awm lo khuaahte thlamuang takin an chêng der der a, ka rûn dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel38:12 Khaw chhe tawha chêngte chu ka rawk ang a, ka suam ang,’ i ti vei a. Chûng mite chu hnam tin zînga darh tawh hruai khâwm leh an ni a, ran leh sum an nei leh ta a ni." 
Ezekiel38:13 Seba leh Dedan mite leh Tarsis sumdâwngtute chuan, ‘Rawk tûr leh suam tûrin i sipaite i khâwm em ni? An tangka leh rangkachak te, an ran te leh sum te chhuhsakin hawn ṭeuh i tum em ni?’ an ti ang." 
Ezekiel38:14 “Chuvângin, Mihring fapa, thu puang la, Goga chu hrilh rawh: Ka mi Israel-te chu thlamuang taka an awm laiin i bei ang a," 
Ezekiel38:15 hmâr tâwp, i awmna ram aṭang chuan mi tam tak, sakawr chungchuang rual leh sipai rual nên i thawk chhuak ang." 
Ezekiel38:16 Chhûmin ram a tuam angin ka mi Israel-te chu i tuam ang a, a hun ka tihah chuan. Aw Goga, ka ram chu ka rûntîr ang che, hnam tinin tu nge ka nih an hmuha ka thianghlimzia a lan theih nân." 
Ezekiel38:17 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Israel zâwlneite hmanga ka lo sawi daih tawh, ‘Israel-te bei tûrin mi tu emaw ka rawn hruai dâwn’ ka tih kha i ni." 
Ezekiel38:18 “Goga chu Israel ram bei tûra a lo kal hunah ka thinur hle ang, Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ka thinur chuan, ‘Israel ramah, chumi ni chuan, lîr nasa takin ka tinghîng ang,’ ka ti a." 
Ezekiel38:20 Tlângte a min ang a, khâmte a chim ang a, kulh bang te a chim ang; thih hlauvin tuipui sangha te, chunglêng sava te, ramsa te, bawkvâka kal te leh rama mihring awmte chu, ka hmaah chuan an khûr ang." 
Ezekiel38:21 Amah bei tûrin khandaih ka ruai ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti. “A mite chu khandaihin an inbei tawn ang." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ruahpuivânâwn leh rial ka chhuttîr ang a, a kalpui sipaite leh a ṭhuihruai tam takte chungah kâta kâng mei ka sûrtîr ang." 
Ezekiel38:23 Tichuan, hnam tin hmuhah ka ropuizia leh thianghlimzia ka tilang ang a, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 “Nang, Mihring fapa, Goga chu thu sawi khum rawh. Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Mesek leh Tubal hotu lian ber, Goga, ka hua che a ni." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ka tuai vir ang chia, ka hnûk ang che. Hmâr tâwp aṭangin ka la chhuak ang che a, Israel tlângah ka hruai ang che." 
Ezekiel39:3 I kut vei lama thalngul chu ka titliak ang a, i ding lama thal chu ka tibung ang." 
Ezekiel39:4 Goga leh a sipaite, a ṭhuihruaite nên chuan Israel tlângah an thi ang a, an ruang chu ramsa leh chunglêng sava ka tlantîr ang." 
Ezekiel39:5 A ram dâpin an tlu pheng phung ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel39:6 “Magog ramah leh tuipui kam, thlamuang taka an awmna ramah chuan, mei ka tichhuak ang a, mi tinin Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel39:7 Ka mi, Israel-te chu, ka hming thianghlim ka hriattîr ang a, ka hming thianghlim chu anmahni avângin a chhe tawh lo vang. Hnam dangte chuan Israel Mi Thianghlima ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel39:8 Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, ka hun sawi chu a lo hnai e, a thleng mai dâwn." 
Ezekiel39:9 Israel khuaa awmte chuan râlthuam tinrêng, phaw te, awmphaw te, thalngul te, thal te, talhtum te leh fei te chu thingah an fawm ang a, tuahah an hmang ang, kum sarih tla a ni ang." 
Ezekiel39:10 Thingtuah phur tûrin an ramah emaw, ngawa thing kit tûrin emaw an thawk chhuak ngai lo vang. Râlthuam tlâwmsan chu thingtuahah an hmang dâwn a ni. Anmahni rawktu chu an rawk ang a, suamtu chu an suam ve thung dâwn a ni,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Chumi hnuah chuan, Tuipui Thi chhak lama awm Abarim ruam an tih, Israel ramah chuan, Goga thlân hmun ka pe ang, chutah chuan Goga leh a ṭhuihruaite chu an phûm ang. Chu chuan khualzinte a dang ang a, ‘Hamon Gog ruam’ an vuah ang." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ram a thian theih nân thla sarih chhûngin Israel-te chuan an phûm zo hrâm ang. 
Ezekiel39:13 Phûmnaah chuan rama awm zawng zawng an thawk ang a, ka ropuina ni a thlen hunah chawimawi an ni ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel39:14 “Thla sarih a ral hnu chuan, ram pum fang chhuak tûr, ruang phûm loh a awm emaw tih zawnga hnaa neih tûr mi an ruat ang. Chutiang chuan ram chu an thian fai dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel39:15 Chûng mite chuan an kal velnaah mihring ruh an hmuh phawt chuan a bulah chhinchhiahna an târ ang a, thlân laitute chuan an phûm tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel39:16 Chumi bulah chuan khaw pakhat, Hamona tih a awm. Tichuan, ram chu a lo thiang ang." 
Ezekiel39:17 “Nang, Mihring fapa, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: chunglêng sava te leh ramsa te chu hrilh rawh: lo kal sela, kil tin aṭangin lo kal khâwmin inthawina ruai ropui ka buatsaihah hian sa han ei sela, thisen han in rawh se." 
Ezekiel39:18 Mi huaisen sa te in ei ang a, ram hruaitute thisen in in dâwn nia; berâm te, berâmno te, kêl te, bâwngchal te leh Basan ran chum te inthawi nân ka talh a ni." 
Ezekiel39:19 “Ka ruai buatsaiha sa thaute chu êleuhvin in ei ang a, thisente chu rui khawpin in in ang." 
Ezekiel39:20 Ka dawhkâna sakawr leh a chungchuang, mi huaite leh indo thiamte sa chu duh tâwkin in ei ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel39:21 “Hnam tin hnênah ka ropuizia ka tilang ang a, ka rorêl tâk dân chu an hmu ang." 
Ezekiel39:22 Chumi ni aṭang chuan Israel chhûngte chuan kei hi Lalpa, an Pathian chu ka ni tih an hre tawh ang." 
Ezekiel39:23 Ka chunga thil an tihsual avângin Israel-te chu salah ka tântîr a nih hnam dangte chuan an hria ang; ka chungah an rinawm lo va, ka hawisan ta a, khandaihah an thi a ni." 
Ezekiel39:24 An bawlhhlawhna leh an bawhchhiatna avângin ka hrem a, ka hawisan a ni.”" 
Ezekiel39:25 Chuvangin, Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Jakoba saltâng chu ka hruai chhuak ang a, Israel chhûngte chu ka khawngaih ang; ka hming thianghlim chu ka humhalh ang." 
Ezekiel39:26 Tu man rawn tibuai lova anmahni ram ngeia thlamuang taka an awm hunah chuan min hawisan avânga an mualphona chu an theihnghilh thei tawh ang. 
Ezekiel39:27 Ka thianghlimzia tilang tûrin an hmêlmate awmna ram ata ka hruai khâwm ang a," 
Ezekiel39:28 hnam tin zîngah sala thawn darha, an ramah ngei hruai kîr leha, tu mah hruai hmaih nei lotu an Pathian Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel39:29 Ka hawisan tawh lo vang a, Israel chhûngte chungah ka Thlarau ka leih ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel40:1 Sala kan tân kum sawmhnih leh pangana, Jerusalem an lâk aṭanga kum sâwm leh pali, kum thar, ni sâwm ni chuan Lalpa chuan a kutin min chelh a, min hruai ta a." 
Ezekiel40:2 Inlârnaah chuan Pathianin Israel ramah min hruai a, tlâng sâng takah min dah a, ka hmaah chuan khawpui din thar ni âwm tak ka hmu a." 
Ezekiel40:3 Chutah chuan min hruai a, dâr tle anga lang mi pakhat ka hmu a, hrui leh tehna tiang a keng a, kawngka bulah a ding a." 
Ezekiel40:4 Chu mi chuan ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, ngun takin en la, ngaithla rawh; ka entîr tûr zawng zawng che hi chhinchhiah tlat rawh: chumi atân chuan hetah hian ka hruai che a ni. I hmuh zawng zawng hi Israel chhûngte i hrilh tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel40:5 Ka hmuh chu Tempul a lo ni a; a vêlin bang a awm a. Tehna tiang a ken chu metar thuma sei a ni: bang chhah lam leh sân lam chu a han teh a, tiang tlûk khat ve ve a ni." 
Ezekiel40:6 Khawchhak lam aṭanga luhna rahkaah chuan a chho va, rahka tâwpah chuan zâwl, tehna tiang tlûk khata zau a lo awm a." 
Ezekiel40:7 Luh zêlna sîr tuakah chuan vênbûk pathum ve ve a awm a, vênbûk dung leh vâng chu a inchen a, tiang tlûk khat a ni. Vênbûk inkâr bang chu tawng ruka chhah a ni." 
Ezekiel40:8 Vênbûk chhûng ber aṭangin luh zêlna chu tiang tlûk khata thui a ni. 
Ezekiel40:9 Chumi dawtah chuan veranda, a chhûng thlâk tawng riat a awm a, ban tawng hnih biala lian a awm leh a." 
Ezekiel40:10 Khawchhak lam han thlîr lêt chuan luhna sîr tuaka vênbûk awm chu a intiat vek a, an inkâr bang chhah lam pawh a inang." 
Ezekiel40:11 Luhna zau lam chu a han teh a, tawng sâwm leh pathuma zau a ni a, ban awmna laiah erawh chuan tawng sâwma zau a ni." 
Ezekiel40:12 Vênbûk luhna bang bulṭhut chu, tawng khata chhah, tawng khata sângin an tipâwng a, bang bul chu luhna sîr tuakah tawng ruk zêl a awm a ni." 
Ezekiel40:13 Vênbûk in ep, châr bang ve ve inkâr chu tawng sawmhnih leh panga a ni." 
Ezekiel40:14 Luhna leh chhuahna ban chu tawng sawmruk vêla sângah a ngai a. 
Ezekiel40:15 Luhna tawntirh aṭanga hung chhûng lama chhuahna inkâr chu tawng sawmngaa thui a ni. 
Ezekiel40:16 Vênbûk chhûng châr lam bangah chuan tukverh tê a awm a, a sîr bangah pawh a awm ve ve a, kalna hrûl pindan bangah chuan tûm kûng lem an ziak a." 
Ezekiel40:17 Hung chhûng tualah chuan mi hruai a, pâwn lam pang bang ringin pindan sawmthum a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:18 Chûng pindan tual chhuat chu lung rem vek a ni, chuanhnuai tual zawng zawng nên." 
Ezekiel40:19 Chuanchunga luhna leh chuanhnuaia chhuahna inkâr chu a teh a, tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel40:20 Hmâr lam aṭanga luhnaah chuan mi hruai leh a, luhna thui zâwng leh a zau lam chu a teh a." 
Ezekiel40:21 Luhna sîr tuaka vênbûk pathum awm ve ve te, an inkâr bang leh a bang ṭhut pâwng bîk te, a ban leh a ban inkâr te chu khawchhak lam aṭanga luhna ang chiah kha a ni; tawng sawmngaa thui, a zau lam tawng sawmhnih leh panga a ni." 
Ezekiel40:22 Tukverh tê te, luhna tawntirh ban te, tûm kûng lem te pawh khawchhak lam aṭanga luhnaa mi ang kha a ni. A luh tirhnaah ban a awm a, rahka pasarih a nei." 
Ezekiel40:23 Chuanhnuai tual luhna zâwnah chuanchung luhna a awm bawk a, an inkâr chu a teh a, tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel40:24 Chhim lamah min hruai leh a, chutah pawh chuan luhna a awm a, a dang ang bawkin bante chu a the a." 
Ezekiel40:25 Tukverh tê te, bang bul pâwng bîk te a awm ve vek a; luhna thui zâwng pawh tawng sawmnga a ni a, a zau zâwng pawh tawng sawmhnih leh panga a ni." 
Ezekiel40:26 Luh chhohnaah rahka pasarih a awm a, ban te a awm a, banga tûm kûng lem ziak te, luhna sîr tuaka awmte pawh chu a inang a." 
Ezekiel40:27 Chuanhnuai luhna leh chuanchung luhna inkâr pawh a teh a, tawng za bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel40:28 Chhim lam aṭanga luhna kal tlangin chuanchung luhnaah chuan min hruai a, chuanhnuai luhna ang bawk kha a ni." 
Ezekiel40:29 Vênbûk te, bang te, luhna bul ban te, banga tukverh tê te a awm ve vek a, tawng sawmngaa thui, sawmhnih leh pangaa zau bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel40:30 Veranda dung chu tawng sawmhnih leh panga a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng nga a ni." 
Ezekiel40:31 Banahte leh bangahte chuan tûm kûng lem ziak a ni a, a hnuai aṭanga chuanchung lâwn chhohna rahka chu pariat a ni." 
Ezekiel40:32 Khawchhak lam aṭanga luhna kal tlangin chuanchung luhnaah min hruai leh a, a han teh a, a dang ang bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel40:33 Vênbûk te, veranda te, chhûng lam pindan bang te pawh a dang tiat vek a ni. Tukverh tê te, ban te, hulhliap te a awm vek a, a thui lam pawh tawng sawmnga, a zau lam tawng sawmhnih leh panga bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel40:34 Chuanhnuai lamah ban a awm bawk a, tûm kûng pawh banah chuan ziak a ni, chhohna rahka chu pariat a ni." 
Ezekiel40:35 Hmâr lam aṭanga chuanchung luhnaah chuan min hruai leh a, a teh a, a dang ang bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel40:36 Vênbûk te, a ban te, hulhliap te, tukverh tête a awm ve vek a, a thui lam tawng sawmnga, a zau lam tawng sawmhnih leh panga bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel40:37 Chuanhnuai lamah ban a awm bawk a, banahte chuan tûm kûng lem ziak a ni a, a chhohna rahka chu pariat a ni." 
Ezekiel40:38 Hmâr lam aṭanga chuanchung luhna sîrah chuan in pakhat a awm a, luhna aṭanga kal luh nghâl mai theih a ni, hetah hian hâlral thil hlan tûr an sil ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel40:39 He inah hian dawhkân pali a awm a, bang bulah pahnih ve ve a awm a. Inthawinaa hlan tûr, hâl ral tûr emaw, sual thawina tûr emaw, thiam loh inthawina tûr emaw hêng dawhkânah hian an talh ṭhîn a ni." 
Ezekiel40:40 Pindan pâwn, hmâr lam aṭanga luhna sîrah chuan dawhkân pahnih a awm ve ve bawk a," 
Ezekiel40:41 ran talhna tûr dawhkân chu a vaiin pariat a ni, tualah pali, in chhûngah pali." 
Ezekiel40:42 Hâlral tûr an dahna dawhkân, lungchher kil li nei, tawng khat leh a chanvea inbial, tawng khat leh a chanvea sâng pali in chhûngah chuan a awm a. Ran talhna hmanrua zawng zawng chu hêng lung dawhkânah hian an dah ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel40:43 Lung dawhkân tlâng kawmna, kutphah bênga chhah, a tlângah chuan a awm chhuak a, hetah hian maichâma hlan tûr sa an dah ṭhîn a ni." 
Ezekiel40:44 Chuanchung zâwlah chuan mi hruai chhuak a, hmâr lam aṭanga luhna lamah leh chhim lam aṭanga luhna lamah in a awm ve ve a; pakhat chuan chhim lam a hawi a, pakhat chuan hmâr lam." 
Ezekiel40:45 Hmâr lama awm, chhim lam hawi chu, Tempula thawktute awmna a ni." 
Ezekiel40:46 Chhim lama awm, hmâr lam hawi chu maichâma rawngbâwltute awmna a ni, chûng mite chu Zadoka thlahte an ni, Levia thlahte zîngah anni chauh hi a ni Lalpa hmaa kala, rawngbâwl theite chu." 
Ezekiel40:47 Chuanchung zâwl chu a teh a, tawng zaa sei, tawng zaa zau a ni a, a inbial a ni; Tempul kawtah chuan maichâm a awm bawk." 
Ezekiel40:48 Tempul pindan hmasaah min hruai leh a, rahka tâwp, chhuah chhohnaah zâwl, tawng ngaa zau a lo awm a, chu chu lehlam lehlamah a kal zêl a. Pindan hmasa luhna bang chu tawng thuma chhah a ni a, bang leh bang inkâr chu tawng sâwm leh pali a ni." 
Ezekiel40:49 Pindan hmasa chhûng vâng lam chu tawng sâwm leh pahmin a ni a, a dung lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni. Pindan hmasa tualzâwl chhohna chu rahka sâwm a ni, rahka chhuahah ban a awm ve ve bawk." 
Ezekiel41:1 Hmun Thianghlim luhna sîr bang chu tawng ruka chhah ve ve a ni, puan in zau lam tiat a nih chu." 
Ezekiel41:2 Luhna bang leh bang inkâr chu tawng sâwma zau a ni a, pindana luhin luhna sîr lam chu tawng nga ve ve a la ni a. Hmun Thianghlim chu a han teh a, tawng sawmli-a sei a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni." 
Ezekiel41:3 Pindan chhûngril luh zêlna kawng sîr bang chu tawng hniha chhah a ni a, bang leh bang inkâr chu tawng ruk a ni; luhna bang sîr tuaka pindan bang la awm chu tawng sarih ve ve a nih chu." 
Ezekiel41:4 Pindan chhûngril chu a han teh a, a dung leh vâng a inchen a, tawng sawmhnih ve ve a ni. ‘Hei hi Hmun Thianghlim Ber chu a ni,’ tiin min hrilh a." 
Ezekiel41:5 Tempul bang chhah lam chu a han teh a, tawng ruka chhah a ni. Bang ring chuan pâwn lamah pindan, tawng li-a zau a awm tluanchhuak a." 
Ezekiel41:6 Chûng pindan chu chhâwng thuma sânga sak a ni, chhâwng khatah pindan sawmthum zêl a awm a. Tempul bang chu chhâwng tinah a pan hret hret zêl a, in chhâwng chhuat chu Tempul banga va lût lovin a chhawrah chuan a innghat mai a," 
Ezekiel41:7 Pindan sâng apiang a zau hret hret zêl a ni. Pâwn lam aṭanga en chuan Tempul bang chu a lang zuih chuang lo. Chhâwng hnihnaa lâwn chhohna a awm a, chuta ṭang chuan chhâwng thumnaa lâwn chhohna a awm leh a." 
Ezekiel41:8 In chhuat chu a pâwng hret a, leia bang innghahna chu tawng ruk a ni." 
Ezekiel41:9 Hêng pindan hual hian kawng tawng ngaa zau a awm chhuak a, bang tawng ngaa chhahin a hual chhuak bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel41:10 He bang pâwn lamah hian hmun âwl, tawng sawmhniha zau Tempul hual chuan a awm bawk a." 
Ezekiel41:11 He hmun âwl aṭang hian chhûng lam luhna tûr kawngka, chhim lam leh hmâr lamah pakhat ve ve a awm." 
Ezekiel41:12 Khawthlang lam, Tempul châr lamah chuan, in a awm a, tawng sawmsariha zau, tawng sawmkuaa seia hung a ni, a hungna bang chu tawng ngaa chhah a ni tluanchhuak a." 
Ezekiel41:13 Tempul chu a han teh a, tawng zaa sei a ni a, a hnung hmun zâwl leh in awm chu tawng za bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel41:14 Tempul hma lam tual chu a teh a, tawng za a ni. Khawthlang lama hung bâk zâwla in awmte chu a teh a, tawng za bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel41:15 Tempul pindan hmasa te, Hmun Thianghlim te leh Hmun Thianghlim Berte chu" 
Ezekiel41:16 a bang thingphela thuah vek a ni; bangah chuan tukverh lem a khât tâwkin a awm chhuak vek a, luh tirh aṭanga in chhûng chu chhuat aṭanga tukverh lem thleng chuan thingphela thuah chhuah vek a ni. Tukverh tête chu hawn tlang a ni lo." 
Ezekiel41:17 Kawngka chung lam pawh a chhûng lam leh pâwn lam thuah vek a ni. Pindan chhûng lam thuahna tluan chuan thil lem ker chhuah vek a ni. 
Ezekiel41:18 Cherub leh tûm kûng lem, inkârthlâk chiata ker chhuah vek a ni. Cherub-te chuan hmai pahnih an nei a," 
Ezekiel41:19 mihring hmêl ang chuan tûm kûng lam a hawi a, sakeibaknei hmêl ang chuan lehlama tûm kûng lam a hawi a. Chutiang chuan Tempul chhûng thuahna thingphel chu ker chhuah vek a ni." 
Ezekiel41:20 Chhuat aṭanga kawngka lu chung thlengin Cherub lem leh tûm kûng lem chu a awm a ni. 
Ezekiel41:21 Hmun Thianghlim Ber luhna kawngkhâr ban chu kil li nei a ni a, Luhna bulah chuan" 
Ezekiel41:22 maichâm ang thing dawhkân, tawng thuma sâng, tawng hniha zau, tawng hniha sei a awm a; a bang te, a chung te leh a kil ban killi te chu thing vek a ni." 
Ezekiel41:23 Hmun Thianghlim Ber luhna leh hmun thianghlim luhna kawngkhâr chu 
Ezekiel41:24 khâr hnih nei ve ve a ni. 
Ezekiel41:25 Hmun thianghlim Ber kawngkhârah chuan, in chhûng banga ker ang bawk khân cherub lem leh tûm kûng lem a awm a, kawngka lu chung aṭang chuan thingphel zâr a awm a." 
Ezekiel41:26 Luhna bang sîrah chuan tukverh tê a awm bawk a, chumi sîrah chuan tûm kûng lem a awm bawk." 
Ezekiel42:1 Hmâr lam tualah min hruai chhuak a, Tempul huala hmun âwl dung zuia in awmah chuan min hruai a." 
Ezekiel42:2 A dung chu tawng za a ni a, a vâng chu tawng sawmnga a ni." 
Ezekiel42:3 Tempul hual hmun âwl tawng sawmhniha zau aṭanga teh ṭan a ni a, in chuan chuanhnuai zâwk tual thlengin a awh a ni. Chhâwng thum a ni a, a chhawr a awm zêl a." 
Ezekiel42:4 Hmâr lam hawi pindan kawngkhâr hmaah chuan kalna, tawng sâwma zau a awm a, a thui lam chu tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel42:5 Pindan hnuai zâwk chu a chhawr a awm avângin a chung zâwk ai chuan a zîm, a chhawr chuan a la hêk a ni." 
Ezekiel42:6 Chhâwng thum ni mah se in dangte anga ban a neih loh avângin a bulṭhut pindan ai chuan a chhâwng bangte chu a pan hret hret a ni. 
Ezekiel42:7 Pindan hrûlah, bang tawng sawmngaa sei, tual zau lam depah chuan a awm a."
