Ezekiel42:8 Tual zau lam hawi pindante chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, Tempul lam hawi erawh chu tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel42:9 Chuanhnuai tual aṭang chuan khawchhak lam aṭanga pindana luh chhohna kailâwn a awm. 
Ezekiel42:10 Chhim lamah pawh, Tempul huala hmun âwl dung zui bawkin in a awm a." 
Ezekiel42:11 Hmâr lam ina awm ang bawk kha kalnate a awm a, pindante pawh a intiat a, kawngkhâr te, a rem hmang te, luh chhohna te a inang vek a ni." 
Ezekiel42:12 Chhim lam hawi kawngka hmaa kal ṭannaah chuan khawchhak lam aṭanga lo luhna kawngka a awm. 
Ezekiel42:13 Mi chuan mi bia a, “Hmun zâwl dung zui, chhim leh hmâr lama pindan awmte hi pindan thianghlim an ni: Lalpa hmaa inlan ṭhîn puithiamte chuan inthawina sa thianghlim chu hetah hian an ei tûr a ni. Inthawina thil thianghlim, chhangphut hlan te, sual thawina te, thiam loh thawina te dah khâwmna tûr a ni, Hmun Thianghlim a nih hi." 
Ezekiel42:14 Puithiamte chu Hmun Thianghlima an luhin chuanhnuai tualah an chhuak tûr a ni lo, an thawmhnaw chu hlîpin hetah hian an dah zet tûr a ni, an thawmhnawte pawh chu thil thianghlim a ni si a. Mipui awmnaa an chhuah dâwn chuan thawmhnaw dang an inbel tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel42:15 Tempul leh a tual vêl a teh zawh chuan khawchhak aṭanga luhnaah chuan min hruai chhuak a, Tempul ram zauzâwng chu a teh kual ta a." 
Ezekiel42:16 Khawchhak lam bang chu a han teh a, tawng zangaa sei a ni." 
Ezekiel42:17 Hmâr lam bang a han teh leh a, tawng zangaa sei a ni." 
Ezekiel42:18 Khawthlang lam bang a teh a, tawng zangaa sei a ni." 
Ezekiel42:19 Chhim lam bang a han teh leh a, tawng zangaa sei bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel42:20 A bang kil li chu a teh chhuak a, a bang dung lam te, a vâng lam te tawng zanga ṭheuh a ni; bang chu thianghlim leh thianghlim lo daidangtu a ni." 
Ezekiel43:1 Khawchhak lam aṭanga luhnaah chuan mi hruai leh a. 
Ezekiel43:2 Khawchhak lam aṭangin Lalpa ropuina a lo kal a, a aw chu tuifinriat thâwm ang a ni; a ropuina avâng chuan lei chu a êng pum a." 
Ezekiel43:3 Inlârna ka hmuh lan dân chu Jerusalem tichhe tûra P athian inlârna ka hmuh ang leh Kebar lui kama ka hmuh ang kha a ni a, bawkkhupin ka tlu ta a." 
Ezekiel43:4 Lalpa ropuina chu khawchhak lam aṭanga luhna kal tlangin Tempul chhûngah chuan a lût ta a. 
Ezekiel43:5 Thlarau chuan min chawi a, chuanchung tualah chuan min hruai a. Ngai teh, Tempul chu Lalpa ropuinain a khat vek a." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ka bulah chuan mi pakhat a ding a, Tempul aṭanga lo chhuak aw ka hria a, heti hian mi rawn hrilh a:" 
Ezekiel43:7 “Mihring fapa, hei hi ka lalṭhutthlêng ka hûnna leh ka ke nghahchhan awmna chu a ni; ka mi Israel-te zîngah hetah hian ka chêng kumkhua tawh dâwn a ni. Israel chhûngte leh an lalte chuan ka laka uirein ka hmun thianghlim an tibawrhbâng tawh ngai lo vang; pathian dangte hmunsâng angin an lalte ruang phûm nân an hmang a," 
Ezekiel43:8 ka tual ânin in an sa a, ka bang bul rêtah ban an phun ṭhîn, an thil tenawm tihte chuan ka hming thianghlim an tibawrhbâng a, ka thin a ur a, ka hrem ta a ni." 
Ezekiel43:9 Tûnah, an uirena chu bânsan sela, an lal ruangte chu la sawn rawh se; tichuan, an zîngah ka awm kumkhua ang." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Nang, Mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte hnênah ka Tempul sak dân tûr hi sawi la, a len lam leh a rem dân hmang hi hrilh rawh. An thil sual tihte avângin tizak rawh." 
Ezekiel43:11 An sualte avânga zah nachâng an hriat chuan Tempul din dân tûr hi an hnênah hrilh fiah la, a luhna leh a chhuahna te, a len lam te, a zau lam te hrilh rawh; a hman dân tûr te, a chhawr dân tûr te an hmuh atân ziak rawh; tichuan, a awm dân hi an zuia, a hman dân tûr angin an hman theih nân." 
Ezekiel43:12 “Hei hi Tempul hman dân tûr chu a ni, a tlâng hualin hmun serh a ni a, hman thianghlim a ni tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:13 “Tawng khat leh kutphah bêng, tawng khata ngaiin maichâm chu hetiang tûr hi a ni. A lei ṭhut chu tawng khata chhah lung rem tûr a ni; a kotlangah khuaptu a awm chhuak tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:14 Tawng khat chhawrin tawng hniha sâng lung rem chhoh tûr a ni a, heta ṭang hian tawng khat chhawra tawng li-a sâng lung rem chhoh leh tûr a ni a." 
Ezekiel43:15 Tawng khat chhawr lehin tap chu tawng li-a sâng rem chhoh leh tûr a ni; tap chu kil li neia rem tûr a ni, kil tinah ki, tawng khata sâng dah tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:16 Tap chu kil li nei tawng sâwm leh pahnih bial tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel43:17 A chhawr hnuai chu kil li nei, tawng sawm leh pali bial a ni ang a, a tlângah khuaptu, khâp khat a awm chhuak tûr a ni; tapa lâwn chhohna tûr khawchhak lamah kailâwn a awm tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:18 Heti hian min hrilh a: “Mihring fapa, Lalpa P athian -in heti hian a ti: Maichâm in siam hunah heti hian in tuih tûr a ni: Hâlral thilhlan in hlân ang a, thisen chu maichâmah in theh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:19 Puithiam, Levia chi, Zadoka thlahte chauh ka hmaah an lo kal thei ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti. “Sual thawi nâna hlan tûr bâwngtuai pe ang che." 
Ezekiel43:20 A thisen chu maichâm tap kil ki pali-ah chuan i tât ang a; a chhawr hual kil tinah leh a tlâng khuaptuah i tât bawk tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel43:21 Sual thawina tûr bâwngchal i la bawk ang a, pâwnah, Tempul tuala hmun ruatah chuan hâl tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:22 Ni hnih ni chuan sual thawina, kêlpa, hmêlhem lo i hlân tûr a ni. A ni lehah chuan kêlpa, hmêlhem lo i la ang a, sual thawi nân i hlân tûr a ni. Bâwng thisena i tih ang bawk khân kêl thisen chuan maichâm chu i tithianghlim tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:23 “Chutia maichâm i then zawh chuan bâwngtuai leh ranrual zînga berâmpa i hlân tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel43:24 Lalpa hmaah chûng chu i rawn la ang a, puithiamte chuan chi an al ang a, Lalpa tân an hâl ral ang." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ni sarih chhûng chu ni tin sual thawi nân kêl in hlân ang a, bâwngtuai leh ran rual zînga berâm hmêlhem lo in hlân bawk tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:26 Maichâm tuih nân chutiangin ni sarih tih tûr a ni a, chumi zawhah sil fai tûr a ni a; tichuan, maichâm chu a thiang tawh ang." 
Ezekiel43:27 Chûng hnuah chuan, a ni riat ni aṭangin, puithiamte chuan hâlral leh remna thilhlan te maichâmah chuan an hlân ṭhîn tawh ang; tichuan, kei ka lo lâwm ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel44:1 Khawchhak aṭanga Hmun Thianghlim chuanhnuai luhnaah min hruai leh a, a lo inkhâr a." 
Ezekiel44:2 Lalpa chuan min hrilh a, “Mihring fapa, kawng inkhâr hi a inkhâr reng tûr a ni, hawn tûr a ni lo; tu mah an lût tûr a ni hek lo. Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chu, hetah hian a lût a, a inkhâr reng tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ram rorêltu erawh chu veranda-ah hian Lalpa hmaa ruai ei tûrin a kal thei ang a, a lo kalnaah bawk a kîr leh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:4 Hmâr lam aṭanga luhna, Tempul hmaah chuan mi hruai leh a, Tempul chhûng chu Lalpa ropuinain a khat a, bawkkhupin ka tlu a." 
Ezekiel44:5 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, ngun takin en la, chhinchhiah tlat rawh; i hnêna ka sawi hi ngaithla ngun rawh. Hmun Thianghlim chhûng hman dân tûr te, tu nge lûta chhuak thei tûr te ka hrilh dâwn che hi." 
Ezekiel44:6 “Hel hmang Israel chhûngte hrilh rawh: Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Israel chhûngte thil tenawm tih hi a tam lutuk ta. 
Ezekiel44:7 Hmun Thianghlimah, ka tân, sa thau leh thisen in rawn hlan pawhin hnam dang, thinlung leh tisaa serh tan lohte in hruai lût a, in tibawrhbâng a, thil tenawm in tih zozai avâng hian ka thuthlung in bawhchhia a ni." 
Ezekiel44:8 Ka hmun in vawng thianghlim lo va, a vawng tûrin hnam dang mi chu in dah a." 
Ezekiel44:9 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: Hnam dang, thinlung leh tisaa serh tan loh rêng rêng ka Hmun Thianghlimah an lût tûr a ni lo; Israel-te zînga chêng ngeite pawh thinlung leh tisaa serh tan lohte chu an lût tûr a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:10 “Milem biaa Israel-te an bo lai khân Levia thlahte pawh hian min hlat a, an bawhchhiatna avângin an tuar ang." 
Ezekiel44:11 Hmun Thianghlim thiantu an ni ang a, kawngka an vêng ang. Mipui hâlral thilhlan tûr leh inthawina an lo talhsak ang a, an lo ṭanpui tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:12 Mipuiin milem an biak lai khân an thilhlante hlansaktu an ni a, Israel chhûngte tân suala tlûkna bulpui an ni a; chuvângin, an chungah ka kut ka lek ta a ni,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti. “An bawhchhiatna avângin an tuar tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:13 Puithiam angin ka bulah an lo kal hnai tûr a ni lo; thil tenawm an tih avângin zah an tuar ang. 
Ezekiel44:14 Ka in vêngtuah leh a chhûnga tih tûr apiang ti tûra tirhkahah ka ruat a ni. 
Ezekiel44:15 “Puithiam Levia chi, Zadoka thlahte erawh chuan, Israel-te an bo lai khân ka Hmun Thianghlim an vawng tlat a, anni hi chuan min rawn hnaih thei; ka rawng an bâwl ang a, ka hmaah an ding ang. Sa thau leh thisen ka hnênah an rawn hlan ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel44:16 “Anni chauh hi ka Hmun Thianghlimah an kal thei ang. Ka dawhkân an rawn hnaih ang a, Pathian biak an hruai ang." 
Ezekiel44:17 Tempul chuanchung zâwl an lo luhin la zai sîna siam thawmhnaw an inbel tûr a ni. Chuanchung zâwlah emaw, Tempul chhûngah emaw rawng an bâwlin sahmula siam thawmhnaw an ha tûr a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:18 La zai sîna siam diar an khim ang a, la zai sîna siam kekawr an ha bawk tûr a ni, an thlan titla thei tûr kâwnghrên an hrêng tûr a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:19 Mipui zînga chuanhnuai zâwla an kal dâwn chuan an rawngbâwlna thawmhnaw chu an hlîp ang a, pindan thianghlimah an dah ang a, thawmhnaw dang an inbel tûr a ni; chutilo chu, thawmhnaw thianghlim chu mipuiin an khawih palh ang a, an tuar dah ang e." 
Ezekiel44:20 Puithiam chuan an lu an ziat kawlh tûr a ni lo va, an sam an zuah sei lutuk tûr a ni hek lo, an mêt ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:21 Hung chhûnga an luh dâwnin puithiam tu mahin uain an in tûr a ni lo. 
Ezekiel44:22 La nula hle mah se, pasal sûn emaw, mâk emaw nupuiah an nei tûr a ni lo; Israel nula hnahkhat chu tu pawh an nei thei ang, puithiam dang thihsan pawh an nei thei ang." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Puithiamte chuan thil thianghlim leh thianghlim lo te, thiang leh thiang lo te mipui an zirtîr tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:24 Thu buai an rem bawk ṭhîn tûr a ni, ka Dân angin an rem tûr a ni. Ka Dân leh ka thupêkte angin kût nite an hmang tûr a ni a, ka sabat an serh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Mitthi ruang khawihin an intibawlhhlawh tûr a ni lo. An pa te, nu te, unau te, fa te, farnu pasal nei lo te ruang erawh chu an khawih thei ang a; mahse, an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Ezekiel44:26 An inthen fai hnuah ni sarih chhûng an hna an chawlhsan tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel44:27 Chutah, hung chhûng chuanchungnungah an kal ang a, Tempula rawngbâwl an chhunzawm theih nân inthenna thil an hlân tûr a ni,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Puithiamho tân kei hi an chanvo ka ni. Israel zîngah chanvo dang eng mah pêk tûr an ni lo, ka hna hi an chanpual a ni ang." 
Ezekiel44:29 “Thlai thil hlan te, sual thawina te, thiam loh thawina te puithiam chan tûr a ni. Israel rama thil serh dah hran rêng rêng pawh an ta tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:30 Thlai chi tinrêng rah hmasa te leh ka hnêna thil pêk rêng rêng chu puithiam neih tûr a ni. Chhang siam apiangin tlang khat chu puithiam an pe tûr a ni; tichuan, chu mite chhûng chu mal ka sâwm ang." 
Ezekiel44:31 Sava te, ramsa te, a thisâwn leh sa seh chu puithiamte chuan an ei tûr a ni lo.”" 
Ezekiel45:1 Ro atân ram in sem dâwnin Lalpa tân Hmun Thianghlim tûr, tawng sînghnih leh sângnga a sei, tawng sînghniha zau ram in serh hrang tûr a ni, chu ram chu ram serh a ni ang." 
Ezekiel45:2 He ram chhûngah hian hmun serh bîk, kil li nei, tawng zanga bial zuah tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:3 Hmun serh pum pui aṭang hian tawng sînghnih leh sângngaa sei, a vâng lam tawng sîngkhat teh chhuak ula, chu chu hmun thianghlim bîk, serh hran tûr chu a ni." 
Ezekiel45:4 Hmun thianghlim bîk a ni a, Hmun Thianghlima Lalpa rawngbâwltu puithiamte tân a ni, an insakna tûr leh biakbûk sakna tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:5 A la bâng, ram tawng sînghnih leh sângngaa sei, tawng sîngkhata zau chu Tempula thawktu Levia chite tân a ni, an nei ang a, hemi chhûngah hian khua an nei ang." 
Ezekiel45:6 Hmun serh bulah chuan khawpui tûr ram, tawng sînghnih leh sângngaa sei, a zau lam tawng sângngaa zau teh chhuak ula, chu chu Israel mi zawng zawng tân a ni ang." 
Ezekiel45:7 Lal tân pawh ram zuah tûr a ni. Hmun Thianghlim aṭangin khaw thlang lamah tuifinriat thleng a ni ang a, khawchhak lamah ram ripui thleng a ni ang a, Israel hnam pakhat tâna ram zuah tiat a ni tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:8 Israel ramah lal chanvo tûr chu he ram hi a ni ang, mi dang a nêk tûr a ni lo, hemi bâk hi chu Israel miten an nei tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:9 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Israel hotute u, pâwngnêkna leh innêkchêpna hi bân ngang tawh teh u, dik takin rorêl ula, thil dik ti rawh u, ka mite hi an ram ata nêk chhuak tawh lul suh u,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel45:10 “In thil tehna chu a dik tûr a ni. Efa dik leh bath dik in hmang tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel45:11 Efa leh bath hi a intluk chiah tûr a ni, a lêt sâwm chu Homer khat a ni ang, Homer hi tehna chhûtna ber tûr a ni ang a." 
Ezekiel45:12 In bûklung pawh hetiang tûr hi a ni: Gera sawmhnih chu sekel a ni ang a, sekel sawmruk chu mina khat a ni ang." 
Ezekiel45:13 In thil hlan dân pawh hetiang tûr hi a ni: Huit chu in thar zât phur sawmruka phur khat, barli pawh phur sawmruka phur khat, hriak chu ṭin zaa ṭin khat in hlân tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:14 In hriak tehna tûr chu bath a ni a, bath sâwm chu Kor khat a ni ang. Kor leh Homer hi a intiat a ni." 
Ezekiel45:15 Israel rama berâm vulh zahnih zêlah berâm pakhat hlan bawk tûr a ni. Buh te, hâl ral tûr te, remna thilhlan te in hlân tûr a ni; tichuan, in sualte ngaihdam a ni ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel45:16 Ram chhûnga mi zawng zawngin Israel rama rorêltu hnênah hêng thil hi an rawn pe tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel45:17 “Thla thar kûtah te, sabat ni-ah te leh kût dangah te rorêltu chuan Israel hnam pum aiawhin hâlrala hman tûr ran te, buh hlan tûr te, uain hlan tûr te a tum ang. Israel mipui sual thawi nân, sual thawina te, buh hlan te, hâlral tûr te, inremna inthawinate a hlân tûr a ni.”" 
Ezekiel45:18 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Thla thar ni hmasa berah berâmpa hmêlhem lo talhin Tempul in thian tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel45:19 Puithiamin he sual thawina thisen hi a la ang a, Tempul kawngka biangah te, maichâm tap hnuai kil li-ah te, chuanchung veranda kawngka biangah te a tât tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:20 Thla thar ni sarih niin thil sual tih palh leh hriat loh vânga thil sual tih palh tân chutiang bawkin in ti leh tûr a ni; chutiang chuan Tempul chu in tithianghlim tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel45:21 Thla thar ni sâwm leh pali ni chuan kalhlên kût in hmang ṭan tûr a ni, ni sarih chhûng chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:22 Kût ṭan tirh niin lal chuan ama sual leh mipui sual thawi nân bâwngla a hlân tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel45:23 Ni sarih chhûng chu ni tin bâwngpa pasarih leh berâmchal pasarih, hmêlhem lo Lalpa hnênah hâl ral atân a hlân tûr a ni a, kêlpa pakhat pawh ni tin sual thawi nân a hlân tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:24 Bâwngpa pakhat leh berâm pakhat rual chuan chhangphut efa khat ve ve zêl hlan tel tûr a ni; chhangphut efa khatah hriak hin khat a tel zêl bawk tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel45:25 “Thla sarihna, ni sâwm leh pali ni kûtah pawh ni sarih chhûng chutiang bawk chuan a ti tûr a ni; sual thawina te, hâlral thilhlan te, chhangphut te a hlân tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:1 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Hna thawh hun ni ruk chhûng chu khawchhak lam aṭanga chuanchunga luhna chu khâr tûr a ni; a ni sarih ni, sabat ni leh thla thar ni hmasa berah chuan hawn tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:2 Chuanchunga luh tlangnaah lal chu a lût ang a, veranda ban bulah a ding tûr a ni. Hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan a rawn ken chu puithiamhovin an buatsaihsak ang a, veranda aṭang chuan Pathian chibai a bûk tûr a ni; tin, a hawn hnuah pawh tlai thlengin khâr tûr a ni lo." 
Ezekiel46:3 Ram mipuite pawh sabat leh thla thar ni chuan veranda bulah Lalpa hmaah an kûn tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel46:4 Sabat nia lalin hâlral thilhlan a rawn lâk chu berâmno hmêlhem lo paruk leh berâmchal hmêlhem lo pakhat a ni ang. 
Ezekiel46:5 Berâmchal hlan rualin chhangphut efa khat a hlân tel tûr a ni, berâmno hlan rual erawh chuan a phal zât zât chhangphut a hlân tûr a ni; chhangphut efa khatah hriak hin khat a telh zêl tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:6 Thla thar ni erawh chuan bâwngtuai pakhat hmêlhem lo, berâm paruk leh berâmchal pakhat, hmêlhem lo hlîr a hlân tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:7 Bâwngtuai hlan rual chuan chhangphut efa khat, berâmchal hlan rualin chhangphut efa khat, berâmno hlan rualin chhangphut a neih theih zât zât a hlân ang a, chhangphut efa khat zêlah hriak hin khat a telh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:8 Veranda-a lal a kal chu a lo kalna vêkah a kîr leh tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel46:9 “Rama mipuiten, hun ruatah, Lalpa hmaa an lo kalin hmâr lam aṭanga luhnaa lo lût chu chhim lamah an chhuak ang a, chhim lam luhnaa lo lût chu hmâr lamah an chhuak tûr a ni, an luhnaah an chhuak leh tûr a ni lo, an kal ngîl mai tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:10 Lal erawh chu mipui rualin a lo lût ve ang a, a lo luhnaah a kîr leh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:11 Kût ni leh puipun hunahte chuan bâwngtuai hlan rualin chhangphut efa khat, berâmchal hlan rualin chhangphut efa khat, berâmno hlan rualin chhangphut an duh zât zât, chhangphut efa khatah hriak hin khat zêl nên an rawn hlân tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:12 Lalin mahni duh thu-a hâlral thilhlan emaw, remna thilhlan emaw Lalpa hnêna a hlan duh chuan khawchhak lam aṭanga luhna chu an hawng ang a, sabat nia tih angin hâlral leh remna thilhlan chu an hlansak ang a; tin, a chhuak ang a, a chhuah hnuah kawng chu an khâr leh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Zîngah, tûk tin, berâmno hmêlhem lo, kum khat tling, Lalpa hnêna hâl ral atân hlan ziah tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:14 Chhangphut efa hmun ruka ṭhena hmun khat leh a hmehna tûr hriak hin hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat tûk tin hlan tel zêl bawk tûr a ni, thupêk angin hei hi tih reng tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:15 Berâmno te, chhangphut te leh hriak te hi tûk tin hâl ral atân hlan kumkhua tûr a ni.”" 
Ezekiel46:16 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Lalin ama ram ro aṭangin a fapa hnênah ram a pêk chuan a fa ta chu a ni ang a, a rochan a ni ang." 
Ezekiel46:17 A ṭhuihruai zînga mi pakhat hnênah a ram ro aṭangin ram a pêk chuan pêk kîr kumah lal ta a ni leh ang, lal leh a fate chauhvin an nei kumkhua thei ang." 
Ezekiel46:18 Lal hian mipui ram ro a lâksak tûr a ni lo, an ram ro aṭangin a hnawt chhuak tûr a ni hek lo. A fate hnêna ram a pêk pawhin ama ram ro aṭangin a pe tûr a ni; tichuan, ka mite hi an ram ro ata an darh tûr a ni lo.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Chhim lam aṭanga luhna bula puithiamho awmna pindan thianghlim, hmâr lam hawiah chuan min hruai leh a; chumi bul, khawthlang lama hmun awm chu min entîr a." 
Ezekiel46:20 He hmun hi puithiamhoten sual thawina leh thiam loh thawina sa thianghlim an chhumna tûr hmun a ni; chhangphut hlante pawh hetah hian an kang tûr a ni. Thil thianghlim rêng rêng chuanhnuai zâwla lâk chhuk tûr a ni lo, mipui a tipawi hlauh dah ang e." 
Ezekiel46:21 Chuanhnuai tualzâwlah min hruai kual a, kil tinah tual hung a awm zêl a." 
Ezekiel46:22 Tawng sawmli-a sei, tawng sawmthuma zau, kil tinah chuan hung a awm ṭheuh va," 
Ezekiel46:23 hungna bang bulah chuan lung an rem chhuak bawk a, thuk atâna rem a ni." 
Ezekiel46:24 “Tempul enkawltuten hei hi mipui inthawina sa an chhumsakna tûr hmun a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel47:1 Tempul luhnaah min hruai kîr a; ngai teh, a pindan hmasa hnuai aṭang chuan, Tempul hawi zâwng, khawchhak hawi zâwngin tui a lo luang chhuak a. Tui chu Tempul luhna hnuaiah a luang zêl a; chhim lam, maichâm awmna ding lamah a luang zêl a." 
Ezekiel47:2 Hmâr lam aṭanga luhnaah mi hruai chhuak a, khawchhak lam aṭanga luhna bulah mi hruai zêl a; ding lam kovah chuan tui chu a lo far a." 
Ezekiel47:3 Khawchhak hawiin mi chu a kal a, a hrui ken chuan a han teh a. Tawng sâng a tlin chuan tui chu min daitîr a, kerêk thleng a ni." 
Ezekiel47:4 Tawng sâng a han teh leh a, mi daitîr a, khûp thleng a ni; tawng sâng a han teh leh a, kâwng thlengin mi daikaitîr a." 
Ezekiel47:5 Tawng sâng a han teh leh chuan lui lian tak, dai kai rual loh, hleuh kai ngai a lo ni ta a." 
Ezekiel47:6 Chu mi chuan, “Mihring fapa, hei hi i hmu em?” a ti a. Tichuan, min hruai a, lui kamah chuan min kîrtîr ta a." 
Ezekiel47:7 Vaukama ka chhuah chuan vaukam tawnah thing a lo awm khup mai a, ka hnênah, “He lui hi khawchhak lamah a luang a, Jordan phaiah a luang thla a, Tuipui Thi a zu fin a ni." 
Ezekiel47:8 Tuipui Thia a luan luh chuan a tui al chu a titui ta a. 
Ezekiel47:9 He lui hi a luanna a piangah rannung chi tinrêng a pung ang a, sangha te a tam êm êm ang. Tuipui Thi tui chu a tithianghlim ang a, thil nung tinrêng an pung ang." 
Ezekiel47:10 Engedi tui hmun aṭanga Eneglaim tui hmun thlengin tuipui kamah chuan sangha mantute an awm ang a, an lênte an pho vang. Mediteranean tuipuia sangha chi hrang anga tam sangha a awm ang." 
Ezekiel47:11 Vaukam chirhdûp hmunte leh dîlte erawh chu chia ten atân a la al tho vang. 
Ezekiel47:12 Lui kam tawna thing chi tinrêng chu ei atân a rah ṭhiah ṭhuah ang a, a hnahte chu a vuai ngai lo vang. Thla tin an rah ang a. Tempul aṭanga tui lo chhuak chuan a châwm a, a rahte chu ei atân a ni ang a, a hnahte pawh damna a ni ang." 
Ezekiel47:13 Lalpa P athian chuan heti hian a ti: “Israel hnam sâwm leh pahnihte ram insem dân chu hetiang hi a ni ang: Josefa thlahte chuan chan hnih an chang ang. 
Ezekiel47:14 In pate hnênah bân phar meuhvin he ram hi in ram rovah pêk ka tiam a, in ro atân insem rawh u le." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Hmâr lam ramripui chu Mediteranean Tuipui aṭanga khawchhak lamah Hethlon khaw panin Zedad khaw thlengin a kal ang a," 
Ezekiel47:16 Hamat leh Berotha-ah a kal zêl ang a, Hamat khân leh Damaska inrina Sibraim kal tlangin Hauran ramria Hazer-hatikon thlengin a kal ang a." 
Ezekiel47:17 Tichuan, hmâr lam ramri chu Mediteranean Tuipui aṭangin Hazar-enon thlengin a kal a ni; a hmâr lamah Damaska leh Hamat ram a awm a, hei hi hmâr lam ramripui chu a ni." 
Ezekiel47:18 Khawchhak lam ramri chu Damaska leh Hauran inrina aṭanga chhim lam panin a kal a, Jordan lui a zui a. Khawthlang lam chu Israel ram a ni a, khawchhak lam chu Gilead ram a ni; ri chu Tuipui Thiah Tamar thlengin a kal a." 
Ezekiel47:19 Chhim lam ramri chu Tamar aṭangin chhimthlang hawiin a kal a, Kades tui hmun thlengin. Chuta ṭangin hmârthlang lamah Aigupta ramri zuiin Mediteranean a thleng a." 
Ezekiel47:20 Khawthlang lam ri chu Mediteranean Tuipui a ni a, hmâr lamah Hamat khua a thleng a." 
Ezekiel47:21 “He ram hi a chi chiin insem rawh u. 
Ezekiel47:22 Ṭhum in vâwr ang a, in chan chu kumkhua a in ram tûr a ni. In zînga saphun awm, he rama fa neite pawhin in insem hunah chan an nei ve tûr a ni, mi dang ang bawkin ṭhum vâwrnaah pawh an pawt thei ang." 
Ezekiel47:23 Chutiang saphun awm vete chuan an awmna hnam ram chan an insem hunah an zîngah an tel ve ang,” Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel48:1 Hmâr lam ramri chu khawthlang Mediteranean Tuipui aṭangin khawchhak lamah Hethlon khaw panin Hamat khuaah a kal a, Enon khua a thleng a, Damaska leh Hamat inrina thlengin a kal a, hmâr lam ramripui aṭang hian a indawtin khawthlang lamah Tuipui aṭanga khawchhak ramripui thlengin an insem tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel48:2 A hmâr berah Dan a awm ang a, Aser-in a dawt ang a," 
Ezekiel48:3 Nafthali-in a dawt leh ang a. 
Ezekiel48:4 Chutah Manase-in a dawt leh ang a," 
Ezekiel48:5 Efraim-in a dawt leh ang. 
Ezekiel48:6 Reuben-in a dawt leh ang a," 
Ezekiel48:7 Juda a hnuhnûng ber ang. 
Ezekiel48:8 Juda dep chhim lamah, mi dang chan zât, ram serh, Tuipui aṭangin khawchhak ramripui thlengin, a zau lam tawng sînghnih leh sângnga zuah tûr a ni, hemi chhûngah hian Tempul a awm ang." 
Ezekiel48:9 Hemi chhûngah hian Lalpa tân bîk, ram tawng sînghnih leh sangngaa sei, tawng sînghniha zau in zuah tûr a ni. Hemi chhûngah hian Tempul a awm tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel48:10 Puithiamhovin he hmun serh aṭang hian khawchhak lam aṭanga khawthlang lamah tawng sînghnih leh sângngaa sei, chhim lam leh hmâr zâwnga tawng sîngkhata zau an chang ang. Hemi chhûngah hian Tempul a awm tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel48:11 He hmun thianghlim hi Zadoka thlahte awmna tûr a ni. Levia thlah dangte chuan Israel-te an sual bo lai khân an zui ve a, anni erawh hi chuan an zui ve lo va ni." 
Ezekiel48:12 Levia thlahte awmna depah, hmun thianghlim berah an awm tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel48:13 Puithiamho ram chhim lamah Levia thlahte pawhin ram bîk an nei tûr a ni, a dung tawng sînghnih leh sângnga, a vâng tawng sîngkhat." 
Ezekiel48:14 Hêng ram hi an hralh thei lo vang, ram dang nên an thleng thei lo vang a, mi dang an pe thei hek lo vang, Lalpa tâna serh hran a ni si a." 
Ezekiel48:15 He hmun bîk chhûnga ram la âwl, tawng sînghnih leh sângnga a sei, a zau lam tawng sângnga hi erawh chu serh hran a ni ve lo, a duh duh awmna tûr a ni, ram an nei ang a, an chhawm thei bawk ang." 
Ezekiel48:16 A laiah khawpui a awm ang a, kulh kil li nei a ni ang a, tawng sângli leh zanga a ni ang." 
Ezekiel48:17 Khawpui hual chhuak hian ram ruak, tawng zahnih leh sawmngaa zau zuah tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel48:18 Khawpui ram zuah hnua ram la chuang, khawchhak zâwnga tawng sîngkhat, khawthlang zâwnga tawng sîngkhat hi khawpui chhûnga awmten huanah an nei thei ang." 
Ezekiel48:19 Tu hnam pawh, khawpui chhûnga awm tawh phawt chuan huan hi an nei thei ang." 
Ezekiel48:20 Ram lai taka hmun zuah bîk chu kil li bial, tawng sînghnih leh sângnga a ni ang, hemi huam chhûngah hian khawpui chu a awm a ni." 
Ezekiel48:21 Tempul awmna te, puithiam awmna te, Levia chite awmna te leh khawpui awmna khawchhak leh khawthlanga ram la awm chu lal ta tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel48:22 Khawthlang lamah Tuipui, khawchhak lamah khawchhak ramripui thlengin a ta a ni a, hmâr lamah Judai ram a ri a, chhim lamah Benjamin ramri a thleng a ni." 
Ezekiel48:23 He ram ruat bîk chhim lam hi, Tuipui aṭanga khawchhak ramri thlengin hnam la awmten indawtin an insem ang." 
Ezekiel48:24 Ben jamin hnamin hmun serh chhim lam an chang ang a. 
Ezekiel48:25 Chumi chhim chu Simeon thlahten an chang ang a," 
Ezekiel48:26 Isakar-in a dawt ang a," 
Ezekiel48:27 Zebulun-in a dawt leh ang a, chhim berah Gad-ho an awm ang." 
Ezekiel48:28 Gada thlahte chan chhim lam ri hi ram pum chhim lam ripui a ni nghâl a, Tamar aṭanga chhimthlang hawiin Kades tui hmun thlengin a kal a, chuta ṭangin hmârthlang zâwngin Aigupta ramri a zui zêl a, Mediteranean Tuipui a thleng a ni." 
Ezekiel48:29 Israel hnam zînga an ram ro tûr sem dân tûr chu khitiang khi a ni, Lalpa P athian thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Ezekiel48:30 Jerusalem khuaah luhna kawngka sâwm leh pahnih a awm, khawpui hi kil li nei a ni a, kil khat chu tawng sângli leh zanga zêl a ni. Israel thlahte hnam hming chawiin kawngka hming an phuah a. Hmâr lama kawngka pathum chu Reuben, Juda, Levi an vuah a, khawchhak lama mi chu Josefa, Benjamin, Dan; chhim lama mi chu Simon, Isakar, Zebulun an vuah a, khawthlang lama mi chu Gad Aser, Naftali an vuah." 
Ezekiel48:31  
Ezekiel48:32  
Ezekiel48:33  
Ezekiel48:34  
Ezekiel48:35 Kulh bang pum pui sei lam chu tawng sîngkhat leh sângriat a ni. Tûn aṭang chuan he khawpui hmingah, ‘ Lalpa awmna’ tih a ni tawh ang." 
Daniel1:1 Judai rama Jehoiakima a lal kum thumnaah Babulon lal Nebukadnezara chu Jerusalemah a lo kal a, a hual a." 
Daniel1:2 Lalpa thuin Juda lal Jehoiakima chu a man a, Pathian ina bungbêl ṭhenkhat pawh a la a, an pathian in awmna Sinar ramah a kalpui a; a bungbêl lâkte chu an pathian ina thil dahkhâwmnaah chuan a dah a." 
Daniel1:3 Lal chuan hotu lian Aspenaza, mi tilreh chu, Israel lal thlah leh milian fa," 
Daniel1:4 tlangvâl pian fel, hmêlṭha leh engkima mi vengva, thil zir thei mi, hriatna ngah, lal ina chetla tlâk thlang chhuaka, Kaldai ṭawng leh lehkha zirtîr tûrin thu a pe a." 
Daniel1:5 Lal chuan, lal chawhmeh tui leh a in ṭhin ang uain, ni tin a pêktîr bawk a. Kum thum an zir hnuah lal hnênah an inlan tûr a ni." 
Daniel1:6 Chûng mi thlante chu Juda thlah zînga mi Daniela te, Hanania te, Misaela te, Azaria te an ni." 
Daniel1:7 Hotu lian, mi tilreh chuan an hming a sa thar a, Daniela chu Beltesazara a vuah a, Hanania chu Sadraka, Misaela chu Mesaka, Azaria chu Abednegoa." 
Daniel1:8 Daniela chuan chawhmeh tui leh uain lalin a in ṭhin chuan intihbawlhhlawh loh a tum tlat a, hotu lian, mi tilreh chu a intihbawlhhlawh loh nân ṭanpuiah a sâwm a." 
Daniel1:9 Hotu lian, mi tilreh chu, Lalpan Daniela duhsakin a khawngaihtîr a." 
Daniel1:10 Daniela hnênah, “Lal thuin ei leh in tûr kan pe che u a, ka pu lalber chuan in rualpui tlangvâl dangte aia in sa a chhiat hlauh chuan min that mai ang tih ka hlau a ni,” a ti a." 
Daniel1:11 Hotu lian, mi tilreh chuan Daniela te, Hanania te, Misaela te, Azaria te enkawltu tûr a ruat a; chu mi hnênah chuan Danielan," 
Daniel1:12 “Ni sâwm chhûng chu thlai hnephnawl leh tuisik chauh min pe la," 
Daniel1:13 lal chawhmeh eiho tlangvâlte nên kan hmêl en chhin la, ṭha i tih angin i chhiahhlawhte chungah thil i ti dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Daniel1:14 Chu thil chungchânga an thu sawi chu a ngaithla a, ni sâwm chhûng chu a en chhin ta a." 
Daniel1:15 Ni sâwm a ral hnu chuan lal chawhmeh eiho tlangvâlte ai chuan an hmêl a mawi a, an sa pawh a ṭha a." 
Daniel1:16 Tichuan, anmahni enkawltupa chuan chawhmeh tui leh uain an in tûr chu pe lovin thlai hnephnawl chauh a pe ta a." 
Daniel1:17 Hêng tlangvâl palite hi Pathianin thil zir theihna a pe a, lehkha an thiam theiin an fing sâwt êm êm a; Daniela phei chu inlârnate leh mumangte hrilh fiah theihna a pe a." 
Daniel1:18 Lal hun tiam kum thum chu a ral a, hotu lian, mi tilreh chuan Nebukadnezara hnênah anni chu a hruai a." 
Daniel1:19 Lal chuan an za-in a lo be vêl a, Daniela te, Hanania te, Misaela te, Azaria te tluk tu mah an awm lo; chuvângin, lal upate zîngah an tel ve ta a." 
Daniel1:20 Thufing leh thil hriat âwm rêng rêng lalin a zawh apiang a ram chhûnga arsi chhui mi te, aienthiam te, aikaih thiam te hriat lêt sâwm an hria." 
Daniel1:21 Daniela chu lal Kuran Babulon a rawn rûn thleng khân lal bulah a khawsa a ni. 
Daniel2:1 A lal kum hnih kumin Nebukadnezara chuan mumang a nei a, a rilru a tibuai hle a, mut pawh a mu thei lo." 
Daniel2:2 A mumang chu sawi tûrin lal chuan arsi chhui mi te, bo hre thei te, aienthiam te leh Kaldai mi thiam te a ko va. An lo kal a, lal hmaah chuan an ding a." 
Daniel2:3 Lal chuan an hnênah, “Mumang ka nei a, min timangang hle a ni; engtihna nge tih hriat ka duh a ni,” a ti a." 
Daniel2:4 Kaldai-ho chuan Aramaik ṭawngin an chhâng a, “Lal chu dam reng rawh se, i mumang chu i chhiahhlawhte hi han hrilh la, kan hrilh fiah mai ang,” an ti a." 
Daniel2:5 Lal chuan, “Ka mumang hi a awmzia min hrilh ngei tûr a ni. Min hrilh theih loh chuan in kut leh ke ka pawhthlâksak ang che u a, in inte ka tiram vek ang." 
Daniel2:6 Ka mumang leh a awmzia min hrilh theih erawh chuan lâwmman tam tak ka pe ang che u a, ka chawimawi bawk ang che u. Ka mumang leh a awmzia mi han hrilh teh u le,” a ti a." 
Daniel2:7 “Lalpa chuan a mumang chu a chhiahhlawhte hi hrilh mai sela, keinin kan hrilh fiah ang,” tiin an chhâng leh a." 
Daniel2:8 Chutah lal chu a ṭêk ta a, “Ka thu ka hlen dâwn tih in hriat avângin tihkhawtlai dân in zawng tih ka hre chiang a ni." 
Daniel2:9 In hrilh fiah theih loh chuan thuhmun ṭheuhvin ka hrem ngei dâwn che u a ni. Nakin deuhvah thil a danglam mai ang tih beiseiin dâwt min hrilha, thil tihkhawtlai in tum a nih hi. Ka mumang chu min han hrilh mai ula; tichuan, in hrilh fiah theih leh theih loh pawh ka hre mai ang,” a ti a." 
Daniel2:10 Kaldai mi thiamte chuan lal chu an chhâng a, “Khawvêlah hian i hriat duh chu tu mah sawi thei an awm lo vang. Lal ropui ber te leh thiltithei ber te, tu mahin an arsi chhui mi te, bo hre thei te leh aien thiam te hnênah hetiang thil hi an zâwt ngai lo." 
Daniel2:11 Lalin i hriat duh hi a khirh êm a, pathiante chauh lo chuan tu man an hre lo vang, pathiante lah kan zîngah an awm si lo,” an ti a." 
Daniel2:12 Chuvâng chuan lal chu a thinur ta êm êm a, Babulon mi thiam rualte chu tihhlum tûrin thu a pe ta a." 
Daniel2:13 Mi thiamte thah thu pêk a nih tâk avângin Daniela leh a ṭhiante pawh chu thah tûr an ni ve ta a. 
Daniel2:14 Mi thiam rual that tûra tirh, lal vêngtute hotupa Arioka chu Daniela chuan fîmkhur tak leh hawihhâwm takin a bia a," 
Daniel2:15 “Engtizia nge heti taka khauhva lalin thu a pêk le?” a ti a. Arioka chuan thil awm dân chu Daniela a hrilh a. 
Daniel2:16 Daniela chu lal hnênah a kal a, mumang chu a hrilh fiah theih nân hun a dîl belh a." 
Daniel2:17 Tichuan, Daniela chu a hâwng a, a ṭhian Hanania te, Misaela te, Azaria te chu thil awm dân a hrilh a." 
Daniel2:18 Babulon mi thiam dangte ruala thah an nih loh nân vân Pathian khawngaihna ngêna, chu thu khirh chu hrilh fiah theihna dîl tûrin a hrilh a." 
Daniel2:19 Chumi zân la la chuan a mumangah chu thu khirh chu a hnêna hrilh fiah a ni ta a. 
Daniel2:20 Daniela chuan vân Pathian chu lâwmthu a hrilh a: “Pathian chu a fing a, thil a ti thei a, Amah chu fak kumkhua tûr a ni." 
Daniel2:21 Hun te, khua te, a thuin an awm a, Lal te a bân a, a siam bawk a, Finna leh hriatna petu a ni." 
Daniel2:22 Thu khirh leh thûk tak takte chu a puang a, Thim zînga thil thuhrûkte pawh a hmu a, Êngin a vêl a hual a ni." 
Daniel2:23 Min thlahtute Pathian, Ka fakin ka chawimawi a che, Finna leh chakna min pe a, Ka ṭawngṭai i lo ngaithla a, Lal hnêna sawi tûr min hrilh tâk hi,” a ti a." 
Daniel2:24 Lalin mi thiam rual that tûra a tirh Arioka hnênah Daniela chu a kal a, a hnênah, “Mi thiam rual hi that mai teh suh, lal hnênah min hruai la, a mumang chu ka hrilh fiahsak ang e,” a ti a." 
Daniel2:25 Arioka chuan Daniela chu lal hnênah chuan a hruai ta nghâl a, lal hnênah chuan, “Judai ram aṭanga sal zîngah lal mumang hrilh fiah thei tûr mi ka hmu ta,” a ti a." 
Daniel2:26 Lal chuan Daniela hnênah (a hming dang chu Beltesazara a ni), “Ka mumang leh a awmzia mi hrilh thei ang maw?” a ti a." 
Daniel2:27 Daniela chuan lal hnênah, “Bo hre thei emaw, aien thiam emaw, arsi chhui mi emaw, mi fing, chu thu khirh hrilh fiah thei tûr tu mah an awm lo vang." 
Daniel2:28 Amaherawhchu, vânah Pathian a awm a, ani chuan mite hnênah thu rilte a puang ṭhîn; lal Nebukadnezara hnênah pawh nakin lawka thil lo thleng tûr a rawn puang a nih hi. I mumanga i thil hmuh chu ka han hrilh ang che." 
Daniel2:29 “Khuma i mut laiin lal chuan thil lo thleng tûrte i ngaihtuah a. Thu ril tifiah tûrin Pathian chuan thil lo thleng tûr chu a entîr che a ni. 
Daniel2:30 Ka fin bîk vâng ni lovin lal hian i mumang awmzia i hriata, i rilrua thu lo lût chu i hriatthiam theih nân he thu ril awmzia hi ka hnênah tihlan a ni." 
Daniel2:31 Ani, ka pu, i mangah chuan milim lian pui mai, tle vur hi i lo hmu a, en ngam loh khawpa hlauhawm a ni." 
Daniel2:32 A lu chu rangkachak ṭha ber chia siam a ni, a âwm leh a bân chu tangkarua, a dul leh a kâwngbâwr chu dâr;" 
Daniel2:33 a ke chu thîr, a ke bâwr chu thîr leh hlum inchawhpawlha siam a ni." 
Daniel2:34 I en reng a, chutih lai chuan khâm aṭangin tu ma tihbal ni lo lung lian tak a lo lum a, thîr leh hluma siam milim kephah chu a rawn delh a, a sawm ta vek a." 
Daniel2:35 Thîr te, hlum te, dâr te, tangkarua te leh rangkachak te pawh chu a keh sawm a, nipui laia hruiha buhsi ang mai an lo ni ta a; thliin a lên bo va, a hnuhma pakhat mah hmuh tûr a awm ta lo va. Lung erawh kha chu a lian tual tual a, tlâng tiat ngawt a ni a, leiah a khat ta mup a." 
Daniel2:36 “Chutiang chu a ni lal mumang chu, ka han hrilh fiah ang e:" 
Daniel2:37 Lal azawngah lal ropui ber i ni a. 
Daniel2:38 Vân Pathian chuan ram te, thiltihtheihna te, chakna te leh ropuina te a pe che a. Leia mihring chêngte chungah rorêltuah a siam che a, sava leh rannung chungah pawh thu a neihtîr che hi. Rangkachaka siam lu ang chu i ni." 
Daniel2:39 I hnuah i ram aia nêp lalram dang a lo ding ang a, dâr ang lek lalram dang pawh a lo la ding leh zêl ang, chu chuan khawvêl ro a rêl ang." 
Daniel2:40 Nangmah anga chak lal dang, a palina tûr, thil tichhiaa tidarh thei, thîr ang an lo lal leh ang. Thîrin thil dang a tichhia ang hian lei lalram lo awm hmasate chu a rawn tichhiain a rawn tidarh vek ang." 
Daniel2:41 Milim ke leh kezungpui chu, thîr leh hlum inchawhpawlh a nih i hmu a; chu chuan, chu ram chu lungrual lo a nih tûr a entîr a; thîr leh hlum a ni a, thîr anga chakna lai a nei ang." 
Daniel2:42 A kezungpui chu thîr leh hlum inchawhpawlh bawk a ni a, ram chu a ṭhen lai a chak ang a, a ṭhen lai erawh chu a chak lo hle ang." 
Daniel2:43 Thîr leh hlum inchawhpawlh i hmu a, chutiangin chu ram rorêltute chuan chhûngkaw inzawm khâwm tumin an inneih pawlh ang a, mahse thîr leh hlum a inchawhpawlh thei lo ang bawk hian an inzawm khâwm tak tak thei lo vang." 
Daniel2:44 Chûng rorêltute hun lai chuan Vân Pathian chuan, ram hlun tûr, ramthar, a rawn din ang a, chu chu tu man an hneh thei lo vang; lal ram dangte chu a tichhe vek ang a, ani erawh chu a awm reng ang." 
Daniel2:45 Tu ma tihbal ni lo, khâm aṭanga lung lo tla kha i hmu bawk a; hlum te, thîr te, dâr te, tangkarua te leh rangkachak tea siam milim chu a delh tâk kha i hmu bawk a. Pathian ropui tak chuan lal hnênah thil lo thleng tûr a hrilh che a ni. I mumang chu ka hrilh ta che a, a awmzia pawh ka hrilh tâk che hi,” a ti a." 
Daniel2:46 Lal Nebukadnezara chu a bawkkhup a, Daniela chu chibai a bûk a, rimtui leh thilpêk Daniela hnêna hlan tûr thu a pe a." 
Daniel2:47 Lal chuan Daniela hnênah, “He thu ril hi i sawi fiah theih avângin i Pathian chu Pathian ropui ber a lo nih hi; lalte Lal a ni a, thu ril puangtu i nih ka hre ta,” a ti a." 
Daniel2:48 Daniela chu a siam lian a, thilpêk ṭha tak tak a pe a, Babulon bial a enkawltîr a, Babulon mi thiam rual hotu-ah a siam ta a." 
Daniel2:49 Daniela dîl angin Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te chu Babulon ram ṭhen hmun dangah hotu-ah a dah a, Daniela erawh chu lal bulah a awm ve ta zêl a." 
Daniel3:1 Lal Nebukadnezaran rangkachak milim a siam a, a sân lam chu tawng sawmruk a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng ruk a ni. Babulon biala Dura phaizâwlah milim chu a din a." 
Daniel3:2 A hnuaia lal tenau te, ramawptute leh biala sawrkâr hna thawk zawng zawng chu lal Nebukadnezara din milim serh ni chhim tûrin a chah khâwm a." 
Daniel3:3 Milim serh hran ni chuan chûng lal tênau te, ramawptu te, thuneitu te, bial hotu te, tangka vawngtu te, rorêltu te, thuremtu te leh sawrkâr hna thawk zawng zawng te chu an lo kal khâwm a, milim hmaah chuan an ding ṭhup a." 
Daniel3:4 Tlângauvin ring takin heti hian thu a rawn puang a, “Hnam tin, chi tin, ṭawng tin hmangte u," 
Daniel3:5 tawtawrâwt an hâm ri in hria ang a, ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te, bengbung te, phênglâwng te, rawchhêm te leh thil tum rîk theih chi dang te an rawn tum ang a; chûng thil chu an rawn tum veleh lal Nebukadnezara rangkachak milim hmaah in bawkkhup ang a, chibai in bûk tûr a ni." 
Daniel3:6 Tu pawh, bawkkhupa chibai bûk duh lo chu meipuia paih tûr an ni,” tiin." 
Daniel3:7 Tichuan, thil tum ri an hriat veleh hnam tin, chi tin leh ṭawng tin hmangte chu lal Nebukadnezara rangkachak milim hmaah chuan an kûn a, chibai an bûk ta a." 
Daniel3:8 Babulon mi ṭhenkhatten chu chu Juda-te hêkna remchângah an hmang a," 
Daniel3:9 lal Nebukadnezara hnênah, “Aw lalber, dam reng ang che." 
Daniel3:10 ‘Tawtawrâwt te, ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te, phênglâwng te, rawchhem te leh thil tum rîk theih chi dangte an tum rîk in hriat veleh rangkachak milim hmaah in bawkkhup ang a, chibai in bûk tûr a ni," 
Daniel3:11 a bûk duh lo tawh phawt chu meipuia paih tûr,’ tiin thu i pe a." 
Daniel3:12 Juda mi, Babulon bial ṭhenkhat hotua i dah Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te hian i thu rêng an ngai lo va, i pathiante chibai an bûk duh lo, i rangkachak milim hmaah pawh an kûn duh ve hauh lo,” an ti a." 
Daniel3:13 Lal Nebukadnezara chu a thinur ta êm êm a, Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te chu a hmaa rawn hruai tûrin thu a pe a, anni chu lal hmaah chuan an rawn hruai a." 
Daniel3:14 Nebukadnezara chuan, “Sadrak, Mesak, Abednego, ka pathian chibai in bûk duh lo va, ka milim din hmaah in kûn duh hek lo tih hi a dik em?" 
Daniel3:15 Tawtawrâwt te, ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te, bengbung te, phênglâwng te, rawchhem te leh thil tum rîk theih chi dang an tum ri in hriatin ka milim siam hmaa bawkkhupa chibai in bûk duh chuan a ṭha a ni mai a, in bûk duh loh erawh chuan meipuia paih nghâl in ni ang. Pathian tuin nge ka kut ata chhan chhuak thei ang che u?” a ti a." 
Daniel3:16 Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te chuan lal chu an chhâng a, “Aw lal Nebukadnezar, he thilah hian kan chhân che a ṭûl lo ve." 
Daniel3:17 Ṭûl a nih chuan kan Pathian biak hian meipui ata min chhan chhuak thei asin, i kut ata pawh min chhan chhuak thei ang." 
Daniel3:18 Min chhan loh pawhin, aw lalber, i pathiante chu chibai kan bûk chuang lo vang, rangkachak milim i din hmaah pawh kan kûn hek lo vang,” an ti a." 
Daniel3:19 Lal Nebukadnezara chu a thinur ta êm êm a, Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te avâng chuan a hmai a sen ṭeuh mai a. Meipui chu a ngai aia lêt sariha saa tuah tûrin thu a pe a." 
Daniel3:20 A sipai zînga chak chak chu Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te phuara meipuia paih lût tûrin thu a pe a." 
Daniel3:21 An kawr te, diar te leh an silhfên dangte inbel vek chung chuan an phuar hlâwm a, meipuiah chuan an paih lût ta a." 
Daniel3:22 Lal thupêk chu a khauh êm avâng leh meipui chu a sat êm avângin, Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te meipuia paihtute chu meialh chuan a hliau hlum ta a." 
Daniel3:23 Anni pathum Sadraka, Mesaka, Abednegoa te chu phuar hlâwm reng chungin meipuiah chuan an tla lût ta a." 
Daniel3:24 Lal Nebukadnezara chu mak ti zetin a tho thut a, thurâwntute hnênah chuan, “Phuar chungin mi pathum meipuiah kan paih lût a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a. Anni chuan, “Paih lût e, aw lalpa,” an ti a." 
Daniel3:25 “Mi pali phuar loh, meialh zînga vei vei ka va hmu si ve, na rêng an ti lo va, a palina phei chu Vântirhkoh hmêl pu a ni,” a ti a." 
Daniel3:26 Lal Nebukadnezara chu meipui kawngkhâr bulah chuan a kal a, “Sadrak, Mesak, Abednego, lo chhuak ula hetah hian lo kal teh u,” a ti a. Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te chu meipui aṭang chuan an lo chhuak a." 
Daniel3:27 Lal tênau te, ramawptu te, ram rorêltu te leh lal thurâwntu te chu an lo kal khâwm a, hêng mite taksa hi chu meiin a khawih lo va, an sam a kâng lo va, an silhfênte pawh a ût lo va, mei rim lah an nam hek lo tih an rawn hmu a." 
Daniel3:28 Nebukadnezara chuan, “Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se. Ani chuan vântirhkoh a rawn tîr a, amah ringa a rawngbâwltute chu a rawn chhan chhuak ta a; lal thupêk awih duh lovin an taksa boral huamin an Pathian chauh lo chu Pathian dang an be duh lo a ni." 
Daniel3:29 Chuvângin, hetiang hian thu ka pe e: Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te Pathian sawichhetu hnam emaw, chi emaw, ṭawng chi hrang hmang emaw rêng rêng chu an kut leh an ke pawhsawmsak an ni ang a, an inte pawh tihram a ni bawk ang. Hetianga mi chhan chhuak thei Pathian dang tu mah an awm lo,” a ti a." 
Daniel3:30 Lal chuan Sadraka te, Mesaka te, Abednegoa te chu Babulon ram bial hotu zîngah a kaisântîr ta a." 
Daniel4:1 Hnam tin, chi tin, ṭawng tin hmang, khawvêla awmte hnênah lal Nebukadnezaran hetiang hian thu a thawn a: “Remna in hnênah awm rawh se." 
Daniel4:2 Pathian Chungnungberan chhinchhiahna leh thil mak mi entîr hi lo hre ve teh u: 
Daniel4:3 A chhinchhiahnate chu a va ropui êm! A thil tih makte chu a va nasa êm! A ram chu chatuan ram a ni a, Kumkhuain ro a rêl ang." 
Daniel4:4 “Kei, Nebukadnezara hi, ka in ropui takah thlamuang takin ka awm a, engkimah ka hmuingîl a." 
Daniel4:5 Mumang hlauhawm tak ka nei a, mumanga ka thil hmuhte chuan ka rilru a timangang hle a." 
Daniel4:6 Ka mumang chu hrilh fiah tûrin Babulon mi thiamte ka hruai khâwmtîr a," 
Daniel4:7 bo hre thei te, aien thiam te, Kaldai mi thiam te leh arsi chhui mi te chu an lo kal a, ka mumang chu ka hrilh a; mahse, an hrilh fiah thei lo." 
Daniel4:8 A tâwpah Daniela, a hming dang chu Beltesazara, ka Pathian hming chawia sak chu a lo kal a, amahah chuan Pathian thianghlim thlarau a chêng a; tichuan, ka mang chu ka hrilh ve ta a. A hnênah chuan," 
Daniel4:9 ‘Nang Beltesazar, mi thiam rual hotu, Pathian thianghlim thlarau chu i hnênah a chêng tih ka hria; chuvângin, thu rilte pawh i hre vek a, ka mang chu hei hi a ni, hrilh fiah rawh le:" 
Daniel4:10 ‘Khum laizâwla mua ka thil hmuh chu, khawvêl laili lai takah thing sâng deuh mai hi a lo awm a." 
Daniel4:11 Thing chu a ṭhang lian zêl a, a zîk chuan vân a tawng ta a; lei ram hmun tin aṭangin a lang thei a ni." 
Daniel4:12 A hnahte chu a mawi hle a, a rah tep tup a, tu tân pawh kham khawpa ei tham a rah a. Ramsate chuan a hlim an bêl a, chunglêng savate chu a zârah an chêng a, thil nung tinrêngin a rah chu an tlân a." 
Daniel4:13 ‘Mua ka thil hmuh chu ka ngaihtuah laiin vân aṭangin vântirhkoh, inring reng a lo chhuk a," 
Daniel4:14 hetiang hian ring takin a au va; ‘Thing kha kit ula, a ṭangte hlawi rawh u, a hnahte vaw ṭîl ula, a rahte paih vek rawh u, a hlim ata ramsate chu tlân darh sela, a zâr ata savate pawh thlâwk bo rawh se." 
Daniel4:15 A bul bâwr chu a awm ngaiin awm sela, thîr leh dâr khaidiatin thlung ula, hnimin bawh rawh se. Vân daiin tlâk huh sela, ramsate nên hnim zîngah awm za rawh se." 
Daniel4:16 A mihring rilru chu ramsa rilruah chang sela, a chungah kum sarih ral bawk rawh se." 
Daniel4:17 Hei hi Vântirhkoh inring rengho thurêl a ni; mihring ramte hi Chungnungbera thuhnuaia awm a ni a, mi nêp ber pawh a duh chuan a pe thei tih tu pawhin an hre dâwn nia,’ a ti a." 
Daniel4:18 “Kei lal Nebukadnezara hian chu chu ka manga ka thil hmuh chu a ni; Beltesazar, nangin han hrilh fiah teh, ka ram mi thiamten an hrilh fiah thiam lo va, nang erawh chuan Pathian thianghlim thlarau i hnênah a chêng a, i hrilh fiah thei ngei ang,” ka ti a." 
Daniel4:19 Daniela, Beltesazara an tih bawk chuan, a hlau êm êm a, eng emaw chen chu eng mah a sawi thei lo va. Lal chuan, “Beltesazar, mumang leh a awmzia avângin thlaphâng suh,” a ti a. Beltesazara chuan, “Ka pu, he mumang hi nangmah hawtu tân ni sela, a kawh pawh i hmêlma tân ni teh se." 
Daniel4:20 I thing hmuh, sâng zeta ṭhang, vân tawng ta, khawvêl hmun tin aṭanga hmuh theih," 
Daniel4:21 a hnah mawi tak, rah tep tup, mi tin ei tham, a hlim ramsaten an belh, a zâra savate chênna thing chu," 
Daniel4:22 aw lalber, nangmah hi i ni. I ṭhang lian a, i chak êm êm a, i ropuina chuan vân a tawng a, i ram chuan kâwlkil a thleng a." 
Daniel4:23 Vân aṭanga vântirhkoh inring reng, lo chhuk i hmu a, ‘Thing kha kit ula, tiboral rawh u, a bul bâwr erawh chu a awmna ngaiah awm sela, thîr leh dâr khaidiatin thlung ula, hnimin bawh rawh se; vân daiin tlâk huh sela, kum sarih a ral hma chu ramsate nên awm za rawh se,’ a rawn ti a." 
Daniel4:24 Aw lalber, hei hi a hrilhfiahna chu a ni: ka pu tâna Chungnungbera thupêk chu hei hi a ni." 
Daniel4:25 Mihring zîng ata hnawh chhuah i ni ang a, ramsate nên in awm za ang. Bâwngpa angin hnim i pet ang a, vân daiin a tlâk huh ang che. Kum sarih ral hunah, Chungnungbera chuan mihring ram chungah thu a nei a, a duh duh a pe mai ṭhîn tih i hria ang." 
Daniel4:26 Thing bul bâwr a awm ngaia a awm tûr a ni tih ang khân Chungnungberan thu a nei tih i hriat hunah i la lal leh ang. 
Daniel4:27 “Tichuan, aw lalber, ka thurâwn che hi pawm hrâm teh; i sual sim la, thil dik ti rawh. I bawhchhiatnate pawh sim la, tihduhdahte khawngaih la; tichuan, thlamuang taka i awm chhûng hi pawh sei a ni mahna,” a ti a." 
Daniel4:28 Chûng thil chu Nebukadnezara chungah a thleng ta thuai a. 
Daniel4:29 Kum khat a vei hnu chuan Babulon lal in chung zâwla a lên laiin heti hian a ti a: 
Daniel4:30 “Babulon khua hi a ropui teh e! Lal chên nân ka thiltihtheihzia leh ka ropuizia tilang tûrin ka sak a nih hi,” tiin." 
Daniel4:31 Lalin chutia thu a la sawi lai mêk chuan vân aṭangin aw a lo chhuak a, “Lal Nebukadnezar, ka sawi hi ngaithla rawh; i ram chu i chân ta," 
Daniel4:32 nang pawh mihring zîng ata hnawh chhuah i ni ang a, ramsa zîngah i awm ang; bâwng angin hnim i pet ang a, Chungnungbera chuan mihringte ramah thu a nei a, a duh duh a pe mai ṭhîn tih i la hria ang,” a ti a." 
Daniel4:33 Chûng thil chu Nebukadnezara chungah a thleng nghâl ta mai a. Khua ata an hnawt chhuak a, bâwng angin hnim a pet a, vân daiin amah chu a tihuh a, a samte chu mupui thla chen chenin a ṭhang sei a, a tinte pawh sava tin ang mai a ni ta a." 
Daniel4:34 “Chûng ni a tâwp hnu chuan kei, Nebukadnezara hian vân lam ka thlîr a, ka rilru ngai ka pu leh ta a. Chungnungbera, kumkhuaa awma chu ka fak a, ka chawimawi ta chiam a, ‘Kumkhuaa lal tûr a ni e, A ram chu a awm hlen dâwn a ni." 
Daniel4:35 Khawvêla chêngte chu eng tham mah an ni lo va, Vâna thil awmte pawh a thu thuin a dah a, Leia awm tu mahin an dang thei lo; Engtiziaa ti nge i nih? ti thei an awm hek lo.’" 
Daniel4:36 “Rilru pângngai ka put leh rual chuan ka ram ropuina pawh a lo vul leh a, kei pawh ka ropuiin ka lal leh ta hle a. Thu min râwntute leh ram hotute chuan mi rawn bêl a, ka ram chu a ding nghet leh ta a, a ropui zâwk mah a ni." 
Daniel4:37 Kei Nebukadnezara hian Vân Lalber chu ka fak a, ka chawimawi a, ka zah ta êm êm a ni; a thil tih apiang a dik a, a awm dânte pawh a âwm thlap a ni; chapote pawh a titlâwm ṭhîn.”" 
Daniel5:1 Lal Belsazaran a milian sâng tân ruai ropui tak a ṭheh a, an hmaah chuan zu a in a," 
Daniel5:2 Belsazaran zu a han tem chuan a pa Nebukadnezaran Jerusalem Tempul aṭanga a lâk rangkachak leh tangkaraw note kha lâk chhuah thu a pe a, lal leh a miliante, a nupui leh a hmeite zu in nân a ti a ni." 
Daniel5:3 Jerusalem khuaa Pathian in, Tempul aṭanga an lâk note chu an la chhuak a, lal leh a miliante, a nupui leh a hmeite chuan zu in nân an hmang ta a." 
Daniel5:4 Zû chu an in a, rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te, thîr te, thing te leh lung tea siam pathiante chu an fak ta chûl a." 
Daniel5:5 Chutih lai tak chuan khâwnvâr dahna ep lal in bang zût mâm, a êng lai takah chuan mihring kut a lo lang a, thu a rawn ziak ta a; lal chuan kut che vêl chu a en reng a." 
Daniel5:6 Lal chu a dâng sâwp sâwp a, a hlauh êm avângin a tha a zâwi a, a khûpte chu a sai hlawk hlawk a." 
Daniel5:7 “Aien thiam te, Kaldai mi thiam te, arsi chhui mi te han ko vat teh u,” tiin lal chu a au ta chûl a." 
Daniel5:8 Lal chuan Babulon mi fingte hnênah chuan, “Tu pawh, he thu ziak hi chhiara, a awmzia sawi thei chu puan senduk ka sintîr ang a, rangkachak khaidiat ka awrhtîr bawk ang a, ka rama lal ber pathumnaah ka siam bawk ang,” a ti a. Lal mi fingte chu an lo kal a, thu ziak chu an chhiar thiam lo va, lal hriat atân an hrilh fiah thei hek lo." 
Daniel5:9 Lal Belsazara chu a mangang hle a, a dâng sâwp sâwp a, a miliante lah chuan tihngaihna an hre bawk si lo." 
Daniel5:10 Lalnu chuan lal leh a miliante thâwm chu a hriatin rang takin ruai ṭhehna pindanah chuan a lo tlân lût a, “Lalber chu dam reng rawh se. I rilru mangang suh sela, i hmêl pawh danglam hek suh se." 
Daniel5:11 I ram chhûngah mi pakhat, Pathian thianghlim thlarau chênna a awm alâwm." 
Daniel5:12 I pa hun lai pawh khân hriatthiamna leh finna fiah tak, pathiante neih ang hi, a nei asin." 
Daniel5:13 I pa Nebukadnezara khân bo hrethei te, aien thiam te, Kaldai mi thiam te leh arsi chhui mi te hotu-ah a dah a ni." 
Daniel5:14 Mumang hrilh fiah te, thu khirh hriat theih te, thu ril sawi fiah te a thiam bîk a, mi fing tak a ni. A hming chu Daniela a ni, lalin a hmingah Beltesazara a sa a; ko la, hêng hi a rawn hrilh fiah mai ang,” a ti a." 
Daniel5:15 Lal hmaah Daniela chu an rawn hruai a. Lal chuan, “Juda mi, sal, ka pain Judai ram aṭanga a rawn hruai Daniela kha i ni em? Pathian thianghlim thlarau i hnênah a chêng a, finvârna te, hriatthiamna te leh finna te i ngah hle tih ka lo hria asin." 
Daniel5:16 “Mi fing te, aien thiam te he thu ziak hi chhiar a, a awmzia min hrilh tûrin an rawn hruai a; mahse, tu man an hrilh fiah thei lo. Nangin he thu ziak hi i chhiar theiha, a awmzia i sawi theih bawk chuan puan senduk ka sintîr ang che a, rangkachak khaidiat ka awrhtîr bawk ang che. He ram chhûngah lal ber pathumnaah ka siam bawk ang che,” a ti a." 
Daniel5:17 Daniela chuan a chhâng a, “I thil min pêk tumte chu nangman nei la, a nih loh leh mi dang pe zâwk ang che. He thu ziak hi ka chhiar tho vang a, a awmzia pawh ka hrilh ang che." 
Daniel5:18 Aw lalber, i pa Nebukadnezara chu Pathian Chungnungbera chuan a laltîr a, a tilianin a tiropui nasa êm êm a:" 
Daniel5:19 a len êm avâng chuan mi tu pawh, hnam tin, chi tin leh ṭawng tin hmanghote chuan amah an hlau va, a hmaah an khûr ṭhîn; a duh a that a, a duh a zuah a, a duh a chawisâng a, a duh leh a tihniam a." 
Daniel5:20 A lo inngaihlu ta hle a, a rilru chu a sakin chapo takin thil a ti ṭhîn a. Chuvângin, paih a ni a, a ropuina chhuhsak a ni ta a." 
Daniel5:21 Mihring zîng ata hnawh chhuah a ni a, a rilru chu ramsa rilru ang chauh a ni ta a; ram sabengtungte nên an tla za a, bâwng angin hnim a pet a; mihringte ram hi Chungnungbera thu thuin a awm a, a duh apiang a laltîr mai a ni tih a hriat fiah hma chu vân daiin a taksa chu a tlâk huh ṭhîn." 
Daniel5:22 Nang, a fapa, Belsazar, chu thil chu i hre reng nâ a, i inngaitlâwm lo va," 
Daniel5:23 Vân Lalpa kalhin i inchawisâng a, a ina note chu i lâktîr a, nang leh i miliante, i nupuite leh i hmeite chuan zu in nân an hmang a. Rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te, thîr te, thing te leh lung tea siam milim, eng mah hmu thei lo, ngaithla thei lo leh hre thei lote in chawimawi ta zâwk a. A kuta kawltu che, i khawsak dân tinrêng entu Pathian chu i zah lo vei a." 
Daniel5:24 “Hei vâng hian he kut hi he thu ziak tûrin a rawn tîr a ni. 
Daniel5:25 A thu ziak chu hei hi a ni: MENE, MENE, TEKEL tih leh PARSIN tih a ni." 
Daniel5:26 Mene tih chu i lal hun tûr chin a chhinchhiah a, a titâwp dâwn tihna a ni;" 
Daniel5:27 Tekel tih chu bûk i ni a, i tling lo tihna a ni." 
Daniel5:28 Parsin tih chu i ram hi sem darh a ni a, Media leh Persia hnêna pêk a ni tihna a ni,” a ti a." 
Daniel5:29 Lal thupêk angin Daniela chu puan senduk an sintîr a, rangkachak khaidiat ṭhi an awrhtîr bawk a, rama lal ber pathumnaah dah a nih tâk thu an puang a." 
Daniel5:30 Chumi zân ngei chuan Kaldai lal Belsazara chu an that a," 
Daniel5:31 Media mi Daria chuan ram chu a chang ta a, kum sawmruk leh pahniha upa a ni." 
Daniel6:1 Daria chuan ram pum pui rorêl tûrin ramawptu za leh sawmhnih dah darh ṭha a ti a. 
Daniel6:2 Chûngte hna enzuia lal tâna ṭha tûr thlîr zui tûrin Daniela leh mi dang pahnih a ruat bawk a. 
Daniel6:3 Ram awptute leh chûng hotute zîngah chuan Daniela chu a fel lawr lak a; chutia a fel bîk êm avâng chuan lal chuan ram pum hotua dah a rilrûk a. 
Daniel6:4 Ramawptute leh hotu dangte chuan ram enkawl thu-ah, Daniela thil tihsual an châng ta rân a; mahse, hêkna tûr eng mah an hmu thei lo; Daniela chuan engkim dik tak leh rinawm takin a ti dim diam ṭhîn a, thil sual emaw, thil dik lo emaw a ti ngai si lo va." 
Daniel6:5 Chûng mite chuan, “A Pathian biak chungchâng thu-ah chauh lo chuan Daniela hi hêk chhiatna tûr kan hmu zo dâwn lo,” an ti a." 
Daniel6:6 Tichuan, lal hnênah an kal a, “Lal Daria, dam reng ang che." 
Daniel6:7 I ram enkawltu, hotute, ramawptute, upahote leh sawrkâr miliante chuan, ‘lal hian thupêk siam sela, chu a thupêk chu khauh taka lekkawh ni rawh se;’ kan ti tlâng a ni. ‘Ni sawmthum chhûng chu, nang, lal hnênah chauh lo chuan tu man, an pathian hnênah emaw, mi dang hnênah emaw eng mah an dîl tûr a ni lo,’ tih thu pe la, ‘a awih lo chu sakeibaknei pûkah paih tûr a ni,’ ti ang che." 
Daniel6:8 Tichuan, lalber, he thupêk hi chhuah la, i hming ziak hnan la, lekkawh tûr a ni; Media leh Persia dân, tihdanglam theih loh chu a lo ni dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
Daniel6:9 Lal Daria chuan thupêkah chuan hming a ziak ta a. 
Daniel6:10 Lal chuan thupêkah hming a ziak ta tih Danielan a hriat veleh a hâwng a. A in chhâwngah chuan Jerusalem lam hawia tukverh inhawng a awm hlawm a. Ni tin, ṭhingṭhiin, tukverh inhawng hawi chuan a ṭawngṭai ṭhîn a, chutiang bawk chuan a Pathian hnênah lâwmthu a sawi leh ta tho va." 
Daniel6:11 Daniela ertute chuan an enthla a, Pathian hnêna a ṭawngṭai chu an va hmu a." 
Daniel6:12 Daniela hêk tûrin an za chuan lal hnênah an kal ta a. “Aw lalber, ‘ni sawmthum chhûng chu tu pawh, lal hnênah tih loh, an Pathian hnênah emaw, mi dang hnênah emaw thil an dîl chuan sakeibaknei pûkah paih tûr a ni’ tiin thu i pêkah hming i ziak lâwm ni kha?” an ti a. Lal chuan a chhâng a, “Ziak e, chu thupêk chu thupêk ding lai alâwm, Media leh Persia dân sût theih loh tûr a nih kha,” a ti a." 
Daniel6:13 Lal chu an chhâng a, “Judai rama mi, sal pakhat, Daniela chuan, aw lalber, i thupêk chu a zah lo va, a pawisa hauh lo, ni tin vawi thum a la ṭawngṭai tho mai,” an ti a." 
Daniel6:14 Chu thu chu lalin a han hriat chuan pawi a ti hle a, Daniela chu chhan dân tûr a ngaihtuah a. Ni tlâk thlengin a ngaihtuah a." 
Daniel6:15 Chûng mite chu lal hnênah an lo kal leh a, “Nang, lalberin Media leh Persia dân ang thlapa thupêk, hming i ziak hnan tawh chu, sût leh theih a ni lo tih i hria e,” an ti a." 
Daniel6:16 Tichuan, Daniela chu lal chuan a mantîr a, sakeibaknei dahkhâwmna pûkah chuan a thlâktîr ta a. Daniela hnênah chuan, “Rinawm taka a rawng i bâwl ṭhîn i Pathian chuan chhan che rawh se,” a ti a." 
Daniel6:17 Pûk chu lungin an chhîn a, tu man Daniela chu an lâk chhuah theih loh nân lal leh hotute chhinchhiahna nem meuhvin lung chu an châr a." 
Daniel6:18 Lal chu a haw a, chumi zân chuan chaw a nghei a, intihhlimna eng mah a ngaithla duh lo va, a muhîl thei hek lo." 
Daniel6:19 Vârṭianah lal chu a tho va, hmanhmawh takin sakeibaknei pûkah chuan a va kal a." 
Daniel6:20 Daniela an thlâkna pûk chu a va thleng a, ṭah-awin Daniela chu a au va, “Daniel, Pathian nung rawngbâwltu, rinawm taka a rawng i bâwl ṭhin i Pathian chuan sakeibaknei kâ aṭangin a chhan ta che em?” a ti a." 
Daniel6:21 Daniela chuan, “Aw lalber, dam reng ang che," 
Daniel6:22 eng mah min tih lo tûrin Pathianin vântirhkoh a rawn tîr a, sakeibaknei kâ a rawn tichihsak a ni; eng mah tihsual ka nei lo va, lal chungah thil dik lo eng mah ka ti hek lo tih lan nân a rawn tîr a ni,” tiin a lo chhâng a." 
Daniel6:23 Lal chu a lâwm êm êm a. “Daniela chu pûk ata khai chhuah tûr,” a ti a. Daniela chu pûk ata an khai chhuak a, Pathian a rin tlat avângin hliam pakhat mah a tuar lo." 
Daniel6:24 Lal chuan Daniela hêktute chu man tûr a ti a, an nupui fanaute nên lam sakeibaknei awmna pûkah chuan an thlâk ta a. Pûk mawng an thlen hma hmain sakeibakneite chuan an lo seh a, an ruhte lamin an seh tliak vek a." 
Daniel6:25 Lal Daria chuan khawvêla hnam tin, chi tin, ṭawng tin hmangte hnênah lehkha a ziak a; “Remna in hnênah awm rawh se." 
Daniel6:26 Thu ka pe e, ka ram chhûnga mi zawng zawngin Daniela Pathian hi an ṭihin an zah tûr a ni. Pathian nung a ni a, Chatuanin ro a rêl ang. A ram chu a chhe ngai lo vang a, A lalna chu a tâwp ngai lo vang." 
Daniel6:27 A chhandam a, a chhan chhuak ta, Leiah leh vânah chhinchhiahna te, Thil mak tak takte a ti a, Sakeibaknei lakah Daniela pawh a chhan chhuak,” tiin." 
Daniel6:28 Daria lal lai leh Persia lal Kura lal laite chuan Daniela chu kawng engkimah a hmuingîl hle a. 
Daniel7:1 Babulon lal, Belsazara lal kum khat kum khân mang ka nei a, zâna ka mangah hmuh ka nei a, ka ziak chhuak a, hei hi chumi zâna ka thil hmuh ziakna chu a ni:" 
Daniel7:2 Kil tin aṭangin thli a lo tleh a, tuifinriat chu a chhêm vak a." 
Daniel7:3 Tuifinriat aṭang chuan sakawlh lian pui pui pali, inang lo ṭheuh hi an lo chhuak a." 
Daniel7:4 Pakhatna chu sakeibaknei ang hi a ni a, mupui angin thla a nei a. Ka en reng lai chuan a thla chu an pawt kawlh a, lei ata an kaitho va, mihring angin ke pahnihin an dintîr a, mihring rilru ang an puttîr a." 
Daniel7:5 Sakawlh pahnihna chu savawm ang hi a ni a, a ke hnung lamin a ding a, nâkruh pathum hi a seh a, aw lo chhuak chuan, “Ei rawh, i duhtâwkin sa ei rawh,” a rawn ti a." 
Daniel7:6 Ka en reng lai chuan sakawlh dang a lo lang leh a, keite ṭial ang hi a ni nâ a, a hnungzângah chuan sava thla ang hi thla pali a awm a, lu pali a nei bawk a, thuneihna an pe a." 
Daniel7:7 Ka en reng lai chuan sakawlh palina pawh chu a lo lang a, hlauhawm tak leh râpthlâk tak, awmkhauh tak a ni. Thîr ha lian pui pui a nei ṭeuh mai a, a seh tawh chu a seh sawm a, a chîl nek ṭhîn. Sakawlh dang ang lovin ki sâwm a nei a." 
Daniel7:8 A kite chu ka en reng lai chuan ki tê tak tê pakhat, ki dang zîngah chuan a lo chawr chhuak a, ki pathum lo awm sa chu a tâwn phawng a. Chu ki chuan mihring angin mit a nei a, a uangthuang thei zat zat hle a." 
Daniel7:9 Ka en reng lai chuan: Lalṭhutthlêng an lo hûng a, Tah chuan Hmakhawsânga chu a ṭhu a; A silhfên chu vûr anga vâr a ni a, A sam pawh sahmul vâr ang a ni. A lalṭhutthlêng chu meialh a ni a, A ke tawlailîr pawh mei kâng a ni." 
Daniel7:10 Chuta ta chu mei a lo alh chhuak a, A rawngbâwl tûr mi sâng tam an awm a, A vêlah a sînga sîng têl an ding a, Rorêl chu an ṭan a, Lehkhabute chu an keu ta a." 
Daniel7:11 Ka en reng lai chuan ki tê tak tê kha inchhuang taka a uang ta pâng pâng thâwm chu ka hre zui a. Ka hmuh lai chuan sakawlh palina chu an that a, a ruang chu meiah chuan an vawm lût a, a kâng ral ta." 
Daniel7:12 Sakawlh dangte thuneihna pawh an lâksak a; amaherawhchu, hun eng emaw chên an nun zêl an phalsak a ni." 
Daniel7:13 Zâna ka thil hmuhah chuan hei hi ka hmu bawk: Vân chhûma inthuam hringfa ang tak A lo kal a, Hmakhawsânga lam a pan a, A hnênah chuan an hruai a." 
Daniel7:14 A hnênah chuan lalna te, Ropuina te, ramte an pe a. Tichuan, hnam tin, chi tin, ṭawng tin hmangte chuan Chibai an bûk a, kumkhuain thu a nei ang a, A lalna chu a tâwp ngai lo vang." 
Daniel7:15 Kei, Daniela hi zâna ka thil hmuh chuan min tithlaphâng a, ka buai rilru hle a." 
Daniel7:16 Chûng thil te chu engtihna nge tih min hrilh fiah tûrin chuta ding zînga pakhat chu ka pan a. 
Daniel7:17 Ani chuan, “Hêng sakawlh palite hi leia lalram lo awm tûr palite an ni;" 
Daniel7:18 mahse, Chungnungbera mi thianghlimte chuan ram chu an nei ang a, kumkhuain an nei dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Daniel7:19 Sakawlh palina chungchâng hriat chian lehzual ka duh a, sakawlh dang a ang ve lo, thîr hâ leh dâr tin nei kha a hlauhawm êm êm a. A mante chu a seh sawm a, a chîl nek a, a tiboral ṭhîn." 
Daniel7:20 A lu-a ki sâwm awm chungchâng te, ki dang pakhat lo chawr, ki dang aia hlauhawm tak, mit nei, kâ pawh nei, chapo taka uang thâwng thâwng ṭhîn ki dang pathum rawn tâwn phawngtu chungchângte chu ka hre châk hle a ni." 
Daniel7:21 Ka en reng lai chuan ki chuan mi thianghlimte chu a bei a, a hneh ta mai a." 
Daniel7:22 Hmakhawsânga chu a lo kal a, Chungnungbera mi thianghlimte chu thiam a rawn chantîr a, mi thianghlimte lal hun chu a lo thleng ta a ni." 
Daniel7:23 Sakawlh palina chungchâng hetiang hian min hrilh: “Leiah lalram palina a lo awm ang, A dangte aia danglam a ni, Lei pum pui a hneh ang a, A tichhia ang a, a chîl nek ang." 
Daniel7:24 Ki sâwmte kha chu ram lal tûrte an ni, Lal dang a lo lal ang a, A hmasate ai chuan dang tak a ni ang, Lal pathum chu a hneh ang." 
Daniel7:25 Chungnungbera kalhin thu a sawi ang a, Chungnungbera mi thianghlimte chu a ching chau vang a, An dânte leh kût nite tihdanglamsak a tum ang a, Kum thum leh a chanve chu a thuhnuaiah an awm ang." 
Daniel7:26 Mahse, rorêlna chu ṭan a ni ang a, A lalna chu lâksak a ni ang a, Tihchhiat hlauh a ni ang." 
Daniel7:27 Ram te, lalna te, vân hnuaia a ram ropui takte chu, Chungnungbera mi thianghlimte an pe ang a, Kumkhuain an lal ang a, Leia rorêltu zawng zawngin an rawngbâwlin an thu an awih ang." 
Daniel7:28 Chu chanchin chu heti zawng hi a ni.” Kei Daniela hian ka hlau êm a, ka dâng ta sâwp sâwp a, rilruin ka pai ru ta reng a." 
Daniel8:1 Belsazara lal kum thum kum chuan kei Daniela hian inlârna, a ṭum hnihna chu ka hmu leh a." 
Daniel8:2 Inlârnaah chuan Elam biala awm Susan khawpui chhûngah ka lo awm a. Ulai lui kamah ka lo ding a. 
Daniel8:3 Ka han en chuan ki sei tak pahnih nei berâmchal ka hmu a, pakhat chu a sei zâwk a, a ṭo hnuhnûng zâwk a ni bawk." 
Daniel8:4 Chu berâm chuan khawthlang lam te, hmâr lam te, chhim lamte a phîn ruai a, sa pakhat mah lo cho ngam an awm lo va, a laka invêng him thei rêng an awm hek lo. A duh ang angin a che a, a inhrosa ta vak vak a." 
Daniel8:5 Engtihna nge ni ang tih ka ngaihtuah lai chuan khawthlang lam aṭangin kêlchal, lei pawh rap hman lo khawpa chakin a lo tlân a, a mit inkârah ki pakhat sei zet hi a awm a." 
Daniel8:6 Lui kama berâm ding ka hmuh kha a rawn pan a, a theihtâwpa chakin a rawn phîn a." 
Daniel8:7 Berâm chu a rawn hnaih a, a si ta vak a, a ki pahnih chu a sîk tliahsak a, eng mah a ti thei ta lo va. Berâm chu leiah a si thlu a, a chîl ta nek a. Berâm chu a lak aṭanga chhan chhuak thei tu mah an awm lo." 
Daniel8:8 Kêlchal chu a thâwm a na ta hle a; mahse, a ropui vânglai tak chuan a ki chu a tliak ta a; a aiah ki pali, kâwlkil li kâwk far, sei tak a lo ṭo ta a." 
Daniel8:9 ki pali zînga pakhat aṭang chuan ki tê tak tê hi a lo chawr chhuak a, chhim leh khawchhak lamah a ṭhang uak uak a, ram ropui lamah chuan a ṭhang a." 
Daniel8:10 Vâna mipuite tluk a tum a, chûng zînga mi leh arsi ṭhenkhat chu leiah a paih a, a chîl nek a." 
Daniel8:11 Vân mipuite hotupa tlukin a intiropui a, hâlral thilhlan, eng lai pawha an hlan ṭhin chu a tihtâwpsak a, Hmun Thianghlim pawh chu a tichhe bawk a." 
Daniel8:12 An bawhchhiatna avângin mite chuan thilhlan an hlan reng ṭhin chu an bânsan a, thutak chu leiah an paih thal dêr a, ki chuan a duh duhin thil a ti ta a." 
Daniel8:13 Vântirhkoh pakhat ṭawng ka hria a, vântirhkoh dangin a hnênah, “Inlârnaa thil hmuh hi eng chen daih tûr nge, thilhlan an hlan ziah ṭhin chu eng chen nge bawhchhiatna râpthlâk tak chuan a lan ang? Eng chen nge Hmun Thianghlim leh ram ropui ber chu duh duha an sawisak ang?” a ti a." 
Daniel8:14 Pakhat zâwk chuan a chhâng a, “Zîng leh tlai tina thilhlan an hlan ṭhin chu ṭum sânghnih leh zathum an hlân lo vang. Chumi hnuah Hmun Thianghlim chuan ngai a awh leh ang,” a ti a." 
Daniel8:15 Kei, Daniela hian chûng ka thil hmuh awmzia chu hriat ka duh a. Mihring ni âwm tak ka hmaah a lo ding a." 
Daniel8:16 Ulai lui kam lehlam aṭang chuan mi pakhat aw ka hria a, “Gabriel, a thil hmuh kha hrilh fiahsak rawh,” a ti a." 
Daniel8:17 Ka dinna bulah a lo kal a, ka hlau êm a, ka tlu bawkkhup ta a. “Mihring fapa, i thil hmuh kha khawvêl tâwp hun tûr entîrna a ni tih hre rawh,” mi ti a." 
Daniel8:18 Thu a sawi lai chuan eng mah hre lovin leiah ka tlu bawkkhup a; mahse, mi rawn chelh a, mi dintîr a." 
Daniel8:19 “Thinurna a lo thlen hun tûr ka hrilh dâwn che a ni, i thil hmuh hi khawvêl tâwp hun tûr thil a ni." 
Daniel8:20 Ki pahnih nei berâmchal i hmuh kha Media leh Persia lal entîrna a ni. 
Daniel8:21 Kêlchal hmul thum kha Grik lal entîrna a ni, a mit inkâra ki sei tak kha an lal hmasa ber entîrna a ni." 
Daniel8:22 Ki tliak ta aiawh tûra ki pali lo chawr khân Grik ram hmun li-a inṭhen tûr a entîr a; amaherawhchu, lal hmasa ber ang khân an chak lo vang." 
Daniel8:23 “Chûng ram lalte an tlâwm dâwn hunah, An sual vâwrtâwp thlen dâwnin Râl rêl thiam tak a lo kal ang." 
Daniel8:24 Thil a tithei hle dâwn a, Engkim a tichhe rem rum ang. A tih apiangah a hlawhtling ang a, Hnam tam tak a tichhia ang a, Hmun Thianghlim chungah pawh a che ang." 
Daniel8:25 A fin a kherek êm êm a, vervêk taka a thiltihte a hlawhtling zêl a, A inngairopui hle ang a, Inring hman lote a bei ang a, a tichhia ang, Hotute hotu meuh pawh a cho vang." 
Daniel8:26 “Zîng leh tlai tin thilhlan an hlan ṭhin chungchâng inlârna i hmuh kha a lo thleng ngei ang a; amaherawhchu, i thil hmuh hi i zêp tlat tûr a ni, rei tak hnua lo thleng chauh tûr a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Daniel8:27 Kei, Daniela hi ka chau dêr a, ni eng emaw zât chu ka dam lo va. Ka thawh peih hnu chuan lal hna chu ka thawk zui leh ta zêl a; mahse, ka thil hmuh avâng chuan ka bo map a, a ngaihna rêng ka hre lo." 
Daniel9:1 Media mi Daria, Ahasuera fapa chu, Babulon ram lal a ni a." 
Daniel9:2 A lal kum khatnaah chuan, kei Daniela hian, lehkhabu chu ngun takin ka chhiar a; kum sawmsarih chhûng Jerusalem khua a ram tûr thu Lalpa zâwlnei Jeremian a hrilh lâwk chungchâng kha ka ngaihtuah a." 
Daniel9:3 Chaw ngheia saiip puan sin chungin vaivutah ka ṭhu a, Lalpa Pathian hnênah ṭhahnemngai takin ka ṭawngṭai a." 
Daniel9:4 Lalpa, ka Pathian hnênah chuan ka ṭawngṭai a; ka mite thil sual tih avângin thupha ka chawi a. “ Lalpa Pathian, i ropui a, kan chawimawi a che. I thuthlungah i rinawm a, nangmah ngainaa i thupêk zâwmtute chu i lainat reng a." 
Daniel9:5 Kan sual a, kan ṭha lo va, thil dik lo kan ti a, i thupêk leh i dânte kan hawisan a." 
Daniel9:6 Kan lal te, kan hotu te, kan pa te leh hnam pum hnêna i chhiahhlawh i zâwlneiten i hminga thu an sawi chu kan ngaithla duh lo va." 
Daniel9:7 Lalpa, nang chuan dik takin thil i ti ṭhîn a, keini zawngin mahni kan intimualpho ta a nih hi; Judai rama la awm te, Jerusalema awm te, an sual vânga ram tin ram tanga i tihdarh Israel-te nên angkhat vek kan ni." 
Daniel9:8 Kan lalte, kan hotute leh kan pate chu zahpuiawm takin an khawsa a; Lalpa i chungah thil sual an ti a." 
Daniel9:9 Lalpa ka Pathian, nang chuan ngil i nei a, i lakah hel ṭhîn mah ila min ngaidam ṭhîn." 
Daniel9:10 Kan Pathian, Lalpa aw chu kan hre duh lo va, a chhiahhlawh, a zâwlneite hmanga kan tân Dân a siam chu kan zâwm duh hek lo." 
Daniel9:11 I aw hre duh lovin Israel mi zawng zawngin i Dân an bawhchhia a, an pênsan ta che. Kan sual avângin i chhiahhlawh Mosia Dân bu-a ziak ânchhiate, hming chhâl meuhva thil ṭha lo thlentîr i tiamte kha kan chungah i rawn thlentîr ta a ni." 
Daniel9:12 Keini leh kan rorêltute chungah, ‘thil ṭha lo ka ti ang,’ i tih chu i rawn ti ta a, Jerusalem phei chu a tluka nâa i sawisak vân hnuaiah a awm lo." 
Daniel9:13 Mosia Dân bu-a ziak thil ṭha lo zawng zawng kan chungah a tla nâ a, kan sualte simin kan Pathian, Lalpa lam kan hawi duh lo va, thu dik pawisain a khawngaihna kan dîl duh hek lo." 
Daniel9:14 “Chuvâng alâwm, hremna i lo buatsaih diam tawh chu kan chungah a lo thlen tâk ni. Kan Pathian, Lalpa chuan engkim dik takin a ti ṭhîn a, keini erawh chuan a thu kan awih ngai lo va ni." 
Daniel9:15 “Aw Lalpa ka Pathian, i thiltihtheihzia tihlan nân i mite chu Aigupta ram aṭangin i hruai chhuak a, tûn thlengin hming i chher a. Keinin thil sual kan ti a, kan tidik lo a ni e." 
Daniel9:16 Aw Lalpa dik taka thil i tih ṭhin avângin khawngaih takin Jerusalem chunga i thinurna leh i thinrimna chu la kiang tawh ta che; i khawpui, i tlâng thianghlim Jerusalem chu, kan sual leh kan pate bawhchhiatna avângin kan vêla awmte chuan kamchhe tleuh nân tak an hmang ta si a." 
Daniel9:17 Chuvângin, aw kan Pathian, i chhiahhlawh ṭawngṭaina leh dîlna hi lo ngaithla la, i hming ropui nân i hmun thianghlim chim chhe tawh chungah hian i duhsakna hmêl han tilang teh." 
Daniel9:18 Aw Pathian, i beng lo chhi la, ngaithla teh; kan chauh tâkzia leh i hming chawi khawpui chhiat hnehzia hi en teh mah; kan dik vânga chutia ngên che kan ni lo, ngil i neih êm avânga ngên che kan ni." 
Daniel9:19 Aw Lalpa, ngaithla teh, Aw Lalpa, min ngaidam rawh; Aw Lalpa, ngaihven la, lo che vat teh. I hming ropui nân, aw ka Pathian, i hming chawi khawpui leh i mite avângin muangchâng lul suh,” a ti a." 
Daniel9:20 Ka sual leh ka mi Israel-te sual thupha chawiin ka ṭawngṭai zêl a, ka Pathian, Lalpa hnênah a tlâng thianghlim din thar leh tûrin ka ngên a." 
Daniel9:21 Chutia ka ṭawngṭai lai mêk chuan inlârna hmasaa ka hmuh tawh, Gabriela kha, tlai lam thilhlan hun vêlah chak zetin a lo thlâwk a." 
Daniel9:22 A lo thlen chuan, “Daniel, i thinlung mit tivâr tûra lo kal ka ni." 
Daniel9:23 Pathian hnêna i ṭawngṭai tirh aṭang khân, ani chuan a hmangaih êm êm che a, a chhâng nghâl che a ni; a chhânna chu ka rawn hrilh dâwn che a ni. Chuvângin, a chhânna hi ngaithla ngun la, i thil hmuh chu ka han hrilh fiah ang e." 
Daniel9:24 “Sual leh bawhchhiatna ata i mite leh in khawpui thianghlim chhan chhuah nân hapta sawmsarih ruat a ni; sual ngaihdam a ni ang a, kumkhuain dik taka thil tih a ni tawh ang. Inlârna leh hrilhlâwkna chu a lo thleng kim tawh ang a, Hmun Thianghlim chu then fai a ni ang." 
Daniel9:25 Hei hi chhinchhiah la, hre chiang rawh: Jerusalem din leh tûra thupêk a nih aṭangin Pathian Hriakthiha a lo lan hma chu hapta sarih a ral ang a, Jerusalem chu din thar leh a ni ang a, kawtthlêrte leh kulh bang nghet takte an siam ang. Chu chu hapta sawmruk leh pahnih a ding ang; mahse, an buai hle ang." 
Daniel9:26 Chumi hnu chuan Pathian Hriakthiha chu eng khaw lawilovah an that ang. Tin, lal thunei tak sipaite lo lian chuan Jerusalem leh Hmun Thianghlim chu an rawn tichhia ang. Tâwpna chu tui lian ang a ni ang, Pathianin a buatsaih indona leh chhiatna chu a lo thleng dâwn a ni." 
Daniel9:27 Chu lal chuan mite nên hapta khat chhûng tân thu a thlung ang a, hapta chanve a ral hnu chuan inthawina leh thilhlan an hlan ṭhin chu a titâwp ang. Tenawm râpthlâk chu Tempul hmun sâng berah a dah ang; a dahtu chu Pathianin a chhiatna tûr a ruatsak ang a, a chhiat hma chu tah chuan a awm ang.”" 
Daniel10:1 Persia rama Kura lal a nih kum thumnaah chuan Daniela, Beltesazara an tih bawk hnênah thu a lo thleng a. Thu chu a rinawm a; mahse, hriat fuh har tak a ni; amaherawhchu, inlârnaah hrilh fiahsak a ni." 
Daniel10:2 Chutih lai chuan kei Daniela hi, lusûn angin chawlhkâr thum chhûng ka awm a." 
Daniel10:3 Chaw tuihnai leh sa pawh ka ei lo va, uain pawh ka in hek lo. Kâr thum chhûng chu sahriak pawh ka thih lo." 
Daniel10:4 Thla hmasa ber, ni sawmhnih leh pali ni chuan Tigris luipui kamah chuan ka ding a." 
Daniel10:5 Ka han dâk a, ka han en chuan puan zai sîna inthuam mi pakhat ka hmu a, Upaz rangkachaka siam kâwnghrên a hrêng a." 
Daniel10:6 A taksa chu berûl lung tle ang a ni a, a hmêl chu kâwlphe ang a ni. A mit chu meichher êng tak ang hi a ni, a bân te leh a ke te chu dâr nawh tlêt ang a ni, a aw chu mipui nasa tak thâwm ang a ni." 
Daniel10:7 Kei, Daniela, keimah chauh hian a ni, chu inlârna hmu chu; ka bula awmte chuan eng mah an hmu ve lo; mahse, an hlau êm êm a, an khûr zawih zawih a, an biru bo ta a." 
Daniel10:8 Keimah chauhvin ka awm ta a, inlârna ropui tak chu ka han hmuh chuan ka chau ta hnêp a, ka hmêlte pawh tu ma hriat theih loh khawpin a danglam ta a." 
Daniel10:9 A aw ka han hriat chuan eng mah hre lovin leiah ka tlu a, ka bawkkhup reng a." 
Daniel10:10 Kutin min rawn chelh a, bawkvâk tûr angin min dah a, ka la khûr zawih zawih zêl a." 
Daniel10:11 Ka hnênah, “Daniel, Pathian mi ngainat i ni, ka thu hrilh che hi ngun takin ngaithla rawh; ding char la, i hnêna thu sawi tûra tirh ka nih hi,” a ti a. Mi biak hnu chuan ka ding thei ta a, ka la khûr ta fo va." 
Daniel10:12 Ka hnênah, “Daniel, hlau suh, thil hriatthiamna i neih theih nân inngaitlâwm taka i awm ṭan ni aṭang tawh khân i ṭawngṭaina chu Pathianin a ngaithla a. I ṭawngṭaina chhâng tûrin ka lo kal a ni." 
Daniel10:13 “Persia ram hotupa chuan ni sawmhnih leh pakhat chhûng chu min dodâl a; mahse, vântirhkoh hotu Mikaela chu mi pui tûrin a lo kal a, keimah chauhva Persia ram hotupa bei ka ni si a." 
Daniel10:14 Nakina i mite chunga thil lo thleng tûr ka rawn hrilh dâwn che a ni, i inlârna hmuh kha hun rei tak hnua thil lo awm tûr chauh a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Daniel10:15 Chutia a ṭawng hnu chuan ṭawng thei lovin lei chu ka bih ta reng a. 
Daniel10:16 Mihring ang hi a lo kal a, ka hmui a rawn dek a, chutah ka âng a, ka ṭawng thei ta a. Ka hmaa ding hnênah chuan, “Ka pu, inlârna avângin ka chau hnêp a, ka khûr reh thei lo va ni." 
Daniel10:17 Engtin nge i chhiahhlawh hi a pu hmaah hian ka ṭawng theih ang? Tha rêng ka nei ta lo va, thâwk pawh ka thaw hlei thei lo,” ka ti a." 
Daniel10:18 Mihring ang khân mi khawih leh a, tha thar min pe ta a, “Nang, Pathian ngainat mihring, hlau suh, thlamuang takin awm rawh, insangmar la, intihuai rawh,” a ti a." 
Daniel10:19 Chutia min biak hnu chuan ka lo chak leh ta a, “Mi tichak ta si a, ka pu, thu chu sawi ta che,” ka ti a." 
Daniel10:20 “I chunga thil ka tih kha i hrethiam em? Tûnah hian Persia ram hotupa bei tûrin ka kal rih dâwn a ni. Ka tihtlâwm hunah Grik ram lal a lo thawk ang. Thutak Lehkhabua ziak chu ka la hrilh fiahsak ang che. 
Daniel10:21 Hêng mite ka beihnaa ka lama ṭang chu in hotupa, Mikaela chauh kha a ni." 
Daniel11:1 “Media mi Daria a lal kum khat kum khân kei hi ka inrawlh ve a, ka tichak ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Daniel11:2 “Tûnah thu dik ka hrilh dâwn che hi. Persia ramah mi pathum indawtin an lo lal ang a, a palina chu a hausa fâl bîk ang; a hausak avânga a chak viau tâk hnu chuan Grik ram chu a cho vang." 
Daniel11:3 Chu ramah chuan lal huai tak a lo lal ang a, ram zau tak a nei ang, a duh duhin a che vêl ang." 
Daniel11:4 A lal vânglai tak chuan a ram chu a darh ang a, hmun li-a ṭhen a ni ang. Ama thlah ni lo, lal dang, a aiah an lal ang a; mahse, ani tluka chak tu mah an awm lo vang." 
Daniel11:5 “Chhim lam ram, Aigupta lal chu a chak hle ang a; mahse, lal pakhat dang kha a chak zâwk ang, a ram pawh a zau zâwk ang." 
Daniel11:6 Kum eng emaw zât hnu chuan Aigupta lal chuan hmâr lam ram, Suria lal chu ṭhianah a siam ang a, nupuiah a fanu a neihtîr ang. Mahse, an inṭhian rei lo vang, a fanu chu a pasal nên, a fa leh a chhiahhlawh chhawmte nên an that vek ang." 
Daniel11:7 Chûng hnu chuan chu nu unau pakhat chu a lo kal ang a, Suria lal sipaite chu a bei ang. An kulhah a luhkhung ang a, a titlâwm ang." 
Daniel11:8 An milim pathiante leh rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam bungbêl, an pathian tâna an siamte chu a ram Aigupta ramah chuan a hâwnpui ang. Rei fe chhûng chu Suria ram chu a bei leh lo vang." 
Daniel11:9 Suria lal chuan Aigupta ram chu rûn a tum ang a; mahse, an lo hnawt kîr ang." 
Daniel11:10 “Suria lal fapa chuan Aigupta chu rûn tûrin sipai a la ṭeuh vang a; tui lian ang maiin an lian ang a, an kulh pakhat chu an hualsak ang." 
Daniel11:11 Aigupta lal thin chu a rim ang a, Suria ram lal chu a bei lêt ang a, a sipaite chu a mansak ṭeuh vang." 
Daniel11:12 A chak zâwk avâng leh sipai tam tak a thahsak avângin a inchhuang ta hle a; mahse, a chak zâwk reng dâwn lo." 
Daniel11:13 “Suria lal chuan a hma aia tam sipai a la leh ṭeuh vang a, hun remchângah sipai tam tak leh râlthuam tam deuh nên a thawk leh ang." 
Daniel11:14 Aigupta ram lal lakah mi tam tak an hel ang, inlârna an hmuh tihhlawhtlin tumin i mite zînga mi kawlhsen ṭhenkhat pawh an hel ang a; mahse, an tlâwm mai ang." 
Daniel11:15 Suria lal chu a lo lian ang a, an kulh chu a rawn hual ang a, a man ang; Aigupta sipaite chu an chechâng ngam lo vang, an zînga huai berte pawh chu an dawl vek dâwn a ni." 
Daniel11:16 Suria ram aṭanga rawn rûntu chuan a duh duhin a sawisa ang, khak ngam rêng an awm lo vang. Ram ropui berah pawh chuan a ding ang a, a thuhnuaiah a awmtîr ang." 
Daniel11:17 “Suria lal chuan a sipai rualte nên ram dang rûn a tum rilru leh a. A hmêlmapa ram a tihchhiatsak theih nân ṭhiana siam a tum ang a, nupui atân a fanu pêk a tum ang a; mahse, a hlawhtling lo vang." 
Daniel11:18 Chumi hnu chuan tuifinriat kama awmte chu a bei ang a, tam tak chu a hneh ang; mahse, lal pakhatin a lo hneh ang a, chapo hle mah se a titlâwm ang a, a chapona chu a chungah a lêt dâwn a ni." 
Daniel11:19 Ama ramah, a kulhah ngei hâwn leh a tum ang a; mahse, an that ang; chu chu a tâwpna tûr chu a ni." 
Daniel11:20 “Chu lal aiah chuan mi pakhat a lo lal ang a, chu mi chuan a ram a lo hausak theih nân chhiah chawi luihtîr tûrin hotute a tîr chhuak ang a. Rei lo têah chu lal chu indonaah ni lovin arte thihin a thi ang." 
Daniel11:21 “A aiah mi sual deuh pakhat a lo lal dâwn, dân anga lallukhum khumtîr pawh a ni lo vang; fin vervêk thawhin a lo lal thut mai dâwn a ni." 
Daniel11:22 Amah kalhtu tawh phawt chu, thuthlung hotupa meuh pawh ni se a hrût nek ang a, a lên bo vang." 
Daniel11:23 Inṭhianna thu thlunpuiin hnam dangte chu a bum ang a, ram zîm têa lal ni mah se a chak tial tial ang." 
Daniel11:24 Ram bung hausa lai laite chu an inrin loh laiin a rûn thut thut ang a, a pi leh pute tih duh ngai loh chu a ti ṭhîn ang. A râllâk te, a rawk sum te chu amah zuitute a sem bawk ṭhîn ang. Kulh nei khaw dangte pawh beih a tum zêl ang a; mahse, a hun a ral thuai ang." 
Daniel11:25 “Aigupta ram lal bei tûrin a insiam chak a, huai takin sipai tam tak a hruai a; mahse, ani chuan sipai tam zet chak tak nên a lo bei lêt ang; amaherawhchu, an phiarrûkna avângin Aigupta lal chuan a ngam lo vang." 
Daniel11:26 Ama mi, a chawhlui kîlpui ṭhinte ngei chu amah tichhetu an ni ang; a sipai tam tak chu an thi bawk ang a, an darh zo vang."
